text: [ ] very Cold. at home.
[ ] morn g , cloudy aftern [ ]. I was at home all Day. hannah [w ].
A very Rainy Day. we Baked a [B ] Isaac Savage. I was at home all Day.
A clear, pleasant Day. I was at home [ ]. Hannah went to mr Ingerhams with [ ] Hannah Crage & Tarried at Crages all night.
A clear col d morn g , aftern n Cloudy [ ]. made mince pies. up late to take [t ].
A clear pleasant Day, y e Evening [ ]. I helpt Hannah Barton do the kitchin work. at Home all Day. Drest John Forbys fingers.
A Snow [Fell]. I was at home. mr Ballard returnd from westward.
[ ] Clear, Cold Day. at home [ ].
[ ] went to mr Westons [ ].
[ ] Snowd aftrn. at home. [ ] had 34 lb [ ].
[ ] I was at home all day. [ ].
[ ] Cold Day. Capt Savage [ ] [ ] unwell. at home
[ ] pleas t Day. at home [ ]. Jon a here & Dind with us.

] [ ] was unwell in y e foren n . [ ] Dind here. I was calld at 11 oclok to mr Tolmans, a fatagueing Ride; accompanied by [ ] Tolman to the Fort,from thence by Asa Williams. found mrs Tolman Deliv d of a fine son, but before I left, put her to Bed Safely [ ].
[ ] Cold Day. Returnd from Tolmans attended by mr Ingerham who Dind with us.
[ ]elect gentlem n here, we [ ] all Day [ ].
A fine Day, Cloudy Evn g , wind at [ ]. Old Lady Boltn, mrs Forbes & Peggy Dind here. I was at home all Day.
Cloudy Morn, very pleasant after n . Selectmen Colo l North & Lady, Capt Cox & Lady & mrs H. Cox here at Even g . I had ye Collic, Got Relief a Little af t one in ye morn; Rested Some this [ ].
A very fine mor n . Snowd after n . I was very unwell all Day & night with my Collick Disorder.
A Chilly air, not very Cold. mr & mrs Weston here. Augustus Ballard Came for Salv for his toe, frose; tarries tonight. I am Some more Comfortable.
A Cloudy forenoon, Cold, Snow Storm aft n & Even g . Agust s Ballard here. I made Burn Salve, 5 lb.
Sunday. A Cold Day. it Snowd, wind at NE. Eph m Cowen unwell. I was at home all Day.
A Clear Day. mr Weston & Lady here.[ ] I was at home all this Day.
A Clear Day. at home. Hannah went to mr Westons at Even g . mr Ballard Got hand irons [ ].
A Snow fell. I was at home all day. mr Forbes made a coat [ ] for mr Ballard.
[ ]. mr Ben n Brown & wife here. August s Ballard went from here. I finisht Cyrus Stockins. at home.
A clear Day. I was unwell all Day. was calld to Nathan Tilars at 11 at Eving.
At N. Tilars. Clear Day, Snowd at night.
Sund. a fine Day, my Birth Day; fifty [years] old. was at Tilars, Mrs Tilar unwell.
At Tilars. A snowy Day. feel unwell. Ruth Moore helpt mrs Tilar Do her work.
Birth, Floid child, Dafter X. Mr Benm n Branard Conducted me from Tilars To mr Floids. I put mrs Fl d to Bed with a Dafter at 9 oClok Even g . fee Recivd.

Cloudy. Came from Floids about Day Br k , Left her Comfortable. Received my fee. mr Floid Breakfasted here. Cyrus & Hannah Set out for Sebastac k . I Slept ye afternorne, feele Better. moon full this D y 11 h 1 m aftern.
Clear & pleas t . mrs Foster here mend g my quilt. I Bakt & Brewd, am much Better as to health than I have Been this 2 months. Hannah & Cyrus Gone to Mr Towns.
A Snow Storm. Crage & Cowen Swingled Flax. I Tried my hogs Lard & partly made my pockits. Cyrus & Hannah not returnd.
Snowd in ye morn, Clear ye middle of ye Day, and Cold. I did house work.
Sunday. A Clear Day. Cyrus & Hannah Gone yett.
Clear. Cyrus & Hannah Returnd. Lucy & her youngs Child came with them.
Clear. Cyrus went home with mr Bullins Sleigh. Brought News of mr PresCoths hous being Burnt.

X Birth. Bolt n child, a Daft r . Clear. Presc t to Breakfast here. I was Calld to Savage Boltons, Put his wife to Bed with a Dafter at 5 h after n . Came home at Evin g . mrs Williams & mrs Foster have bin here. James Cowan & Biah Town tarrie here y s Night.
Clear. Cate Coole here. Lucy & Hannah went to mr Crages. mr Bullin Left his Sleigh here.
Clear. Jon a , Lucy & I went to mr Bullins. Jon a & Lucy went as far as M c Causlands. Mr Bullin & Jesse Supt here. mrs Bolton & mr Chamberlin [left here].
Clear Morn. mrs Wing, Suelle & Gersh m Cox came here, Dind & Drank Tea. Poll Savage to Tea. Isaac Savage Dind. it Began to Snow at 1 oClok. Lucy & hannah went to Brookss, Dolly to Esq r Howards.
A Storm of Snow; Cold for march. Jo no br t hay from Doct r Coneys. ye Storm Contin s . I was at home all Day.
B Clear. mr Ballard & I & Daughter Town went to m r Westons & mr Pollards at Evening.
Clear & pleas t . I went to mr Westons; walkd.
B Clear & ples t . mr Pollard, Isaac Savage & Polly here. Enformd y t Jon o Wimans wife Deceasd Last Eving.

Clear & Pleas t . Biah Town, Betsy, mrs Stackpole & Sally Dind here. Betsy Thommas here Afternoon. Jon o & Carp t Winslow here & Supt. Lucy & I went to Col o Norths with mr s Stp l . mrs Comings & mrs Suole there.
Clear morn, raind a little after n . I finishd making Soap. was at home all Day. Polly Savage here.
thee ice went out of the river, Backd the water up to the Lower flour of y e Grist mill. y e Jamm remoovd about Six O clok. Theop s & Cyrus Tendid Saw mill till three in morn.
Clear, windy. Cap ts Howard & Smith Came up to mr Pollards Eddy. I was at home all Day. mr Blackman & Sister here from y e Westward.

Birth. Welmans child. X Dat r . XX Calld about Day to go to mr Wellmans. Eph m Cowen went with us as far as ye plain beyond Esqr Howards Bridge, where we mett a mesage Enforming ye woman was got Safe to Bed. turnd about & Returnd home. I had two falls; one on my way there, ye other on my Return. Ye Storm Continues yet; the snow is Levil with y e top of the lower Pain of glass of our north window. I travild Some Rods in the snow where it was almost as high as my waist. Stopt at mr Suels & warmd. Cowen got Col o Howards Sleigh & brought me from mr Suels. Got home at 8 o Clock.

Clear. I went to Doct r Coney s By water with Cyrus. paid y e Doct rs Bill for my Sickness Last Decembr which was 9:6. On our return were obliged to Call mr Mc masters ascistance to get by y e rock. I Calld at mr westons; found her very ill. tar d all night.
Clear. was at mr Westons. his Sloop Came up. his wife rode out, is more Comfortable. mr Ballard & I went on Bord Cap t Smith, Bought Some [flan l ], returnd home. Son Town tard here.

Birth. Tylars son. XX Clear & pleas t . Brother Town Dind here. Enformd that his Daug t Hannah has had ye Collik. mrs Foster here; Drank Tea. James Cowen here. James Moore Came to Conduct me to Nath n Tylars. I arivd about Sun sett. put mrs Tylar to Bed with a Son at 8 [oc] in Evin g . I tarr d all night.
I was at home all Day. mr Thomas here. I was making Soap.
Cloudy & Chilly. I was at home. Capt Nichols & Reubin Moore Drank Tea here. mr Williams tard all night. Polly Savage here; brought yarn.
B Cloud. I was at home. mr Williams went away from here this morn. Collins Moore, mr Davis & Tho s Mc keckny here. Polly Savage here; Drank Chocolat.

B was Calld at a little past 12 in morn by mr Edson, to go to his wife being in travil. walkt to ye Brok over thee point; was Drawn by Edson & Wm Canady on a Slead. the river Dangers But arived Safe through Divine protection.
B Clear & Pleasant. Mr Savage & Polly here. I was at home all Day. Mehitable Pollard was married this Day.

B Clear & pleast. Returnd From Tylars. Poll Savage here. Enformd me of ye Death of Ben n Browns Daft, Nabby. mr Burn & his Brt r Jesse & Hann h Crage, [Talk] North off [ ] here. Jon a Retr d from Sebestac k ; all well there.

Clear. mrs Forbes here to Bake. Peggy & Babe with h r . I attended Funeral of Ben n Browns Daft r , Nabby, who Deceas t 19 th inst, being 4 years & 1 Day old. mr Bal d met Select Gent m at Isaac Clearks.

Birth. Edsons chilDren. two Sons. X At 4 & 20 in morn, mrs Edson was Deliverd of a Son which waid 7 1/2 lb and at 6 & 5 minnits of another Son which wd 8 3/4 lb. Left her at about 10, mr Ballard Coming there at that time. Enformd of ye Death of our Grand Son John Town, who Last thursday morn Drank So much spirit that Causd his Death which hapend yester Day at 8 in the morn. On my return from mr Edsons, mrs Weston Cald me in, Nathan Being Sick. I tarried with her this night. Left ye Child much Better.
Clear. Hannah & Dolly washd & Scourd. Old mr Whealer here & Dind. mr Ballard Gone to Settle w t mr Gardner, Pirkins & Moore for Building y r Mill. I weighd y e pork; wt 205 lb.
Clear Morn, Cloudy after n . Hannah washd. Dolly workd in y e Gardin & went to Savage Boltons for Currant bushes. I was at home all Day. finnish d a pair of tow hoes.
Clear. Daughter Town went home. mr Ballard went To Doc t Coneys on Publik Buisness. I was at home all day, Doubled Cyrus s Cott n yarn. finisht my [ ].
Clear part of y e Day, Snowd at night. I combd flax. was very unwell at night.
Mrs Foster here; Dind. I was at home all Day. Jonathan hurt his foot with a Slab. mr Bullins Barn Burnt yesterd y at 11 O Clok in morn.

Clear. I went onto y e gardin to plant peppers. Eph m Came in, Complaind of pain in his bowels, had a very ill turn. I set out some roots after n . Hannah & Dolly went to mr Crages. mr Ballard went to mr Fauts for Seed Corn.
Snowd. I was makeing lee for soap. at home all Day. mr Savage returnd w H our hors from Car ng his Sist r home. Polly Savag here for medecin for hannah. I Sent Some Allowotic tincture.
Clear. mrs Gardy went from here to Colo n Norths. Hannah & Polly Hamblin went with her. I was very unwell; at home all Day. mr Twing brought mr Ballards Breachs.
Snowd all day. mr Ballard gone to Bumb r Hook mak ng Raits. I was at home all Day. Poll Savg here. I finsht my Self a pair hoes & Sowd up a Sheet.

Clear and Cold for April. I Came home from mr Westons. Cald at mr Pollards. Jon o is gone to Son Towns to attend funeral of their Son. I went to Bed but, thinking of my Childrens trouble, Could not compose to Sleep. At 11 Oclok Ev n , Wood d Allin Cald me up. went by Land to Col o Norths; very bad walking. we car d a candle to y e top of Burnt hill. between 12 & 1 arivd at Allins but I was much fataugd.
Clear. Mr Straten & Hayward Brought y r Logs. I was at home all Day. W m Cowens wife here.

Clear. mrs Foster work d for me. Mr Forbes & Peggy & mr Kenady Drank Tea here. Georg Boltons wife here. David Pollards Loggs Brought into y e Brook y s Day. This Day mr Ballard is Sixty years old. I was at home.
Clear. I went to mr Savages to see Hannah. We killd our Calf & Baked & Churnd.
Snowd. mr Ballard brought home a yoak of oxen which he Brought of Moses White. I was at home all day. Hannah twist d Cyruss yarn.
Snowd & raind. mr Canady & Church here Getting logs into the Brook.
at home. mr & mrs Forbes, Peggy & Pol y Savage Drank Tea here. mr Ballard Gone to Col o Howards mill to Repair it. hannah movd her Bed up Chamber.
Clear. mrs Weston Rode as far as here. mr s Foster & Billy here & mrs Woodward. James Cowen tarried here all night. I was at home all Day.

B Clear. I was Cald to mr Suels to See his wife; found her very unwell but Left her more comfortable about the middle of the Day. found Sister Williams & Doct r Barton here. I was calld to Dan l Boltons; She being poorly.
I am at mr Towns. mrs Stagpool Came to See us. I went to y e river with her; mist my way returning home. mr Lewis & Betsy Town went to seek me. at length I found y e way home, though Some fatagd.
Clear & warm part of ye Day; raind after noon. Jon o & Cowan Gone to attend funeral of Eben z Taylor who departed this life yesterday. I was at home y s day.

B Clear. I attended funeral of old mr Thorn. Cap t Fillbrook made a prayer on the ocasion. The Corps were Carried by water to [ ] & there interd. I returnd from grave with Esq. Pettee & mrs Craggin. Leut Browns Lady went to Son Towns. mr Dexter & Capt Hale & Lady there. Betsy went to y e Grave to attend funeral mr Thorn. mrs Collar was Deliv d Last night of a dead Child.
At Boltons. made a pair of Trouses for Jimmy.
Clear morn. mrs Brewer & Polly Fouler here. at Son Towns all Day. rain & thunder aftern.
B Snow y morn, the trees much Loaded. raind after noon. mr Ballard went to Thomas Sewils to hear mr Kinsman Speak At eving. mr Savage Supt here. I was at home all day.
Clear & hott. I was at home all Day Collecting herbs. hannah Combd Flax, Dolly rode hors to plough. Sheribiah Town Breakfasted here.
Clear, Cold & Blustring. mr Ballard gan to ye Hook.

X Birth. Wd. Allins Daftr. XX Clear. Mrs Allin Deliverd of a Dafter at 4 this morn. I returnd home at 11 O Clock. Receivd 6 Shillings of Woodward Allin in part for fee & medicin which Shee had of me. I took a knap of Sleep ys afternoon. mr Woodward here. mr forbes made a pres t of a Calfs head. Jon o Returnd from Towns.
Clear. Town meeting. I Combd Flax after noone. at home all Day.
Clear. I went to mr woodwards, Elliss & Dan l Boltons. Betsy Chever here.
Clear. mrs Bisby & Polly & Hannah Crage here. I receivd a line from Daughter Town & Rote an answere which I finished at 11 O Clok this Evin g . I was at home all Day.
Cloudy morn, Clear aftr n . mr Forbes & John here, made Eph ms Coat & waist Coat. Hannah washt. I was at home all Day.

Clear & Cool for April. I was unwell, had taken Cold which Causd a pain in my Neck and Sholder. Col o Howard, mr Brooks & Do ct Colman here. Enformd of y e Death of Leut t Howard who Departed this Life yesterday.
Clear. mr Ballard gone to Ditoes. John Pinkam here for herbs for his Child thats unwell. the ice runs in the river this Day. mr Forbes here, made me a pres t of a Ladle. I was at home all day.
It raind. mr Hamlin arivd here from y e westward. I made Some Butter. was at home y s Day.
mrs Town & I went to mr Stratens. Colo l Brewer & Lady at mr Towns Dore. we had a Shower. mr Stratens Boy Sett us over y e river. mr Town is gone to Cobecy.
I went with mrs Town to See mrs Dexter. mrs Straten there.
B Polly went home, y e Girls went with her attend d by Cyrus. I was at home all Day.
B I went with Son & Dafter Town to mr Stackpools.
Snowd allmost all Day. mr Ballard attend d Town meeting. I finnished one of Cyruss cotten hoes. was at home y s Day.
I went with mrs Straten & mr Town to Cap t Haywards.
At home all Day. y e Girls Washd.
I was at mr Edsons, Carried warp [ ] Cyrus s . Calld at mr Pollards.
Came from Boltons & went mr EdSons to Carry my web to weave. was at mr Westons.
Clear. I went to See mrs Collar. mr Dexter & Straten there. Daughter Town unwell at Eving.
Cloudy. I went to mr Westons to See Polly Adams, She being Lame. Cald at mr Pollards; Drank Tea. We killd a veall, I drest y e head & feet at Evening.
Cloar & Cold. mr Ballard Returnd home to night. I have been Some unwell to Day.
Clear & very Cold for Ap l . I was at home. Let John Sahaw have 1 oz of salve; prs Eight pence.
Clear. I was at home. Com d flax. ye e Gerls Brewd.
Clear. I went to mr Westons & other Neighbors. finnishd a pair of Tow hoes.

Clear & hott, a Shower after noone. I was at home all Day. mr Ballard Bought 1/2 a Barl of Pork & a Tea Kettle. it Thunders tonight. I had news of Brother Moores Saw mill being Consumed by fire, also near 70 thousand of good Boards belonging to Georg Brown.
Clear & Cold. mrs Foster here. I was at home all Day. Col o North, mr Brooks & mr Ballard Layn g out Road.

[mr] Turner & wf at mr westons. Clear & warm. mr Ballard attendid funeral of Leut Howard. the CorpS were Brought on a Sleigh up ye River to Col o Howards in ye morn g , y e funeral at two O Clock. I was at Mr Westons, Saw the Widdow Drawn Down river at about Six after n in ye sleigh Drawn by men. I tarried at mr Westons all night; took Care of Jimmy.
mr Weston here. Desird me to go to his hous, his wife being unwell. I watk d there. mr Ballard Came after me at Evin g ; rode home. it raind this Evin g .

X Birth. Simm Clearks Dafter. Recd 6/. XX I attended Lecter. went from meeting to mr Suels to See Cap t Suels Foot, it being Scolt. Drank Tea y r . James Moore Calld me from there to go to Simmion Clarks wife, Shee being in travil. was Safely Del d of a Dafter at 11 / OClock Eving. I tar d all night, mrs Peter Clerk also. I have recievd 6/ & there is 2/ Due.
I was at home. It Raind. mrs Weston here; Georg Boltons wife, Sally Bolton & Polly Savage.

Clear, pleas t morn. Lucy not very well. mr Town Came home; brought news y t mr Ballard was gone to Casco to Cort as an Evidence in behalf of Emmerson. I was at mr Towns all Day, but am anaxious to see home again it being dific lt for me to be gone.
B Lords Day & very pleas t . at mr Towns yet, Lucy about house yet. mr Stackpole & Lady here, Drank Tea. Sally Dexter also. Nathan Howard paid Betsy a visit this Evening.
B rainy. I went to Chamberlins to see their Babe.
B I was Calld to Danniel Boltons to See his wife. went to See mrs Ellis.
At Boltons all Day.
A Cloudy morn. I was at Son Towns all Day. Betsy went to mr Dexters & Stratens. Lucy was unwell.
I went to mrs Fosters. Brought home my [sheets] she mended. Let Polly Barton have them.
Raind in y e morn, Sun Shind about 01 [sic] in morn. it haild in y e after n . Sun Sett Clear, raind hard in the Evin g . I was at home y s Day. Began to make Soap.
I was at mr Towns all Day. Betsy Carried a web to mr Crosbys. Sally Stackpole & Loes Spencer here.
At home all Day. y e Girls Spinng.
I was at home all Day.
Clear. mrs Foster here to mend my quilt. Woodward Allins wife here. I was at home to Day.
Clear. mr Tho s Suel at Son Towns this Morn. Lucy & I went to mr Dexters for water to Drink.
Very hott. Broth Moore was here to have writeings Drawn. mrs Bolton here. Hannah and Dolly Gone Mr Westons. mr Leighton here. Enformd y t mrs Hersy was Delivrd of a Son. I was at home all day.
Clear & Cold. Hannah & Dolly Gone out ys aftern. mr Taylor, His D r Polly & Sam l Duttun Junr Dind here. I was at home all day.
Clear & Cold. I went to Isaac Savages to See Hannah, his Daftr. was at James & Georg Boltons & mr forbes s . Brothr Moore & mr Hawes here. I finished Cyrus s Cotten hoes.
Clear. Our gardin was fenced. mr Foster here. I Comd flax. was at home all Day.
Clear. mrs Forbes, Savage & Elisab h Casson here. Major Pain & mr Glover Dind here. I was at home y s day. Hanh h Crage here.
Rainy. I was at home all Day. we set Cabbage plants.
Clear. I went to ye Hook; Carried Dolly to try on h r Gown.
Clear. At mr Westons till after Dinner. mr Weston Returnd from Boston. got home about 12 O Clock, Crost y e river on the Ice. mrs Pollard & I at Col o Norths; Drank Tea.

Chilly. I was at home. Brother Moore & mr Haws, mr Forbes & wife & Peggy, Dind here & Cap t Hatch, mr Edson, also mrs Savage, Drank Tea. I had three Brooms of mr Smith. Let him have 3:4 d in cash & 1 lb of Coffee. Our Saw mill stopt by ye Back water. A Great Cry for provision. no Vesils arived yet. ye ice run this Day.
Clear & hott. I Came home from mr Clearks. our men Cleard y e Crick of Sunken Stuff.

Birth. Hodges Dafter. fee Receivd. X mrs Hodges was Safely Delivr d of a Dafter at 6/O Clock y s morn. I returnd home at Ten, Left her Comfortable. Hannah & Polly returnd from mr Towns. Left y m all well. Cyrus Conducted Polly home & brought his Cloath from Edsons.

B I got ready to go to Esqr Howards & it raind & I put it by. I was Some unwell after n . mr woodward & mr Savige & wife here after meeting. Enformd y t mrs M c Masters had Got to Bed & her Child was deceas t , y e funeral tomorrow. This is Cyrus s Birth Day; aged 29 years.
B Cloudy, wind at S.E. Began to Snow at 5 PM. Isaac Savage here Eving. I was at home all Day.
3] I was at home all Day. Dolly very unwell. I rose in y e night to take Care of her.
B Clear. I went to meeting, y e Sacrament administerd. mr Ballard & I partook. mrs Shaw here after meeting.

B ]. fee Recvd. X I was Calld at 2 O Clock in ye Morn to go to thee hook to Mrs Blake in travil. went Winthrop road about 4 miles, from that to Blakes near four miles. arivd before the Sun rose, found mrs Blake Deliverd of a Son By the help of Peter Clearks wife. receivd 4 Shilling for my trouble. returnd to Fosters on hors back; from thence walk d home attindid by mr Foster. I was much fatagud. then Calld to Isaac Savages to See hannah, his Dafter. returnd home at 10 in Evin g . on return mr Ballard found y e Boome Logs & Bords all a float. Hamlin, Robbins, Cowin & Jonathan got out of bed & went to Secure them. People pas d on the ice from Fort western this Day.
B Clear. the ice runs to day. I heard from Son Town by mr Lewis; all well. I was at home y s Day.
A Snow Storm. mr Ballard at Pol ds . Jannie Robbins hr. I helpt Hannah Barton Do hous work. At home all Day.
Clear & Cool. I was at home. mr Chamberlin here. I mendid Cyrus s Boys Trousers. mr Taylor Dind here.
Clear. Doctr Barton & wife Came here. y e Doc tr went to Cobese.

I went to Esq r Howards to take Care of Alvin Weeks & Polly Briant who were Sick of a feaver. Cap t Nickols & Silas Eddy here from Oxford. I was Calld to mr Chamberlins, his wife in travil at about ten in Evin g . John Comings Come there after me to go to Ben n Whites of winthrop but I could not be dismist.
Clear. Cap t Nichols of OXford here; our friends all well. Hannah & Dolly went to mr Crages & mr westons. Ben n Brown Drank Tea with us.

Birth of Asa Wl ms Dafter. X I Came home from mr Boltons Early, had not Set Down before Asa Williams Came for me to go to his wife. I went as far as Crages, Crost y e river & went on hors back in great hast. found her Safely Delivrd by Old mrs Ingerham. Mr Wil ms gave me 10 S . I returnd home at 12 O Clock. Sam l Babcoks wife & Dorcas Savage here.
Clear & warm. Lucy some unwell. I am at Towns yet. Mr Lues went Down River. Betsy washd & went to mr Dexters. there was a Shower at Night. I feel not so well as I could wish.
I was at home all Day. mr Oriah Cleark [&] his wife here.
Clear & Pleas t . Biah Town here. I was at home ys Day about making Soap & knitting.
I was at mr Towns; we washed. mr Dexter here.
August s Ballard Came for Alice. I was Calld to mr Edsons to see his Burnt foot; found it Bad. Drest it & Left some Salve.
I went to help mrs Weston quillt.
Oct. I am at home. Dolly very unwell. Hannah & Polly washt. mr Ballard went to mr Hersys fore n, to the hook after n . Wil m Stone Sent here for Camp fr . I Sent him an ounce of tinct.
I was at home all Day. it raind Exceeding powerfully y s night.

Birth. Danl Boltons Dafter. X I was Calld in haste to Danniel Boltons, his wife being in Travil. Shee was Safely Deliverd at about twelve O Clok of a fine Dafter. I left her very Comfortable & Returned home before Sun Sett. fee not paid. it rains tonight. I finishd my 4th pair of Toe hoes.
Clear Morn, Cloudy after n . I finish t footing a pair of hoes for Lucy. Betsy & I went to ye field & got Sennakle root, then went down to mr Stackpols; Drank Tea there.
A Shouer. old mrs Hardin here; we Cleand Sellers. I washt Barrils & was at home all Day.
Clear, thawd a little. mr Ballard wrote warrants. I was at home. Hannah fins d Ephes Shirt. mr Savage here, Said wm Kennudy has broug t his wife home.
Clear. Capt Savage & Lady & Isaac & wife here. I was makeing Soap. very weiry at night.
We Began to make our gardin. I finish t Combing flax. Polly Savage went to mr Westons, took [ ]. I was at home all Day. It Raind y s night.

Clear Excep t a sprinkling of rain before noone. I was Cald to mr Ellises at 1 O Clock after n , his wife in travil. Shee was Deliverd of a Son at 1 O Clock y e next morn. I tarried all night. Came to Danniel Boltons [ ] in morn.
Rainy. I was at home y s Day. we Brewd and Spun [sash].
I went to mr Chamberlins to see y e Babe, prepard Some fig phisick for it after I returnd. Dan l Robins has Brus d his Toe, it is painful. I put a Poultis to it. Rufus Ballard here y s Day.
B I was Calld to mr Westons to See his wife, Shee being ill with a Disentery. I administerd a Clister which gave her Eas & Came home at Evin g . Drest Robins s foot that is some better.
B Clear. I attend d meeting at ye meeting hous. went to mr Westons at Intermition. mr Coney made a prayer & Read a sermon in ye morn. mr Babcok performd afternoon.
B X Birth. Elliss child. XX A Louray Day. I tarried at mr Boltons all night, his wife being unwell.

B Clear. Theophelus Hamlin arivd here from oxford, by whom we Rec d a Letter f m B r Collins moore which Enforms of ye Death of Ebin z Davis's wife. Cap t Lambs wife of Charlt n , Solo n Cooks & Ebn z Davis Junrs wives Died in Child Bed; Infants Deceast also. he Enf ms of Death of old Lady Harris.
I was at Ditoes. mr Collar & Eunis Stakpole here.
Clear part of ye Day; Some rain & haill & [Shnow]. I went to See Woodward Allins wife. Saw mrs Hardin there.
Cloudy morn. I Returnd from Boltons, got home at 7 O Clock in y e morn. Son Town Came here after noone, his family are well. it raind at night.
I went with mr Ballard to Doc t Coneys to See his house raisd. James Cowen Came home with us, tar d all night.
I went to mr Chamberlins fore noon, to mr Westons after n , found him & his wife better. y e Girls went there at Eving. mr Ballard Gone to mr [Wheles].
Snowd in ye morn, Clear aftr n . Annual Meeting to Day. mrs Forbes here to Bake; Dind with me. I was at home all Day. Dolly finnisht a Shirt for Eph m .
Clear. mr Ballard & I & Sis t Barton, Cyrus & Dolly & Pollard went to See Norcroses Vesil Lanchd. I went in to See mrs Cleark. Shee has had an ill turn but some better.
Birth. Chamberlins X Daftr. I was at Chamberlins all day. Shee was deliverd at six O/Clok after n of a Dafter. I left there about ten & came home Some fatagud. I was at home, mr Ballard at Pits Town.
Clear. I was at home. mrs Savage, Chamb n , Bolton & Forbes here. Polly hamlin Came at Evin g .
Clear morn. I was at Son Towns all Day. mr Dexter there.
I was Calld to Chamberlins to see y r Babe; heard by mrs Savage y t Lucy was unwell.
I was at home all Day. we had Roast Pigg & a Line of veal for Din r . I heard y t Capt Savage & Hersy were so heavy they oversett their Canoe & fell into thee river.
Clear, Fast Day. mr & mrs Savage here; mrs [Brod] & Lidia MC Graw. I was at home all Day.
X Birth. Churcths Daftr. XX Call d to mr Churches about Day, She being in travil. was Deliverd about 5/O Clock P.M. of a Dafter, y e operation performd by mrs Winslow.
I went to mrs Boltons, Hannah to mrs Westons.

I was at home. Richard Ridan & his Wife here. Cap t Nichols here y s Evn g . mr Ballard gone to y e hook. I was at home. mr Salv ns Hatch & wife Came here. Capt Nichols here Bound to y e westward. he, Rub n Moore, Wil m & mr Eddy staid here this night.
Cloudy & rainy. old mrs Bolton & mrs Chamberlin here after n . I was at home all Day.
mr Ballard Gone to mr Pollards. Clear. Soloman Pollard went from here, went on Board Cap t Smith Bound for y e west Indies. Hannah & Dolly Gone to mr Westons. mr Sarls & [Lee] Drank Tea with us.
Cloudy. I went to mr Pollards afternoone. mr Hodges Set out for Boston. I began mr Ballard a pair of hoes woolin.
I was at Ditoes. mrs Cragen, Hail & Barton made us a visit. Betsy was unwell. there was a little rain y s afternoone.
Clear & hott morn. Joseph Town at Son Towns. I was there all Day. fixt to go Down with Nathan Howard but Lucy Thought it not best. Betsy went to mr Crosbys for Cloath; brought Some home.

Birth. X Henry Babcocks Dafter born at five in morn. XX I was Calld at 5 O Clock y s morn to Henry Babcocks, his wife being in Travil. arivd there about Day Light; found her put to bed, the operation performd By mrs Smith. mrs Babcock I found in Severe pain; her complaints So great & Shee very Desireous I should inquire into y e Cause. I Complyd & found her greatly ingered by some misshap. mrs Smith does not alow y t Shee was Sencible of it. however her, Viz mrs Bab ks , Distres was so very Severe we were apprehencive Shee was Expiring. Sent for Doct Colman But Dr Williams fortunately Came in & prescribed remidies which aford Some relief. I Left him there & returnd home at 10/PM.
Clear. we wash t y e East roome. I was at home.
B I attended Divine servis all Day. a pleas t day for y e Season. Mr Ballard & I went to mr Bisbees at Evin g . mrs Pollard there.
B Clear. I went to meeting. Old mrs Haws & Daugh tr & Sister Moore here at noone. they & many more people Calld after meeting. mr Ballard & I went to See them up y e rips.

A A Clear but very Cold Day. my fammaly all attended Divine Servis Except Ephm & my self. ye Girls gone to mr Williams y s Evin g , Cyrus also. mr Pollard & Hall here. mr Ballard is gone to mr Pollards.
Clear. My Girls wash d . Dolly rode a hors to plough. I gott a mess of String Beans, y e first we have had. was at home y s Day.
I was at home all Day. a very Chilly air. mr Ballard gone to Town meeting. Rachell Faught here.
A Clear, Cold day. I was at home, mended a Shirt for Eph m . Edm n Allin & wife here. the Girls washt. ye mill Stopt by reas n of ye Cold. I hear mrs Faught is Deceast.
Clear & Pleast. Hannah went to mr Westons. Old mrs Batton here. I was at home all Day. my son Ephr ms Birth Day; Aged six years.

A Cloudy Day & raind Some. Son Town went from here to go home. mr Ballard gon to mr James Cowens as a refeere on a Cause betweene Jonas Cleark & Henery Babcok. Thommus White Came to tend Saw mill. I was at home all Day

Birth. Bunker Farwells Dafter. X I was Calld at two O Clok in morn to go to Bunker Farwells; got there at Sun rise. I put mrs Farwells to bed at 2 in y e afternoon; returnd home at Eleven Even g . had a fit of ye cramp & fainting also. Dolly got up & brought ye Lavender which revivd me much. mr Farwell Gave me 7 s :4 d for my performance.
I was at home all day.

At home all day and evn g till about nine when Calld in great haste to Col o Howards, his wife & five Child n very sick. Sam l bleeding gave y m great surprise. I tarr d all night. Bill e is mending. Bitsy Wheeler Sick at Esq r Howards.

mr Bullin & Rachel Faught Came here at 9/O Clo k going to attend funeral of mrs Faught. mr Densmore Calld me to See his Son which is unwell. it began to snow when I left home. I calld to see mrs North as I came home. Shee is very Sick. was Enformd there of ye Death of Judg Bowman of Pownalboro. it is a Tedious Storm.

Clear. mr Ballard at Town meating & at Lectur. Revd mr Miller of Brunswick performd y e Exercise. Hann h , Dolly & Cowen attended. Hannah Crage & Jesse, mr Bullin & Brown & y r wives here. mrs Brown unwel. Shee & mrs Bullin Slept here. at home y s Day.

I was at home all day. there was a Shower. Alice Ballard Came here, mrs Kenady here. we had Roast Lamb for Dinner. Jona t & Dann l Robbins bro t 1 Bar l flour, 1/2 Bar l Pork, 10-1/2 gal ns molasis from ye hook.
Clear. I was at home all Day. Sister Barton here.
I was at Chamberlins & Fosters. Jonathan watch with Alvin Weeks at Esq r Howards. I was at home. mr Ballard Came from Pits town .

Birth. Blakes Son. X. fee recievd. I was at home till 7/O/Clok in Evin g when Calld by James Moore to go to John Blakes wife being in Travil. I rode our hors there, put her safe to Bed with a Son. it Snowd all night.
Clear. I went to mr Westons afternoone. Calld at mr Broks s & mr Bissbees.
Clear. Lucy, mrs Craggin & I went to Cap t Hails. mrs Dexter also.
Clear. mr Ballard went to Survey for mr Duten. I was Calld to mr Chamberlins, Shee being unwell. tar d all night. mrs Church is ill, mrs Winslow with her.

Birth Leight n Son X I was Calld To mr Leightons, his wife being in Travil. Left home at ten fore n , arivd there at two aft. found her Safely Delivd of a Son, the opperation performd by Sol o Leightons wife.
A very rainy morn. Mr Stratton & Nath n Howard Breakfast d here. it hath raind very much y s Day. the Corn mill Ceast grinding till finisht repairing. Polly Savage brought home my Cloath.
I Came home Acompanied by mr Moore. it Snows y t . I feel Some fatagud. mr Blake paid me Eight Shillings.
Cloudy part of y e Day. mrs Foster here. Poll Savage Enformd y t James was Scalt. I was at home y s Day. Jon o unwell at night.
Clear. I Came home from Chamberlins y s morn. Polly Hamlen Came home with Hannah & Alice Ballard y s Evin g . I was at home y s Day.
I was at mr Edsons. Doctr s Williams & Coleman there to See his foot which he Burnt.
Sheribi Town Came here y s morn. Enforms y t Lucy is much better. this is Dollys Birth Day.

Birth. Dexters Dafter. Eph Town Came here about Day for me to go to mr Dexters. we Left here at 7/O Clock, arivd at Dexters at 1 after n ; found his wife very ill. I removd thee obstruction and Deliverd her Safe of a fine Dafter about y e middle of y e night. it Stormd Severely as I was on my journey.
I was at mr Westons, after n . calld at Col n Norths. mrs Cox has been unwell but is gitting Better.

Clear part of y e Day. I went to See Isace Savages yonges t Child, it being unwell. Polly Hamlin Slept here. it Snows. mr Sarls Drank Tee here & Took a raft out this Crick y s Even g . Eliphl t Robbins here, unwell.
I was at home. Hannah Coole here, enforms of ye Death of Fahy & Reubens Moores Child; they were Buried yesterday. I wrote a letter to Brother Collins.

A Snow Storm & very Cold. I have been at home ys Day. mr French informd me of ye Death of mrs Stuart who Deceast ys mor n . mr Hinkley & Lady went past here on y r way home. I finishd Ephe s Stockins & fixt Cyrus s footing.
I feel some poorely. am Calld to go to mr Chamberlins to See his Babe. I found it much as it has been. Polly Bisbee & Hamlin here.
Clear. I finished mending my quilt. the Girls went to Forbes s . mr Ballard returnd from Court; brought 2 quart Basons & 2 pint Dito. I was at home all day.
Clear morn & hott; it thunderd & raind afternoone. I was at Son Towns all Day.

Birth. Son Towns Daftr. XX Clear, hotte morn & very hott Day. Daug t Town unwell all Day. Calld her woming together about two O Clok after n ; was Safely Deliverd of a Dafter at 7 O Clok, but Somewhat weak. I Set up with her all night. mrs Straten Tarid, Slept with Betsy.
Rainy. Polly here y s Day. I was at home, we baked. I finishd makeing y e forth Sheet.

I am at home. Doc t Wms Calld here on his return from mr Babcocks. Enforms me y t She is Some more Comfortable; he has hopes She may recover. mr Smily here. we b t 18 lb of Butt r of him. we paid him one Dollar in Cash & three at Daves s Store; we are to give one Shilling pr pound.

17 B A fine pleast Day. for ye Season, I attended Divine Servis both parts of ye Day. A very rainy Day. ye freshet rose in ye Brook. Duttons Dam met with a breach which causd it to rise higher than usual. no great damage hapend here.
A Cold day. I have been at home ys Day. I made 8 lb of Candles for mr Brooks & 4-1/2 lb for my Self. our men brought hay from ye meddow. Dolly fell Down Chamber & hurt her head.
A A Clear, Cold Day. I was Calld to mr Chamberlins to See his Child, found it very ill. I tarried all night. set up.
B Our fammily went to mr Suels to meting. I was Cald to Isaac Savages to See Hannah, She being unwell.
B Clear Morn, Cloudy aft. I attended Divine Servis. Cap t Grant & mrs Foster here in intermish n .
B A fine, pleast Day. mr Haselet performd Divine Servis. I attended all Day. Hannah & Dolly went to See mrs Williams this Evining.
A X Birth. Hatches Dafter XX. Mrs Hatch Calld us up about Day break, thee women were Calld in and She was Safely Delivrd of a Dafter about Sun Set.

B Clear & hott. I left mr Towns at 10 o Clok in y e morn, arivd at home about Six. I left Lucy Comfortable as Could Expect. Son Town Came home w th me. Was Enformd y t mrs williams was Delivd Last friday of two Sons, one of which Expird soon.
I went to mr Churches & Suels & Esqr Howards. mr Witham & wife & Son tarried here. Polly Taylor came at night. Polly Hamblin went to mr [ ] this morning.
Clear. mrs foster here. Polly Taylor unwell. I went to Doct Coneys for Some medicin for mrs Straten. Pollard stubd his foot to Day.
I went to See mrs Babcock, found her very Low. Son Town here this night.
I have been at home y s Day. it is the anaversiry of my Marriage and 31 years Since mr Ballard and I were Joind in Wedlock.
mr Ballard Came after me & Brought me home from Chamb lns . mr Mags Came after me to go to mrs Hatch. we Left our hous at 4/O Clock after n , arivd there at 8/in Evn g .
it Raind. I Left mr Hatches at Day Break attended by mr Williams to ye County Road, from Jonstons by Agustus Ballard. arivd at home at 1 / after n . some fatagud.

X Birth. John Babcs Dafter X. I was Calld to John Babcocks wife being in Travil. Shee was Deliverd of a a Dafter at 5 O/Clock in Eving. A South wind & Smart rain. mrs Savage, Cowen, Babcock, Ellis & Stone & my Self tarr d all night.
B Clear morn. mr Pratt went from Son Towns. mrs Collar & her Daughter here, Mrs Dexter also. Nancy Dors & Betsy went to See mr Thorn; he is Sick.
I was at home. ye Girls Bak d . it snows y s Eving.
I am very unwell but, hearing my Son & Daug tr Town were unwell, venturd to Set out to see them. Cyrus went with me. We Left home at 12 o Clock.
Came from Col o Howards. Left y m very Sick.
Clear & Cold. mr Bullins & mrs Brown Breakfasted here. mr Bullin Dind. Ball d & he went to Col n Norths. our Girls washd. Isaac Savig Supt here. I was at h m ys D y .
Rain after n . mrs Pollard, Weston & Betsy Chever here. Dan l Robbins Came from meddow. I was at home all day.
I was at Cham lns & Fosters. Thunder & rain at Night. Alvin Weeks Departed this Life in y e night.
Clear. mrs Gardy, mrs Savage & forbes came here; Mrs Foster, Sarah & Polly Talor also. I was at home all Day. We Brewd.

Clear. I finisht futting a pair of hoes for Lucy & Began a stokin for my Self. Went to mr Dexters with mrs Craggin, mrs Haill there. mr Luis went to watch with mr Thorn who Departed this Life about y e middle of y e night.
I left mrs L tn Comfortable. arivd at home three after noon. Some fatagud y e rid[en]. Dolly brot my Cloath from Edsons.
Clear. I was at home all Day. mrs Chace Dind here. mr Hopkins began to moove the mill.
I was at home. mrs Gardy Came here.
At home all day. mr Lea here. I finisht mr Ballards toe Stockins yester day. he has been to mr Williams s at Vasalboro to Day.

I came from Dexters. it raind. I Cald to see Polly Dudley who is Extreemly Low & Sensless. Dind at Doct Bartons. got to fort western at dusk But Could not Cross y e river by reason of y e freshet. tar d at Colo n Howards. very Kindly Entertaind. his family very Sick yet.
at home all Day. am unwell, have a Cough.
I was at home all Day. Polly went fm hr.
I was at home. Mended my Camblet gown. mr Ballard went to W m Pullens, Broug t home Six fowls. Hannah & Dolly md Pies.

AClear, Cold Day. I was at home all day and mended mr Ballards Great Coat. we were Enformd of ye funeral of Mrs Stuart at ye Hook. Mr Williams Dind here, Says his wife is unwell. Children I have been Calld to y e Birth of thee year past: 28. Seventean of y m were Daughters. Novem r 14 Receivd of Dan l Bolton in part, one Dollar for going to his wife Sundry times las t sumer & Extracting a Dafter &C, &C. -:6:- I have Lost 42 nights Sleep y e year past.
B I was at home. it was a misty Day. my famely attended Divine Service.
B Clear. I was unwell, Did not attend meeting. mrs Foster, Caty Cool & Polly Hamblin here.
B I Came over y e river & got home Safe, found Dolly Some more Comfortable. mr Hatch & wife went from here. it raind hard after they Left us. mr Woodward & his wife Dind here. Shee Staid at night.
B I Did not attend Divine Servis but am going to visit Henry Babcocks wife who is Sick. I find her Some more comfortable.
Clear, a little cooler. I went to mr Croggins with Daughter Town & Shee had a faint turn there.
Clear. Mr Dillino & Wife & mrs Savage here; Mr & mrs Taylor, mr Page also. I was at home all Day. mrs Gardy went from here y s morn.

Clear Morn. mrs Woodward Dind here, then Cros t thee Crick to go to mr Westons. mr Hopkins and mr Stanley Came in order to Fraim y e mill. Dolly & Eph m unwell. I was at home all Day. it thuntred & raind in the night.
I Came home f m Babcocks & went to mr Westons. mr Hamblin here to Settle.

Birth. Ben n Browns Son. X I was at home till Evn g , then Calld to Ben n Browns wife, Shee being in Travil & was Delv d Soon after my arival. I returnd home at 1 O Clock. mr Brown gave me 9 and 4 for my Performance.

mr John Jones taken & brot to Pollards. Son Town went home from here. mr Ballard went to Cabese. I went to mr Suels to visit his fammily y t were Sick. There were a gang went to Saml Duttuns & took Joh n Jones; Brought him to Pollards. tarrd till morn when they Set out with him for wiscasett.
I have been at home all day. mended a Coat for mr Ballard & 1 for Cyrus & Eph s Trousers. ye Girls went to see Polly Hamlin y s Evinn g . mr Ball d been on ye Road by Herseys.
at hatchs. Sister Wilams there. Death Chamb s Child.
Calld to mr Browns to See his Infant who is unwell. Bigan a Stockin for Cyrus.
I returnd from Babcoks at 9 O/Clok morn. a Cloudy Day.

Birth. Joseph Wilms Dafter X. Mrs Willm s Safe delivd of a Daughter at 5 morn, ye Child much spent but soon revived. I Left them Cleaverly. I returnd home at half after 1/O Clok. it Snowd. mr Church here & mr Smith. wilms Child Expird about midnight, I hear.
B Clear. I attend d Worship after n . we Bak t a pie for Din r .
A very Cold Day. I was at home all day. mr Ballard gone to Capt Neys, Bro t home 42 lb of Tallow. Brothe r Moore & Joseph Williams Dind here. we killed a swine which w d 174 lb. I Salted it ys Eving.
at mrs Fletchers yet. I hear mr Farley was gone away fr m [family].
I am Still unwell. mr Town & wife Some better. Cyrus Set out on his Return home before noone.
I was at home all Day, finish d mr Ballards hoes. watcht at y e fort y s night.
Doct r Barton Came from Cobase, Dind here; went home in y e afternoon. I went to See them up y e rips.
I attende d funeral of mr Weeks, tarried at Esqr h this night. took Care of Polly & Suck.
B A Clear Day. I attended worship aftern. Sheribiah Town here this Night. I am [ ] unwell.
it raind all day. mr Ballard Been at mr Pollards. I have been at home. we killd 3 fouls.
I rose this morn before Day, it was Cloudy. Betsy & I Sett Some plants. I finisht ye [stokin]. a thunder Shower afternoone. Betsy [is unwell].
a Cloudy Day, began to Rain at 9 in Eving. I was at home all Day. Bak d Some Pumpkin Pies.
Clear. I was at home. Cyrus went to Cobasy for Some pork & onions.
Clear & Cold. I have been at home ys Day. mr Ballard returnd from B r Moors. we had a Barril of fish & Cag of molasis brought home to day.

A A Clear, pleas t Day. I am Still Some unwell, did not attend divine servis, But my famaly did. Hannah Woodward Calld here on her return home. Shee had Slipt down & mudied her Cloaths very much. we Dind on Roast Spairrib.

B Clear. I attended funeral of old mr Thorn. Cap t Fillbrook made a prayer on the ocasion. The Corps were Carried by water to [ ] & there interd. I returnd from grave with Esq. Pettee & mrs Craggin. Leut Browns Lady went to Son Towns. mr Dexter & Capt Hale & Lady there. Betsy went to y e Grave to attend funeral mr Thorn. mrs Collar was Deliv d Last night of a dead Child.
B I was Calld to W m Cowens wife at 1 O/Clock in morn; found her very unwell. Mrs Thomas & I went into mr Stackpoles at Evin g .
B A great rain & freshit. mr Savig & Chamb[len] & Ep h Cowen here all night. Dane l & Life tend [mill].

A Birth. Ep m Stevens Son X. A Clear Day. I did not attend Devine Servis. Broth Moore was here. I was Calld by Eph m Stevens of winthrop about Sun Sett to his wife in travil. had two falls from the hors I Rode but receivd no hurt. arivd there about 8/O Clock. mrs Stevens was Safely Deliv d at 11 of a fine Son, her third Child.
Clear. I was att home all day. Polly Hamblin Came here at Evn g , Cyrus acompanied her.

Sheribiah Town Came here for me to go to mr Dex[ters] up Sebestacook. I Left home at four O/Clock P.M. arivd there a little before Twelve. found mrs Dexter very ill with thee Mumps. fixt her a remedy and Shee mended soon. I tarried there & at Son Towns till october y e sixth, then came home by water attended by Cap t Hale & Shere b Town. they brought a bar l of fish from mr Stratens for us. Daught Towns babe been unwell, Some [better].
attended funeral of Peggy Haward who Deceast yesterday. Doct Colman unwell. Sam l & Jack mending. Polly about hous.

X Birth. Cowens Dafter. XX at Cowens Still, Shee unwell yet. Jonas Clearks infant had a fitt; they Calld me to See it. mrs Cowen Calld her women together this Evin g . was Safely Deliv d of a Dafter about y e middle of y e night & is Comfortable. fee & medisin 10/. May 5, 18001 recd 10/ by his Dagt [bitsy].

I Returnd hom in a Sleigh. mrs Williams here, shee fainted & fell on ye floar. I was Enformd yt mr Smith was gone away & tis feard he Desins to Deprive him self of Life on acount of Polly Hamlins refuseing to wed with him.

A Clear, warm Day. I have been at home y s Day. Mr Ballard went to Doct r Coneys y s morn. Mr Weston & Cap t Savage here trying to find whether there was a mistake about a Bord a Count. Hannah & Dolly washt. Mr Searls here for Rie by order f m mr Brod s .
Clear and warm. mrs Foster Came here. we were Informd of y e Death of Susanna Savage who Deceast Las t night.

raind Last night, Snowd y s morn. [y e ] dam broke y s morn. mr Ballard & Brooks [had] Some uneasyness. I am unwell. Isaac Savage to Breakfast here, had some phisick for his Dafter hannah. y e Northern Light appears this Evinn g . Cyrus & Eph m ointing for y e itch.
Clear & Cool. Mr Town went to Fort Hallifax to attend Town meating. mrs Hayward & her Dafters, Straten & Haill were at mr Towns; Drank Tea. I was there all Day.
I was unwell with a Cold. took a walk a little before Sun Set as far as mr Westons. Calld at Colon l Norths to See her. Shee being unwell. found her Some Better
Cloudy & rainy. I was at home, did work about house; the Children better. hannah ironed and Parthena & Dolly spun Cotton.
I was at home. Foster went home from work here.
I was Calld to See Doct Colman. I watch d .

Birth. Beamans Dafter. XX I was at home till about Sun Set, then Calld to Mrs Beaman being in Travil & was Safe Deliv d of a Dafter about mid night. I tar d all night. Mrs Williams here this afternoone. mr Ball d at Valabboro.
Sister & I went to mr Ferwels.
It Snowd fore noone. y girls washt. Old mrs Bolton & mrs Chamberlin Dind here. mr Savage Shod one pair oxen. Dolly went Fosters, had her Shoes mend d . I was at home all Day.
Clear. I was Calld to mr Westons to Cutt y r infants Tongue. mrs W stn gave me some Tea.
Clear. I was at home. Mrs Mc Night & her Sister here & Dind. I mended my goun. hear yt mrs Goodin was Delv d of a Son that wt 12 lb.

Cold. I was at home y s Day. mr Hollowel mendid Puter here for which he Received 3 peks of Corn. Old mr Springer & wife here. Elisab h Cossen also. Cyrus Bo t a Case & 12 bottles of mr Crage, pr s 14 s . Georg Bolton has our hors, is gone to weding of Danniel Savage junr & Bet s Peirce. Jubal Hinkley & widdo Robison are to be joind in Wedlok y s Day.
Birth. C Clearks Dafter X. I was Calld to Charls Clearks from mr Fletchers, put mrs Cleark to Bed with a Daughter about 3 O/Clok after noon; returnd at Sun Sett to mr Flechers. X X
I Came from y e fort after n , went Back again before night. took a sleep fore part of y e night. sit up y l after two in mrs Howards Chamber.
Jono n Came home from Son Towns. Enformd y t Lucy had a broken Breast. Dolly Sett out to go up with Sher e Town & Sam l Stackpool to Son Towns.
Came from y e fort & went to Chamberlins. Dolly returnd from Son Towns, Left them Comfortable. mr Ballard Still at Sebestack.
it raind. mr Bullin & wife Came home with mr Ballard. Shee tarried here all night. I have been at home. Jon os Birth Day Æ 23.
B I went to meeting. Polly Hamlin here in Intermition. Isaac Savage & wife Came home. This is Daughter Towns Birth Day.
A A Rainy day. y e Revd mr Foster Preacht here. I attend Divine servis, went to mrs Westons in inter m . mrs Suelle Sent for Salv. I sent her 1/2 an o z . Polly Hamlin Sleeps here y s night.

Clear but Cold. I have been at home. Mr Ballard Returnd from Sebastacuk; Informs that Son Towns famely are well Except y r Dafter Patty. mrs Straten put to Bed Last week. A Town meeting in town y s Day.

A Showry Day. Hannah Gone to help Polly H.. it is Town meeting. Doc t Coney Chosen to Represent y s Town in y e General Cort; mr Bullin Grandjure n . mrs Ellis was here, informs y t mrs Allin is very Low. y e Northern Lig t appears y s Evin g . I sent 32 Skeins of Tow to mrs Chamberlin. mr Butlin & mr Taylor dind here.
At home all Day. Polly & Hannah made a Shade for Han h of my olld [peinshan] apron. y e Town Mett to Day to hire mr Noble. Voted to hire him till march.
I was at home all day; very unwell. I tried to to take a Swett Last night but could not; this night went into a warm Bed. Drank Some hott Brandy tody, Swet a little.
I returnd from Cowens. Foster at work here. mr Ballard went to Doct r Coneys y s after n to meete Select Gentl m .
Clear. Mr Bullin & Cleark & Patty Bullin here & Dind. Hannah & Dolly went with Patty to Mr Crages. I went to Mr Densmors to see his wife who is unwell.
Clear. I have been at home. Mrs Farly here this night. mr Ballard been to Henry Babcoks. Jerry Babcok Dind here. Eph m Cowen Dres t flax here. I hear y t mr Smith has returnd.

it Snowd this morn, a Cloudy Day. the River open & people Cros t By water at fort western. the Corps of Susa Savage Interd at 3 o/ three O/Clok & 45m / PM /. mrs Foster gone. it is now 6 in Evin g . I jest Receivd News of y e Death of Nathan Runels s wife who deceas t ys mor n .

XX Birth. Eliab Shaws Son.XX A frosty morn. I finnish t kniting Cyrus s Buskins, the Girls wash t . I was Calld to Eliab Shaws at half after 5/O Clock PM, his wife in Travil, & Shee was Safely Delivrd between 6 & 7 of a Son, her 4 th Child. I Slept at mr Browks.

Birth. Mr Gillmans Dafter. X A rainy Day. I was Calld to mr Gillmans at y e hook to See his wife in Travil, put her Safe to Bed at 5 aftern with a fine Dafter, her nint h Child. tarried all night. receivd my fee.
a rainy Day. thee Spalldings brog t Loggs. we had 9 men Dind besides our own family. I Sent 18 Skeins of Tow to Chamberlins by mr Woodd.
Pleast. I have been at home. mr Dexter & Son Sleep here. Dolly Set three Current Bushes.
A Storm. I was at mr Towns. I ironed & finished a pair of wolon Hoes for my Self.

Clear. I was very feeble, at home all Day. y e Girls Brewing, Bleaching y n & Spinning. mr Smily tarrid here Last night, Breakfasted. mr Ballard went to Pitts town. Saw Sher e Town at Doc t Williams going to See Leu t Haile, he being Sick.
I was at home all Day. Cyrus Conducted Parthena homeward as far as mr Faughts. mr Kidder and his wife Slept here. mrs Woodward went home from Col on Howards, acompanied by mr Pollard.
I was at home. mr Pollard & mrs Foster Dind.
I Came from y e fort about noone. Left Doct Colman Exceeding Low indeed.

X Birth. mr Hoveys Dafter.X I was Calld at 15 Muini ts after 12 O/Clok to mrs Hovey, Shee being in Travill and was Safely deliverd at 8 y s morn of a Daughter, which w t 10-1/2 lb. I left her Comfortable; got home at Eleven. Receivd 6/ Shilling. Due for medis n 2/s. I went to See mrs Suall aftern n , found her able to do her houshold work. went to Bed Early this Evening. ye girls washt & Scourd.
arivd at home from Dexters. found Clarrisa Barton here on a visit.
It Snowd. I Came from Beamans, was much fatagud. did no work at home y s Day.
Siesd with a pain in my Ear.
Clear. I went to mr Williams s , staid till Eving then went to mr Westons; spent the Eving. mr Ballard brought me home. Savage Shod 1 pair oxen for us.

Clear. Mr Ballard went to Brother Moores to Draw Some writings for him. I went to mrs Pollards where he met me and waited on me home. mr Weston & wife & Neighbour Savage there. We all Supt there & spent Evinn g .

Clear & pleas t . mr Ballard & I, mr Pollard & wife, went to mr Bullins. Dind & went to mr Barkers, Towns & Shaws. mr Bullin & wife & mrs Davis went with us. the men helpt two horses out of ye river. we spent y e Eving at mr Duttens very agreeable. Doct Cony & Lady there. we got home at 12 O/Clock.

A a Clear Day. mr Bullin Came here ys morn. I Rode to meeting with them & Hannah with her father. Brot h Town here ys night, Mr Pollard & Savag also. Georg Bolton Enformd he had heard Smith had hangd himself.
A Clear, pleas t day. y e Girls went to mr Westons. mr Densmoore killd a Swine for us which w d 276 lb. I spun some thread. Jon o , Danl & Life carrd of Bords to Brooks. Jes e to work y s day.

Birth. mr Norris s Son. I was Calld to thee hook to mrs Norris, Shee being in travil. Put her Safe to Bed with a son at 1/O Clock after n . Returnd home at four. mr Cowen & Eph m here Setling w t mr Ballard. Due to them on Ballance 3/8. I Receivd 6/ of mr Norris, 2 remains Due. mrs Chamberlin Sent my Cloath, 31-1/2 yards. Polly Savage Brot home 7 Skeins & 5 knot s of Tow yarn.
at mr Edward Savages to See his wife, find her very weak & Low.

X Birth. Joseph Fosters Son. X I was Calld at 6/O Clok to mrs Foster in Travil who was Safely Deliverd of a fine Son at 8-3/4 O Clo[k] y s Evining. I Returnd at 2/. Left mrs Cowin with her. Lidia, Aron & Billy Sent to our hous, Sleep here ys night.
Came home about towo after n . Luke Barton here & Dind. I Sent Some Soap to Lucy by him. mr [Sheren] here, he was unwell.
Clear. Mr Ballard at mr Savages s . Hannah gone to Mr Fosters, his Children went home. Dan l Boltons wife & Polly Savage here.

A A very Rainy Day. I Did not attind worship. Mr Hamlin here directly from y e Westw d . Brt Letters from Brot h Collins & one from Josiah Kingsbury. we Dind on a fine Legg of Cornd Pork stufft with green herbs from our Gardin. it rains part y s Evinn g . I paid Polly Savage all y t we ow d her yester d by an order on Capt Davis which we answr d.
B I went to Col o Howards, tar d all night & watcht. mrs Howard had a Severe feaver fitt.

I tar d & help t moove y e Sick, dres y r Blisters &C returnd home at noone. Dolly gone home with hannah Barton. Shee returnd at Evn g , brought Parthena. mrs Foster & mrs Brown here. Broth Moore & Tho s Smily here. mr Ballard went up with y m to view a mill spott.

the anual meeting. Capt Saveg s wife & Sally & Polly Hamlin here. mr Bullin Slept here. Theop h Hamlin & James Burten Slept here. I have been at home all day, Finisht my [gloves]. mr Hamlet & Noble both dismist.

a rainy day. Polly Hamlin here, mr Reed & Peny Blackman also, and Drank Tea w h us. mr Blanchard went to Georg Browns. Cyrus went to y e Hook for a Bar l of Flower. this town mett & Gave y e Revd mr Foster a Call to Settle here. mr Ballard went to Mr W m Gardners for monney Due but got none. I have been at home y s day.
a Clear Day. I have been at home. we Breud. mr Gillbreth Came, he is helping pick mill. Hannah & Dolly spunn Tow. mr Ballard reckoned with James & Georg Bolton.

it raind. Mr Ballard Paid Blanchard all that was his due for his Servis here & Dismis t him. he Breakfasted here then went to y e mill & began a quarril with Jon o & made Such an outcry as gave my Self & famely great Surprise. I sint for mr Ballard home from Savages. mr Savage & Streeter came with him. I am makeing a pair of trouses for Eph m . Sherebiah Town Came h r y s after n , Sleeps here. mrs Wodward Calld going home from y e hook.
A Lowry Day. Polly here. mrs Pollard Drank Tea. mr Ballard gone to [Cabose]. Doct Barton Came home w t Jon o , tarrd [here].
Cloudy. I feel a little more Comfortable. I rode to Mr Pollards find my Self profited thereby.
A Snow Storm. I was at home all Day. my throat Sore.

This Day observd as a Day of fast & prayer in this Town on acount of Calling one to Settle in ye Minestry. Revd mr Emerson performd ye fore n Exercise & Mr Moore ye after n . I Calld to see mrs North after Meeting, Shee being unwell. mrs Pollard & mrs Cox there. Smith & Polly Hamlin are in all Conversation at present.
Clear & warm. Hodges Dres t flax here. I Comd 7 lb. have been at home to Day. Mr Ballard went to mr Westons.

I was at home. ye Girls wash t . mr Brooks Drank Tea with us, mr Foster also. Enforms y t mr Whiting of winthrop is Dangerously Sick. mr Ballard mending y e Dam. Jon o out to look of Loggs, Came home very unwell. I poultist his hand and gave him Some herb Tea. A very Remarkable apearance in the hemisphere of Light together with Streams of Read.
I Came home from mr Shaws at 10 h / [morn]. mr Cowen & others Brought Loggs to y e mill. I went to See Polly Hamlin, Shee is unwell. old mrs Hardin Sleeps here.

it Raind. I returnd from mr Gillmans at 11. after dinner went to mr Westons & Col o Norths. the Spalldings Bro t Loggs into y e Crick and Let some run by. Polly Savage Credit by 16 Skeins spinng of Tow which Shee brot home this day.
Clear. I was mr Dexter & Nathan Howa rd Brought Loggs to us. I was calld to winth p to Bill Richards s wife, Shee being in travil. arivd at 5 O Clok P.M. very much fatagud.
Cloudy fore noon & after n also, but not much rain. mrs Town & I went to mr Dexters, Drank Tea there. mr Town was gone to take care of Sheribi s Colte.
At home. I we nt to y e field, Raked Some hay. Our men brought y e hay all in from y e meddow.
A Clear, fine Day. mr Kidder went from here on y e way home. mr Brooks after his Bread we Baked. mr Hopkins & Stanly went away at noone. I did hous work, was at home all Day. felt unwell y s Evening.
mr Crages Shop was Consumd by Fire. I was at home all Day; finsh d a pair of hoes.
Thanksgiving Day. I did not attend worship. mr Foster & wife, mrs Chamberlin, Theop h Hamlin & Polly & Poll Savig, Han h Woodward & Eliphl t Robbins Supt here. mrs Foster tar d all night.

A Clear day. we Brewd a bar ll & 1/2 Beer. Mrs Coy here. Jenny Cool Calld going to See her Mother. Mr Crage s Shop raisd. I have been at home. W m Gardner here, Says he has Lost a [gunny]. he had our Mare to Varsalboro yesterday.

I have been at home, did hous work & spun thread. Hannah unwell. mr Ballard went to the hook. Neighbour Williams & wife here. Dolly went to Savage Boltons for needles. Danniel Robbins unwell to night.
Clear. I went to mr Westons, found him and his wife Both unwell. I am calld at mr Pollards. mrs Hodges there.
At home y s day. Mr Savage here; Shod oxen. he and wife spent Evinng here.
at Ditoes. remain unwell. it is Excessive Cold.
Clear. Mr Ballard & Daninel went to ye Meddow. widdow Coy here with Black, Susy & Child. mr Leighton bro t me two [ ] Fowls. Polly & Sally Fletcher & Betsy Chever here. I have been at home ys day.
Clear morn. I have been at home today. Revd mr Noble Came to Town yester d y .
it Snowd ys morn. Cleard of pleast. I have been at home all day.
A Clear & pleas t morn. mr Voce at work here, Jese Crage also. Mrs Williams here, had a faint turn. Hannah went home with her. I have been at home, Spun Some thread.

I Came home attendid by mr Moor. Receivd my fee & pay for medecin. (arivd at 4/ y s morn). mr Ballard at Doc t Coneys makeing Rates yester d & y s day. Jon o found the Loggs & Came home Last Evinn g . Sherebiah Town Slept here. Polly Hamlin been here y s day, Eliphlt unwell. the mill Lies still y s night.

Birth Fletchers Dafter X mrs Fletcher Calld her women again this morn & was Safe Deliverd of a Dafter at 5 O/Clock ys morn. ye Babe Seems Some unwell. I tarried all night. mrs M c Knight Came there & tarried till morn, Said her husband turnd her out a Dorrs.

Very hot. old Mrs Cowin here & dind. her Husband car d to jale for Debt. Mr Ballard gone to Cabese & Town meeting. I maid a Sheet & wed gardin. A thunder Shower. mr Lee & Brooks here, and mrs Shaw. W m Keenady after me to See his wife. I was lame & did not go.
A I Came from mr Fletchers, Left her new Child very unComfortable. I attended worship. Revd mr Noble performed before noon & Revd mr Haselitt after noone.
I was at home all Day, feel some unwell. this Day I am 51 years of age.
ye meeting Continuud. mrs Williams Bakt here. Broth Town & Sheribiah, James [Stackpole] & Danniel Bullins Slept here. Ive been at home.

a Clear day. I Bak d Some flour Bread & Pumkin Pies. Brot h Moore here. Mr Hamlin & Mrs Williams Drank Tea w h me. Mr Ballard & N r Savage went to See their farm. Jon o , Cowen & y e Bobins s makeing fence at Savage Boltons farm. Noah here to work. I have Been at home all y s day.

Mr Ballard went to y e hook. I went to Williams. Levy Moore & David Smily here, informs that Sister Barton was Diliv d of a son Las t Sunday, her twelvth child and 5 son. Briant Fletcher had his arm Broke by the fall of a tree.

a rainy day. mr Ballard went to y e hook. mr Gill breath Came here, is helping Dress y e mill. mr Bullin here; informs y t Eb n Churchs wife was Deliv d of a son & Daughter Last weak. Sher e Town Sleeps here, informs that John Emry of Sabastacook very much hurt in a Saw mill, his Life not Expet d . Likewise y t Daughter Town has been unwell and is got Comfortable.
A Clear, Pleasant day. thee Girls washt and went to mr Bysbees. I have been at home y s day. Mr Ballard Been out to purChace Loggs.

Election at Boston. I have been unwell. Sherebiah went from here Bound to Sebasta k . Hannah & Dolly gone y s after n to See Polly H. Dan l Boltons wife, Sally Bolton & Polly Sav g have been here y s day. mr Ballard Been surveying Road & makeing plan.

A Birth. Briant Fletchers Dafter. fee rec d . XX A very warm Day. I was Calld at 8 y s morn to Brian Fletchers. his wife in Travil & was Safe Delivd of a Dafter Betwen ten & 11. I returnd home at 5 aftern. mr Lee here fore n . Ben n Edwards, mr Wels & David Learned Dind here. I receivd 6/ of mr Fletcher. Beriah Ingerhams wife was Delivrd of a Dafter 30 th of may, Extracted by old mrs Fletcher.
I have been at home. Savage Boltens wife & Polly Savage & Polly Hamlin here. my Girls washt. Little Isaac Savage rode hors to plough half ye day.
Clear. Doc t Barton went from here. y e Girls set out for Sebestacook. mrs woodward here after noon, drank Tea with me. Jon o Gone to Cabbasa. this is Ezra Towns Birthday.
I was at home. Mrs Edson here, had X 1 oz Salv for her Husband foot. I Coughed much this night.
mr Ballard Gone to mr Pollards. Clear. Soloman Pollard went from here, went on Board Cap t Smith Bound for y e west Indies. Hannah & Dolly Gone to mr Westons. mr Sarls & [Lee] Drank Tea with us.
I have been at home ys Day. it snowd. Mr Densmore Came for a Cyrrup I maid for his wife. Mr Ballard been at mr Pollards with thee other Select Gent m .
Snowd ys morn & Raind after n & Evin g . Mr Ballard gone to mr Pollards to meat y e meting hous Committy, & Settle with Asa Emerson. Jon t is out y s Evinn g . I have Comd 8-3/4 lb of flax to Day.
Clear. I have been at home, mended Ephm s Briches. mr Ballard at work at y e Saw mill. Jon o is much Better. we Boild some Linn g warp.

mrs Hardin wnt from here. mr Ballard went to attend town meeting. mr Sual Sent a man to attend me to his hous to hear Mr Pother speak. after meeting I went to See mrs Weston. Shee being unwell. I Rode hom, found mrs s Becke, Lidia Bisbee, Polly Hamlin & Polly Adams here. Eph m is 7 years old y s day.

A Clear day. the Girls washing. Mrs Chamberlin & Georg Boltons wife here & Drank Tea. mr Hodges work d here. Mr Ballard at D r Coneys y s Evening. Dan l went to the hook, Bro t home 6 gal ns of Rhum, 2 lb coffee, 5 lb Sugar & Some Tobacco & 1-1/4 Bush l of Salt from Jo s Williams for me, for assisting his wife in travil with her Last Child. I have Been at home y s day.

Birth of Wilm Richards Dafter. XX I put mrs Richards Safe to Bed with a fine Daughter at about 4 y s Morn. Left there a little after break of Day. Called to See Mrs Branard who is unwell & Woodward Allins Wife who is very Low indeed. Calld at Sam l Comings; rode his hors & Saddle as far as Fosters, Walkd from There. was at Crages & Williams. Dolly at mr Cragges. I Sent 21 Skeins of Tow yn to mrs Cham ln . Ben n Brown & wife here. I was in bed much fatagud.

I Left home about three O Clock PM, went as far as Davis s Store. was Calld to Col on Howards to asist Mrs Pollard & Bisby Lay out y e Corps of his wife just now Deceast. his Children yet very Sick. I returnd home a Little after Sun Set.
I was at home till in Evn g , then Calld to John Blakes, his wife being unwell.
I was at home all Day. mr Ballard was surveying for Ben n Brown. mr Chandler, Mr Hodges & wives, Mrs Dorcas & Abigal Pollard here.
I was at home. Mrs Williams here. thee girls went to mr Craggs. Brot 3 pair of shoes @ 6/ pr pair. mr Ballard Sowd flax & went to Doct r Coneys.
I have been at home, wash t potatoes. Polly Savage & Isaac workt here. mr Ballard went to the Hook w h a raft of Bords, 8000, to put on Bord mr Toby s vessel on frait to Boston. he tarried all night.
Clear & Cool. mrs Foster w t home. mrs Gardy Came h r . Mrs Kenady & Martha Drank Tea. Polly H. here. I spun sho e Thread. mr Ballard at Pounalboro Coart.
Mr Ballard returnd from Surveying at Varsalborough (by Disire of Es q Lovjoy). I have been at home all Day, mended Mr Ballards Breaches. Polly Hamllin here for milk, Drank Coffee here.
at Ditoes. mrs Williams went to Magges.
Clear. I was at home. Rachel faught & Marget & Polly Bisbei here. I Bo t an apron patren of Rachel for 6/6.

I have been at home ys Day. mr Williams & Crage & Brown Jun here giting wood. Jon o Drove teame. mr ss Coall & Gorden & mr Sam l Fosters son Dind here. Savage Bolton Paid me for going to his wife & for medisin. 8/.
I have been at home all day. mrs Willms here. mr Ballard went to Stedmans for pork. it is very Cold.

Clear. mr Voce work d here. I Doubled thread. we finish t Brewing a Barril & half of Beere. Friend Gardner Sleeps here. our yong men Brought 57 Loggs to y e Saw mill. mr Ballard fell off y e Raft into ye river. Mr Suell Calld me to see his wife, Shee Being in Travill. mrs Howard, Mc Master, Voce & Bellchir were assistants.
Showers y s day. Sherib h Town killd a veal for us. we Lent a Side to Col o North, wt 28-3/4 lb. I went to mr Crages & Williams s . Eliphelet is Better, tending mill y s Evinn g .

A Clear Day. mr Ballard, Son Town, Jon o & Ephn Cowen gone to asist Brot h Moore Rais his hous. the Girls went to mr Westons. Polly Hamlin Came home with y m , & sleeps h r . Mr Sual here, paid me 6/ for attendin g his wife in Travil with her Last Child. Cap t Springer paid 4/ for my Servis, it being what remaind my Due. mr Hollow y Sleeps here y s night. the anavercery of y e Death of my Dater Dorothy.
A Clear & Cold. we all attended Divine Servis Excep t Cyrus & Eph m . Clarrisa & Perthena Barton, Patty Bullin & Betsy Brown here at noone. Hann h & Dolly gone to Williamses y s Eving.
A A Pleast day. we have no preaching in Town. Mr Hamlin Dind h r . Polly here. y e Girls went to mr Williams s . mr Brown, Emerson here.
A Siesd with the Collic.

A X Birth Thoms Sualls Son XXX Clear & pleas t . mrs Suell Safe Delivrd at 3/O clok y s morn of a Son. I Left her Comfortable & returnd home at 01/O Clok; feele some fatagued. did not attend Divine Servis. Mr Foster, a yong Gentleman from Stafford, in y e state of Conneticut, performd. Cap t Savages wife & mrs Fareley here in Intermision. receivd my fee July y e 1 st of mrs Sewell.

A A Clear, hott day. I attended y e public worship after n , & Bak t Bisquits for Jon o to Carry to Sea. Polly Hamlin here, mr Collar also from winslow. he brot his wife & oldes t Daughter to varsalboro to see Doc t Williams.

A a hott day. I attended Divine Servise after n . mr Foster Delivird a discoarce from Math 25/41 ver , a Shour after servis. mrs Woodward & Nb r Savage Supt with us. Isaac Cowen Enformd of y e Death of Susanah Sautbe who Deceas t Last weak. Doc t Coney returnd y e Rhubarb which he Borrowd of me and 1 penny w t & 20 grains over plus. Lucy Town is one year old this Day.
A Clear & pleas t . Josep t Williams & wife & Isaac Savage dind here. Theop n & Polly Hamblin here ys Evin g .
at Do s . ye Collic Still.

X Birth. John Babcs Dafter X. I was Calld to John Babcocks wife being in Travil. Shee was Deliverd of a a Dafter at 5 O/Clock in Eving. A South wind & Smart rain. mrs Savage, Cowen, Babcock, Ellis & Stone & my Self tarr d all night.
I was Calld to Robert Fletchers at half after one y s morn, his wife

A Loury day. mr Ballard been to mr Gardners to put in his Crank. Mrs Farley here for releaff. thee girls moovd Beds up Stairs. There was a thief Whipt at y e post for Stealing Cloath f m mr Eben z Farewell. I have been at home y s Day. Thee speckled Cow calvd. I have been today unwell, feel more comfortable y s Eving.

X Birth. Savage Boltons Son. X Clear & Pleas t . I was Calld at 11 O/Clok to Savage Boltons, Shee wife being in Travil. Shee was Safe Delivrd at 3 after n of a fine Son. his oxen attached & Drove away about 7. I walk t home. Jon n has Swap t away our hors with mr Sleeper. mr Gillbreath sleeps here. mr Ballard been at Doct r Coneys makeing rates. Mr Blanchard at work for us. Rachel Faulh here y s Day. y e Girls wash t & Bak t & was ht floars.

Clear & Cool. y e girls wash t . Mr Ballard was at Cap t Suels. I went up y e Crik to Seek y e Calf, did n t find it. Cut wood for fire to wash. wint to Williams s . Isaac Cowen here y s Evinnig. I sent some pills and herbs to his wife.

A A hott day. Son Town, Betsy & Polly Left here for home. Jon o went w h them. we Dind on veal hazlet. mr Brooks, Theop s , Polly Haml n & Sally Pr e here after n . Cap t Nichols here Directly from oxford, informs our friends are well. his Daft r Campbel has had her 7 th Son.

Clear. the wid o Foster & Oliver, Ep m Stevens & Pamela Barton Dind here. mr Stevens paid me 6/8 for attending his wife in travil & y e 26 of Last February. I went y s after n to See mrs Copelin, met her at mr Pollards, spent y e aftern n there. mr Ballard & Cowan went Carry a raft of Boards to Cap t Huskins s Ves l . Jonathan gone on Board Bound for Boston.
Clear & warm. we Spun Some & Cleand ye Seller. I went to mr Porters for wool but got none, then went to Savage Boltons & George s , his Infan t , unwell & Hannah is poisaned in her face & Leggs.
I have been at home ys Day. mr Burten here. mr Ned Savage here, Enforms his wife is a little Better.

a hott day. we were Spinn g Cotton. mr Ballard Gone to Coart on ye grand Jury. Mrs Coy here, Polly Haml n also. Doct r Coney returnd from Boston, and James Burten. Cyrus B t 14-1/2 lb Butter of Abra m Page. I pick t String Beens.
a Clear Day, our friends took Breakfast & departed. Cap t Savig s wife here [ ]. I am unwell y s day. mr Densmoor helpt Btcher a Swine which w d 264 lb.
A Clear day. I went to Mr Fosters, Calld at Williams s . y e girls washt & went to see Polly. Jon o & Eph m gone after 66 Loggs w h w t adrift.

Clear and Cool. thee Girls washt & Scourd & washt y e floors. mr Ballard went to Bisha Cowens. mrs Woodward here. Jon o been to Cobese. I have been at home. y e girls went to mr Westons after they had done work.

Clear. Mr Ballard and Cowen work t on y e Road South of here. the Girls washt and went to Williams s . Son Town Came here. mr Holloway mended my Tea Pot. Gillbr h went from here. mr Cobb & son Came here after all were in Bed Excp t my self. we Borrow d a quarter of veal of mr Brook which w t 15-1/2 lb.

Clear. mr Ballard work d about home. I went to Mr Williams s . mrs Page there. James Slacpool Sleeps here. the anaversery of the Death of my Daug t Martha who Deceas t in 1769 aged 8 years & 2 months & 28 Days.
a rainy Day. we Spun Cottne. mr Ballard went to mr Pollards to Settle acounts. we are informd y t Emry & mr Fairfield are Excieding dangerous.
A I was unwell, had ye Collick. my famely, Except my Self & Eph m , attended worship.
Clear & pleas t , Fast Day. mrs Weston here, Doc t Coney also, & dind. we had a Legg of pork. mr Ballard Carried mrs weston home. I have been at home all day. mr BiSbe remoovd to his farm.

we breud a barril & half of Beer. I planted 2 Ears of Corn which mrs Hatch made a present of to Eph m . mr Ballard went to Pollards. I went to N r Williams. Charls Cleark paid 9/ which was Due for attending his wife & for medicin.

Clear. I have been at home. mrs Bisbee and Lidia here. I went to y e field. Isaac Savage here from Coart. mrs Chamberlin & mrs Clough. mr Ballard went to y e Hook for Stors which mr Bonny Br t from Boston. 1 Barril Pork, 1 Do of Rhum, 01 lb Chocolot. Eph went with him.

Clear. I carded Cottne & Cutt Aulders and maid a Sort of a fence part round the yard By the mill Pond, and then was Calld to Eliab Shaws to See his Children, they being Sick with y e Canker rash. Hannah North, Tammy & Sally Cox here. Bro t a quarter of Lamb, wt 7-1/2 lb. Polly Bisbe & Adams here to Day.

Clear. I went to Esq r Howards & mr Suels to visit y e Sick. mr Suel made me a present of a Calf Skin. I was Calld at 10 / OClock in y e Evng to Ezra Hodges s wife, Shee being in Travail. i walk there in 20 [minutes].

Birth. X Henry Babcocks Dafter born at five in morn. XX I was Calld at 5 O Clock y s morn to Henry Babcocks, his wife being in Travil. arivd there about Day Light; found her put to bed, the operation performd By mrs Smith. mrs Babcock I found in Severe pain; her complaints So great & Shee very Desireous I should inquire into y e Cause. I Complyd & found her greatly ingered by some misshap. mrs Smith does not alow y t Shee was Sencible of it. however her, Viz mrs Bab ks , Distres was so very Severe we were apprehencive Shee was Expiring. Sent for Doct Colman But Dr Williams fortunately Came in & prescribed remidies which aford Some relief. I Left him there & returnd home at 10/PM.
A fine Day. Theop h & Polly Hamlin Came here. I Comd 7-1/2 lb of flax. at home all day.

I have been at home. mr Ballard gone to Doc t Coneys till noone. mrs Johnston Came here with her yonges t Child. Polly Hamlin went from here to mr Crages, he is Returnd from the westward & Jese from Vasalboro.
A Stormy day. Mr Ballard Left home for Sebestakuk. mrs Farly here, says her famely are in Sufering Circumstances. I cardid Tow for Hannah & Dolly to spin.
a Clear Day. we Boild a Linning warp. I was Calld to mr Bisbes to See Lidia who is Sick with y e Disintary. Lost a Shoe of y e hors.

Clear. mr Ballard Came home from viewing Land belonging to mr Pitts s Heirs. y e mills have been stop t from going by y e freshet. Cap t Grant Dind here. mr Ne d Savage s wife & Polly Drank Coffee with me. Son Town Sleeps here.
I went to Ditos Before noone. his wife interd y s after n ; a Larg number attended. I tarried all night & watcht with Polly & Peggy.
At Blakes, his wife unwell. I went to Tilars.
I have been at home. mr Ballard & Ben n Brown junr furrowing. Jon o & Cowen gone to help a Fammely up river. James Moore informs y t mrs Norris is very unwell Still.

at home. Eliphlit Cleand my Seller. mr Ballard Came from y e hook, then went to mr Bullins. W m Kannadies wife, I paid her what I owed her, Polly H., B. Peirce here, drank Coffee. Son Town Came down, Sleeps here y s night. Danniel Robbins unwell. I made him Some Catnip Tea. mr Blakman & Asa Mason were over Sett a Crosing y e river; Lost Corn & other articles, but were bot h savd from Drowning. James Bolton took y m up.

Birth. X Georg Boltons Son. X Cool Morn. I was Calld at 4/O Clok to Georg Boltons wife in Travil, put her Safe to Bed with a fine Son at 11 O Clok. Returnd home y s aftern. mrs Gardy Calld at mr Boltons. Jenny Coole here, Drank Tea. mr Ballard Came from Coart.

A A Clear morn. mr Brown went in hast after Doc t Colman for his Eldist Son being sick. I went from home at 12 O Clok to See him, find him very ill. Returnd home at Sun Set, found Sherebiah, Betsy & Polly Town and James Stacpool here. I was informd that mr Hathaway who was Drowned Last week was taken up & is to be interd this day. Eph m Cowin Came here y s Evinng to work for mr Ballard one month.
A Cloudy. Jon o Cowen & Hannah & Dolly went to Esq r Petingels to Meeting. I walked to mr Williams s , found y m well. mr Smith there.

A it raind y s forenoon. mr Town & Dexter Left here after n . Polly & Sally, mr Wil[nin] & wife here. mr Savage dind w h us. Lethgo, Davis, Brooks, The o H., Jesse & Burten all here y s day. I have been at home till 11 Evn when Calld out of Bed to mr Pattins. went on foot to Brooks s , then by water.
B I Came home from y e fort about noone, attended worship after n . mrs Jesse Koofe Slept here. Sam l Bullin & Ep n Cowen also.

X Birth. Capt Sprin grs Dafter. I was Calld at 10 O Clock in y e morn in haste to Capt Jobe Springers wife in travil, who was safe X Delv d Soone after my arival there of a Dafter. Left y m Both Comfortable and X returnd Before night. the Birth at 2 O clock.
I feel unwell y t . Mr Ballard gone to Lay out Road from ye Hook towards [winthrop]. it Storms. ye Girls are washing. I was Calld to Joseph Williamses at y e hook, his wife in travil.

thee Girls washt. I helpt do hous work. mr Blanchard returnd f m yarmouth. mr Wil ms here for Some Lee. a Little rain fell. mr Savage Came from Winth p , informs of y e Death of the widdow Allin, Daughter to mr Hopkins.
X Birth. Pattins Dafter. I put mrs Pattin to Bed with a Dafter at 4 in Morn. Came by water as far as Davis s Store, then walkt home. arivd at :01: o Clok morn.

it raind y s morn. our friends Set out for Cabesy, mr Ballard for pounalboro. I spun Shoe thread. mrs Weston here aftern n , mr Stickney also. mr Parmer here from Sebastacuk. Dolly and Polly Town & Eph at Boltons.
Clear. the girls washt. Mr Ballard wint to mr Sualls foren n , to town meating after n . mrs Copelin & mrs Hodges here. I feel unwell. Cowen Moed y e gardin. we pick t some Cotten.

this is Daughter Towns Birth Day, aged 28 years. I am not So well as I coold wish. my girls washing. Hannah North here, Says her Mame is Coming to See me. David Fletchers wife was Delivrd of a Son y e 22 ins t . Mrs North & y e two mrs Cox s here, mr Brooks w h them. mr Ballard w t to mr Bisbees. Doct Coney here, Says mrs Hardin is unwell again. Polly & Sally, Theoph s & [Jemmy] & Elijah Crage here at Evinn g .
Siesd with a pain in my Head.
unwell. thee women Calld & Tarried [till] Tuesday morn then Dismist, Shee [being] some more Comfortable but not [wishing] to Dismiss me So I am there yet.
A Clear day. we are whitening Cloath. I have Been at home. Hannah fell off our new hors. Betsy Chever & Hannah North here.

Clear & warm. mr Ballard Gone to Coart. mrs Gardy & Bolton Came here. Betsy Coburn & Han h Mc Cathny, mr Twing & Jack North Drank Tea here. Cyrus Bought 4-1/2 lb Butter of Abr m Page. Gillbreath, Rufus Ballard, & Conerad Sleep here.
it began to rain about twelv, a Stormy after n . y e Girls & I spinn g Cottne. I had y e Collic all night. mr Ballard been to Pits town.
Clear & hott. we Bak t . Polly Fletchr Bak t for mrs Williams. we spun some Cottin. y e Girls went to pique Blue berries. I Boiled a fine Linning warp, 32 skeins.
B At Blakes. it Snowd. Shee cood not Consent I shood Come home.
I finish d my gloves & was Calld to Charles Clearks, his wife very unwell. I Sett up with her the most of ye night. Shee was attended with Some feaver.

it Thundred & raind before morn & has been a rainy day. I Bog t 25 lb of sheeps wool. I went to mr Porters & Crages & Williams s . y e girls spun. mrs Wil ms comfortable. mr Twing unwell. I Sent him some Pills.
I am unwell. mr Ballard Gone to mr Suels with ye other Select Gentlemen to Settle with ye Revd mr Noble for preaching in ys town.

Birth. James Moors Son.X I was Calld at 4/O Clok to Brian Fletchers, his wife being unwell, but got better & her women went home. old mrs Fletcher & I went to Roberts after n . I was Calld from there in hast to James Moors wife, being in Travill. Shee was Safe Delivrd of a Son at 10 Evinn g . Calld from there to mrs Norris s who had took Cold, adminniStred Something which gave relief.

Clear morn. mr Ballard went to the NW part of y e Town to take Valluation. I went aftern n to mr Westons, mr Pollards, Colo n Norths & mr Williams s . Dolly & Betsy Chever went to mr Bisbies & mr Fauts a visiting.

Clear. Son Town & Jonathan went to Cobese, returnd y s aftern n .
