Brot Betsy up. informd y t a young man had fell into y e streem and was almost drowned, but revived. mrs s Brown & Farwel here. we here y t Emrys Leg is Like to ganger. Broth Towns wife was Delivd y e 27 ins t of a Dafter & is very ill, in danger of a feaver. I here also y t y e w o Fitch has had a Son & a young wom n at Swetlands, Bets Tarr by name, a Daft.

Birth. X Josept Williams s Dafter & first Child. X I was Calld at 01/O Clok ys morn to Naigh r Williams s wife in Travil. Shee was very ill all day till about ten in y e Evinng when Safely Deliv d of a fine Dafter w t 9 lb. I tarid all night. Shee Seemd much fatagud. Sally Peirce Came and tarried with her. Eliab Purkins wife Dilvd of a Son yesterd.
Cloudy morn. mr Ballard went to y e Med o . the Girls Pulld Flax. mrs Porter & Polly Hamlin here. mrs Foster Sent me Some Pees. mr Stephins a Turner Sleeps here.
Mr Ballard mowd on y e Entervail. Polly Taylor & Dolly finisht pulling our flax. mrs [Wilm s ] here. mrs Densmore went home.
Clear, Some snow fell Last night. mrs Wilms here y s after n . Polly Hamlin at Evinn g . I finish t Cyrus s Gloves. have been at home all Day.

Birth. Isaac Cowens Dafter.X Calld y s morn at 8/O Clok to Isaac Cowen s to See his wife, arivd there at 1 / PM. found her Safe Deliv d of a Daughter, Born betwixt Six & Seven O Clok. Left them at 3. Returnd home 7, very much fatagud. had 2 falls from my hors which Lamd me Some. Polly & Sally here when I came home.

Clear. I have been at home. Bak t flower Bread & ma d Soap. mr Lee was here. Hannah work t for Polly Hm ln . Dolly & Polly Town went to mr Crages. mr Foster brot a pair of shoes for Polly which Cyrus givs her.
Clear & Cool morn. the girls Scourd & wash t y e floors. mr Leighton Dind here. we had Roast Lamb, pees & Cucumbers. I was informd y t mr Coller of winslow has Buried 2 Daughters, all they had.
I have been at home. Polly Taylor spun 6 Skeins of Cottne & Dolly & Hannah did hous work. mr Ballard Came home, he is informd of y e Death of Death of Doct Gardner. Ezckiel Leighton Sleeps here.
very pleas t . I Com d 6-1/2 lb of flax. the ice moovd in y e river, jamd as Low as mr Brooks s .

Clear. mr Jonston Came here, mr Biges also. mr John S t on Left here for home y s after n , and I went to mr Cowens with a Short webb to be wove. on my return Calld at Densmoores, his wife unwell. our Saw mill Beg n to go y s Day.
A Cloudy, Cold Day. thee ground frose. I have been at home Carding Tow.

Clear. Esqr Lovjoy Dind here, Oriah Cleark & his Son also. Son Town Came here. Polly Hamlin & Betsy Chever here. mr Ballard at mr Pollards after n. X. I Lent Doc t Coney six penny wt & a half X of X Rhubarb X. [sic] I have been at home y s Day.

A Clear Morn, it Raind after n . mr Dexter brot Loggs. mr Blanchard & Noah & ye Team work t at mr Williams s . his wife here after n , Drank Coffee. Rhubin Moore Sleeps here y s Night. informs of y e death of an infant of Collins Moors, a Twin of a month old. I spun Some Thread. Light in y e North this Evinn g .

I have been at home. Benjamin White Bro t me a pair of Flat Irons, pr s 6/, which is my fee, 2/ remains, Due for remidies. Dolly is 14 years of age this Day. Parthena Barton here. mr Ballard mett y e Select Gentlemen at mr Pollards this fore noon.

A Clear. I was Calld to See Asa Mason, his foot wounded. I dres t it & returnd. Calld to See mr Ben n Brown who is Sick, his youngest Child unwell also. After I Came home, w t to See Neigh r Williams, he being unwell. Dolly s Throat Soar yet.

A very warm for march. y e ice on y e moove. a Breach Discoverd in ye Dam ys morn. our fammily all attended Devine Servis Except Ep h & my Self. Neighbor Williams & wife here after meeting, Brooks & Davis also.
A Clear. Son Town went from here. Polly Hamlin & Hannah went to mr Bisbe s . Lidia is Better. Esq r Lovjoy here, Isaac Savage & his wife also.

A A very warm Day. I was very unwell in y e fore noon. attended Devine Servis after n & Calld by Col o Norths Desire to See his Lady, Shee being unwell. I returnd home & went to N r Savages to See his Dater Hannah, Shee being unwell. Hannah & Dolly gone to Neigh r Williams s .
I came home from Blakes, Left her Better.
A it began to Snow at one O Clok y s morn, a tedious Storm till 4 y s afternoon. Mr Ballard not Returnd. Y e Severes t Storm we have had this winter.
a loury morn. I carried 36 Skeins of Linn g Warp to mrs Chamberlin to weave & 7 of Tow filling. a rainy afternoone. our gardin ploughd. mr Blanchard & Noah Woodward Came to work here.

A Cloudy day. mrs Densm r Came here & work t for me. I feel some unwell, Dolly also. mr Ballard makeing plan. Doc t Coney here, Let me have half oz. harts horn & 2 Stiptic Poud s , p rs 1/. [Tom Jons n] Came for me to See mr Willm s , he spits Blood.

Birth. mr Westn s Son. I was Calld to Mrs Westons at 1 O/Clock in morn, Shee being in Labour; was Delivred of a Son at 7 in y e morn. I returnd home about one aftern. Left y m Comfortable. mr Hopkins & Stanley here. Polly Fletcher Came to nurs mrs Weston. mr Ballard Been with y e Courts Committee on the Roads from y e River to winthrop & west & to y e Country Road East ward, which they have Laid out.
mr Ben n Edwards & 3 men from Charlton dind here. I wrote to Brot h Waters by them. mr Ballard planted Corn y s day. our Mare Lent to go to Varsalboro.

Clear. I howd the Beens & Cucumbers in the yard by y e Brook & spun some s h thread. took a walk with Eph & Polly as far as mr Williams s . Dolly wed Gardin. Jon o & Cowen Set 400 plants we Bought of mrs Bolton.

a Cloudy day. mr Ballard & 12 men wrk d on y e Road up y e hill North of our hous. mr Smily here, Dind. Jon o Came home from Son Towns, they are well. we Bak d a quart r of Veal & Began to Spin our Cottne. Jon o Bro t home Some herrin fish f m Towns.

X Birth. Moses Whites Dafter. X a rainy day. I was Calld to moses Whiles, his wife in travil. I went by water to Jacsons Landing then walk d , arivd at 1 O Clok. Shee was Safely Delivd of a Dafter about 5. I rode to y e fort, Crost y e river, arivd at home at 8 y s Evin g . found Theophe ls , Daniel & Eliphelit here a Setling y r Sawing afairs. I Charg d mr White 7/ for Extract n & medisin.
A Clear. I was Calld to Cap t Savages to See his wife & Sett up with her this Night. mr Ballard went to Winthrop to meeting.

Clear. Clarrisa went. Jon o Came from watching with mr Brown, Says he is Better; Hannah from watch ng w h mrs Hodges, Shee is Better. I went to mr Porters on a visit, was at mr longs. Rhuben Cowen had 1 oz. Salv for him Self & 1 oz. for Sam l Jackson, did not pay for it. november 17, Jackson paid for his Salv.
unwell Still.

Clear. Mr Blanchard Sett out for North Yarmoth, Gillbreath for home. old mr Smyle here. mr William Gardner, also Polly Hamlin & Sally Peirce. I have been at home ys day. mr Ballard is 61 years of age y s Day.
at home. mr Gardy went to y e fort. Polly H. here of an Erand. I spun thread & knit. Dan l Breakfasted here, means to Bord at Boltons from y s time.
Cloudy morn. Polly Haml n here. Doct r Barton Breakfasted with us. we Began to hill our Corn.

Clear. Revd Mr Foster Dind here. we Spun Cottne. I went to mr Williams s . Polly Fletcher wint from Nursing her. I receivd a pair of Shoes & 2/ from mr Beeman for attending his wife & for Medisen, of Savage Bolton 1-1/2 lb Cottne for Servis Done there.
I have been at home till 7/O Clok when Calld to Ben n Browns to See him & Son Nathan l . I Sett up with him y s night. he rested very Comfortable. it raind.
at Clearks. gave his wife a portion of phisic which gave her Releaf. I left her about 5 O/Clock & Came home upon ye river.
Clear. I Carded Cottne. y e girls washt. old mrs Bolton, mrs Chamberlin & mrs Savage here, Drank Coffee. mr Pattin Came for me to See his wife who - I was at Pattins, his wife is unwell.

rainy. I Came home from mr Browns. Shee gave me a piece of Beef. Brely & family arivd at his Camp Last Evinng. my girls washing. mr Foster & his two Brothers here after n . & Polly & Sally here. mr Ballard and Theoh ph Setled acounts.
A Clear Day. mr Ballard went to Cabasy, Hannah and Dolly to mr Pollards. I am unwell. Cyrus Brought hannahs Shoes home.
A Shoury Day. Polly Ham ln here to work. I went to See mr Williams s , he is Lame. Eph m Cowin Bro t Turnip Plants from Wilm ss . mr Ballard at mr Pollards.

A Clear Day. Polly Hamlin Dind here & mr Leighton, Son Town & Betsy. John Shaw work t for us & Isaace Savage y e 3 d . The Girls gone to mr Westons y s aftern n . mrs Williams here towards Evin g . we had some apple pies.

Clear. I Came home from Williams s y e morn at 01/O Clok. Left her very Comfortable. Polly Fletcher is Nurs. Mrs Cowen & mrs Follett here. Ben n Edwards & Wills Dind with us. Hannah & Dolly went to See mrs Wil ms . Col o North is returnd from Boston.
Clear & Hott. we pulld flax. mr Ellis, mrs Stone & Polly Cowen dind here, Brot h Moore been here, informs y t mr Fairfield is very Dangers.

I went to mr Porters. Bo t 2 oz. Indigo, 2 Green Col rd Bowls, 1 Tunnill, 1 Dipper, 1 Pepper Box, 2 Tumblers & 3 y d Tape, paid with an order from Isaac Cowen. Jon o has Changd y e mare for a hors. Hann h receivd a Line from Daft r Town, her fammely all well.
Clear. I gatherd Biens. Gillbr h Dind here. mrs Powers, Cate Scott & Hann h Fuller drank Coffee. Wil m & wife here, mrs Bisbee & Lidia.

X Birth. X X Ezra Hodges Son. XX Clear. y e Girls wash t . mr Ballard workt on y e Rode by y e mill. mr Vaun here. I did hous work & Sowd Seeds. was Calld by mr Pollard at 6/ PM to mrs Hodges. Shee in Travil and was Safe Delv d of a fine Son about 11/. I then wint in hast to mrs Brown in Travil, arivd there at midnit.
South wind & rain. I have been unwell.
Clear & Cool. I doubeld & twisted some Tow yarn. Susanna Cowin Brought home 13 yds of Cloath which Shee wove for me. mr Burrows & wid o Clearks son Slept here.

Very hot. old Mrs Cowin here & dind. her Husband car d to jale for Debt. Mr Ballard gone to Cabese & Town meeting. I maid a Sheet & wed gardin. A thunder Shower. mr Lee & Brooks here, and mrs Shaw. W m Keenady after me to See his wife. I was lame & did not go.
A rainy Day. Mr Ballard & Lee Settld & Lee gave a note of 11=13:7 for the Ballance. I have been at home, hoad y e Peas aftern. mrs Bolton had 1/2 lb Tea for plants.

Clear & hott. mr Ballard, Savage and Cowen mending y e Dam. I went aftern n to mr Edsons & Carried 32 Skeins of Linning warp for her to weave, 11-1/2 skn s of Tow y n & 8 of Cottne. the girls went to n r Savages for green Peas. I let y m have 1 lb of Butter.
I have been at home. mr Ballard is unwell, has taken Some Soap pills. Polly Taylor & her Cousins here, mr Bolton & Chamberlin also.

I was Called Early y s morn to See Lidia Savage, who was very ill. gave her some urin & honney & Some liquirsh & put a plaster to her Stomach. went up after n , find her Relievd. Went to See Neigh r Williams, find him Better. hear mr Brown is mending.

Birth.X mr Porters Son.XX I am unwell Still. Mrs Brown & her Sister Higins here. Isaac Herdin had 1 oz. of Burn Salv, price 1/ which is not pd. my Girls Brueing & Scouring y e puter. the Saw mill has gone Some y s day. I was Calld To mr Porters wife at half after Seven in Eving. Shee Being in Travil and Put her Safe to Bed with a Son at half after 9/O Clok. I tarried with her all night. fee recievd.
A Clear. I was at mr Porters y s fore noon, attended Divine Servis after n , was agreeably Entertaind with a discoarce Delivrd By Revd John Foster of Paxton.
A Clear, wind N.W. Mr Williams & his wife Dind with us. Hannah & Dolly went home w h her.

A Birth. mr Gordins Dafter. X. receivd not any thing. Cloudy foren n . I was Calld at 8 O/Clok y s morn to Mr Gordins, his wife in Travil. found her Put to bed by old mrs Fletcher with a Dafter. I calld at mr Willims on my return, found her unwell. tarried there till towards Evin g , left her more Comfortable. mr Lee here at Evn g and Polly Hamlin.
A A Clear day. mr Ballard very unwell. I Bak t Some Bread for him to Carry w t him if able to go on y e Bussiness of Deviding Pitts s Land.
A A Clear Day. I attendid y e worship. Calld to See mrs Porter, was at mr Westons in Intermition. Nabby Jackson here for Some Maiden hair for mrs Bent who Remn s poorly.
A Clear. I have been at home. Jon o is unwell. I gave him a Portion of Rhuburb. we kill d a Chikin, made Some Broth. Sherbiah Town Came here, Left y e famely well

A A Clear, Pleas t day. I attended meeting, the Sacrament adminesterd. mrs Westons Son Baptised by y e name of Samuel. mr Ballard & I went to visit y e Revd mr Foster this Evening. mrs Rebeckah Wiman & Sally Peirce here. David Nichols & mr Atwoods Son here with y e Capt n . Capt Nichols here from OXford, Brog t a Letter from Brother Collins of Oct the 1 st .

A Clear. I attended Devine Servis. Revd Mr Moore performd. mr Bullins yongest Dafter Fainted & was Carried out of y e hous to mr Pollards. Shee recoverd her Sences just as Servis was Ended. I attended after n . Polly Taylor and her Sister sup t here. mr Fairfield wounded.
Clear, wind NW. Mrs Springer Dind here. we spun Tow.
I was at home. mr Chamberl n work t here. Uriah Cleark & wife & Son & mrs Wilm s Drank Tea here, Daniel Robbins also. Broth Moore sent for his Nails & some Rhum.

Clear. y e girls washt & Bak t & Browd 1/2 Barril of Beere. mr Ballard went to Church meeting. Mr Leighton & Ezekiel Came to work for us, Ep m Cowen also. we Receivd a Great wheal from Nathan Tylor. [Sal] Cowen Delivd of a dafter.
a hott day. mr Ballard gone on y e Buisiness above mention d . y e girls wash t . I Twisted 18 Knotts of thread. Esqr Lovjoy Breakfasted h.
I Came home from Cap t Savages. Left her more Comfortable. Betsy Thomas Better. I have been to See mrs Weston. mrs Turner there with the Babe. mr Ballard been to the Hook on Busin s for mr Vaun.

Clear. a great frost y s morn. Shere Town went from here to Cobese, mr Ballard to Joseph Stacpools Surveying. Cyrus Left home for Son Towns at 1/O Clok. Jon o tended y e mill. I have been unwell today.

Clear. I did hous work fore n , went to Lecter after n . Calld to See mrs Porter, find her Exercised w h pain & Some feaver. I came home to See to my afairs. Returnd to See her at 1 0 c ys Ev ng . Set with her & Left her more Comfortable y s morn.

A Clear Day. Polly went home. mr Davis went from here with Mr Bullin. mr Ballard is takeing Valluation. y e Girls went from home at 12 O Clok to take Leav of Polly Hamlin, Shee being Bound for oxford. I wrote a Letter to Deacon Davis, 1 to Brot h Collins & 1 to Sister Waters, which I Sent by them for to be Carried by mr Hamlin. I have Bak t for mr Brooks & Bakt Some mins Pies. Ben Brown work t here.

A Clear Day. I made a Syrrup for mrs Weston and for mrs Porter, & Some oil a mulge & went to See mrs Porter. mrs Coy & Dafter were here. Asa Mason here to have his foot Drest. mr Ballard & others workt on y e rode by y e Little Brook South of this. mr Stevens, a Turner, Sleeps here. Brog t me a morter.
a Chilly day. mr Ballard & Jonotha n Surveying for mr Vaughn. mrs Woodward Calld as Shee was Carrying mr Fosters Little Son home. I have been at home. Dolly fell down Stairs and hurt her.
I was at home all Day. y e Corn mill Set to goin g .
A rainy day. mrs Densmore here. I went to mr Westons for sewing Silk y s morn. Shee went home at Evinn g . I went to Capt Savages. mr Ballard maid plan.

a clear day. I Came from mr Porters at Sun rise, was at mr Westons, Pollards, & Brookse s . B t a Black handkercf of a Dutchm n , a Case of knives & forks of mr Brooke. have had much Labour to perform y s Day. Sister Williams Came here about 1/O Clok. Jon n killd a Steer. Cyrus went to y e hook for some Earthen ware. mr Pollard gave a dollar which was Left for me by a man from winth p .
I spun 14 knots of thread. mr Ballard went to Brot h Moores, heard y t Doc t Barton has Removd to Winslow. our Mare Returnd. Mr Toby from Sandage here & mr Bisbee, Polly & Sally Drank Tea here.

Clear. mr Ballard work d about home. I went to Mr Williams s . mrs Page there. James Slacpool Sleeps here. the anaversery of the Death of my Daug t Martha who Deceas t in 1769 aged 8 years & 2 months & 28 Days.
a Clear Day. I went to See Sally Brown. She is very unwell. Mr Ballard went to Survay Land for Doc t Coney. Mrs Edson Bro t me home 24 & 3/4 yds Cottne & Linning Cloath w h Shee wove.
at hatches. feel some better.
I spun some thread & wed gardin, a shower aftern n . mrs Foster Came here, Polly and Sally also.
Clear. Briant Fletcher Dind here. the wid o Howard, mrs Ferwell, mrs Betsy & Polly Howard here aftern n . I went to mr Williams s about Sun Sett. it rains y s Evinng.

Clear. I carded Cottne & Cutt Aulders and maid a Sort of a fence part round the yard By the mill Pond, and then was Calld to Eliab Shaws to See his Children, they being Sick with y e Canker rash. Hannah North, Tammy & Sally Cox here. Bro t a quarter of Lamb, wt 7-1/2 lb. Polly Bisbe & Adams here to Day.

it Snowd. mr Ballard gone to Brot h Moors. David Learned here. I have been unwell ys [day]. when Jon o got up this morn, he found a Chair in the fire part Burnt, a pair of Shoes & a pair of hoes of Cyrus s , allso a coat of [ ].

I Came home from Pattings with Neigh r Williams, Calld there. we spun Cotten. ye girls gone to mr Crages y s Evinn g . it is Cloudy. mr Ballard Came home from Coart after we were all in Bed. mr Porter had 2000 of Cl r Boards.
I have been at home, feel unwell. mr Weston here to Settle with Mr Ballard. John Church also Setling about his Timbr which was Sawd on our mill. mr Foster brought Pollys Shoes home; new ones.

A Clear warm day. mr Ballard at work on the Rode up y e hill N of our hous I spun Some Cotten for mrs Weston & finish t a pair of Tow hoes for mr Ballard. y e Girls went to N r Williams s . mr Halloway mend d puter for me. Polly went home y s morn.

Cloudy & Some rain. mrs Farley here. I went to mr Williams s . Shee has been up & is as well as Can be Expected. I was at mr Porters & mr Westons. Spoke w h mrs Pollard. I hear y t Solo mo Browns wife Deceast Last wednsday in Travil, has left a poor famely.
a very hott Day. we pulled flax. I Bo t a Spindle of mr Savage, prs 1/6.
I was at home, did housel work. y e girls finish t y r goun s , y e men repairing y e Corn mill. Cyrus Bo t 15 lb of Butter of Abr m Page.
Clear. I gatherd Seeds & did hous work. Cyrus & Hannah went to Son Towns. Jones, of winthrop, dind here. mr Ballard Came home at night.

Birth. Georg Browns Son. Mrs Brown Calld her women & was Safe Delivrd at noon of a Son which w d 11-1/4 lb. I went after Dinner to See Cap t Savages wife, find her able to Set up. returnd home at half after 6/PM. find mr Williams & wife here. I went to Bed at Eight.

A a hot Day. I had a pain in my head, did not attend Divine Servis y e fore noon, went after n . Brot h Moore & mrs Brown here at intermition. I went to See mrs Williams at Even ng . mrs Pollard & Dorcas there. my Girls & Eph m went Down. Eph m Cowen Carried Becke Bisbe home.
A A very hott day. I was Calld to Cap t Savages at Evinng, watch t . Cyrus returnd from Towns.
A A Clear day. Hannah & Dolly wore y r New gouns. I stayd at home. Patty Towns birthday, Shee is three years of age.

A A Clear day. Ben n Brown Calld here going to attend worship at Winthrop. mr Williams here; I applid a plaster of Comphry to his ancle. I have red in mr Marshalls Gospel Mistry Mystery of Sanctification.

Birth. Daniel Savig Juners Son. XX I was Calld at 3 y s morn to Daniel Savages wife in travil. Shee was Safe Deliverd at Two after n of a Son. I Left her & Child Cleverly & arivd at home about 6/, then went to See Mrs Hodges, Shee being not So well as I could wish. Calld to see Betsy Chever who is not well. returnd home at 9. mr Crage here. Polly & Thop h here at Evinn g .

this is 17 years Since y e Death of my Daft, Triphina, who Deceast Æ 4 y r & 3 months. I was Calld y s day to See mrs Weston, Shee being unwell. mrs North unwell also. Parthena Barton here, B t 2 gown patren.

a Smoak y thik air and hott. Polly Taylor here on a visit. we Bak d for Williams & Brooks & spun Some Cotton. mr Ballard, Jon o & Cowen went to See a meeting hous raised at Winthrop, the Buisines performd with Safety.
I was Calld to See Cap t Savages wife who is Sick of a feaver. Shee took phisick, was very Sick after y e operation. I watch t with her this Night.
Cyrus 30 years old y s Day. I came home by Fort western. Dolly wash t . mr Ballard Surveying for mr Vaun, gone y s night.

I was Calld 6/ y s morn to See mrs Hodges, found her very ill. adminstred a Clister & other remedies whi[ch] gave relief. returnd hom at 5/, found Clar s Barton here. Dolly & Shee went to mr Crages to See Hannah.

A Clear morn, Cloudy aftern n . I Came home from mr Springers. Left them Cleverly arivd at home at 12 O Clok. was Calld at 2 PM to mr Woodwards to See mr Blakman who is unwell. Came home at 6. the girls went to mr Westons. mr Ballard went to ye hook fore n , to Revd mr Fosters after n . Clarisa Barton here.
Clear. we Spun Tow & Brewd. yong mrs Hardin here & drank Tea. Jon o gon to Sebastakuc. Mr Ballard tended Saw mill.

Mr Ballard went to y e hook. I went to Williams. Levy Moore & David Smily here, informs that Sister Barton was Diliv d of a son Las t Sunday, her twelvth child and 5 son. Briant Fletcher had his arm Broke by the fall of a tree.

Clear. our men went to mow y e Meddow near mr Taylors. mr Ballard & Eph m went to Carry y r Dinner. old mrs Bolton & mrs Savage Drank Coffee here. we spun Some. Polly Taylor Sleeps here. I feele unwell. mrs Duttin Dilivrd of a Dafter, I hear.
Clear & Cool. I was at home. mrs Williams here. mr Jones y t Livs at Doct Coneys, h r y s Evin g .

A rainy day. I have been at home. Jonathan was very voialant. Seasd with feaver and universally pained. we put him to Bed, apply d onions to his feet, gave him tees to promote Sweting. Set up w t him till 1/O/Clok.

Clear & warm. mr Smyle here. mr Ballard paid him four Dollars which was Due for Butter we had of him Last Novem r y e 12 day. mr Ball d went to his Land up river. mr Williams of Varsalboro here. mrs Gardy Sleeps here, Polly Haml n also. I made a Syrrup for mrs Weston. Cate Williams here for milk. Gillbreath Sleeps here.
Cloudy & Some rain. Ben n Br n & Tim y Woodw d here to work. mr Ballard at Doct Coneys makeing rates. Mr Hamlin & Polly Left mr Crages Bound for OXford. mr Woodw d Eat Breakfs t here.
A Clear day. mr Ballard & others work t on y e Rode. Pamela Barton Came here to work for me. I have been fiting my wool for Spinng. Rebecah Tounsen, a Son Born.

Clear. mrs Woodward here, made me a presn t of a Spairrib. mr Ballard Surveying. Jon o assisted him. mr Bullin here, Says mrs Bent is Better. I have been at home. Hannah wash t Daniels Blankett & our Swine tore it into Strips.

Clear morn. I Came home from Hardins at 1 OClok, was iminediately Calld to See mrs Weston, Shee being very unwell. I aply d a Blister, Batht her feet, put on a Back Plaster, returnd home at Evinng. Left her a Little Easyer. left mrs Hardin Comfortable. Shee was help t up & her Bed made. my girls help t mrs Pollard quilt Bed quilt. Lidia Bisbe was here after noone.
I was at home. Mr Hopkins & Stanley went home.

Clear. I Came home after n , found Dolly Better. Polly Taylor & Lucy Porter here. Doc t Coney here from mr Browns, Says he is very poorly. mr Ballard Been to y e hook, Carrid thee plann to mr Vaun, receivd his pay. Came home y s Evinng. Jon o returnd from Sandy river, Informs y t mrs Eatons father Deseast Last w k & was interd on Sunday Last.
Clear & Pleas t . the Revd Isaac Foster was ordaind in this Town. my Famely all attended Except my Self & Eph m . mr Fuller, Doct warren & Brother Town Sup t here. Gillbreath went home after n .
Clear. I have been at home. mr Ballard gone to Col o Howards. Hannah & Polly & Eliz h Crage w t to mr Bisbees & Faughts on a visit. I was Calld to Ben Whites at half after 10, his wife in travil.
at Ditoes. mr Williams went home.
Clear & hott. mrs Coy Breakfasted & Dind here. I have been at home, gatherd herbs. y e girls went to mr Williams s . heard Sally Fletcher is unwell. mrs Fletcher Sent me Some Sheeps wool, 1-1/2 lb.
A I allended worship all day. a Shower. Esqr Lovjoy, David Smily & John Bragg Calld after meeting & Eat with us. this is my Daft r Hannahs Birth day. Aged 17 years. Jon o returnd from Boston.
Clear. I Did hous work & mending. Benjam n Branard Dind here. mr Ballard Came home. Cyrus Carried 1 Bush l wheat & 1 of Indien meel to mr Carr.
Clear & not So Cold. mrs Brown & mrs Hygin here. mr Ballard went to hear Snells trial for abuseing mr Bullin on the high way. he is Laid under Bonds. I finisht futting a pair of hoes for Dyky.

Clear and hott. Cap t Pinkam here, his Legg Soar. I Drest it. Peggy Coob & mrs Foster & Billy here. I Cearded Some Cottne. Jon o rafting Boards fr Boston. mr Ballard B t 7 lb Sugar at mr Porters. Capt Pinkam Borrowd 1 lb of Chocolat.

I Recond with Polly Taylor and paid her all that was Due for her Servis with us Last year. mr Ballard been to Cap t Suels. Mrs Coy & Mrs Bolton here. ye girls washt. Jon o Bro t from Boston 1 Barril of Pork, 1 of Rhum, 1 of Sugar and 1 of flower.
Moderate wether, at home all Day. mr Ballard went to mr Pollards. Dolly wash t at mr Westons. Betsy Bro t her home. I knitt new toes to a pair Hoes for Jon o .

I have been at Cap t Savages till aftern n . Shee took phisick, Seemd Releavd. I Calld at mr Thomas s , Betsy unwell, a pain in her head. Hannah Savage a pain in y e Stomac. Mr Ballard gone on the Estate of Pitts. I hear y t Rhuben Moores Eldist son is Deceast Last Sabbath Day.
A rainy day. mr Ballard Came home. mr Luis & Nath l Low Breakfas d here. Dolly Spun Some wool.

mrs North here fore n . I went as far as y e little brook with her. mr Ballard work t t at Meeting hous hill on y e Rhode. Williams piqut mill, his wife here. mr Ballard & Dan l Robbins Setled y r acounts and they Came out Even. Clarisa went home.

Very pleas t . mrs Foster here, mr Savage and also Sheribiah & Nathan Howard tarry here y s night. Son Town & Ezra Left here for home. mr Mc Masters & his wife here, Brot Cyrus 18 lb of Butter. this is ye aniversary of Father Ballards Death.
Clear & warm. I went to mr Williams s . mrs Pollard Came home w t me. mr Pollard sup t here, mr Savage, Theop h & Polly also. I began a Stockin fr mr Ball d .
Cloudy. I have been at home. Anders n Taylor Sup t here. y s is Son Towns Birth day.
Clear. Jonothan much Better. mr Balr d gone to y e hook. mr Weston & wife, mrs Pollard & Coy, Drank Tea here. Mr Smyle Sleeps here. Hannah & Dolly been to mr Westons, Han h with Polly Hamlin.
Clear & warm. mrs Gardy went from here. Cyrus & Hannah Came home. I hear y t Moses Whites Infant Departed this life y e 25 th in st .
Clear. Tim y work t here. mr Ballard at Doct Coneys. mr Woodward Sleeps h r .
Clear. mrs Foster & Parthena Barton here. my Girls wash t . I finish t piqueing my wool. we are informd y t mr Wiman is com from Boston & Brog t his Sister.
Clear & Coole. mr Ballard, Dicky & Eph m went to finish Surveying mr Vauns Lot. Jon o & Bolton Butcherd a Steer. I have been unwell. y e Girls Breaking wool.
it Snowd. Joth n Suall Built a Stove in the mill. Brother Moor & Saml Comings Dind here. I have Been at home, finisht makeing my apron & did house work. Pamila finish t Spining a woolin pease.
foggy. Sheribiah Town & N. Howard went from here. mr Savage Shod Jon ns oxen. Williams killd a swine for my Sons which w d 223 lb. Kity Savage & Polly & mr Pitt Supt here.
I was at home. it is very Cold, 9 it snowd yesterday.
Clear. I went to See mr Williams, he is Poorly. mrs Gardy Came here aftern n .

Clear & Very pleas t . Shere Town & young mr Howard Breakfasted. mr Bullin, Hopkins & wives, mrs Emerson & [ ] Dind. mr Ballard and I went to mr Pollards, y e Girls to mr Westons. Derias Ballard Came for his mother, they Left here for home at two O/Clok.
A fine, Pleast Day. mrs Porter & Williams here, their Husbands Came to wait on them home. mr Weston & wife here fore noon. mr Ballard went to mr Pollard to hear a Coart.

Birth X Benja n Whites Dafter X Put mrs White Safe to Bed with a Dafter at 3/O Clock aftr n . I returnd home this Evinn g much fatagud, had Collic Symtons. took Some pepper pod steept which [remoovd] it. we are informd y t James Runells, who livs up y e river, struk one Cymbol with an ax on his head. his Life is not Expected.
Clear Day & Cloudy Evin g . I have been at home. mr Ballard went for hay, is gone to mr Pollards y s evinn g . Moses Better. it Snows at 9 in Evinng.
Snow. I have been at home. its Cold.
Moderate. it began to rain ys Eving.
I was at mr Williams s y s Day. Polly Fletchr with her Sister Sally. Dolly Came for me. Rode my New Side Saddle Brot home y s Day.
Clear. I have been at home mending Cloths. mr Ballard Caried my woolin yarns to mrs Edson to weave & his Cloath to mr Densmoors to [make]. very Cold this night.

a Clear Day. mrs Foster Dind here. I Began a Leggin & went to mr Westons. Shee & I made a Settlement of some Tradeing we have had which was not Book t , & there is 2/1 Due to me. mr Ballard done a Little toward fixing y e house.
a Cold Day, Snowd at night. mr Edson brought my woolin Cloath hom. mr Maggs & mrs Brown Dind here. we killed a Swine that w d 109 lb. mr Ballard B t 3-3/4 lb Candles of mr Weildon at /40 pr pound.

Clear & pleasant till towards Evinng. I have been very unwell, attended with a Collick pain, not able to perform any Business. mr Ballard Gone to the meddow after Hay. Eph m Been over y e pond for wood. my husband got a Load of hay, Came home much fatagud. brusd his Shins with the Crust So that they Blistered. I hear that Esqr Howard had an ill turn Last night.

Cloudy. Snowd before night. I went to mr Porters & Pollards. David just arivd. mr Ballard gone to Cutt wood for mr Foster. Williams & True Dresing Flax here. I was Calld to Cap t Sualls wife in Travil, got there at 7 O Clock Evinng.
Cold. I was Calld to see [Billy] James Savage who is Sick. Lucy & Hannah went to mr Pollards.
A very Cold. Daugh t Town & Dolly went to meeting. Peggy & Hannah Cool here.
A a Severe Storm of Snow. mr Ballard went to thee meating hous. Revd mr Foster Came But no other person, So there was no preaching.

A Moderate & Foggy, raind at Evinn g . I took Some aloes, it oprated. I feel Better. Georg Brown here y s Even g , Enforms they are very Sick at Colo Howards. it is a Sickly Time in y s town. Jack Howard Deceast.

A Birth. mr Blakmans Son. X A bitter Cold morn. I rose at day break, had a Shaking fitt & pain in my head. did not attend public worship. Pamele Staid at home. I was Calld to See mrs Blakman in Travil. left home at Sun Sett, got there after much fatagud. found her put Safe to Bed by mrs Ellis, tarried all night. mr Blakman gave me 6/8.

A Birth. Cap t X Harry Sewalls Son. fee Recvd. X. a fogy Day. mrs Suall Delivard at 1 / y s morn of a Son & is Cleaverly. I returnd home at 8 y s morn. Did not atlend worship. Son & Dafter Town, Sherebiah, Ezra & Lucy here. mr Faught & Clarisa Barton sup t here. Sam l Badcock wife to Bed with a Son the 29th of January. mrs Fletcher operator.
Came home at 11/ O Clok. Left all Cleaverly. I went to Cap t Sualls and Thomas Sualls & Revd mr Fosters spent Evinng at Esqr Howards. mr Ballard Came y r to accompany me home.
A Clear & very Cold Day. Excesive Cold night. mr Ballard Spent Evinning at Capt Sualls, Doct Coney also. we had washing Done to day & killd 6 fowls.

Ephm had a Severe fitt. Clear & pleas t . I am free from the Collic pain. we are informd of Jacky Howards Death. I went to attend funeral, but by reason of Esq r Howards being taken very ill, I was Calld in there & tarried with them till about 9 O Clok when Cyrus came there; informd y t Eph m was in a fitt. I returnd home in great hast Led by Cyrus & York. found my Little Son revivd. Left y e Esq r more Comfortable, Betsy also.
Cold. Cap t Savages wife here. I was Calld to See mrs Savage & Jamey, mr Bullin Came there & brough t me & Lucy home; Carried her home with him. I Sett up with her Child till 12 O Clok.
Hannah Carried 30 Skeins of Cottne y n to mr Edsons and Bro t mrs Densmore here to Make y r gouns. I was Calld to See Isaac Hardins wife, Shee is very unwell. I rode my hors.
A a Clear Day. I attended Divine Servis. Revd mr Foster unable to perform. Deacon Emerson officiated in his room. Anne Web & Nabe Pollard here at Evinning.
Cold. mrs [Foster] gone to mr Bullins. Sally Peirce & Betsy Brown here. I Combd 4 lb flax for Jon a . mr Ballard at Coart.
Clear & very pleas t . I was Calld to see mr Savages Dafter, find her very Low. Set up with her all night. Shee puk t up a considerable quantity of phleg m and Seems Some revivd.
I have been at home, Carded Some Cottne. y e Girls went to mr Porters. Polly, Sally & Betsy Chever Came home w t them.

Cloudy morn. I was Calld to See mrs Foster, find her very unwell. I Bathd her Throat, Drest her Blisters & Did for her as far as I Coold. Dolly Being unwell, I returnd. Bathd her Throat & am at home Still. mr Ballard gone to y e hook in mr Vauns Busines s , returnd y s Evinn g .
I have been at home. y e girls wash t . mrs Savage & Kitty & mrs Woodward here. I was Seisd with the Collic in the night, had a Severe Shock. Hannah Calld up to tend me.
Cloudy morn. [ ] to see mr Savages Child n , find them much as they were. Levy Moore & mr Smyle here.
Clear & Cool. mrs Bisbe dind here. I went to Fort western w h her. we Calld at y e Nei brs on y s Side of y e river.
Clear. mr Ballard gone to y e hok Surve[ying]. mrs Porter here y s aftern n . mr Jones [&] Ezek l Leighton Sleep here. I have been [ ]. made a Syrrup for mrs Weston.

Cloudy & warm. I went to See mr Brown, find him very Low, Exercised w h a Cough. A shower at Evn g . Polly & Sally here. mr Crage & y e Girls returnd from mr Bisbe s in y e rain. mr Patten Bro t me a pair of turnd pumps made by mr Cain.

Clear. mr Ballard at Doc t Coneys. Jos h Bullin & Rachel Faught here. Mrs Brown Calld here. Sally Peirce here to Spin Shoe thr d , Drank Tea. ye Girls wash t & wash t Kitchen. I piqut wool. Ben n here all day. Tim 1/2 y e Day. I was Calld to See mrs Bent at half after 10 ys Evinn g . went by water arivd at 12 o Clok, found her very unwell.

Clear. mr Ballard gone to Doc t Coneys. I Sent for mrs Densmore to finish my goun. mrs Cole & Gardin Dind here. Uriah Cleark & wife & Eunice Drank Tea. Benn n Brown and Timme Woodward workt here. Eph m Cowen helpt Digg Potatoes.
Clear. Mr Ballard went to the hook. I have been at home mending Cloaths.
Clear. I have Been at home. mr Woodward Brot us a Swine that wt 70 lb. his wife Carried Jemmy Weston home with her y s Evinng. mr Cobb & Son Sleep here. mr Ballard Br t home 1 lb of Tea.

Clear & Cold. I Came home on the Slead, fited Some things for Lidia Savage; Sent Dolly with them. mr Ballard is gone to See Thom s Sewall to Converse with him Concerning ills he is acused of Spreading of the Revd mr Foster, he returnd with out any Satisfaction.

Clear. mrs Gardy went down below here. Dolly ascisted her as far as Crages. mr Ballard turnd flax. Ephm helpt. Dolly work t for Polly H. aftern n . I Cut my Sage, gave mr Bullin Some. mr Usher had /8 X worth of Salve.

Clear. Eliab Shaw workt for us. mr Brown Dind here. mr Davis Came here, he has y e Shingles. we bled a Catt & applid y e Blood which gave him relief. Doct Lee here. mr Ballard went to Capt Suels. Hannah makeing my Skirt. Polly & Sally Drank Tea w h us.

Clear Day. Snowd at Evin g . Cap t Page & mr Ballard went to Cap t Sualls. I finisht Eph ms Stockins. James Weston Carried By here going home. John Church here says his Son is Sick. mr Porter Came home y s day.
A Snowd this noon. the men went to meeting. it was Cold & windy. my Self & Girls tarried at home.
a Clear Day. y e Girls wash t . Poll Savage here. I have been at home kniting. mr Ballard went to Revd mr Fosters, finds him mending, his Lady unwell. mr Hart of Winslow is here this Evn g .
Clear & Cold. I have been at home. mr Ballard Carried a Load of wood to mr Pollards old hous for Rev d mr Foster. I made me four night Caps.

Exceeding Cold & windy. mr Georg Brown here, has froos Both his Ears. I put some Salve on them. Pamela is 18 years old this Day. we have all Been mending old garments. Welches wife Delivrd of a Dafter the 19th inst. mrs Fletcher operator.

Clear part of y e day. it Snows now. it is 11 in Evinng. Excesive Cold till Evinng. I finish t knitting mr Ballards Leggins & mended Dickys Stockings & Eph ms Trousers. Hannah Did hous work, the other Girls turning Cotten Sheets and other mending.

Clear. Eph m is well as usual. mr Ballard & Cyrus piqut mill. I have Been at home. Begun Ep m a Stockin. hear Esq r Howard is Better, mrs Betsy also. this is the anevercary of my Marriage 32 years Since.
Clear & Cold. I went to See mrs Shaw & knitt on Pamelas Stockin. mr Ballard was at mr Pollards.
I was at Hardins all Day. he went to mr Coneys for apples. She Seems Some [Comfortable]. I came home. Polly Hamlin here to work.
Snowd this Day. mr Bullin Brot Daughter Town here from his house. Brother Moore Dind & mr Bal d , Abial Lovjoy & Ep h Cowen Supt here.
Clear. I Came home at noone. Left his Brothers & Sister there. found Son Town here who informs his Little Dafter is unwell Still, thee rest of his family well.
I was Calld to See mrs Savage, find her Some more Comfortable, & Betsy Thomas Shee is very unwell. Polly Adams here.
Clear. mr Ballard gone to y e hook again. mrs Pollard & mrs Hodges here, Drank Coffee. Clarisa Barton Sleeps here. Jon o unwell, Sleeps on a Bed by y e fire. Dolly unwell also.
I have been weak but free from Pain. the Girls gon to mr Porters y s Evinn g . Cyrus went to mr Carrs for Cloath, Carried Corn.

Clear & Cold. we Began to make Soap. Rev d mr Foster here, going to attend funeral of Nathan l Runels Child. Desired me to go and See his Lady & Child who were unwell; I went. I was Calld to see mr Hodges [ ] Ballard Came home with me.[ ] we found James & Eunice Stackpool here, [Echabod Pitts] also.

X Birth. mr Reads Son. X. mrs Read was Deliverd of a Son at four this morn. it Cleard of & is very pleasant. I Calld to See mrs Savage, find her poorly. mrs Shaw, Shee remains Low. I returnd home at half after Ten y s morn, receivd 6/ of mr Read as fee. 2/ remains X Due for medicin.
Clear & very Cold. I knitt all Day. Dicky Bro t 21-1/4 y ds Cloath from Sally Boltons which Shee wove for me.
I was at home till Evin g when Calld to Cap t Savages to See his wife. Set with her y s night.
at mrs Bents. Shee Continued very poorly till after noon. I Slept with mrs Wiman, mrs Jackson w h mrs Bent, who rested Better than Shee has Since Shee has Been unwell.
a preparitory Lector Preach t . I attended. mr Ballard Came from Doc t Coneys. I was at mr Westons & Porters. Saml Dyky & Timmy work t here.
it Snowd y s Morn, raind aftern n . Mr Smily here. Mr Ballard work t about y e Dam & Bridge. I have been at home, mended Stockins. the girls Spun. Cyrus went to the hook.
it Snowd. I have been at home. Mr Ballard wint to y e hoock. mr Lee here. Hannah Burnt her thumb. I Scourd my woolin yarn.

X. Birth. Nathan Swettland Son. X. I was Calld to Nathan Swettlands wife at 1/O Clok this morn, found her Safe Deliver d of a Son about 2. James Hinkleys wife operator. I returnd home at ten before noon. it Snows. I receivd 6/ of mr Swettland for Trouble & medicin. y s is her third Child. I was Calld at Dusk to mr Savages to See Lidia who is very Sick. Set up with her all night, mrs Chamberlin also.

Clear. Eliab Shaw here to work, Ben r Brown Jun r also. mr Davis here y t . Jono at Cap t Page s , was informd y t mr Shepherd departed y s Life y s morn. it is 9 years y s day since we arivd at John Jones s Landing at y e farm.

Clear morn. I finisht mrs Fosters [dress], help t Brue & went to See mrs Williams after n . Shee paid me 6/ for attending her at the Birth of her Daughter. it Snowd before morn g & was windy. 36th Snow.
G Clear & pleast. the funeral of Capt Sam l Howards Daughter Polly was attended after meeting. Jon o & y e Girls returnd from Son Towns & Patty Came with them.

A A Clear day. I Stayd at home. Davis hear y t , Doc t Coney Came to See him after meeting, advis d him to go to y e Salt water. its 9 years this morn Sinc we went in at mr Jones s to Live. Silas Lee is at mr Brooks s , Polly Sleeps here. Polly Dudly & Sally were here y s Evinng.
Clear & warm. mr Jacob Chandler & wife here, Cap t Suall also. mr Leighton Sleeps.
A Snow Storm. I have been at home. Pamela finisht makeing a Shift for me. I have kni[t] Some. hannah Spun Cotten. Dolly did hous work.
a Clear Day. Lidia Foster here. Mr Ballard has Been to mr Woodwards, Browns & Cap t Sewalls. I have been at home.
Very Cold. I finish t fingering mr Ballards Glovs, Becky Wiman & Sally Peirce here.

Cloudy. the weather moderated. I have been at home, fited Eph ms Leggins. the Girls Bak t Pies. David Learned Supt here. Dolly went to mr Westons & got 1 lb Butter, 2 oz Ginger, 2 oz. Spice, 1 oz. pepir. Snow this Evening, raind before morning.
Clear & Pleas t . I went to see mrs Porter. at home at Evin g . Neigh r Savage & wife & his Brother Sup t here.
Clear, more moderate. I went to Carry Some filling to Sally Bolton. Revd mr Foster here. mr Ballard Carried him Some meet from Cyrus & Sause from our Selves. Dolly Carried her Stockins home.
A A Clear Cool Day. we Dind on Spair rib. Dolly Rode to meeting on Eph m Cowans hors. Jon o is 24 years old this Day.
Clear. mr Ballard been to mr Clearks. I have been at home Combing flax; 13 lb.
Snow Storm. mr Bullen Bro t his wife here. mr Ballard went to hear Coart. Daughter Towns Child very Sick. Eph m Stephens here, had 2 oz Salv, paid 1/.
Clear morn. Son Town went home. I was Calld to mr Savages, gave Lidia some Senna. it Snowd at Evinng. I Set up all night.

Clear. Jon o is Better. mr Ballard at Doct Coneys fore noo n , making plan after n . Dolly & Clarisa went to Cap t Sualls. Shee went home towards night. Polly Hamlin Sleeps with Dolly. I feel some unwell.
Cloudy & Some rain. I have been at home. mr Ballard & Dicy finisht husking our Corn.
Clear & very Cold. mr Stackpool left here after n . mr Savage Calld [ ] Lidia, mr Brown & wife [ ]. I left her revivd. mr Gillbreath [ ].
Clear. I am unwell. Neig h Savage & wife here at Evinn g .
Clear & pleas t . I am very unwell, my face painfull. Eat haste puding & water for Breakfast & Bean broth f r Dinner, went to Bed a t 8. Rested poorely.
Calld from Cap t [ ] s to see Betsy Thomas, find her very ill. tarried with her y s Night. Nabby Jacson watch t also.
A fine Morn. I Left mrs Bent, Came home By water with Bill Wing & Charls Cox. mrs Williams here to Bake, Drank Tea. Ben n & Timmy work t here y s Day & yesterday.

Clear & Pleast. I made a Syrrup for mrs Porter & Carried it to her y s aftern n . mr Ballard at mr Pollards on an arbitration Between mr Witham & Baker of Sandy river. Timmy work t here. I receivd a piece of Check for an apron from Robert Fletchers wife by Joseph Williams.
Clear morn, Cloudy aftern. I made an under Coat of y e Blankett y e Swine tore, & Bound a quilt.
Clear & Cold. mr Ballard Bank d y e hous. I did work about house. we Bak t Pumpkin Pies. Hannah Spun thread. Dicky went home.

Cloudy and Some Snow. I was at mrs Savages al Day. the Child a little revivd. old mrs Savage Came to watch. mr Ballard Been to mr Pollards to here tryal of a Case between the Revd mr Foster & the Sewalls, it is ajournd till monday next at 8/O Clok. Pamela & Hannah gone to see the Sick Child.
Clear. mr Ballard been to Doc t Coneys. I have been at home. Hannah Cool Sleeps here, Dan l Robbins also. Cyrus Bot 1 lb Tea. Lidia & Aaron Foster Bro t Cyrus 15 Eggs.

A Betsy Welch b n y s Day. Clear. mr Ballard attended worship at Deacon Emersons. Crost y e river on thee ice. the rest of our famely Staid home. Eliphelit here for Some Salve for his Legg which he Brusd.
A I returnd home. Left mrs Savage and Betsy Thomas mending, find mr Balla much weller than he was when he Lef t home. I had a Severe pain in my rite foot y s nigh.
A Clear & Cold. I attended Devine Servis & went to See Lidia Savage. mr Brown & his Wife here, mr Faught & wife also.
G Clear & Pleast. I attended Public worship. was at mr Westons at intermision. mr Savage Dind here.

this is Daughter Towns Birth Day, aged 28 years. I am not So well as I coold wish. my girls washing. Hannah North here, Says her Mame is Coming to See me. David Fletchers wife was Delivrd of a Son y e 22 ins t . Mrs North & y e two mrs Cox s here, mr Brooks w h them. mr Ballard w t to mr Bisbees. Doct Coney here, Says mrs Hardin is unwell again. Polly & Sally, Theoph s & [Jemmy] & Elijah Crage here at Evinn g .
A Snow fell y s day. I Doubled & Twisted 14 Knotts of Thread. mr Harris Dind here. mr Leighton Sleeps.

Clear morn. I went with mrs Brown to hear y e trial of Capt Sewall & Thomas Sewall for defameing y e Revd mr Isaac Foster. they were found gilty & find & Laid under Bonds. I went to See mrs Foster after Cort was over.

Snowd part of the Day. the girls washt and washt the East room. Anne Web & Nabby Pollard & Amos here. mr Ballard & Dicky getting timber for Mr Fosters well. I fitted Some Tow y n to Knit & Began a Stockin.
Clear. mr Ballard & Sons attended Town meeting. Hannah Cool Came here to work. Na t Taylor Sleeps here. I have been at home, helpt Dolly make a Shirt for Eph m .
Rain, the wind S, the Snow wasted much. mr Ballard been to mr Westons. Cap t Sewall here. I have Brewd. Gillbreath here helping Cyrus Dress the mill y s night.
Clear & Cool. I combd 11 lb of flax. Hannah & Pamela wash t , did y e work about house & spun 4 Skeins of Tow. Han h Cool & Dolly sp n 5 Skeins Linn g . mr Ballard been to Town meeting.
Clear. mr Ballard Plough d the gardin. mrs Ellis here. I have been at home.
Clear & Cold. mr Ballard spent this day at Capt Sualls. I have been at home, finisht kniting y e first leggin of mr Ballards. Densmoore Brot mr Ballards Coat home. Dicky had his Trousers Cutt out.
Clear & pleas t . I have been at home Knitting. Parthena Barton here. mr Ballard Carried a Load of wood to Revd mr Foster, he remoovd from mr Sewalls this Day.
Clear & warm. I Combd 20 lb of flax. Revd mr Foster here. we killd a Swine, w t 160. Dan l Robbins Sleeps h r .

A XXX Birth. Cap t Springers Daft. A Chilly air. I attinded worship. was Calld about Sun Sett to Cap t Springers wife in Travil. Shee was Safe Deliv d of a Dafter at 10 O Clok y s Evenn g . I Sett up with her all night.
Snowd. I have been at home. Mr Ballard went to Doct Coneys. Dolly to mr Westons for needles. Patty Savage is married to mr Gordin of winthrop this day. Saml Brown Dind here.

Clear. Thanksgiving Day. I went to meeting & was Calld to Colo n Howards to ascist mrs Pollard Lay out his Son James. Mrs Betsy, Polly & Jack are very Sick. I watch t . Doct Colman unwel. Death of James Howard.

Clear & pleast. I was Calld to See Moses Pollard, he being unwell. Saw Shereb h Town, Sons family well. Revd mr Foster & Lady Dind there. I Drank Tea with mrs Weston. mr Ballard been to mr Fosters ys Evinng.

XX Birth. James Savages Son. XX. I was Calld half after Six this morn to James Savages wife in Travil. Shee was Safely Deliverd at Six Eving of a fine Son, her first Child. it has been Severe Cold, Snowd at night. I tarried all night.

X Birth. mr Swetts Dafter. X. observd as a day of humiliation & prayer. I went to the house of worship. was Calld out by mr Swett at y e Conclution of y e first prayer. went to the Hook on the ice. put his wife to Bed safe with a Daughter & Slept at mr Duttens.
Clear. I Combd 20 lb of flax. mr Ballard went to mr Herseys to run a Line. our Saw mill went this Day & night.

XX Birth. Charls Cleark, Second Dafter. XX. fee receivd Oct 18 th , 1788. Clear norn. I was Calld at 6/O Clok this morn to Charls Clearks wife who is in Travil & Shee was Safe Deliverd of a Dafter at one PM. I returnd home at 5. the girls have washt & Scoured. mr Stephens Bro t Pamela home. We had Pork of Jonathan.

a snow Storm. I was Calld to mr Savages to See his Child n that were Sick. Doc t Coney there. mr Bullin & wife went from here. I stayd at Sav gs & watcht. Son Town Came here, his Child n Been unwell. at home.

X Birth. Ben n Blaks Dafter. X. Clear. I Came home & Dolly went up. mr Ballard unwell. Jon o & Dicky gone to the meddow. I went to Bed at 7 & was Calld at 10 to go to mrs Blake in travil. Shee was Deliverd of a Dafter half after 11 [in] Ev nn . I tarried all night. its very cold.
Clear. mrs Foster Came here. I spun Linn g . Georg Boltons wife here, had 1 lb of Tow & 1 lb of hoggs Lard. mr Williams & Jon o Brot a Barril of Rhum from the hook.

Clear. mr Ballard at y e hook. Jon o gon to Sandy River. Jonathan Wiman here from y e westwd. Bro t Letters from our friends. Polly went home. Sam l Stephens & his wife of winth p to mill[]. mr Wiman Informs y t mr Streater, a preacher, is Lately Departed this Life, Left a lg family.
Clear & pleasant. our men finish t Bringing in thee Corn. I have Been at home mending Hoes for Jonothan.
Snowd & very Cold. Gillbreath helpt pique the mill. Cyrus unwell. I have been at home. mr Ballard got wood & went to Revd mr Fosters.
Clear. mr Ballard gone to mr Pollards to meet Capt Sewall on public Business. mr Lapham of Pitts town here for herbs for his wife who is unwell.

X Birth. Elias Taylors Daughter. XX I recieved nothing. Clear & pleast. I was Calld about Sun rise to Go to See Elias Taylors wife in travil. met a mesage informing Shee was Safely Deliv d . returnd home & feel more Comfortable than I have Some Days past. Pamela & Dolly went to See mrs Foster, Shee is unwell. mr Hersey here this Evin g .

Clear & warm. I have been at home. mrs Foster here yet. mr Ballard fixing gardin fence, the girls have spun 21 Skeins of Linning & 28 of Tow y s weak. the ice Broke & the river opend at y e Criks mouth.
Cool. I have Spent the most of y e Day takeing Care of the younges t Calf. Hannah Cool & Dolly went to mr Pollards to wind & warp a Piece. mr Ballard been to the hook, B t 2/1 lb & 1 lb of Sugar.
G Clear & warm. I tarried at home. the Booms opend & the Loggs went out of y e Crick. mr Foster Came to help his wife home this morn. the river opend. a thunder Shower Began 11 Evn.
A Clear & windy. my famely attended worship Excep t Eph m & my self. I hear mrs Weston Left Boston yesterday & was at meeting here y s after n . mr Harris s Son Obedi h Deseaat yester d .
G Clear & Cool. I did not atend publick worship, am unwell though Some Better than I have been. mr Wade was published to Rachel Petingail.

A Clear. I went to meeting aftern. mr Floid Bro t a note for thanks for his wives Delivry. I was Calld in to See mr Childs. mrs Becky Wiman here for Some tincture for him. mr Howard here from Sebastacuk.
A Cloudy y s fore n , Snowd after n & Evin g . y e girls & I Staid at home. mr Savages Children are mending. Gillb h here yet.
A Cloudy & Some Snow. I was Calld to See Joseph Fosters wife & Daughter, find them poorly. returnd & found Eph m Lambd.

X Birth. Isaac Hardins Son. X Clear. I was Calld to See Isaac Hardings wife in Travil. Shee was Safe Delivrd a 3 / OClok PM of a Son. the remains of Obediah Harris were inter[d] this after n . I Stay at Hardins y s night.
Cloudy & Cold Day, Clear at Evin g . I Combd flax. Gillbr th went from here. mr Alin had 1/2 oz Salv. Salvina Hatch Sleeps here. mr Ballard been to Doct Coney, the Girls at mr Crages.

A Clear, pleasant morn. Cloudy before night, Snowd a little and misted. mrs Daylor here, her Husband is very unwell. old mrs Whealor & Polly Wall & Polly Savage here. we have killed a Swine this after nn . mr Williams helping pique mill. mr Howard went from here. Eph m Cowen here.

Cloudy & warm. Revd mr Foster here, Says his Lady is unwell. Deacon Emerson & mr Woodward here also. mr Ballard been to gett mr Savage to asist makeing a Kirb for mr Fosters well. I have been at home.
Cloudy. Nathan l Bragg here, had some Salv, 1 oz. I have Been unwell.
Clear. mr Ballard is gone to Winslow to purChace Loggs. I went to mr Westons & mr Pollard. Jon o is unwell. Ephm Cowen tending Saw mill.
Clear. I mended Cyrus s Coat & Ephm s Trousers. mr Ballard gott wood. Dicky Came here again.

X Birth. widow Mary Shepherds Dafter. X. A Cold morn. I was Calld to See the widow Mary Shepherd in Travil. Left home at five, put her Safe to Bed with a Daughter about 4 PM. returnd home at 8 Evinng. mr Ballard been to mr Stephens and to the Hook. it Snowd Some. mr Winslow moovd this Day passt by mr Hainses.

I returnd at 11 O Clok morn. Left mrs Edson So well that Shee was quilling yarn for her Sister to weave. mr Learned & Sally White Dind here. mr Welman Sent me a piece of Salmon. Hannah & Dolly, Eph m & Patty attend School. Pamela went to mr Crags. our men turnd off Boards to Davis. Town meeting yesterday. Do ct Coney Chosen to Represent this Town in Ge n Coart. mr Carr Delegate for Convention at Falmoth or Portland.

Clear. the Girls went to School aftern n . mr Ballard ploughd flax in. I Brued. Danniel Bro T a Salmon, wt 21-1/2 lb. we Bo T 61 lb of pork. Saml Foster & W m Pullin Dind here. mr Ball d Bot him Self a pair of hoes at mr Westons.
Clear, a Cold morn. mr Smiley went from here. the Girls went to School aftern n . mrs Densmoore, Chamberlin & Savage here. Lidia Bisbee Sleeps here. mr Ballard planting potatoes.
Clear. mr Weston & Lady here informs y t mrs Allin Expird, mrs Porter & mrs Loes Harris also. mr Ballard at mr Pollards. I have been at home.
Clear. I have been at home. mr Ballard & mr Joseph Foster Reckoned. mrs Williams & Peggy Cool here. Hannah Cool went to Varsalboro yester d & returnd to Day. Mr John Taylor & Sons went from here.
it Snowd. I have been at home kniting. we are informd that Ezra Hodges is gone & left his famely. it is not known where.

Birth. mrs X Bents Son. X Clear. I was Calld to See mrs Weston, She Being unwell. was Calld from there to mr Jacksons, to mrs Bent in Travil. her Child Born before I arivd. I put her Safe to Bed. Set with her this night.
rainy, am at Cap t Belchers. mrs Voce & mrs Cumings there. this night mrs Belcher some pooly. I rose to tend her.

Clear & pleas t . James Howard interd this after n . I returnd home at Evinng. went to Bed Early, have had the Collik all night, had but Little rest. I left Polly mending. mrs Betsy & Jack very Sick. mrs Fairwel stays with them this night.
Clear. I Came home, Rode on a Slead. was Calld to see mr Porters Infant, it being unwell, gave it some Senna.
I returnd home by the way of mr Hainss. it Snowd & raind. Snowd in the night also.

Clear. I have Combd 13 lb of flax. mrs Taylor & Bolton & Clarisa Barton here. mr Learned Dind. Cyrus Boug T 17 lb of Veal of mrs Taylor. one of Johathans OXen fell down Dead Between here & Savages as Gillson was driveing them. he had Caried a Load of Barrils Down for mr Wiman.
Clear. I came home, find Lucys Child very Sick, pukeing, & mr Ballard at Coart.

Pleast. I returnd from mr Blakes with mr Hewen, went directly to mr Savages. Lidia Expird at half after 1/O Clok. Pamela and Hannah there. we Came home at 4. I feel very much fatagud. we left mr Ned Savage & wife there.
A Daughter Town & I tar d at home. mr Town & Howard & Sisters Came here. I was Calld to Savage s , mr Ball d went with me. Neigh r Will ms & wife, & Betsy Thomas here.

G Clear. Son & Dafter Town & their Dat r Patty left us Bound for y r own home. the wind to the S. I went to meeting after n . The Funeral of Ibbee Howard attended. the wind Blew so high I did not Cross the river. we went to the field after meeting. mr Hamlin here. mr Ben n Porter of Winthrop & Pamela Barton publish t .
Son Town Left here. it raind. the young folks rode out, I was Calld to Savages. Set up all night, the Child n very [peavish].

rainy. mr Ballard Sett plants. I quilld for hannah Cool. Peggy Came from Springers, Enforms y t mrs Lumber is Danger s ly Sick lately, put to bed with a Son. Foster went from here y s day. mr Hovey Brot me 3 lb Butr.
Clear morn, Snowd after n , & Evin g . I have been at home kniting on mrs Fosters Stockin. mr Ballard at Doct Coneys. two of the Cragges here for keeping for y r Teem.
A Snow Storm. I was Calld to See mrs Reed, am unfitt to go out, But went. find her Exercised with Some pain & Sore throat. returnd at Dusk, feel unwell. I have Seen 52 years this Day.

A Snow Storm. mr Ballard & Dicky went Early to git timber for mr Fosters well kirb, & they gott him a load of wood. I have been at home kniting and prepareing Some Pills. the Girls washt. mr [Read] here, his wife is mending.
Clear. I have been unwell. Betsy Chever here. Cyrus Bro t his Desk from Pattins. anaversery of John Towns Death.
Clear. mr Ballard gone to Deac n Emersons. I have been Doubleing & Twisting Thread. the Girls washt. Hannah Lost a Shoe & Silver Buck l under the Saw mill.

Clear. Patty Town has Been very Sick, her throat has Canker in it. mr Ballard & the Girls went to the funeral of Capt Sewals Child. Maj r Dutton and his Lady Came here. Gillbreath, Leighton & Son Sleeps here. I am informd that Pamela Barton is publish t to mr Porter of winthrop, a widower. mrs Reed was here this Day. I hear that Thomas Sewals Son is very Sick.
Clear. mr Ballard gone to Survay for mr Senter. Betsy Chever here. I have been at home. it snowd at night.
A Exceeding Cold. Revd mr Moore preacht. my Self & the Girls Staid at home. Enoch Crage & Polly Taylor here at Evinn g . Eph [e] has the tooth aik.
Clear & Cool. I went to mr Pollards & Doubled Some yarn. his wife & I went to Revd mr Fosters, mrs Weston there.

Birth. Nathanl Herseys 4th Son. XX. Clear morn. I was calld at 9 O Clok y s morn to See mrs Hersey, Shee Being in Travil, and was Safe Deliverd of a fine Son at 1 PM. I returnd home at 5, find the two mr Learneds here. I receivd my fee on six & 8 pence of mr Hersey. mr Thomas Sewall made me a Presant of a Calve Skin. haild & raind about one y s aftern n .
Clear. I attended the funeral of Judge Howard & tarried all night with thee widow. Shee Complaind of a Soar throat. a larg funeral.
Clear. I am unwell. Dolly went to School for n . Lidia Bisbee & Polly Drank Tea here. mr Ballard making fence. Cyrus Brot 2 lb butter.

I was at Capt Sewalls the most of the Day. old mrs Fletcher Came there & I came away. Crost the river in the Boat, the wind very high. I Calld at mr Pollards, Col o Norths. Lisy Cosen unwell. I was at mr Williamss. Sally Peirce here. mr Gardners remains are to be interd this day.
Clear. mr Ballard at mr Pollards. mr Jonston & wife & Neig r Williams & his wife, also. I have been at home. Mr Lapham here, Says his wife is no Better. mr Ballard went to y e meddow.

Birth. Nathan Tylors Dafter. XX. Receivd nothing. I was Calld at 2 O Clok to Nathan Taylors wife in Travil, found her Dilivr d of a Dafter. Doc t Williams operator. very rainy. I tarried till morn then Sett out on foot, walkt to the Bridg Below mr Kenidays when Tylor Came up with a hors. I rode home, arivd at 7 much fatagud. Jon o & Sam l Dicky had a quarrel; what a Shame it is. Cap T Nichols & his Son Jonathan here this morn going to CobessiContee.
rainy. I was Calld at 4 O Clok this morn to See Stutely Springers wife in travil, there all Day. Shee was very unwell.
Clear part of the day. mr Ballard went to Revd mr Fosters. I have been at home. Pamela finish t Dickys over alls. We are informd Cap t Howard is got Safe into y s river. a Cow is loos in town.
I returnd home at 12/ O Clok, find Hannah very unwell, her throat Sore. I Set with her till mid night. Jacks Brother Sleeps here. mr Ballard making Slead.

Birth. Capt Belchers Dafler. XX. Clear part of the day. mrs Voce & Cumings went home. mrs Belcher taken iller at half after 11 = was Safe Deliverd of a fine Daughter at 20 muinits after 12 pm. I returnd by water, arivd home at half after 4. find all well. received 6/ of Capt Belcher as a reward. I went to See Becky wiman, find her Craysy.

Clear. Sherebiah Town went to Pitts town. Nathan Howard went on Bord y e vesel for Boston. Theophelus Came in from his farm. Polly Higins had 2 oz Salv, her mother Scalt her feet. I went to Tho S Sewals, Calld at Wil ms , mr Pollards & Westons, watcht with Becky. Shee is very Sick.

Clear. mrs Tylor Brot the Black Child here. mr Ballard went to mr Cars. they procurd her 1 Bushel of wheat. mr Porter, Joseph Burton & the Girlls went to mr Faughts. James Stackpool & Betsy Town came here. Polly Savage, Sally Peirce here. Hannah Cool unwell, her throat sore. I have been at home.
Clear. I was Calld to See Seth Williams s youngest Child & Georg Browns Children. Calld at Porters, his Child is Better.

Cloudy & Cold. I went to mrs Westons aftern n . mr Brooks there, Shew dislike at my informing mrs Weston of Some afairs which hapened in School. I Bought 1-1/2 yds Linnen of Burtun @ 5/8 pr yd, paid Cash. 1/4 yd Camb K of Frank, paid 3/7 for it.
Clear. I have Combd 20 lb of flax. mrs Brown here, had 1-1/2 Bushel Ashes. I planted Garlic Seed. Dolly Sowd Some Pees. Pamela has Spunn a Skein of Linning this weak & Been to winthrop.
Clear. mr Ballard gone to Church meeting. Pamela & Hannah went to mr Densmors. Betsy Cut out Pollys gown. hannah Cool remains unwell. I Sett up w h her till 11 O Clok.

G Clear. our women tarried at home forn n . mrs s Butrfield, Cleark & Gordin here in intermition. I attended aftern n . hannah poorly y t . Ephm went to meeting Last Sabbath & this also. Elihes Getchel & Polly Savage Cryd the first.
A Cloudy & not so Cold. Dolly gone to meeting. Snowd a little. mr Runels & wife here. Eph m Cowen Supt here. it rains fast this night.
G Clear. our famely all went to meeting but my self & Eph m , he is Broak out with the rash. Sister Bartons Son is much better. Shee went from here with mr Faught Bound for home.
G Clear & Cold. I attended Publick worship. mr Williams & wife here in y e Evinning, Eliphelit Robins & informd of y e Death of Anne Webbs Child.
Very Cold, Snowd. we attended funeral of Lidia Savage. John is Some Better. mrs Savage unwell. Dolly went there in y e morning. Deacon Emerson maid the prayer.
Clear & moderate. mr Stackpool & Lady Sleep here. mr Brooks & Weston here.
Ephm had a fit. Clear & Cool. Eph m had a Fitt. Doct Coney Calld to See him. mr Ballard been at mr Pollards with y e other Select gen t men.
Clear. I went to mr Savages. mrs Densmore Came to make our gounds. Peggy Coole here to See hannah, who remains poorly. mr Ballard & y e Young men went to asist in raising mr Childs s house.

X Birth. Isaac Savages Dafter. X I was Calld to mr Savages at 1 O Clok morn, his wife in Travil & was Safe Dl d at 11 PM of a Dafter, tho Dangerous for Some Time. I tarried till Day light. a thunder Shower.

very pleas t morn. Daugh t Town & other friends Left here for home. I went as far as mr Westons. it Snowd after nn . mrs Weston & I Setled all Between her & I,viz,for a quart of Brandy I had 9 ins t and for ginger, spice, pepper & Butter on her part, 2 Days work by Dolly [ ] 2/ Due to me before [ ] which She had 9th inst.
Clear. mr Ballard went to Vasalboro. Leu t Browns wife, old mrs Gardy & mrs Frich, Cap t Savage & wife here. the girls went to mr Crages. mrs Loes & Rhoda Came home w h y m .

Clear & hott. I Cut my hysop. Hannah Came from mrs Fosters. Lidia is Better. mr Ballard is more Comfortable. Dolly poorly. I hear y t y e Revd mr Foster is not so well as he was yesterday. I went to y e field and gatherd Some pees.
Clear. I went to See mr Savages Child, tarried all night. mr Ballard Came from Doct Coneys, Carried me up on a Sled. I finisht my Stockins. a man from woolwich Sleept here y s night.
Clear & Cold. I am unwell. mr Cumings Drest 10 lb of flax on Jon ns acount. I began a Linnen Stockin for Lady Foster.
Cloudy, a little Snow. mr Ballard at mr Fosters. I Combd 10 lb of flax. Pamila finisht her skirt & Jackat. Joseph Foster had 1-1/2 oz tinct r , /9 d . he carrid 20 pills to mr Childs.
Clear. I have been unwell. Dolly & Han n Cool washt. thee girls finisht Eph m a shirt. the red Cow calvd.
Clear. mr Ballard Been to run a Line at mr Stephens s . I have been Boiting yarn & tending Leech & Twisting Thread. feel much fatagud.

Clear. mr Hains Learned Came here Directly from the westward. Brot me a Letter from Brot h Collins which informs my Friends were then well. mr Ballard went to mr Badcocks. I was Calld to mrs Howards to See his Daughter lbbee who is Siesd with a relaps of the rash. I found mrs Cumings there, So returnd home. Sally Pierce here today. Patty is Better. I was Seisd with a Disentery in the night.

Clear. I went to See mrs Williams, her Breast is Soar. Bunker Ferwell there. I Saw a hors fall in to the river three times by y e fort wharf. the 4th attempt they got him over the river. a Snow fell this Night.

Clear & pleast. Jon o & y e Girls Sett out for winslow at 9 h & 30 m this morn. Revd mr Foster & Lady Dind here Es qr Petingale & Asa Williams also. informs his wife was Delivrd of a Dafter the 1st inst. Rufus Ballard came here.

a rain. mr Learned & his Brother David went from here this morn with their Shingles. Mrs Porter here. mr Ballard and Deac n Emerson gone to Jabiz Cowens. I wrote a Letter to Brother Collins & one to Sister Waters.
Clear. I Came home from the fort. mr Carr here for Boards Due to him. Han h , Pamela & Dolly at School. mr Ballard is Ploughing by y e rode. this Day he is 62 years old

Clear. we warpt a webb of 42 yds Linnin. I went to mr Williams s , his wife is better. mrs Pollard here at Evinng. mr Hodges Came there Last Evinn g . Revd mr Foster here after n . mr Ballard been fixing the loome.
I heard Cap t Sewalls Son was Dead, hear it Contradicted. went there, find it very Low. Sett up with it this Night. his wife is Sick.

Clear. mr Jonston & wife & Son Left here for home. mr Ballard gone to Cap t Sualls. Jon gone to Joseph Fairbanks s for hay. Sally Peirce here, mrs s Cham ln , Savage, Bolton, [Vinc] Savage & Sally Webb also. I made 6 Dos Candles. have been at home.
Clear. I have been unwell. mr Ballard is at mr Emersons makeing Raites. mr Heigns Learned Dind here, old mrs Whelor also. Polly Savage here just at Evinng. Ben n Brown & wife here.

G X Birth. mr Danys Son . X. Clear & warm. I went to meeting without my Cloak, went to mr Westons in intermition. was Calld out of y e meting house to go to See mrs Dany at the Hook. Put her Safe to Bed with a son, her Second Child, about 4 O Clok. returnd By water to mr Westons, walked home from there. there was a Shower. James Weston 3 years old this Day. a vesel with Famelys unLoading at mr Westons Eddy. Anderson Taylor Bro t me a pair of Shoes from mr Welman for my fee for asisting his Lady.

XXX Birth of Stutely Springers Son. XX. Clear. mrs Springer grew very ill about 1 O Clok y s morn. Calld her women and was Safe Deliverd at 11 of a fine Son. I left her Comfortable & returnd at 3 pm. mrs Bisbee & Lidia Came home with me. mrs Voce here Bakeing. old mr Cowen & wife & Son Drank Tea here. Georg Couch Departed this Life last wedns day Eving. was interd y s Day.

Rainy. I was Calld to Jos Fosters to See Lidia, Sick with the rash. Came back to mr Pollards, went from thence to fort western; attended funeral of Pegy Cool. from that to Georg Browns. Saw his wives hand Drest. returnd home at Ten in Evin g . Exceedingly fatagud. J.B. here. mrs Sherman Brot to mr Pollards by Harford of winslow. mrs Frich here ys night.

Cloudy. Snowd before night. I went to mr Porters & Pollards. David just arivd. mr Ballard gone to Cutt wood for mr Foster. Williams & True Dresing Flax here. I was Calld to Cap t Sualls wife in Travil, got there at 7 O Clock Evinng.
Clear. I quilld 7 Skeins of yarn. Cyrus Bot 2 lb of Butter. mr Ballard Bro t home 14 lb Cod fish. Son Town Slep t here last night. I went to mr Westons, Bot a XXXVI Slay. Son Town here.
at mr Sewalls all Day. Came home at Eving.

Clear. I went to See David Densmoores knee. mr Barton & Betsy Town went from here. I Settld with Pamela This Day. Shee has Lost 1 months time, or rather workt for her Self since Shee came here & had, 20 y d s Cloth at 2/8 pr yd 2:13:4 Lawn for an apron : 7:6 2 pair shoes 12/ Leather & makeing :17:1 Paid mrs Densmore for Cuting her gown :6 Credit by her Labour 4:--:- Detr to 1/7 in cash : 1:7
G At mr Hinkleys. Shee remaind poorly till after nn , then by remedys & other means, Shee got Esyer. I tarried all night.

G Clear. I attended publik worship. Revd mr Foster preacht a DisCoars on the Death of a Daughter of Esqr Huzzys who was Buried Last Sabbath Day at Nantucket. Mr Porter Carried his wife home from here after Exercise. Mr Ballard & I went to mr Savages.
G I was Calld to Joseph Fosters from mr Cowens to See Aaron, find him unwell. returnd to mr Cowens, tarried till near night. Left them poorly. Doct Coney been there & to Fosters also.

G Clear. we had ice an intch thik in our yard South Side of y e hous this morn. I attended public worship; a Sermon preacht on y e Death of Lady Howards Daughter. Pamela out publisht. mr Porter here. Isaac Leighton Came here to work fors us the ensueing week. this is the Day apointed for Brother Collins Moores Joining in wedlok with mrs Betsy Chamberlin of winchester. may their Connections be for their happyness.

Rainy. I was Calld to See mrs Edson, Shee being unwell. Left home at 6 O Clok morn, tarried all night, mrs Mc Master & mrs Densmore also. we went to Bed & were not Called up. there were 11 Salmon Catchd in the Sain at Kenadys fishing place.
rainy morn. Sally Peirce Bakt here. I went to See mrs Savage, Shee s unwell. Hannah Coole gone to mrs Sewall.
Clear. y e Girls washt. mrs Ellis & Bolton here, gave me Some Coffee, Tea & Sugar; They Dind. mr Ballard Brot 2 loads hay. I made a Syrrup for mrs Savage.

death of W m mc Masters William mc Masters Expired at 3 O Clock y s morn. mrs Patin & I laid out the Child. poor mother, how distress[d] her Case. near the hour of Labour and three Children more very Sick. I Sett out for home. Calld at mrs Hd s , I find her Son very Low. at mr Williams s , Shee very ill indeed. now at home it is nine O Clok morn. I feel as if I must take Some rest. I find mr Ballard is going to Pitts ton on Business. Dolly is begining to weave thee hand kerChiefs. Eph m & I went to see mrs Williams at Evinn g , find her Some Better.

Clear. mr Hinkly brot me to mr Westons. I heard there that mrs Claton Childs Departed This life yesterd y & y t Shee was thot Expireing. I went back with mr Hinkly as far as there. Shee Departed y s Life about 1 PM. I ascisted to Lay her out, her infant Laid in her arms. y e first such instance I ever saw & y e first woman that died in Child bed which I Deliverd. I Came home at Dusk, find my famely all Comfortable. we hear that three Children Expird in Winthrop last Saterday night. Daniel Stayd at mr Cowens.
Clear. I did hous work & went to See mrs Ellis. Shee is very unwell. Came home at Dush, find mr Williams & wife & Nathan Howard here. mr Ballard at Capt Belchirs. his Lady sent me 1 Dos of pigions.

G rainy. I attended public worship. the Revd mr Farars from y e westward performd. Leut John Shaw & Rachel Kenaday were Publisht. mr Ballard & I went after meeting to See mrs Howards Son, find him mending. went in to the Colo ns , the old Lady is unwell with a Cold. mrs Betsy made me a prest of 2 Caps & a ribion.

Clear. mr Stackpool & Lady went from here. Capt Sewall here, mrs Foster also. mr Ballard went to his Lot, finds Ellis has treaspast. I have been at home kniling mittin. Cyrus at Williams s . [hers] Son Towns little Daughter is Some Better, rest of his family well.
Clear & pleast. mr Ballard & Cap t Sewall been Laying out a road to mr Duttens mill. mrs Bisbee & Polly here, the Girls gone to mr Westons. I have been at home, knitt Some.

G Clear morn, a Storm before night. Son Town went from here. Fosters foot much Sweld. I poultised it. Joseph Fosters wife here this night. Hannah at Cap t Porters. Hannah Cool at mr Williams s . Philip Norcroses wife Deliverd of a Dafter 31 st of may last. Pamela has a pain in her head this Day.

A Shower. mr Ballard went to a meeting at the Church. mrs Gardy came here. I have had a pain in my Stomach. Eph m went to the meeting hous to Catechizeing. mr Hardin here, Says his Child has had the Soar opend on its throat & is much Better.

Clear. mr Ballard houghing Corn. the girls finished Their gounds. mrs Densmore fited mine & tried it on. I let her have 3 lb of flax for her Labour. Betsy Town finisht Dollys. the girls went to mr Crages. Hannah Cool is Better.

Clear. mr Faught here, Says Gidion Barton is very well & Sister went from there this morn. mr Porter & Pamela Left here for her her [sic] fathers on a visit. I came home about Day light & went to bed. Eph m is Better, went to School. I went to mr Savages after n , Shee is very Comfortable. Gillbreath Sleeps here. mr [G Cowen] here on business with mr Ballard.

Clear. I was Calld to mrs Howards this morn for to See her Son, find him very low. Went from mrs Howards to See mrs Williams, find her very unwell. Hannah Cool is there. from thence to Joseph Fosters to see her Sick Children, find Saray & Daniel very ill. Came home, went to y e field & got Some Cold water root, then Calld to mr Kinydays to See Polly. very ill with the Canker, gave her Some of y e root & gargled her throat which gave her great Ease; returnd home after Dark. mr Ballard been to Cobesy, his throat is very Soar. he gargled it with my tinct r , finds relief & went to bed Comfortable.

A Shower this morn. Isaac Hardin Came for me to go and See his oldist Son, Sick with the rash; it is Sweled on y e Neck. mrs Harris, Cowen & Foster there. I returnd home at 5 PM. mr Ballard at work on the high way. mr Porter and N. Howard here y s night.

Clear. independence of America observd in this Town. Pamela & I went to mr Blacks, he was not at home. Seth & Joseph Williams s wives here. mr Dudly, D r Barton, mr Leighton & Biah Town Sleep here. mrs Harris & other young people here. Hannah took her webb out of the Loom, there was 40 yards.
Clear & hott. I Bak t Bread for mr Brooks, he is going to y e westward. I rode to mrs Fosters, Billy & Daniel very Sick. Lidia is mending. Revd mr Foster is got a [wound].
Cloudy, Some Snow. mr Ballard & Dicky workt for Revd mr Foster. I combd Cyruses flax. I knitt, the girls Spinning.

Snowd. I have been at home kniting. mrs Savage here aftern n . mr Ballard been over the river to a meeting to Choose malitia officrs. they made Choice of mr Porter, Cap t ; John Shaw, Lieut; Asa Williams, Ens. [ ].
Very Cold. Sherebiah Town Came here for ma to go to Son Towns, Their youngest Child being sick. I had mr Wimans hors, we arivd there at Dark. the Child very ill.

Clear. I am unwell & Patty also. mr Ballard gone to Collect Raits. Mrs Pollard Sent home 5 lb of poark wh h Shee Borrowed 12 april 1786. I went to mrs Howards, watcht with her Child. Shee is very Sick indeed.

Clear. I went to mr Savages after a Sleigh, did not get one. then went to mrs Pollards for my own, her piece not on it. I was at mr Westons & Revd mr Fosters. I Bog t an apron patren for Pamela of mr Black, price 7/6. Isaac went from here.
A snow Storm. Capt Suall here, and mr Ballard went home with him. he informs of the Death of Cap t Howards Dafter Polly.
A rainy Day. I have been at home knitting. the girls Been to School. Foster Came to work. Nathan Howard came here aft we r in Bed.

Clear. mrs Bullin Dind here. a preparitytory Lecter. Revd mr Whiting Deliverd a discours from Isaiah 55 V 1st. there were But 26 persons in y e hous. mr Ballard Sowd peas this fore nn . he and I attended public worship aft n .

rainy fore noon. Dorkis Pollard here to warp a piece. mr Ballard fixing the loom. Hannah Coll Sett the webb to work. mrs Voce here, says mrs Pattin is very unwell. Jonathan Brot home 9 lb of hard Bread which Cost /5 pr lb.
Left the Child. Calld at mrs Howards & Dind. was Calld to See mrs Belcher who has a pain in her Side. Sett up with her till 11 O Clok. Shee is easier.
Clear. Sally went from here. mr Ballard went to mr Browns. Jono Came home & mr Savage killed a Swine. I have been at home.
Clear. we Began our garden. mr Ballard a t Savages mending the Spade. Ellis Bisbee Bro t Loggs. I have been at home. the Towns and the Bisbees & [ ] Dind here. Nathan Howard Br t Loggs.

Clear part of the day, a Shower aftern n . mr Ballard Came from Surveying at Wings. I Combd flax. Nathan Howard tarries here this night. Hannah Cool Bo t a gown patron at mr Franks. Georg Couch was interd this afternoon at the fort. mrs Voce & Betsy went on Board the vesel Bound for Boston this morn.

Cloudy. had news y t Lidia Foster was very Sick. had mr Pollards hors, went there, tarried the most of y e day. Came to mr Pollards from thence to Revd mr Foster to See him; find him very Sick with the rash. Came to mr Brooks s , got Some Cold water root. Cyrus went and Carid it to mr Foster. we Sheld Pees. mr Ballard g n to asist Broth Moore rais a Barn.

G Clear & hott. I attended public worship, went to mrs Howard to See ibbe, Shee is Sick.. mr Fought & Clarisa Barton Dind here. Danneil Robbins is unwell. mr Howard went from here this morn. mr Williams & wife & mr Hamlin Drank Tea here.
G A Cloudy Day, Snowd Last night. my Self & the Girls did not attend Divine Servis, Cyrus did.
G Cloudy & rain. mr Town & Howard went from here for Winslow. Hannah Cool went to meeting. I feel unwell. Did not atend worship in Public.

G Clear & pleas t morn, Cloudy after n . Cyrus went to See Lidia Foster, finds her Exceeding ill. I went to See her & Revd mr Foster who is very ill. mr Emerson Performd thee Publick Servis in his Stead. mr Ballard returnd from my Brothers. Bro t a hors which he had of Jethro Gardner. I watcht.

Clear & warm. mr Ballard posting his Book. mr Woodward & he Setled acounts. mrs Taylor here, Polly Savage & mrs Savage were here. I have Been at home, Twisted yarn & knitt. finisht a pair of Stockins & Began another. Rufas Came here after n .

Cloudy, a Shower at Evinng. mrs Bisbee & Polly here. the old Lady Dind. I went to Doc t Colmans with her. mr Learned & mr Stephens Dind, old mr Hardin also, and informs he has Lost his Best Cow; a heavy loss. Pamela is gone to mr Stephens S at winthrop.

Rainy. mrs Foster went away. Hannah Came from mr Portors. Becky Wiman is Better. mr Ballard been to meet thee Select men. I have been at home Doubling yarn for harnes. Hannah Cool got the web out, 35-1/2 yds. there was 93 Skeins of yarn filld into it. Dolly run a nail into her foot. mrs Foster had 10 pills of me.

Clear & hott, a Shower before night. I went to Capt Sewalls to See his Child Sick with the rash, find it very ill. was at mrs Howards, her Dafter is mending. Calld at Cap t Porters, took 8/ which Isaac Hardin left for me for atending his wife, and 1/ more. the articles were 3 fanns.

Clear & pleas t . Hannah Came to mrs [Fosters]. I returnd, Calld to See mr Foster; find him mending. Left Lidia better also. Dolly is unwell. Col n North is returnd. Doc t Colman Enforms y t Betsy Stackpool was Drouned 28 inst in y e river Sebastacuk. May God Sanctify y e instance to us all. I am informd y t mr M c Masters Son Daniel is very Sick with the rash. mr Williams has Bled again & is very poorly. mr Ballard & Dolly unwell. I Batht their feet & gave them Some herb Tea. I feel much fatagud my Self. Eph m Cowen & Ezek l Leighton here y s night.

Clear. I did not wrest very well. was Calld at 4/O Clock y s morn to see Aaron Foster, find him very unwell. gave him Some Senna and returnd home. Jon o gon to Cobesy to attend a Coart Concerning Some uneasiness which hapned between old mr M c Causlin & Son, Luke Barton & him Self Some time Since. mr Williams & his wife Drank Tea here. Hannah Coole went from here this morn.
