I returnd at 11 O Clok morn. Left mrs Edson So well that Shee was quilling yarn for her Sister to weave. mr Learned & Sally White Dind here. mr Welman Sent me a piece of Salmon. Hannah & Dolly, Eph m & Patty attend School. Pamela went to mr Crags. our men turnd off Boards to Davis. Town meeting yesterday. Do ct Coney Chosen to Represent this Town in Ge n Coart. mr Carr Delegate for Convention at Falmoth or Portland.

Clear. mr Ballard went after money for Tylor. I gatherd String Beans. mrs Voce & Daughter & Nathan Howard returnd from Boston. I went to mr Savages. Sally Peirce Sleeps here. Lad of washinton Ett Supper here. Hannah Cool gone to See her Sister Pegy who is Sick.

Clear & hott. I pik t y e Safron. mrs Pattin here. mr Ballard & I & all the Girls attended funeral of William mc Master. their other Children are mending. James Howard very Low. Drank Tea at mr Pollards. Calld at mr Porters.
a rainy Day. I have been at home kniting.

I did hous work. Howard went from here. mrs Smily here. Hannah Cool came [here]. Parthena [I get on] with [now]. mr Ballard been to ye [school] Surveying. I have been at home. this is Dat r Towns Birth day, 29 years old.
returnd from mc Ms ts . Calld at mr Westons & Williams s Polly Savage [there]. Foster Came to work here yesterday. mr Ballard at mr Pollards. Cyrus is 31 years old this Day.

Clear. mr Ballard gone to Cap t Page s . he help remove his house. mr Hains Learnd here, Left oxford 2 weaks ago, our Friends all well Except my Mother, who is in a Langued Situation as Brother Collins informs by a Letter Dated Sep t 7, 1787.

Cloudy, Snowd before Sun Sett. I was unwell, my throat Sore, went to Bed at nine. was Calld at half after ten By mr Read to see his wife in Travil. it raind fast as I went & almost all night. old mrs Savage & mrs Stone were attendants.

Clear & pleast. Revd mr Foster here. I have been at home. mrs Elis & mrs Chamberlin here. Sherebiah Town Came here Last Evinn g , Says Bitsy is recovering & Polly & Lucy have had the Rash. it has Snowd y s Evinn g .
Clear. mr Chamberlin helpt mr Ballard hough. I have been not So well as I Could wish this day. the Girls Bakt pumpkin Pies. Polly Taylor here. thunder & rain in the night.
Cloudy & very Cold for y e season. mr Ballard houghing potatoes. I carrid mrs Pollards Sleigh home & was at mr westons & Col o Norths. find my famely all in Bed on return.

Clear. I have been to see Mary Kenida, find her much as Shee was yesterday. was at mr M c Masters. their Children, two of them, very ill. y e other 2 recovering. at mr William also, Shee is some better. hear James Howard is mending. Han h Cool Came home.

X Birth. Eban z Hewin s Dafter. X Clear. I was Calld at 3 O Clok morn to Eben z hewins wife in Travil. Shee was Deliverd of a Daugh tr at 7. I then went to mr James Pages, took a walk with him & Lady through his improvements; they are Beautiffull. mr Hewen Conducted me home about 2 PM, gave me 6/ as a reward. mr Howard takeing a raft out y e [Boom], he Sleeps here. Sherebiah Town also. I have been to Cap t Porters on an arand. thee girls =vis= Han h & Dolly, took a Ride to mr BiSbees Acompanied by James & Joseph Burton.
Clear & Hott. Hannah wash t . Clarisa Barton here. I have felt unwell, been at home all Day. Robins gon with a raft for Elj h Daves. mr Blake Sent me 6 lb of Chees at /6 pr lb .
Clear & pleas t . mr Weston & Lady here. mr Ballard & Dicky helping mr Foster. Dolly gone to Colo Howards. Hannah and Pamela to mr Porters. all returnd at ten O Clok.
Cloudy. I have been at home. mr Ballard to mr Bisbes. Dolly Been to mr Voses.
Exceeding Cold. we Gave Lucy Physic, it operated very well, drew Blisters also. Betsy & I Sett up till 1 O Clok.
at Ditoes. took Care of lbbee all day. mrs Woodward Came there. Cap t Savages Wife & I watcht with her, Son & Dafter Town Came to our house, his child n well.
it raind this morn. Capt Suall & mr Ballard went to mr Woodwards to See Georg Stone who is Confind with Lameness. Dicky Set out for home or to go to his Dads.

XX Birth. Edsons Dafter. XX. Cloudy. I was Calld to See mrs Edson who was in Travil, arivd there at 7 O Clok morn. Saw her husband Lying in the road in Kenadys Lain. Shee was Safe Deliverd at 8 h 26 m PM of a fine Dafter. May God almighty bless her and help her to Shun her Fathers wicked Examples. heard from Son Town.

Clear & warm. mr Ballard planted Corn. Dolly & Hannah Cool Dropt after n . old mr Wheeler & mrs Taylor here. Cyrus Bro t the bars and other utencils for weaving home. he had Some Veal of mr Allin & 2 lb Butter of B r Pating l .
Clear. I planted pepers, anis & coriander. mr Rich from the westward workt here, Jon n aftern n . Polly Bisbee here. I combd 7-1/2 lb of flax for myself & [4] 1/2 for Cyrus.

Mr Belcher Set out for Boston, I for home. Left mrs Belcher Better. Came to Capt Sewalls, find his wife & Child very ill. tarried all night, watcht. Thomas Sewalls Children have the rash, Becky very poorly. mrs Woodward at the Capt ns .

Clear. mr Hamlin here till after nn , [is better]. I went to see mrs Porter, She is unwell. has had the Canker & ague in her head, is some better. I Calld to See mr Sanford, find him very Low. mr Ballard Came home from Sincleirs.
G Clear & Cool. I attended public worship. mr Bent had two Sons Baptised, one by the name Rufus, the other, David Jackson. Jonathan gone up river with a famely.

G Cloudy morn, returnd from Edsons. Left her Comfortable, arivd at home at 5 y s morn. Breakfasted & went to Esqr Howards to See his Lady who is unwell. Came to meeting, aftern n . had a pain in my head.

G Clear. I came home from Cap t Sewals, do not feel fitt to go to meeting. took a fine nap. Parthena Barton here and mr Faught. I hear that a woman from Boston by the name of Polly Trust Came to mr Pollards in pursuit of John Leir. Shee is pregnant by hm.
G Cloudy & fair. the ordinance of the Supper administred. Georg Couch desird prayrs, he being very low. mr Leir & Rachel Faut, Smith & Mary Kenida Publisht.
G Clear. I have had a Severe Pain in my head. a Shower of hail & some rain y s after n . George Coutch remains very Sick yett. Desires prayers. Nathan Howard here.

Clear. the Girls washt & went to mrs Westons. mrs Savage Dind here, Capt Savages Lady here & Dind also. I went to mrs Howards when I heard of the Esq rs Death. Esq r Howard Departed this Life ; a Suden Change, he was well and Dead in about three hours.

Clear. the Girls Strikeing harnis. I went to See mrs Williams. mrs Voce & Betsy here. mr Smyle Sleeps here. mr Ballard surveying for Revd mr Foster & been to Doct Coneys. mrs Harris, Lidia Bisbee, Sally Peirce & others here y s Evinng. mr Savage made the irons for our Loome. I paid him 4 Shillings in Cash.

Clear. I am more Comfortable than I was yesterday. mr Ballard Brot our Kittle from Savages. mr Edy asistided him. we Boild a Linning warp, 55 Skeins. the girls gon to mr Crags. mr Howard Left here y s morn.

rainy. I set Beet plants. mrs Woodward here. Capt Sewals Son Departed this [ ] Life this morn. mr Leighton and his Son, Isaac, Sleep here. the girls went to mr Crages. Mr Porter of Winthrop was here last Evining. mr Ballard makeing [rates].
at home. thee Girls wash t . mr Ballard Securd flax. mrs North & Capt Cox s wife here.
Clear & pleast. mr Cumings, Jon o & Rufus have been Dresing flax. mr Ballard is gone to mr Jonas Clearks. Revd mr Foster here y s morn. Lidia Foster here.
a rain. I have been at home. mr Ballard to Doc t Coneys. mr Ingraham had 1/2 Bush l flax Seed. mr Leighton Sleeps here, informs that Joseph Ben Fillbroks s Hous is Burnt & most of his goods.
mr Ballard Laying out Rhod by Cap t Sewalls. I have been at home. Dolly very lame.

Clear. Hannah Cool warpt our gouns and went to mr Densmors to have her goun Cut out. mr Ballard went to the hook on an arbetration. I was Calld to Cap t Sewalls to See his Child, find it very Sick indeed. I hear that mr William Gardner Departed this Life yesterday. I Sett up with Billy Sewall all night.
at home till after n , then Calld to Jo s Fosters to See Aaron. find him poorly. Calld from there to Mr M C Masters, his wife unwell.

Clear. I was Calld to Doc t Coneys to See Pegg Cool who is near Expireing, from there was Calld to See mrs Brown who has a Dread full Lame hand. went Back to the Doctrs, Set up all night. Peggy Expird about 2 O Clok y s morn.

Clear morn. I pulld flax y e foren n , rain after n . I am very much fatagud. Lay on y e bed & rested. y e two Hannah s Washing. Dolly weaving. I was Calld to mrs Claton in travil at 11 O Clo K Ev NG .
I atended funeral of mrs Claton & her infant. am Enformed that mrs Shaw has Doc t Coney with her. I Calld to see James How d , find him low. mrs North also is Sick. a thunder Shower y s Evinn g .

rainy morn, Loury Day. I went to See mrs Weston, Shee is unwell. Calld at [ Col o Nths] & Cap t Porter. he is Better. mr Ballard has been at work on the Bridg. Cyrus and mr Gillbreath went to Churches with the spindle of y e mill to be fited.
Cloudy. I have been at home, wound quills for Dolly. She wove 5-1/2 yds.
Clear & pleas t . I went to See Lady Foster, find her very Comfortable. Shee went into the kitchen. mr Ballard went to Town meeting. mr Foster made me a pres t of a Silk hand kerchief.
Clear. mrs Porter Left here for home. mr Pollard Sent for me to See Sanford. I tarried & watcht. he is very Low indeed.
Cloudy. Danniel Robbins Came here from the westward. mr Voce Remoovd from mr Emersons to Doct Coalmans. mr Ballard at mr Pollards on public buisiness. I have been at home, finish t hannahs Stockins.

X Birth. Will m Stones Son, first Child. XX. Cear. I was Calld to William Stones wife in Travil at 11 O Clok morn. Shee was Safe Del d of a Son at 9 Ev n . I returnd at 11. mr Porter & Pamela Siting up. Sister Barton Came here this Day, by water. I heard a man fell down Dead in y e Coart hous at Pounalboro yesterday.

Clear. I went to Deacon Coneys & y e Docters, mr Churches, & Cap t Belchers. mr Ballard went to a vesel at y e hook & got some Corn. I Come home with him. Pamela returnd. Shee was joind in Wedlok with mr Porter yesterday. mrs Church was Dilivd of a son last Tusday morn at 1 O Clok & 20 m. Doct Coney operator. Jerymy Baddoks wife y e Same Night of a Dafter. old mrs Fletcher performd the ofice of a midwife for her.
Clear. I work d abou t hous fore n . was Calld to mrs Howards to See James, found him Seemingly Expireing. mrs Pollard there. we Sett up. he revivd.

X Birth. John Cumings s Son. XX. Clear & Pleast. I was Calld to go to John [Cumings] at winthrop at 6 h 30 m morn. went about 6 miles, had a fall from the hors, did not receive much hurt. was informd the Lady was Safe [Delivd] of a Son. returnd at 7 h 30 m . Doc t Barton and famely here on their way to the westw d . I wish them a Safe pasage. Cyrus went to help them to the vesel. Capt Savages Lady here, made me a pres t of 2 hand kerchiefs. Parthena Barton Sleeps here. I went to see mrs Voce y s Evinning. Capt Nichols here.
Clear & very hot. I have been pulling flax. mr Ballard Been to Savages about Some hay.

Not So Cold. I Came home. Son Town attended me. we Left Lucy more Comfortable, got home at Dusk. found my kinsman, Hains Learned, here Directly from Ward. our friends all well who are yet alive. Cap t Heartwell, Cap t Sam l Davis, Leut Ben n Davis & mr Dan l Phillips are Departed this Life, all of OXford. a Snow this night.

lbbey Howards Death, Departed this life at 4 oClok morn. I came home after mrs Woodw d , Savage & I had Laid out her Corps. mrs Savage, Mrs Williams here. mr Ballard gone to a meeting Concerning Building a School house. Luke Barton here.
Clear. I have been at home, made some mins Pies. mr Learned & Clarrisa Barton here,two Strangers also.
G X Birth. Welmans Son. X. I was Calld to mr Welmans at 9 y s morn, his wife Safe Deliv d at 7 Ev n of a Son. I tarried all night, watcht. Cap t Savages wife there. It raind y s Evinng.
G Very pleas t . I atended worship, maj r Dutton at meeting. after n mr James Page Desird prayr for y e Death of his Father. Hannah & Dolly were fritind by a Baire between here & Neigh r Savages.

Clear. I Came up By water, attended by Taylor & Hinkly. I receivd 7 lb of flax of mr Welman on acount of my trouble march 31, 1785. our men Turnd of Bords to [Leemans]. Woodward here this Evinn g . Reb ch Wiman here for milk.
at home till 10 Evin g when Calld to see mrs Williams who is in travil. there all night.
G At Ben n Whites with his Sister Rebeckah who is in Travil tho unmarried. Cloudy.
Clear. mr Ballard Carting Dung, run y e Cart of thee road. I was Calld to mr Belchers, his wife being unwell. mrs Cumings & Church there.
I went to williamss to settle with Han h Cool. Came home, was Calld to See mr Sanford, find him very Low. Revd mr Little maid a prayer with him. mr Ballard gone to Sinclears.

Clear. I have Been at home, Combd 9 lb of Flax. mr Ballard Ploughd. Haigns Learned Dind here. we had 103 lb 1/2 of Beef of Danl Robbins. Dolly went for Current Bushes. Polly Fletcher, mrs Harris & Wiman here. Sally Webb had 1 lb of fatt for mrs Porter.

Clear. mr Ballard gone to Coart. mrs s Shaw & Ellis & her twin Boys Dind here. I have been Combing flax. the Girls strikeing a harnis to a 36 & Coulering a Linning warp. Becky Wiman rode by here today.
at mr M c Masters all day.
G Clear. I Did not atend the worship. went at Evin g to See mr Foster, Sett up with him. mr Learned & Jonothan went to Brother Moores.

At Doct Coneys. Peggy Departed y s Life about 3 O Clok y s morn. Bitsy champny taken Sick. the Doct returnd from S. river at 2 PM. I was to see Old Lady Coney. Came up with mr m c cMasters as far as mr Westons.

Birth. [mrs] Clatons Son. at mr Cowens. put mrs Claton to Bed with a Son at 3 PM. Came to mr Kenadays to See his wife who has a sweling under her arm. Polly is mending. returnd as far as mr Pollards, by water. Calld from there to winthrop to Jerimy Richards wife in Travil, arivd about 9 O Clok.

Birth. mr Shaws Dafter. X. I Sett out to visit Joseph Fosters Children, met Eph m Cowen by Brooks s Barn. Calld me to See his Dafters Polly & Nabby who are Sick with the rash, find them very ill; gave directions. was then Calld to mrs Shaw who has been ill some time. Put her Safe to Bed with a Daughter at 10 O Clok y s Evinn g . Shee is finely.
Clear. I have been at home. mr Ballard workt at y e Bridge Sherebiah Town Sleeps here, Lidia Foster also.
Clear. I feel unwell. mr Ballard gon to y e hook, y e Girls to Cap t Porters. Jon o bro t his Colt from Cobesy.
Clear morn, rainy aftern n . I Combd flax & knit. Joseph Fosters wife here y s night.

Clear. I came home at noon, Left Sanford alive. Drest Betsy Chamberlins Soar. Foster is unwell, his face Sweld. I went to See Sanford at Evin, find him much the Same. Daniel Savages wife & Sally Peirce here, Brot home 16 Skeins of Linni n y n , y e spining of whice Satisfies me for ascisting mrs Savage in travl Oct 1 st 1786.
at Towns, Lucy Comfortable y e infant is not as well as I could wish. Eunice Stacp l is nurs.

Clear part of the day, a little snow. Biah went from here. Polly Taylor here. I paid her for what work Shee Did for me Last August, 8 Days. old mrs Wheeler here. mr Ballard been to Col o Howards. I have been at home. Ephraim is Eight years old this Day.
Clear. the girls washt. Hannah had a pain in her head. Sally Bak t . mr Ballard gon to y e hook. mrs Tylor here. Sister & I went to see mrs Williams.

Clear. mr Williams & wife & Sally h r . mr [ ] Barton & Betsy Town from Pitts Town [ ]. mrs Welch here for nn . I went to mr Savages, Drest her infant, find them Cleverly. mr Densmoore here for advice for his Son who is lambd by a fall which brousd his knee. Sally Peirce been here y s after nn . we have Bakt Some rice pudings y s Evinng. I finisht mr Ballard s Linn g Hoes at 9 & 3/4 O Clok.
at mrs H ds , her Son very Sick. Capt Sewall & Lady Sett up till half after 4, then I rose. the Child seems revivd.
Clear. mr Ballard went to Varsalb h , Jono n & Ep m also. I have been makeing Soap & Bucking Cloath. Polly Bisbe & Hannah mc Cakney here. Revd mr Foster here today, he is unwell.

Clear morn. I pulld flax till noon. a very Severe Shower of hail with thunder and Litning began at half after one, Continud near 1 hour. I hear it broke 130 pains of Glass in fort western. Colo n Howard made me a pres t of 1 Gal w Rhum & 2 lb Sugar on acount of my atendance of his famely in Sickness. Peter Kenny has wounded his Legg & Bled Excesivily.

X Birth. Wil m Whites Son. XX. Clear & pleast. I Came from mr Fosters. we made 25 Doz n of Candles. mrs Voce here. Hannah is not So well as usual, I was Calld about mid night to go See Wil m Whites wife. I was very unwell. Seth Williams after me to See his wife also in travil. mrs White Safe Delivrd of a Son by y e asistance of Moses Whites wife before I arivd. I was Exceeding Sick while gone.

X. Birth. of Becky Whites Dafter. XX at mr Whites, Becky ill all day, her women with her, She was Safe Deliverd about ten Evinn g of a Daughter which Shee Declared Seth Partridg to be the Father of. I tarried all night. Clear.

Clear. Mr Kenny Conducted me home. we arivd at 4 h morn. I made a fire & hett my feet then went to Bed & Lay till Ten, then rose & feel much Beter than my fears. mr Ballard is gon to mr Pollards. I let mrs Porter have 10 skeins of [ ]. Receivd 10-1/2 knots of Doubled & 7 of [ ] y n w t 10 oz, part of it Coloured Blue. in this year 1787, I have Extracted 12 sons & 15 Daughters; been Calld to 7 women which were Deliverd before my arival. Hallowell December 31, 1787 Martha Ballard Her Diary Doc t Stephen Barton, with his Famely, Left our hous bound to Boston Oct r 25 th , 1787. My Hon d Mother Moore Deseast December 4 of a Palsy. now 1787 is Ended, it happy is if we are mended. God grant if not we may be.

X. Birth. Joseph Williams s Daft r . X Mrs Williams Safe Delivrd of a Dafter at 7 O Clok morn, I tarried with her all day. he Brot Hannah Cool to nurs, mrs Pollard, Porter, Childs & Foster were assistants, all went home after Break ts
Clear. mrs Dorcas Pollard here to warp a pice. mrs Savage went home. Theop s was unwell, Did not work. mr Ballard Came home. Gillbreath Sleeps here.
rainy. thee South Company met to Chuse their ofisers. maid Choice of mr Belcher for y r Captain; mr Hersey, Leut; mr Church, Ens. they all accepted. I am at Cap t Belchers Still (Election this Day.
Clear & pleast. I was diging roots foren n . Calld to See mr Sanford after nn . watcht y s night.

A lowry Day. mr Ballard gone on the Devision line Between Revd mr Fosters & mr Kenadys. I have been at home, had a pain in my head. Dolly finisht weaving our hand kerchiefs [16] of them. Theophl s finish t Sealing the wes t roome. it Snows this Evin g . [AniverSary] of my marriag, 33 years.
G Clear morn. mr Hamlin Breakfast d here, had Some pills. I was Calld at 9 o Clok to mrs Howards to See James, he being very Sick with y e Canker Rash; tarried all night.
Came hom by water. left mrs M c Masters better. my Girls washing. Dolly has Sett mrs Williams piece to work.

X Birth. Jerimy Richards Dafter. X. at mr Richards. his wife Dilivrd of a Dt r at 10 O Clok morn. returnd as far as mr Pollards at 12, walkd from there. mrs Coy buryd a Dafter yesterday. mr Stanley has a Dafter Dangerous, Will m Wicher 2 Children also.

Birth. James Hinkleys Son. X. Calld from Shaws to James Hinklys wife in travil, put her safe to Bed with a Son at 7 O Clok y s morn. Left her as well as is usual for her. Came to mr Shaws, receivd 6/8; received 6/8 of mr Hinkly also. Came to mr Cowens, find his dafters & Jedy ill. Claton & David Came inn from Sandy river, People well there. arivd at home at 5 aft rnn . Doct Coneys wife Delivrd of a Dafter Last Evn g at 10 O Clok.

Clear. I have been at home. the Girls washt. mrs Welch here, took some flax home to spin. Rhuben Moore & Davis Nichols here after Loggs. Lidia went home. Dolly took the hand kerchiefs out of y e loom. Mrs Woodward here.
Cloudy & Some rain. mr Ballard gone to Varsalborough to run Lines for mr Carr. Dolly finish t weaving mrs Williams s Cloath. I have been unwell. mrs Savage here y s morn.
Clear, Flint Bartons wife & her Sister Dind here. mrs Foster went from here. mrs Voce & Daftr here at Eving. my Girls went to mrs Williams s .
Clear. Gidion Sanford Departed this Life. mr Weston & his wife & Nathan here.
Cloudy. I returnd home from Towns, Left them as well as Could be Expected. find my Famely all well. a rainy night.
Clear. mrs Tylor here for Corn, had a peck. Sister & I took a walk as far as mr Savages. I hear John North is Sick. Gidion is unwell. we gave him Some hysop Tea, put Tow on his throat.

Clear. I went to See David Densmoores knee. mr Barton & Betsy Town went from here. I Settld with Pamela This Day. Shee has Lost 1 months time, or rather workt for her Self since Shee came here & had, 20 y d s Cloth at 2/8 pr yd 2:13:4 Lawn for an apron : 7:6 2 pair shoes 12/ Leather & makeing :17:1 Paid mrs Densmore for Cuting her gown :6 Credit by her Labour 4:--:- Detr to 1/7 in cash : 1:7
Calld from mrs H ds to mr m c Masters to See y r Son William who is very low. Tarrid th r y s night.
rain this morn, wind N after n . I have been makeing Soap, am informd y e Revd mr Foster is very Sick, has sent for Doct Williams.

Cloudy & Some Snow. mr Ballard went to the hook. we receivd a Letter from our Friend Hains Learned of the 19 th inst, informing us of the Death of my honoured Mother, who Departed this Life after a Short illness y e 4 th ins t ; her Decease was the Palsy. Shee was Aged 72 Years the 27th of July last, Old Stile. he also informs y t my Sister Deborah was Safe Delivrd of a Son & that my other friends were in health, and of an acsident by fire which hapend on the Night of y e 5 th inst in OXbridg; a hous Consumd with four persons, 2 aged & 2 Children. News of the Death of My Mother.
G Laury. at mr mc Masters, y r Son very sick. I Sett up all night. mrs Patin with me. the Child very ill indeed.
G Clear morn, a Shower aftern. I attend d worship. Deacon Emerson Performd. mr Ballard went to See mr Foster at Evin g , finds him poorly. mr Hamlin here.

G XX. Birth of Thomas Kennys Daught and first Child. XX. Clear. I attended Divine Servis, went to mr Westons in intermision and was Calld at 7 h Evn to See Thomas Kennys wife in Travil. I Broke through the ice on the Eddy by Capt Sewals. went into thee water to my waist, got out without asistance. mr Kenny Carried me a Shoar in his arms. I mounted his hors, wett as I was rode to mr Whites in hast. find the Pateint very ill. Shee was Safe Delivr d at 10 h & 30 m of a Dafter and is Cleverly. I fell in to the river.

I am at mrs Howards watching with her Son, went out about Day. Discoverd our saw mill in flames. The men at y e fort went over, found it Consumd together with Some plank & Boards. I tarried till Evinng. Left James Exceeding Dangerously ill. my Daughter Hannah is 18 years old this Day. mrs Williams here when I Came home. Hannah Cool gott mrs Norths web out at the Loome. mr Ballard Complains of a soar Throat y s night. he has been to take mr gardners hors home.

death of W m mc Masters William mc Masters Expired at 3 O Clock y s morn. mrs Patin & I laid out the Child. poor mother, how distress[d] her Case. near the hour of Labour and three Children more very Sick. I Sett out for home. Calld at mrs Hd s , I find her Son very Low. at mr Williams s , Shee very ill indeed. now at home it is nine O Clok morn. I feel as if I must take Some rest. I find mr Ballard is going to Pitts ton on Business. Dolly is begining to weave thee hand kerChiefs. Eph m & I went to see mrs Williams at Evinn g , find her Some Better.
Cloudy, Snow at Evin g . I have been Bucking yarn & knitting. Hannah Sewing. we brot in the last of our potatoes. I hear mr Foster is no Better.

Clear. Mr Kenny Conducted me home. we arivd at 4 h morn. I made a fire & hett my feet then went to Bed & Lay till Ten, then rose & feel much Beter than my fears. mr Ballard is gon to mr Pollards. I let mrs Porter have 10 skeins of [ ]. Receivd 10-1/2 knots of Doubled & 7 of [ ] y n w t 10 oz, part of it Coloured Blue. in this year 1787, I have Extracted 12 sons & 15 Daughters; been Calld to 7 women which were Deliverd before my arival. Hallowell December 31, 1787 Martha Ballard Her Diary Doc t Stephen Barton, with his Famely, Left our hous bound to Boston Oct r 25 th , 1787. My Hon d Mother Moore Deseast December 4 of a Palsy. now 1787 is Ended, it happy is if we are mended. God grant if not we may be.

X Birth. Seth Williams s Child a Son XXX. I Came from Whites by water to mrs Westons, Calld to See her. mrs North Calld me in there, gave me Some Brandy, which gave me relief. have been on the Bed the most of ye Day. mr Lee here. Theo ps bee Laying a flore over y e East room. mr Porter Supt here. mr Learned Sleeps here. I am informed that Seth Williams wife was Safe Delivrd at 7 O Clok y s morn. Shee had a Son.
Clear & Pleast. I returnd from mr Whites Some fatagud, have not been undrest Since I left home. was Calld to N r Savages to See his Infant who is unwell. Theop s Laid our kitchen floar.

I helpt mrs Williams up & maid h r Bed & returnd home. left her Cleverly. I help t do the work & was Calld in hast to See mrs Williams, Shee being in a Deleriam by reason of a mis s Step of her Husband, tho not Desiring to injure her. I tarried till 3/O Clok morn. Left her rationall, tho Exercisd with Some pain. Will ms Bro t me 5 lb of chocolat this aftern n .
Clear. mr Ballard at mr Pollards on Business. Hannah wash t . mrs Porter & Sally Bisbe here this Evinn g . Hannah fell Down Stairs. Ep m Cutt his finger. Dolly has wove 2 handkechfs.

Clear & very pleas t Day. mr Ballard Sett out at 10 h this morn for Winslow, was Disapointed of a hors & returnd. Snowd this Evin g . I have been at home. Jon o Changd his oxen for the hors he ond the first ins t . at home.
at mr Pollards till Evinning, find Dolly lame. Poultist her foot with Sorril roasted.

Cloudy, a Little Snow. mr Ballard gone to mr Pollards on Business. the Girls washt. mrs Porter Sent for me to See her Daft r Becky & Polly Bisbe there. I calld at Mr Williams s . Sally s Eys are Sore yet.
I did hous work. mrs Voce & Daughter here. I w s Calld to See mrs mc Masters in Travil at 7 Evn.

I spun Some Shoe thread & went to see mrs Williams, Shee has news her Mother is very Sick. Jeny Huston had a Child Born the night before Last. I was Calld by James Hinkly to See his wife at 11 & 30 Evn n went as far as mr Westons by land, from thence by water. find mrs Hinkly very unwell.
I went to Isaac Savages y s morn, his wife here aftern n , Deby Shaw allso. I was Calld to mr Cowens. Set up all night. our men at y e meddow.

Clear. mr Moore Dind here. I went to Col l Norths and got 2 lb Butter, 2 Do of Sugar, &-1/2 lb of Tea. Mr Brown, his wife & mrs Ferwel here. an ox trod on mr Ballards foot & Lamd it very much. I Batht it with Camp hr & turpentine.
at home till Sun Set, then Calld to See Andrew Goodwins wife who is unwell.
rainy. mr Ballard been to Varsalbor o . Jonathan returnd from Winslow, all well there. Collins Moore & Alax r Smily Sleep here. I have been at home, wrote to my Mother, Brot h Collins & Sis t Waters.

Clear. Peggy Fox Came after me to go and See mrs Foster, Shee has took Cold, her Breast is painful. mr Foster is some better. I attend Funeral of mr Sanford & went back to mr Fosters, helpt her up & applied Some thing to her breast. mrs Voce with me. I went to Bed at ten, was Calld at 11 h 30 m to See mrs Goodwin in travil. arivd about one.

Clear & pleast. I went to Isaac Savages and got Some rie which James Savage Left there for me, 3 pecks & 5 qr ts , then went to mr Westons. had 2 lb Sugar, 1/4 lb of Tea, a pint of W. Rhum. I have knit on a leggin.

Clear Day. Snowd at Evinng. mr Bullins & wife & Daught Dind, Polly Savage also. Doc t Cony here. mr Ballard gone to Col o Norths. I Went to mr Williams. I Sent mrs Densmore 14 pills by h r Son. Death Cap t Pages infan t .
G at mr Godw s . Shee is Some Better.
G Clear & pleast. I attended public worship, the Revd mr Foster performd, we had but one Exercise by reason of his weakness.
F Stormy, Snow & Hail. mr Ballard & Jon o went to mr Pollards. there was no preaching. it is very bad Stiring. Death Mrs KenyDay.

G Birth. Andr r Goodens Daft r . XX. Arivd at mr Good ns at 1 h noon, find her Safe Deliverd of a fine Dafter. Lady Cox operator. I tarried till ten. Sett out home by water, arivd at noon. attind worship after n . the Revd mr Fosters Son Baptised, named Nathan l . Genny Cool here. I receivd a handsom reward of mr Goodin. mrs Voce carried it.
Came home from mr Goodwins, left her about house. Fanny Cox rode behind me. mr Ballard gon to Survey for mr Pitts.

Clear. I have been at home. mr Learned went from here to Varsalb r . mrs Barton returnd from winthrop, informs mr Chandlers Daugh t Walton Deceast Sept 20, and Mrs Wing Last weak. Both in Child Bed. my Girls went to See mrs Voce y s Evinning. mr Ballard been to mr Pollards. Select Men mett on buisiniss.
Clear, at home all Day. Sally Barton here. mr Ballard went to Wails on Business.

Birth. mr Beamans Dafter. X X. Clear. I was Calld to mrs Beaman in travil at 9 O Clok, Shee was Safe Delivd at 12 of a Daughter, I Left her Comfortable & returned home at 7 P.M. receivd 6/8. I have knitt on mr Westons Leggin this Evinning. mr Ballard at mr Pollards
Clear & pleas t . mr Ballard at Col o Norths. I am informd That Cap t Pages inf t Expird 19 th inst & is to be interd this Day. at home.

Clear. I was Calld to mrs Howards this morn for to See her Son, find him very low. Went from mrs Howards to See mrs Williams, find her very unwell. Hannah Cool is there. from thence to Joseph Fosters to see her Sick Children, find Saray & Daniel very ill. Came home, went to y e field & got Some Cold water root, then Calld to mr Kinydays to See Polly. very ill with the Canker, gave her Some of y e root & gargled her throat which gave her great Ease; returnd home after Dark. mr Ballard been to Cobesy, his throat is very Soar. he gargled it with my tinct r , finds relief & went to bed Comfortable.
I went to Mr Andrew Goodwins, all well there.
Clear. I was Calld to See mrs Weston, find her very unwell. was Calld from there to See Revd mr Foster, find him very ill. I watcht with him. raind at Evinng.
Jon o Sett out for winslow. it Snows. Cleard of pleas t at 11. mr Barton Came for me to go to winslow.
I Came home, weand as far as mr Pollards. tarried & watcht with Gideon Sanford.
Clear & pleast. mr Learned Left here Bound for home, I wish him a prosper s journey.

Cloudy. I went to See Savages Infant, Doct Colman was Calld to see it also. I was at the Docters. returnd at Dusk. some Boys on our mill pond, Gas h North fell in, was help t out again Safe from harm.
a Snow. at mr Pollards till Evinng. Left Sanford a little more Comfortable. Doct Williams there has Sett Ma jr Duttons thigh which was Broke yesterday. it Snowd this Day.
Clear & very pleas t , this day observd as a public Thanksgiving. I attend Public Servis. I went to See mrs Williams, find her more Comfortable.

Clear & pleast. mr Ballard been to Deac n Emersons makeing Rates. I went to Davis s , got 3 oz indigo. spent Evinn g at mrs Porters. Cap t Sewall & Lady were here while I was absent. Eleason Luce was killd by y e fall of a tree.

Clear. mr Ballard Sett our for winslow. I was Calld to See mr Weston who has an ulser gathering in his throat, tarried & watch t . am informd of y e Death of Wil m Kenadys wife at Sandy river. Cap t Norcross maried to mrs Nancy Hussey. mariag Cap t Norcros. I was a t mr Westons.

XX. Birth Savage Boltons Son. XX. Clear & Cold. I was Calld to See Savage Boltons wife in travil at 7h morn. Shee was Safe Deliv d of a very fine Son at 12 O/Clok. I returnd home at 7 H Ev n . Left mother & Child Cleverly. mr Ballard been to Brother Moores, returnd at 10 h , informs that Jacob Foot Buried a Daft this Day. Eliab Shaws wife Came to her Fathers y s Day, the most of the way on Snow Shoes. her Husband & Child n Sick. Death. I was at mr Boltons.
at home. mr Burton had his hand Drest here. mr Hamlin Came here, very poorly. we made a bed by the fire, I gave him Some Catnip Tea. he Tarried all night. Luke Barton Sleeps here.

Clear & Pleast. Dolly very lame. Hannah wove Some. I went to See Sanford, find him very Low, apparently Expireing. I went to thee Revd mr Foster s . Came back to mr Pollards. we gave Sanf d Teas, he revivd & spoke. I left him at Nine this Evin n . find Dollys foot Easier. Cyrus is returnd, all well at Son Towns.

Cloudy & Some Snow. mr Ballard been at Deacon Emersons makeing Raits. I have been at home, am informd that Mr Beamans infant Expired this Day, also that mr Charls Weber Bured a Child this weak. Death, of mr Beamans infant.

X Birth. mr mc Masters Son. X. mrs mc Masters put to Bed about 2 y s morn with a son, y e infant very weak & Low. I tarid all day. mrs Petingail Came there. Sally Leonerd watcht, the child revivd a little.
Snowd all Day. mr Ballard Came home this Evin g . Ive been at home.
G at mr mc Masters till Eving. left them poorly. find mrs Straten & Alice Ballard here. Cyrus returnd from Son Towns, left them all well. Doct Colman Published to mrs Sukey Atkins of Nubery.
F Clear. mr Ballard attended public worship, the rest of us tarried at home.

E Cloudy fore n n , rain after n . my Self & Dat s tarried at home. Joseph Williams went to Doc t Williams to be Docterd. Hannah Cool went to be his Nurs. Joseph Williams went to Doc t Williams.Cyrus at meetg.
I went to mr mc Masters, find their Infant deseas t , it was interd y s Evin g . I tarried all night. it raind.
Clear. mr Ballard went to Varsalbo. I have been at home. Peirly Pollard Came here.

Clear morn. mr Ballard Sett out for Varsalboro; Jona and Wil m Emerson for Winslow. mrs Savage here, Rev d mr Foster here aftern n , mr Weston allso. Cyrus went to mr Blakes & B t Some Rhum. I made Some herb Tea for Hannah & Stemd her head over hott herbs, which gave her relief. Joseph Foster had 1 Bush l of Jona s potatoes. Snowd y s Evin g .
X Birth. X Revd mr Fosters son X XX. I was Calld to Revd mr Fosters Lady in Travl. Shee was Safe Del d of a fine Son at 7 Evn n . I watcht. it is her Second Child.
Clear & pleas t . Sally here y t . Dorkes Pollard here to warp a piece of worsted. I finisht Hannah s Linning Gloves.
Cloudy. the Girls wash t . mrs Taylor & mrs Bolton were here. Theop s to work here. I have knitt.
Cloudy, Snowd at Evinn g . I hear Henry Knowland is very Sick. I have been at home, Salted y e Pork. Seth Pitts here. I Drest his wounds. at home.

Clear morn. I Left mr Foster at the riseing of the Sun. Calld to see mrs Weston, shee is still poorly. I have workt very hard Bucking Cloath & trying Tallow. we have killd thee old Cow this Day. Shee had 40 lb of Tallow, w t in y e whole 430. Doct Coleman Brot his wife home.
Clear. mr Barton & I Left our House at 9 This morn; arivd at his at 3 pm. find his wife in Travil & her women Calld. mrs Spincer was there. Shee was Calld at 10 to mrs Simson. it is very Cold.
Clear. Son Town Came for me, I went there, we arivd at 8 O Clok Evin g . mrs Hannah Emry there.
Clear. I was Calld to See Sally Williams, her Eyes are Some better. mr Ballard been to mr Barkers & paid him all he owed him.
Clear & not so Cold. James Cofrin Cutt wood at the Door. I have been at home. Polly Savage washt here. I paid her in flax & ashes.

Clear & pleast. I went to See mrs Williams. was Calld by mr Seth Williams to see his Son Moses, who is very unwell, we Gave him Some Senna & manna. I Came back to Josephs, tarried with her till 1 O Clok morn. mr Ballard gone to Brot h Moores, tarried all night. Snowed Eving.
Clear. I was Calld to See Lucy Porter who is very unwell, her Boddy com down & much Swel d . mrs m c Night Sleeps here, her Husband has turnd her out of a Dores as Shee says.
Clear. I returnd from mr Westons, he is not better; has Sen t for Doct Williams. Henry Badcoks wife Delivrd of a Da t 17 of Janu y . Birth. I was at mr Westons.
Clear. mrs Foster here, Betsy Voce also. Shee Sleeps h r . mr Emerson Rote advertisements forbiding any person Leting Calvin Edson have any Spirritous Liquor. Son Towns infant Deceas t .
Cloudy, warm. mrs Polly Bisbe here makeing a Gown for Hannah. Gillbreath Dresing the mill. I have been at home. A hous Burnt at New Gloster & a Lad in it.

Snow fore n n , rain after n . I Sett out to attend funeral of Betsy Chamberlain; met them with the Corps. Dolly & I follow d as far as Colo Norths. The ice moovd and They Could not pass over y e river. Thee Corps were put into The metting house. I returnd as far as mr Williams s ; Spent y e after n there; her Children unwell. the Corps of Betsy Chamberlain lay in y e meeting hous.
Clear. I have been fiting wool for Cyrus s shirt. mr Weston had a Potash Fraim raisd. mr Ballard returnd from Sinclears. Dolly has wove 4-1/4 yds. Jon o & Daniel gone to watch with mr Sanford.

Clear. I went to the hook; was at maj r Duttuns, mrs s Hallowils, mr Densmors, Revd mr Fosters and mr Westons. Calld at mr s Porters & Williams s , their Children are Some Beter. Theophilus maid a Book Caiss & put it up in y e East room.

Birth mrs Hains Dafter. XX. Clear & Windy. I am at mr Hains & his wife was safe Delivrd at 5h morn of a Dat r ; her 10 th Child. I left her & Child Comfortable; returnd home at noone; receivd 6/. mr Porter of Wint p Dind here. mr Ballard at Son Towns yesterday; They were well.
G Clear & pleast. the Revd mr Foster Preacht at Varsalbor O . Esq r Lovjoys Lady is Sick. mr Ballard & I went to See mr Sanford, find him a little revivd.
E rainy part of y e Day. I attended worship after n , Hannah also. there were but few people there. Levy Moore & W m Roberts here. at meeting.
G Clear. I Sett out to go to meeting & met Thomas Keny, who Calld me to See his wife who is unwel. I was at mr Whites this Day. snowd at night.

E Clear & Cool. I attended worship. there were more people a t meeting than has been Lately. I Calld to see mr Williams, he thinks he is better. Eliphalet Robbins has Broke his Collar Bone & hurt his arm. at meeting.
E Clear & Cool. my Self & Dat s did not attend meeting. Hannah is very unwell. I went to See Patty Williams, Shee is no Better, mrs Porter there. my son Ephraim is nine years old this day.

I have been at home, piqut wool for Cyrus. the Girls washt. Theophelus Laid a floar in the west Chamber. mr Bisbe here. mrs Chamberlin here to have Betsys Soar on her throat Drest. I aplied a plaster.
Cloudy. I am at mr Whites yet, his Daft poorly.

Clear & Pleas t . mr Ballard been to See about School. Brothr Town here; Says his Da t , Hannah, is better. Polly Savage here to work. I have been at home. Wil m Emerson here. Hannah Rode out; is some Better.

Clear & Cold. I have been at home; finished makeing my soap; had a barril. Cleand 80 Skeins of Tow y n . the girls Bakt & Brewd. mr Ballard been with mr Carr & Cap t Sewall to the Lott of Land which mr Savage & he own d . they prised it at 16/ an acre. at home.
rain. Snow & Haill & Cold. mr Voce been here to work. Cyrus got Some wood for mr Williams. Thee Girls & I washt. Jona Bo t A Tea Pott. at home.
returnd from mc Ms ts . Calld at mr Westons & Williams s Polly Savage [there]. Foster Came to work here yesterday. mr Ballard at mr Pollards. Cyrus is 31 years old this Day.
Clear. I have been at home. Shereb Town here, left all well at home. mr Elis & wife here.
Clear & Cold. mr Woodward & his wife here. They Broke their Sleigh Coming Down the hill. I went to to [sic] mr Williams s to See Patty. Shee has a swelling on her throat.
I am at mr Fosters. Shee is Cleverly.

Clear & very pleast. mr Vahn here. Sally Bart n lef t here. mr Foster, Savage & Brown here. mr Hadon fell into the river. Came here for a Shirt to put on till he Dried his Cloaths. Hannah & Dolly went to mr Westons. mr Ballard to Town Meeting.

X. Birth. Bralys Son. XX. Cloudy I rose by Candle light. Theop s Layeing y e Floar of y e East room. I was Calld to See mrs Braly in Travil who was Safe Del d at 12 O Clok of a Seventh Son and 15 th Child. I returnd home y s Evin g . it is a rainy night.
Snowd. I have been at home. finish t my Stockins; the third pair this [for] winter. we are informd that Henery Knowland Expird this morn & is to be interd tomorr o . Death Henry Knowland. at home.
E A rainy Day. mr Ballard only of our famely attended public worship. mr Mathews & his Brot h Sleep here. mr Brooks & Judg Howards wid o Published. Beal & Polly Savage also.
Clear. mr Ballard been to the hook. girls washt, Foster wounded his foot. mr Hains Learned Sleeps here,informs our friends are well.

X. Birth Luke Bartons Son. XX. Clear & Cold. mrs Barton was Safe Deliverd of a Son at 1 this morn & is Cleverly. Sherebiah is very unwell. I tarried there this Day. Patty Town unwell. I forgave mrs Barton my fee for my attending her.
at mr Towns, mrs Dexter there. Luke Barton & Betsy Town were Maried yesterday.
Clear morn, Snowd after n . mrs Pollard Came here to instruct Dolly how to warp our hand kerchiefs. mr Broadstreet Dind. Hannah & Polly Cool here Evinn g . I hear y t Maj r Dutton is very Sick.

Clear & pleas t . Cofrin works here. Son Town Came here; informs that Sherebiah is a little Better; his famely all well. mrs Barton is Cleverly. Peirly has been to the meddow for mr Wade. Hannah is gone to Jo s Fosters to get her Shoes made. Col o Howard & old Lady, mrs s Betsy and Polly, Esq r Pette, Esq r Farewel & Ladys here. mr Town & Saml Stackpool Sleep here. I have been at home. it Snows This Evin g .

Pleast. mrs Pollard Came here with her Son Amos who had a Lame knee, I bathd it with Camph r & mallalot ointment, aplid a plaster of my Salv, then I went to mr Williams s . find her up & had Dres t her Babe. Ben n White Calld me to see Becky.

Clear. I went to mrs Porters, mrs Pollard there. we relievd the Child by puting up thee rectum, we Left her Easy. mrs m c N t went from here y s morn. Clarisa Barton here goin g to mr Porters at Winthrop. Dolly has wove the Eighth handkerchief. I am informd that Daniel Fairfield Junr Of Varsalboro Departed this Life y e 12 th ins t & Jeremy Halls wife the 6 th , Shee of [ town ] this Town. I finisht my Stockins this Evinn g .
Clear. mr Ballard returnd from Son Towns, informs that Patty is Scolt very Bad & their infant remains very Low. the rest of y e famely are well. I was at home.
Clear Part of the Day. mr Emerson went and put Jabiz Cowen & his Dat, Rebekah, to mr Woodwards. I was at home.
Clear. I have been at home. mrs Weston here on a visit. mrs Woodward Calld. mr Ballard Came hom. Broth Moores Son Sherebiah is Sick. Gillbreath left here.
foggy. I have been at home. mr Balrd laying out a road. the remains of Betsy Chamberlain were interd at 1 h pm. Jona ascisted. Hannah has been at mrs Williams s . Betsy Chamberlins remains interd.
Clear. Hannah is much Better. Betsy Chever here. I have made 28 doz of Candles; 6-1/2 lb of the tallow, Cyrus s . mr Gillbreath Came here; is unwell. Theophelus & James Burton here also.
F Clear. I was unwell, did not attend worship in Public. Revd mr Moore preacht here. he & Lady & others here at Evinning. Snow this Evining. Son Town Babe inter d .
E a rainy Day. mr Ballard & Cyrus attend meeting. I have been not So well as usual. And w Goodins wife was prayed for. mrs Williams here; her husband poorly. Pamela Porters Da t Born.
E Clear. mr Ballard Came home from wiscaset. my Self and Da ts at home.

G Clear & very pleas t for the Season. I attended public worship. Called to see mrs Porters Daug t , find her much better. Hannah Cool here for herbs for mrs Williams who has took Cold. mrs Ingerham informs me that mrs Tolman was Delivd of a Daf t Last weak.
E Snow fell in y e night. Cloudy fore n , Clear aft n . Sally White, Patty Goodin & Lucy Ney here at noone. Cyrus wint to Meeting.

E Cloudy & Some rain. I attended worship in y e fore nn & was a t Revd mr Fosters after n . his oldest Child unwell. Calld to See Jos Fosters wife. Shee is no Better & Jos h Williams Seems mending. Sally & Patty are unwell. Cyrus is unwell. I washt the Sick. Calld at mr Wilms s .

E X. Birth Capt Porters Dag t . X. Clear Day. I was Calld to Cap t Porters Lady in Travil at 4 h morn. Shee was Safe Del d of a fine Da t at 10 and is Comfortable. I taried with her till 3 h pm; then returnd & took a nap of Sleep. Calld to See Sally; find her much as I Left her. Mr Williams is not any better. Hannah has been w h mrs Williams ThisDay. I was at mr Wilms s .
Clear. mr Ballard been to mrs Howards on the business of mr Pitts. I have quild for Dolly. Shee has wove three handkerchfs. mr Warrin of Berwick Sleeps here.

Clear & modorate. mr Ballard went to Varsalboro to work. we were informd of the Death of Son Towns infant & that their Da t , who was Scolt, is much Better. Rain this evin g . Theop s & James Bur tn Sleep heare. at home.

Clear. mr Ballard went to mr Pollards to make a warant for anual meeting. mrs s Cool & Gordin here. old mr Cowin & wife & mr Hardin Dind here. Jona & Daniel Bolton went to y e meddow. Cafrin Dres t flax here. I have been at home. Hannah unwell. Dan l Robbins Sleeps here.
Clear. I have been makeing Soap. Clarisa Barton & mr Porter here. Cap t Porters Lady & mrs Childs made me a visit. it Snowd at 9 h Evn g .

Clear till after n, then a thunder Shour. mrs Williams here. I went there, he is Poorly. there has been a Town meeting. they made Choice of Doc t Coney to Represent us in General ascembly. Doc t Colmans Lady & her Sister were here. Jabish Cowen work t here.

Clear. I have been at home. mrs Savage here. Dolly went to mr Foots. Clarisa here. Leu t Hains Learned Came Directly & from the wes t wd . our Friends all well. his wife was Del d of a Dag t 26 April. I am informd that Ben n Porters wife was Del d of a Da t y e 10 ins t and is Cleverly. Theop s and Jona gone to Brot r Moores.

Cloudy & Cool. I have been to tend Jos h Fosters wife. Shee took a puke; was as well after it as Could be Expected. Calld at mr Williams s . they are poorly. mr Ballard gone to Varsalboro. mr Gillb h Sleeps here. some rain. y e Girls been to mr Westons. I wrote to my Brot h Collins Moore & was at Jo s Fosters & Wilmss.

Clear. I went to mr Williams s . Sally is no Better. I wen t to See mrs Porter. Receivd my fee of y e Cap t in things in The Store 7/. I Came back to Wm s . Sally had an ill Turn. we were apprehensive it was Near Expireing. the Neighb s were Called in; it had revivals through the night. I tarried all night, Dolly also, & mr Crages till 2 h morn. Hannah Cools Came there & was very faint & poorly. mrs Williams had fitts. I Watcht at mr Williams s .
Snows briskly this Day. mrs Porter Came here from Winthrop. I finisht Dollys Linning Stockins.
Cloudy. I am with mrs Kenny yet. Shee is better but Does not Consent I should leav her.
F Clear & warm. mr Ballard, Theop s , Jon o , & the Girls went to meeting. we hear that mr Weston is Better. it raind all night. at home.
Clear & warm. I have been doubling twine for mr Foster s Jane. I was Calld to Cap t Sewalls, Lady in Travil. Walk t over y e river Safe. arivd at 8 h Evn g . Gillbr h Sleeps here.
Clear till towards Evin, then Snowd. we have wash t a larg washing. Polly Savage helpt us. I paid her in flax. Son Town Sleeps here; his Children are unwell. mr Ballard been to y e hook. at home.
Clear part of y e Day. I have Knitt on Hannahs Stockin. Dolly Spoold a warp for Jona & I; 24 Skeins. mr Voce here. Samuel Blake was interd. he Departed This Life yesterday.
Clear. Sally is revivd. The Doc t there, advisd to phisick; we gave her Some. I tarried till 3 h pm. Hannah is there. Han h Cool went away y s morn. Hannah watch t at mr Willms s .
very windy. mr Town Left here for home. mrs Stackpol went from mrs Goodins. I am 53 years old This Day. my birthday.
Clear & Cool. I have been at home. Hannah is no better, has a pain in her Ear. Dolly wash t . mr Cumings drest flax here. Cyrus had six lb Butter of mr Reed. he had 6 lb before.

Election at Boston; very rainy. mr Ballard Came to mr Williams s for me this morn. I left them very poorly. we had veal for Breakfast; the first we have had y s Spring. I took a nap after n . Parthena & Dolly went to See Sally. Cyrus went at Evin g . Shee remains very Sick indeed. Cap T Porter returnd from Bst n . Nath l Brown was Drowned.

Clear. mr Ballard went to Pownalboro Coart. I went to mr Williams s they are very poorly. mrs Fletcher & Ingerham were there to watch. I Came home & wrote to Bro th Jon a . at Dito s , at mr Wilms s .
at mr Fosters. it raind. Joseph Fosters wife watch t .
rainy. I finisht mr Westons Leggins. Theo s Sealing y e East room. mr Ballard and Jon o agreed to rebuild y e Saw mill.
Clear & pleast. I have been at home. Revd mr Foster was here. mr Ballard went to mr Densmores. Hannah washt. thee remains of Henr y Knowland interd. Funeral, Knowland at 4 h pm.
Clear & very warm. I went to N r Williams s ; find them very unwell; tarried all night & watcht. I watch t .
Clear & Cold. I have been doing house work & visited mr Foster & mrs Weston, find y m very unwell. rode mr Savages hors home. work t till 11 O Clok. mr Ballard took mr Chaces oxen for taxes this Day
Clear & Cold. mr Barton Conducted me home. I left them all as well as Could be Expected. we left Towns at 1 pm & arivd here at 7.
E Cloudy. I went to meeting aftern n . there were but 4 feemales Except my Self. the river open so that people Crost by water; the road very muddy. the river Open, thee Bridg is wreckt.

a very rainy Day. I Comb d flax for Jos h Foster fore n . went to mr Wilm s aft n . they are no Better. Tim m Pages wife was there; Says mrs North is unwell. I made pills. left Some Senna for Sally wilm s . at mr W s .

Clear & Hott. I Came home before Sun rize. Sally is much as She was. Theop s Hamlin & James Burton Sett out for oxford. I rote to my Brot h Collins Moore. I went to mr Wil mss af tnn . we thought Sally was Expireing. Shee had a Severe feaver fitt. Parthena & Dolly watcht. I tarried all night. I wrote to Brot h Collins Moore & went to mr Wilms s . watcht.
at Son Towns & feel fatagud with my journy. old Lady Thorns funeral attended.
Clear morn. mrs Pollard here to warp our handkercfs. mr Ballard Sett up the Loom & went to the hook. mrs Foster & mrs Brown Drank Tea with me. thee girls were unwell.
Clear & pleas t . Doc t Colman & Lady & mrs Adkins here on a visit. Theopholus returnd from PenopScott. Dollys Shoes Brot home.

Clear. I was at Wil mss all Day. Sally had another very ill turn. I Came home at Evining. Left Thos Moore there. find the Girls have Cleand my house, Ephm Bro t Some wood to mr Willi ms Thru twitihes. at Wilmss.

E Clear morn, Cloudy aft n . I went to N r Wil mss , he Rode my hors as far as mr Chamberlins; his Da t , Sally, very ill all day. Shee had Severe fitts aft n & all night. I Tarr d , Polly Whealor also. Nat L Brown taken up & interd. at Ditos.
G Clear & pleast. I attended public worship. the river was not pasable at fort western. I hear mr Duttun is better.
E Some Snow. The Sun Shind part of the day. mr Ballard & I attended public worship. There were Strangers at meeting. I am informd Robert Mc Causlins wife is in a low State of health.
B at Son Towns. Peggy [Ghoun] Came there.
at Son Towns. a snow fell.
Clear. mr Ballard gone to Brot r Moores. mrs Savage here with her Infant, Doct Williams here to see it. I hear that three men fell into the river this Day. Snowd aftern. Dolly Sett the web to work.

X. Birth Cap t Neys Son. X. I was Calld at 1 Hm to Cap t Neys wife in Travil. Shee was Safe Deld of a fine Son at 4. I returnd home at 1 H PM. receivd 9 lb Sugar & 1 lb Candles. Left the Patient Cleverly. this is her Second Son & Seventh Child. at Cap t Neys.
Snowd a little. Polly Savage Came to work for me. mr Ballard gon to Varsalb r . I have been at home. Georg Boltons wife hr.
Clear. theis Town mett to vote for Governer s ; thee annual meeting also. Parthena Barton Came here on a visit. I have been Doubling Twine yarn.

rainy. I was Calld home. Hannah is very unwell. I Calld Doc t Colman to her asistance; he gave an Emetick which operated Kindly & gave relief. Parthena & Dolly washt. I went to mr W s at 6 h pm. we put Sally into a warm Bath which Seemed to give her Some relief. I returnd home at 9 h pm, find Hannah Cleverly. mr Ballard been to Col o Duttuns, Brot home Some Stores. we had a Barril of pork Brot home yesterd y . I was Calld by Polly Wheeler to mr Wl mss to lay out the Corps of y s Da t , Sally, who Expird between Eleven & twelve y s Evn g . Hannah unwell. Sally Wil ms had fitts all Day. Shee Expird at 11 h 30 m . at Ditos.
Clear. mr Ballard at mr Emersons makeing Raits. I have been at home Doing hous work and quilling for Dolly.

Clear & pleas t . I went to See And w Goodwins Lady, find her mending; her Mother there. my Daught s are gone to mr Crages. I hear that Moses White is Sick, maj r Duttuns Lady also. the wind South all day, NW at night & very high. at mr Goodins.

Clear. mr Ballard Sett out for Varsalboro. I have been at home. Han h is Better. Dolly got her web out & Carried Betsy Chevers Cloath home. 6 [yards]-[3] 3/4 yd. had 1 lb Sugar, 1/4 lb Tea of mrs Westons. Began to rain at 11 Evn.

rainy. mr Gillbreath & Theophilus went from here. mrs Savage here. Shee & I made a Settle ment on acount of her Spinning & thee wolen wheal, my being with her when Sick and 1 pair of Shoes & medecin I let her have when her Children were Sick, & we were Evin in our acounts. I lett her have 4 lb X off flax X which Shee has not paid for. mrs Savage & I Settled.

Clear. mr Ballard went to Brot hr Moores. Jab e Cowen work t till 3 o Clok. we were Fav d with Company of mrs s Betsy Thomas, Dorkes & Nabby Pollard, Hannah M c Keknay & Han h North. I have been at home. James Burton wounded his Legg.

Clear morn; Showers after n . mr Learned & mr Ballard went to Brot h Moores. I went to y e hook, was at Col o Duttons. his Lady is Low but on y e recovery. I was at mrs Hollowels, mr Densmoors, Revd mr Foster, Joseph Fosters, mr Westons & Josep h Williams s . my Da ts wash t & wove some. Betsy Chever Been here, mrs Savage also. Jona Came home. I was at the hook & Joseph Williams s .

Cloudy, raind y s Evin g . I went to See mr Williams s famely. they are very unwell. Leut Learned & his Bro t , David, Dind here. mr Ballard been at Varsalboro laying out a road thro y e Town. mr Gillb h help t Cyrus Dress mill. thunder & rain in y e night. I wrote to Sisters Barton & Waters. I was at N r W ms .

Cloudy. James Weston Expired at 3 h morn. I laid him out ascisted by mrs Lois Harris & Polly Hinkly. mrs North Came in to See them. I returnd home at 10 h morn; feel much fatagud, took a knap of Sleep, feel better. mrs Welch here. mr Ballard laying out roade by y e river below mr Pollards to Pitts Town. James Weston Expird at 3 h morn Æ 4 years, 1 month & 11 Days. I Calld at mr Williams s .

Clear. I returnd home. Left mrs Kenny about house. I Calld at mr Pollards, hear that Rachel Faguht was Deliverd of a Daugh t 22 nt ins t , Wil m Cowens wife of a Son the 23. mrs Fletcher performd. mrs Voce has been here. mr Ballard at mr Pollards.

Birth Cap t Henry Sewalls Daug t . XX. Clear. mrs Sewalls women were Calld & Shee was Safe Deliverd at 7 h morn of a fine Da t , and is Cleverly. mrs Pollard, Voce & I Cros t on the ice. I Calld at Col o Norths & Jos Williams s . mrs Voce rode our hors to mr Chamberlins to See Betsy who is very Sick, if alive. I receivd 6/ of Capt Sewall for my Service there. There was a moose by our garden This after noon.

Snow fore n , rain after n . mr Ballard gone to Doct Coneys. Son Town & Luke Barton Sleep here. mr Savage & mr Ben n Brown here at Evin g . Dolly wound & warpt & drawd in mrs Williams s webb. I have been at home. Combed flax for Cyrus & Jonathan. Snowd. at home.
Clear. I have been at home. Dolly warpt & Drawd in her web. mr Voce here. mr Densmore bro t mr Ballards Breeches home.

Clear. Sheribiah Town went from here Bound for Boston. I have been to Col n Howards. he made me a pres t of a Casse bottle of wine. Esq r Adkins & his Daughters here. I was at Col n Norths, Cap t Porters & mr Williams s . Son Town Sleeps here. at mr Wilmss.
Cloudy. I quilld for Hannah to weave fore nn & went to See mr Wilms aft n . We had Six men to work on y e frame. mr Gillb th Sleeps here. at mr Wilms.
Clear & pleasant. I was Calld to See Jamy Weston who is very unwell. mrs Belcher there. mrs Betsy went in a Sleigh Ride.
Clear & Cold. I was Calld to mr Ben n Bisbes, his wife being in Travil. I left home at 4 h morn. I went to old mr Bisbes, Lidia unwell.

Clear morn; a little Shower after n . mr Ballard been with a Committee on the Road west Side y e river. I have been to the hook, had of Col o Sam l Duttun 3 pair hos @ 5/ pr pair; 2 Combs, 1/ on acount of Moses White & Thom s Kenny. Came back to N r Williams; tarried with them till Evin g . mrs Voce watches there. Sally is very Sick. Nat l Brown was Drowned Last night near mr Kenndys. mrs s Duttun & mrs Sewall are mending. mr Eben z Hail Sleeps here. Polly How is mending.
a friday night.

Cloudy fore n Clear aftern n . mr Ballard and Jon o at mr Davis s Drawing writings with mr Silas Lee. Theop s made a Fraim for mr Brooks s Desk. The girls went to see Polly Bisbe. I have mended Stockins this Day.
It Snowd. I was at home. mr Ballard pos t books.
Clear & warm. we Bak t . I help t about house fore nn , Wed flax after n . Jona Came home after Sun Sett. Polly Savage here at noone. Robbins Sleeps here. we had 5 workmen. I was at home.
Clear & Cold. I went to mr Westons. Polly Taylor went with mr Barton to Doc t Williams to have her arm taken Care of. mr Weston made me a pres t of 2 lb sugar & 1/4 of Tea.

A very rainy Day. I have felt unwell. mr Ballard went to Esq r Norths to hear Coart Between mr Foster & y e Sewalls. Jona wen t to Echabod Pitts s for Corn. mr Childs & Craige planted the point on y e Crick w h Corn. the remains of old mr Coutch were interd. I have been at home.

Clear morn. at 1 h pm 20 m , a Shower of hail & rain with thunder. David Learned here. mr Porter & wife & Parthena went from here at 10 h 30 m . I have been at home. mr Ballard Sett plants. the Litning Struck 2 trees at Cap t Pages. at home.

E Clear & warm. I attended public worship. Revd mr Foster preach t from Micah 6 & 8. I Calld at mr Williams s , he is very Low. mr Isaac Cowin & wife here for advice about her Breast which is Soar. I was Calld to Williams s in haste, he had an ill Turn but gott better & I Came home. Anna Webb Stays there. Daniel Robbins Sleeps here. Joseph Foster here, his wife very ill. at Jos h Williams s .

E Clear till 1/O Clok PM, then Thunder & rain. our famely went to meeting Except Ep m & my Self. I went to See mr Wil ms famely, they are very unwell. mrs Pollard & mrs Porter there. I went to Bed at 10, was Calld at 11 h Evin n to mr Moses Whites wife in Travil. I walkt over the String piece of y e Bridg by mr Hoveys. Eph m Cowen publisht to Hannah Savage.at Wilms s .
E Clear & Cold. I went to meeting & was Calld at 6 h pm to See mrs Hovey in Travil; arivd there about 7. her women were Collected Directly.

X. Birth mr Moses Whites Dafter. X. Clear. mrs White was Safe Deliverd of a fine Da t at 9 h morn. I Left there for home at noone. Calld at mr Hersey s , mr Pollards, Col o Norths & Capt Porters & mr Williams s . Sally is very Sick. Came home; find Parthena Barton here. Left my patients Cleverly. Parthena Barton Came to work for me. Hannah wentfor h r at Wms s .

Clear. thee workmen Came to fraim The Saw mill. I went aft nn to See mrs Foster; find her very Low, and mr Williams; he is more Comfortable. mrs Weston made me a pres t of 3 lb Sugar. Jona got 3 lb of Tea. Gillb h Came here. Robbins Sleeps here. Began to fraim the Saw mill. At Jos h Wilms s & Fosters. 4 men work t here.
at Towns, help t Lucy.

Snow d & Blow d , & is very Cold. I have been at home. Foster Left this for the westward. Jon o attemptd to go to the meddow but did not get there. We are informd that And w Goodins wife is very Sick; Sent for Doc t Williams. Foster left here.

Clear & warm. I have been at home; am informd that the wife of Daniel Branch s was Deliverd of a Son yesterday. Goodins made also of a Daft. mr Larance, Wil m Elis remoovd out of y s Town also. Birth.
Cloudy. Parthena & Dolly went to mr Crages & mr Westons fore n , Shee went home after n . I have been Twisting Saine Twime. Joseph Williams Came home. thee Bridg was mended.

Clear. I Came from mr W mss at 10 h morn; laid on the Bed and took a knap. we all, Except Cyrus, attended the funeral of Sally Williams. mrs W ms Fainted after Shee returnd home. mrs Chamberlin & Anne Webb Tarry there. Sheribiah & Son Town Sleep here. Funeral of Sally Williams at 5 h pm.

Very heavy Showers. mr Ballard went to Pownalboro Coart. I am informd by mrs Weston y t the wife of Joseph Foster Expird this mor n at 2 O Clok. Clarrisa Barton Left here for home attended by mr Scenter. I went to see mr Williams & tarried all night. at Wilms s . mrs LiverMoore Del d of a Son by Doc t Coney at 11 Evn g . Death mrs Foster.
Clear. mr Williams helping Cyrus. I went to See his Dat, Sally. her Eyes are Sore. the Girls went to mr Westons at Evinng. Jono Gone Down to mr Agrees for mr Black s Stores. at mr Wilms s , 3
a rainy Day. I have been at home Carding Tow. Hannah Spunn. Polly is at home. Cafrin Drest flax this Day & yesterd y . Peirly Left us last Evin g . a little Snow.
Clear. mr Ballard gone to Varsalboro. Revd mr Foster here. I have been home. Clarisa went home. Hannah Rhode out. Death of mrs Oakman. Snowd.

Clear. I have been at home. the Girls washt. mr Ballard Came home. Brot h Moores Children have been Sick. Thankful Croell Departed this Life The 4 th Day after Shee was Seizd of the putred feaver. James Bolton and mr Green workt half y e Day, halld thee mill Timber into y e Door yard.
Clear & pleas t . mr Williams & Sally here all Day. Hannah & Dolly went to Cap t Porters. I have been at home. mr Smith, Wall & Jabe Cowen work t here. I was at home.

Cloudy morn, Clear after n , rain & thunder Evin g . mr Learned left this Bound for the west wd . I have been at home. Com d flax for Jos h Foster. mr Benn Brown Sleeps here. I wrote to my Mother Ballard. at home all d .

rainy. mr Ballard Surveying thee road from Pitts town to fort Westorns, East Side y e river. Son Town Came here. I attended the funeral of James Weston. Calld to See Nr Williams, he is growing weaker; his feet Swell and a purging takes place again. Funeral of James Weston. I attended it. was atWlms s .

Clear. Theop s Hamlin went to hous keeping. Hannah went up with his wife. I Combd flax fore n . was Calld to mr Densmoores to See their Children who are unwell. Came back to mr Williams s ; tarried all night; he did not rest much. Sally Burton & Martha Kenada here. at Dens[mors] & Wilms. watcht.

Clear. I pulld flax & tended the yarn to whiten. mr Hopkins & mr Marrow Dind here. a number of Girls here at Evin g . Remarkable apearance in the atmosphere. I was at home. Light in the atmosphere this Evin g .
Clear. mrs Savage & Polly & mrs Welch been here warping Hand kerchiefs. Doc t Tupper took Break fast here.

Clear. I went to mr Chamberlins, found his Daug t Betsy Expird and The famely in Tears. I asisted mrs Woodward Lay out the Corps. Came home; went to mrs Williams s , Sally is Better. Jona returnd. Betsy Chamberlin Expird at 9h y s morn.

Cloudy. Son Town & mr Barton left here for home. mr Ballard been to Cabesy; bot Cloath for a pair of Breaches. I have quilld 14 Skeins of yarn & Combd 10 lb flax. Dolly has wove 7-1/2 yds. mr Lemuel Cumings Sleeps here. rain. at home.

Clear till Evin g & then rain. mr Voce was Calld away a t noon to attend a Coart between Tho s Sewall plan tf & Rev d mr Foster Defend t . mrs Pollard here to instruct Dolly about her weaving. I have been at home. Dan l Rollins Sleeps here. Joseph Fosters wife Came home yesterday. Rev d mr Foster s Tryal in an action commenc t by Tho s Sewall. at home.

Clear. Son Town went from here. I Spoold yarn fore n & went to See mrs Foster & James Weston aft, find them very Low indeed. Cap t Porters inf t is unwell. I Calld to See it; Left it Some Senna & manna. mr Williams s famely are poorely. I Calld there. Son Town went home. Jon o went to Sinclear. at Ditoes & Capt Porter.
Cloudy & Showers & thunder. Gillb h Left he r . I watch at Fosters. Calld to See Willms. watcht, was at Wms s .
Cloudy. mr Ballard Surveying for Tho s Hinkly. I have been at home. Hannah went to See mrs Williams. mrs Woodward Calld here. Cap t [Ben n ] Stickny Married to Nabby Jackson.

Clear & Cold. mrs Lois Harris and mrs Betsy Chever here. mr Savage & his wife Spent Evin g with us. my Son Ephraim was Siesd with a fitt at Ten O Clok; had a very Severe one. my famely were all in Bed Excep t my Self. Cyrus Calld & I went in haste with a Light. we all Expected he was Expireing But were in the use of means, put his feet in warm water, pryd his teeth a part & put down Salt & water. he came to his Sences in about half an hour, and rested Pritty well the rest of y e night. I Sett up till Two O clok. Ephm had a fitt. this is y e 3 D . firs t , Decem 18 in 1784; y e 2 d , March 26 in 1787.

X. Birth Ben n Bisbes Dat r . XX. Clear. mrs Bisbe was Deliverd of a Daugh t at 2 h this morn and is Cleverly. I returnd home at 10 am Some fatagud. Polly Bisbe rode the hors Back. my Da t , Hannah, is much Better. mr Cumings & David Wall here Drying flax. raind this night. mr Bisbe De t r to fee & Medicin Eight Shillings. I was Calld to mr Hains at 4 h aft.

Clear. I was home fore n . Roasted a Line of veal. I went to mr Wil mss at one o Clok. Sally is no Better. mrs W ms very poorly; not one of the famely well. I was Calld to mr Westons to See James who Continues very Low. mrs North there. & mrs Densmore, Anne Webb Came to mr Wm s & watcht. My Girls went to mr Crages. Son Town is here. I have not Seen him as my famely were all in bed at my return. Son Town Sleeps here. Cap t Porter had fitts Last night. I was at mr Wilms s .
Calld to Joseph Williams s to See his wife, very unwell. mr Foster gone to the hook. I Came home at Evin ng , find my Famely in helth.
Clear. I have Been mending Stockins. mr Ballard Surveying for mr Vahn. mrs Voce & Dafter here.

Clear. I have been at home. we made Some Saucages. mr Ballard after wood from mr Vaughns Land for Cyrus. Jon o been to purchase a yoak of oxen of mr Jackson. was informd that John Blake Lost his hous by fire 14 inst and that Jethro Gardner his the 24 th . [ ] by fire. at home y s 3 Days.

Clear morn. Showers aft n . mrs Welch here; had 3 lb of Tow of me & 2 lb 6 oz of flax of Parthena. Jo s Foster here; says his wife is not So well as Shee was. I went to See Joseph Williams; find him much as he has been. Robbins went from here. Dolly Put in a pease for Jon a . we had six men to work to Day. I was at mr Williamses.

Clear & very hott fore nn , a Shower & heavy Thunder aft n . Rachel Foot here & mrs Welch. Jon a returnd from Coart. Wil m Howard of Winslow Sleeps here. I have been at home. Spent part of the Day Seeking The Red Cow. Cyrus & True found her with a Calf & Drove y m home. I hear NorCross is Comin and that his Broth fell over Bord [&] was Drowned on his Pasage. at home. hear from Coart the Criminals Condemned & Revd mr Foster has Lost his Case with Walker.
E Clear. I went to mr Eben z Taylors to See their Da t , Polly, who is very weak & Low. mr Ballard Came home this morn. mr Jonah Crossbee Sleeps here. I went to mr Taylors.

G I fited for going to meeting but was Calld to See mrs mc Masters who is unwell. mrs Cowen & I administred remedys that Doc t Coney prescrib d . her physic began to operate. I left her, returnd as far as mrs Williams s , tarried with her till 10 in Evnng, Shee being Exercisd with much pain, but got easier & I Came home.
F Clear. mr Ballard & Jon o went to meeting; the rest of our famely did not. at home.
E a rainy Day. I have been at home. the Revd mr Foster absent; gone to Preach at Fairfield. mr Densmore here; Says his infant is unwell. the Speckled Cow Calvd this morn. at home.
Clear & pleast. the girls washing. mr Ball d makeing Plan of mr Pitts s Land. mrs Savage & mrs Brown Drank Tea here.
Clear. Cap t Savage here. mr Ballard went with him to Deaco n Emersons to prepare Some thing for the relief of mr Knowland, whose famely are sick and much Distrest. at home.

X. Birth mr Hoveys Son. XX. Clear & Cold. mrs Hovey was Safe deliverd of a fine Son at 1 h morn. I returnd home at half after 1 h pm. Left my Patient Cleverly, the Babe was not So well as I could wish. I receivd 2 lb & 10 oz of Butter and 1 lb 15 oz of Cheese in part for my fee. July 22 receivd the remainder of my fee in Butter.
Cloudy. I went to See mrs Foster & mr Williams fore noon; he rode here. I went to mr Chamberlins & Doct Colmans aft nn . & was Calld at 5 to mr B. Browns. at mr Wilms s . we had Eight men to work.

Clear. mr Ballard & mr Crosbee Sett out for Pownalboro at 3 h morn. mrs Weston here fore n , mrs Welch aft n . I Combd flax & Let mr Welch have 2 lb Tow. Shee had 3 lb before. I went to See mr Williams; find him Lower than he has been, and more Distres t for Breath. I was at N r William ss .

Clear. I helpt Spread the yarn to whiten then went to the revd mr Fosters; tarried till near night. I opend her Breast; it discharged a Larg quantity. I Left her much more Comfortable. I Calld at mr Westons. Sammy is about at Col o Norths, also his Lady is very ill. at mrs Williams s , Shee is Comfortable; her Child also. at mrs Fosters. her Breast is Easier. at Wido Williams s also.
Clear. I have been at home. mrs Childs here to warp a web. mr Ben n Bisbe paid me 6/ for attending his wife the 28 th of March Last in the hour of Travil. at home.

Clear morn. I was Calld to See Sally Wil ms who is very Sick. Doc t Colman left her medicin. I was Calld from There to See James Weston; he remains weak. Came back; tarried all night & watch t . Tim y Pages wife there all day. Patty Seems a little Better. raind in y e Evinn g . I watcht with Sally Wil ms . I heard they were well at Son Towns.
Clear. I have been at home, wed flax fore n n & knitt after n . Six men work t here besides our own. Robbins Sleeps here. at home. 6 men to work.

Clear. I went to Wd o Wilms s . Patty was in a Sleep from 10 h morn till Eight Evn g ; then her fitts Came on & held her all night. mrs Child watcht. Dolly & Parthena Slept there. we thought the Child Expireing in y e night. at wido Wilms s . Polly White & Polly Hinkly here.
at Towns, Lucy was Delivrd of a Dafter at 4 h & 30 m P.M. Birth of Son Towns Dafter.
Clear & Cold. Capt Savage & wife, mr Bullin & Deac n Emerson Dind here. mr Ballard & he are gone to See Jabiz Cowen. Dolly is unwell with a Cold.

Clear & warm. Jon o , James Burton & my Da ts went to Winthrop. Charls Harris was here to have his hands Drest. I gave him some Salv; he was Burnt attempting to Save his house when Burning. my Child n went to Winth p . I finish t Lucys hoes.
Cloudy. I have been twisting twine & Combing flax. Doct Coney open d the Soar on Patty Williams Throat.

Cloudy. I Came home from Wilms s . Nathan Howard Calld here. my Self & Dag ts attended funeral of mrs Foster. I was at Col o N hs , Cap t Porters, mr Westons & mr Crages & Wil mss . mr Thwing very much Distres t with an Austma. mr Gille & Patrige Sleep here. at Ditoes, mrs Foster interd.
Snow d . Jon o went to Broth r Moores. Cyrus finish t picking the mill. I have been at home. at home.
Clear fore n , Cloudy & shaury aft. Betsy Chever here; had some Thread. I Spun Some weak yarn. Jona Brot 1/2 a ton of hay from Deac n Emersons, and was very unwell all night.

Cloudy. This Day observd as Fast & prayer. I attend worship aftern n . I went to See Rev d mr Fosters Son, Isaac, who is aflicted with Soars thought to be the Salt Rhume; find him very poorly. hear that Cap t Sam l Oakmans Lady Expired in travil yesterday. Jona gone to winslow after mill timber.

Clear. mr Jos h Foster Bro t his wife here. Shee had a feaver fitt while here. I have been at home. Hannah wove three y ds of wail Cloath. Polly Cool here. Theophelus is Publisht to mrs Sally Rockit of OXford.

Clear. I have been at home. mr Bal d Harrowd his flax & went to mr Vahans. he Let him have some Barley & gave Some Gardin Seeds. mrs Savage Sett her Gard n roots in our gard n . Polly Bs b & Cate Scott here, Leu t Learned also. Wall & D. Robbins Sleep here. Hannah finish t her webb; 25 yds. mrs Pollard Sent 6 Skeins Lin g y n by Ephm which Shee had Borrowd. I was at home.

Cloudy & Some rain. I did house work fore n n . was Calld to See mrs Sewall at the hook. Shee is Exercised with a Swelling in her Left Legg & Some pain. my Da ts washt. old mr Coutch Departed This Life at 2 h pm. I Calld at mr Williams s & they are all unwell. Sally no Better. Death old mr Coutch. I was at ye hook & mr Wilms s .
Clear. mr Ballard on the Business of Surveying road. I have Combd 13-1/2 [lb] of flax. mr Ben n Porter and his wife here. Son Town went from here. I have b n at home.

Clear. I Came home from Wms s at 3 h morn; went to Bed & Slept. mr Ballard is returnd from Coart. I combd flax. The girls all went to Tho s Hinklys. I went to Wilms s ; he is very restless. John North and Eliphelet Robbins watch there. at Wilms s , Doc t Welch there.

Clear. I tended the yarn. the Girls finisht putting our flax. mrs Pain Andrews & Stuteley Springars wife here, Ben n Bisbees wife and Lidia also. the girls went to mrs Williams s . Doc t Barton here Bound for Boston, mr Low with him. I was at home. Briant Fletchers wife Deliv d of a Son.

Clear. mr Ballard gone to mr Carrs. I went to mr Savages; he Came home his face very much brused & Sweld. I Came home, had News that his Coal Pitt was like to burn up. I rode to the Neighbors below to Call asistance to putt it out. Thomas Smyley Sleeps here. Hannah is a t wido Williams. at mr Savages & wido Williams s .

Clear. mr Ballard gone to mr James Pages on public business. Jonathan & Taylor went to See the Execution of Oneal. I have been a t home. the Girls washt. Gilbreath Sleeps here. the wife of old mr Springer Departed this Life this morn. I have been at home. Death of mrs Springer & Oneall Executed.

Cloudy, Snowd a little. mr Ballard went to help moove a house for Doct Colman. I have been at home. Dolly finisht weaving Cyrus s Shirts. I warpt & putt in a piece of Lining and wove one yard. Shee began the Shirts Thursday.
A laury Day. mr Ballard Been to the hook. I have quilld for Dolly. Shee has wove 8-1/2 yds. mr Cumings been to Pownalboro & returnd & Sleeps here. Dan l Robins Sleeps h r also. rain. at home.

Cloudy & raind a little. mr Voce finish t our Bed rooms. Jona & Dan l Robbins Bro t a Barril of Cyder here. Hannah has wove 1 y d of Cloath. I have been at home; wound quills & knit some on Hannahs Stocking. I had y e Cramp This night; had a verySevere fit of the Cramp. mr Ballard & Da ts wereup attending me.
Clear. I help t about house fore nn & went to mr Williams s af t . Shee took a puke. I tarried & Tended her. mrs Becky, Polly & Lidia Bisbee here. I was at mr Williams s .

Cloudy. I Came from Fosters; left her very Low. Calld at Wms s ; he is Low also; then went to mr Rheds, b t 5 lb Butter & 10-1/2 lb Chees; help t do hous work the rest of the day. Jabish Cowin here; helpt us to water & wood. we had Six men yester d & y s Day also. was a t Wms s .

Clear Except a Shower. mr Carr & mr Page here fixing to take the Valluation. I went to See mrs Williams, her Child is much as Shee has been. Revd mr Foster was there; informs his Lady is poorly. Doc t Colman went to See her. I was at wid o Williams s .

Clear. mr Weston Calld here. I went to See mrs Foster. Shee has been not So well. Came to mrs Williams s ; her Child very Sick; it had fitts. mrs Porter there the after n . mrs Pollard & Polly Hinkly & mr Sam l Peirce Stay there. he attended me home. I was at Revd mr Fosters & the wido Williams. Patty had fitts.

Clear. I went to Doc t Colmans at 1 h pm, his Child Expird at 4. I put on the grave Cloaths and tarried till 7. Colo North and Lady there. I found mrs Williams & mrs Harris here a t my return. I Sett up till very late to finish Hannah s Stockins. Death of Doc t Colmans infant. I was there. Dolly finisht her web, 44-1/2 yds. Beniah Ingirham had a son born.
Clear. I have been at home. mr Ballard Came home. Eph m is as well as usual.

Clear part y e Day. I was Calld in hast to See Sally Wil ms . Shee had a very ill turn. Her mother faintd. Thee Child revivd. I tarried all Day. Doc t Emerson Calld to See it. we rub d it with vinegar, gave Clisters. I tard all night; Parthenia also. Son Town went home. I watcht at mr Willmss.

X Birth of mr Shubl Hinklys Dagt. XX Clear & warm. I was Calld to Shuball Hinklys wife in travil at y e 12 th hour. Shee was Safe Deliv d of a very fine Daut at 2 h pm. I returnd home at 7, Left mother & Child Cleverly. found mrs Williams & mrs Hamlin here. Lady Foster has been here also. we Rais d the Saw mill floom. Sherebiah Town Sleeps here. I was at Suball Hinklys. Sheribiah Town Came here.

Clear. I attended funeral of Doc t Colmans infant. Calld at mrs Williams s , find her very sick. the Doc t gave her a Puke. I tarr d all nigh t . Funeral of mrs Springer & Doc t Colmansinfant. I attendid y e latter.

E Clear. I Came home; left mrs Williams very ill. I Slept Some & went there again at Evin. mrs Pollard & others there. Charlotte & Polly Cool there. Parthena watches. the Revd mr Moore preach t . Hannah is gone to Son Towns with Sherebiah.

E Clear & pleas t . I attended worship in public. Nethaniel Norcross Desird prayers he being Sick with a feavor. Revd mr Foster Deliverd two Exelent Discoarses from Psalm 90 & 12 ver s . I was at meeting & at wido Wilmss.
F Clear. I went to meeting after n . mr Nason had a Dat Baptised by y e name of Lidia. Theoph s here.

Clear. mr Ballard & Theoph s went to Varsalboro. Revd mr Foster Came for me to See his infant; it has a Coald. I Came home at Eleven o Clok; walk d ; was much fatagud. Jon o & the Girls were gone to Ride in a Sleigh. [ ] Came home half af t 12.
A Cloudy Day & raind at Evin. I have been at home. Patrig wounded his foot with an adds. mr Ballard mett the auditers at Col o Howards. Sherebiah Left here. at home knitting. Parthena returnd.
Cloudy & Cool. I went to See mrs Williams; Spent the after n . left her more Comfortable. my Girls washt. mr Fillbrooks here this Evin g . mr Gille returnd from Winthrop. I was a t wido Wilm ss .

Clear. mr Ballard gone to mr Carrs on public business. I have been at home. my Girls washt. we receivd a Letter from Broth Collins which informs that Sister Nabby was thought at the point of Death & our other Friends were well. Jona is gone to Son Towns. at home. recievd Letters from Brot hs Barton & Collins Moore of Sept 7 th & 5 th .

Clear. mr Ballard gone to Cap t Page s . he help remove his house. mr Hains Learnd here, Left oxford 2 weaks ago, our Friends all well Except my Mother, who is in a Langued Situation as Brother Collins informs by a Letter Dated Sep t 7, 1787.
Snowd till noon then haild & raind till near Sun Set. very Clear Evin nt . I have been at home. James Page & mr Jackson Dind here. a Pedler Sleeps here. at home.

Clear & Cold. Betsy Chever here. Jon o & ye Girls Rode out in a Sleigh this Evning. mr Fuller, from winslow, Sleeps here; informs me Sherebiah is very unwell yet, the rest of the folks well. Jon o is 25 years old This Day.

X. Birth mr Ben n Browns Son. XX. mrs Brown Safe Del d at 4 of a fine Son. I returnd at 9 h morn; Left them Cleverly; receivd 6/ as a fee. it is her Sixth Child & 3 d Son. my Girls Washing.
