Daniel Savage Jun r Brot me 7 lb Sugar yesterday for attending his wife at her geting to Bed with her Last Child. we had Six men to work to Day. the Girls went to mr Williams s . Gillbreath went from here yesterday. At mr Ben n Browns. it is 19 years ThisDay Since the Death of my Daf t Dorothy. six mento work y s d y .

I was Calld up by Theop s Hamlin at 2 h morn, his wife & James Burton with him. I was informd that Nr Wilms was wors. I went there & tarried till after n . Left him some Easier. Dolly & Parthena went to Jos h Fosters; there were 7 Young Women Came home with them. Hamlin [&] wife & Burton Sleep here. I was at Nr Wilms s .

Showers. I went to See mrs Foster; her Breast is Easier. mrs North is Better; mr Savage, his wife & Polly, Drank Tea; hannah Woodward also. I rode to Theop s Hamlins. Calld at Doct Colmans. I was at mr Fosters. Calld at Wdo Wilms s .
a rainy Day. I was Calld by Doc t Colman to See his Lady in Labour. Shee Calld her women at Evin. at the 7 th hour at D r Colmans.
Clear. I have been to See mrs Williams. Shee is unwell. Dolly is 16 years old this Day. Shee went to mr Craggs & Bot a hatt, pr s 9/. Lois & Polly here at Evin. at wido Williams.

A Clear day. thee Town mett to hear Rev d mr Fosters Proposals but did not Axcep t them. Dolly & Parthena went to See mrs Hamlin. mrs Savage here. Shee has Spun 40 Double Skeins for me Since April 15 th , and had 2 Bushl of ashess & Some Physic for James, & Dolly wove her 7 yds of Diapor. I let her have 1 Skein of lining warp. the whole is 6/5 X. Town Meeting. I have been at home. mrs Savage here.

Cloudy & raind. the men did not work the after nn . I went to See mr Williams; he seems a little better. mr Dexter there; Says they are well at Son Towns. mrs King of winthrop here; informs that Wil m Pullins wife is very ill with a broken Legg. at mr William ss . 4 men work t on y e fraim besides mr Bal d .

XX. Birth of mr Fullers Son. XX. Clear. I was Calld from mrs Williams s at 2 h 30 m to mr Fullers Lady in Travil. Shee was Safe Deld at 1 h pm of a Son. I returnd home at 4 & find mrs Polly White here. Shee Slept here last night. mr Fuller paid me 6/ as a fee, gave me 5 Bowls. Extraidinary for medisin. Patty Williams s fitts on her. at Ditos. Polly White left here. Parthena is 17years old this Day.
Clear. I have been at home. old mr Smily here. mrs Savage warp t a piece here. I have been at home.
Cloudy Part of y e Day. Jon o & y e Girls returnd; all well at mr Porters. they went to Cap t Porters this Evin g . I have been at home; Bak t . mr Gilbreath Sleeps here. Cap t Sewall here.
Clear. I have been at home; made 20 dz of Candles. Hannah washt. mr Ballard been at mr Pollards on Business.
Cloudy & Showers. Jona went to Coart. the Girls washt. I was Cleaning The Seller. mrs Taylor was here; Says Polly is very Low indeed. at home.
E X. Birth Thoms Hinkly s Dagt. XX. at mr Hinklys; her women Calld at 7 h Evn. Shee was Safe Delivd of a Daugt at 11 pm. I tarried all night. at mr Hinklys.
Clear. mrs Williams here; Ben n Porter & Clarisa, Polly & Lidia Bisbe, mr Emerson & Burton. I have been at home. at home.
Clear. I spun weaking y n . I went to See James Weston. Calld at mr Pollards, Col o Norths & mr Williams s . my Girls wash t . mr Cummins drest flax here.
rainy. I have been at home. mrs Oakmans remains interd.

Cloudy; raind at night. mr Ballard went to mr Vahans. mr Ben n Porter Dind here, Says his wife has been poorly. I have been at home. Hannah wove 3 yds. mrs Savage Brot home five Skeins Linning & 4 of Tow. Polly sent 16 Skeins Tow by Dolly.

X. Birth Moses Sewalls Da t . X. Clear. I was Calld at half after 12 h morn to mrs Sewall at y e hook. Shee was very ill; was Safe Delivrd at 5 h pm of a fine Daf t & is Cleverly. I tarryd all night; fee receivd. at mr Sewalls.

XX. Birth Danl Savages Son. XX. Cloudy morn. I was Calld to Dan l Savage Jun rs wife who is in travil at 10 h morn. Shee was Safe Deld of a Son at 9 h Evn. I Left her Cleverly. arivd at home at 11 h 45 m . mr Ballard gone to Varsalboro. Clarisa Barton been here and mrs s LoiS Hinkly, Polly White from Falmoth & Susan a Cleark. I was at Daniel Savages.

Clear. I Combd flax for Cyrus & was Calld to See Sam l Weston who is Sick; his Complaints are Pukeing & Purging; he has Voided 8 worms. we gave him Some Senna & Rhubarb. I Calld to See mr Williams; he Seems more Composed. Polly Cool there. Parthena been to Revd mr Fosters. his Lady gave her a y d ribbon & Sent one to Dolly. at mr Westons & Williams s . mr Ballard to y e hook.

Clear. I was Calld Early this morn to See thee Revd mr Fosters Lady who is very unwell; her Breast is Likely to Break. I aplyed a Poltis of Sorril & returnd home. mrs Williams & Polly Cool & mr Savage here after n n . Daniel Robbins Left here Bound for the westward. Dolly Slept with mrs Wilm s . I was a t mr Fosters & wido Williams s . my Girls washt thee floars, Parthena wrote Lettersto her friends westward.

X. Birth of Jotham Smiths Son. XX. Clear. I was Calld at 9 h morn to See Jotham Smiths wife who was in Labour & was Safe Delivd of a fine Son at y e 12 th h. I returnd home at 3 h pm then went to See mr Savage. find him Some more Comfortable. the Girls gone to See mrs Hamlin this Eving. Cyrus been to the hook to Day. at mr Smiths & Nr Savages.

Cloudy. I was Calld to see mrs Colman; tarried all day. her Sister Left her bound for Nuberg. the Bridg over this Crick was finish t y s Day. Elisabeth Knowland Came to the Doc t s to Nurs mrs Colman. I was at Doct Colmans.
Cloudy. I have been at home; wound quills. Polly Bisbe here. the Girls went to wido Williams s . at home.
At home. Cleaning yarn & quiling. Dolly finisht her piece 23-1/2 yd. Capt Nichols, Reubin & Rich d Moore Dind.

Clear. we Cleand Bedsteads & wash t rooms. Dorcas Pollard warp t a piece. David Learned Came here fore n n . I wen t to See Josep h Fosters wife & others. Doc t Barton Came at Evin, Bro t Letters from our Friends, one from Bro t Ballard; one from Brot h Colins; from Sisters Barton & Waters also. at Jos h Fosters.

Clear. I wed Garden fore n n . was Calld to mr Isaac Clearks to See mrs Nancy. Shee has S t . Anthonys fire; is in pain & very much worried. I Calld to See James Weston & mr Williams s famely. they Seem Som more Comfortable Excep t James, who is very Low indeed. at Ditoes.

a Loury Day. we had five men to work - I went to See mr Williams; he remains much as he was. I was at mr Westons & Capt Porters. mr Thwing had taken a Puke. mr Lois tending him. it is 19 years this Day Since the Death of my Dagt Martha. I was at Wms s .

Cloudy fore n , heavy Showers with Thunder aft n . Brot h Moore here; he Left Boston yesterday mor n . I have been at home. mr Ballard been writeing. we killd a Calf which w d 79 lb. we putt out our yarn to whiten for a piece of Check. I have been at home. Dog Days begin ys Day.
Clear. I went to wido Williams; her Child was Seis d with

E fitts at [8] h Ev n . it had 9 by 1/2 after 1 morn, then was Easy till 9, then the fitts Came on, it had 4 in the 11 hr , then another which Continued 1 h & 30 m . I Came home & Changd my Linning. Eph m Cowen here in intermition. mr Goold, a Gentleman from N. Brantery, Preacht here. I went to mrs Wilms s , tarried all night. Patty Exceeding ill. Polly Bisbe & my Da t Han h watcht. at wido Wms s . mrs Voce & mrs Harris watcht. at Detoes. mrs Foot & Clarrisa Barton here.

E Clear & Cool. I attended public worship; went to mr Westons after meeting. James Seems a little more Comfortable; at Nr Wil mss ; he is poorly; his wife unwell yet. Patty much the Same. Polly Coole there. Cap t Stickny & mrs Nab y Jackson publishd.

E very rainy. we brot 50 pails of water out of our Seller. mr Ballard went to the meeting house & met Revd mr Foster & N r Savage. there was no preaching. the Girls went to Theo s Hamlins at Evin g . we roasted a Line of veal for Dinner. I was at home.

Cloudy. I wed flax & was Calld to mr Westons. James is near Expireing. I Calld to See mr Williams, he is more unwell; his feet Swell. Shee is a little better. I Set up at mr Westons. James alterd at 10 h Evn. Esq r Lion & Betsy Whelor also.

Cloudy. mr Girls wash t & Scourd. I pulld Some flax & went to See Patty Williams. Shee is much as Shee has been. mr Ben n Leighton Sleeps here this night. mr Ballard been takeing valluation. at mrs Williams s .

Clear morn; Showers after n . I was at wido Wilms s all Day. we thought the Child was Expireing. the Neighbours Calld but it revivd. we administred Clysters prepard with English mallows & Camamile, which operated & relaxed the Bowels. I lift it Easy and returnd home at Evin g . Hannah been to mrs Westons, Parthena & Dolly there Last Satterday to help her quillt a Bed quilt. [Guild] Partrage Came here. at Ditos. I hear that old mrs Hutchens of winthrop Departed this Life Sudenly this Day.

Clear. I went to See mrs Fuller & Child. Calld to see mrs Bates; find her Better. returnd home at 10 h m. receivd 7/ of mr Hinkly at mag r Stickneys & 7/ on Suball Hinkly s acount. wid o Williams here. Polly Bisbe workt for me makeing Hannah a goun. at Hink[lys] & Fullers, mr Batess & mr Westons.
Clear & pleast. I returnd home from mr Clearks, Left all Cleverly. at mr Clearks.

Cloudy. I have been at home, am not So well as I could wish. mrs Savage, wido Williams & mrs Harris here at Evin. the girls went to mr Craggs. Jon a is not returnd. at home. I was Calld to Eliab Shaws in the night.
Clear & Cold. mr Jabez Cowens house was Consumed by fire this morn. mr Ballard Came home This Eving. I have been at home; wound quills. mr Cowens hous Burnt.

Clear. I gatherd herbs & was Calld to mr Fosters. Calld at widow Williams s ; her Child is very unwell. mr Ballards hand is much Better. Cap t Porters Lady has been here. Parthena gone to Stay with mrs Williams. mr Gilbe here this night. at mr Fosters & wido Williams s .

XX. Birth Doc t Colmans Son. XX. at Doct Colmans. his Lady was Safe Del d of a fine Son at 3 h morn. he went to visit mr Moses Sewalls Lady; found her very Dangerous. bro t his nurs & I returnd at y e 9 th h morn. Left mother & Child Cleverly. I took a nap of Sleep & went to mrs Williamss & returnd at Evn n . the Girts took a walk with Belsy Chever. at Do s & at widow Williamss.

Clear. mr Voce & Parmer Laying Shingles on our house. we Breud. I went to See wido Williams. Shee is Better. Dolly winding the warp for Check. I was at wido Williamss. Voce here. Clarisa Barton is 18 years old this Day.

Clear part of the Day; some Showers. I have been at home. we brewd 1-1/2 Barril of Beer. Dolly finish t mrs Porters webb, 24 yds. Jon o is gon to Raising of Cap t Nehemi h Getchels house. we had 5 men to work. mr Ballard got 8 lb of Sugar at Col o Howards [ tend] on Selvenas Hatches acount which was my Due for Servis done. I was at home. Jon o gone to raising. its 19 years Since the Death of my Dat Triphena.
Clear. I went to wid o Williams, tarried all night. her Child very ill. old mrs Fletcher & Sally & Polly tillton there. at Detos. Set up.

Hannah Left home atended on board Capt Agrey by Jona, accompanyd by mr Hains Learned to go to Boston; from there to Oxford. we Sent By her 4 m Shingles, 1 Crown & 6 Dollars & a half. may Shee have a prosperous Journey & meet her friends in Safty is y e Desire of her mammy. mrs Hamlin here. Gillbreath here. I have been at home. Hannah Left home at 5 h Evin.

Clear. I was Calld up before Day by reason of Hannahs being unwell. her Complaint is a pain in her Left Ear which Continued till after n . Shee had a feaver all day & faint turns. I have been Constantly nursing her. Shee Seems a little Easyer this Evinn g . Mr Ballard is gone to wiscasett on Business. Joseph Williams gone to y e Doct s again. Hannah is very Sick. an accident at wichcaset; mr Jack Brown Shot thr o the Back.

E Cloudy. my Self & Parthena & Dolly tarried at home; we had roast veal for Dinner & Bak t Some Pumpkin pies, mrs Young from Sandy river here. mr Savage & wife Drank Tea here. they have been to See mrs Foster; find her very Low. mr Williams much the Same as he has been. we hear mrs Hains & mrs Pullin are Both like to recover. I have been at home. Son Town was here yesterday, he was after Doc t Wilm s for Cap t Haills Child.
Clear & not very warm. I have been Cleaning thee Seller. Cap t Savages Lady & mr Edward Savages also, were here. I went to mr Williamss & Cap t Porters. Hannah was a t Wilms s . I was at mr Wm s .
Clear. mr Williams & wife & Children & Hannah Cool here. Wil m Emerson Sleeps here. mr Ballard Came home much fatagud; has Brous d his legg. I have been at home. Colo North returnd.

Cloudy & Some rain. I have been at home. mr Ballard went to y e hook. Jona Came home from wins low with the Timbers. all well at Son Towns. Dolly is unwell. Jona Brot Timber from Winslow. Theo p from Varsalboro.
Cloudy & rain. I have been finisht Jona s frok. Hannah wove 3-1/2 yds.

Clear. I returnd from mr Sewalls at 10 h morn. went to See Jo s Fosters wife & find her very Low. mr Will ms is a Lit l Better. Shiribiah Town been here. I Calld at J. Willms s . David Pollard over Sett his Boat in the rips.

Clear morn. at 1 h pm 20 m , a Shower of hail & rain with thunder. David Learned here. mr Porter & wife & Parthena went from here at 10 h 30 m . I have been at home. mr Ballard Sett plants. the Litning Struck 2 trees at Cap t Pages. at home.

Clear. Broth Barton here; took Breakfast. old mrs Cowen Dind. Jabizh work t here. I went to Wilmss at 3 h pm; he had a very ill Turn. we were aprehensive he was Expireing, but revivd. I Came home at 10 h Evn. Doc t Barton Came here at 10 h Evn, tarries here. I was at Nr Wilms s .

Clear. I hurt my foot with a plank. mr Ballard wrote to Bro th Collins & went to Cobasa to Carry it to Doct Barton for Conveyance. mrs Woodward here; her Son no Better. my Da t Hannah is very unwell. I hear mrs Foster is no better. I have been at home.

Clear Except a Shower. mr Page & mr Ballard fixing the Valluation. mrs Williams here; invited me to go there. I went & Spent y e after n . her Sister Charlotte Came there from Boston. mrs Savage here when I returnd, her Husband is very poorly. I was at wido William ss .
Clear. mr Page here makeing rates. mr Hains & David Learned Dind here. I have been at home. Taytor finish t Spreading our flax. I was at home.

Clear. mr Ballard went to y e hook. I went on Board Cap t Dean & receivd 7/ on Stuley Springers acount which was my Due for atending his wife, & medecin. Daniel Robbins Sleeps here. Dolly Cutt her finger. I was on board Cap t Deane. at wido Wilms also.

Clear fore n , Cloudy & some rain aft n . Jona Killd an OX. Parthena Came home. we Cleand a tripe. I have been at home, Did house work & quilld y n . Dolly had a pair of Leath r Shoes brot home. I have [been] at home. mr Savage made me a present of a Logerhea d .

E Clear & pleast. I did not attend worship. Parthena went to mr Foots. Shee lost her pockett. James Springer found it & bro t it here. wido Williams & her Sister Charlotte here at Evin g . I have been at home.

E X. Birth Isaac Hardins Son. XX. Clear. Doc t Barton & others took Breakfast here. I was Calld to Isaac Hardins wife in travil. Calld to mrs Williams to hear from her Husband, he is near Expireing; found mrs Hard n poorly. Shee was Safe Del d of a fine Son at 11 h & 1/2 Evn. I tarried all night. at mr Hardins. Smith & [Cloe] Cleark Published.Spoke with mrs Wilms.
E Clear & pleast. I attended public worship. the revd mr Foster Deliv d 2 fine Discoarses from Romans 10 & [ ]. I attend d pb c worship &was at wido Wims s .

E Clear & very Cool. I was unwell before n n and attended public worship aft. Revd mr Foster Spoke from Geneses 2 & 7; made a very fine discorce. wid o Williams and mrs Lois Harris here after meeting, Wil m Howard & mr Fillbrook also. Dan'l Robbins returnd from Boston. At meeting. Calld at wido William ss .
E Clear & Pleas t . I tarried at home, Dolly also. Clarisa Barton & others here after meeting. my Girls at wido Williamss at Eving. at home.

E Clear & Cold. I attended public worship, but 27 people there. the revd mr Fosters text was Romans VIII 38, 39 vers s . mr Wing of Fairfield Sleeps here; informs he was at Brot h Moores at Rochester about 3 weaks Since; his famely all well. I was at meeting. I wrote to Hannah.

Cloudy morn. we raisd the Saw Mill Fraim. mr Marshall & Thomas Moore were hurt; The Businiss other ways Done with Safety. there were a vast Concorse of men & Children & not many Disguisd with Licquor. the Young Folks had a Dance here at Evn g . Disperst at midnight. Our Saw Mill was Raisd. Rob t Denisons wife Dild of a Daf t by mrs Fletcher.

Clear. I Left mrs Hardin at 5 h morn as Cleverly as Could be Expected. Calld at mrs Williamses; find her Husband Expired. mr Flint Barton & mr Hardin Breakfasted here. I went to mrs Williams s & tarried till Evin g , but feel very much fatagud. at mrs Williams, her Husband Expird at 3 h morn.

Clear fore n , Cloudy aft n . Cyrus went from home Bound for winslow. I have been at home. my Girls wash t . Thomas Smyle Came here to work. David Learned Sleeps here. Leut John Shaw paid me 6/ for attending his wife in travil augs t y e 7 th . I have been at home.

Clear. I went to See mr Childs s Son who is unwell. I went as far as mr Edsons. Came home at 2 pm. Broth Moore here. I went afterward to old mr Isaac Savages. Came home at Eving. I Calld at Doc t Colmans; his Lady made me a presant of a Cap. at mr Childs. Dolly finished weaving the Check, 39-2/1 [sic] yds. mr Parmers Son at winthrop Expird of a feavor.
E Clear & Pleas t . I Stayed at home. the rest of y e famely went to meeting. Doc t Whitaker performd. mr Ballintin e & his wife here all Day & Sleep here. Polly Bisbe here y s Evn g . at home.
Clear & Cool. Ben n Dexter & his Sister Came here, Son Town also. mr Smyle Came to work. I was Calld to Thoms Sewalls to See his Lady. at mr Sewalls. Son Town here.
Clear. I have been at home. the Girls have been to mr Bisbes & Westons. wido Williams Sleeps here. Wil m Haywood, Burton, Polly & Lidia Bisbee here. I Bo t a Broome of mr Briggs. I was at home.

I Came home from mr Jacksons. Left mg r Stickneys Lady & Son Cleverly. I went to mr Davises & Bougt a Cloak of mrs Anne, paid X 12/ X. there is 3/ Due X. I Came from mr Jacksons. wido Wm s Sleeps here.

Snow foren n , moderate aft rain. I went to See Polly Savages infant, it has a Soar mouth. wido Wilms there. Dolly finisht her web & took it out. I finish t knitting Eph ms mitts. Snow. I was at mr Savages. Wrote to Sis t Barton.
Clear. I have been tending yarn to whiten & pulld Some flax the also. Hannah & Parthena went to mrs Wilms s at Eving. mr Ballard been surveying for Subal Hinkly. at home all Day.
E Clear Except a Shower. mr Balad only of our famely went to meeting. I went to See mrs Foster; find her very much Distrest with her breas t . Dan l Robbins here. I was at Revd mr Fosters.
Clear. I have been at home, made a Baise Coat & piqut 1/2 lb of wool. at home.

Clear & pleast. mrs Williams here. I have been at home. mr Ballard & Ephm went to Esq r Husey s to See the the [sic] muster. James Stackpool & Thom s Howard here this night, mr Smyle also & mr Learned. at home.
Clear. I was Calld to Cap t Savages to See mrs Cowen. a very windy Day. I was at Capt Savages, wen t by water.

X. Birth of Eliab Shaws Daft. receivd my fee Oc tr 22, by Ephm, 1792. XX. I was Calld between 12 & 1 h morn to Eliab Shaws wife in travil. Shee was Safe Delivd at y e 11 th of a fine Daugh t . I left them Cleverly & returnd at 4 pm. mr Hains Learned Came here; he left home Last Wednsday. I receivd a Letter by him from Sister Waters, Dated at Boston. mr Ballard is gone to y e hook. Taylor Came here y s Day. at Shaws. mr Learned Came here, brogt me a Letter from Sis t Waters of y e 12 th inst. David Fletch r a Dag t Born.
at Detoes & Daniels junirs. windy. at Ditos.

XX. Birth of Leut John Shaws XX Daugt Daug t . [sic]. Clear Part of the Day; some Showers. I went to See mrs Williams; her Child is very unwell. mrs Pollard there, mr Vahn also. Polly Bisbe tarried with her this night. I was Calld to Leu t John Shaws Lady who is in travil; left home at 9 h 30 m . Shee was Safe Deld of a Dag t about 11 h Ev n . I returned home at two. at mrs William ss . Dolly finisht Strikeing Harnis to a Forty.

Clear. mr Ballard went to Pitts Town; informs at his return that mrs Suall is yet alive & that mr Parmers Famely are Sick & much Distres t having no nurs. mr Ballard brot 2 Cheeses which he had of Nathan Swetland, for Katy which w d 13-1/2 lb. this Day my Da t Town is 30 years old. Hannah is gone to wid o Williams s . at home all Day, gatherd Herbs.
Cloudy part of y e Day. Cyrus is gone to Gardners mill. he is 32 y s old this day. I have been at home. Dolly warpt a piece for mrs Pollard of 39 yds. I have been at home. Cyrus is 32 years old.

XX. Birth of Ep m Cowens Dag tr . XX. at D t os. mrs Cowen ill, Calld her women. was Safe Del d of a Dag t at 8 th h pm & is Cleverly. I tarried all night. at Ditoes. Cap t Nichols took Letters for Sis t B & Han h .

Clear & hott. I Came home at the 5 th h , went to Sleep at the 8 th & to wd os at 1 pm, found mrs Cumings there. Patty Expird at 5 h pm. I put on her Grave Cloaths with the asistance of mrs Cumings & mrs Han h m c Kathny. mrs Bullin & mrs Lois Harris are there. at Ditos. Pally Expird at 5 h pm. Aged 8 months & 17 days & 10 hours old.
Cloudy, a Shower & Thunder about 1 h pm. mr Ballard went to Pitts Town. the Girls spun some Cottne. I Carded it. have been at home. Gillb h help t Cyrus pick mill. I was at home.
Clear & pleas t . I Came home, Cros t on the ice. Calld at mr Westons, Col o Norths & mr Savages. mr Ballard is Gone to mr Jacksons. at Ditoes.
Clear. I have been at home mending mr Ballards Great Coat. Polly Wheeler Sleeps here. mr Cragg & Thos Davis took their Sartificates. at home. mr Bal rd been to Doc t Coneys.

E XX. Birth of William Wings junr Dagt & firs t Child. XX. Clear, Cloudy & moderate. I was Calld to See the wife of William Wing at Day Break; found her very ill. Shee was Safe Del d about 10 th h AM. Jessy Bullin attended me there & home as far as the meeting house. I find Polly Whealor very unwell. I was at mr Wings. Calld to See wido William s . I wrote to my Da t Hannah.
Clear & very pleas t . mr Ballard went to Varsalboro. Thomas Haywod went away from here to go home. I have been at home, Tryd Jona s Tallow. at home. The Death of Senter Latter part of the night.

Cloudy. mr Ballard went to Doc t Coneys fore n . I went to See mrs Sprage aft n . mrs Hamlin here to warp a piece. Parthena has a soar throat. Polly is not so full of pain as Shee was yesterDay. I went to Wilm Sprages.

rainy fore n , Clear aft. mr Ballard is unwell. Polly is not So well as Shee has been. Doc t Coney Calld to See her. mrs Hamlin here to warp a web. the Girls been to wido Willims s . Charlotte here at Evng. I have been at home. I was at home.

Clear. Revd mr Foster here, Desird me to go & See his Lady. my Dat r , Dolly, is there. mr Hovey bro t me 5-1/2 lb of Buller which was Due to me for attending his wife the 3 d of March last. I went to See mrs Foster; her Breast is soar and Shee is unwell other ways. I attended Funeral of mr Williams. There were a Larg Concoarse of people; the widdow fainted. I gave her Some Drops & Shee revivd. Gille & True Sleep here. I attended Funeral of Joseph Williams & was at Revd mr Fosters.

Cloudy morn. Cap t Dean here. Brot me a Letter from Bro th Jon a . Cyrus returnd from Son Towns & Hannah with him. Cap t Coxes Lady & mrs Hannah North here, mrs Harris also. mr Danys Child Expired at 7 Ev n . receivd a Letter from Bro th Jon a of June 17 th . I was at home.
Cloudy & Some rain. Parthena & Dolly gone to mr Foots, Hannah to Sleep with mrs Williams. I have been at home, Cutt my Camomile.
a very rainy Day. Son Town went from here. I was at Ditoes. a t Ditoes.

Cloudy, Snowd at Eving & raind. I went to mr Savages & helpt get Polly up & Drest her Babe. the girls went in y e Evng. mrs Williams Sleeps here. Wl m Stone Left a M of Shingles with mr Barton on my acount. I was at mr Savages. Snow.
Clear & Cold. I have been to mr Savages. mrs Williams here y s night. at mr Savages.

Snowd & raind. we were boiling Soap. mr Ballard went to meet Select Gen t men. David Learned Sleeps here. Polly Whealer is very unwell. Doc t Coney Came to see her, Left her Some remidies. wodw d Allin here to work, he Came yester Day. I receivd 4 lb Chocolat of Ephm Cowen for assisting his wife y s 4 th inst. I have [been] at home. Snowd.

rainy fore n , Clear af t . I have been at home, made 2 pockets for Hannah, mended Cyrus s Stockins & piqut wool for him. mr Ballard is not so well as usual. Jotham Smith Crid t by 1 M Shingles. mr Ballard bot a Side of Beef of Colo Howard. at home. Smith brot Shingles.

Clear. I went over y e river as far as Charls Clearks. mr Ballard been to mr Pollards on public Business. our young people are there to a Daunce. I receivd of mr Allin 3/ which was Due for medisin & 5 lb of Chees for Cyrus A /6 pr lb. at mr Brooks. a Little Snow.

Cloudy & Some rain. I went to mr Livermores to See Polly Whealor; find her very Low. Sett up with her. there I Closed ye year in asisting the Distresed. I was at Mr Livermores. Births in Hollowell in 1788 - 17 Sons & 25 Dag ts . Deaths - males 7; Feemales 5.
Clear. I have been at home. mrs Foot & Clarisa here. mr Ballard gone to Varsalboro. at home. mrs Foot here, and Clarisa.

A Clear & very fine morn. I spent y e Day with Polly. Shee had two turns which we apprehinded Shee was Expireing. Dolly Came to See her. mr Allin Came at Eving to acompany me home. I made Some Capnip Tea for Parthena. mr Ballard & Cyrus picking mill. at mr Livermores.

Clear & very hott. I went to the hook; visited the Sick then went to mr Woodwards to See his Children. find his Son in Chains & his Da t very ill with a Swelling on her throat. Shee was Bro t on a Slead to mr Browns. I was at the hook & at mr Wdw ds .
Clear. Dolly warpt & drawd in a piece for Check, Laid in 45 yds. I have been at home Kniting. mrs Harris here at Evin g . at home.
Cloudy, Snowd at Eving. mr Ballard been at Col o Norths. I have been at home, Mended Cyrus a pair of Breaches & Doubled his Stockin y n . at home. Snowd.

Clear & Warm. we killd a Veal. mr James Page here on public business; informs his wife is unwell. we attended funeral of Pally Williamss who was interd y s Evinng. the widdow, her Mother is the only surviveing branch of that famely. Funeral of Patty Williams. I attendd
Clear & pleast. I went to mr Wadwards & other Neighb s , met Nathan l Runels who informed y t Cap t Agrey went from home this morn. our men have been Raising mill Giers. I went as far as mrs Woodwds.
Clear. mr Ballard been over halling writeings. I have been mending Cyrus s Breaches. there has been many people in here this Day. Jona been to the hook. the Girls Baked. I was at home.

D Clear & Cold. I was Calld to See Nancy Savage. She Continues to Puke & Purge. Shee is Cutting her Eye teeth. I was informd y t a Dagt r of Sam l Goodins has Lately had a Child. Shee is unmarried. I went to mr Savages.
E a rainy Day. mr Ballard and N r Savage & old mr White mett at the meeting house. mr Foster was not there. I was at home.

E Clear & Cold. mr Ballard & others went to the house of worship but were not Suferd to Enter. then went to Revd mr Fosters, had liberty at mr Thwing for mr Foster to preach in his house; his Text was Geneses 3 d Chap 8 th vers, mr Ballard has been to mr Livermores this Ev n . Polly Whealor is very Low & his infant is very Sick also. I have been at home. wido Wilms Sleeps here. mr Crage was Married. wido Wilms Sleeps here.

E Cloudy. I tarried at home foren n , wrote to Brother Jona Moore; attended public worship aft n . wido Williams Sleeps here. a rainy Evn g . Tho s Haywad has a pain in his Side. at meeting. I wrote to Brother Jon a Moore.
D Clear & Cold. I have been at home. Sam l Babcock had a Son born. at home. Birth.

Clear. Revd mr Foster & Lady and wido Williams & mrs Lois Harris Dind with us. mrs Rheed & mrs Blakman Calld here. mrs Dorkis Pollard here to warp a piece. mrs Savage here; says James is unwell. Jona been to Pitts Town for a pair of Shoes. I have been at home.

Cloudy. I have been at home. mr Bullin here to Clean Some wheat. Parthena & Dolly went to mr Westons. at Evinn g a thunder Shower. Cyrus went to Carry Letters to mrs Lois Hinkly to Convey to Rochester & falmath. at home.

Clear & Cold. mr Ballard & the other Gentlemen who are the meeting house Committee mett at Col o Norths to Settle that Business. I went to mr Livermores. Polly is Decaying; his infant is unwell. wido Williams Came there at Evin g . my Girls washt & wash t the room. mr Page Sup t here. mr Ballard wrote a note for Eliphelet Robbins against Daniel of 10 Dollars. I went to mr Livermores.
Clear & very Cold. mrs Voce Dind here. I went to See Nancy, find her much as Shee has been. mr Ballard been to y e hook. mr Gillb th Sleeps here. I went to mr Savages.
Clear & Cold. mr Page here making Rates. I have been at home. at home.

Clear morn, Cloudy aft n . mrs Hamlin wound & warpt a peice here. mr Carr here; informed that mr [Ziachers] Senter Departd this Life very sudenlley yesterday. I have been at home, Did hous work. we Breud & finisht Trying Jona s Tallow. at home. mr Loee here.

Cloudy & moderate. Dolly rode as far as mr Westons & Carried Polly. her pain returnd in her hip this af tn . Mr Ballard went to the hook. I have been at home, finish t mending mr Ballards Breaches. mr Fillbrook is here this night; Says Towns famely are well. I have been at home.

Clear. Dolly & Clarrissa washt. mr Ballard went to Collect Rates. I was at Revd mr Fosters & mr Westons. Jona is unwell. Parthena is Better, Ephm also. I Calld at mr Daviss & left 3/ for mrss Anne Davis, it being all that was Due to her for a Cloak I had of her. at Revd Fosters & other Neighb rs .
Cloudy morn, Clear aft n . I went to See mrs Savage. Shee had a pain in her Side. I Drest Isaac Cowens hand at mr Savages. at mr Savages. Snow.

Clear. mr Ballard Surveying for mr Vahn. I went to see mrs Williams; find her very Disconsolate. Danl Boltons wife & mrs Porter Came there aft n . I Came home. thee Girls gone to help mrs Thomas quillt; returnd at 11 h Evn g . I was at mrs Williams s , her Babe is no better.
Clear. mr Ballard went to y e hook. mr Page & he here af t . I went to mr Danys. Sherb h Town Sleeps here. I was at mr Danys.
Clear. Parthena & Dolly returnd. mrs Williams here, Spent y e Evin g . Han h & Thena went home w h her. I have been at home, helpt Do house work; boild Cyrus s warp, & wid o Wims s . at home.

X. Birth Thos Sewalls Son. XX. Clear. I was at mr Sewalls. his Lady Calld me up at 4 ys morn & Sent for her women. Shee was Safe Delivd of a Son at half after Six Eving & I returnd home about 8. Left mother & Child Cleverly. find wido Williams & Polly Savage here. the wind Blod part of our Barn of yesterdy & Damaged many other Buildings in this Town. Killed some Swine. at mr Sewalls. Sally Dexter went from here to winthrop.I receivd 6/ of mr Sewalls.
Clear. the Counsel Sett at the meeting house. Jona killd a Cow for revd mr Foster. mrs Bullin Sleeps here. I have been at home. I was at hom e .

Cloudy. I have been at home. we Bak t Some Apple pies. wido Wilms Sleeps here. William Stone gave me an order on mr Burton for 3/ which James Savage owd me which, with the rie I had before, pay d all he Owd me for attending his wife in her illniss Feby 18 th 1787. at home.

Cloudy Day, Clear Evin g . I have been at home. Broth Moore, Cap t Savage & Jonas Cleark were here; mr Dyer & Capt Mathews also. the Latter was intoxecated, Carried on very Drolely this Evng, fell in the fire & Spillt my Soap, which was boiling, on him. Polly is a little Easier. I have been at home. Snowd.
Clear & very Cold. Hodg workt. mrs Weston here. my Girls went to N r Savages, mr Ballard to meddow. I have been at home. at home.
Clear. I have been at home. mr Ballard to Church meeting. mrs Savage warp t a piece here. the girls gone to Hamlins. at home.
Clear & pleast. I have been at home. mr Learned here this night. I made a Diapor Skirt for Hannah. at home.
Clear & very Col d . mr Ballard at mr Pages makeing Rates, I at home. at home.

Clear. I went to Col o Howards & mr Livermores. Polly is very Low. mrs Williams Sleeps here. I receivd Letters from my friends, from Hannah of Dec 20 th , from Brot h Collins & f m Sist Bart n . at mr Livermores. receivd Letters.

Clear. mr Bald at Coart. I was at home. mr Porter & wife, Patrig & Foster went to Foots. Clarrissa Came here with them in y e night after we were in Bed. Dolly & Parthena wrode out in Evin g , Polly Bisbe also. at home. mr W[ ] of Jones planta[ion] lost [his] hous [ fire].

X. Birth John Coutches Son. XX. A bitter Cold morn. I rose at y e 4 th H, was Calld at y e 6th to See mrs Coutch who was in travil & was Delivrd at y e 8 th of a fine Son. her Second Child, both Sons. I returnd at y e 6 th h Evn, left all well. at mr Coutch s .
Clear & pleast. we Spread the Diapor ou t for whitening. I was at wido Williams s . Shee is Some Better. Dolly Sleeps with her. mr Voce & Son here Shingleing y e house. I have been at wido Williamss.
Clear. mr Ballard went to the hook. I have been at home & made 23 Doz n of Candles. Cyrus found 10 lb of y e Tallow. at home.
Clear. Cyrus went to Son Towns. I was at home. Dolly wash t Eas t room. at home.
D Clear, wind. Junr Hamlin s folks Dind here. I was at home. at home.

E Cloudy & Dark. mr Ballard went & put up the publishments of Ben n Prescot & Polly Hinkly & m c alister & Elizabeth Carver. Parthena is unwell. I gave her Some pills. Shee took one in a spoon full of Beer. the wind mett it & Shee was so Strangled Shee turnd Black in her face & almost lost her Breath. I was at home. Parthena unwell. I wrote to Hann h & Doct Barton, Send by Es qr Coney.
Cloudy. I have been at home. mr Ballard went to mr Pollards with Letters to Send by Doc t Coney. Parthena is Some Easier. I have had a pain in my head. Birth Jos Browns Dagt. at home.
Clear & pleas t . Cyrus returnd, his Sister & Polly & Lucy with him. I have been at home. at home.

Clear & very pleast. I was Calld to Revd Fosters to See Isaac, put a Cattaplasm made of honey, flower & y e yolk of an Egg, on the Soar. was Calld from there to mrs Cumings in travil who was ill thro the night. at Revd Fosters & other Neig rs . mrs Chandler Expird at 2 O Clok pm.

a very rainy Day. I went to mr Savages to see James who is unwell. his mother Came here to warp 4 [ ] hand kerchiefs. mr Ballard gon e to mr Carrs to meet the Select Gentlemen. mr Jeremy Hall took a Sartifaket & Left 2/3. mr Ballard did not return this night. at Nr Savages.

Clear. the wind NW. I have been at home. mr Bullin here Cleaning wheat. an old Lady Sleeps here. Woodward Allin here; paid me 3/ by reducting So much Due to him from mr Ballard for his Coopar ware. at home. W d W d Allin here.Eliab Shaw Left 1 m of Shingles with Burtun for me.
Snowd, morn is Cold. I have been makeing Candles, 23 Doz. I hear Polly is no better. at home.

Clear & not so Cold. mr Ballard Bot 37 lb of Exclent Beef of Cap T Ney & 9 lb Butter of mrs Pollard, 1 gal n Rhum of mr Weston. old mrs Coutch Sleeps here, two Leightons & Gillb h . I have been at home. at home.

X. Birth Saml Cumings Junr s first Son. XX. Clear morn, Cloudy aft n . mrs Cumings was Safe Deld at y e 6 th H morn of a Son which wd 9 lb 3/4. I receivd 6/ fee and 1/ for medisin & returnd atended by mr Hovey a t y e 9 th H. took a knap. Son Town Came here. Snows y s Evn g . at mr Cumings. Snow.
Clear & very pleas t . the Girls wash t & washt y e floars. I have been at home, Did house work; feel weary. at home.

Cloudy & Some Snow. mr Ballard went to Church meeting. I have been at home. Polly very poorly. mr James Page Dind here; informd that mr Ben n Branard departed This life last night. I have been at home. news of the Death of mr Branard.

Clear & Cold. Cyrus Conducted Clarissa home in mr Pollards Sleigh. mr Ballard went to mr Livermores to See about the Expince of Polly whealors Sickness there & funeral Charges. his Bill was L 4=18/. Shee was here 14 Days. I attended her with Nursing & Some medicin. mr Ballard Spint 2 Days providing a place & mooving her. went to inform her Father of her Death. our Bill was 16/, mr Pages 8/. I was at home. Clarrissa left here. Parthena is Better, Jona also.

Clear & Cold. Sherib h Town and mrs Eunice Stackpole Came. Son Town went home. Eunice had a very severe pain in her teeth & face. I aplyd Some Scorcht Tow & hett her face & Shee got Ease. mr Ballard been to Col o Howards. William Emerson here y s night. I have been at home. mr Pollards famely attended funeral of his Dafter Chandler & h r infant. at home. funeral of mrs Chandler & her infant. Jona is 26 years old y s Day.

X. Birth Welches Son. XX. Clear. mr Ballard & the other men went to Pitts town to help rais a mill. Shere Town & James Stackpool & mr Learned Dind here. I was Calld to See mrs Welch in travil. Shee was Del d at 9 pm. I Came home at 11. at mr Welches.

Clear. I went to mr Brooks s & mr Welches; find his wife not so well as I could wish. Calld at wid o Williams. Hannah gone to Sleep there. My Girls wash t the flors. I had Sole Leather for a pair of Shoes of mr Welch, price 1/8. I was at mr Brooks s .
Clear & pleas t . I wound 9 Double Skeins of y n on quills & went to mr Westons & replased the Dollar I Borrowd of her the 22 nt of last month. mrs North there, Betsy at y e Colo n . at mr Westons.

Cloudy & rain. I went to mr Pollards to heare what was Laid before the Revd. Counsil Examine Eveidnces agains t Revd mr Foster. I was Calld to See Polly Savage who had a Pain in her Stomach & Side. w [sic] gave her Some Feaver fue Tea & Shee was Easier very Soone. I was at mr Pollards & Savages.

XX. Birth Asa Wilmss Child, a Dagt. XX. Snow & haill & rain. Thanksgiving Day. I Did not attend worship. mrs Williams here. Parthena & Dolly went to mr Foots aft r we Dind. I was Calld to go to Asa Williams s wife in Travil at 9 th hour Evin g . I went as far as the turn of the road beyond the Bridg this Side mr Browns, mett a mesage Desireing I would return. mr Pitts acompanied me home, the rideing very bad. the girls went no farther than mr Bisbes. at home till Eving then Calld by Asa Wilms.
Clear. mr Ballard went to Colo Duttuns mill. Brot h Moore & David Learned Dind here. the Latr Sleeps here. wido Wilms & Polly Bisbee here. I have been at home. I was a t home.
Cloudy. mr Ballard very unwl l . Polly is Better. Wido Wil ms here. mr Porter Came for his wife, they Left here at y e 9th H Evn. at home.

X. Birth of mr Jacob Chandlers Dag t , Born Dead. XX. Clear. I am very unwell with a pain in my Neck & Shoulder. Jacob Chandler here, informd his wife has fitts & he wisht for me to go & See her. the young people Left here, went to Capt Danl Smiths. mr Pollard Calld me to his Dagt, Chandler, at 5 h 30M Evn g . we arivd at 7 h 30 m . She was Deld at y e 9th hour of a Dagt, Still Born, & Seems more Comfortable. I Sett up & tended her with her Marm. Shee Seemd revivd in y e morn. at mr Chandlers.

Clear, Cold & very windy. mr Town & mrs Eunis here all day. Shee had a Tooth Extracted. I have been at home. Jona brot a load of hay home. there was a young man had his Legg Cutt off at Stirling, by Doct Williams. he bro t it to Doct Coneys & descected it. at home.
Cloudy. I have been at home. mr Bald been to Doc t Coneys. mr Learned Came here. Betsy Chever here. at home.

Clear. I attended the preparetory Lector; there were but Twelve persons there Except Revd mr Foster. Theophel Hamlin & his wife here y s Evn n . mr Smyle left here. mr Learned work t on the mill Giers, Sleeps here. I was at Lector.

Clear & not so Cold. mr Town & mrss Stackpool Left here at 9 ys m . I went to Revd Fosters, his Childs Soar is Broke & is in a good way. Broth Moore was here, it raind at y e 9 th hour y s Evn, was a stormy night. at Revd Fosters.

Cloudy, Snowd at night. I was informd by mr Liverm r that Polly Whealer Expired at 1 h y s morn. mr Ballard went to inform her Father. Clarrissa Barton Came here. Parthena is very unwell. mrs Wil ms Left here y s morn. at home. Death Polly Whealer. Snow.
Snow. mr Porter & others Left here Bound for home. mr Ballard at Coart. I have been at home. we have had but little Company Since the foren n . at home.

Birth Ezek l Pages Daft r . XX. Clear & pleast. mr Hadg workt here half y e Day. mr Ballard returnd. Capt Belcher & Esqr Coney from Boston. I receivd a letter from Broth Edwd Davis informing of his wifes Death. I was Calld to See mrs Page in travil at 10h & 30m Evn . Shee was Deld of a Dagt at about 11, all Cleaverly. I tarried till morn. at mr Pages. receivd 6/ for my Servis.
very rainy till after n . mr Savage finisht Jonas Cranck for his mill, Brot it home. he & 5 more men Dind. Snowd at Evn. I have been at home. at home. rain & Snow.

D X. Birth mr Danas 3 d Son. XX. Clear & Cold morn. I was Calld at 4 O Clock morn to See mrs Dana. Shee was Safe Delivrd of a Son at 1h & 30m aft n . I left all as well as is usual & returnd about Sun Sett. Receivd 6/ reward. at mr Danas.
D Clear & Something Cold. mr Lee was here. my Girls gone to Hamlins. I have been at home. mrs Savage here. at home.
D Snowd & is Moderate. I returnd at 7 h 30 m in morn. at mr Pages.
Cloudy & not very Cold. mr Ballard at Coart. it was ajournd without Day y s Evi n . I have been at home mending My quillt. Dolly wove 6-1/4 y d s Cloath for mr Voce. at home.
Cloudy. I was to See Nancy Savg. had information by Letter of Sister Nabbys Death. Shee Expird Jan y 29. I wrote to Clarrissa Barton. at N r Savages. recd a Letter fm Brt h Davis.

Clear & pleasant. I have been at home. mr Ballard to Pitts town for Lining & triming for Jona a Coat. he boug t me 18 Sewing needles & himself a pair of Silver Sleave Buttuns which w d 5 penny w t 47 gs. Cost 3/4. Revd Foster here y s morn. Robert Fletcher a Daft Born y s morn. at home. Birth Robert Fletchers 3 d dagt r at the 6 th H Morn.
Clear & moderate. I was at home all day. at home.

Cloudy. I have been at home. we were alarmd by fire which was discoverd at y e 3 h & 40 y s morn. the Bed on which the Girls Slept having by Some means on fire. a Chair which I Slipt under the Side on which Parthena Lay was Burnt to a Coal on y e Top of y e post next y e fire & the Bed Cloaths much damagd. mr Morgin Sleeps here y s night. mr Page & Prescott Dind here. Parthena is Some Easier. at home. this is 1 year Since I fell into the river. we Barely Escapt being Consumd by fire this morn. the wisdom of God is great & his tender mercy is over all his works. mr Liverm r here for grave Cloaths for Polly Wehl r .
Clear & pleast. Jona & y e Girls went to Winthrop. mrs Hamlin here. I at home. mr Ballard is unwell. at home.

Clear part of y e Day. mrs Childs here to warp a webb. mr Ballard is not returnd, it is the 10 h Evn. Cap t Porter has Beat mr Isaac Savage & abused him very much. I have been at home. Cap t Porter faut N r Savage.
Clear & Cold. mrs Merifue went from here. I have been at home. y e Girls wash t . at home. it Snowd.

Clear & Cold. mr Ballard went to mag r Goodins. Calld to See Polly Whealor. Shee is no Better, the infant is. I have been at home. Dan l Bolton & his wife Dind here. we made Some mins Pies. there was a Sleigh over Sett a Cuming down the hill abov our house. I have been at home. Stephen Dudly of Winthr p frz his hands this night.

D Cloudy. Parthena is Easier. her pain returnd at Evin very Sever. mr Hamlin & wife here. mr Ballard went to y e revd mr Foster to inform him y t mr Whealor Desires him to attend the funeral of his Dagt to morow. at home. mrs Hamln here.
Haill & rain. mrs Couch left here at 2 h PM. mr Ballard Gone to Colo n Howards on Business. I have been at home. Shere Town & a man from Damescota Sleep here. I went to mr Savages.

XX. Birth mr Andws Dagt. XX. Cleard. mrs Savage here. Shee & I Reckond & Setled. I fall in her debt /6. mr Ballard been to And w Goodins for molases & Col o Duttuns for Potatos. Polly Savage here. I was Calld to See mrs Andrews at 5 th H pm. Shee was Safe Delivrd at 8 & 30 M Evn of a Daugter. I returnd at 12 percisely by our time piece. Left my patients Cleverly. my famely w s in Bed when I returnd. mrs Savage & I Setled. at mr Andrews.
Cloudy. I went to mr Pollards. mrs Black is Cleverly. I was at mr Westons & Cap t Porters. mr Ballard returnd, mr Smiley with him. mr Guile here. I was at mr Pollards.

Clear & pleast. I have been at home, did house work & feel much fataugd. the Girls are gone to mr Crages. they are now returnd; informd that Hannah Fletcher has Sworn Shee is with Child by Josep h Fellers. at home.

Clear & Cold. mr Ballard attended Town meeting. there was a vote pass t that the revd mr Foster Should not preach in the meeting hous anymore. mr Brooks here to Settle with me about Bakeing & at the rate he was pleasd to alow me for the trouble there was 15/6 Due to me. I have been at home. the girls wash t . Polly has been very poorly. at home. 2 years Since Ephm had y e first fitt. mr Ben n Branard interd this Day.
Snowd fore n , Sun Shine af t , Cloudy Ev n . mr Ballard been Surveying for Col o Duttun. I have been at home. I have been at home. Snow.

Clear & pleas t . mr Ballard at mr Pollards. I was Calld there to See mrs Black. Shee had an ill turn, her milk is Cuming. I returnd at night, left her more Comfortable. Daniel Robbins Sleeps here. I was at mr Pollards.
Clear. I have been at home. Wrote to Brot h Jonathan Moore. Jona gone to husking. I was at home. Wrote a Letter to Brot h Jona.

Clear. I have been at home about makeing Soap. wido Williams Sleeps here. Dolly receivd a Letter from Hannah of 10 inst by Cap t Porter, who left Boston yester day. I was at home. a Letter from Hannah.

Clear. I attended at Counsil to hear the Evidences Examind. Margarett Fox gave a very Contirary Evidencd Concerning her working on y e Sabath from what Shee Did when Calld in the Cause of Cap t Sewalls Defameing the Revd mr Foster. I was at mr Pollard & a t mr Westons.mr Ben n Dexter & his Sister Sleep here.
Cloudy. Reuben Moors wife & Child n here, mooving from Pitts Town to Varsalboro. David Learned Dind here. I have been at home. mr Williams paid me 1/6 for my trouble Last Eving.

Cloudy, raind Eving. mr Ballard went to mr Jacksons for Turnips. I Combd 12 lb of flax for mrs Weston. Betsy Chever & old mrs Bolton been here. I have been at home all Day. Polly has not Kept anything Down that Shee has Eat this day. been at home. [7 lb] Combd flax.
Cloudy & Snow. mr Ballard went to mr Pollards, was very porrely after n . mrs Williams went home. Jona killd a Swine for us which w d 220. Gillb th here. I at home. at home. Snow.

Clear. mr Pollard & I left his Dagt as Comfortable as Coold be Expected. She had not any fitts while I was there. the Docters have hopes of her recovery. I Came home at 2 aft. found Sherebiah Town & mrs Eunice Stagpole here, they Left my Child n well. at Ditoes. mr Pollard gave me 6/ for my trouble.

Clear & pleas t . mrs Hamlin is more Comfortable. I left her at y e 9 th H m , was Calld at half after 10 to See Mag r Stickneys Son who is unwell. returnd at 1 h 30 m Evn & went again to mrs Hamlins. find her much Better. Rheuben Moores famely here on thier way to Pittstown. at Dit[os] & mr Jacksons.
Rainy. I have been at home. the Girls made some mins & Pumkin pies. mr Ballard went to Varsalboro & met the other Select Gen t men at mr Pollards. Calvin Ballard Sleeps here. at home.
Cloudy. Charls Cleark here, brot me 8 lb of Sugar for attending his wife May 3 d 787. I went to see mr Densmoores Children who are unwell. left them 20 pills, pr s 1/. at mr Densmoores.

E X. Birth mr Isaac Clearks Son & Dagt. XX. Clear & Pleast. I attended public wors p , Revd mr Foster Discoarst from GeneS S 33 d & 4 th . mr Gille went from here this morn. my Girls went to mr Childs at Evin g . Elias Crage & Hannah m c Keckny Cryed. I was Calld in haste at 11 h Evin g to mr Isaac Clearks Lady in travil. Shee was Safe Delivd of a fine Son & a Daugt before 12; all likely to Do well. I receivd 12/ as a reward. at meeting & at mr Isaac Clearks.
E Clear & Cool. I was at meeting; at mr Westons in intermision. Went to mr Hamlins at Evin g . at meeting & at Hamlins.

Clear. mr Ballard went to Varsalbboro. I went to Col o Norths, receivd 3/ on mr Edsons acount for attending his wife in travil May 12, 1787 & for Salve. it began to rain Evn. at Col o Norths & wido Williams s .

Clear. mr Ballard attended funeral of Polly Whealor. I got fixt to go but Jon o had wrode the hors away which prevented me. Clarrissa & Dolly went to mr Hamlins. Eph m very unwell. Parthena is better. [ ] Williams moovd to mr Voces. at home. Funeral of Polly Whealor at 4 PM.

Clear. I went to mr Westons & Colo Norths. Mag r Stickney is apprehended for missConduct in his partnership with mr Weston. Son Town, mr Learned, & 3 other men Sleep here. at Colo Norths & mr Westons. bot figgs, raisans& Tea & [Bais ]. paid y e cash.

Snowd morn, raind Evin g . mr Ballard went to y e hook. I have been at home. mr Black here for a Sartificate. mr Lee here this morn. my girls washt. I workt on my quillt. at home. Marriage mr H. Black was [sic].
Clear. I went to mr Hamlins & N r Andruses. Broth Moore & David Learned here. by the Latter we receivd Letters from Broth Collins & Doct Barton. at mr Hamlins. recd Letters from our friends.
Clear & very Pleasant. Levy Page here for his Sartificate. mr mc Night to have his Taxes abated. Welch works here. mr John Bragg & his wife Dind here. I have been at home. at home.

X. Birth Georg Boltons 3 rd Son & 4 th Child. XX. Clear & pleast. I was Calld at y e 12 th h to go to Georg Boltons wife in travil. mr Ballard went after his horse which was lent to Polly Savage. I waited 2 hours & mr Usher Came with Cap t Savages Mare. I Sett out alone & arivd Safe. my anxciety was great for y e woman, but I found her Safe. Shee was Safe Deld at y e 9 th h Evn & I returnd at 2. at Green Lodg.

A heavy rain. the river opend and the Bridge over this Crick went away. the underpining of y e North Side our house fell in, but we are yet alive & well for which we ought to be thank full. part of y e Dam gone also. A heavy rain, the river opend. I have been at home.
at mrs Husseys & mr Goodins. I finisht Cyrus s Stockins. at mrs Husseys & mr Gooding.
Clear. old mr Whiting & Lady here. mr Ballard & Polly Town unwell. mr Savage & wife here. mrs Porter came home with my Child n . at home.

Clear & Cold. Clarisa Barton & Parthena gone to mr Porters at winthrop. mr Ballard been to Town meeting. they have apointed a Counsel. I have been at home. Wido Williams Sleeps here. I wound quills & footed Eph ms Stockins. at home. Parthena gone to winthrop.

Clear & Cold. mr Ballard went to Doc t Coneys. I have been at home; finish t Parthena a pair of Stockins. Shee & Dolly went to mr Hamlins, Jona to Cap t Agrys. mr Savage & wife here. at home. Christmas.

Clear. 3 men took Breakfast, Eight persons Dind, six Supt. mr Ballard attended Coart. I have been at home. mr Porter & wife Came here, mr Fillbrook also. Clear. mr Ballard at Pollards. mr Porter and others Left here. it Snows. Clarrissa wrode on mr Towns Sleigh to Brot h Moores. mr Bal at Pollards. I was at home. I was at home. Clarrissa Came here thisnight. The Girls wrode in a Sleigh as far as pitts townlast Eving.
Over Cast part of ye Day. I Combd flax & went to mr Andrews s & mr Hamlins. mr Ballard went to mr Pollards on public Business. I was at mr Andws & Hamlins.
Clear morn. mr Smiley went from here, mr Ballard to mr Pollards. I have been at home. hear mr Floid has a Son Born. I have been at home.
Cloudy & Chilly, raind at Evin g . I have been at home. wid o Williams sleeps here. Cyrus Bo t 1/2 Bushel apples at mr Devnp ts . at home. Jona got Snuff.

Clear till aft n . Polly Whealor was removd from here to mr Livermores. I went with her. Shee was not much fatagud. mrs Liverm r Seemed Sorry Shee was brot there but used her very Kind. this the annevversary of my mariage, 34 years. I went to mr Livermores with Polly. John Savage threw Ephm Down on y e ice & abused him. Snowd.
Clear & Cold part of y e Day, a little Snow. I have been at home, finisht knitting Cyrus a pair of Stockins. I was at home. Snow.
Clear & pleast. mr Ballard been to Cap t Enoch Pages. Jona halling loggs to y e mill. Robbins workt here. I have been Combing flax. Revd mr Foster here. have b n at home.

Birth of Eben z Hewins Dag t , receivd 8/. A Severe Storm of rain. I was Calld at 1 h pm from mrs Husseys by Eben z Hewen. Crosst the river in their Boat, a great Sea A going. we got Safe over, then Sott out for mr Hewens. I Crost a Stream on the way on fleeting Loggs & got Safe over. wonderful is the Goodness of providence. I then proseeded on my journey. went beyond mr Hainses & a Larg tree blew up by the roots before me which Caused my hors to Spring back, & my life was Spared. great & marvilous are thy spareing mercies O God. I was assisted over the fallen tree by mr Hains. went on, Soon Came to a Stream, the Bridg was gone. mr Hewin took the rains, waided thro & led the hors asisted by the Same allmighty power. I got Safe thro & arivd unhurt. mrs Hewin Safe Delivd at 10 h Evng of a Dag t . went from mrs Husseys to mr Hewens. my Cloak was burnt while there so that it is not wareable.
I Sett our for Son Towns at 9 h 30 m morn. it raind by Showers all day. we arivd about 7 Evn, find them all well. I was much fatagud as the rodes were very wet & miry. I went to Son Towns.

Cloudy. I was Calld to Revd mr Fosters, his Lady unwell. was Calld to Thoms Hinklys wife in travil at Eving. a Boisterus wind & rain as I was on the way there. arivd Safe. at Revd mr Fosters & Tho s Hinkleys.
Clear & pleast. I went to mr Davis s & mr Westons. Dolly gone to mr Hamlins to help Strike a harnis. I was at mr Davis s . mrs Wilms Sleeps here.
Clear & pleas t . our Men rais d the Slip of y e mill. I have been at home. Gillb h & y e wid o Wilms Sleep here. I have been at home.
Cloudy & Some rain & Snow. wido williams Sleeps here. George Bolton let me have 4/6 worth of Sugar on [Franks] a Count. Snowd Evn. I was at home.
Clear & pleas t . Cap t Savages Lady here. Polly is very Low, pukt up all Shee takes. I have been at home. been a t home.
Cloudy, Cold & Snow d at Evn. mr Ballard very unwell. I was at home. we made Some Piess. at home. Snow.
Clear & Cold. I am informd y s Evn y t mrs Chandlers fitts were returnd & Shee was thoug t Dangerous. at home.

Clear & Cool. mr Ballard went to Col o Duttuns. Polly finisht my work & I paid her all I owd h r . Shee & my Girls went to mr Westons. they were informd that Cate Scott was pregnant. I have been at home. Polly Bisbee finish d my work & receivd her wages.

Birth Capt Norcroses Son. I receivd 6/. rainy. I Came from mr Hewins to mr Pollards. my hors mird & I fell off in the mud, but blessed be God, I receivd no hurt. mr Hewin attended me to mrs Husseys. w arivd at 11 h morn. mrs Nor Cross was in Travil, her women were immidiately Calld & Shee was Safe Delivd at 5 h 30 m Evn of a fine Son. her Husband & mrs Delino, & her Child n , went on board bound for Nantucket Early y s morn. Came from mr Hewins to mrs Husseys.

E Clear, not very Cold. I tarried at home. Colo Howard Came to see Polly Whealor, brot her Some Sugar. Shee Gave him an order on Moses Hastin for her wages Due. Doc t Colman here also. brot [ ] & Bisquits. wido Wilms & Charlotte Cool here at Eving. Cap t Savage & Lady & Isaac Savage, mr PresCott Sup t here. I have been at home. mr Foster Preacht from 1 Corint h 11 & 1 vers.
D Clear & Cold. I was at Revd Fosters. mr Ballard is Better, the Soar on his nose is Broke. Dagt Town & Dolly at mr Hamlins. Polly Savage here. Parthena at home. at Revd Fosters & N r Savages.

E X. Birth Mary [Lord] Savages Dafter. XX. Clear. I attended worship aftern & was Calld about the 6 th hour Evn to See polly Savage in Travil. Shee was Delivrd at 8. mrs Williams & I Came back to our house 12 & 40 m . William Haywood here & Supt. at meeting. & at mr Savages.
D Showers. my Dagt had a very high feaver fitt & Swet very much at Evn. I watcht [ ]. at Ditoes.

D Cloudy the most of y e Day. Cap t Enoch Page & his Lady here aftern n . Polly Bisbe went home. Jona atended her. Moses Pollard here for herbs & medisin for mr Hodges Child. I have b n at home. Snowd at Evn.

E X. Birth of Magr Sticknys Son & first Child. XX. Clear morn, Cloudy aft. I attended worship. Rev d mr Brow Williams preach t foren from the first of John 2 nt 6 verse [ ]. Revd mr mc Lain af t fr m Jobe 34 & 31.32. the result of ye Counsel was red. I went home with mr Jackson, his Dagt Stickney was Delivd at y e 11 h Evn of a Son. at meeting & at mr Jacksons. Put mrs Stickney to Bed. receivd 12/ of y e Mag r . Snowd.

D A very Cold morn, Snow d . I took my leav of mrs Hussey & famely. Came to mr Herseys, he and William Howard brot me from fort westorn by water. I left my patients Cleverly & found my famely well. it is the greatest freshet in this river y t has been this many years. I returnd home from mrs Husseys. Left my hors at mr Brookses.

D Clear & Cold. Doc t Whitaker preacht in the meeting house. mr Ballard attended fore noone, was So Lame he was oblidged to Ly on the Bed aft n . Clarrissa Barton here. Dolly & Shee attended worship aft n . I had pork & Veal & Greens for Dinner. Esq r Howard Dind here. I went to See N r Savage, he is mending. I was at N r Savages. Polly Wale Came here to work for me the weak insuing. a frost y s morn.
D Snowd y s morn, Clear Evn. Ben n Savages wife & her Broth Sup t here. I hear mrs Chandler is no Better. at home. Snowd.
Cloudy, Snowd at Evn. mr Ballard from home. I was at home. Savage Bolton Los t 1 Gal n of molases. it was found in Reuben Turners posesion. at home.
Clear & Cold. mrs Chamberlin & Levina Savage here. Dolly workt for mrs Hamlin. I have been at home this Day. Calld at y e 11 h Evn to mrs Black who is in Travil & was very ill. at mr Pollards.
Lucy had an ague & then a severe feaver folowd. at Ditoes.

Clear. I was Calld to See Polly Savage. Shee has an inflamation in her head & her throat Sore. we aplid a Blister to her arm & I returnd; went onto y e bed, was very unwell the ramainder of y e Day. mr Ballard went as far as mr Walls to See his Coalt, Los t a note after he past mr Andrews. Daniel Robbins Sleeps here. I applyd a poltis of Basswd to Manlys foot, it being Sweld. I was at N r Savages. a frost. mr Ballard began to plant.
a very rainy day. I wrote to Sisler Walers. mr Gille here. at home. wrote to Brot h Collins & Sister Sally.

Cloudy. mr Learned went from here to do Business with mr Cleark. Son Town & the men that were with him, wint Early f m here. mr Ballard is gone to Pitts town. Broth Moore Dind here. mr Learn d Sleeps h r . Jona Came [here], brot Loggs. I was at home.

X. Birth Capt Herseys Dagt. XX. Clear Except a Shower. I was Calld Early y s morn to See Cap t Herseys Lady. Shee was unwell, her women were Calld after n , & Shee was Safe Delivrd at 7 h 30 m PM of a Dagt. her sixth Child, 4 of y m Sons. I tarried all night, mrs Savage & mrs Voce also. I was at Cap t Herseys. I Lamed my footgoing over the Crick.

Clear & Cool. I Drest manlys wound, aplyd an Egg Cataplasm & Scraped horn. I feel a little more Comfortable my Self. I went down street, Calld at mr Savages. they are mending at mr Pollards, mrs Blacks Brest is soar. at mr Westons, his Lady is unwell. a woman by the name of Robbins informs She Saw Son Town last Lords Day, at mr Richardsons with his Dear Inf t . mrs Grant has taken it to giv it Suck, & his wife is a little revivd. I was at mr Savages, mr Pollard & mr Westons, & mr Craggs. A very great Frost y s morn.

Clear & pleast. mr Ballard pickt mill. I have been at home, finisht quilting the patches on my quilt. Parthena went to mr Hamlins to Stay with his wife. Woodw d Allin went away from here. Cyrus Bot 4 Dz n of Smelts. at home.

Clear & Cold. Wil m Hayward & Sister from winslow & Polly & Lidia Bisbee here. my Son & Girls went with y m to mr Thomasis. I receivd a Letter from Clarrissa. Daniel Stevens had a Son the 23 rd ins t . mrs Dudly oper tr . at home. mrs Savg here. recvd a Letter fm Clari ss Bart n .

XX. Birth mr Andws Dagt. XX. Cleard. mrs Savage here. Shee & I Reckond & Setled. I fall in her debt /6. mr Ballard been to And w Goodins for molases & Col o Duttuns for Potatos. Polly Savage here. I was Calld to See mrs Andrews at 5 th H pm. Shee was Safe Delivrd at 8 & 30 M Evn of a Daugter. I returnd at 12 percisely by our time piece. Left my patients Cleverly. my famely w s in Bed when I returnd. mrs Savage & I Setled. at mr Andrews.

Clear & pleast. I returnd at 2/O Clok this Morn, went to Bed & had a fine Sleep. mr Rheuben Branad here, Brot me 5 pecks of wheat for my being with his wife Feby 18. I went to mr Childs, Pollards & Westons. they were well as usual. at mr Childs.
Snowd y s morn; a very raw, Cold day. mr Smiley Came here to work. mrs Williams & Dan l Robbins went from here. I paid her 1/6. at home.
at mrs Husseys. at mrs Husseys.

Clear. Doct Coney & Williams Came to See my Dagt Town, Gave Directions & Left medisins. their opinion is that her Complaints are of a bilious kind which Causes a debilyty and universal weakness, but think Shee will recover with proper atendance & medicin. mr Eben z Haills Lady Came & Carried the Dear babe home to give it Suck. mrs Sally Stackpool watcht. Lucy Got Some rest. at Ditoes. a great frost. a t Ditoes, a frost y s morn.
Clear & Cool. I have been at home, wrote to Brot h Collins & Sis t Barton & Dag t Hannah. Jona bro t home Cod fish. at home. wrote Letters.
Clear morn, a Shower aft n . I have been unwell, but went to See mr Hamlins infant, its mouth is near heald. it Seems not so froward as it has been. I was at mr Hamlins.

Clear. I have been at home. mrs Hamlin here. I wrote to Sister Waters. Josep h Town Dind here, mr Ezekiel Page also. I receivd a Letter from Parthena which informs that Dagt is gitting better. Cyrus went to Doc t Coneys for medicin for her. at home. wrote to Sis t Sally.
Clear. mrs Williams here all Day. mrs Porter & Polly Bisbe here. Jona Killd an OX. I have been at home; did house work. I was at home.

Clear & very pleasant. mr Ballard is gone to Thos Smyles. I have been at home till near Sun Sett when Calld to mr Andros s , his infant was Sies d with fitts at 11 y s morn. I tarried all Night, Sally Chamberlin also. I was at mr Andros s .

Clear & pleast. mr Ballard at mr Pollards. Col o Duttun & mr Savage took Breakf t here. mrs Williams here. I was Calld to See mrs Hamlin, tarried with her all Day. mrs Chamberlin there. I have been at mr Hamlins.

Clear. Jon a went on board Cap t Getchel in Comp y w h mr Burton, Bound for Boston. mr Learned here. I went to the hook & mr Waids, receivd 6/ of him for attending his wife in travil April 4. I am very unwell Since I returnd. I went to y e hook.

Cloudy. I have been at home; heard y t Capt Agry got to Boston Las t monday. Parthena receivd a Letter from her mother of Oct 26 th informing they are well & Sister Nabby was Living. we Bakt mins Pies today. at home. wido Wilms Sleeps here.

Clear & Cold. mr Ballard a t Col o Norths Setling with the meeting hous Committee. I have been at home part of y e day. was Calld to See Nancy Savage aft n , Left her Some tinc t of Alloes, 1-1/2 oz, prs 1/X. Hannah Fletcher Del d of a Son 8 ins t .

Clear morn, Cloudy aft. mr Ballard went to And w Goodings for pork, his hors fell thro the ice at y e hook. Cyrus went to Col o Duttuns for potatoes. Jona killd his Swine, it wd 243 lb. mrs Savage here. I have been at home. I have been at home. rain.
Clear. mr Town & Barton went away with a rafft. I helpt my Dagt quilt, we got it out of y e fraim. Shee was unwell all night. mr Town gone. I was at mr Towns.
my Child is mending but has no use of her hipps & leggs. mrs Haill Came & gave the poor Babe Suck. Sally Dexter watcht. I had rest. at Ditoes. a frost y s morn.

rain y s morn, Cleard off & was very warm. Luke Barton & John Heartford here, took Breakfst. I Sent some Bisqui t , Veal, Codfish, Eggs, apples, Candles, an Earthen pott & Cham r Pott, & 1 Gal Molases. we Boild y n & Breued y s Day. mr Learned & John Bragg Dind here. Dolly Carried Polly Savage a pair of Cloath Shoes. I have been at home. mr Hodges bro t me 1 lb Cotten which was due to me for an Extract.

D Clear fore n , very warm. mr Learned here. I had roas t Veal for Dinner. Showers aft n & Evn g . I have been at home. Wall & Jabe Saw this night. I was at home. Hitty Davis [Deld] of a Son. mrsWinslow opr t .

D A fine, pleast Day. Lucy Can bare mooving a little better. Sherebiah is gone for the wido Williams to Come nurse her. Hannah Blossom Carried the babe to Suck. mrs hale, mr Eben z Haills wife, here fore n n & gave it Suck. its mammy has not but very little for it. her appetite is a little better. Biah mett my Son, Cyrus, & returnd, mrs Eunice watcht y s night. at Ditoes. a frost y s morn.
D rainy morn, Clear after n . Burtun, Haughton & Polly Savage here. I have been at home.

X. Birth mr Arnals Son. XX. Clear & pleast. I was Calld at 2 h morn to See mrs Arnall at y e hook. Shee was Safe Delivrd of a fine Son, that wd 10 lb 2 oz, at y e 4 h. I returnd 8. Left all Cleverly, receivd 6/ as a reward. mr Georg Brown informd me that Cap t Smiths wife had 2 Children Born Last night, they are dead. I was Calld at mid night to See mrs Hamlin, found her very ill. I wrode the hors which Hannah Hadskins had here. at mr Arnals. Hannah Hadskin Sleeps here. Snows ys Evn g . Eph m is 10 years old. at mr Hamlins.

A fine Day. mr Town & Cyrus Sett out at 8 y s morn. Lucy has been very weak & Low, her feaver Beat up again & her Left Legg Swells. my hopes are almost vanisht. I aplied a Blister to the Legg affected. I asisted Polly Stackpoole in takeing Care of her y s night. I gave the Babe Senna & Rhubarb. at Ditoes. a frost y s morn. Cap t Abram Pages wife had a Son Born 26 th inst.

Clear morn, Showers af tn with thunder. mr Learned took 4 m 400 Boards from here, Sleeps here y s night. I have been to Doct Colmans & mr Pollards. mrs Blacks Breas t like to Break. at mr Pollards & Doc t Colmans.
Snowd fore n , Clear aft n . Son Town Came here. I at home. at home. Snowd.

X. Birth mr Blacks Dagt. XX. Clear weather. mrs Black was Safe Delivrd of a fine Daughter at 5 h & 57 m morn. I returnd at 6 h Evn. Sherebiah Town and James Stackpoole here, informs that Patty Town had been very unwell, but is mending. the rest of y e famely are well. mrs Hodg had a fitt at her Dadys. at mr Pollards. receivd 6/ for Servis Done there.
D Clear. Dagt Town Calld her women, Shee was very unwell thro the Day & night. I did not Sleep much. at Son Towns.

Clear. mrs Howard & mrs Dexter to see my Dagt. Shee had an ague & feaver fitt & is reduced very Low, her Babe Exercised with much pain. I feel some fatagud, I am informd that mr Piper & one of his Children were Drownd, his wife & another Escaped with Life. at Ditoes. Piper & Child Drownd. Seth Wilms wife Deld of a Dagt.
Clear. I went to mr Westons, his Lady Lent me X[/6]X. [ ] Doc t Colmans had one thousand of Shingles. a number of young Ladys here at Evin ng . mr Learned Sleeps here.
rainy. Son Town & Barton Came down w h a rafft. mr Learned took a rafft of Bords to Capt Oakman. I have Combd flax. I have been at home.

Clear. I Came from Capt Herseys at y e 9 th h, Left his Lady as well as Could be Expected. I Calld to See mr Blacks inft, find it much better. Came home at y e 12 h . mr Learned here. Parthena Came home from mr Faughts, all well there. at Cap t Herseys & mr Pollards, & mr Westons.

I have been at home. Clear weather. Parthena returnd from Winslow, left my Dag t much more Comfortable. Shee Came by water with mr Josep h Town & mr Whealor. I have been at home. my Dagt Dollys [ ] death 20 years Since.
Cloudy. mr Ballard helping Cyrus. I have been at home. mr Savage & his wife here. at home.

A Storm of Snow. I feel dull, layd on the Bed & Slept a Little. was Calld by mr Hamlin to See his wife. Shee was very unwell thro the night. I had no Sleep. mrs Chamberlin there the latter part of y e night also. went to mr Hamlins at 11 [AM], wore my new Shawl.
I went to hamlins, his infant Sick; from there to Esqr Huseys. at Esqr Huseys.
at Ditoes. at Ditoes.

Clear, a frost y s morn. Doc t Coney Left this Bound for home. gave Lucy a potion of rhub & Sa t wormwd. Shee is very weak and helpless yet, her legg very much Swelld. Shee Complains of a pain in her right Sholder. at Ditoes. Doc t Coleman Calld at mr Towns.

A Storm of rain & Snow. Capt Haill & Sherebiah Town Brot Loggs. Son Town & mr Barton, & two young men, they all Sleep here. I have been at home. Dagt Town was very poorly after I Left her, but is nore Comfortable now. Snowd. I have been at home.

A Shower y s morn, Clear aft n . Doc t Whitaker here. I have been quilling yarn & Combing flax. Dolly weaving. my Dag t Tryphena Expired 20 years this Day since her Death. it was a very hott day & Continued So thro the Sumer. I have been at home. Anaversry of my Dag t Tryphenas Death.

Clear & Cold. the infant Expired at 5 h 30M Morn. I put on the grave Cloaths, went to mr Hamlins and then returnd. Augustus Ballard, Eph m Cowen, his wife & Lefe Savage, & mr Soal of winslow Dind here. the Latter informs that my friends at Oxford were all well y e 23 ult. I was at mr Andros s , his infant Expird. We receivd News from Oxford.

X. Birth mr Wades Dagt. XX. Clear & very pleas t . I was Calld between 12 & 1 y s morn to See mrs Wade. Shee was Safe Delivrd of a Dagt, which wd 9-1/2 lb, at y e 3 d h. I returnd at y e 9 th . Left all Cleaverly. Calld to see mrs Hodge & mrs Black. was Calld at 10 to See mrs Hamlin, find her very poorly. I tarried all day, Parthena also. Shee tarries y e night. Clarrisa & Taylor Sleep here, Burtun also. at mr Wades & Hamlins.
Some Showers. I have been at home. Dolly Spoold & warpt 38-1/2 y ds . Polly Wall went home aft n . mr Wall & Robbins tend y e mills ys night.
a Clear morn. I was Calld at the riseing of y e Sun to Sarah White, Shee being in travil with her forth Child, & is yet unmarried. Shee remaind ill thro y e Day. I was with Sarah White.

D Clear, Except a Shower. mr Ballard & I went to See George Browns Son georg, his right thigh is much Swild. he has been Confind five weaks. Polly Wall Came here again y s Evning. I was at Georg Browns.
D Clear & Cool. the Girls went to funeral of the infant above mentioned. it was interd Before they arivd. I was at home all day. I was at home. Funeral of mr Andrews s infant.

D XX. Birth Sarah Whites Dag t . XX. a Shower y s morn, Clear & warm after n . Sarah White was Safe Delivd of a Dagt at the 9 th h morn, & I returnd after n attended by her Father. find Ephm very Lambe. I returnd from mr Whites.

Birth Eph m Towns Dagt. Clear & very pleasant. Dagt Town was Safe Delivrd at 6 h 30 m morn. my Son went to Fairfield for mrs Hannah Blossom to nurse. mrs Dexter Came to see us. Lucy is as Comfortable as Could be Expected, the Child also. mr Barton Came up river, his wife went home with him. at Ditoes.

Clear & Cool. I was Calld to See mrs Rheed. Shee has been unwell this 5 weaks, Exercised with flying pains. I Calld to See mrs Hamlin, Shee is unwell with a Coald. mr True Cut his foot. Dolly & Polly wash t & Brued. I was at mrs Rheeds & Hamlins.

X. Birth James Savages Dag t . X. Clear morn, a Shower aft n . I was Calld a 8 th hour morn to See James Savages wife. Shee was Safe Deliverd of a fine Dag t at 7 h P m . I tarried all night, receivd my fee in Spining. at mr Savages.

Birth Hamlins Dagt. XX. Clear & very pleas t . mrs Hamlin Safe Delivrd at the 5 th H morn of a Dagt, wd 9 & 3/4 lb. I left her Cleverly & returnd at 5 PM. Clarrissa Came there. Parthena tarries y s night. at mr Hamlins.
Clear & Pleast. my Dagt Seems a little revivd y s morn. I thought proper to give a gentle potion of Senna, the Babe is very uncom. a t Dos. Parthena Barton Came here this day.

Clear morn. mrs Eunice Hodskins here. mr Learned & Doc t Whiteaker Sleep here. I have been at home. Revd mr Foster is removd from mr Thwings to the house where Joseph Williams formerly livd. friend Taber takeing Spruce Boards from this mill on Shereba h Towns acount, y s Eving. I wrote to my Dagt Hannah by mr Learned & Deliverd him 24/ to Carrie her to purchace things at Bos tn . I have been at home, wrote to my Dag t Hannah. Ephraim went to School. Ben n Porters wife Been here.

X. Birth Rubin Branards Dagt. XX. Clear. I was Calld to mr Branards wife in Travil at y e 9 th h morn. Shee was Safe Del d of a Dagt at 5 PM. I returnd at 8 Evn. Son & Dagt Town been to his Dadys. at mr Branards, Winthp.

Cloudy part of y e Day, a little rain. mr Town & Stackp l Dind then Sett out for home. I wrote to Lucy. mr Ballard gone to mr Smileys. mr Bisbee drank Tea here. I finish t Dollys Stockins and began Cyrus s . I wrote to Dagt Town; was at home.
rainy. Lucy is very ill, the infant a little Easyer. mrs Stackpool Came here & watcht. I rose but three times this night. a frost. at Ditoes. mrs [Bijes] Delvd of a Son.
D Clear morn. Parthena Came home, informs mrs Hamlin is Better. I went after n , find her much more Comfortable. mr Ballard Secureing Loggs. the ice breaking up in y e river. I was at mr Hamlins.
A rainy day. I Combd flax. mr Ballard went to pitts town, mr Learned to Hamlins. Son Town & Barton Brot a rafft & Sleep here; a Tozier Boy also. I have been at home.

Clear weather & Cool. old Lady Bolton & mrs Hamlin here. mr Ballard with the others appointed to Divide the Estate of the Late James Howard Esqr. Jona is gone to asist mr Livermore raise a House fraime. I have been at home. I was at home.
Clear & hott till Evn, when it began to rain at 10. Agustus Ballard & his mamy here y s Day, mr Foster & Lady allso. I have been at home. Jesse Bullin & Debe Black Sleep here.
Clear. I have been at home and finished mending my quillt. at home.

Clear & pleas t . mrs Hamlin is more Comfortable. I left her at y e 9 th H m , was Calld at half after 10 to See Mag r Stickneys Son who is unwell. returnd at 1 h 30 m Evn & went again to mrs Hamlins. find her much Better. Rheuben Moores famely here on thier way to Pittstown. at Dit[os] & mr Jacksons.
at Ditois. mrs Cox there. a rain. Son Town here, all well at home.
at Ditoes. at Ditoes.

Clear & pleast. my Dagt Seems a little more Comfortable. Parthena went to See the Babe, finds it very well. Cap t Haywoods Lady here yes tr Dy & Calld y s morn. I feel So much fatagud I am allmost ready to faill, But Sett with Lucy part of y e night; Parthena the oth r part. at Ditoes. a frost y s morn.
Clear. I attended Funeral of Lidia Bisbe at 2 h pm. Clarrissa Barton here. mr Ballard Came home. I attended funeral of Lidia Bisbe.

Clear & Cool. Son Town & the other Gentlemen went from here. mr Ballard went on the Business of Dividing the interest Judg Howard left. the Girls went to mr Westons. Polly Savage warpt a web here. I have been at home. mr Sprage Sent to me to go & See his wife, but being Some unwell I pospone it till to morrow. God willing, I Shall go. I have been at home.

Clear & warm. mr Sam l Cumings wife here. I had 7 lb Butter of her. I went to mr Savages. Polly bro t my Cotten y n home, 10 Double Skeins. Cyrus been to Pitts Town. the Agrys had 2 Vesels Came to the hook, bro t Corn. I was at mr Savages. Dolly got her webb out, 35/y d .

Clear, Hi wind. I was very unwell. mr Reed & wife here y s morn before I rose. they went to Doct Coneys. Jona killd the Calf. we lent mr Pollard 15-2/1 lb, mr Savage 5 lb, mr Hamlin 3-2/1. I was at home.
Clear & Cool. mr Learned & Son Dind. mrs Hardin & Clarrissa Drank Tea here. James Wall wounded Cyrus in y e fore head with a Club. I went to mr Savages to take Care of him. I was at Savages.
D Clear. I went to See mrs Sprage, find her very Low, but in not so much pain as Shee had been. I Calld to See mrs Jackson also. Shee is in a weakly Situation. I was at mr Sprages & mr Savages.

D Clear. my famely attended worship Except my Self & Cyrus. mr Learned & famely arivd here from oxford a 2 h PM. mr Burton & wife & Tommy Haywood took Tea here. I was at home. mr Learned & famely here.
D Clear. I was at home. we Dind on Pork & String Beans. mr Burtun & wife here. the Girls went to N r Hamlins. I was at home.

D Clear & hott. I attended worship in public, mr Jonston performd. Cap t Stackpool Calld Doc t Colman out of meeting to visit mr Flint Bartons Son. mrs Foot & Clarrissa here, mr Savage & his wife also. Cyrus had Corn to grind all Day. I was at meeting.

Cloudy. mr Ballard went to Town meeting. I went to Colo Norths. Calld at Revd mr Fosters. Isaac is recoverd of his Soar. Daniel Robbins Came here. welch dres t 9 lb 3 oz flax. I was at Revd mr Fosters & Colo Norths. mr Curtis here.

Clear. I was Calld at twelve O Clok to See mr Blaks infant, it is very unwell. I went to See mrs Burges, Shee is very ill able to be about. I Came home at Evn, find 10 men here which all tarrys y s night. they are Boating Colo Hadens goods. I was at mr Pollards & Capt Porters.

Clear & hott. I went by mr Andrews s , Desire to See his Son James, who has a Swelling on his right Side. applied a Cataplasm made of the yolk of an Egg, Honey & flower. went to mr Hamlins. Polly Savage warpt a piece here. mrs Woodward here at Evn. I was at mr Andws & Hamlins. we put our yarn out to whiten.
Clear morn, a Shower after n . mrs Hamlin here & mr Learneds famely. I have been at home. I was at home. mrs Porter here.
Clear. I went as far as mr Westons. Calld at other Neigh s , find y m well. had 1/4 lb Snuff of mrs Weston & a pair of Cards of mr Blak. I was at Westons, mr [Fosters], &C, &C.

Cloudy. I Left Son Towns at 7 th h morn acompanied by him, arivd at home at 2 pm. raind before we got home. I Dind at Colo Howards. find my famely all in health, happy Sittuation. Came from Son Towns.

Clear & very Coole. Dolly went away y s morn to See her Sister Town. John Coutch Bro t me 3 lb of wool which Satisfies me for attending his wife at her geting to Bed y e 6th of Feby Last. y e hefer Calvd. I was at home. mrs [Brown] & Savage here.

a Shower y s morn. I returnd home at y e 6 th hour, dress t Eph ms heel. Seth Juet Foster here, made me a present of a Blak Silk Hand kerc f . mr Ballard & Georg Bolton went to Cobecy for Some things Jona Sent from Boston. Son Town Came here, infms his wife is mending. at Ditoes.

X. Birth Stutely Springers Dagt. XX. Cloudy & Some rain. I was Calld to Stutely Springers wife in travil at y e 4 th h morn. Shee was Safe Delivrd of a Dagt at 3 PM. I returnd at y e 7 th h, Left my Patient as well as Could be Expected. find mrs Burtun here. I was at mr Springers.

Ezra Hodges Son Born. XX. Clear & not very hott. I was Calld in y e after n to See mrs Hodg who was in travil. Shee was Safe Delivr d about y e 10 th hour Evn of a fine Son, & 4 th Child, which wd 11-1/2 lb. mr Hodg is out at y e meddow. it is his 4th Child . I tarried all night. mrs Burtun here when I left home. at mr Hodges. I receivd 2 lb Cotten as a reward.
Clear. I wen t to See mrs Foster. Burten & wife & mrs Cooshin here. at mrs Fosters.

Cloudy & rain. Dot Whitaker left here very Early, mr Learned also at 1 h pm, the Later Bound for Boston on Board Capt Agery s . Dolly & Polly Cleaning house to Day. I was at home. mr Learned left here.
Clear. mr Ballard waited on me & Dagt Town to mr Westons. at mr Westons.
my Dagt is very ill indeed. mr Town & I took Care of her. at Ditoes. a frost.
