I Calld at mr Pollards; was informd that Sherebiah Town was Declineing very fast; he thinks he Shall not Continue Long in this world. I allso hear that Luke Barton was thought to be Expireing this morn. I went to Lecter & to mr Hamlins.
Clear morn. Doc t Williams was Calld to See Phile Petengail. he returnd & Sleeps here; informs his patient has got the Shingles. I have been at home.
Snow. I was Calld to Neig r Savages to See his wife, Shee being unwell. mrs Chamberlain & mrs Welch & my Self tarried all night. I was at mr Savages.
Clear & very pleas t . I was at mr Savages; finish t footing a pair of worsted hoes. a t mr Savages.

X Clear & very Pleasant. I was again Calld to See mrs Chamberlin. Shee remains very much Exercised with pain. I adminestred a Clyster which gave great relief. I went to See mrs Bolton; dind there. I finish t footing a pair of Stockins for Polly Town. I have livd to See 55 years this day. I was at mr Chamln s . this is my Bir th Day; 55 years old.

Clear. Cyrus & David went to Seek mr Preskotts Child y t was Lost. it was found alive. I Sowd parsnip & Carrot Seed in the Gardin by y e Barn. Ephm went to mrs Woodwards for half peck potatoes Shee gave him, & planted y m in y e Gardin. Shee was here, Drank Tea with me. Seth Pitts wounded him yesterd y . at home. Preskots Dagt found. mrs Woodwd here. Dolly got her web out.

C Clear & very pleas t . I Came home before breakfast. mr Foster & Smyle went home. The Doc t , mr Ballard & White to meeting. I went to mr Savages at Evn, his wife was afflicted with a pain in her teeth. The Doct & mr White Sleep here. at Dittoes. Hallowell, March 21 st 1791 Due to Ep h Ballard on Settlement with Parthena Barton from her /12/ 19 th Decem r to Sundry articles 1-16-2 Cred t by 6 months work @ L6 pr yr 3= -:- Feb y 15 th 1792 De tr to a hatt made & fitt to ware :6:
C Cloudy day, Snow at Ev n . I have been to See mrs Chamberlin; find her a little Easier. at Ditoes.
C Clear. I attended public worship after n . A gentleman by y e name of Tylar from Uxbridg performd. mrs Pollard here for herbs for Judy Heuston who is Sick at mr Blacks. a t meeting.
C Shourry this Day. mrs Ellis & Son here. David went home this morn. I have been at home. at home.
a Snow Storm. Shee is unwell. my Girls went to mr Pollards. at Savages.
Clear part of y e Day. I went to mrs Westons; spent y e aft n & y e Evn g at mr Craggs. mr Ballard Came there and acompanied me home. at mr Westons & mr Craggs.

Cloudy & Some rain. mr Ballard at Town meeting. Daniel Coney, Esq r Chosen to represent y s Town at y e General Coart. we receivd a letter from Brother Jon a of Ap l y e 21 st by mr Joseph White, informing his famely are well. Jon a Came home, brot 50 Loggs down. Wil m Haywood Came with him. mr Haills Children are mending. a t home. receivd a Letter from Brot h Moore of Rochester of Ap l 21, 1790.
Clear, a Cold air. I have been at home. my Dagts washt & Scourd y e Puter. at home.

Cloudy. Son & Dag t Town & I Sett out for Cap t Herseys y s af tn , but Saw a Cloud arise; returnd and there was a smart Shower. mr Ballard went to mr Carrs to a meeting to Chuse Juriers. mr Carr & mag r Goodin Chose for Grand Jury. Cap t Page & And w Goodin for petty &C. a t home.

X Birth. Isaac Savages s Son. XX. Clear. I was Calld to Savages Early y s morn. Shee was Delivrd of a Son at 3 h Evn. I tarried all night. Doc t Whitaker & Son Slept here. his hors fell down Bank, our men help t him up again. at mr Savages. Birth 4 th .

Clear & pleasant. I tarried at mr Craggs & asisted what I was able. my Dagt Dolly washt there, Judy Huston allso. mr Black & mr Ben t Sett there this night. the Corps were Coffind & Sett in the west room. purge & Smell very ofensive. at Dittoes. tarried all night.

Cloudy till y e 11 th h morn when the Sun Shone. mr Ballard & Foster gone to to [sic] a meeting of y e proprietors of the Town Ship Calld unity at the house of mr Carr. Neig r Savage informd me that the Revd Isaac Fosters Lady was Safe Delivd of a Dag t Last Evn g & is Cleverly. I have been at home; feel unwell. Cyrus Borrowed a 40 Sleigh of the widdow Coburn for Dolly to weav a pice for Ben n Porter. at home.

Cloudy, Some rain. Cyrus went to Esq r Fairwells, Jon a to winslow. mr Ballard Complains of pain in his back. Dolly Drew a piece thro Harnis & read. I went to Savages & made Soap pills for mrs Weston, & knitt Some. I was a t mr Savages.

X Birth. James Hinkleys Dagt. XX. Clear & more pleasant. I was at mr Hinkleys, his wife Calld her women & was Safe Delivrd at Sun Sett of a Dagt. her oldest Dag t in her 15 th year. Shee has 7 Sons & 2 Dagts. I watcht with her, mrs Cox & Davis tarried. at Ditoes. Birth 18 th .

Clear. I was Calld from mr Jacksons to mr Brooks s at 4 h m; his Lady & 3 Child n Sick with y e measels. I tarried the Day and night, Dolly watcht, the Childn s measles turnd. a t mr Brookses. my Sis t Debby Expird.
Clear. mr Ballard went to Pitts Town. I have been at home. we killd a Veal which wd 84 lb . mrs Bolton here. mrs Barton is makeing her Self a gown. at home.
Snow & a raw Cold air. I feel very unwell. Dolly began to weave a piece for towels. mrs Mosier & Son here for relief, having lost their house by fire. at home. mrs Mosier here.

Snowd fast this morn. Son Town went as far as mr Chamberlins; returnd by reason of the Storm. Sett out again after we Dind. mr Ballard & mr Child Settled this Day. the Sun Shone at 4 h pm. I am not So well as I Could wish; have been at home. a t home.
Clear & Cool morn. I went to See mrs Bisbee, find her mending. ms Becky is very unwell. it is a very Sickly time among us. a t mr Bisbes & wrote to Bro r Collns.

Clear. I have been at home. finisht Fosters Stockins, was informd he had wounded him self. mr Burtun & Lady here at Evn g . Suball Pitts here. Echobad Pitts informs his Brot h is very poorly with his wound. at home. Jona n was taken with a warrant, Ben t & Voce allso.
at mr Goodwins; am So much overcome with my illness & falague, I am but just able to walk the room. mrs Good n is very unwell. at Good ns .

Cloudy. I tarried at mr Porters till 2h pm, then Sett out for home; left my patient Cleverly. left mrs French & mr [Keeser] with her. I arivd Safe at home at 6. Cap t Betcher here informs his Lady is very unwell indeed. at mr Porters. Jona went to y e hook for Corn & Coffee.

Clear. Parthena is better but Hannah is not able to Sett up many muinits without fainting. Dolly so well that Shee work t in y e Gardin a little. we Sowd Beets, parsnips, Carrots & Onions. Eph m Planted Some Beans yesterday. at home. Hannah very Sick. mr Pitts here.
Clear. I went to See mr Savage, find him Easier. returnd [&] wed Garden all day, Except writing to Doct Barton & Bro r Collins Moore. at mr Savages. wrote to Doct Barton & Bro r Collins.

Clear & pleasant tho Somthing Cool. The Ladies went from here. my Son Jon a & the Girls went to Winthrop. mr Burton & his Lady allso. mrs Hamlin & her Little Dag t Rode here in the Sleigh with mr Burton. Sam l Peirce Dresing flax here. Foster & Ephm gone to mr And w Goodins for Hay. a t home. my Girls went to Winthrop.
Clear morn. I am Exceeding weak but Can git my Breath Easier. Gilbreath here helping Cyrus. mr Cragg, his Lady & her marm were So Kind as to Come to See me. it raind at Evn a little. at home. Sick.

Cloudy morn. Cleard at 10 h morn. I returnd at 1h pm. find mr Jones here & Dolly gone to mr Hamlins to help take Care of the Babe. mr Cragg attended me home. mr Ballard had a fall which hurt him Some this Day. Betsy here yet. mr Jones Sleeps here. at Ditoes. the ice Breaking up on the river.

Clear & pleasant. I have been at home. mr Dexter here; informs that Biah Town is wasting fast, that Nathan Haywood is mending & that a woman in their new Plantation Expired in Child bed last Lords Day, & Son Towns famely are well. mr Shuball Pitts here this night. Elisha Mathews had a Son Drowned at his Logg Landing as they were raffting Loggs. at home. a Death; Mathews s Son Drownd.

Clear & warm. I Returnd by Land, Excep t Crossing y e river; find all well at home. mr Mathews s Son was found floting on y e water at the hook this morn by a man belonging to Fairfield. at mr Whites. Mathews s Child found & interd at Col o Norths Burying Place.
Clear & Cold. mr Bolton took his mare to woods to be winterd. I have been at home. a t home.
Cloudy. Doct Williams makeing A Plan here y s fore n, went away aft n . I have been at home. a t home.

C a Clear, pleasant Day. Brother Town took Breakfast here; informs that his Son Biah is a little more Comfortable than he has been of late & y t Ephm s famely are well allso; y t mr Bartons funeral was to be attended at 1 h pm This Day. I have been at home. a t home. funeral of mr Barton. Genl Lithgo returnd .
C Clear & moderate. Parthena went to mr Porters at winthrop. I was at home. y e mare Came home. a t home.

C Clear. mr Ballard and thee girls attended worship,thee Church of Chester & Hollowell receivd thee Sacrament of ye Supper; and as many as has Consented to the result of a late Counsel and Could Consent to the articles of faith, the above mentioned Church have Sind were invited to join in receiving the ordinance. I was at home. mr Emerson Preacht in this Town.
Clear morn, Cloudy Evn. Parthena & Clars a Came here. Foster & Ep m went to medo. I have been at home; mr Ballard to y e hook. at home.

Clear & pleas t . William Haywood & Elesha Bisbe here. mr Ballard is gone to mr Westons to Settle with him. Esq r Cony returnd from Coart. I have been at home. Jabe Sleeps here. a t home. Esq Cony returnd.
Clear. I have been at home, hough d Cabbages, Cucumbers &c. mr Lee here, mr Dexter allso. Son Towns famely are well. Moses White Sent me 3 lb wool. at home.

Clear. mr Ballard went to mr Goodins for Seeds. Haywood & Savage Bolton went from here to Bring Down Loggs. Cyrus to Georg Boltons for him to Cum & help Jon a who is very unwell. I am atempting to Swett him which Seems to reliev him Some. Georg Brot a Barril of Pork from Bents for us. Jon a is very Sick. I Sett up to nurs him this night. a t home. Jon a is unwell.
Clear, a frost y s morn, a Cool air. David & Eph m began to plant our Corn. Patty planted pumpkin Seed. I have been at home knitting. at home.

Cloudy morn. Cleard at 8 h morn. my Child n left us Bound for home. Dolly went up with them. mr Ballard & mr Kingsbury went to Pitts town. I wen t to mr Arnals Store, bot 9 y ds Callimanco a 2/ pr yd. Calld on my return at mr Hamlins. he is returnd from oxford; his wives Sister Came with him. Cap t Weston Sleeps h r . we receivd Letters; 1 from Doc t Barton, 1 f m Br h Collins , & 1 fm Sister Waters by mr Hamlin. I went to the hook. we recvd Letters from Oxford & Charlton. I receivd 3/4 of mrs Walker in part of my fee.

Clear Except a Small Shower. mr Lee here to Settle with mr Ballard and Cyrus. I knit fore n, was ashing my Cabbages when mr Reed Calld me to See his wife. I arivd there about Sun Sett. mrs Woodw d , Ingerham and Williams were asistants. a t mr Reeds. mr Porter Brot Cyrus 16-1/2 lb lamb.

A very rainy fore n . Cleard of pleas t at y e 3 h pm. mr Ballard Bot two Bushels of Corn of meloy; gave 10/ in Cash. I have been at home. Foster went from here; he has not Eat anything here y s Day. Samuel Cumings Jun rs Son Drowned. a t home. Sam l Smith here for Sustenance for his father who is Sick. Death.

Clear & pleasant. I returnd home by water as far as mr Westons. Grien, Wilboro & Zilpha are unwell. I Calld at mr Pollards, his wife very unwell. I find my famely well as I left them. Gillbriath helping Cyrus. Cap t Howland Came up y s Day a t Ditoes. receivd 6/ of Ben Preskott for assisting his wife Feby 10 [] . A Child Lost.
Clear. I was at Dittoes. the wind N. I Sett up all night. mrs Brooks s disorder at y e height; her infant is Sick. mrs Church has it to nurs. at Ditoes.
Clear. we Dind on a Line of veal. mr Burtun & Lady, mrs Hamlin, Son & Dagt Town & mrs Barton Dind with us, mr Kingsbury allso. a t home.
a t Pounalboro; attended Coart. at Dito.

X Birth. mr Reeds 2 nd Son. XX. Clear. mrs Reed was Safe Delivd of a Son and her Second Child, both Sons, at Sun rise. I left her & inf t Cleverly & returnd home at 11 h fore n . wen t to Bed, Slept till 2 pm then went out & pulld flax. a t Ditos. mrs Reed Sent Ephm half a Chees, wd. 2-1/2 lb. Birth 21.
Clear & very Cold. I am a little Better than I was yester day. Foster had an ague fitt y s morn & remains poorly thro y e Day. my Girls got their web out. at home. Foster Sick.

Cloudy part of y e Day; the wind South. Vessels arivd in y e Eddies here. mrs Voce here on a visit. I feel a little more Comfortable. my Girls washt my gown s y s Day. mr Ballard is gone to y e hook. I finisht my Stockins I began 19 th inst. mr Ballard bot a Chees of mr Arnald. a t home.

A fine, Clear & pleasant Day. I have been at home. mrs Mash & mrs Page here. the old Lady informs me Shee has Extracted 756 Child n in y e Coars of her Practice. Son Town here allso; informs his wife & Child n are Exercised with the influen zy & that his Brother is very low. mrs Bolton & mrs Brown here. at home. mrs Mash & Son Town here. I Sowd Beet Seed.

Clear. I have been at home. workt in the door yard. mr Foster Sleeps here. informs that Esqr Hussey Departed this Life yesterday at 7 h Pm. mr Kingsbury at mr Burtuns. Jona & others had Tryal for pulling Westons old rack Down. it Cost him 24/. at home. Esq r Hussey Expird yesterday in prisson.
Clear Except a Shower a little before Sun Sett. I pulld flax. [&] went twice to See mrs Welch who is unwell. thee girls helpt me in y e after n . at mrs Welches.
Clear. I am at mr Goodins. feel very unwell yet. mrs Cox Sleeps there a t Dittoes.

Clear & very pleasant. I have a pain in my head by reason of my fatagues. mr Craggen here; took Breakfas t ; informs me Sherebiah Town is very Low. I was Calld to see mrs Belcher y s morn; find her a little more Comfortable Except her Breast which is Soar & painfull yet. I was Calld from there at 3 h pm to See mrs Andrews who is unwell; tarried there all night. at Cap T Belchers & mr Andrews S . Began a Stockin for Foster.

Clear morn; Cloudy aft n . mr Ballard been to the hook. mr James Page Dind here; his Son Came to work here. mrs Hamlin & Burtun here. Hannah has Sett up Some this after n . I have been at home. Sowd peas & planted Beens & potatoes. a t home.
Clear. I wrote to Brother Elijah & Sis t Walers. mr Ballard at the hook. my girls washt. I workt in my garden. a t home.
Clear part of y e Day, some Showers. I pulld flax. the girls help t me aft n . David Page came to work here. at home. Hannah is 21 years old this day.
Clear & Cold morn, the wind at S after n & very Chilly. our folks returnd from Winthrop. I have been at home. mr Burtun & Lady here. Polly Savage been here. a t home.
Cloudy. I am Easier but very weak. at home.

Cloudy morn. Sun Shine before noon. mr Ballard Gone to Settle with Cap t Hersey. Hannah Putt Soup on to Boil this morn. I am informd that a mrs Cragg of winthrop Departed this life the weak past. mr Andrews gave me a Lemmon y s Day & mrs Hamlin gave me a piece of Veal. at home. news of a Death. there was a Drowned Lad taken up at y e Chopps in this river.

Cloudy, began to rain jus t at night. Parthena went to mr Foots. Hannah is at mr Hamlins. I have been at home, am not so well as I Could wish. am informd mrs Bisbee is very Sick & Sam l Badcoks wife. they have y e measels. at Cap t Belchers & mr Brooks s . at home. wrote to Broth & Sist Barton. Hannah returnd. Parthena went to mr Foots.
A rainy Day. mrs Page and Dag t here till near night when it Ceast raining & they went to mr Shaws a t the hook, and I hough d the plants before the door. at home.
Clear & hott. I work t in the Gardin. Parthena went to mr Densmores to get a Goun made. Leu t Learned Came here y s Evn. we had a thunder Shower at Evn. a t home.
Clear. I pulld flax foren, went to See mrs [Reed] aft, who has had an ill turn & is gott Better. I receivd a Letter from Brot h Davis of June 14 th . at mr Reeds. recd a Letter.

C Clear & very warm. Parthena went to mr Foots, Hannah went as far as mr Bisbes with her. Calld to See mrs Wood wd who is Sick with the measels. I was Calld to See mr Isaac Clearks Lady who was Seisd with Pukeing & a Disintary attended with Severe pain in her Stomach. I gave her Some annis Seed Decoction with Manna Dissolvd there in and after wards 4 Soap pills which Expelld thee wind, & gave relief. at mr Clearks and watcht with his Lady. mrs Jackson tarried there allso.
C Clear. mrs Page Calld here, has left her Dagt at mr Shaws. old mr Pitts Drank Tea here. at home.
C Clear after n . mr Ballard is gone to the hook y e Evn g Jos Foster here. Cutt a pair of Shoes for Seth Foster. at home.
C Clear. I attended worship in Public this after n . the Service was performd by mr Cornwill. at meeting.
C Clear & Pleasant. mr Learned was here; took Tea & went to Varsalbor o . I have been at home. Jobe Sleeps here. Ephm s tooth aich t . a t home; unwell.
C Showers this Day. Leu t Learned went from here after Dinner. I have been at home. a t home.
C Clear. I was Calld to See mrs Burjes who has the Collic. mrs Cragg was in Travil. I was Detaind there all night. mrs Braly Sent for me. they Could not Consint I [Sh d ] go. at mr Craggs.

C Clear. the wind to y e Suthard but very Chilly. I have been at home. Parthena returnd from Varsalbor o ; informs me Broth h Moores infant is very Sick. mrs Bisbee is a little revivd. at home. Parthena returnd.

X Birth. Diah Prescotts Son & [ ] Child. XX Snow. mr Bullin & his Dag t Pally here. I was Calld to see the wife of Jedediah Prescott of Winthrop at 1 h pm by Stephen Pullin; he was 2 & 1/2 hours from home till his return with me. the good Lady was Safe Delivrd at 10 of a fine Son. I tarried all night. a t mr diah Prescotts, Winthrop. Birth 13th.

Clear & Pleasant. we were informd that mr Pollard had broke his Legg this morn. I am Calld to See mrs Burton who is unwell. Son Town is Coming with Loggs, our men gone to meet him, it is 12 OClok. mrs M c Cathney, mrs Black, Judy Huston, Polly Pollard, Nr Savage & wife took Tea here. mr Stratten, Son Town & Robs n , Dexter Dind here. my Dagt & famely well. Biah Declineing, Nalhan Haywood mending. a t home. mr Pollard Broke his Legg.
a fine rain. Jon a Planted Corn on his farm fore n . I hear mrs Bisbe is wors. mr Anderson & David, Ephm & Savages Boys workt for Jon a foren.
Cloudy, rain aft n . I wed gardin till after n , then went to see Polly Savages Child, it is Burnt. mr Ballard is gone to the hook Doc t Coneys. William Haywood Sleeps here. at mr Savages.

Clear & Cool. mr Ballard went to mr Pollards on Business with thee Select men. Broth r Moore Came home w with him, took Supper & went home. thee girls Been to mr Hamlins. Hannah tarries there. I have houghd y e Cabages before the Door. at home. my girls to mr Hamlins. Bro r Moore here.

Clear & warm. I returnd home, Left my Patient much more Comfortable. find Son Town here on my return, his famely are well. Doc t Williams and Son & Collins Moore Sleep here. at Dittoes. receivd 1/2_ for y e medesin& time Spent.
Clear & pleast. mr Ballard Sett out for Unity. Hannah washt. I Did the hous work. mrs Burtun and Hannah Rockwood & Rachel Savage Drank Tea here & had green Peas to Carry home. at home.

Clear. mr Ballard Sett out for Unity on the Business of Lotting out the Town Ship. Juet Foster with him. mr Brown & his wife here. Reubin & Richard Moore Sleep here. Hannah is gone to mrs Woodwards to watch. at home. mr Ballard Set out for Surveying.
Clear, a frost y s morn. Hannah washt. I Did hous work & Gatherd Seeds & flowers in the Gardin. at home.

Clear. Cyrus went to Pitts town. Bot 1 oz Beet seed & 1 oz parsnip; gave 1/ pr oz I planted y e Beet. Jon a informd me he Saw Wil m Hurd; he left Oxford 7 Days ago. Mother Ballard & Polly Kingsbury were thought to be not long for this life when he left there. at home. had news from Oxford.

Clear. mr Ballard went to wins low. I wed Garden & went to See mr Savage. he has a pain in his Ear. we laid on 2 Blisters, one on his neck & 1 on his arm. his wife Came here at 9 Evn, Says he is very much Exercesed with pain. a t mr Savages. Broth r Eben zr inft Deceast this Day.
Clear till after n , a little rain. I went to See mr Andrews s infant, it has a Soar mouth. my Girls planted Cucumber & million Seeds. at mr Andrewss.

Clear morn. Some Cloudy af t wds. I returnd home after helping mrs Brooks up & Changing her Linning. I went to Bed & Slept after I Came home. they were fireing a Cannon y s Evn g below here this Evn g . a t Dittoes. my Sis t DebeDavis interd. I got the news 24 th inst.

Clear. I rose before Sun rise. mr Town & mrs Barton went to Pitts Town. we receivd a Letter from Broth r Barton of y e 13 th ins t which informs that his famely are well; that my Dear Sis t Debby Davis Departed this life y e 8 ins t & was interd y e 10 th . Shee has left a Husband & Seven Children to moarn y e loss. my Hon d marm Ballard & Polly Kingsbury were then living. at home. receivd a letter from Doc t Barton of 13 inst.
a t Ditto; attended &C, &C. at D o .

Clear. I went to Saml Cumings s & paid her 18/ which was her Due for Cloath I had of her, & returnd a yard that was left. I Calld at mr Hamlins, Burges s & mr Craggs. Dorcas Pollard & Alice Burges here on a visit. a t Saml Cumings & mr Craggs.

Cloudy morn. mr Ballard gone to Survey for mr Purkins at Varsalbor o . on his return informs Sister Moore had a Son born lately. my Girls been to mr Craggs & other Neighbors. the babe has a [soar mouth]. I have been at home.
Clear. Son Town left here aft Breakfast. I then wrote to Sis t Waters & Brot r Elijah and Sent by mr Hamlin who Sett out for Oxford this aftern n . a t home. wrote to Brot r Elijah & Sis r waters.
Clear. I have been at home. workt in the yard again; feel fatagud. mr Ballard gone to Pitts town. Wil m Haywood here; informs Sherebiah is yet alive but very low. at home. Burial of Esq r Hussey.
Cloudy, raind at Evn. mrs Good n was more unwell. we Sent for mrs s Bullin & Cox. they & I Slept to gether y s night. at Dittoes.

Clear. mrs Andr s is a little more Comfortable. I left her at 10 in y e morn. Parthena went to mr Porters. my Girls to help mrs Chever quillt. Dolly was Siezd while Shee was gone & Came home very sick indeed. I Balh t her feet & attempted to Swet her. James Stacpool Sleeps here. mr Ballard been at Col o Norths to Settle for his Surveying the fall past. at mr Andrews s . Foster is at work here. Broth r Town is Sick. I Sett up with Dolly till after mid night.

Cloudy. I Sowd Some redish seed. mrs Child Sent for me to see her. I find her very unwell. I Calld at mr Pollards. they are Better a t mr Craggs, find Polly Bisbe very unwell there. returnd at Evn; find mrs Brown here. Shee is much more Comfortable than Shee has been. at mr Childs s Pollards & Craggs. Hannah is Cleverly this Day.
Clear. mr Ballard at Col o Howards on Business. I have workt in y e Garden. James Clearks wife Dind here. mrs Brown here for her hatt. a t home.
C Cloudy & Some rain, a Chilly air. Jon a returnd from Winslow; informs y t Sherebiah is Extreamly Low, that Son Towns famely are well. I was at home James Hinkleys, his wife was Sick.
Clear. Danl Robbins took Breakfas t . mr Dexter Dind here. I have wed gardin & Sett Plants all Day; feel very weary. Juet Foster work t here. a t home.

Clear. mr Ballard & I, mr Pollard & Lady & mrs Hodges went to mr Bullins, had what Cherries and Currents we wisht for & other handsome Entertainment. Hannah went to mr Dinsmores. at mr Bullins. mr Walkers Son Expird this morn.

Rainy fore n , Clear part af tn . Doc t Wil ms & Son, mr Moore took Breakfas t & Dind here. I went ou t after 3 h pm, hilld my Cabbages before y e Door then gatherd 2 pails full of Pees & helpt Shell them. at home.
Clear. Hannah went to mr Blacks to help quilt a Coa t . I was Cleaning the Seller this after n . a t home.
Clear. Hannah returnd. I went to Savages to See Isaac. mrs Pollard, mrs Hodges & mrs Norcross here. at Savages. mrs Pollard here.

Clear & pleast. I gatherd green Pees in our field. mr Bullin & his Lady Dind here. he went to town meeting. Shee tarried till after Tea. I walk t as far as mr Savages with her. at mr Savages. mrs Bullin here.
Clear. I went to See mrs Benjamins Dag t . it is ill with a Cold & worms. the Girls Spinning Yarn for mr Ballard Some Stockins. at mr Savages.

C Birth. And w Goodwins Son. X Cloudy. mrs Goodin Calld her women & was Safe Delivrd of a fine Son at 12 O Clok & is Cleverly. I watch with her & feel much better than I have Done. a t Dittoes. Birth 15. my Son Jon a has Seen 27 years y s Day.
C Clear. I have been a t home. mr Seth Williams Drank Tea here. at home. Death of Sherebiah Town.

Clear. I returnd from mr Hainses by the way of y e hook; dismist the Lad which acompanied me at mr Wades. Calld to See her Child. lift it Some tinchture. Calld at mr Hodges, Jose unwell; at mr Westons; all well at mr Savages, Polly Better. Cyrus Delivrd me Letters, one from Broth Elijah of Sep t 4 th / 90, 1 from Sist Walers of y e 5 th and 1 from Doct Barton, same date, informing my friends ar well Excep t Col o [Jewns] wife. a t mr Hainses, Wades, Hodges, Westons & Savages.

X Birth. James Burtuns Son & first Child. Clear. I went from mr Burtuns aft n . Calld to see the School. went to See mrs Weston, from there to see Fanny Hodges who is Sick; returnd home in y e Evn. was Calld back to Burtuns, his wife in travil. Shee was Safe Delivrd of a Son at 11 O Clock and is Cleverly. I tarried & watcht. at Dittoes. Birth 24 th . firs t born.
Clear. I have been unwell y s Day. my girls wash t & went to mr Hamlins. Joseph Preskott had a Dag t Lost in the woods wendsday last & [ yet ]. at home. mrs Savage here.
Clear. mrs Shaw here. I have been at home. mr Ballard returnd from Surveying. at home.
Clear. mr Town & mrs Barton returnd. they, with my Dagts, Parthena, and mr Kingsbury went to mr Burtuns. I helpt Clean away y e Doer Durt. Ephm Sett Cabbage plants. a t home.
a t Ditto; attended &C, &C. at D o .
I have been Shelling out mustard. mr Page here. Hannah went to mr Kenadys. Cyrus to the hook, bot 2 lb. wool. at home.
Cloudy & some rain. Dolly is gone to Winthrop. I have been at home kniting & helping Carry Chips into y e gardin to burn. at home.

Showers in y e morn; Clear the rest of the Day. I have workt in y e garden. mrs Woodward & mrs Reed here. I made 10 D zn Candles. mr Ballard Bot 2 yds Cloath of Cap t Rodgers; Price 15/ pr y d . at home.
C Clear & Cool. I have been at home. a t home.

a little rain. I left mrs Goodwin & Child Cleverly. Calld to See mrs Cragg. Shee is not So well as I Could wish. arivd at home at y e 10 h morn, find Foster is returnd. I went to mr Craggs, administred a Clister of milk,water & Salt, applyd ointmint & a Bath of Tansey, mugwort, Cammomile & Hysop, which gave mrs Cragg great relief. Calld at mr Savages, gave Nancy a Dose of Salt & water which Causd her to puke. Shee threw up two worms and seemd Easier & I Came home. a t Ditoes & mr Craggs. receivd 6/ & 1 yd of gaus of Goodin. at mr Craggs & Savages. Capt Sewall, Carr & Goodin Chose into the ofis of Select men.

Clear. mr Ballard went to y e hook to a meeting of the Proprietors of unity. I went to mr Hamlins & the Fort. Old Lady Howard is very Low with the influenzy. I was at Col o Sewalls. find Son & Dag t Town & wid o Barton here when I returnd. Gillbreath here. 4 men from Washinton. David Page here to work. Calvin Edson was Drowned in this river this night. he attempted to Cross & it is Supposd he fell asleep & fell over Board. I was at Fort Western & other Neig sr . Edson Drowned This Evng.

Cloudy & some Rain. mr Kingsbury Left here Bound for Oxford. mr Ballard went to y e hook. mrs Harris here on a visit. Capt Stackpool here, informs that Sherebiah Town Expird last Evn between 11 & 12 hours. he is to be interd to morrow. y e Cap t allso informd y t a mr Lues was killd by a Limb falling of a tree; that a man at Penopscott hangd him Self & a nother at Boston Shott himself. I have been at home. I have been at home.

Clear. I wed gardin & went to See Georg Chamberlin; left him Some tinckture of aloes. mrs Savage there. Shee Calld here. mr Ballard been with the Committee on the road. Foster here to work y s Day. a t mr Chamberlins. there was a Shower in ye night.
Clear Except a Shower. I have workt in y e Gardin. Hannah gone to have a goun tried on. Clarrissa got her web out. a t home. mr Walkers infant was interd.
Clear. I helpt Hannah do hous work fore n, houghd in y e East gardin after n . Hannah washt the floors & Scourd ye Puter. at home.

A rainy Day. I finish t Cleaning the Seller, and knitt Some. mr Ballard returnd from Unity & went to Col o Howards on Business. mr Titcom & Calvin Ballard Dind. mr Robbins & Silva Moore Sup t here. at home.
Clear. I harvested my Gardin Pees. Hannah went to mr Hamlins. I was Calld this Evn g to See mr Sam l Norcross s wife who is in Labour; had her women with her all night. at Saml Norcross s .
Clear. mr John Jones & Stephen been here y s Day. I have mended Stockins & gatherd Seeds in y e gardin. at home. John Jones here.
Clear. I have been takeing Care of my Seeds. I receivd a Letter from my husband; he was well yesterday. a t home.

XX Birth. Cap t Husseys Son. XX. Clear. Capt Husseys Lady was Safe Deld of a Son at 11 h morn. I returnd to mr Whites at 4 Pm, tarried all night. Left my Patients Cleverly. mrs NorCross Left here yesterday for Boston. the new Born inft wd 10 lb. a t Capt Husseys. Birth 25 th .first Born. receivd 6/ May 10, 1791 by Sally Hussey.

rainy. mr Chamberlin Calld me to See a wound his Dag t Polly had on her right Legg. I Dress t it with lint and Spirrit. W m Haywood & Polly Bisbe here. my Girls wen t with them to mr Burtuns. mr Ballard been to y e hook to a propriators meeting. I was Calld in great has t to See mrs Hamlin who was in a fitt. I walk t there, applyd Vinagar to her Lips, temples & hands & Onions to her feet & Shee revivd. I tarried all nigh t . mrs Edsons inf t Expird Last night. at mr Chaml n and was at [ ] to See mrs Hamlin who had a fitt. Death.
I returnd. Calld a t mr Blacks and Dind. was Calld at 9 h Evn to mr Snells, his wife in Travil. mr Winslow attended me, arivd there before 11. at Ditoes & mr Snells.

Cloudy, raind at Evn g . I have been at home. help t Cutt up & take Care of the beef, and knitt Some. we brot 26 Cabbages into the Seller from before y e Door; got Beets & Carrots in allso. Hadlock was Executed this Day. at home. Hadlock Executed. John Trask Expird.
rainy, Cleard of at Evn g . the Saws go Briskly. mr Rawson workt for Jon a . I have been at home. Dolly got mrs Boltons webb out and took y e Loom Down, there was 30 yd s . at home.

C X Birth. Mag r Stickneys Dagt. XX. Clear & hott Day. I was Calld by mag r Stickney at half after two y s morn. Shee his Lady was Safe Delivd of a dagt at 5 h Evn. I was Calld from there to See mr Ezekiel Pages Lady; find her Sick with y e influenza. administred Some thing for her relief & returnd to mr Jacksons at 11. Tarried all night. Took Care of my patient. at mr Jacksons. Birth 20 th . receivd 6/.
Clear Day, rain a t night. I was Calld to Cap t Husseys at 1 H pm, had an ill turn there. mrs Goodin there this afternoon. a t Cap t Husseys.
Clear. I was at mr Burtuns all Day & night. Dolly Came there to nurs his wife. a t Dittoes. Dolly allso.

Clear & very pleas t . we dugg our Parsnips. I have been at home, finisht Hannah a pair of thread Stockins. receivd a 1/4 of a Dollar and a pisterrene of mr andrews, in part for attending his wife y e 9 th of may last. I had 1/2 Bsh l wheat in august, price 3/. there is /3-1/2 Due to me now. a t home.
Clear fore n , Cloudy aft. mr Reed here. mrs Woodward allso. I have work t in y e garden part y e day. at home.

A vere fine rain. I helpt transplant Beets & Cucumbers. mr Town & mrs Barton went to Judg Bomans office. Shee took administration on her Late husbands Estate. mr Edson was Drowned 21 inst & taken up y s morn. a t home. Funeral of Calvin Edson who was Drowned the 21 st inst.
a t Ditto; attended the Cause between this Common welth & Jo North Es q ; was tried & given to the jury. a t D o .
Clear. I have been takeing Care of Gardin Matters. a mr Warrin of Varsalborough Sleeps here. he is from Rochester, Las t may when he Saw Bro r Moore, his famely well. a t home. mr Warren here.

Clear the most of y e Day. we were greatly alarmd this morn with fears y t my little Son was Drownd Crossing the mill Pond. he was Sent to mr Savages but mistook his Directions & went to mr Childs s . mr Jones was here this Day. his man Richardson Sett out with his rafft, got hicht on a rock & returnd, tarries for y e next tide. Dolly and I made Eph m a pair of Trousers. mrs Polly M c Kethney & Judy Hueston here, Drank Tea with me. at home. mr Jones here. two men from Sandy river Sleep here. we were alarmed about Ephm.

C Clear and Cool. I attended public worship. Deacon Coney made y e 1 st prayer, Esq r Petingil y e Last foren n . Col o Sewal y e 1 st aft & red Doc t Dodridges Discoarses, mr Liverm n Last prayer, but few attended. Polly Bisbe Came here to help us. a t meeting. Richardson went from here with his rafft.
C a t Pounalboro. went from mr Hatches after meeting to mr Kiders at Eastern river. a t D o & mr Kiders.
C Cloudy & Some rain. I have been at home. the Seeds begin to Cum up in ye gard n . at home.

C Cloudy. Leu t Hains Learned took Breakfast here, and he and his [ ] Brother left here. y e Cap t Bound Directly to oxford. mrs Betsey Howard & mrs Colman Sent Some things here for Polly Taytor; wine, Sugar, apples, Bread and fine linning raggs. it began to rain before 9 Ev n . at home. Cap t Learned Left here. therewas a meeting at Abisha Cowens y s Day.
C Clear and pleas t . we Dind on a Turkey of Jon as providing, mr Hamlin & Patridg here. the Girls went home with them. I have been at home, a fine Evn g . at home [ ] Clear [we ].
at Dittoes. raind all Day. I tarried y s night; watcht, my patient Exercised with Pain. at Ditos.

Clear. I have been at home. Josiah Kingsbury Came here; informs me Mother Ballard was alive & more Comfortable the 2 n inst. mr Foster Sleeps here. Jona n & y e Girls went to mr Burtuns with our kinsman. at home. mr Ballard went to Pitts Town.
at mr Kiders. mr Ballard attended Coart. North acquited to the great Surprise of all that I heard Speak of it. a t mr Kiders.
Clear. the Girls quilted a Bed quillt. & went to mr Craggs; Spent Evng. I went to mr Westons, Bot 3 dz needles, 1-1/2 lb Sugar. Calld at mr Craggs & Savages. at mr Westons. Polly Bisbe here.

Cloudy fore n , Clear & very pleas t aft. I helpt Eph m and John Savage gi t french Turnips in & Some Cabbages. & knitt Some. Dolly finisht weaving Cyrus s Cloath, wove it at mr Hamlins; there was 8-1/2 y ds . mrs Woodw d here; informs me Hannah North is mending but very weak indeed. at home. raind.

Clear and pleas t , muddy walking. I went to mr Westons, Bot for Polly Taylor with money which mr Jackson gave for her; 1 lb rasons, 1 quart molases and 28 Bisquit. my Girls washt. a t mr Westons. he gave a pint of W E Rhum for Polly Taylor.

Clear. I Left home Early Bound for Pounalbor o ; mr Ballard allso. we went on Board Leut Pollards Boat. Stopt at Pitts town. got to mr Hatches where we took Lodgings During the Coarts Setting. went into Coart aft n . a t Coart.
C rainy. mr Warrin left here af tr Breakfust. mr Gillman returnd from Surveying, left mr Ballard well yesterday. Hannah Rockwood & Dolly here, inform me mrs Burtun is very Cleverly. a t home.

Clear. my Girls had Some Neighbours to help y m quilt a Bed quilt. 15 tn Ladies, they began to quillt at 3 h pm, finisht & took it out at y Evn. there were 12 Gentlemen took Tea. they Danced a little while after Supper, behavd Exceeding Cleverly; were all returnd home before y e 11 th h. a t home. we had Company.

Clear & Pleasant. I Left my patients Cleverly and returnd at 11 hours morn. mr Cowen let me have 3/4 lb Tea and 1 lb Sugar. I began to foot a pair of hoes for mrs Pollard. Set up Late to work. at mr Cowens.
Clear. Foster went from here this morn. I have work t in y e Garden all Day. mr Ballard is gone to mr Pages y s aftern. a t home. Sett Plants.

Clear. I have gatherd herbs for Sickness. we had String Beans and Green Peas; the first we have had this Summer. Patty sick in the night, pukeing & purging. a t home. Caton was married to Sally Chamb n .
Clear & very hott. I wed the Gardin by y e Barn. we had Cucumbers from our own Vines. Cyrus went to Varsalbor o . I have been at home. Widdow Ballard here.
raind till near night. mr Ballard went to the hook. mr Reeds Sister here on her way to See him. I have been at home kniting. Juet Foster Sleeps here. at home.

X Birth. Saml Norcros ss Son. XX. Cloudy part of y e day & Some rain. my patient ill all day. Shee was Safe Delivd of a Son at Six O Clok Evn. I tarried all night. And w Goodwins wife was there. at Dittoes. Birth 22.

Clear & hott. I have been Doing work in my gardin, hilld Cabbages. Will m Haywood here, bro t a Letter from Dolly this Day. shee is 18 years old. Son Towns famely are all well. a t home. Dollys Birth Day; She is 18 years old.
Clear. Cap t Hussey here. I went to mr Hamlins, his wife unwell; her Sister here. Son Town, mrs Barton & mr Burtun Drank Tea here. raind in y e night. at mr Craggs & Hamlins. Son Town here.

Cloudy, rain at night. mrs White Sent for her women. they were with her all night Vis old mrss White, Norc ss , moses & Benn Whites wives; Jackson, Stickney, Coburn & Lidia, his Sister. I Slept not this night. my [patient] very ill. a t Whites.

rainy till near night. I returnd from mr Hamlins y s morn. left her Better tho weak. mr Baker of Unity Dind here. mr Ballard & he made a Settlement and he receivd an order on y e proprietors Collector for his Due from mr Ballard. mrs Edsons Child interd y s after n . a t mr Hamlins. Funeral mrs Edsons Child. Hannah puting in Cyrus s webb.

X Birth. Snells Dag t . XX. Cloudy Some part y e Day. I was with mrs Snells who was very ill thro the Day and was Safe Delivd at 9 h Evn of a Dagt, her first Child. mrs Cox, Bullin, Blanchard, Brown and mrs Winslow attendants. a t mr Snells. Birth 27 th .
Clear & pleas nt . I have been at home, not So well as I Could wish. mrs Woodwd Drank Tea here. at home.

X Birth. Ezra Hodges 3 d dagt & 5 th Child; the first was 5 y s old y e 10 of Sep t last. XX Clear part of the Day & very Cold. I am informd that Jona & others who were attempting to go Down with a rafft were inclosd by the ice at Bumber hook Point. thee ice makes very fast. Doc t Williams & his Son here at Evn. Could not pass with y r Horses, left y m here and went to mr Pollards. I was Calld at 8 h Evn to See mrs Hodges in Labour. her women were Calld and Shee was Safe Delivrd at 10 h and 30 m Evn. mrs Pollard being unwell Did not arive till the moment the Child was Born. the Ladies who assisted took Supper after all our matters were Completed, & retend home about 12. mrs Pollard and my Self tarried all night & Sett up. mrs Hodges rested finely, y e inft allso. at mr Savages and mr Hodges. thee ice Stopt at Fort Westorn. Birth 29 th . Sam l Dawin fell thro y e ice as he was attempting to go of y e rafft to y e Shore, but was Savd by their geting to him with a Cannoe & takeing him in.
Clear & very Pleasan t Day, a frost at night. I was at Dittoes, feel unwell all Day. a t Deto s . unwell.
Clear. I tarried at mr Burtuns till 2 h pm, then Left her & infant Cleverly. I helpt her up yesterday & this day and made her Bed. I find mrs Polly Stackpool here at my return. a t Dittoes.
C Clear. I returnd home from Cap t Husseys. find my Dag t s & Parthena returnd on Friday, left all well at Son Towns. mrs Dexter is mending.

C Clear. I have been at home. my Girls went to meeting and to See mrs Burtun. Shee is Cleverly. Elizabeth Taylor here; Dind. Moses Pollard brot me a Letter which E. Robbins bro t from Broth Elijah Moore. a t home. receivd a Letter from Bro r Elijah of 18 th ins t .
Clear. I have felt very unwell but have been harvisting Beens the most of y e Day. my Girls washt. at home.

Cloudy morn, Clear a t noon. I left home at noon one h pm. went to James Hinkleys, receivd 6/ as a reward for attending his Lady in her illness with her Last Child. was then Calld to Cap t Husseys, his wife unwell. I tarried all night. a t James Hinkleys & Cap t Husseys.

Clear & warm. David went to meet mr Ballard with the hors, met him at Esqr Farewells. he went on to wins low. mr Ballard arivd at home at noon, then went to Town meeting. mrs Woodwd here, Drank Tea. I have been harvisting Beens. a t home. mr Ballard returnd from Surveying.
Clear. I have been at home. helpt Eph m Clear ye Dore yard & knitt on Fosters Stockin. mr Ballard Surveying for mr Thwing. a t home.

Clear & hott. we Came to thee Coart house; Saw Melona receive the punishment which the Coart inflicted at 8 hours morn, then returnd to mr Hatches. Paid our reckoning & Sett out for home. I wrode mr Pollards hors; we Dind at mag r Smiths. Calld a t mr Bullins & mr Jacksons; arivd home near Sun Sett. find Alice Ballard here. Gillbreath helping Cyrus. a t D o & returnd home.
Clear. I have been at home. the Girls quilted two quilts. Hannah Rockwood & mrs Benjamin helpt the Evn g . we Bak t mins and pumpkin pies. mrs Porter here. a t home.

Cloudy, and Some rain. I have been at home. mrs Brown went past, informs me that Hannah North is So weak that Shee faints when they take her ou t of Bed. Eph m & John moovd part of y e fence. a t home. rain.

rainy. Seth Foster workt here, moovd fence on y e point South Side y e Crick. mr Putnam Calld and informd me mr Ballard was well last Satturday and y t mr Gillman was Some unwell. I have been at home. at home. Dolly made her Callamanco Skirt. Death, Jery Whites inft.

Birth. Capt Burjess Dagt. Clear and very Cold. mr Burjes Calld me from Wiesoms before Sun rise to his wife in travil. Shee was Safe Deld of a Dagt at Sun Sett. I tarried all night, her Nece was unwell, her Little Son allso. a t [Cap t ] Burjeses. Birth 33.

Clear and Cool. mr Savage & Lady took Breakfast here. I Borrowd mr Browns Hors and went to See Polly Taylor, find her very Low. mrs Jackson, Brown, Bolton and Pe ts Kenny Supt here. mr Jackson gave me 3/ for Polly Taylor. I am informd Hannah North is very Sick. a t mr Taylors.
Clear. I have been at home, finisht the hoes I began yesterday. Spent part of y e night in over halling my Cabages. there were many of them roting. a t home.
Clear and very Cold. I have been a t home mending hoes. mr Savage Shod our Oxen. old mrs Wheelor Sleeps here. mr Ballard been makeing Plann. a t home.
Clear & hott. I work t in my Gardin. Clarrissa Barton Came here ys fore n . mr Lanhister Dind here. mr Ballard went to the hook. at home.
Clear. Patty Sick all day. I tended her. I Sett cabbage plants. mrs Woodwd here at Evn. my Girls washt. a t home.
Clear. mrs Weston here. Shee went to mr Bisbes after n . mr Ballard & Hannah went to Lecter. mr How performd. I gatherd parsnip & pepper Grass Seed. at home.
Clear. I have been at home. mrs Woodw d Calld here; her famely have got thee Measels. mrs Benjamin here at Evn n . at home.

Clear. I returnd by water with mr Andrews. the Canoe leek t , I wet my feet. I was Calld to See mrs Welches Children who were ill with a Cold. Dan l Robbins & a mr Gleason Sleep here. mr Norcross gave me some [refuse ]. a t Dittoes and at mrs Welches. a very rainy night.
Clear. The wind to y e Northard. Haywood & Bisbe took Breakfas t & Dinner here. mrs Blak and Judy Petty here after n . I have workt in the Gardin Some. a t home. Hannah wrote to Dolly.
Clear aftn I was Calld to Cap t Husseys. mr Greely, his Lady & mrs Dummer there. a t Husseys.
Clear for n , Cloudy af t . I left Polly at 1 h pm more Comfortable. find Dolly under y e operat n of Phisick, waited on her but feel Some what fatagu d . at Ditoes. Snowd all night.

X Birth. Jere Whites Son. XX. Cloudy & rain fore n . mrs White was Safe Deld of a Son at 10 h morn. I tarried with her till 4 pm then went home by water. feel much fatagud. was informd that mr Hamlin & Burjis had lost Linning. at Dittos. Birth 26 th . firs T Born.

rainy morn, Cleard af t n. mrs Woodwd and mrs Brown been here. I have been to Dress Polly Chamberlins wound. Carried Ointment I made of mellolott. Col o Sewall here this Evn g . Hannah began to weave Cyrus s webb. a t mr Chamb ns .

Clear & very pleas t . I Left mrs Snell & infant Cleverly; receivd 6/ as reward. Calld at Cap t Husseys, he made me a present of a waistcoat for my little Son. I Calld at Colo Sewalls & Col o Howards. mrs Polly is better. got home at noone, finish t a pair of mitts for mr Ballard. a t Dittoes. returnd home.
Clear & pleas t . mrs Hannah Woodwd and Clarrissa Barton here. I went to See mrs Burtun. mrs Shaw & Dag t returnd from y e westwd. John Trask interd. a t mr Burtuns.

Cloudy. the river is Closed and I Saw men pass over on y e ice about Sun rise. I took Breakfast and returnd home. mr Foot here. horses and Cattle Crost our mill pond on y e ice y s Day. I went on to y e Bed & took Some Sleep. Jon a and mr Wall returnd home at Evn. it began to Snow at 10 h Ev n . a t mr Hodges. a Snow Storm began at 10 Evn.

X Birth. Ben n Browns Dagt. XX. receivd my fee Nov r 22 nt 1791 in Turkeys. Clear and very Cold. Dolly is unwell, took Soap pills, had Several faint turns. I went to See Polly m c kethney, find her very low in Strength and Spirrits. Doct Colman let blood in both her feet. I was Calld at y e 8th h Evn in hast to See mrs Brown. Shee was Safe Deld at 9 h 30 m of a fine Dagt, her 7th Child. mr Brown was absent. mrs Woodwd and my self tarried all night. at mr Craggs & Browns. Birth 32 nt . Death Polly Taylor.
A Severe Snow Storm. I was at mr Craggs. Pally no better. I Sett up Part of y e night. at mr Craggs.

B Clear Day, Snowd at Evn. mr Pitts went from here after Breakfast. mr Savage took Brk ft here. I have been at home. mr Ballard went to Col o Norths y s Evn g . mr Pollard here, informs y t Moses is returnd from y e woods with a wound on his hand. at home. Snow.
C Clear. mr Ballard went to meeting all day. mr James Page here a t noon. we had a Loin of Lamb for Dinner. mr Gillman here to Tea. we had a Cold night. a t home.

B Clear and very pleas t . Son & Dag t Town & Parthena returnd at Evn g . I was Calld to Sam l Cumings s to his wife in Labour. Shee was Delivd of a Dagt at 1 h 30m, about 5 m before my arival. his parents with her & no one Else. mrs Briggs and hamlin there after her Delivery; tarried thro y e night, my patient Exercised with much pain. at Sam l Cumings. J. Kenny here for me to go & See his wife.
C Clear. I have not been so well as I Could wish. Did not attend public worship; mr Ballard Did. a t home.
C Clear and very Cold. I returnd from mr Browns at 1 h pm. Jona attended Funeral of Polly Taylor. [mr & mrs] Hamlin, Burtun, Patridg, Hann h Rockwood & Parthena Supt here. a t mr Browns. Funeral.
C Clear & very pleasan t . mr Page and the widdo Coburn Dind here. I attend worship aft n , and my Girls. mr Ballard went to thee hook at Evn. a t meeting.
C A Cold, Snowy Day. I have been [ "at home". - implied]. mr Savage here & Shaw of pitts town. a t home.
C Clear & pleast. I attended worship aft n . mr Jones & two men Sleep here this night. a t meeting. mr Jones Came here.
Clear. mr Ballard at mr Pollards fore n , at mr James Pages after n . Cyrus went to mr Craggs at winthrop. Selvester Moore & a Burjes Sleep here. a t home.

Clear. mr Ballard a t mr Brooks s on Busines s . mr Fellows of Unity Sleeps here. I have been at home. finisht giting out my mustard Seed. mr Cragg & Woodward returnd from the Westward. a t home. Fellows here.

Cloudy. mr Ballard went to the hook twice this Day. Eben z Church here. mr Fuller & Nathan Dexter Sleep here. Parthenia receivd a Letter from her aunt Barton; they are all well. I finisht mr Ballard a pair of Stockins. at [home]. mr Fuller of winslow Sleeps here. Snow d at Evn g .

Clear fore n , Cloudy aft n . mr Jones left here af tr Dinner. his men waited for y e tide to take out Boards which he had here. mr Williams informs me y t Taylors House fell Down this morn, but thro Good Providence no one receivd any hurt. the famely were removd to the house where mr Cottle livd. Polly was Brot in her Bed on a Sled. we gott Cabbages into the Seller, have 50 heads. a t home. mr Jones left here. raind this night.
Cloudy. Jon a Butcherd our Oxon. I have mended 10 pair of Stockins. a t home.

Clear for n , Cloudy aft. mrs Densmoore here to Cutt me a gown. hannah finisht makeing it. Dolly is much as Shee was. Pally mc kethney no better. Judy Heuston had fitts y s Evn g . at home. mrs Densmore here.
B Clear part of y e Day. I was at Dittoes. Sett up all nigh t . Polly is a little wandering in her feaver fitts. a t D t oes.

Clear and not very Cold. mr Wiesom here y s morn for advise, his wife being in Dangerous Saircumstance. I Sent her a Stiptic powder which he gave her; it gave relief. I went my Self, left her Some things to take. Calld at mr Hamlins, his wife not so well as I Could wish; at mr Burjes s , Shee is more Comfortable than Shee was; at mr Westons, Shee not So well as usual; at mr Craggs, Polly apears to be mending. they removd her into the Chamber y s Day. I Came home at Dusk. Son & Dag t Town and their Little Daft Came here, Left their famely well. mrs Pollard paid me 1/6 for work I Did for her. a T mr Wiesoms & other Neig rs . Phinehas Pane, a Dagt Born.

X. Birth Sam l Cumings Dag t . XX. a Severe Snow Storm. I left mrs Cumings at 2 h pm a little Easier. I got home thro much Diffuculty, find y t mr Kenny was here after me Soon after I left home last Evn g . hear all so y t Esq r Coneys Lady was Delivrd of a Dag t this morn a t 10 h. a t Ditoes. Birth Sam l Cumings Dg t at 1 h. Esq r Coneys Dag t at 10 h morn.
Clear. I have been takeing Care of Gardin matters. mrs Cowen Dind hr. a t home.
at Cap t Husseys, his wife Better. at Husseys.
Clear. I finisht harvisting Beens & Shelld Musturd. mr Ballard gone to y e hook. mr Woodwd, Hannah Rockwood & Juet Foster here. at home. Sent mrs Bisbe 1 oz. Snuff.
Clear. I have been at home, helpt the Child n git in 58 Cabbages from before our Doore. have knit Some. mr Brown dind with me. a t home.

Clear. Dolly is very unwell. I gave her Senna & manna with anis Seed and Rheubarb, it operated kindly. mr Ballard went to mr Crosbys and bot 5-1/2 pints W E Rhum, 2 lb Butter, 1 lb Sugar & 1/2 Doz n Bisquit. I have been at home, feel fatagud. Jabe Cowen here to work aft n . Jon a been to Pitts town & up to Stones. a t home.

Clear. mr Foster here, took Breakfast. Shuball Pitts allso. mrs Cowen & mrs Cumings here. Wil m Howard here; informs Son Town & famely are well. I have been at home. Alice Ballard went from here, Hannah & Parthena to mr Stanlys; bot 3 goun Patterns, Callico & 3 Lawn Hand kerchiefs. a t home. Alice Ballard went home.
Cloudy. I have been at home knitting. Hannah & Dolly went to help quillt a Bed quilt for mrs Burges. they got it out and returnd home late in y e Evn g . a t home.
a very rainy Day, Some Snow. we are very much put to it for fewel. I have been at home, finisht a pair of Linning Stockins for Dolly and I began Eph m a pair of woollinany. a t home. rain & Snow.

Clear part of y e Day. I have been at home, finisht Eph ms Stockins and made my Self a Baise Coat. Cap t Nichols here directly from Oxford; informs my friends are well there. a t home. Cap t Nichols here. Burial mr Whites infant.

The Sun rose Clear, Snowd Soon after. I left my patients more Comfortable. Calld to See Sally Hamlin & Hannah Cragg; find y m Better. Polly m c kethney Seems a little Better. arivd at home by 10 morn, find mr Porter and wife here. Dolly is Better. Hannahs face is not so badly Scolt as we Expected. Shee Spilt Boiling Licour on her foot this Day and Scolt it Some. Jane Welch Came for me to go and See her Mother. I went. her Complaints are pain in her head and limbs. mr Porter and wife & Hannah went to mr Burtuns. a t Ditoes. Hamlins & mr Craggs & mrs Walches. mrs Porter gave me 1/2 lb of wool.

Cleard away at 10 h morn and I went in at mr Craggs to See Polly m c keckney, find her much more Comfortable. then left mrs Blak as Comfortable as Could be Expected. mr Blak gave me 12/ as a reward. I arivd at home a t y e 11 th h, find mr Ballard is Gone to Pitts town for Hay, Ep m with him. at mr Blaks. Hannah went to See Polly Bisbe y s aftn.

a Cloudy day. I was Calld by Col o Sewall to See his Lady who was in Labour. Shee was not So ill as to Call in other assistance this Day. I Slept with her till about 1 h morn when Shee Calld her Neighbours to her assistance. a t Colo Sewalls.

X Birth. Asa Williams s Dag t . XX. A Cold Snowy Day. I was Calld at y e 6th hour morn to See mrs Williams. Shee was Safe Delivrd of her 4 th Dagt at 1 h Pm, and I returnd home at y e 6th Evn. found mr Ballard returnd from his tour of Surveying. I began to foot a pair of hoes for mrs Pollard. I receivd 6/ as a reward. at Asa Williams s . Birth 31 st . A Snow.

Cloudy y e wind to y e S. I have been mending hoes. mrs Wheeler left here after Breakfast. Doct Whitaker and his Son Sleep here. mr Ballard been makeing Plann. I was informd that And w Goodins youngest Child Expird y e 6 th inst. I was at home. D r Whitaker here.

Clear and very Cold. mr Ballard went from home bound for Sandy river. I was Calld to See W m Densmore, he was Siesd with the Collic, got Ease before I arivd. I returnd home & went Directly to mr Bisbes, tarried & watcht. Polly s feaver very high the most of y e night. W m Howard Came there a t Evn. the wind Shifted to y e S & blew very hard. mrs Bisbe is very anxious about Polly. at mr Bisbes. mrs Rockwood went home.

Clear. I wed gardin fore n , attend ed Lecter aft n . mr Emerson Performd. mrs Bisbe & Polly Came home with me, Tarry all night, & Ep hm went home with Clarrissa; Bro t a Chees & Some Butter from mr Porters. a t Lecter. mrs Bisbe here.
Clear. I have been at home. mrs Woodw d here. Shee had been to Pitts Town. mr Ballard been to the hook. I have Spun & doubled & twisted thread. at home.
rain fore n , Clear af tn . I have been at home. finish t my Stockins. Gleason took Breakfast and Supper. Sam l Dauin Supt here. a t home. Dag t Town is 32 years old y s Day.
Clear. mrs Brown here. I have gatherd Beens in my gardin for Pickles and for Seed allso. Wm Haywood Dind here. a t home.
Cyrus is 34 years old this Day. I was at mr Husseys. Eat Corn pudding. at Dittoes.

Cloudy & Cold. mr Cragg Calld me to See Polly m c kethney. Shee is no Better. mrs Voce Came and we Changd her linning. I find Dolly very ill at my return, her Blister very painfull. mr Putnam of 7 mile Brook took Break fast here. a t Does. Snowd all night.

Clear & moderate. I went to See Esq r Conys Lady, find her a little more Comfortable than Shee has been; Shee is troubled with Biles and Soar Nipples. I Calld and helpt git mrs Welch out of Bed, Shee is as well as Could be Expected. I Calld to See mrs Blak, Shee had an ill turn yesterday but is Better. Dolly Seems some better this Evn g . mr Ballard returnd from wiscasset. a t Esq r Coneys, mrs Welchs & mr Blaks.
C Clear. I went to See mrs Goodin. returnd to Husseys & Slept there. a t Ditoes.

B Clear part of ye Day, Cloudy aftn. I attended Public worship, mr Smith performd. mrs Pierce Sent a Bill for prayers. I was Calld at 9 h Evn to See Leut Pollards wife who was in Labour. mrs Savage, Williams & Cowen there all night. a t meeting and mr Thomas s . I am 56 years old y s Day.

C Cloudy. Dolly is very weak & Faint. we helpt her up. She all most fainted. Hannah Complains of a pain in her head. mr Hamlin here, had Some medisin for Sally who is Siesd with Pukeing and Purging. at home.
Cloudy part of y e Day. I returnd from Husseys a t y e 11 hour, find my Girls are gone to winslow. Polly Wall here. I gatherd Seeds after I came home. at Ditoes.

Clear. mr Cragg Calld me to See Polly. Shee Seems Better in Some respects, but her blister on y e Left arm Looks very black. I helpt remove her from one bed to another and returnd. Dolly was very Faint indeed till near night, when Shee Seemed much more Comfortable, and Sett up y e Evng. I was Calld at 10 h Evn to See thee wife of Shuball Wiesom. met with diffiCulty on y e way beyond mr Burjeses. Came back to his house, he went with us. I arivd Safe, tarried all night. a t mr Craggs and Wiesoms.

Cloudy. I tarried till near night. Polly has been got out of bed, and her bed made, had a fitt of y e feaver. I find Dolly mutch as I left her. Hannah is weaving a Blankett. I went to bed Early and Slept well. at D t oes. Polly very Sick yet. Snowd.

X. Birth Leu t David Pollards Dagt. X. Clear & Cold. mrs Pollard was very ill thro y e Day. Old Lady Fletcher, mrs Pollard & Eph m Cowens wife aded to our Company, and my patient was Safe Delivrd a t 9 h Evn of a fine Dagt and is Cleverly, Considering how ill Shee has been. I tarried all night. Sett up with mrs Pollard. a t mr Thomas s . Birth 7 th .
Clear. mr Ballard Came from mr Pages, left his Spectacles; went Back for them. I was Calld to See Edsons infant who is Extreamly ill; tarried & watcht. at mr Kennady s .
Clear. mr Ballard gone to preambulate y e line between Hollowell and Varsalboro. I went to Col o Sewalls, tarried all night. a t Col o Sewalls.
a rainy Day. John & Peter Jones & Cap t Hussey Dind here. I have been at home. a t home. mr Jones here.
X Ephm Cowens Son Born. XX. Clear. I was Calld at [y e 7 th ] h morn to Ephm Cowens wife in Labour. Shee was Del d at 9 Evn of a Son. I tarried all night. a t Ephm Cowens. Birth 30.

Clear and Cold fore n , Snow aft n . I went to See Ephm Cowens wife & James Savages Child. Came back to mr Craggs. tarried & watcht with Pally McKethney; her Brother John there. Loes Harris watcht. at Cap t Savages s , James s & mr Craggs.

Clear and Cold. mr Ballard went to Coart. mr Town & wife & Dolly to Pitts Town. mr Field, Rust, Shaw & Pierc s Son Dind. Esq r Weston & Leu t Learned Supt here. I have been a t home, y e girls washt floors. I finish t a Shirt for Patty & work t on one for Ep m . at home.
Clear & Cold. I have been at home, feel falagud with my worries abroad. Cumings & Brown had their Case tried. the jeury Brot in in favour of Cumings. a t home.

Clear and Cold. mr Ballard & Ephm went to mr Briggs s for Hay. Arth J. Foot and wife & Dagt here on a visit. mrs Savage Bak t here. Georg Boltons wife & Vine Savage here. I have been at home. at home.

Clear & Cold. I have been at home, have wrote to Doct Barton and Brother Collins & Sist Waters. Cap t Getchel was here, informs me his Brother, y e mag r , is at y e point of Death with a Cancer which has broak out in as much as a Douzen places on his boddy. at home. wrote to my Friends at Oxford.
Clear foren n , rain af t . I was at mr Burtuns, tarried all night. his wife was unwell. I receivd a Letter from mr Ballard. he was well Last Monday. a t mr Burtuns. receivd a Letter from mr Ballard.
at Husseys, all Cleverly. at Dittoes.

Clear. I went to See mrs Burtun, find her Cleverly; Dind there. was Calld from there to Jery Whites wife who is unwell. Set with her till 2 h m, was then Calld to See Cap t Husseys Lady in Labour; her attenDants were mrs Cox, Hinkly, White, Goodwin & Sally, his Sister, & widdo Norcross. a t Jere Whites & mr Burtuns.

Clear & Cold. I had a Severe pain in my head y s morn, but was Calld to See mrs Caton. Shee has taken Some Cold and has a pain in her hip. I feel much better after I returnd. Dolly is very unwell thro the Day, but Seemd revivd in y e Evng. mrs Benjamin Spent y e Evn g here. a t mr Chamberlins.
A Snow Storm. mr Ballard Carried Some wood to mrs Welch. I began a mitt for Cyrus. a t home.
Clear Except Showers. I have wed Gardin & wrote to Broth r Jona n . a t home. wrote B Jon n .

C rain the most of y e Day. Clear at Evn. mr Hamlin & Burtun & y r wives here. Hannah been to meeting after n . I went to mr Savages to See the Child n who were unwell with a Cold. mr Foot brot Parthena here. a t mr Savages. Parthena Came back frommr Foots.
Snow and rain. mrs Benjamin quilted a Bed quilt here. my Self and Girls and mrs Chamberlin help t her. we got it out in y e first of y e Evn g . a t home quilting. Snowd & raind.

Clear and Cold. the Public thanksgiving. my Girls went to mr Hamlins. Jon a Sitt out for Long reach, with a rafft of Boards y s Evn g . mr Wall with him with Boards for Cap t Davis. I am informd y t Sam l Foster of Winthrop had the misfortin to Break one of his Leggs last Satturday and is tho t to be in Danger of loosing his Life. a t home. Asa Mason & Hannah Cowen Married y s day. thee ice runs in y e river.

X Birth. Shubal Wiesoms Son. XX. Clear and very Cold indeed. I was Calld at y e Dawn of Day to Wiesoms, found his wife Suffering for want of help. Shee was Deld of a Son y e 8th h. the inf t I was feirfull wd Expire but revivd and I left mother & Child Cleverly. arivd at home at 12/ O Clok, then went to mr Burjeses. I gave his wife Some medisin, walk t home. Calld to See Polly mc kethney who it is that is mending slowly a t Wiesoms. Birth 34.

Clear and very Cold & windy. mr Pitt left here y s morn. I have been at home. receivd a letter from Sis t Waters of Jany 26 th inst , Hannah one of Jany 1 st together with Shee & Dolly Each of y m a Cap, which was my Hon d mothers. at home. receivd a Letter from Sis t Waters of 26 th Jany.

X Birth mr Catons Dagt and 1 st Child. XX. fee recd July 21. Cloudy. I was Calld by mr Field to go to See mrs Caton at 1 h morn, walkt there, was allmost over com when I arivd. I put her Safe to bed with a Dag t at 3, and returnd home a t 7. her Husband not at home. I was Calld at 8 to See Cap t Burjes s little Son who was Scalt on his left arm yester morn. I Drest ye arm. Calld to See mrs Hamlin & Burtun, receivd 6/ of mr Burtun as a reward for assisting his wife in travil Sept 23 d . Calld to See mrs Blak, find her Cleverly. Calld at mr Savages to rest my Self, find mr Ben n Leighton here when I Came home. my Girls gone to See Polly m c keckney. Hannah informs me Polly Bisbe is Better. at mr Chamberlins, Burjes s , and other Neig rs . Birth 2 nt which I have assisted in y s year. I have not rested in my Bed more y n 2 or 3 hours Sinc Tuesday morn.

B Clear & very pleas t . I went to See mrs Welch in y e foren n , find her a little Easier. I Calld at mr Savages. Dolly Rode out and is more Comfortable. mr Hamlin and Burtun & y r wives, mr Patridg and mrs H. Rockwood Spent Evn here. mr Blackman Calld me to See his wives Sister. I had a fall out of y e Sleigh on my way. I receivd no hurt, tarried all night. mrs Thompson watch t . I went to bed y e latter part of y e night, gave y e Lady Some Senna & manna with Seeds and left her an ounce of Elixer prop ts . a t mrs Welches and mr Blackm ns .

X Birth. Col o Sewalls Son. XX. A Clear & Butifull Day. mrs Sewall was ill till 3 h pm when Shee was thro Divine asistance made the Living Mother of a Living Son, her 3 rd Child. mrs Brooks, Belcher, Colman, Pollard & Voce assisted us. I went to Col o Howard at Evn g to ask assistance for Polly Taytor. Colo Sewall gave me 6/8 as a reward, Conducted me over y e river. I Calld at mr Craggs, was informd that Hannah North was tho t to be Expireing this morn but is revived. mrs Colman informd me that the Doct, her Husband, gave Hannah a Dose of Callom Calomel for worms which gave relief. She went next Day to See mrs Goodin and took Cold, which has brot her into the Sittuation Shee now is. when I arivd home found Cap t Silva Learned here from oxford. Letters. a t Dittoes. Cap t Silva Learnedof Oxford Sleeps here, brot a letter fm Broth Collins, 1 fm. Sister Barton of Oct. 31. Jon a killd his Oxen. Birth28 th .
Clear. I was at home, finish t y e hoes which I began last Evng. mr Ballard bo t a guire of paper. a t home.
Cloudy and Some rain. I have been mending hoes. mr Ballard Planing. Eph m Cowens informs me his wife is not so well as they Could wish. a t home.
Clear and very Cold, y e wind Shifted to NW, Blew very high. mr Howard brot me home aft n . Polly is very much as Shee has been some Days pas t , very helpless. a t mr Bisbes.

C A severe Storm of Snow. Cleard of at 6 Evn. mr Savage here. I have been at home. mr Ballard went to mr Pollards to Carry a Plann to be Conveyd to Cap t Weston of Canaan. Juet Foster left here this Evn g . I was a t home. Snow.
B Clear & Cold. I have been at home. mr Densmore here, Says his Son is much as he was. mr Ballard Came from mr Rusts at Sandy river this Day. at home.

Clear. I have been at home. wrote to Brot h Levy Davis, Collins, and Elijah. Expect Elip t Robbins will bear them. mrs Reed Sent me Some Butter, 3 lb. I have had 7 before. at home. wrote to my friends.

Snowd y e most of y e Day. Jona and mr Field Butcherd 2 Swine for us. mr Ballard & Eph m got wood. I have been at home mending Cloaths. mr Burtun Sett hoops on three Tubs for us. Dolly almost fainted. a t home. Snow.
Cloudy & Cold. mr Ballard been to y e hook to a meeting of y e proprietors of Unity. I have been at home, finisht a pair of mitts for Patty. at home.

Cloudy & Some Snow. I left my Patient a little Easier & returnd home. Twisted 7 knotts of y n then I went to See mrs Welch, find her as well as Could be Expected. Son Town here, his famely well. a t mr Black mns .
Cloudy & Some rain. I have been at home takeing Care of gardin Seeds. mrs Benjamin here. Doc t Whiteaker Sleeps here. mr Tappin & mr Savage took Tea here. at home.
Cloudy, the weather moderate. Doc t Coney here; took acount of Births & Deaths y e year past from my minnits. I have been at home. a t home.

Clear and very Pleas t . mr Ballard Came to inform me y t Capt Nichols s Lady was at ou r house. I returnd after we had took Breakfast, leaving my Patients remarkably Comfortable. after Chatting a little while with my friends, took a walk with them as far as mr Pollards. Calld at mr Blaks & Savages on my return. Fredrick Foot, his wife & Sister here on their way to mr Bullins. mr Pitt here. a t Ditoes. mr Thomas gave me 6/ as a reward. I receivd a Letter from Doc t Barton of Freby 6 th .
Clear & pleas t . mr Ballard been makeing Plann. I have been at home. Dolly went to mr Savages. at home.

X. Birth Bizer Benjamins Son. X. receivd my fee Sept 4 th 1792. Clear part of y e Day. I went to Dress Pollys finger foren n . mrs s m c ithny, Heuston & Whitin & mr Craggs little Dagt here aft n . I was Calld at 6 h 1/2 Pm to See mrs Benjamin. Shee was Safe Deld at 10 Evn of a lusty Son. mrs Pollard, Chaml n & Caton went home. mrs Welch and I tarried till Day. Ephm Bot 1 lb Chocolat & a Bowl with wood he Carried to markett. a t mr Savages. Birth 8 th . Polly mc kethney & others here.

X. Birth John Coutchs Dag t . XX. misty morn. I was Calld at 7 h morn to John Coutches wife in Labour. Shee was Delivrd of a Dagt before I arivd there. I Drest the infant, took Breakfast and returnd home about noon. it was a very rainy Evn g . I was informd this Day that A Sister of mrs Neys has Lately Murdered her Self. a t mr Coutches. mrs Hinkley performdfor mrs Coutch. June 27 th receivd 6/ of mr Coutch.
B A rainy Day, the freshet high. mr Pollard & Savage here to See about the Bridg, informs us y t mr Voce has Savd the most of his Bords. I have been at home. the ice went from y e hook. at home.

Clear. Doc t Coney Came to See the Child, orderd Blisters & left Senna and some Drops. I Came from there at noon, left the Child very ill. Cyrus there near night. the Neighbours there, it was tho t to be Expireing. at Dittoes. Dolly & Hannah Rockwood here.
Clear. I was at Dittoes and mr Brooks, Cap t Belchers & Col o Howards. mrs Polly is unwell. Thom s Sewalls wife at mr Brooks. at [ ] all night.

Clear & very Cold, a very hard frost this morn. thee ground remaind frose all day. mr Ballard, Gillman & Tho s Stickney Left here at y e 11 h morn on a Surveying Tour at Seven mile Brook, loting Setlers lotts. a t home. mr Ballard Sett out for Surveying.
Clear Day, Snowd at night. I Came home aft n , was Sent for at Evn again. my Dagt Hannah watcht. Polly very Restless, her marm Came to mr Craggs. a t mr Craggs.

Clear. mr Titcom took Breakfast. Cap t Slackpool, Bullin, Goodin & Town, and y r wives Dind & took Tea here, mr Ben n Porter to Tea, I have been at home. Dolly Seems not So well. Doc t Coney here, left her Some Bitters. at home. a number of friends here on a visit.

Clear. Cool but very pleas t Sun. my son & Dag t Town took y r Departure from here at 12 O Clok. Jewet Foster here Dressing flax. I went to See Polly mc kekney, find her Seting up & much better. a t mr Craggs & mr Blacks. my Childn Left us homewd bound.
A very rainy day. I have been at home, knitt on mr Ballards Stockin. mr Walker of 7 mile brook Sleeps here. home.

Clear and Cold. mr Ballard and Ephm gone to y e meddow. my Dag t s & Parthena gone to mr Westons on a visit. I do not feel So well as I Could wish. Dan l Robbins went from here Bound for home. Georg Brown & David Learned Sleep here. a t home. my Girls at mr Westons.

Clear morn. mr Ballard went to y e meeting, tarried all night. I went to mr Baxters, took 7/6 there by an order from mr Hodgess. I was at mr Blaks, his Lady gave me a Skein Camb c Thread. I was at mr Pollards. Sis t Williams Came here. I was at mr Savages, Drest Pollys finger. a t mr Baxters & other Neig rs . Sis tr Williams here.
Cloudy & rain. I Came from Detoes. Calld at mr Hodges, his Dagt Fanny very Sick but revivd and seems Better. arivd at home a t 5 h pm. at Ditoes & mr Hodges [ ].
C Clear morn. mr Savage here aft n . I have been at home; a Cold day. a t home.

Birth mrs Welchs Dagt. Clear. I was Calld at 9 y s morn to See mrs Welch who is in Labour. Shee was Delivd at 12 of a Dagt, Dead Born, and was very ill after Delivery. I tarried with her till about 9 Evn when Shee Seemed a little more Comfortable. I was then Calld to Thomas Hinklys. at mrs Welches. Birth 4 th . mr Ballard gone to wiscasset.
Snowd all day. I have been at home. my Girls washt. I knitt on a mitt. at home.
Clear. I went to mr Pollards fore n , wed Gardin aft n . mrs Woodward here. mrs Page & Dagt Sleep here. a t mr Pollards.
a very rainy Day. we had to hoist Gates to prevent y e foundation of y e Bridg from fleeting. I made 11-1/2 DZ n Candles. Borrowed 11 lb Tallow of Jon a . a t home. rain.

X Birth. Ezra Hodges 3 d dagt & 5 th Child; the first was 5 y s old y e 10 of Sep t last. XX Clear part of the Day & very Cold. I am informd that Jona & others who were attempting to go Down with a rafft were inclosd by the ice at Bumber hook Point. thee ice makes very fast. Doc t Williams & his Son here at Evn. Could not pass with y r Horses, left y m here and went to mr Pollards. I was Calld at 8 h Evn to See mrs Hodges in Labour. her women were Calld and Shee was Safe Delivrd at 10 h and 30 m Evn. mrs Pollard being unwell Did not arive till the moment the Child was Born. the Ladies who assisted took Supper after all our matters were Completed, & retend home about 12. mrs Pollard and my Self tarried all night & Sett up. mrs Hodges rested finely, y e inft allso. at mr Savages and mr Hodges. thee ice Stopt at Fort Westorn. Birth 29 th . Sam l Dawin fell thro y e ice as he was attempting to go of y e rafft to y e Shore, but was Savd by their geting to him with a Cannoe & takeing him in.
Clear and very Cold. I went to mr Craggs. Dolly remains mutch as Shee was. Doc t Williams went to See Cap t Page and returnd, tarried all night. I Close y e year there. a t mr Craggs & watcht.

Clear and pleas t . Jona & Eph m went to Pitts Town for Hay, mr Ballard to mr Carrs. I went to mr Savages to See about my Saddle irons. mr Thomas gave me a Letter from Doct Barton of Jan y 26 th . Snows this Evng. a t mr Savages. receivd a Letter fromDoc t Barton of Jany 26 th .
A Clear, Pleasant Day. I have been at home mending Cloaths. mr Ballard to y e meddow. at home.
Cloudy & rain. I was at Cap t Herseys. mrs Savage & Cowen went home at Evng, mrs Voce and I tarried all night. at Cap t Herseys.
B Clear and Pleast. I have been at home. Jon a killd a rabbit & Sent it mrs Nabby Hodskins who is unwell. at home.
B Clear & very pleas t till near night when there arose a Squall of wind & Snow. mrs Voce & I tarried y s night. mrs Hersey rested very well. a t Dittoes.

B Cloudy all Day, rain aft n . we were informd y t mr Gould was to preach. mr Ballard & Cyrus & Eph m went up but found it was a misrepresentation. Jon a Dind here. mr Livermore Drank Tea. I have been at home. rainy night. at home.

B Snowd all Day. mr Ballard & Jon a attended worship at y e Coart hous. mr Smith of winthrop performd. Wil m Haywood Sleeps here. Clear Evn n . Thoms Kenny Calld me at 11 h to See his wife. we got there at y e 12 th . a t Kennys.
B Clear Except a Sprinkleing of rain. I have been at home. mr Burtun & wife, mr Partrage & mrs Rockwood, & mr Livermore Drank Tea. Polly Livr mr here at Evn g . at home.

Clear and Cold. mrs H. Thomson here; informs me mrs Williams is Cleverly. I have been at home; knitt a pair of mitts for Ephm. Ephm Cowen Sent me 3/4 lb Tea. at home. Parthena gone to work for mrs Burtun.

X. Birth T. Kennys Dagt. XX. Began to Snow Latter part of last night and a Severe Storme. the wind very high. mrs Kenny Deld at 9 h morn of a Dagt. I Left her & inft as well as Could be Expicted & returnd at 3 pm. a t Kennys. Birth 3 d . June 24 th receivd 6/ of mr Kenny.

Clear & Cool. Cap t Hersey Conducted mrs Voce & I home. we left his Lady about house. I find my famely as well as usual. Josiah Ketth informd me y t mrs Peirce Expird this morn. mr Ballard is gone to y e hook to a meeting of y e proprietors at unity. Parthena returnd from mr Foots, informs me Fredricks infant has had fitts & y t Polly Bisbee is much Better. it Snowd be fore night. a t Ditoes. mrs Peirce Expird y s morn at 6 h 30m.
Clear. mr Ballard & Sons went to Town meeting. I have been at home, y e Girls wash t . Peter Jones took Tea with me. at home, began a Stockin for Cyrus.

Clear. mr Jones here, Sleeps here. mr Cragg is finishing the Bridg over y e mill Pond. mr Livermore here at Evn g . I was Calld at 10 h Evn to See mrs Dany who is in Labour. I went by Land, find Saml Norcros s Lady there. a t mr Danys. Death of mr Fletcher.
Clear. I was Calld at 10 morn to See mrs Cottle, arivd there at 1 h pm, find her very unwell. mrs s Tylor & Hollowell there. a t mr Cottles. very high wind.
Clear. I Sowd Peas, mr Ballard went to Town meeting. mr ss Savage & Benjamin here. my Girls washt. my throat is Soar. a t home. mrs Savage here.

Over cast part of the day, and moderate. I have been at home mending hoes and knitting. Dolly had a faint turn this Evin g , and pain in her Side. I gave her Caster. I was at home. Birth D Fletchers Dagt.

Cloudy & not very Cold. I was unwell, Did not rise till mr Pinkam Calld me to go to mr Bisbe s , his Dagt Polly being Siesd with a Complaint in her Nervs. I made use of pipe Phisic which gave relief & Shee rested much Bitter than Shee had for Some nights past. Cap t Haywoods Lady & I watcht. a t mr Bisbes. mrs Haywood there &Doct Williams at Evng.
A Severe Storm of Snow. Son Town and mr Fuller Dind here. mr Ballard went to See that mrs Welch had wood, made her a Shovel &C. I have Spun Some thread. a t home. Son Town he re .

Clear. I was very unwell y s fore n , finish t Sowing my Gardin Pees aft n . Old mrs Norcross Calld here. mr Ballard & Eph m Drove our old Cow Down here, Shee Calvd y s Day. a t home. mrs Norcross here.

X Birth. mr Hainses Dagt. XX. Clear. the Doc t left here before I rose. I was Calld to See mrs Hains Early this morn. Shee was Safe Deld at y e 10 hour Evn of a fine Dagt. I tarried all night. my Patient s Cleverly. this is her 11 th Child, 6 th Dagt. mrs Cumings went home with mrs Harris. mrs Page & Briggs tarried at mr Hainses. a t mr Hainses. Birth 23 d .I receivd 6/ of mr Hains. receivd Letters from friends.

Clear and very pleast, thawd Some. mr Hollowell, y e tinker Dind. Pattey & anne Bullin Dind and Drank Tea. James Cowen & wife took Tea here. Jon a s Red Colt was hook t by one of y e Steers, hir Entrales Came out. Jon a returnd them, Sewed up the rent. Shee not with Standing, Expird before morn. I have been at home. Parthena gon to Burtuns. at home. Jon a Lost a Colt. Parthena gone. Pattys new Shoes Brot home.

Clear Except a little Snow in y e morn. I went to mr Savages at Dusk. mr Foot & y e Lady s here as they returnd. Dolly is makeing her Over Coat. Capt Savage inform s me mr Densmores Son is like to have his Soar break again. a t mr Savages.

Clear & pleas t Day, Cloudy at night. mr Ballard went to pitts town. he waited on his Dagts & my Niece to mr Bullins. mrs Benjamins Dagt Cutt her middle finger of her right hand off, they Sent for me. I went twice to See her this aft n . a t mr Savages. my Girls to mr Bullins.

a little Snow morn, a foggy, misty Day. I Came home at 5 h 1/2 morn, went to Bed and Slept. Echabod Pitts and wife & Son here, Came before noon. Shee tarried here, he went farther and returnd & they Sett out for home after Tea. mr Burtun Came with a Sleigh and waited on my Girls to his hous, & I went and Dres t little Pollys finger, and Drest y e infant. a t Dittoes. mr Pitts & Lady here. my Girls went to mr Burtuns.
Cloudy & rain. I was at home. a t home.
Cloudy, raind Before night. old mrs Norcross & mrs Livermore here on a visit. Hannah has been very unwell. a t home, had Company.
Clear. a t mr Craggs, tarried all night. mrs Jones & I Sett up. Pally rested better. Doc t Williams there thee last & this night. a t Ditoes.
Clear. I have been at home. Son & Dag t Town, mr Porter & others Break fasted &C, &C. a t home.
Clear. I have been at home. mrs Rokwood Came here. mr Ballard at Coart, y e Jurey were Dismist. a t home.

Clear & very Cold, Some Cloudy aft n . I have been at home. mr Allin here, informs his younges t Child is Scolt. my Girls are gone y s aft n to help Quillt a Coat for Sally Gillman at mr Pollards. Peter Jones here. I let him have a pint of mustard Seed which paid him for apples I had of him las t fall. a t home.
Snowd foren. Brother Moore & Sister & mrs Haws & mr Pitts Sleep here. Nathan Haywood & wife & her Bro r here y s after n. I have been at home. a t home. Brot r Moore here.

rain. Foster and Jon a went to y e hook. Sister Williams left here after Denner bound for Varsalbor o . Ep m Carried mr Hamlins Bords as far as y e meeting house. Ben n Brown informs me his mammy is very poorly. the petitioners of Unity Drew 4 Lotts this Day & mr Ballard returnd home at Evn. I finisht kniting Cyrus Leggins. a t home. Sis tr Wilm s went from here.
Cloudy & Some rain. mr Lankester Dind here. I have been at home. Hannah is better, Dolly not so well as Shee has been. mr Ballard been makeing fence. a t home.

X. Birth Thoms Hinklys Son. XX. Clear. mrs Hinkley was Delivd about 1 h morn of a fine Son. I left her Comfortable at 8, and returnd home. Calld to See mrs Welch, find her as well as Could be Expected, her Sister Cyphers with her. I was Calld immedialely after my return to See Will m Densmore find him very low, his thigh Sweld as much as it was when I saw him before. Jona & Ephm gone to the meddow at Thos Hinkleys. Birth 5 th .
Clear. mr Ballard Carried Ashes to mr Westons. I have been at home, finish t knitting Cyrus s mitts this Evn g . a t home.

mr Ballard is Surveying for mr Norcross. my Girls went to mr Childs on a visit. I have been at home. mr Jones Came up, Gillbreath with him to work on the Corn mill. mrs Benjamin here, Molly Wall also. at home. my Girls to mr Childs.
