Clear Except a Squall of Haill & rain. mrs s Dorcas & Polly Pollard here, mr Savage allso. I have been at home. a t home, had Company.

Cloudy and Some rain. Clear in y e Evng. mr Town was here, his famely are well. I have been at home, finisht a Stocking for Eph m . I Sent to Voce for Some Tea & Sugar; he wd not Send me any. a t home. rain.
Clear, Cold & very windy. mr Ballard gone to y e Hook on business relating to Unity. mrs Benjamin here. I have been at home. mr Densmore here, informs me his Son is no better. a t home.

Clear part of y e Day. Esq r Coney here, Juett Foster allso, Directly from the westward. I have been at home. Eph m went to mr Jones s , brot a hen & Chicks. Shee hatcht 16, Eleven of y m perisht for want of proper Care. a t home. Cyrus Came here.

B Clear. Capt Davis s Brigg & two other vessels went up y s Day, Jon a was here after n . mr Ballard & I went in at mr Livirmors y s Evn g . Parthenia went to mr Burtuns to work for them. a t mr Livermors.

B Clear fore n , wind S, Cloudy aft n & Evn. I went to See Will m Densmore, help t Dress his Soar, it Smells very disagreably. I Coalld at mr Pollards, find Moses very unwel with a pain in his Ear and Side of his head. my girls went to mr Hamlins. the hors got away and Dolly tarried all night. mr Savage and wife here, inform me y t Doct Colman has opend y e Soar in William Densmores groin. a t mr Densmores & mr Pollards.

A rainy Day. mr Ballard went to mr Thomas s . Dolly returnd from mr Hamlins. I have been at home. Spent part of y e Day Cleaning y e Platform of ice, Some kniting & part perrusing y e news papers, one of which informs of y e death of Uncle Thomas Kidder. at home.
Clear. my girls washt & went to mr Voces. I planted Potoes fore n , was Calld to mr Shaws aft n , his oldest Child Sick. I watcht with it. a t mr Shaws.
Clear and very Cold. I have been at home, footed a pair of hoes for Patty and mended hoes. at home. Funeral mr Goodins Child.

Clear & very pleast. Jon a went to y e hook, Dolly to mr Blaks. Eph m with his Teem attempted going onto y e Crick to Load Some Boards which belongd to mr Hamlin. his Steers Broke thro the thee ice & we had a very great surprise. mrs Welch, mr Cragg & wing Came to our assistance. we relievd the teem and they were all Savd, but what I under went with my fatague was very Severe. Hannah and Parthena went to mr Blaks aftr Dinner. I went to mr Savages, find them Comfortable. Eph m Cowen here for things for Capt Savages Lady. a t mr Savages. mrs Pierce interd at 4 h pm. Ep ms Oxen had like to have Drowned.

Clear. mr Ballard makeing Planns. mr Pollard & his Lady here. I have been at home, attempted to make Soap. Cyrus gone to Winslow. mr Foster workt here, B. Porter. at home. Jon a s Saw mill Began to Saw y s Day.

X. Birth mr Danys 4 th Son. XX. Cloudy. mrs Dany Calld her women at 3 h morn & was Safe Del d of a Son at 4 h 1/2, and is Cleverly. I Calld to See Phillip Norcros s Lady who is unwell and Came up by water. reach t home a t 9 morn. mr Ballard and Cyrus gave up y r Possission here to Peter Jones. we are informd that Old mr Fletcher Expird last night. mr Woodwd, his wife, mr Brown & his, & her Brother here; poor woman is in a Distress t State of mind. they have Compelld her, as Shee Says, to go to her Fathers which Seems much against her will at this time. may God restore her to Comphort of mind. my Girls are washing and Scouring. a t mr Danys. Birth 11th. mrs Brown here on her way to her Daddies.
Clear & very high wind & Cold. mrs s Tylor & Hollowell went home. mrs Cottle poorly. a t Dittoes.
Clear & pleas t Day, a very Cold night. mr Ballard & Ephm been giting wood. I finisht Footing a pair hoes for Ephm. mr Gillman Supt here. a t home.

X. Birth mr Blaks Son. XX. Cloudy morn. I was Calld from mr Bisbes at Day Dawn by mr James Blak to See his wife. Shee was Deld at 7 h 13 m morn of a fine Son. I tarried thro the Day & night; was awake y most of y e night. a t D o s & mr Blaks. Birth 1 st of my asisting y s year.

Clear. I have wed Gardin fore n . Hannah washt. mr Ballard finisht fencing the meddow, got home at noon. mrs Porter Came here at 1 h pm. mr Hamlin & Burtun & their Child n & Parthenia here to Tea. Juet Foster Sleeps here. my Dagts returnd from wins tow yester day. Dolly thinks her ride has been of Servis to her, Shee has workt very Steady y s Day and has a pain in her Stomach this Evn g . Cyrus Sheard our Sheep yesterday. at home, had Company. mrs Porter of winthp here.
Cloudy morn. Parthena returnd this morn. Shee & my Dagts went to help mrs Pollard quillt a Bed quillt. Dolly tarried there all night. I have been at home. Foster Sleeps here. a t home.

Snow & rain fore n , Clear af tn . I was Calld to See Lidia White who has had fitts this Day, but had left her before I arivd. Shee Complaind of an Opresion at her Stomach and pain in her head. I left her a portion of Senna and manna and returnd home at 11 h 20m Eving. my famely all in Bed when I arivd. a t mr Whites to See his Dagt Lidia.

Cloudy till 10 h morn when it Broke away & y e Sun appeard. Cyrus then Sett out for Winslow, Patty Town with him. Shee has been here 13 mounths and one day. I have been at home. Dolly is gone to take Care of Sally Hamlin for her mammy to go to Cap t Smiths. One of Jon a s Oxen dropt down and Expird instantly about Sun Sett as Eph m & John Savage were bringing a Lode of wood Down this Crick. a t home Cap t Hershys at 10 Evng. Jon a lost an OX. Cyrus is Gone to winslow, Carried Patty Town home.

X. Birth Capt Herseys Son. X. Clear. Cap t Hersey Calld me at the 5th hour morn to See his Lady who is in Labour. Shee was Safe Deld at 6h 30m pm of a fine Son. I had mrs Thomas & mrs Voce as assistants. I tarried all night, my Patients were very Comfortable. mr Voce Supt there. a t Capt Hersey s . Birth 9 th . I receivd 6/. Tolman a Son Born.
Clear. Esq r Weston, mr Pitts & Foster, Son & Dagt Town took Breakfast. I was Calld to See Polly Bisbe, tarried all night. She was Delirious in her feavor fitt. at Bisbes.

Clear and very Cold. mr Ballard went from home bound for Sandy river. I was Calld to See W m Densmore, he was Siesd with the Collic, got Ease before I arivd. I returnd home & went Directly to mr Bisbes, tarried & watcht. Polly s feaver very high the most of y e night. W m Howard Came there a t Evn. the wind Shifted to y e S & blew very hard. mrs Bisbe is very anxious about Polly. at mr Bisbes. mrs Rockwood went home.

X. Birth mr Greelys Dagt. XX. Clear & Cold. I went to See Wil m Densmore, find him much as he has been of late. I was Calld by mr Greely (from there) to See his Lady who was in Labour & was Safe Del d at 10h 30m Evn of a fine Dagt, her 7 th Child of which 4 are Dagt s . I tarried all night, Slept a little. a t mr Densmores & mr Greelys. Birth 6 th . receivd 3/ august 16 th 1794 of mr Greely.

Clear and Pleas t . Bro r Moore & wife & her Sis t left here af t Breakf t . my Girls are gone to Mag r Smiths in Company with others in Sleighs. I have been at home. mrs Chaml n here. mr Caton walk t & Bro t her Child to mr Savages. a t home. my Girls wrode out. Jon a is 28 years old y s Day.
rainy. mr Burtun here writeing on y e Plann of unity. mr Baker Sleeps here. we are makeing Soap. I have been at home. a t home. mr Baker here.
mrs Coy went home, mrs Welman allso. mrs Preskott & mrs Tylor tarried. mrs Moore ill. it was rainy from 8 y s morn. we all went to Bed, I got but little res t . a t mr Moores.

Cloudy for n , raind after n . I wed part of my Peas. mr Livermore and his Sons here Planking Seller. Dolly finisht a Pair of trousers for Jon a , he Dind here. a t home. Capt Howland went Down y s after noon with his Sloop.

Clear. mrs Sally Stakpoole went from here, Cyrus waited on her with by water. I went to y e hook, Bot needles, pins and Combs. Borrowed mrs Carrs Side Saddle. I wed Gardin after I returnd, Cyrus helpt me. mr Ballard & Eph m at y e meddow, fencing it. mr Cottle paid me 2/8_ in Cash by mr Densmors yesterdy, mr Dany 1/6 y s Day. thee Letters I receivd by mr Hurd were 1 from Sist Barton of one from B r Collins of 8 inst, one from Sist Barton of y e 11th, one fr m Doct Barton of 15th which inform of y e Death of Leut Nichols s Lady of Oxford; Shee Expird april 14th 1791. Son Town Came here at Dusk, he has been to Pownalboro. his famely were as well as usual yester day when he left y m . at the hook. receivd Letters yesterd y . Son Town Sleeps here y s night.

Clear. I was Calld by mr Crane to go to See mrs Pond of winthrop, went as far as mr Sam l Cumings s , was there informd the Lady was safe Delivrd by mrs Whiteing, of a Dag t . I returnd home at y e 11 h morn attended by mr Eastman. I went to mr Pollards & mr Westons after n . Leu t Hains Learned Sleeps here. I bot 1 lb Tamerins of mr Baxter & a pinte of wine of mr Weston. a t mr Cumings s , Pollards & mr Westons. Leu t Learned here.
Clear. I have been at home. mr Ballard Ploughing, Eph m with him. a t home.

B Clear Some part of y e Day, the wind to y e South and it began to rain about 10h Evn g . mr Densmore Came here for me to go and See his little Son who remains in a Low State, his thigh is Sweld as much as when I saw it before. I recommended their their applying to Some person of Skill for y e Safety of y e Child. I went to mr Savages at Evn g . a t mr Densmores & mr Savages.
B Clear and very Pleas t . I have been at home. mr Hamlin & wife here. Some young Ladies here at Evn g . Gillb h and Cyrus went to Varsalboro. we had a Loin of Veal for Dinner. a t home, had Company.

Clear and very warm & pleas t till 2 h Pm, when a Squall Came on very Suden with haill and wind and it was Cold at Evn, but Clear. my girls went to Capt Belchers. mr Seth Williams & Field and their wives here. I have been at home. a t home. had Company. my Girls gone to Cap t Belchers.
Clear & pleas t . mr Ballard went Down with part of our furniture. my Girls washt. mr Andrews & mrs Bolton here. I have been at home. mrs Savage here. a t home, had Company.
Clear & warm. Naby Shaw Expird at 3 h pm & I returnd home at Evn. Son Town here. a t Ditoes. Son Town here. Death.

Clear. I was Calld at 2 h morn to See mr Blacks infant who is unwell, it was a little revivd before I arivd. I gave it a Syrrup of mullin which gave it relief. I went from there, Dind at mr Jones s . Calld at mr Savages & mr Craggs, his little Dagt is not so well as usual. I receivd a letter of may 23 by Esq r Cony from Sist Waters, informing they are well. a t mr Blaks & other Neigbrs. receivda letter from Sis t Waters of may 23.

Clear. I have been at home. mrs Livr mr & mrs White here. Es qr Coney Calld to See Dolly, recommends her taking Port Wine. Leut Hains Learned, Shuball Pitts & Juet Foster here all night. mr Ballard been to y e hook to a meeting of the Propriaters of Unity. a t home. mr Learned Sleeps here.

Clear & pleasant. I wrote to Sister Waters & went to mr Westons. Commited my Letters to him for Conveyance. Hannah Receivd a Letter from Ezra Davis of Boston of 17 th inst, wrote him by mr Weston with hoome I left 6/ to procure wine for Dolly. mrs Livermore here y s aft n . mr Adams & his Bro r Left here after Breakfast. a t mr Westons, Sent Letters by him to my friends. Jon a Sleeps here.

B Clear. I walk t to meeting. Revd mr Judson performd, he Descourst fore n from Jobe 1C 1V, aft n from Luke [ ]C 41 verse. I wrode from mr Densmores home, he & wife here. Jesse Bullin & Son Jon a Drank Tea here. at Meeting.
Clear and Very Cold. I have been ["at home." - implied] mr Ballard Planing. mr Foster & Ephm went to mr James Hinkleys for 4 Sheep, y e first we have ownd this 14 years. at home.
Clear and pleas t . mrs Savage & Polly & her Child n here, little Polly fell Down Seller. Old mrs Whealor Sleeps here. I have been at home. Cyrus returnd. at home. Son Towns famely well.

Clear, bu t a Chilly air. mr Ballard attended Funeral of mr Fletcher, he was interd at 4 h PM. I have been at home, Do not feel so well as I Could wish. my Girls Cleaning thee house & prepareing to remove. a t home. Funeral of mr Fletcher.

X. Birth mr Cottles 5 th Dag t , 9th Child. XX. Clear. mrs Cottle had mrs T and H Calld and was Safe Deld at 10 h morn of a fine Dag t . I left her as well as I Could Expect at 1 h PM. returnd by way of Col o Duttuns, the road very bad. I reacht home at 4. mrs Densm r here, Isaiah Manley here. a t Ditoes. Birth 12th. Cyrus went to tend mill for mr Robinson.
A Snow Storm. I have been at home Cutting raggs for Coverled. mr Ballard mending mill, Cyrus picking it. mr Fields helpt him. I was at home.

A Cloudy, misty Day. Foster went from here after breakfast. Jon a Dind here. mrs Porter Sett out after Dinner. I wed Gardin after n . mr Ballard went to y e hook. Cyrus & Ephm brot Down the last of our Potatoes. I was a t home.

X. Birth Eliab Shaws Dagt. X. Birth Alvin Neys Son XX. Cloudy. I was at Eliab Shaws, Calld there at 9 h Last Evn g . his wife ill all night & was Safe Deld a 8 h y s morn of a Dagt. I left her Cleverly. Came with Spead to alvin Neys who was there after me at 7h y s morn. I arivd at Neys at y e 11 h. his wife was Safe Delivrd at 2 h 30 m aft n of a Son. I receivd 6/ of him for my performance. left his wife & Son Cleaverly and arivd at home at half aft 6 very much fatagud, went to bed Early. we had a thunder Shower in y e night. a t mr Shaws, Neys. Birth 16 & 17. I have [not] Slept [since] I left [home]. mr Town & Jona at Pownalbor o .
Cloudy & warm. I have been [" a t home" - implied] Hannah got y e Coverleds out, 4 of y m and put in and wove Some of a web for Shirts for Eph m & Patty. a t home.
Clear. I went to mr Savages and Dres t the Little girls hand. Old mrs Whealor Sleeps here. mr Ballard been to Esq r Norths on a reference. a t mr Savages.

Foggy. I was at Cap t Herseys, was Calld Last Evn at 10 h , walkt as far as mr Craggs then rode. mrs Savage, Voce, Cowen were Calld. we were all there y e rest of y e night. Cloudy. mrs Thomas Came to Capt Herseys Early y s morn, went home before night; thee res t aftn. women tarried all night. mrs Hersey Seems more Comfortable. a t Ditoes.

Clear morn. I took Breakfast and Set out for home. Cros t the river on the ice, went in at mr Pollards. from there to mr Westons, tarried there thru the day & night. thee river opend, thee freshet high. Came from Capt Hersey s , y e river opend at 4 h pm.
Cloudy & Some Snow. Polly a little Easier. I left her near night. Calld at mr Taylors, his youngest Child has the meaSels. I arivd at home aft Sun Sett. a t Ditoes. Son Town went to Winthrop.

Snowd some. I left my Patients as well as Could be Expected in y e Care of mrs Walker and arivd at home before noon. I receivd 3/ of mr Greely in part for my performance. mr Bullin here, informs that he asisted Doc t Williams to open the Soar on Will m Densmores thigh. a t mr Gralys & Col o Sewalls.

Clear & pleas t . mr Ballard & Eph m went to y e meddow. I went to mr Savages, my Girls gone there y s Evn g . Ben n Bisbe s Dagt Sally Expird y e 3 rd inst & was interd this af tn . a t mr Savages. Death Ben n Bisbe s Dagt.
Clear. mr Baker Left here Early. Doc t Coney here to See Dolly. I have been at home. mr Ballard went to y e hook. Joseph Foster here to work. at home. Esq Coney here.

X. Birth James Moores 4 th Dag t . XX. rainy morn, Cloudy Day. mrs Moore Calld us up at 2 h morn, Shee was Safe Del d at 2 h 30 m morn of a fine Dagt, her fifth Child, and is Cleverly. I returnd home accompanied by mr Mortgain, find Dolly at work and much more Comfortable. mr Ballard Sowd flax this Day. the Town mett yesterday & Chose Danl Coney Esq r to represent this Town. Cyrus Came here. a t Ditoes. Birth 13th. receivd 7/6 of mr James Moore for this Days Performance, Sep t 30 1793.
Clear Except a Sprinkling of rain. I have been weading Gardin & planting mellion s & Beens. Dolly went to See Jon a . Cyrus Came here at Evn. a t home.

Cloudy fore n , the Sun Shone at noon, and Son Town & my Dagts Sett out for wins low. we had a Sprinkling of rain about Sun Sett, Showers went round us & thunder & Lightning. mr Ballard & Eph m Came from y e meddow. mrs Nabby Hodskins interd at 2 h PM. a t home. Funeral of mrs Hodskins. my Dagts gone to winslow.

B Clear. Jon a watcht with mr Page, Came here & went to Bed. mr Ballard returnd. he, Eph m & the Girls went to meeting by water. I wrode after n . mr Judson Dis Coars t from 2 Timothy 4 C 7 & 8 verse. the mr Livermores here at Evn g . I attended worship after n .
B Clear. mr Bullin & Lady & Son Dind here. Dolly wrode out. Parthina & Jon a here. Cyrus & Ephm Sought the young Cows Calf, found it Dead & Drove thee Cow home. I have been at home. a t home.
B Cloudy part of ye Day. Magr Keath here. my Dagt s went to mr Hamlins. I have been at home. mr Fields informd y t Nabby Hodskins is very low indeed. a t home.
B Clear & pleas t . I have been at home, hear mrs Brown is at mr Woodwards, her infant is put out to nurs. a t home.

B Clear & hott. mr Ballard & Cyrus went to meeting, a mr Emerson Rerformd. Augustus Ballard & his mother, Robert m c Causland & his wife here, Jon y White & his wife allso. we were much Alarmd about Eph m , the circumstance was this; he went up Chamber, laid down on Some bd Cloaths & fell asleep. we went to mr Livermors and mr Kennadys to Seek him. I had look d on Every Bed and found him not. a thought turnd in my mind to Search again & found him asleep. at home. Sist Williams & others here. we were alarmd about Ephm.

Clear morn, Cloudy aft n , rain at Evn g . mr Ballard went to Winthrop. mr Weston & Lady here. I have been at home, my Girls washt. Joseph Foster work t here. Seth J.Foster informs me mrs Brown is Delireous yet. a t home. mr Ballard at Winthrop. mrs Weston here.

Clear. I have been at home. Shuball Hinkleys wife was here. I have been Doing hous work & weading gardin. Hannah wash t & Bak t & wash t the Kitchen floar. Dolly very weak & low, not able to Sett up but very little. Thom s Smyle Dind here. a t home. Dolly is very low.
Clear. Dolly had a faint turn. I went to See Nabby Hodskins after I had wed one onion Bed, find her very low. I tarried all night & watcht. a t mr Hodskins, watcht with his Dagt.
Clear. mr Ballard been Surveying, rode by mr Jones. mr ss Livermore & Cumings here, Drank Tea. Cyrus & Ephm spent y e Day after our Sheep, found them not. a t home. mrs s Liverm r & Cumings here.

Clear. I have been at home, finish t my Dagt Towns Stockins & Began my Self a mittin. Dolly finish t weaving thee Lawn Hankerchiefs. mr Hamlin & Burtun, their wives & Childn, & Hannah Rockwood. mrs Livermore wove her own Hankerchief here. mr Ballard at Esq r Coneys y s morn, helpt mr Densmore fraiming & raising his House Fraim. at home, had Company. mr Densmores house was raisd. Independance observd.

Clear & very warm. I gatherd String Beens for Dinner, we had Veall from mr Pollards. mr Ballard went to Jon a s , Cyrus to Cobbecy. I went to See mrs Livermore, Shee is not so well as Shee has been of late. we Cleand our Well y s day. I was a t mr Livermores.
Clear. I have been at home. mr Ballard went to the meddow, my Girls to mr Hamlins. mrs Benjamin Brot my yarn. a t home. mrs Ben n here, my Girls gone out.
Clear. Dolly was Sick, mrs Livermore to See her. I was Calld to See James Moores wife. mr s Shaws Dagt interd after n . a t James Moores, mrs Welman allso.
Clear. I have workt in my Gardin. mr Ballard & Sons workt on y e road. Hannah put a web into y e Loome. been a t home.
Clear. I have been to See mrs Livermore, Shee is unwell. mr Learned & Foster went from here after Breakfast. mr Ballard went to Wiscasset. a t mr Livermores.

Clear. I houghd my plants by the Door, went to mr Liverm rs . Came home, wed onions. Son Town Came here, informs his family are well & that Thomas Sewalls wife was Delivd last Lords Day. mr Ballard been to runn y e lines round his land at the north End of y s town. Polly Livermore here on a visit. Dolly not So well as usual. Son Town Sleeps here. a t mr Livrm rs . Son Town Sleeps here. mr Ballard been runing lines for him Self.
Snowd this morn. mrs Whelor tarried here all day, Sleeps here. I have been at home, Dolly finish t makeing a Coat for Eph m . at home. Death of mrs Gardner, Pittstown.

Clear & pleast. mr Ballard and Eph m went to plough the Gardin which we are to improve. thee Bridg over y s Crick was finisht Covering this Day. mr Childs & Burtun, their Ladies & mr Patridg, & mrs Rockwood here. I have been at home. mrs Savage & Polly Calld here. a t home, had Company.
Clear. Dolly wrode as far as mr Pollards. I went to See mrs Ney. mr Ballard been Surveying for mr Cragg & Thwing. thee wind was very high. a t Cap t Ney s .

mr Caton Sent me 6/ by my Son Cyrus. Cloudy morn, Clear & hott aftn. mr Ballard went to Mag r Smiths. Cyrus Bro t Jon a s things Down here, hee Sleeps here. I have been at home. mrs Liverm r here. at home. Jon a moovd here.

Clear & hott. I have been very unwell. I was Seisd with thee Colic last night and got but little rest. I have Cleand a little Cabbage Seed. Polly Densm r here, Says her Marm is Some better. Shee has had a tissick. at home.

Clear. I left mrs Badcock, walk t home. Dolly is poorly. Foster to work here. finisht my [Shoes], I went to mr Pitts Store, Bo t 1 quart W E Spirrit, 1 Skein of Black Silk and 2 knots off Thread, all cost 2/3. I Calld at mr Pollards & mr Densmores, went to See mrs Welch who is unwell. mrs Lucy Norcross & mrs Pheba Hinkly here. mr Ballard work t on mr Densm rs house. a t Ditoes. had Comp y .

Clear and Cold. I have been at home. Hannah is gone to watch with Polly M c kethney. Dolly is unwell. I made her peneroyal Tea. Saml Fosters Legg amputated aft n . a t home. old mrs PresCotts arm Cutt off this morn.
B Clear foren & warm, Cloudy af tn . I attended worship all Day, my Girls in y e aft n . mr Smith performd, took his tex t in John 1 st C & 1 st V. there was full meeting. a t meeting.
Clear Part of y e Day. mr Ballard gone to Survey for mr Gilley. I have workt in my gardin. mr Haywood & mr Hurd took Tea here. Hurd Sleeps here. a t home. Haywood & Hurd here.

Clear. I rose late, workt Some in my gardin, then Lucy & I went to See old Lady Coney. Dind with y e Doct s Lady. Calld Calld [sic] at mr Cumings s , returnd home a t 3 h pm & went to mr Livermores. mrs Black Came here. I was Sent for home. mrs Livr mr & Daug t Drank Tea with us. mr Town returnd from Pounalboro. mr Pitts here at Evn g . a t [Deacon] Coneys & other Neigh rs .
Cloudy. mr Ballard work t for mr Densmore. I have been at home, piqut wool, wed Some in my gardin. mr Sam l Norcrose & wife & mrs Dana here. Foster made Ephm s Shoes. a t home, had Comp y .
Clear & Colder. I have been at home, made Candles, 18-1/2 DZ wt . mr Pitts here. Dolly has wove 10-1/2 yds. a t home. mr Bullin paid wheat here, 2-1/2 B l .
Clear. I went to Dress the Childs hand at mr Savages. Old Lady Bolton, mrs Savage & Chamberlin here aft n . Dolly wrode out to mr Hamlins. a t mr Savages. Dolly rode out.

Clear morn. I Took Breakfast at mr Westons and went to mr Hamlins & Burtuns. Dind with mrs Hamlin. Lucy Cassety went from Cap t Burjess this Day. I Came from Hamlins, Calld to see mrs Childs and mrs Pollard, then prosceded homeward. met mr Ballard who Conducted me home tho thro Some difuculty. I find my family as well as usual and that Jon a has Securd his Boards. rain & high wind in y e night. at mr Westons & other Neig rs .

Cloudy morn, the Sun Shone middle of y e Day, a thunder Shower near night; a N E Storm followd. I Sett Beets & Cammomile. mr Ballard returnd from Coart. thee French man acquited, mrs Barker imiprisond for Defaming Polly Noble. Sally Cox and Son Jon a Sleep here. at home. Sally Cox Sleeps here. I planted Cucumbers.

Cloudy & Some rain. mr Ballard went to Voce es , Cyrus to Cobyse mill for mr Foster, who made Ephm a pair of Calf Skin Shoes. went to mr Kennadys & mrs Welches, Shee is Some more Comfortable. a t mr Kennady s & mrs Welches.
B Clear & warm. mr Ballard, my Self and all my Sons attended worship. Juett Foster is publisht to Hannah Thompson, another couple allso. a t meeting.
B Clear and Cool. I have been a t home. we had Cabbage this Day. mr Densmore here, Says his Son is mending. a t home.

B a Storm y morn, wind N E the rain abated after we Dind, & Sally Cox went away from here. mr Ballard and Jon a only of our famely attended Public worship. the Storm Continues. I have been at home. we had Peas, the first from my gardin y s year. a t home. Polly Densmore here, Says two of y e Child n are Sick. we had green Peas.
Cloudy morn, Clear middle of the day, Cloudy Evn. I have been at home. Juet Foster went from here. mr Ballard made a plann. a t home.
Clear and pleast. mr Stephen Jones and his Brother Peters Lady Dind & took Tea here. mr Black, his Lady & Polly Pollard took Tea. mrs Savage here at Evng. a t home. we had Company.

Cloudy & rain. I Sett Cammomile roots. mrs Voce & Dagt Dind & took Coffee with us. I went to See mrs Livermore, Shee Seems very unwell. my Girls went in y s aft n , find her a little better. Cyrus bro t 2 Bushel meal home from Jonses mill y s Evin g . a t mr Livermores. mrs Voce & Dagt here, mr James Page allso.

Clear. my Dagts wash t at y e river, Dryd & irond. mr Ballard went to his meddow, Carried utencels for geting hay. Parthenia went to work for mrs Pollard. I have been at home, Did house work. a t home. Parthenia went to work for mrs Pollard.
Clear. mr Ballard been to mr Vahns. I have been at home. mr Cragg wrode here, but is feeble. at home, gatherd one musk mellon yesterd & 4 this.

Clear. mr Ballard is 66 years old this Day. I have been at home, wd Gardin fore n n . Dolly wrode down to Cap t P. Browns & up as far as mr Westons y s morn. Hannah & Shee went to mr Livermores after n . mrs Livr mr was here. a t home. mr Ballards Birth Day. Dolly more Comfortable

Clear & warm. I returnd home foren, left mrs Hodskins a little revivd. I Calld at mr Densmores to See Thomas who is very unwell. find Dolly as well as Shee generally is. I went to mr Livermors, find his Lady unwell. mr Dummer & Capt Hussey & Juet Foster here. mr Ballard & Sons Sett out to fence the Meddow at 3 h PM. Cyrus Came home. Nabby Hodsk n no better. a t D t oes & other Neig rs . mr Ballard gone to fence his Meddow.

X. Birth Rob t Fletchers Dagt. XX. Clear. mr Ballard & Ephm went to y e meddow. I put Rob t Fletcher wife to bed with her 4 th Dagt at 30 m PM. left her Cleverly, fee receivd June 19 th . a t mr Fletchers, Birth [14 th ].
Clear. I have been at home, Sett Beet & Turnip plants. mr Ballard went to thee hook to Survey for Capt Smith of Washington. at home, Sett [plants].

Clear & very warm. mr Ballard & Ephm gone to Rafft Boards & take to the hook for mr Stanley. mr Cottle paid me 3/4 in Coffee, which Sattisfies me, for attending his wife April 27 th . mr Livermore made me a pres t of a quarter of lamb. mrs White, mr M c Causland & his wife here. Son Towns famely well. at home, had Comp y . we used y e last water our well aforded this Day. mr Ballard & Ep m gone up after a rafft which paid of Coming out of y e Crick the mor n tide.
Clear morn, Cloudy aft n . I have been at home. Old mrs Cowen here, mrs Savage allso. my Girls went there at Evn. mr Ballard Carrying Down our Efects. a t home, fixing to remove.
At mr Moores, his wife So ill her women were Calld. we were all there thro the night. at Ditoes.
Clear. I have been at home, wed gardin. mrs Hannah Rockwood here. mr Ballard & Sons workt on y e roade. a t home.

Clear. mrs s Livermore & Dinsmore and Polly took Tea with me. I have been at home, quilld for Hannah, workt Some in my Gardin & knitt Some. mr Ballard returnd, mr Liverm r Drank Tea with him. a t home.

Clear. mr Ballard & Cyrus Surveying. I wed gardin foren. Esq r Coney here. Son Town left here homewd bound. mrs Welch here. mrs Livermore & I went to mr Whiles. Old mr Hinkley here. mr Adams & Sprague here who presented an Election Sermon to my Dagt for her Daddy. mr Ballard did not return, Cyrus did. a t mr Whites. mr Adams left mr Robbins Election Sermon.

Clear. mrs Whealor left here. I have been at home, knitt Some & began to fix for remooving. I was informd that Old mr Fletcher is very Sick. mr Fields & Eunice Hodgkins here. at home, hear mr Fletcher is Sick.

Cloudy. I workt Some in y e Gardin, went to mr Livermores aft n . mr Ballard went to Survey for mr Briggs. my Girls Sowd gardin Seeds. mr Ellis & Jon a Dind here. mrs Livermore was here, mr Gillman allso. a t mr Livermors.
Cloudy & Some rain. I have been mending old garments. mrs Welch was here. mr Ballard & Eph m went to Seek our Cannoe, found it and bro t it home, Bro t 28 lb pork allso. at home.

Clear & very warm. mr Ballard returnd from mr Lees. I went to mr Westons, Bot 3 lb Pott ash at /6, to mr Burtuns, Left four Dollars & an order on mr Cogsil of Boston for 3 M of Shingles left by Hains Learned in Oct 88 Which he is to purchase articles with for me in Boston. we receivd a letter from Brot r Elijah of the 21 st inst, informing our friends were in health. a t mr Burtuns & Westons & Densmores, Shee is got Better. receivd a Letter from [Br] Elijah of 21 inst.
Showers fore n , Clear aft n , a Shower a t Evn. I was Calld a little before night to See Asa Masons wife, got there at Day light down, had no Sleep y s night. a t Masons. Liddia [went] home.
Cloudy, raind fore n . I have workt in y e Gardin. Son & Dagt Town Came here, brot Dolly s Sheep and wool. mr Ballard Came home at Evn. a t home. Son & Dag t Town Came here.

Clear & Pleast. my Child n left here at 9 h morn Bound for home, mr Pitts allso. I went to work in y e gardin. Cyrus got wood & went to Pitts town. I have workt in y e gardin all Day. mr Thorp Came for his Shirts which Dolly made, paid 5/3 d for makeing. a t home. Son & Dagt Town left here.
Clear. mr Ballard Surveying for Eben z Church. I have been at home, gatherd ripe Beet Seed, mended hoes. my Dagts went to mrs Welches. at home.

B Clear & very warm. Elisab h Cleark here, informs me mr Pages inf t is not so well as they Could wish. I went to see it, gave Directions &C. Jona here, took Breakfas t & Dind with us. mr Page gave me 6/ as a reward for Servis Done. Old Lady Coney is not so well. Polly Liver mr & my girls pick t Strauburys. a t mr Pages.

B Clear & very pleas t . I have been at home, Cyrus here. mr Eben z Davis of Charlt n , & Hains Learned Sleeps here. mr Davis informs y t Sist Barton got to Bed with a Dag t (Son) before he left Oxford. at home. Eben z Davis & H. Learned Sleep here.
B Clear. mr Livemr s & Lady here. I have been at home, my Dagts to mr Hamlins. a t home.

B X. Birth Jery Whites Dagt. XX. Cloudy & rain. Cyrus a t home. I was Calld to See mrs White at 4 h pm, find her in Labour. her women we re Calld & Shee Safe Deld at the 7th h. I tarried all night. thee inft, a feemale, mother and Child Cleverly, receivd fee Oct r 25 th . a t mr Whites. Birth [26] th .
Clear & very warm. I wed my onions, was allmost overcome with y e heat. Juet Foster Drank Tea with us. mr Pitts here. my Girls washt y s day. a t home. Esq Coney returnd from [Coast].
Clear. mr Ballard & Cyrus went to pitts town, returnd. mr Balld then went to Esq r Lovjoys to Look of a mill place. mrs Lois Hinkley & Lucy Cleark here. a t home.
rainy. I left mr Whites after Breakfast, his wife Seems more Comfortable. I Scalt my pickles. Jason Coney here. mr Ballard paid him what he owed him. I laid down & Slept this aft n . a t mr Whites.

Clear & very pleas t . mr Learned left here after Breakfast homewd Bound. mr Davis aft Dinner by whome I wrote to Bro r Collins, Elijah Barton & Sis t Waters. mr Ballard went to thee hook Twice y s Day. Phebe Hinkley here at even. my Girls Washt and piecing Bed quillts. they went to mr Burtuns attended by Moses Pollard. it raind Soon after they left home. a t home. mr Davis left here. I wrote to my friends. my girls went to mr Burtuns. mrs Barton Came here this night.

Clear. old Lady White went home & Rebeckah Came to Nurs. I returnd home at 11 h morn. I Spent the aft n & Evn at mr Westons. Slept at mr Hamlins. it raind in thee night. a t Dittoes, mr Westons & Hamlins.

Cloudy part of y e Day. I went to mr Catons. Calld at mr Pollards, Jonses, Boltons, Voces & Densmores. Came home and went to mr Shuball Hinkleys. Cap t Savages Lady Came home with me & Sleeps here. Shee informd me that Sally Peirce Swore a Child on my son Jon a & he was taken with a warrent. mr Abisha Cowen is his Bonds man for appearance at Coart. a mr Catons & Hinkleys. mrs Savage here. Nathan l Norcross married to Eunice Hodskins. two [Blac ] allso.
Cloudy fore n . our men went to y e meddow. it began to rain at noone, mr Ballard & Cyrus returnd. Foster here to work. I have been at home. mr Sawyer here. a t home, the men to meddow.
Cloudy fore n , Clear aft n . I have been at home. mr Ballard Thrash t Peas. my Dagt s wash t at y e river. at home.

Clear. I workt in my Gardin fore n . Dolly wrode to mr Hamlins, he & his wife here. I Churnd & made a Chees. mr Ballard Complains of faintness y s aft n . my Corn & Beens & Peas & Beets are Come up. Hannah planted Cucum rs . a t home.

rainy. mr Densmore Came here for me to go & See his little Son. thee rain abated & I went about noon. we adminesterd a Clister, the Child revivd. Betty Complains of pain in her head. Liddia had a fitt of the Collic, Anne is poorly with a Cold. I tarried till near night, then walkt home. Cyrus been to the meddow. mr Ballard, he & Epm & John Savage Came home. mr Bal d went to mr Pollards on a reference. a t mr Densmores to See his Children who are unwell.

Clear & very warm. mr Ballard left home bound for Seven mile brook. I have been at home. Rufas Ballard Dind here. Old mr Hinkley & Cap t Hersey here. my Girls alter d their hatts into Bonnits. Hannah & Parthenia went to mr Whites a t Evn. a t home. mr Ballard gone to 7 Mile Brook.

Clear fore n , a Shower after n , Some haill here; a Considerable Damage Done by it at y e fort. mr Ballard got his Boards Down & paid mr Stanley what was Due to him from us and Cyrus. I have been a t home. mr Livermore got in part of his Hay. a t home. a Shower.

Cloudy morn, Clear aft n . mr Ballard has been Surveying for mr J. Jones. Cyrus tending Mill for P. Jones, my Dats & Parthenia to help mrs Hinkley quillt. I have been at home, took Care of my pickeles, gathering Seeds & knitting. at home. my Girls went to mr Hinkleys. mrs Shaw Sent me Some Vinegar.
Clear. we removd from the mills to the house which was old Leut Howards, and Peter Jones went to the mills with his famely. we removd our famely. mrs Savage & Polly help t me.

B X. Birth Eze kl Pages Son. XX. Clear & warm. I was Calld at 1 h morn to See mr Ezekiel Pages Lady who was in Labour, and was Safe Deliv d of a Son at y e 6th hour. I left mother & Child Cleverly & returnd home at y e 11th h, took a knap of Sleep. we dind on the Haslit of a veal. mr Livermore, his Lady & Brother Drank Tea here. a t mr Pages. Birth 15 th .my Child n all Dind with us this Day.
Clear morn, fine Showers after n . I Sett Cucumbers & mellon plants. mr Ballard got French Turnips and Sett. mrs Kennady here. a t home, Sett plants.

Clear & hott. mr Johnston & wife, mr Woodward, Cap t Springer & my son Jon a Dind. mrs Anny Bullin Drank Tea & Sleeps here. I have been to make a Syrrip for mrs Livermore. mr Ballard been to his Land at y e uper end of y s Town. a t mr Livermo[res].

Clear. I have workt in my gardin. mr Ballard is Surveying, tarries y s night. Clarrissia Barton & Lucy [ en s ] Dind here. Parthenia went to mr Foots. mrs Livermore here. Deacon Coneys house rais d . a t home. Parthena went to mr Foots. Deacon Coneys house rais d .

X. Birth Capt Norcro ss Dag t . XX. Clear. I was Calld at the 1st h morn to See Capt Norcross Lady who was in Labour. I arivd there a 2 h . Shee was Safe Del d at 5 h of a Dagt which wd 9-1/2 lb . I left her at 10 arivd very Comfortable. arivd at home at 1 h pm, the rideing bad. Henry Badcok paid me 6/ in Tea and Sugar for attending his wife in Travil Feby 28, 1790. I Eat new Chees at mrs Husseys. a t wido Husseys. Birth 10th. mrs Gardn r interd.

Clear for n , Cloudy af t . I workt in the gardin all day Diging grass roots, rakeing them of, planting Beens. Eph m Sett Cabbage Stumps, Beets, Carrots & parsnips & Turnips. Dolly wrode to mr Jans s . Cyrus Came here from mr Robinsons at Varsalbor o where he has been to tend mill Since Wedensday last. a t home. workt in my Gardin.
Cloudy morn, Clear & hott middle of y e Day, Cloudy & Litning Evn g . I have not been So well as I Could wish. mr Fields has kep t our young horses pounded ever Since monday morn. a t home.

Clear Day, Cloudy Evn g . mr Ballard Brus d his Leg a halling timber. I applyd Camphere. he attended Lectere after n . John JohnSton took Breakfast here. I went to mr Livermores, Polly and Alice were unwell. I wash t our Cloath, Dried it and Putt in Ley. there was a Church meeting held. a t mr Livermores. Dolly Spun 34 notts of Linning yarn y s Day. Ingrahams Dagt born.

Birth Asa Masons Son. Clear. I am at Masons Still. went & gatherd Black berries. mrs Mason grew ill after n . Calld her women at Evn & was Safe Deld at 10 h of a Son. we tarried thro the night. my patient is Cleverly. had no Sleep y s night. a t Ditoes. Birth 18 th .

B Clear. I Sett out for home Soon after Day, walkt as far as mr James Savages then Rode out as far as mr Isaac Savages, his sons brot me Down by water. I Searcht my Cloaths immediately after I arivd, found a vas t number of Flees on them. I Calld at mr Pittsis, Boltons & Savages. mrs Dorcas Pollard here for Parthenia. a t Ditoes.
B Clear & very warm. mr Ballard & Ephm attended public worship. we had a Shower after meeting. John Gardner & Arther Lithgo Esqrs Calld here. a t home.

B Clear & warm morn. mr Ballard, Jon a and Hannah attended public worship and I wrote to Brot r Collins, Elijah Barton & Sis t Waters to Send by mr Burtun. I Sent him 7/11-2/1 by Hannah to purchace things in Boston for me. mr Pollard and his wife here. I was Calld at Sun Sett to Sam l Badcocks wife, went by water. I was Seis d after I gott there with thee Collic. Did not Sleep any this night. at Saml Badcoks. I wrote to my [friends] at Oxford. I had the Collic y s night.
Clear. mr Ballard went to Esq r Norths as an Evidence, mr Town to Pownalboro, my three Dag ts & Parthena to Capt Filly Browns. I have been at home, Bak t Cakes. mr Smyle Sleeps here. a t home.

Clear & warm Excep t a Light Shower. mrs Lidia White & mrs Rockwood here. mr Ballard bro t our flax from mr Jones s . Cyrus [Crd] Jonathans Saw here & went to Pitts town to mill. Leu t Pollard here, informd me that mr Page went home y s day. my Girls wash t . Dolly Spun Shoe Thread. a t home Sewing and Knitting. Ephm went to School.
rainy. I was at mr Badcocks, very ill with the Collic all day, had Ease at Evng. a t Dittoes.

Clear & warm. mr Ballard & Sons went to y e Meddow, Cyrus to Pitts town. mr Foster here to work. mr Ben n Porter, Densmore & y r wives, master Eaton and mrs Livermore Drank Tea here. my Dagts have washt & SCourd floors. I have been at home, knitt Some. a t home, had Company.
Clear. at Dittoes & at Jery Badcocks. a t Dittoes.
Clear. Jona helpt kill 3 Bares by mr Ab m Pages. Dolly is very Sick. Son Town Sleeps here. I have been at home. mrs Liverm r & Densmr here. a t home, gatherd a ripe water Mellion.

Clear, a Brisk S wind. Some Vessels arivd. I went to mr Livermores with mrs Densm r foren n to help mr Thos Hinkley quillt, Dolly with me aft n , Hannah & Parthena went at Evn g . mr Ballard workt at mr Densmores. a t mr Hinkleys to quillt, my Girls allso.

Cloudy & Some rain. we put a Bed Quillt into the fraim. I went to See mrs Densmore after n , Shee is not so well as usual. Jack Livermore Cutt his ankle, took a piece of Bone off. my girls Bakt Cakes & Pies. at mr Densmores.

rainy fore n . I took Breakfs t with mr Hamlin, Dind with mr Burtun, Drank Coffee with mrs Childs. Calld at mr Pollards & Westons and arivd at home at 7 h Evn g . mr Ballard been to Varsalboro. mrs Burtun made me a pres t of 2 dz Bisquit. a t mr Hamlins & other Neighr s .

Clear. mr Ballard went to mr Browns for his mare, had her Bled in y e mouth. Shee bled all the way home & Continued to bleed an hour or two after Coming home. we at length filld y e incision with fur & it Ceast. mrs Livermr & I went to mr Sam l Norcrosses, their Marm & mr Phillips wife there. mrs Barton & my Dag t Hannah went to mr Densmores. at mr Sam l Norcrosses. our Mare Bled Excessively.

Clear. I have been at home. mr Burtun, his wife & Sister, mrs Hann h Rockwood, Patty Bullin & Phebe Hinkley here. mr Ballard returnd from pittston, brot a letter of 25 ult from Doc t Barton, I wrote an answere. thee Moon Eclips t this Evn g . at home, receivd a Letter from Br r Barton, wrote an answer.

Clear & pleast. mr Ballard & Hodges went to Pitts town for y e Boat, got her up as far as here. William Haywood & Moses Pollard Dind here. Hannah washt, Dolly weaving. I have been at home. mr Weston Calld here. mrs Sherburns Infant was interd. at home. funeral of mrs Sherburns inft.
Cloudy morn. I was Calld from the Doct s to See mrs Tubs, shee removd to Thom s Hinkleys to be Sick, was very unwell thro y e Day. I was Calld at 11 h pm to See mrs Wesson. at mr Tubs & Westons.
Clear. I was at mr Westons Selvesters & Doct Colmans. at mr Selvesters.

Clear & warm. mr Adams & Brother here. John Johnston & Jon a Dind. mr Savage & I went to mr Livermores, from there to mr Densmores; their Child unwell. a t mr Livermores & Dinsmores. mrs Savage left here.
Clear. mrs Badcock is more Comfortable. a t Ditoes.
Showers. mr Ballard Sett out for the meddow, met the men & returnd home. I have been at home, knitt Some, workt in my Gardin Some. mrs Tubs here. a t home.
rainy. I have been at home. mr John Jones Sleeps here. a t home.

Clear. I wed gardin foren. mrs Liverm r here. Jon a Dind with us, we had greens, the first we have gather d from our Gardin. mrs Livermore & I went to See mrs Coney who is very poorly. mr Ballard went to his meddow, Saw mrs Brown & her Mother who Came to town y s day. a t Doc t Coneys. Ephm went to mr Bullins, his Sons wife is Sick.

Clear. mr Hurd & Robbinson here from Oxford, Brot Letters from Bro r & Sist Barton & Collins, which informs my friends all well. I went to mr Densmors, the Child got releif by phissick & Clister. I Set out home. was Calld upon & went & put y e Grave Cloaths on mrs Nabby Hodskins, returnd home late. a t Ditoes & mr Hodskins, his Dagt Expird. mrs T Slakpool Sleeps here.

Clear & very warm till Evn, when the wind Blew from y e N. a Smart Shower. my girls went to mr Bullins by water, his Sons waited on Hannah & Parthenia home. Dolly Tarries all night. Benn mrs Livermore been here, mr Sawyer for mr Ballard to Survey. a t home whitening our Hand kerc fs . Porter here.
Clear & hott Except a Shower. mr Ballard is gone to Pownalboro. I have houghd gardin Some. thee girls washt, Cyrus & Eph m help t mr Livermore about his Hay. a t home. there was a light Shower.

Clear. I left mrs Badcock, walk t home. Dolly is poorly. Foster to work here. finisht my [Shoes], I went to mr Pitts Store, Bo t 1 quart W E Spirrit, 1 Skein of Black Silk and 2 knots off Thread, all cost 2/3. I Calld at mr Pollards & mr Densmores, went to See mrs Welch who is unwell. mrs Lucy Norcross & mrs Pheba Hinkly here. mr Ballard work t on mr Densm rs house. a t Ditoes. had Comp y .

Clear. mr Ballard been Surveying for mr Martin at y e hook. I have been to See mrs Cumings, mrs Sewall there, mrs Voce & Betsy allso. I went to Doc t Coneys, thee old Lady is more Comfortable. at mr Cumings s & Doct Coneys. Son Town Sleeps here.

Clear Except a sprinkling of rain. mr Ballard went up to y e mills. Jon a & Son Town Came down with Loggs. Town Came here, informs me his wife is not so well as hee was, his little Dag t is Better. a t home. Began my Gardin. Son Town here.
Clear. I have been at home, made 13 d zn of Candles. Cyrus run 18 Spoons. mr Ballard makeing Planns of Unity. Tho s Smiley Dind here. we Sett Cabbage & Turnip Plants. a t home, made Candles.

Clear fore n , Showers aft n . mr [sic] Anne Bullin went from here after Dineing. I wed Gardin Some, helpt Sett plants. mrs Densmore Sent me 80 Cabbages & Turnips. mr Chamberlin here. mr Ballard went to mr Carrs, receivd 6/ for a plann of unity. Hannah Got her webb out, 45 yds. a t home. Hannah got her webb out.

Clear. I have been at home, have no t been quite So well as usual. mr Ballard returnd, has Surveyd his land lying at the North End of y s town. he informs me that Jona is not well. Dolly has wove 6 Hand kerchiefs y s Day, & Hannah 2. Parthenia returnd. a t home. mr Ballard Came home from Surveying.

B Cloudy morn, began to rain at 10 h morn. mr Ballard, my Self & Cyrus attended public worship. the Revd mr Little of Wells performd. I Dind at mr Pollards. thee text fore n was Luke 10-20, but rather rejoice that your names are written in Heaven. after n y e 12 verse, one thing is needfull. a t meeting. Revd mr Little Performd.

B Clear & pleast. mr Brd wl Livermore Calld on me this morn, favrs me with Carrying a Letter to Doct Waters. I went to See mr Densmores famely, the inft is very ill; the other Child n much as they have been. I Came home, Supt & went back & watcht. Elephelet Robbins Came there for me to go to mr Pollards, Betsy Heuston being very Sick, but I Could not go. at mr [Densmors].
B Clear. I have been a t home, wrote to Broth r Barton & Sister & Collins. Jon a took Breakfas t & Dind here, he Bro t us part of a Smok t Salmon. a t home, wrote Letters.

Clear. I was Cleaning y e Door way for Setting plants. Eph m was Choping & a Chip Struck my face, which hurt me much. I applyd Camp hr . mrs Davenport here, Shee & I went to mr Livermores, mr Ballard & y e Girls there allso to Tea; mr Fields & wife, mr Norcross & mrs Hodskins & mr B. Livermr, & Jon a Devenport. a t mr Livermor s . mrs Devenport & others there.

rain foren, the Sun Shone a little while af t n, Showers after 6 h Evng. mr Adams, thee Printer, & another Gentleman with him, putt in here by reason of y e rain, tarry all night. I have been at home. a t home, workt Some in my Gardin.
Cloudy. I Came home. Cyrus went to his mill, Dolly to mr Densmores. the ice was Stopt here ys morn, movd again at Evn g tide. a Smart rain in the night which opind the river. a t Ditoes.

Clear, a frost y s morn. I hough d my Corn & Beens. my Dagts & Parthena went to mr Hamlins. mrs s White & Suky Norcross here. I went to mr Livermores with them. a t mr Livermores, my Dagts to mr Hamlins.

Clear. mr Ballard went to the hook to a propriators meeting. my Girls wash t the Floors & Scourd y e puter. mrs Hamlin & Sally walkt here in the fore n , her Husband, mr Burtun & wife & Son Came Down by water aft n , mrs Jackson & Dagt & little Son, mrs Pollard & her Supt here. I have been at home. a t home, had Company.
Clear Except a Shower. mr Ballard and Sons returnd from y e meddow. I have been at home, am informd y t mr Cragg is So Sick that he is Confind to his Bed. a t home.

Dolly wen t to mr Densmores. A Smart N E wind with a powerf l rain the morning, Cleard of pleas t before noon. Dolly went to mr Densmores to Learn the Taylors art. I wish her Sucseess & happiness. Ephm gone to hall hay for mr Hamlin, he returnd withou t doing it. I have been at home, Spun wick yarn & made the wicks for 21 Doz n Candles. a t home. raind again at Evn.

Birth Sam l Badc ks Son. Clear. mr Ballard returnd. Capt Fillebrowns Lady here. Dolly is better. I was Calld at 5 h 30 m Ev n to See Saml Badcoks wife, arivd at 7. Shee was Delivd of a fine Son at 10. I tarried all night. a t Saml Badcoks. Birth 19 th .I receivd 3 lb 1/4 unwasht wool of mr Badcock.

Clear part of y e Day, wind S Cloudy aft n . mr Ballard been to y e hook. mrs Savage & Dagt here. Dolly wrode to mr Burtuns, Brot home 8 y ds Chints which mr Burtun Bot for me at Boston, it Cost 3/10 pr yd. a Letter from Bro r Collins of August 28 informing my friends are all in health. I have been at home. am happy in hearing glad tydings from my friends a t So great a Distance. Jon [n] is gone to winslow. a t home, receivd a Letter from Bro Collins of ags t 28, refreshing to hear of y e health & prosperity of my Dear Connections who are hundrds of miles [from] me.

Clear. mr Ballard Surveyd for Capt Ney. my Girls had a quillting, got out one & partly quillted an other. thee Gen t men & Ladies Daunced in y e Evn. Polly Bisbee tarried all night. a t home, we had a Quillting.
Cloudy & Some rain fore n , Clear aft n . I have been to mr Densmores & mr Whites, Dres t their infants. mr Ballard bott 1 Bushel Apples of Cap t Dean @ 2/6. a t mr Densmrs & Whites.

Cloudy foren. mrs Barton Left here, homeward Bound. Dolly went to mr Wicksoms. I was Calld at Evn to See Jeremy Whites inft, gave it manna, annis Seed & Safron; it revivd. I tarried all night. I Scolt my pickles y s day. Cyrus Came here at Evn. a t Jery Whites, his inft unwell.

rainy till near night. I have been at home. Patty Bullin here. mr Ballard gitting wood. Eph m help t mr Densmor e git in potatoes. Jon a went to winslow & returnd at 10 h Evn. Son Towns famely are well. a t home.

Clear & Pleasant. mr Ballard Surveyd land y t mr Pollard Sold to Esq r Williams, made a Plann & wrote a Deed at Evn. mr Dagts went to help Thos Hinkleys wife quillt a Bed quillt. Ephm and Ezra went to Pitts town. I have been at home. we got our Beets in. mrs Liverm r here at Evn. W. Haywood Sleeps here. Dolly tarried till Late. a t home, my Girls went to quillting. Doc t Colman removd to the hook.

Birth mr Tubs s Dag t . Clear. I was Calld from mrs Weston to mrs Tubs (at 2 h 30 m Morn) who was Safe Deld at 10h 03m of a Dagt. her Labour Severe but I left her Cleverly a t 12 h & returnd to mr Westons. a t Di to . Birth 28 th .
Cloudy & a Chilly air. mr Wesson Calld me from the hook last Evng. I went to see [his] Child. at mr Wessons.

X. Birth mr Wessons Son. XX. Clear & Cool. I was Calld at 3 h morn to See mrs Wesson, Shee was Safe Deld at 4h. 30m. of a fine Son. mrs Pollard, Duttun & Hamlin assisted. Shee and Child are Cleverly. I recievd 12/ as reward. mr Ballard Sett out for to Explore the Country Back of fort Hallifax, inployd by this Common wealth. I tarried at mr Westons, mrs Filleb n & Sally Floid allso. a t mr Wessons. Birth 30 th . at [mr Wess s ]. a rainy night.

A Clear, Serene morn, over Cast day. mr Ballard, my Self & Jon a attended Funeral of Betsy Heuston who Expird at her Uncle Pollards. Shee was interd at 4 h pm. I Calld to See mr Densmores Child n , find them a little more Comfortable. my Dag t Hannah is very unwell y s Evn. I gave her Some Cammomile & Camph r . Shee Batht her feet & went into a warm Bed. I hope it will relieve her. I attended funeral of Betsy Heuston.

mr Caton Sent me 6/ by my Son Cyrus. Cloudy morn, Clear & hott aftn. mr Ballard went to Mag r Smiths. Cyrus Bro t Jon a s things Down here, hee Sleeps here. I have been at home. mrs Liverm r here. at home. Jon a moovd here.

Cloudy. our men went to the meddow. Cyrus returnd at Evn. Liddia Foster & her Brothers Sleep here. I have been to Jeremy Whites; old Lady Coutch, mr White, Kenny & y r wives there. Sally Whites youngest Child is Sick. a t mr Whites.

X. Birth Esq r Juetts Dagt. XX. Clear & Pleas t . Jon a is gone to Winslow. I was Calld by Esq r Juett to See his Lady at 1 h pm, arivd at 2. Shee was Safe Deld at 3 of a Dag t , her 8 th Child; y e number of Sex are Equal. mrs Dearburn, Broads t , Shaw, Barry & Lang attendants. I wrode home alone, arivd at 9 Evn. the hors pestyrd me, but I got Safe thro. at Esq r Juetts. Birth 23 st .
Clear & very windy. I have tend the Cloath, been at home. Parthenia wove 8 yds. Dolly is not returnd. a t home.

Cloudy morn, Clear & very hott from noon to 3 when we had a very heavy Shower & hard thunder. mrs Welch helping Dolly Draw a piece of Huckaback. Cyrus Crosst ye river with y e heffer. a t home, houghd gardin forenoon.

Clear after n . my Girls wash t & went to help Tho s Hinkleys wife quillt. mr Ballard been to Pitts town, Cyrus to Varsalbor o . Son Town been to Pownalbor o , he Sleeps here y s night. Judy Hueston here. I have been at home, gatherd Seeds & Cammomile, mint & hysop. at home. Son Town Sleeps here.
rainy morn, Cleard off aft n . the Ladies went away. my Dagt is Cleverly. a t Does.

Cloudy & a Brisk South wind. Son Town left here. mr Ballard went to mr Jones s , had his mare Dock t . I have been at home. Cyrus Came here at Evn g . Capt Lathrop went up with a Sloop y s aft n . Mag r Getchel Expir d this Day. a t home. mr Town left here. I wrote to Doc t Barton. a Death.

A A Clear morn, overcast Day, Snow at Evn. mr Ballard went to hear mr Smith, he Performd in the Acadame at y e hook. I have been at home. Cyrus & Dolly here. mr Ballard at mr Pollards, he was here y s Evn. mr Densmores Dagts & Lucy Kennady here. Dolly went away. at home.

Clear. mr Ballard went to Capt Husseys for wool, he found his Cannoe which has been gone Some time. he & Eph m hauled it out of the water. I have been at home, Did house work, Hannah Spun. Dolly went to mr Densmores, had a Bed & bed Stead Carried for her to Sleep on. a t home.
Snow fore n , raind at Evng. mr Ballard & Eph m went to y e meddow. I have been at home. Hannah warp t & Got her web to work. I did hous work, feel fatagud. a t home. Hannah Put a web into y e loome.

Cloudy part of the Day, the Sun Sett Clear. mr Ballard returnd and mr Town Came with him for me to go to his house. Cyrus Came here, brot us [much Lame]. the Gentle men who were Chosen as referees in the Cause between Peter Jones & my Son Jon a Sett this day. they gave Jones £8 damage & the Cost of Coart was 2 pound 5/. I Could wish my son might learn to govern his temper for the futer. a t home. mr Ballard returnd. Jones s & Jon a s [referees].

the Sun Shone part of y e fore n . mr Ballard is gone to Survey Land for Asa Cumings. Ephm went to mr Selvesters, brot home a pair of Calf Skin Slippers for Hannah. W m Haywood Dind, Supt & Sleeps here; mr Baker of Unity Supt & Sleeps. I have been at home. Jon a workt at the Coart house. a t home. mr Baker here.
Cloudy foren, Clear & very pleas t after n . mr Ballard is gone to Varsalbor o with others on a Road. I have been at home doing house work. Hannah weaving, wove 5 & 1/2 yds. a t home.

Clear. mrs Livermore warp t a web here. mr Shuball Hinklys Lady here. I have been at home, my Children all Dind with me. Jona took Breakfast & Drank Tea. Cyrus went and Brot a Swine home. a t home. mrs Hinkley here. a mr Shaws.

Clear & warm. mr Ballard went to Wiscassett, mrs Pollard & Hannah to mr Jacksons, Dolly to mr Pollards with Polly. mrs Livermore puting web into my Loome. I have been at home. Jon a to ma gr Smiths. a t home. mr Ballard to y e Pointe, Hannah to mr Jacksons, Dolly to mr Pollards.

Clear. Jon a & Eph m went to the meddow, Jon a returnd at noon very unwell. I gave him a Tea of mullin & maiden hare which gave releif. mr Ballard attended a meeting of y e Church after n . Foster workt here part of y e Day, he informs his Dagt is Sick. I have been at home. mrs Livermore put in a webb here. a t home. mr Ballard to Church meeting. Jon a is unwell.

Cloudy. I began to make Candles & was Calld to See mrs Wesson, I find her as well as Could be Expected, but of the mind Shee Can not take Care of her inft at home. a Stupud afair, I think, but She must Do as Shee pleases. a t mr Wessons. walk t home, was much fatg d .

A Cloudy, moderate Day. mr Ballard & Ep m went to y e meddow. John Humes went from here. I wrode in his Sleigh as far as mr Densmores, returnd at 4 h pm. mrs Welch here. Rich d Foster Came here for Parthenia who went with him to mr Porters of winthrop. a t mr Densmores. Parthenia went to winthrop to work for mr Porter.

Clear & Cold. mr Ballard returnd. I have been a t home, wound quills. Han h has wove 5 & 1/2 yds. mr Liverm r here at Evn, left 8 Dollars which Es q Coney Sent to mr Ballard. the Es qr Sett out for Boston y s morn. a t home.

X. Birth Cap t Neys Son. XX. Clear & very warm. I Came home at 6 h morn. Son Town here. I was Calld at 8 to See mrs Ney. Shee was Safe Deld at 1 h pm of a Son. I tarrid till near night. there was a Sprinkling of rain. I receivd 6/ as a reward. find mr John Jones, Ezekiel Chace and mrs Rockwood here. mr Jones Sleeps here. a t Cap t Neys. Birth [20 th ]. mr John Jones here.

Cloudy Day, rain at night. mr Ballard & Eph m Went over the river foren, to mr Densmores after n . he removd into his new house. I have been at home, knit on Parthinias Stockins. mrs Livermore here. my Girls have been makeing me a pair off Staise. a t home.

Birth mr Densmores Dagt. Cloudy part of y e Day. mr Densm r Calld me Early y s morn to See his wife. Shee was Safe Del d of a Dagt at 3 h pm & I returnd home at Sun Sett. I have been very unwell. a t mr Densmores. Birth 25.

Clear. there is frosst this morn, thee first we have had this fall. mr Ballard has been to Pitts town and to Winthrop. I went to mr Densmores & Carded Cottne. gathered Seeds & herbs in my Gardin. at mr Densmrs. mr Ballard to pitts t n & Winthrop. a frosst.
Clear & pleas t morn. I tarried at mr Whites till noon, then returnd home and went to mr Densmores. Spent the aft n . mr Ballard is gone to work at y e mill at pitts town. at Does & mr Densmr s .

Clear part of y e Day. mr Ballard went to mr Hardins to prepare for giting a Mill Stone from there, Eph m went allso. Clarrissa Barton Came here, went to mr Densmrs to have a gown made. Patty Bullin went from here y s Evn. I have been at home, Sewing & kniting. my Girls wash t & went to mr Densmores at Evng. a t home. Pally Bullin wen t home, Clarr y Bartun here.

Clear fore n , Over Cast aft & Evng. my Dagts went to winthrop to attend the weding of Richard Foster & Clarr a Barton. mr Ballard went to Pitts t Early y s morn. Ep m & Ezra returnd after nn . I have been at home, finisht footing my Self a Pair hoes. a t home. my Dagts gone to Clarr as weding.

Clear & very Pleas t . I was Calld from mr Westons to See mrs Childs, find her very unwell. I Calld at mr Hamlins & returnd to mr Wessons. mrs Johnson went to Cap t P. Browns. a t mr Wessons & Child s .
Cloudy & Chilly. mr Wesson brot mrs Fillebrown to See her marm. Shee tarried all night. at Ditoes.

rainy. I tarried till 3 h pm at mr Wessons & then returnd home, find my Famely well. Cyrus been at home y s Day. I have spent but one whole Day at home Since Oc tr 23 rd . the remains of mrs Goodin were interd this Day. a t Ditos. Funeral of mrs Goodins.

Cloudy & misty Day, raind at Evn. mr Ballard went to Esq r Coneys foren, to y e hook aft n to Lay out a Burying Place & meeting house Spot which was given by mr Charls Vahn to y s Town. I have been at home, helpt Ephm remove Turnips & other Sause into Bins. Hannah is more Comfortable. a t home.

X. Birth mr Selvestr Son & 3 rd Child. XX. Clear & Pleast. mrs Selves tr was Safe Deld of a Son which wd 8-1/2 lb at 3 h morn. I left her Cleaverly a t 11. Calld at Cap t Filebrowns & Jen e Whebs. walk t part of ye way home, wrode the other. receivd 2 lb Coffee, 1 yd ribbond & a [Cap boader] as Extraodenary for waiting on her. I went to mr Densmores, was informd that mr Ezeliel Pages youngest Child Expird last night. a t Ditoes. Birth [35]th. fee receivd. mr [sic].

Clear & Pleast. mr Ballard & Ep m giting wood. mr Bullin & Lady here, he Brot us Beef. Jon a brot home a goos & 25 lb Beef. I went to mr Shepherds, Bot 3 Chip hatts & a Sheet past bord for which I paid 3/9 Cash. I Calld a t mr Livermores & took my ring which mr Greanlief mended. Hannah got her piece out of y e Loom, 15-1/2 yds. I went to the Stores a t y e hook. Snowd in y e night. mr Bullin & Lady here.

Clear Except a Shower. mr Ballard & Cyrus went to pitts town. I was at mr Livermores & mr Densmores. Son Town Sleeps here. Esqr Juett Came for his hors, gave me 6/ as a reward for my assisting his Lady yesterday. at mr Liverm rs & mr Densmores. Son Town here.

Clear & very windy, the Snow flys briskly. mr Ballard & Epm are gone to the Meddow, they returnd with out reaching ther by reason of the wind. Hannah & I made the Cottne & wool Sheets. Jon a has not been at home Since yesterday. mr Ballard Sett a Bone in my left wrist which I misplast as I was wriding yesterday. a t home.

Clear. I tended thee Cloath & knitt. my Sons went to mr Bullins for Dolly. the girls made a Coat & Trousers for Eph m after Shee Came home. Robert M c Causlin & his wife here, going to Winslow. a t home.

Clear. Son Town left here homewd Bound. Bro r Town was here. mr Balld went up to mr Pollards. I went to mr Wicksoms to Carry 4 lb wool for her to Comb. I Calld at mr [Baxters], bot 1/2 lb Tea a 3/ pr lb. Cyrus went to Pitts town, took posession of y e Grist mill & returnd here at Evn. a t mr Wicksoms. Bro r Town here y s Day. Cyrus went to Pitts town to tend mill.
Clear & pleast. mrs Haywood and her Dagt Stratten to See my Dagt this morn. Shee is Cleverly. at Does. death of mr Hewens infant.
Cloudy. thee ice Stopt against our house. I have been at home, feel much fatagud with my Exposements of late. at home.
Clear & very Cold. I have been at home. mr Ballard been up in Town. Cyrus, Jon a & Dolly here this night. Hannah has washt a larg wash y s Day. a t home.

A Birth Dan l Savages Dagt. XX. Clear & very Cold morn, more moderate aft n & Evn g . I was Calld at 11h morn to See the wife of Dan l Savage Junr who was Deld at 2 h pm of a Dead Daugt, but is as well her Self as Can be Expected. I Came home at Evn. Calld at mr Seth Williams s , find mr Densmore & his wife here. a t mr Savages. Birth 1 st ;Still Born. fee recd may 7 th 1793.

B X. Birth John Badcks Son & 5th Child. XX. Cloudy & Some rain. I went last night before mid night to John Badcoks, his wife being in Labour. a message Came there at 10 h y s morn for me to go & See mrs Sherburn, Shee being in Labour allso. I Could not leave my Patient. I Delivrd her of a fine Son at 1 h pm & returnd home. walkt 2 miles, Came by water to y e rock & walkt from there. find mr Jones here, mr Hamlin & wife & mrs Livermore here. Cyrus went to pitts town, Carried his Bed & Chest; he is 35 years old this Day. a Child of Seth Williams s wounded it Self in y e boddy ys Day. Jerem y White Calld me at 9 Ev n to See his wife. I Sett up the most of thee night. old Lady White & Shuball Hinkleys wife there. a t mr Badcocks. Birth 24 th .mr Jones & others here. Cyrus 35 years old y s Day. mrs Sherburn Deld of a Dagt. Williams s Childwounded. I have helpt 403 Child n into Existancein this Eastern Country Since the year 1777.

B Clear & not very Cold. my Child n , who are Single, all at home, Parthenia allso. mr Peter Jones Dind here (we had a line of Lamb roast.) I went home with him to See his Son, tarried all night. mr Savage & his wife were there. a t mr Jonses.

B Clear & pleast. my Son & I Sett out to Come Down, Calld at Capt Grants. Shee Came home from Charls Jacksons, informd me that his Dagt Jane was Deld of a Son at 10 h y s morn. we Came to mr Pollards ferry. I was Conducted over, my Son turnd back for home. I tarred at mr Pollards & watcht with Betsy Heuston, who is near the Close of life. mr Voce Sett with me. I Came from Winslo to mr Pollard, watcht with Betsy Heust n . Funeral of mr Hewens infant.

X. Birth mr Webbers Dagt. XX. Clear & Cold morn. I was Calld by mr Webber of Pittst n to See his wife. Shee was Safe Deld at 1 h pm of a Dagt & is as well as Can be Expected. her Childn have the Cough. my Son Towns Child n have it allso. a t mr Webbers, pitts ton. Birth 32 nt . Betsy Hueston Expird a t 6 h Evn.

Snowd. I left mr Jones s at noon. Calld at mr Wessons, Dind there, find her weak. Shee has not walkt her room any Since Shee was put to bed. her infant is at mr Hewens. I Calld at mr Densmores, their Children are giting better. Esq r Lithgo here, requested of me to go & See his Lady next weak. we had a very rainy night. a t Ditoes & mr Wessons & Densmors.

Clear & Cold. mr Ballard is gone to Varsalbor o for Hay for Col o Sewall. Hannah washt. Shee lett a Stik fall on her foot, Brusd her toe & almost fainted. mr Town & his Dag t Patty & mr Fuller Came here. Jon a went to Washington. I have been at home. mr Savages inf t was interd at fort western. a t home. Funeral of mr Savages inf t .

X. Birth mr Bradford s Son. XX. receivd 6/ by my Son Cyrus, Sept 30 1792 of mr Bradfd. Snowd all day. I was Calld by mr Bradford of Pitts to n at 7 h morn. I wrode our hors as far as the hook Point. Eph m went to take her home. I then prosceeded by water, arivd at 9 h , found the Lady Safe Deld (by Doc t Parker) of a very fine Son, her Second Child; both Sons. I was Conducted by Nath Norcross (of Littleboro) by water as far as mr Selvesters. Calld there and warmd, and walkt from there home. I was wet & much fatagud indeed. I arivd at home at 7 h Evn. a t mr Bradfords of Pitts ton. Snowd.33 nd Birth.

Clear. mr Town & I left my house at 8 h this morn, we were put to Some dificulty at the ferry, but Got Safe over at 11 h, and arivd at mr Towns at 6 h Evn; found them well. mrs s Stackpool & Strattne there quillting a Coat for mrs Barton, we got it out. I was fatagud, but went to bed & had rest. I went to mr Towns.

A very Serene, Pleas t morn. I was Calld upon to go to winslow. I went on hors Back to mr Wessons, Crost y e river on foot, wrode in a Sleigh, arivd at Esq r Lethgow s at 4 h pm. t I went to winslow to Esq r Lithgow s .

Sun Shine & Cloudy by turns, the wind Westwd. mr Ballard returnd from pitts tn , Brot Some Cloath which he bot of mr Barker, & went to mr Savages. I have been at home kniting on my own Stockin. a t home.
Clear. mr Ballard went Early to the meddow. Jon a is better. I have been at home mending Stockins & houghing Cabbages. at home.

Cloudy this Day, observd as a public thanks giving. Dolly & Cyrus at home, tarry all night. Son Town here, his famely have the Cough. mr Fuller & James Wall Sleep here. I watcht with mr Densmores infant, his Child n all Cough very much. a t mr Densmores all night. Son Town here. mr Eaton Drownd.

Clear & Pleast Day, Cool Evn g . mr Ballard & Ep m got wood to mr Selvesters & for our Selvs. I have been at home. mr Childs here, invited Hannah to go to help his Lady quillt. mrs Densmore here at Evn, mr Waid allso. Jon a Staid from home last night, returnd this Evn g . I Doubled yarn for Buskins & Some worsted, 24 knots, which mrs Wicksom Comd & spun. a t home.

Snowd a little & not So Cold. mr Liverm r here about Taxes, took Coppies &C, &C. mr Ballard & Ephm giting wood. Jon a gone to git y e mare Shod. Hannah wash t . I knitt & helpt do house work. a t home.

A Clear & pleast. I went to Pitts tn to See mrs Town who is unwell. my hors Stumbled & Dismounted me, Brus d a little but I was able to walk till I met a Sleigh. the Gentlemen there in asisted in mounting my hors again & I arivd in Safety; aplid Camphir to my brouses, tarried & Dind. left Direction & medisin & returnd home at 5h pm. mr Seth Williams Came for me to go and See his Lady who is not So well as Could be wisht. I went, made use of means & medisine which gave relief & Spent y e night with her. at Bro r Towns & mr Williams.
Clear. mr Ballard at the hook, Bo t 1 Quire Paper. mr Weston & Lady & mrs Johnston here. I have been at home. at home.

Cleard of a little after Sun rise. I went to mr Densmores, Shee & 3 Child n Came home with me. Shee Cutt out my gown. Dolly had a tooth Extracted by mr Livermore. mr Peter Jones s Lady here, tarries all night. Parthenia went to Winthrop, Brot Clarrissa home with her. a t mr Densmors, Shee here, mrs Jones & Clarris a allso.

Cloudy. mr Ballard gone to Pitts town. we put a Bed quillt into the Fraim & my Self, mrs Barton & my three girls got it out an hour before Sun Sett. I went to mr Densmores, Came home & finisht Cyrus s Stockins. a t mr Densmores, Drest her infant.
Clear. I have been at home. my girls went to mr Pollards. mr Strattne & Lady & mrs Barton Sleep here. mrs Strattne bro t me 3/4 yd Camb c , cos t 6/. at home. mr Strattne here.
Clear. I have been at home, pickt wool. Jon a went to green Lodg. Eph m & mr Densmrs Sons finisht giting our potatoes in to the Seller. a t home.

Clear part of y e Day, the wind S. mr Ballard got wood for us & mr Livermore. I have been at home knitting & Spoold my woorsted, 16 Skeins. Clarrissa went home, Parthenia with her. we got our Cabbages in, had but 20 heads. a t home. Clarrissa went home.
Over Cast morn. mrs Kennady here. Cloudy Evn & very moderate. mr Ballard Came home from Pitts t n . I have been at home. my Dagts returnd before Day. a t home.

Cloudy. mrs Wesson remains much as Shee has been. Consented that I Should go home & See how my famely were. I find mr Ballard is gone to Pitts town, the rest of my famely are well. I returnd to mr Westons. a t mr Wessons.
Snowd. mrs Pillebrown went home. mr Wesson brot me Some work. a t Ditoes.
rain for n , Sun Shone af tn . I went to mr Densmores, Saw James Stackpool; he informd me there was a letter at mr Goodins for me. a t mr Densmor s .

A SE wind & rain this fore n , Clear at Evng. I have been at home. Cleand the Seller & pickt a pound of wool which I had of mr Snell. mr Ballard been to the fort & hook, is gone to y e fort again to meet the Select Gentlemen, requested an order for what is Due to him from this Town. they did not grant it but paid him forty Shillings in part of his acount. at home.
Snowd. mr Ballard & Ep m got wood. the Girls went to mr Densmores to have Parthenia a Gown made. I have been at home Sewing. at home.

X. Birth Phillip Norcros s 1 st Son. XX. Clear but a very high wind. I was, I was [sic] Calld at 6 h morn to go to Phillip Norcros s wife in Labour, men Shoveld thro Drifts & we arivd at 7. I left mrs Bolton & inf t Cleverly. mrs Norc s Deld at 1h 30m pm. of her 5 th Child & first Son. I tarried all night, Slept a little. my Patients are Cleverly. mr NorCros was not at home. a t Does & mr Norcros s . Birth 5th.
Clear. mr Ballard Surveying for Capt Hersey. Son Town left here at y e 12th hour. mrs Welch warpt hand kerchf s here. I have been at home, gatherd Seeds &C. at home. Georg Brown Dind here.

X. Birth mr Jones s Dag t . XX. Clear. I was Calld at noon from Cap t P Browns to mr Jones s , his Lady was Deld at 3h pm of a Dag t , her 3 d Child, y e other 2, Sons. I tarried all night, my Patients as well as Could be Expected. at mr Jones s . Birth 3 d . Hannah Sent my winter gown there.

A Clear & pleas t . mr Jones Brot mrs Savage there & I returnd home at 1 h pm. Cyrus Sett out for Pitts t n . I receivd 6/8 of mr Jones for my asistance now & he made me a pres t of 1/2 Bs l rie & a piece of fresh pork for former Servises. a t D t oes.

A Over cast morn, Clear aft n , Cloudy Evn g . Dolly went to mr Peirces. Sarah Densmore here, informs the inft is no better. mr Hamlin here at Evn. I have been at home. Cyrus was here. Jona went from here at Sun Sett. at home.

Clear, a Cool morn but very pleas t Day. mr Waid Calld me to See his oldest Dagt who is very unwell. Ephm went with our teem to help Break a road on y s Side y e river. I returnd just before night. mr Ballard went to Col o Norths to Carry a Schadule of a house Fraime for mr Lee. a t mr Waids, his oldest Dag t is Sick.

Clear & Some windy. I returnd from mr Williams after Breakfast, find mr Ballard is gone to Fairfields back of Pitts tn , & Eph m to mill with his teem for our Selvs & mr Densmores & Liverm r ; got home at 9 h Evn g . mr Ben n Porter & Son & Judy Heuston here. I wrote to Doct Barton. a t mr Williams. Judy Heuston Ben n Porter here.

Snowd y s morn. Cyrus went to Pitts tn , Dolly to mr Densmores. Jon a has not been here y s Day till night. mr Ballard & Ephm got a load of wood. I have been at home, do not feel So well as I Could wish. I am this Day 57 years old. Hannah has been washing. mr Waid here, Supt. a t home. aneversary of my Birth, 57 years Since.

Clear & Pleast. I Sett out for home, accompanied by mr Webber & Dore, the wrideing very bad. I Calld to See mrs Colman, Shee is Cleverly. I arivd at home a 1 h pm. mrs Barril gave me 6/ Cap t Norcros s Lady Sent me for assisting her in travil April 9th 1791. mrs Welch here y s day to warp a webb. Jon a was out on a rafft last thurs Day night in a very Severe Storm. we are informd that mr David Jackson of this Town was unfortunately Drowned between here & Boston on y e 18th inst, his Vessel & Cargo lost. at Ditoes. mr Webber bestowd 8/8 for my Service.

rain with a S wind, the Evn ng it Snowd. Ephm & Jack brot our Sheep from mr Peter Clearks, one of them has been wounded on the neck. I Drest it with Tarr. I have been at home, began my Self a Stockin. the Girls finisht Spining a Cottne warp. mr Ballard been mending a Slead. I have been at home.

Clear & Cold. mr Town & Fuller wn t to Coart af t Breakfast. mr Ballard returnd this aft n & went to Col o Sewalls on Business. I have been at home. Cyrus Came here at Evn. Jon a is not here y s night. Hannah wash t y e rooms y s Day. a t home. Cyrus Came here, brot 3 peks Indian, 2 of wheat, 2 of rie meal.

Clear, a pleast Sun but Cold air. mr Ballard & Cyrus Sett out for pittstn, my Dagts for winslow, Eph m to work for mr Child. he helpt him with two yoak of Oxen, & Jack Livermore yesterday; the Same y s Day. Joseph Foster here & Cutt Shoes for my Son Cyrus. Ephm Broke his [Sliyd]. my Dagts Left home a t 11h morn Bound for Winslow, acompanied by mr Burtun, Pollard & Patridg. Polly & my Self only left at home. I was Siesd with a Severe paine in my head which held till Evng. a t home. my [Dagts] went to Winslow, mr Ballard to Pittstn.

B Clear. mr Ballard & I & Sons attended Divine Servic, the Revd mr Farrah of New Ipswich Performd. Georg Brown here. Polly m c kekny here. a t meeting. Peter Grant & Nancy Barker, Tho s Norris & mary Shepherd Publisht.

Snowd all Day. mr Ballard was Siesd with pain (y s morn) but got Easier in a Short time. Parthenia Came from mr Childs s I have been at home, Doubled Stockin yarn which Dagt Town gave me & Some which Hannah Spun. Jack Liver mr & Eph m went to the hook, got their Sheep home but Did not find ours. a t home. Snowd. Parthe n Came home.

X. Birth Son Towns [6]th Dagt. XX. Cloudy. my Dagt was Seisd with her Labour, her women were Calld and Shee was Safe Deld of a Dagt at 10 h Evn. I Sett up with her thro y e night. Shee was faint when we put her in Bed, but revivd & is Cleverly. this is her 8th Child. a rainy night. a t Son Towns. Birth 31 st .
A Snow Storm. I was at Es q Lithgows. a t Ditoes.

X. Birth Cap t FilleBrown Dagt & first Child. XX. Clear & pleast. I was Calld to see mrs Randal at y e Sitty. Shee removd from Shuball Hinkleys in the night. I was Calld from there at 12h to Capt F Browns, his Lady had her women Calld at 1h pm, & was Safe Deld of a Dagt which w d 10lb at 1 h 45 m pm, & is Cleverly. Shee was very ill indeed before Delivery. a t mr Randals & Cap t F Browns. Birth 9 th . my Dagts went to Pitts tn y s Evn g .

Cloudy & Snow. mr Bolton went to Doct s & Bo t Senan & Seeds; I gave the infant Some. they Calld mrs Savage there & I left the Child a little Easier & returnd home, was over Sett once. felt Exceedingly fatagud, went to bed before dark. was Calld out again at y e 11 h pm & went to Joseph Preskotts, his wife in Labour. mrs Hinkly & Preskot wrode part of the way with me. a t Ditoes & mr Preskots. receivd a letter from Sis t Waters of Jany 20 th 1792. Sent one to Doct Barton.

Clear, the wind Southard. I have been at home. my Child n went to mr Burtuns on a visit. Ephm helpt mr Densmores Sons to y e hook with ashes. mrs Black Calld here & went to mr Densmores to try on an overcoat. a t home. my Child n went to mr Burtuns.

Clear. I have been a t home, washt my wool, hilld Cabbages, gatherd my Corn. our men returnd from the meddow, have finisht giting the hay. mrs Norcross, Polly Cowen & Anne Norcross here. Jon a Bo t a quarter of Veal. a t home.

Cloudy. I Came home at Day and, after takeing Breakfast, Laid Down and Slept, but watchings are very fatag ng to me at this time of life. mr Town & Fuller left here. a t Does. mr David Jackson Los t at Sea, his Vessel allso.

Clear & very pleasant. mr Ballard went to Esq Coneys & other places on Busines. Hannah & Dolly are gone to help mrs Child quillt. I have been at home, twisted yarn. Eph m went to haull wood for Waid. a t home.
Clear & Pleast Day, Cold Evng. mr Ballard been to meddow, Dan l Liverm r with him. Jon a to mill. I have been at home, knitt on my Stockin. Hannah began me a Cap. a t home.

X. Birth Isaac Hardings Dagt X. & X. James Savages Son X. Clear. I was Calld by Isaac Hardin at 4 h morn, his wife Delivd of a Dagt at 1 h pm. I went Directly from there to James Savages, my hors mrd in a Swamp and I fell off. arivd at Savages at 3, find her Safely Deld of a fine Son by his marms assistance. were fresh t and went back to Hardins by Col o Duttuns farm. I wrode Hardins hors home, arivd at 8 very much fatagud. at mr Hardins & James Savages. Birth 2[1] th . Birth James Savages Son. Birth 22.

Clear & pleas t . mrs Jones wrode our hors part of y e way home. Eph m Brot a quarter of Lamb from mr Craggs. mrs Livermo r & mrs Dens mr here. I went home with y e Later, their Chimney up to y e ridg pole. at mr Densmores.

Cloudy. mr Ballard gone to winthrop, mrs Barton to Pitts town, Eph m to take the hors back. I went to mr Densmores, gave the inft manna. a t Ditoes. I waigh d the wool I had of mrs Badcok, wt 2 lb 11 oz.

Clear & very pleas t . mr Strattne & Lady Dind here & then Sett out for home. mrs Barton & my Girls went to mr Burtuns. mr Densm r Butcherd a wether for us. I have been a t home. at home. mr [sic] Girls to mr Burtuns.

Clear. mr Porter here, tarries y s night. Eph m went to Pitts town with y e mare for his Daddy to ride home. Cyrus Came here at Evn g . I have been at home, pick t wool. old mrs Cowen brot me 1/2 lb Sage. a t home. mrs Porter here, informs meCapt [Fairbanks] Lady Deceast Sep tr 28 th ,Shee was at y e westwd.

rainy foren. I went to mr Chamberlins to Borrow a read. Calld at mr Childs s , his wife is very unwell. I Dind at mr Pollards. mr Ballard & Ephm been to git a mill Stone from mr Hardins to the river. mr Keneda & Savage Bolton helpt them. at mr Chamberlins & other Neigr s .

Cloudy fore nn , rainy aftr n . Ezra left here y s morn, home wd Bound. Ep m went & Carried him on hors Back as far as mr Wals. mr Ballard giting wood. I have been at home. a t home. my girls returnd from weding.
Cloudy. I was at mr Westons. the wife of And w Goodins Expird this Day of a Consumption. a t Ditoes. mrs Goodin Expird.
Cloudy. I went to mr Pollards and to a mr Davis s Store. am at mr Wessons ye t . thee ice runs at y e fort, Stopt a t Cobese. a t Ditoes.

Clear part of y e Day. mrs Densmore Sent for me to See her Infant, it has a Cough & Soar mouth. her Child n have y e Cough. I Calld to See mr Liverm r , he is better. I receivd a line from Dagt Town of 8 th which informs She & famely are well. a t Ditoes & mrs Livermor s . I receivd a Letter from Dag t Town.

Clear & pleast. I have been at[" home." - implied] helpt Hannah about house. Dolly Came home at Evn g . Eph m been to pitts t n to mill, brot 3 bushels of meel. wrode mr Pollards hors, ours is lame. home.

Clear. mr Ballard went to mr Savages, had his Oxen Shod. when he returnd he informd y t mr Pollard turnd my Son Jon a out of his house. it is very Strange y t men Cannot behave like rational beings. Parthenia finisht makeing her Goun. I have been at home mending Cloaths. Cyrus went to mr Jones s mill, brot 1 Bus l wheat meel, 1 Bs l Indian, 1 Peck rie. mr Ballard bot 1 Gal molases of mr Wesson, Some Pork & Beef & a Loaf of hoggs fatt of mr Dumer. a t home.
