X. Birth mr Waids Son. XX. Clear but very windy. Cap t Fille Brown Came & Carried me from mr Norcros s to his house. I tarried till 7h Evn when mr Waid Calld me to See his wife who was in Labour, & was Safe Deld of his first Son & 3 d Child at the middle of the night. I tarried there all night, Sett up. I receivd 6/ of mr Waid. a t Cap t P Browns & mr Waids. Birth 6th.

Clear, Something windy. mrs Livermore here, Patty Town made her Dagts a visit. David Densmore & Ep m Carried wood to Cap t Meloy for which they receivd 2 Setts Tea Dishes & 2 small muggs. mr Ballard mended his Slead. I have been at home. Dolly Came home. a t home. mrs Livermore here.

B Cloudy & Some rain. mrs Porter went from here, Cyrus went away with her Bound for Washington. Doc t Colman & Coney & mr Livermore been here. I have been at home. a t home. Esq r Coney informs me mrs Goodin is near y e Close of life as he thinks.

B Clear, Serene morn, Cloudy aft n , Snowd a t Evn. Cyrus here y s Day, he Seemd fatagud by loss of Sleep as he tended mill all las t night. Esq Coney here, informs me his Child n have the hooping Cough. mrs Densmr Sent for me to See her inf t , I went. a t mr Densmor s .
B Clear, Cool morn, the wind S aftern. Cyrus here, he tended his mill all last night. I went to mr Densmores, mr Ballard, Livermore & Lady there at Evn. a t mr Densmores.

B Snowd. mr Ballard went to meeting to Col o Duttuns, mr Smith performd. I was Calld to See mrs Jones who was unwell. I tarried all night. gave mrs Jones medisin & Shee got a good nights rest. mrs Savage & Dag t there. a t mr Jones.

G Clear fore n , Cloudy af t n, Snowd at Evn. mrs Densmore was here y s Day. David Sleeps here. Cyrus at home . I have been at home. Jon a had a Sheep lamb d . I gave Dolly a Decoction of the two worm woods. a t home. mrs Densmore here.

A Clear, Calm & Cold. I returnd home from mr Waids at 10h morn, went on the Bed & Slept. mr Livermore here. Capt P Brown Came & Conducted me to his house, his Lady unwell. very Cold y s night. at mr Waids & Cap t PhileBrowns.

B Snowd & raind. I was Calld to See Sally Peirce at 9 h morn, the rideing very Bad. Doc t Colman Calld me from there af t noon to See his Lady. I was Calld from there to Sally before morn. a t mr Peirces. A Snow Storm.
A Clear part of y e Day. Snowd a t Evn. Patty Bullin Dind here. Cyrus & Dolly at home, Jona is not. I have been at home. a t home. Patty Bullin here.

B Clear. Jon a went to a Baptist meeting, Saw 9 persons receiv Baptism. Parthenia, Polly Pollard and mr Hamlin, Eliphlet Robbins here. I have been at home. a t home. Dagt Town is 33 years old y s Day.

B Birth Doc t Colmans Dag t . XX. Cloudy morn, Snowd before noon. I was Calld from mr Wessons to Doct Colmans at 3h. morn, his Lady Safe Deld of a fine Dag t at 11 h . 40m. mrs Dummer and Sewall attended her with me. at Ditoes & Doct Colm ns . Birth 29 th . receivd 9/8.

G Clear & very pleast. I have been at home, Cyrus & Dolly at home. my three Dagts went to See mrs Livirmore, Shee has a pain in her face ocationed by a Cold. I have not been So well as I Could wish my Self y s Day. at home. Dolly wrote to wid o Barton.

Clear. Wil m Haywood & Polly Bisbe here. mrs Liverm r & I went to help mrs Hinkley quillt a Bed quillt. I find mr Strattne & Lady here on my return, mr J Jones allso. at mr Shuball Hinkleys. mr Straton & Lady Sleep here.
B rainy morn, Clear & very pleas t after n . mr Blake Dind here. mr Johnston & Black[dm] Sleep here. mrs Barton and my Girls went to mr Whites & mr Livermrs. I have been at home. a t home.

X. Birth Ben n Whites Dagt. XX. Clear. mr Walker Calld me at 2 h morn to Ben n Whites wife in Labour. Shee was Safe Deld a t y e 7 th of a Dagt, and I returnd home at 12 O Clok. Calld at mr Walkr s , JackSons & Devenports. I took a nap after I returnd. Cyrus returnd from Gillbreaths & went to Pitts town, his Daddy is there. at mr Ben n Whites. Birth [26] th .

Clear, wind Nor wd . mr Ballard went to Pitts town with a mill Stone. Ezra Town Came here, his folks well. I Dug french Turnips fore n , went aft n with mrs Livermore to See mrs Norcros. Shee was absent & we made a visit to old Lady Coutch. a t old mrs Coutches.

X. Birth Sally Peirces Son. XX. Clear. I was Calld from y e Docts to Sally, Shee was Safe Deld at 1 h pm of a fine Son. her illness very Severe but I left her Cleverly & returnd to y e Doc ts about Sun Sett. Sally Declard that my Son Jon a was the father of her Child. at Doc t Colman s & mrPeirces. Birth 27 th .

rain. I returnd home by Water, am informd that mrs Goodin Departe d this life 29 th inst. Shee has left an Husband & 7 Childn to bewail the loss, Parents, Bro rs & Sisters allso. may God giv thim the Sanctyfying Crace to mourn aright. I was Calld to mr Westons at 5 h pm. at the Docts & at home & mr Wessons.

Cloudy & moderate. mr Dany Calld me Early this morn to See his younges t Child who is Burnt on his face. I went & made an ointment & Dress t it. I went to See mrs Selvester, find her Cleverly. I Calld at [mr] Parmers, Bo t a pail, paid 1/6 off John Badcok, Thos Hinkley & Ben n White. I receivd of each 6/ as a reward for assisting their wives in Child [Birth]. I was at mr Densmores, his Child n unwell. a t mr Dany s & other Neigr s . I Spent Evn g at mr Densmors.

Snowd y s morn. I Came home Early. mr Balld & Eph m went for Jon a s Hay. Clear towards night. I have been mending my Cloaths. Moses Pollard waited on my Dagts & Parthenia to his Dad s this Evng. this day is y e Anavarsery of Marriage. I went to hous keeping the Same Day, have had 6 removes Since. my next may be into my last abode, may I be prepard. Cyrus went to Pittst n this morn. my Girls returnd after the moon rose. a t Dtos. 37 years this Day Since I was Joind in wedlock with mr Ballard. many Sines have past Since y t Day.
Clear & Excessive Cold. I was at ["Ditoes" - implied] mrs P Brown more Comfortable. Ditoes.

Snow, Haill & almos t raind, it has been a very uncomfortable Day. Cyrus tarried here. Jon a Came home at Evn. I have been at home. Dolly went to mr Densmores y s morn. mr Ballard & Ephm workt at y e house & Barn. Hannah Spining wool. a t home.
rain in y e morn, foggy all Day. mr Ballard, Ep m & D. Densmr brot hay from mr Waids. I have been at home. Hannah washt. Cyrus went to his mill. Dolly to her Service, her Sheep is better. a t home.

Clear & pleast. this Town met to Vote for Govr s , Sennate r , &C, I went to See mrs Livermore, Shee is a little Easier. mr Densmore, his wife, two Dagts & my Dagt here. the Ice broke up & the river open allmost acros t , against our houses. it parted so that people Crost in boats at y e fort. a t mr Livermores. we had Company.

Clear & Cold. mr Ballard geting wood. I was Calld to mr Hamlins, his wife being unwell by taking Cold. I tarried all night, made her Some Soap Pills; gave her 5. Shee rested tolerable well., her infant is a fine boy indead. a t mr Hamlins, his wife has had an ill turn. Hannah at mr Densmores.

Clear & Pleas t . I wen t to mr Densmores. Cap t Savages Lady Came here & Sent for me home. Cyrus Dind here & Conducted mrs Savage to the hook in his Sleigh. my Sons are gone to y e meddow. Savage Bolton brot a Load of hay, informs me his infant is unwell. John Savage went with one teem. at mr Densmr s . mrs Savage here, & Cyrus.

Snowd. mrs Densmore Sent for me to go & See her inft. we gave it a Decoction of Sage & mullin & it Seems to be revivd. I Came home at Evn g . Eph m has been hauling Brick for mr Hamlin. at mr Densmores.

Snowd part of y e Day. mr Burtun came for Hannah to keep house for him while he & his wife went to Winthrop on a visit. Jon a Carried his wife & Son home. I have been at home. do not feel so well as usual. mr Ballard & Eph m made a pen for our Sheep. Dollys Lambs Expird. Cap t Porter here. at home. Hannah at Burtuns. Sally went home.

Clear & very pleas t . mr Ballard went up to mr Jones s , informs me y t y r Son Stephen is Scolt Badly. I Went to See mrs Livermore, find her very unwell. her face is Sweld & Shee is in much pain. I applyd a Cateplas m made of hysop and wheat Bran, & Shee Seems Easier. the Ice removd Above here & the river is open this aftern. a t Doc s . the rivir Opend.

B Cloudy Excep t the morn which was Clear. Cyrus Came home, informs that mr Lamirey of Pounalboro [ wasfe ] was Drowned by his Canoe overseting the 2 nt inst. I have been at home. my Dagts went to See Polly Livermore who is unwell. her Daddy here at Evn. a t home. [ Gy ] Cyrus & Dolly here.

Clear. my Girls wash t . mr Ballard attempted to go to his meddow but Could not get there. mrs Liverm r here at Evng. I Was Calld at 9 h Evn to See mrs Selvester who was in Labour. a Cool but pleast Evng. a t mr Selvesters. mr Pages infant Expird.

Clear & very Cold morn. mr Town & fuller went to Coart aft bkf t . two Unity men here. mr Ballard & Cyrus went to Town. Jon a has not been at home Since yester day. I have been at home, mended a Coverld & knitt Some. mrs Welch was here. a t home. Jon a was married to Sally Peirce.
Clear. mr Waid workt here fore n . mr Shubal Pitts, his Sister & Parthenia Barton Calld here, they were going to his Brothers at green lodg. I have been a t home. a t home, Parthenia here.
Clear. Sally, Hannah and my Self went to mr Livermores, his little Dagts here to visit Polly Town. mr Ballard is much more Comfortable than he has been. at mr Livermores.

Clear & pleast. Jon n & his wife went to house keeping. Hannah wrode up with Sally, Ephm walkt. mr Manly and he went and Carried Jon n s things from here by water in y e foren n . mr Ballard has been to Col o Howards. I went to See mrs Livermore, find her much more Comfortable. mrs Hinkly & White there. Selvenus Hatch Sleeps here. mr Waid & mr Ballard Divided the flax which we raisd on his land. a t mr Livermor s .

Snowd Some. mr Ballard went to help Cyrus Dress his mill. Clear at Evn. I was Calld at 9 h Ev n to see mrs Walker. the ice run but we got Safe over. I wrode from Mr Devenports Landing. a t mr Walkers.

foggy & Some Showers, lite ones. I went to Peter Jones s to See his Son who is Scalt. I tarried all night, the Child is a little Easiel. I went to bed but Did not Sleep but little. a t mr Peter Jones s .

B Clear & Pleas t . I Came home, find my famely in health. left mrs Wesson as well as Shee has been. Cyrus at home. mr Ballard has been to work at Cobese mill part of last weak. mr Livermr here. Moses Pollard informs y t Shaw, y e Sherrif, has taken a Doct Johnson by virtue of an advertisement for forgery. a t Does & at home.
Clear. I helpt mrs Lithgow make Cake & Pies & knit on my Stockin. a t Ditoes.

X. Birts [Seth], Williams s Dagt. XX. Clear, a very Sharp air y s morn. I was Calld from y e Capts at 2h 30m morn by mr Williams, arivd at 3. his Lady was very ill & was Safe Deld a t 3h 45m & Seems Cleverly. I left there & returnd to y e Capts at 6h 50m. took mr Will ms gave me 6/ as a reward. I went to See mis Randal, find her more Comfortable and returnd home, attended by Capt F Brown who bestowd Two Crowns & a Tea pot & Sett of Tea Dishes for my Servis there. mrs Densmore here, Cutt my Goun. mrs Lidia Cleark Sleeps here. I feel a great deal falagud. Dolly at home. a t mr Williams s , y e Capts & mr Randals. Birth 10th.

X. Birth Joseph Preskots Son. XX. Clear & Cool. my Patient was very unwell thro the night but was Safe Deld at 6h morn of a Lusty Son. I left her & inft Cleverly at 11 morn & arivd at home at 2h pm; receivd 4 lb Coffee for my trouble. Jona Came home at Evn, informs me y t Savage Boltons infant Expird a t 5 y s morn. a t mr Preskots. Birth 11th. Death mrBolt n infant.
rain. Hannah washt. I have been at home. helpt Sally nurs her Babe, it is not so well as usual. mr Ballard been a t home. Ephm brot Hay from mr Densmores. Dolly went there aft Breakfast. at home.

foggy morn, Clear middle of y e Day. I Drest Stephens Jones s Burn & went to See my Son Jon a s wife, returnd to mr Jones s . made an ointment of Lint Seed Oil, Bees wax & rosin. Drest the Child & Sett out for home. mr Crage Calld me in to See his little Dagt who is Sick with the Canker. I Drank Tea there, mrs H. Cox was there. I arivd at home a t Dusk, the rodes were very muddy & wet the most of the way. mr Ballard has been Laying out house Lotts at y e hook for mr Vauh n . a t Ditoes & a t my Sons & mr Craggs.

Clear part of y e Day. I finisht makeing my Cottne Shifts & went to See mr Densmores Child n , find the infant is weaker, the others much as they were. I wrote to Doc t Waters and enclosd a letter for Doc t Barton. the wife of mr Edw d Springer of this Town was interd this Day. Shee departed this Life the night of the 17 tnth inst, her infant interd with her. a t Ditoes. I wrote Bro r Waters.

Clear. I went to mr Wessons, Bot 4 lb Sugar @ /11 pr lb, 1 lb rasins 1/, 2 half muggs @ /7, pint & 1/2 rum, 1 Skien Black Silk /6, 3 lb Butter @ /9; to mr Pitts bot 1 lb Ginger @ 1/6. I had 5-1/2 lb sugar of mr Voce for 1/2 a M Shingles which mr Braley left at mr Crages for me. I was at mr Crages, Jonses, Hamlins, Burtuns & mr Pollards, find them well in general. thee number of Child n I have Extracted Since I Came to Kenebeck, I find by writtne acount & other Calculations to be 405. I went up to town on business & thus I Clos d y e year & it is Done. the question is, are we Better y n when it first Began, if not, God grant we may be.

X. Birth mr Shaws Son. XX. Clear & more moderate. I was Calld by mr Shaw at y e hook to See his Lady who was in Labour, arivd there a t y e time y e Clock Struck 12. Shee was Safe Deld at 3h pm. of a Son. I tarried all night, my patients are Cleverly. a t mr Shaws. Birth 8 th .

rainy morn Cloudy till 3h. p.m. when y e Sun Shone. mr Ballard went to mr Stephens s . I have been at home. Jon a went to the hook & up to y e fort. Eph m Cowen here, Dind. Dolly Came home at Evng. at home.

rainy morn, Clear af tn . mr Ballard a t Doc t Coney s & y e hook & up to mr Savages. he informs y t mr Jones s & mr Crages Child n are mending. I have been at home, found a Turky on her nest, 5 Eggs there in. Hannah finish t Comeing our flax. Dolly Sleeps here this night. a t home.

G Clear, the wind Southardly. Jon a Dind here, informs me his Son is not So well as he Could wish. mr Jones & mr Livermore took Tea here. I have been at home. a t home. mr John Jones here. mr Lor y Goodins house Burnt.
G Clear. I have been at home. mr Livr mr , Dens mr . Child, Hamlin, Burt n & their wives & others were here. Cyrus & Dolly at home, Jon a & his wife & babe allso. at home. Company here.
G Clear & Pleas t . Es q Coney Calld to See us. Cyrus & Dolly at home. I have been at home. mr Manley went to his Cousins. a t home.

A Clear. I Came from mr Shaws & arivd at home at 11h morn, receivd 6/ as a reward. Dolly is at home. Hannah & Shee went to mr Waids. Jos h Foster here. Cyrus was up. Ephm went Down as far as Cap t Husseys with him to take y e hors Back. Jon a is not here y s Day. Moses Pollard informs me Eliphalet Robbins is recovering from his late illness. a t Ditoes. my Dagt went to See mrs Waid.
Cloudy & rain. mr Ballard went to Varsalbor o . I have been at home. Ephm went to School. a t home.
Clear part of y e Day. mr Ballard went to work at Cobesy mill. mrs Porter Came here. Sent Ephm to mr Childs for Parthenia. a mr Moore of Green Sleeps here. a t home. mrs Porter here.

Clear & very pleast Day, Cloudy Evn g . mr Ballard is gone to help Cyrus fix his mill. Jon a Came home aft n . Hannah spent Evn at mr Liverm rs , Dolly & mr Densmrs Dagts there. I have been at home, finisht my Stockins & began to foot one. a t home, Hannah at mr Livermor s .

Clear & pleast, a white frost y s morn. Dolly went away Early. mr Ballard went to Survey a little for mr Liverm r he took Breakfas t there. mr John Jones Dind here. I have been at home knitt Some, Hannah washt. Jon a went to the woods for Shingles. Cyrus went to his mill. Manly Came to work here, it is y e 3 d day he has Drest flax for us. a t home. mr John Jones here.
Cloudy & Some rain. mr Ballard wen t to mr Vahans. I have been a t home. I found our Blak Turky with 7 Eggs under her. a t home.

Clear & Cold. mr Ballard was at mr Savages, haveing his Cumpas mended. mr Town went from here. mr Bisbe here. I have been at home, feel very unwell. mr Manley work t for mr Wade. at home. Son Town went home.

X. Birth Saml Jacksons Dagt. XX. Clear. I was Calld by Saml Jackson to See his wife, who was Safe Deld at 1h pm of a Dagt. Shee had a turn of faintness but revivd. I left her and arivd at home about Sun Sett. at Saml Jacksons. Birth 14 th . receivd6/ fee July 5.

Cloudy & misty morn. mr Dingler Came here when we were at Breakf t to hurry mr Strattne. they Sett out Directly for to go on board Capt Springer bound for Boston. it has raind Stedily this Day. I have been at home kniting. a t home. mr Straten & Lady went from here. I Sent 6/ by her to purchace me Some Cambric.

Clear & very Cold. I tarried at the Cap ts till Evn then Came home. I went to mr Dumers & Bot 2 yds Sarsnet, 1/2 lb Snuff, 4 yd Lawn, a mustard & Sallt; all Cost 8/4 d , paid y e Cash. I finisht mr Ballad Buskins & was Calld to mr Sewalls at 11 h 30m. a t Ditoes & mr Dumers, mr Ballad & Jon a to meddow.

a Clear, plest Sun tho Cool air. mr Ballard & Cyrus went to Pitts tn , Jon a went to the woods for Shingles. mrs Welch & Jenny here goin to mr Beemans, y e Dagt is to tarry there. her other Two Childn, Shee informs me, Shee has given to mr Mitchell at 25 mile Pond, to Do for as his own. I have been at home. Hannah finisht Spining the mxt wool for her Daddys hoes. at home.

Cloudy till 9h. morn, when y e Sun Shone, very pleast y e remainder of y e Day, Cool at Evn g. mr Ballard Eph m & D.Densmore are gone to y e medow. John Savage Sett out with y e Teem a little before night. I have been at home knitting on a Stockin of mr Ballards. Jona has been to y e hook & y e fort. Polly Cowen Swore a Child on Phinneas Pain y s day. a t home mr Ballard gone to y e meddow.
Clear & Cold. I returnd home. mr Hamlin made me a pres t of a quill Wheal & 3 quarts of rice. mr Waid informs his Dagt is no better. Hannah is washing. a t mr Hamlins, his wife is better.

Clear. I am very unwell. Hannah is gone to mr Densmores to have an over Coat Cutt out. I was Calld at 2h pm to See Savage Boltons inft, find it a very Destresst Child. I tarried all night, tho very unable. mr Cragg Calld me to See his Dagt who has the Cough & other Complaints. mrs Savage at Boltons. a t mr Boltons, watcht, mrs Brown allso.

Cloudy the most of y e Day. Eph m workt for mr Hamlin part of y e Day. he Brot a quill wheal home which is a present from mr Hamlin to me. Polly Livermore Spent y e Evn g here. mr Ballard went to Col o Howards at Evng. I have been at home. a t home.

Clear. I have been very unwell. mr Ballard & Ephm workt about y e barn. old mr Ingerham here. Jon a Came home & Dind then went up to town. I was So unwell I Could not Sett up y e aftern. at home all day. a t home.

X. Birth mr Selvestr Son & 3 rd Child. XX. Clear & Pleast. mrs Selves tr was Safe Deld of a Son which wd 8-1/2 lb at 3 h morn. I left her Cleaverly a t 11. Calld at Cap t Filebrowns & Jen e Whebs. walk t part of ye way home, wrode the other. receivd 2 lb Coffee, 1 yd ribbond & a [Cap boader] as Extraodenary for waiting on her. I went to mr Densmores, was informd that mr Ezeliel Pages youngest Child Expird last night. a t Ditoes. Birth [35]th. fee receivd. mr [sic].
Clear. Son Town went home. I have been at home. mr Goold & Fuller Sleep here, Shuball Pitts allso. a t home.

Over Cast the most of y e Day Jon a went to the meddow Lot for Shingles, mr Ballard returnd from Pitts tn . I have been at home. my Dagts returnd from winslow. our friends are in health there. mr Pitts brot Parthenia here. a t home. my Dagts returnd. Ephm went to mr Sewals, Bot 4 lb Butter @ /9 & 2 Doz n Bisquet @ [/], paid y e Cash.

Cloudy Some Snow. mr Ballard went to mr Childs to git a pair Shoes made for Hannah. Ephm has been to mr Shepherds, bot a Chip & 2lb. Sugar. Cost 3/, to mr Dumers bot 1/2 yd. Sarsnet 1/3. mr Georg Brown brot us 4 Bush l of Wheat from 7 mile brook. I have been a t home. Jon a has not been well y s Day. a t home.

Cloudy morn, the ground just Coverd with Snow, the Sun Shone the middle of y e Day, Cloudy at Evn g . mr Ballard been to Lay ou t a house Lott for mr Dany at y e hook. I have been at home. mrs Porter & my Dagt Dolly Sleep here. my Son Jon a broke his mill Saw y s Day. he had one Swine from here yesterd y , and another y s Day. a t home. Carded Cottne. mrs Porter here.

X. Birth Peter Grants Son. XX. A Cloudy, Dull Day. I was Calld by Peter Grant to See his wife. they had Calld Doc t Parker before I arivd & he Seemd to Chuse to Perform the opperation which took Place at 1h 11 m AM. I lift her & infant Cleverly at 2h and arivd Safe at home about 4. Dolly & Sally Densmr here at Evn g . I receivd 6/ of mr Grant. at mr Grants, Pittst n , his first Childwas Born. Doc t Parker Performd y e Operation.

X. Birth mr Walkers Son. XX. Clear morn, Snowd before noon, Clear aft n . mrs Walkers was Safe Deld of a Son which wd 10-1/4 lb. I Came from there at 11 h & arivd Safe at home at 1 h pm, find that mrs Pitts had Sent for me. I laid Down & Slept, had a Severe fit of Cramp. a t Does. Birth 34 th . fee receivd Feby [25] 1792.
Clear. I finish t my Stockin. my patient was unwell all Day. a t Does.

Cloudy. mrs Lidia & Dolly went to mr Densmores af t Breakfast. Lidia Came back & wrode down on y e Carriage y t Eph m was going to mill with. mr Ballard went to mr Shepherds, bot 2 bush l Corn @ 3/; to mr Livermores got 2 lb raisens a /8, 2 Skeins Silk a /4-1/2; to Col o Duttuns bot W.E.R. 2/1 ; to mr Dumers & bot 3 yds Sarsnet @ 2/6 pr yd, 1 Sheat past bord /8. I have been at home, finish t footing my worsted hoes & began a pair of yarn ones. Eph m been to Pitts tn mill. Cyrus Came home with him. a t home.

Clear but very Cold morn, a pleas t Sun in y e middle of ye Day. mr Ballard returnd at Evn, Dolly Came home. Jona has attended funeral of mr Boltons inft, but a Small number there. I have been at home, have not been able to perform any Business. a t home. funeral of mr Boltons inft Son.

Clear & moderate. mr Ballard got wood and went to y e hook, Jon a to the woods for Shingles; Brot home 2lb Coffee. Seth J Foster here. I have been at home mending hoes. Dolly Came home at Evng. we are informd that the infant of mr Selvester was interd y s aft n . a t home. Funera l mr Selvesters infant Son.
Clear. mr Ballard been makeing preperation for his Tour into the woods. I have been at home. John Savage work t for us. I put 16 Eggs under a Turkey. Dolly Came home. mr Livr mr Supt here. at home.

A Birth mr Randals Son. XX. Cloudy morn. I was Calld between midnight & 1h m to See mrs Randal, who was Safe Deld at 1h of a fine Son. Shee Sufferd before my arival but the life of mother & Child were preservd. I tarried all night, receivd my fee in Pork, 18 lb , & 4 lb Lard for former attendance. I left the Lady & inft as well as Could be Expected. Calld to See mrs F Brown who I find Cleverly. a mr Randals. Birth 12th.

G Clear morn. I went to Bed after Day, rose with the Sun, took Breakfas t & Left mr Preskotts at 7h morn accompanied by Noah, his Son. I Calld at mr Ben n Porters, his wife gave me a Legg off Veal. I Calld at mr Fosters, find her & inft as well as Could be Expected. She had an ill turn yester dy when her milk Came, but is Cleverly. I arivd at home at y e 11 th h morn, took Dinner & went to See mrs Livermore who was put to Bed yester dy , & is Cleverly; her inft allso. I was Calld from there to See the wife of Lem l Jackson, arivd 8h pm, find her Exercis d with Cramp pains. tarried all night, was much fatagud with my Exercise. Came from mr Preskotts & went to Lem l Jacksons. I receivd 9/ off mr Preskott.

B X. Birth Esq r Lithgows Son. XX. Snowd & was Cold. mrs Lithgow was very unwell all Day. her women were Calld in towards Evn g & Shee was Safe Delivrd of a fine Son a t 10 h Evn, and is Cleverly. mrs Pettee, Stackpool, Thomas & Collar taried all night. a t Does. Birth [36] th . I Sett up with my Patient, her first Born.
G Clear & pleast. we have been preparing for mr Ballards Deparlure to Lay out Town Ships. W m Haywood & Jon a Dind. mr Jones took Tea here. a t home. mr Jones here.
Clear. I was at the Esq rs , mrs Bridg Came there at 8 Evn g , her Dagt is Cleverly. mrs Stackp l & I Slep t together. a t Does. mrs Bridg Came there.

Clear & Pleast Sun but Cold air, a very Cold night. mr Ballard out after hay, procurd 1/2 a ton at mr Norris s . mr Densmores Dagts & Cousin here, Dolly allso. Cyrus Came for his Daddy to go & mend his mill. I have been at home knitting on Cyrus s mitt. a t home.

X. Birth Moses Whites Dag t . fee receivd. XX. Clear & pleast. I was Calld to See Moses Whites Lady who was in travil. I arivd there at 4 h morn. the Lady Safe De ld of a Dag t a t 11 h 5 m . I left her at 2 pm, find on my return that mr Ballard took his Departure on his Tour of Surveying a t 12 O Clok. may God prospur & return him [&] his Company in Safety. I receivd 6/ of mr White by mr Roberson. a letter from Bror Collins at 2 d inst, one from Doc t Barton of 16 th ; Hannah one f m her aunt Barton of 18, all which inform our friends are well. at mr Moses Whites. Birth 15 th . mr Ballad Sett out on his Tour of Surveyng. I recievd Letters fm oxford.

A Shoury Day. Cyrus Came here y s morn from Jon a s and went to Pitts tn . I have been at home, workt in my Gardin; Planted Cucumbers. mr Briggs here, took a Dead for his Son W m ; Did not pay for it. Hannah has been to mr Densmores to help quillt a Coat. a t home, workt in my Gardin.
Clear. mrs Jackson is relievd of her Distress & I left her at 3h pm. I Calld at Jon a s , mr Childs & Wessons. arivd home at 8 Evn. a t Jacksons.

Clear & very Pleas t . mr Moore & mrs Porter left here. mr Ballard went to Esq r Coneys & to Cobesy. I went to See Bradwl Livermore, find him Easier than he was. mr Thos Smyle here when I Came home, he Sleeps here. I am informd that the wife of mr And w Goodin Expird las t night at 11 h , allso y t the wife of mr Wiman at Jonses plant n lately Deceas t in Child Bed. a t mr Livermr s . mr Smily here. Death of mrs Goodin.
Snowd foren, raind aftr n & Evn. mr Ballard at pittst n . Jona went to the meddow Camp & hauld 5 Thousen of Shingles. I have been at home footing a pair of Stockins. a t home.
A foggy misty Day. I was Calld to See mr Nath l Shaws infant, it has the Cough & appeard in Danger of having fitts. mrs Lishance watcht. a t mr Shaws.
Clear. mr Ballard went to Survey for Col o Duttun. I have been at home. mr Woodward Dind here. a t home. mr Wood wd here.

Snowd the most of y e Day. mr Ballard & mr Wade Setled acounts. Manly made a Gate. mr Ball went to the hook and up to Town, he receivd 8/ of Pet r Voce which Isaac Hardin left there for my attending his wife in illness. I have been at home. a t home. Isaac Hardin paid me 8/.

Clear, a frost this & a number of morns past. I have been at home. Bro r Town & Cyrus Dind here & Slept this night. they Brot a mill Spindle to mr Savage to mend. mr Manley left here at noon. mr Ballard paid him for his Service here the month past. a t home. Br r Town & Cyrus here. Manly left here.

X. Birth mr Beemans Dag t . XX. Clear. I went to mr Dummers, bo t 2 yds Shalloon 5/, 2 Do fustian 5/, 1 lb Tea & Teapot 3/8, paper pins /10, 1 Gal n molases 3/6, Skein Silk /5, 2lb Butter 1/6. mrs Barton & my Dagt gone to Jon a s . Thos Haywood here. I paid him 24/ for his Dad. I went to See mrs Densmores inft, it is no better. I was Calld at 9h Evn to See mrs Beeman, Shee was Delivd Soon after my arival of [a her] 4 th Dagt. I tarried all night, my Patients are Cleverly. a t mr Dummers & mr Densmores. I have Beets, Carrots & Beens up. at mr Beemans. Birth 19 th .

X. Birth Moses Sewalls Dagt. XX. Clear & very Cold. mrs Sewall was Safe Deld a t 2h 15m morn of a Dagt, her 3 d Child, & is as well as Could be Expected. I returnd home after we Dind. receivd 6/ Cash, 1/2 lb Tea, 3 Skeins Cambk Thread as a Compensation. Lois Hinkley Calld here. a t mr Moses Sewalls. Birth 7 th .mr Ballard gone to mill. mr Searls here; Dind.

Clear, a very Cold morn, Pleas t Day. my Son Jonathan Brot his wife & little Son here. mr Ballard returnd from Pittst n . I have been at home, finisht kniting Hannah a pair of hoes. mrs Welch here, Shee left her Dagt Jenny at mr Beemans. a t home. Jon a Brothis wife here on a visit.

A Clear and pleas t . mr Ballard is Severly Exercisd with pain in y e Small of his back. there was preaching at our meeting house, we did not attend. mr Warrin of Pittst n performd. Cyrus & Dolly have been at home. mr Pollard, Patridg, mr s Ballard & mrs Dorc s Pollard here at Evn. my Son Jon a is 29 years old y s Day. a t home. Company here at Evn. Jon as Birth Day, 29 years old.

Cloudy morn, Sun Shine the most of y e aftern. mr Ballard returnd from the meddow, the Boys with him, they brot a little hay home. Jon a has been to the wood, had Shingles brout out. he went to See James Savage, finds him very low. I have been at home, finisht knitting mr Ballard a pair of hoes. Hannah is gone to mr Dinsmores, Polly Liverm r allso. a t home. Hannah went to mr Densmrs.

X. Birth Savage Boltons 4th Son a t 8 h Evn. A Severe Storm of Snow. mr Ballard gone to y e fort, returnd at 2h pm. mr Savage Came in Directly for me to go to Savage Boltons. I went on hors Back as far as mr Pollards, in a Sleigh from there. mrs Savage went with me. we were once over Sett, once I got out & helpt push behind y e Carriage. we arivd Safe at Sun Sett at Boltons. a t Boltons. Birth 4 th . I tarried all night. a Doleful Storm of Snow,[ ] fee recd [ ].

Clear & very Pleast. mr Ballard is gone to Survey or run lines for Jery Badcok & others. Jon a is gone to winthrop. mr Walker here, Brot me 2 lb Cottne & 1 lb Chocolat for former Services. mr Ballard returnd without Doing y e Business he went for. mrs Black here, Hannah went with her to mr Densmores. I went to mr Livermores. Shee is not So well as usual. Dolly Came here, Drank Tea. Georg Brown Sleeps here, has 2 horses. a t mr Livermores. Mrs Black here. I had a Severe fitt of y e Cramp y s night.

Clear & Pleast. mr Ballard went to the meddow. Hannah returnd at 12 Oclock. mr Hamlin, Burtin, Pollard, Pattridg, Esq Hales Lady, 2 mrs Bisbe s , Rockwood & Sally Hamlin with her, the Ladies Dind & Drank Coffee here. mr Haywood, Pollard & Pattridg waited on them and my Dagts at Evn g to mr Pollards. I have been at home, was very unwell in y e fore n , more Comfortable aftern. mrs Haill & Polly Bisbe returnd & Slep t here. a t home. my Dagts went to mr Hamlins. receivd Letters from Doc t Barton & Bro r Collins of Feby 12.
Clear. I wed gardin foren n , and went to mr Densmores to Carry the Cloath for mr Ballard a Coat. I Calld to See mrs Liverm r , find her & inft very Comfortable. a t mr Densmores & mr Liverm rs .

X. Birth James Childs s Son. XX. Clear & very warm. mrs Childs s illness Came on, her women were Calld & Shee Safe Deld of a fine Son at 0h 30 m pm & is Cleverly, & Every Circumstance Seemd agreeable, but alass, what Changesing Seins take place. at 8 in the Evng as a number were Collected & Diverting them selves, if I may use the Expression, by fireing the field pieces, three men; vis Will Voce, James & Sam l Johnson were wounded by an unexpectd Discharg by reason of it not being properly Swabd. the two Johnsons were thought to be mortally wounded, they were Carried to mr Craggs. I went with mr Childs & Batheir [sic] wounds & returnd to mr Childs. at mr [Childs]. Birth 22 [nt] . threemen were wounded by a Discharg of a field piece. Nancy Gillmanwent from mr Childs to mr Shepherds.

X. Birth mr Hamlins Son. XX. Snowd. mr Ballard brot a hogg home which he Purchas t yesterd. I was Calld to See mrs Hamlin at 9 Evn, Shee was Deld of a Son at 10 h 15 m . I left her at 10 h 45 m & went to Cap t Philibrowns, his wife unwell. a t mr Hamlins & Cap t Phillibrowns. Birth 2 nt .
Cloudy & Some Snow. I was Calld to See mr Densmores inft, it being unwell. mr Pitts, his Sis tr Sela, mr Burtun & Lady here at Evn. at mr Densmors to See his [inft].

Snowd a little fore n , Clear aft n . Sally & Hannah Spent y e aft n and Evn g at mr Densmores. Jon a went to haull Shingles. went for the Girls at Evn. mrs Densmore is unwell. I have been at home. mr Livermore returnd home from the westwd at 10h. Evn g . a t home. my Dagts went to mr Densmores. mr Livermre returnd from the westwd.

Cloudy, a Chilly air. Esq r Cony here. I paid him for his attendance & medesin for my Dagt Dolly. his Demand was 6/. mrs Porter left here after we Dind. my Dagts & Sally Densmore went to help mrs Norcross quillt a Bed quillt. Pally went to her uncles to take care at his little Son. Ephm went to See her Safe there. I have been a t home. a t home. mrs Porter went home, my Dagts to quillting, Patty to Jonathans.
A misty Day, the Sun Shone a few minuits about 10 morn. I have been at home. Put 17 Eggs under a Turkey who was Seting. a t home.

X. Birth Colo Sewalls Dagt. XX. Clear & very pleast. I was at Col o Sewalls; he was Surveying Bords a t Jones s mill, his Lady s illness increas t a t 5 & Shee was Safe Deld at 6 h pm of a fine Dagt & is Cleverly. mrs Brooks, Voce & Parker assistants. I tarried all night. mrs Cowen took Tea there. old mrs Lankester there unwell. a t Col o Sewalls. Birth 18thof which 10 were Dag ts .

Cool & rainy. I was a t mr Childs takeing Care of Sam l Johnson. mrs Childs & infant are very well indeed. I made an ointment & applyd to Sam s Soars, Bathd them with Spirri t & worm wd . mr Ballard returnd from his Survey in health. he Came to mr Childs & Conducted me home by water, Ephm assisted. I Calld a t mr Pollards, find her no t so well as Shee Could wish by reason of Troubles Shee is Calld to bear. mrs Childs made me a pres t off a Handkerc f . I find my famely all will and our Turkeys have hatch t , and have in y e whole 43 Chicks. at mr Childs & mr Pollards. mr Child givs me Credit for 15/ as a reward for my asistance there.

G Clear, a Cool air. Cyrus Dind here and went to his Bro rs . Patty has a sore throat. mr Child s here for Borax to apply to his wives nipples, his inft has a Sore mouth. Dolly returnd from Winth p . Hannah s Hors got out off y e pasture & Shee tarried. they attended a Baptist meeting, Saw one mrs Smith Baptised. mr Baxter & mrs Dorcas Pollard Joind in Wedlock this Evng. a t home.
A Severe Snow Storm. Jon a went to Pitts tn , Brot up 7 Bushels meal. mr Ballard is Some Easier. I have been at home. Hannah washt. a t home. Dan l Fosters wife Deld, her inft Expird.
Clear & warm. I have been a t home, workt in my Gardin Some. Spent Some time Seeking my Turkeys & knitt Some. Hannah washt, mr Ballard went to mr Craggs. a t home.

Clear fore n , Cloudy and a Sprinkling of rain aft n . mrs Desnm r & Dolly Came here. my Dagt tarries all night. mr Ballard left home Bound to Winslow as an apriser of Land belonging to a mr Pitt, which Es qr Williams is about to Purchace. my Dag t Han h returnd from Winth p y s Evng. a t home. mr Ballard went to Winslow.

Clear & very Pleas t . mrs Stackp l went home. I went to my Son Towns, tarried about an hour, returnd to the Esqr s . Sett out from there at 1 h pm, arivd a t home at 8 Evn. I left my Patients Cleverly, find my famely So. Esq r Lethgow made me a reward of 24/ & a Callico goun patron & 1 y d Cloth Linning. returnd home. was at Towns, all well there. mrsStrattne there.
Clear & pleast. John Savage Came Here to work. I have been at home, Began to make Gardin. a t home. workt in my gardin.

X. Birth Jery Powels Dagt. XX. Clear Except Showers at Evn g . I workt Some in my gardin. mrs Densmore hire to warp a web of 50 yds . mrs Savage here on a visit. I was Calld at 6 h AM to See Jery Powells wife, went by water. Shee was Deld of a Dagt at 8 & I returnd a 10 Ev n , find mrs Bartun here. Son Towns famely are well. a t Jery Powells. Birth 16 th , a first Born.

Clear. I went to See mrs Livermr foren. Son Jon a Dind here, informs me his Daddy was well & Expects to return home Soon. I went up to the Stores aftern. a t mr Livermors. I putt 17 Eggs und r a turkey.
G Clear morn. I gatherd a fine mess of Greens in my Gardin. Cyrus, Jon a & Dolly were here. mr Ballard and I went to mr Livermores, Shee & inft are Cleverly. a t mr Livermores.
Cloudy & Some rain. I workt in my Gardin, mr Ballard makeing Plann of his Survey. Hannah went to her Brothers a t Evng. a t home.

X. Birth mr Wessons Son. XX. Clear & Cool. I was Calld at 3 h morn to See mrs Wesson, Shee was Safe Deld at 4h. 30m. of a fine Son. mrs Pollard, Duttun & Hamlin assisted. Shee and Child are Cleverly. I recievd 12/ as reward. mr Ballard Sett out for to Explore the Country Back of fort Hallifax, inployd by this Common wealth. I tarried at mr Westons, mrs Filleb n & Sally Floid allso. a t mr Wessons. Birth 30 th . at [mr Wess s ]. a rainy night.
Cloudy & misty. the inft is revivd and I returnd home at 1h. p.m. Jon a Been to y e hook & fort. Ephm is at the Sugar works with mr Densmores. a t Ditoes.
Clear part of y e Day. mr Ballard & Ep m & John Savage Brot Bords Down. I have been at mr Livermore, find his Lady much weller. I finisht mr Ballards hoes. a t mr Livermr s . Snowd at Evn.
Clear & Cool. mr Ballard has been to Survey land for mr Briggs. Esq r Wesson Sleeps here. I have been at home, Spun 15 knots of linning y n for thread. a t home. Esq r Wesson here.

Clear. mr Ballard gon up in town. Ephm & John Savage brot home a Barril of pork from mr Pitts, 28lb Sugar @ /11 d , 18lb Chocolat @ 1/5. Bro r Town & Cyrus Came here at Evn & Sleep here. at home. Bro r Town & Cyrus Sleep here.

Cloudy. I returnd home a t 9h morn, left my Patients Cleverly, receivd 6/ as a reward. mrs Bartun left here y s morn to go home by water with Ja ms Haywood. a t Does. mrs Barton went from here. raind aftn.

Clear Excep t a Sprinkling of rain. I went from mr Whites to See mrs LaShance who is Sick, from there to See mrs Daws; find her Cleverly. I Calld a t mrs Sherburns, Selvesters, Greelys, Cap t Fillibrowns and the mr Norcrosse s . arivd a t home before night. mr Ballard went up to town. Ep hm work t at mr Kenadas. mr Whites Child Seems to be more Comfortable. a t mr Whites & other Neighbours. I receivd 6/ of Sam l Cumings Junr for allending his wife.
Clear & Cool. I have been at home, not able to Sett up y e most off the Day by reason of my fatagues. mrs Bradbury here to have a hatt made by my Dagt Hannah. a t home.

Cloudy morn, Clear the rest of y e Day, the Sun Eclipsed. Jon a Brot his wife here. mrs Densmore here on a visit, her husband & mr Waid Supt. mr Livermr & wife, mr Ballard & I went to mr Phillip Norcroses, their Child n have the Cough. Col o Sewall here fore n . a t mr Norcros s .

Cloudy part off y e Day. Hannah washt. I went to mr Livermrs, his Lady & I went & Spent after n at mr Densmores, mrs Edson there. Dolly Came home, tarries y s night. mr Ballard been to y e hook, Bo t 2/1 Gal n N E Rhum & 1 gal n molases. Dolly went to mr Wessons, Bot her Self a pair Shoes. I gave her the money. a t mr Densmores. S.J. Foster & Sam l Jackson paid me for asisting their wives.

Cloudy morn, Clear aftn. mr Waid here Choping wood. mrs Wickson, H. Rockwood & Polly Liverm r here, the latter to have a hatt made. our men broke their Slead Down. a t home. we had Company, mrs Wickson here.

Snowd & raind. mr Haywood & m Pollard Came & Conducted mrs Haill & mrs Bisbe up to Town. mr Densmore & Waid and their wives Calld here on their way to y e hook. mr Ballard, Eph m & David Densmr been to y e meddow, returnd with out giting any hay except a hand Sleigd load, which y e boy halld. I have been at home, am not well yet. mr Black Came & acompanied my Dagts to his house. Jon a Came home a t Evn g informs me his Son was Burnt on one of his feet this day. at home. had Company. my Dagts gone to mr Blacks. they Spen t y e Evn g at mr Thomas s.
Clear & hott. I have been a t home. wed gardin foren n , had Company after n ; Vis mrs Voce, Hersey, Densmr, Betty Baxter & Dagt Dolly. I had a Turkey began to hatch. a t home, had Comp y .

Clear & Cooler. I went to mr Craggs, help t Dress the wounded. Saml Johnson was Carried on a Bier Born by 4 men from mr Craggs to mr Childs where was Dresst. I took Care of him thro the Day. Doc t Colman informd me his wife & Child n went on Board a vessel bound for Nubury. I went in a t mr Hamlins, & Burtuns. mrs Wicksom was there. a t mr Craggs & Childs & Hamlins.
Some Showers fore n . Son Town, his wife & Dagts Sett out from here a t y e 11 th h morn Bound for Pitts tn . I have wed Gardin Some. Hannah is not So well as usual. a t home.

Clear. I have been at home mending & kniting. my Dag t Hannah maid my Bunnit over anew & finisht mrs Bradburys; Shee Came for it, Betsy Champny here allso. mr Ballard houghing Beans on y e Entervail. a t home. Nathaniel Voce was Drowned a t y e hook.

over Cast morn. mr Pitts, his Sis tr & Parthenia left here at 12 O clock. mr Hamlin here. mr Ballard & Ephm Clearing road to wood. Jona Brot 14lb rice, 1/2lb Tea, 1 gal molasis. my Dagts finisht makeing my goun. I finisht Cyrus s mitts. at home.

Snow d . I went to See mrs Densmore, Shee is very unwell, I gave her Camphir and aplid hott Bricks to her feet, which brot perspiration & Shee Seemd a little relievd. Dolly wrode home in y e Sleigh with me. Hannah Bak t Pies. mr Georg Brown here, has a Sore finger. mr Livermore here. a t mr Densmores.

Cloudy & Some rain. mr Ballard has been to mr Seth J. Fosters and to pitts tn . Son Town Came here a t Evn g , he left his famely well. he informs me y t Hannah Davis has a Son a weak Old. I have been at home, mended mr Ballards Short Coa t . we had a Calf Come. at home. Son Town here.
Cloudy the mos t of y e Day. I have been at home. Jon a Dind here. I have Planted Beens & Beets before the Door. the Boys planted Potatoes. mr Livirm r Sowd Pees for us on the Entervail. a t home.

Clear & warm. I returnd home a t 9h morn, left my Patients Cleverly. I Sowd Beets, Carrots, Parsnips & Planted Beens & Musk mellons; Sowd Cabbage & French Turnips. Dolly Came home at Ev n . Eph m went to mr Wessons, Bot me 1 quart W rhum. mr Hamlin Sent me a Stand to Sett a Light on. a t Does. receivd 6/6 as a reward.

Clear & warm. mrs Bisbe, Haywood & my Dagty Hannah went to See mrs Fillibrown y s foren, to Son Jon a s after n . mrs Nancy Cleark Dind here, mr Livermore Supt. mr Ballard finisht weading his Corn. Ephm attempted going to mill By water, got as far as mr Shepherds. thee wind agains t him, he left his Canoe & Corn and his Daddy went & brot it home again. I have been at home, workt in my Gardin & did hous work; feel much fatagud. a t home. had Compa y .

Clear. I hough d my Cabbages & went to the hook. was informd y t Nathan l Voce was Drowned yester dy & is to be interd y s aft n . find on my return home thal mr Ballard is gone to Sett on y e Jury of inquest on y e Boddy. I purchast a t the Stores of thread wha t Cos t 1/6, tape & Bob n 1/6, Silk Sew ng /6, Sug r 2/, Shalloon 2/6, fan 1/6, Snuff 1/, 7 yds Callico @ 2/10; 19/10; 6lb Butt r @ /7; 3/7. mr Voce interd y s after n . I was at the hook as far as mr Shepherd. funeral of mr Voce, attended at 4 h pm.
G Clear. mr Ballard, my Dagts & Eph m attended worship fore n & aft n allso. Cyrus & my Self after n . mr Smith Discours t from Numbers 23 d & 10 th . I attended worship. af t .
G rain fore n . Cyrus Came home after Dinner, he waited on me to mr Densmores. I find her a little more Comfortable. Jon a & Dolly had Each of them a Sheep Lambd, both had twins. a t mr Densmores.

G Cloudy all Day. I went to See mr Densmores inf t , it is unwell. mrs Barton Came here, her Sis t & inf t are very unwell. mr Livr mr Drank Tea with us. Cyrus & Dolly here. Eph m went to Jon a s , little Jack is unwell. a t mr Densmores, his inf t is unwell.

G Clear, a frost y s morn. I wrode out as far as mr Shepherds. Calld at mr Shaws, his inf t is Better. mr Phillip Norcross gave me 6/ as I was returning home, for my assisting his wife the 20th of Jan y . I was a t mr Shepherds & D. Colmans & at [home].

G Clear. mr Ballard, my Self & Ephm attended Public worship all Day, my Son Cyrus aftern. mr Smith Discours t from 1 st John v Ch 10 vers in y e morn; Aft n f m Proverbs 1 st 29 th . mr Liverm r here a t Evn, Drank Tea. Dolly tarries here y s night. a t meeting. W m Briggs & Nabby Fuller Publisht y e 2 nd Time.

G X. Birth mr Daws s Son. XX. Clear & very warm. I was Calld at 7 h 30 m by mr Haws to see mrs Daws who was in Labour, and was Deld at 9 h Evn of a fine Son, her fifth Child, all males. I tarried all night, mrs Cox allso. my Patients as well as Could be Expected. mr Daws Sett out for long reach this morn. mrs Ney, Greely, Parmur, Sherbur n & mrs Cox assistants. a t mr Daws. Birth 24th.
Cloudy. Jon ns lambs were brot into ye hous, are feeble but revivd. mrs Livermore & I went to See old Lady Coney, Shee has had an ill turn, but is a little better. a t Deaon Coneys.
Clear. I have been a t home. Jon a help t furrow for Planting. Cyrus went to his mill after Dinner. little Jack is better to Day. a t home.

Clear morn, Cloudy after n . I went to mr Childs s , his wife & inft are Cleverly. Johnson is as well as Can be Expected. I Calld at mr Pollards, Pitts, & mr Wessons, & Bot in his Store 2 Skeins Silk a /5/, 1 quart 3 gills Rhum Cos t 1/6, 1 Comb 2/, 3 Lemmons 1/. when I Came home was informd y t mrs Livermore was unwell. I went to See her, gave her Some Directions what to take as remedies & returnd home. a t mr Childs s & other Neig rs .

Clear & warm. I went to mr Shephards, bo t 2lb Loaf Sugar @ 2/, _ hyson Tea, Cost 2/6. Came back to mrs Daws, Left her Cleverly & returnd home at 2 h pm. mr Ballard is gone to Pitts tn mill. a t Does & mr Shephard s .

X. Birth Wil m Swant ns Dag t . XX. Cloudy & a moderate rain after n . I was Calld y s morn to See mrs Swanton who is in Labour with her first Child. Shee was Safe Deld a t 9 h Evn g of a fine Dag t . mother & inft are Cleverly. I tarried thro thee night. at Cap t Savages. Birth 26 th . I receivd 6/ as a reward.

rainy. my Son Jona & mr Savage here on their way to Pownalbor o . Cyrus went to y e hook, Bot 1 quart & 1/4 W E Rhum, 2lb Sugar, 1 Tea Pott, 1 Bowl. mr Eustiss, Hamlin, Burtun & y r wives & Sisters here; Drank Tea. Hannah Rockwood hurt her foot going to y e river, was bro t back & tarries here y s night. a t home, had Company. H. Rockwd Sprain t her foot & tarries here y s night.

Birth Black Edmonds Son. Snowd y s morn. I was Calld by Edmond at 6h morn to See his wife. had one fall from my hors, was assisted by Moses White in prosceeding the rest of y e way. Lidia was Delivrd at 1h pm of a Son, her first Born. mr Walker Conducted me home in a Sleigh. Hannah has Bak t Pumkin pies. at Black Edmonds. Birth 13 th .

Clear & warm. I workt in my Gardin forn n , felt much over Come and laid on y e Bed Some time. mr Ballard & Eph m are weading our Corn, began this morn. mrs Woodward here, Hannah Wall was with her. a t home. mrs Woodw d here.

Clear Day, a Sprinkling of rain at Evn g . I went to mr Norcros s & had 4 milk pans, did not pay for y m . mr Dana gave me a refues Puding pan. Suky Norcross here. I Cleand my Seller y s Day. a t mr Norcros s .

Clear & pleas t Day but a frost y s morn. I workt in y e Gardin till near night, then went to See mrs Livermore who is not So well as usual. Hannah has a pain in her head. a t mr Livrmr s . I Sowd SomeCarro t Seed. Hannah unwell at Evng.

Clear & warm. I have planted Beens, Cucum rs , Sowd peppers, Carrots & Cabbage. Hannah washt & Scourd house. mr M c Causland here, his wife & Child very ill. mrs Barton went home with him. a t home, Sowing gardin &c, we have cabbages Cum up.
Clear. mr Densmore & wife & Dat t Dolly Dind here. mrs Dinsmr & I went to See mrs Livermore who is Cleverly. a t Ditoes & wrote to Doc t Barton.

Clear fore n , Cloudy & misty Evn g . mr Ballard is Gone to Pownalbor o . I have been weading Gardin, and went to See mrs Livermore; find her Comfortable. Hannah washt the West roome floore. a t mr Livermores.
rain foren, Clear after n . I returnd from mr Andrus s a t 9h morn, find Hannah Cox here to work for me. mr Ballard wen t to Pownalboro y s after n . mr Vahan Calld here. a t mr Andrews s .

Clear. mr Ballard Sett ou t to Survey for mr Vauhan. mr Wing returnd mr Ballards papers. he & my Son Jon a Dind here. Cyrus here aftern. my Dagts went to mr Wessons, Shee & her Son Chever Calld here foren. a t home. mr Wing gave mr Ballard 1/2_ for Servis he had Done.
Clear. I have been at home. mr Ballard & Eph m assisting at y e Sugar works. Jon a Sett his Saw mill to work, Sawd 1 log. Hannah & Sally Carding & Spin g Cottne. a t home. fas T Day.

Clear a Cool air. mr Ballard & Es qr Wesson went to Es qr Coneys & Engagd to Lay ou t 21 Town Ships, between the rivers PenobScott & Kenebeck. it is Land which belongs to this Commonwelth. I have been at home. Hannah Scoured my Puter & the kitchen. Seth Manley Bro t us Corn & workt here with one yoak oxen. a t home. mr Ballard & Es qr Wesson at Es q Coneys.

Cloudy, the wind N E. it raind and Snowd before night. mr Ballard is gone to winslow. Bro r Town & Cyrus went Down about 2h pm. Jon a went up, he had a Desk & Barl Cyder. I have been at home. a t home. mr Ballard is gone to Winslow.
Cloudy. I was Calld at 10h morn to See Rich d Fosters wife in Labour. Shee lingerd thro y e night. I Slept a little. mr Ballard is 67 years old y s Day, if alive. at Rich d Fosters

Clear, a Coolish air. I have been a t home, workt in my Gardin Some. mr Silas Barns here. mr Ballard went to his meddow. Ep hm went to Pitts tn to See Cap t Grants vessel Lanch t but was Disapointed, it being Launcht yester day. Jon a here, informd me mrs Jones is very unwell ocationed by her Husbands ill usuage, & keeping her in the Seller Bare foot. O the wretch, he Deserves Severe puneshment. a t home. I was informd y t P Jones had abus d his wife.

G Clear. mr Ballard, my Self & Lucy Pettie, Eph m & Polly attended worship, Cyrus aftern. mr Frisby off Ipswich performed. Spoke foren from Acts 17 th 30:31, after n f m Matt h 11 th 30 th . mrs Baxter Left here a t Evn. Colo Sewall had a Child Baptisd by y e name of Meriah, mr Capin one namd Charlotta, mr Liverm r one by y e name off Alpheus. mr Abr m Pages Childn & one of mr mc Masters Baptis d at Evn at mr mc Masters. mr Liverm r here. a t meeting. mr Frisby Performd.

Clear fore n Snowd a little before night, raind at night. mr Ballard went for hay but Could not get to it, Came home much fatagud. mr Livermore & wife had our hors & Sliegh, went to y e hook, Came back at 2h. P.M. Dind. Shee Spent aft n here, went home at Evn. I have been at home. a t home. Isaiah Manly work t here.

G Cloudy foren, the Sun Shone from then a few hours. A Shour at Evn g , thunder. mrs Cowen here. Sally and Polly Densmr Drank Tea. Dolly went home with thim. I Sett a Turkey on 17 Eggs. a t home. Cyrus Sleeps a t his Bro rs .

A Shour y s morn. Dolly went to mr Densmo rs . mr Livermore Butcherd 2 Piggs for us. I roasted one for Dinner. Dolly Came & Dind, Jon a & his wife allso. they left here at 3 O Clock am. I have been a t home, am not very well. a t home. Jona & wife went home.

Clear & pleas t . I have been at home. mr Ballard & Ephm got a load of wood. Dolly went to mr Densmores y s morn and returnd at Evn. we saw Esq r Coney wride over y e river about Sun Sett. a t home. Esq r Coney returnd fr m Boston.
Cloudy all day, raind at night. I have been a t home, Did house work, knitt, & wed gardin; Hannah weaving. my Black Turkey Brot ou t 14 Chicks. a t home.

Clear & hott. I have been a t home, wed my Beets & Sett Cabbages . Son Town, his wife & Dagts returnd from Pitts tn ; his Dad s famely are well, his Sister M c Causlin is more Comfortable than Shee has been, her inft is very Low. it is not Expected it will long Survive. Son Town left here & went as far as my Sons. a t home. have not been So well as usual. Son & Dag t Town & Child n Sett ou t for home.
G Cloudy & Some rain. I Dind with mr Densmore. Cyrus & Dolly a t home. a t mr Densm rs .

G Clear. my Dag t Hannah had a tooth Extracted this morn by mr Livermore. mr Ballard & my Self & Son Eph m attended public Worship. mr Smith Discourst in y e morn from John 7 th C 37:V in y e aft n f m 1 Corinth 4 th 20 th . mr Liverm r here after Exercise. Cyrus Came home at Evn. Hannah is not So well as I Could wish. I attended worship. mr Joseph Slackpl had a Son Born, it was not alive.

Clear & pleas t . mrs Savage & her Dag t Benjamin here. I went to mr Livermores a t Evn g . Deac n Coney was here, informs his wife is Comfortable. a t mr Livermores. mrs Savage & her Dagt Ben n here.
Clear. I work t in my Gardin Some fore n . was Calld to See Georg Bollons wife who was in Labour, at 1 h pm. Shee remaind in a Linguring Situation thro y e night. a t Georg Boltons.

Clear till near night when we had a little rain for which we ought to giv thanks. mr Ballard Sett out for Unity. my Dag t Hannah is 23 years old y s Day. I have gatherd part of my Cammomile. a t home.

Clear & pleast. I returnd home from mr Churches at y e 8 th h morn. I receivd 6/ for my Service. mr Ballard left home on his Surveying business (for y s Commonwealth), this morn a t 10 o Clok. Eph m wen t to my Son Jon a s , Patty to School. mr James Page & an other Gent mn with him Dind here. at mr Churches. mr Ballard Sett out to Compleet his Survey he began last May.

G Clear part off y e Day. I went to meeting from mr Childs. my famely all tarried at home. Hannah had a tooth Extracted. Cyrus Came home at Evng. mr Livermores Swine in our field a number of times. I went my Self & informd him. at mr Childs & mr Livermores. my Dagt Dolly is 20 years old this Day.

X. Birth mr Beemans Dag t . XX. Clear. I went to mr Dummers, bo t 2 yds Shalloon 5/, 2 Do fustian 5/, 1 lb Tea & Teapot 3/8, paper pins /10, 1 Gal n molases 3/6, Skein Silk /5, 2lb Butter 1/6. mrs Barton & my Dagt gone to Jon a s . Thos Haywood here. I paid him 24/ for his Dad. I went to See mrs Densmores inft, it is no better. I was Calld at 9h Evn to See mrs Beeman, Shee was Delivd Soon after my arival of [a her] 4 th Dagt. I tarried all night, my Patients are Cleverly. a t mr Dummers & mr Densmores. I have Beets, Carrots & Beens up. at mr Beemans. Birth 19 th .

Clear & hott. I wed Gardin fore n . was Calld to mr Jer e Whites to See his Child, it is toothing & feaverish. I Came home at 4 pm, Bro r Moore with me. my Dagts wint to mr Hamlins. I returnd to mr Whites, tarried all night. a t Jere Whites. mr Ballard to raising of mr Dummrs house. Bro Moore here.

Birth Georg Boltons 4 th Son & 5 th Child. Clear. my Patients illness increas t at y e 11 th h morn & Shee was Safe Deld a t 30m pm of a Son, both mother & inft are Cleverly. I left them at 3 & arivd at home before night, Considerably fatagud. Hannah & Patty at mr Densmores. a t Does. Birth 25 th . I Bot a pair Shoes for Hannah, Cost 4/8.
rainy. I returnd home a t 6 h morn. feel Some falagud, went to Bed & Slept. Sett plants aftern. a t D t oes.

rainy. S. Jewet Foster here, his inf t is mending. he, my Son Cyrus & mrs Rockw d Dind here. mr Daws Sent me 6/ as a reward for assisting his Lady in Labour June 17 th . mrs Rockw d went home on hors Back, Cyrus & Hannah in Company. Hannah went to See her other Brother, all well there. a t home.

Clear & pleast. I left my Patients Cleverly & returnd home at 9 h morn. mr Petingl Bestowd 9/ as a reward. mr Seth Williams & Lady made me a prest off Some Coffee, Tea & Sugar. mr Ballard Surveying hous lotts a t y e hook. Jery Fairfield, his wife & her Bro r Dind here. Ephm went to Jona ns . a t Ditoes. Company here.

Clear, y e wind Southerly. Shuball Pitts & W m Haywood here. mr Ballard & Ephm weading Corn. I have been a t home, kniting & work t Some in my Gardin. Polly Livermore here, informs me her mammy fell thro y e floor & hurt her Self. Ephm is gone this Evn g to mr Waids after Eels. a t home.
Clear. I have been at home. mrs White here. Hannah went to mr Livermores with her. Son & Dag t Town & their oldes t & youngest Dag ts with them. Dolly here. a t home. Son & Dagt Town Came here.

X. Birth S. J. Fosters Dagt. XX. Clear. I was Calld at 6 h morn to See S. J. Fosters wife who was Safe Deld at 11 of a Dag t . I arivd at home at 5 pm and was Calld by Colo Sewall at 7 to See his Lady, Shee being in Labour, was there all night. y e field piece fireing. a t mrs Fosters & Col o Sewalls. Birth 17 th . mrs Rockwood here.

Birth EnenZ Church Dag t . XX. A Cloudy, rainy Day. I have been knitting. Eph m tro d on a board in which was a nale, & lamb d him Self. I wrote to Bro r Collins, to Send by mr Burtun. I was Calld at 8h Evn by EbenZ Church to See his wife who was in Labour. her Child was Born (& not alive), before my arival, but Shee was in Dangerous Circumstance. a t EbenZ Churches. Birth 23 d .
Clear. mr Ballard is a t Pownalbor o . I have been at home. Hannah washt. Shub l Pitts here. Eph m & David hilling our Corn. Jona here, his mare is very much Sweld on her Jaw. a t home.

Clear. I was Calld to See mrs Savage who is Exercis d with a Severe pain in her Stomach. I adminestred remed s which gave relief. I went to See Jobe Springer who is very unwell. my Dagts went to quillt for mrs Baxter, Lucy Pettie allso. a t mr Savages & Springers.

Clear part of y e Day. my Girls washt. Hannah had a Severe fitt of y e tooth aik. Dolly & Sally here. I have been at home, Do not feel So well as I Could wish. Lucy Petty went to mr Densmores. mr Ballard returnd from Pitts tn at noon, went to mr Ingerhams aft n ; Lett his meddow grass to him to Cutt to y e halvs. at home. Dolly receivd a letter from her Sister Town, they are well. mr Burtun removd to mr Crags Store.

Clear & pleas t . mr Ballard & Waid makeing Troughs to Collect Sap in. Jon a at y e Saw mill, Eph m with his Dad. he is 13 years old this night at 11 hours Evng. I have been at home nursing Jack, he has not been well. he hurt his Eye with his nale. a t home. Ephms Birth Day.
Clear. Seth Manly workt here y s Day with his Oxen. mr Ballard has been to Lay a road out to Joseph Preskots. I have been at home. a t home. mr Ballard Surveying a road.

Cloudy, Snowd in ye morn, Clear a little before night. mr Ballard Came home at noon. all well at Son Towns. he went to y e hook, has his Breud Barrild, Bot a tinn kettle, 3 Dippers & Fustian for Ephm Cloaths, went up to mill. I have been at home. a t home. we had a hen, bro t out 11 Chicks .

Birth Rich d Fosters Dagt. Cloudy & Showery. mrs Foster was Safe Deld of a Dagt & first Child at 5 h 30 m . I was Calld upon to go & See the Lady of Jed y Preskott & I arivd there at 10, find her in Labour. tarried there all night. went to Bed & had rest. mrs Attkins of Sterling there. at Does & mr Preskots. Birth 20th.

Clear & warm. I workt in my Gardin foren n . mr Livermore & wife and Polly here, Dolly & Sally Densmr allso. we were informd at Sun Sett that Billy Foster fell out off a Canoe & is Drowned. we Bo t 17lb Veal of mrs Coutch @ /3 pr lb. I paid the Cash. a t home. mrs Liverm r here. Billy Foster Drowned 6h pm.

X. Birth Ben n Preskotts 2 nd Son. XX. Clear & fine morn. I was Calld at the Dawn off Day to See Ben n Preskotts wife, who was Safe Deld a t 1 h pm of a Son. I left her Some what Comfortable a t 3 h 15 m . had to wride in a Shower, arivd home a t 4. mr Preskott gave me 6/ as a reward. mr Savage was there to See if I Could go & See his wife which Causd my hurrying home. Dolly Complains off a pain in her head. a t Ben n Preskotts. Birth 27. his 2 nd Child. Cyrus been to Winthrop this Day.

Clear Except a lite Shower at Evn. I have been at home. mr Ballard returnd at Evn from Unity, bro t the malloncolly News of David Page being Drowned this after n in a Pond by Cap t Whichers. at home. David Page was Drowned y s after n .

G Clear & very warm. I Did not attend worship. Cyrus Came up about noon, Laid Down & Slep t . mr Winget Calld. Page was taken out of the water this morn. mr Medcalf here for me to Go & See mrs Sheppard. I went at Evn, find her Nurs is gone. a t mr Sheppards. David Page was tak n out of the water this morn.

G X. Birth mr Allins Dag t . XX. Clear part of y e Day. I was Calld by mr Allin at 7 h morn to See his wife. Shee was Safe De ld a t 9 off a Dagt. I left her Cleverly a t 12. mr Allin gave me 6/ as a reward. he Conducted me to y e ferry & I attended worship in Public aftern n , walkt home. Eph m has the Chicken Pox. a t mr Allins. Birth 33 d .Cyrus was a t home. a rainy night.
G Clear. I Do not feel So well as I Could wish, Did not attend public worship. the rest off my Famely Did Except Patty. Col o Duttun Sup t here. Dolly Complains of pain in her head. a t home.

Clear. I went as far as my Sons. Calld to See mrs Andrews and mrs Savage, they are not very well. mr Hamlin had a house phraim raisd this after n . mr [sic] Dagts are gone there to a Daunce, Eph m allso. Sally was gone to Cap t Savages. a t Jona s & other Neig rs . mr Ballard finisht geting his hay.

A Shower y s morn, Cloudy all Day. mr Ballard & my Dag t Hannah attended funeral off David Page. mr Pollard & Hannah went to mr Porters. Parthenia Barton Came home with them, Shee is 20 years old y s Day, Polly Town is 9 years. a t home. Parthenia Came here. David Page was interd this aft n .
Clear. my Girls wash t at y e Brook. I was Calld a t 2 h pm to See mrs Savage who was in Labour. her women Calld at Evng. a t mr Savages.
Cloudy & Some rain. I have been a t home, mending Eph ms Cloaths. mr Ballard been to the hook. Parthenia returnd from Sydne. Selv Moore here, his folks well. a t home.

Clear. Ben n Brown Jun r Sheard our Sheep & Eph m Drove them up to my Son Jon a s . I have workt in my Gardin part of y s Day. Lidia Densmore here with y e Babe. I was Calld to See mrs Childs. a t mr Childs. our Sheep were Shorn this Day.
Clear & very warm. I was Calld to See mr Andrews s inft, who is very Sick with y e thrush. I tarried all night, had not much res t . I was at Jonas, mrs Swanton there. at mr Andws s .
rainy. Eph m went to School. mr Waid here, he is mending off his hurt. I have been a t home, Began a Stockin for mrs Densmore. Dagt Town is is [sic] 34 years old. a t home.

Clear & hott. I have not been So well as I Could wish bu t workt Some in my Gardin; removd Some Beets. I gatherd String Beens, y e firs t we have had y s Summer. mr Ballard & Eph m been mowing. mr Ben n Leighton Sleeps here. a t home. mr Ballard began to mow his Grass at home. we had String Beens.

Clear & hott. Isaac Savage workt here. mr Ballard & he mowing. my Son Cyrus went to winslow, Ephm to Pitts tn with mr Densmores Son. mrs Livermr here, gave me a piece of Lamb. I have been at home, knitt Some. a t home.

Clear. mr Ballard Laying ou t a hous Lott for mr Pitt by mr Wessons. mr Lankester Dind here. Ephm bro t 3 quarters of Lamb home, len t one to mr Andrus, 8_. mrs s Burtun, her Sister & mrs Rock wd here, her Husband & Br r Came to Acompany them home. a t home. mrs Burtun & others here. I had a fitt of y e Cramp y s night.

Clear till near night when we had A light Shour. mr Shepherd here, gave me an invitation to go and See his Lady tomorrow. I have been a t home, finish t kniting Dag t Towns hoes & Doubled yarn for Dolly a pair, wed Gardin a little, &C. mr Ballard & Eph m been Houghing Corn. a t home.

Clear. Dolly, Son Jon a , his wife & little Son Came & Dind & took Tea. mrs Densm r here. I went to acquaint mrs Liverm r y t her Childn, with others they had taken into our field, were wallowing in y e grass. a t mrs Livermo rs . my Child n here Excep t Cyrus.
Clear & Cloudy by turn & not Cold. mr Ballard makeing Plans. I have been at home. I gatherd my Cammomile, y e Second gathering. Cyrus Came here, Sleeps here. at home.

Cloudy morn, Clear after n . I relievd my Patient at 4h morn & left her Comfortable. Came home at 10 h , receivd 6/ as a reward. went to Bed & Slept. mrs Dorcis Pollard & Dagt Dolly here. Son Town Sleeps here, his famely are well; his Sis t mc Causland is Low. a t Ditoes. mrs Dorcas Pollard & my Dag t Dolly here.
Clear morn. mr Waid Breakfs td here. he & my little Son Bringing hay from his place for us, Bro t 24 hundred. mr Ballard returnd from Coart. a t home.

Clear. I returnd home, Calld at mr Pollards. Hannah informd me mrs Sheppard wish t to See me & I wen t , find her Cleverly. he made me a pres t off a bottle off wine. I purchas t a pair lether Sliprs @ 5/, papr pins /9. a t Savages, Pollards & Sheppards.
Clear. Ephm & Polly wen t to School, mr Ballard to mr Savages. Hannah is makeing Lucy a hatt. I was Calld to See mrs Savage, tarried all night. O the flees. a t mr Savages.
Clear, a Cold N W wind. mrs s Hinkley Calld here. I have been at home, mr working on thee Bridg. a t home.
Clear. Hannah washt. mr Ballard went to Pitts tn . I have been at home, help t about house work & knitt Some. Saml Foster & other Gent mn here. mr Robbins after plans. a t home.

Clear & Cool morn, Pleas t Day. I went to See mrs Livermore & Polly, they are both unwell. mr Manly bro t Dolly home at Evn g . mr Ballard & Ephm been a t y e Sap works, Jon a at his Saw mill. at mr Livermr s .

Clear. mr Ballard been to Esq r Coneys, receivd 30 Dollars in part for the Surveying he is to Do for this Commonwealth. he allso went to mr Shepherds & ye fort on Business. I have been at home. Hannah made Pumkin Pies. mr Webber here, his wife very ill. a t home. Cap t Howard and Howland went up this aftn n with their Vessels.

] Coney asisted her. Clear, a frost y s morn. my Patients illness Came on at 8h morn, her women were Calld. her Case was Lingering till 7 pm. I removd Difuculties & waited for Natures opperations till then, when Shee was more Severely atackt with with obstructions which alarmd me much. I Desird Doct Hubard might be Sent for which reques t was Compli d with, bu t by Divine assistance I performed the opperation, which was blisst with the preservation of the lives off mother and inft. the life of the latter I Dispard off for Some time. a t mr Preskotts. Birth 21. the mostperelous Sien I ever pas t thro in the Cours of my practice.blessed be God for his Goodness.
Clear. I have workt in my Gardin. my Dagts went to Winthrop. Billy Foster interd at 4h pm. mr Ballard finisht weading his Corn. a t home. Funeral W m Foster.

Clear till 3 h pm when we had Showers & thunder. Oliv Hamlin here, left here & arivd at home before it began to rain. mr Ballard was there. mrs Porter here. Son Town & mr Pitt left here this morn. at home. mrs Porter here.
Clear. Parthenia went to mr Shaws foren. I went to Lecter aftern & went to mr Norcros s . after my return, to See mr Andrus; find him on y e recovery. at Lecter & at mr Norcros s .
Clear. mr Ballard returnd from Pitts tn & went to mr Sheppards, paid him 20/ which was Due for Blankits. I have been at home, helpt about house & knitt Some. a t home.
G Clear, a very grea t fros t this & yester morn. Cyrus Came home y s after n & wen t Back again. I have been at home. a t home.

G Cloudy. mr Ballard & Patty wen t to meeting. Ephm went for my Dagt Ballard. Shee & her Babe Came. mr Pollard & my Son Jon a here aftern. Cyrus a t home. Jon a & his wife wrode our hors home. a t home. Moses Polld & Hannah Ballard Published.

G Clear & Pleast. mr Ballard, my Self & Patty attended worship in Public. mr Frisby Performd & administred thee ordinances of y e Supper to a few, and Bap t ism to a Child off mr Wessons. a t meeting.

Clear. mrs Porter went home. Cap t Blunt took Breakfas t here. mr Ballard Sett out for Waldoborough. I have been a t home takeing Care of my field. mrs Livermore & Dagt here. a t home. mrs Livermore here. mr Balld to Waldobor o .

Clear. mr Ballard has been working on the high way. I went to See mr Andrus fore n n & to my Sons aftern. I found mr andrus more Comfortable than he was. my Son was taken, David Pollard & David Berry allso. the Crime wich was aledg d agains t them in the warrant was a riott. thee tryal is Pospond till Oct r . a t the hook & at my Sons. Hannah go t her web ou t , 45 yards.

Cloudy fore n , the Sun Shone af tn . mr Ballard wen t Early y s morn to Pitts tn to help Cyrus Dress mill, is not returnd. mrs Edson warpt a web here. Son Jon a Dind here. Lidia Densmore Spun 3 double Skeins Cotten here y s Day. I have been at home, Carded & Did other work. a t home. mrs Edson here. Hannah got her web out.
Cloudy. Dolly went to mr Densmrs, mr Ballard to the hook. I have been at home. Sally here helping the Girls. mr Pollard & Savage Supt here. a t home. we killd three young Turkeys.

X. Birth mr Andrews Son. XX. Cloudy. I was Calld out Before Day to See thee wife off Sam l Dawin, was met at y e foot of y e hill beyond Savage Boltons with News that Shee was go t to bed, & returnd home. mr Andrews Calld me a t noo n , his wife Deld off a Son at 4 h PM. I tarried all night, my Patient Cleverly. a t mr And r ws s . Birth 27 th . Sam l Dawin had a Child Born y s morn.
Cloudy & a fine rain. I have been a t home. mr Ballard went to y e hook & up to y e fort, Eph m to pittst n to mill. a t home. we had 13 turkeys hatcht.

Birth Isaac Savages Dag t . Clear. mrs Savag was Deld a t 2 h morn off a Dag t , her 11 th Child & is Cleverly. I was Calld Early to See mr Andrews s infant who is Sick with the Chin Cough. went to my Sons, his Son is unwell. I returnd home at Evn. I Saw mr Ben n Brown, his wife & her Sister on their way to Canaan. mrs Brown is recoverd off her Late indisposition. a t Does. Birth 31 st . mrAndrus paid me a fee off 6/ for allendance. Isaiah Manley Expird.
Clear. I have been a t home, mr Ballard a t a town meeting. a t home.

Clear & hott. mrs Childs very unwell all Day. mrs Hamlin and Burtun there. the field piece was fird the most of the night which interrupted my Patient much. a t Does. thee field piece was fird a t night.
Clear & very warm. I returnd home a t 1h PM, was not able to Sett up till near night. Lef t y e inf t a little Easier. find my Dag t washing. Dolly & Sally Dens mr here. a t Ditoes.
Clear foren, a Brisk S wind which Shifted at 3 pm to y e Nor wd , & we had Showers. mrs Foot Dind here. Ep hm go t in our Pees & help t mr Waid get his Oats in. I have been at home kniting. a t home.

Clear. mr Ballard has been giting Hay. Eph m has been unwell y s after n , not able to Sett up. his Dad y Complains off a pain in his Back. I applid Burdock Leavs, wiltid in Spirrit. I houghd Gardin foren & raiked hay after n . Hannah & Dolly went to mr Burtuns, find his Bro rs wife & mrs Oliv Hamlin there. mrs Livirmore here at Evn. a t home. Eph m is unwell.
Clear & hott. Eph m went to his Bro rs , Brot me Some Cherries. Sally & her Babe Came here after n . 2 mr Leightons Came to mow at noon. I have been at home. Dolly here, tarries y s night. a t home.

Clear. mr Ballard went to Survey for mr Vauhn. my Dag t s & Niece went to quillt for mrs s Baxter. mr s Kidder & Thwing, Leighton & Bradbury here. I have been a t home. a t home. had Company. my Girls were not at home.
raind all day. mr Ballard went Jones mill. I have been at home, finish t piking hannahs Cottne. a t home.
Cloudy Day, a very heavy Shower a t Evn. mr Ballard a t Esq r Coneys. I have been at home, quilld for Han h . a t home.

X. Birth J. Kenney Son. X. X. Birth James Burtun Dag t . XX. A rainy morn. mrs Kenny Deld off a Son a t 1h morn, and mr Kenney gave me 6/ as a reward. mr Burtun Came after me at 2 o Clok. very hard rain. I left mrs Kenny her & inft Cleverly. I walkt to y e Landing thro great fatague, passt by water to mr Wessons, walkt from there to mr Burtuns. [ ] arivd at 4 h morn, find his wife Deld off a Dagt but in Danger for want off assistance, but thro providence I Delivd her Safe at 4 h 30 m . I was as muddy as I Could well be. I tarried till near night. mr Burtun made me a pres t of 6/ & a Looking Glass, price 7/6, which I beStowed on my Dag t Hannah. a l Does & mr Burluns. B, 35. Birth 36 th . mr Ballad at Esq r Conys, recvd his pay of him. Cyrus was here.

Clear & pleas t . mr Ballard been Surveying hous Lotts at y e hook. he bo t 1/2 Bar l Beef of mr Devenp. I went to mr Shepherds, returnd & found Son Jon a & his wife & Son, mr Haywood & Sister & P. Bisbe & my Dagt Dolly here. y e Girls Sleep here. I Twisted yarn for Dolly a pair of hoes & began to knitt them. a t mr Shepherds. we had Company here.
Clear & hott. Esq r Wesson took Breakf t here & took a Coppy of a Plann. mr Town Left here homewd bound. mr Ballard returnd from Coar t . a t home. I have been at home.

X. Birth mr Sheppads Son. XX. Clear. I was Calld to Seee mrs s Sheppard, arivd a t 12 O Clok. Shee Calld mrs Ney a t Evn g and was Deld at 9 h of a very fine Son, her 3 d Child. mrs Cox & I Sett up with my Patient who is as well as Could be Expected. a t mr Sheppard s . Birth 28 th .

Clear. mr Ballard went to pitts tn Early y s morn, Jon a gone allso. I went on Board Cap t Howland, Bot 8_ lb wool @ 1/9; to mr Wessons B t 2_ lb Loaf Sugar @ 2/4, 2 of Brown @ 1/1 & 1lb raisens @ /9; to mr Childs, paid 2/6 for makeing Patties Shoes. mrs Baxter here on a visit. we had of mr Wesson 1 quart W E R & 3 Lemmons, of mr Livermr 6lb Butter, And of others 7_ lb Lamb, 2 Dz n Pigions. Abr m Page of washington Sent me 3/ which has been my due Since his Twins Birth. a t mr Wessons & other Neig rs , on Board Howland &C.

Clear & very warm. I tarried at mr Savages till near night, then walkt home. Calld at mr Burtuns & Drank Tea. find mr Pitt & his Br or here. receivd a line from Br r Collins of 7 th inst; all well. a t Does. receivd a Letter f m B r Collins of 7 th ins t .
Clear & pleast. mr Densmore Butcherd a Swine for us which w d 30[ ]. mr Ballard went to y e hook. Es q Jewet off [Dover] Sleeps here. I have been a t home. mrs Colman Calld here. a t home.

rainy foren. I tarried a t the Mag rs till after Dineing, receivd 6/ as a reward. mrs Conry Came with me to mr Devenports where we Spent y e remainder of y e after n , returnd home a t Dusk. I left my Patients Cleverly. a t mr Stickneys & mr Devenpor t s.

G Clear, pleas t day. my Son Jon a & wife & little Son here; Ephm bro t y m by water & returnd home with them, Cyrus & Dolly were at home allso. my Dagts went to mr Livermores after Tea with lheir Bror & Sis tr . I have been a t home. a t home. my Childn here. Phin s [Pain s ] Dagt Born.

Cloudy part of y e Day. mr Ballard went to y e meddow, he is freer from Pain. Ephm is able to work. I have been at home. mrs s Ferwell, Lee, & mrs Bets y Howard here. a t home. Hains Learned Sleeps here.

G rainy. mr Pollard & Pitt Dind here, thee latter was Joind in thee Bands off wedlock with Parthenia Barton. the Ceremony pirformd by Sam l Dutton Esq. I have been at home. we had no Company Except our famely attend. thee Justice gave the fee to y e Bride. a t home. mr Shubal Pitt and Parthenia Barton Joind in Mariage.

G Clear & very warm. Mr Ballard & I & Ephm allended worship. my Son Cyrus & my Dagts, mr Pitt & my Niece in Y e aftern. mr Smith Discoars t from Mic 6:8, for n , 1 st Peter 2 nt 21 st . my Dagts & Niece & mr Pitt went to my Sons after the Exercise was over and walk t home at Evn. a t meeting.
G Clear & not So Cold as it was. Son Jon a Came here & took his hors home, had 1 bus l Potatoes of Eph m . I have been at home. we roasted A Turkey for Diner. A home. mr Pollard & Pitt here.
G Clear & Warm. I tarried with my Patient thro y e Day, mrs Cox allso. I lef t her there at 7 Evn. I receivd 24/ 8 as a reward, walkt home. Calld at Cap t FilleBrowns, Daws & Norcros s . a t Does.

G Clear. mr Ballard & Parthenia & Dolly & Eph m attended Public worship. mr Smith Deliverd a farewell Sermon, his text fore n Corint h 13:13, aftn, Isa h 17:17: Wil m Haywood Dind & my son Jon a Supt here. I receivd a Letter from Doc t Barton informing his famely are well & that Aunt Moore was Deceas t , & her remains were interd 15 ins t . a t home. receivd a Letter from Doc t Barton which informs me off y e Death of Aunt Moore.
Clear. I went to mr Livermores foren n , to mr Densmores after n . mr Ballard & Eph m houghing, Jon a & wife to Sidney. a t mr Livrmores & Densmores.

X. Birth Ben n Petengails Dag t . XX. Clear morn, Cloudy aft n . I was Calld by mr Ben n Petingail (a t 5 y s morn) to See his Lady who is in Labour, & was Safe Delivd a t 9 h Evn off a fine Dagt, her fifth Child her & 3 d Dag t . her las t before was 10 years old las t march. I tarried all night, my Patient was Exercisd with Faintness for Some time, bu t revivd & had rest. a t mr Petengails. Birth 29 th . James Cowens wife fell from her hors & hurt her much; is at mr Thomas s .
Clear. mr Ballard workt on the Bridg, raising it. mrs Densmore & my Dag t Dolly Dind & took Tea with us. mr Waid Dind. I have been at home kniting. at home. mrs s Densmr here.
Clear part of y e Day. mr Ballard at y e hook & to Jones s mill. Cyrus Came here a t 6h pm. I have been at home. a t home. Cyrus [Came] up here.

Cloudy Day, raind at night & Snowd. mr Ballard Left home at 11h morn to Survey Land belonging to mr T. Pitts. I have been at home. Dolly went to mr Burtuns a little before Sun Sett. a t home. mr Ballard Sett out on a tour of Surveying.

Clear & more moderate. my Sons go t 2 load of wood, and Ephm went to git Some for mr Desn mr . Hannah Put a Bed quillt in to the Fraim & quilted it out before Shee Slep t . Parthenia & Dolly help t her. a t home. Hannahs Bed quilt was quillted y s Day.

Clear. I have been at home takeing Care off my field. Leu t Nichols off Oxford and mr EbenZ Davis off Charlton Dind here. mrs s Wesson & mrs Lovjoy took Tea. Parthinea went to mr Foots. mr Pitt Sleeps here, my Dag t Dolly allso. a t home. mrs Wesson here. Son Cyrus is 36 years old this Day. Leut Nichols here.

Clear & very Pleas t . I went to See Andrus foren n . at mr Ballards request, I invited him to Com to our Hous & tarry till he was able to go home. he Diclind accepting our favour. I Came home at noon. Old Lady Norcros, her Sons wives & mrs Livermore were here aftern n . a t mr Norcros s .

Clear & Cloudy by turns. mr Ballard finisht raising y e Bridg y s morn. he has been Laying out a Strea t a t the hook. I have been at home. mrs s Pollard, Dagt Ballard & Lucy Petty here. Lucy Sleeps here. a t home. mrs s Pollard here. we beemd a web off, 26 yds.

Clear & pleas t . Dolly Came home to instruct the girls how to Draw their pieces of Dimmity, tarries y s night. mr Ballard returnd. I have been at home, Carded Cottne & mended Ephm a Jack coa t . a t home. Ephm bro t Hannahs wheal home.

Clear & pleast. mr Ballard been to Col o Sewalls & the Hook. I have been at home. Sally & the Girls pu t a Bed quillt in to y e fraim for Parthenia. Sarah Densmore & Dolly here this Evng. a t home. roasted a Turkey.
Clear part off y e Day, Some Showers. mr Ballard went to help Cyrus Dres his mill. I have been at home. Dolly Sleeps here. Sally, Polly & [Poly] Liver mr here. a t home.

X. Birth Charls Clearks Son. XX. Clear. I was Calld this night to See Charls Clearks wife who was Deld at 3h morn & is of a Son, her 4 th Child, her 3 d is Destilule of reason by reason fitts. I receivd 6/ of mr Cleark, gave him a former acount off 6/. Calld to See mr Uriah Clearks Dagts who are Confind with weakness. I Calld at mr Pollards & a t mr Hodges, his Childn unwell. a t Charl Clearks. Birth 32 nt .my Girls went to mr Pollards at Evn g .

Clear. mr Ballard & the rest off my famely went to See y e muster. mrs M c Causland & others Dind & took Tea here. Jonas wife tarries here. I receivd [9]/ off mrs Powel for asisting her. a t home. a General Muster of y e regament at Shubal Hinkleys. Andrus and Son Jon a fou t .
