Cloudy fore n & Some Snow. Lucy work t here part of y e Day. Dolly Dind & took Tea with us. mr Ballard go t wood & Dug Potatoes. I have been at home. Sen t 6/ for Indigo & Sallts to Buck with. a t home.
G Clear. I have been at home. Dolly here, Dolly not. a t home.
Clear & hott. I have been at home. Dolly Sleeps here y s night. Esq Coney s Dagts here. a t home.
Some Smart Showers. my Girls Bleaching yarn. I have been at home kniting. Dolly Sleeps here. a t home. mr Hamlin moovd to his New house.
Clear morn. mrs s Leighton left here after Breakfast. it began to rain about noon. mr Ballard & Son went to mr Burtuns for a keg off molases. I have been at home. a t home. A Smart Shower a t Evng.
Cloudy foren, Clear after n . I went to mr Wicksoms, Calld at mr Hamlins & Baxters & mr Dinsmores. I finisht Car d ing hannahs Cottne y s Evng. a t mr Wicksons & others.
Clear & Pleast. mr Ballard a t mr Sheppards on Business with Genl Dearburn & Col o Howard. I have been at home. Hannah got her web out, 20 yds. Esq r Wesson & mr Livermore Supt here. a t home.

Clear & Pleasant. mr Isaac Savage & his wife Dind here. mrs Black, her Sis t Pollard & Polly here aftern. I was Calld to See mrs Kenney, made use off means & medesin which gave relief, & returnd home at 10h Evn g . mr Savage & wife left here a t 12. a t mr Whites. we had Company.

Clear. mr Savage Calld me to See his wife, Shee has a pain in her Ear & face. I went to my Sons & mr Burtuns, Bot a Lenten hand kr cf @ 4/6, a t mr WeSsoms Bot pint & half Brandy, Cos t 2/1. a t my Sons & a t Neig rs .

Clear. mrs H. Rockw d finisht her goun & wore it home. mr Ballard been to y e hook & y e fort, Cyrus to mill. Parthenia pu t Coverleds into the loom. I have been at home. Dolly makeing a waist Cot for Cyrus of his old [Surtnet]. the Girls went to mr Livermores a t Evn. a t home.
Clear. mr Ballard at Pitts tn . mr John Jones & A mr Duttun here. my Girls washt, I a t home. a t home. J. Jones here.

G Clear but Cold. we were informd that Old Lady Coney was not like to Survive but little while as her Symptoms are more Dangerous. mr Livermore, his wife & Son & my Self went over to See her. Crost y e river in a Canoe by breaking thro y e ice in Several places. we found the old Lady in A very helples & allmost Sencles Situation. her Dag t Cumings is her Nurs, her tryals are great. God grant her Strength & patients to perform her arduous task. Moses Pollard was very ill this night. I was Calld up to help Hannah Nurs him. I wen t to See Old Lady Coney who has had a late Shock of y e Palsey, her left Side is useless.

Clear & hott. we roasted a Pigg. mrs Densm r & Dolly Dind. mrs Liverm r , mrs Densm r & I wen t to Shub l Hinkleys after n . we receivd a letter from Br r Elijah of June 17 th . a t mr Hinklys. receivd a line from Br r Elijah of June 17 th .
the Sun rose Clear. Cloudy Some part y e Day. mr Ballard is gone to Varsalboro, Cyrus up to mr Savages, Eph m Clearing a wood road. a t home. Cyrus Sleeps here.
Snowd & raind. I have been at home. Cyrus went to his Bro rs , brot three quarters of muttun home. Hannah has been piecing a Bed quilt. a Cold N W wind at Evng. a t home.
Clear. Dolly began to make a Coat for mr Sargen t . Parthenia Put her Callico Bed quillt in to y e fraim & Hannah & I help t her quillt. a t home.
Clear & very Cold. mr Ballard is very unwell. I have been at home. a t home.
Clear. I workt in my field all Day gathering & Husking Corn. Norths horses Broak Down y e fence & Lay in my Corn all night. a t home.

Cloudy. I went after n to Jobe Springers to See a wheal which I Bot of Cap t Houland, gave him 13/ for it & 2/9 for a pair of Cards. Bot 1/2 Bush l of Apples of mrs Pollard for 1/3. a t mr Springers & other Neigr s .
rainy. I have been at home. mr Ballard been to the hook, Bot 2_ Cottne. my Girls go t y r web to work. Jon a here, he has wounded his thumbs. a t home.
Clear. mr Ballard wen t to pitts tn . Polly Pollard, mrs Damrin & my Dagt Dolly quilted all day, mrs Livermore after n . I have been at home. mr Town Sleeps here. a t home.

Clear & Pleas t . mr Jim y Pollard took Breakfas t here, mr Porter & Son Pollard allso. the Latter is So far recoverd as to be able to return home. I have been at home. Hannah is weaving ragg Coverleds, mrs Pitt Spining. Shub l Pitt bro t two Cows here and left y m with me to keep a few Days. at home. Son Pollard wen t from here, is muck Better.

Clear but very Cold. mr Pollard Came & Conducted my Dagt & his Spouse home to Hous keeping, may be happy. Dolly help t her pu t up her furniture & went home with her. Ephm Drove y e team. Cyrus went & Bot 2 pails, Cost 2/8. I have been at home. a t home. Hannah went to houskeepin g .
Clear. I have help t Do hous work. my Girls went to help mrs Weston quillt. Son Town here, his famely are well. mrs Oliv Hamlin Came home with my Dagts. a t home. mrs Oliv Hamlin here, & Son Town.

Cloudy morn. my Dag t Ballard Sett out for home, went as far as mr Densmores, was informd y t her Husband had Bea t mr Andrus last Evng. Shee Came back here and mr Ballard wen t to mr Norcros s , finds it is no t So Bad as is repreSented. Jon a Came here & went to See him. Sally Sett out again, arivd Safe at her own home. Ephm went with her & wrode the hors Back. mr Shub l Pitt & Jon a Dind here. I have been at home. a t home.
Clear & Cool. my Girls wash t & Bleach t yarn at mr Densmores Brook. I have been at home, finisht a Stockin off mrs Densmrs. Shee was here, Drank Tea. a t home.
Clear & Cold. mr Ballard got wood, mr Waid help t him. I have been at home. Dolly Came [here]. a t home.
Cloudy part of y e Day, Some rain. mr Ballard been prepareing for his Tour of Surveying. mr Bullin & his Lady here, they have been to Sidney. a t home. Robert mc Causland s infant Expird.

Cloudy morn, the Sun Shone very warm from 11 to 2 o clock, then Cloudy & Showery. mr Ballard wen t to winthrop. I have been at home. Lidia Dinsmore finisht Spining Hannah s Cottne. we killd a Turkey. a t home. mr Ballard a t Winthrop.

Clear. mr Ballard & Esq r Wesson went to y e Hook & to Esq r Coneys. I went to mr Sheppards, Bot 28-3/4 yds Cambliteen, Cos t 38/; Case knives & forks 8/; Small Spoons 1/2; Sewing Silk /10; total 48/. at mr Dummers Bot 1 Doz n plates, Cos t 3/. rainy Evng. a t mr Sheppards & Dummers. Hannah has wove 40 yds this weak.

XX. Birth Elisha Presk ts Son. XX. Cloudy. I was Calld a t a t [sic] 4h morn to See the wife off Elisha Preskott who was in Labour, & was Safe Deld off a Son at 5h Evn. Shee was very ill, her Husband was absent. I was attended by an English young Lady who Lodges a t mrs Sherburns. I left my Patients Cleverly & arive a t home a t 9 h Evn; find my Son, his wife & Son here, all well. a t Preskotts. Birth 37 th .Son Jon a & wife here. I Bot a Chees, w t 11 lb @ /7 pr lb.

F Clear. mr Thwing was here, Desird me to go & visit his Lady. I wrode up after n , find her not very well. I Came from there a Sun Sett. Calld at Son Pollards & took Tea, arivd at home at 8h Evn. a t mr Thwings.

G Clear & very pleas t . Cyrus Came home, John Goodin of Pownalboro with him. mr Savage & my Son Jon a Dind here, we had a Turkey roasted. mr Ballard went to Esq r Coneys. Col o Duttun here. Dolly wrode to her Brothers. I have been at home. I am informd that mr Swet & two of his Child n are Deceas t with y e Small Pox. a t home. it is 15 years y s Day Sinc we arivd a t kennebeck a t Jones Landing.
G Cloudy Day, rain a t Evn n . we have Been at home. killed a Turkey & Cookt it for Dinner. Cyrus no t here. a t home.

G X. Birth Saml Church s Son, his 4 th Child. XX. Clear & Cool. mr Ballard & Ep m attended worship fore n & my Self aftern. Augustus Ballard, Cyrus and mr Pollard Dind here. I wen t to mr Livermores, his inft unwell. mr Smith Discours t from Luke 6 th 4:5:6:7:8 vers s . Saml Churches wife Deld 11 h 30 m Evn g . a t meeting. mr mc Causlands Dag t interd a t 3 O Clok. Birth 30 th .

G Cloudy foren, a little rain & Thunder; Clear before night. Cyrus was not a t home. thee Matrimonial writes were Cellibrated between mr Moses Pollard off this Town and my Dag t Hannah this Evng. Esq Coney performd y e Ceremony. my Son & his wife & Son tarry here. a t home. A Marriage in my Famely.

Cloudy & misty morn. mr Ballard wen t to Esq r Coneys, returnd and Sett ou t for Pounalboro. [ ] Parthenia to mr Pollards for a Six & Twenty Slay. Hannah Beemd y e wollin Shurting. Ep hm to mr Waids to work. I have been at home. raind aftern & Evng. at home. mr Ballard to Pownalboro.
Clear & Cold. I Did work of Divers kinds till about midnigh t , was then Calld to See mrs Kenny. a t mr Gillmans

Cloudy & Clear. mr Ballard Sett out to Survey mr Pitts s Land North from him. mrs Pollard Came here to See her Son who is very ill indeed. we gave him Sage Tea & a decoction off Snak root & Cammomile, [Steamd] his feet &C. the Girls washt, Jon a here. a t home. mrs Pollard here.

X. Birth mr Thwings Son. XX. Birth mr Suells Son. X. Clear. mr Ballard & Cyrus wen t to Town meeting. I Bakt & Brewd & was Calld to See mrs Thwing at 6h Evn. Shee was Deld at 10 off her first Born, a Son. I was waited for by mr Brown to attend mrs Suell who we arivd there at 11 30 m . Shee was Deld off a Son at 12. I tarried there thro the night. my Patient is Cleverly. receivd 7/4 march 18 1794. a t mr Thwings & Suells. Birth 1 st . Birth 2 nd . receivd 6/ of mr Thwing.
Clear. I went to See mrs Burtun who has had an ill turn & is Better. Dolly Sleeps here. a t mr Burtuns.

Cloudy & a very Chilly air. I wen t up as far as Savage Boltons, he paid me 8/ a t mr Burtuns for attending his wife y e 19th of Jany last. I Bot 2 puter Dishes, wt 5lb @ 2/; 1 Coffee p t , 3/6; Six table Spoons, 1/8; total 15/2. I paid 7/2 Cash. mr Bolton answers 8/ of it. a t Savage Boltons & others.
A very Cold Day. I have been at home. Hannah wove a Bed Blankitt for her Self, Tow & wool. At home. P. Livermr here a t Evng.
Cloudy all Day & very rainy night. Dolly finish t y e Coat & Parth a her Bed quill t . Jon a was here. I have been at home. a t home. Parthenia finisht her Bed quillt.
Snowd. mr Ballard is a little Better. I have been at home. mr Pitts here. a t home.
X. Birth mr Blaks Son. XX. Clear. I was Calld from my Sons to See mrs Blak who was Deld at 5h Evn of a Son & I returnd. mr Blak gave me 9/5 d as a reward. a t mr Blaks. Birth 5th.
Clear. I was at home Doing like Servic. wil m Dinsm r helpt this & yesterday. Hannah is weaving. a t home.
rainy. mr Ballard & Ephm went to See mrs MedCalf Baptis d by plunging. I have been at home. a t home. Snowd & raind.

X. Birth Ezra Hodges Son. XX. Cloudy & Some rain. mr Town left here after breakfas t . the Girls had the Ladies to help them quillt. I was Calld to See mrs s Hodges a t 4h pm, Shee was Safe Deld a t 11 h Evn off a very fine Son, her Sixth Child. mr Ballard Came home. a t mr Hodges. Birth 38 th . Son Town went home.
Cloudy but not Cold. Snowd a little at Evng. we killd 2 Turkeys. I have been at home. the girls Spun hoes y n for Cyrus. he & Ephm have been giting wood home. at home.

Clear par t of y e Day, the weather is moderated. I have been at home regulating my things &C, mrs Pitts Made her Candles & Some for me. Cyrus went to mr Dummers, Bo t him Cloath for a Coat @ 10/ pr y d . a t home. mr Pitts Sleeps here.
Clear foren, Cloudy af tn . mr Ballard returnd from Surveying for y s Commonwelth. mr Town & Pitt here y s night. I have been at home. we Dind on a Turkey. a t home. mr Ballard returnd.

Clear. I have been a t home, Cas t 23 Candles. mr Ballard been to Pitts tn . mrs White here, informs me mr Andrus is very poorly. mr Ballard met mr Davis going for Doc t Parker to Come & See him. Doct Page attends him. a t home.

Clear & Cool. I gatherd up Corn the Swine had broak Down in our field. I was Calld aft rn at 6 h to See mr Childs inf t . I walkt there, tarried all night. we gave the patient a portion off rhubarb, it is much relievd. at mr Childs.
Clear & not So Cold. mr Ballard mending a Slead. Cyrus & Ep hm brot our Sheep home. I have been at home. Dolly finisht her Dad s Cloaths. a t home.
G Clear & very pleas t . I have been at home. mr Isaac Savage & my Son Jon a here, little Jack y is better. a t home.
Cloudy, hail & rain. Cap t Car & mr J. Page here. mr Ballard mending Slead. Cyrus to Capt Coxes. Ephm bro t Dollys Sheep home. I have been at home, Did divers Sor t s of work. a t home.

X. Birth Jonas Son. XX. Cloudy, Snowd Some. I feel Some more Comfortable, went to washing; mr Ballard to mr Sheppards. my Son Jona Came for me and Cyrus went & Brot our hors back. we went in hast, find my Dagt ill. her women were Calld & Shee Safe Deld at 8 h Evn of a Son, and is very Comfortable. a t my Sons. Birth 7 th .
Clear & Pleast. my Child n & mr Strat n went home, mrs Barton to Son Pollards. Cap t Hersey & Lady here. I have been at home, Ephm at mr Childs. a t home. Son & Dagt Town left here for home.
Clear. Ephm workt for mr Waid. I went to See his oldes t Dagt who has a Swelling on her neck. a t mr Waids. Hann h wove [15] yards.
X. Birth James Kenneys Son. XX. Clear & not So Cold. mrs Kenney Deld of a Son at 10h morn. I left her & inf t Cleverly at 3 pm & returnd home, receivd 6/. a t mr Kenneys. Birth 34 th .

Cloudy. mr Pollard & Pearly here to See Moses, he Seems a little more Comfortable; his Marm wen t home. Dolly wen t there to work. I have been at home, we batht mr Pollards feet and applyd Onions to them and he is much Better. mr Ben n Porter Sleeps here. a t home. mrs Pollard wen t home. mr Porter here.

Cloudy. I left mrs Suell Cleverly a t 8h morn. went to mr Thwings, find her & inft Cleverly, he went after her marm. I tarried till 3 pm when my Son Cyrus Came & Conducted me home, find Dagt Ballard & her Son & Lucy Town here; her Daddy & mrs Barton Came here yester Evn, are [doing] Business with Judg Boman. Son Jona Came at Evn. a t mr Suells & Thwings.

Cold morn, Snowd aftern. mr M c Causland Came here for mrs Barton, his wife is failing fas t . he informs me that mr Suells inf t Expird y e 12 th Day of its life. mr Liverm r Dind here, Son Jon a allso. Jacob Bradbury Calld me to See his wife who was in Labour with her firs t Child. at Jacob Bradburys. mr Ballard & Eph m Came home from Winthrop.
Clear. Cyrus Came here. I have been at home, help t quillt on Hannahs Bed Quilt. we got it out late in y e Evng. a t home. Ephm was Banking y e house.

Clear. mr Ballard work t a t y e Bridg over y e Gully. I have been at home. mrs Densmore Dind & took Tea. mr Seth Williams & his wife here. Cyrus Came home, has quit thee Gris t mill he has tended. Dolly returnd from her Apprenti Ship with mr Densmore. Cyrus tended mr Hollowells mill 14 months. Cap t Nichols has hired it now. a t home. Cyrus & Dolly returnd home [from] their Late Servises.
Clear & more Callm. the river was So full of ice it allmos t Stop t y s morn. I have been very unwell this Day, at home all Day. a t home. the river is Closin g .

Clear & very Pleast. I have been a t home. it is the Day appointed for thanksgiving. mr Pollard and Pitt waited on their wives & Dolly to mr Pollards. mr Densmore had a Turkey of me. a t home. roasted a Turkey.
Clear & very Cold. mr Ballard went to mr Ber h Ingerhams. I have been at hom. a t home.
Clear. mr Blak Came to my Sons and Conducted me home and Back again as far as his house, my Son from there to his house. a t my Sons.
Clear. we husk t & gatherd Corn. wil m workt for me. mrs Brown Sleeps here, Shee is in her right mind. a t home.

X. Birth Ben n Stickneys Dag t . XX. Clear fore n , Cloudy aft n , rain at Evn g . I receivd 6/ of mr Hodges & returnd home a t noon, left my patient Cleverly. Calld at mr Burtuns, his Lady is Cleverly. I Bo t off him 2 iron kettles which Cos t 7/, 1 Spider @ 3/6, 2 pepper boxes & 2 Dippirs @ /6 Each, 2/; 1 yd binding /1, Ginn 2/6; total 15/1. I went to mag r Stickneys a t 9 h Evn, his wife Deld at 11 h 5 m off a Dagt. I tarried all night. a t Does & mr Burtuns & mag r Stickneys. Birth 39. Bizer Benjamins wife Deld of 2 Sons, Both Dead.

Clear & Cold. I was Calld to See mrs Child, Shee is very unwell. I recommended to her a portion of Senna. I Calld at mr Wessons & Pollards. I Bo t 1 mugg a 1/, 2 tumblers [2]/, 2 Cruitts 1/2. a t mr Childs. Elle nr Taylor Expird
Cloudy all Day, began to Snow abou t Sun Sett. Eph m workt with his teem for mr Baxter. Parthenia Washt, I help t . have been a t home. it Snowd in the night. a t home.

Clear & Pleast. I went to See mrs Thwing, Shee has a Sweld Breast, & I was at mr Childs, his wife is unwell; the infant allso. mr Ballard has been Surveying for Es q Matthew Howard, & went to mrs Husseys. a t mr Thwings & mr Childs.
F Clear & Cold. mr I. Savage, Esq r Mathew Howard & Shubal Pitts here. Dolly went to mr Pollards aftern. I have been at home. a t home.
A rainy Day. Cap t Stackpole here. mr Ballard went to Winslow. I have been at home till 11h Evng when I was Calld to See Leu t D. Pollards wife. a t home mr Pollards.
Clear & very Pleasan t for Christmass. I have been at home. mr Ben n Porter Came here Late in y e Evn g , Sleeps here. a t home. mrs had two Sons Born.

Cloudy. I was at my Sons till near night When mr Pitt Conducted mrs Barton & my Self as far as mr Burtons. we wrode in his Carriage home, bro t Jack home with us. a t my sons. mrs Bolton Sent me a Shaul.

Clear & very pleas t . mr Ballard Surveying for mr Vau n . mrs Barton returnd here at 11 h morn. Son Jon a Came for Patty, Shee went home with him. Parson Warrin here. I have been at home, washt 4 Blankets and Some other Cloaths. a t home. Ephm work t at mr Childs.

Clear. I have been at home. Hannah got the Shurting out, 20 yds, & put another web in. I quilld & did other work. mr Ballard returnd, Brot 9_ yd Cambleteen, 5 yds Linning & 3 lb Tea, and a hand kf which he had off mr Bridg for our attendance at Suprem Cort. a t home. mr Ballard returnd.

Clear. mrs Densmore & Dolly here to work makeing Gouns for my Self & all three of the Girls. mr Ballard a t mr Dummers, Bot 6 Bowls, Cost 3/. mr Densmr Supt here. I was Calld to Tho s Kenneys a t 11 Evn. a t Thos Kenneys. raind a t 10h Evn g .

rainy morn. Jon a & his wife went home. Georg Brown Came here at Evn. I was Calld to Shubal Henkleys, Jona Came there for me. returnd home without me. I was with my Patient all night. a t mr Hinkleys.

X. Birth Bradburys Son. XX. Storm of Snow. mrs Bradbury was Delivd at 9 h 30m in morn of a Son & I returnd home a t 1 pm, find that my little Grand Son has Done Cleverly while I was absen t . a t Ditoes. Birth 8 th . receivdmy fee Oct the 11.
Clear & Beautiful pleas t Day. I have been at home. mr Ballard went to Settle with Col o Howard. Cyrus went to y e hook, Bot 5 pecks Corn & went & had it ground. Ep m work t at Waids. at home.

foggy morn, Sun Shone a t 10 h . Cyrus wen t to his Brothers. mr J. Jones here. I have been at home. mrs Edson here to warp a web of mrs Densmores. mr Pollard & Pitt here y s night. a t home. mr Jones here, Son Cyrus also.
Snowd the mos t off y e Day. I have been at home. we killd 2 Turkeys. mr Ballard went to mr Pollards, bt 5_ lb flax @ /9, 5lb Butter @ /10. a t home. finisht a pair of [hoes] for Dolly.

Clear & Cold. Cyrus wen t his Brothers, Bro t a Bushel of Turnips. Dolly returnd from mr Thwings. Shee has maid 3 gouns there & a t mr Bur tns , & took her pay in Cash @ 2/3 pr Day. I have been at home, finisht Eph s hoes. Snowd in y e night. a t home. Ephm workt for Densm r & Cragg with his Team.

Clear Excep t a Squall of Snow foren n . mr Pollard & Pitt took breakfast here. mrs Rockwood here to have a goun made. I have been at home, Did the house work. Ep hm workt for mr Bradbury. mr Ballard returnd from Surveying a 15 mile Lott. a t home. mrs Rockwd here. mr Ballard Came home.
Cloudy Day, Snowd at night. mr Ballard went to mr Pollards. I washt, the first washing I have Done without help this Several years. at home y s Day. a t home.
Clear. I was a t my Sons. a t Does.

Clear part of y e Day. Dolly Spining Cotten. Ephm went to his Bro rs , Jacky s hand is giting better. the freshet is very high. I have had a pain in my head, been at home till 11 h Evn g when I was Calld to See mrs Parker, y e next house below here. at mr Parkers.

X. Birth mr X Buzels Son. XX. Clear. Dolly washt & Scourd the west roome. mrs Densmore here. mr Ballard returnd from pittst n , Cyrus to work for Jon a . I was Calld at Sun Sett to See mrs Buzel who was Safe Deld at 9 h Evn of a fine Son. I tarried allnight. a t mr Buzels. Birth 19/ th .
Cloudy. mrs Brown left here. I gatherd Some Corn. mr Ballard returnd home very unwell. a t home. aunt Moore of Oxford was interd ys Dy.

Clear. mrs s Savage & her Daug t made me a visit. mr [sic] Daugts and mrs Pitt went to my Son Jon a s . I have been at home. mr Ballard returnd from Surveying at Varsalbor o , informd that Elle r Taylor Deceas t las t night. mr Pitt Sleeps here. a t home. mrs Savage here. Snowd in y e night.
Cloudy Day, Snowd a t Evn g . mr Ballard returnd, informs me my little grand Son is very unwell. I have been at home. Cyrus is gone to EbenZ Trashes. a t home.
Clear & very Pleasant. mr Ballard had Two Bush ls Corn from Ben n Porter & went to S. Jewit Fosters, Ep hm to Jona s with his Team. I have been at home. a t home.

Clear. I left mrs Buzels & inft Cleverly & arivd at home at 10h morn. I receivd 9/ as fee & hors hire & medisin. I feel not a little falagud as y e rodes are very bad. raind aftern. mr Ballard is gone to his meddow. Dolly is makeing Soap. a t Ditoes. I was much fatagud.

F rainy fore n . Dolly went to Son Pollards after n & Cyrus Came here from his Brors. I have been at home, receivd a letter from Doct Barton of y e 19 th ult which informs our friends were in health. a t home. receivd a Letter fm Doc t Barton of march 19.
G Cloudy. I have been a t home. mrs s Pitt & Dolly Came home, had a fall from y e hors; Did not hurt them very much. Elly Taytor was interd y s Day. a t home. Funeral off mr Taylors Daug tr .

G Clear & very Cold. I wen t to my Sons to See his Child, it is a little more Comfortable. mrs Pitts wrode with me as far as Son Pollards. I wen t in & warmd, they are well there. Cyrus returnd from Sidney. John Chamberlin was marid y e 10 inst, removed his wife to Sidney y e 11 th . Shee was Deld of a Dagt y e 12 th & it Expird before night. a t my Sons, the Child is better.
Clear & Cold. mr Ballard was up Street & at y e hook. I was at home. Dolly workt [ ]. a t home.
Clear & very Cold. I have been at home. mrs Pitts & Dolly Came here from mr Pollards. mr Ballard been to y e hook. a t home. mr Pitts here.
Clear. Dolly washt & Shee & I went to mr Livermores. I was Calld to mr Capins at Evn g . mr Ballard been to Col o Howards. a t mr Livermores [mr] Capins.
F raind this morn, Clear & very Pleasan t aftern. I have been at home. mrs Barton went to visit her Sister, finds her more Comfortable than Shee was. mr S. Jewet Foster Sleeps here. a t home.

X. Birth David Pollards Son. XX. Clear & Pleas t . I was at mr Pollards, his wife was Deld at 11 h Evn of a Son. mrs s Voce, Williams, Hamlin & Black assisted. mrs Gordin had fitts. mr Ballard returnd from winslow. a t Ditoes. Birth 11 th . receivd 6 as a rewar d .
Clear & pleas t . I wen t to mr Porters. mr Ballard to Es qr Farewels to Survey. Son Town Came here. Dolly went away with him, his famely well. a t mr Porters.
Cloudy, raind a t Evn. I have been a t home, Bakt & Breud. mr Ballard went to Winth p , Bot 3_ lb Butter. mrs Barton very unwell with a Cold. a t home.
Cloudy foren, Clear after n . I have been at home, Did work about house. mrs Barton mending Pattys Cloaths. a t home. have Seen 58 years this Day.

X. Birth J. Kenney Son. X. X. Birth James Burtun Dag t . XX. A rainy morn. mrs Kenny Deld off a Son a t 1h morn, and mr Kenney gave me 6/ as a reward. mr Burtun Came after me at 2 o Clok. very hard rain. I left mrs Kenny her & inft Cleverly. I walkt to y e Landing thro great fatague, passt by water to mr Wessons, walkt from there to mr Burtuns. [ ] arivd at 4 h morn, find his wife Deld off a Dagt but in Danger for want off assistance, but thro providence I Delivd her Safe at 4 h 30 m . I was as muddy as I Could well be. I tarried till near night. mr Burtun made me a pres t of 6/ & a Looking Glass, price 7/6, which I beStowed on my Dag t Hannah. a l Does & mr Burluns. B, 35. Birth 36 th . mr Ballad at Esq r Conys, recvd his pay of him. Cyrus was here.

X. Birth Shubl Hinkleys Son. XX. Snowd. I was at mr Hinkleys. Son Jon a Came again at Evn, they Could no t Dismiss me. mrs Hinkley was Deld of a fine Son at half after 11 h Evn, and I was Conducted to my Sons. receivd 6/ as a reward from mr Hinkley. at Does. Birth 3 d . this Birth was on y e 18 at 1 or 2 in the morn.

Snowd. Son Jon a Came here, I wen t home with him; Carried his little Son home. mr Ballard wen t up & bro t me home. we Calld at mr Pollards. Leu t Pollard bro t his wife home y s Day. Son & Dagt Town & Dagt Dolly Came here a t Evng. a t my Sons, his wife is as well as Can be Expected; the infant is Some unwell

Cloudy. mr Ballard waited on me to mr Twings, his Lady is a little more Comfortable; her Breast has broke twice. we went in to hear them Sing at Evn g . Dolly Came home from mr Livermores. a t mr Thwings. Snowd at night.
Clear. I have been writing to Bro r Jon a . Dolly went to mr Waids. mrs Livermore was here. I have workt out Doors part y e Day. at home. wrote to Bro r Jon a .

Cloudy morn. Cyrus went to Pitts tn aftern. it raind before night, a Severe N E Storm in y e night. I have been at home. mrs Bradbury & Betsy Champny here. a t home. Cyrus wen t to Pits tn . mrs Parker returnd home.

X. Birth mr Danys 5 th Son. Clear. I put Mrs Dany to Bed with a fine Son about y e mdl of y e night. Shee & inft are Cleverly. I returnd home at 4h morn, went to bed; had a Severe fit of y e Cramp at 6. Dolly watcht with mrs Densmore. Shee was returnd and was attentive in waiting on me. I went to bed again & Slept till 9. mr Ballard is gone to do Surveying for Esq r Howard. I was Calld to [Epr] Cowens. at mr Danys. [Birth] 21 st . receivd6/.
Clear. mr Ballard been up to Jonas & to y e hook. Cyrus wen t to Pits tn and brot his Chest & things home. I have been at home, have not been So well as I Could wish. a t home.

Snowd all Day & is very Cold. Ep m got wood for mr Livr mr , Densmr and Waid. I have been at home, mended Ep ms Buskins. Dolly finish t his Coat. a t home. Ep hm workt for Liv r , Densm r & Waid with his Teem.

Clear. mr Ballard been to Pitts tn . I have been at home. Bak t & wash t the west room & one Bedroome. Ephm went with the oxen to haul mr Fletchers furniture, his Sons, two of y m , workt here the most of y e Day. a t home.
X. Birth Savage Botlns Dagt. XX. Clear. I was Calld from my Sons to Savage Boltons a t 8 h Evn, his wife was Deld at 11 h 50 m of a Dagt, her 6th Child. a t Does & Boltons. Birth 6th.

X. Birth mr Parkers Dagt. XX. Clear. mrs Parker was Safe Deld at 11 h fore n of a Daugt. I left her and infant Cleverly at 2 h pm & returnd home, find Dolly is gone to mr Densmores. mr Ballard returnd at Evng, he Surveyd for Doct Parker Tuesday & Wednsday, Thursday faught fire at Cobesy uper mill. the other 2 days workt at y e Grist mill. a t mr Parkers. Birth 16 th .
Showry. I have been makeing Soap. mrs Barton & Dolly went to Deac n Conys. at home.

Clear. I was at mr Hinkleys till near night when I returnd home, left his wife more Comfortable. we receivd a letter of Apr l 1 st from Bro r Jon a Moore informing his famely were in health. a mrs Brown of Sandy river here. at mr Hinkleys. receivd a letter from Bro r Jon a of 1 st ins t .

F Cloudy. Cyrus & Jona & little Jack, mr Pitts, his wife, Daugt r & Polly Pollard here. I have been at home. I was Calld at half after 8 Evn to Deacon Coneys, his Lady Expird at 10. mrs M c Masters & I put her in grave Cloaths. mrs Brooks was present. the former went home after midnight. mrs Brooks & I tarried all night. a t Deacon Conys, his wife Expird at 10 h Evn g .
F Clear. I wen t from Boltons to my Sons. mr Savage & his wife Dind there. my Dagt is not very well y s Day. I have been very unwell my Self. a t Boltons & a t my Sons.

F Clear. mr Ballard went to meeting at the hook. mr Child Sent for me to See his wife who is Confind to her Bed. Shee has various Complaints. my Dagt Dolly is not So well as we Could wish. Jon a here, his infant is not very well. a t mr Child s . Ephm put Eggs under two Turkeys.
F Clear. mr Ballard attended worship at the hook. I was Calld to See mr Parkers infant fore n , at Evn to See Asa Masons wife. arivd there at 10 h Evn. a t Does & Asa Masons, very bad wriding.
at Ditoes, very unwell. a t my Sons.

Clear. Eph m Sett out with his Teem at 1h to mont Vernan for Hay for mr Livermore, mr Ballard & Foster to Surveying. Eph returnd this Evng. Jona, Rich d Foster, with their wives, Dind & tarried all night. mr Pollard & Pitts & their wives took Tea here. I have been at home. a t home. had Comp y . Son Jon a is 30 years old y s Day.
Clear & very Pleas t . I was a t mr Masons, his wife had a Linguring Case. a t mr Masons.

Clear, but Cool. I returnd home at 9h morn. mr Ballard Came home from Surveying at 12 O Clok. Cyrus Sleeps here. mrs Barton is not So well as Shee Could wish. I have wrote to Bro rs Kingsbury, Barton & Collins. a t Ditoes. wrote to my friends at Oxford.

X. Birth Thoms Hinklys Son, the 9 th by XX two wives. XX. Clear, a Coal morn, fine Day. I was Calld between twelve & one y s morn to See mrs Hinkley who was in Labour & was Deld of a fine Son at 11 h . I left her & infant Cleverly & returnd home, find mr Ballard Sett out on a tour of Surveying y s morn. my girls have washt & are Scouring house &C. a t mr Hinkley s . Birth 22 nt , Sixteen of which were Sons. recd 6/.
Clear. mr Ballard Sett out again to Survey for mr Pitts. Hannah walkt from her Brors, was much falagud. I was at home. Dolly workt here. a t home.

Clear & very Cold morn, Snowd a t night. mr Ballard run y e S line of this Lo t & went to Colo Howards. Bror tr Town Dind here. I have been at home. we killd 2 Turkeys & Cok t one of them. a t home. mr Thwing here at Evng.

Birth Asa Masons son. Clear. mrs Mason was Safe Deld at the 2 nt h morn of a Son, her Second Child. Shee was very ill, but I left her & infan t Cleverly at 4h 30m, & reacht home at 9. I Calld & helpt little Jack allso. at mr Thwings, his wife is very ill with her Breast & other maledies. Polly Densmore is here to work for Dolly. I went to Bed & Slept after I returnd. a t masons. Birth 17 th . I was very much fateagud.
Clear. I have been at mr Capins all Day. he returnd from y e reach. a t mr Capins.

Clear. I went to See mrs Gordin, find her very unwell. mrs s Thomas & Hersey Came to mr Pollards. I returnd home at noone. Jed h Preskott Dind here. mr Waid here to work. mr Ballard gone to Winlh p . mrs s Livermore & Polly here on a visit. a t Ditoes.

X. Birth W m Pitts Son. XX. Clear & very pleas t . mr Ballard wen t to Pittst n to work. I was Calld to See mrs Pitt who was in Labour. Shee was Delivrd at 10 h Evn g of a Dead Son. I tarried all night, mrs Pollard and Voce allso. a t mr Pitts. Birth 18 th .
Clear & Cold. I was at mr Porters, he wrode my hors to winthrop. a t Ditoes.

Clear but Cold. I went to my Sons, his wife is not So well as when I left her. I made use of remidies which gave relief. I returnd home a t Sun Se t . mrs Barton is better than Shee was yesterday. a t my Sons. mrs Brown was here.
Clear & Pleas t . mr Ballard wen t to Varsalboro to Survey. I Combd Some flax. was Calld to See mrs Childs & infant, tarried all night. at mr Childs.

Clear. mr Pitts infant was interd this aftern. I left his Lady Some what Comfortable, arivd at home at 7 h Evn. mr Pitt gave me 12/. Dolly been at mr Densmores, this and yester day. our [Sow] killd a Lamb. a t Ditoes. his Child interd. mother Ballard Desseast.
F Clear & not very Cold. Son & Dag t Pollard here, mr Isaac Savage allso. I have been at home. mr Smith Preacht a t y e hook. a t home. John Norths firs t Son Born.
Clear. I was at my Sons, mrs Barton allso. Sally is more Comfortable. a t my Sons.
Clear & pleas t . my Child n wen t to Son Pollards & I was Calld to mr Catons. mrs Liver mr Came & Bak t me Bread. a t mr Catons.

X. Birth Ezek l Pages Son. XX. Clear. I was Calld at 6 h aftern to See mrs Page who was Deld a t 10 of a fine Son, her 8 th Child. I returnd home at 2h morn, receivd 6/ of mr Page. I had a turn of the Cramp y s morn. a t mr Pages. Birth 14 th.
Cloudy. Dolly wen t to Son Pollard. Bro r Moore was here. Ephm Cowen Calld me to See his wife who is unwell. a t mr Cowins.

Cloudy part of y e Day, a Sprinkling of rain at Evn g . Dolly is gone to mr Bisbe s . I have been at home, workt in my Gardin. we were informd of the Death of mrs m c Causland. at home. Dolly [at] mr Bisbe s . mr Ballards Birthday. 68.
Cloudy & Some rain. I have been at home, Strip t Turkey feathers. a t home.
Clear & Cool. I was at mr Cowens, his wife is a little more Comfortable. I went to Daniel Savages. Son Town wen t from here. at mr Cowens.
Clear. mr Ballard went to Survey for Briant Fletchers. I went to Son Pollards on a visit. mr Pitts is in Persute of a thief. at Son Pollards.
Clear. mr Ballard went to Pitts tn . mr John Jones was here. Dolly returnd from her Brot rs . I have been at home, we bakt pumpkin peis. at home.

X. Birth Bulah Dagtr. XX. X. Birth Joseph Browns Dagt r . XX. Cloudy, Some lite Showers. I was Calld at 3h y s morn to See Bulah a t mr Cumings. Shee was deld at 4 of a Dagt. from there I went to mr Joseph Browns to See his Lady who was Safe delivd at 2h pm of a Dagt. I tarried till 4 h when his Son Conducted me to mr Shepard by water, from there I took passage with Josp h Preskott to mr Daws. walkt from there home, feel very much fatagud. I receivd 6/ of mrs Brown. her Husband is gone Down y e river. at mr Cumings. Birth 26 th . Birth 27 th .

G Clear pt y e Day. mr Ballard returnd f m Ptst n . mr J. Jones, J ms Page & Son Jon a Dind here. mr Pollard & Pitt Supt. I have been at home. mr Ballard paid John Jones 21 Dollars in part of a note he had against him. a t home. mr Page & Jones here.

F Clear. my Son Jon a & Dag t Dolly went to See mrs M c Causland & found her very low. Shee views her Self near the Close of Life. may Shee be Composd, have an easy passage from time to Eternity, & may the Change of Seins be her Everlasting happiness. Sally Cox went to her Dads. I have been at home. mr Densmore & wife here. a t home. Dolly [went] to See mrs m c Causland.
F Clear, windy & Cool. I returnd from mr Cowens, left his wife much better. Cyrus & Jona here. Dolly went to her Bro r Pollards. W m Thomas here. a t Ditoes.
F Cloudy & a little rain after n . Son Jon a & Pollard & their wives and mr Jones & Wil m Haywood here. I have been at home. we Dind on roast Veall. a t home.
Clear & very pleasant. Cyrus went to Pitts tn . Esq r Wesson here. I have been at home, washt. a t home. Esq r Cony [Came] home.

Clear. I went to See mrs Densmore, find her & inft Comfortable. mr Ballard with mr Foster, Noah Wood wd & Silva Moore Sett out to run lines on mr Pitts s land in Pownalboro. mrs Barton returnd from her Sisters, left her more Comfortable than Shee found her. Shee has been there 3 weaks. a t mr Densmores. mr Ballard went to Survey. mrs Barton Came here.

Clear. mr Ballard preparing for planting. mr James Page Dind here. old Lady Coutch Calld, Eph m helpt her over y e river. I have been at home. my Girls washt & went to mr Densmores. Cyrus went to Jon a s . a t home. Dolly went to mr Densmor s .

Clear part of y e Day & very warm. I went to Deacon & Doc t Cony s , Dagt Ballard with me, all well there Except mrs Cumings who has a Cold. mr Ballard been to view timber of Capt Meloys. Mehittable Peirce & H. Wall Sleep here. Jona & wife returnd home. a t Deacon Cony s . Mhb l Peirce here. I began a Cottne Stockin Dolly.

F Cloudy and Some rain fore n , Clear after n . Dolly went to mr Pollards, Sally Cox went to her Dads. Brot r Davis returnd from Varsalbor o . I have been at home, wrote to Doc t Barton & Sister Waters & Bro r Collins. a t home. wrote to friends at Oxford.
a t my Sons, feel a little better. at my Sons.
raind the mos t of y e Day. mr Foster and his wife went from here after Dineing. Sally & her Child n here this night. a boisterous wind & Snow in the Evn g . I have been at home. a t home.
Clear. I have been at home, wrote to Bro r Elijah Moore. a t home, wrote to Br Elijah.

Clear & warm. I have been at home Clearing y e Door yard of Chips. Cyrus & Ephm ploughing y e Entervl. mrs Barton went to Jon a s . Dolly got her Bro rs web out. I am inf md that mrs m c Causland is thought to be near y e Close of life. a t home.

Clear & warm. mr Ballard went to Leut H. Learneds. I was to See mrs Densmore, Shee has Canker in her throat & is very unwell. Dolly went to Son Pollards. mr Beadle is Some beller. at mr Densmores, Shee is very unwell.
A very Severe Snow Storm. I have been at home. this day is 38 years Since I was Joind in Wed lock with mr Ballard. a t home.

rainy foren, Clear aftern. I Came from mr Capins to Deacon Coneys, find the old Lady very Sick. Came home, we receivd a Letter from Bro r Kingsbury which informs [ ] y t Mot r Ballard is very Low, other friends well. I was Calld to See mrs Densmore at 11 h . a t Does & Deacon Coneys. receivd a Letter fm Capt Kingsbury of march 30 th .

X. Birth Capt Neys Son. XX. Clear & very warm. I was Calld at 8h morn to See Capt Neys Lady who was in Labour. Shee was Safe Deld at 10 of a very fine Son. mrs Cox, Cleark, Hinkly, Pilsbiry & Sherburn were assistants. we tarried till near Sun Sett when we left my Patients Cleverly. I receivd 6/ as a reward. mr Ballard is returnd. I went to See mrs Densmore, find her Easier. a t Capt Neys & mr Densmrs. Birth 33 d . mrs Neys 9 th Child.

Clear. mr Ballard Carried little Jacky home fore n , brot Dolly here, went to Winthrop after n . mr Ben n Brown & his wife here, took Tea with me. I have been at home. Cyrus bot me 1/2 lb snuff at mr Smiths Store, Cos t 1/6. a t home. Dolly Came here. mr Ben n Browns wife here.
raind this morn. I have been at home doing house work & Combd flax. a t [home].

X. Birth Thos Stikney s Son. XX. Clear & warm. I was Calld to Thomas Stickneys wife in Labour at 8h morn. Shee was Safe Delivd at 10 of a Son, her first Born. I receivd 6/ as reward, left her Cleverly at 3 pm & returnd. Cyrus Sleeps here. Borrowed 13-3/4 lb veal of mr Densmr. at Thos Stickneys. Birth 32 nt .
Clear. mr Ballard went to Sidny. I have been at home. mrs s Hinkley Calld here. Cyrus Sleeps here. I am informd that Hannah is Sick. at home.
a t mr Porters, his wife was ill all Day; he gone. Cap t Fillbrook Conducted her women there, he Came home. a t Ditoes.

Cloudy, Snowd a lillle. mr Ballard & Ep hm got wood. Cyrus to Pits tn to mill. I have been at home, mrs Barton wash t . mr Ballard brot a pair of Shoes from mr Childs for me, informs me their infant is very Sick. at home, had a pain in my Ear.

Clear & Cold. mrs Child is unwell with a Cold, the infant is teething. I left them after Dining. Calld a t mr Hamlins, Sally is unwell; at mr Pitts, his Lady is not So well as Shee Could wish; at mr Wessons, all well there; at Son Pollards. Came from there in a Sleigh. mr Keth attended me. a t Dittoes & other Neigr s .

Clear. Lucy Damrin here to have a goun made. mrs Ol v Hamlin here, mrs H. Densmore, Anna Bullin, mrs Hunt & Sally Densmr allso. mr Waid Butcherd a swine for us. Bro r Eben z & Levy Moore here. I have been at home. Cyrus Slept here. at home. receivd a Letter from Esq r Lethgow. we killd a Swine.

Clear & very warm. I went to Son Pollards, find my Dagt very unwell. Shee was more Comfortable when I left her at Evn. Dolly workt at mr Dumers. mrs Livermr Calld in here at Evn. a t Son Pollards. Cyrus Sleeps here.
Clear. mrs Barton went from Jon a s to our house, we Sent for her at Evn. at Does.

X. Birth mr Catons Dag t . XX. Clear & Cold. mrs Caton was Safe Deld at 3 h morn of a Dag t and I returnd home a t 10h, receivd 6/ as a reward. I Calld to see mrs Jackson, find her very low. mr Stratton & Lady, Son Town, his wife & Dolly Came here a t Evn. mr James Page took Tea with us. Cyrus been [to] mill. a t Catons. Birth 9 th .

Clear & Co o ler. Ephm gone to work for mr Waid. Cyrus waited on Dolly to my Son Jon as . Cyrus returnd and informd y t Jack had burnt his hand. Jon a been here, Says the Child is Easier. mr Faught Dind here. Cyrus went to mr Sewalls, purchased a Chees which Cos t 6/. a t Ditoes.
Cloudy part y e Day. I was at Dittoes, his wife very unwell. a t Dittoes.
Clear. I have been at home. Dolly returnd, Jon a with her; brot Jacky. y e Girls took my bonet to apart & new made it. at home.
Clear. I have been at home. we were Bleaching yarn. mr Ballard & Ephm workt on the road aftern. Cyrus went to Pitts tn . Dolly returnd from Jon a s . at home.

Clear & warm. I was Calld to See mrs m c Neall at mr Kenedys. mrs Fairbank & Lambrt here. I went aftern to See mrs Greelys infan, it is better than it was. Dolly went to Son Pollards, Hannah is much Better. a t mr m c Neels & Greelys. Cyrus Sleeps here.

F Clear & warm. mr Ballard & Cyrus Attended worship, mr Turner performd. Shub l Pitts & wife & Dagt Pollard & Son Jon a Drank Tea here. Sally went to her Dads. I have been at home. a t home, my Child n here.

F Snowd foren, raind at Evn. Son & Da t Town & Dolly went to See mrs m c Causland. mrs Barton Came up with them. mr Pollard & Pitts here with their wives. mr Strattun & his wife went to Cap t Fillebrowns fore n , they all Dind here. a t home. my Children here.

F Clear & warm. Cyrus & I went to Pitts lon, attended Service aftern & the funeral of mr Robert m c Causlands wife, oldest Daug t to Brother Town. Sally & Polly Densmores here when we returnd. I Dind at mr Moores & my hors was put up allso. Mrs Hamlin returnd from Oxford y s Day. Shee has been gone 3 weaks & 4 Days. a t Pittston, the remains of mrs M c Causland interd at 5h pm.
F Clear. mrs Barton went to our house. I tarried at my Sons. a t Does.

F X. Birth James Hinkly s Son. XX. Clear foren. Sally Densmore Brot their infant to have a burn dres t . I was Calld to See James Hinkley s y s 3 d wife at 12 O Clock. Shee was Delivd at 11h Evn of a Son, her first Born. I tarried all night, my Patients are Cleverly. a t James Hinklys. Birth 31 st
F Clear, a Cool air. Ephm went to Jon as . Dolly Came home at Evn g . Jack is better. a t home.
Clear. I was at my Sons. Isaac Hardin Calld me to See his wife at 9h Evn. a t Does.

Clear. I went to the hook as far as Elisha Preskotts. mrs Barton was Calld to See her Sister who is very Low. I bot at mr Dummers Store 1 yd Durant, 2/4; [1_ th ] yd Cambric, 2/6; 2 Skeins Silk, /8; 3 knots Thread, [/6]. paid the Cash. a t the hook.
Clear & warm. my Girls washt and washt the floors. Cyrus Carried little Jacky home. I have been at home, workt in the gardin. at home.

Clear. Brother Davis left here this morn home ward bound. Dolly went to work for mr Densmore, Cyrus to Jon a s . Ephm to mill to Pitts tn . mr Ballard been to the hook. I have been at home. Son Town Calld here. a t home. Son Town Calld here.

Clear & warm. I receivd 6/ for my Service, returnd home at 9h morn. Calld to See mr Parkers infant. Shee thinks it is better. mrs Coutch Dind here. I went as far as mr Shepperds. Bot 1 pair Shoes @ 4/4, three y ds Black ribbon @ /6; at Doc t Colmans bt 1/2 oz Camph r /8, Do myrr /7_, Do of alloes /4_, Viall & Sallts /6_, 3 oz Spermaseta /4_. at mr Dummers bt 2 muslin hand kercf s , 1/2 y d lawn 7/9. at mr Greelys, Shee is not so well as Could be wisht. her infant had fitts last Evng. at Saml Norcorss, Cleard her inft breasts of milk. Esqr Lithgow here at Evng, he wishes to See me at his house about a fortnit hence. a t Dittoes. at the Stores. Cyrus Sleps here. a Child killd by the fall of a tree at [sic].

Clear. mr Ballard Sett out for Pownalbor o to attend Coart on the Grand Jury. Dolly went to her Brothers. I have been at home, washt the west room and Cleand Bedsteads. Sally washt & washt the Bed rooms. I had information that Son Towns Dagt Hannah is very Sick. Cyrus Sleeps here. Ephm has been houghing Corn & Potatoes. at home, had News that Hannah Town was very Sick.
Clear. mr Ballard went to Do business with mr Vauhn, Cyrus to work for him Self up abov here. I have been at home Doing hous work. Sally Spoold a warp. a t home.
Clear morn, over Cast Day & very moderate weather. mr Ballard attended Coart. I have been ["at home"- implied]. at home.
Cloudy part of y e Day. I went to mr Densmores & Drest her infant. a t Ditoes.

X. Birth Saml Cuming s Dagt. XX. Clear. mr Ballard had his flax Sowd. I was Calld to Sam l Cuming s to See his wife. Shee was Deld at 2h pm of a Daugt, her 3 d Child. I Calld to See mrs Child, find her Seting up. I arivd at home about Dusk, walkt from mr Child s . a t Sam l Cumings s .Birth 25 th . Dolly at mr Danys. receivd6/ of mr Cumings July 13.
Clear. I have been at home. mr Ballard to Sidny, mr Jos h Burton here. Dolly, Sally & mrs Pierce to mr Pollards. mr Partradge & mrs Rockwd Marrid. at home. my Girls at mr Pollards.

X. Birth John Coutches 3 d Son. XX. Cloudy morn, raind aftern. I was Calld at Sun rise to See John Coutches wife who was in Labour. Shee was Safe Delivd of a fine Son at 7h 30m morn. I receivd 6/ as a reward & left my Patients very Comfortable, & returnd home at 10. mr Pollard, Pitts, Son Jon a , their wives, mrs Burton & Cyrus Dind here. we had a fine Loin of Veal & String Beens. mr Ballard was Calld to mr Kennadies at Evn. at John Coutches. Birth 34 th . my Childn here. Jona s wife & Childn tarry all night.

Clear & very warm. I went to the hook Stores on Business foren n . mrs s Hamlin Came here, her Husband & mrs Olliv Came at Evn, they took Tea & returnd home. at the hook. mrs Hamlin here. Sally Cox 18 y r .
at my Sons, his little Son Burn t his head. we applied Rhum & Salt. a t my Sons.
Clear. I have been at home. mr Ballard returnd at Evng. Jon a Came and Conducted his wife and infant home. he left Jack here, he was restless part of y e night. a t home.

Clear. I Closd a letter to Doct Waters & sent my packet to mrs Hamlin. we attended funeral of old Lady Cony. Shee was interd in the Docters field. mr Prockter maid y e prayor, he is preaching at pittst n . Cyrus here, took Tea with us. a t the funeral of mrs Cony. wrote to Doct Waters.

X. Birth mr Capins Dagt. XX. 478 th Extraction Since I Came to Hollowell. Clear & warm. I was Calld at 1 h morn to See mrs Capen who was in Labour. Shee was Delivd of a fine Dagt at 2. I tarried there till after Dining, went to mr Brookses, mrs Cony & Dagts Came there. I Came to mr Capins again, rec d 6/. Cyrus Came to mr Pages Landing & Conducted me over y e river. Ephm heard y t our Hon d Mother Ballard is Deceas t . a t mr Capans. Birth 23 d . we had News of ye Death of mot r Ballard.

Clear & very Pleasan t . mr Shubal Pitts removd his wife from here & wen t to house keeping. may they prosper in this life & be happy in the future. Dolly went home with mr Pitts & tarries y s night. I have been at home. a t home. Parthenia left me & wen t to house keeping.

X. Birth Densmores Dagt. XX. Clear. mrs Densmore was Deld of a Dagt at 11 h morn, is as well as Can be Expected. the inft is troubled much with wind. I gave remedies which releivd & returnd home at 4. Hannah & Parthenia here. mr Ballard been to meeting at y e hook. I went to Danys at Evn. a t mr Densmores. Birth 20 th . receivd my fee in Candles.
F Clear. Cap t Savage & two Dagts attended worship. mrs Cowen had a turn of faintness, we Calld her women. Shee Seemd better and part of them went home. a t Dittoes.
Clear, the wind S W. I have been at ["home". -.implied] mrs Barton & Dolly washt. the Calf Damaged a Laun Handkerchif of of [sic] Dollys. home.
Clear. mr Child Came here for me to go & See his wife. I walkt there, find her Confind to her Bed. was Calld from there to Saml Norcros s , his wife in Labour. at mr Child s & Norcros.

Clear Except a Sprinkling of rain. mr Ballard returnd, Cyrus Sleeps here. Sally went to Son Pollards, Eph m workt for mr Child. I have been at home, lent mr Densmr 6 lb, lacking 2 oz, of Pork. a mr Hinkly Drownd at Pitts tn .

X. Birth Ben n Porters Dagt. XX. Clear & pleasant. mrs Porter was Safe Deld at 1h morn of a Dag t . I left her at 9, as well as Could be Expected, & returnd home without attendance or Company. Calld at mr Pages & Son Pollards, Son Jona and his wife & Son there. Patty a t her uncles. I los t a Larg hand kercf as I was on my way to washington. a t D t oes. Birth 40 th .

Cloudy & moderate. mr Ballard and Ephm wen t to mr Preskots for Hay. I have been at home. Cyrus wen t to Moses Sewalls, bot 8_ lb Chees, Cos t 5/8, gingr bd /4. three of mr Densmrs Dag t s here. a t home.
Clear & Cold. I have been a t home. mr Ballard returnd, brot 4 lb butter. Eph m went & brot Dolly here. a t home.
Clear & warm. mr Ballard & Ephm went to the Meddow to mend y e fence. Anna Bullen went home, Sally went with her as far as mr Sheppards. I have been al home. at home. Anne Bullen here.
F Clear. mr Ballard wen t to y e hook aft n to hear mr Smith. Son Jon a was here, his wife is Cleverly. I havi been a t home. a t home.
F Clear, a Brisk S W wind. Moses Pollard, mr Pitts, their wives and Polly Pollard here this aftern. I have been at home. mr Liverm r here. a t home. my Child n here.

F X. Birth Moses Cars Dag t . XX. Snowd morn. I was Calld at 3 h to Moses Cars Lady. Shee was Delivd at 5 of a fine Dagt, her first Born. I arivd at home at 8. mr Car gave me 6/ as a reward. mr Ballard attended worship at y e academy. a t Moses Cars. Birth 10 th .
G Cloudy. mr Ballard returnd. he fell & hurt his Side yesterday. I have been at home, have my work to Do my Self. a t home.

F Clear & warm. I was a t meeting. mrs Ingerham informd me that mrs s Hewin was Delivd of a Son the 26 ult. I was at mr Childs at intermition, find his wife as Shee has been. Son Pollard, mr Pitts, their wives & Polly Pollard here at Evn. a t meeting. my famely all there.

Cloudy & a little Snow. mr Ballard is Exercisd with pain in his Side which he hurt, but has been able to go to y e hook & to attend a t a meeting off thee Church. I have been at home, washt my kitchen. my famely is reduced to four in Number. Cyrus has been to y e fort & y e hook, Eph m to work with his OXen for mr Livermore, & now this year is Come to a Close. May we begin a New one in the Servis of our Grea t Master, who will reward the his faithfull Servants. a t home. mr Ballard is unwell.
Clear & Cold. mr Ballard & Eph m are gone to mr Preskotts for Hay. I have been a t home. Betsy Champney was here, informs old Lady Coney is no better. a t home.
Clear & Cold. I have been at home. mr Ballard Surveyd for mr Waid foren. a t home.
Clear. mrs Cowin was Lingering and very much Deprest in Spirits. we Calld mrs Fletcher. mrs Coal Calld there. mrs Savage & Fletcher tarried all night. a t Dittoes. Town meeting.

Clear Except a shower. Hannah Cox & Lucy Ney here. mr Ballard is gone to Varsalbor o to Survey. Dolly weaving, Sally washing. mrs Child Sent for me to go and See her. Shee Seems a little more Comfortable, her Sister Cushin there. a t mr Child s . H. Cox and L. Ney here.

Clear Except a light Shower. mr Ballard went after n to Do Surveying for mr Vauhn. I went as far as mr Sheperds, Bot 2 lb Sugar @ /10, 1 Chip hat @ /9; to Doct Colmans, bt 1 oz Senna, Do manna @ 1/ pr oz, 1 oz annis Seed /4, 1/2 oz pink root /4_; at mr Livermores, bt 1 Skein Sewing Silk /4. at the Stores below here. Calld to See the mrs s Dumers & mrs Norcross.

Clear. mr Ballard wen t to his meddow. I went after n to Cap t Meloys, Col o Duttuns, Cap t Fillebrowns & mr Dummers. mrs Duttun is mending Slowly, Shee has not been able to walk alone ye t . my Dagt Dolly is 21 years old, many Changing Siens have I past thro in those years. a t the hook. Dag t Dolly is 21 y s old this Day.
X. Bth Hardins Son. XX. at Hardins, his wife Deld of a Son a t 3h morn & I returnd to my Sons at 8h morn, find Sally tolerable. mr Hardin paid me 6/ at mr Blaks. a t [Hardns]. Birth 4 th .

X. Birth P. Jone s Son. XX. Cloudy. I was Calld by Peter Jones to his wife in Labour at 3h morn. Shee was Safe Deld at 4 of a Son. I tarried till near night & Left my Patients Cleverly. receivd 6/ as a reward. mr Ballard is gone to Survey for Doc t Parker. a very rainy night. a t Peter Jones s . Birth 15 th . Jobe Spring r had a Son born y s night.

Clear & very warm. I finisht Cleaning my Door yard, went to See mrs s Hamlin, find her much fatagud with her Joirney. I Calld a t mr Baxters. find mr Ballard was returnd when I arivd at home. mrs Densmore here. a t mr Hamlins & mr Baxters.

Clear. Mrs Barton Calld here on her way to Winslow. I paid her 6/ in part for her labour for me. John Stackpool with her. Patty Good n , Fanny Cox & Dolly Dind. Sally & P. Densm r & P. Livermr Took Tea. I went to help mrs Norcros quillt. mr Savage Came there to See his wife who has y e Collic. I tarried there y s night. at mr Norcross & Savages. my Dag t had Comp y . mr Ballard at Coart. mrs Barton went home.

Cloudy part of y e Day. mr Ballard is gone to Vasalboro to Survey. mr David Smyle here. I finisht kniting a pair of Cottne hoes for my Self. Ephm workt with the oxen at mr Childs. a t home, raind at night.
Cloudy morn, a fine rain after n . my Sons went Down to Coart. I have been at home. Ephm got plants of mr Densmore. a t home. Cyrus went to Pownalboro.
Cloudy, a fine rain at night. Dolly & Ephm relurnd from Son Towns, left them all Comfortable. I have been at home. a t home.

X. Birth Jery Dumers Son. XX. Clear. I was Calld a t 9 h morn to See mr Jere Dumers Lady who was in Labour, Shee was Deld a t 5h Evn g of a fine Son, their first Born. I tarried & Nurs t my Patients thro the night; they are Comfortable. a t mr Dumers. Birth 36 th .

A foggy morn, haild after n , a Storm of rain in y e night with heavy wind. mr Ballard, Cyrus & Eph m attended Coart. the Cause in which Emersen prosecuted mr Ballard was tried, turnd in favour of the Latter. I have been at home. a t home.

Clear, warm fore n . Sally Cox Came to work for me. mrs Livermore & I went to mr Shub l Hinkleys, the mrs Norcros s , mrs Selvester & Ney were there. I Calld to See mrs Parker, her inft is not very well. David & Will m Densmr Sleep here. Ephm is [un ]. a t mr Hinklys. Sally Cox here.

Clear. Dolly went to mr Danys to work, mr Ballard to Survey for Col o North. I went to take my leave of mr Dany & wife who left y s town and are going to New town. I went to [Godlin] Pages & paid him 1:18:8 which mr Ballard owd him. I was at other Stores. a t mr Danys & at the Stores. Elisha Preskott paid me 6/ for assisting his wife Oct r 27 th .
Clear. John Jones Esq r here, and Setled all acounts & notes with mr Ballard & my Son Cyrus. Cyrus Shearing our Sheep. at home. mr Jones here, mr Ballard Setled with him.

Clear part of y e Day. Sally & her little Sons went from here aftern, Dolly & S. Cox went to Son Pollards with her. I have been at home. Dolly tarries at her Sisters. Cyrus Came here. a t home. Jona s wife & Children went home.
Clear. I have been at home. mr Ballard went to Survey a pice of Land for Doct Colman which he purchast of mr Pollard. Dolly went to Son Pollds. a t home. Cyrus Sleeps here.

Clear & hott till niar Evn when we had rain with thunder. mrs Densmore here. I have been to See mrs Duttun, Shee is very Sick. Cap t Cox s Lady is Nursing her. Sally & Dolly went to Son Pollads, tarried all night by reason of y e rain. at mr Duttins, his Lady is very Sick. gatherd ripe Beens.
Clear, mrs O. Hamlin Came here last Evn g , is makeing her Self a Bunnit. Dolly had an ill turn. at home.

Clear. I tarried at mr Dumers all Day. mrs Williams Came at Evn & I Came home, receivd 13/6 as a reward for my Performance. find that Dolly is gone to work for mrs Burtun. a t mr Dumers, receivd 13/6.
A very windy Day. I was a t my Sons. a t my Sons.

Clear & Pleast. Dolly Came here. Shee walkt, has a pain in her head Since Shee Came, but has workt Some on Eph ms over Coat. mr Ballard went to mr Dumers & bot 1 y d blue ratteen. I have been at home, mrs Barton washt. at home.

Clear. mr Forgeson here, paid a note. mrs Hamlin went past here bound for Boston. Betsy Voce & P. Livermore here aftern. Cyrus Came from Jon as to work for us. he & Eph m began to plough. mr Ballard makeing fence. the girls finisht kniting y e [Scan]. at home. Betsy Voce here.

Clear till near night when we had Some rain. I have been at home. Bro r Moore & mr Lathrop Dind here. Dolly returnd from mr Burtuns at Evn. Sally Wil ms here for a Dress. mr Ballard has been writeing & up to y e fort. a t home.

X. Birth MC Neels Son. XX. Clear. I was Calld at 6h morn to See mrs m c Neele who was in Labour. Shee was Deld at 12 of a Son which was inspird with life but Expird in a Short time after the Birth. I left her as well as Could be Expected at 6h pm & Came home. Dolly & Sally Came home from Son Pollards. a t mr m c Neele s . Birth 37 th . Dagt Ballard & her [Child n ] Came y s Evng.

Clear. Eph m Cowen & his wife here. I receivd a letter from Bror Collins of the 10 th inst informing our friends are in health. mr Ballard returnd. at home, receivd Ltr from Bro Collins at y e 10 th inst.

X. Birth Saml Norcros s Dagt. XX. Clear Except a lite Shower. mrs Norcross was Safe Delivd at the 11 th h foren of a Daugt. I tarried with her till 8 h Evn whin I left her & infant Some what Comfortable. I receivd 6/ as a reward. this is mrs Norcr ss 8 th Child, 4 of Each Sex. at mr Norcros s . Birth 28th. Dolly Came home from mr Densmrs.

Clear & very warm. mr Ballard at the fort & y e hook. I went to See mr Blaks infant, it has taken a Cold, Seems a little revivd. I Calld at mr Hamlins, Shee is feeble. at mr Childs, his wife much as Shee was. mr Beadle is very unwell. at mr Pitts. Dolly returnd from mr Bullins. Cyrus Sleeps here. a t mr Blaks & other Neigh s .a man wounded in the woods, very badly.
Clear. I have been at home fixing for mr Ballards Departure to Lay out 4 Townships for this Common wealth. at home. Dagt Bal d here.

F Clear & a Cool air. mr Ballard, Cyrus, & Ephm & I attended Divine Service. the revd mr Turners Discourse was Concerning the Grea t Day of Judgment. I went to See mrs Dummer, find her weak but tollerable Comfortable, her Babe is a fine Child. Son Jona, Pollard, his wife & mrs Pitts here after meeting. my Child n all went home. mr Savage here, informs that a boy who Servd a t mr Sheppards was Drowned at, or near, his wharf y s afternoon. I was Calld to See mrs Lashnees at 11 h Evng. at meeting & at mr Dumers. my Child n here. Jonas wife went home. An indian Boy was Drowned.

F Clear. I went to See mrs Child, mrs s Pollard there. we helpt her out of Bed & Shee Sett in her Chair 2 hours. I administred a Clistar which opperated kindly & gave great relief. I Calld at mr Westons, Pitts & Son Pollards, find them all well. at mr Child s .
F Clear & very warm. Georg Brown Breakfasted. Shubal Pitts Dind here. I went to mr Lathrops. at mr Lathrops.

F Clear & very warm indeed. mr famely attended worship at the hook. I, my Self, Did after n . Calld to See mrs Greely who remains very feeble, her infant has a Soar mouth. Calld at mr Hinkleys, his wife is Cleverly. Jon a & his little Son here when I Came home. Dolly wrode to mr Pollards. I went to See mrs Densmore, shee is not so well as Could be wisht. at meetin g at thee hook. Calld at mr Greelys.

X. Birth Hinklys Dagt. XX. Cloudy. I wen t from Lat ps to James hinkleys at 3 h morn, his wife Deld at 7 Evng of a Dagt at 7 Evn & I returnd at 10 to mr Lathrops. find her ill. I receivd 6/ of mr Hinkly. a t mr Hinkleys. Birth [12th].
Clear Except a Shower. mr Ballard went to Varsalbor o to Survey. mr John Church & Jason Cony here. I have been at home. a t home. Dolly to mr Pages.

Clear & very warm. mr Ballard went to mr Dumers for money which mr Pitt Sent him. Dolly & Sally Went to the Stores for things. I went to See mr Beadle, find him very poorly. mrs Lang was here while I was gone. Saml Philbrook hurt in a Saw mill. Nat n Burtens Child Drowned. a t mr Pitts & Son Pollards.

X. John Lashnees Son. XX. Clear till near night when it raind. mrs Lashnees was Safe Deld at 5h morn of a fine Son which w d 11_ lb. I tarried with her till 6h pm, left her Cleverly as Could be Expected. I receivd [7/4 d ] for my Service. Calld to See mrs Dummer, find her Cleverly. mr Ballard Sett out on his Tour of Surveying. Ephm went with him to take the hors home. a t mr Lashnees. Birth 38 th . mr Balld left home to Survey 4 Townships.
Snow, Haill & rain. I Bak t y s foren and was unwell after n . mr Ballard and mr Liver mr Settled acounts. a t home.

X. Birth Ep m Cowens Dagt. XX. Clear. mrs Cowens illness Came on about Two y s morn & Shee was Safe Delivd at 3 h 30m of a fine Dagt, with 5 pains after my inquiry in to her Case. I tarried, took breakfast and Sett out homewd. Calld at Col o Sewalls, his Child is much better. I arivd at home at 10h morn. I receivd 6/ as a reward. mr Ballard is gone to pitts tn . Fanny Cox & Hannah Goodin Came here. a t Ditoes. Birth 24 th .
Clear. I have been at home. my Girls washt house, I wed Gardin & Combd flax. mr Ballard returnd home. Cyrus Sleeps here. at home.
A fine rain. mr Ballard fixing out for the meddow. I have been at home. Dolly made a hatt for Patty Town & Put in a Shurting web. a t home. Hannah is 24 y s old y s Day.
Clear & Pleast. I went to See mrs Densmore. Sally & Polly here, tarry all night. at mr Densmores. [28]
Clear. our men planted our Corn and Beens and potatoes. Es q Cony was here. I planted mellon Seeds y e north Side of the house. it has been very warm. a t home. Dolly went to mr Hamlins at Evng.
Cloudy. I returnd home at 4h morn, left mrs Savage Easy. I walkt and am mutch fatagud. Son Town Calld here. Mehit l Peirce to work for me, Shee Came last Evng. Ephm Slept at Jon as . at mr Savages.
A fine rain las t night & y s morn. I have been working in the Gardin & Carding Cottne. Dolly is gone to mr Bullins. a t home. Dolly at mr Bullins.
Clear. I have been at home. mrs s Pitts Came here & put a web into my Loom. Anna Child here, Says her marm is no better. a t home. mrs Pitt here.

rain foren, Clear aftern. I went to See Son Pollard & mrs Child, the former is Bitter, y e latter is much as Shee has been. mr Patridge, his Lady & Ruth Rockwood here while I was absent. at Son Pollards & mr Childs.

Clear, a Great fros t this morn. I have been at home. Sally wen t to my Sons to help quillt a Bed quillt. Ephm got in part of our Corn, had Some youngsters to help him husk it. at home. Dolly Came home. Sally bot a Goun pat n .
raind fore n , Clear after n . mr Ballard & Sons went to Coart. I have been at home alone all day. the Cause between Andrus & my Son Jon a was Plead & given to the Jury y s Day. a t home.

Clear. Sally Densmore went home after Breakfast. Polly tarried & Spun for Dolly. mrs Densmore Came here, her Dagt went home. Dolly wen t to Son Pollards. mr Densmore Came here a t Evn. a t home. mrs Densm r here. the river Opend.
Cloudy, Some rain. mrs Liver mr Sent for me to See her inft, it is Scollt. a t [mr Liver mr ].
Clear. John Savage work t here. I have been at home, workt in my Gardin. Sally went to mr Pollards. Han h Woodwd here yesterday. at home. mrs mc [Causland] Deceast.
Clear & Cool. mr Ballard been on business for Esq r Pitts. I wint to mr Densmores, mrs s Livermore and Hinkley there. David Learned Esq r Sleeps here. Cyrus is at Jona s . a t mr Densmr s .
Clear & warm. mr Ballard & Eph m mowing & makeing hay. mrs Pitts here weaving. I have been at home. a t home. mrs Pitts weaving here.
Clear & fine air. mr Ballard mowing. I have been at home. Cyrus here at night. at home.

Clear after the morn. mr Ballard & Ephm Came from the meddow, went there again aftern. I have been at home, was Doing a little in my gardin, gather d Parsnip Seed. Sally Cox Came home. Dolly tarried to work. a t home. Polly Livr mr & Sally Williams here.
Clear. I have been at home. mrs Parker & her Child n here. Sally Cokx wove 3 yds. a t home. Church at Pitts tn Burnt.
Clear. mr Ballard Came to Jon a s , informs me he has been unwell, but is more Comfortable. at my Sons.

A Stormy Day, Snowd, raind & haild. I have been at home. mr Ballard has been to the fort, Bot 2-2/2 y ds Durant, 1 Skein Silk; all Cost 6/. it was for Dolly. a t home. mr Liverm r Extracted a tooth for me & one for Dolly.
Clear. I was Calld to See mrs Hinkley who is Exercised with a Severe Cough, tarried all night. mrs Hinkley & mrs Ney there. Betsy went home. a t Thos Hinkley s .
Cloudy. mr Ballard went to mr Pollards & Sent his hors to winslow for Dolly to wride home. Bro r Moore & Son Jon a Dind here. I have been at home, Sally washt. a t [home].
a little rain this morn. Dagt Town is Cleverly. I tarried there this Day. the two mrs Fullers at Son Towns. mrs [Cragen] & Strattne there. Harnon Barton unwell at night. a t Son Towns.

Clear. I Did house work till near night & workt in my Gardin. Sally & I made Some Pies. I was Siesd with a Severe Pain in my Back which lasted an hour when I Seemd freed there from. mr Buzell Calld me to go & See his Sister Judy who was in Lab r . I arivd at his house about Dusk. I felt the Collick before I reacht there, was Severely Exercised with it thro the night. at mr Buzells, New France.

F X. Birth Slepn Hinklys Son by Judy Buzell, out of Wedlock. XX. Clear. I was Still Labouring under the triall of y e Collick. mrs Hinkley took grea t Care of me, I was Easier towards night when my Patients illness Came on more regular, and Shee was Safe Deld at 5 h pm of a fine Son, which Shee Declard Stephen Hinkly is thee true father off. Shee is as well as can be Expected. I am Exceeding feeble thro the night. a t Dittoes. Birth 39 th . I receivd 6/. there is 2/ Due for hors & medisin.

Cloudy & Some rain. I Sett ou t , weak as I was, & wrode home. Find Dolly very unwell. Shee wrode to her Bro r Pollards & her Sis tr & mrs Pitts Came here to See me. Polly Livermr took Tea here. I Drank 2 Cups of Tea & Eat a Little, which is the firs t food I have taken Since Saterdy noone, Excep t thin gruel. I made a Decoction of feavr fu, peneroial & Cammomile for my Self & Dagt. a t Ditos. Left Judy & infant Comfortable.

X, Birth Lathrops Son. XX. rainy morn. mrs Lathrop had her women & was Deld of a Son at 11h 30m morn of a Son which w d 12 lb. I went to D r Colmans & Procurd 3/ worth of Drugs & returnd home. Sally & Polly Densmore & P. Livermore here. a t Lathr. Birth 13 [th] . receivd [ Sugar July 28].
Clear & very warm. mrs Oliv Hamlin here to have a goun made. Dolly returnd at 12 O Clok. I have been at home. mrs Densmr & Sewall Calld here. a t home. Oliv Hamlin here. mr Moores Son Drownd.
rainy. I have been at home. Dolly is makeing a Leut string goune for mrs Gage. Ephm is not returnd. a t home. Dolly began to Spin a Warp.
Cloudy. I was at home. the widdow to mr Thom ss . a t home.

Clear. I went to See mrs m c Causland, find her very low; her husband is unwell. I Crost y e river at Gen l Derbns & at Norcroses. feel fatagud. Dolly workt at mr Livermores. mr Ballard is gone to Col o Norths. a t Robert m c Causland s .
Clear & warm. I have been at home. Dolly went to her Brothers. mr Ballard & Ephm houghing. mrs Livermore here. a t home.
Clear & very warm. I pulld flax. mr Ballard & Ep hm went to the meddow, Dolly weaving, Sally washt. Dolly Conductd Patty part of the way home. at home, pulld flax.
Clear & Cool. mr Ballard is gone to his Meddow, Dolly to Son Pollards. Eph m went help figh t fire on mr Kenadas hill, he tarried all night. a t home.
Clear. Sally weaving on mrs Pitts web. I went to See mrs Densmr. Shee has a pain in her Stomach. went from there to See mrs s m c Neel, find her better. a t mr Densmores & m c Neels.

Clear. mr Ballard Doing Business at the hook. my Girls washt foren & went to Quillt for mrs Pollard. I went to See Polly Livermore who is Siesd with S t Vites Daunce. was Calld at 11h to See Black Hitty, went by water. a t mr Livermrs & Griffins.

Clear. I have been at home. at home. 20 6 Clear. Dolly & I went to Son Pollards. Son Jon a Camethere for me to go to See his wife who is very unwell. we Swetther. I tarried all night. Sally go t Easier &had Some Sleep. a t Son Ballards & Pollards.

X. Birth [Alph s ] XX Lyons Dag t XX. Clear. mrs Moore is unwell but Consented y t I Should go to See mrs Lyon who was in labour & was Safe Deld at 8h Evn of a Dagt & I returnd to mr Moores, find her more unwell. mrs Tylor & Welman were Calld. at Moores & Lyons. Birth 42 nt . receivd 6/.

Cloudy, Snowd a little. mr Ballard & Sons attended Coart. the Jury Bro t in their verdict in y e Cause of Andrus; it was that Pollard, Berry, & Jon a Should pay 150 £ Damage, Pollard apeald. I have been at home. Betsy Densmore here. at home.
raind part y e Day. I have been at home. the Girls went to Moses Pollards. mrs Blake returnd from the west wd . a t [home].

Cloudy, raind a little a t Evn. Brother Edw d Davis Came here, bro t me a letter from Bro r Barton of 19 ins t . mr Ballard has been to y e hook & the fort. Son Town & Enoch Fuller Dind here. Polly Pollard here to have a gown made. Ephm workt for mr W m Pitt. I have been at home. at home. Deacon Davis here, brot a Letter from Bro r Barton of 19 inst.

Cloudy & Some rain. mrs Pitts here weaving. I have been at home, was informd that Son Towns Child Expird y e 10 th inst. may the triall be Sanctifyed to Eatch of us. at home. mrs Pitts got her web out & went home.

Clear. mr Livermore here this morn, threatend giting a warrent for me because I had my Turkeys put up. he Claimd them as his, accused me with Steating one of his last year. his wife Came here afterwards & Declard Shee Saw Some of my famely Drive her Turkey from here, which I find was a mistake or falshood as Every one of us Say we did not. Shee Came into our house & had a long Conversation, two much to write. Tho s Henkleys wife & her Sister made me a visit. Sally fletcher & Jane Welch here. Dolly Cut Each of them a Goun. at home, had Company.
Clear. Sally & I pulld flax. Dolly Came home, informs me her Sister Pollard is unwell. Cyrus Sleeps here. a t home pulling flax.
Clear. I help t gather Beens. mrs Pitts here, Dolly wen t home with her. Sally wove 4 yds. a Shower in y e night. a t home.

Clear, fine Day till near night when a Sea turn Came on. Esq r Eben z Haild & Lady, & mrs Strattne, Dag t Pollard & mrs Pitts Dind here. Dolly & Sally went to mr Pollards with them. I have been at home. mr Bradbury Sent me 6/ for assisting his wife Febr y 13 th . a t home. Esq r Haild &Lady here, & others.

Clear. mr Ballard went to work at mr Bullins. I have been at home. Polly mc Master here to have a Cloak & Goun made, Dagt Pollard to warp a web & Strike a Hernis. Ags ts is taking Senna, Sally watch t with him. at home. Hannah here. [2]
Cloudy part of the Day, the weather is moderated. mrs Barton Came to my Sons and I Came home a t Dusk. mr Ballard went to the hook, my famely are as well as usual. a t my Sons.
A very Severe Storm of Snow & haill. mr Voces Store, with all that was there in, Consums by fire. I have been at home. mrs Barton & Dolly at mr Densmores. a t home.

Clear. I was at mr Hinkleys till near night when I returnd home, left his wife more Comfortable. we receivd a letter of Apr l 1 st from Bro r Jon a Moore informing his famely were in health. a mrs Brown of Sandy river here. at mr Hinkleys. receivd a letter from Bro r Jon a of 1 st ins t .
Cloudy foren, Clear after n . mr Merriam Came here and I have wrote to Doc t Barton, Waters & Bror Marvin. I have been at home. a t home. wrote to Bro r Barton, Waters & Marvin.

Clear. I left Son Towns, famely as well as Could be Expected, & returnd home & went to Doc t Colmans. Bot 1/2 lb Spermaseta @ 2/, 1 oz Drag ns Blood 1/6, 2 oz of manna 2/, 1 nutmegg 1/. paid 6/ in Cash. a t Dittoes & at the hook to Doc t Colmans.

Clear fore n , Cloudy after n . I went to mr Parkers & Claps. August s Ballard is Sick at Claps. Dolly Came f m there. Lucy Doty went f m here, receivd her wages of us for what Shee had Done here. at mr Parkers.

Clear. Dolly had a faint turn. August s is no better, has kep t the bed the mos t of y s Day. a t home. [3] F Cloudy, raind a t Evn. my famely all attended worship Except my Self & Son Cyrus. Augustus went out of his room & I aird it. Son Town Came here at Evn, his famely well. the Ordinance of y e Supper administred y s Day. a t home. Dolly tarried at Son Pollards. [4]

F X. Birth Nathl Shaws Son. XX. Clear. mr Ballard & Sons went to meeting, mr Turner Performd. Sally wen t after n . Augustus Ballard was brot here y s after n . I was Calld at 8h Evn to See Nath l Shaws wife, Shee was Delivd a t 11 h 5m of a Son. I tarried all night. a t mr Shaws. Birth 44 th . I receivd 6/.

F Clear. I wrote to Bro r Collins and Sen t by mr W m Merriam who left here at 11h morn Bound for Boston. Ephm is unwell. I tarried at home. Dolly returnd from winslow, her Bror Town with her. Shee Seems Fatagud. a t home. wrote Bro r CollinsMoore. mr Merriam wen t from here.
at mr Parkers, his Lady is about house. the river is [2]

Cloudy morn. Son Town wen t to Pitts tn , returnd & went to Son Jon as . Dolly went to mr Pollards. James More here, paid me for assisting his wife in may 14, 1791. mr Ballard [Lauing] ou t a Landing at the hook by martins. a t home. Son Town went from here.

X. Birth Tim y Pages Son. XX. Clear. I returnd from mr Shaws, left them Cleverly. find Ags ts much as he was. Dolly is gone to Son Pollards. mr Bullin here y s Day. I was Calld aftern to mr Tim y Pages wife who was Safe Deld at 7 h Evn. I tarried all night, her Child was a Son which wd 11 lb 1/4. a t Shaws & Tim y Pages.Birth 45 th , for y s year & 500 th Since I Came to this Country.
rainy. mr Ballard & Cyrus gone to Town Meeting. Dolly Came home. Augustus went into the other room. I have been at home. mr Town Sleeps here. a t home. [5]
very Difacult to pass. I knitt while gone from home 2 [3]
F Clear & Cool. mr Ballard wen t to the hook to hear mr Lock. I have been a t home, feel unwell. a t home.
Cloudy & rain. I feel much more Comfortable my Self. Dolly is very unwell this forenoone. Shee went to her Sisters aftern. mrs Densmore warpt a webb of 42 yds here. a t home. Dolly to her Sisters.

Cloudy. mr Ballard went to y e fort & hook, Dolly to Son Pollards. Son Town left here homeward Bound. Cyrus & Ephm Banking house. Augustus went out of the house. I have been at home prepareing for Thanksgiving, a high SE wind & rain at night. a t home. [6]
pr Gloves and 5 pair & 2/1 mitts. the river was past on [4]
Clear & very warm. I was Calld at 9h to See the wife of Henery m c Causland who is in Labour. I was there all night. at Henry m c Causlands. [Jery] mooreinterd.

A very rainy after n . Ephm returnd about 1h pm, Son Towns famely well. Dolly wen t to work a t mr Blaks. I have been at home, Sally Spining. Son Cyrus is 37 years Old this Day. at home. Cyrus s Birth Day 37 years.

Cloudy Day, a high S E wind & rain at night. the Brig was Lancht at the fort. I have been at home Prepareing for Thanksgiving. I broke my Tea kittle. mr Ballard bog t one which Cost [4/.] at home. [7]
y e ice y s morn. [5]
Clear & Cold. mr Waid work t here. the widdow, Dolly wrode with her. mr Thwing here, his wife has a Sore Breas t . I have been at home. a t home.

Clear & warm. mr Baker here foren n . Rob t m c Causland & Hannah Cox Dind. mr Leigh tn Supt. Cyrus Came here with a Team. my Girls & mr Densmores went to mr Hinkleys. mr Ballard to Son Pollards, brot y e haslett of a Veal home from them, Ephm Some fish. I have been at home. a t home. may 9 th receivd bushel wh t of T hinkly.

X. Birth mr Greely s Dagt. XX. raind finely this morn. I was Calld at 4h morn to See mrs Greely. Shee was Safe Delivd at 8 of a fine Dagt, her Eighth Child. I tarried till 8h Evn g . Left her & infant very Cleverly. receivd 6/ as a reward. at mr Greelys. Birth 30th.
Clear & warm. I have been So unwell that I have kept my bed the most of the Day. Cyrus working for mr Capin, the Girls weaving. a t home, unwell.

X.[Birth Reads Dagt]. XX. Clear & very pleast. I was Calld a t five O Clok morn to See mrs Read who was Safe Deld of a Dag t at 9. I returnd home a t noone, left my Patients Cleverly; receivd 6/ as a reward. Son Jona, his wife & Childn all Supt with us. Pally & Jack Sleep here. mr Thomas waited on Dolly to mr Pollards. a t mr Reeds. Birth 46th.
at mr Parkers 5 Days. [6]
Clear. the fire rages on Both Sides of the river. Sally Cox is gone to my Sons, he Dind here. a t home. receivd a Letter from Sist Waters of march 4 th .
Clear. I have been at home, wed Gardin & gatherd String beens. mr Pitts Came to See about her weaving. Sally Spun Cottne. a t home. mrs Pitts here, we gatherd String Beens.

X. Birth Black hitties Son. XX. Clear. I put my Patient to Bed with a Son at 1 h , morn & returnd home about Sunrise; took a nap. mrs Liverm r Sent for me to help her Dress a blister on Pattys neck. mrs Benjamin here to have a goun made. mrs Porter, Pitts & Dagt Pollard here. mr Ballard been at the hook part of this Day. a t Grifins & mr Livermors. Birth35 th . receivd 6/ may 17 th 1795.

Clear. I Came from Jon a s to Son Pollards. my Dagts & P. Pollard went to Winslow, Sett out at noon accompanied by Jon a . mrs Pitts & I wen t aftern to See mrs Wesson & mrs Child, find her more Comfortable than Shee has been. [we] Calld on mrs Capin. a t Ditoes, mr Wessons & Child s . I tarried at Son Pollards the night.

F Clear. my Son Jon a was here, his famely are Exercisd with this Epi cal demical Cold. Sally Cox wen t to her Dads, Dolly to mr Densmores. mr Ballard to S. J. Fosters. mr Waid here. I have been at home. at home. Sally gone to her Dady s .

X. Birth James Moores Dagt. X. Clear. mrs Moore was Deld of a Dagt at 6h 30 m . I left her and infant Comfortable at noon & returnd home, find my famely well; was much fatagud. a t moores. Birth 43 d . receivd 6/9.

Clear till near night when there was a light Shower. Cyrus Conducted Patty & Jacky home. the Ship Grounded near our Landing, morn, & Fleeted & went Down after Sun Sett. I have been at home. Rufus Ballard here this Day, informs me y t his Sister Lucy was Delivd of a Son last weak & is Comfortable. Augustus Seems Dull all Day. at home.
Cloudy & Cold. mrs Holdman here to have a goun made. mrs Benjamin to have a Cloak Cut, Polly Rust after work. I was Calld to mr Parkers aftern. mr Ballard is better. at mr Parkers. mrs Holdman here.
Clear. I was Calld to Ben n Whites a t 2h morn, wrode in a Sleigh. a t Ben n Whites.
Clear & Colder. mr Ballard & sons went to hear Coart. Jon a apeald. Eph m Brot Patty home. I have been at home, have not been So well as usual. y e Coart ajournd with out day. a t home.
Clear. I have been at home. mrs Pitts got her web out & went home. Dolly Came home at Evn. mr Ballard got his hay in. at home. Cyrus Sleeps here.

Clear. Ephm & Dolly went to winslow. mr Ballard to Survey hous Lotts for mr Vauhn. I went to See Phebe Hinkley, find her Sore is giting better. Calld to See mrs Parker, Shee is more Comfortable. a t mr Hinkleys & mr Parkers.
Clear & very warm. I workt in my gardin fore n , pulld flax after n . mr Ballard finisht giting his meddow hay & returnd. Dolly made a Dress for mrs Williams. a t home, Sally Williams here.
Clear. mr Ballard returnd from Varsalbor o . Ephm is gone to Pittst n to mill, he informs he Saw the ashes of y e Church. I have been at home. Dolly made her a muslin gown & Skirt. a t home.
