X. Birth mr Dows 3 d Dag t . XX. Cloudy morn, Clear aftn. I was Calld to See mrs Dow who is in Labour at 8h morn. Shee was Delivd of a fine Dagt at 11. I left her Cleverly a t 6h Evn, receivd 6/ as a reward. Sally Densmore Sleeps here. Jacky Ballard here. a t mr Dows. Birth 41 st .
Cloudy. mr James Page here. mr Ballard paid him 6/ towards his Tax. I went to See mrs s Meloy, find her Tolerable Comfortable. Old Lady Coutch there. at [Capt] Meloys.

XX. Birth Ben n Whites XX. And X. Parkers Dagts. XX. a t Whites, his wife was Deld at 12 O Clok of a Dagt, and I was Calld back to mr Parkers. his Lady was Dild at 9h 30m of a Dagt. I am Some fatagud. Son Town here. a t Whites & Parkers. Birth 50. Birth 51.

F Snow, hail & rain. mr Parker went for his Nurs. I lef t his Lady at 4 pm, as well as Could be Expected & walkt over y e river; wrode mr Ballards hors home. I had a wrestless night by fataug & weting my feet. a t mr Parkers. returnd home.
F Clear & Cool. Cyrus & Eph m went to meeting at thee hook. Son Jon a Sleeps here. Lucy Doty Came here to work for me. I have been at home. a t home. Jon a & his Son Sleep here.

F Clear & warm. I attended worship at the hook. mr Ballard & I wen t to Cap t Meloys a t intermetion. Dolly is unwell y s Day. mr Pitts & wife here. Augustus Ballard Sleeps here. a t meeting at y e hook. mrs Duttun is Better.

F Clear. mr Ballard, my Self & two Sons attended public worship. I went to my Sons in y e intermition, their infant is unwell. I Calld to See Son Pollard, he is lame. mr Pitts is very unwell with a Cold, Dolly went there after meeting. al meeting & at my Sons.

F A very heavy rain foren, Sun Shone at 12. mr Ballard went to Meeting. Dolly is unwell Pukeing in y e night. Esq r Coney Calld here, he has been to Join mr Smith & mrs Nancy Cleark in Marriage. a t home. Doc t Cony here.

F Clear & pleast, my famely all attended Public worship. thee good old Genttlemans Discoars was adapted to the youth, more particularly from those words, Remember thy Creator in the Day of thy youth; his Exortations were Excelent. may they be Deeply impresst on their minds for their future good. a t meeting.
F Clear. we left the house alone and attinded worship at y e Academy, found Some Beef put into a window when we returnd. mr Jotham Sewell and my Son Jon a here after meeting. a t meeting at the hook.
Clear & warm. I have been at home. Dolly & Sally went to Capt Cox s . mr Ballard & Eph m mowing. Cyrus Sleeps here. at home. y e Girls to Cap t Coxs.

Clear. mr Ballard Surveying for mr m c Master. I have been a t home. Ags s Ballard wen t from here after noon. Dolly & Sally wen t to the Stores at y e hook. Anna Bullin Came here to have a Goun made. a t home. Dolly finish t her Self a Dress.
Clear. Son & Dagt Pollard & mrs Pitts here. I have been at home. a t home.
Clear. mr Ballard wen t to Survey for Col o North. I have been at home. mr Gow & Lady here al Evn. Dolly has been very unwell. a t home.

Clear & very pleast. mr Burtun & wife, mr Craig, mrs Hamlin and mr Ale r Belcher, Dagt Pollard & mrs Pitts took Tea here. I have been at home. Cyrus Bo t a t Cars 1 q t Brandy @ 2/2, 1 lb Sugar /10, Doz Bisqui t /8. paid. a t home, had Company. mr Hodges house was raisd ys Day.

X. Birth Esq r Howards Dagt. XX. Clear & Pleast. Dolly went to her Brothers. Polly Pollard Came home with her to have a Goun made. Es qr M. Howard Calld me to See his Lady who was Delivd of a Dag t at 8h 10m Evn. I tarried all night. a t Esqr Mathew Howard. Birth 49 th .

Clear. mr Ballard Surveying for mr Pollard & Page. I went to mr Finnys & Benjamins, brot my wollen web goun home & went to mr Peter Clearks. they ingagd to weav it. I Calld at Capt Meloys Store, Bot a Shall @ 5/6. he made me a present of a muslin apron. I bot at Cap t F Browns 5-2/1 pints Brandy 2/9, 3 puter poringers 4/6, paper pins /10; Total 8/1. a t Finnys & the hook. [10]

Cloudy. mr Ballard went to Pownalbor o . I have been at home. Ephm workt at mr Densmores with his Oxen. Sally washt & Scowrd puter & the floors of all the rooms. Polly Livermore here. mr Gow & his Lady here at Evng. a t home.
A very Severe Snow Storm with a heavy wind from y e Noth. I tarried at mr Pages y s Day & night, mrs Coks allso. my patients Cleverly. a t mr Pages. Feby 94 receivd 3/7_ off mr Page.
Cloudy. mr Ballard went to git his Oxen Shod. I have been at home. Bro r Town here. mr Pollard & Ezk l Page here on business. a t home. Bror Town here. [11]

rainy. mr Ballard went to his meddow. Cyrus & Ephm got a [load wood to mr Beeman. Jon a was here. I have finisht a pair of hoes for mr] [Torn page ] a t [ho ] [END OF DECEMBER 1793] Sep t 5 mr Ballard Sett out for to Survey. 7 paid to Ebenz Cole 2 Dolrs. 12 10 to mr Carter for Spirt 4/6 4 6 12 to mr Brooks for Two Stone potts 7/6 7 6 to mr Voce for 3 oz pepper /9 9 13 to J. O. Clear. I have been a t home kniting on my Ballards Legin. I began it yesterday. Dolly did hous w k , Sally Spun. a t home.
Clear & Cold. mr Ballard at mr Burtuns to Settle with him. I was a t ["home"- implied]. my Sons Carreing woo d to mr Beaman. home.

X. Birth Henry m c Causlands Son. XX. Clear & warm. I was a t mr m c Causlands, his wife s illness increast about 4h morn. her women were Calld and Shee was Safe Delivd of a Son at 6th h. I relurnd home at noon. recevd 6/ as a reward. I went to See mr Parkers [inft]. at Ditoes. Birth 29th.
rain. I have been at home. Dolly returnd from mr Blaks. a t home.
Clear. I have been at home kniting on mr Ballards Legin. at [home].
Clear. I was at home, very unwell. Dolly & Sally went to Son Pollards. a t home.
Clear Except a Sprinkling of rain. mr Ballard & Ephm workt on the road. I have been at home, wed Gardin. Sally Bleaching yarn, Cyrus Sleeps here. a t home.
Clear & very warm. I was Calld to See Wil m Hewins wife

Clear morn. two Gentlemen here bound to Sandy river, a Lady & little mrs allso. Saml Cumings rewarded me for assisting his wife may 14. mrs Densmore here foren. we had String Beans for Dinner. mr Ballard returnd at Evng. a t home. mr Ballard returnd, informd y t y e Cause of Andrews & my Son is Continued.
Clear. mr Ballard & Son giting in hay. I went to See Patty Livermore, find her a little more Composd, mrs Densmore there. Cyrus informs me y t Jonas Son Jona is unwell. a t mr Livr mrs .
Cloudy morn & Evn, Clear middle of y e Day. I left mr Pitts a t noon, Came by mr Waids, Bradburies &C. Got home a t 3 O Clock. a t Son Pollards.
Cloudy & raind a t night. I have been at home. Cyrus went to mr Wessons, Bot me 1 qu t W E Rhum. a t home.
Clear. I have been at home. mrs Parker had our hors to go & See the Negro woman Docter. mrs Densmore here, warpt 2 webs. mr Ballard writeing. at home.
Cloudy. I was a t mr Parkers and Colo Sewalls. mrs Parker unwell, Colman Bled her at Evn. at Ditoes. mrs Holdman left here.
Clear. I have at home. Did y e house work, had a pain in my head at Evn g . Ephm went to thee Meddow, put on a pair of new Trousers. mr Ballard had a pair New boots made at Beemans. at home.
Cloudy. I have been a t home, workt about house. Sally washt the west room. Cyrus went to the hook. I Sent 6/ to Susy Cleark for weaving. Ephn been to work for mr Waid. a t [h ].

F Cloudy. mr Ballard, my Self & Childn attend worship at the hook. Revd mr Turner Discoarst from those words. God is a Spirrit. I Calld at Capt Meloys after Exercise. Dolly wrode home & Sent the hors back for me. Dagt Pollard & mrs Pitts & Cap t Nichols here. at Meeting.
F Clear. I have not been So well as I Could wish. Cyrus Came home this foren n . Sally Cox went to my Son Jon a s , Dolly Came home with her. a t home. Cyrus returnd from Coart.

F X. Birth mr Poores Dagt. XX. rainy. I was Calld from mr Parkers at 2h morn to mr Poores. Doct Page was Calld before my arival. I Extracted the Child, a Dagt. he Chose to Close the Loin. I returnd home at 8 am, receivd 6/ as a reward. mr Ballard & Ephm attend worship, Dolly & Sally after n . Charls & John Coks Supt here. I was Calld to Cap t meloys at 11h Evn. raind. a t Ditoes & mr Poores. Birth 47 th . A Daugh tr at Capt Meloys allso.

E Clear & very pleast. mr Ballard, Cyrus & I attended Divine Service a t the hook. Son & Dagt Pollard & Dagt Dolly here after n . Moses Springer & Lucy Norcross, Joseph White & Sally Humphry Gardner Cryd y e last time. a t meeting.

F Snowd & raind y s fore n , Clear after n . mr Lee Preacht at the Hook bu t my famely Did not attend. mr Parker was here after n , Expres t his Desire that I Should make his Lady a visit Soon. I have read 2 of Doc t Prices Discourses y s Day. a t home. mr Parker here. Snowd y s morn.
F Clear & very warm. I was not at meting, Did not feel very well. at home.
F Cloudy. I have had a Sick Day. Mr Child Came for me to go & See his wife but I Could not. at home.
E Clear & Cold. Cap t Hersey went & brot mrs Conrey to nurs his wife. I went to mr Parkers, Judg Lithgow & Col o Howard there. a t Detoes & mr Parkers.
F Clear. mr Ballard, my Sons & Sally attended public worship at y e hook. revd mr Turner performd. mr [sic] Son Jon a here at Evn g . I have been at home. a t [ho ].
Clear. mr Waid killd a Calf for us which wd 81 lbs. mr Ballard went to his meddow, I went to See mrs Parker who is unwell. a t mr Parkers.
Clear. I was Calld at 1h morn to mr Daws at Cap t Cars.
Clear. I have been picking wool. John Jones Calld here. Dolly gone to mr Wessons. my sons are Planking the Seller where it fell in yesterday. a t home. J. Jones here. I have made a Cheese.
Clear & Pleasant. Dolly went to work at mr Hamlins. Georg Brown here. And w m c Causlin Calld me to See his wife a t Evn. at And w mc Causlands.

X. Birth Capt Meloys Dagt. XX. a t Capt Meloys, his Lady in Labour, her women Calld. (it was a Severe Storm of rain. Cleard of with Snow). my patient Deld at 8h 5m Evn of a fine Dagt, her attendants, mrs s Cleark & Duttun, Sewall & my Self. we had an Elligant Supper and I tarried all night. at Cap t Meloys. Birth 48 th . I receivd 24/.
Clear. I made Candle wiks & Dipt 27 Dozn three times over when mr Child Came for me, his wife very Sick. mrs Pollard & Patridg there. we tarried all night. a t mr Child.
Clear & very pleas t . mr Ballard & Sons have been geting wood for mr Beeman. I have been at home, Bakt & Did house work & knitt Some. Sally wove 3/4 y d , the piece is very tender. a t [ho ].

X. Birth Benjamins Son. XX. Clear morn, Cloudy, Cold Day. Snowd at night. my Patients illness Came on, her women Calld again & Shee was Safe Deld a t 7 Evn of a Son. I tarried all nigh t . mr Benjamin is absen t . A t mr Savages. Birth 1s t . receivd 6/ July 10th.
Clear & pleast. mr Ballard went to mr Gaslins to Survey for him. I have been at home. Sally wash t & washt house, Ephm to meddow for mr Kennady. at home.

Clear. I was Calld from mr Parkers to mr Williams s to See his youngest Child who is very Sick, there all night. mr Parker gave me 18/ for attending his Lady in her illness with her Las t Child. a t mr Parkers & Williams s .
Clear. I have been a t home. Dolly went to mr Devenports. a t home. mrs Anna wen t home.
Clear. I have been at home. mr Ballard wen t to Pownalbor o . a t home.
Clear. Magr Goodin Dind here. I was Calld to See mrs Daw, her Husband returnd from Boston. a t mr Daws.

Clear till near Sun Sett when i t began to rain. Cyrus Bo t a t vessel 3_ lb Cod fish, 2 bunches oinions. cost 1/2_. mrs Wickson & Becky Hardin took Tea here. I have been at home. a t home. mrs Wickson here. Snowd y s night.

Clear. I left my patients very well at 7, arivd at home a t 9h morn, receivd 7/6 as a reward. mr Ballard & Sons bringing brick from y e hook. Dolly & Polly Pollard are gone to y e Shops y s after n . a t Dittoes.

F Clear & hott, my famely all, Except my Self, attended worship foren n . I went after n , was informd that little Jon a was very ill; went to See him. Patty Town Sleeps here. a t meeting. my Son & mr [Child hi we wors ].
Clear. mrs Child Came here. I have been at home. been a t home.

Clear. I returnd from mr Pages, receivd 2/8_ in part of my fee & 6/ of W m White for going to his wife with her Second Child. the Ship which Pitt Built was Lanched y s fore n . August s is much as he was, has no appetite. Dolly & Sally a t mr Thomas s at Evng. A Dittoes. y e Ship Lanch t .
Clear & Cold. mrs Cushin here, Son Town, mr Burtun & wife allso. Dolly Came home. I have been at home. a t home. I began a Buskin.
Cloudy. mrs Gage & Son Dind here. I went to Dea cn Conys, his Dagts, Sewalls & Church there. mrs Cumings gave me a [Cup] of her [Marny]. a t Deac n Conys, his Child n there.
Clear. Dolly & I went to Son Pollards. I finisht a legin. at mr Pollards.
at 12/o Clock. Shee was very unwell. I tarryd till y e

Clear. I returnd from mr Williams s , left my Patients as well as Could be Expectd. Calld to See mrs Hersey, Shee is Comforlable. I have receivd 9/ of Cap t Hersey as reward for my Servec & 15/ of mr Williams. I Calld at mr Parkers, his Lady made me a pres t of 1_ yds ribbin, her infant is better. a t Ditos, Cap t Herseys & mr Parkers.
T 12 th when I left her more Comfortable & Came home. a t mr Hewins three Days. mr Sualls Childwas interd.

Clear & very warm. mr Ballard is gone to y e meddow, Ep m allso. Dolly went to Capt FilleBrowns. Sally is gone to her Dads. I was at Deacon Conys, they are well; gave me Some Apples. Cyrus informs me that Son Jonas Son is better, has had a Number of Larg worms past from him after takeing the Pink root & Senna after it. a t mr Hewuns.

E Clear & very Pleasant Candlemas. mr Ballard only of my famely attended worship in public. Son Town & wife & youngest Child, Son & Dagt Ballard & Childn, Son Pollard & Dagt here. a t home. my Child n here.

Clear morn, raind a little at Evn. Ephm went to Mathew meddow & returnd with his load at 11h morn. I went to Doct Colmans & Bo t medesin for which I paid 7/6. Calld at mr Childs, Pollards, Pitses & Son Pollards. Jonas wife & Child n Came home with me. Dolly is very unwell. at Doc t Colmans & other Neighb s .
Clear & very Cold. I have been at home. mr Ballard & Eph m went to mont Vernon for hay. at home.
Clear. I was a t Ditoes & mr Cars Fillebns. I finisht [Dollys] Stockins. a t Dittos.
rainy. Thunder at Evn. I have been picquing wool. my Sons finish t Planking y e Seller. a t home.
Clear & very Pleast. I was a t Ditoes, & James M c Causlands, my Patient, unwell with a Disentary. at Ditoes.
Clear. I returnd home after Dineing. Revd mr Turner and Esq Cony Sup t here. I was Calld to mr Parkers at 11 Evn. a t Ditoes & mr Parkers. mr Turner here.

Birth John Badcks Dagt. Clear. I mrs Childs a little Easier. I was Calld to John Badcoks to See his wife at 1h pm. Shee was Safe Deld of a Dagt at 9. I tarried all night, mr [sic] patient as well as Could be Expected; the Negro Doctres there. a t Ditoes & Badcoks. Birth 53 d . mrs Childs had Doct Cony with her this night.

rainy. mr Ballard went to his meddow. Cyrus & Ephm got a [load wood to mr Beeman. Jon a was here. I have finisht a pair of hoes for mr] [Torn page ] a t [ho ] [END OF DECEMBER 1793] Sep t 5 mr Ballard Sett out for to Survey. 7 paid to Ebenz Cole 2 Dolrs. 12 10 to mr Carter for Spirt 4/6 4 6 12 to mr Brooks for Two Stone potts 7/6 7 6 to mr Voce for 3 oz pepper /9 9 13 to J. Clear bu t windy. I left my Patients as well as Can be Expected & returnd home at 10h morn. mr Ballard is gone to Varsalboro. mr Bullin bro t us Some Beef, he Dind here. mr Ballard returnd at [11]. mr Town Sleeps here. a t Detoes.

Cloudy, rain a t night. mr Ballard returnd. mr Town Sleeps here. I have been at home. Margarett Foot here, Desird me to go & See mrs Norcross who s Breast is Soar. Ephm at his Brothers, Jacky is Sick. a t home. Son Town here.
Clear. I was Calld from mr Wil mss to mr Parkers to See his infant who is unwell, returnd to mr Williams s . mrs s Fletcher & Ingerham watcht. a t Ditoes.

Birth Josep Savages Dag t . Clear. mrs Savage was Safe Deld of a Dagt a t 2 h morn. I left her as Comfortable as Could be Expected at 6, and Came to my Sons. find his wife a little better. I tarried there this Day & night. at [Ditoes & my Sons]. Birth 7 th .
Clear. mr Ballard a t Doct Conys. I have been at home. mr Gow & his wife here to have a Goun Cutt out for her. a t home. mr Gow [&] wife here.
Clear & warm. mr Ballard Sett out for Canaan to Do Business for ma gr Goodin. I Came home from mr Daws. Dolly & Sally wen t to quillt for mr Baxter. a t Ditoes. the girls went to mr Baxters.
Clear. I was Calld to James Moores, his wife unwell. mrs Tylar and mrs Welman there all night. a t James Moores.

Clear. Son Pollard brot my Dagt here to warp a web, Polly went home with him. mr Poor Calld me to See his wife who is not so well as Could be wisht, find mr Livermores Sons Laying a hearth in our kitchen. the Bridg acrost the Gully was Coverd y s Day. at mr Poors, mrs Greely there.

Birth Son Towns Son & 9 th Child. Clear. mrs Child here till after n . Son Town Came for me a t 2h pm. I went forward as Soon as posable. Crost the ferry at 3, arivd at Son Towns at 7. Shee my Dagt was Safe Deld of a Son at 7h 30m. mrs Stackpl, Strat n & mrs [sic]. a t Son Towns. Birth 40th, of which 27 are Sons.
Clear. Doc t Parker here, left augustus 2 grns Tartar Emitic. I have been at home. mr Ballard been to Lecter. a t home. Doc t Parker here to [vis t] Agustus.

A Clear day, overcast Evn g . Dolly & Sally washt & washt all the floors & went to mr Densmores at Evn g , Eph m with y m . he has Sleighded wood to market this Day. I have been at home. at home. my Girls at mr Densmores.
Clear. mrs Cushin here, had a gown made. I have been at home. Ephm brot the las t of our Hay from y e meddow. a t home. Son Town Sleeps here.

Clear part of y e Day. I have been at home Carding Cottne. mr Ballard went to the hook, brot 12 yds Cloth which mrs Cleark wove. I Sent little Jacky & La faett Some mitts. a t home. Cyrus brot our Small hand irons from mr Savages.

F Clear. our Child n all here y t are in y s Town, mr Pitts & his wife & mrs S. Williams. I was Calld at Evn to See mr Deckmans Child who has a Swelling on y e Throat, mrs s Pollard, kimbal & Capin there. at mr Dickmans to See a Sick Child. Dolly went home with Jon a .

Cloudy. mr Ballard Surveying y s morn for Col o Duttun, to Town meeting aftern. mr Waid & Son Jona Butcherd a Cow for us, the wt 489. I Cleand y e heels, Tripe & tryd the Tallow before I Slept. a t home. we killd a Beef.
Clear. Son Town & Dagt went home with Jon a & wife. Jack is very well. L Faett is very unwell. I have been at home. mr Ballard up Street. a t home. my Child n to Jonas.
rain, haill & Snow this Day and night. I have been at home. at home. wrote to Sis t Waters.
Clear. I went to mr Densmores and Livermores with mrs Cumings. Sally Came home. a t D & L mores.
Clear morn, Cloudy aft n . Dolly is more Comfortable. Doct Wil ms here a t Evng. I have been at home. mr Ballard & Sons got wood. Jona Sleeps here. At home. Doc t William s here.
Clear. mr Ballard a t mr Nores s Surveying. I was Calld at 7 Evn to Moses Sewals wife in Labour. mrs Cleark, Greely & 2 mrs s Duttuns assistants. a t mr Moses Sewalls.

Clear & Pleast. we are makeing Soap. mr Thad s Snell was here, Gave me 7/4 as a reward for attending his wife in Child Birth Jany 14th, 1793. my son Jon a was here, informs me his wife is unwell. I sent her Some medisin. mr Freeman here, had 3 Sheets, Dead Blanks, to Carry to mr Ballard. informs me he was well last first Day. I have been at home. at home. heard f m mr Ballard. funeralJohn Badcks wife.

X. Birth mr Morgins Dag t . XX. Clear. I was Calld from Col o Sewalls to See mrs Morgin. Shee was Deld of a Daugt r at 4 h Pm. I returnd to mr Pollards, tarried there y s night. a t Does & mr Morgins. Birth 12 th .receivd 6/. first Born.

Clear. I Came home from mr Daws, left her more Comfortable. Calld at mr Dumers, his in ft has y e thrush. Wil m Hurd, his wife & Sis t Betsy, & mr Meriam Sleep here, bro t me a letter from Doct Barton which informs Cap t Learneds wife is Dead. mrs Voce & Betsy Dind. mr Ballard returnd from Surveying. a t Ditoes. I receivd a Letter from Doc t Barton of augs t 15, '93.
Cloudy part of the Day. I have been at home. Sally washt. I have piqu t wool & Cottne, had 2 lb of Butter of mrs Pollard. a t home.
Snow & rain. I was at m c Causlands. a t Ditos.
Cloudy. I was a t mr Parkers. a t mr Parkers.

Cloudy morn, a Snow Storm aftern. I returnd to mr Childs, his wife very ill. I was Calld at Evn to mr Pollards to See mr Blak & [Davids] Childrn, they are ver [torn page]. at mr Childs & Pollards. mrs Dickmans Child [Expird] yester[night].
Clear & Cold. mr Ballard at Coart. Son Town Sleeps here. I have been at home. Sally Cox went to her Dads with her Bror John. Ephm Sleding wood to Town. a t home.
rainy. I was Calld to Son Jona s to See his oldest Son who has y e Canker. there all night, y e Child very sick. a t Son Jona s , his Child Sick.
Clear. I was a t mr Williams s , he went to Jons s Plantation; his Child very Sick. I tarrid all night. a t mr Wilms s .

Clear & more Pleast. I left Jona s wife So well as to Sett up Some & bro t her oldest Son home with me. mr James Page & Silv a Moore Dind here. mr Ballar d went to Varsalboro at Evng. Eph went to School to mr D. Livermore. a t my Sons.

Clear morn, Some rain afternn. I Sett out to go to mr Burtuns, it began to rain before I got as far as Son Pollards and I Calld there, tarried a little while & returnd home. Cyrus went for Dolly, brot Her home in mr Hamlins Slay. at Son Pollards. I am informd y t mrs Hardin wove 1_ yds this Day, & 3 y next day.
Clear. mr Ballard a t the hook, bo t 4 milk Pans @ /9. Dolly went to her Bror s , his oldes t Son is very unwell. I have been at home, gatherd ripe Beet Seeds & one Cucumb r . a t home.

Clear. Sally Came home, washt the west room. I was Calld to See mrs Benjamin, Shee has a pain in her Stomach. I walkt there & home, feel much fatagud. Dolly is at Son Pollards, he Came home [yesterday]. a t Bizer Benjamins.

Clear. mr Ballard gone to Survey for Es qr Petingail. Dat Pollard went home. I went to the hook. mrs Poor is yet low. mr Lathrop paid me my fee for attending his wife y e 19 th of march Last. a t the [hook].
rainy. at Colo Sewalls. at Ditoes.

Birth Eliab Shaws Dag t . Snowd. I was Calld Early y s morn to Eliab Shaws, his wife was Safe Dild of a daught at 1h pm & I returnd home. wrode there, & home, on Saml Braleys Slead. I Calld at my Sons, his Child is Better. Dolly is at mr Hamlins. I began a Cottne Stockin. a t Eliab Shaws. Birth 4th. April 29,1795, receivd of Son Jona on Shaws acount, 3/.
rainy. I have been at home, made Pies. Dolly weaving on Jona s web. mr Ballard bro t Corn, Wheat, Tea & Sugar home. a t home. made [mins] Pies.

Clear part of y e Day. Dolly had Two Lambs Come y s morn. Ep hm went to take Care of y m , found one with the Entrales all out, brot it in y e hous. Sally & my Self put them in to y e boddy again, Sewd up the breatch; it Suckt & walkt afterwards. mrs Patty Bullin Came here. mr Waid & Robbins workt here, they got wood to the hook. Cyrus went there for Some things for me. at home.

E X. Birth Isaac Hardin Dag t . XX. Clear. mr Ballard, my Self & Eph m attended worship foren. I Dind at Cap t Meloys, was Calld out of meeting, in y e first prayer, to mrs Hardin. Shee was Safe Deld of a Dag t at 5. I was Conducted home by mr James Page, arivd at 10. a t Isaac Hardins. Birth 10th. mr JamesPage Sleeps here. fee recd may 20.

Clear & pleast. mr Page & mr Ballard went to Doct Conys, returnd & Dind. mr Ballard Sett out to Survey land for Rhuben Fairfield & others. Ephm went as far as mr Ben n Browns to take our hors home again. a t home. mr Page went home. mr Ballard to Surveying.

Clear & pleast. Selve Moore & others Sett out to assist mr Ballard in his Surveying. Cyrus went to take the hors home his Dady wrode. I have been at home, workt in my Gardin Seting Currant Bushes &C. at home. thunder & rain in the night.

X. Birth mr Hamlins Dagt. XX. Clear. I was Calld at 6h morn to See mrs s Hamlin, Shee was Deld of a Dagt at 7h & 20m. I Spent the most of ye Day with her. I went to See mrs Dickmans Child, find it very Sick; the Lady had a fitt. mrs Pollard was there. I left mrs Hamlin & infant very Comfortable & returnd home at Evn. mr Livermors Laid a floor in our kitchen. a t mr Hamlins. Birth 52 nt . receivd 12/ Feby 5th 1794 of mr Haml n .

Clear. mr Town Came here, brot his Dagt Polly. Dolly & Sally went to Shubal Pitts s with him. he & his wife returnd here to Sleep. I finisht kniting Pollys hoes and roasted a Turkey & washt hankercfs. at home. Son & Dagt Town & Patty Sleep here.

Clear but very Cold for march. Eph got 1 Load wood to mr Burtun, his Oxen pesterd him So he quitt work aflern. this is y e anniversary of Son Jon a s Birth. a t home. Son Jon a is 31 yearsold this Day.
Clear & Pleas t . I have been at home. mr Ballard went to Winthrop, my Sons got wood. at home.

X. Birth Moses Sewals Dag t . XX. Cloudy morn. mrs Sewall was Deld of a fine Daugt at 12 m past midnight & is Cleverly. I tarried thro y e night. mr Sewall gave me as a reward 1_ y d mode, 2 Skeins Silk, 1 oz thread, a paper & Card of pins. Dolly with her Brors & Sisters Sett out for winslow. A t Detoes. Birth 6th. Ben n Porter Sleeps here. Sally goes to her Bro rs Weding.
Clear & Pleast. I have been at home makeing Soap, have filld one Bar l . I Sell up very late to finish it. a t home.

X. Birth James Hinklys Son. XX. Clear. I was Calld to mr Patridges to See Patty M c neere who has y e Collic & fitts. Calld from there to Colo Sewalls, from there to James Hinkleys Jun r , his wife was Deld at 11h Evn of a Son, her firs t Child. I tarrid all night. the wrideing is very Bad. the fresh t over the Bridges at y e hook. a t Ditoes Colo Sewalls& others. Birth 13 th . receivd 6/. her firstBorn.
Clear. Son Town Left here for home. mrs Pollard made me a visit. mr S.J.Foster here. mr Ballard returnd from mg r Goodins. I have been a t home. at home. Son Town wen t home.
Cloudy Day, raind at night. mr Ballard attended a Church meeting. I have been at home. our friends from Oxford left here. a t home.

Clear & pleast. I finish t picking my wool & Scoured all the woolin yarn I have got Spun. mr Ballard returnd from Surveying for mag r Goodin. Hannah Coks Drank Tea here. a t home. mr Ballard returnd. Han h Coks here.

Cloudy & misty. I returnd home, left my patient more Comfortable, find my husband Confind with an ague in his face. Augustus is better. Dolly went to Benjamins, Sally to Shubal Hinkleys. I Calld to See mrs Daw & mrs Beamans Child. a t Ditoes.
Cloudy morn, Clear of at night. I was at mr Parkers, mrs Cowan there, Hannah North allso. at Ditoes.
Clear [torn page]
E Clear & very Pleas t . my famely all attended worship in public. I wen t to mr Pitts s at intermition. a t meeting.
Clear & Cold. mr Ballard a t Coart. I have been at home. we Bakt Some Pies. David Smyle & Town Sleep here. Ephm Sleding wood to Town. a t home.
very rainy. at my Sons. we procurd Cold water Root for the Child, he Seimd to mend. La Faet is not So well as Could be wisht. a t Ditoes.
Snowd. I was at mr Williams s . he returnd with James Bennet, a Prisner. a t Ditoes.

X. Birth Wil m Swantons Son. XX. Clear till Evn when it Snowd. I was Calld at 1 h pm to See mrs s Swanton who Deld at 7 of a Son, her Second Child. I went to See Cap t Savage who is unwell. Calld allso to See mr Williams s Dagt who remains very weak. Came home about 11h Evn g . I receivd 6/ as a reward. a t mr Swantons. Birth 8th.

Clear & very Pleas t . I wen t to mr Burtuns, made a visit there & at mr Crages; returnd at Evng. Dolly went with others to y e hook as a Spectator to their Singing School. mrs Burtun gave me a Kenester. a t mr Burtuns & Crages. Doc t Ward & Polly Bullen Married.

Clear. Dolly went to Shepherds, Bo t a Goun patron for Sally Cocks a t 4/ pr yd; at Cap t Fille browns b t me a 1/2 lb Shush n Tea, 2/9 & 3 lb Sugar @ 1/4 - 4/. mr Ballard is gone to mr Bisbes, Cyrus to pitts tn . at home.

X. Birth Nat n Burg ss Son. XX. Clear. mr Ballard went to Varsalbor o . I was Calld to See the wife of Nathan Burges who was Safe Deld (tho very ill indeed) at 11h Evn of a fine Son. I tarried all night. my patients are as well as Can be Expected, her husband is at Sea, if living. a t Nalh n Burges s . Birth 17th. a firs t Born. receivd 6/.
Clear. mr Ballard went to Winslow. I was ["a t home" - implied] a t home.
Clear. I was Calld to mr Parkers. a t mr [Parkrs].
Snowd. a t Ditoes. mrs Con r bro t there. at Ditoes.

X. Birth Jasson Butlers Dag t . XX. Clear & Pleast. mr Ballard wen t to Survey Land for mr Gilley. I was Calld at 5h Evn to See thee wife of Jason Butler at y e hook. Shee was Safe Deld of a Dagt a t 5h 50m, and I tarried all night & nurst her. receivd 6/ as a reward. a t mr Butlers. Birth 5th.
Clear. I have been at home, Carding Tow for Sally to Spin. Ephm Bro t Bords & Hay from Colo Howard. mr Wessons Vessel arivd at the hook y s Day. at home.

E Clear. I returnd home & went to meeting, we all went but Cyrus. I went to mr Seth Williams s after Exercises, his Sick Dagt is very Low. I Calld to Sam Pollards, they are well. find Dolly very unwell, Balht her feet & gave her herb Tea. a t Butlers, Hamlins, William ss ,Son Pollards and at meeting. Doc t Ward &Patty Bullins Cryd the first time.
Clear & Cold. mr Ballard & Waid and Ephm giting wood to mr Beaman & our Selvs. Dolly went to Col o Sewalls. Sally washt. I have been at home. a t home. Dolly at Colo Sewalls.

Clear till after n . mr Ballard at Doct Coneys. I was Calld to See Rol d Smiths wife who is unwell. I Calld at mr Beamans & P. Norcros s & T. Kennys. I bot an Earthen Vessel, price 1/. at [Han] Clearks.

Clear & very pleast. mr Hamlin & wife & mrs Rockwood, & Son & Dagt Pollard Dind here. went to Son Jona s aftern, Ephm, Dolly & Sally with them. Dolly tarries at mr Hamlins. a t home. mr hamlin & others here. Dolly tarries there this night.
Clear. mrs Densmore Dind here. William work t here. I have Sowd parsnips, Beets, Carrotts, Onions & Sett out Beets & parsnips for Seed, Dugg Beds, &C. a t home. mrs Densmore here.

rainy. I have been at home, am informd y t mr Ballard found the Snow 4 feet deep when he arivd at the place of Destination for begining his Tour of Surveyings. Cyrus has been to the hook, had 1 Bushl indin Corn, 1 Dito of wheat of Esq r Dumer. at home, had news f m mr Ballard.
Cloudy, Snowd aftern. I have been at home, Did house work. Sally Spun. at home.
Cloudy & very windy. Son & Dagt Town & y r Childn left here home ward bound. I fear they have Suferd with y e Cold. I have been a t home, felt very unwell. a t home. my Child n went from here.

Clear & Cold. mr Partridg Came for Dolly to go there to work, Shee went. mr Burtun here, wants a west coat made. mr Hamlin Sent me 12/ by mr Patridg. mr Ballard attended the funeral of mr Williams Child. Bror Town, his wife & his Son m c Causland Sleep here. I have been at home. a t home. mr Balld attended Funeral of mr Williams s Dagt.

E Clear till near night when we had a Shower. Shubal Pitts was here, his wife is Some more Comfortable. he Borrowd Some Pork of me. Dolly Came home. I have been at home. Sally & I Bakt pumkin pies & wheat bred. a t home.

Cloudy, raind at night. mr Wad Calld me to See his wife who had an ill turn. I Sett up with her y s night. mrs Hodgis Dag t & Polly Pollard, Polly Page & Sally Williams were here. my Dag t had two webs warp t . at mr Waids. Dagt Pollard here.

Clear & Pleas t . Son Jona Came for his wife & Child n . Dolly & Sally went to Son Pollards with them. I have been at home, receivd a Letter from Sister waters which informs my friends are well. a t home. receivd a Letter of Jany 15 f m Sister Walers.

Some Snow & a very Chilly air. Sally returnd from weding a t Evng. Bror Eben z Dind & mr Livermore Supt here. it is a Cold, Slormy night. I am 59 years old this Day. I was Calld a t 11 h Evn to Joseph Savages wife, her women with her. a Josph Savages.

X. Birth James Savages Son. XX. Clear morn, Cloudy aflern. I was Calld a t 8h morn to See the wife of James Savage, Shee was Safe Deld of a fine Son at 1h pm. I left her Comfortable & returnd homewd as far as my Son Jona s , arivd there at 7h Evn, tarried all night. my Dag t is a little more Comforlable than Shee was. a t James Savages. Birth 11th. mr SavgSent me 2 Bushl Corn to my Sons.
Clear. I Came from mr Hinkleys, Calld at home & returnd to Col o Sewalls. a t Hinkleys & Col o Sewalls.
Clear & Cool. I have been at home. this is the day appointed for a Fas t . a t home.

Cloudy part of y e Day. mrs Pitts is here. I have made her a Syrrip of Comphry, Plantain, Agrimony & Soloman Seall leavs. mr Gersham Cocks & his Sister & Sally Hussey here. I have workt a little in my Gardin. at home. mr Gersh Cocks here.
Clear. I have been at home. mr Ballard went to mr Browns, bot Some Tallow. Eph m made a pen & put up 3 [Turkeys]. a t home.
Cloudy morn, Clear at noone. I Came home, find my famely well. mr Ballard gone to winslow. a t Ditoes.
[torn page]
Clear. mr Ballard a t Coart. mr Bullin & wife here. I have been at home. mr Town Sleeps here. Cyrus & Ephm at Coart. a t home. [18]

X. Birth Capt Herseys Dagt. XX. Snowd y e morn. Capt Hersey Calld me to See his wife about Day. we got Safe over the river, the freshet rose & it Broke up. his wife Safe Deld at 7 h Evng of a Dagt, all like to do well. a t Cap t Herseys. Birth 2 nt .

X. Birth Seth Williams s Dagt. XX. Clear. mrs Williams in travil & was Safe Deld of a Dagt at 7h 40 m Evng. I tarried all night. Betsy is Some more Comfortable. mrs Williams & infant are Cleverly. at Ditoes. Birth 3 d .
Clear & very pleast. Ephm workt for mr Kennady. mr Cyrus went to Capt Filly Browns, Bo t me 14 lb flower, gave 2/5, G Bd /2. mr Patridg & wife Calld here a t Evn g . I have been at home. a t home.
Cloudy. mrs Child & her Dagt here, mr Child Came at Evn. Cyrus Conducted them home. I began a Stocken for Ephm. at home. mrs Child here.

Clear. I have been at home. Doct Coney Calld here. mr Ballard went to y e hook. I had a Severe pain in my head at Evng & greatly opprest with wind in my Stomach. had got So much Ease as to Sleep when I was Calld by moses Springer to See his Lady. a t mr Moses Springers.

Cloudy. I Came from mrs Burges s at 9h morn. mr Ballard has been to y e hook. Cap t Bouland of unity & Reubin Fairfield Dind here. Dolly went to mr Bisbes. Sally & I workt Some in the Gardin. Jason Livermore Junr took Curren t Sprouts of our Land with out Leav. I Calld him back & he gave y m back. we Sett them & others out in y e Gardin. a t Dittoes.

Clear & warm. I was Calld to mr Densmores Twice y s Day to See their younges t Child who has Swallowed Some Boiling hott Coffee. it Seeme Easier at Evn. Harmon Barton Came here with Ephm & Ezra. Dolly is gone to her Br r Pollards. at mr Densmores to See his Babe who is Scolt in its mouth & throat.

Cloudy & Some rain. Dolly returnd from her Bror Jona s . Sally Cocks went to the hook. Shuball Pitts Sleeps here, his wife has been not so well this Day. I have been working in my Gardin, Sowd Beets. at home. mr Pitts Sleeps here.
Clear. mr Ballard returnd. all well at Son Towns. I have been at home. a t home.
at Ditoes. [at Dittoes].
Clear, moderate Day. mr Ballard has wrote part of y e Day, wen t to Coart aftern. I have been at home. Cyrus attended Coart. Ephm Sliding wood to Pitt. mr Baxter returnd from Boston. a t home.

X. Birth Col o Sewalls Dag t . XX. Clear. mrs Sew Calld us up at 1h ys morn. mrs Pollard & Voce Calld at 6h morn. mrs Sewall was Diliv d of a Dagt before they got inn & is Cleverly. mr Ballard Calld there & Dind. I Came from there at 2h pm. Calld at Son Pollards & Spent ye rest of y e after n . arivd at home at 7, feel fatagud. Dolly tarries at Son Pollards y s night. a t Ditoes. Birth 15th. recd 8/3. her fifth Child.
Clear & warm. Colo Duttuns Lady Calld to See me. I have Planted Cucum rs & Squash and & mellon Seeds. mr Ballard wen t to mr Wessons. we have plantd Corn. Dolly returnd from mr Hamlins. at home.

Cloudy the most of y e Day. Son Town Dind here. Capt Meloys Lady here on a visit. Cyrus went to winthrop for 1/2 Doz n Chairs for Dolly. Shee Came home at Evig from Son Pollards, is fatagud. mrs Pitts had a feavour at Evng. I have work t in my Gardin, Sowd Beets. a t home. Son Town here. mrs Pitts is very unwell.
E Cloudy foren. mr Ballard and Cyrus & Ephm went to meeting. mr Pitts Dind here. I was Calld to mr Phillip Norcors s wife who is in Labour, her women Calld. a t Phillip Norcros s .
E Clear. Dagt Pollard Dind here. Dolly & Sally went home with her. we had a Legg of Pork, Stuft, & Calvs head & feet to Dine on. a t home. Dagt Pollard here.

E X. Birth mr Gows Son. XX. Clear & warm. mr Ballard went to Church at Pittst n . I was Calld at 3h pm to mrs Gow who was in Labour. I walkt there. Shee was Delivd of a Son, her first Child, at 5 h 30 m and I returnd home at 10 in y e Evng. at mr Gows. Birth 27th. receivd 6/7 d .a firs t Born.

Birth mr Waids Dag t . Cloudy. mr Beaman was here, Desird me to Go & See his Lady; left his hors for me to wride. I went & Dind with her. went to See mrs Carr, find her much More Comfortable; her husband is Some Better. I Calld to See mrs Fillebrown, Shee is Cleverly. I was a t mr Fesandans Store, bo t 4 lb Cottne @ 2/4, 1 pr Shoes 4/. a t Jery Dmrs bot 2 yds Duran t @ 2/9. Came back to mrs Beamans, was Calld by mr Waid to See his wife who was in Labour, & was Safe Deld at at [sic] 10 h Evn of a Dagt. I tarried all night. a t mr Beamans & others at hook, from there to mr Waids. Birth 19th. we had a Colt from our mare y s Day.

Cloudy. I went to mr Selvesters, bot 6 lb Tamrinds, Cost 6/; 3 lb Cottne @ 3/; & 3 lb Sugar @ 1/. to mr Beamans, Shee is Cleverly. made me a present of 2 qurts of Vinegar. Bot at mr Danys 1 Jugg 1/, one Pott 1/, one Dt o /9, 2 pans @ 6 d . paid the Cash. at the hook. mrs Holdman here.

X. Birth Phillip Norcros s Dag t . XX. Cloudy. mrs NorCros was Safe Deld of a Dagt at 1 h 30 m morn. I left her before noon as well as Could be Expected, receivd 6/. Sally & Dolly washt. Dolly was very Sick all night, had a pain in her Ears. a t Ditoes. Birth 23 d .
Clear. mr Ballard & y e Boys have been Cuting Bushes. Cyrus went to winslow. Sally washt & Scourd & Bakt & washt 2 floors. I have been Sewing Raggs together. at home.

X. Birth Son Pollard Daug t , first Born. XX. Clear. I was Calld a t 9 h morn to my Daughter Pollard who was in Labour, found her very ill. her women were Calld (mrs Pollard, Capin, Black, Hamlin & Burtun) and Shee was Safe Deliverd a t 1 h Pm of a Daugh t , her firs t Born, and I tarried with her allnight. Shee is Cleverly. mr Ballard went to Survey for Doc t Parker. at Son Pollards. Birth 28th. Dolly Calld to See her Sister.

Clear & very Cold. mr Ballard workt in his Shop, Ephm for mr Wade. Sally wen t to help mrs Pollard quillt. I have been at home. Charls & John Cox & mrs Patty Goodin here. Dolly Came home from Col o Sewalls. a t home. young Company here.

Clear & Pleasant. Dolly went to work a t mr Hamlins. I was Calld to See Mr Hodges s Child, Shee has been much Exercisd with Pain but is Easier. I am informd that the boddy of a young Girl by y e name of Tilton was found in the woods in Varsalboro. it is Suspected that a Negro by y e name of Edmond Fortis was y e perpetrat r . the Coroner was Calld from this Town. a t mr Hodges & Son Pollards. A Girl found Dead, it is thougt was Murderd.

Cloudy. Dolly very full of Pain in her Ears. we Batht her feet. mrs Pitts went home, Shee is very feeble. I have been at home transplanting Parsnips & doing other work in my Gardin. mrs Densmore here. at home. mrs Pitts went home. mrs Densmore here.
Clear. I have been at home, work t very hard in my gardin. planted Beens & Cucumbers & Sowd Beets, Carrots, Parsnips, Safron, Radishes, Onions &C. at home.

Clear. I have been a t home. my Girls wint to mr Blacks to quillt. I plant mellon Seeds & Beens. my Sons yoakt & ringd our piggs, & turnd them ou t , made a pen for ym. a t home. Sally Wil ms here a t Evn g .
Clear. mr Ballard & Eph m went to the meddow. I have been at home. a t home. y s [is] y e anneversary of my [marriag].

Cloudy. Bro r Town & others went home. I was Calld at 11 h to See the wife of mr Roland Smith who was in Labour. I was there all night. Bror Ebenz Moore Slept here on his way to Oxford. Snowd at night. a t mr Smiths, his wife was ill.

Cloudy foren. I walkt home, left mrs Waid more Comfortable. mr Arthur Densmore Sowd flax & wheat for us. Sally Williams made me a Bunit. mrs Livirmore & Polly & Phebe Hinkley here. Son Town Sleeps here, his famely are well. a t mr Waids. we had Company. mrs Livermore, Son Town here.

Cloudy part of y e Day, rain aftern. I have workt in my Gardin & Doubled hoes y n , & knit Some. Sett Some french Turnips. mr Ballard made plan, the Boys Cutt bushes, James had a brother Calld to See him from y e westwd. at home. James Sturges Brother here. y e Boys Cut Bushes.

Cloudy foren. Charls Cocks Came a t 11 h morn for Sally to go to his Dads, his Brother Gershom is very Sick, his Life is Dispard of by his friends. I have been at work in my gardin this fore n , Sett Some Cabbag & Turnips. I wen t to Son Pollards, find my Dag t but feeble. I was at mr Wessons Store, bot 1 lb Coffee @ 1/4, _ lb Brim stone /4, 1 oz Sinnamon /9, 7 gills Ginn 1/9, 1_ lb raisans @ 1 1/3, Snuff /2. at Doc t Colmans, 2 oz Spermaseta, 2 oz manna, _ oz myr, Do alloes 1/2, Vial & Salts, Camphr _ oz. a t home. a t Son Pollards & other Neighbors.
Cloudy part of ye Day, Snowd at Evn g . mr Livermore Butcherd two Swine for us which waid 445 lb. I have been at home. At home. Dolly md her muff & tippit.
Clear. I was at mr Savages, her women all tarried all night. a t Dittoes.
Cloudy, Some rain Early y s morn. I Came home from my Sons, the roads are bad. I walkt Down y e hill beyend Jones s mill. at my Sons.
I was at Colo Sewalls. the river opend at y e fort on

E Clear. Mr Ballard, Cyrus & Ephm attended worship at y e hook. I have felt very dull. mrs Densmore Sent Some roas t pigg to Dolly. Shee is at her Bror Pollards, returnd a t 6 o Clok. at home. Dolly Came home fr m Son Pollards.

Clear & pleast. mr Ballard is gone to mr Bisbe s . mrs Pitts & Hitty Pierce here. I have been at home. Sally went to y e Stores with mrs Pierce. I finisht futing a pair hoes for mr Ballard. a t home. mrs Pitts & Pierce here.
Cold. at Capt Herseys, he was Seeking a nurs & transporting women home. I tarried all night, my patients Cleverly. a t Ditoes.
Clear. I wash t y e west room floor. Dolly got a web to work, Sally wove Some, about 2 yds. a t home.

Cloudy & moderate. I went to mr Shepherds; was at mr M. Sewalls, his Lady is got out of y e Cham r . at mr Smiths, his Lady is as well as can be Expected. I went to mr Densmores & Spen t aftern. Dolly been at her Bro r Pollards. a t the hook & mr Densmores. Georg Brown here this Day. I have finisht a pair Cot n hoes.

X. Birth Moses Springers Son. XX. Clear. I was at mr Springers, his Lady was Deld at 5 h 27 m morn of a Son. I lefe her & inft very Comfortable & returnd home at 11h. I went on to y e bed & Slept. mr Ballard been to y e hook. Betsy Voce was here. a t Ditoes. Birth 16 th . recd 7/6. a first Born.

X. Birth James Kenne ys Dagt. XX. rainy. Doc t Williams Dind here. mr Ballard is gone to mr Thomas s , a Law Seut there between mr Peter Parker & Colo Sewall. I was Calld a t 2h Evn to See James Kenneys wife who was in Labour, & was Delivd at 11h of a Dagt; her husband was absent. I tarried all night, had no Sleep. a t James Kenneys. Birth 18 th .
Clear & warm. I have been helping about house & Sewing. James Sturgess Brother here. Sally went to See Densmr s Child. Ep m & Ezra wen t to Son Jon as . a t home. Dolly returnd.

Clear morn, A fine Shower aftern. I was at mr Densmores to See his Dag t Dorcas who has a Soar throat. we gave her Cold w tr root Tea & a fue drops Viteral. I finish t kniting my Stockins. at mr Densmo to See Dorcas.
E Clear & pleas t . Dolly wrode up the wood road y s morn. Moses Pollard & wife & Hitty Pierc here. I have been at home. we Cook t a Legg of Pork. a t home. Son & Dag t Pollard here.

E Clear & very Coal for y e Season. mr Ballard returnd from Washington. Betsy & Lidia Densmore here, inform me Dorcas is better. Dolly Came home from mr Pollards. I Coverd my plants for fear of a frost. a t home. a Cold Day.

E Cloudy & moderate. we all attended worship y t were at home. mr Ballard was absent. Seth Hollowel & Tylors Dagt were Publisht y e first time. Revd mr Turner Discoars t from Luke 12 C 15 Verse, beware of Covetousness. a t meeting & all my famely who wereat home. text Luke 12 C 15 Verse.

E Clear & pleast morn. I left my Patients Cleverly at 9h morn & returnd home. I Do feel fatagud. Son Jona & his Son here. mr Ballard left home at 3h pm on a Tour of Surveying for this Commonwealth. may he be Preservd & returnd in Safety is the prayer of me, his Spouse. a t Dittoes. mr Ballard Sett out for Sandy river.
E Clear. mr Ballard wen t to meeting a t y e hook, Eph m & Ezra to Pitts tn , Sally & Dolly to Cap t Cox s . I have been at home. James Sturges to Varsalbor o . a t home. the Girls to Cap t Cox s .

E Snowd. mr Ballard returnd from Varsalboro, informs y t Thos Robbins Departed this life last Evn g , Sudenly. mr Ballard only of our famely attended Public worship. my Son Jon a Came & Carried little Jacky home. Ephm went to take y e mare home. a t home. mr Seth Williams Dag t Betsy Expird y s night.
Clear & pleas t , the Snow is waisted very much. we Sett up a Leach for Soap. at home.

Clear. mr Ballard & Sons attended Town meeting. Bro r Eben z Moore Came here on his way from Oxford home, informs me our friends are well. by him I receivd a Letter from Sister Waters of March 22 nt . I have been at home. Dolly took Senna. A t home. Bror Eben z Moore returnd from Oxford, bro t a L tr from Sist Waters.
Clear & very pleast. mr Ballard went to Pownalboro. I have been at home, finisht footing a pr hoes for mr Ball d . mr Densmores Dagts here. Old mr Hinkley Dind here. a t home. Dolly had Company.
Cloudy morn. Dolly wen t to mr Claps, Ephm & Ezra to See y e mills at y e hook. I have workt in my Gardin. Sally washing. a t home.

Clear, a frost this morn. I planted 10 Cramb y Beens. mr Bullin, his wife & Son here. Capt Nichols, his wife, Son & Dagt took Tea with us. Dolly & Sally went to mr Shepards, Bot 9 yds Callomanco @ 2/4 y d for me a Skirt. I have workt in my Gardin. a t home. Capt Nichols, his [wife] & [other] friends here. my Girls at the hook.

Clear & very warm. mr Ballard & Cyrus attended Coart. I went to See Daugt Pollard, find her more Comfortable; to mr Pittes, his wife is very feeble bu t Shee wrode my hors to Son Pollards. I was at mr Capens to See mrs Page who has Scolt her foot. The Cause between Andruos & Son Jona was tried Las t Satterday & wen t in favour of y e Latter. may he for the futer be Carefull to gard against giving way to passion & liv a Sober life is the Earnest wish of me, his affectionate mother. a t Son Pollards, Pills & mr Capins.

Cloudy. I returnd from mr Waids, left my Patients Cleverly & took a fine Nap after I Came home. Ephm work t for Shubal Pitts, mr Carlton for me. Dolly & Sally went to mr Shubal Hinklys. Polly Dens mr & Lucy Kenada here at Evng. a t mr Waids.

Cloudy. mr Ballard is gone as an apriser a the Late Gov. Handcoks Lands in this Eastern Country. I have wrote to Bro r Jon a Collins & Sisters Barton & Waters. a t home. wrote Letters to Bror s & Sisters.

Cloudy. Ezra wen t home. Cap t Savage & Lady & Georg Brown Dind here. we had a very fine rain aftern. I was Calld by Pet l Cleark Junr to See his wife who is unwell. I went to Bed, Slep t Some. mrs Coutch there. a t mr Peter Clearks. Cap t Savage here.

X. Birth Ezra Hodges s Dag t . XX. Clear. mrs Pitts Came here, had a feavour fitt. Cyrus & Dolly returnd. at well at Son Towns. I was Calld to mr Hodges s , his wife in Labour & was Safe Deld at 11 h Evn g of a Daug t , her 7 th Child, & is Cleverly. I receivd 6/ as a reward. I tarried till Daylight. a t mr Hodges s . Birth 25 th . mrs Hodges is 29 years old y s Day.

A light Shower. mr Pollard bro t mrs Voce there. my Daug t is Cleverly. we got her up & made her Bed. I tarried till near night when mrs Porter Came there & I Came home. Cyrus wen t to winslow. mrs Porter, Foster & Pitts all Sleep here. mrs Pitts Came here yester day & Dolly went to Old mr Pollards. a t Son Pollards. Came home, mrs Pitts & her Sisters here.

Clear. I was Calld to See mrs Hamlin who is very Sick with a Disentary. I was to See mrs Pitts, find her more Comfortable. I went to mr Hamlins at Evn & Sett up with his wife. at mr Hamlins & Pitts s , [their] wives Sick.

Clear & Cold morn, moderated a t Evng. I have been at home. Dolly went to Son Pollards, Ephm Carried 19 bus l of ashes to mr Wessom. receivd 3/3_ in Cash & 1 quire of paper @ 1/6. a t home. Dolly a t Son Pollard.

Cloudy & Some rain. I was Calld to See mr Moses Whites wife in Labour, there all day & night. Edmond Fortis, a Black man, was Conducted to Pounalboro Jail for Commiting a Rape on mrs Tilton & afterwds murdering her on y e Evn g of y e 18th inst. A most Shocking Sein which he has Confest. he has a wife & 2 Child n . a t mr Whites. Edmond Fortis Conductd to Jaile for murdering mrs Tilton.

X. Birth Peter Cleark juners Son, first Child. XX. Clear. mrs Clearks illness Came on So great that her women were Calld & Shee was Safe Delivd a t 8 h Evn g of a Son. I left her as well as Could be Expected & returnd home at midnight. at Ditoes. Birth 22 nt . I receivd 7/2_.
Cloudy & Some rain. I work t Some in my Gardin. Dolly is better. Jason Livr mr Junr had a fitt this morn a t the hook. a t home. Jason Livermore Junr had a fitt at y e hook y e morn.

Clear. mr Densmore put Gargett in to our Cows neck. I was informd that mrs Pitts was unwell & went to See her, find her a little Easier. I tarried all night. raind at Evn, a Brisk wind. a t mr Shuball Pitts s .

Clear & warm. I have workt in my gardin, planted mellons & Cucum rs . Dolly is gone to her Sisters. Ephm work t for mr Waid fore n , is gone to See a phraim raisd for Mat w Haywood Esq r . I wrote to Doc t Barton by mr Burtun yesterday. at home. I wrote Doct Barton yesterdy & Sent by mr Burtun.

Clear. mr Ballard & Sons & James Sturges went to hear Coart. mrs Page went from here before noon. Dolly made a Callico goun for Polly Page and Shee went away to go home with her Mother. Son Jona s wife here. Dolly went with her to Son Pollards. mrs Benjamin Sent me 6/ for asisting her in Labour with her last Child, which was Born Jany 13 th 1794. at home. Son Town & [P ] Baker & a manfrom Penobscott Sleep here this night.

Clear & very warm. mr Ballard wen t to Pittst n to mill. Son Jon a brot his oldest Son here foren. Ephm went to ye hook for Some Biskitt, 2 Doz n 1/4, Gal n Vinigar 1/6, 1 lb Loaf Sugar 1/10. Betsy Voce Calld here, informs me that mrs Pitts is more Comfortable than Shee was yesterday. Daugt Ballard & Child n Sleep here. a t home. Dagt Ballard & Children here.
Cloudy & Snow. I have been a t home. Dolly unwell this foren. I have Done house work, we brot the Loom into y e house & Sett it up & [ d] a web. at home.

X. Birth Roland Smiths Son. XX. Cloudy, Snowd Some. mrs Smith was Safe Deld at 6h pm of a fine Son & is as well as Could be Expected; her illness was very Severe. mr Smith Conducted me home a t 9 h Evn g . he gave me 18/7 as a reward for my Service. mrs Cleark, Felps & Robinson were assistants at the Birth. at Ditoes. Birth 9 th . a first Born.Bror Moore Sett out for Oxford. I Sent a Letter to Sister Waters.

A fros t y s morn, Clear Day. Son Town wen t to Pittst n , returnd & Sett out for home. he Sowd 1/2 Bushl wheat for us. Betsy Voce & Polly m c Master & Old mr Hinkley took Tea here. mr Carlton workt here, Came about 10 h morn. a t home. Son Town went from here. Betsy Voce here.

X. Birth Capt Phillip Norcros s Son & 3 d Child. XX. Clear & Cool morn. I was Calld at 5h morn to See Capt Phillip Norcros s wife in Labour. Shee was Safe Deld at 20 m after noon of a fine Son, her 3 d Child. I left mother & Child Cleverly at 4 h Pm, was Conducted by water to Shepherds wharf, from there walkt home. Calld at Capt Neys, Gows, Parmers, Sewalls. there Bot 2 Skeins Silk, 1/2 Dozn table Spoons, Cost 2/2. Calld at mr Danys, Norcros s , & T. Hinkleys, arivd at home at 7 h pm. Dolly returnd a t Evn. mr Town & Sturges Sleep here. James is unwell. a t Capt Norcros s . Birth 24th. receivd 6/ as a reward. mr Town Sleeps here.
Clear & warm. I have washt. Dolly went to Son Pollards, her Sister is more Comfortable. mr Perham, the Surveyer Dind here, I paid him 18/. at home. mr Perham here. Dolly at Son Pollards.
Clear & Cool. Dagt Pollard & mrs Pitts here. mr Pollard Came a t Evn & Conducted them home. I have been at home. mr Ballard went to Cap t Coks s to get a Surveyers Compass mended. At home.
Clear & windy. I was at Ditoes. the women all went home. my Patient Seemd to be Some better. a t Ditoes.
At home, Do not feel So well as I Could wish. a t home.
y e 30th, the people Crost on the ice fore n n .
Clear & very warm for y e Season. mr Waid & Amos Pollard work t here. mr Ballard is gone to Bro r Moores. mr Page here for Gardin Seeds. I have been at home. a t home.

Clear Except a lite Shower. I wen t after n to See mrs Pitts, find her not So well as Shee was yesterday. Dolly Spoold & warpt a Linning web. Sally gone home this Evng. I Bot at mr Wessons 1 lb Coffee 1/4 2/7, Do Tea 1/6, 2 lb Sugar 2/, paid y e Cash. I was at Son Pollards, mr [sic] Daugh t is Cleverly. at Son Pollards & mr Pitts s .
E Clear & Cold. I attended worship a t the hook aftern. Eph m Burges & Joanny Jewell Cryd 1st time. I Calld at Capt me loys after meeting. a t meeting & at Capt Meloys.

E Clear & very Pleas t . mr Ballard returnd from Bro r Moores. Dolly & Sally Dind at mr Waids. Jon a , his wife, & Dagt Pollard Spen t y e aftern here. there was a Society meeting at y e hook. Dolly went home with her Sist r . a t home. my Child n here.

E Clear. mr Ballard wen t to meeting, rev d mr Turner performd. I have been unwell, Dolly likewise this foren. Shee went after n to See mrs Pitts, finds her no better, mrs Voce with her. Sally Cocks Came from her Fathers, her Brother is a little better. our Boys got y e Sow with 7 piggs home. at home. Dolly went to See mrs Pitts, finds her very Low.
E Clear & Pleast till Evn when it Snowd. mrs Jackson there. a t Ditoes.
E Clear. mr Ballard went to meeting a t y e hook. Colo Sewall Calld me to his house, his Lady is not very well. a t Colo Sewalls
E at Colo Sewalls.

Cloudy fore n , Clear aftern. my Son Came for me to See his wife but I Could not liav my Patient. I Sent a remedy which relievd my Dagt. thee women were Calld to mrs Savage & Shee was ill thro the most of y e night. a t Ditoes. Slept none y s night.
Clear. I was at Colo Sewalls. a t Ditoes.
Clear morn, Snowd before night. I wen t to mr Parkers this morn, was Calld to Jason Pierses; his wife is unwell. a t Ditoes. mr Parkers & Pierces.
Cloudy part of y e Day. I have been at home. mr Ballard was up as far as Andrews s , he had a house raisd y s after n n . a t home.
Clear. I went to See mrs Pitts, find her Case Difarant, as Shee has a Severe Gripeing, & relax. I was at old mr Pollards & Hamlins. old mr Hamlin here y s fore n . a t mr Pitts s & others.

Cloudy morn, Clear after n . mr Ballard is gone to Survey for mr Wesson & Esq r Howard. I have gatherd Safron, radish pods & parsnip Seed, Done my house work & made Some Pills for my Dag t Dolly. Sally weaving. Eph m wounded his foot. Dolly Came home, informs me that Hannah & her Babe are not So well as Could be wisht. at home, heard mrs Pitts was not so well.

Clear morn. Dolly was up in y e night pas t a number of times. I gatherd my Safron, helpt Do hous work foren. Silva Moore look Breakfas t & Dend here. Dolly Seems a little better. mr Hamlin Calld me to See his infant, it is very Sick. I went from there to mr Thwings & Kimbals. was Calld in has t by mr Pitts, his wife being thought near her Dissolution. I tarried there all night, was in bed from 12 h to 4. Shee revivd & rested Some. a t mr Hamlins, Kimbals, Thwing & Pitts s .

Clear & very warm. I Came to Son Pollards, took Breakfast. Eph m Brot y e hors & I Came home, met mr Ballard, Selva Moore & James Sturges on their way to Surveying. may they be preservd in Safety & return. I left mrs Pitts more Comfortable, am informd that Shee has been Carried into mrs Pitts Since I left her. Sally Cox is gone to watch y s night. at mr Pitts s . mr Ballard Sett out for a Tour of Surveying, Ephm to bring the hors home.

When I rose, and they retird to take Some rest at 6 OClock, Shee Desird mr Pitts & I to moov her & fix her Bed. we Did & laid her in again. Shee Expird in a very Short Space without a Strugle Excep t Distress for Breath. we have reason to hope our loss her gain. A Clear Day. I Came home from mr Pitts s after we had Performd our las t Ofice of friend Ship, Excep t her interment. my Son Ephm wen t to inform his friends at winthrop. it is four months this Day Since I was Calld to See my Dead Neace who was Seisd with this, her last illness, which Shee has born with Christian meekness and humility. Shee has manifested her regard to Christianity by an opne Profission of religion & receiving the ordinance of Baptism. we morn the los of her Company, but have the greatest reason to hope that Shee has Changd this for a a [sic] world in which Shee will be free from all pain and Sorrow, joind with Glorified Saints to Sing Redeeming lov. a t mr Pitts s , his wife Expird. Ephm is gone to inform his friends. a t mr Pitts.
Clear. mr James Page Breakfasted here. mr Ballard went up Streat. I am Brewing a beer for Dolly. August s Ballard Dind here. at home. August s Ballard here.
Clear & very Pleast. Dolly & Sally gone to Son Pollards. Son Town Came home with y m , his famely are well. I have been at home. a t home. y e Girls to mr Pollards. Son Town here.
Clear. we quilted a quilt for me. mrs Densmore, her Dag ts & Polly Livermore helpt us. Dolly Bot 2 Setts Tea Cups & a Tea pott at mr Blaks. a t home. quiltd my Coat.

Clear & very warm. mr Ballard & Cyrus attended Coart. I wen t to See mrs Pitts, find her more feeble than Shee was yesterday; a t mr Capins, mrs Page very bad with her foo t . Dolly was up to mr Pitts s . Dag t Pollard is about y e house. mrs Coutch & I took Tea there & walkt home together. a t mr Pitts, Capins & Son Pollards. mr Lambart lost his Case and was [Sentancd] to imprisonment & Cost.

Cloudy fore n, a very rainy after n. I walkt to mr Pittss this morn where I Saw the opperation of a Dessection performd on his Deseased wife. her Lights were found to be very much ulcerated & a Skirrous utera. her remains were interd about 6 h Pm. her female friends Could not proceed to the grave by reason of the rain. Hannah Cocks Came here with Sally & Sleeps here. I Could wish we might wisely improve ye [Call]. a t the funeral of mrs Pitts. all my famely that were at home were Present.
Cloudy. I have been working in my Gardin part of y e Day. the worms do great Damage in it. mr Ballard returnd. Son Town Sleeps here, his Child n unwell. a t home. mr Town Sleeps here.

X. Birth Aaron Hinkleys Dag t . XX. Clear. I was Calld by Aaron Hinkley from mr Hodges s at 3 h 30m in morn. mrs Hinkley was Safe Delivd a t 4 of a Dagt, her 5th Child. I left her & Child Cleverly at 6 & returnd home. I receivd 6/ as a reward from mr Hinkley. mrs Pitts Seems more Comfortable. Dolly is Cleverly after her Journey. Shee went to mr Bullins from winslow. at Ditoes & Aaron Hinkleys. Birth 26 th .mrs Densmor here to See mrs Pitts. Sally gone home.

Clear part of the foren. mrs Pitts & her Sisters took Dinner here & Sett out for winthrop. it Soon began to rain a little. Sally Cocks went to Son Pollards, my Daug t is Comfortable. mrs Barton is Come to be her Nurs, all well at Son Towns. a t home. mrs Pitts & her Sisterswent from here to winthrop.

Cloudy part of ye Day. I Came from mr Hamlins to mr Pitts, Spent the most of y e Day there. Shee had a Distres t turn by Eating a little meat, but Seems more Comfortable. I Calld at mr Capins & Son Pollards, he is gone to trooping to Pittst n . a t Dittoes. mrs Hamlin is Easier y s morn.

Clear & very pleas t . Dolly wen t to Son Pollards, Cyrus to Varsalboro. mrs Livermore was here. mr Pitts & mrs Barton Came home with Dolly. Sally Hamlin & Charls Cocks took Tea with us. mr Robbins Calld me to See his wife who is not So well as Shee Could wish. Cyrus returnd home. I wrote to Doc t ["Barton." - implied], Sent it by mr Craig. he and his wife went on board this afternoon. I gave mrs Robbins Some Derections & relurnd. at mr Robbins. wrote to Doct Barton.
foggy. mr Pollard & wife, mr Thomas & my Dag t Dolly wen t on a visit to Mag r Stickneys. I have been at home. a t home. Dolly to mg r Stiknys.

X. Birth Moses Whites Dagt. XX. Cloudy & Some rain. mrss White was Deld at 2h morn of her fifth Daughter & 9 th Child. I left mother & Child Cleverly a t 7. mr White bestowd 7/6 as a reward. at Ditoes. Birth 20th. fee receivd.

Clear morn. Augustus Ballard here. I was Calld to See Sally Williams who is not So well as Shee Could wish. I wen t to See mrs Pitts, mr Capins Child & Dagt Pollard. Dolly is there. mrs Ingerham, Sturges, Crage & Burtun, Sally & P Densmore here. at Shubal Pitts & other Neigrs. John Houston Expird at Sandy river.

Birth Richd Fosters Son. Clear & very warm Day. mrs Foster was Safe Deld of a Son, (her second Child) at 4 h & 50m morn. I left her at 9 as well as Could be Expected. Calld to See mr James Page who is very low by a fall he receivd last Satterday. I find mrs Pitts greatly revivd, how wonderfull is Gods goodness. I Came to Son Pollards & Slep t , which refresht me, being very much fatagud. Came home at Evng. Dolly is Gone to Jon as . at Rich d Fostres & Pitts and Son Pollards. Birth 31st.

rainy. I have been with mrs Pitts all Day. Shee has been more Comfortable than Shee was yesterday. Doct Williams Calld to See her. Spoke Les couraging, Said he had known Some find help from using the Bark, but Did not wish to advise to it unless Shee Chose to. Shee wisht to try it, we prepard it & Shee took 7 Tea Spoonfuls. I Saw no ill Efect from it. I left her at 6h & 30 m & returnd home, find Dolly a little better than Shee was. a t mr Pitts s , Doc t Williams there.
Cloudy foren, a Smart rain aft n . I have been at home, Jona here. at home.

Clear. I wen t from mr Pits s to mr Child, find them Comfortable. mr Dagt Dolly there to work. I went to See mr Wesson who has had y e mumps, he is mending. I Came to Son Pollards took Tea. Calld at mr Densmores, Came home & Sowd Cabbage Seed and Sumer Savory, & Sett Jill run y e ground. the wife of Danl Bullon interd this Day. I am informd of y e Death of mrss Hopkins, mrs Allin & Rich d Moores wife & Joell Chandler. a t Ditoes & other Neigrs. the Funeral of mrs Bolton. News of Deaths.

Clear & Cool. I have been to work in y e Door yard, Sowd Cabbage & Turnips. Planted Some beens &C. Sally went to mr Hamlins. my Sons ploughd a piece on y e North Side of y e gully. a t home. Sally Cox at mr Hamlins.

Clear. I workt in my Gardin. mr Ballard & Cyrus gone to Coart. I was Calld to mrs Plaisted who was in Labour with her first born. I wrode a mans Saddle which fatagud me very much. I Slep t none this night. my Patient not very ill. mrs Bradstreat & Dore & mrs Church there. a t mr Plaisteds.

Clear & very warm. mr Ballard Surveying at the hook. I have been to See mrs Pitts, find her very weak & low. may Shee have the Divine presence to Support her. Jon a , his wife & Child n Sleep here. a t Shubal Pitts s , his wife very low.

Clear after Sun rise. we had a fine Shower after 1 h y s morn. I left mrs Pitts revivd & returnd home at 10 h morn. at Shubal Pitts s , his wife very ill indead. 30 7 mrs Davis & mrs Porter Sleep here this night. Rachel Cumings, who is Crazy, here y s Day. Broke Down Corn, Beens & other misChief. we Confind her & Sally & I led her to mr Hinkleys who has the Care of her. Shee is an object of pitty, may God restore her reason if Consistant with his Divine will. mrs Davis, Porter here. Rachel Cumings here. Crazy.

Clear & very pleas t North wind. we killd a Lamb yesterday. I Sent Jon a a quarter and one to mr Livermore, for one we had of them before. Dolly wrode to Son Pollards. I sen t him a piece of Lamb. at home. Dolly went to Son Pollards.
Cloudy & Some rain. I have Planted Some Cucumbers in my Gardin & Done other matters there. I have been at home. at home. Old mr Hamlin arivd here from Oxford.

Clear. mr Town Sett ou t for home, Dolly with him, Cyrus to Pownalbor o , Sally to Esq r Smiths. Selv a Moore here. I have been working in my Gardin Some. at home all Day. a t home. Dolly went to Winslow.

Clear. I Did my house work & went to See Daugt Pollard, made use of means which gave her relief. I wen t to mr Burtuns, Bot 2 Combs, 2 Strings Beeds & 3 yds quallity. at Old mr Pollards, had 3_ lb butter. at Son Pollards & other Neighbrs. mr Ballard Came home.

Clear foren, Cloudy aftern. I have Done Matters in my Gardin & went to the hook. Left a Letter for Doct Barton a t Isaac Livermores. Calld at Cap t F Browns. Sally is gone to Son Pollards, the Boys finisht reaping our wheat & bound it. at the hook. mr Perham of Sandy [river] interd y s Day.

Birth Doct Colmans Son. Clear, a North wind. I was Calld to See the wife of Doc t Colman who was in Labour at 1 h 1/2 y s morn. Shee was Safe Deld of a fine Son at 11 h 10 m foren. I left her as well as Could be Expected & returnd home at 3 h 30 m aftern. I wrode to mr Robbins, find his Lady more Comfortable. I was at Cap t Fillebrowns, all well. at Doc t Colmans. Birth 34 th . at mr Robbins s & Capt Fillebrown s . Bot 4 oz Snuff @ 9 d .
E raind. I attended worship after n , my Sons all Day. Sally Cocks is unwill. I Calld at mr Pitts, he is Lonely. mrs Barton gone to winthrop. a t meeting & at mr Pitts s .

E A rainy Day. mr Ballard returnd from Sandy river, he attended the public worship after n . the famely tarried at home. Ephm went to See how mrs Pitts does, finds her very low. Shee has had two fitts of feavour this day. I had a Severe pain in my Ear all night. a t home. mr Ballard returnd from Sandy river.

E A Shoury Day, Thunder a t Evn g . Dolly & Sally wrode to mr Pollards, they inform me that Old mr Hamlin & a Son & Daugt are ariv d yesterday, lately, from Oxford. at home. Dolly & Sally went to mr Pollards.

E Clear & Cool. mr Ballard and Sally Cocks went to meeting, James to Varsalbor o . I went to See mrs Pitts, Shee thinks that Shee is mending. Shee Came home from mr Foots this afternoon. at Shubal Pitts s , his wife is more Comfortable.

rain y s morn, Clear Part of y e Day. mr Hodges Calld me to See his Dagt Fanny who is Labouring under y e indisposition of a Brokin Limb. I find her very restless. Doct Cony there. at mr Hodges to See his Child.

Clear Excep t a light Shower. mr Ballard at mr Pollards on business. I have been Doing matters in y e Gardin, galhering Safron. Dolly & Sally washt & washt the floors. Dolly went to mr Shephards fore n with Son Jona. he bro t his Oldest Son & left him here. at home. Son Jona brot Jack here.

Clear & pleast. I have been a t home, help t Do the house work. Sally workt for her Self, Shee is Some better than Shee was yesterdy. Ephm workt for my Son Jon a . at home. made 2 [doz] Candles, part mr Pitts s .
Snowd. I was at mr Pierces, his wife So ill that we Calld mrs Pollard & Savage. Jonas hors fell thro the ice on y e mill Pond. a t mr Pierces.
Cloudy part of ye Day. I have been at home. mr Ballard at Sheppards for kettles & Stores for his Tour. a t home.

Clear. I was at Shubal Pittses all Day. Shee is very low, Exercisd with Severe Gripeing & loose Stools. God only knows how it may terminate. I Sent for my hors, but find her So ill I tarried thro the night. Shee had Entervails of Pain & rest, but weak indead. at mr Pitts s , his wife very low.

Clear & very warm. I have workt in my Garden all Day, wed it all over where there were beds. Sally washt, Dolly wove 3_ yds. mr Ballard went to Esq r Conys, the boys pulld flax. I hear that mrs Pitts is much the Same. a t home. wed Gardin.

Clear, a fine air. mrs Pitts was So Comfortable that Shee Sett in her Easy Chair 3 hours foren, had a feavour fitt aftern & was very much pu t to it for Breath. revivd a little and I went to See mr Hamtins infant, find it much revivd. Dag t Pollard gave it Suck this Day. I returnd home at Sun Sett. I Calld to See mrs Pitts, Shee is not So well as Shee Could wish. my Dagt Dolly is a be little better. a t mr Hamtins, Pitts & Pitts s .

Cloudy foren n , Shours with thunder aftern. I was Calld to See mrs Pitts, Shee was thought to be growing near the Close of life, but revivd. her mouth & throat very Soar. poore Creature indures her illness with great patience. her husband & I watcht. her fitt of feaver began at Sun Sett, Continud till after midnight. may her patience Continue. a t mr Pitts s , his wife was in more pain than Shee has been.

Clear. mr Ballard & Sons attended y e Town meeting, they have Divided this Town into three parrishes. I have been at home. Sally Cocks wen t to Esq Smiths. a t home. Town Meeting. by [ajourMen t ] ys Town Divided.

Clear morn. Dolly went to mr Burtuns to work. I went to See mrs Smith, Shee has taken Cold & is unwell. her Sister Came there y s day. Son Jon a Calld me to See his Child n , they are Exercised with a Disentary. I was at Son Pollards. my Dagt is washing. at mr Smiths, Burtuns, Pollards & Son Jon a s . James s [Brother] Sleeps here.

Clear. mr Ballard a t Coart. Cyrus Sett ou t for winslow. Dolly Spun Linning fore n , went to See her Sister after n . mrs Abbit here. I have Done house work & Some in my Gardin. Sally Williams here. at home. mrs Abbot here, Dolly to her Sisters.

Cloudy fore n . Son Town went from here. Son Jon a s wife here to warp a webb. Ezra Town Came here. I have been at home. Sally is unwell with a Cold. Dolly & Shee wrode to Son Pollards. a t home. Ezra Town Came here.

Clear till near night when it was Dull weather. mr Floid & mrs Voce Dind here. mr Ballard wen t to a meeting of the Church in this Town. mr Pattin here. mr Pitts Sleeps here, his wife has been more Comfortable y s Day. I have Done my work about house & tended her, feel Some fatagud. at home. mrs Voce here & mr Pattin. Shubal Pitts Sleeps here.

Cloudy foren. Charls Cocks Came a t 11 h morn for Sally to go to his Dads, his Brother Gershom is very Sick, his Life is Dispard of by his friends. I have been at work in my gardin this fore n , Sett Some Cabbag & Turnips. I wen t to Son Pollards, find my Dag t but feeble. I was at mr Wessons Store, bot 1 lb Coffee @ 1/4, _ lb Brim stone /4, 1 oz Sinnamon /9, 7 gills Ginn 1/9, 1_ lb raisans @ 1 1/3, Snuff /2. at Doc t Colmans, 2 oz Spermaseta, 2 oz manna, _ oz myr, Do alloes 1/2, Vial & Salts, Camphr _ oz. a t home. a t Son Pollards & other Neighbors.

Clear. I was Calld to mr Hamlins, his wife is very Sick with a Bloody flux. I tarried all night. I Calld to See mrs Pitts who is more Comfortable. I went to See mrs Child & Son. a t mr Pitts s & Hamlins.

Clear. Cyrus is gone to Jon a s . Dolly warp t a piece & Drew it in, Dally Spining Tow. Eph m is diging Potatoes, he wen t after n to See the Bridg over Jones s Brook Raisd. I went to help mrs Hinkly quillt a Bed quillt. at Shubal Hinkleys. Colo Duttuns Lady Calld here.
foggy & warm. Sally went to her Dads. Dolly wove. I have been at home. at home.

X. Birth John Beamans Son. XX. Clear. I was Calld at 7 h morn to See the wife of John Beaman in Labour. Shee was Delivd at 10 of a Son; her first Son & 5th Child. I left her a 7h pm Cleverly & Came home. receivd 6/ as a reward. James Sturges Came here to work. a t mr Beamans. Birth 21st. fee Receivd. Funeral of Selves tr , [int]. y s [aft]

Clear y e mos t of y e Day. mr Ballard is gone to Washington to Survey for mr John Davis, who remov d from hollowell to the farm which was owned by Doc t Williams. I have been to mr Livermores. Sally Wil ms & Polly Livr mr been takeing a puke. I receivd Letters from Brthers Collins, Moore & Barton, my friends there are well Except Doct Barton. Old Lady Town Deseast in may last. a t mr Livermors. the Girls unwell. I receivd Letters of y e 1 st inst from Doc t Barton & Bror Collins. Death aunt Town may last.
E Clear. Dolly went to Son Pollards aftern. James & Ephm went to Capt Coxes. Gersham is beller. mr Waid was here, his infant is not So well as Could be wisht. a t home. mr Perham Sleeps here.
Clear & very warm. I was Calld to my Son Jon as to See my Daug t Dolly who is very Sick with a Disentary & Faintness & Pukeing. I tarried all night. a t Son Jon as , my Dag t Dolly Sick there.

Clear. I have been at home Doing matters in my Gardin. Shubal Pitts Dind here, informs me his wife is much as when I left her. Phillip Bullin Dind here, informs his Sister Anna is a little better. mr Ballard been to mr Bisbes. Dolly has been makeing a waist Coat for Cyrus, he went to mill to Varsalboro with 2 Bushels of wheat of our own raising. it made Beautifull flower. a t home. Cyrus went to get wheat ground at Esq Farewells mill.

Clear. I gathrd Seeds & other matters in my Gardin foren, went to mr Densmores after n , Dorcas is Sick. mr Ezra Smith & wife here. mr Densmores Dagts and Cousen here a t Evn. Ephm has workt with the Team for mr Child. at mr [Densmores]. mrs Smith here.

Clear [&] Pleas t . Dolly wen t to Son Pollards this morn, Cyrus to Pitts tn to mill with 1 Bus hl wh t . mr Densmore, True, their wives, a Sister & a Gentleman here, Drank Tea with me. Calvin Ballard Dind here. at home. Dolly to Son Polad s & Jon a s

Clear & very Cold for y e Season, wind N W. I have been piking Cottne. Ephm workt for mr Waid, Cyrus finisht planting potatoes below the Barn. a hard frost this night. a t home. mr Ballard is 69 years old y s Day. Severe frost.
Cloudy & Some rain. I was at Ditoes, my Patient remains poorely, her women went home. I Slept a little. a t Ditoes. Andrus & Son Jonas [Caus tryd].

Clear & very warm. mr Ballard went to his meddow. Son Jon a is gone to winslow. I went to See mrs Parker below here, find her very feeble. Jona s wife & Child n wen t home by water, our boys Conducted them. Selv a Moore Sleeps here. I have wrote to Bro r Barton. Dolly wen t to See mrs Pitts, finds her fadeing. a t mr Parkers. wrole to Doc t Barton. Jona s wife & Sons went home. Selva Moore Sleeps here.

X. Birth Nath l Thwing s Son. XX. Clear. I was Calld to See mrs Thwing who was in Labour, Deld her of a Son a t 10 h morn. receivd 6/ as a reward & returnd as far as mr Pitts s , tarried & watcht. Cap t Cox s wife with, we apprehend mrs Pitts near the Close of life. a t mr Thwings. Birth 33 d . watcht with mrs Pitts.

X. Birth Ben n Fitches Son. XX. A foggy morn, Clear & warm afterwds. I was Calld to See Ben n Fitches wife at 1 h morn. Shee was Deld of a Son (her first Born) a t 5 h m. I left her Cleverly, her Babe allso, & arivd at home a t 10. receivd 6/ as a reward. Dolly is gone to Son Pollards. Sally finisht Bleaching y n , Cyrus went to Capt F Browns, bot 1 quart W E Rhum, paid Cash; had 2 lb Shugar, Dito of Butter & 1 lb Coffee which was not paid for. a t Ben n Fitche. Birth 35 th . at home.

E X. Birth mr Plaisteds Son. XX. Cloudy morn. mrs Plaisted was Delivd at 10h morn of a Son. I left her before 12 and arivd a t home at 1, feel Some fatagud as I have not been undresst Since I left home. mr [sic] famely are all gone to meeting a t the meeting house. I killd about 30 flees & Changd my Cloaths, feel refreshed. mr Plaisted bestowd 9/ as a reward for my Service. Dolly Calld to See mr Pitts & Dag t Pollard. mrs Pitts is very low. a t Ditoes. Birth 29th. receivd 9/.
E Clear & very warm. Sally Cocks went to her Dads. we all attended Public worship. Son Town Sleeps here. Jon a Sup t here. at meeting. Son Town here.

E Clear & Cold. S. Moore & J. Slurges Came here y s morn. mr Ballard returnd at Evn g . they found Snow 5 feet & up in their Tour. mr Hamlin & Son, my Son Jona, S & P Densmore took Tea here. at home. old mr Hamlin here. mr Ballard returnd.

E Clear, a Comfortable air in y e morn, but very warm Day. my Self & famely all attend Public worship. I Calld to See mrs Pitts who I find a little revivd, but dare not build my Expectation of her recovery. mr Pitses mother Came to See her. I left her at Sun Sett. Sally Williams & Polly Livermore here at Evng. a t meeting & all my famely Prayrs Diserd on behalf of mrs Pitts. Shee is very low, her relax Some abatedd.

E Clear. mrs Cocks wen t from mr Pitts s to my house y s morn. I wen t home after n , took Tea with mrs Cocks & returnd to mr Pitts s . old mrs Pollard & mrs Barton watcht till near Day. at mr Pitts s , his wife had a very Distrest night till near day, after which Shee Slept a Sweet knap.

Clear. mr Ballard went to Esq r Coneys y s morn, to Surveying Land for a mr Fuller afterward. I have Done my house work. Cap t Blunts Lady Dind, took Tea & Sleeps here. Polly Page Came here to work, informs me that Dag t Pollard had an ill turn to Day. a t home. mrs Blunt Sleeps here.

Clear & very warm. mr Ballard & Cyrus attended Coart. I went to See Daugt Pollard, find her more Comfortable; to mr Pittes, his wife is very feeble bu t Shee wrode my hors to Son Pollards. I was at mr Capens to See mrs Page who has Scolt her foot. The Cause between Andruos & Son Jona was tried Las t Satterday & wen t in favour of y e Latter. may he for the futer be Carefull to gard against giving way to passion & liv a Sober life is the Earnest wish of me, his affectionate mother. a t Son Pollards, Pills & mr Capins.
Clear & warm, Cooler a t Evng. mr Ballard & the Boys wen t to y e meddow to Cut it, Dolly to Son Pollards. Sally washt. mr Pitts here, his wife is not So well as Shee was yesterdy. at home.

When I rose, and they retird to take Some rest at 6 OClock, Shee Desird mr Pitts & I to moov her & fix her Bed. we Did & laid her in again. Shee Expird in a very Short Space without a Strugle Excep t Distress for Breath. we have reason to hope our loss her gain. A Clear Day. I Came home from mr Pitts s after we had Performd our las t Ofice of friend Ship, Excep t her interment. my Son Ephm wen t to inform his friends at winthrop. it is four months this Day Since I was Calld to See my Dead Neace who was Seisd with this, her last illness, which Shee has born with Christian meekness and humility. Shee has manifested her regard to Christianity by an opne Profission of religion & receiving the ordinance of Baptism. we morn the los of her Company, but have the greatest reason to hope that Shee has Changd this for a a [sic] world in which Shee will be free from all pain and Sorrow, joind with Glorified Saints to Sing Redeeming lov. a t mr Pitts s , his wife Expird. Ephm is gone to inform his friends. a t mr Pitts.

X. Birth Cap t Fillebn s Son. XX. Second Child. foggy morn. Cap t Hersey Sent for me to See his Babe, it being Sick. I left it Some Senna & manna & returnd home at 11h fore n , was Calld imediately to Cap t FilleBrowns wife who is in Labour. Shee was Safe Deld of a fine Son at 10 h 30 m . I tarried & took Care of her. mr Town left here, mrs Barton & my Dagt Dolly gone with him. a t Cap t Herseys & Cap t F Bns. Birth 36 th . Dolly is gone to winslow.

Clear. I have been to See mr Hodges Child, they think it is mending. Calld at Son Pollards, they are well, at mr Baxters, his wife is unwell, at Doct Colmans, all well. I had of him 1 oz Galbanum 1/3, Dito alloes 1/, _ oz myrr /7, one nutmeg 1/, 2 oz Clovs. mrs Colman made me a presen t of a thimble.
