Clear and Cold. Son s Pollard and Lambart with their wives, and Son Ephr m , and Son Town & Dag t here. my Dagts Spen t the Day. I have been at home. Pally Easty helpt me do my work. at home. my Child n here to See us.

Clear and very Cold. mr Chambers Came here with Corn for mr Ballard. I was Calld in has t a t 1 h pm to go to See my Dagt Lambart who was Exercised with very Severe pains. Dagts Town & Pollard there. we made use of means which gave relief and I returnd home. a t mr Lambarts. my Dagt very unwell.

Clear. Cyrus wen t to the hook, was informd that mr Daniel Stevens was Dead and that his remains were to be interd this aftern. my Son Eph m here, he wen t to pitts tn for money Due to Cyrus from Rheuben Moore. he bro t it to him and he Sent it to his Bro r Lambart, 10 Dollars and 2 pisterenes. I have been at home. at home.
Cloudy & rain. I have been at home. mr Ballard and Phillip returnd from Surveying at Varsalborough. Cyrus has been to y e for t & hook. a t home.
Cloudy, rain, haill & Snow. mrs Caton washt and was unwell after wards. mr Simeon Clearks wife and her Son Saml s wife Came there to See us. at mr Catons, mrs s Cleark there.

Cloudy the mos t of the Day. Cyrus wen t to Son Jonas, his wife is more Comfortable. mr Ballard has been to Doc t Coneys. I wen t to See mrs Dingley, Shee is well. Phillip Bullin left here this morning after Breakfast. at mr Dingleys.

Clear. I have been not So well as I Could wish. mr Ballard Surveying for Esq r Haywood. Cyrus gone to Winthrop. Eben z Sett fire to the brush in the gully, it run to the fence and burn t Some lengths. I went to See Mary Densmore, find her more Comfortable than Shee was yesterday. a t mr Densmores. Cyrus brot our Cloath from winthp, 14 yds the Dresing. Cos t 1 Dol r 96 Cents.
B Snowd all Day. mrs Caton Calld her women and was very unwell all night. at mr Catons.

B Clear and very warm. mr Ballard and Cyrus wen t to meeting a t y e fort, Nabby & Ebenz r to y e hook. I tarried a t home, our hors is Lame and I was not able to walk. my Sons Pollard and Lambart and their wives, Pally Easty and Son Eph m here after meeting. Dolly walkt here & home. a t home. my Child n here to See me after Meeting.

D X. Birth Capt Moses Springers Son. XX. Clear and pleast. I feel very unwell, but was Calld Directly af t Breakfast to See the wife of Cap t Moses Springer who is in Labour, and was Safe Deld at 3h 30m pm of her Second Child and Son. after we had taken Tea I receivd 7/6 and returnd home. at Cap t Moses Springers s .Birth 7 th . receivd 7/6 as a reward.

B Clear and pleasan t alltho we had great frost this morn. mr Ballard Clear. mr Ballard, Cyrus and Ebenz went to Meeting to the for t , mr Prim also. Nabby to the hook. Phillip Bullin Came here at noon, went to the fort after n , returnd and Supt, mr Capin here allso. I have attended meeting aftern. our hors fell Down As we were returning, threw me in to a Doleful gully. mr Ballard Cleard himSelf of the hors and we were not much hurt. mr Allin here at Evng which he Spen t with Nabby. a t meeting. mr Capin & Phillip Bullin and mr Allin here after meeting.
B Clear and very pleast. Cyrus went to Meeting a t y e fort and Nabby to the hook. I tarried a t home not haveing a hors to wride. a t home.

Birth Bizar Benjamins Son. Cloudy. I was Calld at 5h morn to See mrs Benjamin who was in Labour. Shee was Deld between Seven and Eight of a Son. I left them Comfortable and returnd as far as Son Lambarts at noon, tarried there till near night. Dagt Pollard and Patty Easty there. Ephm Came home with me. a t mr Benjamins. Birth 15th. at Son Lambarts aftern.

Cloudy. at mr Catons ye t . his wife is not fitt to be left. he wen t to the river. Shee wisht to Drink wine and Eat Bisquit, he procured it and Shee Drank Eleven Glasses this Day, and Eat Bisquit and wine at Evn g 3 times. a t mr Catons. I finisht kniting my yarn,have knit 1 pair hoes Since I lef t home.
Clear & very pleast. mr Ballard wen t to mr Bullins to Survey. Ziba Halls wife and Nancy Fletcher Dind here. I have been at home. a t home. mrs Hall Dind here.

Clear, a frost this morn. mr Ballard went to Varsalboro to Survey. I have been at home. Cap t Ab m Pages wife here for Gardin Seeds. Shee brot me Some flower. Cyrus finish t Dresing our flax. we had 62 lb in y e whole. mr Prim paid me 6/4_ in Cash and we had a Chees of mr Burtun, w t 10, for his Board [one] weak. a t home. Capt Ab m Pages wife here. Mr Ballard went to Varsalboro.

Clear. I Sett out aftern to go and See Dagt Lambart, was mett by mr Kitrick who wisht me to go and See his wife. I went and tarried all night, my Patient Some unwell. I went to bed and Slept very well. at mr Kitridges.

Cloudy, Some rain by Day, aplenty at night. I Churnd and made a Chees and wint to Son Lambarts, my Dagt not very well. I tarried all night. Ep hm Came home with my hors, he Sleeps here. at Son Lambarts.

Shines & Showers. I have been much Exercised with pain bu t have workt in my Gardin the mos t of the Day. I hear mr Livermore and Cap t Pages wife are unwell. my Son Came and Carried his Sons home. mr Capin Sleeps here. at home.
B Clear and very pleasant morn. mr Ballard and Cyrus gone to Meeting, Phillip to his Dadys. I have been at home. a t home. Son Ephm Came to See us at Evn g .

X. Birth Elisha Noles s Dagt. XX. Clear. Son Town left here Early, going to Coart. I have Done my work, Sett out at 3h pm to See Dagt Lambart, was met by mr Noles and Disered to go and See his Brother Elishas wife who is in Labour. I arivd at 6 and Shee was Deld of a Dagt, her third Child, at 9h Evn. I tarried till morn. a t Elisha Noles s . Birth 28 th . April 27, 1798 receivd 3_ yds Cottne Cloath @3/.
Clear and very warm. I have been at home, am unwell yet. mrs Dingly here aftern, it Seems Cleverly to See her So kind. a t home.

Clear. I helpt Do the house work foren, went to Son Lambarts aftern. her Dear little infant has got the thrush. I went to mr Baxters and Voces. Calld to See Dagt Pollard, Shee & Childn are well. I returnd home, went to mr Beemans, find her not So well as Could be wisht. mr Capin has been writing for mr Ballard on plans. A t Son Lambarts and others.

A rainy aftern and Evng. I was Calld to See the wife of mr Moses Sewall, Shee being in Labour tho not very ill. Old Lady Dilingham was Calld the first of y e Evn g . my Patients illness increast and ther Calld young mrss Dilingham at 4h morn, mrs Greely allso. a t mr Moses Sewalls.

Clear. Cyrus and Ebenz made a pin for the Sheep. Son Town here, he informs me his wife is not So well as usual. Dear Child, I wish to See her. I have been makeing Soap, am informd y s Evn that Old mr Smith a t y e fort Expird y s aftern. may we all hear the Call and be prepared to follow him, may God Enable the Surviveing Connections to make a wise improvment of this visitation. a t home. Death of Old mr Smith.
Cloudy part of y e Day, some Showers. I have Sett muskmellon plants and Done my hous work. mrs Heartford Calld here. Betsy Andrews Came here at noon to work for me. a t home.

X. Birth Moses Whites Dag t . XX. Clear and very warm. Son Jon as wife Came here. I houghd Cabages, gatherd beens and wen t to mr Moses Whites wife who was in Labour, and was Dild of a Dagt a t 10h Evn. I tarried all night. at mr Moses Whites. Birth 38 th . receivd9/ as a reward.

Clear. I have been Collecting herbs, working in my gardin &C. I have been very unwell, but went to See mrs Dingly. Shee Expects to Sett out for Boston tomorrow. Pally washt and went to Son Pottards and Lambarts. they are as well as usual Excep t the infant who has a Soar mouth. at mr Dingleys.

Cloudy. I have been washing. mr Ben n Brown, his wife & Son Dind here. Capt Hersey here, paid his parrish Tax. mr Ballard been makeing plan. Cyrus went to Jon a s, bro t 3 lb of tallow. we have had 7 lb before, he brot three pecks apples from there allso; and 1 Bushel Onions from mr Hamlins as a presen t . a t home. mr Ben n Brown, h s wife, Son & Capt Hersey here.
Clear morn, rainy aftern. mrs s Dingly Came to See me. I workt Some in my Gardin fore n . we had a fine mes of greens from our Cabbage Stumps this Day. a t home. mrs Dingly here.

Clear. I have been without help y s Day, Done my house work and washt Some raggs & Scourd yarn, Doubled Tow y n for bed tick warp. the men planted Corn on the Entervail and Some on new Ground. at home. Nabby gone.

Clear morn, Some rain aftern. I returnd from mr Braleys. I Calld to See the wido Jones, Shee is not very well; at mr John Joness, Ruthe Lee is very unwell. I Calld to See mrs rice, Shee is unwell. Dind at Son Pollards. Calld at Lambarts. Came home, Skimd my milk and was Calld Directly to See mrs Rice who is in Labour, her women were Calld but Shee had an unnatural travel. a t mr Bralys and other friends.

Clear and very warm. I have been at home, have work t in my gardin. Betsy did hous work and pik t wool. Shee wen t to her Dads a t Evng. Cyrus went to Burtuns for Corn of Doct Conys then Carried it to Pitts t n to be ground. Ebin z is mowing & makeing hay. at home.

Clear and Cool. mr Dingley and his wife, with others, Sett out for Boston this morn. I went to Son Lambarts, find her Cleverly and the infant as well as we Could Expect. Revd mr Stone there to visit, mrs Hamlin, Savage & Benjamin allso. Ephm Came home with me. a t Son Lambarts.

Clear. mr [sic] Dag t Lambar t here. Cyrus went to winthrop, Pally Easty wrode in the Sleigh with him to her uncles. Ephm Came for his Sister, her husbands parents being there. a t home. Dag t Lambart here. Cyrus went to winth p .

X. Birth Thos Kennys Dagt. XX. rainy. I was Calld aftern to go to Ephn Cowens. I prepared to go and Thom s Kenny Came, Expres t a wish to have me go and See his wife. mr Cowen Consented. I went, find her very ill. Shee was Deld of a Dagt about Sun Sett. I left them Comfortable and went to Cowens at Evn, find her not very Sick. I lost my Shoes. a t Thos Kenneys. Birth 20th. at Ephm Cowens allso, lost my Shoes & fell from my hors.
The Sun Shone part of the Day. mrs Gordin was quilting a bed quilt, I helpt all Day. mrs Cowen was very unwell. at mr Cowens.
rainy. I have been at home. it Cleard off aftern and mrs Cocks went from here home ward bound. I Did Some washing aftern. at home. mrs Cocks left here.

X. Birth mr Judsons Dag t . XX. Clear. I was Calld to See mrs Judsun at the hook at 7h morn. Shee was Deld at 3h pm of a Dagt, her 3 d Child, all Daugts. I left her & infant Cleverly and returnd home a little before Sun Sett. mrs Pickford was here. a t mr Judsons. Birth 40. receivd 9/as a reward.

a rainy Day. I have been at home, have been kniting hoes for my Self. mr Ballard went to the for t and hook, Cyrus to Fosters about Boots. Nabby has had a pain in her Stomach. Phillip Sleeps here by reason of y e rain. a t home.

Clear. I have been kniting. mr Ballard at the fort, bot a Shawl and gave me. Cyrus Dresing flax, Phillip has been makeing plans. Thos Stickney Came for me to go and See his Brothers wife who is Sick, but I Could not go as he bro t no hors. a t home.
a Shoury Day. I have been at home. Son and Dagt Town Came here, Sleep here. I do not feel very well. our men all went to hear Coart. a t home. Son & Dagt Town here.
Clear. I am with my Dagt Lambart. Shee has no other Nurs ye t but is as well as Can be Expected. Dagt Ballard went home. I watcht. Debby Law Came and washt and Slept there. at Son Lambarts.

Clear. I went to Son Lambarts this foren, Dind there, mrs Capin there. my Dagt is remarkable well, her Dear little Babe is recovering of the Soar mouth. I was Calld from there to See mrs s Burns, find her very unwell. applied remidies which gave Some relief. I tarried all night, Shee had Some rest. at Son Lambarts & at mr Burnses.

B Clear. I am at mr Burnses, his wife is unwell yet. I was Calld from her to See mrs s Robbins who feels her Self unwell, but Seems more Comfortable aftern. I Dind & took Tea and returnd home at Evn, find mrss Pikford, her Sister Nabby and mrs Dingleys Dear little Dagt here. mrs Welch & Childn Came here to tarrie y s night. at mr Burnses & mr Robbins s . mrs Welch & Child n Sleep here.
B Clear and very warm. Son Town went to meeting, and our men allso. my Dagt & I tarried at home. they went to mr Lambarts at Evn. at home.

B X. Birth Ansel Neys Son. XX. Clear morn, a heavy thunder and rain aftern. I was Calld from Son Lambarts at 10h m to AnSel Neys wife who was Deld of a son, her firs t Born, a t 2h pm. heavy thunder while her illness was on her. I left mother and infant Cleverly, Came home, put Clean Linning on and went to Son Lambarts. find her without any help Excep t Dagt Pollard there with both her Childn, and Jon a s lit Dagt which was brot to take the milk from Dollys Breast. a t Ditoes and a t Ansil Neys. Birth 37 th . I receivd 9/3_ of mr Ney.
Clear. Town meeting. I have been at home. our men went to Town meeting. at home.

Clear the most of y e Day. I have been at home. Phillip Came hire to plan, their Survey. Judy Heuston & Betsy Page here. mr Ballard at Coart. Cyrus & Ebenz taking Care of hay, they go t in all y t was mowed before this day. a t home.
Clear. I have been with my Dagt. Polly Butterfield Came to be her Nurs at Eve. I tarried this night, mother and inft as will as Can be Expected. at Son Lambts, her Nurs Came at Evn.

Clear. I have been at home. Patty washt. I help t about house. Jason Pierce & wife, mrs Heartford & Pickfors and Nancy Dingly here to Tea. mr Saml Pierce Sleeps here. Revd mr Stone Calld on us y s fornn. at home. had Comp y . mr Stone here foren.

X. Birth Chandler Robbins s Son. XX. Clear and very warm. mrss Robbins was Deld at 3h morn of her Second Son and is as well as Can be Expected. I tarried till afternoon, receivd 13/6 as a rew d . mr Ballard returnd from his Journey, Son Town with him. mrss Savage, Trask and Phillip Bullin Dind here. at mr Robbins s . Birth 41 st . mr Ballard returnd.

Cloudy foren. Clear. Cyrus went for Dagt Lambart to come here and make a goun for me. Son Jon a was here, informd me his Father Peirce was very Sick. my Dag t tarries with me this night. Shee is in much better health than Shee has been for years past. may give y e prais to y e author. a t home. Dag t Lambar t here, tarries y e night.

X. Birth James Catons Son & Dag t . XX. Clear. mrs Caton has been ill and was Deld of a Son at 2h 30 m pm, and of a Dag t at 3h pm. I tarried all night, have had bu t little Sleep this three nights. mr Simeon Clearks wife watcht. I Could not Sleep for flees. at mr Catons. Birth 17 th & 18 th . receivd 12/ as a reward.

Clear and very warm. mr Ballard wen t to Survey for mr Wesson, and to a meeting abou t the Bridg over kenebeck river. mrs Livermore and mrs Heartford here. I have been at home. mr Prim took Breakfas t and Dind here. a t home. mrs Livermore & Heartford here.

Clear and very warm. Son Lambart Calld me from mr Kitridges to See my Dagt. I tarried there till aftern, then went home. returnd and Came home again. left my Dagt more Comfortable. mrss Burtun and her Son James Slept here. a t Ditoes & Son Lambarts. mrss Hamlin here and mrss Burtun Sleeps here.

Cloudy morn. I Came home and went into the gardin, Sett Beets. Betsy went to try her goun on. mr Moses White applied to me to assis t his wife Some future day. mr Ballard and Cyrus are gone to Coart, Ebinz haying. a t Ditoes.

Cloudy. I left my patient after Breakfas t , arivd at Son Lambarts at 11. mrs Capin there. I Dind there and Came home. Did up my work, feel Some fatagud. Dagt Lambart Cookt a Loin of veal for me on which we dind. Son Jona Dind there. a t Ditoes, Ebn and Son Lambarts. mrs Capin was there.
Clear. I have wed my Beens, Cleand my Seller and Done my house work, but feel very unable. Cyrus & Ebenz finisht weading our Corn. I hear that mrs Lee is yet living. a t home.

X. Birth Moses Sewalls 2 nd Son. XX. Snowd. mrss Sewall was Deld (a t 4 h 45 m morn) of a fine son before mrss Greely Came into y e Chamber. Shee and infant are very Cleverly. I left them a t 9 h and returnd. Left Old Lady Dilingham with her. mr Sewall gave me 10/6 as a reward. a t Ditoes. Birth 12th. receivd 10/6.
Clear. I have been at home. Patty Easty wash t for me for which I paid her 2/. I Did my house work and wed gardin. I Do not feel So well as I Could wish. a t home.
Clear Except Some light Showers. my Dagts and Jonas wife here to See me. I am more Comfortable than I have been. a t home. my Dagts and Sally Cocks here.

Clear & warm. I returnd home. mrs Dingley Came here. I Cut herbs to Dry, houghd french turnips, then went to See my Dagt Lambart, find her very Comfortable. Dagt Pollard & Childn & mrs Carter there to Tea. mrs Carter bestowd 18/3_ for my assisting her in travil June 5 th . a t Ditoes and Son Lambarts. Shubal Pitts & Sally Cocks were Joind in Marriage y s Day.

Clear. Dagt Lambart Came here, bro t her inft in her arms. it is wonderfull to See her So well. mr Ballard & Ebenz went to See the meeting house at the hook raisd. I have been at home. at home. Dag t Lamb t here.

Clear and very warm. I have been at home. Patty washt. Son Jona, his wife, Dagt Pollard, her Childn & Polly Hodges Dind here; Son & Dagt Lambt aded, to take Tea. they have been to the hook and went home. my Dagts Pollard & Ballard with their Childn Sleep here. John Braly left here after he had taken Breakfas t . EbenZ got in part of the flax. at home, my Child n here.

Clear. I have been at home. mr Ballard Still prepareing for his Tour. he brot Two Birch Cannoes to our Shore. Patty Easty went after Dineing to Son Pollards, Shee informs me that both his Childn are very unwell. Ephm brot his dady a Box for Chocolat. Ebenz has been Spreading flax. at home. Son Lambart is 24 years old this day.

Clear. I have been washing Old Cloaths which ought to have been Done long ago. a gent mn by y e name of Shirtley here. I was Calld to mr Gills, his wife is not So well as Shee Could wish. I tarried all night. mr Ballard brot [80] lb of Beef home which he purchased of mr Daw. at mr Gills. mr Shirtley Sleept here.
C Clear and pleasant. we all attended meeting. I went to Son Pollards at noon. Son Jona here at Evng. a t meeting.
rainy and Some haill. I made 29 lb Candles. Nabby Spun Some Tow. at home, made Candles.
rainy the mos t of the Day. Nabby returnd at noon. I was calld to See the wife of Josiah Norcross at 6h pm, find her very unwell. I tarried y s night, Slept Some. a t Josiah Norcros s .

X. Birth John Rices Dagt. XX. rainy morn. mrs Rice was Deld at 9 h 30 m , mrs Rice was Dild of a fine Dagt, her third Child. I returnd home at 2, mr Lambart with me. he Butchered a Swine for us. I Sett up very late to Do the work which is necessary and do feel very much fatagud. a t mr Rices. Birth 31st. fee receivd.

X. Birth mr Kitridges Son. XX. Clear and warm. I wed gardin in y e morn. wen t to See Dag t Lambart, Shee is unwell bu t wrode my hors to Son Pollards. I went there, was Calld by mr Kitrich to See his wife who is in Labour. her women were Calld at 8h Evn, Shee was Deld at 10 of a Son, her first born. mr Kimbal was there after me. I Could not leave my Patient and he returnd with out me. a t Sons Lambarts & Pollards & mr Kitridges. Birth 35 th .

Clear. mr Ballard Surveying for mr Robbins. I went to the hook, bot of mrses Sewall 3_ yds mode @ 6/6, 2 Skiens Silk /5, three _ yds ribbond @ 1/ 3/6, at mr Robbens, one hand kerc f 2/5, 3_ yd ribbond @ /6, 3:10:_. I Calld to See mrs Greely who is all most blind. at the hook. mr Ballard Surveying for mr Robbins.
Clear. I am, this Day, arivd to y e age of 61 years, old Lady Lamb t her Son Luke and Barna, his wife, mr Capin and his wife made us a visit. we Spent aftern agreably. at home. Old Lady Lambart here.
rainy. at mr Cowens. he went Early to Seek my Shoes, found them, informs me Mrs Kenny is Cleverly. mrs Cowen is not very Sick. I tarried all night. at Ephm Cowens.

X. Birth Ephm Cowins 3 d Dagt and 4 th Child. XX. Cloudy. I was at mr Cowens, his wife was in Labour all Day. mrs Savage and Swanton went to See the Ship Monlezumaum Launcht. we had 11 Children there thro the Day. Shee Calld the Day Calld [sic] her women at Evn and was Safe Dild at 11h Evn of a fine Dagt. I tarried thro the night, my Patients Cleverly. a t Ditoes. Birth 23 d . April 1799 Ephm Cowen Credt by Spin g 19 Skeins of Lining yarn what was my Due was 9/.

X. Birth Daniel Fosters Dagt. XX. rainy. I Bakt. Son Lambart Calld me to See his wife who is afflicted with the tooth aik. I was Calld from there at 3h pm to See the wife of Daniel Fosters s . who was in Labour, and was Deld of a fine Dagt, her third Child, at 8h pm. I left them Cleverly and returnd to Son Lambarts at 11 h Evn. find my Dagt has had her tooth Extracted by Doc t Colman and Shee is Easy. I tarried there this night, Slept with my Dagt. a t Son Lambarts. my Dagt unwell, wentfrom there to Daniel Fosters. Birth 29 th . receivd6/ as reward. augst 24 recd 3/.

B rainy. I returnd home, Son Ephm acompanied me. Cyrus and Ebenz went to meeting to y e fort. I bakt Some puding, Pork & Beens for Dinner. Son Town Came here from Coart, a Negro man was Commited to gaol this weak for attempting to murder mr Saml Gooding of Drisden. a t Son Lambarts. Son Town Came here.

B rainy. I left mrs Cowen and her infant Cleverly at 7 h morn and arivd about nine a t my own habitation, find my family all well. Son Ephm here and Son Jonas Sons here. Cyrus and Eben z went to meeting. Cyrus Conducted my Grand Sons home afterwards. at Ditoes.

B Clear. Cyrus, Ebenz, & Patty attinded public worship foren. I went my Self aftern. Doct Cony Calld to See me this morn, he informd me that mr Waids infant Dagt Expired y s morn. its Death was Causd by the hooping Cough which brot on fitts. I Calld at Son Lambarts after meeting, Cyrus allso. we took Tea with them. mr Savage informd me that mr Ballard was unbe unwell when he arivd at the uper Settlement. God grant the restoration of health to him if yet wanting and return him & his assistants in Safety to their respective homes. at meeting & at Son Lambarts. Death of mr Waids infant AE 31 Days.

Clear and pleasant. I went to See mrs Waid and Foster. Calld to See Mary Densmore, Shee is very low. I went to mrs Leaches and paid Sarah Neal 6/ which was 1/7_ more than I owd her for Spining. Sarah went to Cap t Blunts to liv. a t mr Waids and other Neighbours.
Clear. I have Done Some washing. Son Town Spent this Day at the hook on Business with Cap t Molloy, Sleeps here y s night. at home. Son Town Sleeps here.

X. Birth Phillip Norcros s Son. XX. Cloudy and Some rain. I was Calld a t 2h morn to See the wife of mr Phillip Norcross, found her very ill. Shee was Safe Deld at 3 h of her Second Son and 7 th Child. I receivd 9/ as a reward and returnd home, went to bed and Slept. mr Dingly Calld here. Ebenz went to Pittst n aftern. Cyrus wen t to mr Brooks s , bo t 2 Stone potts for to put Butter in; they cos t 3/6 each - 7/6. at [Phillip Norcros s ]. Birth 44th. receivd 9/ as a [reward].

Clear, the wind Northerd. I attended Funeral of mr Waids infant. I Calld a t mr Densmores as I went, a t mr Dingleys as I returnd. mrs Thwing and her Sister Nancy Kidder, mrs s Dingley, Heartford and mrs Nancy Hilton took Tea with me. at the funeral of mrs Waids inft. mrs Foster is unwell. mrs Thwing here.
Clear. I was Calld a t 11 h forn n to Wilm Chamberlains wife who is unwell. at Wilm Chamberlains.
Clear. I have been at home. mr Ballard at Coart. Son and Dagt Town went home. we had a Shower aftern. at home. Son & Dagt Town wen t home.

Clear. I have been a t Son Lambts all Day. Polly washt and I nurst my Dag t . mr Ballard Came and Conducted me home at Evn. Son Lambart been to help rais a house phraim for mr Sewall a t y e hook. at Ditoes. Came home at Dusk, put up my been vinesand wrote the abov from 19 th inst.

Clear. Pally went to See her Mother. I have Done my house work and mended Two Shirts for mr Ballard. he and Bullin Compleeted the Plann and Sartifacates fitt for return and Bulin went from here. EbenZ began to pull our flax. a t home.

Clear. mr Ballard Sett out to go to Dresden to meet Col o North & others of a Committee to lay out a road to y e point. mrss Trask been here all day. Ebenz is gone to the meddow. mr Town is gone to the hook, his hors is in our Pasture. I have been at home, my right foot is Sweld much. at home. mrs Trask and infant here.
Clear and Pleasant. I am here alone Except EbenZ, he has been Cuting Stalks. I have Done my house work and put up gardin Seeds. at home.

Clear. I returnd home attended by John Chamberlin. Calld at Son Jonas, his wife is very unwell; at Peter Jones s and Son Lambarts, they are well. find my famely well on my return. Nabby has made my Soap Since I left home. I found 80 flees on my Cloaths after I Came home, which I brot from mr Catons. a t Ditoes and others.

Clear and warm. Ebenz went to mr James Pages and Drove a Cow and Calf here whi ch mr Ballard has bo t of Said Page. mr Ballard is gone to run a line on y e Eas t Side y e river a mile back. I have been at home. Old mrs Kenny was here. at home.

X. Birth James Hinkly Junr Dagt. XX. Clear and warm. I rose and hoed Some before my Door, was Calld by James Hinkley Junr to go to new france. I went. his wife was Deld of a fine Dagt between 12 and 1 O Clok aftern, and I returnd. then went to Son Lambarts. Son Jon a and wife & Dagt Pollard there. mrs Capin & Sally Webber were here while I was absent. a t James Hinkleys at new france. Birth34 th . receivd [8/7]. mr Burtuns Vesil was launchd20 m before I came home.

Clear. I have been at home. Dagt Town Came here foren n , my other Dagts aftern mr Gill and his wife Dind with me. mr Ballard and Cyrus at Coart. mrs Page, Dingley and mrs Blunt were aded to my Compy to Tea. Son and Dagt Town and mrs Blunt Sleep here. a very warm night. at home, had Compy.

X. Birth mr Rolandss Son & 4 th Child. XX. Cloudy. I was Calld at 1h morn to See the wife of mr Rollands of the South Parrish. Shee was in Labour and was Safe Deld of a fine Son at 6h 30 m , and I returnd home a t 1 h pm. left my patients Cleverly. I receivd as a reward 9/. Cyrus and Ebenz brot Poles for our beens and Sett them. Cyrus wen t to mill. a t mr Rolandss. Birth 32 nd . receivd 9/.

Clear. I attended funeral of Old mr Smith this aflern. I Calld at Son Lambarts as I wen t , my Dagt went with me, Dagt Pollard went allso. my Son Cyrus attended. at the house of Cap t Ezra Smith. the remains of his Father interd.

Clear. I was Calld to See mrs Dingly this morn, find her very unwell. her Throat is Soar and Shee puk t blood. I Sent her Some honey. I attended Lecter after noon. was to See David Pollards Child, it has been very Sick. Dagt Pollards infant is very unwell. Dagt Lamb t was there. I am informd that Ruth Lee Expird this morn at 10h. a t mr Dingleys and a t meeting. Rev d mr Farrer performd. mr Gillit made the firs t prayer. Death mrs Lee.

Clear and very warm. I helpt about house forn, had a very Dull turn the middle of the Day. Esq r Cony here y s morn. I went to See mrs Dingly a little before night. mr Ballard went and took Tea. we went on Board the Schoner. Pally went to Son Pollards, finds her my Dagt not very will. Dagt Lambar t is very Comfortable. at mr Dingleys. Pally to Son Pollards & Lambarts.

Clear and very warm. mr Gill, his wife & infan t here, mrs Carter allso. Dagt Lambar t went home. Son Ephm been here pulling flax y s Day. Jerusha Capin been here with my Dagt. mr Ballard Sett out for Penobscott. a t home. Dag t Lambart went home. mr Ballard [Sett] out to Penobscott.

Clear and very warm. the widdo Savage Dind here, Son Pollard and Jon a allso. they Conducted their wives & Childn home. Jessy Bullin here inpertuning Patty Easty to go and work for his Marm. may Divine goodness direct me to Some one Sutable to assis t me in my business. a t home.
X Cloudy. I have been at home mr Philip Norcros s , his wife unwell. I was Calld at 1h morn. we had a very rainy night. a t Philip Norcros s . Dagt Lamb t 24 years old ys day.

Clear. I returnd from mr Gills, his wife is more Comfortable. I Salted my Beef, mended Cloaths and did other matters. Sally Cocks Dind here and Susa n Cowen took Tea. Cyrus went to mr Randals, bot 2 qts W I Spirrit, paid Cash 4/9. a t Ditoes. Sally Cox, Susan a Cowen here.

Clear part of the Day, Showers of rain & haill. I planted Cucumbers and workt in my gardin. wen t to See mrs Dingly, Shee is not So well as Shee Could wish. I Calld at mr Livermores, all well there. I took my Candles of the Stiks and put them in to the Box, have it full and 1 DoZ n more. at mr Dinglys and mr Livermores.

X. Birth Josiah Norcros s Dagt. XX. rainy foren. I was at mr Norcross, his wife Deld at 3h pm of a Dagt. I receivd 8/1_ and returnd home at SunSett. Nabby Jewel left my house and business at the middle of the Day bound for Monmoth, accompanied by mr Allin. I paid her 1/1_ as Shee pas t mr Norcross. at mr Norcross. Birth 24th. Nabby Jewel left here.

Clear and warm. Son Lambart Came and Cutt my pork and I Salted it. I feel very unwell but have worried thro Doing my work. mrss mc Master & her Dagt Bell Calld here. Cyrus had of Saml Cony 1 gal n Molases and 1/2 gal n W. I. rhum, price of both was 9/. we have it on mr Gills acount. a t home. mrs m c Masters & Bell here.

Clear. I Came from mr Kitridge a t two hours morn to mr Lambarts, find my Dagt more Comfortable. Shee has been very Smart all Day. mr Ballard and Bullin returnd from their Tour of Surveying in good health. I Came home at near Sun Sett. a t Son Lambarts. Birth

Clear part of y e Day, Cloudy and a Sprinkling of rain at Evn. I have been to Son Lambarts, all well there; at Son Pollards, their babe is Some better. Son Jon a s little Sons there. at my Sons Pollards and Lambarts.
Clear. mrss Stackpole returnd to mr Dingleys after breakfas t . I went with her and Spent the remainder of the day. at mr Dingleys.

Clear. I went after Breakfast to Son Lambarts, they were Seting out for to go to mr Capins. I assisted them to Dress & See them Depart, then went to Son Pollards, they are well Except little Hannah. Shee is better than Shee was. I Came home near night. Cyrus & Ebenz housd our flax. Cyrus then went to the hook, bot at F Browns & Stratns _ g ln Spirit & 1 lb Coffee, paid Cash 6/. Son Ephm Came to Sleep here. at Sons Pollards & Lambts, the latter went to Varsalboro.

B Clear. mr Ballard, my Self and Cyrus attended public worship. I Came to Son Lambarts at noon. we Supt there after meeting. Shee wrode home with me and Cyrus went home with her. Sally Cocks went to See mrs Kimbal, Shee was Deld of a Dead dagt on the morn of y e 9 th inst. the operation performd by Ben Page. the infants Limbs were much dislocated, as I am informd. at Son Lambarts and at meeting.

D Snowd y s morn, raind, moderate most of the day. mr Ballard and Cyrus went to meeting. Ephm Came home for his Cloaths, he Seems in hast to return. they are well at his Sisters. at home. Ephm was a t home.

B rainy morn, Clear middle of the day, Showers aftern. Polly has been to her Fathers, Shee informs me they had haill there. Capt Abr m Pages wife Calld here. I have been at home. a t home. Polly Wall went to her Dadys.
B Clear. Son & Dagt Lambart, Eph, Jessy Bullin & Sally Cocks Dind here. I have not been So well as I Could wish. we Dind on Roas t Spairib. a t home. my Childn, Some of them here. Jona here at Evn.

B Clear. I attended meeting, was at Son Pollards at intermition, all well there. my Self, Cyrus, mr Pollard, his wife and Child n and Patly Easty, mrs Moore and Thankfull Godfray took Supper lhere at Son Lambarts. mr Patrage & wife Came there. a t Meeting and at Son Pollards & Lambarts. Dagt Pollard was at meeting, mrs Wesson allso.

B XX Clear. I attended worship at y e fort. Son Lambart had his infant Baptised by the name of Allin. I Calld to See Son Pollards infant, find it a little more Comfortable. mrs s Hodges there. Phillip Bullin Supt and Sleeps here. Son s Cyrus & Ephm here. a t meeting, Sons Pollards & Lambarts. Bullin Sleeps here. my Dagt Town is 38 years old this Day.

B Clear. Cyrus and Ebenz went to meeting. mr Calf performd. I wen t to See mrs Dingly aflern, Shee has been unwell but is more Comfortable. I was informd there that the house of Revd mr M c Lain was Consumd by fire 23 inst, and a Daughter los t her life in it. a t mr Dingleys, his wife is not So well as Shee Could wish.
Cloudy. I have been washing, mr Ballard makeing fence round y e Barn yard. Cyrus went to mr Lambarts. Phillip Bullin Came here at Evn with an intent to Learn y e art of Surveying. a t home.

Clear Part of y e Day. Nabby washt. I workt in my gardin, Planted [ ] musk & watermellon, Squash and Beens. a very high wind, raind at night. Sally Cocks Came here, tarries all night. Cap t Littlefield here. a t home. Sally Cocks Sleeps here this night. Jery Heartfrd was hur t by a board which the wind blew of a [house].

Clear and warm. mr Ballard been prepareing for a Tour of Surveying. Bullin left here after breakfast. my Dagt Lambart Came here to do work for her Dady. EbenZ been to Training. mr Cast Chosen Captain of the uper Company. at home. Dagt Lambart here. mr Livermr & Bullin took Breakfas t here.

Clear part of the Day. I have been at home. my Dagts Dind here. mrs Town and Dagt from pitts tn , they, Excep t mrs Town, took Tea. mrs Pitts & Sely, and Son Ephm, Peggy Wall & James Burtun, Son Jona & Sons, my Dagts Childn & Rachell Capin all here to Dinner Dat Pollard & Childn & Jonas Sons Sleep here. at home, had Company. this regament Met at Shubal Hinkleys.

B Clear. my famely, all Excep t my Self, attended worship all Day. I Did aftern, & Calld to See Shubal Pitts s wife. Shee was faint and went out of meeting. Son Ephm Came and Supt with me and returnd home. at meeting & at Shubal Pitts s .

X. Birth mr Pillsburys Dag t . XX. Cloudy. I was Calld at 6h morn to See mrss Pillsbury who was in Labour. Shee was Safe Deld a t 1 h pm of a fine Dagt. I wen t from there to Doct Colmans Store, bot 2 oz Spermaseta @ /4_ /9. Do Cammomile. y d vial & Salts, & Box Snuf /8. from there to See mrss Child, find her better. I returnd and took Tea, receivd 6/ and then Came home, attended by mr Pitts s Boy. I left mother and infant Cleverly. at mr Pillsburys & Childs. Birth 50th. receivd6/ as a reward. EbenZ [Cool] Left here.

Clear part of the Day. mr Town went to the hook, returnd here at noon, then Sett out for home. Cyrus went to Varsalbor o to Seek Some help for me, did not Suckseed. I have Done my work in y e house and wed gardin and Sett french Turnips.

Clear and warm. I have been at home. we Bakt and Churnd mr Porter and wife & mrs Foster Dind here and the wife of W m Pitt took Tea. Sarah Densmore & Ruth Rockwood here at Evn g . at home. mr [Cleark] & [Wesson here].

Clear part of the Day. A man from new Sharron took Breakfast here. mrs s Dingley & Nancy & mrs s N Hilton here. mrss Grow here aftern, took Tea. Ebenz returnd from monmoth. I have been picking wool, Pally allso. at home. mrs Grow here.

Clear and Cool. Polly went to her Dads aftn & Patty to Son Jonas. I have been at home, fiting my Coverleds for weaving. Becky returnd from the hook at Evn g . mr Ballard been Survey for mr James Page. at home.
Clear. I was at Ditoes, my patient is not very well. we find Shee has an inclination to Drink rhum. Shee Drank about one quart, her illness increast. at Ditoes.
Clear. I did my work foren, went to Son Lambarts aft n , find my Dagt unwell, tarried all night. a t Son Lambarts.

Clear. mr Ballard been Surveying for mr Bridg. I have been at home, Done my house work. Patty Livirmore here with Nancy Dingly. Ebenz puling Flax. Son Ephm Came here, brot 13_ lb Veal from Son Lambart. my Daugt is Cleverly. a t home.

Birth mr Waids Dagt. Clear. mr Trask Came for his wife. Patty went to the hook in y e Boat with her. Old Lady Cony Calld here. I was Calld a t 5h pm to See mrs s Waid who is in labour. Shee was Deld of a Dag t at 7h Evn. I returnd home at 10. mr Waid was gone to trooping. we had thunder & rain in y e night. at mr Waids. Birth 42 nt .

Clear and very pleasant. my Dag t Lambart Came here this aftern, her Husband Came at Evn and waited on her home. Eph returnd our hors and Sleeps here. Ebenz been to training half the Day. I paid Ebenz two Dollars. a t home. Dagt Lamb t here. Ephm Sleeps here.

Clear and warm. mr Ballard and Cyrus went to Coart. Dagt Town and mrs Blunt wen t from here. I have workt in my Gardin and Endevourd to make my milk pans Sweet. Ebenz been haying, Betsy help t do hous work and pik t wool. mrs Blunt left 6 lb flour with me. at home. I gatherd 4 quarts String Beens in my Door yard.
Clear. I have been at home, feel a little more Comfortable but not able to perform what I have to Do. a t home. receivd a Letter from mr Ballard 20th ins t .
Clear. I have been Coming flax, 6 lb _. mrs Savage & Dagt Ballard Dind & took Tea here. I knitt on a Buskin aftern. at home. mrs Savage & Dagt Ballard here.

Birth Joseph Youngs Son. Clear. I have been Doing my house work. we had a Calf Butcherd by mr Lambart. I Cleand y e head and feet and Bak t . mrs Savage Came here to See me. I was Calld to See y e wife of Joseph Young at 6h Evn. Shee was Deld at 10, her infant Expird at 11, it was a Son. at Joseph Youngs. Birth 25th. ye Child Expired an hour old. 5th [ ].
Clear. I have not been So well as I Could wish this day. our men Cleand the Store. Betsy helpt do my hous work, we Churnd and made a Small Chees. a t home. feel very unwell.
Cloudy and Some rain. I was Calld at 10h morn to See mrs s Baly who is in Labour. her women were Calld near nigh t . I have been Exercisd with a gripeing pain. a t mr Balys in the North Parrish.
Clear. I have been at home, had a grea t Deal of work to do, have no help. Ephm & Ebenz finish t pulling our flax. a t home.

Clear and warm. I Did matters about house foren, Sett out at 11h morn in Persuit of help in my houshold business, and Spining. went as far as mrss Davis s but find no encouragement. returnd home at Evng. feel Some fatagud. I bot of moses Sewall 4 yds black ribbond @ /10 pr yd, 3/4, 1 y d _ @ /7 /10_, 2 Skeins Silk @ /4_ /9 d , and piece Tape @ 1/1 one Do @ /9; total 6/9:_. a t mrss Daviss and other [housen] below here.

a rainy Day. I returnd from mr Norcros s , left his wife more Comfortable. have mending things & makeing Baggs for mr Ballards Tour into the woods. Son Jon a made me a pres t of a Beef s heart and Some Apples. Ephm & Ebenz Butcherd a lamb. Eph Sleeps here, Phillip Bullin allso. at mr Norcros s

Cloudy Some part of the day. I was Calld to See Grifins youngest Child, it Seems very unwell. I returnd and a mrss Austin Came to me for Some advice, Shee being not So well as Shee Could wish. my Dagts were here yesterday, mrs s Pitts allso. I Sent to mr Ezekiel Pages for Patty Easty to Come here. Shee Came and Confis t that Shee took our property in Cash twice the Sumer past, and likewise promist to make restoration. the matter is not yet Setled. God grant Shee may be led to declare the truth and, if posible, make restitution to all whome Shee has injured of their property. at home Grefins to See a Sick Child. a mrs s Austin here for advice in Case of illness.

B Clear. I was Calld to See Cap t Littlefields infant who is afflicted with a rupture. I recommended the application of Brandy to y e part affected. they inform me that [J o ] Page Says it mus t be opined, which I Should think improper from present appearance. Son Eph m Sleeps here. a t Capt Littlefields to See his infant. Ebenz wen t to Monmoth. Cyrus Came home.

B Cloudy Day, raind at night. mr Ballard and the young men wen t to meeting at the fort, the Girls to the hook. I tarried at home. mr Georg Brown & Phillip Bullin Dind with us. I have been at home, Did not feel So well as usual. I had a very Severe fitt of y e Cramp last night. mr Ballard & y e Girls rose to my assistance. at home. Georg Brown & P Bullin Dind here.

B Clear and very warm. I attended worship at the fort. Peter Parkers younges t Child Bapiesed by the name of John Ruggles. I Calld at Son Lambarts, they are as well as they have been. the Babe is relax t yett. I was Calld to mr Robbins a t 10. a t meeting, Son Lamb ts [&] mr Robbinses.

B Clear and very Cold. I left mrs s Byrns and hir Babes as well as Could be Expected. I wrode on hors back to Col o Sewals, but Could not Cross the river and was at the Col os all night. I Cros t the at mrs Byrnss & Colo Sewalls.
Clear. mr Wickson here, he and EbenZ & Son Ephm Reapt our wheat & Stord it in the Barn. my son Sleeps here. I have been at home, feel much fatagud with my work. at home.

X. Birth Anton y Brackets Son. XX. Clear Part of the Day, rain at night. I have Swept my Chambers & lower rooms, & Done other matters. Pally mended me a quillt. I was Calld to See the wife of Anthony Bracket at 9h Evn, was fatagud with my hors & the bad roads. Shee was Deld of a Son a t 11. I tarried all night, mother and infant are as well as Can be Expected. a t Anthony Bracketts.
Clear. I have been at home, Doing hous work, part washt Baggs & blanketts which mr Ballard bro t home from the woods. Polly Wall Came here from Son Pollards. at home washing.

river on foot Clear and Cold. I Crost the river on foot from Colo Howards to mr Burtuns, Came to mr Pollards, was Conducted from there home by mr Whiten in a Sleigh. arivd a t home a t 2h pm. Phillip Bullin here makeing a plan, he tarries all night. I was Calld at 8h Evn to See mrs s Mory who is in Labour. at Colo Sewalls. Cros t the river on y e ice. at mr Morees.

B X. Birth Ephm Burges Son. XX. Clear and Comfortable. I was Calld at 8h morn to See the wife of Ephm Burges who was in Labour and was Safe Deld of a fine Son at 10. I left her Cleverly. at Ephm Burgess foren, at meeting aftern and at mr Crags. Birth 33 d . I Came home from mr Burges s a t 3h pm, then walkt to meeting. the remains of Rhuth Lee were Deposeted in the house of worship and after Service were Conducted to the Burying ground of the Hon b Daneil Cony, and there interd. mr Crage Calld me to See his little Son who is unwell. I Calld to See Dagt Lambart, Shee is some unwell. at mr Crages & Son Lambarts.
Cloudy foren, a little rain. I have been at home. Dagt Lamb t here. mr Ballard been prepareing for his Tour of Surveying. a t home.

Clear. I have been to mr Dingleys, Dagt Pollard allso. mrs Dingly Came here, Dind & took Tea. mrs s Livermore and her two oldest Dagts & her Son Alpheus here to Tea, Cap t Ab m Pages wife allso. at mr Dingleys foren, had Comp y aftern.
rainy. I have been at home, prepared a medisen for [ ] Cough and knitt at Evn g . a t home.
Cloudy. I have been Doing house work & kniting; been at home. Polly makeing the Bed Blanketts. mr Ballard writeing. at home.

X. Birth Elijah Hinkleys Dagt. XX. Cloudy. mrss Hinkley was Safe Deld of a Dagt, her first Born, at 6h morn. I left her and inft as well as Could be Expected after Breakfast. receivd 9/ for my own Service & 1/6 for the hors. I wen t to bed and had Some Sleep, was Calld about noon to See mrs s Byerns. it raind and I had great falague in geting there, find her very unwell. her women were there but She got more Comfortable and they all retird to their own homes. at mr Hinkleys & mrss Burnss. Birth 50th. receivd 9/ as fee & 1/6 for hors.

Cloudy, Snowd & haild a t nigh t . I have been at home. Son Town Sleeps here. mr Ballard & Cyrus went to help raise a mill fraim for mr James Bridg, it was began but not finisht. at home. Son Town Sleeps here.

B Clear. mr Ballard & Ebenz attended worship. Cyrus Came up and wen t aftern. all my Children who reside in this place took Tea with us. Dagt Ballard Sleeps here. Ebenz wen t to winthrop for a Compas, wrode Son Jon a s hors. a t home. my Child n here at Evn.

X. Birth mr Wests Son & 2 nd Child. XX. Cloudy and Some rain. I was Calld at 11h morn to See the wife of mr West, who is in Labour. Shee was Safe Deld at 1 pm of a fine Son. I left her at 3, receivd 9/. mother & inft were Cleverly. I was Calld to Tim Pages. very [rainy]. at mr Wests. Birth 45 th . receivd 9/

raind the most of the Day. Cyrus Sett out this morn, went to Varsalbor o and Conducted Rebeckah Robbins & Patty Moore here. they are Come to Spin for me, we finisht picking my wool. I have been at home. at home. Becky Robbins & Pally Moore Came to work for me.
Clear part of y e Day. I have been Doubling yarn & Sewing raggs. the Girls went to visit my Dagts aftern. Son Town Sleeps here. at home.

Clear. a t Ditoes. Sally Cocks went from there, I went to Son Pollards aftern, tarried at Son Lamb ts all night. my Dagt very unwell y s night. a t Ditoes & at Son Pollards. Patty Easty Came here aftern to work for me.

Clear foren. I went to See my Dag t Pollards Dear little Babe, it has a Sweling on the throa t . it broak and discharged some this aftern, and the Child Seems more Comfortable. I Calld at Shubal Pitts s door, his wife is unwell; at mr Pillsburies, find him very low, but I think not So Sick as when I Saw him last. my Dagt Lambart went to visi t mrss Kitridg this aftern. at Son Pollards & Carters Store & mr Pillsburies.

Clear and warm. I have Done my house work and ironing. mr Pitts and wife, Son Ephm & Polly Wall Sleep here. EbenZ been giting Stalls into the barn. at home. Shubal Pitts & wife here. Dolly Wall Came here.

Cloudy, Some rain. I was at Sons Pollards & Lambarts, met with Something disagreeable from Sally Cocks which took the Comfort of my visit away. I Came home, Slep t but little. at my Son Pollards & Lambarts.
Clear. I have been at home, very unwell the most of the Day. I washt my wes t room aftern. a t home.
Clear. I have been at home, Combd flax. Son Ephm Sleeps here. at home.
Clear part of the day. I have been at home, washt & washt my kitchen. Cyrus went to mill. we killd 5 Chickins. at home.

B Clear and pleas t . Cyrus & all the Girls attended at the fort. Heman Robins & EbenZ Moore here after meeting. I have been at home. Ephm Came and Dind with me and returnd home. a t home. Robbins & Moore here.

B ] Thwings Son. XX. Clear and Cold. mr Thwing Sett out for mrs Eastman to take Care of his wife who Cep t Chamber all day and was Deld a t 5h pm of her Third Son. he arivd a t 7 with her Nurs. I tarried all night, my patient Cleverly. At mr Thwings. Birth 59th. Saml Norcs s inft interd.
B Clear and very warm. I was a t home all Day, had a very ill turn a t Evn. mrs Ficky here, eat Dinner. a t home. feel very unwell.

A Clear. we all attended public worship Except Polly Wall. Polly Town Came home with me. Shee left her Fathers famely well on friday last. Revd mr Stone pirformd Exceeding well this Day. at meeting & at mr Dingleys.
Clear, a Cooler air. Sally Cocks Came and washt for me. I dres t 6 lb Butter, have been very unwell. Sally ironed my Cloaths and washt my Bed rooms and kitchen. at home.

Cloudy foren. mr Ballard Sett out on his Tour of Surveying a t 10h m. Cap t Abram Page and Bullin went by water with the Stores, my husband wrode Jonas hors to fort hallifax. Cyrus wen t to his Service. Jona and his wife went home. at 12 O Clok y s Day, I had 13 Dollars and one Crown restord with an acknoledment that it was taken unjustly out of my husbands Desk. the persons name I forbear to mention here. [(god forgive the transgressor).] a t Sons Pollards & Lambarts. left Senna & Rhubarb for their Babes. Pally left here pm, went to mr Bullins.

Clear. I have been Combing flax, finisht what I have of last years groth, had 24 lb Tear. Cyrus and EbenZ finisht husking our Corn. Cyrus went & got 1 Bushl wheat ground. he informd me that Capt Tobey had a Child lately Deceast. mr Child here, wishes me to go and See his wife who is unwell. Bro r EbenZ here. at home.

Clear and not So Cold. I Came home a t noon. I receivd 9/10_ for my Service. I was Calld Directly to See mrs Dingley who has taken Cold and is Exercised with various Complaints. I tarried there this night, made use of remidies which gave Some relief. at Ditoes & at mr Dingleys. receivd of mr Thwing 9/10_. mr Waid workt here.

Clear and Cold. mrss Stackpole, her granddaut er Nancy, Dagt Pollard and her Child n Dind, they, Cap t Cocks Lady & mrs s Pitts took Tea here. mr Ballard been Surveying for Esq s Cony & Bridg.I have been at home. Polly Wall lef t here after Diner attended by Abisha Cowen Jun r , I paid her 3/ which was all that was Due to her. a t home. had Comp y Polly Wall left here. Dagt Pollard & Childn Sleep here.
Clear. I have been at home. Scholt my Bed rooms & Bed Steads. Pally is not returnd yet. Jabis Clough & wife here. a t home.

X. Birth Anton y Bracketts Son. XX. A rainy Day. I left my patients Cleverly after Breakfas t and Came to Son Jonas; a very heavy Shower while I was there. my Son Conducted me as far as y e meeting house where we met with mr Dingly, who Desird me to go & See his wife who is very unwell. I Calld there, Shee Seems Some better. I arivd at home at Dusk, feel fatagud. a t Ditoes & Son Jonas & mr Dingleys.Birth 47. receivd 9/ as a reward.
Clear. I have been at home washing. Becky washt for mrs Dingley. Phillip here makeing plans of their Survey. at home washing.

X. Birth mr Morys Dagt. XX. Clear and very Cold. mrs s Mory was Safe Deld at 1h y s morn of a Dagt, her 6th Child, Eaqual number of sex. I tarried thro the nigh t , my patients Cleverly. I had 1 hours Sleep, took Breakfas t , receivd 6/7 in part of my fee, 2/6 remains Due. I arivd at home at 10h morn, find Cyrus is not So well as Could be wisht. at mr Moress. Birth 54 th . receivd 6/7. Due 2/5.

Clear and Cold. mr Ballard went to mr Conys Store. he purchased a Small Shovel and tongs, Cost 9/6. Esq r Cony here. Dagt Pollard and Childn went home from here. Patty Town has help t me do my work, I feel fatagud & unwell. at home. Dagt Pollard & Child n n left here. Ephm here at Evn.

Clear. Patty Moore & Becky Robbins Dind & took Tea here. Son s Town & Ephm to Tea. Phillip Dind. a mr Rusell breakfasted. we have been prepareing for mr Ballards Tour. Dag t Lambar t & rusha went home. at home. Dagt Lambart went home.

Clear and very pleasant. Dagt Pollard, her Child n and Son Jon a s Sons left here after we Dind. Son Cyrus attended them home. I gatherd beens and took Care of fethers & Swept the Store after they left here. EbenZ Cole has workt with our OXen for mr Child. a t home. Dagt Pollard & Childn went home.

Cloudy part of y e Day. I have Scourd yarn and quilld for Becky to weave. Shee Drew a piece into the Slay this morn; Lining warp and it is filld with wool. Daniel Livermore here, informd me that mr Pickfords infant Expird the 24 ins t and is to be interd this aftern. a t home.

Cloudy. I have knitt 60 purls on mr Ballards Legin. he went to mr Savages and had his hors Shod, Cyrus to work here. Polly Did y e house work. Capt Deans Vesel went pas t here at 10h Evn g going up to the fort. a t home.
Clear and windy. I was with mrs s Byrns. Shee is very unwell. at mrs s Byrnss.

haild. I was Calld to See mrss Dingley a t 3h morn, Shee had an Excessive pain in her head, and Severe Pukeing. we gave her a Decoction of [Cherytreoine] which relievd her. mr Bedinton dind here. at mr Dingleys.

B Clear and pleast. mr Ballard only, wen t to meeting from here. I have been unwell. Cyrus has a bile on his hand. mr Rice Calld on me to go & See his infant, but I am So unwell I Could not. mr Pitts Calld here at Evng. a t home.

Clear and Cold. mr Ballard had a fitt of y e Collic. I was Desired by mr Sprague to go and See his wife, he Came without a hors and I did not go. I have done house work and waited on my husband, feel very much fatagud. at home.

X. Birth Jim y Pages Son. XX. Cloudy and Some rain till noon. mrs Page was Deld about 5h morn of a Son, her first Born. I lef t her and infant Cleverly and arivd at home at noon, acompanied by Old mr Page. Son Jona here. Old Lady Hamlin, mrs s Burtun, mrss Dingly, Ruth Rockwood & two of her Brothers took Tea with me. at [mr Pages. receivd 12/. Birth 46th].
rain foren. the Girls washt & began to Spin my wool. Pally Bakt Some pies. Cyrus went to mrss Pages for Some apples. I wen t to mr Dingleys to See mrs s Stackpl. Ephm Sleeps here. at mr Dingleys.

Clear. I have been at home assisting about my work. Becky began to weav my Coverled; it did not work according to my wish. we Calld my Dagt Lambar t here, who gave instruction how to weav y m and we were able to perform. mr EZekiel Pages wife Calld here. a t home. Dagt Lambart here.
Clear. I have been at home, washt and am much fatagud, went to bed at 11 h Evn. at home.

X. Birth Son Lambts Son & first Born. XX. Clear and very warm. Dagt Lamb t had her women Calld this fore n , and was Deld of a Son a t 6h pm. Shee was very ill but thro the grea t goodness of God, Shee and inf t are alive and as Comfortable as Can be Expected. I am with her this night, Dagt Ballard allso. a t Son Lambarts. Birth 36th. ["UncleAllen, July 22/96" written here; does not appear to be in Mrs.Ballard's writing.]

X. Birth Robirt Abbots Dagt. XX. Cloudy. mrss Paten Dind here. I went to Lecter aftern, A mr Bowers performd. I Calld at mr Pollards and Son Lambarts. mrss Duttun wrode my hors home. I wrode home afterwards. mrs Abbot Deld at 3h morn of a Dagt. at Lecter, mr Bowers Performd. Birth 43 d .receivd 9/ as a reward.

Clear. I was Calld to See mrs s Burtun at 1h 20m morn, Shee Seemd to get better. we wen t to bed at 3. I spent the forenoon with her and went to visit mrs Thwing. was Calld from there at 2h PM by reason of Polly Burtuns being Burnt in a most Shocking maner by her Cloaths takeing fire. Shee being in the Chamber with her Brother Billy, we used Every measure for her rilief but all in vain, Shee became a victim to Death. at mr Burtuns & mr Thwings. Polly Burtun was Burn t .

Clear. I have been at home, washt the west room & ketchen floors & did other work about house, brewed &C. mr Ballard been to Winthrop to purchase wheat & rie, lef t it at Chandlers mill for to be ground. at home.

X. Birth Charls Dingleys Dag t . XX. Clear and pleasant. I was Calld about noon to See mrss Dingley who was in Labour and was Deld of a Dagt a t 2h pm. I left her & infant Cleverly and returnd home in the Evng, find Son & Dagt Town here. at mr Dingleys. Birth 56th. fee recd [Feb] 6th, 1797.

Clear and very Cold. I was at mr Burtuns, his only Dag t Expired a t 11 h 30 m morn, her death ocationed by her being burnt.a distresed famely they are, the mother expecting Soon to be Sick. I tarried this night, mrs s Burtun is allmos t over whelmed with Sorrow. God grant her his gracious aid in this visitalion. at mr Burtuns his Dear Daughter Expired. mrs Cocks & Duttun assisted to lay it out.

A Clear and very Cold. I Spent this Day with the afflicted family of mr Burtun, their Child interd after the public Service was Ended. I returnd home much fatagued. Son and Dagt Lamber t Came here on their return from his Fathers and tarrie all night. a t mr Burtuns, his Child interd at Evn.mrs Peirce Expired last Evng.

B Clear and very Cold. I was Calld out of Bed this morn to go & See my Dagt Lambart who is very unwell, her throat has Canker in it. I nurs t her up, Shee Seems more Comfortable and I returnd home at Evng. mr Ballard, Cyrus, EbenZ wen t to meeting. at Son Lambarts, my Dagt unwell.

B Clear morn, Cloudy aftern. Son Town and wife left here after Breakfast homeward bound. they Conducted Rhoda Pollard home. Jack Ballard is with us yet. mr Ballard only of our famely attended Public worship. at home. Son Ephm & Dagt Lambart here at Evng.
Clear. I went to Son Lambarts to have a goun made. Dagt Pollard & her Childn Came there, Ruth Rockwood there allso. Ebenz Cole Sleeps here. mr Wicksone been thracshing wheat for us. a t Son Lambarts.
Clear and not So Cold. Cyrus went to winthrop to bring our meal home. he bo t 19_ lb Chees @ /9 pr lb . I have been doing house work, boiled my neets feet and tripe &C. a t home.

X. Birth John Abbots Son. XX. Snowd all Day. I have been washing. I was Calld at 10h 10m Evn to See the wife of John Abbot who was in Labour. Shee was delivd at 11h 30m of a fine Son. I tarried all night. mrss Felps & Dany attended us. at John Abbots. Birth 57th. Since my marriage is 42 years.
Clear and Cold. I was Calld to See the wife of Isaac Hardin at 12h pm, tarried there all night. mrs s Cumings and Briggs there. my Patient did not Seem very Sick. a t Isaac Hardins.

Clear. I went to See mrs s Child. mrs s Dingley went to Son Pollards with me. I Calld at mr Hamlins to See his Dady who lately left Oxford. my friends are well there, he informs y t John Wolcott Cutt his own Throat jus t before he left there. at mr Childs & other friends.

Clear and pleast. I Came from mr Dingleys a t 11h morn, left his wife more Comfortable and am prepareing a Syrrup for her. I made it & Sent it by mr Dingley at Evn. a t mr Dingleys. mr Waid workt here.

Clear. mr Binjamin here for a Lamb of Son Jon a s ys morn. I went to Son Lambarts & mr Pilsburys, he is very Sick. I Calld at Son Pollards, they are as well as usual. John Braly bro t Patty here. an mr Pillsbury s & my Sons Pollards & Lambarts.

Clear. I have been at home. Collins Moore & wife Dind here. mrs Burgin, her Dagt & grand D t took Tea. I wrote to Doct Barton and Bror Collins Moore. a t home, had Comp y . I wrote to my friends a t Oxford.
Cloudy. I have been washing I [sic] the things which were brot from the woods. A dirtyer parsil of Cloaths I never Saw. at home. Cyrus went to Pittst n .

Clear. mr Waid, Finny & Benjamin helpt git us wood. Cyrus went and brot Dagt Lambt here, he then conducted us to the hook. I purchased at mr Roland Smiths goods to the amoun t of £2/10/4; we returnd. Son Lambart Came and Spen t the Evn g here. I was this Day informd by a mr Moore of Green of the Death of Bro r Ew d Davis. at the Hook. Son & Dag t Lambt here.I was this day informd of y e Death of Bror Ew d Davis.
Clear part of the Day. Son Jon a Dind here. Cyrus went to Savages, he Chopt wood for [mr] Leach. I have Done my house work and nurst the lamb, it seems likly to live. at home.
Cloudy, more rain afternoon & evn. I have been washing. mr Prin and another man Dind here. EbenZ workt with y e OXen for mr Child. a t home.
Clear. I have been at home, wound quills & knitt on mr Ballards Buskin. a t home.
Clear and pleast. I have Done a large wash this Day and knitt 30 purls a t Evn. mr Baker of Sharon Dind here. mr Ballard been to Son Jonas, his Childn are more Comfortable than they were. a t home.
Clear. I went from mrss Byrns s to Old mr Whites, my patient is not well yet. at Ditoes & at mr Whites.

Clear and pleast, but Cold. the ice is Stopt in the river. mr Abram Page broke thro and crost with his Canoe. I went to See mrs Dingley, find her Cleverly. mrs Densmore Came there. I was Calld from there to See Anna Partrage who had Convulsed turns, but is revivd. I Sett up till after 1 O Clock. a t Ditoes and at mr Partriges.

Birth Ficky s Dagt. Clear and Pleasant. we had our Piggs Butchered by Son s Jon a & Lambart, Son Town assisted. I was Calld about noon to See mrss Ficky who was in labour and was Dild of a Dagt at 3h pm, the wives of Shubal & James Hinkley attended. I Came home before Sun Sett. a t mr Fickys. Birth 1 st Phillip Sleeps here.
Clear and Cold. mrs s Leach washt for me, I paid her 1/6. I have been at home, did my house work. [at home. mr Joys Sister to Death].

Clear and pleas t . my Childn who reside in this Town were here Except Ephm, Ruth Rockwood allso and Polly and Patty Town, they Dind and took Tea. mr Webber workt for us. mr Ballard Drove the teem. I have been at home. it is 11h Evn. at home. my Childn here.
Clear. I have been to Son Lambarts. mrs Gill & Dagt Pollard there. Capt Stackpols Lady Sleps here. a t Son Lambarts. mrs [ ] here.
Clear. I went to mr Dingleys to See mrss Stackpole who Sett out home attended by mr Goodin. Son and Dagt Ballard & Lambt & wife & mrs [D ]. at Ditoes. mrs Stackpl [ ].

Clear and very pleasant. mr Ballard and my Self attended Lecture at y e meeting house. there were but a Small number there. I Calld to See my Dagts Child n who have the Cough, they are no better as yet. a young man by the name of Rice Sleeps here. Becky got my Coverled out and Shee and Patty went to mr Dingleys at Evng. a t Lecture, mr Pillsburys, Son Pollards & Lambarts.
Clear. I have been gathering Seeds & herbs and Cleand my Sellar. Cyrus came home at Evn. at home.

B Clear and very Pleast. I attended public worship. the Ordinance of y e Super administred. mr Robert Fletcher were admited to full Communian and their Children were Baptised; the first by the name of Anna; 2, Mary; 3, Susanna; 4, Zeruah. they behaved with great decency, may their tender minds be inpres t with their Duty as they mature. mr & mrss Dingly returnd from Boston. I went there bu t found they were gone to mr Livermors, So Returnd without Seeing them. at Meeting. mr Robart Fletcher & wife were taken into full Communion with the Church and their Child n Baptised. my Son Cyrus is 40 years old this Day.

A X Birth David Pollards Second Dagt. XX. Clear and pleast Day, Cloudy at Evn g . I was Calld to See mrs Pollard at 4h mor n , Shee was Deld at 5 of a Daugh t , her forth Child. I left her and infant Cleverly and returnd at 7. my Dagts and their husbands, Ezra & Eph m , mrs Eunice & Lucy Town Dind here. Jona Ballard allso, the 2 latter Sleep here. at Leut David Pollards. Birth 11th. October 6 th I recvd 9/ of mrs s Pollard as a reward.
Clear and pleas t morn, Cloudy after n . I left mrs Burtun & infant Clever ly and Came home at 9h morn. Sen t for mrs Leach to wash for me, She Came. at mr Burtuns.

Cloudy. I have not been so well as I Could wish. Lucy Town helpt me do my work, I bakt, tho much fatague. I have seen 63 revotutions of the Sun. it Seems as if I Could not labour much longer as I have done. May God grant me grace to Endure with patience what I have to Sufer. a t home.

Clear part of the day. Es qr Cony Dind with us, my Dagts Pollard & Lambart and their Childn allso. mr Weeksam work t here this day. EbenZ Cole began to work for us, he has agreed to tarrie one month. Phillip Bullin here this night. I finisht futing a pair of hoes for mr Ballard. a t home. a Severe Snow Storm began this Evng.
Clear and Cold. I have been at home prepareing for Thanksgiving. I feel much fatagud this Evn g . at home.

Clear. I wen t from mr Abbots to mr Damrins to See his wife who is not So well as Could be wisht. I returnd home at noon. I receivd 9/ of mr Abbot as a reward. Son Jona Dind here. Son Pollard Came here for Ephm s Sheep. mr Ballard gave Rhoda Pollard a Lamb. at Ditoes.

Clear. I Came from mr Hardins after breakfas t . left his wife [about] house. I wrode in a Sled with mr Briggs to the Court house. went to See mrs s Burtun, find her as well as Could be Expected. I Came home at 1 h pm, do feel very much fatagud. Patty Town tarries here this night. a t Hardins & mr Burtuns.

Clear and pleast. mr Waid workt for us. Son Jona Came and Conducted me to his house after we Dind. mr Dingley here, paid me 12/ for service done for his wife & famely and medisin. I was Calld from my Sons between 10 & 11h Evn to See the wife of Tim y Branard. I Should have wrote Rhuben. mr Floid attended me. a t Son Jonas & Rhuben Branard.

Clear. mr William Moore Conducted me home, I gave him 2/3 to pay mr Dinsmore for the use of his Sleigh to Conduct me to the patient above mentioned. I Calld and warmd me at mr Pollards. Sally Fletcher went from here. I gave her 4/6 for her Service with me, I allso gave to mr Moore to pay mr Dinsmore for the use of his Sleigh, 2/3. at mr Frenches, Reedfield. Sally Fletcher went home. I was at mr Heartfords at Evn.
Clear. Polly Wall wint to Son Pollards to help her, young mrs s Hamlin Came here and Dind with me. I have been at home all Day. I have been at home.
Clear and pleasant. I have washt and feel very much fatagud, am unwell. had bu t little res t this night, have been at home all Day. a t home, washt.

Cloudy part of the Day. Son Town here, informs me his wife is not able to walk by reason of a wound Shee receivd 3 weaks ago y s night. Becky Robbins went to the hook this aftern. we had [ 1 Bushel new Corn ground y s day ]. at home. Son Town here.
rainy. I have filld quills for Becky & helpt Do the hous work, and knitt on a Legin a t Evn. mr Ballard been up to the fort. a t home.

Clear & Cold. I have been at home. Son Jona, his wife & two younges t Child n Came here. my Dagt & Child n Sleep here, a young man by the name of Churchel allso, from Keritunck. at home. Son Jona, his wife & 2 Child n here.

X Birth mr John Brooks s Dagt & first Born. XX. Cloudy morn rain and wind after Sun rise. I was Calld at the first h morn by W m Brooks Esqr to See the wife of John Brooks who was in Labour and was Safe Deld at 3/4 hour after 4 of a Dagt, her first Born, mrs s Bond & Williams were Calld as assistants, I left her and infant Cleverly and arivd at my home at 11h 30m. I receivd 9/ Cash and a pair Shoes @ 6/-15 as a reward. I put my house in order and Cook t a Dinner. mr Ballard went to the fort and Cyrus to the hook after I Came home. a t Esqr Brooks. Birth 6 th. receivd 15/ as a reward.
A rainy Morn, very windy Evn & Night. my famely, Except myself, attended worship at the fort. Son Ephm Came here and Dind. at home.

Clear and windy. EbenZ workt with y e OXen for mr Child. I have been washing. Polly went up as far as mr Carters Store. I was Calld to See mr Waids infant, it has the hooping Cough, is very ill. at mr Waids to See their infant. Cyrus informd me y t Dagt Town fell of their hors.
Clear & pleasant. I have been at home, filld quills, Did house work & knitt. mr Baker of keritunk Dind here. David Wall & wife took Tea with us. a t home.

Clear part of the day. I have been kniting and Did Some washing. mr Ballard wen t to mr Shepards. mr Tibbits of Sharon & mr Bond were here. Cyrus went up Street, Polly has the tooth aick. a t home. finisht kniting A Pair of Buskins for mr Ballard.
Cloudy and Snow on the ground y s morn. I was with mrs Byrns all day. Shee is very unwell all Day but Seems Easier at Evn, and rested better this night. at mrss Byrnss.

X. Birth Saml Damrins Dag t . XX. Clear morn, Cloudy Day. I was Calld at 2h 15 m y s morn from mr Partridges to See the wife of Saml Damerin who was in Labour. Shee was Safe Deld of a Dagt, her first born Child at 10 h . I left Mother & infant Cleverly & arivd at home at 1h 30 munits. at mr Damrins. Birth 51st. receivd 9/ as a reward.at mrs Byrns s .

Clear and pleasant. mr Ballard & Cyrus went to Court. I have been doing house work, do not feel so well as I Could wish. Phillip Bullin took tea with us this Evng. I have tried my hoggs lard. I bo t 7 oz snuff & paid for 1 oz which I had of mr Carter last friday, Cost 2/3. a t home.
Clear and Cold. I have been at home, Done hous work and helpt mrs Leach make my Sausages. mr Ballard went to a meeting of patitioners. I paid mrs Leatch 1/6 for this Days work. a t home.

Clear and moderate. Polly & Patty Town went to Son Pollards. I went to See Nancy Dingly who is unwell with the Cough. Came home and wen t to See mr s Burtun, find her Cleverly. I bot at mr Carters Two Shawls @ 4/6 Each which I gave to Son Towns Dagts. I Calld at my Dagts. allso, /9 worth of ging r Bread. at mr Dinglys and at the fort Settlement. we had a Lamb come this Day.

Clear. mr Ballard went to Dresden. Son Jona Came for me to go and See his infant who is not So well as they Could wish. I Calld at mr Dingleys to See their infant, it has the Cough but is not so ill as it has been. Dagt Ballard is as well as Could be Expectd. Jack went home with us, Le faett & Hannah are with their aunt Hitty. at Son Jonas. at mr Dingleys.

Clear. BiZer Benjamin & a mr Rice workt here geting wood. Son Jona & Joseph Foster junr Dind here. a mr Coulridg Breakfasted. Becky & Patty left here at 11h 30 m morn homewd bound. I have been at home, puting my house in order. I have had 47 yards made into Cloath & two Ragg Coverleds Since the Girls Came to work for me. Some part was Spun before. at home. Becky Robbins & Patty Moore went from here to their own homes. Son Ephm Sleeps here.

A Clear and pleasant. Cyrus only of my famely attended worship foren, mr Ballard and my Self aftern. Huse left here this morn bound for monmoth. Polly Buterfield to Cap t Williamss. mr Ballard, my Self & Cyrus partook of a fine Turkey at Son Lambarts after meeting. Bulah Calld here. Son & Dagt Pollard with their Child n were at Son Lambat s . at meeting and at Son Lambarts. Caleb Huse left us.
Clear, Cold & very windy. Son Jon a here, he Conducted his Nurs home, his wife is as well as Can be Expected. I have been at home, do not feel so well as I Could wish. a t home.

Clear and pleasant. I have done Some washing. Hepsy Bakt Some mins Pies. mrs Leach here, brot home yarn Shee had Spun for me. Son Town has been to the hook on business, he is gone on for home, left here after Sun Sett. at home. Son Town went home.

Clear and Cool. mr Ballard Sett out at 9h morn for Monmoth to Survey for a mr Bishop. Mary Buterfield Came here Early this morn. Shee Slept at Son Lambarts last night. Shee has washt for me. mrs Leach has Combd flax for me this Day. Sarah Neal here to warp a web, Shee took Tea with us. Hepsy Brown Came to work here again. at home. mrs Leach Combd flax for me.
Clear. I have been at home, Bakt Bread & mins Pies, feel much fatagued a t Evn. a t home.

X Birth Saml Davis s Son. XX. Clear. my Dagt Lambart Came here with her Babe. Ezra Town & Son Ephm took Breakfas t , I gave Each of them 6/ to purchace them Bibles with. Dolly Spun me yarn for Candle wicks. mr T Page and P Bullin Dind here. I was Calld to See the wife of Saml Davis who was in Labour and was Deld of a Son at 7h 30m Evng. I tarried all night. a t Saml Davis s . Birth 12th.receivd 6/7 as a reward. Dagt Lamb t here.

Snowd & blowd all day. mr Ballard and EbnZ winnowd our wheat 5_ bushels. I began to knitt my Self a pair of hoes and mended a pair Small Cloaths for mr Ballard. he went to Son Lambarts, find that my Child n got home well las t Evng. a t home.
Snowd the most of the Day. I have been makeing Pies & other matters. mr Ballard & Cyrus have been to the Stores. at home.
Clear. I was Calld at 1 h 10m morn to See the wife of Saml Norcros who is unwell. I Spent the Day there. at Saml Norcros s .

Clear and not So Cold. Old mr Luke Lambart Calld here to See us. Patty Town wen t from here to Son Lambarts. Phillip Bullin planing here. I have been at home, did my hous work and Cleand my rooms. a t home.

X Birth Rhuben Branards Son. XX. Clear. mrs Branard was Deld of a fine Son at 6h morn, I left her and infant as well as Could be Expected and returnd to Son Jonas at 9h, find him more Comfortable. he Conducted me home aftern, I was not long there, when he Came and Carried me to See the wife of David Pollard, who Seems unwell. a t mr Branards. Birth 8 th. receivd 9/. as Son Jonas and David Pollards.

X Birth mr Heartfords Dag t . XX. Clear and Cool. I was Calld to See mrs s Heartford at 10h last Evng. Shee was Deld of a Daug t , her first born at 1 h 20m this morn. I left her and infant Cleverly and arivd at home at 5. I went to bed and Slept till 9. I feel much refresht by the res t which I have taken. I receivd 9/ for my performance. I have Done my work about hous thro great Dificutly, was in Bed part of the Day. a t mr Heartfords. Birth 16 th. received9/ as a reward.

Birth John Chamberlins Son. Clear, a Cool morn. I was Calld at 3h morn to go to John Chamberlins. I was attended by Saml Jackson, arivd a t 7 h . my Patients illness Came on rapidly 6h pm and Shee was Deld at about 7 of a fine Son. I tarried all night. Josiah Norcross Infant interd this Day. a t John Chamberlins. Birth 48 th . mr Ballard returnd [home] from his [ ] this Day.

Clear part of the Day, Snowd Some. Cyrus wen t to pitts t n to mill. Sons Jona & Lambart Sup t here. Daniel Livermore made a presen t of an Almanack to my Son Cyrus. mr Ballard and EbenZ been giting wood home. a t home. Sons Jona & Lambart herea t Evn.

Clear and pleasant. my Brother Eben z Moore Dind here, he informs me that mrs Pilsbury Expired this morn. Dagt Lambart Came here with her babe, her husband Came to See her home. Huse and his uncle Sleep here. Son Ephm is 18 years old this day. I have been at home, done but little work. at home, Son & Dagt Lambart here. Son Ephm is 18 years old this Day.
rainy part of the Day. I boild & Sised 30 Skeins of Lining yarn, help t Do house work. Becky got the Blanketts out, 20 yards. a t home.

B Clear and pleast Day, Some rain at Evng. my famely all attended worship at the fort. the Ordinance of the Super Administred. mr Ballard and I went to mr Childs a t intermition. we Calld a t Son Lambarts after meeting, the Dear little Babe has the Cough yet, as Severe as Ever. at meeting & mr Childs & Son Lambarts. Son Ephm Came and Sleeps here.
Clear Day, Cloudy at Evng. Son Jon a Came & Dind with us. we had roast chickens. his wife and Child n went home. I have been at home, knitt Some and helpt do hous work. at home. my Childn went home.
Clear. mr Waid helpt mr Ballard giting wood. Cyrus went to the hook and fort. I have Done my house work and washt, Cut meet & apples for Pies. a t home.

Clear foren n , Cloudy aftern. I have been Carding Tow, Polly Catcht a Basket full on fire with the Candle and burnt them. I feel much fatagud. mr Ballard been to Son Jonas, all well. at home. a very rainy night.
Clear and very pleast. Cyrus & EbenZ harvisted the Corn on the Entervail. I have been Baking & Brewing & ironing, Polly Wall helping me. at home. we began to harvis t Corn.

raind Some. mr Capin Dind here. I have been at home, filld quills and helpt do hous work. Patty Eastey Came here this afternoon and Subscribed her name to an Acknolidgment that Shee took a quantity of Silver money out of mr Ballards Desk unjustly las t August, and promis t to restore the Same. Phillip Bullin and Polly Wall were the Witnes's. a t home. Patty Eastey here.

Clear and pleast. mr Ballard wen t to Winthrop, he brot home 3 Cheeses which he Bot of mr Joel White, and Two pots of butter which he bot of mr Saml Cumings. he brot in to our house las t Evn, which he purchased at the hook, 2 quarters Lamb & 28 lb of Cod fish. I began to futt a Stockin for mr Ballard this afternoon. at home. am Some unwell with a Cold.

Cloudy. I left mrss Byrns not So well as Could be wish t , Came home attended by mr Graves; find my famely well. I was Calld at 6h evn to mr Partridges to See his Dear little Child who M c Causland had Struk Down with a Billit of wood, and its life was Dispared of. I find it a little revivd. I Spen t the night there. at Ditoes and a t mr Partridges to See his Child who m c Causland had almost Deprivd of life.

Birth mrss Byrns s Twins, both Dagts. A grea t Snow fell last night & y s morn. I am at mrss Byrns as Shee was Siesd with her illness very Severe about noon. Calld her women a little before Sun Sett and Shee was Safe Deld of Two Daughters before 8h Evn. there was but a Short Space between the Births, they are fine Children. may God long preserv them. I Sett up with my Patients, mrs Canre and Benn Whites wife allso. it was a very Cold night. I was Calld to mrs Byrns yesterday. mr Ballard & Dingley broke thro the ice and got me over the river. I was fatagud in Climbing y e bank on the other Side. mr Dingley & Graves assisted me. at mrss Byrnss. Births 52 & 53. I receivd 9/ in par t of my fees. mrs Stickny gave me 6/ which mrs s [Can ] Sent me. there is 3/ yet my Due.
Clear. I was Calld at Evn to See mrs s Burtun who was unwell. old mrs s Hamlin there, we went to bed together. a t mr Burtuns.

Clear. I have Bakt & Brewed and Done my house work. mr Capin and Lady, Son & Dagt Lambart here a t Evn, I was Calld by mr Linkorn to See his wife at 8 h Evn, left my Company to wait on them Selves. my Patient had her women Calld and was very ill all night. a t mr Linkons. august 7 th recd my fee of mrss Linkorn .

Clear, Except a little rain in thee morn, it Thawd all day. Cyrus been to mill to pittst n , had wheat, rie & indian Corn ground. I have been at home, did house work. mr Ballard was at the fort, informs tha t Theop s Hamlins youngest Child is burnt Badly. a t home.

X Birth Ebenzr Hewens Dagt. XX. Clear morn, Snowd before 11 h . I was Calld by a mr Morril to See the wife of mr Ebn zr Hewin the at 3 h morn, Shee was Safe Deld at 5 of a Daug tr , her 4th Child. I left her and infant Cleverly and arivd a t home at 11h morn, mr Hewin acompanied me and gave me 9/ as a Compensation for my Service. a t Ebenz Hewen s . Birth13 th . receivd 9/.

B Clear and pleast. mr Ballard & Cyrus attended worship, Polly and my Self have Colds and did not. mr Lamb t & wife and the Babe here after meeting. mrss Rice Sent for me to See her, Shee being very ill. mr Ballard Conducted me there. I gave her Melleot Tea which brot on perspiration ang gave releaf and I returnd. Calld to See Son Pollards Childn who are unwell. at mr Rices. Son & Dag t Lambarthere.

A X Birth mr Kimbals Son. X X Clear and moderate. I was Calld a t 6h morn from mr Burtuns to mr Kimbals to See his lady who was in labour and was Deld at 4h 30 m Evn of a Son. I returnd to mr Burtuns at 7, was Calld back at 10, by reason of the infants bleeding, made use of means which preventd it. tarried there thro the night. it snowd. a t mr Kimbals. Birth 2 nt. receivd 9/ as a reward.

B A hazy morn. I left mr Partridges, his Child a little revivd. Came home a t noon. mrs s Dingley Came here to inquire after the Childs welfare. I went into the prison and Saw the irons put on to M c Causlands hands, an aufull Spectacle he is to behold. may God gran t his pardoning mercy for all his offencies and giv us all Sutable reflections; may the Dear Babe be restord to health and its Parents make a wise improvment of this Chastisment. at mr Partridges. mrs Dingley here.

A X Birth mr Linkon s Dagt. X X. Snowd. mrs Linkon was Deliverd of a Daugh t at 4h morn, the infan t apeard Destitute of life for some time but revived and I dres t it and left that and the mother as well as Could be Expected, and arived at home at 1h pm. Polly Town Came home with me from Son Lambarts. Eph m Sleeps here. a t Ditoes. Birth 4 th. fee recd augs t 7 th of mrs s Linkon.

A X Birth mr Finney s Second Dagt. XX. Clear. I was oblidged to rise at 2h morn to take Care of Sally fletcher who was Seisd with puking, I gave her the tincture of red pepper, Shee Soon revived and went to rest. I went to bed again, was Calld at 4 to go and See mrs s Finny who was in Labour and was Deld of a Daugh t at 5h 30m. the infant Survivd about one hour and Expird with out any aparant distress, it Seemd to be Struck with a mortification. I put on the grave Cloaths. tarried till aftern and was Conducted home, left mrs s Finny as well as Could be Expected, Shee has had the hooping Cough. our hors was Sick directly after we arivd at mr Finnys. a t mr Finneys. Birth 14 th . the inft Expired being one hour old. receivd 6/7 augs t 26.
A rainy. mr Ballard & Cyrus went to meeting. Ephm Came here at Evn and Supt with us. I have been at home. mr Hamlin had 1 oz Salv. at home.
B Clear. my famely attended worship foren Except my Self. Cyrus Came up; he and my Self went aftern. mr Cushman performd. a t meeting & at mr Dingleys.
Cloudy, Snowd a t Evn. I have been at home, Cleand my Coverled warp, mend a waistcoat for mr Ballard & knitt Some. mr James Page Dind here. Becky went to y e hook. Becky [ ].

Clear. mr Ballard & Cyrus went to Town went to Meeting. mr Capin Calld here. Phillip Bullin Sleeps here. mrs Dingley & Nancy here to Tea. Tho s Kenny Sen t me 6/ by my Son Cyrus. I have been at home helping do house work & knitting.
