I have had my house work to do and, wors than all my hard work, to bear frowns (from one who Calls him Self my friend) and taunts from Hepsy for takeing proper Care of my house, may God forgiv their Erer and enable me to perform the trust reposed in me as the head of a famely, as he Dictates to me is right. at home and O my Trouble.
Clear. I have been at home, workt some in the gardin and did my house work. God grant me Strength to bear my toil and affliction. at home.
Clear day, raind at night. Doct Cony here, left medisin for Hepsy. I have workt in my Gardin, Sett Curent Bushes &C. at home & Doct here, Hepsy is Better.

Clear and warm. I was Calld by Lem l Devn pt to go and See his wife who is unwell. Shee got better and I went to See mrs s Gill. Lucy Town has Seen 15 years this day. I returnd and tarried at mr Devenports, his mother and Syntha Runels there allso. at Lem l Devenports & mr Gills.
Clear and Pleast. I have been at home. mrs Baxter here. I Sent 21 Skeins Lining warp to mrs Wellch to weav. at home. [mrs Baxter here].
Clear and pleast. I sorted apples, Cut and Strung Some to drie. Indiens here. at home.

Clear. Rhoda Pollard & Han h Ballard here foren. I was Calld at 1h pm to go and See the wife of James moore at Read field, find her very unwell. mrss Gould and Taylor tarried there this night. at James Moores.
Clear and pleast. Jona, his wife and Asa Peirce are gone to mr Crosbys at Belgrade. Hannah Stayd with me. mr Ballard and James Gilly got wood. at home.

Clear and a Cool air. I have workt Some in my gardin and done my hous work. mrs Parker and her 3 youngest Childn here. Polly Bolton & Sally Farewell took Tea here. mr Ballard & Cyrus at Coart. Dag t Ballard & Ep hm went to Asa Pierces. at home.

Clear. mr Ballard has had a fitt of the Collic. I Could not leav him. Dagt Ballard went to mr Gills, mrss Crosby with her to meet Bror and Sist Barton. I harvisted Poland Beens that were [ripe]. at home. Hannah Ballard here.

Clear. I have been takeing Care of my pickles and other matters and been to my Sons to see his Dagt. Shee is not any better. we gave her the Bark of Shumake and a Clister. mr Ballard Surveying for mr Swetland. mr Floid Died Sudenly this morn. at my sons. Death of mr Floid.

[X. Birth Bunkers Dagt. X.] raind very hard at night. my Patient was Deld of her first Child, a daug t , a t 5h pm. mrs s Soal, Pitts & Moody wen t home. I tarried all night, and the other women. at Ditoes. Birth 26th. recd 7/6 [1/4]. [19]
Clear. I have been at home. mr Ballard & Cyrus at meeting, Eph m at home with me. at home.
Clear part of the day. mr Ballard & his Sons were at meeting. we took Diner at Son Jonas, my Dagts were both there. they Calld here as they wen t home. raind at night. at Son Jonas. my Dagts here.

Clear. mr Ballard, Cyrus, Ephm at meeting. I was at mr Pitts s a t intermition, was so unwell after I returnd that I Could not Eat nor Sett up till near night. Dagt Ballard and mrs s Crosby were here. at meeting.

rainy. mr Ballard only of our famely went to meeting. mr Hodges here, he wishes for Polly to tarrie with me. I went to See Son Jonas Dagt, find her in less pain than Shee was yesterday. Doct Cony was Calld to see her, he gave her rheubarb and Calomeel, left El x vit l & Stot n . I Came home before Supper. mr Ballard went there at Evn. may God grant his Blessing on the means used for the Child. at my sons. Cony to See Hannah, gave her Calomel.
raind very hard the most of the day. I returnd at 1h pm. Son Jona, his wife & Sist Gitchel and dagt Lambd took Tea with me, Allin allso. a t Ditoes. [20]

Clear. the Babe is no better. Son Pollard Lambd went for Doct Cony to Come and See the babe, he was absent. Son Pollard Came and Calld Doct Colman who recommended Castor Oil; we made use of it. Cony Came at Evng, he gave it as his opineon it was Dangerously ill, advised to pursue the Cas t Oil which we Did. it was very Sick thro the night. the Doc t left Snake root, Cammomile and an other ingreedient and Parrigoric which was used acording to his direction to a punctilio but to no affect, the illness still increases. at Ditoes. mr Stone there on a visit. the babe very Sick.

X. Birth Luis Hamlins Son. XX. Clear and warm. I was Calld a t 2h this morn to See the wife of Lues Hamlin who was Safe deld a t 6 of her firs t Son and Second Child. I went from there to See mr Thwing who is very unwell. Calld to See mr Crages inf t , it has had Sore on the throat, is mending. I Calld a t mr Burtuns, bo t a shaul, price 7/; at Crosbys, bot 1 piece tape @ 1/. returnd to mr Hamlins and dined, recd two Crowns as a rewd. wrode home in a Shaise accompanied by mr Hamlin. at mr Luis Hamlins. walkt to Springers hill then wrode. Birth 17 th . recd 13/2 d as a reward. Polly Hodges Came to liv with me.
Cloudy part of the day. Geny & W m Black and Betsy Pollard took Tea here. mr Mudgett here on Business with mr Ballard. at home. Polly had Comp y .

Clear. mr Ballard Surveying for Esquir Lyon. mr Floid s remains were intered. I have been doing hous work and Some in my Gardin till 3 O Clock after n , when I went to son Jonas. his Dagt is much as Shee was. S. Juett Foster & his wife there. Son Lambd is 28 years old y s day. at my Sons. the Child is much as She has been. the remains of mr Floid were interd this day.
Cloudy. dagt Lambd and Son went to mr Gills. I have been at home. a t home. [21]

Clear and pleast. I left mrs s Thwing and inft Cleverly and returnd home at 10h morn, find Son Ephm at work here. he is anointing for the itch y s Evng. mr Kitchredg here at Evn. at mr [Thwings]. Son Jona & wife Supt here.

Clear and Cold. mr Ballard left home at the riseing of y e Sun to N2 to Survey. I have washt and Cleand the North room. Cyrus waited on Jonas wife & daug t to Asa Peirces, went at Evn and Conducted them home. Bill Cuting wood. at home.
Clear. I was at Son Jonas. mrs s Titcomb and her Son there. mr Ballard got wood. at Son Jonas.
Clear and pleast. I went to Son Lambds, tarried all night. did not Sleep but very little. at Son Lambds.
Clear Excep t Showers. Son Lambd brot his wife and babe to mr Gills, tarrie there y s night. mrs Parker Sett out for Boston with her famely. at Ditoes. my Patient unwell yet.

Clear Excep t a very light Shower aftern. Son Jona discharged the deb t for which he has been Confined one weak, and returned to his famely. he, his wife and Revd mr Stone took Tea with us this aftern. may all troubles work together for our good. at home. Revd mr Stone made us a visit.
Clear. Son Lambd took Breakfast here. his wife Came down, we went to See Hannah Ballard, find her more Comfortable. my Dagt Lamb d is 28 years old y s day. at Son Jonas. Dagt Lambd Birthday.

X. Birth James Kenneys 3 d Dagt. XX. Clear. I have been at Hallowell, left home at 4h morn, put the wife of James Kinney to bed; her 3 d Dag t and 5th Child, left them Comfortable. I Calld to See Nabby And s , find her very Low. arivd at home at noone. at Ditoes & at mr James Kenneys. Birth 20th. recd 9/ at Moodys Store.

Clear. I was Calld at 6h morn to go and assist to Put Nabby Andrus in her grave Cloaths. Doct Cony Dissected her, found her Comptaint was in the Uterus, it Contained 1 gal n water together with other Substance. the w t of it after the water was taken out was 7 lb. the Liver w d 3_ lb. the trunk of her Boddy Contained a larg quantity of water. the fros t killd my Vines this night. at mr Andruss. his Dagt Nabby Expired at 6h this morn.

Cloudy the most of the day. Lucy town went home aftern, her Sister Polly is Come to mr Gills. I have harvested Some Beens, gatherd Cucumbers and plumbs. Cyrus is unwell but went to hear Coart. Wigins Spread the flax and go t in part of the stalks. Jon a s wife & mrs pierce here. at home. Lucy Town went home from here.
Some Showers. mrs Cowen more unwell. mrs s Seekin and Welman were Calld. I got but little Sleep this night. at Cowens.
Clear. I was Calld to See mr Brownens Son. Son Lambd Carried his Dagt home and Polly Hodges allso. at mr Browens.
Clear Part of the day. Dagt Lambd & Son dind here and then went home. mrs Saunders here, Dagt Ballard allso. I have been at home. a t home. [22]

Cleare, windy and Cold. I have been a t home. Jona & wife Sup t and Spent Evn g . Bill Cuting wood. Jona brot 2 load to our door and 1 to the Settlement. at home. Expired a t Hallowell, Old mr Norcross.

Clear morn, Cloudy afternoon. James Page, his wife & Childn Calld here, Doct Cony and mrss Fisher allso. mr Ballard gone to Survey the Jaill yard. I was invited to attend at mr Bunkers weding to mrs Fanny Cocx. Son Jona & wife went. Hepsy tarried with their Child n .
Clear. I have been at home kniting. old mr Pitts and Dagt Ballard Supt here. at home.

Clear but Cool. my Daughters and Son Pollard attinding y m Came foren here to welcom their dear aunt. we visited Son Jon a aftern where Son Lamb d joind us. may our meeting be for our good as I Can truly Say it is a Comfort to me. at Son Jon a s. my Dagts here. mrs Crage [there], gave me Tea and [ ].

Clear. I have been So unwell that I Could not Sett up till 2 or 3 o Clock aftern, whin Jon as wife Came in and got water for me to bath my feet and made me a dish of Tea. I had not had So much as a drop of water given me to wet my mouth till my husband Came to dine, when he gave me a little which had been in the house 2 days. at home, very unwell. Hepsy left with out Saying Good by.

Clear. I went to See Nabby Andrews, find her in a viry Distressed Situation. Shee was tap t for the dropsy yesterday. I calld to see little Hannah, find her Some better, went again at Evn. at mr Andrews & my son. P. Bullin went up river to Survey.
Cloudy. I got in part of my Cabbages. a t home. [23]

Clear and very Pleas t . I washt my Buttery and kitchen, Sorted my Apples & Cut Some. Cyrus went to the Settlement, bot _ gl n Sp t , 3 lb Sugar, 1 dos biskit, 1 Car d gt pins, at mr Wes ns & Dexters. Cos t 8/6. at home.
Snowd this foren n . Lydia Nud help t me wash. Hepsy workt Some for her Self. mr Kittridge here and Setled with mr Ballard, gave him a due bill for y e ballance which was Two Dol s 17 Cents. at home.
Clear and warm. I returnd home in a Shais, left my Patient abou t house. Bakt Some Cake and Bisquet and Broun Bread. I Calld at Lewes Hamlins, all well. at mr Devenp ts .
Clear till Evn when we had a shower. I have been gathering Beans & Pees in my gardin, am informd that mrs Andw s is yet living. at home.
rainy. we heard mr Ballard was well on Monday last. I have been at home, Cutt Apples to drie. at home. [24]
Snowd and raind. Jona had 2 OXen Butcherd. I have been at home. mrs Herington here. at home. [14]

Clear and pleast. Son Jona & Bill geting wood. Brot 2 Loads here. I have been at home. Cut apples & Stewed Pumkin allso. am informd by Sally Andrus that the remains of Old mr Norcross are to be intered this aftern. Capt Stones wife Calld here. at home. Funeral mr Norcross.
Clear part of the day. I have Bak t & washt and washt my buttery and kitchen floors. a t home. [25]
Clear and pleast. I have been a t home, finisht Cuting my Specht apples. 3 indiens here, I gave them 2/1 Bush l apples for a Bark. dag t Ballard Sup t with me. at home.
Cloudy and Cold. I have been at home, Sorted my apples, paired and Cut the ones that were roting. mr Ballard makeing a hogg pen. at home.

Cloudy the most of y e day. Dagt Ballard here. Son Lambd took Breakfast with me. Cyrus went to his hous and brot home 4 bushls Corn. I have been at home. Bill got in 4 Bushels of Turnips from our yard. at home. raind, haild and Snowd the most of the night.
A Snow Storm. we are at mr Moores, his wivis Sis t was Calld at Evn g . the patient was very unwell all night. at Ditoes.

this day, by recomendation of the President of the United States, was set apart to Commemorate the Death of Genl Georg Washington. we met at the meeting hous in Augusta where there were assembled the Lodg of Hallowell. Capt Casts Company of malitia and a larg concoarce of people. a prayer Deld by y e Revd mr Stone, an oration by mr Whitwell and a Closing prayer by mr Gillet. at the meeting house on the Death of Gen l Georg Washington, y e aniversary of his Death.
Clear. dag t Ballard and Sister, Ephm and Willm dind here. son Ephm Sleeps here. a t home. [26]

Cloudy and Cold, Snowd at Evng. mr Ballard returnd from N2. he Slept at Son Towns last night, they are all well. I have Bakt Apple Pies y s day. Ephm Came here at Evn, Sleeps here. at home. mr Ballard returnd.
Clear Part of the day. Cyrus and I dind at Son Jonas. Son Lambd Calld there on his return from Boston. Jona from winslow, he has Sold his hors. a t my Sons [ ] Lambd Came home. [27]
Clear. mr Ballard went to meeting. Amos Pollard here on his way home. we Spen t Evng at Son Jonas. at son Jonas at Evn g .
Clear. I have been at home. Old Lady Shaw and Polly Bolton here to Tea. I have done my hous work. at home.
A fine rain. I have been at home. mr Ballard is unwell. at home. mr Ballard unwell.
Clear and warm. mr Ballard had the Collic. I feel very unwell, but tend on him. mrss Crage Sen t for me but I Could not go. at home.
Clear and pleas t . I have done a larg wash. dagt Ballard quilting a bed quillt. a t home. [28]

Clear. I am with my Childn yet. Cony Came and gave the babe an Emetic which had a kind operation but, alas, the Cause is no t yet removed. he gave it Excesive washings with Brandy and red oinions applyd to the belly and feet. we followed his Directions. mrss Haywood and Polly Pollard Sett up with the Child, it was thot to be Expireing a t 4 h morn. at Ditoes. the babe is no Better.

Clear. Son Town here this morn, his famely well. I have houghed my Corn & Beens in thee gard n . Ezra Town & Son Ephm Sup t & Sleep here. mr Ballard hough d Potatoes and planted Cucumbers. Cyrus went to Hallowell for milk pans, Polly washt. at home. Ezra Town & Son Ep m Sleep here.
Clear. Dagt Pollard, Rhoda and Hannah & Sally and Allin Lambd Came here, tarrie all night. I have been at home. at home. Dagt Balld here to Tea.
Clear and very pleas t . I got in the last of my Carrots and Cabbages. Sett ou t 100 young Sage roots. I ironed at Evng. mrs Farewell here. a t home. [29]

Clear and pleas t . I have been at home. Cousin Saml Davis of oxford Sleeps here. Bro r Ebenz Came here with him, Supt with us and went home. Flint Barton & Collins Moore here at Evn. Betsy Cowen helpt me this day, we Bakt mins and Apple pies. at home. Cousin [Davis] & Bror Moore here. Jack Ballard is unwell.

Clear and very pleast. I have been at Son Lambds. mr Ballard, Jona and wife & Dagt, mr Wilb r and wife there. we bot Veall, Chees and Butter of a mr Stevens of Green. I have Spent y e Day helping my Dagt put up her things for removing. they are going to Son Pollards to liv in part of his house. at Ditoes.
Clear. I left mrs Gill more Comfortable, Came home at 10h morn; attended to my work. mrs Trask and dagt Ballard here. mr Ballard and I took Tea there. at Ditoes & at mr Craggs.

Clear Excep t a Shower at night. I houghd my gard n . was Calld to mr Edsons at night to See mrs Collier. Shee was relievd before I arivd. I larried all night. mr Ballard gone to Pownalboro to Coart. at mr Edsons to See mrs Collier
Clear. I was at mr Andrus s , Nabby is no better. at mr Andrus s .

Clear. Dagt Pollard Dind with us. mr Ballard, my Self, Cyrus and Son Jonas famely and Dagt Pollard attended funeral of Nabby Andrus. Revd mr Gillit Presided or Performd Prayers. Thomas Fletcher Expired last Evn his very Sudinly. at the funeral of Nabby Andrus. Doct Barton & Sister Sleep here y s night.

Clear and Cool. I was Calld by mr Dickman to go and See his wife who was unwell. I found the wife of Es qr Belcher there. mrs s Dickman met with an abortion. I left her as well as Could be Expected. I Calld to See mrs s Basford, found her and infan t Cleverly. I was at mrs s Duttuns and Lues Hamlins, he Conducted me home in a Shais. Polly Town Came here. at mr Dickmans. Birth 23 d Polly Town Sleeps here.

Birth Ephm Cowens 4th Dagt. Clear. my Patient had mrss Duttun, Moore and Gould Calld and was safe Deld at 0h 30 m Evn g of her 5 Child and 4 th dagt. I left her and infant Cleverly and arivd at home at 6h. Dagt Ballard Supt with us. mr Ballad is not returnd. I hope he is well. at Cowens. Birth 24th.
Clear. I have done my hous wk, got in [Beets]. Sons Jona, Lambd & wives Sup t , y e latter Slep t . at home, my Childn here.
Clear and very pleas t . I finisht ironing, wen t to my Sons to Tea. mrs Farewell and Dagt there. the quillt was got out this Evn g . at my Sons.
Clear. I have been at home, did my hous wk & knit Some. Ephm a t work here, he is not So well as usual. I made herb Tea. at home. [ ].

Clear and very pleast. mrss Welch here for things for the Sick Babe. mr Ballard went to mr Asa Williams and got my lether Shoes mended. I have been very unwell y s day but have done my hous work. Son Jona here at Evn, Sold a mare to Nathan Tylor, took of him a note for 9 Do ls payable the middle of March; and another, Same Sum, to be paid September y e first in good Shingles. at home.
Clear. mr Ballard Surveying for Esqr John Davis. I wen t to Son Jonas jus t Evn. I took Tea with them. Sabery Price Spun on my wheal. at Son Jonas.
Clear. I have been at home, done my hous wk. at home.
Clear and warm. I have been at home. mrs s Baxter here on a visit. at home. mrs Baxter here.

Clear and very pleast. I have been at home, Bakt Some Cake. this is y e anniversary of my Marriage, 46 years Since. mr Ballard returnd home from surveying for mr Ingerham & others of that Neighbourhood. I Sorted my apples this Evn g and mended a pair of hoes for Son Eph m . at home. it is 46 years y s day Since my marriage.
Clear and pleas t . mrs Welch here. I have brot in Chips, Brewd and boiled apple pareings and done other matters, feel fatagud. a t home.
Clear and Cold. I have put my pickels into the Seller. mr Ballard Surveying at winthrop for mr Smith. at home.

Birth James Moores 3 d Son. Clear and very pleas t . mrs s Welman was Calld after Day and mrs Moore was Safe Deld of a Son at 7h morn. I left her and infant as well as Could be Expected and arivd at home at 3h pm, receivd 4_ lb Salt pork of mr Moore. at Ditoes. Birth 6th. Sons Jona & Ephm hereat Evng.

Clear and Cool. mr Ballard to meeting. Son Ephm here. Dagt Lambd Sent us a piece fresh Pork, Son Jona us a Legg Pork and head and hart of a Beef. I have been at home. Betsy Cowen Came back to Jonas. at home. received presents from Jona and Son Lambd.

Birth son Polard s 2 nd Son. Birth Son Jonas 2 nd Dag t . Snowd and raind y s morn. my Dear Dagt Pollard was a t 0 h 20 m morn safe Deld of her Second Son & 5 t h Child. I Sett up with her till 5. Shee was Exercised with pain & faintness, the infant Seemd very unwell till then. mrs Toll Sett up all night. Dagt Lamb d Came in the morn and I went on the bed and had the finest nap I have had Since the first in this year. mr Ballard Came after me at 3h Pm to Come to Son Jonas wife who is in Labour. Shee was safe Deld at 6 h 30 m Evn of her Second Dagt and 6th Child. I tarried with her till 10 then Came home and Sett with John till mid night. at Sons Pollards & Jonas. Birth 1st. Birth2 nd .

Clear and pleast. I was Calld to See John Davis al my sons, he apears to have the Symtoms of the near aproach of Death. Doct Cony & Colman were Calld. his Constitucion Seemd So far Spent that he was not able to take medisin. he had Severe Spasms which were relievd by Salt and water only, he revivd a little. Revd mr Stone was invited to See him after meeting. he made a well adopted prayer on the Ocation. I tarried thro the night with the Child, Doct Colman allso. at my Sons to See John who we were aprehensive was near the Close of life.
Clear. mr Ballard and Ephm Building a [necesara] house. I have been at home. at home. Bill went home.

Clear and very Pleast. I left my Sons fore n. Came home, took Care of my business. was Calld again aftern to my sons, find John apparently near the Close of life. Doct Colman there, administring a decoction of the pink beet without affect. I tarried all night, the Father and Doct Colman allso. mrs s Saunders Calld to watch. I laid down by y e fire a t 11, was Calld on at midnight when an alteration in the patients breathing took place. it was not able to Swallow after that nor had it any great struggle. its life wen t out as a Candle. at my sons, tarried again this night. I am informd that Dagt Pollard has had trouble with one of her Breasts.

Clear. I have been at home, done my hous work and Some in my gardin. Sister Pollard Dind here and went to Son Pollards aftern. Dagt Ballard went with her, Carried her daugh t there to go to School. at home. Sister Pollard here.
Clear and Cool. I have help t do my washing. mr Ballard is Some better. Dagt Ballard here to Tea, Shee bro t a hen which we Cookt to Ea t there with. at home, had new Potatoes.
Clear. mr Ballard went to winslow. I have been ["at home." - implied] at home.

Cloudy and Some Snow. John, the Son of J. V. Davis, Expired this morn at 1 h 10m. mrss Saunders, Oliv Fletcher and my Self put on the Grave Cloaths, finisht the performance at 3. Doc t Colman Conducted me home at 6. I went on the bed and Slept. Mr Ballard went to Colo Duttuns for hay. Bill Cypher wen t with the Team. a t my sons. John Expired at 1h 10m y s morn. Æ 2 years, 7 months & 13 days. he was a promising Child, how oft are our Expectations Cut off.

Clear. I have been at home, workt Some in my gardin. mr Ballard had the Collic. Doc t Cony gave him a Potion of phisic, he got Easy. it was Lecter but I Could not attend. at home. mr Ballard had y e Collic.

Clear. my Sons Pollard & Lamb d , their wives, Childn and Thos & Paul Lambd & Son Ephm Dind here. mrs s Crosby and mrs Carpander Calld. Son & Dagt Lambd & his Brothers went to mr Capins. Son & Dagt Pollard and their Childn, Excep t Rhoda and Allin, went home. we Spent the aftern at my Sons, they had Company. at Son Jonas.
Clear. I have been at home. Cousin Davis left here y s morn, homward Bound. I have done my work alone, Bakt mins Pies. have felt unwell. at home. Cousin Davis left here. Jack is better, [been hr].

XX. Birth S. Juet Fosters 2 nd Son. XX. Clear. I was Calld to my sons to see the Desection of the Son of Es qr Davis which was performd very Closly. the left lobe of y e lighls were found to be much inflamed, the intestines, allso, in which were 4 interscections, an inftamation of the kidneys and Blather. there were not a singte worm Contained in y e boddy but a small quantity of what the operators Supposed to be the bed in which they had resided. the gaull blather was larg and very full. the opperation was performd by Doct s Colman and Page. Judg North, Son Jon a & my Self were attendants. I was Calld from there to see the wife of S. J. Foster who was in Labour and was Safe Deld at 7 h Evn of her Second Son & 5 th Chil d . I tarried all night, the patient as well as Could be Expected. at my sons. a Desection Performd on y e boddy of John Davis junr. at S. J. Fosters. Birth 3 d . July 13 th receivd as a reward 10/10.

Clear. I have, thro much pain, Done my work. been on the bed a great Part of the day. O God, if it be thy will let the Cup of affliction depart from me, but thy will be done. at home, was very unwell.
Clear. at Ditoes, they are a Distresst famely. I left them a t 10h Evn. at Ditoes.

funeral mr Yeatons Dagt. Clear. Doct Barton & Sister Sett out from here to go to OXford. I went to See mr Andruss famely, they all Seem more Comfortable Except Betsy, who remains weak yet. I Calld at mr Brownens, his Child is Better. the remains of Thom s Fletcher intered this aftern. mr Ballard and I Dined at son Jon a s; his Father and he Sett fire to the Bushes which have been Cutt on our land this Sumer. mrs Baxter Sleeps here. at mr Andrus s , Brownens & son Jonas. Doct Barton & wife left here for OXford. funeral of Thos Fletcher.
Clear. I was Calld to Eph m Cowens to see his wife who is unwell. I was at Colo ["Jabez Cowens." - implied] at Colo Jabez Cowens.

Cloudy and a little rain. I have workt in my Gardin diging potatoes and gathering the last of my Beans that greu the vein. mr Ballard returned from wiscasett at about noon. Cap t Falinsby has made him a present of a black waist coat. my husband and I Sup t a t Son Jonas. my Dagt Ballard dined with us. at my Son Jonas at Evng. mr Ballard with me.
Clear. Son Lamb d Sett ou t for Boston, his wife went home. Jona & wife [ ]. at home washing. thunder & rain a t night. at home. Son Lambd to Boston.
Clear till near night. mr Ballard had 200 25 lb Beef brot home y s aftern, it Cost 3 Dols pr h. I have been at home, done my hous wk & knitt Some. Ephm is more Comfortable. at home.
Clear and pleast. I have been at home. mr Ballard to hook and fort. at home.
raind. Jane went home. Betsy Cowen Came and helpt me fill my Sausages. Cyrus killd our Calf. I feel fatagued but not Confused. at home.

Snowd. I Came home from mr Fosters , find Son and Dagt Lambd & Ephm were Come down. they and mrs s Conry Dind here. we then attended Funeral of the Son of John V. Davis. the procession was from Doc t Colmans and interd in the grave yard by Colo Howards. we Came to my Sons and Sup t , then Came home. my Childn Sleep here. at mr Fosters and a t y e interment of Esqr Davis s Son. Revd mr Bowers attended, mr Stone allso.
Clear and Cloudy by turns. mr Ballard Surveying for Dito. Dagt Ballard in here. I have removed Part of the Banking for y e house and knitt some, finished my Black hoes. at home.
Clear. I was at home till 8h Evn when I was Calld to Son Jonas to See John Davis who is Scholt and brot from Asa Pierces, there he had fitts. I tarried all night. at my Sons, John Davis brot there.
Clear. Betsy and I washt. I feel not So well as I Could wish. Doct Cony wrode by here. at home.

Clear. Sons Lambard & Ephm wen t to Pittstn. Jona, his wife and 3 Child n Dind and took tea. Esq r Davis here. mr Lamb d , his wife and Ephm went home at Evn. Betsy has a pain in her head. I gave her Sage Tea. Shee Bathed her feet. I het Bricks & Put to h r feet. at home. part of my Childn here.
Clear. I have been at home, my husband returnd. at home.

Cloudy and moderate foren, raind aftern and Evn. mr Ballard went to Survey land for mr Francess of Hallowell. the land is near Alp s Lions. I have been Corking the west Side of y e North room. Son Lambd took Breakfast with me. Ephm has finisht a door to the Buttery and hung it and put a hatch on y e W door. at home. Son Lambd gave me straw to fill Some [Beds].

Snowd. Son Pollard here, informs me his wife is very unwell, her Breas t in danger of Breaking. I have been at home, we bak t and Churnd 7 lb 14 oz butter. Doc t Cony here. mr Ballard & Cyrus Signd a petition to Send to Genl Coart. at home.
Clear. mr Ballard, Cyrus & Ephm attended worship. Son Jona and all his famely, Except his Dagt who is at her aunt Pollards, Dind here. we had Beens, Peas, squash and Cucumbers for Saus. at home.
very rainy y s day. we did not go to meeting from here. Son Jona here at Evng. at home.

Clear the most of the day and very moderate. mr Ballard only of our famely went to meeting. Jona Came and puld Some Turnips. Ephm has taken Sallts, he went to Son Lambards toward night. I have Cutt and Stued some apples. at home.
Clear and Cold, windy. I have been unwell. mr Ballard to meeting, was informd that Dagt Pollard is Some better. at home, unwell.

Clear foren, raind and haild at Evng. mrs Herington washt for me, Shee had her Child with her. Dagt Ballard here aftern, mrs Edson allso. I have finished kniting a pair worsted hoes for mr Ballard. he has been Surveying for mr Weston. at home. Dagt Ballard here.
Clear. I have been at home, done my hous work and done for John, but am ungreatfully treated by his mother. may God forgiv her. at home.
Clear. Hannah Seems Some Easier. I went after noon to Son Lambds and returnd at Evn g . my Dagt had an ill night, the infant very wrestless. at Sons Pollards and Lambds.
Clear. Son Jonas Childn all here forn, their marm gone to the Settlement; Cyrus Conducted her. he is gone to the hook. I have been at home. at home. Son Town Sleeps here.
Clear. I have been at home, Planted Potatoes and did hous work. Dagt Ballard, Betsy Cowen and Le faett took Tea with me. Son Ephm Came here at Evng. mr Ballard Surveying for W m Briggs. at home.
Clear. we Bak t , had new rie which mr James Moore let mr Ballard have on acount of my Service at his house. at home.
Clear. I have been at home, gathered some apples from 3 trees which were all mos t Stript by Some hand unknown to me. at home.
Clear. I have Cleand my Seller and done other matters. mr Ballard Surveying for mr Whilwell. Son Jona is in the Care of an ofiser,or in prison for a debt. at home.
Clear. mr Capin, his wife & Dagt Lambd and Bror Barton Dind and Sleep here, Excep t my Dagt who went home at Evn, his Bro s with them. we Spint aftern at my Sons. Mrss Gill dind here. at my Sons.

Thanksgiving Day. Snows. it is now in the 2 nd hour. I have not been to rest for the night. this day is appointed to giv thanks for the mercies received y e pas t year. I feel very ill able to perform my work. Betsy Cowen Came and helpt me. Shee, Son Jona, his wife and all their Childn, Lamb d & famely, Son Pollard & wife, Cyrus & Ephm partook with us at Dinner. Esqr Davis & his Son here at Evn. Betsy was waited on by James Savage to Asa Peirces. at home. my Childn Dind with us.

Clear and very Pleas t . Doct Colman Came and opened my Dagt s Breast, Shee is Easier. the Doc t Conducted me home. I then wen t to Son Jonas, his infan t very sick. we gave it medisin which gave relief. my son returnd from winslow and I Came home late a t Evn. son Towns famely are well. Nabby hail marrid ys Evng. at Ditoes. my Dagts Breas t open d . was at Jonas allso [27]
Clear and warm. I Cutt my Sage and wen t to mr Andrus s , we thought Nabby Expireing. at Ditoes.
Clear. I have been at home. mrs s Baxter went from here aftern. Death off Lyons Child. at home.
Clear. I was a t Cowens, the patient no Betr. at Ditoes.

Cloudy & Clear by turns. I have Scolt my Pickles and done Some other matters, do not feel so well as I Could wish. Dagt Ballard been to Col o Howards. Shee informs me Shubl Pills s youngest Child Expired about Sun Sett. I feel for them in their affliction, may it be Sanctified to them and to us all. at home.
Clear and very Pleas t . I finish t my wash. I heard mrs Parker had fitts, went to See her. Doct Cony bro t me to Jonas. at mr Parker. Shee in fitts.
A very rainy day, attended with high wind. I have been at home. Son Town Calld y s morn to bid us farewell. I removd things East Side the Sellar and Cleard the drane So the water ran of. at home.
Cloudy, raind Some. mr Mofett from N2 Dind here. we had a Loin of Veal roas t . I gathered parsly, fresh and green, from my Gardin for to put in my gravy. at home. mr Mofett dind here.

Clear. mr Ballard workt at planing. Cyrus to the hook, bot _ lb Tea Calld hyson skin. I have made 24 & _ DOZ n Candles. Polly & Sally Farewell here to See Betsy. I do not feel So well as I Could wish y s Evng. at home.
Clear and warm. I went to Shubal Pitts s , find his Dagt very ill. I Calld at mr Thwings, mrs Kider there. I Calld a t my sons, his Babe is better. at mr Pitts s , Thwings & Son Jonas. [28]
Clear and Cold. I was Twice at my Sons, tarried all night. Son & Dagt Lambd and their Childn Came here. they left allin and went to mr Pitts s . at my sons. son Lambd & famely here.

Clear. I feel Some more Comfortable bu t have a pain in my Stomach. Doc t Cony went Past this morn up the road. mr Ballard gone to Parish meeting. Son Lambd Came and Conducted me to his house, his Daugt is unwell. I Spent the night there. at Son Lambard, his Child n unwell.
Clear and Pleast. I have Brewd & Bak t . Betsy gone to See her Sis t Polly who is Sick. wido Farewell dind here. at home. [1]
[Snowd.] Cyrus went to mr Pitts s and Brot Sister Barton here. Bror Came, they Sleep here. I have Bakt and done my other work. Betsy returnd, her Sister is Better. [at home.]

Clear and Cold. the Child n Seem better. mr Ballard Came to son Lambards & we went to son Pollards, find them as well as Could be Expected. we Dind with them. Calld at son Jonas, find his wife Setting up, John very restless. Eph m Came here at 10 h Evng. at Sons Pollards, Lambds & Jonas. John been takeing y e Bark.
Clear. I was Calld to See mr Dingleys inft, it is very Sick. I Spent y e night with them. at mr Dingleys. [2]

Snowd. mr Ballard, Ephm & Betsy to meeting. I have been at home. Bror & Sister Barton Spent ye day here. we are informd of y e Death of mr Heman Robbins s wife of Varsalboro and Patty Sprage of y s Town. at home.
Cloudy. mr Ballard returnd from runing the line between Harlem and Varsalborough. at home. mr Ball d returnd.
Clear. I have been at home. at home.
Clear. mr Ballard returnd from Surveying at N2. I have got my apples into the Seller and washt my Cloaths in the first water. Cyrus to Town meeting. a t home. mr Balld returnd from N2.

Cloudy and Some rain. I have Bake d Bread and done my hous work. mr Ballard has been writing. he had a fall in the Barn which hurt his left Shoalder. I bathed it with Sp t turpintine & Spirit. Cyrus Butcherd a veal for Jona. we had a quarter, w d 11 lb. he afterwards went to Son Lambards, bro t home 3 bushels Corn. at home.

X. Birth John Pages 2 nd Son. XX. Snowd. I was Calld by Alpheus Lion to go and See the wife of John Page. we pas t by mr Hamlins 20m before 9 y s morn. the patient was Deld at 11 of her Second Son and 3 d Child. I left all as well as could be Expected. past mr Hamlins 20 m before 5h pm, reacht home before dark; was Cold and fatagued. at John Pages. Birth 4 th . recd 6/ as a reward.
rainy. I have spent y s day with mr Dingley. A mrs Wiman from Goshan there. the Child very ill, we gave it Senna which brot of much fleghm. it Seems more Comfortable this night. at Ditoes. [3]

A rainy day. Cyrus went to son Lambds and brought 3 Bushls Corn home. Jane Pickt wool and went home at night. I have done my house wk and began a Stockin. mr Ballard been at home. A mr Dogett Came to request his Service in Surveying some Lotts a t N2. at home.

Clear. Hitty Continues her ingrattitude. Esqr Davis Came and removd his Son to Son Jonas. mrs Conry, Jason Pierce & wife, Son Jona and Sabary Price Came to assis t . it is happy for me as I am allmos t fataugd to Death by doing wha t I have. Doc t Barton Sleeps here. at Son Jonas this aftern. John was removd from here to my sons.
at Son Pollards. Doct Howard Calld, thought the Breast not fitt to open. my Dagt had an ill night. at Son Pollards.

Clear and pleas t . I left the Child some Easier and Came home at 10h morn. Son and Dt Lambd here, they have been to mr Capins. Daniel Piper of No 2 was here. mr Ballard deld a plan of his Survey there and Some Sartificates to Carrie to the Setlers, and one Plan for D. Levermore Esqr. a t Ditoes. Son & Dagt Lambard here. [4]

Clear. Betsy washt the rooms. Rufas Ballard and wife Dind here. I Churnd, had 4_ lb butter. Betsys Bror W m dind here. I was Calld a t 11h Evn to go and See the wife of Shubal Pitts. at Leut Sbl Pitts s . there was a Ball at mr Pitts s . [5]
Clear. I have done my hous work, washt potatoes and put them in the Chamber to dry. mr Ballard and my sons are a t Coart. Jonas wife here, Shee brot me Steued Strauberys. at home.
Clear. I have been at home, Cleand mustard Seed. wido Farewell and Dagt Ballard took Tea here. at home.
Clear. I have been at home pareing and Cuting apples to drie. Dagt Ballard and part of her Childn here. at home.

X. [Birth Shubal Pitts s 1 st Son. X.] Clear and Pleast, mrs s Pitts was Safe Deld at 1h 50m y s morn of her first Son & 3 d Child, it wd 11 lb. I tarried till after noon. my Compy were Old Lady Cox, Pitts, Sister Barton, Moody, Soal & Witherel. at Ditoes. Birth 5 th . recd 10/. [6]
Clear. I have been at home. Ephm works here, Bror Lambar d Sleeps here. at home.
Clear and very warm. I have been at home. mr Capin, his wife, Doct Barton went from here. the mr Lambds Calld here. at home. mr Capin left here.

Clear. I have been at home, Bak t . Betsy Cowen washt for me. Elijah & Gidian Barton Came at Evn, they Sleep here. I was Siesed at 10 h Evn with the Collic, it Continued till near morn. mr Ballard got out of bed, made me Some [Lie] and warmed a Brick to pu t to my Stomach. at home. had y e Collic. Bror [Bartons] Sons Sleep here.
Clear. I have been at home, Betsy to her Grand fathers. Doct Barton Supt, Bro r Ebenz here. at home.
Cloudy. I have been at Ditoes & Brownens. Came home and wrote to Bro r Jona. wend again. mrs Mott & Williams Sett up. at Ditoes all night. I wrote Br r Jona
Cloudy, raind at night. we finisht harvesting our apples.
Cloudy. I was at Cowens. mrs s Duttun there. I had the Collic at mr Cowens this night. at Cowen.

Clear and pleasan t . I have been working in my Gardin diging potatoes &C. Old mr Chamberlin Sup t with us. mr Ballard went to Esq r Haywoods at winthrop to borrow money bu t did not Sucseed, he went on Son Jonas acount. at home. Son Jon a returned from Jaill.
Clear. I have been at home. Dagt Ballard Came and did my ironing. at home.

Cloudy. mr Ballard Sett out to go to Son Lambards for Corn. I have Salted the Beef. the trees were Blown down So that Mr B. Could get no farther than mr Edsons with his Sleigh. he wrode without a Saddle to Lambds, got 1_ Bushl Corn and Carried it to mill. at home.

Cloudy all day and very moderate, raind a t night. mr Ballard makeing a plan foren, went to a Parish meeting aftern. Cyrus went to Son Lambds, brot home 2 Bushel of Corn, then went to mill with part of it. Doc t Barton Came a t Evn, Sup t & Sleeps here. I have brot my Beef ou t of the Sellar and repacked it. Boiled the pickel &C, &c. at home. Doc t Barton Sleeps here.

Clear. I have been at home, we washt the Buttery & kitchen. I feel very unwell at Evn, but had to go to the Barn to take Care of Cyruses Cow. I bathd my feet and went to bed. Betsy took Kinde Care of me. at home.
Cloudy, raind a t night. I was Calld at noon to go to mr Capins, arivd there Just at night. at mr Capins.

Clear and Cloudy by turns, not very Cold. mr Ballard and three of Jonas Sons went to meeting, he and his wife and W m Spent Evn g with us. the Bell Cow Calvd in the field, the men got y e Calf to y e barn after meeting. Ephm is gone to Son Lambards. at home. Son Jona & wife here.
Cloudy and moderate till Evn g when it began to Snow. mr Ballard been to meeting. Doc t Barton, Son Jon a & his wife Dind with us, we had roas t Beef. at home. Doc t Barton Sleeps here.

Clear. mr Ballard to meeting. Es q Davis brot his miss and Son here, we gave up our North room to them. Doct Colman Sleeps here, Esq Davis, Son Lambd and famely allso. my husband and I lay by the kitchen fire. at home. John brot here. my Childn Sleep here.

Clear. mr Ballard walkt to meeting, Slip t down and hurt his sholder again. Son and Dagt Lambd took Supper with us. Bitsy went home at Evn g . my husband and I went to Jonas. mrs Conry Sick with y e head aick. at my sons y s Evn.

Clear. Betsy washt the N room and her Bedroom. Son Jona Came in and invited me to go to his house. I went, had not been long there before Davis & Doct Colman & Page Came to administer a Dose of Callomel. I returnd home Soon. at home my Sons.

Clear. I was Calld, after mr Ballard and Sons went to Town meeting, to go to Reed field and See the wife of Amos Lyon, find her Some unwell. I larried all night. mrs Noles and Swanton were Calld, we all had Some Sleep. at Amos Lyons.

Cloudy and moderate. I have removd Chips in y e door yard and knit Some. Jessy Bullin, his wife and Child & her Bror here fore n, took a dish of Tea. Jonas wife here to twis t Some thread. at home. Jes y Bullin & wife here.

Clear and Pleast. mr Ballard and Cyrus went to meeting for govr & senator. I have been removing the Banking from the East Side South End, part of y e west Side and N End of the hous; removd Chips allso. at home. a meeting for choic of Gov and Senator.
Clear and very warm. I have been at home. at home.
Clear. I have Been at home, washt Some and Cut apples. Dagt Ballard & Childn, Son Ephm, mrss Edson & Cole took Tea with us. at home. Compy here.

Clear and pleast. mr Ballard, Cyrus and my Self Dind at Son Jonas, on Calvs head & harslet and other good things. I attempted to wride but found y e road So bad I dismounted and walkt. I was Calld from there to See mrs Heringtons Child who is Sick. Cyrus put the hors in the Sleigh and led her there and home again. I Emtied an underbed and filld it again, Swept the Chambers, made two Beds, mended a Coat for Cyrus and Sewd some raggs for Coverld after I Came home. at my Sons & mrs Welchs to see James Herington.

Clear. I have been at home, mended mr Ballards mitts & knit Some. Es qr Davis here at Evn, he gave mr Ballard 8_ Dollars on acount of the trouble we had with his Son. at home. Esq r Davis here at Evn.

Clear and windy. Wil m Cypher Came here to work, he has been whealing dirt to Bank the house. mr Ballard puting the boards up, Cyrus went to Hallowell. I have been at home takeing Care of my Cloaths which were washt, and doing my housework; feel fatagued. at home. was invited to quilting to mr Andruses but Could not go.

Clear. I have had A Day of great Composier. Bro r Barton writing on the plans mr Ballard has been makeing. mrs Herington washt. Son & Dagt Lambd here on their way to mr Capins. Jane & I Cleand the Skins for Sausages. at home. Doc t Barton, Son Lambd & wife here.
Clear. Son Pollard Calld Doc t Colman to open his wives breas t , it had a Copeous discharg and Shee Seems more comfortable. the infant is Cleverly. mrs s Black came up with her Brother. at Ditoes.
Clear and Cool. mr Edson took my Sons Cow from the Barn this morn. mrs Saunders took Coffee with us this aftern. Son Jona, his wife & Hitty are gone down into the Settlement. at home.
Clear. I have workt in my gardin. mr Ballard gone to Varsalboro to run lines for the Croses. at home.
Clear. I have been at home, workt in gard n . at home.
Clear and warm. mr Densmore Calld here, Moses Parmer allso. I pick t up the apples that were falen from our Trees. at home.
Clear and warm. I have been doing things in my Gardin, puting up the Shelves in my Buttery &c. mr Ballard returnd from winslow. at home.
Clear. I was Calld by son Lambd to go and See his wife who is unwell, his Father there. Ephm workt here. at son Lambds.

Clear. I was very ill with pain, Jonas wife Came to take Care of me before day. Dagt Pollard & Son Lambard and Sis t Barton Came to See me. I got Eas from pain but feel very feeble, my Sis t tarries all night. at home, unwell.

Clear and very hot till aftern when it raind a little. mrs s Bolton and her Son Dind here. Brother Barton, his wife & Brother Flint, Son Town and mr Diar Calld here. Brother B. and wife gone up to Sydna. I have been doing hous work, have had a hard pain in my Stomach all day. Dagt Ballard has had Company this day. mr Ballard & Cyrus got in a Load of hay. at home. Bror and Sis t Barton & others Cald here.

Clear. blessed be the auther of all our favours. I am relieved of my Pain. Dagt Ballard and Belsy Came and waited on me. I have mended Stockins for my husband. Bro r Barton and his Son Luke dind and spent the remainder of y e day and Sleep here. he left Sister at Esq r Reads at Bodenham. at home. am Easy bu t feel weak. BrorBarton here.

Clear and very pleasant. I attended worship aftern, a mr Moody performd. thee remains of Shubal Pittss youngest Child were interd after Service. at meeting. funeral of Shubal Pitts s Child, AE 1 year 9 m and 1 day.

Clear. mr Ballard went to meeting, Cyrus and Ephm to Lambds. Bror Barton and his Son from here to mr Pitts s , Bill to his Fathers. I have been at home. at home. Bror Barton left here. David [Walls] 2 nd Dagt Born.
raind. mrs s Capin unwell, had women Calld at 9h Evng. at Ditoes.
Clear and pleast. mr Ballard was at hallowell and at the meeting hous. I have been at home. Betsy Cowen did my washing for which I gave her 1/6. at home.

Clear and Cloudy alternately, and Cool. I have been at home. mr Ballard makeing a plan n , Cyrus doing things a t y e Barn & Cuting wood. Doc t Barton left here after breakfas t bound to Goshan. at home. Doct Barton Sett out for home.
A Severe Snow Storm. son Lambd & famely went to Son Jonas. Esq Davis and son Ephm Sleep here. John Seems Cleverly. at home.
Cloudy. I wrose before day, feel very unwell but had to do my work and bear other troubles. God giv me grace to bear it. Bro r Barton & son Ephm sleep here. at home. cyrus bot 2 milk pans & 1 pail.

Clear. Mr Ballard at Colo Duttuns, Ephm and Betsy to a Sleigh wride, Cyrus to mill. I washt Boards to Cover milk and washt my ketchin. Esqr Davis Came for me to administer Clisters to John. Colman and Page there, mrs Springer allso. I went again at Evn g . Oliv Fletcher watched. at my Sons twice. Betsy gone to Sleigh wride.

X. Birth Amos Lyons 1 st Dag t . XX. Clear and pleast. my Patient was more unwell y s aftern. two mrs Noles s , her Marn & mrs Swanton there, and Shee was Safe Deld at 5h Pm of a Dagt, her Second Child; the first was a son. I tarried all night. at mr Lyons. Birth 6th. recd 12/. mr Ballard to harlim & Varsalboro

Clear Part of the day and warm. I have been at home, finish t mr Ballards mitts and began Cyrus s . Our OXen Sen t to a mr Pages to be kep t . Timothy Page removd in to the house that mr Roice has ocupied by the meeting house. at home.
Clear till Evn g . I have workt out doors, removd Banking and [hoeud] round the hous. Son Lambard here, his famely well. at home, workt ou t doors.
Clear. I have helpt do a larg wash. mr Ballard made his return of his Survey for friend Winslow. at home.
Clear the mos t of y e day. mr Ballard workt on the road. Cyrus to y e hook, bot 2/1 BuShl rie and 4/1 lb Snuff. mrs s Saunders here. at home. Churnd 4 lb 5 oz Butter.
Clear. I went to See my Dagt Pollard who is Confined with a Soar Breas t . Doct Howard was there, saw it and recommended a wheat breud poltis. at son Pollards & Lambds.

Cloudy, Snowd before night. Ely Andrus Shod OXen here, ours and Son Jon a s. Phillip Bullin Sleeps here on his return from Surveying up the river. I have been at home, have had Symtoms of the Collic. mrs Farewell Calld here. at home. Phil p Bullin Sleeps here. we finisht Banking y e hous.

Clear. mr Ballard came to son Pollards and I Came home, left my Dagt Low bu t as well as could be Expected. there was a great discharg from her Breast this morn. we Calld at Son Lambards, they are well as usual. am informd that mr Allin is interd this after n . we Calld at Son Jonas, his son wilm is Sick. the Revd mr Joseph Boman, who was the Pastor we Satt under at OXford, Came to see us this aftern. at Sons Pollards & Lambds. Rev d Joseph Boman here to See us. Funeral of mr Phinias Allin.

Clear and not So Cold. mr Ballard gone to Varsalboro to Survey land for Doct Colman. I have workt very hard in my Gardin and feel very much fatagud. Cyrus has helpt me. I Sett out Goosbery Bushes and Currents. Dagt Ballard and Hitty have been to visit mrs s Saunders. at home, workt in my Gardin all day.

Birth mr Dexters Dag t . Clear. I have been very unwell but went to See Son Jonas infan t , it is unwell with a Cold. I was Calld at Evn to mr Dexters wife, Shee was Deld of a Dagt by Doc t Cony before I arivd. I went to mr Shubal Pitts s and Slept with Sister Barton. at my Sons, mr Dexters & Pitts s .11th Case.
Clear. I have been at home, went to Jonas just at night. at my Sons.
a very rainy day. I have been at home, mr Ballard to Hallowell. Dagt Ballard went to Son Pollards to See her Dagt who is unwell there. at home.
Clear. I have been at home Doing hous work. at home.
Clear. I was at Son Lambds. he was Breaking up land, his Father helping him; his wife not very well. at Ditoes.
Clear. I have been more Comfortable, have done part of my hous work. my Sister is with me yett. Jona and wife dind with us on pork & greens. at home, am better than I was yesterday.
rainy. I have been at home. Ephm is unwell. at home.

Clear. I have been at home, done my hous work. Sister Barton assisted me. Shee mended a Coat, ristbanded a Shirt and mended Breaches for my husband. I made a Chees to day, Ephm returnd from weding. Saml Trask Sleeps here. at home. I am informd of y e death of one of Bror Jonas sone at Sea.

Clear. mr Ballard been makeing plan & returns and went to Es Qr Brooks s . Cyrus driveing teem at his Brors, Ep hm been down Streat. I have made me a Loos goun and done some hous work. my Nepheu EbenZ r Moore Sleeps here. Sally has been washing &C. at home.
Some rain. I have been at home. at home.
rainy. mr Ballard only of our famely went to meeting. Son Jona wen t to Son Pollards. Jack, Ephm & Wil m here. at home.
Clear. mr Ballard, Cyrus & I attend worship. revd mr Ellis Performd. at meeting.
Clear and pleast. mr Lambd and son wen t to Tho s Allins, brot some apples home. my Dagt, my Self, Sally Selvester and all the Childn Dind at Son Pollards. at Ditoes & at Son Pollards.

Cloudy. mr Ballar d to meeting. Ephm took Salts, he is very unwell. mr Kider and wife and Son hapened in here a t 9 h y s Evn, they Supt and Slep t here. Shee has a very bad Cough. at home. mr Kidder, his wife and Child Sleep here.

Clear. mr Ballard went to meeting. Jona, his wife and Dagt went to the North Parrish to hear Jot m Sewall. Son & Dagt Lambard Calld here on their way home. Allin went home with them. Luke Barton Sleeps here. mr Ballard has Seen 76 years this day. Birth day. at home. Son & Dagt Lamb d went home.
Clear. I went to meeting and was Calld out by mr Cottle to go and see his wife who aprehended her Self near the hour of Labour. I found mrs s Tyler with her. at the meeting hous and at mr Cottles.

X. Birth Theop Capins Dag t . X. Clear part of y e day. mrs s Capin dismis t and Calld her women again by 10h Evn and was Deld a t 11 of her 6th Dagt and 7 th Child, and is Cleverly. we got Some Sleep. at Ditoes. Birth 25th. recd 6/ as a rewd. 3/ recd Since.
Clear and Pleast. I have been at home, Pickt up 10 Bushels Chips and did hous wk. at home. Ephm Sleeps here.

Clear till Evn when it Snowd. I went in to See little william. Ephm let him fall y s morn and Burn t his arm, and Cut his Chin with a pott which was by y e fire. mr Ballard been makeing plan. at Son Jon a s at Evn g .

Snow d . John was very ill, Cony & Colman were Calld Early y s morn. dres t the burns with poulleses of 3 d pt rhum, oinions and indien meal. Colman and mrs Duttun with him this night. I laid down a little while in my Cloaths. at home. the Docters here the most of the day.
a Severe Snow Storm. I have been at home, was very ill with the Collic at Evn. at home.

Clear. mr Ballard Planted Corn & Potatoes. I Planted Cucumbers and houghd peas. feel So unwell aftern I did not Sett up. Jonas wife here near nigh t , Shee is not very well. Sally has done a Larg wash. at home.

Clear and pleast. mrs Welch took Breakfast here. I finisht removeing my Turnips and did other matters. mrs Conry here, wisht me to go and See Jonas inft, it is not so well as it has been. at my sons. John is not So wrestless as he was.
rainy. I took Breakfast at Eliab Lyons and he Conducted me home. I met Son & Dagt Lambard going home. Betsy and I bak t Some apple Pies. Dagt Pollard is at Son Jonas. at Ditoes & at Eliab Lyons.

Birth Saml Titcomb 2 nd Dag t , dead born. Cloudy. I Combd 4_ lb flax and was Calld to See the wife of Sam l Titcomb who was in Labour. Shee was Safe Deld at 6h pm of her Second Daught, it was dead Born. the Patient has had a Severe Cough but her Case was Natural and not Severe, and I know not wha t to ascribe the death of y e inft to but the Cough the Mother had. a t Saml Titcombs Esqr s . Birth 7th. recd 13/2 d as a rewd.

Cloudy. I dug the ground and Sett 165 Cabbage Stumps and french Turnips. I was Calld, after I had done, to go and See the wife of Georg Rhead who was in a weak Situation. mrs s Mott & Woodw d there all night. I Slep t some. at mr Rheads y s night. workt in my gardin all day.
Cloudy, raind at Evng. I have Bakt, done my hous work, finishd my washing. mr Ballard workt on the road, Cyrus Carting Coal for Ely Andrus. Dagt Ballard here a t Evng. at home.
at Son Pollards. Dagt Lamb d there. mrs Pollard is very ill, the infant very restless for want of the Breast. I Slept but little. at Ditoes, or rather at Son Pollards.

X. Birth mr Cottles 15 Child and 6th Son. XX. Clear. mrss Cottle was Safe Deld at 11h morn of her 15th Child & 6th Son. I left her Comfortable and returnd home. I Calld at Son Lambards, find my Dagt very unwell. [Dagt] Pollard was with her. mrs Chamberlain Calld me in to See her Child which Seems very low. I have spent from may 24 th till this day at mr Cottles. I find my hous in desent order at my arival and that my famely are all well. at mr Cottles. Birth 12th. recd 1 Bus l Corn, _ do rie, 1 Crown. Wil m HewenExpired.
Clear. I have done Some work in my gardin, & knitt Some. mr Ballard workt on the road all day, Cyrus _ y e day. Old mrs s Chamberlin Came here, Shee Sleeps here. at home. mrs s Chamberln here.

Clear morn, Showers with thunder aftern. mrs s Selvester Dind here and wen t to her Son Damerins a t the hook aft n . I have been at home, Sett plants. Ephm Sleeps here. the Coart hous was partly raised this aftern. at home. hear y t mr Knowland Broke his Legg.

Snowd fas t y s morn, haild at 11 Oclock, raind very fast aftern and Evn. I have done my ironing and hous work. Son Jona Dind here. mr Scribner here. the wind very hard at N E at 10 Evn. at home. we Put up 3 swine to fattne.

X. Clear and pleasan t . I have been a t home, have Seen 66 years roal away. O may the remainder of my life be Spent in the Service my heavinly father, who has so long preserved me and so kindly Supported me. at home,have seen 66 years.

Birth Son Lambards 3 d Son. Clear and Cool. I was Calld at 3h morn by Son Lambar d to go and See his wife who was in Labour. Shee was Safe deld a t 5 of her 3d Son and 4 Child, and is as well as Could be Expected. Son Jona and his wife Calld there. at Son Lambds. Birth 10th.

Clear. rainy. Son Lambd Came with News y t his wife was very ill, Sally wen t to Nurs her. I have spent the day alone, feel Gloomy. Son & Dagt Town Came here at Evng. I feel very much falagued indeed. Ezra Sleeps here allso. mr Cottle Calld and left me _ Bs l Corn, Says his wife is Comfortable. at home, my friends here a t Evn.

Clear. I have been helping Clean my hous. mr Merrick here, Sary Mott allso. mr Ballard put up 2 Shelves in y e Buttery. Lucy Shaw left here after breakfast. at home. mr Soal here with a request y t I wd be at home.

Clear. I was at Theops Hamlins, Bot 1 pr Shoes 5/6, 1_ yd ribbond 1/5. Saw Polly Rockwood who informd me Uncle EbenZ Learned Deceast about 3 weaks Since. I workt in my gardin after I returnd. at mr Pells s , Dexters, Hamlins &Es Q Titcombs.
Clear. mrs Town spent part of the day here and part at Son Jon a s. my Dagt, Shee, her husband, mrs s Dingley, mrs s Stackpole here to Tea. I have made a Chees. at home. mr Hewen interd.

Clear foren, Cloudy aftern. mr Ballard and Betsy to meeting, Cyrus Seeking his white fas t Cow; found her and the Calf abou t noon. Ephm has taken Sallts y s day. at home. Betsy went to her Grand Dadys, tarrid all night. Reeds Child died.

rainy. I was So unwell I did not attend public worship. my Sister Spent y e day with me and went to Leut S. Pitts s at Evng. mr Ballard to meeting, the ordinance of y e Supper was administred. Deacon Cony was there. mr Rob d Fletcher has wounded him Self, he Desired prayers. at home, unwell.

Clear and a frost this morn. mr Ballard, Ephm, Son Town & his wife went to Meeting. Cyrus went to see his Sis t Lambd after meeting. EbenZ Moore Dind here, Son Jona, his wife & 2 Child n allso. at home. Lidia Nud here at Evn.

Clear and warm. mr Ballard only of my famely went to meeting. we had, to dine; Sons Pollard, Lambd, my own Sons, Dagts Pollard & Ballard, Jason Pierce & wife, 10 Grand Child n and Dolly Kymbal. I am informd that Son Lambds inf t is much better, his wife feels more sencible of her hurt than Shee did yesterday. At home, part of my Childn here.
Clear and warm. mr Ballard & Cyrus went to hear mr Stone, Ephm to the N Parish. I have been at home. Hannah Braly Came at Evng to assist me about work. at home. Hannah Braly Came here.
Cloady. I was Cld to mr Dingleys to See the wife of Neth l Chase who was in Lab r , her women there. at mr Chases.

Clear. Son Jona and his wife Came home, brot their dagt home. Shee is very ill with a pain in her left Side. Doct Barton & wife Came there, took Tea and Sleep here. at Son Jonas, his Dag t Sick. Doct Barton & wife here.
Clear and warm. mr Ballard Surveying for Cap t Ozgood. I have been at home. at home.
raind and Snowd. Son Lambard Ploughd foren. I was there this day. Son Ephm has Seen 22 years this day at 11 h pm. at Son Lambds.

Clear, Beautyfal weather, our Comp y went away before break fast. mr Kidder made a prest to mr Ballard of a Crown. I have workt in my gardin, planted Beens, squash, Cucumbers, mandrakes, Sun Beens and Sow d Cabbag Seed. Dagt Ballard here to Tea, mr Ballard and Sons to Town meeting. mr Wesson s was Chosen representitive. at home, workt in my gardin.

Cloudy. mr Ballard Sett out at 11 h morn to go and assist W m Brooks & Ep m Town aprise and [Divide] 2000 acrs of tand which lies between this [and] penobscott river to 7 heirs of the late Doct Geneson. Bror & Sister Barton and y r Son Luke left here after Dinner to go to hous keeping at mr Crages Shop. I wish them prosperity. Cyrus and Ephm have been makeing fence. I have been to Son Jonas with my Sister as Shee wint down. at Son Jonas. Doc t Barton, his wife & Luke went from here to hous keeping.
Clear. I have done my hous work and Some in my gardin. Dagt Ballard, mrs Trask & Suky Peas & Doc t Barton took Tea with us, Ephm & W m allso. At home, had Comp y .

Clear and very warm. I have been at home, mended Shirts. I finisht mending the 5 th Since I began one yesterday. mrs Selvester, Hodges & Mills Dind here. Sally went to the Settlement with them. At home.
Cloudy. I returnd home, Sufered with the Chill in the air. his Son Came to take back the hors. at Ditoes, his Son Sleeps here.
Clear. mr Ballard gone to run lines for Moses Ingerham. Cyrus been to Son Lambds, brot home 2 Bushels Corn at . he informs me Dagt Pollard is not well. at home. Ephm Sleeps here.

Clear part of the day and Snowd Some par t thereof. mr Waid Butchered 3 Swine for us. Cap t Toby and A mr Fish dind here, Son Jona allso. Bitsy Cowen Came and helpt me part of the day, and now this year is Come to a Close and happy is it if we have made a wise improvment of the time. at home. we had 3 Swine Bulchered and purchasd 31 lb rough Tallow of Cap t Ney at 10 Cents pr pound.
Snowd and haild. Betsy Came and help t do my work. the Docts both here. John Seems more Comfortable. I was up the most of the night. at home. Cony made 2 visits.
Slormy. Doc t Barton and Ephm here yet. I feel very unwell, Betsy helping me. at home.
Clear. I have done hous work & some in the gardin, Sett Cabbage plants &C. mr Ballard, W m Cypher & Cyrus planted Potatoes. at home, wrote to Bror Jon a n .
Cloudy, haild a t Evn. I have been unwell, knit Some at Evn. little Ephm had y e Ear aick. at home.
A very rainy day. Dag t Pollar d , Jona and all famely here. Leut Allin and wife and a Gentleman & Lady here. Theops Capin Sleeps here. at home, had Compy.
Cloudy. I left mrs Titcomb as well as Could be Expected and returnd home at 8h morn. Colo Duttun here. mr Ballard Paid him all he owed him, 7 Dols 70 Cents. at Ditoes & a t Son Jonas.

at mr Rheads. Snowd foren, Cloudy aftern, raind at Evng. my Patient was Deld at 2h pm, the Birth premature. I left her as well as Could be Expected and returnd a t 5. it is Fast day. mr Ballard and Allin Lambard have been to meeting. at Ditoes. Case 9th, recd 6/.
Clear. I have been a t home, washt my floor. at home.
at Son Pollards. my Dagt is very poorly. a son Pollards.
Clear and warm. mrs Chamberlain went to mr Woodwards foren, to my Sons aftern. I have workt in my gardin, Sett Cabbages and Cucumbers. mr Dingley Calld at Evn. at home. mrs Chamberln Sleeps here.

Clear and very warm. I workt in my Gard n till 11 O Clock. I then dres t my self and went to Lecter, Sister Barton went with me. Shee and I took Tea at mr Craggs. we went in to see mrs s Hamlin, Shee had fitts yesterday. a t Lecter and other places.

Clear and not very Cold. Sons Pollard and Ephm Supt here. I have Bakt and done my other hous work. mr Ballard been to the Settlement on business. at home. Sons Pollard and Ephm here, informs me Lambd is unwell.
Clear. I have been at home. Son Pollard, Lambd, Ephm & Polly Hodges Dind here. Jona killd his Swine. at home.

Clear and Cold. I was at Son Lambds, my Dagt So well as to be help t up and Sett a t table and take breakfas t with us. Daughts Pollard & Ballard there aftern. Son Jona Sleeps there, his wife wen t to her Bror Gitchels. at Ditoes.

Clear and warmer. I Planted 10 Cucumber Seeds and went to the Stores aftern. was at Bro r Bartons, mr Densmores, Burtuns, Dickmans & Betts Stores; then at mr Pitts s & Soals [&] Hamlins. Flint Barton & wife Came home with me. at the Sittlement. I planted Cucumbers.

Bth mr Thwings Dagt. Snowd. mr Ballard to meeting, Cyrus to mr Lambds. I was Calld to See mrs Thwing who was Deld of a Daugt before I reacht there. mrs s Norton Principle Performer. at mr Thwings. Birth 27 th . recd 6/ as a rewd.
Clear. mr Ballard to meeting. Revd mr Boman Performed. at home.
Clear and not So Cold. Dagt Pollard, her husband and Child n were at Son Lambards. I left them after Sun Sett and reacht home before 9. at Ditoes.

Clear and the longest day of y e year. I have again had the happyness to wait on God in his hous, and been Entertained with two agreable discoarses Deld by mr Parker from Dresden. mr Ballard and I spent intermition at Brother Bartons. Son & Dagt Ballard, with 5 of y r Childn, took Supper with us, Our Nephew EbenZ Moore allso. at meeting. mr Parker Performd.

Clear. I have been at home, workt hard in my house and gardin. feel fatagued at Evn. am informd of y e death of mr Reads Daught. Capt Saml Hussy s Remains were interd yesterday. at home, Sowd Peas before the house.
Clear the most of the day. I have been very unwell but had my hous work to do. I Churnd at Evng, 4_ Butter. at home.
Clear. I have been at home, Done my hous work and houghd in my Gardin. Sally Came back from Lambds, left my dagt better. I Sowed Peas. at home. Cyrus brot Sally here again.

Clear and Cloudy alternately. Sally went to Burtuns and got her A patron for a goun. I have felt very feeble but have done par t of my work. Sally has been washing. at home. mrs Peirce & Dagt Ballard here. S. Juet foster paid me 10/10.
Clear. mr Ballard Set out for 25 mile Pond to Survey for Capt Sandford. I have been at home, did my hous work. Hannah spun. Old mrs Mosier dind here. at home.

Clear. Sister Barton and I went to my Sons, find Hannah very ill. Doct Barton recommended a Phisick and a Blister, the remedies had a favourable operation. at my Sons. Sister and I tarried till midnight.
Clear. mr Ballard Surveying for mr Allin, and the mr Petingails. I have been at home. at home.
raind and Snowd fore n. Son Lambd finisht Breaking up his ground y s after n . at Ditoes.

Clear. I have been at home, Churnd and about my soap. Dagt Ballard Sent us part of y e haslet of a Veal. mr Ballard been to the meddow. Cyrus Sow d parsnips, Beets & Carrots. Son Town Sleeps here, his famely are well. at home makeing Soap. Son Town Sleeps here.
Clear. I have done my hous work, Churnd and Planted Beens, peas, Sowd Cabbage. Cyrus been to Sydna, Ephm to work on Cap t Robinsons fraim. at home, Planted Beens &C.

Clear Excep t Showers. Sister Barton Came here, Dind with us. Shee, mr Ballard & I took Tea at my Sons, Cyrus allso. Bror Barton Came to my Sons to acompany his wife home. at my Sons. Sister Barton here, & there allso.

Clear and very warm, a Shower at Evng. I rose Early, we Brewed, made a Chees and Sally Scoured my puter. I felt very feeble aftern, went out towards Evn and houghd Some which revived me. Son Ephm wounded his hand. At home, did hous work and houghd.

Clear and pleas t . I went to see mr Soals Babe, find it better. dind at mr Pitts s then went by water to mr Gills, Spent aftern and night there. his was taken in travil befor morning and her women Calld. Sister Barton and mrs Pits took Tea there, their husbands Came to see y m home. [at mr Gills.] Dagt Lambd has Seen 29 years this day.
raind. mr Capins Son wen t home. Parkers boys help t me Sort apples, and I washt Some of my Cloaths. at home.

Cloudy and moderate. mr Ballard is not returnd. I have been a t home, did my hous work and mended 3 pair hoes for Cyrus. Ephm put the ash box together and went to Coart. Dagt Ballard dind. P. Bullin Sup t and Sleeps here. at home.

Snowd. John Seems better. mrs Wood wd here to watch. I laid down in my Cloaths after mid night. Doc t Colman Came after that and tarried y e remaind r y s night. I was Calld up at 5 to help dress John. he pas t 1 worm. at home.
Clear. Doc t Barton & Ephm went from here. Betsy and I have Bak t , Brewed, Churned, Boiled pickele and the Swines feet. I had 4 lb 6 ox. Butter. at home.
Clear. I have Cutt my sage and feaverfue. Sister Pollard, Dagt Ballard & Hitty Pierce took Tea with me. Ephm Came at Evng. at home.

Clear. Richd Fosters wife & her two youngest Childn Came here. Luke Barton wen t to Son Pollards for his marm. Shee Came here aftern. the Doc t and Shee Slep t a t my Sons. mrs Foster & Child n & Luke Slep t here. Dagt Ballard Came and took Tea here. at home. my [famely] here.

Clear foren. I Sett out for home after Breakfast, left my Patients Cleverly. Calld at Son Pollards, Lambards, they are well. his Father there, Son Pollard allso. his oldest Child had an ill turn las t night but is better. I reacht home a t 10h m . Brother Lambard Dind here and went on for mr Capins. it has raind Since 4h pm. at mr Moores. mrs Herington washt here yesterday.

Clear. I have been at home, did Some matters in my Gardin. Sally Cypher Came to help me. mr James Waw Sleeps here. I am informd y t mr Dickmans infant was interd. it departed its short life yesterday, he had Convultion fitts himself. mr Ballard & Cyrus at Coart. at home. mr Wow Sleeps [here]. mr Dickm ns inft [interd]. mr Ballard Surveyed for mr Petingail yeslerday.

Clear. mr Ballard is gone to Show the Taxes. I have been very unwell, Sally Cypher helping do my work. mr Waid and Amos Pollard took Breakfast here, the Latter has been diging our well. a mr Abbott here on business with mr Ballard. at home.
Clear and pleas t . we Bakt, Brewd & Churnd, had 5 lb 10 oz Butter. Eph m & Wil m here. at home. mr Ballard to hook.
rainy. I have been at home. Dagt Pollard and Babe here. Thop s Capin wen t to son Lambds. Cyrus down to Burtuns, Bot _ gn Sp t , 4/; paper pins 1/2. at home.
rainy. I have been kniting, finish t Cyrus s mitts and knit on a Stockin, 50 purls. at home. Ephm [workt] here.
A very rainy day. mr Ballard got some wood and went to mr Cyphers s for hay. I have workt some in the Seller and knitt on mr Lambards Stockins & doubled thread. at home. A very rainy day and Evng.

Cloudy. mr Ballar d got in Part of our turnips and went to hear mr Kibby preach at mr Roices. I have been at home. Son Jona, his wife, his Sons Ephm & Wilm dind here. the Preacher Discoarsed from 2 nd Thesilo 1st C, 7 & 8 verses. at home. 2 Years Since the Death of Dagt Town.
at Ditoes. mr Pollard Came home, left his Load at for t hallifax. at Ditoes. we could no t git any milk from my Dag t breas t .
Clear and warm. I have been at home, mended Cloaths, helpt do y e hous work. mr Ballard workt on the road. mrs Chamberlain went from here. at home. mrss Chamb n left here.

Clear and very warm. Son & Dagt Lambd, allin & Barna Came here Early y s morn, took Breakfast. Dagt Ballard and Child n to Tea, Gidion Braly allso. we are informd of the death of Bulah & Grifin, Persons of Coulor. I had a turn of faintness after my Child n left here. at home, part of my Childn here. I had a faint turn a t Evn g . Deaths.
Clear. mr Ballard & Cyrus to meeting. I went aft. mr Stone discoarsed fm PSalm 119. at meeting. Wegens returnd.
Clear and Cold. I was at Ditoes. Gid n Braley got yellow lilly roots to apply to mrs Pollard Breas t , it Seemd to giv her more pain. at Ditoes. my Dagt is no better.
Clear and warm. mr Ballard, my Self and Cyrus attended worship at the meeting hous, Revd mr Stone Performd. EbenZ Moore here. at meet g .
Clear. mr Ballard went to meeting, it is Communion day. I have been very unwell indead and no one to help me. Jon a & Ephm went to Son Pollards. at home, very unwell.
Clear. I went to See Dagt Pollard. her Breast is likely to Break again and Shee is very feeble. I tarried all night. at son Pollards.
Clear and Cool. I have workt very hard in my gardin and feel much fatagud. at home.

Cloudy foren, Clear after n . the wife of mr Rob d Fletcher and two of her Daugt s , Dagt Ballard, 2 of Childn, her Sist Hitty & Sally Farewell took Tea here. mr Ballard been to See mr Robinsons hous raised. I workt in my gardin part of y e Day. I made a Chees. at home, had Comp y . Capt Robensons hous was raised.
Clear, pleast foren, Cool aftern. mr Ballard and Betsy attended funeral of mr Rheads Child. Revd mr Stone Calld & took Tea with us. at home. mr Georg Rheeds Child interd.

Clear part of the day. I have been at home, made a Chees and done my other work. Betsy Cowen here. I paid her 10/. Sons Pollar d & Lambar d and Jon as & his wife have been here. Cyrus been to mr Pollards after OXen. at home, made a Cheese. Betsey Cowen been here.

Clear till near night when we had a Shower. Sally Selvester left me. I feel very unfit to do without help. mrs Dingley Came to see me aftern. Shee made me a prest of A q t Spirit and Some hyson Tea. Caty Pitt, Nabby Page, Polly Cowen & Lucy Stone Calld in when the Shower. at home. mrs Dingly here. Sally left me, we paid her all her wages.
Clear part of y e day. I have been at home, done my hous work & Set plants. at home.
Clear. I have felt unwell with a pain in my Stomach. Dagt Ballard here to Tea, her Child is better. at home.
Clear and warm. mr Ballard & Cyrus and Ephm went to Winthrop to the Ordination. at home.
Clear. Bror Lambd Sett out for home. Saml Drove his oxen to John Norths and wrode his sons hors home. Colo Duttuns Dagts there. at Ditoes.

Clear foren n . Son Town wen t down to Coart. Son and Dagt Lambd, their Sons Allin & the Babe, Came here. Dagt Ballard dind here. mr Ballard and my sons to Coart. we took Tea at Jon a s . Hitty returnd, left her Sister Getchel better. at son Jonas. Son and Dag t Lambd & 2 Childn Came here.
Clear, warm and very pleas t . I have [done] my hous work, Boiled y e Beef pickle. Cyrus mowd Bushes, Ephm workt at Robinsons. at home.

Clear. I did my work and ironed foren and Cutt 14_ lb Sage from the two beds next to the hous, gathered my Balm flowers. Jonas wife, Cap t Wilams s & Rob d Fletchers wives Came in here and, I went to my Sons and took Tea with them. Ephm Sleeps at home ys night. at my Sons to Tea. mrs s Wil ms & Fletcher there.

Cloudy. I have been at home, feel no iller than I have done. I have Cut the sage from 2 Beds next to y e hous and done Some other matters. John Abbot here, informs that Sally Selvester has mett with a great Change and under great Concern of mind, if God has begun a good work in her. I pray he w d carriey it on to her Everlasting Salvation. at home. John Abbot here, informs there is a Change wrot in Sally Selvester.
Clear. I have been at home, helpt do my hous work. mr Ballard to Coart. at [home].
Clear and warm. I have houghd my Cabages and helpt do hous work. Ephm here this fore n n . I planted a yellow eyed been on the rock. at home, Planted 1 Been.

X. Birth mr Gills 3 d Son. XX. Cloudy. mrs Gill was Safe Deld at 11 h 30 m fore n of her 3 d Son and 5th Child, by her presen t husband, and is Comfortable. Sister Barton and I tarried with her till her Nurs Came. I Came home with my Sister, tarrie all night. mr Finny was drowned this aftern, near the mile Rock. it is though t his feet gave way as he was Choping a tree on the Bank. at mr Gills & Bror Bartons. Birth 16th. recd12/. Death of mr Finny.

Clear. I have been at home about Soap yet. Son Lambard here y s morn, his famely are well. Son Pollards Babe is unwell. mrs s Capin and her Dagt Webber here. Son Jon a & wife went to See mr Ben n Everendon and mrs Suky Pea Joined in mariage. at home. mrs s Capin & Daugt here. Mariage mr [Everindon] to mrs Pea.

Cloudy. I finisht my wash. Betsy Cowen helpt me aftern. Dagt Lamb, and son Allin, Came here. I was Calld Soone afterwds to mr Bunkers wife, my Dagt went to Jonas. it raind at night. mr Kenny sen t for me. I Could n t go. at mr Bunker.

Clear and Cold. Colman went home. Colman went home Cony Came. John pas t 19 worms y s day. his dad been Twice to see him. Sons Lambd & Ephm dind here. mrs Saunders watcht. mr Ballard unwell. I feel so much fatagued, I Can but just keep about. at home.
Clear. mrss Pollard went from here, mr Ballard Sett out for wiscasett. I have work t in my gardin, removd Cucumber, mandrake, Cabbage & Squash Plants, houghd part of my Beans &C. at home.
Clear Except a Shower at Evn. My Sister and her Childn went from here after Breakfast. the Doct workt here all day, went home at Evn. I have been at home, feel very unfitt to do my work. at home.

Clear forn, a Shower aftern. Doc t Barton dind here, he has been to look of Land. mr Ballard Sett out to Survey it. Dagt Pollard Came here near night. Cyrus went home with y e hors Shee wrode. at home.

Clear and very warm. mr Ballard & Cyrus are Down in Town. I do not feel very fitt for business but have to help do my work. mrs Farewell, Dag t Ballard and a mr Pierce from New Salem took Tea here. by y e Laller we receivd a Letter, of 14th inst, from Sister Marvin which informd Shee was well. at home. we receivd a Letter of 14 th inst from Sister Marvin.
Clear. mr Waid & Pollard here part of ye foren. Capt Stones wife, Dagt Ballard & mrs Saunders here, Doct Barton allso. I have Sufered much this day with my infirmety. at home. mrs Stone Visited me.
Clear. I have been at home. mr Ballard went to parrish meeting. I mended a pair of Breaches for him and helpt do my hous work. we roasted a Loin of Veal for diner. 3 of Jonas Childn dind here.
Cloudy. Son Pollard Came for his wife and Babe. Dagt Ballar d & Childn here aftern, we Churnd 3_ lb Butter. at home.
rainy. mr Ballard and Jon a finisht A Plough. I have mended some Cloaths. Ephm to work for Church Williams. at home. the river opend y s morn.
Cloudy & Clear by turns. I have been at home, have not been very well. mr Ballard been to mr Cyphers s for hay. at home. Snowd this morn.
Cloudy and Showers. mr Ballard went to meeting. Doc t Cony went past here, the traviling ba d . at home.
Clear. mr Ballard and Betsy at meeting, Ephm to Son Lambds. Allin has not been well. at home. Dorkis marr d Nicolas.

Clear till near night when it raind. I went to meeting, it was Communion. we had as full a meeting as I have Seen lately. Ephm went to son Lamb d s after meeting, Allin went home with him. Saml Trask took Tea here. I was informd that Old Lady Coutch was disceased. Esqr John Davis & his Bride were at meeting. Hains Learned here at evng. at meeting, Sacrament day. interment of Old mrs Coutch. Es q Davis & Bride at meeting.

Clear and very pleast. mr Ballard to meeting, Jona & Ephm to N parrish. mr Lamb d here. Cyrus returnd, Pally Town Came with him. informs y t Lucy is very unwell. Dagt Ballard here aftern. Doc t Cony Calld here. I have been very feeble. Hitty Pierce left me this morn. at home. [ ] feeble. mrs [Pierce] left me. we [paid] her [1/6]. Patty Town Came here.

Cloudy. I went to meeting foren n , it is Communion day. I was in to See mrs Black, find her very feeble. Dagt Ballard is there, her Sister Polly Came this morn. the Revd mr Stone Discoarst from Mathew 22 nt C. 42 nt vers. At meeting foren n , the ordinance of y e Supper Administred.
Clear and Cool. I have been at home, done my hous wk and knit 22 purls on a Stockin. at home.

Clear and warm. mr Ballard Sett out to do Surveying at Boudinham. I was unwell fore n. mrs Conry and Son Jon a , his wife and Old mr Cypher took Tea here. Cyrus, attempting to take a young hors to water, was Cau t by one of his Leggs and dragtd Some way on the ground; hurt him Considirably. at home.
Clear. I have been at home, am more Comfortable. my husband been makeing a fence by his Corn. I washt the kitchen floor and gathered Beens. at home.

Cloudy & a little rain foren, Sun Shone part of y e aftern. I have been at home, wound 10 Skeins hoes y n and helpt make Some apple pies. Patty has done y e hous work. I hear mrs s Black is much as Shee was yesterday. at home. [] mended Stockins.
Clear and not So Cool. I have workt in the gardin the most of this day. at home.
Clear. I have been washing my wool and weading gardin and Sett 50 Cabbage plants. at home, Sett Cabages.

Clear. my Pain returnd last night and Continued all day. my husband went for Doct Hubbard but he did not Come with him. Sister Williams, Jonas wife & Hitty with me the mos t of the day, and did all they Could to give me relief, bu t withou t Effect. at home, very ill indead.
Clear. I have pick t Some wool, gathered my hollihock Seed and Cut the Broom. Dagt Ballard and mrss Hatch took Tea, the Latter sleeps here. at home. mrs Hatch here. I have Sett up all day.

Snowd Some [ ]. mr Lambard Dind with me, mrs Cypher allso. Joseph Davis and Jo s Rockwood of OXford here. Son Town Sleeps here. Lucy is no better. I feel feeble my self. Son & Dagt Pollard Calld as they were going home. mrs Black is better. at home. my friends Calld on me. I paid mrs Cypher1/10_ for Sallys work.
Cloudy and some rain. I have done my hous work and Cleand the Buttery. Betsy Cowen went away from here. at home. Betsy left me.
A very rainy day. I have been at home. mrs Herington took Breakfas t . Jon a Dind, his wife & 3 Sons took Coffee here. at home. my Child n , Some of y m , here.

Clear and very warm. Cyrus went to take the hors home that Sally wrode. I have been at home, done my work; feel very unwell. I went to See Jonas Son Ephm who is unwell. mrs Pierce Calld here aftern. at my Sons. Ephm is unwell.
raind. I have been at home, done my hous work. at home.

Clear. I have been at home very unwell. mr Ballard been to the Settlement below. Sally Cypher Came to work here. Jon as wife and her Sister been to mr Motts. Doc t Barton here, informs me that my Brother Elijah is Sick with a Cancer on his Sholder. at home.

Cloudy. I help t do work about hous and pulld 1 Bushel F. Turnips foren, was not able to Sett up aftern. mr Waid Sloneing our well. mr Bullin and wife Calld here. mr Ballard returnd from Boudingham. at home. mr Ballard returnd.
Clear. Son Lambd went to Augus ta . I have been there. dagt Pollard and her Childn there. at Ditoes.

Cloudy foren and a Shower; Clear part aftn, raind at Ev n . Son & Dagt Lambd & Ephm Sett out to go to mr Capins, his Dagt Jerusha is to be Joind in wedlock with a mr Webber of Varsalboro. I have done [] my hous work and Planted Cramby Beens, W. squash, musk and watir mellons, Some Beens I had of mrs Edson. at home. Son Lambd, his wife, Babe & Son Ephmwent to mr Capins.
