Clear till near night whin it raind and thundered. Sally Selvester Came here to work. we Cleand the Bed room and Bedstead. Cyrus went to take mr Lambards hors home. Ephm workt for Cap t Robinson. at home. Sally Selves tr Came to help me.
Clear. I have been at home, do not feel very well. At home. Sally Farewel here.
Clear. I have been at home. mr Ballard Surveying at Boughdinham [ ]. Williams here. at home.
Clear. I have been at home. Son Town, Ezra & Benn Porter Sleep here. mrs Parker here. at home, had Compy.

Clear morn, Cloudy and windy Early in y e day. mr Ballard gone to run the line between this Town and Read field. mrs s Saunders here. Son Jona, his wife & 2 Daug ts here at Evn. at home, washt Some things. I had dirtyd my Silf. mr Ballard gone to Read field.
Clear. I have been at home. Old Ladys Mosier & Rheed here; we have Bakt apple, Cherry, Currant tarts, Custard, and wheat Bread. I gathered Peas. at home.

Clear. mrs Thwing is very ill. I went in and Sett with her while a puke opperateed. Shee had the Cramp after wards. Sister and I went in and took Care of her till Shee Seemd beller, we then went to Lecter. the remains of mr Finny were brot in to the meeting hous and a Discoarse on the ocation delivr d by Revd mr Stone. the funeral rites Performed after Service was over. I Calld in to See mrs Densmore, Shee is Some Easier. mr Ballard went on and left me to walk, he Stop t at mr Bonds where I over took him and wrode home. I do feel very ill nidead. [sic] at Lectur. funeral of mr Finny.

raind part of y e day. mrs Capin & her Dagt Calld here, they dind at my sons. Old mr Pitts, his Son Seth, Shubl, his wife, mr Bunker and his, Jona and his, took Tea here. I have been at home. At home, had Company.
rainy. mr Ballard returnd f m Read field. I have pickt Some wool. Jona Butchered two Stears, Cyrus & Bill assisteid him. at home. mr Ballard returned.

Clear. I have had a fatauging day. mrs Gill and Farewell to see John. mr Mofe t here. Jane Herington Came at Evn to help me. Son Pollard Calld me at 9h Evn to See his wife who is in Labour. a t son Pollards at night. Betsy Cowen helpt me.
Clear. I have been at home, wed 2 Beds Beats and helpt some about hous. Savage Bolton, his wife & youngest Child here. Doct Barton Came y s aftern and tarries y s night. at home.
Clear. mr Ballard workt at Surveying for mr Gill & Town. I have been at home, done my hous work, washt the Buttery & Kitchen floors. Doc t Barton had 7_ lb Lamb. at home.

Clear. I have been at home, feel very unwell. Dagt Lambard Came here. Sister Barton went home after Diner. my Dagts, with my sons wife, went to mr Gills. Dolly returnd and Sleeps here. mr Ballard returned from Surveying. I paid my Sister 3/, and to mrs Herington for washing 2/, and to the Stors 6/. at home. my Dagts went to mr Gills.
Clear. mr Peirce Sett out for Hamden. I have been very unwell. mr Ballard Surveying for Geo Hodgskin. at home. mr Ballard Surveying.

Cloudy and a very heavy Shower. mr Ballard Surveying for EbenZ Church and mr Rollands. I have done Some work in my gardin and part of my hous work. I Churnd. mr Fletcher driling & Blowing in our well. at home. mr Fletcher workt here part of y e day.
Clear. mr Waid finisht Stoneing our well. I have been at home, did some mending. a t home. mr Waid finisht Stoneing our well.

Clear. I have been at home. mr Ballard absent. Sons Jon a n & Lambd with y r wives and part of y r Childn dind & took Tea with me. Luke Barton dind, his dady breakfasted and went home. Sister is gone to Gotian. at home, had Compy of Childn.
Clear and very warm. mr Ballard & Cyrus to meeting. Jona, Eph m went to Sydna. I have been at home very unwell indead. at home.

Clear Except a Show er at Evn. Sons Pollar d and Lamb d Came, we all Dind at Son Jonas Except Dagt Pollard, who was at mr Gills till near night. they went home after y e Shower. mr Ballard & Cyrus to meeting to the meeting hous, Ephm to uper parsh. at my Sons.

Clear, Except Showers. mr Ballard to meeling. mr Cushman Performd. I have been more Comfortable. Jona and famely here. Sally Cypher went home, here nose Bled 4 or 5 times y s day. at home. mr Lamb d went on Board CaptPool Bound for Boston.
Clear. I have been at home, my husband and Ephm at meeting. at home.

Cloudy morn. mr Ballard, Pally & Cyrus to meeting at the meeting hous. mr Parker Performd. mr Gill, Lamb d & Ephm and Dagt Ballard to y e uper Parish. mr Cibby perf md . I was Calld to See the wife of John Chamberlin at 2h pm, her women Calld at 9h Evn. Shee lingured till after midnight. at John Chambrln s .
Cloudy and Some rain. I was Calld to mr Georg Reeds to See his wife and younges t Child who are unwell. Jabish Cowens wife and I Sett up all nigh t , the Child wrestless. at Georg Reeds.

Clear. I have had pain in my head and Stomach but did a little work in my Gardin. Polly Pollard, Sally Savage, Abby Sewall & Son Lambard took Tea here. mr Ballard been to a Parrish meeting. Allin wen t home. at home.
Clear and warm. I have helpt wash and do the hous work, mend some. went to my Sons aftern, took Care of the Babe and Billy while Shee went down to the Settlement. at my Sons. I wrote to Bror Jon a .

Cloudy and misty. Son Jon a & W m Cypher hauld Stones for the well. mr Ballard been to pay Taxes to y e Treasurer. I have been very feeble all y s day. Dagt Ballard in to See [ ], Allin Lambd allso. at home, very feeble.
Clear. Dag t Ballard, mrss Pierce & Saunders here to Tea. I have been at home. at home.

Clear. I was Calld to my Sons this morn to See his Oldest Son who is very ill with pain like a Collic. we administred a Clister and gave him y e decoction of y e flowers of London pride, and he got releivd about noon; and I Came home at 2h pm. I workt in my Gardin and went again towards Evn, find him Comfortable. mr Forbes and wife Came home with me. at my Sons, Jack is Sick. mr Forbes & wife Sleep here. Rhoda Pollard is 7 years old.

Cloudy part of the day. mr Ballard is gone to Survey for Ben n Brown Junr. I have been at home, unwell, but harvisted Some Beens. mrs Farewell and Dagt Ballard took Tea here. Edw d Springers youngest Child interd. I lost B d y s day. at home. Edwd Springers Childs Funeral. Son Lambd relurnd.
Cloudy and moderate. I have been at home, Sewd on wolen Sheets and Cut Some apples. Jonas wife here, Old mrs Rhead allso. at home. Son Lamb d to Breakfast here.

Clear. I have workt in my Gardin, Sowd Peas. mr Ballard went to Hallowell, Cyrus to Son Lambar d s; they are Cleverly there. he Conducted Jona s wife home. mrs Welch been here to Swingle her flax, her Childn with her. at home, I Sow d Peas.

X. Birth mr Soals 2 Dag ts . XX. Cloudy foren, raind before night. I was Calld to see mrs Soal at 7 h morn, Shee was Deld of a Daug l at 11 h 10 m , and 5 m after of another daug t . Shee and infts likely to do well. I relurnd at 4 h am. at mr Soals. Birth 13 th 14 th .recd 12/ as a reward.

rainy. I am very ill yet. Doc t Barton and his wife Came to See me. my Distress Continued till about Sun Sett when I Puked and Soon the pain Subsided. I had wres t this night. my Sisters B. & W. here y s night. Cap t Littlefield after to go [sic] and See his wife but, alas, I Could not go. a t home, had a very Distressed day. Capt Lilllefield here.

Clear and pleast. mr Ballard Collecting Taxes on East Side y e river. mrs Hatches hors got out of y e pasture. Cyrus went after it as far as Rheubin Pinkams and brot it back. mrss Weston here, informd that Salmon Rockwoods wife was Deld of a daught by Doc t Hubbard, last night or today. mr Saml Jacksons wife Calld to See me, mrss Butler and Farewell here allso. I have not felt so wel y s day as I did yesterday, but Hitty went to Jonas to take Care of y e Child n y s Evn for my Son & Dagt to go to Son Lambards. I washt the dishes and swept the hous at Evn. mr Ballard returnd at 11h Evng, informs y t Deacon Coneys wife is sick. at home. mrs Hatch left after Breakf t . I had Company y s aftern.
Clear. I have been So unwell as to keep my bed the most of the day, was very Sick all night. I was aprehensive I Should not liv till morn. Jonas wife Came in y e night. at home, had a Sick night.
Cloudy and some rain. I have been at home, done my hous work and washt my Linen in one water. mrs Welch here to Come flax. at home, mrs Welch here.
Clear foren, rain with thunder aftern. I have been very unwell y s day but have my work to do. mrs Farewell Calld here. Capt Sanford here on Business. at home. Bror Barton Calld here.

Clear Excep t a Shower. I have done my hous work and Sett plants where the Peas were at the N End of y e hous. I have been twice to See Son Jona, he is very unwell. mrs Cypher here for advice respecting Sally Churches Child who is unwell. I gave her Safron for it. at my sons, he is very unwell.
Clear. I have been at home. Bror Barton here, informs me Bror Elijah has been very sick. at home.
Clear and warm. I returnd home at 10h morn. Betsy Sett out to go to her dads. I was Calld to see the wife of Mag r Beng m Stickney who is unwell, was there all night. at Ditoes & at mgr Stickneys.
Clear. I have been very unwell but washt Some. Bro r Barton & wife Came here, he is very unwell. Dagt Ballard here to Tea. at home. Bro r & Sist Barton Came here.
rainy. mr Ballard relurnd, Son Lambd Calld here. I have been at home, did part of my hous work. Sally washt, Ephm workt at Ditoes. at home.

Sam l Jacksons wife Calld here. Son Lambd dind, he informs me his Sister Filbrook is very low. Phebe Runels & Polly Cypher took Tea here. Hannah Braly went away with them. I paid her 6/11_ for her Service here. at home. Stutely Springers wife Deld of a Dagt by mrs Mosier yesterday
Clear. I have been at home, feel very unwell. mrs s Ingraham and Williams here. I paid y e Latter what was Due for Chees & 1/ for Shoes. at home. George Brown Sleeps here.
Clear. sister Barton, Dagt Ballard & Hitty Pierce here to Tea. Ezra Town Sleeps here. I have been at home. Hitty Hatch went home to quillt. at home. Ezra Sleeps here.

Clear and very warm. I houghd in y e Gar dn and Shelled peas till 11h morn when I was Sudendly alarmd with news that my Dagt Lamb d , in attempting to Come and visit me, was thron from her hors with her dear infant, and much hurt. I imediately Sett out to go and See them, was overtaken by Doct Cony who was Calld to their relief. I found, on my arival, that my Dagt was not So much hurt as was feared; the inf ts head was very much Sweld. thee Doct Examened it and Bathd it with Camphr. he allso lett Blood and it revivd so that I left them and returnd home near night. find Doct Barton, Gill, Sons Pollard, Jona and their wivis and Childn, who with Son Lambard and Dolly Kymbal, took Tea with us. Blesed by the Great Author of Mercys that the lives of my Childn were Spare d . at Son Lambds. A mercyfull preservation took place when in Emenent Danger.

Clear. I have not been able to Sett up but very little this day, but have reproaches from those who, I think, ought to use me with more kindness. I really pray that God will Pardon the Sins of us all. a t home, very unwell.
rainy morn. Sally and I did Some washing. I am informd by Capt Toby that the Lady of revd mr Stone is Deld and that the infant is dead. at home.

Clear morn, Cloudy afterwards. I have been at home, helpt finish the washing and did Some Sewing, laid Boards to walk on to the well and out hous. Pally Bakt pumk n Pies. mr Ballard laid a platform at y e well. at home.

Clear. mr Ballard, Pally & Ephm attended public worship. I did not feel able to go. Son Jona, his wife and Daug ts here after Meeting. mr Stone discoarsed from Romans 1 st C 28 V. at home. Jona & wife here.
Some rain. mr Forbs, his wife and Daug t Sleep t here. I have been at home, workt in g dn . at home. mr Forbs here.

Clear till near night when we had a little rain. I have done my work tho very unable. Sister Barton & Luke Came here at Evn, informs that mr Atkins had his Legg broken by a Car t wheal pasing over it, the Cart was loaden with brick. at home. Atkins s Legg Broke.
Clear. I have been at home, houghd Part of my Cabbages and did hous work. Doct Barton mowing here. at home.
Clear. I have been very unwell. Dagt Ballard Came and did my hous work. Phebe Church Came after noon and part did my washing. the wind brisk to y e N wd.
Clear. I have been at home, feel very unwell. Sally Cypher Came here again. at home.

Birth John Chamberlins Son. Clear. my patients illness Came on and Shee was safe deld at 3 h 30 m morn of a son, 7 th Child by her last mariage. I left them Cleverly and arivd at home at 10h, took some refreshmen t . at Ditoes. Birth 18/th.
Clear and Some Cooler. I returnd from mr Reeds. Doc t Cony went there, informs me the Patients are no wors. Dagt Ballard and Childn here aftern. at Ditoes.

Clear. mr Ballard been to Lay ou t a road thro James Keatons land. mrs Edson here for gardin Seeds, her husband bot Son Jonas Old Cow. I have knitt Some, mended a Coat for my husband and workt some ou t doors removing Chips. at home.

Clear and very pleast. I wrode as far as mr Parkers by way of y e new roade. mr Ballard Sett ou t to Survey with mr Josh F. Davis. Dagt Lambd Came here with Allin & Barna. Dagt Ballard & Hitty Pierce and Son Lambd to Tea. I did not rest very well y e night. at home. Some of my Child n here. mr Ballard Sett out for Boudinham.
Cloudy. Jon a killd 3 swine. I have been at home. at home.

Cloudy morn, Clear and warm Aftern. mr Forbes and wife Sett out for home. Hannah Coole, mr Burtun & A Daugh tr of mgr Pains have Calld here. I have Cleand my Sellar, made a Chees, hough d Beens &C, and knit Some. at home. W m Stone had a Son Born, mrs Mosier assisted.
Cloudy foren. mr Ballard returnd at 2h pm. mrs Farewell Came to See me. I have felt faint y s aft n . at home.
rainy. I have been at home. at home.

Clear and very Pleast for Decembr. I have been at home, been able to knit Some, finisht futing a pair of hoes for Son Ephm. mr Ballards hand is better. Old Lady Butler and mrs Farewell Calld to See us. Ephm been to work at Jonas new hous. Cyrus after Corn and to mill. Patty Bakt. at home. mrs Butler & Farewell here. Some Snow this night.

Clear morn, Cloudy day. Sister Wiliams left home for home. Doc t Barton Came here. Doct Hubbard Came to See me, gave some prescriptions but his Opinion is that it is not provible I Ever Shall injoy a good state of health again. at home. Doc t Hubbard here to visit me, left Some medisin.

Clear at Sun rise, a Brite rain bow soon apeared and a squall of wind and rain. I have been at home, Cleand my Cucumber Seeds and pickt Some wool. Doc t Barton removd from this Town to Varsalboro y s day. mrs Pierc did my washing. at home.
very rainy. I have been at home, did Some hous work and began a mittin. mrs Young finisht bottoming our Chairs, 13 th , and did 2 for Son Jon a . Three of Jon as Sons dind here. at home.

Clear till Evning when it raind. I have done Some wk in my gardin. mrs Herington wash t for me and washt two floors. I let her have 2 lb _ pork a t 10 d pr pound. mr Ballard has been Surveying for mr Colwell. at home. mrs Herington washt for me.
Clear and not so warm. I feel more Comfortable, have done my hous work. mrs s Livermore, Pickford & Dagt Ballard here to Tea. at home.

Clear and very warm. I have done the most of my hous work. Hannah Spun, pickt wool, ironed and helpt some about hous. mrs Farewel Calld here. mr Ballard returned from Surveying. Jona is better. Ephm helpt Cyrus rake hay this aflern. At home. mr Ballard relurnd.

Clear, Cold and windy. I have been very unwell. Hitty Peirce helpt me about my work. Hains Learned, his wife and Sister Barton here, tarrie all night. Jona, his wife and mrs Gitchel took Tea. at home. friends to See me. it was last night my friends Stop t here.
Clear and pleast. I have been at home. Jonas wife & 4 Childn dind. Shee and mr Ben n Brown took Tea here. I began to foot a pair hoes for Son Ephm. at home. Dagt [Bald] & 4 Childn here.
Clear and pleast. mrs Slickney had her women Calld aftern and was unwell all night. we had Some Sleep. at Ditoes.
Clear. I have been at home, done my hous work though very unable. at home.
Clear. I have been very unwell all day.
Clear. I am makeing Soap. Hitty Hatch left me, we paid her 7/ for a weaks work. at home. Hitty left me.
Clear. this is the Anniversary of my Mariage, 47 years. I have been at home kniting mitts. a t home. it is 47 years [Since] my Mariag.
Clear. mr Ballard to hear mr Stone, Ephm & Hitty Hatch to the North Parrish to hear mr Fogg. Jona, his wife & Child n & Hitty Peirce here. at home.
Clear. mr Ballard to meeting, Cyrus to winslow. Jona, his wife & Ephm to Lambards. I have been at home. I feel a little more strength than I have for some time pas t . at home. Cyrus to winslow.
Clear. mr Ballard went to meeting. Ephm up to North Parish. at home.
Clear. mr Ballard & Cyrus to meeting, Jon a s wife, Pally & Ephm to North Parrish to hear Comf t Smith. Ant y Bracket told his Expearence. at home, feel unwell.
Clear part of the day and Colder than yesterday. I have been at home doing work about the hous. mr Ballard makeing a Plan. Cyrus and Jack went to Colo Duttuns. at home.
rainy part of y e day. I have workt in gard n , Sett plants. mr Forbs left here for Gloster. at home.

Clear and warm. I was at home till 5h pm when James Moore Calld me to See his wife. we reacht there by 7, the hors I wrode Stumbled and Threw me, Lamed my left ancle. Ephm Cowens wife was Calld a t Evn. a t James Moores.

Clear and very warm, raind at Evng. I have been at home, very unwell. Dagt Ballard Came and got me Some Breakfast & helpt me get Supper. Doct Barton workt here. Son Town Sleeps here, his famely [well]. at home. Son Town Sleeps here.
Clear. Phebe finisht my washing and went. I have been Some more Comfortable. at home.

Clear. I have not been able to Sett on a Chair this day by reason of my infirmaty. I Swep t my Chambers, lower rooms and Seller, then left home to be free from work. walk t down to mr Moodys, there rested a little and went on to Bro r Bartons. Laid down on y e Bed a little while, then Sister and I went to Shuball Pits s . I tarrie there all night. mrs s Soals inft had an ill turn in the Evng, we all went in to See it. at Leut Pitts s all night. this is Son Lambds Birth day, agd [sic].

Clear part of the day. the men Bank t our hous. I washt the most of the Cloaths out of the first water and Part of them in y e second, & washt the dishes after Breakf t & Diner; feel fatagued and was on y e bed aftern. at home. Allin Lambd here y s day.
Clear and Cold. I have been at home, made a Petty Coat for Sally of old worsted Stockin leggs & began to hand a pair of mitts for Hannah. mr Ballard after taxes. at home Sewing & kniting.
Clear part of the day. mrs Herington Spoold my warp. mr James Cowen Dind, Sup t & Sleeps here. mr Ballard had 800 hay of wido Blakman. at home.
Clear. I have been so well as to do some work. Revd mr Stone Dind here. mrs s Wickson, Welch & Cyphers Calld in. at home. Revd mr Stone to See me.
Clear, pleast foren n , Cloudy aftn. mr Ballard gone to parish meeting. Cyrus & Ephm down to y e settlement. Patty did hous wk & spun some. Dolly pikt Chips. I have knitt & pikt wool. at home.
Cloudy and raind some. mrs Welch washt & Bak t for me. I have been very feeble all day. at home. mrs Welch helpt me.
rainy Part of the day. I helpt wash and pulld Some french Turnips; was Sick a t night. at home.

raind part of the day. I have been at home, mended Some hoes. mr Ballards hand is Some better. Pally washt the floors, Eph & Saml work t on Jonas hous, Cyrus went to Son Lamb ds . at home. augusta may 6th 1802 Dolly Kimbal Det r to Cash s d 1 Crown 6/7 1 Dolr 6/ 1/4 do 1/6 14:1 may 22 to Cash 4 Dols 1: 4: 1:18:1 to Cash 1/2_ : 1:2_ June 4 Credt by 9 weaks 5 days 1:19:3_ @ 4 s / pr weak.

Clear. I have been Comfortable for which I disere to bless the author of mercies. mrs s Jones to See me y s fore n. mrss Child and Theop s Hamlins wife, afternoon. mrs Cypher Calld to see me. at home, more Comfortable; had friends to See me.
Clear. mr Ballard Collecting taxes. mr Bullin & wife Calld here, they are going to Canaan. I have been picking wool. Jonas wife here. at home. mr Bullin & wife here. Cyrus Sett out for Patty [Tn].

Clear. mrs young bottomed 1 Chair for Son Jona and we paid her 4/2 d for the three Shee did for him, gave an order on Son Lambard for 19/. Shee went away before noon. I have been kniting a mittin. mrs Welch & David dind here. at home.
Clear and pleast. Dagt Lambd Came and dind here. I went to Son Jonas with her. mr Gill s & wife and Patty, mr Town and his wife, Son Lambd & Ephm Sup t there. at my Sons. Dagt Lambd here.
Clear. I have done my work, houghd part of my Cabages. Hitty, Sally, Betsy Pierce & Hannah Ballard here to Tea. At home.

Clear part of y e day, raind at Evn g . I have been at home, done the most of my hous work, washt y e N room & Cleand my Seller. Hannah helpt me Some and Spun 1 Skein hoes yn. At [home]. Capt Woo d brig Expired Sudenly.
Clear. I have felt very feeble but have done part of my work. mrs Cypher here, Sally went home. at home.
Clear part of y e day, a Sea fogg Came on aftern. I thought there was a fire below, went to my Sons and found it to be fogg. at my Sons.

X. Birth mgr Ben n Stickneys 5 th Son. XX. Clear. my Patients illness Came on Severe this morn and Shee was at 10h 30m Safe Deld of her 5 th Son & 7 th Child. I lefe her and inft Cleverly and reacht home at 3h 30 m . we all Sup t at Son Jonas. Betsy returnd a t Evng. at Ditoes & at So n Jonas. Birth 8th. recd 9/ as a rew d .

Cloudy & Some rain. mr Ballard & Cyrus attended worship. I have been at home. Jona, his wife & 2 youngist Child n supt here. Tho s Woodbridg here y s morn, informd of the suden death of his [father]. I home.
Clear. I have been at home. mr Ballard, Cyrus & Eph m to meeting, mr Ellis Performd public Service. at home.

Clear and pleast. mr Ballard went to meeting, Ephm to Lambards. Dagt Ballard and her Sister Getchel Dind and took Tea, Hitty took Tea allso. I was Siesd at 8 h Evn with the Collick. Jon a was Calld in the night. I had a humour Came ou t on my Skin which was very tedious to bear. they gave me a decoction of Snake root & Safron but my [sic] Continued thr o the night. at home. was Sies d with the Collick a t 8h Evng.
Clear. Hitty did part of my wash. I Churned and did a great part of my hous work. mr Ballard Surveying at Rhead field. at home.

Clear. mr Ballard went to Settle with Col o Howard for the ren t of the farm we las t livd on. I have been makeing Soap, Ephm went to winslow. Sally Cypher Came to help me. at home. mr Ballard Sumoned to Coart as a witness.

Clear. I have been at home, feel very unwell. Sally Cypher went home, her Mother Came here, Says that Shee may Come again. mrs s Woodward and Old mrs Rhead Calld here. I have finisht giting in my Beans and Cut my Broom Corn and wed part of my Current Bushes. at home.
Clear part of y e day. I have been at home, knit part of a mit for Little Ephm, a pair for Wil m and 1 for Thos Lamb d . at home.

Clear. mr Cottle & wife Dind here. Doc t Ballard & mrrs Trask Supt. Cyrus went to Son Towns with Patty. I have been at home. Betsy Church Came to work for us. Son Lambd, his Dag t & Thoms & W m Gill here. I am informd mrs Trip has a Child, w d 12 [lb]. at home, had Compy.
Snowd. I have done all my washing. Betsy did y e hous work & helpt me wash y e Buttery & kitchen. Son Lambd here, his famely well. at home.
Cloudy. I have washt all the wolens and part of my Linning. Dagt Ballard here Jus t at Evn g . mrs Cypher here. at home, helpt wash.
Snowd & raind. we have put a Leach for Soap. Betsy washt the N h room. Son Lambd here, and 3 of his Childn. at home.
Cloudy and Some rain. I have Sett Cabbage Plants, feel falagued. Sally spun some. at home.

XX. Birth James Moore s 7 th Dagt, w d 8 lb. XX. Clear part of the day. mrs Brownen and Moore were Calld and the patient was Deld of her 7 th Daugth & 10 th Child at 6h pm. I tarried all night, they are all Cleverly. a t Dittoes. Birth 15th. recd 9/.
Clear. mrs Herington washt for me. I paid her 1/8 Cash, in Buller /3 d . Son s Town and Lambard Sleep here. I feel very weak and low but have my work to do. At home. Sons Town & Lambd Sleep here.
Clear. Phebe did my morning work & went home. Dagt Ballard & I made 12 DoZ n Candles. mr Ballard Surveying for James Howard. at home, made Candles; 12 DoZn.
Snowd & raind. mr Ballard Collecting Taxes. mrs Chamberlin Calld here foren. I have Cut some Apples. at home. mrs s Chamberlin here.

Clear and Cold. I have been kniting, mr Ballard after taxes. Patty washt, I did part of y e hous work and knit. Son Town Came at Evng & Sleeps here. he informs y t Lucy is failing fast. may God prepare her for his wil in life or death. at home. Son Town Sleeps here. A Lecter Preachtat Benn Browns & his Child n Baptised.

Sons Pollard, Lambd, Jon a , mr Gill and their wives Came here on A visit. my own Dagts tarrie here all night, mr Gill & his wife at my sons. Son Pollard at mr Lambds. we made a kettle of Soap []. at home. my Child n all here. I had the Collic.
Clear. I wrode down to See mrs s Crage, find her more Comfortable. I went to See mrs s Black, find her very unwell. at mr Craggs & Blacks.
Snowd & raind. I have been kniting, Patty washt. at home.

X. Birth Pegy Whealors Dagt. X. Cloudy & windy. I was Calld a t 4h morn to See Peggy Whealor, Shee was Deld of a Dagt at 9 which Shee declared [ ] Gates was the Father of. I came home at 12 O Clock, tried the lard. A mr Meril of N. Gloster, his wife, Rob d Forbes and Fanny Sleep here. his marm made me a pres t of a pair of mitts. at Saunders. Case 3 d . receivd 9/ ofL. Hamlin. had Compy.
Cloudy, Snowd at Evn g . mr Ballard, my Self and Childn, Except Cyrus, Dind a t Son Jonas. he has Seen 39 years y s day. at my Sons, had y e Collic pain again.
Clear. I have been at home very unwell. my son Cyrus has seen 45 years this day. at home. Cyruss Birth day, 45 [years].
Clear. mr Waid Bulchered Cyrus s Cow. I helpt Clean the tripe & feet. mr Ballard returnd from Fairfield. at home. mr Ballard returnd.

Clear and Cooler. Son Eph m Sett out to wait on his Sisters & Jon a s wife to Son Towns. I have been at home, finisht makeing a Barril of Soap, have had a turn of y e Collic. at home. Ephm went to Son Towns.
Clear. I was Comfortable this foren n , had a Severe turn of pain aftern. Dagt Ballard Came to See me. I got Easier before night but am very weak. at home. had Severe pain part of y e day.
Clear. mr Ballard went down Streat, Hitty allso, we paid her 6/ in part for her Service. I have not felt so well y s day but have Emtyed my Soap & pulld up Some Cabbages. at home.
Clear. I have finisht mr Ballards mitts & began Cyrus s . Son Pollard Sup t here. Ephm went home with him. mrs Parker here. at home, finished A pair of mitts for mr Ballard.
Clear. I have Done my work, Bakt, &C, feel fatagued. mrs Parker Calld here. Ephms Mare is Lambe. I put honney & Campeva on to y e wound. at home.
Snowd & raind. I have been about Soap works, feel fatagued. I have had the Collic pa in . at home.

Clear. mr Ballard went to meeting, Ephm allso. Son & Dag t Pollard Came to See me, brot their Babe; it is Better. Son Jona and wife took Tea. mr Gill & Son Lambar d here at Evning. I have felt more Comfortable. at home. Son & Dagt Pollard here.

Clear. mr Ballard to meeting. Patty Sett out for y e aftern but went to Son Lambards. he and his wife and Babe Came home with her. Son Jona, his wife, Ephm and Babe, Supt here. Son Ephm gone to Son Pollards. at home.

Cloudy, misty & warm. mr Ballard and I went to meeting, were agreably Entertaind by discoarses on the new year. we were at Son Lambds at noon and Supt at Son Jonas with all our famely. at meeting, Son Lambds & Jonas.
Clear. I have been at home. mr Ballard & Ephm a t meeting. I went to Bed at 9 and was Calld at 10 to See mrs s Black, was there all night. at mr Blacks.

Cloudy, Cold & windy. mr Ballard & Cyrus went to meeting. I have felt the Collic again y s Day. Hitty Pierce, Hannah, Sally & Ephm Dind here. my Child n returnd from Son Towns, all well there Except Lucy, who is very low. Jona and wife Came here after Shee Came home. I have had y e Collic pain y s day. at home. my Child n returnd from Winslow.

Clear, Cool morn. I have been at home, done my hous work tho very unable; was Calld to my Sons to See Wil m , he is very ill. mr Ballard down in Town, receivd the tax Bills. Sam l Bralys wife here to Tea. at my sons. W m unwell.

Cloudy and Some rain. I was free [ ] from pain till Eving when it returned more Severe. Son Lambard and famely here, they were removing to the Store which was formerly Doct Coneys. may it pleas the Great author of all good to Bless and Prosper them in Every Lauful persute. at home, very ill. Son Lambd removd to this Town again.

XX. Birth James Blacks 3 d Son & 7 th Child. XX. Clear till Evn, Snow d a little then. my Patien t s women were Calld in at dusk and Shee was Safe Deld at 6h Evn of a fine Son which w d 11 lb _, Her 3 d son & 7 th Child. Shee is as Comfortable as Can be Expected but has had a Severe Labour. I tarried att night. wido Thomas watcht. at Ditoes. Case 2 nd . receivd 7/6 by Dag t Pollard March 20 th 1804.

Clear. I have been at home, very unwell forenn. Betsy Andrus Came to help me, began my wash. Jona & famely returnd. Ephm, B. Cypher, Ro bd Fletcher got 6 loads wood here and 1 to Jonas. at home, Betsy Andrus Came to assist me.

Clear Except a Shower aftern. mr Ballard to Coart on y e G. Jurey. a mr Pattison from [Hamden] took Breakfast here. I have been at home, did my Bakeing. Hitty finish t my washing. I washt the Shelves in my Bullery. at home, did part of my hous work.
Clear. mr Ballard Sett out for Pownalboro. I have been at home about makeing Soap. I feel very feeble y s afternoon. at home.

to Augusta] Cloudy the most of y s day. I was Calld at 5h y s morn to go and See mrs Yeaton who was in Labour. I arivd there at 6 and the patient was safe Deld a t 8 h 45 m of her 4 th Child & Second son. I tarried till after 1 h pm and reacht home at 3. I have been to See mrs Cain and find her very feeble and lambe I gave to Dagt Ballard 3/ as a rewd for Service done. At mr Yeatons. Birth 17 th . recd 9/as a reward.
Clear part of ye day. mr Ballard run the line between Sidney & Agusta. I have been at home, finisht Tommys mitts. Patty washt. at home.

Clear and very pleast. I left my Patient after Breakfast. Calld to See mrs Moody, find Shee has taken Cold but likely to get over it. her inft is as well as Can be Expected. I had a Severe fit of Cramp y s night. at Ditoes & mr Moodys.
Cloudy, Snowd at Evn. Betsy washt and washt y e kitchin. Cyrus returnd, informs me Lucy is much as Shee has been; the rest of y e famely Cleverly. at home.

Clear part of the day, Snowd Some at Evn g . I have helpt do hous work, washt some old wolen pieces. feel falagued, laid on y e bed part of ye aftern. Dagt Ballard in here. Son Jona had a phraim raisd at the Crotch of y e road in our field. at home. Jona had a Phraim raised y s aftern.
Snowd. I was Calld at 1h m to go and See mrs Trip, found a number of women with her but Shee was not very Sick. I tarried this day with her, mrs s Wiekson allso. we Slept there. at mr Trips.

Cloudy part of the day. I have workt in my Gardin. Sally washt and went to help quillt a Bed quillt for Hannah Ballard. Lucy Shaw Came home with her, Sleeps here. mr Ballard returnd from Pownalboro. at home. Lucy Shaw Sleeps here.
raind and Snowd. I have been mending a waisl coat for mr Ballard. revd mr Stone was here, mr Ballard paid him 27 Dol rs & 20 Cents which he had Collected. we Bakt mins Pies. at home. mr Stone here.

Clear part of y e day. mr Ballard giting wood. Son Lambard Conducted his wife & 3 of his Childn here, he Came for them at 10h Evn g . Dagt Ballard & part of her Child n Spent aftern. Old Lady Cypher and James Cyphers wife Calld here. Dolly Lambd tarries at my Sons y s night. at home, finisht a pair mits for Hannah & began her another pr.

Cloudy. I left y e patient as well as I found her. Calld to See mrs Black, find her not so well as I Could wish. Came home, laid on y e Bed and got Some Sleep before night. son Jonas wife and 2 youngist Child n here. Son Pollard and Rhoda Calld here at Evng. at Ditoes & at mr Blacks.
Clear. I have been at home, am unwell. mr Ballard down to y e Settlement. at home.

Clear. I went to see mrs s Black, find her more Comfortable. I attended the preparetory Lecter, felt Some fatagued when I returnd. Jason Pierces wife Dind here. our men brot in y e Beats at Evng. at mr Blacks and at Lecture. mrs Crage wrode to mr Lawsons.
Clear. I have been kniting. Patty Bakt, & twisted y n . there have a number of Sleighs paSst us y s day. at home. there was More Snow fell than we have had this winter before.
Clear. I have been allmost Sick, been at home. at home.

Clear. mr Meril and his Company left here after Breakfast. I have helpt do my hous work. we washt the floors. Dagt Ballard Came in to See me. I have felt quite unwell y s aftern. at home. Dagt Ball d here.
Clear. I have done part of my work, Dolly spun some forin. Shee & Dagt Ballard went to y e wido Farewels to quilting aftern, returnd at 11 h Evng. at home, Dolly to quillting.

Clear. I have been very unwell indead, had an ague fitt y s morn. my husband got Hitty Hatch to Come and help me. I had a Call to go to amos Braleys but was not able. at home. Hitty Hatch Came here to work.
Clear. I have been at home mending Shirts for Ephm and doing Some other matters. at home.
Clear and not quite so Cold. I have been at home, mended Cloaths. at home.
Cloudy part of y e day, Snow d at night. I have been at home fixing Son Cyrus s Cloaths, but have been very unwell. at home, unwell.
Clear. mr Ballard went to meeting. I have been at home very unwell. Jason Peirce & wife, Jona & his Childn here. Son Ephm went to Sidney. at home. mr Pierce & wife here.

Clear and Pleast morn, Cloudy aftern. mr Ballard and Patty to meeting. Shee went to mr Gills, Cyrus went after her at Evng. Sons Lambard, Jon a & Ephm went to Sidney. Son Town Came here, informs me that Lucy is better. at home. Son Town Sleeps here.
Snowd. mr Ballard only of our famely a t meeting. at home.
Clear. mr Ballard to meeting all day, Ephm aftern. I have been mending Cloaths for Son Cyrus, he is going to mr Lees tomorrow. Sally & Betsy Church were here. at home.

Clear. Dolly went to my sons for n to help my Dagt, Shee is a little more Comfortable. mr Ballard went to meeting all day; Ephm aftern. Saml to the N. Parrish. Son Jona and wife and Sally here to Supper, we had a Legg of Pork Stuft. at home. Son & Dagt Ballard here after meeting.
Clear part of the day and Snowd par t of it. I have not felt so well y s day as I did yesterday. Dagt Ballard took Tea with me. Dagt Lambard made me a pres t of Loaf sugar. a t home, not So well.

Cloudy. mr Ballard Sett out to Varsalboro to do Surveying for mr C. Vauhn. a woman by the name of [ ] Calld here. Shee requested me to give her Some buds of Balm Gilead and Some Suthern wood. Shee took what Shee wisht for and went on for Cap t Stackpoles a t winslow. at home. mr Ballard to Varsalboro, Pally to Son Lambds; I Paid her 4 Dols.
very rainy day, Snowd at 11h Evng. I have been kniting. at home kniting.
raind. I have been at home about my Soap. at home.
Clear. I am very unfit to labour but have my work to do. Doct Barton is Mowing here.

Clear and pleas t . Betsy finisht my wash. mrs s Church & her Dagt Lidia took Tea here. Bill Cypher Cut wood at our door y s aftern. mr Ballard & Cyrus down in y e Settlement, Ephm allso. the Coart Sett. at home. mrs s Church here. Betsy went home.
Clear. I have been at home helping Clean my hous and racking and piking Chips & Sorting Potatoes. I am so Fatagued I did not Sett up the aftern. mrs H. Pierc Dind with me. at home.

Clear and Cold & windy. Sons Lambard & Ephm Sett out y s morn to go to Son Towns. the remains of Lucy Town are to be interd at 2h y s aftern. may the famely, and Connections with the Neighbours, have the presence of the Grea t Parent of the universe and may y e Call, be ye allso ready, be attended to by us all. Son & Dagt Ballard and part of y r Childn Supt with us. mr Ballard been giting Hay f m Motts. at home, feel not well. Funeral of Lucy Town y s aftern. Dolly Kimbal went home.

Clear, a hard frost, the 3 d we have had, but my vines were not much hurt till this. I pulld up part of y m . Son Lambard Brot us 2 piggs. Ephm Came here with him and went to work on mr Bridges Phraim. Cyrus Came home near night. I have been at home, racked up Chips and makeing Soap. at home. my sons returnd from winslow.
a very rainy day. I have been mending hoes. at home.
Clear morn, Snowd Soon, Comfortable afterwards. I have been at home. at home. mr Lawson here. recvd [money].
Cloudy. I have been at home. at home.
Clear. I have mended a pair Trousers, Cut Coverlid raggs and sewed y m and Cut flocks. mr Ballard and Cyrus got some wood. at home mending Cloaths.
Cleare. I have been at home. Hannah Ballard & Dolly Lambard Spent the day here. mr Ballard went to Nathan Breads to do Some Surveying. at home. mr Ballard to Varsalboro.
Clear. I have been at home, not able to do much work. Dolly Car d ing Cottne. at home.
Clear. I help t do y e hous work which Caused me to have a very ill turn a t night. Son & Dagt Pollard Calld here, they were going to See mrs s Black. at home, have not been so well.

Snowd. mr Ballard went to the Settlement. I have been Doubling yarn and kniting. I finisht y e 3 d pair of Tow hoes. Saml Trask Came and Conducted Dolly Lambard home, Shee has been with me Since y e 14 th inst. at home. Dolly went home.

Cloudy. I have been at home, have Seen 67 years this day. O how many visicitudes have I pased thro; may I make a wise improvment of all. mr Eliab Lyon & wife Calld here. Friend Echobad Pitts dind with us. Dagt Ballard Calld here going to mr Butlers. at home. mr Lyon & wife here.
rainy. I have been makeing holders and peicing raggs foren, have not been able to Sett up but little y s aftern. at home.

Clear and Cold. my famely, all Except my Self, attended worship at the meeting hous foren. I went aftern; Dagt Ballard all day. Jona, his wife, Ephm & Patty to Son Lambds at Evn g . mr Gill and wife are gone to winslow y s day. the North Parish worship t in the new Coart house. Jotham Sewall performd. at meeting & all my famely. mr Gill is gone to Son Towns.
Cloudy. I am unwell but was Calld to See Dagt Lambd who is very unwell. at son Lambds.
at Ketons.
Clear. I am very weak and low but have gathered in part of my Beans. I had a night Swet last night. [I] expect I am fas t on a decline. at home. Doc t Barton here.
Cloudy part of y e day. I have been at home. we Bakt mins Pies. mr Ballard went to hook. at home.

Clear and Pleast. Son Cyrus Sett out for wiscassett, Son Ephm went to Conduct him part of the way in a Sleigh. he is gone to tend a mill for mr Silas Lee. may God guide and Preserve him, and return him in Safety. mr Ballard is gone to the Settlement. I feel gloomy. Saml Freeman is Cuting wood at our door. Ephm returnd a t Evng, informd me his Mare, with the Sleigh, fell thro y e ice opisite mr Smiths. two men Came to their asistance and, thro Gods goodness, the lives of my Sons and hors were Saved. the harness was Some damaged. at home. Son Cyrus Sett ou t for mr Lees a t y e point. they fell thro y e ice agains t mr Smiths, were assisted by two men and Escaped with their lives. Dagt Balla d here.

Clear and Cold. our Cow Calvd this morn about Sun rise. I went to the Barn to milk her, Shee has a fine heifer Calf. Dolly washt. I have been quite Confined part of y e day with A Pain in my Stomach. Son Ephm made me a Bread trough. at home, unwell.

Clear. I have spent the most of y e day racking Chips in my door y d . I Sett Currint Bushes & Balm Giliad. mrs Pattin brot home 21 double skeins y n which Shee has Spun for me. I paid her 7/6. Dagt Ballard and mrs Pierce took Tea here. mr Ballard, Cyrus & Ephm been to Town meeting. Mag r Saml Howard Chosen to represent this Town in General Coart. [at home. mrs Pattin, Dagt Ballard & H. Pierce here.]
Clear. I have been at home. Pally Came home from Dagt Lambds. at home.

Clear and Colder. I have finisht futing a pair hoes for Ephm, and began another pair, & mended a pair Socks for him. Jon as wife and Dagts Came here at Evng for want of fire. Patty went home with her and Carried wood. Leu t John Shaw Sup t here. at home kniting.
Clear. I have been at home makeing Soap. at home.
rainy. mr Ballard began to furrow for Planting. mrs Welch here for burnit roots. I have been mending my Stockins. Dagt Ballard here. at home.
Clear. I have been at home. Doc t Barton work t here, his wife dind here and went to Son Lambds. Son Jona & wife took Tea here y s aftern. at home, Sister Barton here.

Clear. I have been at home. mr Ballard & Cyrus to Coart. mrs Farewell, Dagt Ballard and Son Town took Tea here. son Town Sleeps here, his Famely all well Except Lucy, who is declineing fas t . may God be with her and aford her Comfortable hopes of his love for immortal part, may he Send a guardan Angel to guid her better part to bliss. Sons Jon a & Ephm been to Sidney. Jason Pierce Came to my sons. at home. Son Town Sleeps here. Lucy is no better.

Clear part of y e day and more moderate. I have done part of my hous work, Sorted Potatoes, Clear d my Seller of 3 pails ful of dirt, Sett 30 Cabbage Stumps and removd part of the banking from the hous. Dagt Ballard & 3 of her Childn & Sally Farewell took Tea here. Son Pollard Calld, his Famely are well. I have had a pain in my Stomach. at home. Dagt Ballard here.
Clear and very windy & Cold. I have my work to do bu t am not able. Dagt Ballard here. at home.

Cloudy the most of y e day. I have been at home mending hoes. mr Ballard down in y e Settlement. I was informd that mr Abbotts Store, and all the goods therein, were ConSumed by fire the night past. at home. mrs Cypher dind here.

Clear. I have been at home. Hannah Ballard Slept here last night. Shee was unwell. Betsy went to Son Jon as to See to the famely a t were at home. my Dagt gone to Asa Pierces. at home. Saml Smith of Sidney Expired y s day.
Cloudy and Some Snow. I have been at home. at home.
raind. I have ptanted Cucumbers & musk [melans]. at home. [5]
Clear. I have been mending mr Ballards Cloaths. mrss Edson here. at home.
raind Some foren, Clear at Evng. I was Calld by mr Moody to See his wife at 7h Evng, her women were Calld in at 11h Same Evng. at mr Moodys. mr Ball d returnd. EzraHodges had 1 Son & 2 Dagt s Born.
Clear. I have been at home, unwell. mr Ballard to y e Settlement. Dolly went to my Sons and Spun Some wick y n . at home.
Clear. we planted Beens, Sowd oinions, Beets & parsnips. at home. [6]
Clear and pleast. mr Ballard & I a t meeting. we went to Son Lambards at intermition. Ephm attended aftern. Cyrus went to son Pollards. at meeting. Text in Numb 23 C 10 V, Corinth 16 C 13 vers. [ ]

Birth Daniel Moodys 3 d Son. Clear. my Patient was safe Deld about 1h y s morn of her 3 d Son. I got some Sleep and returnd home at 9 h morn, my famely were all at meeting Except my self. Son Jona & famely dind with us. at mr Moodys. Birth 1s t . recd 9/.

Clear morn but Cold, Snowd aftern and was very Cold. Son & Dagt Ballard and Child n Supt with us. we had a Sheep died. mr Ballard, Ephm and Saml Trask went to meeting. I feel more Comfortable y s day but was very unwell all night. at home. Son Jona and famely Supt here.

Clear. mr Ballard to meeting. Jack Ballard brot Hannah from Son Pollards. Jonas wife & Child n Sup t here, he Came in Just as we Sett down to Table in a great passion about his white Mare being hurt. it overcame me So much I was not able to Sett up. I Could wish he might See the folly and Evil of Such Conduct and reform. at home.
Clear & pleas t . I was at meeting & at mr Thwings, he is unwell. Dolly kimbal here for her Cloaths. at meeting. [7]
Clear and Cold. I have been at home. Dagt Ballard here to spin on my wheal. all her Childn Except Jack, he is gone to Bellgrade. at home. Dagt Ballard here.
Cloudy morn. Son s Lambd & Pollard Sett out for Bath, a Severs storm of Snow. at Ditoes. my Dagt very Sick.
Clear. I have done work in my gardin. we planted our Corn. at home. [8]

Cloudy. mr Ballard Sett out for Bodinh m . my Childn here. Hitty Pierce & mrs [Reton] here. I have felt a little more Comfortable for which wish to be thankfull. at home. my Childn, Cyrus & Ephm to muster.

rainy. I have been at home. we Bakt some Pies & wheat bread. mr Ballard been Twice to y e Settlement. I Salted our Beef and Cut apples and Brewed. Son Jona is unwell. at home, we Bakt. Saml Braley had a Son Born.

Clear part of y e day. Ephm went in Comp y with y e Revd mr Stone, Son Lambd and Saml Page to Grealy Pond for fish. they Caught 3 only. I have been mending Stockins and Brewing. Dolly washt and went to Son Jonas. at home. Dolly went to my Sons at Evng.

Clear. mr Ballard went to Lambds, brot me my Dagts new Cottne Cards. I have been makeing Candles, 20 Doz n for my Self and 3 Do for Dagt Ballard. Shee Came in to See me aftern. Saml went to meeting to Cowens. at home, made 23 dz n Candles.

Clear. I have Sett Curent Bushes, Sowd Letues and pepper grass, finisht removing the Banking from y e hous; feel fatagued. Georg Rheeds wife Deld of a Daugh t this day. Ephm and Saml gone to Training. at home. workt in my Gardin. Ephm Gone to Traning.
rainy. I have been kniting, had a pain in [my] [Stomach]. at home. [9]
Clear. I have been not very well but went to my Sons to See Sally, Shee is unwell. at my Sons.
Clear and Cold. I feel unwell. Sis t Pollard Came here at Evn, Jonas wife with her. mr Ballard Came home unwell. at home. mrs Pollard Sleeps here.
Clear. Patty washt, Ephm & Saml workt in the hous makeing Sashes. W m Cypher workt for us. I have finish t y e 3 d pr hoes for Son Ephm & wound 10 Skeins y n on balls. at home kniting.
Snowd. Betsy Church went to mr Wm Pitts. I finisht my Soap, feel very unfit to do my work. at home.
rainy. I have been at home. Dagt Ballard mr Ballard to Cap t OZgoods. at home.
Clear. Dagt Pollard Came to see me, Dagt Lambd Came aftern. Son and Dagt Ballard Dind and took Tea with us. at home, had pain in my Stomach. [10]
Clear and warm. mrs Herington Scoured my Puter. our men gone to Coart. Dolly Kimbal Came to work here. at home.
Clear. I have Sett French Turinps. mr Ballard returnd from mr Gardners. at home.
Clear and not so cold. I have Bakt & done my other work, feel So unwell that I did not Sett up the aftern. at home.
Cloudy. Dagt Pollard Came from Son Lambards and we wen t to Jonas. at [ my Sone ]. [11]
Cloudy part of y e day. I have had a very Sick day. Dagt Ballard Came to See me Several times. I got Ease and had a better night. Dagt Bal d to mrs Farewels aftern. at home, very ill indead, all day.

Clear. mr Ballard down to y e Settlement on business. I have been at home, do not feel So well as I could wish but helpt do hous work, knit and did some work in my gardin. Son Jona & his wife wen t to Asa Pierces to See L e faett who is Sick there with the measels. Clarrisa Scourd my puter. at home. Dagt Ballard gone to See L e faett.
Clear and Pleast. Ephm & Patty kept Christmas a t Son Lambards, his partnr. Polly Farewell hers. Cyrus [Tolle]. at home. mrs Wiman of winslow Expired.

Cloudy, snowd a little at Evng. I have been at home overhalling raggs for Coverlid &C. Sally Cypher here, informds y t Saml Smith Expired yesterday. at home. mrs Bridg Deld of her first Dagt & 3 d Child. mrs Mosier performd.
A thunder Shower. it was this day we were at my Sons and had Showers. old mrs Butler Sleps here, Betsy Towl allso. at my sons. [12]

Snowd. we made Some apple & mins Pies. Cyrus went and Bo t me 8 yds flanel, bro t it home at 2h pm. I made me a Shif t and put it on y s Evng. Chace Pages wife Expired. at home, made me a flanel Shift.
Clear and warm. I ptanted W mellons. had pain aftern, bu t went to mr Parkers to See his wife who was in Labour; her women Calld at Evng. at mr Parkers. Birth 7 th . [13]

X.[Birth mr Parkers Dagt]. X. Clear. I returnd from mr Parkers, left her Cleverly. Shee was Deld of a daug t a t 2 h ys morn, her 4 th Dagt [&] 8th Child. I had a Severe Pain in my Stomach and made use of Senna. heavy thunder at Evn. a t Ditoes. Birth 7th. recd 6/ as a reward. [14]

Cloudy & raind before night. Sons Jona, Lambd, their wives here. Doc t Barton Came aftern. Doct Cony visited me. I took my phicek, it operated 4 times. have not had a Severe turn of pain this day. have heard from my husband, he is well but not like to return for Somedays. at home. Dagt Lambd Came here. Doc t Cony visite d me. Bror Barton here.

Clear and warm. Dagt Pollard Spen t this day, or y e most of it, with me. I have been more Comfortable than I was yesterday. Son Lamb d , his wife and Son Pollard, Jona, his wife & Childn and mrs Getchel Dind here after meeting. we had string Beens and green Peas. I feel not so well a t Evng. Son Pollard Conducted his wife home, their Childn are not so well as usual. it is Expected they are about haveing the measels. at home. my [Childn] here to Dine, and 7 Grand Child n .

Clear forn n , rain with hard thunder y s aftern. mrs Duttun went home this morn. I have had my work to do and Jack Ballard to nurs, he is Coming down with the measels. my famely to meeting, Revd mr Cushman Performd. my arm is very Sore and painfull bu t I have no one to help me. at home. Jack Ballard here with y e measels.
Cloudy and rain. mr Ballard Sett out for to do Surveying for mr Vaughn at Fair field. Patty to wid o Farewells to quilting. at home.
Clear. I have been at home, finisht kniting a pair white mitts for Hannah Ballard. Dolly with us yet. at home. here mrs Hodges had 3 Children Born 16 th ins t .

Clear foren, Cloudy aftern. I have been mending Stockins and Legins for mr Ballard & Cyrus. mr Ballard is gone East Side of y e river to Collect Taxes. I am informd that John Brown is in Joal for Commiting a Rape on his own Daugh t of 11 years of age. at home.

Clear. mr Ballard and Ephm to Town meeting. I have done Some Sewing and part of the hous work, but have not been able to Sett up this aftern but very little. Dolly washt. at home. mrs s Farewel Calld here.
Clear. mr Ballard gone to Survey for mr Pierce at Winslow. I have houghd Beens & peas and transptanted Cucumbers. Sally washt. Hannah Pollard Came here, Shee & H. Ballard to Tea here. at home.

Clear. I have been unwell foren, More Comfortable aftern. mrs s Andrews Spen t aftern with me. Shee left here at dusk, had not been gone but little time when I was Siesd with the pain in my stomach. my famely were up with me the most of the night. at home. mrss Andrus here. I [was] very [ill] all [night].

Clear. I am very feeble. Betsy Andrus Came here to help me but dare not Stay by reason of Jack Ballards being here with the measels. Sally Farewell Came from my Sons and did part of my work. my Dagt Came home a little before night, her husband and Shee tarried here all night and took Care of their Son. I got Some rest. at home, very unwell. Jack Ballard Sick here.
Clear and not so Cold. I have washt my wollin Cloaths s & part of y e Lining. Patty did y e hous work, washt a part of y e lining. at home, washt.
Cloudy & very windy. my Dagt very ill, her throat very Soar. I bathed it and Put on Flanel. at Ditoes. my Dagt no better.
went to Son Pollards y s foren. at Ditoes & Son Pollards.

Clear. my Child n took Breakfast here and went home. Jack pukt up 6 very Larg worms. his marm Came and dind with me, we had string Beens & peas. Jack went home aftern. mr Ballard been Surveying a Lot for Jona which he has Sold to Ebenz Hovey. at home, very unwell. Timothy Woodw d sinfant interd this day.

Clear and Cool. I have washt the Bullery, kitchen & N rooms and helpt make apple pies, and done other things. Son Jona Sup t with us, he is not very well. mr C. Vaughn here. at home. Jobe Springer had a Son Born.
Cloudy, raind before night & at Evng. I have been mending Cloaths. Dagt Ballard & Billy dind with us. mr Ballard been to the Settlement. Ephm & Saml workt at the Shop. at home.
Clear. I have been helping do hous work. mr Ballard and Son Ephm gone Down to the Settlement. Jonas wife is unwell, her Sister Hitty Came there to See her. at home.

Clear and Cold for y e Season. I Sett out french Turnips, 2 of another kind [&] 1 Beat. I went to Eliab Shaws with a web to be wove, 25 Skeins wp, 2 do Lining filling, & 47 Do Cottne. I was gone 2h fm home. at mr Eliab Shaws & Calld at mr Parkers.
Clear. Hannah Ballard was bro t home from mr Saunders s where Shee was Sick all night. I went to See her and workt Some in my Gardin. a T Ditoes.

Clear. I have been So well (thro the Great Goodness of the great Parent of y e uneverse) as to perform the busines of my hous. mr Ballard Surveying for Son Jona. his wife, mrs s Andrus, Jewels and wido Farewell took Tea here. at home, feel more Comfortable.
Clear, Cold & very windy. I have been a t home kniting mitts. mrs Pollard Sleeps here. Son Pollard Calld here. at home.

rainy. I have Doubled 10 Skeins y n and helpt do hous work. mr Ballard went to Cuminsen mill, bot 2 Bushels Corn and had it ground. Ephm & Saml workt in y e hous makeing Sashes. at home, Doubled 10 Skeins yarn.
Clear. I washt y e N room and did my olher wk. at home.

Clear part of the day. I workt in my gardin foren, wen t to Son Jonas aftern. mr Ballard Came and took Tea there. mrs s Savage there. Shee Came home with me and Sleeps here. a t my Sons. [mrs] Savage Came home withme.

Clear. I have done my hous work & houghd in my gardin. was Calld at 3h pm to go and See my Dagt Lambard who I find very feeble. Doct Coney has given her an Emetic. I find Sis t Barton with her and Betsy Kumbal with her as help to do her work. I larried all night. Son Ephm Slept there this night. at Son Lambds, his wife is Sick. Sis t Barton there.
Clear. I have been at home. at home.

Clear part of y e day. I have mended a wais t Coat & Shirt for Cyrus. Dagt Ballard & mrs s Pierce here to Tea. our men to Coart, a Caus between Cap t W m Haywood and Robinson Mills was tried and went to thee Jury this Evng. at home. Dagt Balld & mrs Pierce here.

Clear and cold for the Season. I have removd banking Eas t Side y e house. Son Pollard, Dagts Ballard and Lambard Dind here. Polly and Sally Farewell Spen t the aftern & took Tea with us. I receivd a Letter from Sis t Waters of march y e 1 st , our Connections are well at the westwd. at home, had Comp y . recd a Letter from Sister waters of March 1 st .

X. Birth Abm Devenports Dag t . XX. Clear. I was Calld at y e 5th h morn to go and See the wife of mr Ab m Devenport who was in Labour. Shee was Safe Deld at 9 of her 1 st Dagt and 4th Child. I returnd and attended Lecter. Calld at mr Blacks, Saunders and moodys, & at Several Stores. Son & Dagt Ballard Sup t here. Son Cyrus Came home from y e Poin t , arivd at 9 h Evng; he is Some fatagued. at mr A. Devenports. Birth 5th. recd 12/ as a rewd. I was at Lecture aftern & at mr Moodys.

Clear till near night when it became Cloudy. I have workt in my gardin a considarable par t of this day. how much reason have I to bless God for restoreing mercies. he is able to bring us low and to raise us again as Seemith good unto him!!! mr Ballard is So well that he is gone to Collect Taxes. Dagt Ballard is gone to Son Lambds. Clarrissa is this aftern to mrs Farewels. at home, and through Gods Great goodness am muchmore Comfortable. Clar a went to mrs s Farewels.
Clear. I have been at home. Dagt Ballard Came home, left Le faett more Comfortable. I have houghd part of my Beens. at home.
Clear. I have been at home. mrs Harington Came and did Some washing. I paid her 1/6. at home.

Clear. mr Ballard is Confind with a Lamb hand. I have been at home mending hoes & Shirts. Son & Dagt Ballard & mrs Pierce Supt here. we are informd that mrs Wiman of winslow Expired last night. Son Town Came to bring the tidings. at home, had Compy.
Cloudy & Some rain. I have been mending Shirts for son Ephm, have done three. Betsy Brew d and did hous work & mended trousers for Saml Trask. at home.

Cloudy and Some rain. I have workt in my Gardin and done my hous work. Dagt Ballard here for Beens. I went there y s morn and Carried her 3 Cucumbers. mr Ballard been on the Collection [business]. at home.
Snowd. mr Ballard went to meeting, the rest of our famely at home. at home.
A very rainy day. Ephm only went to meeting. mr Ballards hand very lambe. at home.
Clear and pleast. mr Ballard and Sons went to Meeting. Betsy went to her Dadys. I have been at home. at home.

Clear. I tarried a t home, very unwell. Cyrus did not go to meeting. Jona, his wife and 2 Childn here foren. Son & Dagt Lambd and 2 Child n here after meeting. a mr Boardwell and Dolly Farewell took Tea with us. at [home], very unwell.

Clear. I have been more Comfortable, have houghd my Squashes, mellons and Cucumbers. Dagt Lambd been with me all day, Cleand Cyrus s Bedstead of bugs, Swept my Chambers (which Shee found very dirty), done my hous work, &C. mrs Farewell, Dagt Lambd, Son Jon a and wife took Tea with me. Cyrus has killd a Lamb of ours, I Eat a Small portion there of. at home, have workt Some in my Gardin. Old mrs Marsh Expired y s night.

Clear and warm. I have been very unwell, Pukt this morn. my husband been after Some one to take Some Care of me, but did not Suckseed. Dagt Ballard Came in, made my Bed and Brush t the rooms. May i t pleas God to direc t us to Some one who may have pitty on my Case and gran t me Such assistance as my Case requires, or give me to acquiess in his divine will. a t home, very unwell.

Snowd a little. mr Ballard to mr Lawsons & Revd mr Stones. I have been at home, knitt on a pair Tow hoes for Cyrus. Dagt Ballard here to twist yarn. at home. have the above news Confirm d and y e Childn w d 9 lb Each. the mother had no help till all were born.

Cloudy. mr Ballard Sett out for Monmoth to Survey. I have been at home mending hoes and doing hous work. Dolly wen t to her marms. I paid her 6/7. Son Jon a and all his Child n , Except Hannah, took Tea. Bror Moors Son James and Jack & Le faett Ballard Sleep here. at home. mr Ballard gone to Monmoth. Jethro Gardner here.

Clear foren, Cloudy aftern. I have been mending Stockings, Dolly ironing, Dagt Ballard to mr Woodwards. Jona to mr Motts for hay, got 9 hundred wt. Saml returnd from his marms, Shee is Sick with a feaver. at home.

Clear. I am very feeble. Dagt Ballard here to attend me. Mr Ballard finisht ploughing his Corn and Sett out for new Milford to Survey for mr Vaughn. my pain returnd at nigh t . my sons and Pheebe Church were up with me the most of the night. I was very ill. at home, very Sick at night.
Clear. I have wast my North room and went to See Hannah Ballard, Shee has got the measels. at my Sons to See Hannah.
Cloudy, raind some. I have began a Pair of mens hoes and help t do hous work. mr Austn brot Corn for us. at home. let mrs Cypher have /3/.
Clear. my Dagt is more Comfortable. I tarried with her this day allso. at Ditoes. my Dagt is better.
rainy weather. at Ditoes.

Clear. I was again Calld on to visit mrs Lyon. I went, wrode there without dismounting. find her a little easier by the help of an opiate which Doct Hubard had given her. her pain returned about Sun Sett. he Calld to See her again a t 10h Evn, made a very pertinent prayer with her and gave her an other annidine. Shee was Easier thro the night. at Amos Lyons, his wife is Sick. Son Lambds Birth day.

Clear. mr Ballard attended meeting. my Children Dind with us, Hitty Pierce allso. they, with Pally Town, spent y e Evng at Son Jonas; Except Cyrus, he is not very well. Jonas Childn all here. my Dagts bro t their Babes. at home. Thanksgiving day. our Childn to see us. Hitty Sleeps here.
Clear. I have made Cake, whea t Bread, rice, & Pumkin pies. Dagt Ballard & her sister took Tea with us. I am informd of y e Death of Daniel Townsins wife in Child bed. at home.
Cloudy part of y e day and very Cold. mr Ballard and Cyrus Finisht Ploughing the Corn ground. I have been at home, do not feel so well as I Could wish. mrs Pierce here to Bake. at home.
Clear. I have been So unwell that I Could Sett up but little, but houghd part of my Beens. Salmon Rockwood Dind here. at home, unwell.
Clear and more moderate. mr Ballard to Hallowell, mrs Pollard to son Jonas. Charlottee Brown & Sally Farewell here on a visit. at home. Pally had Compy.
Clear. I have been at home kniting. they were Shingling at Jon a s hous. at home.
Cloudy & some Snow. I have been very unwell. mrs Farewell Calld here. I had a very Sick night, was Put in bed by my husband & Cyrus and Lay in my Cloaths. at home, very Sick at night.
Clear. mrs Savage Spent this day & night with me. we have been kniting. at home, mrs Savage here.

rainy foren n . I am with my dagt Lambd. Shee is so much better that Shee has partly made a goun for Sister Barton. mrs s Gill Came there. I left there at 3h pm and went to Lecter, mr Stone performd. I met mr Caton at mr Pitts s Store where he paid me 9/ for assisting his wife in Labour may 18th. I allso receivd 9/ of Luis Hamlin for assisting Peggy Whealor in like Circumstances the 18th of Feby last. mr Ballard, Cyrus & my Self took Tea at Son Jonas. I Calld at mr Towns, his wife is more Comfortable. at Ditoes, a t Lecture, at Luis Hamlins, Towns and at mr Pitts s Store. Son Town at mr Lambds, his Famely are well. Saml Trask is unwell.
Cloudy and some rain. I have done my hous work, Cleand my Seller and Boiled Some Pickle. Sister Wil ms & Dagt Ballard & her Dagts and Sally Parker took Tea here. at [home]. Dagt Balld here.
Clear and more pleast. I have Done my hous work & removd dirt, or banking, from the hous, feel Some fatagued. Dolly has been unwell, her Bro r John here aftern. at home. Lucy Town Expired y s aftern.
Clear and windy. we were much alarmd by fire which Caught in drie Stuf by y e Shop, it ran allmost to ye fence between y e lots. at home.

Clear the most of the day. I have been so well as to work in my gardin part ofthe day. W m Cypher helping hough our Corn. mr Ballard and Cyrus with him, Son Jona, his wife & William dind with us. at home, workt in my gardin.

Clear. I have workt in my gardin foren. mrss Moody and Dag t Ballard here to Tea. mr Ballard been over the river, finds Le faett better. Clarrisa has the head aich. at home. mrs Moody & Dagt Ballard here.

Clear. mr Ballard to meeting. Sons Lamb d , Jona & Ephm to Son Pollards. Cap t Stackpool Came down to inform us of the death of Lucy Town, may God pleas to Sanctify the dispensation to us all, and may we hear the Call, be ye allso ready. at home. was informd of y e death of Lucy Town.

Clear. my famely all at meeting. Revd mr Parker performd, he Spake foren n from Exodus xx C 8 [V s ], after n fm Matthu xxiv 42 nt . I went to mr Pitts s at intermition, to Son Lambd after meeting. was very unwell all night. at meeting & at mr Pittss & Son Lambd s .

Clear. we all attended worship a t y e meeting hous, the ordinance of y e Supper administred. A Revd mr Abbott Performd foren, mr Stone aftern. I went to son Lambds at intermition. felt very much fatagued when I Came home. at meeting. [Communion] day.

Clear and Cold. mr Ballard & Cyrus at Town meeting. Ephm & Saml Trask Boarding Jon as New hous. I have mended 2 pair hoes for my Self & done Some hous wk. at home. Chase Pages wifes remains were interd.
Clear, pleast morn, Cloudy before night. we made Sausages and I knit Some. Jonas wife Supt. at home.
Cloudy. I have Done part of my hous work. Revd mr Stone and Lady made us a visit. at home. mr Stone & Lady here.
Clear. I have been at home, feel some better. at home.

Clear. I have been very feeble, Sett up but little. Dagt Ballard, mrs s Pitts and mrs Moody here. Cyrus has Brew d , I straind the wart and [Got] him Supper. I Eat a little Broiled Lamb. at home, very feeble. friends to See me.
Cloudy, heavy thunder after n . I have been very feeble. Lydia Hallowell here, Cut part of my Sage for mrs Gill. at home.

rainy foren. mr Ballard Sett ou t at 10h morn to mr Asgoods on Business. Son Town left here about noon on his way to OXford. I Commited to his Care a Letter to Ses t Waters and another to Brors Collins & Elijah. may God grant him a prosperous Journey and return him in Safety to his famely in Due time. I feel very unwell this night. [at home. Son Town left at 11h Distind for OXford. I wrote to Brors Collins & Elijah.]

rainy. I have been at home mending hoes for mr Ballard, and helping do hous wk. James Lester here, Sodered y e handle on a Coffee Pott, mended a Tea d o & 2 Basons. Dolly Spun 1 Skein Cottne. at home. Paid for Tinkering 1/4.

Clear part of y e day, a thunder Shower aftern. Dagt Lambard and 2 Childn, Son Jon a , his wife and all his Childn took Tea with us. Son Pollard Calld at our door, his famely are as well as usual. Ephm put the lower Casements in to 3 windows & a ligh t in the out hous. Dolly went to mr Parkers. at home. Child n to visit me. Ruth Fairfield of winslow Expired.

Clear. I have been very feeble ys Day. Dagt Ballard here foren and again near night. mrs s Gill & Dagt Lambd to See me. blessed be y e father of all our Mercies, I have been free from pain this day and night. I eat Curant Saus with Tea about 2 hours before Sun Sett, and in 3 hours it found its way thro me and I find relief. at home. mrs Gill, Dagts Lambd, Ballard and mrs Saunders here.
Clear. I have washt my kitchen, feel very unwell indead. mr Ballard to Coart. at home.

Clear. I was at mr Gills, the Child is viry low. Old Lady Hamlin, mrs Camble & Moore Came there to See me. Old Lady Gill Came there and I left there afler diner. Calld at Son Lambds, Thoms is Sick with the measels; fm there I Came to mr Burtuns, took Tea with friends who Consisted of mrs Hamlin, Crage, Camble, Moores, Carter & 2 mrs Burtuns, & returnd home. Calld at my Sons, his wife is better. L e faett & Wil m are Sick. Sis t Barton, mr Porter & wife Sleep here. at mr Gills & other friends. [30]
Clear and very pleast morn. Cousin Saml Davis from Penobscott Came here, tarries all night. Pally is gone to mr Gills. at home. Saml Davis Sleeps here.
Snowd. my sons returnd fm Bath and I returnd home, feel falagued. left my Dagt Cleverly to what Shee was. at Ditoes. my sons returnd.
I have been at son Pollards till satterday night when

Clear. I am at mr Lyons, his wife is much distresed with pain; it Seems a uterine Complaint, and wind. I administred a Clister which gave her great relief. Shee became pirfectly Easy. I went to mr Preskotts and larried all night, had the Cramp and Slept but little. Peris Hamlins wife there. at Ditoes, mr Swantons & Preskotts. Dagt Lambds Birth day.

Clear. I went to mr Gills aftern, their Son Sam l Expired a t 9 h [Evn]. I was with them all nigh t . a hous belonging to y e Biges s was Burnt ys night, 2 famely made destitute of a habitation. it was the hous which was Deacon Clearks. at Ditoes. Saml Expired at 9 h Evn. Bigess hous Burnt ys night.
Cloudy, raind at Evn. Sons Pollard, Jona and their wives Dind here, [ ] Pierce allso. Jona, L e faett & Hannah, Son Pollard & wife went home after noon. at home. [ ] of our Childn Dind here.
Clear and Cold. mr Ballard did Some Surveying for Son Jona. I have had a pain in my Stomach bu t have done some mending. at home.

Clear and windy. Jon a & wife Dind here and took Tea. Old Leut Shaws Barn Burnt and they were much pu t to it to Save his hous. Cap t Stone was in great danger of loosing his Buildings. I have done but little more than watch y e motien of y e fire. at home.

Clear part of y s day, a light Shower aftern. Sally Towl wen t from here, we paid her 6/3 pence for two weaks work. Son Jon a dind, he & wife, Billy, Jason Pierce, Hannah & Sally Pollard took Tea here. at home. workt Some in my Gd n .
Clear and pleas t . mr Saunders began Son Jon a Chimney. I have been mending & kniting. at home.
Cloudy & Snowd. Dagt Ballard Came and got me Some breakfast. I feel very feeble. mrs Pattin Came to See me, informd me mrs Cain was dead. at home, feeble. Dagt Bal d & mrs Pattin here.
rainy after 10h morn. mrs Savage went to my Sons after Breakfast. I Sow d Peas, Planted Corn & Beens. mr Ballard Sowd oinions & Parsnips. at home. workt [some] in y e Gardin.

Clear part of the day. I have had the pain in my Stomach very Severe but did my hous work, Excep t Churning which Sally Tole did for me. I was so ill after Shee went home that for Some time it Seemd I must Expire Soon, but the author of all mercies was grant me relief for which I disire to prais his holy name. at home, have been very ill all day.
Cloudy. Sister Wms went to Son Jonas. I have Done my
raind foren, Snowd a t Evng. mr Ballard & Sons to meeting, Patty went aftern. Jona & wife, Hannah, Sally & Ephm here at Evng, Ephm Sleeps here. at home.

Clear and Cold. mr Ballard, my Self, Ephm, Dagt Ballard & Hannah to meeting. the Ordinance of the Supper administred, there were 7 male & 14 female members Communed. I went to Son Lambds, their Babe is very unwell. Dolly Kembal returnd here. at meeting & Son Lambds. Dolly K. Came here at Evng.

Clear. my famely Excep t my Self wen t to meeting. Jon a Ballard waited on mrs Savage to Sidniy, Shee Calld here. Dagt Ballard and part of her Childn ["Calld here." - implied] I made Tea for them. mrs Farewell Calld here after meeting. at home. mrs Savage and mrs Farewell Calld here.

Clear. my famely attended worship Except my Self and Ephm. he went to Sydney with Son Pollard, who took Breakfast here. Jon a and wife and part of their Childn here at Evn. L e faett Seems feeble. Clarrisa Sett out to go to her Fathers but went to mrss Farewels. at home. Clarrisa at mrs Farewels.

Clear till near night when we had rain & haill. my famely all at meeting, the ordinance of y e Supper administred. I have great reason to bless God for this Opt of Commorateing the dying Lov of the Savior of Sinners, may my life be agreable to the mercies I receiv. at meeting, Communion day.

aftern work. Sister did y e morning work as I had taken Phisic the Evng preceeding y s day. my Lott is Singular but with Patience I wish to Conform to it. my husband returnd at Evng fm Balls town much fatagued with his Journey, had a fitt of Shakeing. I heat a Blankett and put it about him a t about 3h morn. he, being relaxed, Dirtied the Bed. I rose, Shirted him and removed the dirty lining, went to Bed again, but was so Cold that I Could not Sleep. I rose again before the Sun rose, washt the things which were unclean but felt So unfitt to attend worship lhat I tarried at home. my famely all attended. O my god, when will the Time be when I may have it in my Power to go to thy house to worship again. at home. mrs Duttun here. my husband [returnd]. at home. Dagt Ballard here. mrs s Stone went on Board Capt Bruister for [Boston] this [morn].
Clear. I have been unwell. mr Ballard to meeting. I was Calld at 10h Evn to mr Andrus s , mrs Duttun very Sick. I spent y e night there. at mr Andrus s a t 10 h Evn g .
Clear, part of ye day we had Showers. Dagt Ballard took Tea with me. I have been so unwell that I have done but little work this day. at home, unwell.
Clear. I have been at home. Dagt Ballard here to Tea, her Childn are better. at home. Dagt Ballard here.
Clear. mr Ballard Sett out to Survey for mr Smart & others. Dagt Ballard here, workt Butter I Bot of mr Getchel, there was 7_ lb. at home. [mr] Ballard gone.

X. Birth Monasah Duttuns Son. XX. Clear. I Came home, did Some washing, wido Savage Came here near night. I was Soon after Calld to go and See mrs Duttun who is in Labour and was safe Deld at 7h Ev of a Son, her Second Child. Shee is as well as Could be Expected as Shee has the measels. I Sett with her till aft mid nigh t , mrs Springer afterwards. at mr Andrus s . Birth 8th. Novr 15 th recd 6/7 of mr Andrus.
Clear. mrs Pollard & Young & Son Town Sleep here. I have been at home. at home. mrs Pollard here.

Cloudy and Cold. I have knit, but am very unwell. mrs Wimans remains are interd this day. may those who are nearly Concerned make a sanctifyed improvment of the dispensation of Providence and may we all learn to be allso ready. Old mr Gill here. at home, had a Severe head aick at night. Funeral of mrs Wiman a t winslow.
Clear. I have been at home. Son Jona & wife to mr Fletchers, Jack & Wil m Came here. W m had a Severe turn of y e Collic, he and Ephm tarried here all night. at home. Billy had y e Collic.
Clear. I did my work and wen t to visit a Sick Child of mr Saunders s . at mr Saunders s .
Clear. I am So unwell I Could not Sett up but little. Dagt Ballard here, Ephm is very Sick a t Son Lambards. at home. Ephm Sick a t Lambds.
Clear. I have done my work but an feeble. at home.

Clear. Menasa Duttuns wife Came here to help me. I wrode to my Sons to See mrs Getchel, Shee has the Collic. mrs Farewell Calld here. Son Jon a returnd from winslow. Son Towns Famely are well. a t my Sons. mrss [Gitchel] is Seck there.

rain. I am very unwell and have not attempted to do much business. Dagt Ballard Came and got Dinner. Jason Pierces wife Dind with us. Cyrus gone to Hollowell to attend at the review, Ephm as a Soldier. at [home]. Dagt [Ballard] & mrs s Pierc here.
Snowd. Sally work t for me, went home at Evn. I was Calld at 7h Evn g by mr Evlith to go and See his wife. the wrideing was very bad, but we arivd Safe from harm. at mr Evliths.

Cloudy. I have been at home, did hous wk and mended a pair Legins. mr Ballard returnd at Evn g with his right hand and Sholder Lamb by reason of a fall he got yesterday. Jimy Page Supt with us. at home. mr Ballard returnd Lambe.

Clear. mr Ballard and Dolly went to meeting, it is y e yearly fast. I have been at home. Son Lambd & mr Gill Calld here. I am informed y t the wife of Church Williams was Deld of a Son, her 2 nd Child, y s morn. at home. mr Ballard to meeting, fas t day.
Clear. I have been more Comfortable, have wed 4 beds and Sett 40 Cabage Plants in my gardin; have finisht Cuting out mr Ballards and Cyruss Shirts. at home.
raind Some. I have been to See hannah, find her Some better. Capt Parker killd by his Cart overSeting. at my sons.

X. Birth mr Evliths Daugt. XX. Cloudy. mrs Evlith was Safe Deld at 2h y s morn of a daugh tr , her first Born. I lefe her afler he brot mrs Conry as Nurs. Shee was very ill but I lef t her as well as Could be Expected. mrs Eads Deld by Doc t Cony, her inf t is dead. at Ditoes. Birth 9th. recd 10/6 as a reward.
Snowd. I have been at home. Son Lambd & Ezra Town here. Lucy is no better. at home. Ezra Town here.
Keton Calld [me].

Clear. I was Calld back to visit the patient, administred a Clister and performed other Services and left her in hopes of her recovery. I Calld at mr James Moores, Col o Duttuns and Son Pollards. arivd at home before night, find mrs Duttun here who has washt all my lower rooms in my absence which I lake very kind. at Ditoes, Col o Duttuns & Son Pollards.
Clear. I tarried a t ditoes till af t diner. Sis t Barton Came there. I Came home, Calld a t son Lambds, Thoms is unwell, Barney allso. I workt in my Gardin afer I Came home. at Ditoes & son Lambds.

Clear, a great fros t . I left mrs Duttun at 7h m, her Babe is unwell. I have been unwell, Sally Church helpt me. I have paid her 4/ for what Shee has done for me this weak. I was Calld about Sun Sett to go and assist to put on the grave Cloaths for mrs Duttun who is now Expired. her husband is Come to see her, arivd before Shee was diad. mrs Arnald & Cypher & Betsy Church assisted me to perform what was Done, the Babe is very unwell. at Detoes. mrs Duttun Expird.

Clear. I have felt very unwell but have had my work to do. mr Ballard to Lecter, I did not feel able. mr Evelith here for some advice respecting his inf t , as it Seems unwell. a t home. Lecter. mr Evelith here.
Clear. I have wash t 5 Bed blankets & one rag Coverled and help t wash my kitchen, and done Some mending. Hitty Pierce Sleeps here. at home, washt Some.

Clear. the fire drove mrs Welch and famely out, they Sleep at our hous. I have been out the most of y e day watching y e fire, was Calld by James Keton to go & See his wife who is unwell. at mr Ketons at night.

Clear. I have been very unwell till 3:O Clock aftern, but I have done the work of y e hous. my Grand Childn went to my Sons aftern. mr Ballard been Surveying road on that which leads from mr Westons to Winthrop. at home, very unwell.

Clear and pleas t for y e Season. mrs Farewell and her sis t Bakor here, took Tea. I have been a t home. Sally Church helpt me, we Bakt Pumpkin & apple Pies & brown Bread. I paid her 1/6, and to Sally Farewel for spining hoes y n /11. at home, had Comp y .
rainy morn, Cloudy all day. mr Ballard only of our famely went to meeting. Son Jon a Dind here, Dolly has been to Capt Stones. Saml Shott a Partridg and gave it to Dagt Ballard. at home.

Showers foren n . my famely went to meeting, all Except my Self. I had a Severe pain in my Stomach. Clarissa Stone Came here about noon, Shee is going to work for me. 5 of Son Jon a s Childn, 2 of Pollards, Allin Lambd & Luke Barton here at Evn g . at home. Clarrissa Stone Came here. 8 of my G. Childn here.
Clear. the Sacrament administred. I was not able to attend. Son Jona & Lambd and y r wives took Tea here. a t home. Communion day. Child n here.

Clear part of the day and warn for the Season. mr Ballard and Ephm to meeting. Son Jon a , his wife and Ephm Supt with us. Son Ephm went y s after n and Conducted Rachel Capin from Son Lambds home, little Dolly went with them. at home. Jon a and wife here. mr Kinsley arivd at home this Evn g .

Snowd y s morn. I have been at home. mr Sanders got the Chimney out of the hous. Son Jona got his 3 Colts to the Barn, they have been out till now and not fodered. at home, finisht footing a pr Tow hoes. Sally is 1 Year old.
raind. I have been at home, finisht a Stockin which I began on friday last. at home.

Clear. Indipendance observd at Hallowell. mr Ballard and Ephm I went to See the, or rather hear an Oration deld which was performd by Tho s Bond. Clarrisa went to mr Parkers. I Sett 62 Cab g plants. Old mrs Rhead here, Shee was going to mr Asa Williams. I was very unwell, all night with pain. at home. mrs Rhead Calld here.

Cloudy till aftern when the Sun Shone. our men takeing Care of the hay. mr Ballard gone to Sidney to survey for mr Getchel. I havee wash t some of my Cloaths. Sister Wilms went to my Sons. Shee and my Dagt Came and took Tea here. mrs Duttun here mending Cloaths for me. Revd mr Stone Calld here. at home. mr Ballard gone to Sidney.
Clear. mrs Duttun very ill yet. I Came home. Sally Church washt for me, mr Ballard to mr Breads. a t Detoes
Clear. I have been at home, workt Some in my gardin & knit Some; am more Comfortable. at home.
Clear foren, raind before night. the wido Farewell here to Tea, Shee paid her taxes. Dagt Ballard gone over y e river. at home, mrs s Farewell here.

Clear. I went to Son Lambds, his Son Barny is Sick with the measels. I Calld at mr Towns, his Child has y e Disentary. mrs Andrus Spake to me as I Came home, her famely are unwell, mrs Dullun allso. I Sent her Safron & meregoulds. at [Son] Lambards & mr Towns.

Clear and pleast. I Came home Early y s morn, find mrs Savage very unwell, Shee remained So till Evng. Sally Church washt 15/ Shirts and other Cloaths. I paid her 2/1 for her Service. Son Ephm informs me Barny is some better. at home. mrs Savage here, very unwell.
Clear and pleast. I have a pain in my neck bu t have to do my work. mr Ballard got in our Beets & some Parsnips. at home, feel very unwell.
