Cloudy. I have done my work, feel more Comfortable. Sally Church Came and did my washing. I had no Chang, did not pay her. mr Ballard removd fence at Eas t Side y e hous. at home.

Cloudy y e most of the day. Sally Church Came and helpt m wash. I went to my Sons, find them as well as Could be Expected. Cyrus went to Son Pollard s , Carried the wool we had Carded, and after a Girl, but Shee was not ready to Come and he returnd without her. Nabby Fall is Come to nurs my Sons wife. mrs Farewell Calld here on her return home. at my Sons. Sally Church helpt me, I pd her 2/1_. mrs Farewell Calld.
Clear. mrs Pollard went from here, I wen t with her to Son Jonas. mrs Young is Bolloming Chairs for us, has done 8. at Son Jonas.
Snowd a little. mr Waid Butchered 2 Swine for us. he had 12_ lb Sparerib. at home, we killd hoggs.
Clear. Son Jona began his haying, I did part of my washing. mr Ballard took his OXen to mr Ben n Pages to pasture. at home.

Cloudy part of y e day. Polly Farewell Came to do Some Sewing for me. mr Ballard been Surveying for Doc t Mires. Son & Dagt Pollard dind here & went to Son Lambards. Cyrus & Bill Cypher got in Corn. a t home. Polly Farewell here. Son Pollard & wife Dind here.
Clear. I have done my work. Dagts Pollard & Lambd here, y e former tarries y s night. at home, my Dagts here.

Clear part ye day. mrs Duttun wacht. I have done part of my hous work & knit Some. mrs Hity Pierce Dind here. mrs Dattun went home at Evn. I paid her 3/ for her Service. mr Ballard and Cyrus been to Town meeting. at home, feel better.
rainy. Sally Church work t for me y s Day. Cap t Osgood here, informs that the wife of Amos Lyon Expired y e 12 th ins t , her remains intered y e 13 th . at [home]. Sally [Ch ] workt [ ] me.
Clear. I have been at home mending Shirts for Son Cyrus, Dolly did hous work. at home.
Clear. I have been very ill this aftern. Sally Tole Slept here. at home.
rainy. mr Ballard & Cyrus to Coart. son Town Selpt here las t night and went from here this morn. at home. son Town here.

Birth Nathan Tylors Son. Cloudy & some Snow. we made my Sausages. I was Calld to See Nathan Tylors wife, Shee was Deld at 8h Evn of her 6th Son & 10 th Child. I tarrie all night. Hannah Bolton Expired at 3 h pm. Dagt Pollard was gone to put on her grave Cloaths. at mr Tylers. Birth 4 th . Death of Hannah Bolton.
[at] Ditoes.

Clear. mrs Duttun went home this foren. I went to my sons, find Wil m & Sally very unwell. I returnd, prepared my Self and went to Lecture; a mr Abbott performd. I Calld at mr Andrusis as I came home & at my Sons. the Child n Seeme Some more Comfortable. my Son Ephm is not well. at my Sons, at Lecture & at mr Andruses.
Clear. Sis t Barton Came here and Cutt Apples to drie for her Self. Sally Church & Child here. we have harvisted Beens & hops. mrs Farewell & Sally been here. at home. Bror & Sis t Barton Sleep here.

Clear. I tarried till aftern and returnd home with mr Ballard who was returning from Surveying. I have Sufered much with my malladies in the Coars of this weak, but God has held me up to perform for others. Sis t Barton & mrs Emry Came here on a visi t . a t Ditoes.

Clear part of y e day, very Clear a t Evn g . mr Ballard been to Hollowell, Cyrus returnd from winthrop with y e woll he had Carded there. I have been at home. Son Jona had his Swine killd, Sent me a harslett. at home. Cyrus returnd. mr Balld went to y e hook.
Snow d . I left mrs Tylor as well as Could be Expected. Calld at son Pollards, her Babe is not well. I arivd at home about noon. at Ditoes & Son Pollards. Hannat Bolton remains were interd.
at Ketons, his wife got better and her women went home. at Ketons.
Cloudy & some rain. we all went to the funeral of mrs Duttun, Jonas famely allso. mr Wilboro Prayed [&] Deld a discoars on y e ocation. a t didoes.

Clear and pleas t . Sons Jon a , Lambard and wives and 5 of Jon a s Childn Sup t with us, Hannah was not here. I am informd at Evn g of the Death of Col o Duttuns wife and that her Funeral was attended from her Son SamlS. may the visitation of providence be Sanctified to all nearly Concerned and the Call be heard by us all to be allso ready, as it is apointed to all men once to die and after death the Judgmen t . may we have our loins girt our lamps Burning tha t we may not be [Surprised] when the Bride groom Shall Come. at home, am informd of y e Death of Col o Duttons wife.

Clear. mr Ballard to meeting. Ephm & Son Lambd to Son Pollards, they Calld here at Evn g . Tommy going home with his dad y . Darcos Hodges with Son Pollard going to liv with mr Partrage. mr Bunker was in Company with them. at [home.] Sons Pollard & Lambd here.
Cloudy, snowd Some. mr Ballard & Ephm to meeting. Son Jona, his wife and part of y r Child n Sup t with us. I have been at home. at home. Dagt Ballard Came here.

Clear. mr Ballard went to mr Gardners. I receivd a Letter from Cyrus of y e 16 th inst, and wrote an answer; he was well. Dolly is at Son Jonas y s aftern. at home. recd a line fm Cyrus and wrote an answer.
Clear. mr Ballard is unwell, has a pain in his back. I have workt Some in my Gardin, had my pain fore n and at night. mrs Farewell & Son & dag t Ballard took Tea here. at home, mrs Farewell here.
rainy. Sister of mrs Emry here, did the most of my hous work. I have been very unwell. a t home.
Clear and pleast. I have Done my work, Strained the liquer from apple pareings. mr Ballard been to pitts ton Seeking help for me, but did not Suckseede. at home. Jabish Cowen Sleeps here.

Cloudy, raind a t nigh t . Dagts Ballard and Lambard took Tea with us. I have pu t fethers into a new Cottne and Linen tick for my Son Cyrus s . Sally Church washt and Bak t for me this day. at home. Dagt Ballard & Lambd here.

Clear. I have Done my hous work and my washing. I went to my Sons at Evn g , find them as well as can be Expectd. mr Ballard been down to the Jail, Served his warant on James & John Savage for Taxes and left y m both in Jail. at my Sons at Evn g .
Clear. mr Ballard went to Coart. the Judges were not Come but arivd at Evng. Son Town Sleeps here. I have workt in my Gardin, Sowd Peas, Planted Beans. at home. Son Town Sleeps [hr].
Clear. I have been very ill y s day. Dagt Ballard Came and nursed me, may Gods blessing rest on her for her goodness to me. at home, very Sick all day.

Clear. our men takeing Care of y e hay. I have done my work tho very ill able. I walkt to my Sons to See Sally who is Sick with the measels. Sister Wil ms been there Part of the day. James Moore here after me to go & See Amos Lions wife. I was not able. at my Sons. Sally Sick. mr James Moore here.

Cloudy. I am informd that mrs Duttun is very Sick. I walkt there, tarried all night. her aunts Pain & Springer and Doc t Howard there, he pu t a Blister on her Breas t , gave her Squells, &C, &C. [at Detoes.] [Doc t ] Howard there.

Clear. my friends left here. I have not been well. Sally Church washt for me. Calvin Ballard Calld here, Son Jona allso; he informd that mr Duttuns inft Expird is buried y s day. a t home. Calvin Ballard here.

Clear. I have been at home, houghd my peas, Some beens, [radashes], Cucumbers, millons, and knit. mrs Farewell and Dagt Ballard too Tea here, informd that James Cyphers infant is dead. Rhoda Pollard is 8 years old ys day. at home. mrs Farewell & [Dagt] Ballard here. a [death].
Clear part of ye day. I have been a t home. Dagt Ballard to mr Gills, his Babe is very Sick. may God pleas to restore it to health and they be able to bless his name. at home, feel very unwell.
Clear. I have been at home unwell, but have gathered part of my Beens. Cyrus is very unwell. at home.
Clear. mrs Savage went to my Sons. Sally Farewell Came to help me. a t home. mrs Savage went to my sons.

Clear. I have been at home, feel more Comfortable. Sally Church washt for me. mr Ballard gone to Survey the road thro Winthrop. Son Town Sleeps here. this is the aneversary of my Dag t death. at home. Son Town Sleeps here. 4 years Since ["my Dag t death". - implied]
rainy. mr Ballard to Son Jonas foren, hooping Casks for him. mr Ballard and Cyrus Cutt pumpkins at Evng. we boiled the refues and Strained it for use. at home.
Cloudy forenoon, raind aftn. Cyrus and Bill got wood. mr Ballard returned from Surveying jus t before night. at home.

X. Birth Pegy Whealors Dagt. X. Cloudy & windy. I was Calld a t 4h morn to See Peggy Whealor, Shee was Deld of a Dagt at 9 which Shee declared [ ] Gates was the Father of. I came home at 12 O Clock, tried the lard. A mr Meril of N. Gloster, his wife, Rob d Forbes and Fanny Sleep here. his marm made me a pres t of a pair of mitts. at Saunders. Case 3 d . receivd 9/ ofL. Hamlin. had Compy.
Cloudy part of the day. I have washt 13 Sheets and other things bu t how unable I am not able to Express. at home.
Cloudy. I have been a t home. Jonas Sons Sleep here. aniversary of arival at kenebeck. at home.
Clear. Dag t Pollard wash t for me. old mrs Gill and her sons wife, mr Petingail, Town and Rachel Town Came here, Thoms Lambd allso. mr Ballard returnd. at home. friends Came in to See me.
Cloudy and misty. mr Ballard to mr Vaughns. Doc t Cony Calld and left me Some pill [Cocha] and a blister. I have been So well as to Sew on a Shirt. a t home, feel some better.
rainy. Sally Church work t here. I paid her 1/6. I have been Cuting apples to drie. at [home]. Sally [C ] here.
Snowd all day. Dat Ballard was unwell, Dolly went there to take Care of her. I have been at home mending Stockins. at home. Dagt Bald unwell. Dolly went to help her.

Clear. I have been very ill, Sen t for Doct Cony. he left me Some Lavender & Rhu bb . Dagt Ballard Came to see me. Phebe went home. Jona and wife and Babe here all night. I got Some rest but Swet all night. at home, very ill. Jona an wife [stayd] here y s night.

Clear. I have done my washing, mr Ballard and Cyrus to Coart. Sister Wil ms , Dagts Ballard and Lambd took Tea here. Ezra Town Sleeps here, Ephm Came home with him. Hannah Ballard here this foren, Sally with her. Shee Slipt down and hur t her head with a Stone. at home. Sister Wiliams Sleeps here, Ezra Town allso.
Clear. I have been at home. Ephm Brot 39 Skeins warp, 26 filling y n from mr Pollards. at [home].
Clear. I have been at home, mended Cloaths. Nabby went away to Hollowell a t 11h Am. I have had y e aftern n work to do. a t home. Nabby to y e hook.

Clear and warm. my famely at meeting. Sister Willams spent the day with me. Dagt Ballard Came here after meeting, we took a walk to the Shop and orChar d . Ezra & Ephm been to Son Pollards after meeting, returnd at Evng. at home. Sister Wilms & Ezra Sleep here.

Clear. Bro r & Sis t left here. Jack Ballard Conducted his aun t to mr Faughts. my famely to meeting but my silf all day. we attended funeral of mr Gills Child after meeting. I had supper to prepare after I Came home. at meeting, & at the funeral of Saml Gill.
Cloudy. mr Ballard to meeting. Dagt Ballard Came here & par t of her Child n . Nabby Fall Came here. at [home]. Dan [Wd wd ] married to Clar a Stone.
Showery. I went to See Old mrs Tytor. mrs Keton had her women Calld again. at Ditoes & at mr Tylors.

Birth Son Jonas [3 d Daugt & 7th Child]. Clear and pleast. I rose at 4h y s morn. mr Ballard Sett ou t to Survey for Jud g Robbins. I have been Seting my hous in Some degree of order. Son Ephm made me a present of a Chest. W. Cypher brot it from y e Shop and I filld it with lining. was Calld about 2h pm to go and See Son Jon a s wife. Shee had her women Calld at 9 and was Safe Deld at 11 of her 7th Child and 3 d Daught & is Cleverly. a t Son Jonas. Birth 10th. I Came home a t 2 and got Some Sleep.
Clear. I have done my hous work and Some washing and went to Son Jonas, find them as well as Could be Expected. I knitt 30 purls on a Slockin for my husband after 7h Evn g . at my Sons.
Clear. mr Ballard Collecting taxes. I have been at home. mrs Farewell Calld here, Sally Church allso. a t home. mrs Farwell here.

X. [Birth of 5 th Child, a daugt. Lambd. XX. XX. Birth mrs Bodwels Dagt. XX. Clear. I was Calld at 20m after midnight to go and See my Dag t Lambard who was in Labour. She was Safe deld of her 5 th Child & 2 nd Daught at 1 h 20 m . I tarried with her till near the middle of the day when I was Calld by mr Edson to go and See mrs Bodwell who was in Labour. Shee was Safe deld at 6 h Evng of a Daugt, and I returnd home a t 11 h 20 m . I had a Severe turn of Cramp in the night. a t Son Lambard s & mrs Bodwe ls . Birth Son Lambards Dagt. Birth 5th, fee receivd. Birth 6th, recd 6/ as a reward.

Clear part of y e day, thunder & a Shower adtern. I have helpt do my hous work. Son Pollard here, made me a pres t of A head and harslet of a Calf. he is not very well. Son Jona & wife & Jack Dind with us. I have had a very ill turn. at home. Clarrisa to her Fathers.
Clear and windy. Bill Cypher Banking our hous. Sally Church helpt me half y e day. mr Georg Brown Sleeps here. I have been at home. a t home. mr G. Brown Sleeps here.

Clear. I have done my hous work. mrs Farewell Calld here. I went to my sons, find mrs Gill and Dagt Lambd there; they Came home with me. Ephm & Allin Came and Slept here. Jason Peirce & wife at my Sons. Son Cyrus been to Reedfield for Rachel Allin, but did not obtain her. mr Gill, Sons Lambd & Jona here at Evng. at Ditoes. Dagt Lambd & mrs Gill here.
Clear. I have work t in my Gdn, Planted Cucumbers, musk mellions and Beans. mr Ballard Sowd Some Beats. mr Ballard and Cyrus to Coart. at home. workt in my [Gardin].
Clear. I have been very feeble but am left to take care of my self and famely. I paid Clarrissa Stone 8/8_ for what Shee has Done for me Since June 20th. at home, very unwell.
Cloudy & rain. mrs Duttun Some more Comfortable but very weak. mrs Edson was Calld and I Came home. at Ditoes.
rainy. I have wash t part of my Cloaths, feel much fatagued. mr Ballard has been to wido Floids & mr Osgoods. a t home.

Clear. I have got in matters from my Gardin. Cyrus more unwell. Dagt Ballard, mrs Butler, Farwell took Tea here. Ephm Came home very Sick. I got warm watir to Bath his feet & made him Catnip Tea with peneriol. the wife of S. J. Foster Expired at 3h y s morn. at home. Eph Came home Sick at Evng.
Clear. I was Calld to See mrs Duttun, her milk is Coming and Shee Seemd very much distresed till 10h Evn when Shee got Easier and I wen t to bed a t 11, got Some Sleep. at mr Andrus s .

Clear and very pleas t . mag r Stickney here this morn after mr Ballard to go and Survey for Capt Rheed. Son Town went from here before Breakfast. Sally Came and help t me again, Shee washt my floars. Dagt Ballard took Tea here. at home. mag r Stickny here. Dagt Ballardhere aftn.
Clear. I have done my hous work, Strained Liquor for vinagar and filld a Barril which we purchased of Old mr Cros by for that purpos. at home, put my Vinagar into a New Barril.

Clear. mr Ballard, Son Jon a and his Son Jon a , went to Survey Land for mr Whipple. I was a t my Sons, assisted her some and dresed the infant. Came home and Bak t bread, Beef and pork for Super. Cutt raggs for flocks & Coverled at Evng. Cyrus & Bill go t wood. at my Sons.
Clear. I have been going on with my washing. I wrote a line to Bro r Jona by mr Edson, and Sent it to mr Andrus s . at home.
I have been a t home, it is 25 years yesterday Since I arivd a t kenebeck. how many Siens have pass t Since. Son Ephm returnd from mr Lambds, is as well as Can be Expected. at home. Ephm returnd.
Clear. mr Waid Butchered 2 Swine for us. w t of both 413 lb . Nabby is not very well and I had more to do than I was able. I tryed the Lard y s evning. at [home] we had [] hoggs Butchered.

Cloudy and very warm. I have been very feeble. Dagt Pollard has Bak t and done my other work. Rachel and Tommy went home. Allin & Dolly Sleep here. Dagt Ballard, mrs Fletcher and mrs Wall Calld in to See me, Jane Black here allso. a t home. friends Calld in to See me.
Clear and warm. my blister allmost makes me Seck. W m Webber & wife dind here. Jona & wife gone to Sydni. a t home, have a blister.

Clear. I took up my Cloaths, renced, dried & ironed them & Did my other work. I went to my Sons to See L faett, mrs H. Pierce there. Dagt Ballard went to Son Lambds aftern. at my Sons. Cyrus [unwell].
Clear. I have been at home, we Bakt Bread, Pudings, meat & mins Pies. mrs Farewell Calld here at dusk. mr Ballard is gone to run a line for mr Whipple west Side this river. at home.
Clear. I have been at mr Gills, Came there las t Evng; his wife is very unwell. his Son Charls has a Sweling on his throat. at [mr] Gills.
[Snows] at Evn g . I have been at home. Son Pollar d been here y s day, his famely well. at [home].
Clear. mr Ballard to the meeting hous, mr Moody performd, Ephm to uper Parrish. mrs Brown Sleeps here. at [home].

X. Birth Benn Waids 2nd Son. XX. Clear morn, Cloudy part y e Day. I was Calld at 5h y s morn to go and See mrs s Waid, Shee was Deld of a son a t 10. I left her and infant as well as Could be Expected and arivd at home at 3 pm. we went to my Sons to dine, or rather Sup, after meeting. Nabby Came at 10 h Evn, then wen t to Jonas. at mr Waids. Birth 1 st . receivd 4:6.

Clear. mr Ballard, my Self, Cyrus & Ephm & Hoiet went to meeting. we, some of us, went to Son Lambds a t intermition. he and my Dag t were gone to mr Capins. James Cowens wife desired prayers for her Self being in a low State and allso the Death of her Daugh t might be Sanctified. a t meeting & at Son Lambds. heary t mrs Badcock was dead.
Clear. I Came from mr Gills to Son Lambards. mr Ballard & Son Ephm there at intermition. Ephm Sup t there. at Ditoes & Son Lambds.

Clear. Sister Wil ms help t me in the morn and went to Son Jonas. I finisht my work, went there aftern. feel much fatagued, went on the bed and rested. I took Tea there, mr Ballard & Cyrus allso. Sister Came home with me, mrs Farewell with us fm there. I had a very ill night. aneversary Lucy Towns [Birth] 17 years. at my Sons. Ezra Town Sleeps here.
raind. Nabby wash t . I knitt and Sewd and did par t of my hous work. at home.
Clear. I have been at Son Pollards, my Dagt is more Comfortable. at Son Pollards.

Clear. I have been at home. it began to Snow at Evn. the Girls have washt and been to Jonas. I began to make me A Skirt. Leut John Shaw paid his Taxes. Georg Andrus paid 1D 50 Cents. at home. mr Ballard gone to mr Foys.

X. Bth Ketons 5th Dagt. rainy. my Patient was Safe Deld at 3h y s morn of her 5th daugh t and 8th Child. I left her after n and Came to Son Pollards but Could not proseed on acoun t of y e rain. at Ketons and Son Pollards. Birth 6th.
Snowd. I have Bak t & Brewd and done my other work. mr Evlith here for advice respecting his inft. mr Ballard was at son Lambd, [bot] a Chees, wd 17 lb. at home. mr [Evelith] here.

Cloudy. Sally Church workt for me. Sons Jona & Lambard, their wives and part of their Child n here. Thomas was Sick and Puk t , Barny is finely to what he was when I las t Saw him. Son Ephm wen t yesterday to Son Pollards to work, one of mr Petingails Sons with him. a t home. Child n to visit.
Clear and Cold. I have been at home. I feel Some fatagud. Dagt Ballard a t son Lambds, her Childn here. Shee returned home ye aftern. Son Town Sleeps here. at home. Son Town Sleeps here.
Cloudy & Some rain. I have been at home, did Some work in my gardin altho I had a Pain in my Stomach, was very ill with it all night. at home, was Sick all night.

Clear and very pleasant. mr Brown Sett out from here on his way to y e State of Vermount. Sally Came and helpt me ys foren. I paid her 1/6 for yesterday & this. at home. Sally Church helpt me part of y s day.
Snow d and blowd all day. I have been at home. Bakt pies. at home.
rainy. I have been at home, wrote to Bror Jona. a t home. wrote [B ] Jona [Mo ].

Clear part of y e day. I was Calld a t 2 h pm to see mrs Duttun whome was tho t to be Expireing. I sett with her all nigh t . mrs Edson went home, mrs Arnald Came and Sett with me. mrs And s is allmost Confined with a pain in her Back. a t Ditoes.
Showers. I have finisht wy washing and done my hous work. Suky Kenady here. I lent her my Saddle to go to Farmington. I am informd that mr Gills Child is better. at home.
Clear. the remains of mrs Foster were intered a t 3h pm. Dagt Ballard, her oldes t Son & son Epm attended. I have been very unwell. a t home. funeral of mrs Foster.
Cloudy, Some rain. Dagts Ballard & Pollard Dind here, my son allso. Son Pollard & wife Sleep here. mrs Farewel took Tea with us. at home. Childn here.

Clear. I have done my hous work, boiled the pickle my Cucumbers are in. Cutt, pared and hung up 4 pumpkins, helpt pare and Cutt more at Evng. mr Ballard returned from Surveying winthrop road. Sally Farewell been in here y s day. at home.

Clear part of the day. I have been at home, done my work; feel very unable. mr Ballard went to mr Woodwards after a Girl but faild of giting her. Dagt Ballard Came here, tarried bu t little while [when] Shee was Sent for by mr Getchel. a t home. Dagt Ballard been here.

Clear and very pleas t . Son Jon a Came for me to go and Dress his infan t . mrs Hodges there. Shee Calld here, had y e youngest of her Dagt infts with her. I did my aironing aftern and Cutt raggs a t Evng. at [Ditoes]. mrs Hodges here.

X. Birth Charls Gills 4 th Son & [6] th Child. XX. Clear and Pleast. I was Calld a t 3m after mid nigh t to go and See mrs Gill who was in Labour. Shee was Safe Deld at 10h morn of her 6th Child by her last marriage and 4th son. I left her and infant Cleverly at 1h Pm, the wrideing very bad. I Calld at Son Lambds and took y e milk out of her infts breast, they were very full and hard. at mr Charls Gills. Birth 7th. March 14 th recd of mr Gill, by the hand of Son Ephm, 12/ as a reward.
Clear. I finisht my washing and ironing. Dagt Ballard Came and mended some hoes for my husband & Sons. I feel very much fatagued with the which I have Performed in y e Coars of this weak. a t home.

rainy. I have been very unwell. Polly Farewell did my hous work. I wen t aftern to see Barna Lambd, find him very low indead; tarried there all night. I Calld a t mr Andrews, find 5 of his famely Sick with y e measels. at Son Lambds & mr Andrews s .

Clear and Colder. I have been trying our Tallow and Salting the meat, and doing other matters till late in the Evng. Nabby Complains of feeling very unwell, took herb Tea when Shee went to Bed. at home.

Clear and warm. I have worried thro the business of this day. Dag t Ballard Came and assisted to Cook Supper. her famely (Excep t L e faett who is gone to his uncle Savages) partook with us, mrs Pierce here allso. we had Squash, the firs t we have had this [Summer]. at home, my famely all to meeting.
Clear. I tarried at my Sons till after meeting [then] Came as far as mr [Andrews], tarried all night on mrs Duttuns acount, went to bed and Slep t some. al my Sons [&] mr Andrews s .
Clear. mr Ballard & Son Ephm to meeting. Son Jona & wife here and Supt with us. Nabby Complains of A pain in her right Side, took Tea again. at home. Son Jona and wife here.
rainy. mr Ballard to meeting. Son Jona, his wife and 4 Childn here at Evng. John Bolton and Lucy Bolton were Published. at home. Jona [and] wife [here].
Clear. I have been at home, began a Stockin for Sally Ballard. at home.
Clear. I have been at home, harvisted Beens and Corn till I felt very much falagud. at [home]. [Mrs ] Calld here.
Clear and very Cold. Nabby is a t my Sons. Allin & Ephm here. I have done my work, Sett up till 12. at home.

Clear and Colder than it has been of late. I have Done part of y e hous wk and knitt Some. Ephm Conducted his Sis t Lambard to Son Pollards. mr Ballard been down in Town. Nabby washt and Sewd for her Self. a t home.
Cloudy. I have been at Son Lambds. he went to Hallowell aflern and did not return till 5h morn. at Ditoes.

Cloudy part of the day, raind at night. Son Jona had men to work at haying, his wife went to Sith J. Fosters. mrs Hallowell Came here at Evn and tarries all night. Jona & wife both gone all night. at home, feel very unwell.

Cloudy and rain. I have Scoured 65 Skeins y n , finisht a Stockin & began another, knit 50 purls. Nabby did hous work & finisht her Shor t goun. Shee work t on it las t Evng. at home. Scoured my yarn.
Clear. Son Pollard returnd from his Mothers, David Pollards wife & Polly Pollard with him. mr Hodges, his wife, Fanny, and his 3 Child n which were Born at a Birth, Sleep there. at Dito.
Snowd. I have finish t my Skirt and knitt some. mr Ballard returnd. a t home. Jona & wife to Asa Pierces.
Clear. I have been at home, workt on a Cottne Shift of my own. Phillip Bullin here at Evn g . Son Jona & wife to mr Gills, they tarrie at Son Lambds all night. at home. [P. Bullin here.]
rainy foren. I returnd home aftern. at Son Pollard s .
moderate. I have been at home. at home.
Cloudy, raind a t nigh t , and Snowd. I have done my hous work and wash t my kitchen, feel very unwell a t Evn g . at home.
Cloudy, raind aftern and night. I went to Son Lambds, tarried all night. Sister Barton is there. at Son Lambds.
Clear and pleast. mr Ballard and Ep hm went to meeting this day, is observed as a day of thancksgiving. Son Jona and all his famely partook with us at Super. at home. thanksgiving day.
Clear part of the day and Cold. I have been a t home, done my work. at home.
Snowd. I have been at home makeing Soap, finisht footing mr Ballards Stockins. at home.
Snowd. I have been at home about Soap makeing. Son Jona, his wife, Jason Pierce & his wife went to mr Gills & Lambds. mr Densmore removd his famely. at home. [Robd Forb and Sister went from here].

Clear, a great fros t . I left mrs Duttun at 7h m, her Babe is unwell. I have been unwell, Sally Church helpt me. I have paid her 4/ for what Shee has done for me this weak. I was Calld about Sun Sett to go and assist to put on the grave Cloaths for mrs Duttun who is now Expired. her husband is Come to see her, arivd before Shee was diad. mrs Arnald & Cypher & Betsy Church assisted me to perform what was Done, the Babe is very unwell. at Detoes. mrs Duttun Expird.
Clear. I have been at home, did my work about hous through much fatague. Rich d Fosters wife Came here at Evng and Sleeps here with her youngest Child. at home. mrs Foster SLeeps here.
Clear. Ep m Cowens wife here, I paid her wha t was her due fm me. at home. mrs Cowen here.
Clear. mr Ballard gone to Collect taxes. Son Pollard to y e hook, his wife to Jonas. they went home at Evng. a t home. Dagt Pollard went home.

Clear. I have been at home, Sorted our Corn & helpt do other work. Sally Church helpt me. I paid her 3/8 pence for the three days Shee has workt here this weak. we had a [Broild] Chicken for Dinner. Dagt Ballard partook. at home. Dagt Ballard here.

Clear. I have been at home, done my hous work, ironed and Bakt an oven full of pumkin Pies. A mr Stewar d , his wife and five Child n Calld here on their way (from Hallifax in moun t vernon) to Canaan. they have been 16 days on their joirney. I gave them Some refreshment. mr Ballard been down below, informs y t Ben n Page fell from Tim y Pages phraim and was much hurt. at home. a famely Calld here bound to Canaan by the name of Steward.
Cloudy. our men removd the fencs to the west of y e wel. I was a t my sons. a t my Sons.

Clear. I have been at home till Sun an hour high. mrs Butlar Came here. I Set out on hors back and went to Son Pollards, arivd there at dusk. Cyrus went with me, he tarried all night. at Son Pollards.
Clear. I went to my Sons to See Sally, Shee is very unwell. Came home at Evng. at my Sons, Sally Sick.
Clear. I have been at home, my famely all to meeting. mrs FoSter to my Sons after Breakfast. mr Forbs & Savage Dind here. I went to Son Jonas to See Sally who is unwell. at my Sons to See Sally.
Clear. mr Ballard to meeting. I have been at home. Son Jona & famely Sup t here, Aallin & Dolly Lambd allso. at home.

Clear. Sally Came and did my work and I went to meeting. I paid her /9 for her Service. Son and daght Ballard Sup t here. Revd mr Parker Performd. I wen t to mr Pittses at [intermition]. at meeting & mr Pitts.

X. Birth Son Pollards 4 th Dag t . XX. rainy. I have been at Ditoes. my Daugh t was taken in Labour, her women were Calld in before dark and Shee was Safe Deld a t 11 h 10 m Evn of her 4 th dag t and 6th Child, and is as well as Can be Expected. at Ditoes. Birth 8th. recd as a rew d .

Clear. mr Ballard on the Colleclion business. I have Cleand my Buttery. Jon a and Ephm Ballard helpt me picking Chips, & Son Eph m & Sam l Trask went to mr Pettngails [to wk.] at home. Hannah Ballad is [unwell].
Clear. I did my washing, Nabby the work about hous and help t me wash the kitchen floor. a t home.

Clear foren and very warm for the Season, raind at Evn g . Nabby washt. I brot the Cloaths in and dried & folded them. I have done hous work and knit some. Allin Lambard and Jonas Sons here. mr Ballard been to See Phillip Bullin. Cyrus to mr Brookses, bot me _ lb Snuff, price 3/. at home.

Clear. Sally Church Came to wash for me. I was Calld to go to See Saml Gill, find him very low indead. his Complaint is Disentry & worme. I tarried all night, Sett up till 1h m. at mr Gills, [his Son Saml very Sick].

X. Birth Anthony Brackets Dag t . XX. Clear and very Cold foren, more moderate aftern. I was Calld at 4h morn to See the wife of Anthony Bracket. Shee was, after hard Labour, Safe Deld at 4 h 30 m Evn of her 4 th Child and first Daugh tr and I Came home a t 7. I spent y e Evng kniting. Hannah, Wilm & Sally Ballard Sleep here, their dady & marm gone to Son Lambds. at mr Brackets. Birth 2 nd . receivd 6/.

Clear and prity Cold. mr Ballard Surveying for James Page on mrs Farewells Back lott. I have been at home, washt the N room and knitt. Jona & wife & Hitty Pierce gone to Son Pollards, the Child n Came here. a t home.
Clear part of y e day. I have spent this day a t Son Lambds. Son Jona & wife Came there, tarrie all night. Snowd at Evng. at my Sons.
Clear. Sister Williams here part of y e day. at home.
Cloudy part of y e day. I have been kniting, Nabby doing hous work. mr Ballard to Settle with the Town & Country treasurers, got receipts in full for Some taxes, and in Part fr others. at home.

Clear morn, Cloudy aftern. Son Pollard went to Augusta. mr Hodges Sett ou t for there aftern. I tarrie there this night. Oliv has had Company this day, had the bes t room to Sett with them. at Ditoes.
Clear and Cold. Nabby Fall left here, we have Paid her all her wages for work Shee has done here. at home. Nabby left here, wint to Hallowell.

Clear. I have been a t home, Swep t my Chambers. Le faett removd the Corn out of y e South Chamber into the north one. Lidia has been to Esqr Davis s to See her sister. Shee met her oldes t Sister on her way (from Concord, N. H.) to Bellgrade. Miles Leathers, who livs at my sons, is unwell; has a pain in his Side. at home. Lidia to See her Sister _ y e day.
Cloady. have been at home. raind . Dagts Ballard & Lambard and part of their Childn here, Old mrs s Church allso. at home. Child n to See me.

Clear part of the day. Lydia Nudd Sett out to go to her fathers. I washt y e Bullery and performd other work foren, was very unwell before night. Fanny Hodges Came from my sons to assist me. I had a very ill night. at home. Lydia [went] home. I have been very unwell.
Cloudy. Cyrus Bulchered a Veal. I have workt in my Gardin all day. at home. mrs Peirce Sleeps here.
Snowd and Blowd. I removd my pickles (with the help of Cyrus) into the Sellar and did my other work. at home.
rainy. I was very unwell this morn. Sally Church Came and help t me. mr Ballard to Parrish meeting.
rainy, the Snow is all most gone. I tarried with my Daughter till Evn g when mr Lambard Conducted me home. my Dagt & infant are Comfortable. at Ditoes.

Clear. I have been at home. Cyrus and I removd the banking N of y e front doore. I Shoveled it into my Sellar to fill a wet place under the Stairs. Lydia went to see Betsy Andrews. at home. Dagt Ballard here to Tea. Jack brot Hannahhome.

Clear part of the day, raind a t night. I have been very unwell all day. mrs Edson, Dagt Ballard, Saunders & mrs Crockett here. Old mr Jo foster and Son Jona took Tea here. at home, have been unwell. mr Ballard Surveying for mr Gilly.
Cloudy and Some rain. Cyrus went to winthrop to Carrie wool to be Carded. I have been at home. at home. Cyrus to winthrop [with] wool.

Clear and Cold. I have done my hous w k and mended hoes. mr Ballard gone to mr Lambds. mrs Cypher bro t me 10 Egg, 1/10 d . I let her have 1/6. I was Calld to mr Pitts s a t 9h Evn. at mr Shubal Pitts s a t Evng. mrs Cypher here.

Clear part of the day. I have been about my Soap and began to foot a pair hoes for Cyrus. mr Prince Baker here, Sup t here. he had a Plan of New Sharon to Carrie to Judg Coneys which he is to return. at home. mr Prince Baker of New Sharon Sup t here.
Clear. I have finish t makeing Soape, have got three Barrils full and Some more. Colo Duttun here, paid the remainder of his taxes. at home, finisht makeing Soape.
Cloudy. I have been at home Sewing. Allin & Thomas Lambard here. Snowd at night. at home.

Clear. I went to my Sons to see his Son Jona who hurt him Self yesterday at his uncle Lambds. we are aprehensive he has a Briech. we Bathd and bandaged him and I Came home. I am informd that mrs Whitwell was Deliv d las t night, her infan t Expired Soon and Shee Expired this morning at 4 O Clock. Dagt Ballard took Coffee here, her Son Wil m Sleeps here. may God Support the bereeved in their affliction and be better to them than what he has taken from them. at home. hear of the Death of mrs Whitwel & infant. mr Livermore here this aftern.
Cloudy. I have been So well that I have made Flower Bread for my self, Brown bread for mr Puringtun. we bott 10 lb Butter of Leu t John Shaw. at home.

Clear. I have Cleand my Chambers. Fanny Hodges help t me this fore nn. Sons Pollard & Jona ant their wives took Tea. Son P. & wife Sleep here. mr Ballard been to the Settlemen t . at home. Son & Dag t Pollard, theiroldes t & younges t Dagts with y m .

Cloudy, raind at Evn g . I went to Son Jonas about noon. mr Ballard and Cyrus Calld in after meeting and took Supper with them. mrs Gillbar t and Saunders Came there at Evng. [at they are Comfortable].
Cloudy. mr Ballard, Cyrus & Ephm to meeting. Lydia went to my sons. Sally remains unwell, Le faett, Ephm & Wil m allso. at home.

Snowd. mr Ballard and Cyrus wen t to meeting. mr Gill & Lambar d Came and Conducted Dagts Pollard & Ballard to Son Lamb d s. Jona and Ephm wen t there. I have been at home. it was a Severe Storm aftern and Evng. at home. Dagt Pollard went to Son Lambards.
Clear. I have been a t home, did my work. Rhoda Pollard Came here with Son Cyrus. a t home.
Clear. mr Ballard brot his OXen fm [Pages]. I have been unwell y s day. [Son] Ephm wen t to Son Lambds, [was] taken down with y e measels. at [home]. Son Ephm down [Sick] at Son Lambds.

Cloudy. I have done my hous work and Cut and Pared 4 Pumpkins. mr [Ballard] on the Collection Business. Betsy Andrus here, paid me a Crown for my attending her Sister Duttun in her last Sickness. at [home]. Betsy Andrus here.
at Son Pollards. a t Detoes.

Cloudy, Snowd at Evn g . I have been to my Sons to See Patty, Shee fell out of her Brothers arms & hur t her face. I have finished futing mr Ballards hoes and began to fu t A pair for my Self. Nabby and I pickt up the Chips at the door. mr Ballard to son Lambds. Doc l Barton here, his famely well. Eliab Shaws wife & mrs Braley Calld here, Sarah Cleark allso. at my Sons. A Suden Death a t Hollowell this day, a mr [Johnston].

Cloudy and some rain. I have finished kniting a pair of mitts for mr Ballard. Son Pollard here, his famely well. Son Ephm returnd from there. Nabby Sett up a Leach for ley. Cyrus to Hallowell for Corn. a t home.

Clear. I have help t do hous work and rakt Chips. Dagt Ballard & mrs Chamberlin here. mr Ballard fenced y e Gardin. he has seen 78 years this day. as his years may his grace in Creas. at [home]. Son Town Sleeps here.
Cloudy part of y e day. mr Waid Butchered our OXen, they wd 160. I help t about the work till near night and was much fatagued. at home. our OXen were killed. Son Lambd here.
Clear till near night. mr Ballard to Son Pollards, Dagt Ballard & Lambard Came home from there. I have Brewd and done other work. at home. Dagt Lambd Calld here.

Cloudy and Some Snow. I tarried at Son Lambds till 3 h pm and then Came home. they made me a pres t of a pair Shears and _ yd flanell. Sons Jona & Lambd & y r wives to mr Gills, their Childn Sleep at our hous. at Ditoes.

Clear. mrs Welch washt for me. I paid her Cash 9/8_. mr Ballard Sett out for Ball Town. Sister Williams spent y e day at my Sons, Came here at Evn g . I have been not So well as I Could wish. at home. mr Ballard Sett out for Ball town. mrs Welch washt here.

Cloudy, Snowd a t Evn. I have finisht my husbands Stockin which I began at 4h pm 28th inst and a Cottne Shir t which mrs Duttun had partly made before Shee died. mr Ballard Sett out with others to look a road from the Bridg to Sheapscott Settlemen t . at home.

Snowd. I Came home from Son Pollards accompanied by Rob d Fletcher. Calld to See mrs Thompson. mrs Farewell Calld at my hous. Shee has been to her hous, finds her hous broken open and part of her Efects gone. at Ditoes & at home.

Clear and Pleast. mrs Forbes and her Son Rob d left here after breakfast bound for Gloster, they Slep t here last night. I have been at home. Dagt Ballard went to Son Pollards. Son Ephm & my [sic]. at home. mrs Forbs Set out fm here for Gloster.

Clear and very pleasan t . I have been at home, Done Some Sewing [&] pick t Beens to Cook. mr Ballard down to the Settlement, P. Bullin Came home with him. Sally Pierce & Hannah Ballard and little Sally here. a t home.
Cloudy & some rain. I work t some in my Gardin. Lydia had Comp y , her Sister Zepporah, Hitty Hatch, Betsy Andrus & Polly mosier. at home.

Clear. I have done Some matters in my Sellar, have mead wheat Bread and Brown. I feel very unwell y s aftern. my Sympathy is great for my Son Town and his Dear wife and famely in their present afliction. they are this day attending y e Solemnity of intering the only Child of his present marriage. may the Great paren t of the Univerce giv them Comfort and be more to them than wha t he has taken from them, and may all the famely hear the Call be ye allso ready. may we all be Excited to the Same. at home. Funeral of Son Towns Child. Genl Sewall Calld here.

Clear. I have been very unwell. we Cookt the head and harslit of the Veal. Jona, his wife [&] siSt r , w m & Sally Dind with us. Dagt Ballard had an ill turn a t Evng, Pukt up 6 larg worms. at home. my Childn here.
Clear and very Cold & windy. I have been a t home, feel unwell. at home.

Clear. mr Ballard gone on Eas t Side y e river to Collec t taxes. mr James Child here, paid me two fees for performing Cases for his Lady. firs t in Novr 12 th 97, Second Augus t 3 d 99. he gave for the two L 1:1:0. at home. mr Child paid me 3_ Dollars for pas t Service.
Clear and Cold. I made 26 doz n Candles. Nabby did my hous work. at home.
Snowd. mr Ballard returned home. I have not felt very well. Jona is very unwell with a Cold. at home. mr Ballard returnd.

X. [Birth Shubal Pitts s 2 nd Son. XX.] Cloudy and Some Snow. my Patient was Safe Deld at 2h 5m y s morn of her Second Son and 4th Child. I tarried with her till aftern n , left her & inft Cleverly and Came home, thro some falague, had my hous work all to do. at Ditoes. Birth 11th. recd 9/4 d as a reward.
Clear and very pleas t . I went to Son Jonas aftern, Sally is unwell. Lydia Complains of a Pain in her head. I aplyed Camphir when Shee went to bed. at Son Jonas. I paid 12/ to Lydia Nud.
Snowd part of this day. I Slipt down and hurt my Self. Dagt Ballard & mrs Pierce in here. I finish t kniting a pair of hoes for Hannah Ballard. at home.

Clear, the Snow wen t of. I was Calld aftern by mr Moody to go and See his wife, found mrs Woodward there. the patient is in Defucalt Circumstances, we both tarried with her all night. at mr Moodys, his wife unwell.

Clear. I Sett 10 Curent Bushes, have been Sorting Beens and doing other matters. mr Ballard been down into the Settlement. Fanny Hodges and Hannah & Sally Ballard here. Son Ephm & Lathrop to work for Son Lambard. at home.

Clear. I was Calld at 2 h morn to go & See Midian Cowens wife who is unwell. I See her in Safe Circumstance and returnd home, have felt allmos t Sick. Lydia to work at my sons. mrs Farewell took Tea here, Shee informd me that Theo s Hamlins wife was Deld last night. at midion Cowens. receivd 3/9 for my trouble.

Clear and very pleast but it is very bad traveling. mr Balld, Cyrus & Ephm at meeting. Lydia wint to Son Jonas. he and his wife & y r Son Jon a were at meeting. at home. mr Cleark & Ruth Springer joind inMariage.
Clear. mr Ballard, Cyrus & Ephm to Meeting a t the meeting hous. Lydia Nudd to the N parrish. I feel my hurt so much that I tarried at home. a t home.

Clear. I am at mr Moodys. Doc t Hubard was Calld to See her, he gave no Medisin but is of opinion that her Complaint wil be thron of by natures Eforts. I tarried this night, a number of Ladies there to visi t y e patienl. at Ditoes. Doc t Hubard was Calld there.

Clear & Cloudy by turns. I went to meeting and to the hous of mr Whitwell. his wife and infant were interd, a vast Concoarce of people followed in procecsion after the Corps. we had but one Service at the meeting hous. Revd mr Stone was Calld to attend a funeral at Capt Homans, Varsalborough. mr Gillet Presided at mr Whitwels. I am informd that mrs Cowen is failing very fas t . at meeting and at the funeral of mrs s Whitwall & infant. I Calld at mr Pitts s , mr Thwings& Moodys.

Clear and warm. my famely all attended public worship at the meeting hous, the Revd mr Stone discorsed from the Gospel of S t John 7 th C 46 th verse, and the ofersers answered Said never man Spake as this man Speaketh like this man. at meeting and at mr Westons.

Cloudy. mr Ballard and sons to Town meeting. I am informd that Daniel Woodwards infant was Sufocated in bed with its Parents the night past. mr Lathrop is makeing a Cofin for it. Lydia and I wen t to Son Jon as to See the Childn who are very unwell. at my Sons to see the Child n . Daniel Woodwds infan t Expired in bed with its parents.

Clear but Cold. I have been very unwell this day. Fanny Came and helpt me make some Apple & pumpkin Pies. Lydia returnd, her Sister Odlin Came with her. Shee Sleeps here. at home. am informd that mr John Badcock Expired las t night.
Clear. mr Ballard to mr OZgoods. I have been at home, mrs Dullun here to mend Cloaths. I have washt. at home, washt. mrs Duttun Sewing for me. [15]
and

Clear. mr Ballard gone to Friend Breads. I have been at home, harvisted part of my Peas. mrs Duttun Sewing for me. I paid her 3/, mr Ballard has paid her 4/ for past Servises. at home. mrs Duttun helpt me. [16]
Cloudy. I have been at home, done work about hous, pu t the tripe in Sous liquir. Cyrus Carried my web to mrs Shaw to weave, 39 Skeins warp, 37 of filling. at home.

Clear. I have been at home, boiled my Soap Grees in Ley, began to fut a pair of hoes for Cyrus. Nabby spun 1 Skein y n for my Dagt Ballard. mr Ballard wrote to A mr Peirce, Boston. at home till the middle of the night.
Clear. mr Ballard went to winslow, Son Town home. I have had a vary Sick day. Dag t Ballard Came to See me. at home, very Sick.

Cloudy. mr Ballard is not returned. I have been at home. Dagts Ballard & Lambd with part of their Childn here, mrs Parker & 5 of hers here allso. Son & Dagt Lambd & Barney Sleep here. Son Ephm at home to Sleep. at home, friends here to See me. [17]
raind foren, windy aftern. I have been doing about the work, Cuting the tallow and trying part of it, washt the Entralls and Put them in Lye to Boil. a t home.
Clear day, Cloudy Evng. mr Gill, Sons Jona & Lambd & wives and nrs Farewell here to visit us. at home. Child n to See us.

Snowd. Col o Duttun dined with us. mr Ballard is not So well as he Could wish. mr Butler dind here. I have been at home, knit some and took Care of our Beef. we boiled the pickle. a t home. Col o Duttun here.
Clear. I planted musk mellons and removd apple trees, removd Chips &C. we had a man by the name of Conan t who dug gardin for us. at [home]. Saml Badcock 3 d & Hitty Pierc [were] Married.
Clear and very warm. Revd mr Stone took Tea here and Lydia Nudd went from here by reason of lambness in her right legg. I have workt in my Gardin Some &C. [at home.] mr Stone here. Lydia went away.
Clear and hott. mrs Arnold left here. Sally Church here with her Child. I have workt in my Garden. at home.

Clear part of the day. Dagt Lambd wen t from here to my Sons. I wen t there aftern to See Hannah who is very Sick with a Pukeing & desentry. Old Lady Mosier Came there, we took Tea and Shee Came home with me; Slept here. the Child is Some Easier. Rhoda Pollard with her aunt. at my Sons. Dagt Lambd went home. Old mrs Mosier Sleep t with me. [18]

Clear. I have been at home. we made pumpkin and apple pies and I knit Some futing a Stockin for mr Ballard. the year is now Comd to a Close and I am Still a living monumen t of Gods Spareing mercie. may I have a proper Sence of his Goodness and liv according there to. at home, made Pies and knitt.

Clear. mrs Capin, Dagt Lambd and Allin & Lucy here. mr Hodges, his wife, his 3 Child n , and Fanny to assist them, they all Slept here Excep t Fanny & Mehaly; Dagt Ballard been here allso. a t home, had Compy.

Clear and pleast. Son Jona & Daug Lambd Dind here then went to Son Pollards. they returnd at 10h Evn. mr Ballard been to pay money to the Treasurers. Bror Ebenzr Sleeps here, Allin Lambd & Ephm Ballard allso. at home. Bror EbenZ Sleeps here. Son Jona has seen 40 years this day.
Clear. I have been at home. Dagt Ballard & Betsy Andrews here to Tea. I finish t a Cottne Shir t for mr Ballard, the third I have had made for him this year. at home. Dagt Ballard here.

Cloudy. I have removed part of the Banking from the west side of the hous. Carried par t to make it more level to the well and part towards the necessary hous. at home removing the Banking from the house.

Clear part of y e day, raind foren n . Dagt Pollard Came here foren n . Dagt Lambard, Son Jona & wife & part of y r Child n Dind & took Tea with us. funeral of a mrs Pray, Hollowel. a t home, my Child n here.
rainy. I have Planted Sumer Squash, Sowd Early peas. at home.

Clear. mr Ballar d returnd. I have been at home, the old Lady left here after Dinner. Shee had y e misfortin to fall from y e top of y e Stairs after Shee arivd at home. at home. Old Lady Mosier left here.
Cloudy and Cold. mr Ballard gone to mill. I have done my work. Son Jona here, he Seems Some better. mr Kinsly & Bill Cypher workt for us giting wood. a t home. Kinsly & Cypher work t here.
A Severe Snow Storm. I have been So unwell I have not Sett up bu t part of the day. the remains of Deacon Coney were intered this aftern. at home unwell. Funeral of Deacon Cony.

Cloudy. I have put my Candles into the Sellar. I have 11 lb of those made in the winter past and 45 Dozn made this weak. I have allso Sown parsley, pink radishs, peppers. Zepporah Nudd Dind here. Lydia went to Hollowell and Came home unwell. I made her Some Cammomile tea. Hannah Pollard Sleeps here. at home, washt the north room and did various other Servises. Lydia Came home Sick. I made her herb Tea.
rainy. mr Ballard and Cyrus went to meeting. I have been at home, Cleard the drane in my Seller. Son Jona, his wife and part of y r Child n dind with us. at home. my Child n dind here.
Clear. my famely to meeting. I tarried at home, made apple saus for S. J. Fosters wife. mr Ballard went to Carrie it to her a t Evn. at home. made apple saus for mrs Foster.
Snowd and blowd & raind. our men Seeking for the Sheep, found Some of them. mr Ballard to meeting aftern. a funeral discoars was Deld by y e rev d mr Stone from PSalm 37 th C and 37 th vers. at home.
Cloudy [&] some rain. mr Ballard only of our famely to meeting. Dagt Ballard Supt here. at home.

Clear and Colder & windy. mr Ball d is gone again to prosceed in heading the Lotts East Side the river. he did not return a t night. I have been at home, knit on Cyrus s hoes. at home. Daniel Woodward had a son Born y s day, his first Child.

Clear. mrs Gill & Dagt Ballard Dind here. I accompanied them to my Sons aftern, we took Tea there. mr Gill & Lambard Came up a t Evn for their wives. mr EbenZ Trask and his wife and Luthar Pierce Sleep there. at my Sons. Daug t Lambd had a pain in her head.

Clear. I tarried with mrs Moody till near night and returnd home very unwell, find my husband very unwell. I was Exercised with Such a pain in my head that it Seemed as if my life must go. I Calld Lydia up in the night. Shee applyed poultises to my feet and warm Brandy to my head with hot flanell, and I became Some Easier before morning.
Clear. I have been at home. Dagt Ballard & Sally Dind here. at home. mr [Balld] to Parish meeting.

Clear. I went to work in my Gardin this morn, planted 8 Sorts Beens and removd part of my Sage, Catnip &C. went to Genl Sewalls aftern n . at Genl Sewalls, mrs Coney there allso. Judg Sewill Came a t Evn.

Cloudy & Some rain. mr Ballard Sett ou t with mr Hartwill to do [Sum] Surveying for him at Leeds. Lydia, Ephm and mr Lathrope attended funeral of Daniel Woodwards infant. Betsy Church & Lydia Came here and took Coffee. we are informd that mr Whitwels oldest Daugh t Expired last night. I have been at home all day. Son Jona here, Says his Child n Seem more Comfortable. at home. mr Ballard is gone to Leeds. Esq r Whitwels Dagt Expird las t night or this morn.

Clear. mrss Odlin left here at 9h m. Lydia went with her to the stores and to her Uncles. mr Ballard been Surveying hous Lotts for mr Whilwel. mrs Crocket and Dag t Ballard here to Tea. at home. Son Towns youngest Child Expired.
Clear. I have been at home. Son Town Sleeps here. P. Bullin sup t with us, Son Jon a allso. at [home]. Son [Town] came [here].
Clear and Cold. I have been at home. mr Ballard been Surveying for Son Jona at the farm of the late Capt Daniel Savage who is disceased. my Son owns one half of Said farm. at home.
Clear & Cloudy by turns. I feel very feeble. Jona s wife here for Seeds foren n , with mrs Pierce aftern to Tea. at home, very feeble. Jonas wife [& mr Pierce here].
raind very fast aftern. Sally Church washt for me. mr Ballard returnd about noon. I have done hous wk & kniting. Polly T. here Sewing for me. at home. mr Balld Came home.

[X. Birth magr Stickney s Dagt. X.] Clear. I was Calld Early this morn to magr Ben n Steckneys wife in Labour. Shee was Safe Deld of her 3 Daugt & 8 th Child, a t 5 h 30 m Evn. I left her Comfortable & went with mr Gill to see his wife. at mgr Stickney s . Birth 3 d . recd [8/] as a reward.

Clear. I have been helping Nabby Bake mins Pies. I wen t into Bed quite fatagued, and was Calld Directly after by mr Young to go and See his wife who was in Labour. arivd there a t 11h 30m Evn g . her women were Calld. at [mr Youngs].

Clear. I have dug some in my Gardin, planted Squash Seeds, removd Sage &C. Dagt Ballard Dind and Polly Bolton Sleeps here. Son Ephm here y s night. mr Ballard been makeing a plan for Crosby & Robinson. at home.
Clear. I have been at home, Done my hous work, swept the Chambers &C. Dagt Pollard made me a Pres t of 6 Block tinn spoons. at [home]. Dagt Ballard here.
Cloudy and rain. Sally wen t home, I paid her 3/. Polly Farewel Sewing for me. Jonas wife & Childn here to Tea. mr Ballard & I to Lect r . at Lecter.
Clear. mr Ballard, mrs Capin, Dagt Lambd & my Self, mr Hodges and his wife & 4 Child n dind at Son Jonas. Lidia Nud Came here a t Evn. a t my Sons. mrs Capin and others there.
Clear. mr Ballard went to Sydny to Survey, Bro r EbenZ Moore with him. Jona and wife Dind here. I finisht futing her Stockins. at home.
Clear & Cloudy by turns. I finisht my Self a Cottne Shift. at home.
Clear. I have been at home, done some work in my Gardin and finishd a pare of small hoes. mr Ballard returnd. Dagt Ballard here to Tea. at home. mr Ballard relurnd.

Clear. Rufus Ballards wife, mrs s Jackson and mrs Bradford Dind here. Dagt Pollard and my Self took Tea at Son Jonas, mrs Farewell allso. Son Pollard here and Conducted his wife home. at my Sons. Company Dind here.
Clear. I have done my hous work & Some in my Gardin. Son Ephm Came home. a t home.
Clear. mr Ballard, Nabby & Lidia went to meeting to our meeting hous. at home.
Cloudy. mr Ballard, Cyrus, Ephm and Lidia went to meeting. I felt unwell and tarried a t home. at home.

Cloudy, raind a t night. mr Famely all attind public worship Except my Self. I was unwell and they did not find the hors till it was too late to go. the Ordinance of the Supper was Administred. mrs s Cowen had a Bill for prayers. may God grant her all the Comfort that Shee Stands in need of in this life and may her better part be received at the Close of life to the relms of bliss and happiness. at home. it was Communion day. I receivd a letter fm Bror Collins of april 11 th , it Came to hand yesterday.

Cloudy part of y e day. mr Ballard to meeting at y e for t . Jona & wife, par t of their Childn, Ephm & Lydia, to mr Ingerhams Barn. the Melhodis t quarterly meeting held there. I am informd that Sam l Parker partook at the Ordinance of y e Supper with them. Cyrus Conducted Rhoda and Hannah to Son Lambds. a t home. mr Ballad to meeting.
Cloudy, raind before night. Son Lambd, Amos Pollar d , son Jona & wife to Son Pollards. Milly Capin, Allin, Thomas & Dolly Lambd Sup here and Sleep t . at home.

Clear and very warm. Polly Town and I tarried at home, y e young men to meeting. mr Parker Performd. Son Jona, his wife and part of their Child n here to Tea. mrs Capin and Son Set out for Boston. at home.
Cloudy. Dagt Lambd Came to See us, Jona n & wife and 2 youngest Childn Dind here. at home. part of my Child n Dind & took Tea here.

Clear. I wrote to my Sester Walers. mr Ballard from home on Business to mr Thomases. Son Town Sleeps here, he is on his way to OXford. I wrote to Sister Waters. at home. Son Town Sleeps here. wrote Sis t Waters.
Clear part of y e day. I have been at home Sewing raggs. mr Ballard been down to y e Settlement, bro t home _ g n Rhum, q t Gin n , _ lb Tea and a Spair rib which Son Lambd Sent me. at home.
Cloudy. my husband & Sons Cyrus & Ephm are gone to town meeting. I have been working in my Gardin and fixing a better way to our well. I paid Lydia Nud one Dollar. at home. Sett Current Bushes.

Clear and Cool. mr Ballard been to mend the meddow fence. I was So unwell foren I did not Sett up but little. I went aftern to my Sons to See Martha, Shee has had a Sick night but Seems better now. at my Sons. lheir Babe is unwell.

Clear and windy. I have been at home, finisht Cyrus s hoes. Son Jon a , his wife, mrs Pierce and Sally took Tea here. Jon a & Son Lambd been to Son Pollards, they are all well. mr Ballard returnd a t Evn, has finished the work he went upon. at home. Dagt Ballad & mrs Pierce here. I hear James Smith had a Son Born y s day.
Clear. I have been at home. mr Trask, his wife & Dagt Ballard here to Tea. mr Getchel Calld here. I began to foot a Stockin for Dolly Lambd. at home, had Company.

Clear. I am Some Easier. mr Ballard Sett out for Boudin ham. Jona, his wife, mrs Pierce here to See me. mrs Bolton Dind here and mrs Farewell Sleeps here. we are informd that Deacon Cony Expired last night. we have Since hiard it was at Sun rise. at home. mr Ballad to Boudinham. we [hear] Deacon Cony is dead.

Clear. mr Ballard Sett ou t for Davis Town. mr Merril & mrs Forbs, Dagt Ballard & Sally Dind. mrs s Crage took Tea here. I have been at home. at home. mr Ballard gone to Davis Town. mrs Forbs & Crage here.
Clear and Colder, the ground was frosen y s morn. I got Greens in my gardin and Sett ou t Skellions. mr Ballard been to Son Pollards. Dagt Ballard Dind here. a t home.
Clear. at Ditoes.

Clear. mrs H. Pierce Dind here and went to my Sons. I went and took Tea with them. the Child n Seems Some better. Lydia Spin t Evn there. little Sally has been here to Day. at my Sons. H. Peirce there. I paid Lydia Nudd12/.
Clear. I have been at home. Lydia wash t . Cyrus informd me that Son Towns younges t Child is no more. at home.
Clear. I have Cleand Seller [&] wash t Some. mrs Crocket here, Cyrus to y e Stores, &C. at home.
Clear part of the day, thunder and rain at night. I have done my work. Allin Lambd and Ephm Ballard Sleep here. at home.
Cloudy, Snowd at night. I have been at home, workt more than was fiting for me. at home.
Clear. mr Ballard returnd. I have been so well that I have mended Some Stockins for my Self. mrs Hodges and Fanny Sleep here. Betsy andrus been here. at home, have done Some Sewing. mrs Hodges here.
Clear p t of ye Day. I washt Nth room and the windows. Jona, his wife, mrs Trask & part of y e Child n here to Tea. at home.

XX. Birth John Youngs 2 nd Daugt. XX. Clear and Cold. mrs Young was Safe Deld at 2h morn of her 4 th Child & Second Dag t . I tarried with her till after noon and returned home, left her & inft Cleverly. find mr Thwing here Dineing. a t [ ]. Birth 4th. June [7 ] recd 9/.
Clear. I have been to See Crocketts Child, it is more Comfortable. at mr Crocketts.
Clear till aftern, then Cloudy. I have done my hous work, Bakt flower and brown Bread for our Selves & mr Purington. Cut Some grass &C, and I feel fatagued. at home.
Cloudy. I have been at home. a t home.
Clear. mr Ballard, Cyrus, Ephm and Lidia went to meeting. I was a t home. at home.
Clear. mr Ballard, Lathrop & Lydia a t meeting. we took Supper at Son Jonas. at son Jonas.

Clear. I have felt very unwell part of y e day, but went to Son Jonas & Dind with my famely. he & wife, Son Lambd & his, took Tea with us, mr Dany allso. at Son [Jonas] & mr [Crockett] to see his infant [who] is Sick.
raind and haild. Son Ephm Deliverd me 12/ which mr Gill Sen t to me. I have been at home, felt unwell. a t home.
Clear. I have been feeble. mr Moody here, his wife remains very unwell. mrs Crocket here to Spin and Bake. I have bakt whiat B d for my Self & brown for mr Purington. at home.
Clear. I have been unwel. mrs Badcock and towo of Saml Badc ks Daughts here, Elijah Barton allso. Ephm Sleeps here. a t home. mrs Badcock here.
Clear. Son Pollard brot his wife and Dagts, Sally & Dolly, here. the Babe is not very well. I have been at home. mrs Black, Dagt Ballard, Hannah & Sally here to Tea. at home. mrs Black here.
Clear. I have been at home, helpt do hous work. Lydia washt. we roasted a Spare rib, Dag t Balld here and partook of it. at home. Dagt Ballard & Sally here.

Clear. I have work t in my Gardin, Sett squashes & Cucumbers. mr Ballard been to the Settlement, Cyrus to Hallowell. Son Jona, his wife, L e faett & martha to Sydney. Lydia wash t but shee is very lambe in one legg. Son Ephm & Lathrop Came home from doing mr Williamss work. at home.
Clear. I have been at home, kni t on a Stockin for Hannah Ballard & makeing Soap. at home.

Clear and very pleas t . mr Ballard Sett out to go and See Doc t Barton, he is going through the woods from Saml Churches. I have been at home, finish t footing Dolly Lambd s Stockens. my Son Ephm has Seen 24 years y s day. Lydia has been to Son Jonas to Spin Some Tow on my wheal which they have there. at home. mr Bald is gone to Doct Bartons. Son Ephm is 24 years old y s day.
Clear. I feel more Comfortable. mr Puringtn here. mrs Farewell is gone down below. mrs s Andrews here, took Tea. at home. mrs And s here. mrs Farewell left here.
Clear. at Detoes. mrs Gill there.

Clear. Ephm and Lydia wen t to meeting, it is a day Sett a part for fasting and prayer. I have felt unwell this day. mr Ballard returned home from Leeds Some fatagued. at home. mr Whitwels oldest Daugt was interd after meeting.
Clear. I feel unwell but have done my work. Betsy Andrus piking my wool. a t home.
Clear. I have Bakt for mr Purington & Pumkin pies for my Self, done my hous wk. at home.
I have done my hous work, Bakt the last meal made of Corn we raised last year, harvested Beens. Cyrus began to gather our apples. at home.
Clear. I have been at home, Planted English Goos beries N of y e hogs pen. done my hous work, Bakt, boild Soap Grees &C. a t home.

Clear. mrs Hodges left here after Breakfas t . I have done part of my hous work. mr Ballard Surveying for mr Purington. Fanny help t me this day & Lydia spun for my Daugt. mrs Farewel here, took Tea with me. at home. mrs Farewel here.

I was Calld at 1h y s morn to go to Saml Clearks, we arivd at 4. his wife is unwell. the wife of Ezekiel Coal Expird this night Soon after Delivery, has left an Infan t Dagt. a t Saml Clearks. mrs Coal Expired.
Clear and very pleast. I have finisht harvisting my Beens. Polly workt here y s day, went home at Evng. Ephm and his men Came here. at home. Polly Farewel w t home.

Clear. our famely all a t meeting. mr Parker Performd from 2 Corinth v C 11 verse. I was at mr Thwings a t intermition, his Child is mending. I Calld at mr Moodys after Service, his wife is feeble yet. Calld at Son Jonas, Son and Daug t Lambard there. Billy Ballard is unwell, he pukt up a worm. at meeting, mr Thwing, Moodys and my sons. mrs Hitty Peirce is Published to Saml Babcock.
Clear. I have been very unwell. mr Ballard to meeting, it is Communion day. at home, unwell.
Clear. at mr Clearks ye t . mrs Hodges Calld. at Detoes.
Clear. I attended worship aftern. mr Parker Performd. I went to Son Lambds to See Lucy, Shee is unwell. at meeting & Son Lambds.

Birth mr Thompsons Child. Clear. I was Calld up about mid night to go to mr Thompsons, wrode beyond mr Edsons when I was met and informd the patient was Delivered. I then returned home attended by mr Edson, arivd a t 2h morn, very Cold. I have been mending Cloaths. Lidia washt. a mr Lathrop Came to work for son Ephm. Set out to go to mr Thompsons.
Clear. we washt. I help t Old Lady Pollard, her Dag t Polly & Dag t Ballard, Son Jona & Son Pollard here to Tea. the Old Lady Sleeps here. at my Sons, Hannah unwell. a Child of Jery Dumers Expired.

Cloudy, it raind in y e morning. I have felt very unwell but have done my hous work and houghd in my Gardin. Son Ephm & mr Lathrop Sett out to go to Son Towns to work. Old mrs Cyphers here, brot me 1 Peck indien meal. at home. Son Ephm went to Son Towns to work.
a t mr Clearks.
Cloudy and foggy. I have made one kettle of Soap and began to foot a Stockin for mr Ballard. a t home.
Clear. Dagt Pollar d & Polly Town Came here, Polly & I to Son Jonas. Ephm Conducted Polly Farewell from her uncles, Calld here. Lydia Nud Sleeps here. at my Sons. Polly Town here.
at Ditoes.

Clear. Dagt Pollard did my washing then went to Son Lambds. mrs Farewel & Getchel here to Tea. I have finisht futing a pair hoes, began another pair. Jona receivd A line from his Dad of 20th inst when he was well. at home.
Clear. Ihave been at home. Son Lambard removd to the house where mr David Thomas has lived. at home.

Clear Except a Sprinkling of rain. I have knitt Some & work t in my Gardin. Planted Cucumbers, Sowd peas, houghd Beens &C. mrs s Farewell Calld here. mr Ballard began to wead his Corn. Jack wrode hors to Plough. at home. mrs Farewell here.
Clear. I left mrs Cleark, took breakfast at Son Pollards. Calld at Georg Boltons and returnd home. Pollards & G. Boltons

Clear part of y e day. I have folded my Cloaths, we finisht Sheling my Beens a t Evng, Lathrop and Burr help t . mr Ballard milkt. Joanna was gone to her dads, her Sister Rachel and Betsy Andrus Came home with her. Son Ephm returnd from winslow. EZra Town and Susana Spring were Joind in wedlock Since he went there. may God Bless and Prosper them in their Mariage State. at home.
Clear. mr Ballard returned from Doc t Bartons, bro t some pickeril; he left Brother more Comfortable. I have finished makeing my Cottne Shif t . at home. mr Bald Came from Bro r [Bartons].
Clear. I wen t to mr Gills and returnd.

Clear & very warm. I have done hous work, Polly T. assisted me. Shee wen t to Crockets, found their Babe in a fitt, Came and informd me. Jonas wife and I went, it Seemd to revive. I let them have 1 lb Candles. mrs Farewel & Bennit, Son and Dagt Ballard, Betsy Pierce, Hannah & W m took Tea. mr Ballard been to meddow. at mr Crockets; had Company here.
Clear. I have done the most of my hous work. Polly Town went to visit at my sons. mrs Crocket here, her Babe very Sick ye t . mr Ballard been to meddow. at home.

X. Birth Saml [Clearks] 2nd Dag t . XX. Clear. mr Simion Clearks Lady [&] Dagt Ballard dind with me. I made my Self ready and Sett out, as soon as Cyrus Came home, for mr Clearks. met him by mr Cyphers, reach t there at 4 P m , his wife was Safe Deld at 5 of her Second Child & Dagt; her first is 7 years old this month. Dagt Pollard went up with us. mrs Crosby, Bisby, Mosier, Cleark & Keton attended. Oliv Fletcher Came to Nurs at 9h this Evng. at Saml Clearks. Birth 10th. recd 12/ as a reward.
Clear and warm. I have done my hous wk and gatherd my String Peas. mrs Dany made me a visi t . Fanny & Hannah Sleep here. at home. mrs Dany here.
Clear. I have done my hous work and other mallers. at home.
and a t Son Jonas. and a t Son Jonas.
Clear morn, raind before night. I was at Georg Boltons, his wife unwell; tarried there y s night, Sally Bolton allso. a t Georg Boltons

Clear. I have Churnd, Bak t and Brewd, workt in my gardin, gatherd ripe Beens from those planted may 30 th . Old mr Lambd, my Dagt, Son Jona, his wife and 6 Childn, Son Ephm & Lalhrop took Tea here, Jack Pierce allso. Cyrus recd 5_ Dol s of Judg Robbins. a t home. old mr Lambd here. I gatherd ripe Beens.

Clear and pleas t . I have Seen 68 years this day, have been to meeting, to son Lambds. Allin has A Scolt foot. I wen t after meeting to Son Pollards, find my Dagt with a pain in her head. Poltised her feet, the infant was Chokd. I made use of means to help [it]. at meeting, Son Lambds & Ballards. Dagt Ballard was here [ ] meeting.
Cloudy morn, Clear aftern. I went to Son Pollards, Slept there. my Dag t & I went in to See mrs Woodward, find her & inf t Cleverly. Nucomb, from Jail, bound home. a t Ditoes & Son Pollards &c.

Clear par t of y e day. I have been very unwell but was Calld a t 4h pm to go and See Jessy Goodins wife, find her not very well. I tarried all night, Old mrs Gill & mrs Goodin allso. a t Jesy Goodins.

Clear. the men to meeting. I sett out aftern, met Augustus Ballard, his wife and 2 Childn going to our hous. I returnd home. Son Jona, his wife and part of their Child n here to Tea. my dagt and I went to mr Danys at Evng. I Deld her 6/ which Genl Town Sent her as a present. at Mr Danys. Augusts Ballard & wife here.

Cloudy morn, began to rain Jus t after we got to meeting and Continued all day. the Ordinanc of the Super was administred. mr Ballard and I wen t to Shubal Pitses at intermition, Rich d Foster and his wife there. he is an inhabiter of the Jail at presen t . I feel for her affliction. at Meeting, it is Communion day.

Clear and cold. mr Ballard to meeting. Son Jona, his wife, mrs Getchel, Jack, L e faell & Marthe Lathrop & Burr Supt here. we had roast pigg. Cyrus and Rachel Town Spent Evng at Son Jonas. at home. my Son & part of his faMely here.
Clear. mr Ballard and Son Ephn attendd Meeting. Sons Jona, Lambard and y r wives Supt here on a roas t pigg. little Barny Sleeps here. at home.
Clear. I wen t to mr Thwings & dind, to Genl Sewalls and took Tea, to Son Lambards a t Evng, tarrie till y e 27 th . a t son Lambds & others.
Clear. I have done my hous work. S. Getchel expired. mr Ballard & Cyrus down below. a t home.
Clear. I did my hous work and wen t to my Sons. at Jonas.

Clear Part of the day. Son Lambard & Jona Butchered 2 pigs for us. son Ephm & Lathrop here. I have done my hous work. H Hannah G. help t me fore noon. Shee went to her aunts to liv with her, aftern. I paid her 3/. at home, we had 2 Pigs killd.

Clear. I finish t washing my Bed quillts and planted Cucumbers, Sett apple trees &C. Dagt Ballard here to Tea. Shee that was Betsy Voce, now mrs Young, her husband & his Bro r here. Son Ephm and Lathrop Came here at Evng. at home. mr Elisha Mathews remains interd this Day, and mr Evliths Child Expird.

Clear. I have done my hous work & Some in my Gardin. mrs Cyphers here, brought me _ peck indien Meal for which, & that yesterday, we paid her 2/3. I went to son Jonas. mr Ballard, Cyrus & my Self took Tea there. at my sons. [mrs] Cyphers here. [Oliv Fletcher & Polly Farewell.]
Cloudy. I have been at home makeing my Soap and kniting. at home.

Clear Part of y e day. I Setled with Lydia Nud, there is 2/5 due to me. Shee went home. Sally Church washt & Scourd for me, I paid her 2/7_. Old Lady Coal Sleeps here. Shee, Jona, his wife and 4 Child n to Tea with us. at home, mrs Coal here.
Clear and pleas t . the wido Higins and her Dag t Peve Dind here, Son Ephm and Lathrop allso. Lal p Supt. I have done my hous work. y e young men to training. a t home. mrs s Higins &Dagt here.
Clear. I have been at home, mr Ballard to Hallowell. Lydia to See her Sister and help her quillt a Bed quilt. Son Lambard has been here. at home. Son Lambd here.
Cloudy & rain. mr Ballard to N parish Collecting taxes. I have been doing various kinds of business. Son Ephm Sleeps here. at home.
at Ditoes. y e Genl returnd.

Clear. I returnd, Calld at Son Pollard and Georg Boltons. Shee Complains of her Breast. I Calld at mr Edsons, Came home wrote a Letter to Bror Jona to Send by her. was Calld in hast to go to John Boltons wife, it was Cloudy and very dark before we reacht there. I Slept very little y s night. at John Boltons, his wife ill. I wrote Bro r Jona by mrs Edson.
Clear. Dagt s Lambd & Ballard Dind here, their husbands to Tea. S. Pollard, H. Ballard, Son Ephm, Lathrop & Burr Sleep here I have Bakt for mr Purington & my Self. at home. Dagt Lambd here.

Clear. I have gathered my hops. Fanny helpt me aftern. we Bakt for mr Purington and for my Self. Cap t OZgood here to Sumons mr Ballard to apear as Evidence at Coart next weak, left 1/6 in Cash. at home.

X. Birth John Bollons first Dagt. XX. raind y s morn. my Patient was Safe deld at 9 h y s morn of a Dagt, her first Born. I returnd home at 2 aftn. Calld at Crockets, his Child very unwell. he Came to me and had Syrip of BalSon for it. at Ditos. Birth 11th. March 22 nt [1806]receivd of James Bolton a pair Shoes & 1 lb. Sugar.
Clear. I have been unwell. Dagt Ballard & part of her Child n here. my son Jona, Ephm and Lambd to Pollards, Lath p to winthrop. at home.
Clear and very warm. Cyrus, Lath p , and Burr to meeting. mr Parker Performd. Ephm to Son Pollards. I have been unwell but done my work. a t home.

Clear and more moderate. mr Ballard, Cyrus & Ephm attended worship at mr Stones meeting. I have been at home. had my work to do aftern by reason of Rachel being unwell. Shee was on the Bed till I had got Super on table, when Shee got up and partook with us. She wash t the dishes and wen t and Spent y s Evn g at Son Jonas. at home.

Cloudy, Snowd at night. mr Ballard and Ephm to meeting. I have been unwell. Son Jona, his wife and 6 Child n Sup t here. we had a puding and roast Spare rib. I was very unwell all nigh t but, as is usual, did with out much Care taken of me. Rachel to bed a t 8 oClock. at home, very unwell.
Clear. I left Son Pollards, Calld at mr Bollons, his wife more unwell; wisht me not to go home, and I tarried. a t mr Bollons.
a t Goodins, the patient did her washing but w d not Consent to my returning home. a t Ditos.
Clear and very warm. Polly Farew l here to work. Dagt Ballard and mrs Pitts and part of y r Child n here. at home.

Cloudy. I have been doing hous work, Cutt Pumkins to Drie. mrs Getchel Dind here, her Dagt is with me to help do my work. mr Ballard went down to y e Settlement aflern. mrs Getchel brot her dagt a new coat & Short goun. Shee put them on this day. a t home. mrs Gelchel here.
Cloudy foren, raind aft n . Son Ephm Dind here. Rachel did part of the washing, I hous work and Some other matters. at home. Ephm here at noon.

Clear Part of the day and Cold. mr Ballard workt at the Shop foren, went aft n to ye Settlement. he found Wil m Cypher in the road very much intoxocated with Liqur. he, with y e help of mr And s & Smith, got him to mr Andrus s . I have done my hous work, Rachel washt. we mended a pair Small Cloaths for mr Balld at Evng. Lindy & Hannah here. a t home.
very rainy. I have done hous work and knit, Rachel finisht a Shirt for Cyrus. mr Ballard workt at y e Shop. at home.
Cloudy. I have done my hous wk bu t am very unwel. Sons Jona, Lambd and their wives to Son Pollards. at home.

Clear. mr Ballard is gone to y e meddow. I feel very unwel. my husband Came home at 4h pm, took a little foo d . Complains of feeling the pain in his Stomach, but was Calld by John Sewall to answer an Execution of 800 Dollars. was by him Conducted to the Jail in augusta and Commited. our two Sons, Jon a and Ephm were bound for the liberty of the yard for him. I pray the great Paren t of the universe to Protect him and giv him Comfort in his present tryal. at home, very unwel. my Husband was this Evng Committd to Jail on acount of the tax Collection.
Clear and warm. Son Jona and wife to funeral, Jack & L e faett allso. Fanny & y e Child n here. Lon & Dag t Lamb d to Tea with me. a t home. Lambd & wife here.

X. Birth Pres Hamlins 3 d Child. . Clear. I went to Peres Hamlins, Put his wife to Bed with her 3 d Child and first Dagt, left them Comfortable and returnd home at 3h Pm. recd [9/] as a rewd. at Peres Hamlins. Birth 14th. recd 9/.

Clear par t of y e day. I have done my hous work and Some washing, felt unwell aftern. mr Ballard Paid the State tax and got a receipt in full from Arthur Lithgo Exqr. I have Sorted part of my apples, Cut those that were Spect with rot and Stued them. at home, done various kinds of work.

Snowd. Son Lambard Conducted his wife and Babe here, left them with me. they tarrie all night, Slept with me. I had a very ill turn in the night but, Blessed be the Great author of all my mercies, I got Easier. Son Ephm Came here y s Evng very ill with a Cold. I gave him herb Tea. a t home. Dag t Lambd So kind as to Com and See me. we made Sausages. Jonas wife Calld in to See me.

Clear and Cool. I have been a t home, workt in the gardin. Sett 20 Cabbages, Some Lettuce and help t do hous work. I pikt Cottne. Son Ephm Setled with Lathrop, paid him his Due Except 5 Dollars. L. Sett ou t for Buck field. at home. mrs Farewell Calld here. Hannah PollardCame [here].
Clear. Old mrss Arnald here. Shee & I went to See Crockess Child, it is very Sick. Sally Church helpt me. the old Lady Sleeps here. at [Crocketts].

Clear. I was Calld a t 11h last night to go and See A mrs Whitton a t Hallowel. I arivd about 1 this morn, find the patient Deld of her Child, a daugt. her 5 Child and 2 nt by her Pres t husband. Shee was not fully deliv d . I performd what was remaining to be done and pu t her to bed Safe. I tarried all night. Mrs s Freeman, Ben n Whites and T. Stickneys wives were there had dresed the infant &C,&C. I Sett out for home the wrideing very bad. I Calld at the Revd mr Stones and warmd, and from there I reach t home at noon. Cap t Toby Dind with us. I was very much fatagued indead. at home till 11h Evn when Calld by A mr Whinton to Hallowell. Birth 16th.
Cloudy. Son Lambar d Came and Conducted his wife & Babe home. Ephm better and wen t to the Settlement. I have been at home, feel very unwel. at home. Daugt Lambd went home.
Clear. I went to Son Jonas to see Ephm, he is very unwell. mrs Coal went away. Polly Farewel Came to Sew for me. a t my Sons.
Clear. I have done my hous work and Some washing. Son and Dagt Pollard Calld here on their way home. at home.
Clear and Cold. Son Pollard bro t his wife & two youngest Childn here, Jona & his wife here allso. I have been very unwell, not able to set up but little. at home, very unwel Child n lo See me.
Clear. I left Son Lambards foren. Dind at Doct Coneys, took Tea at mr Craggs, was a t Gnl Sewalls, mr Thomas s and Thwings. at Ditoes, and [returnd] home.
Cloudy. Joanna washt floors. Rhoda mended hoes for the young men. I have Bakt Pumkin & apple Pies. a t home.
Clear. Dagt Ballard wash t here for her Self. mrs Getchel here. Dagt Pollard & [Child] went to Son Lambds at Evn g . at home. [Some better].
rainy. at Ditoes.

Clear and Cool. I have felt So wel as to help do my work. Rachel washt the floors. mrs Farewel Calld here. I have had a Severe turn of Coughing y s Evng. Cyrus went to Carrie Clean Cloaths to his Father, found him well; he Dind with Judg Cony this day. at home. mrs Farewel Calld to See me.

Clear. Rachel Town to meeting aftern and did not return here. mrs s Getchil & Badcock here. Jona Sen t for me to go and dine there but I was not able, Dagt Pollard and Child n went. Jona and his wife Spent y e Evn g here. little Ephm Sleeps here. at home. Dagt Pollard here this day, in part. Shee Slep t with me.
Clear. I have been at home. Dagt Ballard and part of her Childn here to Tea. Cyrus bro t 9 lb roals from y e masheen. at home, Dagt Ballard here.
Clear. I have done my work bu t very unable. Dagt Ballard to Tea, the Childn allso. S n Ephm Sleeps here. a t home.
Cloudy, raind aftern. I have gatherd and Sheld Beens. Cyrus to son Lambds. mr Cottle here, his wife is unwell. Dagt Ballard ironed for me. Sis t Wilms Came there. a t home.

Clear and pleas t . mr Ballard work t a t y e Shop till after n when he Came in; is not very well. Rachel washt, I did y e hous work & knit Some. Polly Town is 22 years [old] y s day. a t home. Son Lambd Calld here. PollyTowns Birth day.

Birth Georg Boltons Dagt. Clear. my Patienl safe Deld at 2h morn of her firs t born, a Dagt. I left them Cleverly at 8/ arivd at home safe. Polly went to mr Gills. I gatherd 2 quarts Curents. Dagt Ballard [sic]. a t Ditoes. Birth 9th.
Clear. I left my Patient Comfortable and returnd home. Calld a t mr Gills & Genl Sewals. a t Ditoes.
Cloudy, raind at noon. Polly mending a Bed quillt. Rhoda and Hannah Sleep here. mr Purington Paid me 6/7 for Bakeing for him this Sumer and 2/ for Stalks & Shock. at home.
Clear. I have done my washing and Cut 7 pumpkins to drie. Hannah Getchel helpt about hous. mr Ballard to mr Andrus s to have Smith work done to a Plough. a t home.

Clear part of the day. mr Ballard over the river to Call for Parish taxes. I went to help mrs Dany quilt. Dagt Ballard & Sist, Betsy Ands, Joe & Betsy Smith were there. I fold Cloaths and ironed part of them at Evng. a t mr Danys. Son Jona Sent us a Goose.

Clear part of y e day. mr Ballard a t the Shop mending Slead. I have helpt do y e hous work. Hannah, Sabery, Sally, Le faell & W m here to see Barny. Dagt Ballard and mrs Getchel here a t Evng. we have Bakt apple Pies. at home.
raind the mos t of y s day. I have helpt wash and do hous work, finisht mr Ballards mitts. he work t at y e Shop forn & went down below aftn. a t home, knit, [washt], did hous wk & Sewed Some.

Cloudy. I am very unwell. mr Waid here, Butchered two Swine for us and 1 for Jona. I have been very unwel and Old Lady Cypher Came and assisted us to do the work. a t home. we had our Swine Butcherd. I am very Sick. mrs Cypher help t me.

Clear and pleast for y e Season. I have been at home. Cyrus went and Conducted Lydia Nud here to help me. mrs Getchel and her younges t Child here; Sleep with us, Son Ephm allso. Jona Conducted his wife from Son Pollards. at home. mrs Getch l here. Lydia Nud Came here at 8h Evn g .
Clear. I have Cleand my Chambers, Fanny helpt me aflern Clean y e rooms. I went to See Jonas babe. Polly Farewell here. a t my Sons.
