Clear. I have been at home, done my work. at home.

Clear Part of y e day. mr Ballard been to Hallowell. Rachel Town Came to work for me. we Cut Some apples and pumkins, Shee mended Stockins and did work about hous. a t home. Rachel Town Came to help me.
Cloudy, very high wind fm y e wes t . I have done my hous work bu t very unable. at home.

Clear and pleasant to what we have had. I have done my hous work, Brot in Snow to melt to tend my Leac h and many other matters. Cyrus has been to See his Father, finds him well. Son Jonas man brot us a Load of wood. I wish to retain my reason if it be the wil of the grea t Parent of y e univirse. at home. Some wha t Disconposed in my mind.
raind. I have been at home, made 30 _ Doz n Candles, Lydia helpt me. mr Evliths Child was interd this aftern. at home. made [Candles]. Funeral Evl th Child.

Clear, Cold but a pleast Sun. I have been doing my hous work but feel very unfitt to do it. mrs Church here, brot me 2 lb 3 oz flax. I let her have the Same w t of Candles. Son & Dagt Lambd Came, he went with Dolly to Son Pollards, returnd and Slept here. at home. Son & Dagt Lambd Sleep here.
Clear. I have Scourd the Shelvs in my Buttery, wash t y e floor of that and y e North room. Rachil Scourd my puter &C and left me to do for my Self. at home. Rachel Town went from here to Hallowell.

Cloudy & rain. I have done my work. Sally Denison here. I was Calld in has t to Timy Woodwards, his wife was Deld of her Second Child & Daugt by Doc t Howard before we arivd at 4h pm. I Slept at Son Pollards, was Some fatagued. at Timy Woodwds. Birth, his 2nd Dagt.
Clear. I did my hous work an d went to Lectur. Calld a t Luis Hamlins as I wen t . at mr Crags as I returnd. I did my ironing after I Came home. a t Lectur.
Clear. I have pared and Cut Apples to drie. Son Ephm Sleeps here. at home.
rainy. at Detoes. mrss Sewall unwell. the Judg left there and went to Doc t Colmans.

X. Birth Saml Badcoks Son. XX. Clear. Son Lambd Bro t his wife & Babe here. I was Calld a t Sun Sett to go and See the wife of Sam l Badcock y e 3 d . Shee was Safe Deld of a Son at 8h Evng. I tarried all night. at Saml Badcoks. Birth 13th. recd 12/.
Snow Storm. Son Pollard Came with a Covered Sleigh and took his wife and Childn home, left here at 4h 20m. I hope they go t home Safe. at home. Dagt Pollard wen t home.
Clear. I have wash Cloaths & kitchen and workt in my Gardin. Cyrus Carried my wool to mrs Coal to spin. Dagt Ballard and mrs Crocket here. a t home.
Clear and very Pleast. the reviw a t Hallowell this day. I have done my work, took Tea at son Jonas. a t my Sons.

Cloudy morn, Clear aftern. Sister Williams took Breakfas t here. mr Ballard returnd from his Tour of Surveying a t Davis Town. he went to attend Coart directly. mrs Farewel Calld here, I went to my Sons with her. Son Town Sleeps here, informs me Polly is better. the rest of his Famely are wel. at Son Jonas. Son Town Sleeps here. mr Ballard returnd.
Clear and pleas t . I have been working on Cyrus s winter Shirts. Rachel Town helpt me and did hous work. mrs Cypher here. a t home. mrs Cypher here.

Clear. Dagt Ballard and mrs Getchel and par t of their Childn here aftern. mr Gill, his wife and mrs s Pitts here a t Evng. Lydia gone to visit her Sisters. I have been at home, not very wel. a t , had Compy.
Clear. I have been at home, Cyrus to the Car d ing masheen. a t home.

Clear. I have Done hous work. Polly finisht y e Bed quillt and did Some other mending, and went home after [Diner]. I paid her 6/7 for 3_ days. Sally Church workt half y s day. I have not paid her. Dagt Ballard Conducted Joanna Smith here to work for me. Shee is 16 years old. a t home. Joanna Smith Came here to work at Evng.
Snowd foren. I have Bakt pumkin Pies, helpt do hous work and Doubled yarn. a t home.

Clear. mr Ballard mending Slead a t the Shop. Rachel wen t a t 9h 30m to help mrs Dany quillt. Son Pollard bro t my Cloath home, 30-2/1 yds, and y e blanket I len t Lydia Nud. Cyrus was in the Settlement, Saw Son Town. he gave him 5 goos wings to bring to me. I have done my hous work and finish t ironing. at home. I gave him an order on Georg Bolton for 9/.

Clear part of y s day. I have been at home. we Bakt 2 oven fulls Pies, washt the floors &C. Gidion Barton Dind here, Says his father is Better; the rest of the famely are wel. at home. Son Ephm Sleeps here, he is not very wel.

Clear and Colder, freezes at nigh t . I have finish t mending drawers and began a Stockin for Son Cyrus. he has been to Son Lambards, bro t me a presen t of 2 new Pockets from little Dolly. mr Ballard been down to y e Coart hous. at home. mr Ballad bot me 4 oZ Snuf. Cyrus bo t as much more for me.
Clear. mr Waid Cu t up our pork & Salted it. mrs Cypher helpt me, I feel more Comfortable. at home. mrs Cypher helpt me.
Clear and Pleas t . I was prepareing to go and See my Husband but Could not have hors nor Sleigh. so I larried a t home. at home. Cyrus returnd mr Hovys Sleigh, gave 2/6 for y e use.

Clear. I left my Dagt more Comfortabl, returned home, wrote to Sister Waters. Cyrus wen t to mr Lambds to leav it for Conveyance. Dagt Pollard was there. Betsy Andrus here this aftern. Heman Burr been to Conduct Old mrs Farewel to Varsalboro. at Ditoes. Came home foren. I wrote to my SisterWaters.
Clear and very pleast. I have been at home, knit on a Stockin for Son Cyrus and helpt do hous work. at home.
Clear. mrs Farewel and Brown here. I wen t to See Martha, her Eye is much Sweld. Sally Church washt for me. at Ditoes.

Clear. mrs Cypher and Sally Church did my washing. I paid them a pisterene Each. Dagt Lambd, Rachel Capin & Dolly Lambd here. I went to Jonas and took Tea, mr Ballard allso. a t Jonas. Dagt Lambd here.

Cloudy, raind before night, wind NE. I have finisht Culing my Pumpkins and Stued the End pieces, finisht Sorting and Cuting the Apples which were rotting. mr Ballard been to pay money to Treasurers &C. Rachel helpt do hous work and mended Stockins. Cyrus and Bill finisht Bank hous. I was informd that Amos Partridg was very Sick from home and y t his Bror Moses was dead & Perloiny Cony Sick at Boston. a t home. heard Moses Partridg Death.
Clear and Cold. I have done my hous work. Cyrus doing mallers ou t doors and wen t to mill. he was a t Magr Heaths to See his Father, finds him well. a t home. Jonathan Runels Expired this night.

Clear and more pleas t . mr Waid Came and Butchered our Swine. I have done my work. Dag t Ballad and mrs Smith here to Tea. Cyrus _ Bushe l Salt of Tho s Pitts, did not pay for it. a t home. mr Waid informd that Cap t Littlefield was Dead; Hartson Cony allso Dead.
raind Part of the day. I made 15 Dozn Candles. Hannahs Pollard & Ballard Sleep here. at home. made 15 [Dozn] Candles.
Clear. Dagt Lambd here makeing her Self a Goun. Shee went to Son Jonas aftern. I have helpt do my hous work & knit. a t home. Dagt Lambd here.

Clear part of y s Day. I have been very unwell. Lydia Nudd Calld here. Son & Dagt Lambd Came in to See me, made me a pres t of 9_ lb Beef and 1_ lb Butter. Son Town Came at Evng, made me a pres t of a fine Goos. Doc t Barton Came, he Sleeps here allso. at home. friends here to See me. Cyrus Saw his fathir y s day, he is well.
Cloudy & rain. I Calld to see the patient, recd 6 lb chees / 7 d pr lb and returnd home. at Ditoes.
Clear forn, a Shower a t noon. I have done up my Caps. Dagt Ballard here, mended Lathrops Trousers. Heman Bur Came to work with Son Ephm. a t home. H. Burr Came to liv with Ephm.
Snowd. at home. mrs Town here. at home.
Clear. mr Ballard, Polly Town & Cyrus to meeting. mrs Kimball Sleeps here. at home.
Clear and warmer. I have been at home. Ephm s wife with me, Heman allso. at home. Dag t [ ] here.
Clear. at Ditoes.
rainy. I tarried with my Patient till aftern. Calld at Son Lambds. I reacht home at Sun Sett. my Colt is Lamed. at Detoes.

Cloudy. Heman Burr Conducted Rachel Town from mr Gills in a Sleigh. Shee has no t been at home Since Shee went to meeting last Sabath day. I lold her I thought Shee used me very ill, Shee was very much ofended. at home, had to remove my bed into the kitchen without any help.
Clear. I have been at home, Cut herbs
Clear. have been very unwell but have it to bear alone, & my work to do. at home.

Clear and Pleast. Genl Salem Town took Breakfast here, he has been to Penobscott. mr Ballard and Cyrus to Coart. Sally Church washt for me. I did not pay her, have Since paid. a t home. S. Church washt for me.

Clear and pleast for y e Season. I have been at home, did hous work. we Bakt Broun bread and Pumkin pies. mrs Farewel Calld here. mr Ballard workt at y e Shop, he is not very well. at home. mrs Farewel Calld here.
Clear. Lydia Came home and wash t . I have began a Legin for my husband. Cyrus went and Carried a Trunk and his Books of acoun t to him. at home.
Clear. I have done my hous work, Bakt for mr Purington. Sally Church wash t , I paid her 2 s /3 d Ziporah Nud here, Dag t Ballard allso. a t home.
Clear. Joanna & I washt. Rhoda & Hannah Sleep here this night. at home.
Cloudy. Hannah Getchel wen t to my Sons, being unwell. I have done hous work and finisht doubling yarn. at home, hannah went to my Sons.
Cloudy and Some Snow. Rachel wen t fore n to help mrs Dany. I wen t aft Dinner, tarried till Evng. we got the Squars nearly struck out by quilting them. a t mr Danys, Rachel allso, and Dag t Ballard.
very rainy the most of the day. mr Ballard only of our famely at meeting, it is our yearly Thanksgiving. we roasted a goos, boil d Beef, Pork and fowls for Diner. at home.

Clear. I have Bakt and done hous work, Sorted part of my apples and Cut those that were Speckt with rot. Rachel Town Sett out to go to Pitts ton at 11 h AM. mr Ballard and Cyrus Down to the Settlement. a t home. Rachel went to visit her Mother. we paid her 6/ Cash.
Clear. mrs Cypher washt. I am So wel as to help her. mrs Farewel Calld here. at home. mrs Cypher helpt me.

Snowd & raind. I went down to mr Thwings. my husband Came and Spen t aftern with me, he Dind and took Tea there, but must go up the hill a t night. may the Great Parint giv him patiense and Composeur of mind. at mr Thwings. my husband met me there.
Clear. I do not feel very well, had a very Severe turn of the Cramp in the night past; have been a t home. at home.

Clear and pleas t till near night, began to Snow at 9h Evn. mr Dingley brot his Marm Stackpole here foren. we had an agreable visit. he Came and Conducted her home at Evng. Cyrus, Heman and Lydia went to Son Lambds at Evng. I have been here alone, brot wood into the N room after 9 O Clock. at home. Old Lady Stackpole made me a visit this Day.
Cloudy and Some rain. I have been at home, done my work, Brewd &C. am very much fatagud. at home.
Clear. I have done my work and been to See the Child. Son Pollard Came home with me and Sleeps here. a t Ditoes
Clear. I have done my hous work, Ironed till mid night but how unable. a t home.

Snowd and blowd and was Cold. I have roasted a pigg. Son Jona, his wife & [her] Sister Getchel Came and partook with us, Ephm & Billy allso. mr Ballard went to y e Settlement. a t home. roasted a pigg, wt 18 lb.
Clear part of y s day and Cold, Snowd at Evng. Lathrop Sleeps here. I have done my hous work & ironing. Cyrus Cut wood and help t a t y e Barn. a t home. Lathrop Sleeps here. Death John Boltons wife.

Clear and prity Cold. I have done my work tho not able to Sett up all day. Jona Came and Cu t my Pork and I Salted it. his wife & 3 Childn gone to Sydney. Jack [returned] in the nigh t , mrs Getchel with him. a t home.

Clear and pleast part of the day, Snowd and raind a t night. Son Jona, his wife [&] 3 Childn took Tea here. Son Ephm has Seen 25 years this day. at home. Jona, his wife and Part of the Childn here. Son Ephms Birth day.
Clear foren, Cloudy aftern. Rachel & Joanna Smith here on a visit. My washing was done y s day. I finisht a pair hoes for my husband. [at home, had Compy.]

XX. Birth Francis Touls Son & first [Child. Birth 17 th. XX.] Snowd las t night and Some this day. Son Lambd brot his Sister Capin here foren. Shee and my Dagt Set out for home after 3h pm. I then washt mr Ballard & Cyruss Shirts. have Bak t y s day. was Calld by Francis Toul to go and See his wife at dusk, arivd at Son Pollards where they reside, at 6 Evn. Shee was Deld at 8 of a Son, her firs t born. I tarrie all night, Slep t Some. at home till Evn, then to F. Towls. mrs Capin been here. I made a pres of 3 pulits to Dolly Lambd.

Clear part of y s day. Doct Barton and Son Town left here after Break fast. I have done my hous work but feel very unable. Dagt Ballard Calld in to See me. I Sen t mrs Getchel 5/3 d on Rachel Towns acoun t which was all that was due from me to her. at home.

Clear Part of the day. Son & Dagt Pollard and part of thier Child n here. Shee went on to See her Father. I wen t aft n Conducted by Lemuel Witham, a lad who is Com to work with Son Ephm. I returnd at Evn very unwell. Lemuel went to take Son Lambds hors and Sleigh to Jones s for Jona and him to Come up in but not finding them ready to Come returnd with it. they Came up on foot and Jon a Came here with ou t his hat. took him from his Supper, pusht him out adors, Drove him home to his hous Damning and pushing him down and Struck him. Shaw and Burr went on after to prevent his being deprived of life. I followed on falling as I went till meeting Dagt Lambar d was assisted by her. I reacht his hous, find him Cursing and Swearing he would go and giv him a Hard whiping. my Dag t Lambd desired Heman to go and Conducted him to Ephm. he wen t and tarried all night. Son Lambd brot me home in his Sleigh. O that the God of all Mercy would forgiv him this and all other misconduc t . at Shubl Pittss, feel very unwel and what a Scean had I to go a t Evng. may a Good God Support me. funeral mr James Hinkley of Hallowel, his Death was very Suden.
A Storm of rain and Snow. Jonna did hous work, ironed and spun some. I began a Stockin for Son Cyrus. Son Ephm Sent his Mare to Sydney to be kep t . at home, began a Stockin.
Clear. I attended worship, it was Communion day. Cap t Cony & Susanna were Published. at meeting.

Cloudy and misty. I left my Patient at 2h Pm, reach t home a t 3, find I had been Calld for to go to Hallowell. Son Ephm Supt. Lathrop & Burr Came at Evng. Bur Sleeps here, they have finished their work for mr Voce. at Son Pollards. Ephm finishd work for Voce las t night.

Snowd fore n. Cyrus & I tarried at home. Son Ephm Came here & Dind. mr Gill here, wisht to have me go and See 2 of his Child n who are Sick, but I was So unwel that I Could not go. Dagt Ballard went. at home. mr Gill here, his Child n are Sick. funeral of mr Crosbys Dagt.
Snowd. I have been at home. mrs [Getchel] here. Lydia been to [ ]. at home. Son Jona has seen 41 years.

Snowd part of the day. Dag t Lambd and Pollard here. my Comfortors are much as Jobs were. [O] that my Patience may hold out and may I See good acording to the days in which I have been afflicted. at home but in a Situation of Sorrow. mr Kinsly s 3 d son Born.
Clear. Lemuel and Jack Ballard wen t to meeting to y e uper pars h . Called to See Joseph Woodward, find him insane. I have been at home, Joanna went to Son Jonas. at home.
rainy Part of y e day. mrs Kimbal went after breakfas t to my sons. mrs Trask and my Dag t Ball d and Hannah & 2 Cousins took Tea with me. mrs T. & y e Childn Sleep here. a t home, mrs Trask here.
Cloudy part of y e day but very moderate. the annual meeting in this Town. Son Ephm returnd from Belfast, his wife here y s night. at home. my Dagt here yet.
Clear. at Does & mr Evthleths, Colo Lithgows, Colo Norths, Thwings & y e Stores. Sleep at mr Thwings.
Cloudy. Joanna finish t washing wha t Shee began yesterday. I did my hous work. mr Ballard and Cyrus down Street. Joanna went home at Evng. a t home.

Snow d . Rachel bundled up her Cloaths and was going to Sett out in the Storm for hallowell bu t Dagt Ballard Came here and inSisted that Shee Should do my washing and Clean my hous. Shee Said it was as Clean as Shee found it. Shee gave me the lie Several times but did the washing however, was not quite so Sulky after noon. a t home. Ephm here a t Evng.
Clear fore n. Sally Church wash t for me. mrs Page and Dagt Ballard here. we Bakt for mr Purington. H. B. & S. P. here to Tea. I feel more Comfortable for wich I wish to thank God. at home.
Clear and pleast. mr Ballard & Cyrus to Coart. I have done my work. Dagt Ballard here a t Evng. at home.

Clear and pleas t . we Sent and bro t Polly Farewel here to make me a goun. mr Ballard been Surveying a road from Sydna South [here] to Saml Hovys. I have finish t a Shirt for Cyrus. at home. Polly Farewel workt [here].
Snowd and blowd. I have been kniting. Lydia ironed and did hous wk & [twisted] yarn. Jon a Sett ou t yesterday for hay. at home.
Clear and warm. Betsy Andrus workt for me. I have workt in my Gardin & knit Some. Dagt Ballard and Polly Town wen t to mr Dingleys. a t home.
Clear. I help t do my hous work. a t home.
Cloudy. I got Breakfast, was then Calld to See the wife of Jery Towl who is unwell; was there this day and night. at Jery Towls.

Clear. mr Lambard & Son Jona Butchered 2 piggs for us. 1 w d 22_, the other 21 lb. Rachel wen t to help mrs Smith quillt a Bed quillt. I have been at home, Cyrus to hallowell for rie. he bot 2 yds Cotten & linen @ 3/ pr yd. at home, Rachel to quilting.

Clear Part of the day and Colder. Son & Dagt Ballard, par t of their Childn, mrs Getchel and Bhillip Bullin Dind here. Rachel & Joan a Smith to Tea. mr Mathews here a t Evng for pills for Lynda Gitchel, Shee is very ill, he says. at home. P. Bullin here, he was Joind in wedlock yester d with mrs Thustin.
Cloudy, Snowd a little. I have done my hous work and knit Some. at home.

Clear morn, Cloudy aftern. Rachel Town returnd. I have finisht trying my hoggs Lar d , Cut Sauches meet and done other matters. Rachel washt the floor and ironed after Shee returnd. Allin Lambard Sleeps here this night & ye 3 past. at home. Rachel returnd, has been gone 2 weaks & 1 day.

Clear and Cold. I tarried a t mr Thwings till Evng. my husband Dind and took Tea there. son Jon a Conducted me home. I feel fatagued. nay God rewar d my friends. at Detoes, my husband there allso. I [paid] mrs Cypher 2/11 for y r favour.
Clear Par t of y e Day, snowd before night. Son and dagt Pollard & Babe here, Sett ou t for home in y e Storm. I have had a night of pain and Sorrow. a t home. Son & Dagt Pollard here.
A Severe Snow Storm. I have been kniting, finisht a Stockin for Cyrus & began another. a t home.
Clear part of y e Day. Dag t Ballard here to Bake, Shee made Nutts for Ephm. at home. Jonas wife Bakt here.
Clear part of y e day. I have been at home, mended mr Ballards Velvet Breaches and done Some matters about hous, feel fatagued. at home.

Clear and very pleast. I workt in my Gardin part of y e day Cuting the old fence. Dagt Ballard Came here, mrs Smith Calld in on business with her. we Dind on a loin of roas t Veal. mrss Andrews spint aftern here. at home. Dagt Ballard, mrs s Smith & mrss And s here.
raind the most of y s day, Stars appeared at Evng. I have been kniting on Cyrus s hoes. at home.

Clear and very warm. I have done my work and wen t to See the Child, find it much as it was. Hannah Came and ironed for me. I have transptanted squash & Cucum s , Sowd String peas. a t Ditoes. Sowd String peas.
rainy. I am down Sick this Evng, have Lost much of the Seat of life this aftern. God grant me Grace to Submit to all his dispensations with Patience. a t home, very unwell.

Clear part of the day and very Cold. we have Bakt Apple & Pumkin Pies. mr Ballard been to y e Settlement, was infmd that Judg Dumer had Chartered & Loaded a vesel for the W. indies and it is frozen into the river. Cyrus was informd that mr Moody, Precepter, Buried 2 Childn yesterday and is very Sick himSelf. Son Ephm Sleeps here; he this muinit informd that Charls Dinglys 2nd Child Expired last night. a t home. heard of y e Death of 2 of mr Moodys Childn and one of mr Dingleys.

Death of Old mrs Fairfield. Clear and very Cold. I have been at home. Cyrus went and Carried his Fathers Clean Cloaths, was informd of the Death of Jon a Runels & the wife of John Bolton. may we all attend to y e Call, be ye allso ready. at home. funeral of Jon a Runels of Sydney.

Clear part of y e day, Snowd before night. Cyrus wen t to Carrie his Fathers Clean Cloaths. mrs Farewel Calld to See me. Heman Burr Sleeps here, informs me that Son Pollards Babe is unwell. at home. mrs Farewel Calld to See me.
Snowd and raind. I have been at home, help t some about hous and knit Some. Joanna finisht a pair of mitins. at home.

Clear. I have dug ground. Sow d Beets, Carrots, Early peas, Safron and other matters. I then walkt to Shubl pittss. Saw my Dear husband there, partook of a dish of Tea with him. then to my great mortification, he left me and wen t to his place of destination, where I wish him the presence of the great parent of the universe. at Pittss. the School hous was raised, my husband attended.
Clear. I have been very unwel. mr Balld a t meeting. a t home.

Clear. I have not been able to Sett up par t of y s Day. Doct Barton Came here at noon, he tarries all night. mr Ballard, Cyrus & Ephm to meeting. Dagt Ballard Came and helpt me ge t Supper. a t home. Doct Barton Came here.

Clear and Cold. Son Ephm & Polly Farewel, mr Plumer & Sally Do and others went to Son Pollards. I have been at home, removd my Bed from y e kitchen into y e N. room. Son Jona was in to See me but, alas, my husband I have not Seen Since y e 2 nt inst. at home. mr Plumer & Sally Farewel here. Funeral of John Boltons wife.
Snowd. we have not been to meeting. Son Jona to Sydny, Ephm and Burr Dind, and Burr Sleeps here. a t home.
Clear and Cold for April. we have all been at home. the widdo Savage Came here foren from James Savages. Shee tarries all night. at home. widdo Savage Came here.
Clear and pleas t . Daug t Lambard, Son s Jona, Ephm and their wives Dind here. I felt very unwel. this morning Joanna Smith Came and did my work. [at home. part of my Childn here].
Clear part of y e day. I have Cleand Butery and done my hous work. Sally Poll d and Han h Ballard Came and help t me Some. I Bakt for Purington & my Self. a t home.

Clear and pleas t foren, Cloudy aft n . I have been abou t hous and done my work tho unable. Dag t Ballad and part of her Childn here at Evn. Hannah bro t her writeing, it is wel done for the begining. at home. Dagt Ballard here at Evn. I finish t a Pair hoes for Cyrus.
Snowd part of y e day. I have been at home. Ephm down to y e Selltement. at home.
Clear and Cool. I have been very unwel. Phebe Church Came a t 9 hou. Son Pollar d , his wife & Rhoda and Dolly here a t Evng. at home. Dagt Pollard Sleeps here.
Clear and Cool. mr Shaw took Breakfast here. Son Eph m paid him for the work he has done for him. he left here bound to Parris where his Parents liv. at home.
Clear and warm. I have felt not So well as I Could wish. mrs Farewel Calld and took Tea with me. Son Ephm been down to y e Settlemen t , he Sleeps here this night. a t home. mrs Farewel here.
Clear. I have Sett young trees & done other matters in my Gardin. feel Some what fatagued, have knit Some. at home. workt in Gardin, Sett trees &C.
Clear part of y e day. mr Ballard Sett out to go to Davis Town. Dagt Lamb d Came here. I houghd Cucumbers and went to So n Jonas with her. Polly Town Came home with me. a t my Sons. Dagt Lamb d here.

Cloudy, Snowd at night, raind allso. Ephm Conducted his wife home to her marms. Phebe Church Came to help me, Shee did some hous work and twisted yarn. at home. Pheebe Church Came and Ephms wife went home.

Birth Son Jonas 5th Sone. Clear. mrs Farewel Calld here, Shee was going to the Settlement. Dagt Ballard Sen t for me aftern Shee being in Labour, and was Deld of a dead Son before Sun Sett; untimely birth. I tarried all night, mrs s Farewel & Smith also. a t Son Jona. Birth 3 d . premature.
Clear. I left mr Thwings, Calld at mr Moodys and there I had a hors left by my husband, and Came home. find Dagt Ballard here.
Clear. I have done hous work. Phillip Bullin here writing on Plans. a t home.
Clear. I Came home before Sun rise. Joanna wen t and helpt my Dagt till aftern when Shee Came home and Bakt. I feel very much fatagued. Olliv Fletcher is with my Dag t this night. at home.

Clear. Joanna to meeting. I have been to my sons, his wife is as well as Can be Expected. Marcy Badcock Came to help her. Olliv & Rebeckah Fletcher Sleep here. it is Fast day. a t Son Jonas. Oliv and Becky Fletcher Sleep here.
Clear. I have done my work. a t home.
Clear. mr Ballard Sett out at Sun Sett for Wiscassett. I have done my hous work. Polly Farewel Came to work for me. at home. mr Bald to wiscasett.

rainy. I have been a t home, done hous wk and Sewing. Polly finisht my Goun & mended Cloaths for mr Ballard. son Lambd Came and Carried Barny home. Jon a , his wife & part of y r Childn here. at home. Barny Lambd went home.

Clear and pleas t Sun. I put on my grees and Ley to boil. have knit, finished a Legin which I began the day before yesterd y aftern, and began y e 2nd y s Evng. son Ephm brot his tools up to y e Shop and began to fix to work. he and Heman Sleep here, took Supper. at home. Ephm returnd to wk in y e Shop.
Clear. I went to Lecture, wrode Son Ephms Mare. at Lectur.
Clear and warm. Betsy work t for me, I paid her 4/2_ for 5 days work; to Polly Farewel 4/6 for work Shee has done for me. we Dind at Son Jonas. Polly Town Came home with me. at my Sons.

Clear. Cyrus puled Beens in y e Corn field. I piqut part of y m f m y e vines. Betsy, Rufus & Rachel Smith here. Son Ephm and Polly Farewel gone to winslow. mrs Farewel here. a t home. Compy here. Ephm to Winslow.

X. Birth Jery Towls 11th Child, a Dagt. XX. Clear part of the day. my Patient was So ill as to have women Calld in aftr 5h morn. Shee Lingured till 45 m pm when Shee was Safe Deld of a Dagt, her 11th Child. it w d 9 lb _. I left her at about 2 and returnd home, find Some work to do; finisht it at 10 h 40 m Evng. at Jery Towls. Birth 15th. Dec r 10 th , Crdt by a pr Shoes.

Clear part of y e day. we have Bak t Brown & white bread, Apple & Pumkin Pies. Cyrus went to Son Lambards, Carried them a pigg to roast, borrowd 3 lb hogg lard. mr Ballard after taxes. at home. we Bakt. Son Ephm here at night.

Clear and Cold. I went to Son Jonas about noon to See Linda Gitchel, find her very unwell. I gave her 2 Tea spunfuls of Stotins Elix r in swetened water. Shee Seemd better Soon. I returnd at 4. Allin Lambd and Ephm Ballard, Son Ephm & Lathrop Sleep here. at my Sons, he had 4 Swine Butchered.
Clear and Cloudy by turns. I have Done my hous work. Sally Farwel Calld here as Shee was going to her Marms. Son Ephm took Supper here then went to mrs s Farewels. at home.

Clear and very Pleas t for the last day of y e year. I have been at home doing the business of my hous. mr Ballard returnd from his Surveying at Reeds field as well as Could be Expected. he this Evng paid his tax for y e prest year to Leut John Shaw Junr, and took his receipt in full. this year is now near a Clos, God grant we may begin the ensewing in peas [and] happiness. at home. mr Ballrd returnd. he paid his Taxes to John Shaw Junr.
Clear and Cold. I have been at home over hauling papers. Cyrus went down with his Fathers Cloaths. at home.
Clear and Pleas t . Cyrus Cut his ankle but went to mill afterwards. I finish t mr Ball d a pair Legins, have been at home. at home.
Clear. Son Lambard Came and Conducted me to his house to see his hond Mother. I tarried all night. at Son Lambds, his [marm] also.
Clear part of y s day. I have done my hous work and Cleand y e Chambers, Mended Stockins &C. I do feel very much fatagued. at home.

Clear part of y s day. I have been at home, done Some hous work, Some mending and removd some of y e Banking from y e house. Cleand the hen house. Joanna went to her fathers aftern. Hannah, Sally, Martha, Ephm [&] [Wil m ] here. at home. Jo a went home aftern.
Clear. I have been at home, workt in my Gardin the most of the day. mrs Farewel Calld here, we [have] Brewd. a t home. mrs Farew l Calld here.

Clear morn, a rain Bow in y e west. Cloudy aftern, raind Some a t Evn. I have finisht a pair hoes for Cyrus, began one for my husband, workt Some in my Gardin. Sally Farewel, mrs s Badcock & Pierce Calld in to See me. Lem l is gone to Sydni for Ephms Mare and Jonas OXen. mercy here to spin threa d , Joanna to my Sons to twist yarn. a t home. the remains of the wife of John Pinkham interd this day.
Clear. my famely to meeting. Bro r Towns widdo Came here. mr Gill and Lambar d here at Evng. Georg Andrus Came home with Joanna. a t home. mrs Town here.

Cloudy and Cold, Snowd a little. I have been at home. mr Ballard to meeting. Son and Dagt Ballard, mrs Getchel Dind here. Billy, Sally & Martha, hannah G. & B. & Lindy Slept here. Son Ephm went to mr Pollar d s. a t home. Jona & part of famely here.

Clear and Cold. mr Ballard at meeting. Son Jona, his wife, Martha & mrs Getchel Supt here. Hannah, Sally, Sabery, EZekiel and Wil m here y s aftern. I have not felt So wel as I Could wish but have done my work. my Dagt bro t me a Loaf whea t bread and Some Butter. a t home. Son Jona and par t of his famely here.
Clear. I have been to meeting, was a t Shub l Pittss at intermition; all well there. my husband Bor ds there. Rob d Williams Desired Prayers on y e Death of a Brother. at Meeting.
Clear. Son L. conducted me to Meeting. I wen t to mr Pitts s a t intermition, my husband is well. My Son wen t home with his wife and Child n , and returnd and bro t me home. at Detoes & at meeting.
Clear, A Pleas t Sun but Cool air. I have been at home, feel very feeble bu t had my work to do. Shaw went to Sydni. a t home.
Clear. Heman and Lemuel to hear mr Stone, Lathrop to hear mr Fogg. Joanna to the School hous Eas t side. I have done my work, feel falagued. at home. Jo a returnd at Dusk.

Cloudy morn, began to rain at 11h morn. mrs Farewel Came from my Sons where Shee tarried last night, is all y s night here. a Severe Storm. Heman to N. parish, tarries all night. Leml to our meeting, Lathrop waetcht with J. Woodwd tas t night. at home. mrs Farewel here.

Clear part of y e day, raind a t night. I wen t to Son Jonas and Dind. Saml Badcock & wife & mrs Pierce there, Son Ephm allso. Lemuel Came with the OXen and Mare and two Piggs for Ephm. a t my Sons, her Sister Hitty there.
Cloudy and rain. I attended public worship, returnd to mr Pitts s . Sleep there this night. at Ditoes.
Clear part of the day, raind foren. I have had Collic Symtoms but feel better. Ephm & his men and Cyrus all Staid a t home. Joanna wen t home y s morn. [at home, feel unwell].

Clear & Cloudy alternately. I have been Exercised with much pain but have had my work to do. Dagt Lambd Came in to See me, Shee was going to the quarterly meeting of the methodist Society. mr Waters attended at that meeting. Heman Burr Calld and took Tea here. at home, very unwell. Dagt Lambd Calld to See me.

Clear and Pleas t . we all wint to meeting, it was Communion day. I was at mr Pittss, my Husband there. mr John Emry & a mr Jerril [took] Tea here. Jona and his wife to mrs s Farewels, they are as wel as Can be Expected. at meeting. the Sacrament administred.
Clear. mrs Crocket here to wash her Cloaths. I have done my work & nurs t her babe. a t home.

X. Birth mr Cottles 16 th Child. X. Clear and very windy. mr Cottle Calld me Early y s morn to See his wife. Shee was Safe deld at 4 h pm of her 10th Daugt and 16th Child. I tarrid there all night. I receivd 9/ for a reward. a t mr Cottles. Birth 15th, a 16th Child.

Cloudy & Sun Shine by turns. I have felt very unwel, bu t have had to do my work and did Some mending. Jon a and his wife here a t Evng. Shee took Tea. returnd Some Shee had borrowed and gave me Some Coffee. at home. Jon a and wife here a t Evng.
Clear part of y s day. I have been at home. Ephm took Break fas t here. a t home. Burr went down [below].
Clear day, Thunder & rain a t night. I help t Joanna wash. at home, washt.

Clear Excep t a sprinkling of rain. I have been at home, fel t very feeble but have had to do my hous work. Joanna Badcock Came for some Cloaths Shee left here. Mr Waters Supt and Sleeps here. Cyrus been to Carry wool to the masheen for Dag t Ballard. at home. mr Waters Sleeps here.
Clear. I have workt in my Gardin. Sally Farewel Calld here, Says Polly and the Babe are more Comfortable. Cyrus been to Carry Greens & Sallod to Ephm. at home. Sally Farewel Calld here.
raind par t of y e day. I have Cleand Chambers and done my hous work. Cyrus kille a porcapine by the hous. a t home.
Cloudy, rain at night. W m Cypher workt here. I have done my hous work. Betsy & Lydia Church here. at home, done hous wk and washing.

Clear and pleast. Lydia Nudd left me. Son Ephm brot his wife to See me. mrs Town did my washing and I did my hous work. A young Man by y e name of Shaw Came to work with my son Ephm. James Wengate & wife here. at home. mr Shaw Came to work with Son Ephm. Lydia Nudd left me.

Clear and Cool. Son Ephm brot his wife here. his Prentis Boy Conducted Dagt Pollard and Childn home. Son Jona was here this day. he Spake very indecently to me. I pray God to forgive the ofences of all who do ingure my feelings. may they Consider they may be Old and receiv like Treatment. Polly went to Son Jona s , his wife & Child n are unwel. a t home. Dagt Pollard & Child n went home. Shee Deliv d me 7/6 on James Blacks acount.
Clear and very pleas t . Joanna washt. I have done some work in my Gardin but what pain I have had in my feet and leggs this aftern. at home. workt Some in my Gardin.

Clear. Joanna is washing. I have houghd in my gardin and kni t Some. Son Ephm Gone to plant his ground with Potatoes this aftern. Cyrus is planting Corn. he went foren and Carried a Baskett of Greens to Shubal Pittss. at home. Sent a Basket of Greens to mrs Pitts.

Clear till near night when i t sprinkled a little rain. Cyrus been to hear Coart. I have Bak t & Brewd and done Some in my Gardin. Sett 4 Cabbage plants in the middle of the day. put y e tops in Cold water 1 hour then Sett them. mrs Farewel took Tea with me. her Dagt Sally here foren n , Brot me some Butter from her marm. Lemuell Sleeps here. at home. our Cow Calvd.

Clear. Betsy wash t and ironed. I work t Some in my Gardin, mended a pair Briaches for my husband. went to mrs Farewels aftern, find Ephms wife So wel as to be at work. the Babe had a turn of pain while I was there. mrs Cleark and Bennit Came in there. a t mrss Farewels.
Cloudy, raind aftern. I workt in y e Gardin Some. Polly and I made Cherry & Curent Tarts and Shee mend Cloaths for her Grand dady. a t home. Polly Town here.

Cloudy morn, Clear aflern. Luke Barton wriding in a Sleigh ran it over a Sheep and hurt it So it Could not Stand. it was my Sons Sheep. I have been a t home, very unwel. at home. Luke Barton ran over A Sheep with his Sleigh.

Clear and pleas t . the annaversary of indePendance. there was an Oration deliverd at Augusta meeting hous by a mr Fuller, and another at the Coart hous by mr Thustan Whiten. I have work t in my Gardin and knit Some. Cyrus down to hear and See. Betsy pickt wool and went to her Fathers. Dagt Ballard went to her Bror Badcocks. at home. indipendance was Cellibrated. an Oration Deld by mr Fuller of Augusta.
Cloudy. mrs Smith, her Babe and Betsy Andrus to Tea. Selvanus Hatch and wife Sleep here. Joanna went home. I feel fatagued but must put up with my lott. a t home. mr Hatch & wife here.

Clear. I work t in my Gardin foren, Gathered String Beens and green [Peas]. got them ready to Eat, and was Calld in hast to James Boltons wife who is not very wel. was there all night, very much aflicted by flees. at James Bolton. I had Peas & Beens from my Gardin. Death [Cp t Jones inft.]
Clear. Dagt Pollard Sent a hors to Boltons for me. I went there, and to mr Woodwds to see his Child who is not wel. was Calld back a t Evng. at Ditos & at Son Pollards. Death [Edm d ] Warins inft.
Clear. I Scoured my N room floor and did my other work. a t home.

Clear and very Pleas t . mr Ballard is so wel as to go down to y e Settlement. Lathrop and Moody Dind here. Polly went home at 4h pm, Le faett went with her and rode y e hors home. I have Done hous work & knitt some. at home. Polly [went] home [aft n ].

Clear and pleast. I have Done abou t Soap work and knit Some, have not been very well. Ephm been down to trie to have his Father Liberated but did not Sucksceed. we are informd that Judg Norths Store was Consumed by fire this morn. mr Gills loss is very Considerable. mr Eads & famely, and a mr Allin, were turnd ou t by this Calamity. mrs Getchel here y s Evng. at home. Judg Norths Store was Burnt.
Clear. I felt unwel but Joanna went home aftern. EZra Town Sleeps here, his Fathers famely are wel. at home. EZra Town Sleeps here.

Clear. I returnd home, left the patient better. was informd that y e infants of Capt Jones and Edmond Warrin were dead. [Ba ] Smith washt for Self here and [dind] with me. I am informd of the death of mrss Robinson at the 4 Corners. I have Sett Cucumbers & Cabbages. Cyrus gone to the Settlement. we had a heavy Shour. the wind was very Severe at the fort, did Some Damage to rafts &C. Jo an Smith Sleeps here. Son Ephm & Lemuel Slee sup t here. at Boltns. Funeral mrs Robinsons, Cap t Joness & E. Warrins infants.

Clear. I returnd home, left the patient better. was informd that y e infants of Capt Jones and Edmond Warrin were dead. [Ba ] Smith washt for Self here and [dind] with me. I am informd of the death of mrss Robinson at the 4 Corners. I have Sett Cucumbers & Cabbages. Cyrus gone to the Settlement. we had a heavy Shour. the wind was very Severe at the fort, did Some Damage to rafts &C. Jo an Smith Sleeps here. Son Ephm & Lemuel Slee sup t here. at Boltns. Funeral mrs Robinsons, Cap t Joness & E. Warrins infants.
Clear. I was Calld a t Evng to Savage Boltons. I got some Sleep. a t Savage Boltons.

Clear and pleas t but very muddy traviling. mr Ballard & Ephm only wen t to meeting from here. Rachel spen t aftern at Son Jonas. I had Supper to Prepare my Self tho very unable. Heman Burr Sup t & Sleeps here. at home.

Clear. Sons Pollard and Lambar d , their wives and par t of y r Childn Came here. Rhoda, Hannah, Saml & Dolly tarried here, their parents went to meeting. mr Black and Oldes t Dagt Came with them after meeting and partook with me of a Turkey my husband Sent to me Since he wen t from home. Son Ephm and Mary Farewel were Joind in wedlock this Evng. a t home. my Child n here, mr Black allso. Son Ephm was Married to Mary Farewel, Oldes t Daug t to y e widdow.

Death wid o Weber, Varsalboro. Clear bu t I Could not go to meeting. mrs Getchel and Fanny Hodges were in to See me. Lydia at meeting. Son Lambard Came for me to go & See his wife who is very unwell. I find Capt Jones s Lady takeing Care of her. at Son Lambds, my Dagt is Sick.

Clear. we all attended worship at the meeting hous Excep t Lathrop. it was Communion day. EZra Town Sleeps here y s nigh t . I was a t mr Pitts s at intermition. Shee informd me of an infant s being found in a pond in Winthrop. a t meeting. Communion day. EZra Sleeps here.

Clear. Cyrus only of my famely attended Public worship. Dagt Pollard, her Dagt Sally and Oliv Fletcher Dind with me, Lemuel allso. we had String Beens & Green Pees. Son s Pollard, Ballard s & part of their Childn here aftern. a t home. Son Pollard & wife &Sally and Sam l here. Betsy Church [went] home to See her folks.
Clear. mr Ballard Collecting taxes. we have washt. mr Town here y s day. a t home.

Clear and prety Cold. I have done hous work, washt y e Buttery and kitchen and knit 28 purls on Cyrus s Stockin. this is the aniversary of my Mariage. at home. I have livd in a Mariage State 49 years.
Clear. I wen t to see mrs Getchel, find her very unwel. I was no t able to do her any Service and returned Soon. I have Seene 69 years this day. a t my sons. I am 69 yrs Old y s day.
Clear and Cold. mr Gill Conducted me to his hous. Son Lambd, his marm and wife and wido Town there. my Husband Dind & took Tea there. I Sleep t there. at mr Gills with my husband & Others.

Clear. I have done my hous work but very [ ] unable. Lemuel went went [sic] to Son Pollards for Olliv Fletcher but Shee did not Come with him. Heman wen t to mr Churches for Phebe, Shee promist to Come to morrow. Lathrop Sleeph here.

Clear part of y e day, raind aftern. A very Clear Evng. I have been at home. Saml Clearks wife here forn, Sally Farewel aftern. I have sett Cabage Stumps & Turnips, Sowd Pepper grass and Leutice and removd Banking from y e house and knit Some. I made Nutt Cakes for Supper. at home, done various Sorts of work.
The Storm abated foren. mrs Farewel wen t home after breakfas t . very stormy a t night. I do not feel very well, have Sorted Beens and doubled yarn. a t home. Mrs Farewel wen t home.
Clear. I have work t in my gard n , Sowd Early Peas. feel fatagued. Joanna washt. at home. Sowd Peas.

Cloudy morn, Clear aftern. my Dear husband attended me to mr Gills after Breakfast. he Came and took Tea. I tarried all night. mrs s Gill was taken in Labour about the middle of y e night and assistanc was Calld in. at Ditoes.
Clear foren, thunder and rain aftern. I have transplanted Squash and Cucumbr Plants. Planted a fue potaloes, Swept ny Chambers and done my other hous wk. at home. workt some in my Gardin.

Clear. I have been Exercised with pain in my limbs bu t have help t do my work. Betsy Church Came this morn to help me. we Bak t Some Pies and Bread. mrs Farewel Calld here, Says that Son Ephms wife is feeble yet. mr Waters took Breakfas t , dind & Supt with me. I had roast Lamb & Green Peas. a t home. we had green Peas. I wrote to Sister Walers.
Cloudy and Some rain. Sally Church washt. I washt Bed room and Cleand Bedsted. a t home.
Clear and pleast. I left My Patients as well as Could be Expected. Calld at Son Pollards and reacht home a t 10h morn, did my hous work up. at Ditoes.

Clear and not so Cold. Son Lambard brot his wife and Babe and Suky Capin here. I have done my washing and hous work. Dagt Ballard and part of her Childn here. Shee informd me that James Duttun of Reedsfield Expired las t night. Ephm Leighton Sleeps here. at home. Dagt Lambard to see me.
Clear. I have Done part of my hous work and workt in my Gard n . Sowd Cabbage Seed North of y e hous, Sett 6 apple trees.

Clear. mr Waters went from here to go to Bro r Ebenz r Moors & Doc t Bartons, Jona gone with him. Sally Farewel Calld here. Shee had been to y e Stores for Cloathing for Son Ephms Babe. Hannah Ballard went to draw her Aunts Breasts, returnd at Evn. Says her aunt is quite unwel this aftern. I have Cut grass, houghd the polatoes west Side y e hous. feel fatagued. a t home.
Clear. Sally Church washt for me. I did my hous work, feel fatagued much. a t home.
Clear and Cloudy by turns. I have been at home. Lydia Nudd Came for her Cloaths. Ephm Conducted mrs Town to mr Gills, his wife to son Jonas. at home. mrs Town went from here to mr Gills.

[Birth W m Stones 6 th son.] Clear. I was Calld before morn to W m Stones wife in Labour. Shee was Deld at 9h morn of her 6th son and 8th Child. I returnd aftern. a t W m Stones. Birth 1 st recvd 6/ may 10 th .
Clear. I have been at home, help t do y e hous work & knitt Some. we Bakt. Mercy Badcock Bakt for my Sons famely. at home.

Clear. I have felt very feeble this day. Joanna Washing a t son Jon a . his wife to mrs Farewels. mrs s Smith & Freeman here. Ephm and Lem l planting his Ground. Heman to work a t y e Shop, Lothrop Came here a t night. this is Election day. at home, had Company.

Clear and warm. Joanna Smith washt for me. I have done hous work, mended trousers for Cyrus, Planted Potatoes & Cucumbers East Side the hous. Cyrus been to hear coart. I have had a number of faint turns this day. Lemuel took Son Ephms Piggs from here. my Son here a t Evn g . a t home. Jo a washt for me.

Clear and Cool. I have felt very unwel. mrs Farewel Calld here. I Scolt the Bed room and Bed Stead. Betsy washt y e floor and Buttery. Hannah and Sally Sleep here. Lemuel Supt here. at home. Dagt Balld [& mrss] Farewel been here.
Clear. I have done my hous work and some in my Gardin. Son Ephm Calld here. at home.
Clear. I have done my work, washt N. room & kitchen, Stares & Entry floors. mr [Wilson] Sleeps here. a t home, washt floors. Cyrus Carrid 13 lb wool to ye Meshene.
Clear and Cloudy by turns. I have been at home very unwel. Ephm & Burr got me wood. at home. James Hinkly Expired.
Cloudy. Bullin here. I have done hous work. Allin, Thomas Lambd & Ephm Bald Sleep here. at home.
Clear Excep t light Showers. I have been very unwel. Cyrus Butcherd our Calf, went to markit with one quarter & y e Skin. Hannah and Sally Pollard Sleep here. at home. Hannah & Sally Sleep here.
Birth Savage Boltons Dagt. Clear. mrs Bolton Safe Deld a t 3h Pm of her 5 Dagt and 11th Child. I left them Comfortable, Came to Son Pollards and Sleep there. a t Detoes. Birth 12th.
Clear. I have been at home. mrs Getchels Daugts & Hannah Ballard Spent Evng and took Tea with me. a t home.
Clear part of the day. my Dag t Some better. I tarried all night. a t Ditos.
Clear. I have been at home, planted Cucumbers and pumkin Seed. feel fatagud. Joanna returnd forenoon. Dagt Ballard was here, Shee is feeble yet. a t home. Dag t Ballard here.

Clear. I work t in my Gardin and pikt Some wool. Dagt Pollard Came from Son Lambds here and went home. Shee informd me that mrss Jones s Soar had been opened and that Polly Pollard had go t her Self into Business. Leml here, informd that Lathrop had a Soar Opened on his face by D r Mann. at Son Jonas. Dag t Pollard went home. Hannah & Sally Sleep here.
Cloudy. mr Town went to Son Lambds, Joanna to quillt for Betsy Andrus, taried all night. Fanny, Rhoda & Hannah Sleep here. a t home.

Birth Whitons Dagt. Clear and very Cool. Dagt Ballard here for Stay pieces. Polly & Sally Farewel Calld here as they were going down to y e Settlement y s Evng. at home, did my work [ ] and knit 40 purls.

Clear. I have been at home. Son Ephm and Heman & Luke go t wood for me. Sister Farewel took Tea with me. Georg Ulmer of Lincolnville here, wishes to have Cyrus go and take care of and tend a gris t mill of his. a t home, mrs Farew here.
Clear. Old mr Gill & wife at his sons. Son Ephm Came and Conducted me home. a t Ditoes a t Evng.

X. Birth David Edwards s & Lucy Shaws Dag t . XX. Clear. Pheebe Church work t here. I paid her /9 d . I was Calld a t noon to go and See Lucy Shaw (who was at mr A. Brackets) in Labour and was Safe Deld abou t 2 h pm of a Daugh t . Shee Declared that David Edwards was the True Father of the Child. I left her Comfortable and reach t home before SunSett, find Joanna Babcock here. Shee is Come to do our work. at mr Anthonys Brackets to See Lucy Shaw. Birth 2 nd . out of wedlock. mrs Trask Sleeps [here]. fee recd Decr. 4th.

Clear foren, frosty morn, Cloudy aftern. I helpt Jo a wash and went to my Sons, find his wife feeble and Martha Sick with a pain in her Ear. L e faett is Better. Son Ephm been hewing timber in the woods. I Sent Dinner for him, Lem l and 2 others. a t son Jonas, his wife and [Mat ha ] unwell.

Cloudy and rain. I have been a t home, finisht a pair Tow & Cottne hoes for son Cyrus and began another. Son Ephm been to y e Settlement, informs me the freshet is So high that the water is Swiming deep ouer y e mill brook Bridg. at home.
Clear. I have work t in y e Gardin and door yard. the men to see Training, Ephm to Trooping. Hannah, Sally, Martha and Wil m here, Dind. at home. raild Curent Bushes & removd Banking.

X. Birth Charls Gills 7 Child, 3 d Dag t . XX. Clear and very warm. my patient was Safely Deld of her 9 th Child & 3 d Dagt at 3h 30m y s morn, and is Cleverly. I tarried till mrs Con r Came to Nurs and Came home attended [by] Harnon Barton. Daug t Ballard Came and took Tea. Son Ephm & Prentis s to wk at the school hous, my husband allso. a t Ditoe. Dagt Ballard here to Tea. Birth 4 th . recvd 1 Gln Gin [and] 1 Bushl Corn.
Clear Excep t a Shower. I have workt in my Gardin and done hous work. Plantd a few hils potaloes west of ye hous. a t home. Cyrus been to Coart.

Clear Except Showers aftern. mr Waters left our hous at 4h pm to go on Board a Vessil for Boston. I have workt in my Gardin, transPlanted Cucumbers. Sett them East Side the hous. Betsy workt for me. at home. mr Waters left here for Boston.
Cloudy & rain. mr Ballard Collecting. I have done hous work, Cleand Cyrus s Beds td . Sett plants and houd in gardin. a t home.
Clear. Sally Church wash t for [me]. I Paid her 2/1. Hannah Getchel Came to help me. a t home.

Clear and very pleas t . Son Ephms wife Came this morn, has been mending Cloaths for him & Boys. I roasted Veal for Dinner, made Rhubarb tarts aftern. Jona and wife & Wil m here to Tea. Joan a wash t part of my wool. a t home. Jon a & Ep m wives here. Lothrop is not so wel as he was yesterd y .

Clear. I have Cutt grass, Sage and feverfue [&] Burnit. went aftern to See Son Ephm s wife, find her more Comfortable. her Babe Seems Cleverly. Cyrus been down to the Settlement. informs me y t Ebenz Towns youngest Child Expired y s day. at mrs Farewels, find them more Comfortable. A Death.

Clear. I have been at home, Done my hous work but am feeble. mrs Farewel Calld and informd me the Babe was very Sick ye t . mr Purington here for Camomile for his Son James. he is very unwell. Lemuel Sleeps here. a t home. mrs Farewel here.

Clear bu t windy. I have been at home, feel very unwell. Ephms wife assisterd me to do my hous work, her Marm & Sister Calld here. I roasted a Goos for Supper which Son Town gave me. at home. Cookt A Goos which Son Town Gave me 13 th Jany.

Cloudy part of y s day. I have been helping do hous work. we brewd and have Soap in hand as y e hoops of y e Barril Sprung which made it necessary. I look the top hoop and put it to the bottom and so I made it do. it was not so when I had a husband with me. at home.

Clear foren, Cloudy aftern, raind at Evn g . Son Ephm with his apprentises and mr Lathrop went from here this morn to work for mr Whitwel. Ephm has hird a Par t his hous. I gave him a Bed Bolster [&] pillows & 1 Blankett & pair pillow Cases. I wish him Prosperity. Cyrus was down, Says his Father has been to work with [Ep m ]. I have been boiling my Soap. at home. Son Ephm removd his tools and Some other things to mr Whitwels.

Clear. I have Bak t white & B n Bread and work t in my Gardin. [Isaac] Waters, Son of my Sister, Dind here. I was Calld at 10 h Evn to see Son Ephms wife who was in Labour. I walkt there. Cyrus wend to Call Ephm to attend to his wives Sickness. he reacht mrs Farewels a t 11, wen t and Conducted Jonas wife there. at mrs Farewels at night. my Nephue Isaac Waters Dind here.

Clear morn, raind before night. Old mrs Arnold, Cleark, her 2 Child n , Dagt Ballard & mrs Thomson took Tea here. the old Lady Sleeps here. I have been unwel. Betsy Church left here. Hannah & Sally sleep here. at home, had Compy. mrs Farewel to Tea here.

Clear. Son Ephm Conducted his wife & Babe home to hous keeping. Lemuel Came up for her furniture. Heman Came up with the team aftern. I Gave him Greens and Curents to Carry home. mrs Gill, Williams and Betsy Dind here. I went to Son Jonas, mrs Pierce and two Child n there. H. B. & [Mch ll ] Peirce Sleepe here, Jack & Ephm allso. at my Sons. mrs Gill made me a visit. Ephms wife went to hous keeping.

Clear and Cool. I have Done my hous work and Some in my Gardin. Joanna Smith workt here, spun 2 Skeins of [Cotten] yarn and did Some Chors. Sally Farewel Calld and took Tea with me, informs tha t Son Ephms infant has a Soar Mouth. at home. Sally Farewel informd y t Ephms Babe has a Soar mouth. it is 7 months Since my husband went to Jail.
Clear and Cool. I feel more Comfortable for which I wish to giv God praise. have been a t home. Dag t Ballard & mrs Getchel here. 6 Grand Child n Dind here, 3 Sleep here. at home. Dagt Ballard here.
Clear. mrs s Densmore left here to go to Bodinham. mrs Farewel went down to Son Ephms. at home. mrs Densm r left here.
Clear. I have done my hous work and ironed my Cloaths. mrs Farewel returnd at Dusk, informs y t Ephms infant is no better. at home. mrs s [Farewl] Came home.
Cloudy. mr Ballard & Bullin down on busines. I have fatagued, Cut up a quarter of Beef. Joanna left me, her marn here, had 2_ Bushel ashes, has had Gal milk & 3 qts Soap. at home.
Clear. Cyrus went to Carry Some of the harslet of y e Calf to his Father. Jack Ballard Conducted Son Ephms wife & Babe here. at home. Son Ephms wife and Babe Came here.
Clear. I have been at home, done my hous work. at home.

Cloudy. Son & Dagt Lambd, their Babe, Son Jona, his wife, Ephm and his wife, Heman & Lemuel and James Purington partook of a Loin of Veal with me but, alas, my husband is Debard the favour. at home. Part of my Childn here.
Clear. I returnd home, did work in the hous & Gardin. Dagt Ballard & mrs Crocke t here. mr Benet took Ephms Coalt to keep. a t Son Pollard.
Clear. I was at my sons yet, his wife is not So well. I tarried this night allso. a t Ditos.

raind y s morn, Cloudy most of y e day. I have been Cuting Coverled raggs. Joanna Sewing them and doing hous work. Charlotte Brown Calld here. Son Ephm finisht his jobb of wk at the School house. at home.
Clear. Betsy washt. I houghd in my Gardin and pikt wool. mrs Stone, Wickson and Chace here to Tea. Hannah & Sally sleep here. a t home, had Compy. mrs Farewel Calldhere.
Clear part of y e Day. mr Gill brot mrs Town to our hous. I have been at home, knit mitts for Son Cyrus. a t home. mrs Town Came here.
Clear and very Pleas t . I have been at home, help t do hous work and mended Stockins and knitt some. at home.
Clear. [w ] Sent Dinner to Ephm & 5 men. I have fatagued to heat my oven for want of wood Sutable. at home.
Clear morn, Cloudy the most of this day. I have removd Catnip roots, Set some french Turnips. Ephm brot 2 new Cottne [ ] Shirts for Heman, Sally washt. a t home, work t in the gardin Some.
Clear. I have knit Some and workt Some in my Gardin, Sowd String Peas. at home, Sowd peas.
Clear. I have been at home. mrss Farewel here, mrs s Burtun allso. my husband workt a t y e School hous. a t home. mrs Burtun & Farewel here.
Clear. I have workt in the Gardin. Cyrus ploughd the door yard. mrs Farewel here to Tea. Son Town Sleeps here. at home. Son Town Sleeps here.

Cloudy and Some rain, thunder at Evng. Cyrus went and Carried Greens to son Ephms. I have Sett Cabbages and wed my Beets & Carrotts. Son Lambd Sent me 2 qts Spirit by Cyrus. I am in great pain in my left legg. at home, workt in my Gardin Part of the day.
Clear. I have Cleand Ephms Bedst d , washt North Chambr. mrs Farewel, Dagt Ballard & mrs Ketridg here. a t home.
Clear. I have help t do my work. a t home.
Clear and pleas t . Son Ephms wife workt here. Shee and I went to Son Jonas aftern. mrs Church Came there. at my Sons.

Clear part of the day. I have Sett [120] Cabbage and Turnip plants and done other matters in my Gardin. Bakt Cake and done hous wk. Son Ephm gave Joanna Smith an order on P. T. Voce for 12/. at home. Joanna washt fr me.
Clear. I have wash t and done my hous work. Dagt Ballard and mrs Farewel took Tea here. Lemuel Sleeps here. the Babe is much as it has been. a t home. mrs Farewel & Dagt Ballard here.

Clear par t of y e day. I went to Son Jonas to See Patty, find her much as Shee has been. Dag t Ballard informd me [y t ] Betsy Andrews was Deld of a fine Son this morn 3m after mid night. I have been unwell, was much relax t las t night. Sally Farewel is in y e Same Situation. at Son Jonas. Pally is much as Shee was. Funeral of Chases infant.

rainy. Son Ephm here, informs his Father has Broke his Bonds and that he Expects his property will all be atached [this] day. would the Paren t of all mercy Enable me to Support under all the tryals he is pleased to lay upon me and take me to him Self in his own time. at home. my troubles are of the [mind].

X. Birth EbenZ Trasks Son. XX. Clear. mrs Trask Deld of a son a t 5 h 30m y s morn. I have felt very unwell. Came from there to Son Pollards, tarrie all night. my Dag t nurs t me. at mr Trasks. Birth 7th. recvd 9/ as rewd.

Clear. Son Cyrus wen t to Son Lambds on Business with him. Son Ephms wife helpt me do my work, went to her marms and returned. Son Jon a here and Shavd his Bro r Cyrus perhaps for the last time as he is going to leav us tomorrow. at home, am very weak and feeble. Ephms wife here,help t me do my work.
Cloudy and Some rain. I have been doing my Soap. Dag t Lambd and Rhoda Pollard took Tea here. Cyrus been to Hallowell for 3 Sheep. Joanna Did hous work and Pickt wool. at home. Dagt Lambd Calld here.

X. Birth Son Ephms Daug t . first Born. XX. Clear and warm. Ephms wife was Safe Deld a t 4h and 40m y morn of a Daug t , her firs t Child. it wd 6_ lb. Shee was very fain t after delivery. I tarried with her till near 2h pm when I left her and inft Comfortable. was fatagued watking home, went on to the Bed and rested the remainder of y e aftern. a t mrs Farewels. Birth 5th. at 4h 40 m y s morn.
rainy. the old Lady here all day, shee & Hannah and Sally Sleep here. mrss Bunker and Saunders Calld here. I finisht picking my Black wool. at home, not very well.

Clear. I have houghd in my Gardin and done my hous work. Dagt Ballard, mrs Pierce and Sally and mrs Cleark & her Daugt took Tea here. Betsy Church Came to help me at Evng. Hannah Ballard and Hitty Pierce Sleep here. W m Gill Brot me _ Gln Ginn from his Father. at home, had Company. the Girls Sleepe here. mr Gills Sent me _ G n Ginn.

Clear part of y e day, Some Showers. Joanna washt. I workt in my Gardin and did hous wk. Shee went home some time before night. Luke Barton Came and Conducted Sally Pollard from here. Cyrus been to his Bro r Ephms, the infant is not well. at home. mr Puringtn Calld here. Sally went home.
Cloudy. I was a t my sons till 3h pm when I set out for home, was very ill all night. Cyrus got up in the night to wait of me. a t Son Pollards, he is not wel.

Clear Part of the day. Son & Dagt Pollard and part of thier Child n here. Shee went on to See her Father. I wen t aft n Conducted by Lemuel Witham, a lad who is Com to work with Son Ephm. I returnd at Evn very unwell. Lemuel went to take Son Lambds hors and Sleigh to Jones s for Jona and him to Come up in but not finding them ready to Come returnd with it. they Came up on foot and Jon a Came here with ou t his hat. took him from his Supper, pusht him out adors, Drove him home to his hous Damning and pushing him down and Struck him. Shaw and Burr went on after to prevent his being deprived of life. I followed on falling as I went till meeting Dagt Lambar d was assisted by her. I reacht his hous, find him Cursing and Swearing he would go and giv him a Hard whiping. my Dag t Lambd desired Heman to go and Conducted him to Ephm. he wen t and tarried all night. Son Lambd brot me home in his Sleigh. O that the God of all Mercy would forgiv him this and all other misconduc t . at Shubl Pittss, feel very unwel and what a Scean had I to go a t Evng. may a Good God Support me. funeral mr James Hinkley of Hallowel, his Death was very Suden.

Clear. I have washt my kitchen and ironed and mended my husbands Cloaths, and workt on my Soap. Dagt Ballard took Tea here, Sally & Martha allso. mr Hussey and Gitchel were here. at home. A mr Thing Came for me but I did not go.
Clear. mrs Farewel went to mr Bennets, Cyrus to Carry his Fathers Cloaths. Dag t Ballar d and mrs Getchel took Tea here. mrs G. and her Son Sleep here. at home. hear Ephms Babe is no Better.
Clear part of y e day. mrs Farewel went to Son Ephms. I have been at home, done my hous work &C. at home.

Clear part of the day. mrs Warrin Calld here. I have been very ill till after n. Joanna Smith Came and help t me. I was so much better that I Eat some dinner. I have Drank gruel and took no medisin Since I was taken ill. at home, very unwel. Joanna Smith here.

Cloudy morn, warm day. Cyrus and I tarried at home. Jona, his wife and 2 youngis t Child n here to Tea. mrs Farewil returnd from Son Ephms, informs me the infant is very Sick again and y t her [daugt] Sally is unwel. I receivd a Letter from Bro r Elijah and wrote to him in return. at home. Lemuel here for Sauce. had Beens, Squash,Cucumbers & apples. he brot a Leller from Bro r Elijah of 7 th inst. I wrote answ r .
Clear. mrs Getchel wen t to Son Jonas. I went to Son Ephms, his Babe is very Sick. I tarry y s night. at Son Ephms.
Clear Excep t a Shower. it is our Communion. I was at meeting fore noon. tarried with Ephms Babe. mrs Farewel went home. at meeting & at Son Ephms.

Clear. I have been at home lill evning whin I went to See Jack Pierce who is Sick at my Sons. Lemuel Came [here] for Apples and [Soap]. at Son Jonas to See Jack Pierce. Funeral Cap t John Howard, & Capt Gages inft.

Clear. I was taken at y e 11 th hour with a most Excrutiating pain in my Breas t , took a fue drops of Campfr. Got Some Easier bu t had y e pain return a number of times in the Coars of y e day. Son Lambd here for me to go and See Thomas but I was so Sick I Could not go. at home, very Sick. Son Lamb here for me to go and See his Son Thomas.

Clear part of y e day. I have been at home, feel very unwel. mrs Farewel is much as Shee was. Sally been to mr Benets. Lemuel Came here, brot Some Beef & fish to mrs Farewel from Son Ephm. Dagt Ballard Sent me Some roast Veal. Bro r Barton Departed this life y s day, and James Snow in y e Coars of the night. at home, feel unwel. Doc t Barton Expird, James Snow also.

X. Birth friend Eastys 3 d Dag t . XX. Clear. I was Calld by friend Easty to go and See his wife who was in Labour. the Case was performd by the wid o Babcock Just before we arivd. I dres t the infan t and See to their being made Comfortable. this her 3 d Dagt & 4 th Child. mrs Farewel Seems more Comfortable. at friend Eastys. Birth 8th. recvd 6/ reward.

Clear part of the day. Ephms wife and I went to Son Jonas. mrs s Black & Kent there, Sally Farewel allso. I Came home, made Coffee. had Lefy Cowen, Dolly Thomas, Barny Lambd, Hannah & Sally Pollard to Partake with me. Ephms wife and Babe Sleep here. at Son Jonas. mrs Black [&] Kent here.

Clear part of y e day. mrs Farewel returnd from Son [Ephms] and went up as far as mr Edsons. I have been at home. Nicholas Shaw helpt Cyrus gather Corn. Hannah B. here for fever fue for Jack Pierce, he is very unwel. Martha Some Better. at home. Funeral Cap t John Howard.

Clear. mr Lambd was Calld to See mr Swanton who had a fitt a t 3h morn. I went there y s morn, he was better and gone to Read field. Dagt Pollard left her sister and wen t to Son Ephms forn. mrs Capin went home. I walkt from the bridg, Calld at Crosbys and his fathers Stors. at mr Carters, Danys, Fletchers and mr Andrus & Son Jonas. [I returnd from Son Lambds]. receivd 3/ of mrs Swanton, an old Deb t of mrs Capin 1/6.
Clear. I went to See Jack Peirce before Sun rise, find him very unwel. I have Cutt Pumkin to drie and done my hous work and Some in my Gard n . a t Son Jonas y s morn.
Clear. I have gather d Beens, done hous work, was informd my husband was wel y e 19 th inst. at home. heard my husband was wel 19th inst.
Clear and Cool wind. I have workt ou t doors and help t do y e washing. am very unwel a t night with a Severe pain in my left legg, applyd Burdock leavs. at home.

Clear. I have houghd Cabbages, Potatoes and done work in the hous. Cut Catnip &C. Cyrus Conducted mrs Farewel over the river. Sally Town & Wil m Sof y , Carotine Gill here, took Tea. at home. mr Gills Child n here.

Clear and moderate. Nabby Hatch here on a visit. Dagt Ballard to Bake. I gave y e former _ Bs Apples for her marm. I went after Sun Sett to See Jack Peirce, find him very weak. he has had Doct Howard to See him who Bled and gave an Emettic. he Seems very feeble. Heman Burr Sup t here and went to help take Care of him. Cyrus is gone to husk at mr [Andrus]. I was Calld in the night to EbenZ Trasks wife who was in Labour. his Oldes t Son is Sick. my hors thrue me as I wen t up. at Son Jonas. Nabby Hatch here & Dind.
rainy. I am Some Easier, am with my Childn. Thomas is very ill. mr Gill wattct. they Calld me up thinking he was Expiring bu t he revived. at my Son Lambd, Thomas no better.
Cloudy, Some Snow. I have been at home. a t home.
Clear. I have been a t home, helpt do y e hous work and knit. we receivd a Letter from Son Cyrus of 25 inst, he was then well. Joanna washt. at home, recd a line from Cyrus of 25 inst.

Clear. I have gathered Chips S. side of my Gardin, broke the old logg fence to pieces and kep t fire to do my work. Mercy here to Bake for my Sons famely. Shee spun thread, Doubled and twisted it. I feel very much fatagued with the wk I have done. a t home. 4 of [my] Sons Child n Dine here.
raind. I have been at home kniting. Joanna did hous work and wen t to my Sons to lwist Yarn on my wheal. at home.

Clear foren, Cloudy aftern. I have Bakt flour Bread, Jo a Brown and Brewd and went to the settlement, and got her a pair Shoes a t Hamlins. Lathrop had a Call to the Settlement, Ephm went down. Lydia Hallowell took Tea here. Allin & Thomas & William Sup t and Sleep here. at home. allin and Thom s Lambd Sleep here.
Cloudy, raind Some. I have been at home. Joanna went to Leu t Wil m Stones, he Sent me 6/ in part of my Due. at home. Leut W m Stone Crd t by Cash 6/ [ rewd ].

Clear, a warm Sun, W wind, Cool at Evng. I did my hous work. Son Town left here after Breakfas t . I wen t aftern to See mrs s Farewel, the first time I have been in her house Since Shee lived in it. a t mrs Farewels. Cyrus to Coart.
raind Some. I have workt in my Gardin. Betsy washt the rooms. Cyrus went and Carried Greens to mrss Pitts. I was very Severly Exercised with my pain, went to bed Early. at home, very ill at Evn g .

Clear. I have been geting wood and fatagued much to do it. I broke old loggs with an Old hough and brot in the pieces in a baskett, and O how fatagued I was. Doct Howard Calld to See mrs Farewel. Sally was at Son Jonas on a visit. Shee [informd] me at Evng that my Son was Delermennd to Come in to this hous within a fortnit and that I might tarrie here [or] go and liv in their hous and See how good it was to bring water from this wel. O thou Paren t of y e universe, Cutt Short thine aflictions and Sufer me thine unworthy hand maid to See Some Comfort before I go hence. at home, falagueing very much. I began to wash after 9 h Evng and washt my Cloaths in 2 waters.
Clear. at home. Jonas Child n here. at home.
Clear. I have been at home, am informd Barny Lambar d fel in to y e wel 13 th ins t but was taken ou t and had receivd but little injury. I wish to Bless God for his preserving Mercy. a t home.
Clear. I help t do my work & went to Lecter. a t meeting.
Clear. I workt a little in my Gardin and washt wool & knit Some. Dag t Ballard & Sally Pierce here to Tea. mr Partridg here for the Plan of the Jail yard. Old Lady Cypher here for Seeds. at home.

Clear. I have work t in my Gardin, Sett 24 plants, transplantd W Squash & Cucumbers. mrs Stone Calld to See me. mr Lambard and Waters wen t to Son Pollards, Jona & wife allso. my Nepheu Sleeps here. at home. mr Waters Sleeps here.
Clear. I have Cleand my Buttery. Lem l had Soap here. mr Puringtns Mother Sleeps here. Shee is on her way from Varsalbor o home. at home.
Clear. I have been feeble bu t had to do my work and wash. I went to Son Jonas [and] Sett up with Pally. Jo a Smith Sett with me. Old mrs s Dunfy Sleeps there. at Son Jonas and watcht.
Clear. I have done my washing. old mrs Mosier Came here a t Evn g and Sleeps here. I feel fatagued. mrs Bolton dind here. a t home. mrs Farewel to Varsalborough.

Clear and Pleas t Sun. the paths hard frosen y s morn. Cyrus & Ephm Sett out at 2 h morn for LincolnVill to Georg Ulmers Esq r . I have been very unwell. [Polly] Brewd and did the most of my work. Shaw & Burr got up all [the] wood. at home. Cyrus Sett ou t for [Lincolnvill] at 2h morn.

Clear. I have been Cleaning the Buttery, finisht my Soap. Sowd Some peas South of y e hous, dug Chips in the door y d &C. mrs Farewel Calld here. Lemuel is 15 years old y s day. Joanna Cleand hous. Cyrus & Nicholas Shaw Planted Potatoes & Yoaked the hoggs. at home. mrs Farewel Calld here.

Clear and warm. Isaac Waters Came here foren, he and I [Dind] at Son Jonas. he Sleeps here, mr Purington and his wife allso. I have workt some in my Gardin and done my hous work. at home. [hav] my Sons have Company aftern.

Clear. I have done various kinds of work. Old Lady Arnold left here foren n . Sally & Belsy Church Calld in here. Nancy Titcomb & Parthena Pitts here to Ea t Curents. at home. Lathrop & Burr here. Ephm took Supperhere. X
Clear. I have wed my Nusery. Betsy Church did my washing and ironing. Cyrus Bro t 9_ lb flower from Ephm. a t home, unwel but workt.
Cloudy & Showers. I wen t to Son Ephms after I had done my morning work, find the Babe very unwell; tarrie y s night. at Son Ephms.
Clear. mr Purington & wife left here after Breakfast, mr Waters allso. Cyrus to meeting. Heman took Supper here. at home, Cookt a legg of pork.

Clear morn, Cloudy aftern, rain at night. Heman took Tea here, Dagt Ballard, W m , Martha, and Sally Pierce allso. Sally Polld been to meeting. a t home. Dag t Bal d here after noon. I Churnd 4 lb Butter.
Some rain. I was very unwel with a relax. Dagt Ballard and Dagts here just at Evng. Allin Lambd had a Box Curents, Heman Some hops. at home, Cyrus to Meeting.
Clear. I wen t to Son Ephms to See the Babe, find it very unwell. I tarried all [night], administred Clisters but it had a restless night. at Son Ephms to See y e Babe.

Cloudy & Some rain. I was at my Sons till near Night when mr Gill Sent for me to See his wife who has been very Sick and is feeble yet. tarrie all night. Ephms Babe Seems Easier. [a t ] Ditoes and at mr Gills.
at my Sons till y e 6th when I went home to See to my

Clear part of y e day. I did part of my hous work. Son Lambd Came and informd me his [Child] was wors. I set ou t and went there, find him very ill. was up with him a number of times thro the night. Betsy Kumbal watcht. a t Son Lambds, Thomas very ill indead.

Clear. I have been at home, feel very feeble. mr Saml Pierce Calld to inform me of y e Death of Bro r Barton. may God be with his Berieved wife, Child n and other Connections, and may we all be ready allso. at home. Saml Pierce here.

Clear and Pleas t . I have done my hous work and Sheld some Corn. Son Lambd Calld here, he was going to Sydney. Dagt Ballard here to Bake. I Eat the last Bread I had for Breakfast and have Sustained without the rest of the day. Lefaett wrode here this day. Luther Pierce brot Some wood and Cut i t for me. James Savage Came here to See mrs s Farewel. at home.

Clear part of the day, Some Showers. Son Ephms wife and Babe went from here after Breakfast. I have Cleand my Sellar and done other [matters]. Betsy washt. Hannah & Sally Sleep here. Cyrus informd me y t mr Cottles younges t Child is interd y s day and 1 of mr Crosbys of Belgrade. at home. Son Ephms wife went home, Cyrus Conducted her. Deaths mr Cottles & Crosbys Childn.

Clear. I have been a t home. Son and Dagt Pollard and his Mother here y s aftern. Cyrus left here to go to tend mill for mr Pullin at Watervil. I wish him health and prosperety but, alas, how Shall I do without him. at home. Old mrs Pollard, Moses and his wife Calld here.
Clear. I have sorted apples and measured my Corn, had 15 Bushel Ears. at home.

Clear. I feel very unwel y s morn but have pickt Chips and done many other matters and knitt some. Dagt Ballard and Sally dind here, we had a Loin of roas t Veal. Ephm to work for mr Voce. my Husband has this day seen 79 revolutions of the Sun, he has ended this and began the 80 year of his age in Augusta jail. at home. Dagt Ballard Dind here. my husband has seen 79 years y s day.

Cloudy and a heavy Shower. I have pikt wool and Sitt plants. I went to my Sons to See Jack Pierce, he Seems very Sick. Betsy went and help t Bathe his feet and get him to Bed. Lydia Church here for Cherrys and Curents. a t my Sons. Lydia Church here.

Cloudy and Some rain. I am at Son Lambds, Thomas very ill. mrs Fletcher Came to Sett up with him, mrs Savage and I Sett allso. w thought him Expiring at midnight but he revivd a little altern d , again at 2h morn. a t Ditoes. the Child very ill. I sett up the most of y e night.
Snowd. I have finish t a pair mitts for Wil m Gill and help t do hous work. mrs Town here yett. at home.
Clear, a westerly wind. I have Dug ground and planted Poland Beens in my gardin. feel much fatagued. the Child n help t me Some. Allin Said he wisht to help me. at home, Planted Beans.
Clear. I have been at home, help t wash. Joanna Smith workt for me this day. mrs Dunfee & Dagt Ballard took Tea here. at home.

Clear and Shoury by turns. I went to Lecture. we had a Stranger performd. I was a t mr Pitts s , Shee is very unwel. a young man by y e name of Eaton Came here a t Evng, his business was with Betsy Church. a t Lecture & at mr Pitts s .

Clear part of y e day. I have been giting wood and finishing my wash that I began last night after 9h Evng. Son Jona s wife here to Spin thread. I Brot a Burthen of Bark after Sun Sett which took me 300 & 50 Steps. O thal I might be patient. a t home.
Clear and So Cold. at home. at home.
Cloudy. mr Ballard Ploughing. I have been at home, help t do my work. a t home.
Clear and warm. I have workt in my Gardin and in the hous and am much fatagued. the Lord only knows when I Shall be relivd. at home, workt in my Gardin & Planted [Beens].

Clear. I have done my hous work and attended to my plants. Covered and uncoverd them. done Some washing for my Nephew but what pain I have endurd in my left knee & legg. mr Waters Calld Son Jona & wife to See me. they went home [again]. at home, very ill at Evn g .
Clear. I have been at home. mrs Densmore went to her Sons and returnd here to Sleep, mrs Farewel Sleeps here allso. a t home.
Clear. I have done my hous work and ironed. Cap t Savages widdo Came to See me, tarries all night. mrs Dunfy Came and took Breakfast. a t Son Jonas ys morn.
Clear. I have done my hous work and ironed. mrs Coal Came here foren and dind here. mrs Cypher Calld aftern. Cyrus been to take his Fathers Cloaths to him. at home. mrs Coal Dind here.
raind. I am at Son Ephms. at my Sons.
Clear. I have felt very unwel but have had my work to do. Son Ephms wife here, took super. Jonas wife and part of her Child n here. Son Lambard been here. at home. my Son Cyrus to meeting.
Clear. I went to meeting. the Babe is no Better. Rachel Smiths nose bled the mos t of the night. I am at my Sons. at meeting and at Son Ephms.
Clear. Cyrus went to meeting. mr Purington & his mother Dind here. a t home. Leml Slep t here.
Cloudy morn, Clear aftern. mrs Savage went to Jonas foren. I drest to go to Meeting but Could not have the hors. I went to See Pally at Evng, find her very thirsty. a t Son Jonas.

Clear and Cool. I attended public worship. revd mr Cushman performd, he Discoursed from Mat h 5 C 5 vers foren n , aftern f m Math u 10th & 35 th . I was a t Son Ephms at intermition, they are wel. at mr Pitts s after Service, their John is unwel. Old Lady Cocks was there. I went to Son Jonas at Evng, Pally Seems more Composed than I have Seen her Since Shee has been Sick. at Meeting, Son Ephms & [Leut] Pitts s . mrs Cocks there. the fros t kild my Vines this night.

Clear part of the Day. Son Cyrus Came to Son Pollards. we Dind on a fine Turkey and he then Conducted me home. I find son Jonas famely had taken possesion of my hous. I was Calld to [se] Georg Boltons infant, it has a very Soar head. at son Pollard s & Georg Boltons.

Clear Part of the day. I have houghd Cabbages & Cucumbers, done my hous work; feel fatagued. I Sent a Branch of a Curent Bush to my Husband, gave one to Son Ephm. they were very full of frute. mrs Farewel and Smith & her Dagt Lucy here. at home, houghd Plants. Cyrus been to the Settlement.
Showers. mrs Farewel Came and took Tea with me. I have felt very feeble but did my work. with Sallys help I Churnd 3_ lb Butter. a t home. mrs Farewel here.

Clear. at my Sons. gave the Babe Rheubarb, it Seems a little Easier. I went to Ephms New hous and to mr Partridges. Sent a Letter to Bro r Elijah, wrote and Enclosd my of y e [19 th ]. [at Ditoes]. wrote again to my Bror, Sent it by a mr Brigg.

Clear. I left mr Gills after Breakfast, Calld at mr Craggs & Pitts s . reacht my Sons a t 12 [o] Clock. a t _ past was Calld from there to Belgrade to Sherebiah Clearks. reacht there at 3h pm, find his wife in Labour. Shee Linguered thro the night. at Belgrade.
hous, find Patty Doore very Sick. a t my sons Jonas.

A rainy day, high wind at night. I had the pain return and all most dispared of life. Doc t Man was Calld in the night to See me. mrs Savage Came there in the night by reason of the wind being So high. Shee dare not tarry in her own hous. a t Ditoes, very Sick, the Child is very ill allso.

Cloudy, raind at night. Dagt Ballard and mrs s Pierce made us a visit y s aftern. I have finisht Sorting our Corn and done [my] hous work. Son Lamb d here, he made me a prest of _ gl n Spirit. I have lost a portion of y e Seat of life this Evng. may God prepare me for his Divine will and giv me Composure of mind in all my tryals and may I be able to Say in Sincerity thy will be done. at home. Son Lambd, Dagt Ballard & mrs Pierce here.
Clear. I have been at home, sorted apples. Doct Howard here to See mrs Farewel, left her Senna and Bitters. Sally washt her floors. at home.
Clear and Cold. I have been at home. my Eyes are very soar. Jona, his wife, Heman & Lemuel and mrs Farewel Supt with me. at home.

Clear. I have done my hous wk and other matters. went to Son Jonas at Evng, find Jack Pierce and L e faett Ballard Sick. Doc t Howard here to see mrs [Farewel, left her phisec. it operated 10 times. I set with her till 10h Evng. a t son Jonas a t Evng.

Birth Son Lambards 4th Son. Clear. I have washt. Sally removd into my North room. Doct Cony to See her. I was Calld at Evn to Dag t Lambard, Shee was Safe Deld at 11h Evn of her 4 th son & 6 th Child. it w d 12_ lb . Shee is Cleverly. at Son Lambd. Birth 9 th .
Clear and Cold. mr Thomson brot me wood, _ Cord & Cut it and I brot it into y e hous. mrs Farewel has been to mr Pains, Shee walkt. at home.
Clear. I have been at home, workt in my gardin and knit and Bakt. Joanna has help t do hous work, irond & mend hoes. Shee help t me Clean the Sellar. at home.

Clear. Thomas Expired a t 5 h and 20m y s morn. mrs Savage and Fletcher put his Grave Cloaths on and tarried till after Breakfast. Dagt Polly, mrs Gill, Betsy [Kumbal] help t them Sew. I have been very feeble but am there. may God Sanctify this Bereevment to us all. at Detoes. Thomas Expired at 5h 20m Morn.
Clear. I workt in the door yd foren n , did my ironing aftern. Sally Farewel Calld here. I have felt very feeble y s day. a t home.

Clear. I have workt in my gardin. mrss Church, Pheebe and Dag t Ballard & 3 Childn here to Tea. Rhod, Hannah & Dolly Sleep here. the former is 10 years Old this day. at home, had Company aftern. workt in Gardin foren.
Snowd. I have had to go out to feed my Swine, milk my Cow, get in the wood, &C, A mr Spaldin who livs with Son Lambd Calld in and got Stakes out of y e snow for me to keep a fire y s Day. at home.
Clear and warm for y e Season. I have wash t , ironed and pik t up w d . at home.
