Shoury. Cyrus and Ep hm to meeting. I have sufered much with faintness this day. John Jones had a Bill for Prayers on the Death of his Brother. a t home, feel very feeble.
Clear but Cold and very bad walking. mr Ballard and Lemuel to meeting. at Ditoes.
Clear. I am at my Sons, the Babe is much the Same. the Scurf Comes of its mouth Some. mrs Farewel and Sally there. at my Sons, the Babe is no better.
Clear. I have Scolt the Bedroom and Bed Stead to kill Buggs, and done other matters. mrs Densmore to her Sons after breakfast. a t home. Heman Sleeps here.
Clear part of y e day, raind aftern & Evng. I have done my hous w k and Some things in y e Gardin. gathered ripe Scarlit Beens. had Squash, Shell & Stringd Beens and pork for Diner. at home.

Clear. I have gatherd my hops and part of my Beens, pulld my Cucumbers and pickt them of y e vines. wen t to my Sons to See Patty, Shee Seems to be mending; has her reason better. Cyrus Sett out aftern with my wool. a t my Sons, and workt in my gard n .Cyrus gone with roals to mrs Coal to be Spun.
A Snow Storm. Son Pollard Calld here, Says his wife is Cleaverly. Cyrus went to see his father, finds him Better than he has been. a t home.
Clear. Lefaett Conducted me to son Ephms, the Jail & to Son Lambds. mrs Coner at y e latters. a t sons Eph ms and Lambds.
A Severe Snow Storm. I have kep t my bed y e most of this day, but thro Gods goodnes s Some Easier this aftern. have taken a little gruel with a Small piec of Cracker. at home, very unwel.

Clear. I have Bakt flour Bread and Brown, Cherry & Curen t tarts. mrs Pitts made me a visi t , John with her. Dagt Ballard, mrs Getchel and Betsy Andrus took Tea with us. a t home, had Company. H. & S. P. & H. B. Sleep here.
Showers with thunder. I have been a t home, done my work with Sallys help. Cyrus brot 1 Bushl indien Meal home which mr Gill Sen t me. he got 1 Peck rie of mr Mosier. a t home.

Cloudy morn, Clear aftern. mrs Farewel went down on business about the road being taken from her. I have washt. Dagt Ballard and mrs [Trask] here. Son Town Supt and Sleeps here. at home, did my washing. Son Town Sleeps here.

X. Birth Sherebiah Clearks 6 th Child & 4 th Daug t . XX. Clear. mrs Cleark Deld at 8h morn of her 6th Child & 4th Dagt. a fine Child and is as wel as Could be Expected. I went to mr Bisbys, Hankseys and Sett out home. Calld at S. Boltons, Dind at Son Pollards, S. Boltons and Brackets. reach t home before sun Sett. Lemuel Sleeps here, Says the babe is no better. at mr Clearks. Birth 6th. recvd 9/ as a Compensation.
with my Childn. the Babe Expired at mid night.

rainy. I have had to go thro the wet to feed my hoggs, milk my Cow and pique my wood from the old loggs in y e Gardin, and have Sorted part of my apples and Sheld some Corn, part wash t my room &C, &C. at home. mrs Farewel is much as Shee has been.

Clear and Cold. I went to Son Jonas to git him to Cutt me Some wood. Luther Peirce Came and did it for me. I have Sorted apples and Cutt some, and done my ironing &C. Dagt Ballard went to help Betsy Andrews quilt. Le faett wrode to the Settlement. at home Son Jonas to gi t Some of them to Cut me wood.

Clear and Cold. this is one year Since my husband was taken from me and Carried to Jail. A Gloomy year it has been to me. mrs Smith here at Evn g about a Bag which I Challing as my own. Shee said in hearing of mrs Farewe l and Jona Ballard [Jun r ] that Shee had taken out a mark of Blue yarn. mrs Farewel, Dagt Ballard and Lemuel took Super with me. a t home. Tymothy Woodward Paid mrs Farewel21 D 15 Cents and took her receipt. I witnesedit. Shee is to Sent his note to him when Shee goes to Son Ephms.

rainy. I have done some washing and Sorted part of my Corn and Cleand y e Sellar. mrs Farewel remains very feeble. Jack Ballard Came and Cutt wood for us. he Brot me 2 turns of water. a t home. Capt Swanton of Bath Expiredy s day.
Clear. Son Lamb d Conducted the women home and went for mrs Conry to Nurs, arivd with her at 3h y s morn. a t Ditoes.
Clear. mrs Farewel and I wash t . mrs Nason Calld here. I Bakt me Indien Cake, the first Bread I have had in my hous this weak. a t home. mrs Nason here.
Clear. I have helpt Joanna Clean my Chambers and Schold Cyruss Bedstead. Shee left me y s aftern. at home. Joanna went home.

Clear. I tarried till y e 11 th H and Sett ou t for home. Calld at Doc t Conys to See Lynda Gitchel who is very Sick there. I Calld at Son Jonas to See Jack Pierce, he is thought to be Some better. Dagt Pollard Calld and took Tea and then wen t on to Son Lambards. Heman Bur wen t with her. at Ditoes, Doc t Conys & Son Jonas.

Cloudy. the famely that Slept here Sett out at noon. son Lambd went to Hallowell, brot Dolly from Son Ephms. Sist Moore and mrs Johnston Calld here. I slipt at y e door and lambd my Self, Son Lambd Calld doct Winship to See me. at Ditoes.

Clear. Cyrus and I attended a t the intermen t of Tho s Lambard. Revd mr Parker made y e prauer. mr Capin & wife, Pollard and wife, Sons Jona & Ephm & wives, mr Gill and his proseeded as mourners. we wrode in Shais. at the Funeral of Tho s Lambd. [recd] [ ] Letter of Augs t [ ] fm Sist Waters.
Cleare. I have been at home. Bror Lambd here. mrs Farewel walkt to mr Benets. at home.
Clear. the Doct wen t home, mr Lambd and Allin to meeting. wido Savage, Daniel & wife, mr Dingly & his, here to See me. Son Ephm Came a t intermition. at Ditoes, very Lambe.

Clear. I have workt in my Gardin, transplanted Cucumbers &C. done my hous work. have felt better than I did y e 2 days past. Cyrus down to the Settlement, Brot me 2 quarts Ginn which mr Gill Sent to me. a t home. Planted potatoes South Side of y e Gardin.
Clear part of ye Day. I am at my Sons. at Ditoes.
Clear. I have done my washing. Jack Pierce was brot here Sick, Son Jona is Sick allso. at home.

Clear and very pleast. Saml Babcocks wife and Child and his Sis tr Mersy here and took Tea, mrs s Pierce allso. I have knit on my husbands Stockin. Jonas Childn gone to [ ] School. at home. mrs Babcock here.
Clear. I left my Sons at 10h morn, the Babe Seemd very Sick. I left her marm there. Son Jonas wife went down. I have felt almos t Sick Since I Came home. at Deloes, and returnd home quite fatagued.
Clear and warm. Heman Slep t . I have been Cleaning hous and went to Son Jonas to Tea, mrs Farewel with me. Shee informs me y t Shee has los t her Swine. at son Jonas. mrs Farewel Sleeps here.

rainy part of the day. I am told y t Patty is much Better, am glad it it [sic] is so. I have made 13 [Doz n ] Candles, Sent 1 DZ n to Son Jonas to replace those I have borrowed there. Prudance [Snow] Came here to Bake for my Son Jona. Cyrus went to Son Ephms to Carry Plumbs and Apples for his Father and Polly. at home. mrs Farewel to Benets & my Sons.
Clear. I have workt in my gardin, got in the last of my Beens. a t home.

Snowd. I have been at home, washt my room, feel very unwel. Jonas wife Came in to my room at Evng, gave me a Sharp reproof for doing my work. Shee is an inconsidarate or very impudent woman to treat me as Shee does. Cyrus been to Coart. a t home.
Clear. I am at son Lambds, he and wife to Hallowell. a t son Lambds.

the Slorm Continues. I have been So wel y s day that I have partly mended a Coat for my poor Confined Husband who is Sufering for want of it. Dagt Lambard mad him a presen t y e 26 th ins t of a pair of Small Cloaths. at home. thro gh God I am much better y s Day.

Clear. Son Town left here after Breakfas t . he has Seen 50 years this day. I have been doing hous work and went to my Sons to See the girl who is unwel. my Daugt absent. a t my sons to See Pally Doore.
Clear part of y e day, raind at 10h Evn. I have harvested Beens and done other matters in my Gardin. hear the Babe is no better. at home.

Clear part of y e day. mrs Farewel Dind with me and left here and went to Son Ephms. I finisht my hoes and washt some things. Polly Goodin Came here, informd that her Father, mrs Crosby, Barsheba Moore, Gorum Dummer were Dead, and a number of others. at home. mrs Farewel left here. Deaths.
Clear. I have been at Son Lambds. at son Lambds.
Clear part of y e Day. I pu t my Cloaths ou t to drie. 2 mrs Clearks Calld here. mrs Farewell had a fitt of feaver at night. Lem l brot her some things. at home. mrs Farewl is very unwel yet.
Clear. my Dag t is Cleverly. a t Ditos.
Cloudy all day, haild & snowd at night. I have been mending my Cloaths. mrs Farewel up to W m Stones. at home, and Corked my Seller with hay.
Clear and very Pleas t . mrs Pierce Dind. mr Crosby, his wife, mrs Cleark and her Childn took Tea here. I have ironed and ript an Old garnent. at home. Compy here.
Cloudy. I have again Bank t my hous with Snow for y e 3 d time this winter. I feel almos t Sick. at home.
Cloudy and Colder. Jon a , his wife and Wil m went to son Pollards. I have had the head aik. my husband Sent me 1 q t Gin, [] 2 lb Butter. at [home]. Jona [&] wife to Pollards.

Clear. I have been at home. Sally Farewel Came here, informs that Son Eph ms wife is very unwel and that Lemuel went away this morning between Day & Sun rise, unbeknowen to any of the family. a t home. Sally Farewel here.

Clear. mr Lambd was Calld to See mr Swanton who had a fitt a t 3h morn. I went there y s morn, he was better and gone to Read field. Dagt Pollard left her sister and wen t to Son Ephms forn. mrs Capin went home. I walkt from the bridg, Calld at Crosbys and his fathers Stors. at mr Carters, Danys, Fletchers and mr Andrus & Son Jonas. [I returnd from Son Lambds]. receivd 3/ of mrs Swanton, an old Deb t of mrs Capin 1/6.
raind. I have been at home. mrs s Farewel Spun Some. a t home.
Snowd. I am not able to walk. knit a little. a t Diloes.

Clear and very pleast. mrs Farewel spent y s Day and night, it was Town meeting. Son Ephms wife wrode here on Son Lamb ds hors. Shee Dind and took Tea with us. I am happy to See her So much better as to Come here. at home. Son Ephms wife here. Son Jona late home.
Clear. I Came from my Sons after noon, got home about Sun Sett. at Ditoes & mr Pitts s .

Clear. I have began a Stockin for my Dagt Lambd and done other matters. we are informd that the wife of Geo Hodgskin Departed this life this morn abou t 5 O Clock after an illness of 4 years. at home. Death mrs Hodgskens, Varsalboro.
Clear morn, Cloudy aftern n . I have been kniting on my husbands Stockin. Hannah, Sally & Ephm to school, and Jack to y e Gramer School. at home.
Clear and very pleas t foren n . mrs s Farewel left here at y e 11th hour. mrs s Pierce here to Bake, Shee Dind here. I do not feel So well as I could wish. at home. mrs Farewel went from here.
Clear. Sally Church washt. Dagt Ballard Dind here. Sally requests /9 d for her work. I have not Paid her. at home, feel very feeble.
rainy. I have Cleand my Sellar and done my hous work & wen t to See Pally. find her in a greatir Delirium than I have ever Seen her [before]. a t my Sons Jonas. saw him in A [Great Patian her boys.]
Clear. I have been at Son Jonas to See Martha. Shee is unwell, has a disentary. Patty Dore is Some better. Sally farewel Se t ou t for Varsalboro. a t Son Jonas.

Clear and pleast. I have done my washing and had to receiv more of Jonas wives inpuden t Language. I wish her to Show more maners and discretion or hold her peace for y e future. a t home. Cyrus been to Coart.
Snowd. at Detoes. they had a great deal of Comp y . my Dagt and mrs Coner washt. a t Detoes.
Clear and pleast. I have mended a Coat for my Husband, finish t Cuting and Stueing my Apples. have one of my Stone Potts full. At home, Acadamy [at] Hallowell Burnt.

Clear foren day. I have been very unwel. mrs s Pierce Dind here. mr Wiman Brot my Tub which he has Sett up, hoop t and put a new Bottom in [ ] he had of me for doing i t 1 B potaloes. at home, very unwel.

Clear and pleast morn, raind aftern. I have not been So wel as I could wish but have removd part of my potatoes. mrs s Pierce Dind here, Shee has washt. it is Fas t Day. John Pierce & J. Ballard have been Guning foren, to meeting aftern. they could not giv me y e text. at home. it is Fast day. mrs Pierce here.
Clear and warm. I did my hous work and went to Lecter and to See Son Ephms Babe. find it is no better. hear mrs Gill is very low yet. a t Lecter & at Son Ephms.

Clear. Lemuel Came for me to to to my sons again. I find them [mourning] the loss of their dear Babe. may God Sancktify this berievement to them and to us all. mr Frosts Babe is very Sick again. at my son Ephms, the Babe 12 weaks lacking 5 hours.
A Severe Snow Storm. I have Sufered for fire but must bear it. at home.
Clear. Le faett Came and Conducted me home. Son Town and wife here. I find the Child n unwel. a t Ditoes and at home.
Clear and Pleast. I have washt my Cloaths & floor and Chamber Stairs. I have been drinking a beer made of hops and Balm Gilliad. at home.
Clear. Sally washt, Son Ephm and wife here. my husband Sent me 1 q t Ginn, 1 lb Sugar & _ lb Shushon Tea. son Jona brot me 1 qt Brandy. at home. Son Ephm & wife here.
Clear. I kni t Some and tryed hoggs Lar d . a t Ditos.
Cloudy. mrs Pierce Sent for me to See Henry. mr Trask, Son Jona & Townsend and wives took Tea there. Trask & wife Sleep here. Lemuel here, had 2 B sl potatoes. at mr Pierces.

the Sun Shone Early y s morn, Clouded Soon and began to snow. mr Pierce Dind here. I have knit some. I have receivd of Jason Pierce 2 q ts molases, 2 lb Sugar and _ lb Tea which Cost 5:6. he had 1 Bushl Polatoes. at home.
Clear. Dag t Lambd had an ill turn. we gave her feaver fue and Shee is better. at Dito.
Clear. Dagt Lambd Sent for me to go there, I went. Son Ephm & wife there a t Evng. a Suden Death. at Son Lambds, then Cyrus s .
Clear. those mentioned above Dind here this day and went on for their homes. Aaron Foster left here and went to Saunders. at home. mrs Cleark Expired last night.
Clear. I have been at home. no one of the famely attended Divine Service. mrs Pierce been to mr Babcocks, finds them Some more Comfortable than they have been. at home.
Clear and Cold. I have been very unwel this day. mrs Farewel to Son Jonas. a t home.
Cloudy. I have been mending A Coat for my Husband. Jona is Gone to Town meeting. his wife went to Jasons, 2 of his Childn scolt. at home. mrs Piercess Childn Scolt.
Clear till Evng. I have washt a fue things and ironed them. I do no t feel so wel as I could wish y s Evng. at home. we hear that mrs Babcock is very Sick.

Birth Ant y Brackets 5 th Son. Cloudy. I was Calld y s aftern by mr A. Bracket to go and See his wife. Shee was Safe Deld 5 h pm of her 5 th Son and 6th Child. I tarried all night, mrs Springer allso. Polly Bolton there to Nurs her aunt. at Ant y Brackets. Birth 3 d . funeral Capt Jas n Conys infant.
Clear. Son Lambd Came for me and I went home with him. at Son Lambds.
Clear and Cold. I am at Son Lambds, have bore Some of my wait on my lambe foot. a t Ditoes.

Clear part of ye Day. Son Jona Came here this morn and treated me very unbecomingly indead. O that God would Chang his Stuborn heart and Cause him to behave in a Cristion like maner to Parents and all others. I Came home on Monday and past the above Sien yesterday. I have brot wood from the old fence above here to boil potatoes for Son Jonas Swine. he has 8 in my hogs Sty. at home. Seeing Sorrow, it was yesterday this Sien Past.
Clear. I have finisht a Slockin which I began yesterday. Son Jona is So much better he wen t to the Settlement. Jack Pierce Some better. at home.

Clear and very pleast. I have finisht a Stockin for my husband and began another. Dagt Lambd Sent for me to go and See her bu t I felt fatagued by bringing Some water and doing other matters and did not go. Will m has one of his Swets this night, we put him in my bed. at home. Dagt Ballard to mr Bonds.
Clear and pleast. I have been at home, knit Some and did other matters. put up gardin Seeds for Sons Town and Lambd. mrs Pierce took Tea here. at home. mrs Pierce here.
Clear. mr Benat Brot mrss Farewels furneture here and Shee Came here to reside. a t home. mrs Farw l Came here to reside [fr] y e present.

Clear. the wife of S. Babcock y e 3 d here. Shee gave me a piece of Chees, I [gav e ] her [Sage]. at home. mrs babcock here [28] [6] Clear part of y e day. I have wash t & done hous wk. mrs [Farewel] went to Benets and took her [ ] Sent it to her Dagt Polly [by Lemuel]. at home.
A very rainy day. I have irond and done other matters. Jonas wife made Soap. Shee has not been so noisy as Shee was two days past. Cyrus went down to Coart. a t home.
Clear. Son & Dagt Lambd to mr Gills. a t Ditoes .

Clear and very pleas t . I have been mending a waist Coat for my Husband. mrs Pierce took Tea with Jonas wife, I partook with them. Lefaett prickt his knee with the Goards. Jack has the head Aick when he Came f m School. at home. Hallowell Acadamy burnt yesterdy.

Clear Except Some Showers. I have done Some washing and Nurs t the Babe. Martha past 3 worms. Shee has been unwel all day. mrs Pierce and Child Dind and took Tea here. mrs Wiman made [us] a visit. at home. mrs Wiman here.
Clear and very warm. mr Stone Came to See my Childn. at Ditoes.
Cloudy and Cold. I have done a little washing, melted snow and brot 2 pails water f m y e wel. at home. Lemuel Sleeps here.

Cloudy and moderate. Son Town and wife and mrs Pierce & 3 Childn Dind here. Son Jona and wife went to mr Gills with Son Town. Aaron and John Pierce Came home at 10h Evn. Jona & wife at 11 h 30 m . Saml Braly Sleeps here. Le faett, Hannah, Sally, W m & Martha are all unwell. at home. Son Town went f m here to mrGills.

Clear and very warm. Thee Remains of Son Ephms infant were interd. Revd mr Parker made the prayer. I left them and Came home about Sun Sett, wint to Jonas and help t take Care of Patty thro the nigh t . hir Father sett up with me. at the Funeral of son Ephms infant.
Clear and pleast day, Cloudy at Evng. the Childn are unwel yet. Jason Pierce & wife gone to Saml Badcocks. a t home.
Cloudy. I attended public worship. Revd mr Parker performd. mr Ballard and I went to mr Thwings at intermition. I went to Son Ephms at night, Sleep there. at Ditoes, meeting & Son Ephms.
Clear. mrs Conry wash t . Shee was Calld by Wilm Stickney to Nurs his wife. Polly Allin Came at Evn. a t Ditoes. mrs Conry [went] away.

Clear and pleast. Son Lambd and wife to mr Craggs. I nurs t Wil m , he had one Crying turn. they returnd at 10h Evng. the remains of a mrs Fletcher were Conducted from mr Smylies to Belgrade. Shee Expired in her Chair yesterday morning. a t Ditoes. Son Cyrus left mr Lambds after Breakft.

Clear and Cloudy alternately. we had Some Thunder and a light Shower. A mr Smith of Faett Came aftr mr Ballards Compas. I Sent his Coat which I have mended by him. Isaac Robinson and Asa Peirs Sleep here. I have done my washing, am told y t y e Remains of mrs s Cleark are inter d a t 1h Pm y s aftern. at home. funeral of mrs Cleark.

Clear and windy. I have work t in y e Door yard, wed part of my Curent Bushes and Put doore manure about them. A Lad by who lived with mr Crage, by the name of Abr m Durfy was Drownd near y e Kenebeck Bridg, 4 men at Conie falls yesterday and 4 a t or near New Meddows lately. a t home. hear of a number of persons being Drowned lately.
Clear. Lemuel here, informd me my husband had lambd his foot. I killd 3 hens y s Evng. a t home.
Clear Part of ye Day. I have finisht mending A Coat for my husband. Jon a Ballard brot y e news of y e Death of y e widdo Hewens. shee Expired at 4h Pm. at home. mrs Hewin Expired at 4h Pm.

Cloudy and moderate. I have not been very well, done but little work. Luke Barton and Hannah Trask Sleep here. EbenZ T. Sup t here, he Sleeps at Jason Pierces. mrs Pierce Dind here. we hear mrs Babcock is Better. at home. Luke Barton here.
raind all day. I returnd from mr Brackets, left his wife and infant as wel as Could be Expected. Dag t Ballard went to mr Pierces. a t Ditoes.
Clear. I went from Son Lambd s to Son Ephms, then Came home and returnd to Lambds. mrs Savage there. at Ditoes & at son Ephms.
Clear. Doc t Wenship Came and Sett a Broken Bone in my foot and I walkt some abou t house. Son an Dagt Pollard Came here. a t Detoes. had a bone Sett in my foot.
Clear. I have washt and brot Burthens of wood for to Burn, feel fatagued. a t home.

Clear morn, Cloudy aftern, Snowd at Evn g . Aaron & L e faett gone to haull Shingles. I have Bak t brown Bread, 30 lb indien & rie meal and knit on Dagt L s Stockin. Son Jona is gone to Hallowell. at home. funeral of mrs Hodskin
Cloudy. Dagt Lambd Sent for me and I went, find Sister Barton there. Son Town & wife Came. at Son Lambds.
Clear and Pleast but windy. I have Done Part of my washing. mrs s Cleark & mrs s Pierce Dind here. at home. mrs Cleark & Pierce here.
Clear. I have been at home. Cyrus down in town. at home.
Cloudy part of y e Day. a mrs Emerson from [Dery] field had fitts here this night. Doc t Winship was Calld to her asistance. we were up with her y e most of y e night. a t Dito .

Clear and pleas t part of y s day, Snowd a t Evng. Jonas wife, Ephm, W m & Martha Sett out for Saml Babcocks a t 2h Pm. I have finisht mend my Husbands Garments. I hear y t mr Waid is not like to liv long. a t home. mr Ben n Waid Expired y s night.

Clear part of ye day, raind aftern. I have Nurst Some, workt Some in y e door yard, Cleand the Chambers and washt Some. it is 9 weaks and 4 days Since I Saw my husband, but hear he is wel for which I w d Bless God. a t home, had one of my [weak] turns.
Clear. I have been at Ephms, went to the Jail and Slept with my Husband. at Ephms & y e Jail.
Clear and very Cold. I have been at home. I Slept in my Cloaths y s n t . I was oblidged to Sleep in my Cloaths or froas, unhappy Mother I am. a t home.
Clear. I was a t meeting. Revd mr Parker performd. a t meeting.

Clear till nigh t when we had a heavy shour. the men Cleand our wel. I have been takeing Care of things in my Gardin and wen t and help t Pally out of bed and driss t her Blisters &C. a t son Jonas. Patty is very Sick.
Cloudy and moderate, Snowd a t Evng. I have been at home, finisht [arons] mitt and began one for my self. at home.
raind foren. I wen t to Son Lambds aftern, find my Dagt
Clear and Sumer like. I have been at home. mr Ballard bot 2 quarts vinager. we had pork & Greens for Dinner. Dagt Ballard Dind with us. we took Tea with her. at home.
Clear. my Dagt was very ill at night. we were up with her the most of the night. I feel feeble. at [Ditoes], my Dagt unwel.

Clear. Dagt Lambd went to mr Gills. my Son Conducted me home. my Dagt gave me 2 lb Butter, find that Son Cyrus brot me 22 lb flower. Wil m is Better. Son Ephm here for a plan of Hamden. at Ditoes, Genl Sewals & at home.

Cloudy part of the day and warm. I have finisht mending a wais t coat for Son Cyrus and finisht my mitts. A man Came here to Botton Chairs fo r Jon a , he Did 4 in y e whole. at home. little Ep hm [fel] into ye river.

Clear. Oliver Hall workt for Son Jon a . mrs Gilber d & Betsy Andrus with their Babes here to Tea. 2 Ladys Calld in to See mrs Gilb d . mr Patridg here to See my Son. O that he would make A Settlement with his Dear Father with out A Law Sute. the Boys have been to Training. at home. mr Patridg here on business with Son Jon a .
Clear part of y e Day. mr Ballard went to See mrs Gill, finds her better. I have removd my washt my roome & Done other matters, feel fatagued. at home.
Clear and Cold. this is 50 years Since I became a hous keeper. I went to y e Jail to see my husband, he has Lambd his foot. at the Jail to see my Husband.

Clear and Colder. I have been mending a waistcoat for son Cyrus and made Some Salv, went and dres t Henry Peirces Burn. made Some pockett hand kerchiefs at Evning. Jon a Ballard Junr informd that mr Tho s Pitts s Father was dead. at mr Pierces. hear of A Death [otha] Hammond. Death.

Clear part of y s Day. mrs Pierce spun on my wheall, Dind & took Tea here. Luke & EbenZ Sleepe here this night. I have Cleand my Chamber, removd part of y e Banking f m y e house &C. at home, removd Banking from the hous.
raind. I have been at home, knit Some. at home.
Clear morn, Shower the middle of the day. I have taken Down my bed slead to Clean it of bugs, Skolt y e Sealing and washt the floor. L e faett is gone to Saml Pierces. at home.
Clear. I was a t Ditoes kniting. a t Ditoes.
Clear part of ye Day. I Saw 13 tn of my Grand childn at son Lambds. Son and Dagt Pollard Dine there, Shee tarries this night allso. at Ditoes.

Cloudy. I have been washing Potatoes for Jonas Swine. brot wood from the old fence. Son Ephm Dind here. Lemuel Sleeps here. Sally Farewel went to Jonas, her Marm to Eliab Shaws. a t home. Son Ephm here.
Snowd. I have been very unwel y s day but have knit a little. Son Jona is gone down below. Jack Pierce went to mr Cyphers s for rie. at home unwel.
raind last night and this morn. Son Town & wife went to mr Dingleys aftern. at Ditoes.

Birth Son Jonas 6th Son. Clear. I was Calld up at 1h y s morn. Son Jonas wife in Labour. Shee was Safe Deld at 2 of her 6th son and 9th Child. I have assisted a little about Nursing and finisht my washing. mrs s Andrus, Wiman, Cleark and Pierce were here as assistances. the Patient s have been Comfortable thro the Day. at home. Birth 3 d .
Clear. I have washt and persued my Soap worke. I feel Some what falagued. mrs Pierce here Sewing for Dagt Ballard. at home.
Clear part of ye day, a Snow Storm Came on a t 4h pm. I have [Sheld] Corn. Cyrus been down below. a t home. Jonas men wen t to the woods.
Clear and cold. the sick patient was very ill till near night. the Doc t tarried till 2h pm. Shee Seems much better this [Evning]. at Ditoes.
Snowd. I Sent my Husbands Cloaths to him by L e faett. I have been minding a pair of Pockets for my Self. at home.
Clear. I went to Son Ephms, find them as well as they have lately been, tarry y s night. at Son Ephms.
Clear. I have been a t home. Jona and wife to Saml Badcocks, Sally and Martha with them. Peirces Childn here. a t home. Cyrus Sett out to [watervil].
Clear. mrs Emerson Seems better. I wen t to meeting aftern. mr Stone Discoarsed from Luke 6 th 47 & 48. Son Lambd Conducted his wife to Son Ephms at Evng. a t meeting aftn.
Clear. I went to meeting, mr Parker performd. Dagt B. and Sally to meeting. Polly Goodin Came to Son Jonas. a t meeting & a t Ephms s .

Clear and warm. I have been at home. Sons Lambd, Ephm & y r wives here. mr Ballard been to meeting. part of Jonas Childn to N. parish. Rosanna Cottle went home. at home. Child n here to See me. Cyrus here.
Clear. I have been at my Sons. a t Ephms.
we have had a fine rain y s Day. may we be thankful for that and Other mercies beStowed on us. I have bakt Bread & pork & Beens. we had rain with lhunder in y e night. at home. we had A fine rain.
A very rainy day. Cyrus is gone to See the review. I have been ou t in the rain after the Swine and other matters and feel much fatagued. at home, out in the rain after hoggs &c.
Clear part of the day. I have been at home. James Kenny and wife Dind here. I have been very unwell. at home. James Kenny & wife here.
washing and the Babe unwel. a t Son Lambds.
Clear till 4h pm and warm. I have felt very feeble. mr Ballard is gone to Coart. I took Dinner with Dagt Ballard, mrs Pierce allso. at home.
Clear. Polly Allin went home. mr Lambd gave her 3/ for her [Service]. at Ditoes.

X. Birth Amos Bralys Dag t . XX. Clear. I was Calld at [8]h y s morn to See Amos Bralys wife who was Safe Deld at 11 of a Daug t . I left them Cleverly and went to Son Pollards at 2, returnd home a t 8h Evng. mr Hodges Conducted me. a t Amos Bralys & Son Pol ds .Birth 1s t . recd 9/ as a rewrd.
Cloudy and raind Some. I have been Mending Old Garments for my Husband and Son Cyrus. Sen t a waist Coat to Son Pollards for Cyrus. at home.
Clear. I have washt and part Cleand my Seller & workt Some in the Door y d . mrs Pierce Bakt here, took Tea with us. Shee paid me 1 Dollar and had 4 Bushl of Potatoes. at home. mrs Pierce here.

Birth Josiah Thomsons 4th Dagt. Clear. mr Thomson Calld [m] to See his wife who was in Labour. I reacht there about 8h m, Shee was Safe Deld at noon of her 4 Dagt & 5 Child. I left them Comfortable & returnd home at 3h Pm. at mr Thomsons. Birth 5th.
Clear. mrs Farewel and I went to son Ephms, my husband met me there. he Exprest a wish for me to keep possision of this hous a t present. a t Son Ephms.

X. Birth Saml Babcocks 3 d , Second Son. XX. Cloudy part of y e Day. I was Calld at 9h ys morn to see the wife of Saml Babcok 3 d . Shee was Deld at 11 of her 2 nd Son by him. I left them Comfortable and returnd home about sunsett. find Dagt Pollard, her Babe & Dag t Dolly here. the remains of the widdo Hewen were interd y s aftern. at mr Babcocks. Birth 2nd. Funeral wido Hewin. receivd 9/ June 3 d .

Clear and warm indeed for march. I have removd banking f m y e hous and knit Some. mr s Pierce here washing for Jona s wife. mr Pierce Butchered a Calf for my Son. he Dind and took Tea here. Ebn Trask & Luke Barton took Breakfast. Hannah T. spent y e Day & Sleeps here. a t home, removd Banking f m y e house.

Cloudy and Some Showers. Son Lamb d and mr Swanton, their wives & Babes and Dolly Lamb d here. Dolly Sleeps here. we Bakt apple and Pumpkin pies. at home. Son and Dagt Lb d here. Son Jona gone to winslow.
Clear. I have been at home. Old mrss Dunpha here. I gave her Some Old Cloaths for the Child n of her Dagt who is disceased. Dagt Ballard went to Visit mrs Wiman. at home.
Clear. Dagt Lambd & I to mr Swanton, they removd a Shop. a t Ditoes & Swanton
raind but Dagt Pollard Sett ou t for home. mr Lambard Conducted her. Rhoda and babe to John Heaths. a t Di t oes.

[X. Birth Jery Prebbles Dag t . XX.] Clear. I have been Piking up wood. was Calld to See the wife of Jery Prebble who was in Labour and was Safe Deld of a daugh t , her first Born at Sun Sett. I tarried all night. Son Lambd Sent me rum, Butter & Sugar, Tea [&C] y s Day. at mr Prebbles. Birth 10 th . recvd 11/3 d as a reward.

Clear. Son Jon a had 4 swine Butcherd, he has been down below all day. mrs Pierce here to help his wife y s aftern. I have finish t Dagt Lambds Stockins and help t some about house. at home. mr Trask Sleeps here.
Cloudy. Capt Stackpole and wife Calld. mr Hamlin and wife made a visit here. a t Ditoes.

Cloudy and Some rain. Jon a is gone to Winslow. his wife has no t been So well as Shee Seemd yesterday. the infant much woried with wind. I made use of means which gave it relief. mrs s Pierce has spent the day with my Dagt. Shee Seems more Comfortable this Evng. Wil m Trask Sleeps here. at home. my Dagt and the infant have not been so wel as I Could wish.
Clear. I have Done my ironing and almost Compleated my Soap makeing. my husband has been to Son Lambards, they are wel as usual. at home.

Clear. we Sett out from Son L., my husband and I on hors Back. Son & Dagt, Allin, Barny, Dolly and Sally Pollard walkt. the hors I was on Started a little below Zibe Petingails & threw me, Son Lambd ran to my assistance. I mounted the other hors and we went to mr Gills to attend y e Funeral of his Child. revd mr Stone made a fine Prayer on the ocation. I Could not prosceed to the grave but tarried till they returnd and then went to Son Lambds. Lucy is unwell yet. I had a Distrest night. Old mrs Savage took Care of Lucy. at Son Lambds & at the Funeral of mr Gills Dag t Betsy.
Clear. I am a t mr Gills, Son Lambd there at noon. at mr Gills.

Clear Part of y e day, Snowd A little, Clear at Evng. Jason Peirce & wife Dind and Sup t with Jona. the Remains of mr Ben n Waid were intered this aftern n . may God be with the berieved famely and point ou t means by which they may be Supported. at [home]. funeral of mr Waid.
Clear and pleast. I have been at home. Lemuel Came here a t Evng and brot 1 qu t Ginn, _ lb Tea, 3 lb Sugur and 1 Dozn Crackers which my Husband sent to me. at home.
Clear and Cold. mr Lamb d Conducted Sist Barton to Old mr Hamlins. I have not been to meeting. they had famelys here. at Ditoes.
Clear part of y e day. I have been a t home. mr Pierce Dind and took Tea. at home.
Clear. I have been at home, feel not so wel as I Could wish. my husband wen t to meeting. John Pierce, Jon a B. Junr & William to N. Parish. a t home.

Clear. mr Lamb d Conducted me home in a Shais. I am So Lambe I Can Scairsly walk. I was on y e bed the mos t of y e day. mr Ballard attended worship. I. Pierce, P. Wiman, Ros a Cottle and 4 of Jonas Child n to meeting. at Son Lambd s . Came home foren n .
rainy. mr Ballard to meeting. I have felt very feeble. there were 6 Persons Baptised by imertion at Sidney. mrs s Andrus was one. at home. mrs Andrus Baptised at Sidney.
Clear and Cold. I have been puting things in order in my hous bu t feel very Gloomy. at home.
clear and cold. mr Emerson Set out with his wife. I am at Son Lambds, he and wife to mr Capins at Evng. at Son Lambds.
rainy. I have been at Son Ephms. at Son Ephms.
Clear. I have been Sewing Coverled raggs. mrs Wiman here, I paid her 1/6 for Spining. mrs Pierce here, Sised a web. a t home.
Clear. I have been at home unwel. Cyrus went from here aftern. at home.

Clear and warm. I have Done my washing. Was Calld at 5h 30m Pm to go and See the wife of mr James Caton who was in Labour. we went to Bed. I Slept a little. at mr J. Catons. June 9 th receivd 1 Bushel Wheat.
Clear and very pleast. Old Lady Partrage Came in to See me. mr Ballard is not Libarated yet, he went to y e Jail y s night. a t Ditoes.
Clear. I have been at home, feel feeble. Betsy Andrews here Sewing for Jon as wf. mr Ballard been houghing Potatoes. a t home.
Clear. I have been at home, workt in y e Gardin and did my hous work. mrs Pierce Bakt here. Dagt Ballard went to mr Woodwards. at home.

Clear and warm. I have been with Sister Pollard till near night. Shee has taken Phisick, Seemd Some Easier when I left her but not able to help her Self. Oliv Fletcher there to help take Care of her. at mr Blacks with Sis t Pollard.
raind par t of y e day. I have done my hous work and been to See Pally. Shee is much as Shee was, her Marm is with her. I have had a Sick [Night]. a t Son Jonas, mrs Farewel Came home aftern.
Clear and Pleas t . mrs Farewel Sleeps with me, Says my husband is well. at home.
rainy.

Clear. I have been at home, done part of my washing, brot a burden of wood which took 300 & 50 Steps. it fatagued me more than all the work I have Done y s day. my husband has been to Coart. at home. my Husband to Coart.
Clear. I have been a t home. I did some washing. mr Ballard went to Son Lambd. at home.
Clear. I feel very unwel but wen t to Son Ephms, find him [wounded]. left my Daug t Better. it is thanksgiving day. [at dito] & at Son Ephms.
Clear part of the day, foggy aftrn. Sister Barton Came here. mrs Pierce Dind and took Tea here. Linda Pitchel Came here. at home.
Cloudy & misty. I have been minding old garments, finisht a waistcoat of my husbands. mr Pierce & wife Dind. Shee has been spining Cottne on my wheall. a t home.

a rainy day. I have been at home, Sew d Coverled raggs and kni t and Cleard Some of the manure from under the out hous. mrs Pierce took Tea here. John Pierce & Jon a Ballard gone to mr Trasks for hay. I sent gardin Seeds to Dagt Pollard. at home. mrs Pierce here.

Clear and warm. Saml Pierces wife here, took Breakfast with Son Jona, Dind with us. we had Pork & Greens y [l] of my Sons famely Partook. my Husband & I and mrs Pierce took Tea with Dagt Ballard. at home.

Clear and very warm. mr Ballard been to thee Crotch of y e roads to hear an Oration Deliverd. returnd to Jonses, walkt in procescion with y e Federals. he returnd home at 10 h Evn. Dagt Ballard & I took Tea at mr Pierces. at mr Pierces.
Clear. I have been at home. at home.

Birth Son Pollards 3 d Son. Clear. I was Calld in hast to Son Pollards, arivd a t 1h pm. find his wife Safe Deld by Old mrs Savage of her 3 d son & 7th Child and [as] wel as Could be Expected. Child wd 11_ lb. a t Son Pollards. Birth 11th.

Clear morn. mr Lambard Sent Joseph S. Spaldin for Dagt Pollard. Shee and Childn went. Dagt Ballard, L e faett and martha went to mr Babcocks. EbenZ Trask and wife Dind here and Sett out for mr B s . I went to mr Pierces, help t Dress the Childs Burns. Came home, finisht [washing]. at mr Pierces. mr Trask and wife here.
Clear and very pleas t . I have removd some Banking, Cleand y e door y d , knit some & part mended my winter gound. at home. H. Trask Sleeps here.
Clear Part of the day. I have washt and knit. Son Ephm & Heman Bur here at Evng. at home.

Clear. I have been at home. Jona & wife went to Son Pollards. Son Cyrus Came here. I am informd that A man by y e name of Dunppha is Apprehended for abuseing his wife. the widdow Gelchel has been So imprudent as to liv with him Since. I have boild my Soap y s day. a t home. Cyrus Came here at 2h pm. Dunpha Commited to Jail.

Clear and warm. Son Ephms wife Dind here. mr Ballard and I went to Lecture. I went home with Dagt Lambd, her Babe is very much aflicted with a humer. I Calld at Cap t Williams. a t Lectur & Son Lambds.
Snowd. a t Son Lambds, wrote to Saml Wheaton. at Son Lambds.

Clear part of y e Day. I went from Son Lambds to Ephms and dind with my husband. Dagt Pollard gave me 3/ to git Brandy to bath my foot. Lemuel brot me home, made me a fire. I have been very ill y s night. at Ditoes, Son Ephms & at home.
Clear & warm. I have been at Son Lambd. A mrs Edwards there, Shee and I Sew d for my Dagt. mrs Savage Came to See us. a t Son Lambds.
Clear. I am a t Son Lambds. a t Ditoes.
Snowed. I am at home very ill with pain in my head & Back. a t home.

Clear and warm. I went to meeting, Son Lambd Conducted me in his Shais. the Sacrament administred to y e Church and Baptism to the infant of James Williams, y e name Loes W.. my husband and I a t Son Ephms at intermition. a t Ditoes & a t meeting. Communion Day.
Clear. mr Ballard to meeting. Jona to Son Pollards to hear mr Grey. he took Supper here. at home.
at Ditoes. my husband Breakfasted there. Ditoes.
Clear. I wen t to Son Ephms. mrs Hamlin, Patridg, Sist Barton and mrs Farewel and my Self spent aftern and Evn g there together. I Slept there. at Son Ephms.
raind. mrs Pierce Dind and took Tea. I have been at home, nurst y e Babe. at home.
Clear and warm. I have been at home very Lame but had to do my work. at home.
Clear and very warm. I feel very feeble this Day but have done my hous work. mr Ballard to parish meeting, it was ajourned till Monday next. at home.
Clear and Cold. I went to son Ephms & to mr Patridges. Dolly Lambd to School. a t Ephms.
raind Part of y e Day. mr Ballard, mrs Farewel and my Self to Tea at mr Hamlins. at Ditoes & mr Hamlins.
Clear. I have been at home, Sewd Coverlid raggs. mr Ballard went to Son Ephms, Carried 7_ lb to Son Ephms wife & 2 lb wool. at home. mrs Gilbt at Son Jonas.

X. Birth James Catons 9th Child 4 th Son. XX. Clear. my Patient was Deld of her 4th Son and 9 th Child at 4h morn. I left them as wel as Could be Expected and Came to Son Pollards at 9. he and wife are not So wel as we Could wish. I reacht home at 11, Old mrs Dunpha with me. I rensed and hung out my Cloaths, gathered mustard &C. at mr Catons [&] Son Pollard. Birth 5th.

my Husband Liberated y s Day. Clear. this is Election Day. my Husband was Sett at Liberty this day. he went to Son Lambards, finds William very Sick. he came for me, we both went and tarry there all night. y e Babe very ill. at Ditoes, mr Patridges & Son Lambd s .
Clear and very warm. I have Done hous work & Sew d Coverled raggs. at home. wid o Getchel here.
Clear and warm. I have been Sheling mustard See. mr Ballard to Coart. Son Town Sleeps here, his famely well. at home. Son Town Sleeps here. mrs Gow Expired.
Clear and very Pleast. mrs Farewel Sleeps here. Shee and son Jonas wife been to J. Pierces. Betsy Andrews and her Babe here. I have been not so wel. at home. mrs Farewel & Betsy And s here.
Clear part of ye Day.
Cloudy. I have been persueing my work, very fatagueing indeed. my husband is gone to Coart. mrs Weman has been here. Jonas wife went to Pierces. Jack Pierce is Down with y e mumps. at home.
Clear and warm. mr Ballard workt at Son Jonas Phrain. I have Done my hous work and finisht my washing. mrs Thomson here aftern, had herbs. at home. mrs Wiman here.
raind. I am a t Son Ephms, his Chimney is Building by [mr] Saunders. at Son Ephms, he is very Lambe
Clear. I have been at home. Sis t Barton [is] with me. at home.
Clear and freesing weather. I have finisht mending a Coat for Son Cyrus. mr Pierce and wife took Tea here. a t home.

Clear. I work t in gardin forenn, plante d Pumpkins & Squash and went to mr Moodys after n to See abou t his Dresing my Cloath. I walkt to mr Andruses, he was So kind as to let me have a hors to wride down and from his [ house ] home. I took Tea at his hous. a t mr Moodys & Andrus s .mrs Pierce and 2 Chil dn Dind here.
Clear and warm. I feel So feeble that Cannot perform much work this day. at home.
Clear. mr Ballard & I attended the Preparitory Lecture, few attended. mrs Pollard [watkt] to mr Heaths. at Lecture, mr Blacks & Heaths.
Clear. I have been at Son Pollards, my Dagt Cleverly. Olliv Fletcher Came to Nurs her. a t [Do].
Clear. mrs Farewel & son Ephm Dind here. my Son has Seen 26 years this Day. I have mended my Winter gound. at home. Son Ephms Birth Day.

Clear. I have been doing work about hous. Bakt Brown & flower Bread, Pumpkin pies. Fanny B. Murfy and Allin Lambd Came here. Allin Sleeps here. Dolly went home with Fanny, [T y Hill] here. Jo n a returnd from Sebastacook. at home. Fanny B. Murfy here.

Clear. Cyrus Sett out for nr Pullins this aftern. Jonas wife Came home falagued both in Boddy & mind, her her [sic] Sister Getchel was apprehended and brot down for Tryal before Justice North. Shee was not found guilty on Tryal. at home. mrs Getchel was apprehended.
Clear. I have been at home, gathred hops &C. mrs Welch and Sally here. at home.
raind. I have felt unwel. mrs Farewel is with us. a t home.

Clear and pleas t . I have felt very unwel but have had the nois of [ ] Child n out of 5 famely to Bear, some fighting, Some playing and not a little Profannity has been performd. my Son and his wife have Spen t A Part of y e day at Jason Pierces. at home.
Clear. I have felt unwell, did no t attend worship, my husband did. mrs Getchel Calld here on her way home. at home. Marriage mr Stackp to M. Babcock.
Clear. mr Ballard to meeting, I was not. mr Savage and Son Cyrus, Aaron Foster & Hem Bur here after meeting. [Nab y ] [homes] here. at home. hear that mr Crosby was found & interd.
Clear. mr Ballard to meeting. I was at home. Son Ephm here at Evng. at home. Son Ep n here.
Clear. at Do t s, finisht Allins Socks. a t Ditoes.
Clear. I have been at home. mr Calon bro t me 1 Bushl wheat. a t home.
at Ditoes. my husband Breakfasted there. Son Town Sleeps there. Ditoes.
Clear. I went and Spent aftern at mr Crages. Old mrs Hamlin, [Pierces s ] wife, mrs Burtun, Carter, Sister Barton there. Joseph B s wife Came a t Evning. a t mr Crages & son [Lamb]

Clear part of y e Day. I have Cleand a Calvs head and feet & harslet. mrs Pierce took Tea here. Saml Pierce and his [son] Luthar Slept here last night and [Sett] out for home. Son Jona returnd from winslow. Martha pas t 7 worms. at home. mr Saml Pierce killd A Calf for Son Jona.
Clear. I have been at home, very Lam e . a t home.

Clear and warm. I have puld weads in my Gardin, washt my Cloaths in 1 water and done my hous work. mrs Pierce did her washing here. mrs Cleark at Jonas. my Dagt Pollard is 36 years old y s Day. at home. mr Wiman Supt with us. Dagt Pollards Bh day.
Clear and very Cold. my husband and I at Ephms. son [Ephms].
Clear. mrs Farewel and I went to Son Lambds, tarrie all night. wid o Savage there aftern. at son Lambds.
Clear. I have been at home. mr Ballard is Gone to y e meddow ys aftern. John Pierce & Le faett Ballard went to Saml Pierces 27 inst and returnd this aftern at 2h pm. at home.
Clear. I went to Son Lambds aftern, my Husband with me. his Bro r Paul s wife & A mr Shaw there. at Son Lambds.

Clear. I am at Son Lambds, the Child is threatoned with fitts. Doct Cony Came to See him, approved of what we had done for y e Child. Left it Elixer Satutus, it Seems Some better. at Son Lambards, the Babe is very Sick.
Clear and warm. I have been at home, houghd some by y e hogs Sty. a t home.
Clear and very warm. mr Ballard to Coart. I have Done my hous work. a t home.
raind. I have been at home, Cut apples. Clear aftern. mr Ballard workt Some on Son Jonas house. A mr Smith from Hamden was here for a Sartificate of his lott. at home.

Clear and pleas t indead for March. mrs Farewel wrode down when the Child n went to School. I have done my washing, feel fatagued. I receivd a Letter from my Bro r Collins of 7 th Feb y . at home. mrs Farewel went home. I receivd A Letterfrom Bro r Collins of Feby [7 th ].
rainy.

Clear Part of y e day. I have finisht my washing and wen t to See mrs Pierce, Shee has the mumps. Dagt Ballard told me if I wanted the prevalidg of my house I should not have it this Sumer. I Could wish to See Peace. at mr Pierces.
Clear. I have Cleand my Stares & entry and Sellar and done my hous work. my husband workt for Son Jona. mr Perrum Calld to See him. at home. mr Crosby of Belgrade Drowned ys day.

Cloudy morn. Sister Barton has been very unwel y s night past, Seems Better this morn. her Son Elijah Came for her, Shee Sett out for home. I wish her Safe return to her habitation and prosperity [to her]. at home. Sister Barton left here.
Clear. I have been riping old Garments and washt some. I washt my roome. mrs Pierce here to Tea. a t home.
Cloudy. I Sett out to go to Son Ephms. it raind before got to mr Thwings. I went in and tarried all night. a t mr Thwings all night.
Clear and warm. I have been at home very unwel. mr Ballard been down to y e Settlement. at home, very unwell.
Clear. I have been at home very unwell. mr Gray Dind here. My Grand Sons Jon a & William accompanied him to Sidney. at home. Parson Grey Dind with Jon a .
rain. I have been at home. mr Ballard got Some wood home. at home.

Clear and warm, we had a Shower at noon. my husband to meeting. I have been very unwel. Dagt Pollard Came, Fanny Hodges with her. Rhoda Came afterwards, they Sleep here. I feel Some better at Evning. A mr Wood had a Child Baptised by y e name of [sic]. at home. Dagt Pollard here.

Clear. mr Ballard and I attended Divine Service, it is Communion day. Revd mr Stone Discoars t forenn from Thes ns V C 7 & 8 V s . mr Grey Sleeps here. he maid a Prayer in my Sons famely. Nabby been to Son Pollards. at meeting. Communion. this is the aneversary of Son Lambards Birth.
Cloudy & very windy. mr Ballard went to meeting, mr Parker Performd. at home.
Snowd, raind & haild. mr Ballard to meeting. Cyrus & I have been at home. Ephms wife Cleverly. at home.

Clear. I have been kniting. Oliv Fletcher Came to work for Son Jona. mr Coal bro t me 21 y ds Cloth which his wife spun and go t wove for me. I paid him 2 Dollars and Dag t Pollard had Sent her Dito before. a t home. Oliv Came here. mr Coal brot my Cloath home.
Clear. I have been at home. mr Ballard Sheard a Sheep which belonged to Son Pollard. Saml Babcock y e 3 d Sleep here.
Clear and warm. I have done part of my washing. Parson Grey left here aftr Breakfast. at home.
Clear. mr Savage & Cyrus wenl down to ye Settlement after breakfast. we finisht gathering our hopps. mrs Wiman here to Bake. Son Cyrus Sleeps here. at home.
Clear Part of y e Day. I have Bakt Bread and Apple Pies. mr Ballard been down to Coart. at home.
Clear. I am a t Ditoes, began my hoes. at Detoes.
Clear and warm. I persued my wash. mr Bullin & wife Dind took Tea here, informd me y t A. Goodins Child n wr Sick. at home. mr Bullin & wife here.
Clear. I have been at home mending Cloaths for mr Ballard. Ephms Wife Sent me 2_ lb Butter. a t home.
at Ditoes forrn, Came home aftn. the Boys had burnt my wood and I got more, was Scik at night. at Detoes. Sally went to Son Ephms.
Clear. I have seen 70 years Spent y s Day. at Son Lambds, he and wife, Dolly, Barny and Wil m to Son Pollards. a t [Son Lambards].
Clear part of y e Day. I have finisht A pair of hoes for Jonas wife and done other matters. Martha been unwel. [at home. raind at night].
Clear Except Showers. I have gathered Cherrys and done my work, feel some Better. at home.
Clear and warm. mrs Pierce Bakt here. I have Done my hous work and finisht my washing. mr Ballard has been helping Son Jona about his hay & Grain. at home, washt.
Clear. I finisht my wash, was Calld to See Wil m Lambd who is very Sick. he has y e Chickin Pox Rash & Canker. mr Ballard Came there & tarried all night. at Son Lamb d s. William Sick.
Clear and Cold. my husband and I at Ditoes. I had a very ill turn y s morn, lay in bed till [noon]. at Ditos.

Clear. mrs Farewel and I Came from Lambds. Fanny Bell Murfy left there. Shee receivd all the wages that was her Due. Dolly L. is not very wel, y e Babe is better. I was Calld to Saml Braleys wife in Travil, was much fatagued with my hors on the way. at Ditoes and at S. Braleys.
Cloudy & Some rain. I have done my hous work and Sew d raggs & Coverlid. mr Ballard mowing Bushes Eas t of y e corn field. wido Getchel here. Sist Barton Came here a t Evng. at home.
Clear. I was at Ditoes. Son & Daug t & y r Connections wrode to the Forks. I tarried with the Childn. a t Ditoes.
Clear. I am at Ditoes, y e Child is no better. mr Ballard wen t home. at Ditoes.
Cloudy and moderate. I have been more Comfortable y s Day, have Done my hous work and wound yarn on balls to Double 4 Skeins. mr Ballard been at Jonas, Cyrus been Cuting wood. at home.
Clear. the Babe Seems much revived. I tarry all night. a t Ditoes, the Child better.
Clear and very warm. we had a Shower, began at 4h 30 m Pm. I have Done my washing. mrs Getchel & Pierce here. it raind all night. Alpheus Lyons Barn Burnt. at home.
Clear after 10h morn. I have Done my washing. mr Ballard Down to y e Coart hous. at home, washt.
Clear and warm. the Child Seems Some better. I tarrie there y s night. Allin went to Brunswick. a t Ditoes. W m better.
Clear. mr Ballard to work for Jona. mrs Wiman here to Bake a Pigg. I finisht picking my wool. at home. mrs Wiman here.
raind very hard in ye night. mr Huff & his Brother Slep t here. mr Ballard work t for Son Jona. at home.
Clear part of y e day. I went to mr Ushers, Saml Babcocks and Tolmans.
Clear part of the day. I Cookt pork and greens for Diner. Dagt Ballard & famely Partook, mrs Pierce allso. mrs Nason here. Elijah Barton Sleeps here, his folks are well. at home, Ironed my Cloaths.

Clear. I am with my Child n . the Child is much better. my Dagt quite fatagued. Allin returnd from Brunsick, arivd at home between 3 & 4h Pm. mr Lambd Conducted me home. Parson Grey Calld here. at Ditoes. Allin returnd from Brunswick. W m is Better. I Came home.
Clear. mr Ballard workt at Jonas fraim. I have bakt Brown Flower bread, apple pies & Ironed Cloaths. I feel Some fatagued but am geting my hous in order by degrees. at home.
Clear. I have been at home. mr Ballard workt for Jona part of the day. at home.

raind till aftern. I have Bak t Bread and mins Pies and Done some mending and finisht Doubling my Grey yarn. mr Ballard workt for Jona till near night, then went to Son Ephms. finds his wife is poorly with her Breast, it is not Broak yet. at home.
Cloudy. I went to meeting and Allin Lambd Conducted me home. I am very unwel. a t Deloes & at Meeting.
A very rainy Day. mr Ballard went to meeting. Elijah spen t y e day here & Sleeps here. at home.

Clear. mr Ballard & I attended Devine Service. the Revd mr Parker Performd. he Discoarsed from Acts 8 C part of y e 39 V, and he went his way rejoceing. he held up to View the grounds the Christian to rejoice &C. he allso Shew the Duties we ought to perforn and Shew they would be our Comfort in this life and our Everlasting happiness in lhat which is to Com. I Could wish it might have been the lot of all my Child n to have heard him but God is able to teach y r hearts. I pray he might. a t meeting. Revd mr Parker Performd
Clear and pleas t . mr Ballard to meeting, Cyrus and I at home. mr Stone discoarsed fron pro v 14 C 27 V. at home.
Cloudy & high N wind. mr Ballard to meeting and at Son Ephms. his wife is no better. Cyrus and I at home. Revd mr Stone Discoarsed from Luke XVI 7. at home.

Clear and warm. Dagts Pollard and Ballard took Down my Bed steads in y e Chamber and Cleand them of Buggs. Hannah helpt her Father Cord y m up again. mr Pollard Came and Conducted his wife and Child n home. Dagt Pollard paid me _ of a Dollar which Shee receivd of James Bolton 2 nd for me. at home. Son Polard Came for his wife & Childn.

Clear the most of y e Day. mr Ballard went to mill & to y e Carding mesheen. I have been at home, did hous w k and Cutt apples to Stue & Drie. Cyrus returnd, his Bro r Towns famely all well. at home. Cyrus returnd.
Cold. I have been at home. at home.

Clear. Oliv went from here to her Fathers. Sally Pierce Came to work for her aunt. I have felt unwel but knit a little. mrs Pierce took Tea here. Old mr Hamlin Calld here. at home. Sally Pierce Came here.
Clear. I have been mending Cloaths for Son Cyrus. mrs Badcock & Pierce, Dagt Ballard & mr Cone took Tea with me. a t home. I lransplanted musk Mellions.
Clear and warm. mr Ballard and Cyrus went to Coart. I have Done various Sorts of work, feel Some fatagued. mrs Wiman, Nason & Pierce have Calld in here. at home. Cyrus brol me Oinions fm Sn Lambds.
Clear part of y e Day. mr Ballard b n to Coart. the Caus between James Howard and the ma gr Saml H. was Calld this day. I have Done Some washing. mrs Wiman here to Bake. at home. mrs Wiman Bakt here.

Clear. I have Done a Larg wash for me Sinc 12= O Clock and washt my Kitchen. thus I end this year. it is of Gods mercy that I am yet alive and able to perform any business. Joanna Babcock Calld in at Evng to See me. mr Hartwel began a School this day at the hous where he resides, where Son Jon a formerly liv d . at home, washt.
Clear. a t Ditoes, kni t & made Pies. a t Ditoes.

Cap t Nichols here. Clear and warm. Jonas wife Calld me A liar &C. may God forgiv her. it would make a heathen Blush to read the whole Shee Said if I Should write it. at home. Cyrus is 49 years old y s day.
Clear. I have been at home, did Some washing. Joanna Babcock Calld in this Evng. it was last Evn g Shee was here. at home. [2]

Clear. mr Ballard & I gatherd Cherrys. mr B. went down to the settlement with 15 qts. Sold 7 qts & gave the others to mrs Thwing & Pitts. mrs s Conry & Gill here y s aftern. Sally Farewel, 2 of mr Eads Daughts and 3 of his Sons Calld in. at home. mrs Conry & Gill here.

Clear and warm. I have done hous wk and ironed Cloaths, 6 Shirts & 4 Shifts, 2 Gownds and other things. mr Ballard been to y e Settlement for Stores for us and Son Jona. I have put Vinagar a makeing. at home. Sett Vinagar a makeing.
Clear. I have been at home, done hous work. Ezra went from here after breakfast. it is 51 years y s day Since my mariage. [ ]
Clear. I finisht my wash and did other work, feel fatagued. at home. [3]
Clear morn. I Came to Son Lambds. it raind before and all night, they had 14 Lodgers. [at Ditos].

Birth Saml Braleys 3 d Son & 5th Child. Clear. mrs Braley was Deld at 3h morn of her 3 d Son and 5th Child. I left them Comfortable and Came to Son Pollards at 7, find that he had y e misfortuin to break one of his ribs yesterday. I Calld at mr Bracketts and Towns, find mrs Town a little better. Son Ephms wife here. at Ditoes. Birth 4th.

Cloudy & Showers. Sist Barton and I went to Son Ephms. I left her there and returnd home at Evng. we Calld a t Peris, Hantons & Amos Patridges. I Calld at Shubl Pitts s , bot Candles and Snuff. at Son Ephms. Sis t Barton with me.
a Little rain fore n, Clear aftern. mr Ballard returnd home, I did not. the 2 younges t Childn unwel. at Ditoes.

Clear. [ ]. Rosanna Cottle who is living with Son Jon a has had fitts the night past. Cyrus went to mr Ketons and bot [1]1/3 Bushel wheat. he was at Son Pollard, Shee Sent me 14 lb Pork, 1_ Do Lard and Sausages 2 lb for which I giv her thanks. mrs Purington made me a visit. mr Hartwell Came with his famely [ ] hous. he Came here for fire. mrs Purington here. Rosan a Cottle had fitts last night.
Snowd y s morn, Clear aftern. I have been at home, mended my husbands Black small Cloaths & my winter goun. at home. [4]

Clear. mr Ballard Came and took Breakfast at Son Lambds. I Set out for home, went to Son Ephms, look my Cloaths. Calld to See mr Craggs Child. at C. Voces, Bo t 1 yd black Durant. Calld to See mrs Thwing, Shee is better. at Ditoes and others.
Clear and very warm. I have washt my room, the Stairs & Entry, Cleand the Sellar &C, &C. at home.
Cloudy y e most of y e Day. I have done hous work, Gathered herbs. Dat Ballard went to Sam l Babcocks. at home, hear mrs Pollard is better.

Clear and very windy. I have Bakt wheat & B n Bread and Done my other hous hold business. have [lost] much of y e Seat of life. may it pleas thee Great Parent of y e Univers to grant me better health. mr Ballard went and Carried 2 lb 5 oz wool to y e masheen, brot 8_ roals home. at home.

Clear part of the day, a little Snow at Evng. I have done my ironing. Son Jon a had Swine killd, they Sen t us 10 lb of the meat and part of a haslet. Wil m Cypher Cutt wood for us and mr Smith Carted _ y e day. Cyrus been down to y e Settlement, bot 4_ lb Chees, 2 of Sugar, _ Shoue n Tea. he bot 2 lb of Butter yester day for his Father, and for him Self 1 q t Ginn, 1 [lb] Candles. at home. mr Smith & W. Cypher got wood for us. [5]
Clear and very warm. mr Ballard to meeting. John Pierce, P. Wiman & Jon a B. Jun r went to N. Parrish. at home.
Cloudy. I have been at home. mr Ballard to meeting. mr [Siers] took Supper here. Son Jonas wife Came home at Evning. at home.

Clear. mr Ballard & I went to meeting. Revd mr Stone Discoarsed for n f m S t John C 12 V 35 aft n , fm Peter C 1 st V 5. I was at Son Ephms at intermition. at Meeting & at Son Ephms. Cyrus Came home.
Clear. mr Ballard went to meeting, Rev d mr Stone Discoarst f m Genes s 47 [C] 9 verse. Cyrus is unwel with a Cold and I felt unable to attend. at home. [6]
Cloudy. I am still very ill. Son Ephm here, mrs Pierce & mrs Cleark allso. Dagt Ballard went to mr Pierces aftern. Polly made me some grewel. a t home, very ill indead all day.

Cloudy. mr Ballard got wood & went to mr Gills. Son Jona wen t to Saml Pierces. Elijah Sett out for home. I have removd my Corn to y e Chamber, 22 Pails full Sheled and a Bag of Ears. Dagt Ballard and mrs Pierce took Tea with us. at home. my Husband and I Dind with Jonas wife.
rainy. I have Been at home Cleaning my kitchin &C. mrs Welches Dagt Sally here. Col o Duttun took up a note of 10 Dols which my husband held against him. at home. Colo Duttun here.
Clear and pleast. I did part of my wash. mr Ballard workt at Jonas hous. mr Frances Fuller of Reedfield Sleeps here. at home.
A very windy Day. I have been Severely afflicted with pain in my teeth and all over me, got no res t y s night. at home, very unwell.

Clear. mr Ballard work t for Son Jon a . Cyrus went to Son s Lambards & Ephms. he Sent us by him A Sparerib which wd 11_ lb. I have washt my N. room and Twisted yarn for A mop & 3 nots Thread. at home. Son Ephm Sent us A Sparerib. [7]
[Snowd]. I have been at home. mr Ballard been down to mr Bridges ofice. mr Saml Cumings Came for Son Cyrus to go and tend his mill. at home.
Clear and very pleast. Jason Pierce, mr Wickson & W m Cypher here giting wood for [us]. they got 14 loads. mrs Wiman here, took Tea. I have been Sewing and doing hous work. at [home].
Clear. mr Aron Page Sent us 9 lb wool for the use of [9] Sheep this year. I have Done my washing, feel Some falagued. have Cleane d the Sellar in part. at home.
Clear. I have been at home. mrs Holms and Mills Sleep here. at home. mrs Holms & Mills here.

Clear and not So Cold. I have been at home. mrs Wiman here. my Husband workt for Son Jona, Dind there. Cyrus went after mr Kingsley but did not find him. I washt the North room. at home. mrs Wiman here.

Clear. Son Lambard brot his wife, Allin and [Wil m ] here. Shee Came to do Some work for us. I have been at home. Shee Cut my Goun & part made it. they brot me 4 lb Pork, 1 Doz n fish, 17 Crackers, some Coffee and a Creem pot. at home. Dagt Lambd here. [8]
Clear. I have mend a pair Trousers for Cyrus. mr Ballard made a forem and Sett up A Leach. little Saml is some better. mrs Pierce has done her washing here. a t home. mrs Pierce did her washing here.
at home. mr Ballard a t Coart. Cyrus Set out for his home a t 3h Pm. at home.
Clear. I washt 12 Shirts & Shifts and Some other things. mr Balld been down to Coart. at home, washt.

Clear. I have been at home. Dagt Lambd & mrs Gill here. Dagt Ballard Came aftern, mr Gill a t Evng. Jon a , Ephm Ballard & A. [Lambd] Slept here allso. [ ] Cut Cloaths for my husband and Cyrus and did other Sewing. at home, [friends] here.
Snowd. Lucy is very unwel. mr Petingl Butchered a Cow for son Lambd. at Ditoes.
Cloudy and rain. I went to Jonas Old hous to Twist yarn. have been insulted, the Door fastened up on me twice &C. I have need of Patience and Grace to bear it. a t Jonas Old hous par t y e Day.
Snowd all day and Evn till abou t 9. Dagt Lambard went to Son Jonas aftern, mrs Gill about noon. I have been at home, knit at Evng. Cleard off abou t 9 h Evng. at home.
Clear Except Showers at Evng. Dagt Ballard went to Hallowell, the Child n troublesome at Evng. at home.
Clear and warm. mr Ballard helping Son Jona. I have Done my hous work & gathered mustard to drie & mended hoes. at home.
raind part of the day, Clear before night. I have Bakt mins Pies and done my other work. mr Ballard workt at Jonas. [ ]

Clear part of the Day. I have washt and Cleand Door yard. mrs Pierce Dind and Son Ephm Came and took Curent Bushes out of my Gardin. I feel Some fatagued this night. we had Thunder a t Evng. at home. mrs Pierce and her Child n here.
Cloudy and Some rain. I have washt my Cloaths and my floors. mr Ballard mowd Bushes forn n & went to y e Settlement aftern. it is wonderful that I am so well. at home. did my washing.

Clear, the wind to y e N. Son Lambd Conducted his Sister to the vesel to go to Bath, he relurnd and my Dagt Conducted me to mr Wimans and returnd home. I reacht home at 11h morn, Did my ironing. mr Ballard been to Son Pollards. a t Detoes & at mr Wimans. funeral of A man that Expired a t Shubal Pitts s by a fall in A [Vesel].

Cloudy part of y e day. my husband & I rose at 6h y s morn. I have done my ironing and hous work, feel feeble. mr Hartwels Child here for milk, he for meal. I lent him Some. Cyrus went to mill with our wheat and a Bushel of indien which he got [ olted]. a t home.

Clear. mr Ballard to meeting. I got our Pork in to y e Sellar, packt it and Did other matters. Polly Goodin left my Son Jonas, Shee is very unwel. Pierce & wife Dind at Jonas. at home. Polly left [here].
Clear and warm. mr Ballard & I went to meeting. Revd mr Packard performd. at meeling & Son Ephms

Clear Part of the Day. mr Ballard to meeting. mr Stone Discoars t f m John 6 C V 27. Dagt [Lambd and] Allin Came [ ] brot me 8 lb flower. [ ]. mr Grey Preached in y e School hous. at home. Son Ephms wife is Mending.
Clear & very warm. I have been at home. Son Ephm Sent us a piece of Veal, wt 10 lb. I sent him a Box Curents. at home.
Cloudy. I have been at home, not well. at home.
Clear. Sally Pierce and mrs Wiman here to Bake. two of mr Puringtons Dagts Calld here at Evng. I have been at home. at home.

rainy. I feel So much better that I have Ea t two small potatoes, the firs t Substance I have taken since Sunday morning. Hannah, William & Sally have the mumps. mrs Pierce Dind here. I have been So much better this afternoon that I took some Tea and Eat bread and Butter. may I be treuly Grateful for every Mercy I receive from my Great Parent. at home. mr Hall wounded his knee and went home. [thro] God I am much more Comfortable.
Clear. I have gathered part of my hops. at home.
Clear and pleast. mr Fuller got Some Timber after Breakfast, he went from here at 1h pm. Cyrus went and bot me a pair Shoes at mr Bonds. at home. mr Huff Sleeps here.

Clear and very high wind. mrs Wiman Came foren and Spent the day here. I feel very unwel ye t but not in So Severe Pain for which I would bless the bestower of Every mercy. at home, very [unwel]. mrs [Wiman] Came and tarried here.

Clear. mr Ballard down below again. he bot me 15 oz Snuff, gave 3/9 d for it. Cyrus Sett out for mr Cumingses a t 3 h 20 m . he had been to Son Lambards before and bro t home his new Black Coat & pair of Drawers. I have mended him a pr Buskins & pr mitts. at home. we Slept in y e Bed room.
Clear and very Pleasant. I have done my hous work and finisht makeing my wais t coa t . mr Ballard been to mr Bonds, bot 6_ yds Blue Cloath for a Great Coa t . at home.
Clear part of y e Day. I have been at home. at home.

Cloudy. mr Ballard workt for Son Jon a part of y e day. I have been at home. Rosanna Cottle Bakt here. Cyrus went to Son Lambds, Carried 42 Skeins wool filling & 2 lb F. Cottne Do. at home, Cutt Some Apples.
Clear. I have Cleand my Sellar, drew Lee and have got Soap after many attempts. mr Ballard has done Surveying and got hoops for tubs and Casks &C, &C. at home.

rainy foren n . I was Sumoned by mr Cleford to apear at Coart as an Evidince in a Caus between Jason Cony and him Self. he gave me 1=6 and Said I must not fail of being there. the rain abated and I went Down to Son Ephms aftern. at home foren, at Son Ephns aftern.
Cloudy, raind before night. I went down Expecting to be at Coart but was informd by my husband that Cleffords Caus with Cony was Continued and I returnd home. at Son Ephms.
Clear and Cold. Doc t Cony was Calld to See Lucy Lambd, gave an Emetic which relievd her. at Ditoes.
rainy. mr Ballard been to Son Ephms, Carried her _ Bushel of Apples. I have been at home. a t home.

Clear. I have washt. Son Lambard Came for his wife & Babe, they were at Son Jonas. he went there and Conducted y m home, mrs Gill allso. Cyrus been to the Settlement, brot _ g n Spirrit and Sugar home. mr Dunpha brot me a Broom. I paid him in apples. at home, washt.

Clear. I was Calld to Son Jonas to See his wife and Babe who are unwel. they are more Comfortable than they were yesterday. mrs Burington Came there before I Came home. Rhoda Pollard and Sally Ballard Came home with me. Allin & Ephm Sleep here. at Son Jonas, his wife and Babe are unwel.

Clear. I have been at home. mr Ballard to Lambds & Ephms. Jonas wife has Shewn her tantrums. I Could wish it night [be] y e will of God that I might See other treatment. mr Gray, who Teaches Gramer School, here a t Evng. at home. a tumultuous aftern.

Clear and very warm Excep t a Showr at 3h morn. I have done hous work and Mended my husbands Duck Coa t , Trousers & some other things. mrs Gilbart and Childn at Jonas. mrs Pierce & Haah here. at home. we had 1 Bushl Indian Meal brt fm mill.
Clear. I have been at home, Done my hous work and Some mending. mr Ballard and Cyrus been to be Shaved. this is y e aniversary of y e birth [Th] Pollard. [ ]

Cloudy all day. the Girls went home at 10h morn. I have mended 4 pair hoes for Son Cyrus, Legins and Drawers for mr Ballard and done my hous work. mr Ballard been to Son Lambds, got his waistcoat; to the Stores, Bot a Cod fish, w d 5_, _ g n rhum, 1 qu t Ginn &C. at home. the Childn went home.

Clear and Cold. mr Ballard went to Son Lambds and brot his new Great Coat home. Dagt Pollard, Rhoda and Thomas Came and tarrie here all night. I have been weler than I was yesterday for which mercy I wish to be treuly thankful. at home. Dagt Pollard & 2 Childn Sleep here.
raind. I set out to go to meeting, met Sones returning and I returnd home. it is Communion. A mr Hobby Drowned a t the mile rock. at home. mr Hobby Drowned.

Clear and very warm Excep t a light Shower after n . mr Ballard & I at meeting, part of Jonas famely allso. mrs Gilbard here before we went to met ng . Son Jona & his Son J. Went ti Son Pollards. I went to Bed but Could not Sleep for noise in Jonas famely. I rose, lit my Candle & wrote this. at Meeting. [mr Stone Discoarst from Math VI C 14 th , Ye Cannot Serve God & mammon].
Clear part of y e day, a little faling frozen raine aftern. mr Ballard & Cyrus to meeting. I have been at home, paired Some apples at Evng. Revd mr Stone Discoar t f m Ephesions 8 C 14 verse. [ ]
Clear, windy & Cold. mr Ballard to Meeting, wore his new Coat & wais t coat. mr Georg Brown and wife Came home with him, tarrie here this night. a t home. Georg Brown and wife here.

Clear. I have Bakt and done other work, was Calld in hast to mr Cyphers to See Old mrs Pollard who fell from her hors and was Carried in there. Doc t Winship Came and lett blood. Shee was put into a Shais, Conducted to mr Blacks. I went & tarried all night. at mr Cyphers & Blacks. mrs Pollard fell from her hors, hurt her much.

Clear and moderate. mr Smith here Carting wood. W m Cypher Cuting. I have Bakt flower Bread and done other work. mrs Hartwell here to Borrow a Tub, y e Dagt had 1 quar t Soap, he had 3 lb indien flower Saterd y night. at home. we had wood Cutt and Carted. [17] [3] [ ] and pleast. I have done my [ ] work & some mending. W. Cypher [ ] thee garden. mr Ballard been down [ ] Bushl rie & D o of Salt. at home. mrs Hartwel here y s morn. [18] [4] [ ] mr Ballard & Cyrus wen t to Town [ ]. Ezra Town Came home with [ ] Sleeps here. I have done my [ ]. at home. Ezra Town [here].

Clear and very warm. I have Done my hous work & Sewd Coverled raggs. my husband workt foren n and part of y e aftern at the hay. he is very much distress t in his Side he hurt yesterday. mrs Gilbard workt for Jona, her Child n all here at Tea, mrs Pierce allso. at home.

Cloudy morn, Clear afterwards. I have been at home, Cleand the N h Chamber. mr Wiman helping mr Ballard lay a floor in y e Barn, he Breakfasted and Supt with us. mr Piers began to Dig a Sellar by the Shop for for [sic] Son Jona. he has men giting timber for a hous phraim. at home. mrs Gilbard to Jonas.

Cloudy morn, a Severe Slorm of rain & Snow aftern & night. mrs Farewel Came here y s morn. mr Wiman & wife, Saml, Betsy & D. Bolton Came and Slept here. the wind Blew So they Could not Stay at home. I have been at home. at home. 6 Persons Slept here besides my famely.
Cloudy. I have been a t home, feel much better. I gathered Greens for the famely and Sent Some to Son Ephms. Sally remains very Sick yet. mrs Pierce Ding here, we had Cafvs [haslet]. at home.
Clear. Son Jon a put up a hous Phraim joining y e Shop. I went to mr Wimans. at mr Wimans.

Clear. I have been at home. mr Ballard & Cyrus been Down Streat. Cyrus bot 1 [lb] Coffee 2 of Sugar, _ Pepper. mr B. 1 lb Sugar, Beef 8 lb. Jonas famely removd into his new house. at home. Son Jona s removd into his new house.

Clear but Cold & windy. I have Done my washing. mr Ballard been to the Slauter hous for Beef. Son Town Came home with him and Sleeps here, his famely are well. Ezra is in his own house. at home. Son Town Sleeps here.
Clear part of the day, Cloudy a t night. I have put my Bed in to y e Bed room, Cork t the Cracks and hung up sheets to make the rooms more Comfortable. knit in the Evning. at home.

Clear and pleas t . mr Ballard Set out for to go to mr A. Pages at Belgrade before Sun rise. I have made 9 lb Candles. mrs Hartwel here twice. Betsy Wiman & Meriah H. for water. Heman Burr took Super with us. I knit Some y s Evng. at home. mrs Hartw l here twice.
Clear. mr Ballard & Cyrus helpt Dig Potatoes for Jona. Miles Lethers hauld a load for us. I have been at home, ristbanded a Shirt for Cyrus. at home. Cut Pumkins to Drie.
raind. I have been Sorting apples and pairing & Cuting them. mr Ballard workt at Son Jonas new hous. at home.

Cloudy, Snowd & raind. I have been at home. Son Jon a Sent us 4_ lb Venison. I Cookt part of it for Supper. mr Ballard been down below, Bot _ lb hyson Tea, 2 lb Sugar, do Butter & _ g n Spirit. at home. Son Jon a here a t Evng.

Clear and not So Cold. mr Ballard to meeting, it Fast day. Cyrus Came home and went to meeting. Sons Jon a & Lambd Came here at Evng. the Latter Sleeps here, informs that his Famely are wel Excep t Barny who has had the misfortune to hurt one of his Eyes by a fall. at home. Son Lambd Sleeps here. mrs Hartwl Calld in y s day.
Clear. I was at Son Ephms & Esqr Titcombs. at Son Ephms & Esqr [Titcom].
Clear Part of y e Day. I washt 4 Sheats, a Bed quilt and some other things. have been at home. at home. mr Ballard to Ephms.

Snowd. Son Lambard had 2 Swine Buschered. I helpt her Some packing her Glass & Croccry. Wil m is unwell but plays abou t Some. my son had a load of his goods Carried up to Varsalboro where he is going to remove tomorrow, had 2 loads Carried yesterd y . I wrode home in a Sleigh y s aftern. they gave me 5 lb pork & 51 herring and Some Crackers & pickeles. at Son Lambards. mr Ballard found our Cow with a Calf this morning.
Clear. I have been at home, Bakt Brown bread & Pumkin Pies. mr Ballard been to y e Settlement, bo t 2 lb Buller, Do of Sugar & 1 Skein black Silk. at home, was infor of y e Death of mr Clefard.
Clear. Lucy is much better. I have been there. our Swine Butcherd at [Son] Ephms. a t Ditoes.
rainy. I have been at home. Son Jona s famely removd from here to his old house. Parson Grey Sleeps here. at home. mr Grey Sleeps here.
Clear. I have been at home, did hous wk and mended mittins. Luke Barton here, he is gon to See his Mother & Brothers. a t home.

Clear. Rhoda washt some Cloaths for me. I have Bak t Brown & flower Bread. Son Jonas wife Sent me 4_ lb Pork. mrs Cypher Calld here, had my flax Comb. mr Ballard been down to be shaved and to Son Lambds, brot Allins Shirt. Sally went home, Shee was very Sick here las t night. at home. hear [mrs] Gillard has a Son Born this or yesterd y .

Clear and Cold. mrs Farewel Came in to See me, Shee Slept at Son Jonas last night. mrs Heartwel been here. Jonas Boys and Some others killd a Dear this day. I have been mending hoes for mr Ballard and Cyrus. hear Capt Slone is very low. mr Ballard been to Son Lambds, Will m is Some better. Allin is gone to Bath to School. at home. mr Ballard Bot A Cod fish.
Clear and Cold. I was a t meeting and went home. Lambd & wife to Son Pollards. at meeting.
rainy. mr Ballard to meeting. I have been at home. Parson Grey left here Early y s morn to go to Sidney to Preach. at home.
Clear. mr Ballard and Cyrus to meeting. I was at home. at home.

Cloudy part of the day. I have been at home. Cyrus Came home, his Father & he to meeting. Revd mr Stone Discoarsed from James 1 st C foren, fm PSalm C 47 th 1 v aftern. they had fine Singing. Rhoda and H. Ballard Sleep here. at home.
Clear and Cold. Cyrus Came home, he has a Cold and did not go to meeting. his Father went. Son Jona Sen t for us all to go and Dine with him. mr Trask & wife there, mrs Gill allso. at Son Jonas.

Clear and cold. mr Ballard to Meeting. Cyrus Came home. Son Lambard Conducted his wife & Babe & Rachel Capin, here and left them. they Sleep here. I am informd that Capt Stone Expired y s day. mrs Heartwel was here. at home. Dagt Lambd & Rachel Capin Sleep here. Death Cap t Stone.

Clear and Some Cooler, it freeses this night. I have been a t home, done my hous work and Twisted 16_ knots yarn. mr Ballard been fixing a plalform at the East doar. H. & Sally Ballard & mr Harlwels Childn here. Son Jona ptanled apple Seeds west End of the Barn. [ ]

Clear and Cold. mr Brown & wife left here at 10h y s morn to go to Farmingto n . mrs Heartwel made me A Visit, informd me y t Jason Pierces wife was [Deld] of a Son las t night or y s morn. I have finisht my Cottne hoes this Evng. at home. mr & mrs Brown left here. mrs Heartw l here.
Clear and warm. I have been at home, did my hous work and Sewd raggs. at home.
Clear part of y e day. I have been at home. mr Ballard finisht the Barn floor. mrs Saunders visiting at Son Jonas. at home. mr Siers left here.

Clear. mr Wimans famely went home, mrs Farewel allso. Nabby Holms Came here at 2h Pm to spin for me. mr Ballard been to mr Bridges office on Business. I have been at home. a t home. Nabby Holms Came to wk here.
Clear and very pleas t . I have been very unwel, my throat is very Soar. Doct Howard was Calld to see Sally. Shee Seems more Comfortable. we Dind on roast Veal. at home, feel very unwel. [24]
Clear. mrs Wiman here to Bake, hur husband & [ ] to Tea with us. at home. mrs Wiman Bakt here.

raind y s morn, pleast day afterwards. we went to meeting. mr Slone Spake from PSalm 4 C 8 vers. mr Ballard, my Self and Cyrus went to Son Lambards, tarried all nigh t . wido Savage & mr Gill & wife there. at meetng & at Son Lambds. my Son L. was a t Son Pollards.

Clear, part of the day more moderate. mr Ballard & Cyrus Down to Coart. I have washt Some more Cloaths y s day. Sist Farewel Calld here, informs me yt Pollys Breast is very Soar yet. at home. mrs Farewel here.
A Severe Snow Storm. I have Done my hous work and mended & knit Some. my husband Sett out to go to y e Settlement, went as far as Son Jonas and returnd. at home.

Clear and pleas t , Thawd Some. I have Brewd. mr Page returnd 9 Sheep that he took of mr Ballard last Jany 24 th 1805. mr Ballard has been down & finish t his business respecting Depositions and receivd 10 Dollars in part of his Demand. at home. our Sheep were returnd.
Clear morn. raind, Snowd and haild aftern. mrs Farewel, Son Jona & wife took Tea here. mrs F. Sleeps here. I have been mending my Cloaths. at home. mrs Farewl Sleeps here.
Some rain. I was Sumoned by a mr Clefard to apear at Coar t as an Evidince. I Sett out and went to Son Ephms. at Son Ephms.
Clear. mr Ballard & I attended the Prepairtory Lecture. mr Stone Discs t fm 2 nd Cornith. at Lecture.

rainy. I have washt Some. mr Ballard went to Son Ephms and hired a Cow of the wido Farewel. Luke Barton helpt him Drive her home. Shee gave my Small Cremer full of mitk at night. at home. mr Ballard took A Cow of [mrs] Farewel.
Clear. I have wash t . mrs Heartwel was in here. mr Ballard workt at the Barn fixing a place for Sheep that have Lambs. at home.

Clear and more moderate. Jason Pierce, W m Cypher & John Pierce workt for us y s foren giting wood. mrs Wiman made me A visi t aftern. I have not felt So well as I could wish. at home. mrs Wiman to See me.

Clear foren, Cloudy aftern, very Cold. mr Ballard been to y e Settlement, bot 1 bushel Corn for the Sheep, price 6 s . I went to See mrs Heartwel, Shee is unwel. funeral of mr Childs youngest Child. at mr Heartwels, his wife unwel.
Clear. I left Son Ephms after 9h y e morn. Came home, washt Some Cloaths. mr Ballard Came home very unwel near night. at Son Ephms.
Clear part of the day. I have Cutt some Apples to drie and done other matters. mr Ballard went to y e Barber to be Shaved. at home.

Clear part of y e day & Cool. mr Ballard went to where Son L. has livid, they had taken their departure before he reacht there. May the Great Parent of y e univers be with, Bless and Prosper them and giv them Grace to walk in the wais of Godliness. A mr Kidder here f m Penopscott for Sartifacate. at home. Son Lambard removd his famely to Varsalboro this day.

Clear & Cold. mr Ballard went to the Barbers. we had 2 loads hay brot fm meddow. I have Bakt Some apple Pies & wheat Bread and d n Some washing. my husband brot home _ Gn Spirirt & 8 lb lard. at home.

Clear forn, Cloudy aft n . I have been So well as to Bake bn and flower bread, Churn d 2 pounds Butter and b t a Cheese, but with great defuculty.
