Betsy Andrus Came in after n , Shee kindly assisted me while Shee was here or I Could not have got thro my work. I had 2 lb Butter. Son Jonas youngest Child is Sick. my Dagt has not been to See me. L e faett & Martha here to day. at home, feel much better thro Gods Goodness. Son Ephm here. Funeral James Savages wife.
Clear but windy. I have been at home, my husband to meeling. at home.

Clear Except a little Snow in the morn. mr Ballard & Cyrus to meeting. Revd mr Stone Discoarsed fore n fm Luke XIX C 14 th V, aftern f m John 1 st C 46 th vers. mr Heartwel was in here after meeting. at home, wrote to Bro r Collins Moore.

Clear. Son Cyrus Came home and his Father & he went to meeting. Revd mr Stone Discoarsed f m Luke 14 C 18 V. mrs Heartwel brot her younges t Child for me to See, it has had y e itch and has a Sore head. H., T., M., Saml Ballard, Betsy Wiman & Sam l here. at home, mrs Heartwel & others here.

Snowd the most of ye day. mr Ballard and Cyrus to meeting. I have had to fix things for my husband, he Expects to go to Winslow tomorrow. Revd mr Parker Performd this day, he Discoarsed foren from [no entry], aft n f m [no entry]. at home. mr Parker preacht in our [place] of worship.
Clear. mr Ballard & Cyrus to meeting. Heman Burr and a young man here, took Tea with us. Revd mr Stone Discoarst f m Luke 8C, 8V. at home.

Cloudy. mr Ballard & Cyrus to meting. I have been at home. Son Jon a , his wife, Jon a Jun r & Saml here. I have made a Chees. Revd mr Stone Discoarst foren f m Luke 23 C 28th V, aftern f m Psalms X C vers 12th. at home. mrs Pickford Expired.
Clear. I have been at home Seting my hous in some order, Sorted apples &C. at home.

Clear and very warm. I have been at home. mr Ballard to Gardner to Carrie a Letter which I wrote to my Bro r Collins Moore. I have Cleand y e Bed room & Buttery and remood Part of my furniture out of y e North roome. at home. I wrote Bror Collins.

Clear part of ye day, Cloudy at night. mr Ballard been to the meddow. I roasted a piece of Beef for Dinner. have Sorted my apples, Cut those that were roting & put the rest in to y e Seller; have 1_ Bushels. at home.
Clear part of ye day. I washt. Snowd at Evng. Rhoda been at Son Jonas. at home.

Clear and Cold. I have done Some washing. mr Smith hauld us 2 loads wood. Lefaet 2, Ephm on a hors Slead. W m Cypher Chopt in the woods. I washt my kitchen after my husband went to Bed. he Calld to See Cap t Stone y s aftern, he is Sick. a t home. we had wood hauld. I have washt Some.

Clear and not So Cold. Dagt Lambd and Rachel Capin left here after Breakfast for to go to Son Pollards. mr Ballard to Town meeting. I have been at home alone, began a mit n for my husband y s aftern, knit it all but the thumb by 11 h Evng. at home. Dagt Lambd left here.

Clear. mr Ballard to Town meeting. Capt Joshua Gage was Chosen to Represent y s Town at Gen l Coart for y e presen t year. I have been makeing Soap. removd Banking fron y e South End of y e hous and South of y e wes t door. Set part of my Cabbage Slumps &C. Churnd 2 lb _ Buller. at home, Set Cabage Stumps. Elijah left here after Dinner.
Clear. I have been at home, workt in Gardin and done hous work. at home.

Clear. mr Ballard been to Survey for mr Barrows. I have Dug the ground and planted Cucumbers, winter Squash, musk mellons &C. Sowd String Peas, peppers, Oinions and Rheu, Safron, marigoulds, pepper grass &C, and done my hous work. at home.
Clear. I have been at home, workt in my Gardin and did my hous work. at home.

Cloudy, Snowd abou t noon. mr Ballard been down to the Court hous. Cyrus to Son Lambards. he Carried 3 lb hops and my Dagt Sent me 3_ oz Sinamon. it is a Stormy night. mr Cleford Sumaned me lo Coart. [ ]

Snowd. mrs Heartwel here for herbs, one of her Child n is unwell. Cap t Puringtons little Sons for D o for their marm, Shee being unwel. I have been altering my Green Coat, took out 1 breadth and made it over again. mr Ballard took Care of y e Barn and wrote Letters to Sent to Boston. at home.

Clear. I have workt in my Gardin, done my hous work & Churnd 2_ lb Butter. Old Lady Stone Calld to See me, Shee is unwel. Son Jona & wife here foren n . Soal & Cypher washt their wool 20 fleases. mr Ballard and Cyrus been down to Coart. at home. mrs Stone here. the remains of mrs Pickfordinterd y s day.
Clear. I have Bakt and Done Some washing. mr Ballard to Coart. Son Town & mrs Farewel Sleep here. at home, Bakt and washt.
Clear and very warm. Son Lambd Calld me at 3h Pm to go and See his Daugt Lucy who is very Sick. at Son Lambd, mr Ballard Sleeps there.
Cloudy, raind before night. mr Ballard to mr Bridges office again. Cyrus Sett out for Watervil & Winslow at 2 h pm. at home. Cyrus to Watervil.

Clear till near noon. I have finish t my washing, workt some in my Gardin. mrs Farewel, Dagt s Pollard & Ballard, Sally & Saml took Tea with us. mrs Farewel Sleeps here. it raind at Evng. at home, finisht my wash.
Clear. Betsy Andrews here, wish t me to go and See her Child, it has had y e Rash but Seems mending. a t mr Andrews.
Clear & pleast. we lef t Son Lambds after Breakfast. my husband & I went to Son Ephms, his wife is troubled with her Breas t . at Ditoes & at Son Ephms.

Stormd ye most of y e day. my husband went to Son Jonas twice, Broke to y e Barn watering place & to the wood Lott. Shoveled to the wel, out hous, Cut wood, &C. I have Done Some washing. Son Jona Came here. at home. mr Parmer Expired ys night.
Clear and Colder. I have done my washing. mr Ballard been to the meddow. he paid to W m Cypher this Evng 1 Dollar. at home.

Clear and pleast morn. mrs Farewel & my Self went to Son Jonas. mr Balld been to y e Settlement. Came there and we all took Dinner there. mrs Wiman & Smith to Tea with us there. mrs s F. Came home with me and Sleeps here. at Son Jon a s .
Clear part of y s Day. mrs Farewel left here for Son Ephms fore n . mr Ballard been to y e Coart hous. I have washt the rest of my wool &C. at home. mrs Farewel went fm here.

Clear. Nabby Hoelms went from here. we paid her for y e work Shee had done for us. I have Scoured my y n , boild my warp and Cotten filing, washt Some, Straind apple jack &C, &C. Ephm Conducted Nabby to Son Pollards. at home. Jabish Cowen & Dagt Dind here.
rainy. I have finisht washing, feel Some fatagued. at home.
Clear part of the day, Some Squalls of Snow. Son Jonas wife & 3 younges t Child n made me a visit. mr Heartwel took Tea with us. I have ironed & mended. at home. Jonas wife and 3 of her Childn here.
Clear. I have been at home. mr Ballard to the Settlement to be Shaved. at home.

Clear Part of y e day and very Cold. I have Done my washing and other matters. mr Ballard been to y e Settlement, brot home _ gn Spirit, 1 qt Ginn, 4 lb Pork, 2 Do e Butter & 1 Skein Black Silk. at home, did my washing.

Cloudy the most of y e day, misty at Evng. mr Ballard been down to y e Settlement, bot 3 lb Pork, _ g n Spirit. Lues Hamtin gave him a fine Lemmon. I have done my hous work, Churnd 2_ lb Butter. at home. Churnd &C 2_ lb Butter. Thad Snels s Son killd Sudenly.
Clear and pleast [but] Bad walking. mr Ballard to meeting. mr Grey Sleeps here, he Preacht at Cap t Bangers. at home. mr Grey Slept here.

Clear. mr Ballard to meeting, Cyrus allso. mrs Heartwel here for herbs, 2 of her Child n unwel. I have been at home. the text foren n Romans 8 th 28, aftern, Proverbs 22 nt C 24 th vers. at home. Cyrus Came home & returnd.

Clear and Cold. mr Ballard & Cyrus went to meeting. Rev d mr Stone Deliverd a Discoarsl foren n on y e Death of mr Child ss younges t Child from 2 nd Samuel 12 C 23 v. I have been at home. mr Heartwel here, Says his wife is better. at home.

Clear part of the day. mr Ballard & Cyrus to meeting. I attended aftern. Revd mr Stone discoars t foren f m PSalm 16 th 8 vers, aft n from John 6 Chap 68 vers. Son Jona here at Evng, he is unwell. at meeting aftern. mrs Wiman here for Greens foren. receivd a Letter fm Bror Elija h of [mc h 31].

Clear. mr Ballard & Cyrus attended Public worship all day, I went aftern. Revd mr Parker performd from Titus 3 C 2nd vers. I went to Son Ephms after meeting and to See mrs Heartwell, find her better. at meetng & at Son Ephms & mr Heartwels.

Clear. mr Ballard to meeting, Cyrus to Son Lambards. I am at home. mrs s Heartwel was here, I am glad shee is So far recovered. Son Lambard Came here, tarried but a little while. Says his famely are as well as usual. at home. mrs Htwl & Son Lambd here.
Cloudy part of y e Day. I have pickt 5 lb wool. mrs Wiman here to Bake, Shee Dind here. at home. mrs Wiman here.
Snowd all day and very Cold for march. I have washt. mr Ballard tended y e Barn and brot my water.

Clear till aftern when it was Cloudy. I have done my washing and hous work. mr Ballard been to measure the Lot which mr Densmore formerly livd on, at the reques t of mr Bridg. Wil m and Martha Ballard here. at home, washt.
Clear. mr Ballard went to winslow. I have been at home. Betsy Andrews Came to help me, brot her Child, we washt. a t home. nr Balld to winslow.
Clear. I have been very unwell this day. mrs Heartwel spen t aftern here. mr Ballard been to do Surveying for Saml Cumings. Leu t W m Stones Child n here for gardin Seeds. at home, unwel.
Clear part of ye day & warm. I have been at home, workt in my Gardin. Twisted 9 knots Thread & did my hous wk. at home.
Clear. I have been at home, washt y e N h room. Saml Babcocks 3 d wife here. Sister Williams Sleeps here. a home. Sister Wilms Sleeps here.
A Severe Storm of Snow, wind NE. I have done my hous work and Stued my apple. at home.

Clear and Cold. I ironed my Cloaths and finisht Saml s hoes. Cyrus returnd from watervil & went to Son Lambds. Dolly L. has been here y s day, Shee went home, Rhoda went with her. we had 2_ lb fish from Son Lambd. at home. Cyrus Bot me 1 qt [Ginn].

Cloudy part of y e day. mr Ballard went to Saml Cumings mill, bot _ bs l rie & 1 q t milk; had _ Bus l indien ground. he Calld at Cap t Stones, finds him no better. mrs Andrews Sent for herbs. Bracket is Sick. at home.

Clear foren, Cloudy after n . mrs Heartwel here to return Some things Shee had Borrowed. I have finisht kniting my husbands mitts. he has been to mr Stones to desire him to attend the Funeral of Cap t Stone tomorrow, and to Son Lambds. brot home _ Bushel wheat, d o of rie, which Elijah Barton left as a presen t for us. at home. we recvd _ bs l wheat, do of rie, as a pres t from Sis t Bartons Sons.
Clear. I have finisht makeing my soap, have a Barril full. finisht Seting Cabbage Slumps and Beets &C. at home.
Clear. I have been at home, done hous work & Some in ye Gardin. at home.

Clear. I have done my hous work, Brewd, dug gardin, planted Cucumbers, musk mellions and [Bone bis] Beens. mr Ballard dugg a pice of ground foren n , had a Collic pain aftern. at home. mr Balld unwel aftern. Death mrs M c Night.

Clear part of y e day. mrs Gillbd Came & Calld me to go and See mrs Heartwel who has a pain in her Stomach. I walkt there and home again three times, feel fatagued. Shee Seemd Easier when I was last there. mrs Wiman & Son Jonas wife there. I cookt Pork and beens for Dinner. mr Ballard been houghing Corn and giting Some wood. at mr Heartwels, his wife is unwel.
Clear and windy. I went to Son Ephms Expecting to be at Coart but was not [Cald] tarry all night. mrs Brown [there]. [ ]

Cloudy and moderate. I have Brewd and done Some Sewing. mr Ballard been to Carrie Letters to the Post office. Meriah Heartwel here for my pan to warm her marms Bed, sais Shee is very unwel. Allin Lambard here and Ephm y e 3 d , they Cut some wood. I gave them rice to Eat. we had a Lamb Cum. a t home, hear mrs Hartw l is unwell.

Clear and warm. I have been at home, Done my hous wk & Some in my Gardin. Allin Lambd took Breakfas t & Sup t here. Ephm Ballard Sup t , they Sleep here. mr Ballard is complaining of a Pain in his Back. at home. Allin & Ephm Sleep here.
Clar and warm. I am at Ditoes Lucy Seems Some better. I wrode to mr Gills, his younges t Child Expired yesterday. a t Ditoes and a t mr Gills.
Clear & windy. I have Done Some washing. mr Ballard Down below again. at home.
Clear and very pleasant. mr Ballard has been at Son Jonas to work on his hous. I have done Some washing and Bakt Bread. a t home.

Clear. I, after doing my hous work, went on a hors Slead to son Jon a s where we partook of an Elegan t Diner. Dagt Pollard, Son Lam bd and wife, Son Ephm & wife were there. Dagt Pollard, Sally & Thos Came home with me. Sleep here. at Son Jonas.

Snow d . mrs Farewel went to Son Jonas before noone. Son Cyrus Came home aftern & Butchered our Calf. I part Cleand y e head & feet. I finisht makeing a Coat for my Self. Saml Ballard is one year Old y s day. at home. mrs Farewel went to my sons.

X. Birth Son Ephms 2 nd Dag t . XX. Clear. I was Calld between 12 & 1 O Clock y s morn by my Son Ephm to go to See his wife. Shee was Deld of her Second Child & Daugt belween 4 & 5 and is Cleverly. I went to meeting foren, it is Communion. the babe wd 9 lbs _. to Dagt Lambd tarried there foren. at Son Ephms and at meeting, the Communion. Birth 6th. recvd as a Present a Gound Patr n .
Clear. mr Ballard & Cyrus to meeling. a t home.
Clear. I have been at home. Son & Dagt Pollard, Sally, Saml & Thos Dind here. mr Ballard to meeting. Cyrus at home to Dine. funeral of mr Parmer. at home. Dagt Pollard went [home].
Clear. mr Ballard & Cyrus to meeting, Revd mr Stone Discoarsed f m John 5 C 9 th vers. mrs Heartwel here with her Babe. at home.

Clear. mr Ballard & Cyrus to meeting. I have Cookt y e head & harslet of y e Veal. Son Jona, his wife and 3 Childn partook with us, Luke Barton allso. he Came for & had a Loin of Veal for Son Ephm. Revd mr Stone Discoarst foren from Proverbs 16 C 3 V, aftern f m Daniel 3 d C 12 vers. at home. Son Jona & wife Dind here. I receivd a Letter of march 7 fm Bror Collins Moore.

Clear. I have been at home. mr Balld & Cyrus to meeting. Son Jona, Luke Barton & Le faett Supt with us. mr Purington Supt here. he & James Sleep here. Ephm Leighton, his wife and another Man & woman Calld in, mrs Evans allso. Revd mr Stone Descoarst from, for & aft rd , 2 kings VIII C 13 th V. foren mr Purington & James Supt here and Slept here. at home, feel very feeble.
Clear Part of y e Day. I have been Pareing & Cuting apples, workt till midnight. Son Ephm here, says his wife is not so wel as he Could wish. A home.
Clear. mrs Wiman here to Comb flax. I mended 2 pair hoes. at home.

Clear. I have been at home. mr Ballard to Hallowell. Son Jona & wife Calld on their return from Son Lambards. brot us 45 hering, 1 lb Chees, D o [Butr] and Some oinions, a presen t from Son Lambd. at home. Jon a & wife Calld here.
Clear and not So Cold. I have washt and fixt my old gownd [waist]. mr Ballard took Care of ye Barn and Cut wood. mrs Smith here, wanted herbs. her Babe has y e Canker. at home.

Clear and warm. I have done my hous wk, houghd beens &C. I have felt very feeble. mr Ballard workt on y e road below mr Wimans & by Son Jonas. I went in to See mrs Heartwel, find her better. at mr Heartwels.

Clear and warmer than it hase been lately. mrs Wiman here for greens, Hannah Ballard allso. mrs Gilbard paid me for what Soap Shee has had of me. mr Ballard and I went to attend y e funeral of master Sam l Titcomb who was Drouned on Saterday las t . the wife of Es qr Runels Expired on Satterday night last. her remains were interd this Day. may the frequent instances of mortallity Excite us to be allso ready for our last Change. we were at Son Ephms, all well there. A mr Soal Presided at y e funeral, he Delivered a Descoars adapted to the ocation from Lemantations 3 d Chap 39 vers, y e words, Wherefore Doth a living Man Complain &C. at the funeral of the oldest Son of Saml Titcoms s Esqr. funeral of Old Lady Runels y s Day.
Clear part of y e Day. I have pickt wool. mrs Pierce & Babcock here. Dagt Lambd & 2 Daug ts here. Shee gave me oinions & Butter. at home. mr Ballard workt for [Jona]. [Dagt] Lambd [&] [Dagts] here.
Clear. Betsy Wiman brot my flower. I mended a pair hoes for Cyrus & ironed. at home.
Clear Part of y e Day. I have been at home, done my hous work &C. mr Ballard been to hollowell. at home.
Clear and Spring like, grew Cold at Evng, Snowd Some. I have been at home, ironed my Cloaths &C. at home.
Clear. I have been at home makeing Soap. at home.

Clear and warm. I have been more Comfortable, done my hous work, Churned & made a Chees, and Some in my gardin. my husband Dug some of y e gardin. A mr Smith of Faett here. at home. mrs Htwl here twice. Churnd 2_ lb Butter.
Cloudy & misty. I have transplanted Some Cucumbers and done other Matters in my Gardin. mr Ballard finisht Planting our Potatoes. there was a great noise at [Gilbd]. at home.

we had fine Showers for which we ought to be thankfull. I have done my hous work, Sett Plants, houghd beens before y e rain. mr Ballard houghd Corn foren. I pickt Some wool. H., S. & M t Ballard here for Curents for Old mrs Dunpha, her Grand Child n have y e hooping Cough. at home. mrs Heartwel here. Son Jona had a load hay brot to the Barn.

Clear. mr Ballard went to y e review. Sister Wilms left here at 11h morn. I walkt with her as far as Jonas. have mended Cloaths For my husband and Done part of my washing. at Son Jonas. Sister Wilms left here.
Cloudy. I have been very unwel, Could not Sett up till 2h pm. my husband & Cyrus down below.

Cloudy the most of y e day and very Cold. Cyrus went to y e Stores for Some necessaries. I have done my hous work, Cleand Snow ou t of the Chamber and mend Legins for mr Ballard. we were informd of y e Death of Solo n Cumings. at home.

Clear and pleast. mr Ballard been to Son Lambds & Ephms. mrs Coal Came here. my husband paid her 5 Dollars which was all we owd her for work Shee had done for us. Shee Sleeps here. I have Done my work, mendd Cloaths &C. at home. mrs Coal Sleeps here.

Clear Part of y e day and Cold. I have Bak t brown Bread, 16 lb indien & 9 D o of rie meal. Betsy Andrews had 2 qts Soap, paid 4 d _. Sent for me to go and See her Brother, I Could not go. mr Ballard went, finds him Some Easier. at home, Bakt Brown bread.

Snowd in y e morn, raind at Evng. Le faett Ballard Came and Conductd Me to the funeral of Capt Stone. the Revd mr Stone made a very able prayer on the ocation. there were a larg number attended to pay their last tribute of kindnes. at the hous from which y e remains ofCap n Stone was Conveyed for interment.
Cloudy & some rain. I remove Banking from y e west door round to y e East door and did other matters. mrs Purington here aftern, took Tea with us. at home.
Clear. I have Churnd 3_ lb Butter, Bakt and done other matters. was Calld by Isaac Beals a t 5h pm to go and See his wife who was in Labour, tarrie there all night. at mr Isaac Beals. 26th recd .

Churnd 2_ [lb]. Clear. I have workt some in my gardin, Cleand my Seller and done other matters. mrs Densmore, Capt Osgood and others been here. Betsy Andrews here to mend Son Cyrus s Cloaths. I am informd that the wife of mr M c Night Expired yesterday and the mother of mr Peter Eads this morn before 8 O Clock. may we be allso ready. I paid Betsy 3/ towards what work Shee Did for me Some time past. at home. Betsy Andrews workt here. I paid her 3/. Death Old mrs Eads.
Clear part of y e day. I have done my hous work & been to See mrs Heartwel. at Ditoes.

Cloudy & Some rain. Martha Purington Expired at 3h y s morn. I have been very unwel but have had to Bake and do my other work. Dan l Savage, his wife, mrs Swanton & William & mrs s Webber here for Cherrys & Curents. they gave me 2 s and 3 d . mrs Savage brot me [3-2/1] lb Salmon. at home. People here for fruit.
Clear. mrs Brown was dismist, went home. I tarrie this night allso.

Clear after n , rain at Evn. Allin & Ephm Sleep here. I have been to see mrs Hartwl who has a Soar Breast. mr Ballard down to y e Settlement. I have y s day Seen 71 years. few & [toil] have y e years of thine hand maid been. at mr Heartw [his ] unwell.

Cloudy, raind aftern. my husband and I attended at the Sollom funeral of James Purington & his famely which he murdered. there was a Prayer made by Revd mr Stone, a Discoarse Delivd by A mr Taylor from Prov 25 C 28 V, he that hath no rule over his own Spirit is like a city broken down and with walls. there were a vast number of people attended, the performance was on a Stage which was Erected before the meeting h s . the houses near were Crouded, the Streat Crouded & y e tops of Buildings Covered with people. Said Puringtons remains were Lodged in the Porch with the ax & raisor which he made use of to Deprive his famely & him Silf of life were on his Coffin. his Dear wife & 6 Childn s remains laid in the ally before the Boddy Pews. a Sollam specttacle to behold. may we all learn a profitable lesson from this Dreadful Scein and may it pleas the God that rules Sanctify this affliction to the Surviving retalives and to us all. the funeral proseeded from the meeting hous, went over kenebeck Bridg then turnd and went up the hill South and Down Second Street, turnd at the Jail & went to y e grave yard. he was intered without the [walls]. at the meeting hous to attend the funeral of Purington and famely.

Clear. Patty Town washt for me. mrs s Heartwel Calld over for Some one to run, for Gilbd had allmos t killd his wife. I went but did not find any one killd or hurt with any thing but Spirit which is oftne the y e Case there. Son Jona, his wife, A mr Pollard & his here. Luke Barton Came and got Cherrys & Curents. Patty went to watch with Mart a Purington. at Gilbards to hear quariling.

Clear. mrs Farewel Dind with me. mr Ballard went to hear an Oration Delivd at the meeting hous by a mr Jones. he Dind at Son Ephms. mr Heartwel took Supper here. I have Done my hous work, knit and workt in my Gardin. mrs Heartwel has the ague in her face. at home. Allin & Ephm to Breakfast. mrs FarewelDind. mr Hartwel Supt here.

Cloudy foren n . Dagt Pollard Came here. A rainy aft n . mr Ballard been to See mr Dinglys Ship Launched, it is namd y e Three Brothers. I have Cleand my Seller and Done Some mending & hous work. A young man by y e name of Soal, who works for Son Jona, Sleeps here. at home. Daugt Pollard here, Shee workt for me mending &C. Funeral Bunkers Child.

Clear. Son Cyrus Came and tarried here. we Bakt Lamb & Rice Pudings for Dinner. he, Sons s Jona, Eph m & wives, Dag t Pollard, Sally Farewel & M. Edes, S. & M. [and] Sam l B. Partook with us. mr Ballard to meeting. at home. Childn here. I am informd of a Child Drowned at Watervil.

Clear part of y e day. mr Ballard and Son Cyrus to meeting. Son Ephm here and Conducted Patty Town to Son Pollards. Allin Lambd, Ephm & W m Ballard Sleep here. I have felt very unwel but have had my work to do. at home. Revd mr Stone discoarst from Colotions 3 rd C 12 & 13 V.
I have been with my Dagt takeing Care of her & infant.

Cloudy y e most of y s day. mr Ballard to Town meeting. I have twisted 11 knots hoes yarn and mended 3 pair hoes for my husband, and done other matters. mr Ballard bot 2 lb Sugar. at home. mr Ballard to Town meeting.
Clear and warmer. I have been at home, Cleand my Buttery. mr Ballard to Parish meeting. I am very much falagued y s night. at home.

Clear. mr Purington & James took Breakfast and left here Bound for Bodinham. Sally church Came and Did a Wash for me. we paid her 3 s , her Demand was 2 & 6 d . I Churnd after Shee went from here and made a Chees, had 3_ lb Butter. at home. Sally C h washt [for me].
Clear. I have Stued apples and done hous work. Wil m Cypher Bankt our hous. at home.
Clear. I have been at home. mr Ballard Surveying for Squir Lyon. Ephm and Wil m Sleep here. mrs Hl wl , her Dagt, Betsy Wiman & Han h Ballard here to mitk. at home.

Clear till near night. I did my ironing , mended mr Ballards Black small Cloaths & mrs Farewel s . Dagt Ballard & Mt a & Saml here to Tea. mr Son Came and Carried Mart a home. mrs F. Sleeps here. at home. Sister Farewel Sleeps here.

Clear part of y e day. I have workt in my gardin, piqut Some wool, done hous work &C. mr Ballard put ashes to his Corn and went to the Settlement. we had a Shower near night for which we ought to thank y e author of all our mercies. at home, Done various kinds of work.

Cloudy and misty. I have Done my hous work, Sett Some Plants. mr Ballard & I attended meeting aflern. there were an association of Minesters, Revd mr Winship, mr Parker and mr Jenks from Bath. he Delivered a Discoarse from 2 nd Tim y 1 st Ch 7 th v rs . I was informd that Jon a How was Drowned last Satterday, his remains not found yet. at meeting & at mr Thwings, he is very unwell. the mrs Edes s were there.
Cloudy, raind aftern & Evng. my Husband been to Carrie our wool to y e masheen, 8_ lb. I have ironed. Sally Pierce here. at home.

Clear. mr Ballard been to [mr] Catons, bot 1 BuSl wheat. was at Son Pollards, my Dagt Sen t me 2 mins Pies & _ lb of Butter. I have Brewd and Done my hous work. mrs Heartwel had Some mitk & Creem, Shee Sent me Some nut Cakes. at home, Brewd. mr Ballard to mr Catons. I was infm d of y e Death [of] mrs s Paterson.

Clear and very Cold. mr Ballard been to y e Meddow Lott, finds Treaspas has been made there on. he went to y e Settlement. Ben & L e faett got up some wood for us. I have wound 3 Skeins hoes y n , wound & Doubled 3 D o . at home.
Clear. I have been at home boiling soap. at home.

Clear part of ye day, a Shower aftern. I have workt in my gardin and done hous work. mrs Wiman here for Seeds, took Tea here. Jon a Ballard Junr, Hannah, Martha and Saml Dind here. Peter Wiman had 20 Apple trees which they are to pay for. I gave Saml Some Smaller ones & Curent Shoots. at home. mrs Wiman here.

Cloudy & Some rain. my husband been very unwel bu t had to worrie after y e Sheep to get y m out of y e Corn. I have been over y e field 8 times my Self and pick t up wood &C. Jon a B. Junr Came and Slept here. mr Wiman so kind, he brot a Burthen of wood and proposed Seeking my Cow but I thought Le faett would bring her, but he did not. at home. mr Ballard is very Sick.

Clear and warm. my Husband & I were awake at 3h y s morn by mrs s Heartwel and Gillbard who brot us y e horrible tydings that Cap t Purington had murdered all his famely Except his Son James who must have Shared the Same fate had he not been So fortunate as to make his Escape after an attempt was made to take his life. he was wounded with an ax, he fled in his Shirt only and alarmd mr Wiman of y e horrid Scein, who immediately ran to Son Jonas. they two went to hous where the horrid Scein was perpetrated. my Son went in and found a Candle which he lit and to his great Surprise Said Purington, his wife & Six Child n Corps s and Martha, he perceived had life remaining, who was removd to his house. Surgical aid was immediately Calld and Shee remains alive as yet. my husband went and returnd before Sun rise, when after takeing a little food he and I went on to the hous, there to behold y e most Shocking Scein thal was Ever Seen in this part of y e world. may an infinitely good God grant that we may all take a sutable notis of this horrid deed, tearn wisdom there from. the Corps were removd to his Barn where they ware washt and Laid out Side by Side. a horrid Spectakle which many hundred persons Came to behold. I was there till near night when Son Jon a Conducted me to his hous and gave me refreshment. the Coffins were brot and y e Corps Carried in a Waggon & Deposited in Augusta meeting hous. at the hous of Capt Purington to behold A Dreadful Scean indead. him Silf & wife & Six of his Child n all Dead Corps.
Clear and Cold. mr Smith hauld us two Load wood. I have Done my hous work & washt. at home.
Clear part of the day, Snod Some. mrs Cool left here for Colo Howards. I have made a flanel Sheet and done my hous work. at home. mrs Coal left here.

Clear and Cold. I have washt Some and done other work, brot 7 pails water. feel not So wel at Evng as I could wish. we hear that mr Wiman & Son Jon a were Calld to Capt Stones y s morn abou t day, it was thought he was Expireing. hear aftern he was alive. at home, wash t Some. mrs Heartwel St me [1 lb Buller].

Clear morn, Cloudy afler wards, raind before night & at Evng. I have done my work in y e hous. Cleand the hogg pen, Sett Some English Goos bery Bushes west side the house. mrs Nason here foren n , mrs Heartwel aftern for Cammomile. I let her have Some. at home, workt very hard ou t doors & in.

X. Birth Isaac Beals s 3 d Son & 5th Child. XXX. Clear, a frost y s morn. the Patient was Safe Deld at 1h y s morn of A Son, her 5th Child and 3 d Son. Shee is Cleverly, y e Babe was atact with distrese about 2h after the Birth. we thought it was Dead but it revivd. Mr Beals went to Rhed field and brot a Nurs. I tarried till he returnd and Came home on hors back, had my hous to Sett in order. I have not Slept Sence I left home. at mr Beals s . Birth 2 nt . receivd 6/ in par t 26 th . recd 3/ by my husband which he receivd of mr Beals.
Clear. I have washt Some, done my hous work and Some out Doors. mr Ballard Complains of a Collic pain y s aftern. the remains of mrs M c Night interd y s aflern. at home. Funeral mrs M c Night.

Clear P t of y e day. I have been at home Except goin to Drive y e Sheep out y e field and I Stept in at mr Heartwels. his wife Says Shee is no Better. Sally Church did my Washing. I paid her 1 and 6 for what Shee did. at Ditoes. 20 6 Clear. it was this day Sally did my washing. mrs Heartwel is very unwel yet. at Ditoes.

Cloudy & rain. I have felt very unwel but went to Son Jonas to See y e Corps of Mat a Purington. Patty Town went and helpt my Dagt Sew. mr Purington & Son took Supper and Lodging here. Patty Slept up Chambr. at Son Jonas.
Cloudy. I have been at home, did some washing. mrs Heartwel here to Cutt herbs, Catnip, mint, Feverfew &C. at home, workt Some in my Gardin.
Clear and warmer. I have done hous work and Some in my Gardin. mr Ballard Poleing his fence. to Son Jonas to help y r hoggs. at home.

rainy. I have piqut up apples & Plumbs which y e wind blew of yesterday. mr Ballard been down to y e Settlement, had y e mare Shod &C. Dagt Ballard & W m Dind here. Polly Town here. at home. Dagt Ballard Dind here, W m allso.
Clear. I Came home aftern.

Clear. mr Purington, his 2 Daugts & James P. took Breakfast, he & James Dind, he & James Supt & Sleep here. mr Ballard been houghing Corn. I have Bakt wheat & b n Bread and Done other Matters. Old mr Babcock & mrs Wiman here. at home.

Clear. Patty finisht my wash. I have felt very feeble. Old mr Hamlin, his wife & mrs Dilingham took Tea here. mrs Howards made and mr Fullers here for Cherrys & Curenls. at home, had compy. Old mrs Hamlin gave me a Cap.
Clear part of y e day. I have done my hous work, washt Some &C. Sally & Rhoda to work on mr Ballards Coat. I do feel Some falagued. mr Ballard Carried 7 quarts Curents to Theop s Hamlins. at home.
raind till near noon. mr Ballard went to y e Settlement. James Purington & Jon a Ballard Jun r here. I have done my hous work and Some matters in y e Gardin. at home.

Cloudy foren, the Sun Shone part of y e aftern. mr Ballard been to do Surveying for Step n Page. Polly did part of my hous work & went to Son Jon as . I have been washing. at home, have done Some washing.

Clear. I have Done my hous work, wash t , Churnd 4 lb Buller. washt y e Shelvs & floor in y e Bullery, feel fatagued. mr Ballard been to be Shavd, bot me 4 oz Snuff. brot my Glovs which Son Ephms wife bot at Hallowell, Price 7 s . mrs Heartwel to our wel twice, Shee Says Son Jona is gone to Jail but he returnd home again at Evng. at home, washt &C, ironed &C.
raind part of y e day. I have finisht my washing, feel a Collic pain aftern. mr Ballard been to the Barbers. at home.

Clear. Son Cyrus Came home, his Father and he went to meeting. Cyrus Came home at intermition and went to Son Pollards aftern. I have worried with the Collic all day. Polly Town Came at Evn g & took Care of me. I had but little rest this night. at home, had the Collic.

X. Birth mr Perkins Son [&] first Born. XX. Clear. I was Calld at 2h y s morn to go and See a mrs s Perkins who was in Labour. Shee was Safe Delivd of a Son, her first born, at 4h morn, and I returnd home at about 7h morn. left my patienls Cleverly. Cyrus Came here and went to meeting. mr Pratt performd from Ezekiel 7 Chap y e last Claws of y e 10 vers, pride is Buded. Son Jona & wife & 3 Child n , Jas n Pierce & wife & 1 Child here to Tea. Cyrus Sleeps here, H. Pol d , H. & Sally Ballard allso. at mr Perkins s . Birth 5th. recvd 9 s / as a rewd.

Clear. I have done hous work and weed Gardin. mrs Gilbd here, mend a pair hoes for Son Cyrus, Swept my rooms. Calvin Marshal Edsons wife here for Cherrys. Cap t Cony s & James Howards wives & John Whitwel took Tea here, and got fruit. at home. workt Some in My Gardin, had Company.

Clear. mr Ballard went to mr Cumings mill bot 1 bus l Corn, 2/1 Do rie. he began to hill his Corn. Allin Lambd Sett out for home. Sally Cleark & Rhoda Pollard Came here aftern. I have felt very feeble all day. at home. Sally Cleark & Rhoda P. Came here.
raind all day. mr Heartwel in here. I have been mend hoes for my husband & Cyrus. at home.
Cloudy, raind Some. I have made a Small Chees, finisht Banding an under Coat & Done other Matters. do not feel So wel as usual. mr Wiman here, got timber. at home, unwel.

Clear Except a Shower towards night. I have Done my hous work and Some in my gardin, and went to Son Jonas. find Martha Purington in a Low Situation. Old mr Clefford there. I feel very feeble but have put a Barril of water to my plants. at Son Jonas to See M. Purington who I find very Low.
Clear. mrs Cypher here, Rosan a Bak t here. I have been at home. mr Ballard at [Jonas] house to work. a t home.

Clear. I have been at home. we had our 8th Lamb, all alive ye t . mr Ballard has been to Son Lambards, William is unwel. mrs Heartwel here, paid y e flower they had borrowed. I have Twisted 28 knots hoes yarn. at home.

Clear and pleast morn. mrs Farewel left here before Breakfast to go to mr Benits. I have finisht mending my green Coat and did other mending, began a Stockin for Son Cyrus. mr Ballard been to mr Patridges, Says Mary Rockwood is yet alive. he bot me 2 lb Sugar and 20 rows of pins. at home. raind & Snowd aftern.
Clear. I have piqt wool and done my hous work. wido Gilchel did mrs Heartwels washing here. mr Ballard puting ashes to our Corn. at home.

we have had a fine rain y s day, may we be thankfull. Elijah & Gidion Barton took Breakfas t here, their marm got home Safe. I have Sett Beats, Turnips & Cabages before the rain and done my hous work. mr Ballard got Bark & wood. at home. Sister Bartons Sons here.

Clear and Cool. I have been at home, Polly Town with me till near noon. Two men from Hamdin took Breakfast here. Wido Savage Dind, Shee & Dagt Pollard took Tea. mr Miller & Philbrooks paid mr Ballard 4 Dol s & 2 s for the busines he did for them. a Gentleman by y e name of Devenport Came for information about land, he gave him a Crown. at home. mrs Savage, Dagt Pollad, mr Miller, Philbrook and A mr Devenport been here this day.

Clear and Cold. mr Ballard went to mr Cumings s mill, Caried 1_ Bushl wheat, _ Do rie & _ Do indien. he went to old mr S. Cumings s , bot a Chees, wd 16_ lb. I have finisht Brewing and Done Some other matters. heard of y e death of mrs Paterson. at home. mr Balld been to mill. Death.

Clear part of y e day. Betsy went from here at 10h morn to go to meeting at Hallowell. mr Ballard returnd, all well at Son Towns & Lambards. Old mr Spring not like to liv, if living when he Came fm Towns. at home. mr Ballard returnd. I Brewd.
Clear. I have Sett my Sage roots and Done other matters in my gardin, brot manure from behind y e ou t hous. mrs Heartwel here, informd me they have a quilting at Son Jonas y s day. at home.

Clear Part of y e day. mr Ballard is more Comfortable for which mercy I wish to be greatful. mrs Wiman Came here. Betsy & Sam l , they washt their wool. y e old Lady took Tea with us. I Churnd 2_ lb Butter this day. at home. mrs Wiman here. I have Churnd 20_ lb Butter Since we killd y e Calf.
Clear and very Cold. I have been at home, mr Ballard to son Lambards. a t home.
Clear part of y e day. I have been very unwel. mrs Heartwel Came in, made my Bed, very kind. at home, unwell.

Clear and not So Cold. I have been mendind my husbands mits and other Sewing. hear Cap t Stone is better. mrs Heartwel was here, her little girl allso. mr Ballard been below, Bot _ Gl n rhum, 1 qt Ginn, 1 Galn molases. a t [home]. mrs Ht wl here.

X. Birth Ben n Chases Daugt. XX. rainy part of y e day. I removd a plumb tree from my gardin and Sett it in y e Corn field. Sett Curent Shoots and did Some washing. was Calld at 4h 30m pm to go and See mrs Chace who was in Labour. Shee was Safe Deld about 6 of a Daug t . I left her and infan t Cleverly and reacht home at 8h 30m Evng. was Conducted there and home by Cap t Purington. at mr Chaces. Birth 1st for this year. Decr 17 nth receivd 9/ by Chaces work.

Clear. mr Ballard been to Coart. I have done my hous work, planted Corn, Pumpkins, Squash, water mellons and got the weads from part of my Curent bushes. I feel Some falagued. at home, workt in my Gardin.

Clear. I have been at home, washt 6 Bed Blanketts and did other work but, alas, how unable I felt to do it. mr Ballard attended y e funeral of Old Lady Edes. Cyrus Came here to Shear our Sheep. at home. Funeral Old mrs Eads.

Cloudy & Some rain. I have removd Some Plants, Done my ironing and went to See mrs Heartwel. Shee Says Shee is no Better. mr Ballard been down to be Shaved but y e Barber is not wel and he returnd unShaven. mrs Ands & Getchel at mr Heartwels. a t Ditoes.

Clear Part of ye day. mr Purington took Breakfast. they & mr Cleford, Getchel, and a young man who livs with mr Getchel, Dind. Dagt Pollard and Patty & Jon a B. Junr dind also. we all attended y e funeral of Martha Purington. mr Merrit Discoarsed from Job 1 st C 20-21 vers s , Then Job arose [and] ren t his mantle and Shaved his head and fell down upon the Ground and worshiped and Said, Naked Caim I ou t of my Mothers womb and Naked Shall I return thither. the Lord gave and the Lord hath taken away and . Blessed be the name of the Lord. I attended the funeral of Martha Puringt n who Came to her End by the Wounds which her Father gave her. Oh the Dreadful Scien [ d].

Cloudy. mr Ballard went to Son Pollard, Carried 4 lb wool to be Combd & A Box Curents. mrs Wiman & hir Marm by y e name of Emry Dind here. Patty Town took Tea. I have done my hous work and Some in my Gardin. mr Gilb d brot Cyrus s waisk t home. I Churnd 3 lb Butter. at home. Patty Town took Tea here.

Clear and warm. I have done hous work, a little mending and we went to Lecture and Son Ephms. mr Ballard bt me a pair Shoes at Voses, price 7 s =6 d . Son Jonas wife & 3 youngest Child n here after we returnd. at Lecture. Text John 14 C 6 th vers.

rainy all day Except a few minits about 10h morn when the Sun Shone Clear a few [minitus]. we Experienced a very heavy Clap of thunder, it Broak near mr Wimans. mr Ballards hors was in y e lane, I thought Shee was Struck but Shee was [not]. at home.
Clear part of ye Day. I have [Bakt] mins and apple pies. a mr Weber Slept here last night. he had lost a Sartificate and Came for an other. mr Ballard gave it [ ].

Clear. I have Done my hous work, got Dinner for mr Parington, his Daught, James and 3 aprisers. then was allmost or rather quite giving up for a time. after I recovered a little was requested to go to my Sons where I receivd a pair of Sheets for 2 Do & 2 Shifts which I Carried to Lay ou t y e [Dead]. at Son Jonas. Martha P. is very Low.

Clear and warm. I have been at home. Old Lady Dilingham & 2 grand sons, Ep m Leighton & wife, Amos Partridg and wife here for Cherrys. Patty Town went from here to Son Ephms. Oliv Fletcher here, Shee took 1_ facktory filling yn to Carry to Dagt Pollard. at home, had Compy

Clear. I have been at home, [doing] my hous wk, houghing in my [gardin] and was Calld to mr [Wimans] to see Sally Ballard who had fallen & hurt her neck. I Sent hannah to my hous for a Cracker and Some Curents. Shee revivd and went [home], and I returnd home and Bakt Brown bread and Curent tarts. Son Cyrus Came home and informd that mrs Cumings was Delivered of a Daught yesterday. mr Ballard been to y e Settlement, bot 7 lb Sugar, _ lb Tea, _ g n Spirit and _ lb Tea . at mr Wimans to See Sally Ballard who has had a fall and hurt her Self very much. Cyrus Came here ys night.
Clear Except a Shower. I have been at home, done my hous work, ironed my Cloaths &C. mr Ballard went to be Shaved. at home.
raind part of y e day. mr Ballard & Cyrus been to y e Settlement. I have done my hous wk and some Gardin matters. at home.

Clear and warmer. mr Ballard, my Self & Son Cyrus to meeting, it was Communion. Revd mr Stone Discoarst fore n f m Romans 9 C last v, aftern f m Luke XVIII C 22 vers. mr Heartwel & Son Jona here at Evng. at meeting & at Son Ephms.

Clear part of ye Day, raind after meeting. Augustus Ballard, his wife & 2 nd Daugt took Tea. Son & Daugt Lambd and hemon Bur took Tea and Sleep here. Son L. has been to son Pollards, Dolly is unwell. at home. mr Parker Performed. Son Lambd & wife Sleep here.

Clear. I have been at home. mr Ballard & Son Cyrus attended worship [all] Day. Revd mr Slone Descoarst foren from Mathew 5 C 19 V, aft n f n Provb s . Son Ephn, his wife, Jonas wife, Hannah, Sally, Martha, Ephn, Saml, Patty Town, Allin Lambd took Sup r with us. [Allin] & Ephn Sleep [here]. mr Heartwel Came for [water] at 9h y s Evng. I helpt him to light to draw it. at home. Childn & Grand Childn here.

Clear Part of y e Day. mr Ballard & Cyrus to meeting. Revd mr Parker Discoarst foren from mark VI C 12 vers. a Gentleman whose name I do not know performed aftern f m 1st Corin tns part of y e [ th] Carity Sufereth long & pt of y e 8 th , Charity never faileth. at home. we had Cucumbers & Green Corn.

Clear. mr Ballard & Cyrus to meeting. I have not felt very wel. mrs Gilbard Came in fore n. mr Prat Discoarst y s fore nn from 2 n Timothy 3 C 16th, aft n from John VI c 68 v . mr Gill, his wife & Polly Town Came here after meeting. mrs Heartwel Came in for Fire. a t home. mr Gill & wife here.

Clear and very Pleast. mr Ballard & Son Cyrus went to meeting. I was Calld to See [mr] Heartwels youngest [Child] who is Sick. Revd mr Stone Discoarst from [ ] 10 C 37 v foren and aftern. at mr Heartwels to See a sick [Child].

raind aftern. mr Ballard & Cyrus to meeting. mr Stone Discoarst foren from Mark X, 49; aftern f m Romans XIII, 12 v . Silas Wiman, James Purington & Jona Ballard Junr took Tea with us. at home. gathered green Shell Beens, had them for Dinner.

Clear. Cyrus Came here, his Father & he to meeting. mrs Farewel tarried with me. I feel more Comfortable thro Divine mercy. Son Jon a , his wife and William here on their way to Son Lambds. Son Ephm Came at Evn to see me. Revd mr Stone Discoarst foren from [no entry], aft n fm hebrews VI c , 19 v . at home, my sons here.

Clear and very pleast. son Cyrus Came here, his Father & he went to meeting. Revd mr Parker Descoarst foren f m Isaiah V C, 26 vers, aftern f m Acts [no entry]. Son & Dagt Lambard & son Ephm & Sophia here on lheir way lo Son Pollards. I have had threats of y e Collic. at home. part of my Child n & Grand Child n here.

Clear. Polly has been here y s day. Hannah Pollard, Sally & Martha Balld, Allin & Barny Lambd & wil m Swanton Dind. Dagt Lambd & mrs s Swanton took Tea with us. Jason Pierce Carried all my husbands hay from the Barn. Dagt L. brot me 10 lb flower. at home, feel the Collic. Dagt Lambd & mrs Swanlon here.
Clear. mr Ballard Carried wool to y e mashene. the Girls went home afler Breakf t . Polly Town & Sally Farewel Dind and went to Son Jonas. at home, had Company.

Birth Stilsons Daug t . Clear. I have workt in my Gardin & Done my hous wk, Bakt tarts. Allin Lambd here, Says his folks are wel as usual. Patty Town Came at Evng, all well at her Fathers. I was [Calld by] mr Stilson to go and See his wife who was in Labour. Shee was Safe Deld about midnight of a Daught r , her firs t Born. I went with Old Lady Hamlin at 2h 30m to Theop s Hamlins, Slept till morn. a t mr Stilsons. Birth 3 d .Patty Town Came here at Evng.

Clear. I have done my hous work with y e help of Rhoda. Sally been mending Shirts. there was a Sommons left for my Husband by an oficer I did not know. Shubald Pitts Plantive. I Could wish he had remembered the kindness my husband and my Self Shew to his former wife. O the Evngs I walkt from y e . Howard farn when I did not know whether a Stump was a person or not, God only knows. at home. my husband Sued by J. Heartwel.
mrs Farewel returnd from Varsalboro.

Snowd all day. I have Done my hous work and knit a mittin for Cyrus, Except the thumb. Betsy Wiman brot 6 knots [wik] y n her marm has spun for me. meriah here, Says her marm is unwell. Hannah Ballard here for TanZy for Saml, Says he is very unwel, puk t up a worm. at home. mr Ballard made new [tennanls] to a Bed Stead.
Clear. I have been very unwel y s day and night. mrs Heartwel Came in to See me. at home, very unwel.

Clear. I have felt very feeble but have had to Do my hous work & ironing. mrs Wiman here for greens, meriah for Lettuce, Lucy Shaw for Spearmen t &C. Ephm, H. S. & M. & mr Ballard Eat something. mrs Clifford after water, says Martha is much as Shee has been. at home. mr Balld been down to Secure Some Boards.
Clear. mr Ballard work t for Jona part of this Day. I have been at home, feel unwell. at home.

Clear. Dagt Lambard Sent for me to go & See William who is unwel. Wil m Cypher her to Cut wood. I got breakfast and walkt to Son Lambds, Le faell acompanied me. I tarrie all night, have not seen y e river Sinc before it Closd. at Son Lambds.

Clear. mr Ballard went to Hamlins slore, bot 1 bus l Corn, _ Do of rie. went to mr Cumings s mill and had it ground, he bot _ bus l Wheat of him. Sister Barton Came here, her famely are well. at home. Sister Barton Came here.

Clear. mrs Savage with me all day. A happy Circumstance as mr Ballard wenl down to See y e menuvers below, he Came home at Dusk, informd no accident had hapned. A mercy indead. he Dind at Son Lambards. Son Cyrus has Seen 50 [y rs ] this day. at home. mr Ballard to y e review. mrs Savage here
Clear and Cool. I have been at home. Betsy Came again to help me. mr Ballard to Lecture. at home.

Clear and warm. Pruda Snow washt here for Dagt Ballard. I did a Little wash for my Self. our field was Ploughd y s foren. mr Ballard been down to y e Settlement, Bot _ gn Spirit, 2 lb Sugar, _ Boke Tea. at home.
Clear. I have made a Chees which is the 11th Since we killd our Calf. at home.
Clear & Cold. I have been at home. a t home.

Clear Part of y e day & very Cold. mrs s Farewel Came and took Breakfast and Dind with us. Shee Came here last Evng and returnd to Son Jon as as Shee found I was not at home. I am informd that Jon a Ballard Jun r is unwell. I have finisht my washing and made a Chees. at home.

Clear. I have workt in my Gardin, Planted watermellions, Corn, Beens & Pumpkins and Done my washing. feel falagued. mr Ballard been to Coart, finisht Planting his Corn after he returnd. at home, workt in my garding & washt.

Clear. I have been at home. A mr Barrow here for a plan of y e Survey my husband made for him on Monday last. mrs Gilbard here. I have fatagued So much this day I am allmost ready to giv up but how Shall I as there is no one to lake my place in my Business.

rained some. I hear mrs Heartwel is no better. meriah here aftern, informs her Marm is better. may Shee have a greatful heart for all Gods mercys & may we all Speak of his goodness which is great to y e Evil & unthankful. Churnd 3_ lb Buter. I have been at home. mr Ballard to Hallowell, bt 11 lb Cod fish.

Cloudy & rain. Patty Town did Some washing for me. I have been at home but feel very feeble. Allin Lambd Came here. he & Ephm B.y e 3 d Sleep here. at home. Allin Lambad Came here. he & Ephm Sleep here.
Clear. I have been at home. Patty Town Dind here. Shee mended a pair of hoes for Son Cyrus. mrs Heartwel here to Cutt herbs. mr Wiman helpt mr Ballard Cart in his hay. at home. Patty Town left here.

Clear. I have been doing various kinds work in y e hous and in my gardin gathering Sees &C. mr Ballard fixing his fence round his field, then he went to y e Barber to be Shaved &C. at home. mrs Heartwel brot my tub home Shee had Borrowd.
rainy part of y e day, the Lightning Struck a tree a little below mr Wimans. at home.
Clear and Cold till about 3 h pm when it became Cloudy & more moderale. mr Ballard to meeting, Cyrus & I at home. Saml Ballard is 9 months old y s day. at home.
Clear. mr Ballard & Cyrus to meeting. Revd mr Parker performd, Discoarst from Psalm 73 forn, f m 1 st Timothy aftern. at home.
Clar. mr Ballard & Cyrus to [meeting]. I have been a t home. Revd mr Stone Descoarst foren f m Psalm 84 th [11 th Vs], aftern fm y e Same. we had a Shower aft r meeting. at home.

Birth Lues Hamlins Daugt. Clear. I was Calld at 0h 30 m y s morn by Lues Hamlin to go and See his wife who is in Labour. Shee was Safe Delivd at 3h 45 m of a Daught, her 3 d Dt & 5th Child. I left her & inft as well as Could be Expected and reacht home at 7. prepared Breakfast and did my hous work and went to meeting, it was Communion. a Stranger to me Performd foren from Luke 14 C 20 th V, af n from Isaiah 33 Chap 15 & 16th verses. Polly Town Came here at Eving. at Lues Hamlins and to Meeting. Birth 4 th . receivd 12 s as reward. I was at Son Ephms at Evng intermition, Saw Jona & wife there, lhey were at meeting afternoon.
Clear. mr Ballard & Cyrus to meeting. my husband went to the funeral of mr James Springers wife aftern. Son Lambard Came and Conducted mrs Evins here. at home. funeral James Springer s wife.

X. Birth mr Bodwels Son and 12th Child. XX. Clear and pleast. I wen t to meeting foren, was Calld out directly after y e Service before Communion to go to See mrs Badwil. Son Cyrus took Jonas hors & Shais and Conducted me there. the Patiend was Delivd about 9h Evn of a fine Son, her 12th Child. I tarrie all night. Revd mr Stone discoarsed from Ephesians 2 nt Chap, 8th vers. at meeting & at mr Bodwels. Birth 7th, receivd9/ as reward.

Clear & Cloudy alternately. mr Ballard & Cyrus attended worship. I have been at home. Revd mr Cushman Presided, he Discoarsed foren from Luke 23 C, 12 th verse; aftern fm Galat ns 6 C, 9 v. mrs Gill bd & Nabby Holms here, Betsy Pierce & Sally Ballard allso. Luke Barton & Jon a B Junr here. at home. mrs Gilbard [&] Nabby Holms here.

Snowd all day. Cyrus Came here, tarried at home with me. mr Ballard went to meeting. I was Concerned about his giting home. Cyrus went allmost to mr Smiths, Saw him on his way home and returnd. Son Jona here. a Stranger Preacht. we began to milk a Cow of Son Jonas. at home.

rainy. mr Ballard to meeting. the Funeral of Saml Ballard was attended after the afternoon Service. Revd mr Stone Came and made A Prayer which I think was Excilent. Jason Pierce had a Son Expire las t night or y s morn, aged 3 years. at Son Jonas to attend y e Funeral ofhis Son Saml.

Shoury. I have Done my hous wk, houghd in my gardin &C. mr Ballard been Down to Settle with Amos Partridg. y e Settlement was in mr Ballards favour, about 8 Dols. at home. am informd y t Jon a Howse remains were found last Sallerday.
raind the most of y s day. Son Lambd Sleeps here, his wife has mended Cloaths for me and fixl my Bonet &C. we hear y t Martha is no better. at home. Son & Dagt Lambd Sleep here.
Clear. I have been at home. a t home.
Clear, a Cool morn, warmer aftern. I have been at home, workt Some in my Gardin and did my hous work. do not feel So wel as I Could wish. mrs Heartwel here. at home.
Clear. I have been at home. Polly mends Cloaths for me. y s is Son Lambds Birthday. at home. Polly Town Sleeps here.
Clear. I have been at home, gatherd in Beens & green peas &C. W. Stones wife here. at home.
Clear and pleast. mr Ballard was Sumoned to Coart. mrs Gilbard made me a visit, her little girls took Tea here. at home. mrs Gilbard to See me.

a very rainy Day. I have done hous work, regulated my Chests & drawers, Cutt Some Pumkin to drie. mrs Gilbard Came and took my Black Cloak home. Shee mended it to my accepttance and brot it home. her Demand was 1 s, I gave her 1-6. Esqr Tylor & mr [Hirick] here on business about Sertificates. they gave mr Ballard 9 s for his Service. at home. Esqr Tulor & mr [Herric] here from Hamden.

Clear. mrs Farewel left here for Son Ephms. I have been at home. 3 men from Hamden here about Sertifacates, they had breakfast. mr Ballard receivd 4 Dols for his Service & their refreshm t . at home. 3 men from Hamden here.

Clear and very Pleast. Luke Barton, Hannah Pollard, Dolly & Lucy Lambard Came here, took Tea. the 3 girls took Supper. Luke went to Son Jonas. Becky Fletcher took Tea here. I have been Cuting Squash to Stew & Drie. at home. H. Polld, D Lambd & Lucy here &C.
Cloudy. mr Ballard went to Son Pollards to See about giting his Cloaths made. I have been doing matters about hous. at home.

Clear and not Cold. W. Stones w f brot 2 Skeins hoes y n , 2 Do Backbanded. I have done various kinds of wk. mrs Heartwel been here twice, informs me Saml Cleark & [youngest] Child are Sick. mr Ballard Sett out for Son Pollards, met Sally Cleark with his Cloaths and returnd. Shee went to her Brors. at home. Jason Pierce Came home. mr Balld workt for Son Jona foren n . Death of Emaly Cleark, Dagt of Saml Cleark.

raind the most of y e Day. mr Ballard went to mr Hamlins, bot 1 bush l Corn, Carried it to mr Cumings mill. Polly sewing for me. I have been at home. Jon a Ballard Junr took Breakfast here. at home. this Dagt Lambd Berthday.

Clear. I have had the Collic pain this day. Polly Town Bakt for me. Hannah Pollard, Sally, Martha and Saml Ballard Dind. Dagts Ballard, mrs Thwing, her Son, & 4 Grand Childn of Son Jonas, Polly Town, a mr Miller & Philbrooks from Hamden took Tea here. I have Scolt my Peckeles this Day. at home, had Company.

Clear and pleas t . mr Purington took Breakfast here. he Settled acounts with mr Ballard, paid y e whole. A mr Whitny Came here from Hamden on business with mr Ballard. he Ea t Dinner & took Tea, tarries all night. I gathered Currents in my gardin. at home. mr Puringt n & A mr Whitny been here.

Clear. mr Ballard & I attended the funeral of a Child of Jason Pierce. Revd mr Stone attended. the Corps were brot to Son Jona s and interd by his Child. A mr Walker from Hamden Sleeps here. at funeral Jason Pierces Son Isiah.

Clear. I took Breakfast at mr Hamlins. Calld in to See my patient, find her as well as Could be Expected. was Conducted home in a Shais, arivd at 8h 30 m . Pally Town & I went to Son Jonas to. I saw M. [Puringtons] wounds Dresst. Sally Farewel, mr [&] mrs s Eadses here for fruit. at Ditoes & mr Hamlins & Son Jonas. James P. & his Cousin Sleep here.

Clear y e most of y e Day. I have taken down my Bed Stead and Cleand it of Buggs. Scalt my room, put y e Bed up again and done other Matters. Rhoda [ ] helpt me. [Sally] been mending Cloaths. mr Wiman took Breakfast here and Butchered a Lamb. Son Jona had 2 quarters, w d 10 lb. at home. Sally & Rhoda to work for me. Son Jona went to Jail y s Day.
a very rainy day. I have been at home, Brewed. Polly Town here, mending her grand dadys Cloaths. very windy, Blew the apples all very much. at home. Polly Town here.

Clear day, Cloudy Evn g . mr Walker took Breakfas t , his hors was kep t here. mr Ballard did y e business he Came on. he gave him 2 Dols and made me a pres t of 20 Cents. A mr Pumroy Came y s morn, had business done about Certificate. Allin L. & W. Swanton dind. mrs s Gilbard, Jona B. Jun r & Wil m Sup t . I got ready to attend Funeral of Saml Clearks Child. my husband Complained he was unwel and I did not go. y e Boys Sleep here. at home. Funeral of Saml [Clearks] Child.
I returnd home. Ephm gave me a Gound Pat n . at Son Ephms.

Clear Some Part of the day and very Cold. mr Ballard went to Son Jona s , made A head bord for the Beadsted he fixt yester dy . I took down that in my Bed room and put that which he has altered. finisht the mitt I began yesterday and knit part of another. Polly Purington here for herbs for her marm who is unwell. meriah here, Says her marm is Some better. at home. Hannah here, Says Samuel is very unwell yet.

I recvd a letter from Bror Collins [9 th inst]. Clear. I am very Sick indead. mrs H in to See me. mrs Wiman Came, spen t the day and night with me. I have been Easier y s night for which mercy I wish to prais the auther of thal and all y e mercies I receiv. at home, very Sick and Exercised with much Pain.
Clear. I have workt Some in my gdn & done hous work. mr Ballard to See about Boards to fens his Corn field. at home.
Hail & snow. I have been at home, Bakt brown Bread & mins Pies, feel fatagued. Jona B. Junr and Wil m Sleep here, Supt allso. at home.
Clear. I have washt & done my hous work. Rosanna Came here to Bake. mr Ballard workt for Jona part of y e day. at home.
Clear but Cool. Sister Barton & I went to Son Ephms after Breakfas t . Sis t wen t to Son Jonas before we went down. Old Lady Hamlin Came and Spent y e aftern with us at Ephms. at Son Ephms.

Clear foren, Cloudy aftern. I have got in a part of my Hopps which y e past wind had ingured &C. mrs Savage Left here before noon and went to my Son Jon as . mr Ballard been giting wood &C. at home. mrs Savage went f m here to Son Jonas.

Clear and pleast. Sally Cleark Came to finish mr Ballards Cloaths. Shee & Jon a Sleep here. I was Calld at 10h Evn g by mr Nason to go and See his wife who is in Labour. he Calld her women after midnight. mrs Smith & 2 Child n & Son Ephm Supt here. at mr Nasons a t night. Warin Stone receivd mrs Farewels Cow that we had last year.

Clear. Betsy washt my N. room & kitchen. mr Ballard been to the Settlement, bot 3 lb Pork, _ gn Spirit, pint brandy, _ Snuff. wil m Cypher here at Evning, mr Ballard Paid him one Dollar. Betsy went home. Peter Wiman & James Purington here for Bm Giliad, apple trees & Curent Bushes. at home.
Clear. I have mended a waislcoat for Son Cyrus, made a Chees and done my hous work. mr Ballard been to the Barbers and to a Store, bot 5 lb [_] Pork. at home. my husband has Seen 81 Years this day.

Clear. I have Churnd 1_ lb Butter which makes 22 lb in y e last 8 weaks. made a Chees, finisht my washing and other [mallers]. mr Ballard been to y e Settlement. at home. I have made 22 lb Butter & 12 Cheess Since w kild the Calf.

X. Birth Ab m Nasons 4th Daugt. XX. Clear and pleast. mrs Nason was Safe Delivd a t 3h 50m of her 4th Daugt and 6th Child. I left her & infant as wel as Could be Expected and reacht home about 9. have Done my work, washt a little, mended hoes for mr Ballard, ironed Some, &C. Wil m Sleeps here. mrs Cleak went from here to her Brothers. mrs Gillbard made me a present of an Oring, Some Cakes & Chees, her husband returnd from Boston yesterday. at mr Nasons. Birth 11th. receivd 9/ as a reward.
Clear. mr Ballard to meeting, Cyrus to Son Lambd s . I have Cookt pork, patience, Cabage sprouts, yerrow & Sheperds sprouts. mrs Heartwel here. H. S. M. & Hannah Trask here, Jack & James Purington.
Clear. mr Ballard & Son Cyrus to meeting. I was not able to attend. Revd mr Stone Discoarst f m Acts 9 th C 39 vers. at home.

Clear. mr Ballard & went to meeting aftern, he was unwel foren. Cyrus Cut us Some wood. Sons Jon a , Ephm & Lambd with their wives spent Evning with us. Cyrus Sleeps here. at home. Part of our Child n here.
Clear. I have been at home, washt part of my Cloaths. at home.

X. Birth Reubin Branads [9 th ] Child & 3 d Dag t . XX. Clear. I was Calld at 2h m to go and See y e wife of Rheubin Branad. Shee was Safe Deld at [6] of her 3 d daught & 9th Child. I left her as wel as Could be Expected and reacht home before noon. mr Ballard is gone to Varsalbor o to do Surveying. I Calld at Son Jonas, his wife is [sic]. at mr Branards. Birth 6th. receivd 9 s as a reward.
Clear. I left mrs Badwel & infant Cleverly and returnd home. mr Ballard & Cyrus to Town meeting. I have done my hous work, feel fatagued. a t mr Badw l s & Son Jonas.

X. Birth Asa Masons 8 Child. XX. Clear and very windy. I have Cut Pumkin to drie. I was Calld at 7 h 45 m to go and See the wife of Asa Mason. Saml Hovy attended me. the Patient Delivd of her 4th Daugt & 8th Child at 9 and is Cleverly. I tarried till morning and returnd home, his son Came with me. at Asa Masons. Birth 10th. fee receivd by Spining.
Snowd all day [&] windy. I have been at home, paird & Cut apples to make Sause. at home. mr Ballard to Parish meeting.
rainy. Son & D t Lambd Sett out after Breakfast for home. mrs Wiman here to Tea. we hear that M. Purington is near y e Close of life. at home. my Childn left here, mrs Wiman Came aft n .
Clear. I have been at home. at home.

Clear. I am informd that Son Lambard removes his Famely to Augusta this day to y e place he went from to Varsalboro. Jona & Wil m Ballard & Luke Barton took Breakfast here. I have workt Some in [ga d ]. at home.

Clear part of ye day. I have been Cuting apples to Day and doing hous work. mr Ballard brot home 5 lb roals from y e meshien and went to y e Coart hous. A man from Hamdin here at Evn to do business with him. he Supt here, gave mr Ballard 1 Dollar for his Service. at home.

Clear and very pleas t . mr Ballard Sumoned to Coart. I have Done hous work, gathered in y e last Beens in my gardin, Scolt my pickeles &C. got Some apples in. mr Ballard Came f m Coart & went to Son Lambds. I Sent them a q t Plumbs. they are wel. my Dagt Sent me Some Sugar. at home. I Churnd 3 lb _ Butter.
Clear. I did my hous work and went to Son Lambards in order to go & See Sister Barton tomorrow. at Son Lambards.
Clear. I have been at home. mr Ballard to thee Settlement. at home.

Clear and very pleast for y e Season. I have been at home, Bakt apple & Squash Pies. Hannar Pollard, Dolly & Lucy Lambard H. S. & M & Saml Ballard & Nancy Smith took Tea. y e 3 former Breakfasted & Dind with us. at home. 7 Grand Childn took Tea, Nancy Smith allso.

Clear. I have done various kinds of work. mr Ballard to Son Pollards to Carry his Cloaths to be made, and to mr Bonds for Linings &C. Wil m Ballard Sleeps here. at home. mr Soal brot us a load of wood.
Clear. I have been at home, did my hous work & matters in my Gardin. mr Whitny took Breakfast, he Paid mr Ballard 2 Do ls & 50 Cents. Ephm & Wil m Dind here. at home. mrs Wiman here to Tea.

Clear and warm. mr Ballard went to P. Voces and got Lyning for his Blue Coat, Sally is turning it. Wido Butterfield and her Dagt Cleark here, took Tea. Sally & Rhoda went to Son Jonas at Evng. at home, had Compy. Churnd [3] lb Butter.
Clear and Cold. I have done hous wk and part of my washing & knitt a t Evn g . Jon a Sleeps here. Sole and Lethers brot a Load wood y s morn. at home, did Some washing.
Clear. I have washt and knitt Some. Sally helpt me. at home.
Clear part of y e Day. I have wash t Some and Bakt. I sent Some Syrrup to Ep ms wife. at home.

Clear. I feel Some more Comfortable. mrs Wiman left me before noon. mrs Smith & Gilbard here aftern, made Tea. I drank 2 Cups, the first food I have taken in 48 hours. at home, very unwel but Easier then I was.

Clear & warm. I have done hous work, Bakt b n & flower Bread. mr Ballard had his Boards hauld. mr Soal brot [1] load Jason Pierces, he Dind here. mr Heartwel Butcherd a Lamb. at home. Dagt B., mrs Cleark & [Paringt] here.

Foggy last night & y s day. Wil m Cypher Cut wood foren, he finisht Cuting what was at y e door after dinner & left here. mr Tarbil Dind here. I have done hous work [&] knit Some. this day is y e anaversary of my Marriage, 52 years since. O the Scins which have past Sinc y t time. I lay museing thereon and Slept but little. at home, anaversary of my Marriage.

Clear. Betsy Andrews Came to mend Cloaths, Sally Church to wash. mr Ballard went to See a vesel Launched. returnd, informd y t a Son of Timo y Page was taken out of the river by Harmon Barton & is alive. Saml, Son of Esqr Titcomb by the Same hand but was not brot to life. at home. Drowned, Saml Titcomb.

raind ys morn. I have been at home, got in part of my Beet & Carrot Seed. mr Ballard been down below and to mr Swantons on Business for Son Jon a . I learn he Came home to his famely y s Evng. at home, did various kinds of Service.

Clear. mr Ballard to meeting, it was Communion day. I was not able to attend. I went to See mrs Heartwels Child that is unwel. Elijah & Luke Barton, Allin Lambd, Jona & Ephm Ballard Supt here. Sally, Marl a & Hannah Dind here. at mr Heartwels to See a [Sick] Child.

X. Birth mr Perkins Son [&] first Born. XX. Clear. I was Calld at 2h y s morn to go and See a mrs s Perkins who was in Labour. Shee was Safe Delivd of a Son, her first born, at 4h morn, and I returnd home at about 7h morn. left my patienls Cleverly. Cyrus Came here and went to meeting. mr Pratt performd from Ezekiel 7 Chap y e last Claws of y e 10 vers, pride is Buded. Son Jona & wife & 3 Child n , Jas n Pierce & wife & 1 Child here to Tea. Cyrus Sleeps here, H. Pol d , H. & Sally Ballard allso. at mr Perkins s . Birth 5th. recvd 9 s / as a rewd.
Clear. I have been at home. Sons Cyrus, Jon a , Pollard, Dagts Pollard & Ballard, Sally & Dolly Pollard, Jona s 3 Daugts took Dinner with us. [at home, Child n here.]
Clear. I have Done work in my Gardin and observed the Eclips, it was not total here but very Dark. at home.

Clear the mos t of y e day. I have Done my hous work and knit Some. Jon a & Wil m Sleep here. the interment of the remains of mr Joshua Davis at Sydna was this day. at home. Funeral Joshua Davis of Sydna.

Clear. I have been washing and workt in my Gardin and went to mr Gillbards. mr Ballard been down below, has taken up the note which he gave to Shubal Pitts. mrs Young Sleeps here. at Gilbds. mrs Young Sleeps here, Ea t Supper & Breakfast.
Clear. Polly washt my hous and Scourd. I did my hous work. mr Ballard returnd from [Varsalboro]. at home.

Clear. we were informd Early this morn that mr James Springer was found Lifeles in mr Pains orchard. mr Ballard went up and was on y e Jury. Capt Robinson was foreman. Son Jonas wife, W m & Cornelus Smith Supt here. a t home. Dagt Balld here at Evng. mrJames Springer found dead y s morn.
Clear and pleas t . I came home, did my work and Cut Pumkin to drie. Hannah Pollard, H., S., & Mt a & W m Ballard Dind here. the Girls tooks Tea, Genny Cottle allso. at Ditoes, returnd home at [ ].
Clear part of y e day but Cold and windy. mr Ballard went about a road by mr Hainses. Judg Coney paid him 6/ for his Service. at home.
Cloudy. I have been at home. mr Wiman Carted the hay from y e Garden in to the Barn. Mr Gilbd took Tea with us. at Gilbad [ ] to my hous and put him to bed.
Cloudy foren. mr Ballard went to Son Lambds, Carried Some Currents & Squash. I have harvested String Peas and done various kinds of work. mr Ballard Says Soffia Came [yester] day. at home. [ ].
Clear. mr Ballard to [G ]. I have been Doing hous work and Cuting apples to drie. at home.
Clear and very Pleast. I have washt, Cut apples &C. mr Ballard to Coart. a t home. Josh Heaths Child Expired

Clear. Old Lady Hamlin, Dag t Pollard & Jona Ballard Junr Came to Son Lambds. they, my Self & Dagt Lambd took our Departure fm there a t 10h morn, arived at my Sisters about 3 aft. we find them in Comfortable Circumstances. at Ditoes, Ben n Browns & Sister Bartons.
Clear. Son Cyrus Came to help his Father. I have been a t [home]. at home. Cyrus [here to help his Dad.]
Clear. my Grand dauters went to Son Jonas after Breakfast. I have Cut Apples and Pumkin to Drie. mrs Gilbard & Child n here, took Tea. at home. mrs Gilbd here, & Child n .
Cloudy and Chilly. I have got in feuel, done hous work & some mending for Son Cyrus &C. mr Ballard been to Son Jonas part of ye day. at home.
Clear and Cold. I have washt. mrs Gilbart here for water. at home & at mr Wigens. [15]

Clear and very warm. I went to See Son Jonas wife who is unwel, has y e ague in her face & other Complaints. Doct Howard to See her, Extracted a tooth for her. mrs Pierce there, informd me y t Warrin Stone & Sally Church were to be Joind in wedlock this day. mr Ballard Cut fart of his Stalks and got some wood. Allin Lamb d here. at Son Jonas, his wife unwel.

X. [Birth mr Wigens Son. XX]. Clear and Cold. mrs Wigens was Delvd about 3h y s morn of a, her 2 nd Son & 4th Child by this Husband. I left her and infant Cleverly and returnd home at 11h am. Susanna Smiths remains were intered yesterday. mrs Gilbart and Capt [Smiths] wife Spent Evng here. at mr Wigens s . Birth 1 st . fee receivd by Son Jon a 9/. [16]

Clear part of the day, Snowd at Evn g . I brot in the Cloaths I washt yesterday, have persued my washing. Son Jona s wife took Tea with us. Jon a & W m Sleep here. Jason Pierces Son Henry Expired y s morn. at home. Son Jonas wife here. 2 of the Boys Sleep here. Death.

X. Birth Son Lambd 5th Son & 7th Child. XX. Cloudy part of the day, raind a little. I was Calld by Allin Lambd to go and See his Mother who is unwell. Shee was Safe Delivd about 6h Evn of her 5 Son which wd 12 lb. I Sett up with her all night, Shee had much Pain. at Son Lambards. Birth 12 th . fee receivd by work.
Clear and Cold. I have been at ["home" - implied]. home. [17]
Clear. I have done some washing. Cyrus Carried 3 lb factory Cottne warp to Dagt Lambd to weav. at home. mr Ballard receivd TaXes [ ] Pierce.

Clear Part of this day. I have knit Some, Bak t and done other matters. A mr Kidder from Hamden Came here on business with mr Ballard at 2h pm for which he receivd 20 Dollars. he dind here. Son Jona took Supper here. at home. mr Kidder here on Business with mr Ballard.
Clear part of the day. Luke Barton has Slept here 2 nights Past. he Set out for home this morn, Jon a B. Junr with him. at home. [18]
Snowd foren n . I have been at home, washt Some and did my hous work. Cap t Smith and mr Soal brot us wood. Jon a B. Junr Sleeps here. at home. Jon a B. Jun r Sleeps here.

Clear and pleast for Decem r . mr Ballard & Cyrus to meeting, my Self and the girls a t home. Meriah Heartwel brot l lb _ meet home, there is 1 lb still due. Revd mr Stone Discoarst foren fm Numbers 23 C, 10 vers; aftern fm Psalms 62 nt , 8 th vers. at home.
Snows. Son Cyrus Came here, he went to meeting. my husband & I at home. at home. [19]

Birth Ant a Brackets s 2 nd Daugt. Clear [&] Cold. Son Cyrus Came home and went to meeting. I have Bakt bread and Pies, was Calld at 2h pm to go and See the wife of Anthina Bracket who was in Labour. her illness Came on while at the hous of worship. Shee was Safe Deliverd at 6h Evng of her 2 nd Daught and 7th Child. I left them as well as Could be Expected, arivd at home at 11h 30 m . at a. Bracketts. Birth 2nd.
Snowd, haild & raind. I have been at home, mr Ballard allso. at home.
Clear. I have been at home. at home.
Clear and Cool. I have done hous wk, fild Sausages & knit some. Jona & Ephm [been] here. at home. [20]
Clear, thawd Some. I Scrapt [fine] Chips and put west Side our hous for Banking. have knit Some, paird and Cut Some apples. William been here, Sleeps here. at home.
Clear and Cold. I have done my washing and knitt Some. Ephm Came and Cutt wood. he, Sally & Martha Dind here. at home.
Clear part of the day. I have been a t home, did hous work, mended hoes and began to foot a pair. Jona & Wilm Sleep here. at home.
Clear and Cold. I have had the tooth aick and feel very unwel. at home. [21]

Clear & very Pleast foren n . Soal and Parker Cut wood at y e door and Dind. W. Hanes wife took Tea, Sally Pierce allso. Jon a and Will m Sleep here. at home. Robinson y e Taylor had two Daugts Born y s day.
Clear. I have been at home, workt Some in my Gardin & did hous work. I receivd a Letter y s day of July 27 [ ] Sister Waters. at home.
Clear part of the day. Allin Came and Conducted mrs Evins & Barny home. mr Ballard Surveying for Step n Page. at home, ironed my Cloaths.
Clear. I have done my hous work & dug our Beets & Carrots. mrs Heartwel Calld in foren, mrs Wiman aftern. I [thurnd] 2 lb Butter. at home, got in Beets & Carrots.
Cloudy, raind at Evn g . I have Cut Squash [&] Pumkin ti drie. A mr Linsey and Georg Andrews here. at home. funeral of Old Lady Fairbanks of Winthrop.
Cloudy the most of y e day. I have been very unwel but have made two Pots of apple Sause. we removd our Bed into the kitchen. at home, feel Some [better] than I did [y s ]morn.
Clear. I have been very unwel. mr Wait Calld here, he Extracted my tooth. at home. [22]
Clear. I have been at home. mrs Wade, [ward] & wiman to See me, mrs Brown allso. at home.

Snowd foren. Son Cyrus gave up ye Idea of going to Ordination by reason not being able to get a hors fitt to wride. he went to y e Settlement, got me _ gn Jinn & 2 Skeins fine [thread]. he Sleeps here ys night. at home.
Clear foren and part of y e Evn g . I have done my hous work and Brewd and knitt Some. Jon a [&] Wil m Sleep here. at home, Brewd. Son Jonas Birth day.
Clear. I went with Sister Barton to help quilt on a Bed quilt. Sister & Sally Pierce dind here. mr Ballard to [Coart]. at Son Jonas. Sis t Barton Sleeps here.
Clear and pleas t . I have done my hous work and Cut apples to drie. mrs Farewel Came here, tarries all night. mr Ballard been to Coart. at home. mrs Farewel here.
Clear. we all Sett out for home, Came to Son Lambds. mrs Hamlin & Jona went home. Dagt Pollard & I tarried all night. I feel very much fatagued. at Ditoes.
Clear, a hard frost. I have done my work, went at Evng to See mrs Heartwel. Shee is unwel, Doct Howard to see her. at mr Heartwels.

Cloudy the most of y e Day. I have Sorted apples & Cut some and done my hous wk. son Lambd Came and Conducted the girls home. W m Stones wife brot 14 Skeins filling yarn which Shee spun for me. I had paid her 2 s before. Shee had _ bus l apples y s day. at home. mrs Slone brot my yarn home.

Saml was 19 months, 8 days & 3 hours old when he Expired. Clear and Beautiful weather. Son Cyrus Came home, took Breakfast. his Father & he went to meeting, it is a day of Thanksgiving. Allin Lambd Came here, informd [me] his Marm is very unwel and wisht me to go and See her. Wil m Ballard Came for Safron, Says Saml is very Sick. mr Ballard Dind at Son [Lambds]. at Son Lambards. my daug t is very unwel. mr Swanton & wife Supt there & Spent y e Evning.
Clear and very Cold. mr Wait Cut Some wood for us. Revd mr Stone Came to See us, Spent Evng here. he has attend Funeral of a Child of a mr [no entry]. at home. Revd mr Stone here. [23]
Clear. daug t Lambard and mrs Gill Came here foren. Son and Dagt Ballard and Martha Sup t here. we Bakt apple Pies. at home. [Child n to See us.]
Clear and Cold, it Snowd at Evng & all night. Dagt Ballard Sett out for [Bodingham]. Sally & martha Spent aftern [here]. at home. Sally and Martha here.
Clear Day and Evng. my husband and I, mrs Gill & daugt Lambd, mr Lambd & Allin Dind at Son Jonas. Sally Miller was Sent for, her Father being Sick. at Son Jonas. Dind and took Tea there.

Snowd last night & haild & raind. I have been at home, done my hous work, Bakt and ironed part of my Cloaths. Jon a B. Sleeps here. he has Spent the most of the day, Cut wood &C, done other Chores. at home. Death Esqr Farewels wife.
Cloudy, snowd & raind. I am at Ditoes. my dag t is as wel as Can be Expected, the infan t well. I tarrie there y s night. a t Ditoes.
Clear and Pleast. I have washt my N. room. Son Ephm Dind here, [ ] allso. he & W m Sup t . Jon a has been unwel all day. at home. [mr Bald been to be Shaved ].

Clear & Cold. a mr Ward from Hamden here. Son & Daugt Lambd here. Son Pollard Came and Conducted his Father & I to Son Jonas to attend at the interment of Henry, Son of Jason Pierce. mr Smith Deliverd A Discoars from Jobe 14 C, 10 vers. at Son Jonas to attend the Funeral of Henry Pierce.
Cloudy and Some rain. I returnd home after noon, Cyrus here. I am very much fatagued and Laid on the Bed y e Evn g . at Detoes, returnd home aftern.
Clear and Pleast. mr Ballard to meeting all day, Son Cyrus forn and to Son Pollards aftern. I have been at home, got my Bed into y e N. room. Cyrus Sleeps here. [at home.] mr Ballard to meeting.

Clear. we were informd about 10h y e morn that our friend Charls Gill had Cutt his Throat with a Shave in So horrable a manner that no hopes of his life remains. may God of his infinite goodness Support his wife and all Connections in this dreadful tryal. I went to his hous about 1 O Clock, found he was Expired. he had his Senses & wrote Some lines. mrs Gills Tryal is allmos t insupportable. at mrs Gills, her Husband Cut his Throat with a Shave this morn. the Sleigh oversett and hurt my face.

Clear till aftern, Snowd at Evng. Son Lambard Came for me to go to his hous, Conducted me and his Daugt Lucy there. my Daugt is not very wel but Shee Cutt out a gound & Skirt for me and part made them. I am there ["ys night" - implied]. at Son Lambards. Cap t Haman Expired ys night.
Clear and very Cold. I have been at home. Cyrus went to the Settlement foren and to mr Cumings s aftern. Jon a and W m B. Sleep here. at home.

Clear. I left mr Braleys Early this Morn, Came to Son Jonas. he Sent for his Father, we took Breakfast there. Son Lambard & [Gidyon] Barton allso. I Came home and did Some washing. Georg Heartwel had a fitt and I was Calld there. [Loiza] Gilbd is unwel allso, and Parkers Child. at mr Braleys, Son Jonas & Heartwels; have done Some washing.
Cloudy. I have been at home, Bakt mins Pies. my husband is unwel. at home.

Clear. I have Done my hous work, Scrap t up fine Chips and laid west Side the hous to keep y e frost out. Soal & Sam l Parker got wood for us foren. Phillip Bullen here, Dind. mr Ballard been to y e Barbers. receivd 3 letters at y e Tole hous from Bro r Jon a Moore. at home. we receivd Letters from Bror Jon a Moore, Rochester.
Clear but Cool. I have Bakt Some mins Pies and done my hous work. Saml Parkers wife here for Potatoes, had _ peck. at home.

Cloudy morn. mr Ballard Carried 1 Bus l Corn to mr Cumings s . y e mill was up and he left it. it Snowd aftern. Betsy Andrus here, brot home a Shirt Shee had made for Son Cyrus and took the other to make. I am informd that Henry Pierce is very sick. at home. Betsy And s here. Snowd aftern.
Clear. I have been to Son Jonas to tell them there were Swine in their field. done my hous work & Some in my Gardin. Cut apples &C. mr Ballard doing work for Son Jona. at Son Jonas.
Clear. I did my hous work & went to See L e faett Ballard who is unwell. at Son Jonas.
Clear. mr Ballard & I attended the funeral of mr James Springer. A mr Car Presideed, he Discoarsed from Amos 4 th , 12 th . at the funeral of mr James Springer.
Clear. I have Sorted my apples and put them into y e Seller. mr Ballard went to mr Saml Cuminges, bot a Chees, wd [no entry]. at home. mr Ballard to mr Saml Cumings s .

Clear and pleasant. through Gods mercy I am So much Comfortable that [I] have done a larg washing. mr Ballard Seemed very decreped this morn but he went to Son Jonas to Sett [hoops] on a Cask, Came home, Dind, and went and finished. I have brot 14 pails of water. at home, have Done a larg wash.
Clear. mrs Smith here at Evng. I have Done a larg wash. at home.
Clear. Son Cyrus Sett out from here for mr Cumings s by way of Augusta meeting hous, he reacht there Safe. I was very unwel foren n . at home, knit Some [at] Evng.
