Clear. mr Ballard to Coart. Sister Barton left here. I walkt as far as the Bars with her, returnd and found Daught Pollard here. Shee hoped to have Seen her aunt. Shee and I Dind and went to Son Jonas. we got the bed quilt out. at Detoes. Dagt Pollard dind here.

Clear. mr Ballard a t Coart. mrs Farewel left here after Dinner. two men from Hamden here on business with mr Ballard, they Sleep here; both by y e name of Snow. at home Cuting apples to drie. Joshua Heaths oldest Child interd, it Expired 8th inst.

Clear. Dagt Pollard & I left Son Lambds. Came to my home, find mrs Farewel and Sister Williams here. we took dinner. Son Pollard Came & Conducted his wife home. I was Seesed with the Collic in the night. Sister W. attended me. at Son Lambds & Came home. Sis t Williams here.
Clear. Joanna Smith wash t for me. I Paid her 2 [ ] 3, I went in to see mrs Heartwel, made her Bed &C. Shee is Some better. Jon a Ballard has seen 15 years. a t Detos. Jo a Smith washt for me.
Clear. I have been at home foren, to Lecture aftern. wrode up with Son Jon a in y e Shais, Calld at his hous. at Lecture.

Clear. at Son Lambds. my Daug t had Severe Pain in her Side & Limbs y s morn. Luke Barton Came and informd us that Saml Ballard Expired at 5h y s morn. I left Son Lb ds and Came to Son Jonas where I tarried till near Sun Sett. may the God of mercy Sanctyfy his Chastisements for our Ever lasting good. at Detoes & at Son Jonas. his Dear little Sammuel Expired at 5h y s morn. Hannah is very unwel.

Clear and Cool. I have been at home. Allin, Barny, Lucy, Ephm and William Sleep here. I have done my hous work and knit Some. mrs Gilbard here. I have felt quite unwel . my husband has a bad Cold. at home.
Snowd foren n . I have been at home, washt Some and did my hous work. Cap t Smith and mr Soal brot us wood. Jon a B. Junr Sleeps here. at home. Jon a B. Jun r Sleeps here.

Clear. mr Ballard and Cyrus to meeting. I have had y e Collic all day and night. Sally Pierce Came and Stayed with me all night. I got Some Easier. Hannah here part of y e day. at home, Sick with the Collic.
Clear. mr Ballard & Cyrus been to the Settlement. I have washt. Jon a & Wil m Sleep here. Cyrus went to mr Cumings s . at home.
Clear part of y e day, Snowd a little. I have been kniting. Sally did y e hous wk. at home.

Clear till near night, Snowd before 9 and all night. mr Ballard been to Town meeting. I have done my hous work and knit, finisht futing a pair of hoes for Son Cyrus. at home. mr Ballard to Town Meeting.
Clear and Cold. I tarried with mrs Gill till aftern when I returnd home. bro t Baray & Lucy Lambd home with me. at Ditoes. [Gramr] School [h s ] Consumed by fire.

X. Birth Warin Stones Daugt. XX. Clear. I was Calld at 2h y s morn to Warrin Stones wife who was in Labour. mr Soal got out of bed when I got to Son Jonas and assisted me. I arivd Safe though the traveting was very bad by reason of y e Snow being Drifted. the Patient was Safe Deld at 1h y s morn of a Daugt, her first Child by y s Mariage. I returnd home at 11h 30m. mr Ballard and Son Cyrus went to Town meeting. at Warrin Stones. Birth 7th. June 30th receivd6/ of Warrin Stones wife in Part of my demand. recvd 3/ by JohnWall.
Cloudy. Son L. Went to Magr Grants on business, returnd at Evng. I am there this night, my Dag t finished my Cloaths. a t Ditoes.

Snowd. I was Calld at 12 o Clock by EbenZ r Trask to go and See his wife who is unwel. mrs Hammond was brot there before my arival. Shee and lhe women went home and I tarried with her till Feb y y e 8 when I Came to Son Pollards. tarry till Monday 9 th when I was Calld back. at home. Calld to mr Trasks in y e night.
Snowd from 3h pm all night, a Severe Storm. I have done my hous work. Jon a B. Slept here. Dagt Ballard Sent me a Decanter of Cherry Rhum. I Sent her 2 qts Vinagar. at home.
Clear. we washt & Did other things. we Bakt bread & Pies. at home.

Clear. Soal & Parker go t wood this day & Cut Some at y e door. Wil m went to mr Rheds for Butter, Chees & Bees wax. mr Kidder from Hamdin here for a Sertifacate, paid 2 Dols & 12 Cents. at home. Son Jona, W m & Sally Dindhere. Lefaett Supt & Sleeps with W m .
Snowd fore n , Clear aftern. I have been at home. Son Lambard Came for Barny & Lucy, he Conducted Sally Ballard home. Jon a and Ephm Sleep here. at home. Soal, Jona, L e faett [ ] Wm Dind here.
Clear and pleast. mr Ballard & Cyrus to y e review. I went aftern to help mrs Gillbard quill. harvisted Some beens. at mr Gillbard s .
Cloudy [&] Some rain. I have done Some washing, Cut apples, Cleand my hogg pen, Cleand my Sellar &C. at home, done various kinds of work.
Clear. I have done hous work, Cut apples and Some other matters. Cap t William Pullin and wife Sleep here, they have been to the funeral of her Mother. at home. Capt Pullin & wife Sleep here.

Cloudy, Snowd aftern. War n Stones wife here, had 3 pecks apples. Hannah Pollard Came here at noon, Han h Ballard & Sally allso, they Dind. H. P. tarried allnight. mr Ballard went to mr Cyphers for a quarter of Beef, it w d [no entry] lb. he went and Setled with mrs Farewel for the Cow we took of her last year. at home.

Clear part of the day. Deac Page, mr Woodward, mr Bullen & wife here. mr Ballard gone to mill. mr Wd wd brot me Some mitk & Chees. Deac n Page gave me 20 Cents. at home, friends here. mr Ballard to Mill.

Clear part of y e day and Cool. this is y e Anneversary of my Birth. I have Seen 72 years, fue and have y e years of thy hand made been, O God. may I Serve the better the remaining part of my life is my Sinceare [Desear]. Dagt Ballard, her Daugts, Sally & Martha took Tea with us. Jon a & W m Supt & Sleep here. at home. mr Heartwel Cutt Some wood for us. I have Seen 72 years this Day.
Clear part of y e day, Cloudy at Evn g , the wind S. I have been rakeing Chips. finisht Clarifying the grees & Bones for Soap and part did my washing. at home makeing Soap.
Cloudy and some rain. mr Ballard has been to y e Settlement. I have been at home, Done my hous work. Warrin Stones wife here to Borrow my flax Come. at home. mrs Stone here.
Clear. I have been at home. mr Ballard been to y e barbers. at home.

Clear, So great a frost that there was ice on tubs of water at our back door. y e mr Snows took Breakfast and Sett out for home. I have Bakt & Done other matters. Son Jonas wife here to Tea. at home. mr Ballard to Son Pollad s & to y e barbers.
Clear. Sister Willms left here after Breakfast. I have been very sick. mrs Farewel tarried with me and did my work. mr Ballard got me a Box Andersons Pills. I took 2 at night. at home, very Sick.
Clear. Jonas wife here. mrs Wait & Mastin took Tea here allso. I have brewd & done my ironing. mr Ballard bot 13 lb Beef & galn Molases. at home.
Clear. I have been at home, Bakt twice and did other matters about hous. a t home.

Death Jason Pierces Son. Cloudy & Some rain. I have washt some and done my hous work. Son Ephm here, Cyrus Came home. mr Ballard went to mr Slones to request him to attend the funral of Son Jonas [Child] tomorrow. at home. Sons Cyrus & Ephm [ ].

Clear and not so Cold. mr Lambard here to Breakfast, he wishes us to keep his Child n till he removs this Side y e rever which he Expects will take Place next weak. I have washt and Brewd, brot 8 pails water. Son Cyrus Came here y s aftern. I have been very unwel this night. Cyrus got up before Day to nurs me. at home.

Clear foren, Cloudy aftern. I have felt very unwel. mrs Gilbard Came and Spent aftern with me, made my Bed and Cookt Some Supper. Exra Town and Son Ephm took Supper here.Soffy is unwel. at home. Saml Cumings s wife has Lost a Sister, Nthls wife a Brother.

Clear. mr Ballard and Cyrus to meeting. Revd mr Stone discoars t from PSalms 73 C 25 vers. Son Lambd to meeting foren, his wife & I went to Son Jonas. he Came a t noon, brot Lucy and left her; took his wife & Babe and went to Son Pollards. I Came home and Cookt Pork & Greens. Sally, Martha & Lucy Came home with me and took Tea. at Son Jonas, Son & Dagt Lambds, & Son Pollards. mr Ballard is 82 years old y s day.
rain. mr Ballard & Cyrus to meeting. I have felt unwell. mrs Gilbard here [&] mr Turner performd. at home.

Clear. I have been very feeble. mrs Gilbard Came in to See me, got Dinner. Hannah got Breakfast and did up my work foren. Ephm & Will m Sleep here. A mr Child here for ointment for A mrs Winslow. at home, very unwel. mrs Gilbard to See me.

Clear foren, Cloudy and some rain aftn. I have Sett Leutice, removd stones which were dug by the hogs pen, planted Squash at the west Side the hous. mr Ballard Planted Potatoes N of y e hous. Cyrus to Sons Lambd & Ephms, and to Esq r Bridges. the Democrats were fireing Canon and Ringing the Bell on Sullivan being Governer. they began before Sun rise and kept it up till after 12 O Clock. at home. Democrats Rejoiceing.

Clear. Allin Lambard Conducted his Sister Lucy & Sally Miller here. mrs Wiman Came to see me this aftern, took Tea here. we are informd that Esqr Farewels wife Expired last Saterday. I have been at home, done hous wk & knit. at home. Sally Miller & Lacy L. Came here. mrs s Wiman here.
Clear. I have been at home. at home.

Birth EbenZ r Trasks Dagt. XX. mrs Trask was Safe Delived ys morn before day light of her 3 Daught and 9 Child. I left her and inft Cleverly & relurnd home before noon. at mr Trasks. Birth 3 d . receivd 1 Dollar & 5 lb flax.
Snowd all day. I have Bakt white & brown Bread and knit Some. Jon a Jun r & Wm Sleep here. at home, Bakt.
Clear and Cool. Son Cyrus Came home, his Father & he & Allin Lambd attended funeral. I did not feel able to attend my Self. Cyrus Sleeps here. at home. Funeral of mr Gill.
Clear and more moderate. I have done my washing and hous wk, Shoveled a path to my wel. mr Ballard went to Son Pollards. at home.

Clear till after 2 pm then Cloudy. I have been very ill with an uncommon pain in my right Side. mr Ballard been down to Judg [Norths] on busines. I have been alone, had to bring in Chips to keep a fire. mrs Nason Calld in to get Some Dock root for y e itch. at home, very unwel through the day & Night.

Clear [part] of y e day. I have been at home. Saml Parkers wife washt Some Shirts & Blanketts for me. Allin and Barny Lambd and Ephm Ballard took Tea here. mr Ballard has been to y e Settlement, bot a Chees and _ gn Spirit. mrs Parker had _ Bus l [Potoes], Shee had _ Ditoe before. [at home]. [Soal] and Parker Ploughd our [Corn] field. mrs P. Washt.

Clear Part of the day. mr Ballard and Son Cyrus went to Coart. I have leveled the Gardin North of y e rock & west to the Curent Bushes, planted Mellons & Squash. Son Town Sleeps here, his famely are wel. Jackson y e Barber Expired y s morn. at home. workt in My Gardin. Son Town Sleeps here. Death of Jackson.
Clear. I left Son Lambds after Diner & returned home. Allin has been to Magr Grands & Conducted me home. at [Diloes] & Came home.

Snows & Blows but we are able to Make a fire and have food to Eat, which is a great Mercy for which I wish to thank y e Great Doner. mr Ballard went to Son Jonas. I finisht Wil ms hoes and began to foot one for Cyrus. at home. there was a meeting at Son Jonas to Chuse oficers.
Clear. I have washt my wool and workt in my gardin. mr Ballard to Coart. Son Town left here. Cyrus Shearing Sheep for mr Bridg, 19 in Number, recd 4 s /6 d .
Clear part of y e day. I have been at home. H. Ballard & Sally Pollard Came here, Sleep here. [Studson] Soal & Ephm Ballard Sup t here. at home, Grand Children here.

X. Birth James Ketons Daug. XX. Clear. I have done my washing was was Calld to go to mr Ketons, his wife was Safe Deld at 9h Evng of her 5 th Daugt & 10 th Child. I tarrie all night. mrs Kingsly went home. at mr Ketons. Birth 4 th . receivd 9 s march [180 ].

X. Birth James Fogs Daugt by Rachel Smith. XX. Clear and Cold. I was Calld at 3h y s morn to See Rachel Smith who was in Labour. Shee was Safe deld of a Daugt which Shee declard James [Fog] was the Falher of. I returnd home at 2h 30 m . at home till 9h ys morn. Birth 5th. June 24 th recvd 6/ in part [ ].

Clear part of y e day. I have workt in my Gardin, planted bleu potatoes, 2 lb wt, Some at the S. Side y e Gardin and Some where the apple trees were removed from. mr Ballard & Cyrus been to Coart. mrs Parker here, Shee has been unwel, had a Boil on her Breast. at home, workt in my Gardin. Funeral of Jackson the Barber.
Clear. I have done my hous work, Some in my Gardin and washt. [mr] Parker dind, his Sister Dolly Dind here. mr Ballard and Cyrus [been to] Coart. at home, workt in my [Gardin] &C.

rain. I have been at home. Hannah Pollard Came from Son Lambds. Allin, W m Swanton & Edw d Savage Conducted her. Shee helpt me about my work and went to Son Jonas to Sleep. I have Bakt & Breud y s day. at home, Bakt and Breud.

Clear. Capt Pullin and Lady left here after Breakfast home ward bound. I have been doing hous wk, raiking & Piequing Chips &C. mr Ballard been to y e Barbers. at home. Capt Pullin & Lady left here for home. Jason Pierce [ ].

Clear the most of the day. H. Pollard went to Son Jonas after breakfast. I have Bakt and Done Some more washing and ironed part of my Cloaths. at home. mrs Heartwel Calld in here, Sabry Getchel allso.
rainy. I have Done Some washing. Jona & Ephm Sleep here. Wilm Pierce Dind here. I roasted a Goos which Son Town gave me on y e Evng of Jany 1 st . at home. W m Pierce of Lake Champlain Dind here.

Clear, Cold & windy. I have been at home, done Some washing and mending. mr Ballard been to Son Jonas. mr B. Petingail here. mr Ballard Paid his parish Tax to him. Jona and L e faett Sleep here. at home.
Cloudy. I have Sett up a Leach and hung my Soap on to boil and done my washing. Ephm & W m Sleep here. at home, washing & makeing Soap.
Cloudy and Some rain. I was Calld to See my Daught Pollard. mr Trask accompanied me. we reacht there before Dark. they Chose oficers at Son Jonas. at Son Pollards & Son Jonas.
Clear part of y e day, raind aftern & Evng. mr Ballard been to Coart. Cyrus to mr Cumings mill, brot _ Bushl rie & Do of indien meal. I have Sett 9 Cabage plants. at home, [ironed & work in my ].
Clear. Son Cyrus Came here, his Father and he went to meeting. Rev d mr Stone [Discoarsts] from John [16] C, 3 d vers. at home.
raind very Powerfully all day and till 9h Evn. the freshet is risen and done some Damage. mr Heartwel here y s day. Jon a & Ephm Sleep here. it grew very Cold before morn. at home.
Clear. Cyrus Came home and went to meeting. mr Haskal Performd. at home.

Cloudy foren, Clear aftern. mr Ballard and Son Cyrus to meeting. Revd mr Stone Discoars t from 1 Cron 28 Chap 9 th vers. Son Jona in here after meeting. Allin Lambd Came in to See us y s morn. Jona and W m Sleep here. I put my Soap ou t of y e kettle into the Barril. at home. Death of mrs Petingail.
Cloudy. I was at Son Pollds. at Son Pollards.

Clear. mr Ballard & Son Cyrus to meeting. Cyrus Sett out after after n Service to go to watervil. I have been at home and do not know bu t I Ever Shall be as I am not able to walk to meeting. mrs Thwing wrode up to See me. at home. mrs Thwing here.

Clear. Allin Lambd went home. Daugt Ballard took with us, her husband Dind. mr Soal and Rhuben Breakfasted & Dind. they got wood for us. Wil m Balld & Barny Lambd Sleep & supt here. I have been at home, Done my hous work. at home. I Desire to bless God, I am more Comfortable than I was yesterday.

raind and is very Cold. mr Soal and Parker Sett 80 apple trees in the field East of y s hous. I have done my hous wk & mended Stockins, did a little in y e Gardin. mr Ballard rak t wheat in about the rocks. mr Hearlwel movd his famely y s Evng. at home. we had Apple trees Sett out from y e Nusery
Clear part of the day. Sally Farewel here, dind and went to Son Jonas. I removd my gardin roots, feel fatagued. at home. Sally Farewel here.

Clear. I have been feeble y s day but Some Easier. mrs Parker Came here, helpt me get Dinner. mrs Wiman here to Tea, made my Bed and assisted me other ways. Hannah got Breakfas t . Ephm been to mill, had _ Bushl rie, Do of indien, ground for us. at home, feel Some better for which I Desire to bless the author of all Mercies.
Clear. I have been at home, mrs Wiman took Tea here. mr Chace got wood for us, W m Cypher Chopt it. at home. Funeral mrs Farewel.
Clear. mr m c farlin & W. Cypher Butchered a Swine which w d 160, they killd a Sheep allso for us. I have been at home [ Son Ephm ]. at home. our Swine was killd.
Clear. I have been at home. mrs Wade, [ward] & wiman to See me, mrs Brown allso. at home.
Clear. I have been at home, Cutt apples and knit Some. Wil m Sleeps here. at home.

Clear part of y e day. Son Lambds Child n went to Son Jona s after Breakfast, returnd at Evng. Wil m Pierce and mrs Wiman took Coffee with us. mr Heartwel informd me that Ben n Petty was dead, his death was ocationed by Nath l Dinglys Strikeing him with an adds. what are we Cuming to in this Eastern world. at home. mrs Wiman & Wil m Pierce here, Saml Parkers wife to Borrow Potatoes.

Clear. mr Ballard returnd from Son Pollards, informs y t Rhoda is very unwel. I have done some washing & Bakt Brown & flower bread and mins Pies. I feel very much fatagued. Joanny Smith Came in, Shee did my ironing and took Tea with us. Jona & Willian Supt allso. at home Joanny Smith here.

Clear till after 1h pm then Cloudy. I am still visited with a Pain in my right Side, have taken Senna and feel a little Easier. it began to rain at 9h Evn, raind all night. at home, very unwel this day. Son Jona in to See me. mr Soal [brot] a twitch wood.

Clear. I have Sett French Turnips and done my hous wk, put up Gardin Seed. Old mr Lambd Sleeps here. Allin and Barny Came with a hors Cart, Carrid Cyrus s Bed & Bid Stead and my Larg iron pot home. at home, did Some work in my Gardin. Bro r Lambard Sleeps here.

Clear Part of y e day. I have workt in my Gardin, over hauled wollin raggs, Cut Some for flock & Some for Carpet filling. mr Ballard been to the Settlement. Rachel Smith Paid [in] 1 Dollar in part of what was Due to me for asisting her in Child [Bed]. [at home. Rachel Smith paid 6/.]
Clear. I have workt in my Gardin, killd a great many worms & Buggs. Dagt Ballard & mrs Gill, Sally and Martha here to Tea. at home. Dagt Ballard & mrs Gill here.
Clear but Cool. mr Soal & Rheubin Brown got wood for us. I have done my hous work & knitt Some. at home.

Clear the most of the day. mr Ballard workt on the rode. I have felt very unwel but have done my hous work. mrs Parker Came in, warmd water to Soak my feet which Seemd to giv Some relief. I feel Greatful for the favour. at home.
Clear. Sally Miller & y e Girls went to Son Lambds. I washt the Buttery & kitchen. [Esq r ] Tylor from Hamden here on business with mr Ballard. at home. Esq r Tylor here.
Clear. I Came to Son Pollards with mr Oliver Cleark, find Rhoda Some better. I tarrie all night. A mr Chandler Came there. at Detoes & Son Pollards.
Clear and Cold. I have been at home. mr Trask & wife, Son Jon a & his wife & Sally Pierce took Tea. A mr Smith Eat here. H.B. & H.T. & w m Ballard look Breakfast here. at home. Friends to See us.

Clear and Cool. mr Ballard and I workt Some in the Gardin. I Sett Some Strauburies and wed the [allies] &C. have been over hauling Some of my old Linnen &C. at home. Son Jonas had 2 Bus Potatoes to Plant.

we have had a fine rain for which we ought to be thankful. mr Ballard and Cyrus to meeting. Daugts Ballard & Lambd, Allin, Ephm, Sally, Martha, Laiza Gillbard here aftern. I have been very feeble. at home, Child n here.
Clear part of y e day and very Cold. mr Soal Came and Cut wood, he & Ep m Dind here. ye latter Sleeps here. I have knit Some y s Evng. a t home.
Cloudy. Rheubin workt here this aftern. I went lo Son Jonas, took Tea with her. her husband not at home. at Son Jonas. [and] Sowd Turnips & [Lentens].
Cloudy. I was at Ditoes. at Ditoes.

Clear. mr Ballard fixing his ground to Plant. I have houghd [Some weads] down, removd ashes from My Leach tub. in giting it from y e form it fel on my right foot and lambd me very much, but I have Bakt not with Standing. I have planted read Corn and Beens, and Set Straburies after 9h pm. at home. hurt my foot but workt some in my Gardin. Cyrus Came home at Evng. Death Perez Hamlins wife.

X. Birth John Wals 2 nd Dagt. XX. Clear. I was Calld by John Wall at 6h ys morn to go and See his wife who was in Labour. Shee was Safe Delivd at 8h morn of her 2nd Daugt & 2nd Child. I left her Cleverly and arivd at home at 12 O Clock [percisly]. I got Dinner and did other matters. Daugts Ballard & Pollard took Tea, Sally, Martha & Ephm allso. at mr John Wals. Birth 11th. receivd 9/ as a reward.
rainy par t of y e day. mrs Farewel Came here foren n , Sleeps here. I have been at home, knit Some. at home, mrs Farewel Sleeps here.
Clear part of y e day, raind part of it. Cyrus Shearing Sheep for mr Andrews yesterday and y s day. I have done makeing Soap, have got almosl A Barrit ful. at home.

Clear and warmer. mrs Gill has been mending Cloaths for my husband and my Self. I have done my hous work. mrs Heath and Hannah Bald Dind. Sally, Martha & Loisa Gilbard Eat here. mr Ballard, mrs [Gil] and my Self took Tea at Son Jonas. John Town, Allin & Barny Lambard Supt and Sleep here. John informs me Mr Freeman in Dead and his remains interd. at home. John [Town] and Allin & Barny Sleep here.

Clear. I have been So well that I have boild my Soap grees and done my other work about hous. how wonderful is y e goodness of God to me. my husband Complains of feeling unwel. I gave him Some Rheubarb at Evng. Sally Pierce has been here y s Evng. at home, feel much Better than I have Since Saterday.
Clear. Rhoda Pollard, Dorkis Hodges, Sally & Martha Pollard here. I have been at home. Sally Miller & Lucy L. went to Son Jonas. at home. grand Childn here.

Clear. Son Ephm made us a present of 12_ lb Beef, Son Town of a fine Goos & 2 wings; they both Sleep here. a Funeral attended from Colo Lithgos. at home. Son Town informd y t a Black girl of Col o Lithgos was Baried y s day.
Clear. mrs Smith here at Evng. I have Done a larg wash. at home.

Clear and Cool. I have Bakt mins Pies, done my hous work. Allin Lambd Came here, informd that his Bro r W m Pas t 36 worms yesterday. Wil m Ballard has been unwel, has a Pain in his right knee. I bound it up & put on warm Spirit. at home.
Clear. I have been at home. Son Jona, W m Pierce, H. Getchel, H. Balllard been here. at home. [Son Jona Got us wood.]
Clear. it is Fast day. mr Ballard & Cyrus to meeting. I have been at home. mr Soal, who livs with Son Ephm, Calld here. at home. an infant of Robinson y e Taylor Expired.
rainy all day and night. Hannah Ballard and Dolly Lambard Came this morn, tarried all day and Night. William Sleeps here. very windy night. at home, very unwel. Hannah and Dolly here.
Clear. Bror Lambard went from here before Breakfast. I have removed part of y e hogg Pen, Sett more Turnips and Brewd. at home.
Raind. I have Sett Cabage Plants, Squash & Cucumbers. mrs Nason had Turnip & Cabbag plants. I wed 2 Beds in my gardin, kild many worms. mr Ballard Sett Cabbage plants East of [ ].
Clear Part of y e day. I have Done a larg washing and washt the Buttery and kitchen floors. at home, washt.

Clear. Dagt Ballard & Jason Pierces wife here. Sister Barton Left here. mrs Gill went to Son Jonas aftern. Lucy Smith Came here, Sleeps here. Son Cyrus Sett out for Watervil to tend Capt Pullins mill again. at home, feel Some Easier. Sister B left here.
A Severe Snow Storm. I have been at home. Jon a B. Slept here. at home.
Clear. I have been at home, feel very unwel. mrs Smith & Parker Calld in here. I have bakt and done my other hous work. at home. mrs Smith & Parker here.
Clear Except Some Showers. I have Persued my washing but feel very unable. mr Parker & wife here. at home, Dolly Lambd here.
Cloudy. Sally Pollard, H. Ballard & Dolly Lambard Came from Son Lambds, Allin Came with them; Crost y e river oposite here. the Girls went to Son Jonas, from there to [Son Polad]. at home.
Clear. James Keton Jun r Came and Conducted me home. Becky Cowen Calld here. mr Ballard gone to the Settlement. at Son Pollards and Came home.
Clear and Cold. I have felt unwel. mr Ballard been to y e Barbers and Stores. I did ironing, washt my Black Cloak and hankerchiefs. at home. Jon a & W m Sleep here.

Clear Part of y e day, we have Planted 3 lb Blue potatoes, part of y m in y e [N ] & part in y e plat of ground East of the hous. mr Ballard is gone to Son Jonas to Sett hoops on a tub. I have removd y e manure from under y e necessary hous. at home.
Clear. I have been at home. mr Balld to meeting aftern. Son Jonas wife, Sally & Martha took Supper with [us], Son Cyrus allso. at home.

Birth Saml Bralys Son. Clear. mr Ballard & Cyrus to Meeting. I was Calld to See Saml Braleys wife by Joel Savage. mountd the mare as Soon as my husband arivd from meeting. at Saml Braleys s Jun r . Birth 6th. at 9h Evng, a fine Son.
Clear. I have been at home, mr Ballard to meeting. Son Jona, his wife, Martha and y e infant here. mrs Wiman Calld in Jus t at Evn g , Son Ephm allso. at home. Lambe. Part of my Child n here.

[Clear.] Son Cyrus at home, mr Ballard [went] to meeting. [mrs] Savage Came here and Sleeps here. [I] have been at home. A mr Flanders was Drowned by the Kennebeck Bridg yesterday. at home. mr Flanders Drownd yesterday, fel fm y e pier of y e Bridg.
Cloudy part of the [day]. mr Ballard to meeting. I have been at home. Georg Stone here for apples. Jonas men got a Load of hay in to y Barn. [at ].

Clear Part of the day. mr Ballard to Parish Meeting. Dagt L Scolt the bead Stead in y e Bedroom, made my Beds & Swep t my hous and wen t to Son Jonas to be Conducted home. mrs s Kiddar and Thwing here and 3 of mrs T. Childn. I have workt in my Gardin Some. at home. Dagt Lambd left here. mrs Kidder and Thwing here.
Clear part of y e Day. Son Cyrus Came a t Evng intending to go to Ordination at winthrop. at home.

Clear part of y e Day. I have washt my Buttery and done my other wk. Ephm & Wil m Sleep here, informd me it was feard y t Daniel Savage was Drownd. I was Calld at 10h Evng to See Son Jonas wife who is unwel. was Calld at 10h Evng to Son Jonas, mrs Woodwd Came allso. we went to Bed, Slept some.
Clear Part of y e day. at Ditoes.
Clear. I have done my hous work, Bakt Pumpkin Pie. mr Ballard has Planted Potatoes, Corn & Beens in the field. my Cucumbers and Squash are Coming up. at home.

Clear. mr Ballard & Cyrus went to hear Prayers on the raising of the meeting hous. they Came home and took Breakfast and went down again to See y e raising. I have been doing matters in my gardin &C. at home. mr Bald & Cyrus Down to raising meeting hous.
A very rainy day. I have done my hous work, over hauld raggs and Cutt flocks. Hannah here for Currents. mr Ballard to my Sons, got pint & _ Spirril. at home.
Clear. I have been at home. mr Ballard went and Caried Some String Beens to Son Lambds. at home. Son Lambd Birthday.

Clear but Cool. mrs Farewel left here after Breakfast, Shee and Hannah Ballard went to her hous, found 3 men viz Daniel Woodward, W m Stone and a Son of Georg Rheeds, takeing Boards of her Barn. I have been at home, knit Some and tending my Leatch & Boiling Soap. Ephm & W m Sleep here. at home. mrs Farewel left here.

raind part of y e day. mr Ballard been diging gardin. I have washt Some and done my hous work. Son Cyrus went to the Settlem t , brot me 10 lb flower. I made a Cake for Supper. it is Election day. at home, did part of my washing.
Clear. I have done my hous work and Cut and puld up Grass, houghd my [red] Corn, wed the oinions and Sett Some plants. have felt feeble all day & fatagued at night. at home.

Clear part of y e day. I have been [a ] [doing] my Baking and hous work and other matters. mrss Smith took Tea here. Shee informd me y t Rachels babe had a Soar [mouth]. Le faett & Eph m [ ] Sleep here. inform y t Saml Parker attented to hang him Self. at [home], mrs Smith here.
[Clear.] I have done various kinds of work in the hous and gar d . mr Ballard been down to See Son Jon a twice this day. at home.
Clear. Wil m Cypher & mr Wickson got wood for us. I have been at home. at home.

Clear part of the day. Deac Page, mr Woodward, mr Bullen & wife here. mr Ballard gone to mill. mr Wd wd brot me Some mitk & Chees. Deac n Page gave me 20 Cents. at home, friends here. mr Ballard to Mill.
Clear foren, Cloudy aftern. mr Ballard went to Son Jonas to hoop a Barril. Sister Farewel Came and Sleeps here. I have done my houswork & knit Some. at home. mrs Farewel Came here.
Clear part of y e day. I have been at home. mrs Smith here for Safron &C. at home.

Clear Part of y s day, Some Shours. mrs Parker Calld in. Betsy Andrus Came, spent aftern; Cookt some food and made my Bed. I feel a little Easier for which I wish to Bless God. at home, feel some Easier. Hannah & Dolly went away foren n .
raind foren. I have been very unwell but have Bakt. Betsy Andrews here to mend Cloaths for Son Cyrus. at home, Bakt. Betsy And s workt here part y e day.
Clear. I have [Sett] plants & Done other work. mr Ballard went to Carrie Some Greens & Sallad to Dag t Lambd. at [home].

Clear part of y e day. I have workt in my Gardin, planted & transplanted Cucumbers; have done my ironing and Cutt Grass. mr Ballard been to the Settlement, bot me 4 oz Snuff. I do feel Some falagued. at home.

Clear. Lucy left here after Breakfast. Sally Cypher Came , did a larg wash & Scoured Puter. mrs Smith & Tibbets Came for Curents. mr Rob d Fletcher, Son Jon a & their wives & mrs Gill Came in to See us, did not tarrie to Tea. at home, had Company. I had a Distrest night.

a rainy day. I have finisht my washing but have felt very unwel. I gatherd Some String Beens towards night. Lucy Shaw here, informs mrs Getchels Child is very Sick, its Mother Came into the hous with Saml Parker yesterday. at home.

Snowd and very windy, Clear at Evng. I have done my hous work, washt some. Son Jona, his Sons Jona & Wil m Supt. y e boys Sleep here. they brot me a Pie. mr Heartwel here at Evng for Indien Meal & Candle. at home.

Clear Except a light Shower about 3h pm. I have done my hous work and washt, Sett 22 Cabbage Plants. mr Parker Calld in here. mr Ballard has been Surveying a piece of land North of here which Son Jona is about Setting to a mr Haws. at home. mr Ballad Surveying.

Clear and very warm. I have finisht my wash and done other Matters but I feel allmost over Cum. Dolly and Sally Left here after Breakfast. Cyrus is gone to the Settlement. I have roasted a pound Coffee which he brot me. at home, Company here.

Clear and Cool. I have been at home. mr Ballard to meeting, Revd mr Stone Discoart fm Luke 10 C 41 & 42 [v]. mrs Farewel Came here, Dind, Son Cyrus allso. he returned to Watervil. Son Jona Calld in. at home. [mrs Farewel &] Son Cyrus Dind here.

Clear. Sons Jona, Ephm & lheir wives and Some of y r Childn here. mr Ballard & Cyrus went to meeting. I was Calld by mr m c farlin to go and See his Sister Bates who is very unwel at his hous. at mr [McFarlns] to See mrs Bates, receivd 1/6.

Clear. mr Ballard, my Self and Son Cyrus attended Bublic worship, it was Communion day. Revd mr Stone Discoarst from Galations III C 1st vers, O [foolish] &C. I went to Son Lambds find his youngest Child Sick, tarried there after n . Doct Cony Came there after meeting and opened a Soar on the Childs face. I Came to Son Jonas, Sent for Polly Pitts to go there but Shee did not go. at meeting room. at Son Lambds aftern, their Babe Sick. Doct Cony opend a Soar on its face.

Clear and very Pleast. I feel very feeble, rose a t 9h y s morn, have had my work to do. mr Ballard & Cyrus to meeting. Revd mr Stone Discoarst fore n fm Luke 6 Chap 38 th vers, aft n fm [no entry]. mrs Wiman came in to See me. Son Lambd, his wife & 4 Oldest Child n took Tea [here]. at [home], feel [feeble]. [friends] here.
Clear. Allin Lambd Came & Conducted my husband & I to his Fathers. I find them remarkable wel. Son Lambd brot us home [ ]. at Son Lambds.
Clear and warm I have done my hous work and transplanted Cucumbers. mrs Heartwel here. at home. mrs Heartwel here. Jona and Ephm Sleep here.
Clear part of y e day, a very heavy Shower aftern. I have Scolt my Bed room & Bead Stead. mrs Savage left here aft Breakfast, Shee went to Son Jonas fm here.

Clear Except foggy in the morn. mr Ballard has been puting board on mrs Farewels Barn. I gatherd String Beens and Cucumbers. I let Ephm y e 3 d have 7 for his aunt. Sent apples & [peckeles] by him for Daugts Lambd & Ballard. at home.

raind this morn. I have made 14 Doz n Candles. mr Ballard to Son Lambds & Ephms. he bot 2 lb Butter @ /9 d pr lb, 3 pints Ginn. he Carried Cucumbers. Cyrus Cut wood in y e woods. at home, made 14 dZn Candles.

Clear and warm y e most of the day. I have Bak t . Dolly Lambd Came here y s morn, Shee help t me pick wool. Allin Came and go t Cherries and Currents for Son Ephm. Betsy Wiman here, got Cherries & Curents. at home. Dolly Lam d here.

Clear part of the day. I Came home, did my hous work and ironing and went to Son Jonas, find his wife much as Shee was y s morn. mrs Woodwd & I went to Bed at 11 h Evn. at Son Jonas. Funeral Ben n Petinglswife.
Cloudy. I am at Ditoes. at Detoes.

Clear part of the day & windy. Son Cyrus attended Funeral of the wife of Perez Hamlin. mrs Smith & wido Savage took Tea, y e Latter Sleeps here. I have workt in my Gardin [today], Planted Cucumbers. at home. Funeral of Periz Hamlins wife. mrs Savage Sleeps here.
Clear Except a light Shower. I have done hous work and Some in my gardin. mr Ballard & Cyrus to raising. mrs Parker took Tea with me. at [home]. mr Bald & Cyrus to raising meeting hous.
Clear. I have gatherd Some Currents to Preserve. mr Ballard went to Son Jonas to git his men to haul us a load wood. Allin here, had some Currents to Carrie to his Marm. at home, Allin Dind here.

Clear and Cool. I have been at home, am informd that mrs s Cypher was found dead in his Barn. mr Ballard Carried 4 DZ n Cucumbers to Son Lambds. Daugt Ballard, Sally & Martha here to Tea. Cyrus Carried 2 botts of Current [wine] to Son Jon a & 1 to Daugt Lambd. at home. Death of mrs s Cypher, Shee was found dead in his Barn.
Clear Part of y e day. I have been at home, workt on my Soap. I went to See his babe. at home, Jonas.
Clear. mrs Parker helpt me do my washing, washt ye N. room floor. Sister Pollard dind with us. mr Ballard unwel. at home, finisht my washing.

Clear. I have done my hous wk and houghd Cucumbers, potatoes, puld up weads in my Gardin. John Town Calld here y s morn. mr Ballard been to y e Settlement, brot home _ gn Spirit, _ lb Tea, 2 lb Sugar. at home. aneversary of y e Purington Scein.
Clear. I have been at home, did my hous work and washt the North room. mr Ballard to the Settlement. at home.

Cloudy. this is the aniversary of y e Birth of my Daugt Town, 48 years Since. I have done my hous work and workt in my Gardin. mr Ballard went down below, Carried 2 Dz n Cucumrs & 3 Dito of pickele Dito. mrs Carter had 1 dZ n & y e pickels. Dagt Lambard 1 DZ n Cucumrs. at home, workt in my gardn. John Davis Esqrs infant Expired.
Clear. I have been at home. Son and Dagt Pollard y r Daught Sally & Dolly Came here. Hannah, Sally, Martha, Lefaett & Allin Lambd Supt here. at home, Child n here.
Clear. mr Ballard was to y e Barbers & to Son Lambards. I have been at home. mrs Farewel left here. at home.
Clear and Cool. I have been at home, had my Leach tub Sett up in my kitchen. I have knit Some and done my hous work. mr Ballard is Lamb in his hand. at home, had the Collic ys aftern & all night.
Clear part of y s day. I have done my hous work but feel very unfit. at home.

Clear. mrs Smith here for [Seed], mrs Parker for roots & Curent Bushes. I have done my hous wk, ironing & pruened apple trees & other work in my gardin. at home. mrs Smith here. Son & Daug t Lamb Came here after we were in Bed, Sleep here.
Clear and warm. I have Bakt and Brewd. mrs Wiman Came here [near] night. Saml Pollard here. David Pollard took a Bed Stead for Dagt Pollard. I put ashes to the [Cabbage].

Clear part of the day. mr Ballard has been to the meeting hous to hear an Oration Deliverd by Revd mr Cushman. I have Mowd grass round the hous with a knife and Sowd Carrot Seed. Hannah and Sally Pollard & Sally Bald Sleep here. W m Cypher Came here for water. it raind So he did not go with it. he went out of the hous and I Could not persuad him to Cum in. I went to Bed a little before mid night, my husband rose and and [sic] his Endevour to get him in but Could not, but he Came in afterwards & Slept on thee floor. at home, Sowd Carrots.

Clear. I have been at home. mr Ballard has a pain in his Back and keeps hous. Sally finisht Scouring, washt my Floors, Did my ironing &C. her Demand was 4/, I paid her 3/. Shee went home. Jona and Wilm Sleep here. at home. Sally went home.
rainy. I did my work and went to See mrs Getchels Child who is Sick. I went over Shoes in water to git to the hous of mr Parker where Shee now resides. at Saml Parkers to See mrs s Getchels Child.

Clear part of y e day. mr Ballard and Cyrus to meeting. Sons Jon a & Ephm and y r wives took Tea here, Jon a Junr, W m & Martha & Soffa allso. Son Cyrus Sleeps here. Son Lambd & wife been to Son Pollards; were not here but left information at Son Jon as that Rhoda Pollard was very unwel. at home. my Sons & wives here.

Clear part of y e day. mr Ballard and Son Cyrus to meeting, the Sacrament was administred. mrs Gilbard Came here foren and tarried till near night. Sons Jon a and Ephm and his wife Came in to see us. at home. Son Ephm & wife here. Funeral Cap t John Gage y s Day.
Clear. mr Ballard to meeting. Son & Dagt Pollard, Saml and Martha here. I went with y m to Son Jonas. mr Ballard Came there after meeting. we Dind there. at [Son Jonas].
a very rainy day. mr Ballard at worship aftern. Revd mr Parker performd, Discoarst from Jude 7 th C. Daugt Ballard here, informs mrs Gitchels Child is Better. at home. mr Balld to [meeting].
Clear the most of y e day. mr Bald & Cyrus to meeting. mr Parker performd. Oliv left here y s morn. Heman Burr took Tea with us. at home.

Cloudy, Snowd before night. Sist Farewel went from here to Son Jonas & went Doun in his Shais. mr Ballard and Cyrus to meeting, it was Communion day. Old mr Tibbets was intard after meeting. Cyrus Came home and at y e request of Tho s Devenport I went to the meeting hous & from there to See his wife, find her very feeble. Shee got Easier. at Thos Devenports. it Snowd. Funeral of old mr Tibbets. Sacrament day.
Clear Except a light Shower. I have been very unwel. mrs Gill & Dagt Ballard Came here aftern, [took Tea.[mrs G] Sleeps. a t home unwel. Dagt Bald & mrs Gill here.

Clear and warm. I have Slipt down at y e East door, my left [Side] fel against y e Sill of y e doore and hurt very much but I Scolt my Bead Stead and mopt my floor. at home. mrs Babcock & Asa Pierces wife here.
Clear. I have done Some washing and my hous work. I gatherd a Bushel Cucumbers. Cyrus Carried Son Lambd about 100 which had been in Vinagar. at home. Cyrus to Son Lambds, the Child is Easier.

Clear. mr Ballard been Surveying for mr Weston & Esqr Davis. he Carried 3 DZ n Pickeld Cucumbers, Sold them to Ger Norths wife for /9 d . I have gathered Cucumbers, Beens, Peas & Squash, Cut herbs and done my hous work. Betsy wiman here for Pickles. her Father here aft n , informs that two of his Sons are very Sick. Dagt Ballard, Martha and James Calld in at [ ]. at [home]. feel [Comfortable] thro [Gods Goodness].
Clear. [I have been at home], did Some washing & went to mr Wimans, find them very unwel. at mr Wimans.

Cloudy part of y e day. I returnd home, left the Patient Some Easier. Came to the meeting hous by water, from mr Thwings on mr Andrus s hors home. Cyrus took him home. I find [Luther] Smith here. at Ditoes & at mr Thwings & Andrus s .
Cloudy foren n , Clear aftern. I have done hous wk [and pared & Cut Some apples. Son Jona here this morn. my husband been to his hous]. at [home].

Clear morn, Cloudy and Some rain aftern. I have transplanted winter Squash and Cucumbers and done my hous work. Son Jona Calld in. y e Blue potatoes I first Planted are Cuming up. at home, workt in my Gardin.
Clear. I have washt and done my hous work. mr Ballard went to Son Lambds, Carried them Beens, Peas, Cucumbers & apples. at home, washt.
Clear and warm. I have workt in my gardin Seting Bushes among my Cucumbers, gathering Some & Scolt my peckles. Jona Junr Carried Beens, 13 Cucm s , 4 Squashes. got a lb Sugar [] 10_. at home.
raind thee most of y e day. Son Cyrus got a load of wood. I have Securad my Candles and done other matters about hous &C. at [thome]. Secured my Candles I made yesterday.
Clear Part of y e day. I went to mr Wimans, find Silas is no better. at mr Wimans.

Cloudy part of y e day & Evning. mr Wickson & John Wall Thrashed our Wheat. Cyrus been to Son Lambards, his Babe is better. I have had a Collic [pain] but [Pickt] wool. at home, had threats of y e Collic.

Clear and very warm. I have felt very feeble bu t have done my hous work and wed gardin &C. mrs Wiman had 5 pecks ashes. Shee came and got Curents and Tansey. Dag t Bald, mrs Pratt & Saunders here. Allin & Barney here, brot me 6_ yds Callico and 2/3 d Chang for 2 Dols which my Daught had of me to purchase it with. at home. mrs Parker here for vinegar. I had other Compy.

Clear part of y e day. I was Calld to mr Wimans to perform an operation for Silas, from there to See Son Jonas infant; find it Some Better. Came home, got Dinner for my famely and went to mr Wimans again. returnd at Evn g . Silas is very feeble. at mr Wimans & Son Jonas twice this day.
Cloudy. I have been at home. Moses & Nabby Hatch Came here, Naby Sleeps here. Shee made me, or Sewd, a wollin Blankit. at home. mr Hatches Son & Daugt here.

Birth Son Jonas 7th Son. Cloudy. I was Calld up at 2h 30m. my Daught was ill, her women Calld in and Shee was Safe Deld at 5h 30m y s morn of her 7 th Son and 10 Child. Shee Seems as wel as we Could Expect and I Came [home] about 10 hours y s morn. at Son Jonas. Birth 8th. Shee had an ill turn aftern. I went and tarried at night.
Cloudy & rain. mrs Pollard and I went to Timy Woodwds, they have a Child Sick. at Son P s & mr Woodwds.

Clear the most of y e day. I have mended 2 pr hoes for Son Cyrus. he Sett out for Watervil to tend Capt Pullins mill. mrs Savage went to Son Jonas after n . mr Saml Harding f m Hamden here on business.
Clear. I have been at home. mr Ballard & Cyrus to raising. at home.

Clear. Old Lady Shaw Dind here, had 2 qts Currents to Carrie home. mrs Wiman took Tea and got a few to Carrie home I have Stript & put down in Sugar 11 qts Currents this day. at home. mrs Shaw made me a visit. mrs Wiman here. [&] Gatherd ripe peas.
Clear. I have Bakt Bread and Pumkin Pies and done my hous work. Cyrus killd a Lamb, Jonas wife had half of it which over paid what we had Borrowed. he went to Son Pollards aftern. al home.
Cloudy. mr Ballard preamelating line between Rheed field & Augsta. our friends left here at 9h morn. Lucy & I did my washing. Cyrus got a load wood. at home. friends left here.
raind. I have been at home, knit Some. mrs Wiman here. Betsy after roots. Cyrus Came from [mr] Cumings & is dismist. at home.
Clear. I have Brewd and done Some in my gardin. mr Ballard unwel. Planted Squash & Cucumbers. at home, Brewd.
Clear. I have been at home, did hous wk and workt in my Gardin, Cutt grass &C. Ebenz Farewel Esqr of Varsalboro Expired y s morn. at home. Death Esqr Farewel.
Clear. there was an oralion Delivd by mr Oldin on the aneversary of the independent Company. Son Cyrus attended. I have done my work tho very unwel. at home. Son Cyrus 51 years old this day.
a very rainy day. I have been at home, [Sorted] apples and Cut to drie. [at home].

Clear. I did work up and went to Son Lambds. Allin Came up with the hors and took Pickeles for his marm. Henry is playing about but his face is Swell. I went to Son Ephms at Evng, Slept there. at Son Lambds and Ephms. Son Cyrus Came home, isunwell.
Cloudy and Some rain. I have cut and Strung apples for drying. mr Ballard and Cyrus to y e Settlement. Cyrus gave me a new Snuff box. Lucy went home. at home.

Clear but Cool. mr Ballard & my self attended worship. Son Lambard Sent his Son Allin with a Shais and he Conducted me to his fathers. from there I wrode an hors BAck. Revd mr Stone Discoarsd from Malhew X C, 32 & 33 V. his wife, Esqr Brooks & wife were admited to the Church. w partook of the Communion or sacrament. at meeting, Son Lamds & Ephms.

Clear. mr Ballard has a pain in his Back and din not attend public worship. Sons Jon a & Lambd & y r wives Came to See us after n , they did not tarry to Tea. Joanna & Lucy Smith did. a t home, Child n here.

Clear. I went from my Sons to meeting, went to Son Lambds at intermition and after meeting. Jonas wife & part of her Childn there to See her Husband. Cyrus at Son Lambd s at noon. at meeting from Son Ephms and at Son Lambards after,wrode up in ye Shais.
Clear Part of y e day. mr Ballard & Cyrus attended worship. Revd mr Cushman performd foren from from [sic] Hebrews 4 C 13 th vers, aftn fm y e Acts. at home. 9 years Since my Dear Daugt Town Expired.
Clear Part of y e day. mr Ballard & Cyrus to Meeting. I have been at home. at home.

Clear part of y s day. I have done Some washing. mr Ballard & Cyrus to Town meeting. Old mrs Parker here for Seeds. mrs Wiman, Smith & Rachel here to Tea. mrs W. finisht my washing. at home, had Compy.
Clear Excep t Some Showers. I was Calld between 12 & 1 to go and see mrs Burden who is in Labour, her women Calld before night. at [mr Burdens].

Clear and Cooler & windy. mr Ballard has been Surveying for John Davis Esqr and for Luis Hamlin, he Came home at 9h Evng. I have gathered the last of my Currents, Sheld Some mustard, ironed &C. at home. gathered the last of my Currints. mr Ballard been Surveying.
Clear. I have done my hous work, Cutt Pumpkins to drie. I went to mr Wimans, his Mother & Daugth & Son in law there. Saml looks feeble yet. at mr Wimans & Son Jonas.
Clear. I have been to Son Jonas by reason of hearing the Child Cry. Lucy Smith workt here. mrs Coal Dind with us. Jona Ballard Jun r Sleeps here. I have knit Some. at Son Jonas.

Clear. I feel more Comfortable for which I wish to bless the great author of mercies. mrs Gill was so kind as to asist y s morn and left here after Breakfast to go to Sidney. I have made 4 under Coats fm my old Cotton Shifts and workt some in my Gardin.

Cloudy and raind aftern. Son Jonas wife Came and took Care of me and did my work. Sister Barton and mrs Gill Came here foren. Dagt Ballard went home after Dinner, y e others Sleep here. mr Sister made me a prest of a Chees and Some Butter. at home, was in great distress y s morn. Jonas wife Came and nurst me.

Cloudy & rain. mr Ballard Carried 12 Dz n Cucumbers to Son Lambards. he informs me Henry is very Sick. I have done my hous work, gatherd Some Cucumbers and finisht the washing I began on Saterday. at home. hear that Magr Pages wife, [and] a Child of Thos Bond, are Deceast.

X. Birth Jon a Devenports 4 th Son. XX. Clear and pleast. I have done my wk foren. was Calld at 4h pm by Jon a Devenport to go and See his wife. Shee was Deld at 8h Evn of her 4th Son and 6th Child. Shee Seems Cleverly. I tarried all night. at [Jona] [Devenports]. Birth [12th]. receivd 9/ as [reward].
Clear. at home. mr Ballard & Cyrus to coart. have workt in my Gardin and done hous wk. at home.

Clear, a Cool air. I have transptanted apple trees which Came up y s Spring. I Sett y m between the apple trees which ran N and [S] at y e South of y e hous. I brot Potatoes and other things from y e Seller, was taken So weak in my knees that I Could not get up without my husbands help. at home, had an ill turn near night.

Clear and warm. I have workt in my yard pulling up weads. gatherd Currents, put 5 qts into a pott with 2 [lb] Sugar. mr Ballard Carried 2 Doz n Cucumbers. Sold 1 dZ _ for 30 Cents, Carried Daugt Lambd _ dz. Shee Sent me Coffee. mrs [Wims], Daugt Ballard, mrs s Nichols & Pattridg here, had Currents for which they gave me 20 Cents. they took Tea here Except mrs Wiman. at [ ]. [13]
Clear and warm. mr Ballard to y e Settlement. I have Bakt and done my other hous work. I Sent 3 DZ n Cucumbers to Dagt Lambard & Currents to her & Ephms wife. at home, gatherd 3 pints Currents.
Clear and not very warm. mr Ballard and Cyrus to the review at Hallowell. I gatherd Cucumbers, Cut my purple Corn Stalks and done other matters. went to Son Jonas after SunSett. at Son Jonas at Evng.
Clear. Sally Cypher washt for me. Olliv Fletcher Came to do Sewing. I have been at home. at home. Oliv & Sally Cypher here.
Clear. I have began my washing and done my hous work &C. at home.
Clear. I have been at [home]. at home.
Clear part of y e day. I went to mr Wimans, find them much as they were yesterday. at Son Jonas, his wife and Babe are unwel. I have gatherd green peas y s day. at mr Wimans & Son Jonas.

Birth Son Pollards 5th Daugt. Cloudy. my Daugt Pollard was taken ill before 3h y s morn and was Deld of her 5th Daugt and 8th Child. at [no entry] y s aftern. I tarrie this night. at Son Pollards. Birth [8 th ].
Clear the most of y e day. I have Cutt Some grass & Tansy. mr Ballard & Cyrus to raising. at home.

Clear when the Sun rose but it Soon Shut in and was Cloudy the most of y e day. mr Ballard went to Son Lambds & Ephms, he Carried Curenl bushes. I roasted a Piece of Lamb, had pees and Cucumbers. mrs Smith, Betsy Wiman and a Cousin of hers took Tea, mrs Smiths Daugt allso. at home, had Company.

Clear. thee funeral of mrs s Cypher was performd. mr Ballard, my Self attended. the Revd mr [no entry] Performd from 1 Peter 4 Chap [7 th ] vers, but the End of all things is at hand &C. at the Funeral of mrs Cyphers.
Clear part of the day. I have been at home. Leut John Shaw Expired. at home. Death Leut John Shaw. funeral Revd mrStones inft.

Clear. I have Bakt brown & flower Bread. mr Ballard planted Beens in y e gardin, he Planted Corn and Pumpkins yester day. Cyrus went to Son Pollards. Rhoda, Hannah & Martha Ballard Sleep here. at home, finisht ironing.

Clear. I have Cutt grass with a knife, Sett plants and done my hous work. mr Ballard been to Sons Lambds & Ephms, he Carried Some Currents. he informs me that Sally Farewel had a wen Cutt out of her neck yesterday. Son Cyrus Came home. at home.

Clear. through the great goodness of y e great parent I am more Comfortable for which I wish to be Gratefull. mr Ballard & Son Cyrus been to lhe Settlement to See Training. mrs Nabby [Edds] and Son Ephms wife to See me which afords me Great Pleasure. at home. mrs Nabby Eadds [and] Daugt Ballard here.
Clear Part of y e day. I have been at home, done various kinds of work. at home.

Clear. the Girls went from here after Breakfast. mr Ballard and Cyrus to meeting. Revd mr Parker Discoarst foren f m Matt u 25-35 [ ], aft fm 2 nd Tim y 3 d C 5 th vers. Son Jona, his wife, Jon a , Sally and Martha took Supper with us. mr Badwel Calld in here, mrs Parker allso. at home. Son Jona, his wife and part of y e Child n here.

A foggy morn, Clear afterwards. mr Ballard & Cyrus to meeting. Revd mr Stone Discoarst from Hebrews 4 C 1 st & 2 verses. the remains of EbenZ Farewel were to be interd this day. EbenZ Moore Jun r here, Supt with us. at home. Funeral of Esq r Farewel.
Cloudy. I have been at home, had a Soar toe. mr Ballard & Cyrus to meeting. Capt Smiths wife here. at home, Lamb.
Clear and Cold. mr Ballard & Cyrus to meeting, I have been at home. at home.
I have been at my Sons till Evng when my Daugt returnd and I Came home. at my Son Jonas.
Clear and Cool. mrs Gill here, mended Cloaths for her Uncle. Jonas wife here to Tea. I have done my hous work, Swept [out] Seller and did Some in my Gardin. mrs Smith [after] plants.

Cloudy. I feel very feeble, my husband Complains allso. we Seem to be a feeble Couple. may lhe great parent Support us lhro life and may we be Conformd to his will is the desire of me his undeserving hand maid. I have had great Distress in my Side this night but got Some resl. at home.
Clear. mr Ballard & Cyrus attended Funeral of Esq r Davis s infant. I sent 2 Doz n Cucumbers to Son Lambds. at home. Funeral Esq r Davis s infant Daug t .
Clear part of y e day. I have Stewd apples and knit Some, Lucy mending. at home.
Clear. I have washt and ironed the last weaks wash and done my hous work & knit a t Evng. at home.

Birth mr Burdens 5th Son & 11th Child. Clear. mrs Burdin Deld of her 5 th Son & Eleventh Child at 4h 5m y s morn. her illness was very Severe a Short Space but Blessed be God it terminated in Safety and y e inft is numbered among y e living. mrs Saunders [here]. [at mr Burdens. Birth 10th.]

Clear. Dagt Ballard, Martha & James here. my husband been to Survey for Lewes Hamlin, the farm on which Isaac Hardin formerly lived. I have done hous work and wed Gardin. at home. Dagt Ballard & Childn here, took Tea.
Cloudy. I Bakt and did my other work. I attended the funeral of Selas Wiman. mr [Wilborough] Delivd a discoars from St Johns Gospil 8 C 2 vers. at y e funeral of Silas wiman. mr [Wilbr] performd.
Clear part of y e day. mr Ballard been to run a line at y e wido Farewels Farm. I have been at home. Old mrs Kenny here. I have knit Some. De ath mr Wingats Child. at home. mrs Kinny here.
Clear. mr Hamlin, his wife, Jos h Burtun & his, 2 mrs Dellinghams here for fruit. the made me prests of Crackers, Sugar, Ginger. at home, had a very [distrest] night had [ ] company.
Clear. I have done my hous work and went to meeting. it was asoceation. mr Parker only was present who Delivd a good Discoars. at meeting and Son Lambds. Funeral mr Bonds Child.

Clear and very pleas t . I larried with my Patient till 2h pm. we got her up and made her Bed. Shee is Still Cleverly. I Came by water to Bomans Brook, from there watkt home. Calld at mr Andrus s & [wimans]. at [mr] [Devenports], [Andrus] & [Wimans].
Clear. Oliv Fletcher here, did Some mending for me. at home. Oliv [Fletcher here].
Snowd & raind at times. Old mrs Kenny Came to See us, Dind & Sup t with us. I have been at home. at home.

Clear. I have been at home. Wil m Ballard Came here about Sun Sett, informd us y t his uncle Samuel Pierce was Drownd laSt night, malloncolly to hear. Cyrus went to his Brors, finds it is a reallity. Son and Daugt Lambard and mr Stevens here. a mr Noles from hamden here on Business. at home. Son and Daugt Lambard here. we had news that Saml Pierce was Drowned yesterday.

Cloudy the most of y e day. I have done Some washing, gatherd 4 DZ & 7 Cucumbers. Jona assisted me and took y m to Carrie to markett. mr Ballard, mrs Wiman here to Tea. her husband Calld and Conducted her home. at home. gatherd Currents, 3 pints.

Clear part of the day. I have Cut Sage, gatherd Cucumbers. mr Ballard Carried 80 to Son Lambds and Some beens for pickeles. Cyrus went to mill, got wheat ground. I Bakt & Brewd. at home. mrs Parker here, Dagt Ballard allso.
Clear part of y e day, windy & Shower. I have been at home, mr Balld to y e Settlement. Oliv workt here, Cyrus got wood. at home. hear Sylas is no better.
Clear. Son Jonathan here, he was released from prison yesterday. I have been kniting on hoes for Son Cyrus. Warrin Stones wife paid me 1s 7 d . at home, Son Jona here.
Clear. I have been al home. at home.

Clear part of y e day. I have Scolt my Pickeles. we had green Peas y s day. mr Ballard & Cyrus to husk for mr Cypher. Cyrus been to y e masheen, Carried 4 lb wool, brot 1_ lb roals. at home, hear that mr Wimans Sons are no better.

Clear part of y e day. Son Lambard Conducted his wife and Henry to See me, he was going to Son Pollards. they made me a present of a Loin of muttun, Some Sugar, Butter and Bread. Son Ephms wife Came here, Jonas wife allso. Shee brot me 2 Pumkin pies. O happy has this year began and So may it proseead and may we So liv that God may bless us and aprove our deeds. at home, part of my Child n here.
rainy. I have been at Ditoes. at Dildo
Clear Except a Light Shower. mr Ballard & Cyrus to raising. I have Brewd and done my other wk tho I have felt very feeble.

Clear part of y e day. mr Ballard went to the meddow. mrs Bennet & Cleark here, had Currents. mrs C brol me l lb 10 oz Chees. mrs B had 4 qts. [took some roals to Spin 1-2/1 lb] I Brewd and did other matters. at home, had Company.
Birth Saml BabCocks Son. Clear. I have been Calld to Saml Babacoks Junr s wife. Shee was Safe deld of her 3 d Son by him at ye 2h pm. at Saml [Babcocks]. Birth 12th.
Clear part of y e day. mr Ballard been to mend mrs Farewels Barn. Cyrus got Some wood. I have got Some apples into y e Sellar, pared Some. Lucy Came here at 9h Evng. at home. Lucy Came at Evng.
Clear and very Pleasant. I have been puting my hous in order. Son Jon a is So wel that he wrode to the Settlement, mr Ballard went with him to be Shaved. at home.
Clear Part of y e day. y e Brig over Bomans brook is gone. at home. Luke Bart Sleeps here.
at home, very unwel. Daugt Lambd with me, did my washing. at home, Some Easier. [2]
Clear part of y e day. Lucy washt. mrs Emry and Wiman made me a visit. I have knit y s Evng. at home, had Company.
Clear the most of y e day. I have been at home, did hous work & knit. at home.
Clear and not So Cold. I have washt and Scoured 49 Skeins of yarn. mr Ballard to y e Settlement, brot A Cod fish, Butter & Sugar, _ g n Spirrit. at home.
Clear. my Dagt Lambd tarried till near night when they Conducted her home in A Sleigh. I feel Some better. Son Lambd Sent me _ Gl n Spirit. they Sent me Buller, Chees and Beef before. at home. [3]
Clear. we had our wheat finisht reaping & got into y e Barn; and part of the hay N of y e gardin. I have done various kinds of work. at home.
Clear aftern. I have been at home, Cut Some apples & done other things. mr Ballard began to get his Potatoes in, finisht gathering Beens &C. at home.
Cloudy. I have been at home. Cyrus brot his Bed home from Son Lambards. I finisht a pair mits for Barnabas and Did hous work. at home. Cyrus Brot his Bed home. heavy rain yesterdy.
Clear. mrs Emry Came here, dind. Shee and I went to See mrs Kenny, find her very low. mrs Emery, Sally Pollard, Hannah & W m Ballard Sleep here. at mr Brookes mrs Emry with me.

Clear Some Part of y e day. mr Ballard went to run [ ] line for mr Andrews. I [have] done my hous wk, washt & ironed part of my Cloaths. at home. mrs Blake brot part of my wheal [home]. had a pair Shoes, [paid] 33.
Clear. mrs Farewel Came here. I remain Some more Comfortable for which Mercy I wish to render Prais to God the author. at home, Some Easier. [4]
Clear. I have been at home, did hous wk. at [home].
Clear. Sally Cypher here to wash. I Paid her 2 [s] 1_ for her Service. mrs Getchel was here. I have hervested Beens &C. at home.

Sun Shine part of y e day, raind part of it. I have washt, done my hous wk, washt 3 rooms & knitt Some. mr Ballard to y e Settlement. mr Theophilis Hamlin Sent me a present of 1 lb Shushon Tea & 4_ lb Sugar which I receiv d with gratitude. at home, did my washing. Marriage Nicholis Shaw to mrs Winslow.
Clear. I have been at home. at home.
Snowd. I have done a little wk, finisht Cyrus s Stockins. at home. [5]

Clear. mr Ballard Surveying for mr Saml Cumings. Cyrus help t L e faett aflern. James fel from y e Bed & hurt his Sholder, I went to See him. I gatherd Pees green & drie, Beens allso. at Son Jona to See James.
Clear. I went this aftern to See Silas Wiman, find him very Low. Oliv is here to work. mr Ballard & Cyrus to husking at mr Andrus s . at mr Wimans.
Cloudy, raind. Cyrus is gone to mr Cumings s mill.
Clear Part of the day. I have Doubled Some yarn. mrs Farewel finisht futing a pair Buskins f r my husband. at home, remain Easier. [6]
Cloudy. I [went] to Son Jonas to git Some one to drive horses out of the [road way]. Jon a Junr Came and got y m out, [one hors hurt Allins head]. at Son Jonas. Dagt Lambd & Ballad here.

Clear the most of y e day, raind in y e night & Thunderd. I have done various kinds of work. we had green Peas for Dinner. Cyrus brot me 6 plates & 6 Tea spoons yesterday. at home, Brewd. Dagt Lam bd Sent me Some Sugar.
Clear and very Cold. I have been at home, did hous w k & knit. at home.
Cloudy. mrs Farewel Bakt. I have done a little work but am feeble y e t. I receivd A prest of 6_ lb Beef and 3_ do Pork from Son Pollard. at home. [7]
Snow & rain, I am at Ditoes. at Ditoes

raind & was very dark. mr Ballard & Cyrus to meeling. Revd mr Packard Performd foren fm 1st Eps l John 4 C 16 th v, aftern fm hebrews. at home. Luke Barton here last Evng, brot 6_ lb Chees, [2_ lb from his marm]. [19]
Clear. mr Ballard & Cyrus to meeting. mrs Farewel here. mrs Smith took Tea with us. at home. [8]
Clear part of y e day. mr Ballard Carried pickeles to Son Lambds, Says Lucy is very Sick. at home.
A Snow Storm. I have done Some hous work & knit Some. I Brewd Some [Beer]. at home. [9]
Cloudy. I have Cut apples for Sause. mrs Brooks here to Spin Thread. I have knit, Lucy spun. Dolly Lambd & Sally Bald Sleep [here]. at home, mrs Brooks here.

Clear till after noon, Snowd at Evn g . I have Bakt wheat & Brown bread, Sorted my apples, Cutt & Stued those that were defective. I finisht my work at 10h Evn. Son Jona here, his boil worries him. at home.
Cleare foren. Son Jon a , his wife & part of y r Child n here. I have felt very unwel. at home, had [Company]. Luke Sleeps [h ].
Snowd. I have done the most of my hous work and knit Some. at home. [10]

Clear part of y e day. I have been at home, Bakt. Lucy did hous wk & Some mending. I mend Cyrus s Trousers. Martha was here, Sewd for me. mrs Smith, Rachel & her Babe here. at home. mrs Smith & Rachel here. I finisht futing mr Ballds hoes.

Clear. I have been at home, did hous work and finisht futing my Stockins. Old mrs Kenny & Brock here. mr Ballard to mr Woodwds, bot a Chees and 2 lb Butter. he heard there y t John Pedrick was buried 21st inst and Esqr Runnels of Sidney this day. at home. mrs Brock & her mother here. Funeral of Esqr Runels.
Cloudy part of ye day. I have washt Some things which I had not time to do yesterday, knit at Evng. at home, Ephm Sleeps here.
Cloudy, Snowd Some. I have been ["at home" - implied], did part of my hous work & knit. at home. [11]
Clear part of y e day. I have done my hous work, Cutt and Strung Apples to drie. mr Ballard and Cyrus geting in potatoes. at home.
Cloudy. I have done hous work and knit on my Stockin. [ ]. at home.

Clear and more moderate. Sally wenl home with Hannah. mrs Emry took Breakfast and Ephm Came and Conducted [her] home in a Sleigh. EbenZ Moore and his Sister Betsy Calld here, Dind and went on for home. mr John Austin took 6 Sheep of my husband y s Day. at home. EbenZ r & Betsy Moore here. mrs Emry left here.
Clear. I have been at home. mr Ballard went to mr Cumings Mill, Carried 1 Bushel [wh t ], got _ Bush l [india] Corn. at home.
Clear. mrs Farewel went from here at 1 O Clock PM. Ephm Conducted her in a Sleigh to his dady s . I have knit & done Some things, [about] Soap. at home. [mrs Farewel left here].
Clear and very Cold and windy. I have done hous work, knit Some. do not feel very wel. Son Jonas wife sent me Bitters, [fresh] Pork and Butter. at home.
Clear and pleas t . I have gatherd Cucumbers and washt. we gatherd hops. at [home].
Clear. I have gatherd Beens &C. at home.

Clear. mr Wickson & Georg Shaw got wood for us. Allin Lambd Conducted me to Son Jonas, Dag t Pollard was there. Old Lady Emry Came there, Shee tarried all night. Son Pollard bro t me home. at Son Jonas, mrs Emry & Dagt Pollard allso.

Clear. it is Crismas Day. I have done a fortnit s wash and was Calld to Son Jonas. he was in great Distress with his arm which he hurt by a fall from his hors last tuesday. I put a poltis on it. Hannah was very ill. I attended to them through the night till after [4] this morn. at Son Jonas, he and Hannah very unwel.

Clear foren. Rufas Ballard, his wife, their Son John & Daug t Sarah Dind here. I have been boiling Bones for Soap, have done my hous work and knit Some. Jona and William Sleep here. at home [ ]. Rufas Ballard & wife here. Death of a Child, Augusta.
very rainy. I have been at home, Bakt white & brown bread. have felt very unwel, went to bed before dark; had a high feaver all night. at home, very unwel.

Clear. I went to mr Wimans at 9h y s morn, found Silas with life in him. I Sett by him, he had not taken anything Sence 7h last Evn. he did not Speak nor Even groan till he Expired which took place about 4h pm. his life went out like a Candle and I hope that God receivd his Spirrit to rest with him Self forever. the tryal is Great to y e berievd famely. Capt Smith & Lady, my Self & Son Cyrus put on his Grave Cloaths & I returnd home about 7h Evng. Capt Smith, his wife & A mr [Bullerfield] Spent the night with them. at mr Wimans. his Son Silas Expired about 4h pm. this is Jon a Ballards Jun r Birthday. Silas wd have been 20 [yr] old if he had lived till Jany 20 th .
X. Clear part of y e day. this is y e anniversary of my Mariage 53 years Since. I have been at home, Bakt and knit Some. mr Ballard and Cyrus been to the Selllment. at [home].
Clear and not So Cold. I have been ["at home". - implied] at home.
Clear. mr Ballard and Cyrus been to meeting. I have been at home. Revd mr Stone Discoarst from Colations III Chap 14 vers. a t home.
Cloudy foren, Snowd a little. Clear part of y e aftern. my husband and Cyrus to meeting. Revd mr Haskal performd from Luke 19 C [13] vers. at home.
Clear and moderate. mr Ballard and Cyrus to meeting. Revd mr Stone Discoar d from Galations 6 th C 8 v. Son Jona and wife Calld in after meeting. at home.
Clear and Cold. mr Ballard and Cyrus to meeting. Revd mr Stone Discoarst fm Philipians 1 st C 27 V. Gidion Barton & Sally Pierce were Published. Son Jona here at Evng. at home.
Clear. I Came home, left my Daugt as wel as Could be Expected. at Ditoes & returnd [home].
Clear and Cool. I have been at home, Sorted raggs & Cutt some. old mr Hall here. at home.

A Severe Storm of Snow, hail & wind. mr Balld workt at Banking hous. the little girls went to Son Jonas after Breakfast. I have Stewed my apples & Scolt my pickls and knit Some. Lucy help t about hous & Spun Some, hembed me a hankercf & made a night Cap.
Clear part of y e day. I have Brewd, done my other hous work and knit Some. mr Ballard to work at Son Jonas, Cyrus to [Town]. at home.

Cloudy, raind Some. Betsy Wiman here, her marm Sent us a Present of 6_ lb Beef and a mins pie, thus we are provided for from time for which I wish to thank God. I did part of my washing tho very feeble. at home, feel [very] unwel. Hannah Spun [w ] y n here.
Clear and warm. I have been at home, not very wel. mr fingers Soar. at home.
Clear. I have been at home, finisht a Stockin mrs Wiman & Dagt Ballard here. Son Ephm has Seen 39 years this day. at home. Son Ephms Birth day.
Cloudy y e most of y e day. 3 of mr Brooks s daug ts here y s aftern & 2 of Cap t Smiths. Lucy mended a Coverled, I finisht Towing my Stockins. at home, finisht my hoes, had Company here.

Clear part of y e day. mr Ballard & Cyrus went to meeting, it is Thanksgiving. Son Lambard Came and Conducted me to his hous where my husband & Son Cyrus took Supper. Cyrus Came home, his Father & I tarried all night. at Son Lambds.
Cloudy till noon when it began to Snow, and we had a Severe Storm aftern and night. I have been at home. at home. mr Balld went to Jonas.
Clear. mr Ballard went to Lecture. mrs Hodges Dind, Sis t Farewel Supt and Slept here. I do not feel very wel but have to do my work. at home, friends here. Death of mr Tibbits.
Clear part of y e day. I Bak t flour bread and did my hous wk. at home.
A Severe Snow Storm. I have been at home, did hous wk & knit. at home. Capt Pitts & Wilms Shop [Burnt].
Clear. mr Ballard to the Selllement, had 2_ lb Candles of Dagt Lambd. Shee Came here at 10h Evng, Spent y e night; her husband went home. at home. [Daugt Lambd Sleeps here.]
Clear, Cold and windy. I have done Some washing, Twisted 1 Skein yarn, ironed and knit Some. Jon a and William Sleep here. at home.
Clear. I have been at home, done various [kinds] Service, went to Jonas. Sally Farewel & Rhoda Pollard Sleep here. at Son Jonas.
Clear. I have done my ironing. Son Lambards Dagts Sally & Martha Bald here. at home.
Clear the most of y e day. mr Ballard to mr Cumings s , brot 2 Cheeses home. did my hous wk, knit some. Cyrus to y e Settlement. at home.

Clear. I had a very ill turn at my Sons but got [brkfast] and helpt Some about the [sic]. Polly Brooks there aftern. my Son and Hannah were Some more Comfortable this [nt]. at [Ditoes]. Funeral of Saml Pierce.

Clear and pleast. I have Bak t white & Brown Bread, done my other work, put my Soap work ou t of y e kettle &C, knit Some. Cyrus Came home, Jon a & W m Sleep here. mr Soal brot wood. the remains of Old Lady White of Hallowell were interd y s day. mrs Mathews, Daugt of mr Beriah Ingerham, Expired this day. mr Ballard to y e Settlement, had 2 lb Sugar of Duttun, _ lb Shush n Tea of ma gr Howard and 13 oz Candles of Son Lambd. at home, done various kinds work. Funeral [Old mr s ] White. Death mrs Mathas.

Clear and very warm. mr Ballard, Cyrus to meeting. Allin & Ephm took Tea here. I was Calld to see Silas Wiman, administred 2 Clisters and returnd home about 9h Evng. we had fresh Cucumbers & green Corn with our Supper. at mr Wimans to See Silas.
Snowd. mr Ballard & Cyrus went to meeting. I have been at home, had Sausages from Daug t Ballard, 1 lb 14 oz. at home.
Snowd. mr Ballard & Cyrus to meeting. Revd mr Cushman performd from Genesis 44 C 24 th vers, See that ye fall not out by y e way. Son Cyrus Sleeps here. it Snowd all night. at home.

Clear and not So Cold. Son Ephm Conducted his wife and Daugt here. Son Jon a , his wife and Sally & Martha & James, they with his Son Jona took Supper with us. his wife and Ephms are both unwel. a t home. Child n and grandChild n here. Martha brot me Butter.
Clear and Cold. I went to See old mrs Kenny who is very unwel. at mr Brockses.

Cloudy most of y e day. I have done my hous work and knit Some. Cyrus is at home y s night unwel. Cap t Smiths wife took Tea here. I am informd that Shee that was [Mary] Densmore died tast Sallerday Sudenly. at home. hear that mrs Densmores Dagt Polly is dead.

Clear and Cold. mr Ballard & Son Cyrus to the anuel meeting. I have been at home, washt the North room, Entry & Stares &C. mr Ballard Served his warrant on John Wall for Taxes and took his note on Demand. at home, knit at Evning.

Clear and pleast. mr Ballard & Cyrus to Town Meeting. Son Lambd is more Comfortable than he was but not able to attend y e meeting. mr Amos Partridg here, bot 4 Balm Giliad trees, is to giv 6 s for them. at home, workt in my Gardin Some. mr Partridg had trees.

Clear and Cool. Cyrus went to Mill with _ lb wheat. Dagt Lambard washt her Cloaths & mine. mr Stilson Calld in to See me. this is the aniversary of Charls Gills killing him Self. mr Ballard very Sick all night. I gave him Andersons Pills. I was up to take Care of him 3 times, he had y e Cramp. at home. my husband very ill all night with [Cramp] & Disintery.
Snowd last night & y s morn, Cloudy and moderate. I have been kniting. at home.
Clear and very warm for y e Season. I have removd Current Bushes and done other matters in my Gardin. at home.
Clear. Daugt Lambard washt. I have knit Some. Son Town Came here at Evng, Sleeps here. at home. Son Town Sleeps here.
Clear. mr Ballard Sett out for Capt osgoods yesterday & returnd. he went y s day, gone all night. I washt my room y s day and not yesterday. at home. Funeral of mrs Stackpole.
Clear and warm. I have workt in my Gardin and knit, finisht my Stockins & Lucys. Dagt Ballard Sent me rice, milk and Veal, 5 lb. at home.

raind this aft n & Evng. I have been Sewing , doing hous work & kniting. Lucy mending.Shee hemed 2 Callico handkercfs & 2 Cottin ones & made me a night Cap. mr Balld Been to the Settlement, was at Son Lambards. they Sent me Beef. he Carried them & Ephm _ [Bush l apples] Each. at home.

Clear. I have been at home. now I have lived to See y e year Ended and may I reflect on the time past of my life and Striv to amend my ways. another year is gone, a new will begin. O may I liv [ ] [little] time and not Commit So many Sins. End 1807.
Clear. I finisht my wash though Sufring the Severest Pain, [gave] up at night. Hannah here Twisting yarn. my pain was So great at night y t I Could not keep in Bed. at home, very [unwel].
rainy. I have wound & Doubled yarn. Son Jona Calld here aftern, informd us that Old mr Cowen Departed this life y s day, aged 89 years. at home. Death of Old mr Cowen.
Clear. I have been at home, knit Some. Cleand y e door y d Some. at home.

Clear foren and part of y e aflern. I have been So well as to do my hous work and knit Some. Daugt Lambd and Child n to Son Jonas, his wife & James have been very unwell. Hannah and Sally & Harriet here a little before night. at home, Sett up the most of y e day.

Clear and Pleast. I have workt in my Gardin. mr Ballard and I Dind at Son Jonas, we had Beautiful rice Puding and Calvs head & harslett. I Sett Current Bushes after I Came home. at Son Jonas. mrs Gilbd there.

Snowd foren n , Clear at Evng. I have been at home. Hannah Bald Supt and Spent Evng. Wil m dind here. I Cut apples to drie at Evng. mr Ballard to mr Woodwards, Bot 3 lb Chees & 2 do Butter. mrs W sent me _ lb fresh Pork. at home, Hannah here y s Evng.
raind foren. Son Ephm Conducted his Father & me to his hous. we both Slept there y s night, Daugt Lambd & 2 Child n allso. it was a Severe Storm of rain & wind. at Son Ephms.
Cloudy and very windy. I have done my hous work, Cleand Snow out of y e hous and knit Some y s Evng. Ephm & Wil m Sleep here. at home, very Cold.
raind, wind Easterly. I have over hauld Linning raggs & prest Some for Dish Cloaths &C. at home, a rainy day.

raind the night past and this day till near night whin the Sun Shone a little while. mr Ballard to mr Woodwards, bot 3_ lb Chees and 2 lb Butter. Cyrus to y e Settlem t , bot me _ lb Snuff at mr Lads. at home. Sis t Farewel here y s night.
Snowd at night. I have Bakt Brown bread. we are informd that William Swanton of this Town Expired on Wedensday las t at Bath, at his Mothers. at home. heard of mr [Swant] Death.
Clear and pleast Sun. I have done hous wk, mended Cloaths & knit. Jon a & Ephm Ballard Sleep here y s & last night. at home.
A very rainy day. Daught Pollard and her daugts Hannah & Martha Came here, they and d t Lambd Sleep here. at home. Childn here.

Cloudy and Cold. I have Brewd, knit, finisht a paer of mits for my husband and knit on his Stockin. this is the anneversary of my Birth, 73 years have I Seen, pas t thro many Sceins. may it pleas y e Great Parent of y e universe to Enable me to liv devoted to his Service the little time I have to Sojourn in this world. Allin Lamb brot us 23 lb Beef. at home, have Seen 73 years y s Day. Allin, [Barny] & Ephm B. Dind here. Funeral mr Edward Springer.
a rainy day, w N. I mended a pair Trousers for Cyrus &C. at home.
Clear and Cold. mr Ballard and Cyrus to meeting. Revd mr Stone Discoarst f m Isiaah 26 C 9 th V. at home.

Clear Some part of y e day. Son Cyrus Came home, his Father and he went to meeting; my Daugts to Son Jonas. my Grand s n Jon a Came and Conducted me there where my husband & Cyrus Came and [we] partook of a good dinner. at Son Jonas and was [informd] that Old Lady BabCockwas Baried this day.
Snowd. Cyrus Came home. we did not attend public worship this day. Son Lambd, his wife and Babe here at Evning. at home. Son & Dagt Lambd Calld in at Evng.

raind & Snowd. mr Ballard and Cyrus to meeting. Revd mr Slone Discoarst fm Ecleasties 12 C 1st vers. we all took Dinner at Son Jonas, Son Lambd & wife & 2 Child n , Son Ephm allso. at Son Jonas, [he] Lefaett & James are very unwell.
Clear and very warm. I have done work in my gardin and went to mr Wimans, find them much as they were. at mr Wims.
Cloudy foren, very Clear and Pleasant aftern. mr Ballard and Cyrus to Parrish meeting. I have done my hous wk & knit. at home. mr Ballard to [Parrish] meeting.
Cloudy morn, Sun Shone at 9h morn. wind & Snow blew aftern. I have done Some washing & knit Some. Gidion Barton and Sally Pierce here. at home, mr Soal Sleeps here.

Clear. Son Jona Conducted Ephms wife and Child to his hous after Breakfast. his Son Ephm Came for his [Grand father] & I. we went and dind. Capt [Lovelans] and Lady & Daugt [Huntoon], mr Trask & wife there. at Son Jonas, Company there. Saml [Pierce] [Drowned].
Clear and Cold. Cyrus was Calld to tend mill for Saml Cuming, he is Sick. I have done a fortuits wash. Han h B. & Sally Pollard & W m Bal d Sleep here. at home.
Clear. I have been to Son Jonas to [dine]. Son Jona, Son and Daugt [Lambd] here at Evng. Jona & Luke Sleep here. at Son Jonas.

Clear part of y e day, the wind to y e S. I have Brewd and done other matters, knit at Evn g . mr Ballard to Mag r Howard, find he has receivd the Taxes he thought were due from him. he got _ gn Ginn at [ ] Brooks s on [Ketons] acount. at home, have Brewd.

Snowd foren, raind Some aftern. I have felt fatagued. my husband Easier but feeble. mrs Brooks Sent here for meel, my Daugt L gave her a quart. not long before night we were alarmed by the Bells ringing for fire. Son Cyrus Sett out imediately and went on for y e Settlement, found it to be the Jail & Jail hous which are [Confined] Consumed. the prisners are Secured. by what means it took fire is y e t unknown. fears are Entertained it was [disignedly] done. at home. the Jail and Jail hous Consumed by Fire y s Evning.
Clear and pleast. Will m Cypher hauld wood, 3 load for us from y e East wd of y e hous. I have removd Banking & knit Some. at home.
Clear. I have had a pain in my Stomack. I have more trouble to See other ways than I know how to endure but God is able to giv me Strength and Forlitude. at home, unwel.
Clear, I have washt Cloaths and my floar, Sow d Sage & Pepper grass. we Sowd String Peas. mr Ballard been helping about ploughing. at home, washt &C.
Some rain. mrs Gill Came & Sleeps here. at home. [2]

Clear. mr Ballard, Son Town and Cyrus, Allin & Barny to meeting. this day observd as a day of fasting & prayer in y e Common welth. Son Ephm & Isaac Farewel, Son Jona, his wife & L e faett, Martha & James took Tea here. at home, fast day. our Childn were part of y m here.

Clear. I have removd Current Bushes, Cleard y e door y d , knit Some &C. Old mrs kenny Dind here. Cyrus been to Son Pollards, my Dagt Sent us Some Beef. mr Ballard returnd f m Capt osgoods. at home, mrs Kenny here.

raind all day. I have been Sorting raggs and Piecing Some for to wash dishes with. Hannah & Martha Ballard here. mr Ballard been to mr Evliths, got 1 qt Ginn, _ lb Souchon Tea & 2 lb Sugar by an order from a mr Robbards of [Varsalboro]. at [home].
Clear. I do not feel very well. Dagt Lambd to Son Jonas. mr Ballard & Cyrus to hear tryal of Barlow, he was found Gilty and [no entry]. at home. [3]
Cloudy. I have been at home, Brewd and did hous wk & knit Some. Lucy twisted hoes y n . at home.
Clear. I have been very ill. Hannah did my Bakeing & other work about hous and attended to me. at home, very Sick.

Clear part of y e day & Cooler. I have been winding & doubling Cottne yarn for Daught Lambard. Shee has been to Son Jonas this afler n . mr Ballard to the Settlement, was at Son Ephms; they were wel. at home. Daugt Lambd to Son Jonas.
Clear part of the day. I workt Some in y e door y d & knit some. was at Son Jonas part of aftern quilting on a Bed quilt. mrs Wiman and Dagt Lambd there. at Son Jonas.
