Clear. I have Bakt Pumkin pies, done some in my door yard. Son Lambards Cow Calvd this morn. my Daught & I went to the Barn at milking time, we had to grant her Some astistance. Son Jonas Daugts & mr Lambd s went & got aulderbuds. at home, have felt Some more Comfortable, Bakt pies.
Clear. I have Planted Squash in y e [field] but have Bakt and washt altho feeble. Dagt Ballard & mrs Gill to Tea here. at home. Barlow Sent to State Prison. [4]
Clear and pleasant. mr Ballard Came home, got our Beets and Carrots in. I tarried y s night. I went in at John and Amos Partridges. at Ditoes.
Clear and Cold. I have been at home. mr Ballard to [Selllement]. at home.
Clear. I workt in y e field & ironed. at home. [5]
Clear part of y e day. I Came to Meeting, went to Son Lambds at intermition. Came home after meeting. at ditoes, Son Lam ds & to Meeting.
Clear. mr Ballard & Cyrus to meeting. I have been at home. at home.
Cloudy. I was Conducted to Son Jonas where we took Supper, was informd that mrs Getchel was Dead. at Son Jonas.
Clear & warm. mr Ballard & Cyrus, mr Lamb d , his wife & Daugts to Meeting. Son Jona, his wife & mrs Gill here. mr Stone Discoars t from Prov 21 C 2 nt vers. at home. mrs Gill here. [6]
raind. mr Ballard, Cyrus & Allin to meeting. a mr Preston Discoars t foren fm Mat u 22 C 39 vers, aftern fm 1 st Corint h 5th C 20 vers. at home.

Clear & wrm. mr Ballard & Cyrus to Meeting. Rev d mr Stone Discoarst foren fm Isiaah 57 C 21st vers, after Romans Hebr w [6 th ] C 16 C 17 verse 17th vers. Son Lambd to Son Pollards after his wife. Sally P Tarried with Dolly, Hannah P, H h , S, and M Ballard. Harriet & Caroline Gill here. Jona took Tea with us. at home. Henry has Seen 18 [mon ] y s day. his marm Came home.
Cloudy, Snowd at Evng. I have Bakt Wheat & brown Bread and Pumpkin pies, Sent one to mrs Kenny. a mr Kimbal here and another man for a Sartificate. at home, Bakt.
Cloudy the most of y e day. Cyrus went to mr Cumings []. I have washt and knit 1 knot of [y n] in mr Bald s Stockin. at home, washt & knit.
Cloudy and Cold. Hannah Ballard here to double and twist yarn, her Father remains very unwel. at home.
Clear. I have been very feeble, Sett up but little. mr Balld to Parrish meeting. I have Beens & Squash Com up. at home. [7]
Clear and Cool, there was frost y s morn. I have Bakt Pumkin Pies. Daughts Ballard, Lambd and my Self went to See mrs Wiman. mr Ballard there to Tea. at mr Wimans.
Clear part of the day. I [Cut Pumkin] last night and to day. Gideon Barton took Breakfast here. Jason Pierce and wife Calld in. mr Ballard husking all day. at home. [mr was un ].
haild & raind. I have been at. at home.
Clear, Cold and windy. I have done my hous wk, ironed & knit. mr Soal Sleeps here. the remains of mrs Mathews interd aftern. at home. Funeral mrs Mathews.
raind y e most of y e day. Corn & Beens are Cuming up. mr Lambd & Luke went to Bowmans point to work. at home. Death Reubin [Wimans] wife. [8]
Clear. Old mrs Kenny & Brooks Dind here. I have done hous work and knit Some. a home. mrs Kinny here.
Clear. Son Lambard [remood] his Famely in to this hous, may it be Consistant with infinant [goodness]. at home. Son Lambad Came here [ ].

Clear. I have planted 60 hills purpl Corn, Beens & Squash with it in the N End of y e Gardin Cucumbers. Sowd Safron & String peas. mrs Abigail Eadds Expired. at home. Deaths Nabby Eadds. Sopha Gill Sleeps here. [9]
Clear. old mrs Kenny Dind here. mr Ballard been to y e Settlement. I have been kniting. at home.
Clear. I have workt in the door yard and knit Some, finisht a Stockin and began another. at home.
A very rainy day. I have been So unwel that I have Sett up bu t little. my Husband not so wel as we Could wish, he has threats of y e Cramp. at home, unwel.
Clear. I have been Sorting Beens the most of the day. EbenZ Hoveys wife was here, Friend David Foster allso. at home. mrs Hovey here, had Some herbs.
Clear. I have transplanted Cucumbers which I planted 20 may. drew Lee, put Yarn into it. at home. [10]

Clear and Cold. I have been at home, finisht a pair Stockins for my Self and began another. workt till 10h Evn by fire light. Son Lambd Came home at 9h, left Son Pollards famely wel. at home. mr Ballard & Cyrus Cutt Bushes.

Clear and very pleasant. I went to Lecture, Calld at mr Thwings, Slept at Son Ephms. Sopha been to meeting. I have not been to meeting Since the Sabbath after Thanksgiving till now. at mr Thwings to Lecture & Son Ephms.

rainy. Cleard of before 10h Evng. I have been Sorting raggs. Son Jona and wife, Sally & James here to Tea. Son Cyrus Came at Evng. Son Ephm & mr [Rines] to Varsalborough for Bords. at home. Jona & wife [here], Shee brot me Some[C ].
Clear. mr Ballard, my Self, Dagts Ballard, Lambd, Allin & Lucy attend at funeral mrs Abig l Eadds. at funeral mrs Nabby Eadds. [11]

Clear part of y e day. Lucy washt. I have done hous wk, Bakt. mrs Smith Supt here. mr Ballard been to the Settlement, he bo t _ lb Tea, a bottle of Stotans Elix r . funeral of John Pedrick. at home. mrs Smilh here, Lucy went home with her. [Funr l ] mr Pedrick.
Clear. I am no better. Daugt Ballard and mrs Wiman to See me, y e Latter tarried all night. we Sent to Stearns for pills, did not [obta ]. at home, very Sick.

Clear. mr Ballard attended Funeral of Old mr Cowen. A mr Fogg Performd, delivered a discoars from Revelations 14 C 13 vers, right Blessed &C. Sons Lambard & Cyrus Came home at Evng. I have finisht doubling Daugt Lambards Cottne y n , there were 15 Sceins. at home. Funeral Old mr Cowen. Death Edsons infant.

Clear part of y e day. I have been to Son Jonas to help her quilt her Bed quilt. what [elce] I have endured I wish not to write. Son Lambard Came here before 9h y s Evng from the Settlement, perhaps for A Caucus. at Son Jonas to quilt on a Bed quilt.

Clear & Cool. I have Bakt B n Bread. Brewd, pild wood, removd door dirt and my other hous work. Daugt Ballard & Lambd, Mart a & Lucy went to Son Ephms aftn. Allin to Hallowell, Son Cyrus to mr Cumings Mill to tend it. at home. I do feel fatauged y s night but Blessed be God for giving me Strength.
Clear. I have Bakt pumkin Pies [Cleansing] yn, Bakt Brown bread. dagt Ballard [ ] Pork. Son [Jonas] C. at home, Dagt [B ].

Cloudy. I Sett out from Son Ephms a little after Sun rise, find sister Moore, of watervil, and Son Elijah and his wife fm Portland here. they Took Breakfast here and Sett out for home at 8h Morn. I have Brewd & Bakt and workt Some in my Gardin. mr Ballard in y e field. at Son Ephms. Came from there very Early this morn. mrs Waitt [look] Harriet fm Jonas.

Clear. mrs Wiman tarried with me till 11 O Clock. I had a Severe Fever after Shee left me. Daught Lambard Came at Evng to See I obtaind Some pills, took a portion. my pain Still Continues. at home, no better.

Clear. mr Ballard & Cyrus to meeting. Revd mr Stone Discoarst foren from [no entry]. Son & Dagt Lambd went to son Jonas. I have been at home, wrote to Bror Collins Moore to Send by mr Rockwood. at home, wrote to Bror Collins Moore.
Clear and Cool. mr Ballard & Cyrus to meeting. I have been at home. Daugt Lambds to Son Pollards. mr L & Luke Came home at Evng. at home. [Revd mr] Stone discoarst fm Geneses 45, 3 V.
Clear. I have been at home, did my hous work & knit some. at home.
A very rainy day. Cyrus been here y s day. Son & Dagt Lambd and part of their Childn at Son [Jonas] yesterday. at [home].
Clear. I have fixt a place East of my roome and lransplanted 22 Cucumbers. mr Ballard workt on road. Son Jona, his wife & mrs Gill here to Tea, latter Sleep here. at home.

Clear and very warm. our men finisht fencing y e field and houghing. mr Lambd & Luke Sett out for Cap t Ballards after 6h Pm. I have mended 3 pr Trousers for mr Ballard and houghd Some in my Gard n . at home.
Clear and Cold. I have washt, been ["at home" - implied] at home.

Clear, y e moon Totally Eclipsed. [g] I rose to See it, mr Ballard and Luke allso. I did my hous work and washing. mr Ballard Surveyd for Bradford. Jonas dog killd my Catt. at home, washt. mr Ballard Sowd wheat for Jon a .

Clear. I have workt very har d in my gardin, houghd my Corn, Cucumbers, wed part of my oinions. mr Austin brot us 6 lb wool for the use of six Sheep which he took of us Jany 7 th for one year. Daugt Ballard Sent me 1 lb Butter. Ephm s wife Sent 10 lb rice. Son Pollard here to Tea, his famely are well. at home. mr Austin brot us 6 lb wool. Son Pollard here. [Hasil] Peting l ] here.
Dul weather. I have been at home, knit, finisht my Stockins. at home.
Clear, very Cold & windy. I have been doing hous work and knit Some. at home. [Death Edw d Springer].
Clear. mrs Farewel dind here. I have had my Soap on to Boil. I finisht a Leggin and began y e other. Cleand y e South Chamber. at home. mrs Farewel here.
Clear. I had a very ill turn this morn but through y e Goodness of y e Great Parent I feel more Comfortable y s aflern. at home.
Clear. I have been at home kniting. at home.

Clear. I have workt in the gardin, Sett Cabbage Stumps & Turnips and knit Some. Cyrus been to mr Cumings s , brot us _ lb indien meal, Some rie and Some wheat. I bakt Some flower bread. mr Ballard fencing y e Gardin. at home. Sett Cabage Stumps & Turnips. mr Lambd Came home at 9 h Evng. [16]
Cloudy. mr Ballard fixing Beds in y e Gardin. I have done hous work, gatherd Some greens and knit Some on Lukes Sock. at home.

Clear. I have Planted Cucumbers, W. Squash, Sowd Sugar & String Peas and Oinions. A mr Stedman and his wife Calld here for melolott. Daught Ballard & mrs Gillbart here to Tea. Luke Sawd limbs off Balm giliad trees and Cutt one down. at home. mr Stedman here. Daugt Ballard & mrs Gilbart here.

Clear. Sister Barton, mr Ballard and my Self & Dagt Lambd Dind at Son Jonas. Sister & I took Tea there. Sis t then Sett out for Son Pollards acompanied by his Daugt Hannah. Gidion Barton Sleeps here. at Son Jonas with Sis t Barton.

Clear. I have been kniting. mr Ballard Clearing a piece North of y e hous. Cyrus assisted him fore n, went to the Settlement after n on Business for us. he brot 2 qts molases & 2 lb Butter. at home, a trying Scein hapend

raind Some thro y e day, faster at Evng. Dagt Ballard here to Tea. mr L been to y e Settlement, Cyrus allso; brot us home 6 lb Pork. our men removed y e hen hous Sett by the necessary. Allin Erected A Place for the hens to lay in. at home. Son Jonas wife here.

Clear and pleasant. I was at Son Ephms till after dinner when mrs Hannah Crage Came and Conducted me to her Fathers in a Shais where I Spent y e aftern very agreeably. mrs s Burtun and Thwing there. I walkt from there to my Sons, Slept there. at Son Ephms & mr Crages.
Cloudy and Some rain. I have wash t and done other matters. mr Ballard has Planted 8 kinds of Beens at y e South End of y e Corn field. at home, did my washing.

Clear and hott. I have houghd part of my purple Corn and Cabbages. mr Nath l & Saml Cumings wives Calld here. Daugt Pollard & her Sons here, Saml Sleeps here. Shee & Thom s at Son Jonas, his wife is very unwel. Dagt Lambd been to See her. mr Lambd had a Bar l flour brot home. I have mended a pair Cottne hoes for mr Ballard. at home. 2 mrs Cumings s & Dagt Pollard here, gave us 4_ lb pork.

Clear part of y s day. mrs Savage Left here after dinner. mr Balld been to Capt Osgoods, he brot home 5 lb pork, _ gn Cherry & _ lb Snuff. I have knit Some, mended a Shirt and houghd beens, Cabbages &C South Side y e Gardin. at [home]. mrs Savage went home. A Letter fm Bror Elisah.
raing. I am at Son Ephms, his wife as wel as Can be Expected. at [Detoes].
Clear. mr Ballard & Cyrus to meeting. Son Jona, his wife and Part of y r Childn & Rhoda Pollard here. at home.

Clear and Cold. mr Ballard and Cyrus, Allin, Barny, Lucy and Dolly to meeting. Revd mr Stone Discoarsed from Matthew 23 C 23 vers . mr Lambart, his wife, mr Robinson, Luke Barton and Jona B Junr took Tea with us. at home. mr Balld & Cyrus to meeting.

rainy. mr Ballard & Son Cyrus to Meeting. Revd mr Stone Discoarst foren n fm Hebrews 2 C 3 v , aflern fm 139 [Plalm] 7th V, whither Shall I go &C. at home. mr Ballard & Cyrus to meeting, Allin & Barny allso.

Clear and pleast. I came fm my Sons to meeting, mr Ballard and I Dind at mr Thwings. I returnd home after meeting, find Son Lambard very Sick. Son Jona and wife were here. we Sent Allin for the Docter but the Tole gatherer would not let him Cross y e Bridg, and he [returnd] without him and we put a blister on his arm and Feverfue to his temples. at my Sons & [Meeting], it was Communion day. at mr Thwings, dind there.

raind foren. mr Ballard and Son Cyrus & Son Lambd went to meeting. Revd mr Stone discoarst foren fm Psalm CXLVIIth 18th vers, aftern fm James Chap 1s t 22 vers. Son & daugt Lambd to Son Jonas. he invited me but I did not go. at home.

Clear. mr Ballard, my Self and Cyrus to meeting, it was Communion. Revd mr Stone discoarst foren fm 1st Corinth ng 11 C 26 vers, aftern hebrews 12 th C 25 vers. Rhoda & Sally Pollard, H, S & M Ballard took Tea here, Son Ephm allso. Son Jona, his wife & mrs Gill Calld here. at Meeting & at Son Ephms. I have Seen 12 Grand Child n here y s day.

Clear Except a Shower about noon. mr Ballard & Son Cyrus to meeting. Revd mr Stone Discoars t f m Matthu 6th C 33 vers. Daugts Pollard, Ballard & mrs Gill here. Childn & Others together with our own fameties to amount of [25]. at home. Dagt Pollard here, Set out for home after 6h Pm.

Cloudy part of y e day. mr Ballard and Cyrus to meeting. Revd mr Stone discoarst fm 2 nt Peter Chap 3 d vers 9th. we had String peas & Beens for Supper. at home. I receivd a Letter of 9 th [inst fm Elisa] yeslerday.
Clear. I am at my Son Ephms, my Dagt as wel as Could be Expected. at Ditoes..

Clear. Dagt Lambd went to Meeting. I got ready to go aftn when [news] Came that mr Andrus was Dead. mr [Lambard] went & returnd. I went, a Prayer was Deld by Revd mr Stone, Discoarst from. [no entry]. at mrs Andrus, her husband Expird [Sudingly] very [ ].

Clear. I feel very feeble but Some more Comfortable than I was yesterday for which Mercy I wish to bless the author of all good. mr Ballard & Cyrus to meeting, Revd mr Parker performd. Discoarst f m 1 Eps l John 4 C 11 vers, aftern fm Romans 2 C 28-29 vers s . at home, very feeble.
raind part of y e day, Cold before and at night. I have been at home, performd various kinds w k . began my Self a pair hoes at Evng, knit 20 purls. at home. Funeral Calvin Edsons infant.

Cloudy and a little rain. I have been at home, did my hous work. workt Some in my door y d & knit Some. mr Ballard to parrish Meeting. Cyrus helping Son Jon a Plough. Hannah, Martha & James here. at home. hear that Cap t Stackpols wife Expired y s morn at 2 O Clock.
Clear. I am at Son Ephms. Sally Cumings washt, Shee Complains of a pain in her head. at Ditoes.
Clear. Sister Barton & I went to Son Ephms, Calld at Old mr Hamlins, Shee was not at home. we tarried at my sons. at Son Ephms, Slept there. Funeral mr Robins n .
Clear. I have been at home, [pasted] paper on part of y e North room, did hous work & knit Some. mr Ballard & Cyrus been to y e Settlement. at home.
Cloudy. Son Cyrus Sett out for mr Cumings. Revd mr Stone was here. I have done hous wk & knit. at home. mr Stone here. [Cyrus] went to mr Cumings.
Clear. I have transplanted Cucumbrs South y e hous, took Care of my y n . Old mr Kenny, mrs Gill & Sopha dind here. I Bakt flower bread. at home, mrs Gill here.
Clear foren, Cloudy aft n , raind at night. I have been at home, wed part of y e oinion Bed, did my ironing &C, felt feeble. at home, ironed.
Clear. I am at my sons, Sally C not able to do much work. my Daugt was very unwel at night. I Slept but little. at Ditoes.

Clear. I have finisht harvesting my Peas in the field and Done y e hous work. Dagt Lambd weaving. we are informd that Capt Toby was woonded very badly by a Bull. at home. Capt Toby very much hurt by a Bull y s day.
Clear and Cold. I have done hous wk & knit Some, feel not very wel. a pair mits for Cyrus. at home.
Clear till near night. I have done hous wk and wed gardin. mr Ballard, Lambard, [Rhines] & Luke houghing Corn. Dagt Lamd & Dolly Strikeing a harnes. at home, workt in my Gardin.
Clear. Sally Farewel Conducted me home and Dagt Lambd went down with her. Son Ephms wife Seems more Comfortable. mrs Gill here, Sleeps here. at ditoes.

Clear and very warm Except A lite Shower near night. I have gathered Beens & Pees, Sent Some to Son Ephms, his wife is Cleverly. mr Ballard been to Hallooell Surveying. Saml Gill Came Came [sic] here for his Sister. at home. Old mrs Parker here.

Clear and moderate. I have removd my Soap in to my Sellar, have one Barril full and 2 pails ful. Son Jona here at Evng, took Tea with us. he has Seen 45 years y s day. I have knit Some. I removd things from y e Buttery, washt Shelves & floor. at home. mr Ball d Bot me [_] lb Snuf.
Clear part of y e Day, Snowd part. I have been at home. [my fingers very sore.] at home.

raind. mr Ballard went to the Settlement, Bot 2 lb Sugar, _ d o Tea & 1 do Butter, _ gn Spirrit, _ Bs l Corn. I have Spent y e day fixing herbs to drie & make ointment of. mrs Brooks & John Browns wife here. at home. mrs Brooks & Brown here. Allin Sett out for Bath.
Clear part of ye day. I finisht kniting a pair Legins and Sorted raggs, Cut some. at home. Death [young] Purkins.
Cloudy all day, raind hard at night. I have done hous work & knit Some. Daugt Lambd brot me Spirit and milk, Jonas wife Sent us milk allso. at home. Cyrus Came at Evng.
Clear. I have Planted Beens, Bush Squash, Sowd F. turnips, Sow d Peas and done other matters about hous. Daught Lambard to Son Jonas. at home. Son Cyrus Came home at Evng.
raind the most of y e day. I have Done the Cooking and other matters. Gidion went to my Sons to Breakfast. at home.
Clear. I have done hous work and got in herbs and parsnip Seeds. Son Jonas wife here to Tea. I have Bakt Brown bread &C. at home. Daught Pollard 39 years old y s day.
Clear part of y e day. mr Ballard And Cyrus to meeting. Son Jon a and wife took Supper with us. at home.

Cloudy and Some rain. mr Ballard & Cyrus to meeting. Revd mr Slone Discoars t fm Ephesions VI C 4 th V. Son & Daugt Ballard, their Sons, Jona, Ep m , Wil m , Jamess & Sally & Martha and mrs Gillbard Supt here. at home. Son Jona & part of his Famely here.
A rainy day. mr Ballard & Cyrus to Meeting. Revd mr Parker Performd. Discoarst fm Mark 2 nt C 27 & 28 Verses & Isaiah 43 d 25. at home.

Clear part of ye day, raind at Evn g . Son Jonas wife & mrs Gill Calld in. mr Ballard & Cyrus to meeting. Revd mr Cushman performd, his Text foren Mat 12 C last vers, aftern Prov 22 nt 9th vers. at home, feel [bet ] feeble. Son Jona Sent us Chees, [Bu ] & fish.

Clear. Dagt Lambd went to Meeting. I got ready to go aftn when [news] Came that mr Andrus was Dead. mr [Lambard] went & returnd. I went, a Prayer was Deld by Revd mr Stone, Discoarst from. [no entry]. at mrs Andrus, her husband Expird [Sudingly] very [ ].

Son Ephms 3 d Daugt Expired, aged 5 weaks, 2 days & 12 hours. Clear. I am at my Sons, the Child is no better. Dagt Ballard Came and assisted in takeing Care of it. Doct Cony was Calld, left Sinna [and] Elixir Salutus but it was past the reach of medisin. it Continued till 7 h 30 m Evng when it gave up y e ghost. a mr Howard tarried all night. at Ditoes. the Babe Expired at 7 h 30 m Evng. mrs Hamlin and Titcomb laid it out.

Clear the most of y e day. mr Balld & Cyrus to meeting. Revd mr Stone Discoarst fm St John 14 C 11 vers. Son Ephm and his wife & Sopha here after meeting. Bror Lambd went to Varsalboro to his Son Capin. at home. Son [Ephm] his wife & Dagt here.
Clear part of this day. mr Ballard & Cyrus to Town meeting, Son Lambd allso. Saml Pollard dind here. Daugt Lambard and Child n to Son Jonas. at home, knit Some.

Clear. I have been very Sick with pain in my head &C. mrs s Cleark Calld here. Jona and wife Came y s aftern. I have got Easier thro Gods Goodness. at home, very unwell. Son Jona and wife here to Tea.
raind part of the day. I was very Sick. mrs Farewel and Son Jonas wife here. at home, very Sick.

Clear part of the day. I have planted Cucumbers & Poland Beens and Some Squash Seeds. mr Ballard planted [Banibas] beens. mr Lambard Corn, Beens & potatoes. Cyrus [Shea ] Sheep. Ephm took Tea with us. at home. Son Ephm Planting Corn on y e Farewel farm.

rainy part of the day. I have transplanted my young Sage root, have 200 Sett Cabbage plants &C. mr Ballard been to mr Hamlins to See y e Select Gentlemen, had Jed y Prebbles taxes abaled & receivd an order on P. T. Voce for 2 D 92 cents. at home.
Clear and windy, thee air much Cooler. I have done my washing but So feeble that I was oblidged to Lay down a number of times. at home, washt.
Clear & warm. I have pickt wool. Dagt Lambd did my washing. Old mrs Kenny here for Currents. mrs Wiman took Tea with us. at home.
raind Some foren n . I have felt feeble but did my hous wk and gatherd pees. Son Lambd and Luke to work on y e Bridg. at home.

Clear. Dagts Ballard & Lambard went to Old mr Gills. I fellt feeble but was So wel aftern as to gather Beens & Pees to Send to Son Epm. mr Ballard went to See Son Ephms Corn, he found Allin, Barny & W m Bald with a fire by y e road, roasting Corn. at home, Some better.
Cloudy. I have Cut apples & other [matters]. at home. [27]
Clear and Cold. I have been kniting. Son Ephm here. at home.
rainy. I have workt in my door y d and knit Some, washt my room, Stairs and Entry &C. mr Ballard to Cap t osgoods. at home.

Clear. my Sister & I lefe Son Ephms before 10h morn. Calld at mr Carters then proseeded to Capt Shubal Pitts s . Dind & took Tea. we went into Stores for pins but found none. I Sett out for home, walk as far as Rewel Williams s when I met Barny with a hors and I wrode home. at Son Ephms, mr Carters & Capt Shubal Pitts s .
Cloudy. I have gatherd Corn to grind & y e last of my poll Beens. a man who had livd East Side river on Voses farm Buried y s aflern. at home, a Funeral. [28]
Clear. I have transplanted Squash in y e field and gardin, done my washing & hous work. Cyrus Calld here . at home.

Cloudy morn, Clear aftern. I have houghd my purple Corn, did hous wk. mr Ballard went to Hallowell, he brot home 6 mackeril, _ lb Snuf, _ lb Shu sn Tea, 2 lb Sugar. Dagt Lambd & I went to Son Jonas, mr Ballard took Tea there allso. at Son Jonas. Shee gave me 2_ lb Chees. mrs Gill Sleeps here.

Clear. I did the morning work and Sett out with Some wool to git Spun. was at Sam l Braleys, Isaace Savages & Asa Masons. mrs Savage took it to Spin 3 pounds roals. I took Dinner at Son Jonas. Daugt Lambd got her web out,30 yds. at Saml Braleys, Isaac Savages & Asa Masons.Son Towns youngest Child named [Salem] Expired.
Clear & pleast. mr Ballard and Cyrus to Hallowell to See the review. I got in Beens, Squash & pumpkins which grew in y e Gardin. at home. [29]

Clear and Cold. Son Ephm & wife here. he brot us 6 lb Beef [and] Do pork and 1 lb [Tobaco] for his Dad. he went to Sidney. Dag t Pollard Sent us 5_ lb Beef and 8 lb Pork. I began a Legin for mr Ballard. at home. Son Ephm & wife here.

Clear and very warm till near night when A Sea turn Came on. I have done hous wk, wed 1 Bed in y e gardin. Daugt s Ballards, mrs Gill, Hannah & Sally Pollard to Tea.. y e 2 latter Sleep here. Sopha, W m , Martha & James here. at home. Child n & Grand Childn here. Dagt Lamb finisht her Hernes.

Cloudy & Some rain. I have Cut to drie Squash & pumkins. Old mrs Kenny here for Cabbage. mr Lambard brot me Tea, Sugar & Spirit. 9 S which mr Stinson Sent me for asisting his wife. at home. I receivd 9 S of mr Stinsonby Son Lambd. [30]
Cloudy & Some rain. I was at Son Jonas, his wife has y e ague in her face, I applied [bn doax n ]. at Son Jonas. [1]
Clear and warm. I have washt & done other work. mr Ballard been to y e Settlement & Cyrus Came home at Evng. Luke & Jona brot us wood. at home.
Clear. I Cut flocke and made holders. at home.
Clear. I have felt very feeble but have Bakt and done other matters. mr Ballard has been to Cap t ozgoods and to Hallowell. Cyrus Came here. at home.
Cloudy and rain. I have Cutt Squash, Pumkin, apples to drie, Dagt Lambd to mr Moodies, carried Cloth. at home. [2]

Clear. I went to mr Williams to see the Decexion of Rachel Savage. There were 12 Doctors present and 3 Mid wives present. there was a Larg Substance which w d 35 lb found in her. at Asa Williams. Funeral of Rachel Savage.

Clear. mr Ballard, my Self and Cyrus to Meeting. Revd mr Parker Discoarsts f m S t John 6 Ch 68:69 th vers s . we were at Son Ephms at intermition, attended Prayer at the hous of mr Dillingham whose infant Child was interd after divine Service was over. Son Jona & wife here After meeting. at meeting. Son Cyrus has Seene 52 years ys day. Funeral mr Dillinghams infant.
Cloudy & rain. mr Bald & Cyrus to meeting. Revd mr Slone Spake fm [Jerem h ] 6 th C 16th vers. Son Jona & wife Supt, Son Ep m Calld in. mr Lambd to hear mr Rogers. at home, Childn here. [3]
Clear and not very warm. mr Ballard & I went to Son Pollards. Ephm Conducted me in a Sleigh. we tarried all night. at Son Pollard, all well.

raind part of y e day, the Sun Shone till about noon. mr Ballard been to Sett off Son Ephms wives Share of her hond Fathers Farm on which he disceast. Sally Farewel and Sophia Came here, they tarrie this night. Son Ep m Dind & took Tea with us. at home, did hous work and knit Some, finisht Lukes Socks.
rainy foren. I have been at home. Done Some work in my Gardin, finisht Sorting Beens. Luke returnd from his Mothers. at home.

raind the most of y e day. I have Sett plants, houghd Squash & Cucumbers. Son Jona Sent us 5 [lb] Lamb. he lost a good hors yesterday by a woond, Warrin Stone a Cow; the only one he had. at home, mended hoes & Sett plants.
Clear. we were at Son Ephms, the Neighbours granted them assistance in makeing preperation for the interment. I Slept in the Chamber alone where y e Corps lay. at Ditoes, Dagt Ballard went home.

Clear part of the day. Rhoda Pollard Came here to weav a piece in her aunts Loom. Saml Dind here. Bror Lambd Came here at Evn, Sleeps here. I have gatherd drie & green Beens, Cu t Squash to drie &C. mr Ballard been unwel. at home. Old mr Lambd here, Rhoda allso. raind at Ev. [20]
Clear & pleast. I have done hous wk. Ezra Town Sleeps here. at home, Ezra Town here. [4]
Birth mr Nasons 7th Child. Clear. mrs Nason was Safe Deld at 1h y s morn of a 4th daugt & 7th Child. we all tarried till morn. at mr Nasons. Birth 3 d .

Cloudy, raind Some. I heard that Sally Ballard was Sick and went to my Sons, find here relievd and Cleverly. her Complaint was the Collic. I tarried and quilted on my Dagts Bed quilt till Sun Sett. we did not finish it. at Son Jonas, Sally has been unwel.
Cloudy. I Still remain very ill. mrs Farewel left here for home. my pain Some abated. at home, very ill yet.

Clear the most of y e day, raind at Evng. I have Planted Squash of Several kinds & Cucumbers Some North of y e hous & Some in the [field.] dagt Ballard [and] mrs Gill, [ ] Town and Ephm to Tea here. [ ] Ballard & Cyrus to Coart. at home. the troops on Gard y s night [ ] y e Indiens So Calld.
Clear and warm. I have Done a fort nits wash. Dagt Lambd washt and went to Son Jonas. they were Crying Murder at Brookses. mr Ballard & Allin houghing Corn. at home.
Clear & Cool. I have felt very feeble. mr Ballard houghing Corn. Daugt Lambd put a web in to the Loome. Rhoda & Dolly Pollard Sleep here. at home. Rhoda & Dolly Pollard Sleep here.

Cloudy morn. mr Ballard went to help Cyrus pick mill he brot home [no entry]. Son Lambd Sett out for Bellfast. I have been picking wool. Son Jonas Dagts & Jason Pierces here. Dolly L went to mr Wimans w h lhem. at home. mr Bald to help Cyrus.

Clear, A Cool morn, warm afterwards. mr Ballard went to Son Ephms, finds them Comfortable. he bot 8 lb pork of C. [Wall]. he, my Self, Son Cyrus, Dagt Lamb d , Barny & Lucy attend Funeral of Neighbor Andrus. A mr Kendal Delivd a very long discoars from Revelations 14 C 13 th vers. Son s Cyrus, Jona & his wife & Martha took Tea with us. Daug t Lambd had a Severe pain in her head after we Came home. at the Funeral of mr Andrus.
Clear. I have finisht Breuing and done my hous work, been at home. Son Town Sleeps here, his Famely are well. at home, Son Town Sleeps here.

rainy. I have done houe work, Sheld Beens &C. Bror Lambd left here a t 9h morn, it began to rain at 11. mr Ballard and Allin Cleand our well. Rhoda got her web into ye Loom. Son Cyrus Came from mr Coneys, has finisht [t ]. at [home]. Bror Lambd Sett [out home he Slept at Son Ephms]. [21]
Cloudy. I have done various Sorts work. Ezra left here for home. at home.
Clear. I have been at home, finisht a Stockin mrs Wiman & Dagt Ballard here. Son Ephm has Seen 39 years this day. at home. Son Ephms Birth day.
Clear. I have been at home doing hous work and gathering parsnip Seed. at home.
Cloudy & Some rain. I have felt very unwel but have Bakt & done other wk. Son Ep ms wife Sent me 2 lb Candles. at home. [22]
Cloudy. I have done hous work. at [home].
Clear. at home. washt, done hous wk. at home.
Clear & pleast. Cyrus to See mr Benn Bisbee ordaind. I have been at home. at home. Cyrus to Ordination.

Clear. I have workt in gardin, mended Cloaths, done hous wk &C. mrs Farewel Dind with me, look Tea with Dagt Lambd and Sett out for home. I went in to See mr Broockses Child, mr Dagt allso. at mr Broockses to see his Child Who is unwell.

Clear. mrs Wiman here to git a Jacoat Cut by my Daugt Lambd. mrs Gill went to Son Jonas. I have workt in my Gardin, Sett [35] Plants and done other Matters. Jonas Boys took Plants and Sett by y e Barn. mr Ballard to y e Settlement, had 1 gl n molases, 2 qts Spirit, 1 Bushl Corn of mr Dickman and Some tobacko. at home. mrs Wiman here. I feel Some falagued.

X. Birth Joel Savages 2 nt Daugt. XX. I was Calld by Joel Savage at Mid night to go & See his wife who is in Labour. I found her not very ill. I went onto the Bed & rested but did not Sleep. it raind before day break. her illness Came on, her women Calld in and Shee was Safe Deld a Daught her 3 d Child at 6h 30 m ys morn and is Comfortable. we had a good Breakfast and I receivd 9 s as reward. Sett out home, reacht there before 10. was informd that Son Towns youngest Child is dead. at Joel Savages. Birth 2nd, receivd 9 S as a reward.

Clear and Cool, a frost y s morn. I have felt very unwel foren n , harvested Beens after n , Sheld Some at Evng. mr Ballard to Hallowell, receivd a part of Colo Fillebrowns Taxes at mr Welds. at [home]. [23]
Clear and very Cold. I have washt Some, Twisted yarn. mrs Partridg brot me this weak 3_ lb B, 1_ [por k ], _ lb Butter. at home.

raind y e most of y e day. I have been at home, transplanted 13 Cucumber Plants. Hannah & Sally Pol d , Han h & Martha Ballad & Ephm 3 d , and Carroline Gill took Tea here. at home, [mended] mrs Brown Short Goun & Skirt, Sett Cucumbrs.

Clear part of y e day. I have washt and done other matters. mr Ballard been to y e Setllement, brot home 2 lb Sugar, _ do Tea & [2] qts Spirit. Cyrus to Coneys and Brot flower home & Corn for [fowl]. at [home]. [24]

Clear. I have been at home, Dagt Lambd to Son Ephms. Cyrus went to Charls Voses, brot 7_ lb Pork. Dagt Ballard, Son Jonas wf, here, brot me [3_] lb pork. at [home]. Son [Jonas] wife here. Lefaett was here. [25]
very rainy after 10h morn. mr Ballard & Cyrus to meeting, y e Sacrament administred. mr Lambd & Luke been [to] Sister Bartons. at home.

Clear. I have put my Coat in my Corn Stalk die, Scolt pickeles and done other matters. Dagt Lambard went to Son Pollards. I pray God May forgiv every misstep Shee has taken towards me thro her whole life and enable her to walk in wisdoms waye in future. at home. daugt Lambd to Son Pollards.

Clear. we Sett out after 9h morn, reacht home before 11. Dagt Ballard & mrs [Gilbi ] here aftern. James Bolton Sent me a pair Shoes & Some Sugar on John Boltons aCount. at Detoes & Son Jonas. Funeral mrs Savage Son by [Purkins].

Clear, the ground frose Some depth y s Morn. I have Brewd, Sowd Parsley and Sett Sage roots. Daugt Lambard & Sally Farewel went to [ the wido ] the hous in which her Father left. they went to Son Jonas after Dinner. at home. my [husba d ] has Seen 83 years this day.

Clear and pleast. I have been at home, did a little aboud gardin Matters. Daugt Lambd washt & Brewd. the men Planted Corn, Beens & Pumkins. Daugt Ballard here aftern. mr Ballard planted [Bonnebis] Beens. at home. Dagt Ballard here with part of her Childn.

Clear, part of y e day Showers. mr Ballard houghing in y e field. I have took my Bed Stead down, Scolt it [&] the Sealing; washt y e floor. we are informd y t a man who is a Stranger was Drowned at Hallowell y s day. Gidion Barton and James Purington here. at home, Scolt my Bed Stead & washt my rooms.

Clear part of y e day. the remains of y e deceased infant were intered after 4 pm. Revd mr Stone made an able prayer on y e ocation. mr Isaac Farewel and Lady were at y e funeral. there was a Shower with thunder after we returnd from y e grave. mr Ballard & I tarried all night. at Ditoes. the Funeral of his Child attended.
Clear & pleast. Old Lady Emry & mrs Wiman to See us. Dagt Ballard Sent us a quarter muttun. Shee brot me [food] on Sunday, they are very kind. at home. mrs Emry & Wiman here.
Clear and pleast. I am So much better that I have done Some work. I hope I Shall have a true Sence of Gods goodness. at home.
Clear and warm. mr Ballard & Allin houghing Corn. I have done y e hous work. Dagt Lambd puting a web into the Loome. Dolly Bar y & Lucy to School. at home. mrs Kenny here.

Clear and not very warm. Dagt Ballard & mrs Trask, mrs Gordin, Swanton & Nancy & W m Stones wife, H, S & M Bld been here y s day, mrs Parker allso. I have been very unwel. mr Ballard been to Hallowell to hear an Oration of y e free masons, it was perf m by a mr Pierley. at home, very unwell. mr Balld brot me a pint of Cherry.

Clear and warm. Old Lady Gill and Charls Dind & took Tea here. Dagt Ballard, Sally, Mat a , W m and James here. mr Ballard helpt Jona about his hay. we had a Shower after 10h Evng. at home, Old Lady Gill [here].

Clear. I have done hous work and Cut herbs to drie. mr Ballard went to mill, Carried _ bs l Corn, had A peck rie of Son Cyrus. Allin returnd from Bath. wido Savage Sleeps here, Shee has been to See mrs Taylor at y e poor hous, Shee is Sick. at home. wido Savage Sleeps here.

a frost y s morn. Clear. I have done my hous work. Dagt Lambd did my washing and her own. we wint to Son Jonas. I there found out where Allin got the Corn he was roasting in the woods. at Son Jonas, Eph Cowen s here, Dorkis Nickles Sleeps here.

Clear & warm. I have done hous wk & mend a Shirt for Son Cyrus. Son Jonas wife here, took Tea. informd that a Child of a mr Hussey Died of a woond it receivd in y e bowels by an accident; his Bro r Struck an ax into his Bowels and his Entrails fell out. at home, Jonas wife here.
Cloudy. I have washt &C. at [home].
Clear. Betsy Brooks helpt Clean part of my hous. I paid her in Soap. mrs Wiman here. mr Ballard to Hallowell. mrs Wiman here. Betsy Brooke [w ] for me.
Clear. I have been at home. at home.
Clear part of y e day and pleas t . I have finisht makeing my apple Sauce & Done other things. at home.
Clear & warm. I have Sett 60 Cabage Plants, houghd down weads &C. at home.

Clear part of y e day, a high wind & rain at night. mr Ballard & I to Lecture & Son Ephms. mr Stones Text 1st Timothy 1st C 15 [v]. Sister Moore her Son ["Sleep here" - implied]. at Lecture and Son Ephms. Elijah & wife Sleep here.

Clear. I have finisht my wash but feel very feeble. I have gathered Some mustard, Cut purple Corn Stalks &C. Son Jonas wife here to Tea with Dagt Lambard. mr Ballard been to Lecture. Revd mr Stone discoarst fm 2 nd Corint IX C 15 th vers. at home. mr Ballard to Lecture. Funeral Son Towns Son [Salem].
Clear but Chilly. mrs Farewel & Dag t Ballard and Martha here. mrs F Sleeps here. at [home]. mrs [Farewel] here.

Clear. I rose Early, Searcht my Plants, killd many Bugs. did a larg wash, wash t my room & [dugt] Lambd left home at y e 11th hour for Son Pollards. Sally [wit ] Dolly helping her. at home. Dagt Lambd to Son Pollards.

Cloudy. mr Ballard and I attended Funeral of Old mr Isaac Savages wife. it was attended at mr W m Stones. mr Com Smith Deld a Discoars from Romans 5th C 21 s vers. we did not prosceed to the grave. mr Savage is more Comfortable than he has been. at the Funeral of mrs Savage.
Snowd till 3h pm then raind. I have been doing hous wk, washt Some; knit allso. Rhoda mended her Grand fathers grey Coat. I finisht a pockett. at home.

Cloudy. mr Ballard to meeting. Revd mr Stone Spake fm Romans XII C 12, aft n fm Isaiah. I & my hous &C. Son Jona, his wife & Mart a here a little while. Son Ep m & wife & Sophia Took Supper with us. mr Rogers Spake fore n fm Rom 5th C. at home, part of our Child n here.
Snowd. mr Ballard to meeting. Revd mr Stone Discoarst fm Luke 9th C 55 & 56 Vers s . I hear that Son Ephms wife has a Sore on her Legg & very Lame. at home, Cyrus Staid at home.

Clear part of y e day, Snowd before night. mr Ballard and Cyrus to meeting. Revd mr Stone disc st fm John IX C 41 vers. Son Lambd, his wife, Barny, Henry here, Son Jona, wife, Sally and Martha, Ebenz Trask and wife here allso. it began to rain in y e night. at home, Friends here.

Clear. mr Ballard to meeting. Revd mr Stone discoarst f n fm Jobe 16 C 22 vers, aft fm [no entry]. Sons Ephm Jona, Ephm & wife Supt with us. Jonas wife to hear mr Goth m Sewal. at home. Childn here. it raind Evng. [2]
Clear. I have been at home, did hous wk & knit on a mit n . Cyrus went to Rhedfield. at home. Daugt Ballard here. [3]

Clear, a Sutherly wind. I have washt, feel very much fatagued, allmost Sick. mr Ballard Cuting Stalks. Beniamin Pains hors was killd between mrs Andruss & mr Wimans by going against a Stump & Pain was badly hurt. at home. mr [Lambd] to Trooping. Pains hors killd, he was very much hurt himSelf.
Clear. Son Town & Polly Sleep here, his famely as wel as usual. Cyrus Came home. at home. Son Town & Polly Sleep here. [4]
raind but mr Ballard, Lambd, Cypher & Soal finish t Ploughing the new ground by our Corn field. I Sorted [Bonnybiss] Beens, had 2 qts fit for [planting]. at home, it is Election day.
Clear & warm. I have washt and Cutt herbs to drie. I feel very Sick at night. at home.

Clear. I left my Sons at 2 h pm, was Conducted home by mrs Sally Farewel in a Shais. Sopha Came with [us]. I gathered Cucumbers, [mustard], Safron, merigoulds after I Came home. at Detoes and returnd home.
Clear. I have done part of my washing and other work. at home.
Clear. Son T. & Polly left here. I have felt very unwel y s day. at home. Son Town went fm here. [5]

Clear. I have done my ironing & Some wk in my gardin. mr Ballard & Allin houghing Corn. Sister Barton Came here. Shee [&] mrs Gill Sleep here. Son Jonas wife here at Evng. Dagt Lambd Ironed [&] wove 4 yards. at home. Sister Barton & mrs Gill Sleep here.
Clear & warm. I finisht houghing my Corn in y e Gardin. the widdo Savage Came to See us. Shee and Charls Swanton Dind here. Shee and I went to Son Jonas. at Son Jonas.
Clear and warm. I have Bakt Brown Bread, a Puding and Brued. mr Balld workt for Son Jona foren. Betsy Wiman here, took Tea with us. at home, Bakt & Brued.

Clear & warm. mrs Savage left here foren n . I have done my hous work, washt and pulld up weads in my gardin &C. mrs Lambd washt, Bakt and went to Son Jonas. Saw mrs Gill & her Bro r Saml direct from Son Towns, they are well. at home. washt & did work in my Gardin. mrsSavage left here.

Clear and warmer than it was yesterday. I went to Son Ephms, find her as wel as Can be Expected. the Babe is Troubled with wind, Cried much while I was there. Son Jonas wife & Dagt Lambard to Cap t Shubas Pitts s . at Son Ephms, a trying Scein took place here y s morn.
Clear. I have been at home, Some Better. I Bakt mins Pies. Betsy Andrus Came in to See me. at home, Betsy And s here.
Snowd at Evng. Linda Getchel Came and did my washing. at home. Linda G. washt here for me. [6]
Cloudy foren, a Shower about 1h pm. I wed my oinions and removd Some of my parsley roots, have not felt very wel. at home, Bakt.
Clear. mr Ballard to Court, Son Town here. at [home].
have been at home, Snowd Some. at home.
Clear. Son Lambds Daugts and Sally Ballard here. mr Balld to Lecture. at home.
Clear. I have Bakt and done other work. Dagt Ballard Sene us victuals. at home.
Clear and Cold. I have don hous work, got in wood & knit some. mr Ballard & Jona Junr got us wood. Cyrus to y e Settlement. at home. Funeral of Old Cap t Carr of Hallowell. [7]

raind and Cold. Cyrus informd that a Collectors hors was Shot at Belgrade this weak and y t mr Dillingham has been fired at by men in Disguise. Barny [Robinson] had 2 horses Drowned Back of fort Westorn this day. at home. Barny Robinson had two horses Drouned y s day.

Clear. I was Calld by Son Ephm to go and See his infant which I found very Sick. it had a high feaver and much oprest for Breath. we gave it a little Caster Oil and it Seemd Some Easier. I Sett up with it till near 4h morn when I put it in Bed with its Mother and Slept a little. mr Son Calld me up and we thought Expireing but it revived a little. we Sent for Son Jonas wife, Shee Came. at Son Ephms, his infant very Sick.
Clear. I have Bakt b n & Flower Bread. mrs Farewel left here. at [home].

raind and Snowd. I have washt, tried Tallow, 16 lb rough, which Cyrus brot fm Son Lambds yesterday, he brot 3 lb 11 oz Butter allso which was purchast with money mr Ballard Left with him. Cyrus brot 1 qt Spirit had of Bond. at [home], washt &C. I was taken very Sick in the night.
Clear part of y e day. Mark twicht up Loggs for us y s morn. I have Bakt, washt things for Cyrus, mended him a Coat & hoes; it is now about mid night. at home, done various Sorts work. [8]

Clear. mr Ballard & Cyrus to hear mr Stone, his text was James 3 C 17 V. mr Lambd, his wife & Childn to upper Parrish. mr Smilh Spake from Thesilonians 4 C 9 vers. I have been at home. at home. mr Lambd s Famely to North Parrish to hear mr Smith.
Clear Pleast Sun but Cool air. mr Ballard and Cyrus to meeting. Revd mr Stone disc st for n fm Mark, aft n f m Proverbs. at [home]. Savage Bolton Calld [here].

raind allmost all day. mr Ballard to meeting. Revd mr Stone discoarst fm Luke VI C 47-48 vers s . Hannah Balld here. Rhoda & Shee went to See the indiens. mr Wiman Spent Evning here. at home. Rhoda Sleeps at Son Jonas.
Clear and pleast day. I am very Sick yet. mr Ballard to meeting. Revd mr Stone Disco st fn fm. [no entry] Son Jona & wife & Martha Came to See me. [H ] Hannah with me all day. Dagt Lambard [better].

Clear the most of y e day, very Cold night. mr Ballard & Cyrus to meeting, Text Prov 13 th 14 vers, aftn Acts 13:15 vers. August s Ballard Calld in here. Luke & Allin brot Polly Town up. at home, friends here.

raind the most of y e night past, and all day till towards night when it Snowd very fast but mr Ballard & Cyrus got 2 [Tagys] of wood. I have been Cuting apples for Sause, Boild Cider. to make it we had a Barril brot home. at home.
Clear. mr Ballard went to Capt OZgoods, tarried all night. I have done h s wk & knit 25 purls. at home.
a very rainy day. this is the anneversary of my Marriage 54 years Since. how many Sceans I have past thro in that time, am here a monument of Gods Mercy.

Clear and Cold. mr Ballard Cutt wood, 20 Loggs &C. Cyrus Sett out for mr Beens to tend mill. Polly was Conducted to Son Jonas to Spend Evng. I have finisht kniting mr Ballard a pair mitts and done other matters. [at home]. Polly went [to] Son Jonas at Evng.
Clear. I have washt a goun for my Self and done my ironing &C. at home, hear mrss Lithgo is Sick.
Clear. I have been so Sick that I have not Sett up but little y s day. Betsy Andrus here to have a web warp t . at home.
Clear. I have Scolt my pickeles & put a dye of my purple Corn Stalks a makeing and did various kinds of wk. at home.
Clear. I have done a larg wash, feel much fatagued. at home.

Snowd all day. my Son & Dagt went home afler Breakfast and Hannah Came and tarried this day & night. thro Gods Goodnes I feel much more Comfortable. Sally & Martha Came here, dind. they went home tho there was bu t little track. at home, much [freeer] fm pain. my Child n went home & Hannah Came here.

Allin [Lambd is 18 years old y s day]. Clear and warm foren. mr Savage and I went to mr Andruss aflern. A Cloud arose. we Sett out from there, got to mr Wimans and had very heavy Shours. it Ceast raining and we reacht home after Candle light. [Shubal] & Tho s Hinkleys wivs at mr And s . at mr Andruses and mr Wimans. mr And s is Some Easier.

X. Birth Son Ephm s 3 d Dagt. XX. Clear. I was Calld at 3h m to Son Ephms, his wife in Labour. Son Jonas wife went with me. my Dagt Deld at 7 h 30 m of her 3 d Dagt. her Case was Some Alarming but Shee revivd and Seems Comfortable. Dagt B went to Es q Titcombs and Ephms wife had a fainting fit. Old Lady Hamlin and I attended her [this day ]. [at Son Ephms]. Birth 1st. receivd 18 S as reward.

Clear & warm. Daugt Ballard, W m , Martha & James Dind here. my Dagt took tea. mr Ballard went to the masheen with 5_ lb wool, had it Carded and brot y e roals home, price 45 cents. I have been very unwel all night. at home. Dagt Ballard here. I was Sick at night.

Clear. Sister Barton Came here, mr Porter Came down with her. he and Son Pollard Calld in here. I have been at home. mrs Porter Sent us a Chees y t w d 12 lb. at home. mr Porter here, Sist Barton allso.

Snowd and is Cold. I have Bakt Mins and Apple Pies and made 11 DZ n Candlewicks. Cyrus to y e Setteement yesterday, got _ lb Tea at Josiah Voces, 3[ s ]. mr Ballard workt at Son Jonas yesterday aftern and y s day. at home, made Candle wicks.

Clear till near night, Snowd at Evng. mr Ballard went to Son Jonas, brot home 10 lb Butter, Cos t 1 Dol. Cyrus has been to mr Locks at Rome. I have done hous wk & finisht kniting my Self a pair garters. at home.
Clear part of y e day, windy at Evng. I have done Some washing & knit. Polly Town Came fm Son Lambeds to our hous. Sally Poll d wen t home. at home. P. Town Came here.
Clear. I have washt & washt my floor. Sister Barton, mrs s Crage & 3 Childn took Tea here. mr Sister Sleeps here, Son Jonas wife & Martha here allso. at home, mrs Crage here.
Clear. I have wk t in gard n , mended hoes. at [home].
Cloudy and Some rain. mr Dickman fell from his hors by his Stumbling, was Carried to Son Jonas. Docters Calld, he is very much hurt. at home. mr Dickman fell from his hors near Son Jonas.
Clear. I have Bakt Pies. mrs Wiman here. I have done various kinds work. at home.
Clear morn, Cloudy before night. I have done hous work, ironed [&] mended hoes for my husband & Cyrus. Jonas wife here a little while. at home. mrss Ozgood gave us _ lb Candles.

Clear part of y e day, Some Showers. Luke Barton Conducted his mother to his uncles Flints. Sons Lambd & Ephm, their wives & Jonas wife to Son Pollards. mr Ballard & Cyrus to meeting. Revd mr Stone Discoarst foren fm Psalm 37 th 5 th vers, after n fm Prov 19C 27 th vers. at home. Sister Barton left here. Dolly Lambd at Son Pollard.

Clear. mr Ballard & Barny to meeting. Revd mr Parkers Text for n 4 C & 5 th V, aftn hebrews 6th C 25 vers. we had our Corn gatherd. the Cattle broke in to it last night and distroyed par t of it. at [home].

Clear. mr Ballard and Cyrus to meeting. Son Lambard here, he has been unwel. I went to my Sons at 2h pm. mr Dickman Expired about 6h Evng, his remains were Conducted in a Cart to his hous. Son Jona & mr Wiman went down with the bereived friends. I took Tea at my Sons and Came home at 10h Evn. at Son Jonas. mr Dickman Expired about 6h Evng.
Cloudy & raind aftern. mr Ballard & Cyrus to Meeting. I have been at home. Revd mr Stone Discoarst fm Luke 8 C 14 Vers. at home.

Clear and Cold. mr Ballard to meeting aftern. Revd mr Stone disc st foren fm 1 Sam l 3 C 18 vers, aftn fm Ma tt 8 th C 11-12 vers s . Old mrs Kenny here and Sally & Marta. Jona Jun r Sleeps here. at home. mr Bald to meeting. Luke Bart & D. Savage Calld here. mrs Kenny been here.
Clear and very windy, Snowd the last of last night and it blowd very much. Lefaett & Ephm Slept here. we did not go to meeting. at home.
Clear. I have Bakt Pies. Son Town Came here, his famely all wel. he informd us Col o Taylor was dead. at [home]. Son [Town] Sleeps [here].
Clear morn, Cloudy aftn & Evng. I have done hous wk & finisht the Leggin for mr Ballard. at home.
Snowd. I feel Some beller for which I wish to feel grateful.
Clear & very pleast. I have Bakt, knit & done other Matters. the little indien girl gave me a baskett. mr Tibbets & Le faett Sleept here. we have 1 Lamb Come. Dagt Ballard gave me _ Snuff. [at home.]
Snowd Some & raind very fast in the night. I have been fixing Apples for Sauce, Stewd Some. at home. Allin here to Shell [Corn] [1] Bus l _.
Clear & Cold. mr Ballard Came home at 12 O clock. I have washt & done my hous wk & knit Some. at home, washt.
Clear part of the day. Son Lambd Came and Butchered our pigg. it wd 83 lb. he informs me his wife is very unwel. I feel for her very much. at home. Son Lambd killd our pigg.
Snowd. I have done my hous work & ript [old] garments, Cut y e fragments for flocke & Coverlid filling. Jona Junr & young Littlefield Sleep here. at home.
Clear. I have been at home, done various Sorts work. mr Ballard to Settlemt. at home.
Clear and hott. I have houghd gardin & Sett Cabbage plants. mrs Smith here to warp a web. at home.

Clear. I have Brewd, gathered Mustard and done many kinds work. Jon a & Stephen Porter here, took Tea. mr Ballard been to mill for Son Jona and went to Cap t Youngs & had a hors Shod. at home. [am informd that mr Dellinghams youngest Child Expird] y s day.
Clear. I roasted a piece Mutt n . Old mrs Kenny here. I Cut Squash to drie. at home.

Clear & Cloudy by turns, Snowd a little. Hannah tarried till Sun Sett then went home. Ephm & W m Came and Sleep. I have been able to do a part of my hous wk & knit Some. at home. Hannah went home at Sun Sett.
Clear. I have been very Sick all day. Dagt Ballard here to do her washing. at home. very unwel.
Clear. very my Sist with me y s day. Dagts Ballard & Lambard & Allin went to wido Savages s on a visit. at home. Sis t [Barlon] here, mrs Andrus here.

Clear and Cold. I have made 11 Doz n Candles wd 10_ lb. this year is about Closeing, we Should do wel to Consider how we have Spent it and form resolutions to amend what has been amiss. let us look to the Author of all mercy for Strength to Conduct as becoms his dear Childn in future.

Clear the most of the day and very Cold. the wife of mr Georg Crosby Expired at 1h y s morn. Cyrus been to Son Lambd s , my Dagt was gone to Son Ephms. I have done hous work, Sorted what apples we have, pard & Cut those y t were Spect with rott. at home. Death of mrss Crosby.
Clear & very Cold. I have bakt Bn & white bd. Hannah B. Dind here, Polly went home with her. at home, heard fm Son Lambd.
Clear. mr Ballard & Cyrus to meeting. Sister Bart n here. I feel some feeble. Luke went to Hinkleys to meeting. at home. y s Text Acts 9 th C 6 th vers.
Clear. mr Ballard & Cyrus to meeting, it was Communion. my 2 Daugts here. Hannah went home, Son Lambd Came to accompany his wife. at home.

Clear the most of y e day and not so Cold. I have been at home. mr Ballard & Cyrus to meeting. Revd mr Stone Disc st fm Timo y 3 Ch 19 vers. at Evng R. & H. Pollard, H. & M. Ballard, Dol y Lambd, Betsy Smith and Jon a Porter Calld in to See us. at home. Grand Child n here at Evng.

Snowd fore n, Cloudy aftn. mr Ballard to meeting. mrs s Trask, Linda Getchel & Sally Ballard here. Revd mr Stone s text foren n C 1 PSalm 1 st vers. Revd mr Gillit performd aftern, tex t James IV C 14 th V. the interment of mrs s Kidder of Watervil from her Father Crosbys afler meeting. Son Jona Came home from ["Cro " - implied]. Son Jonas hors & Sleigh fell thro the ice at [Cro ].
Clear and not very warm. I have finisht galhering the Pees in my Gardin and done the hous work. Dagt Lambard washt & went to Son Jonas. at [home].
Cloudy & rain. mrs Kenny took Breakfast. I have done hous wk. at home.
Clear. I have been regulateing my hous &C. at home.
Cloudy day, Snowd at Evn. I have been at home, began a Leggin. Cyrus been to Son Ephms. Allin Lambard was there, is very much hurt. Snowd at Evng. at home. hear that Allin Lambard was hurt.

Snowd till 10h morn, Clear the res t of ye day. I have been mending Cloaths, doing hous wk & kniting. Le faett & William Sleep here. the School Master was Calld home to See A Sick Sister, the School dismist. at home. a young Squagh here. Funeral Saml Ward of Sidney.

Clear. Dagt s Pollard & Ballard & Polly Town Dind here. Son Pol d Came and Conducted his wife & Babe home. I have Seen 74 years this day, may y e remainder of my life be Spent as becometh a Christian and Close in [peice]. at home. Dagls Balld & Polld here. aniversary of my Birth, 74 th .
Clear and Colder. mr Ballard to Town meeting. I have done various Sorts wk. Dolly & Lucy Lambd came here aftern, Sleep here. at home. Dolly & Lucy Sleep here.
Clear and Cold, Cloudy at Evng. [ Hanah ] B. Trask & H. M. & Sally Ballard here, James allso. I have done hous wk and Some Mending. Le faett & W m Sleep here. at home.

X. Clear part of y e day. mr Ballard & I Dind at Son Jonas. his wife and I went to See mrs Wiman aftern, find her very Low, Confind to her Bed. I returnd home, find Bro r EbenZ Moore & wife here; they Sleep here. William Ballard Sleeps here. at Son Jonas & mr Wimans. Bro r Moore & wife here.
Clear the most of y e day. Son Town left here after Breakfast. Rhoda Pollard Came at noon to mend Cloaths. I have knit Some, done hous wk. at [home]. Son Town left here. Rhoda Pollard [Came] here.
Clear. Rhoda went to Son Lambd to make Cloaths for her Grand dad. I have washt and Cutt raggs for flocks. at home. Jonas wife here.
Clear. I Still remain Easier. mr Ballard & Cyrus got wood. Son & Daugt Lambard Calld in to See me at Evn g . my Dagt handed me a letter from Hannah waters of Oct 8th informing our friends are wel.
Clear part of ye day, Snowd Some. I have Brewd, knit & done other Matters. we have another Lamb. Luke & Jon a Junr brot wood here. at home. I Brwd.
Cloudy & Some rain. I have done a Larg washing, feel fatagued. have Stued apples, Cutt ap s in the Evng. at home, washt.

Snowd. mr Ballard went to mr Pepers to make a Settllement with James Bolton, the afair was left to a [rule], he owd mr Ballard 38 Dols and [ ] Cents for which he took a note for 3 months. mr Bal d Slays at Son Lambds. at home, knit on a Leg n & ironed.Funeral of Nath n [Haywoods] wife.
Clear day, Cloudy Evng. I have done hous work and knit Some. at home.
Clear part of ye day. Polly Town returnd from Son Jonas, has been Mending Shirts for mr Ballard. I have washt Some, ript garments, Bakt flower Bread &C. at home. Polly Came fm Son Jonas.
Clear. Old mr Lambard, Luke Shaw & his Sister Eunis were here y s day. the Old Gentleman Sleeps here. Dagt Lambd been to Hallowell. at home. Compy fm Bath here.
Cloudy, raind before night. I have Bakt, Cut 6 Squash to drie. Son Lambd killd his Sow, Carried it home to dres, Sen t harslet. at home.
Clear and Cold. I have done my hous work, Bakt and knit Some; feel falagued. Ep m Ballard Sleeps here. at home, Bakt &C.

[Birth Son Jonas 11th Child, th Daugt]. Clear and pleast. I have done hs wk and knit. Barny Lambd here, mr Ballard to y e Settlement. brot home 2 lb Sugar, _ do Tea, 1 qt Spirit. I was Calld at 6h pm to Son Jonas, his wife being in Labour. we Calld mrs Bennet & Smith and Shee was Deld at 10h 30m of a Daught that wd 9_ lb. I tarried all night. Son Jona has been in Jail, Came home about 9h Evng. at Sone Jonas. Birth 1st.
Cloudy. mr Ballard & Cyrus to meeting. lex t forn psal m 9 th 3 vers, aft PS m 119 th vers 165. Son Jona, his wife & part of Childn here. at home.

Cloudy the most of y e day. mr Ballard to meeting. Revd mr Stone Spake f m Luke 9 C 61 vers. Hannah Came in y s morn, did part of my wk, Shee went to meeting aftern. Jona & Wm spent y e day here. at home, feel feeble.
Snowd all day. we all tarried at home. Jona B. Jun r & Jona Porter here. it has been very Cold indead. at home, a Severe Storm of Snow.
Clear. I have been at home. mr Ballard to Town meeting. Old mrs Kenny here, Dind. at home, mrs Kenny here.
Cloudy forenn, began to Snow at 12 O Clock. I have done Some washing & mended Mitts & Stockins for mr Balld & Cyrus. at home.
Snowd foren, Sun Sett Clear; it is very Cold. I have done hous wk [&] knitt. Jona Sleeps here. Ephm & Wil m here last night. at home.

[Birth John Shaws 2nd Daught.] Clear. I was Calld about mid night to John Shaws wife who is in Labour. Shee was Safe Deld at 8h y s morn of her 2 nd Child and Daght. I returnd home about noone. mr Ballard went to Town meeting. Magr Sam l Howard was Chosen to represent y s Town in general Coart. at John Shaws. Birth 2 nd . June 16 th receivd 7 S and 6 d of mr Shaw. [2]
Clear. I have husk t Corn &C. at home.

Clear and pleasant. mr Ballard & Cyrus attend funeral of mr Dickman. mr Rogers made a prayer, deliverd a discoars. mr Slone made y e last prayer. Allin Carried 14 fowls home from here. at home. Funeral mr Dickman.

Cloudy all day, misty, raind hard at Evning. I have been over hauling my Lining raggs, made me a night Cap & mend one. knit in y e Evng, hear that Allin is better. at home. mr Ballard workt at Son Jonas.

Cloudy till 11h m, not So Cold. mrs s Emry Came to See me, bro t Some flower. mrs Wiman Sent me as a present [ ]. informs me mrs W is very feeble indeed, allso that Saml Ward of Sidney was Buried yesterday. I have done h s wk & knit. at home. mrs Emry to See me.
Clear part of y e day. I have done h s wk & knit, finisht Cyrus s hoes & began a Mittin for him and mended my gown. at home.

Clear & Cold. I have Bakt brown Bread, mins, Apple & Pumpkin pies. Dol y & Lucy went after Breakfas t to Son Jonas. Lucy relurnd, Sally and Martha with her; all Sleep here. Le faett brot us wood, took Tea. at home. 3 grand Dagts Sleep here.

Clear and Cold. I have done hous wk, mend a Shirt, Sewd raggs fr Coverled. mr Ballard went to mr Wimans, he is returnd f m Schooduck; Saw Son Lambard 6th inst, he was then well. mrs Wiman is very low. at home. Ep m Sleeps here. Warrin Slone had a Daugt Born.

Clear Part of y e day. Bro r & Sister left here homewd bound at 10 h 30 m Am. mr Ballard went to Amos Bonds, bt 1 Bs l Corn, 1 lb Butter, 2 do Lard. mr Brooks s famely removd fm the Old house near night. Death James Cowen at Sidney. Lefaett & Wm Sleep here. at home. Bror & Sister Moore left here. Brooks removd.

Clear and pleast. Pally Came here fm mr Wimans at 6h morn, left his wife very low indead. mr Ballard to Hallowell & to Son Jonas. Pally left here aftern for her aunt Lambards. Dolly to Son Jonas, returnd; Sleeps here, Sally & martha with her. I have removd part of the Chips before y e doore. at home, Bakt flour Bread. Patty to Dagt Lambds.
Clear. I have been doing work about my Soape, feel very feeble. mr husband been to Hallowell. Patty Town Came here at Evng. at home, feel unwel. Patty T. Came here. [3]
Cloudy, raind fast at Evng. Rhoda mended Shirts for mr Ballard & Cyrus. I have done hous wk & knit on a Leggin. at home. Rhoda [to] Son Jonas at Evng.
Clear. I have done my hous wk and knit on a leggin for mr Ballard. mrs Gaskill here to double yarn. at home. mrs Gaskil here.

Clear. mr Ballard went to the Settlement, brot home 1 gl n Molases, _ do N E rhum, _ d o Ginger, _ lb Allspice, a bottle of Slolens Elxr. Son Ephm took supper here. a mr Beene here after Cyrus to tend mill. a famely by y e name of Dow movd to y e old hous.

Clear, thaud till near Sun Sett. high wind at NW in the night. I have done hous wk, knit Some, mende d B. hoes &C. Luke & Jona Sleep here. inf m us that W m Hallowells Child that was Burnt is dead and that James Bonny had his hous Consumed by fire, and two Child n . at home, heard James Bonnys hous and 2 Child n Burnt last Monday.

raind. I Sett out to See mrs s Wiman at 1h pm, find her very low. I watcht with her. Shee got bu t little rest. mrs Emry rose before day & I went onto y e Bed and Slept Some. at mr Wimans, watcht with his wife.

Clear and Cool. I have been boiling Soap, finisht makeing Candles, have 14 lb. Cyrus sett out for Rhome again to tend Mill. Le faett & W m Sleep here. Son Ephm removd his Famely to the hous of mr Westons by y e Jail. at [home], made [Candles]. Lucy Smith Says mr Mosier [is] very [Sick].

Clear and warm. I have help t do my hous work. Patty washt and Cleand bed roome. we removd Cyrus s Bed and Chest up Chamber. mrs Smith [&] Brooks Calld here, inform me mrs Mosier is very Sick. at home. Dagt Ballard Sent us 4_ lb Chees. [4]

Snowd Some. mr Ballard Came home. I have knit Some and done other mallers. mr Bal d has bot a Chees w d 12 lb, 4_ lb pork, 2 Do Buller, 2 of Sugar, _ do Tea & 2 oZ Snuff y s weak, & 2 qts Spirit. at home.
Cloudy, Snowd Some. I have Bakt Squash pies & knit on a mittin. at home.
Clear part of the day & very Cold. Polly & I washt &C. at home.

Cloudy the most of y e day. mr Ballard been to Meeting, it is Fast day. Revd mr Stone Discoarst fm ps m 80, 9-10-11-12 th verses. I hear that mrs s Wiman is a little Easier. Lef t & Ep hm Sleep here. at [home]. Son Jonas here, James is better.
Cloudy and some rain. I went to Dagt Lambards. Calld to See mrs s Mosier, find her very Sick. at Dagt Lambds & mr Mosiers. [5]
raind part of the day. I went to Lecture fm dgt Lambards, from there to Son Ephms; Sleep there. at D t Lambds, to Lecture & Son Ephms. [6]
raind Part of the day. Mr Lambd here. Son Jonas wife & Martha Dind here. I have washt & ironed. at home. Son Jonas wife here.

Clear. I am at Son Ephms and mr Hamlins. mrs Farewel & Da t L., Theop s Hamlins wife, her Dag t Sally & mrs s Carter took Tea there. I Slept at Son Ephms. at Son Ephms & mr mr [sic] Hamlins. hear mrs Mosier is [wors].

Clear & warm. I have been at my Sons till 7h Evn. James is very unwel. my Dagt Comfortable. Son Ephm, his wife & Sophia, Patty Town, H. & S. Pollard Came there. Patty tarries and there y s night, the others went home. mr Ballard to meeting. at ditoes. hear mrs s Wiman is very Sick.

X. Birth mr Pipers Son & 5th Child. XX. Clear part of the day. I was Calld from Son Ephms to mr Pipers Early y s morn, his wife in Labour. She was Deld of a Son, her 5th Child at 12 O Clock. we took dinner & I left them, went to Daugt Lambds; tarri all night. Henry had a very Sick night. I did not undres but Slept Some. Sophia Gill Slept there. my dagt been to See mrs s Mosier, finds her very Sick. at Son Ephms. mr Pipers & dag t Lambards. Birth 3 d . receivd 9 s at Babcock24 inst.

Clear & warm. mr Ballard went to meeting, walkt. Son Ephms wife Came here before noone. Shee & Pally Town took Supper with us. we are informd that mrs s Mosier is more Comfortable. Pally s hand is better. the text f n Hebr s 12 3 vers, aft n psalm 62 nt 8 vs. at home. Son Ephms wife and Pally T n here.
Cloudy part of y e day, Clear Evng. I have done hous work. dagt Lambd Calld here. Jona Ballard Junr has Seen 17 years y s day. at home. Dagt Lambd Calld here.
Clear. I have been at home. Son Jona, Gidion Barton & their wives Supt here. at home.
Clear & Cold. I have done hous work & knit. Cyrus went and helpt git wood home. mr Ballard wrode y e Nud Colt to Son Jonas & home again. at home.
Clear part of the day. I have been at home, Cut apples to Stew. at home.

Clear Part of y e day & not so Cold. mr Ballard and Cyrus attended at Funeral of Georg Crosby s wife. Revd mr Harskal Deliver d A Discoars from Ecleasts 8 C 8 Vers. I have Bakt brown bread & apple pies and knit at Evng. Lefaett Sup t here. at home. Funeral of mrs s Crosby. Revd mr Harskal Performd.
Clear & Cold. I have finisht kniting Jona B. Junr s hoes & done hous wk. Son Jona took Dinner with us. mr Ballard went to See mrs s Wiman, finds her very Sick. at home.

Clear part of y e day. I have washt Some and wkt in gardin. planted watermellons & Cucumbers greene kind. mr Ballard mod Bushes. mrs Bennet here for Seeds. Son Town Sleeps here, his famely wel as usual. at home. Son Town Sleeps here.
Clear morn, raind before night. at [home].
Clear. I have done hous wk, washt & knit Some. mr Ballard wkt for Son Jona. at home. mrs Kenny here.

Clear & more pleast day, Cold night. I have Bakt white & B n Bread, finisht one of Cyrus s Stockins & knit on ye other. Ephm 3 d is 12 years old y day. at home. Le faett & W m Sleep here.Death mr [Norris].
Snowd foren n , Clear aftern. I have mended mr Battard a pair Breeches & knit on a mitt. Polly helpt do the hous work &C. at home. Funeral mr Churchel.

Snowd Some & raind Some. mr Bullin & wife Dind here. Son Town, Polly, Patty & Ephm Supt & Sleep here. Jona Balld Junr brot wood. I have done hous wk & knitt Some. at home. Sally, [Mt a ], & Lucy lefthere after Breakfast, other friends Came here.

Snowd. I have done some mending. Son Jon a and wife here at Evng, inf m me y t [m] James Cowen of Sydna has had a fitt, fell into the fire and Burnt him very badly. Jona B. Junr Sleeps here. at home. Son Jona & wife Spent Evng [here].

Snowd y s morn, Clear part of y e day. Dagt Lambard, Son Ephms wife and Allin & Sopha here. La faett & W m Sleep here. mrs Smith Calld in here. Son Ep ms wife brot us 5 lb Cod fish, 1 do Butter & 5 do flower. at home. Dagts Lambd & Ballard here.

Clear. I was Calld to mr Wimans at 8h am, his wife is near y e Close of Life. I returnd home at 11, have removd y e Banking f m S end & west Side of our house. went back and watcht with mrs s Wiman, mrs s Smith with me. at mr Wimans, watcht. Dolly, Sally & Martha Slept here.

Clear. I have done hous wk & Sett out Squash Plants & Cucumbers. Capt Smith & Lefaett ploughing our field. Cyrus Shearing Sheep. Allin Lambard here for potatoes and Beens. Dagt Ballard Sent us 13 oz Butter. at home, workt in y e gardin. mrs Mosier is no better.

Cloudy, Snowd Some. mr Ballard and Cyrus went to meeting, it is Thanksgiving day. Revd mr Stone discoarst from Psal m C [ ] 7 th , 13-14-15 vers s . Son s Jona & Lambard to hear mr Roggers, his discoars 116 Ps m 12 th vers. Son Jona & Lambard to hear mr Roggers his discoars 116 Ps m 12 th vers. my husband, I & Cyrus, Son & Dagt Lambd, Rhoda and part of mr Lambds Childn Dind and took Tea at Son Jonas. Allin wrode there in A Sleigh. at Son Jonas to Dine.

Clear. I have been very Sick. Son Jonas wife Came and nurst [me] and I feel much Better for which favour I feel grateful to God and to her for her kindness. at home, very unwell. Dagt Ballard Came to [ ].

Cloudy part of y e day. I have done Some mending, knit and done my hous wk. Son Jona Calld in, Le faett brot my Tea kettle fm Brooks s . he & Wm Sleep here. Dagt Lambd Sent us piggs harslet. at home, Snowd this night.

raind all most all day & Evng. I returnd home about 9h Am after removing y e patient & Changing her Lining, left her Sleeping and a little Easier. I found Sally Farewel & Hannah Ballard here, they Slept with Pally Town here Las t night. Sally here y s night allso. at Ditoes, his wife is very Law. Sally Farewel here.
Clear and Cool. I have been to work on the Soap & Clearing Door yard of Chips. Barney & Ephm Sleep [here]. at [home].
Cloudy. I have done hous work, Brewd. mr Ballard workt at Son Jonas foren n , went to Sett hoops for Dagt Lambd aftern. informs me Patty is very Lambe in her hand. at home, I Brewd.
Clear the most of y e day. I have Bakt B n & flower bread and finisht mr Ballards Leggins. am informd that Nathan Haywoods wife was dead, her remains were interd on Wedensday las t .
Cloudy. I have Bak t apple & Squash Pies & brown bread. Sent mrs Kenny a pie. Dagt Lambd 2 and a Stake of fresh Pork. at home. mrs Brooks here, her Mother is very unwel.
Clear & Cold. I have been at home. at home.
Snowd foren, Clear aftn & Even. I have done hous wk. Ep m & W m Sleep here. at [home]. mrs Wim n no better.
Clear, Cool & windy. I have done hous wk and workt in my gardin. planted Crambury, Brown & hundred to one beens South of y e hous. Jon a Ballard Jun r Sleeps here. at home, Planted Beens.

Cloudy and Some rain. mr Ballard to meeting. mr Stones Text for n Prov 28 C vers 13th. Revd mr Moody perform aftern, Text 1 Timo 1 C 11 vers. Son Jona and wife to Sup with us. at home, very lame. Son Jona & wife here. receivd [9 s /] at mr [Nasons] [Auget 25 [h].

Clear & warm. I was Calld to Son Jonas between 3 & 4 morn to See James who was in a fitt. we administ d a Clister which gave Some relief. Doct Ellis was Calld, approvd of whad we had done. he left Senna & manna & drops. I left him at dusk much revived. mrs Baudin there. at Ditoes. James has had a fitt. mrss Wiman is very low. Jona Junr Sleeps here.

rainy. I was at dagt Lambds forin, had a hors brot and went home. Calld d [at] Son Jonas, took Tea, mr Ballard allso. Ep m & W m Slept here. Jack Came after we were in bed, Slept here. at Dagt Lambds, Son Jonas & mr Pipers.

Cloudy & Some rain. I have washt & wkt in gardin, Sett 2 quins trees and 1 apple tre. planted Some of Lukes potatoes, Set Leutis plants & Strauberies. I have Squash & Cucumbers Come up in the bed East Side y e hous. at home, washt & workt in gardin. Showers at night.

Clear part of y e day. mr Ballard planting Corn all day. I have dugg the ground west Side y e hous & transptanted Squash &C. mrs s Mosier Expired at 1 h pm. at home, workt in my Gardin. Death mrs s Mosier.

Clear part of y e day. I have done hous wk, houghd Beens & potatoes. Sett F. Turnips & Squash plants. mr Ballard had a Swine of Son Jona which w d 135 lb. he houghd Corn foren n , went to parrish meeting aftern. Calld to see Dagt Lambd, finds her Comfortable. at home. mr Ballard to Parish Meeting.
Clear. I have Bakt pies. Warn Stones wife here. at home.

Clear. I have washt. was Sent for to go to Son Jonas where I met my two dagts, Son Pollard, Jason Pierces wife and 4 Childn. Jona Junr Conducted his Grand father & I home at 8h Evng. we had a very good Supper there, Son Cyrus Came from Rhedfield and Supt there allso. at Son Jonas, my Daugts were there.

Cloudy part of y e day. I have done hous wk, roasted a piece Beef which Son Ephm Sent us, & finisht futing Cyrus s hoes &C. the Select men Caused wood to be brot to Brooks s . Polly Came home yesterday. at home.
Clear part of y e day. I have Sorted Corn, Cleand Chambr, mended 2 pair Drawers f r Cyrus. Thunder at night. at home. hear that mr Isaac Savage & wife areSick.

Clear part of y e day, snowd a lillle. I am inf md that Old mr Isaac Savage Expired last night. Hannah & M. Ballard & Sally Pollard Sleep here y s night. I have done hous work & knitt some. at home. Hannah Ballard 14 [yr s ] this day. Death mr Isaac Savage.
Clear foren, Snowd at 2 pm, Clear at night but Cold. I went to See mrs Wiman, find Shee is wasting. Jona Junr Sleeps. I have washt Some wheat & My kitchen floore &C. at mr Wimans.

Clear, warm and Spring like. I have workt in my gardin, planted long Squash by y e hogg pen, Sowd pepper grass, Sett Sage and other roots. mr Ballard mode Bush & dugg gardin. I washt his & Cyrus s old over Coats, my gound & other things. Son Jon a had 6 OXen taken by Execution and drove a way. I do feel for but am not able to help hin. Ephm & W m Sleep here. at home. Son Town left here y s morn. mr Ballard is 84 years y s day. death mr Hains.

Clear the most of y e day & warm. mr Ballard to y e Settlement, was informd that the Counsil Sett yesterday and Dismist mr Stone from his Pastorial Charg in y s Place. may God be with him and his Famely. I have been fiting potatoes to plant & killing Bugs on my Vines. Allin & Wil m helpt plant. at [home]. Revd mr Stone was Dismist from y s Parrish yesterday.
Cloudy and rain. I have been husking. at home.
Clear the most of y e day. I have washt thee Bed room & kitchen and knit Some. Barny Lambard here. at home. Aliin is Some better.
Clear. I have done hous wk & knit. Son Jona s wife here. Luke & Jon a Junr Sleep here. at home, Dagt Ballard here.

Clear part of y e day, Snowd a little aftern. I have been to See mrs s Wiman, find her very low. James Purington took Tea there with us. Polly has done my washing & washt my North room. at mr Wimans. Polly washt.

Clear & windy. Son Town & his Childn left here after Breakfast to go to Son Ephms. Jud g Cony and Capt Seth Williams Calld in to See us. Sally, M and Lucy L here, brot me 3 lb _ of drie fish. I have Bakt Some Pumpkin Pies and knit, Finisht footing mr Ballards Stockins. at home. Jud g Cony & Capt Williams here. Le faett & Saml Getchel Sleep here.
Clear and not So Cold. I have mended Drawers for Cyrus & done other wk. mr Bald Sent W m to Jos h Voces for 2 lb Sugar. at home.
Clear part of y e day. I have washt, Scolt my Pickles, knit &C. Le faett & W m Sleep here. at home. a Funeral.

Clear and very Pleast. mrs s Wiman Expired at 3h y s morn, aged 51. mrs s Smith & I put her grave Cloaths on. Son Jona was Calld in to assist us in removeing the Corps into the west room. the Famely filld with Sorrow on the berievment. we Shall all feel the loss. may it be Sanctifyed to us all. I left them, returnd home by Son Jonas. they are as wel as Could be Expected. I Slept 2 hours, rose and performd my wk. mr Ballard to Son Pollards. they Sent me 3 lb fine pork. Dolly Lambd went home, Cyrus to mr Coneys. at home. at mr Wimans, his wife Expired at 3h y s morn. Shee [told] us Shee felt resigned to leav the [world]. Death.

Clear and Some warmer. Cyrus Sett out for Rome y s morn. mr Ballard to Hallowell, receivd on mr Lads acount Tea 1 lb, Coffee _ do. I have dug gardin, Sett Mellons &C. Daugt Ballard to See us aftern, Sally, James & Elisabeth with her. at home. Son Jonas wife here and part of her Child n , inform me mrs Mosier is very Sick.
Cloudy. Rhoda workt for me. Hannah, Martha & Dolly Lambd here aftern. Han h Sleeps here. I have done hous work [&] knit. the men got Some wood. at home.
Clear part of y e day. Old mrs Kenny here, brot me y e nape of a hallibot. I gave her Potatoes and cyder. at home. mrs Kenny here.
Clear and windy. I have done some washing, mending, kniting & hous wk. Le faett & W m Sleep here. at home.

Cloudy & Some rain. I have made Candles, 13_ dZ n . Sally Farewel left here after Breakfas t . Patty went to Son Jonas, their infant is unwell. Shee was informd that mrs Wiman was a little delarious. at home, made Candles. W m & Sally Sleep here.

Clear. the ground frose hard y s morn. I have finisht Dagt Lambds Soap, there is a Larg Barril full & 2 Pails full. Set up a new Leach and put my own Soape to boiling. mrs Farewel Calld here. Dagt Ballard Sent me 9 oz Buller, 1 lb 2 oz pork and Some milk. at [home]. mrs [Farewel] here.
Cloudy the most of y e day. I have done hous wk, Bakt brown Bread; have not felt well. mr Ballard mending fence round y e Gardin. Eph m & W m Sleep here. at home, Bakt & Planted Squash & Cucumbers.

Clear amd warm. I have been very unwel. Hannah Ballard and helpt me, her Dad y & Marm Came aftern, made Tea and partook with us. I feel Some Easier at Evng for which I wish to Bless y e author of all mercies. at [home], very unwel. Hannah [Came] to [wait ] of me.

Clear & very Cold. Polly left here after dinner to go to Gardiner. I have Doubled hoes yarn & done other things. mr Ballard brot _ lb Tea, 2 d o Sugar, pint Brandy, 2 qts W E Rhum yesterday. at home. mrs Kenny here.

Clear foren, Cloudy aft n . Pally Town Came and did Some washing and mending for me. mr Ballard to y e Settllement, bot 10 lb Tallow, 2_ do Pork. I have done hous wk & knit. Le fa t & Ephm Sleep here. at [home]. hear y t mrs Wiman no better.

Clear and windy. I have transplanted Cucumbers and done other work in my gardin. mr Ballard to Hallowell. Calld at Dagt Lambards, brot 6 lb _ veal fm her. Le faett ploughd y e S end of our field. at home, Brewd & workt in gard n .

Cloudy. I have done my hous wk but feel feeble. mr Katons Oldest Daugt dind here, her Mother is Cleverly. mr Ballard to Son Ephm s , Carried Some greens. he gave us 12_ lb pork; it is a Leg, & 5 lb Beef; a great favour. Dagt Lambd Lent us 4_ lb rie & 5 lb indien meal. 19th ins t I Sent the meal home. at home. mr Balld bot me 1 oz Snuff. they had a great day down at y e Settlement on y e removal of the imbargo.

Clear. I have Bakt, wk t some in the gardin. Sett Mellon plants South of y e hous &C. Dolly & Barny Lambard Dind here then Sett out for home. Lucy and W m at Son Jonas. mr Ballard been houghing Corn. at [home]. Dagt Lambds Child n went home.
Clear part of y e day and very Cold. my husband and my Self at home. Lilllefield & Ephm Sleep here. at [home].

Clear & Cold. mr Ballard to meeting. Patty Town to Son Jonas. Hannah here with James, Says mrs s Wiman is Some Easier. Revd mr Stones Text foren psalms 58 vers 11, aftern 1 st Corenth 10 C 31 st vers. Lef t & W m Sleep here. at home. [Hannah] & James & Mart a here.

Birth Son Pollards 9 Child, Daugt y e 6th. Clear part of the day. I was Calld by Son Pollard at 2h 30m y s morn to go and See his wife. we reach t there before 5 and my Dagt was Deld at 6 of a fine Daugh t , her ninth Child, and is Comfortable. the Babe wd 11 pounds. Sally Cleark & Preuda Snow Came at Evng, there all night. at Son Pollards. Birth 5th.

Cloudy & misty. mr Ballard to meeting. Revd mr Stone discoarst fm Luke X C 41 & 42 nt verses. Son Jona and wife Calld in to See me. Barny Lambd, W m , Martha & James here after Meeting. Son Eph, his wife & Dagt & Dagt Lambd went to Son Pollards. at home. Son Jona & wife Calld in, they Sent me 10 oz Butter y s morn.

Clear & warm. mr Ballard to Meeting. Revd mr Stones text 2 nd Peter 3 C 14 th vers. Son s Town, Jona and their wives Calld foren to See me. Hannah helpt me part of y e day. Son Town & wife went to Son Pollards aftern, go home tomorrow if providence permit. at home. Son Town & his wife here [foren].

Clear part of the day. mr Ballard went to James Boltons, brot A Cow & Calf home. W m Ballard helpt him. we had a fine Shower [afterorn]. I dug ground South of the hous to Sett Turnip plants. mr Ballard went to Doct Conys, Setled with him. Ballance in our favour 20 Cents for which he had 1 oz Bitters. y e Doct made a present of 1 oz Camphir. at home, workt Some in my gardin. Doct Cony gave me 1 oz Camphir.
Clear & warm. I went y s aftern to See James, he is very unwel yet. Calld to See mrs s Wiman, find her very low. at Diloes & at mr Wimans. S. & W. Sleep here.

Clear part of y e day. I have Sett Turnips & Cabbage Stumps. Dagt Ballard here. her Son Jona Came & informd he had Shipt for Liverpoole, Setts out to morrow. Sophia Gill & Dolly Lambard Sleep here. at home, workt in Gardin. Sophia & Dolly Sleep here.

Cloudy morn, Sun Shine y e most of the day. I have done hous wk and Some in my Gardin. mrs s Jones here fore n . I Sowd String Peas N end of my Gardin. mr Ballard had _ lb But r at Son Jonas. Jona Junr Sleeps here. at home, Sowd String Peas.

Clear part of y e day. I have workt in my gardin, Sett Squash, Millon & Cucumbers Plants, done Some washing. the remains of Mrs s Mosier were Carried to Sidney and there interd this afternoon. at home. Funeral of Mrs s Mosier, wife of Elisha.

Cloudy till 11 am, Clear aftern. I have washt Some, workt Some in my gardin &C. John Walls wife & his Sist Lason here for Currents, took Tea here. James Wall Expired las t Thursday, left a wife & 2 Child n to moarn. at home. Thunder and rain at night.

Clear foren and warm, Showers after 5h pm. I have workt in gardin, mended a Shirt, done hous wk &C. have not felt very wl. Cut Sage & Fevirfue. W m B. Sleeps here. at [home], feel unwel. Ezra Toun Sleeps here.
