Clear. I have done a larg wash and other matters. mrs Emry Came here, took Tea, Dolly & Lucy Lambard, Sally & Martha Bald also. Jon a Junr wrode hors for his g n Daddy to plough our Corn. at home. mrs Emry here and 6 of my Grand Childn.
Clear and Cold. I have done hous wk and knit Some. mrs Kenny here. Ephm Brot us a Load wood, Cyrus went to help [load]. at home. mrs kenny here.
Clear and Cold. Cyrus Set out to tend mill for Esq Lock at Rome. I did Some washing, knit at Evng. at home. Cyrus to Esq r Locks.

Clear part of y e day, raind a t night. the wife of Old mr Isaac Savage Expired a t 9h y s morn, his Life is not Expected. Cyrus brot 1 Bush l rie meal home which I had of Isaac Savage 3 d . I Bakt b n bread. at home. Mrs s Savage Expired at 9 h morn.

Clear. Son Jona brot his wife & James here at 2h pm. Lefaett and Wil m Came to Sleep here. Jona & wife went home after 10. I have done hous wk & knit Some. at home. Son Jonas wife here. Son Ephm has Seene 30 years y s day.
Clear. I workt in my gardin, Sett Parsley & 3 quins trees by the pigg pen, knit Some &C. mr Ballard diging gardin & Setting hop poles. Ephm Sleeps here. at home, hear y r mrs Mosier is no Better.

Cloudy, raind Some. I have dug gardin, done hous wk and Emtied my Catch tub &C. Georg Batton iun r here on business for his uncle James. at home. W m went to mr Nasons with 2 dz n Eggs, got a [pint Spir t ].

Clear y e most of y e day. I have wkt about hous, houghd Pees & Cucum s . Allin helpt his G n sir put Plaster to y e Corn. Jonas Boys houghd potatoes a little while. at home. Saml Pollard Came f r Sally, Shee went home.
Clear. Old mrs Kenny here. I have felt unwel. at home.
Cloudy, Snowd a little. Son Pollard brot his wife, Babe & Polly Town here. Dagt Lambd, Barny, Wil m & Henry Came, they Sleep here. I have knit & d n h s wk. at home, Child n here.
Clear. Polly did Some ironing. Allin Lambd Came and Conducted Polly Town to their house. mrs Farewel Came here. I have finisht Cyrus s mitts. at home. Polly left here. mrs [Farewel] Came.
Clear, Cold & windy. I have done my washing, hous work &C, feel falagued. Esqr Tods hous & Barn Burn t at 1 O Clock. at home, washt. Tibbits Sleeps here.]

Clear day, Cloudy at Evng. mr Benjamin Porter & wife & Babe here, Dind and took Tea. Dagts Ballard & Lambard to Tea. mr Porter Conducted Dagts home, Expect to tarrie at Dt Lambds. Eph m & William Sleep here. Elisabth y e ind n here, I let her have potatoes. A Son of John Babcocks here for a record of his Birth which was Sept 11, 1791. at home. Ben n Porter, Son [Jona], their[wives] & Dagt Lambd here.

Snowd till near night then raind at Evng. I have Bakt, knit & done other matters. am informd that a mr Chace Expired last night or y s morn and that mrs Kidder of watervill Came to her Fathers yesterday 2 weaks Since and Expired before morning. a Child allso of mr [ ] at P. Hamlins. Le faett & Wm Sleep here. at home. Two Deaths in this Town.
Clear. I have done various kinds of wk, went to mr Wimans aftern. Cyrus went to mr Wimans to Set with them. at mr Wimans.

Clear part of y e day. I have done hous wk, washt wool, Sett plants N of y e great rock, planted Beens &C. mr Ballard planted hundred to one Beens in the the field. Le faett & Eph m furrowed for planting. we Sowd Beets, Carrots [&] Oinions. at home, workt in y e gardin.

Clear the most of y e day. mr mr [sic] Ballard to the Settlement to do business with James Bolton. Capt Osgood Calld here to See him. my husband brot a [new] Sute of Cloaths home which Daugt Lambd and Rhoda made. at home. I have done my ironing & other [things].

Cloudy y e most of y e day, Snowd at Evng. Le faett & Wm Sleep here. I have done hs wk & mended Cloaths. mr Ballard brot home _ lb Tea, 2 of Sugar, d o Butter; he had of Josiah Voce. at home. Son Jona has Seine 46 years ys Day.

Clear. I have felt unwel but have Bakt and done part of my hous wk. Pally did my washing. Shee was Calld to watch with mrs s Wiman, Shee is no better. Lef t & W m Sleep here. at home, Bakt. Pally washt & went to watch w h mrs s Wiman.
Clear & Cool. I have been makeing my Soape and Clearing Chips fm the doore yard. mr Ballard been to Sow Peas for Son Jona. I feel fatagued with my work. at home.

Cloudy y e Most of y s day. I have fixt a bed, planted Squash Seeds and removd part of the Banking from East Side y e hous. mr Bullin here, infmd y t his Son Jessy bured his youngest Child yesterday. Rhoda Pollard Sleeps here, infmd y t Old mr Bisbee is dead. Patty Town is very Lambe. Hannah Balld & W m Sleeps here. at home. mr [Balld] to Hallowell, had of mr Lad_ lb Tea, 2 lb Sugar & 6 [Elwives]. Deaths.

Clear. I have done my hous wk and Some in my gardin, was Calld to See Hannah Ballard, find her very unwel. mr Ballard been to Survey for Nath l Cumings and Salmon Rockwoods, brot home 6 lb Old Chees. mrs Smith brot my meal home. at Son Jonas to See Hannah. Shee is very unwel.
Clear. I was at mr M c farlings, my patient more Comfortable. at Ditoes.

Clear. mr Ballard to meeting. Revd mr Stone Spake f n fm 1 Corin h 15 C 34 V, aft n fm Mat u C 7 th 2 nt v. Patty Came here at Evn, Says mrs s Wiman is very weak. at home. Pally Sleeps here. mrs s Wiman very Low.
Clear & Cool wind. mr Ballard to meeting. Revd mr Stone Discoarsed from Luke XII C 47 & 48 th vers s . Melinda, Hannah, Martha & James here. I have not felt well this day. at home.

Cloudy part of y e day, raind Some. mr Ballard to meeting. Revd mr Stone discoarst fm Romans 1s t C 28 th vers. Hannahs Ballard & Getchel Calld here. Ep m & Wm Sleep here. at home. Rhoda left here afler dinner.

Birth Son Lambards 8th Child and 3 d Dagt. [Case] [performd] by Doct [Elliu]. Cloudy all day. I was Calld by Son Ephm at 3h 30m in y e morn to go and See my Dear Daugt Lambard who was Delivd of her 8th Child and 3 d Daught before he Came for me. no one Present at y e Birth of the Child but mrs Piper. Doct [Elliu] performd the remainder of her Labour and through the great Goodnes of God I found her as wel as Could be Expected. Son Ephm Shew a brotherly kindness, went and brot necessaries and then went to Son Pollards and brot Pally Town to Nurs her aunt. I returnd home before night and did my hous hold business. Martha [ ]. at Dagt Lambards. mr Ballard to meting. Text [ ] VI th 21. mr [ arker] Performd.
at Detoes. Amos Partridg buried his youngest child. at dos. Funeral.

Clear part of y e day, Showers aftern. mr Ballard to meeting. Revd mr Stone Desc st fm Geneses 42 nt C, al these things are against me. I Cookt String Pees & Beens & had Cucumbers. W m Sleeps here. at [home]. Dagt Pollard has Seen 40 years this day.
Clear. mr Ballard to meeting. Revd mr Packard Performd fm Jobe 13th C 1 & 2 nd vers s , aft n fm John 9 & 4. I have been at home, galherd Beens and peas for dinner. at [home].
[Clear], Snowd y s morn. I have been doing hous work & mended a Shirt. at home.
Clear and Cool. I have done hous wk. Pally Town Came here, mended Cloaths for my husband & Cyrus. Le faett & Ephm Sleep here. at home, Pally here.
raind. my Daugt & inft Comfortable. Pruda helpt wash, Sally assisted. Shee tarried all night, all Cleverly. Son Pollard went to Watervill. at [Ditoes].

Cloudy till the 11h am when the Sun Shone, Clear aftern. Allin Lambd Came to work at Eleven. Seemed very unwel, went to Bed and lay till 4 pm then look a dish of Tea. helpt his grand father y e rest of y e day. he & W m B. Sleep here. I have Cutt potatoes to plant. at home. Allin helpt us part of y s day.

the Sun rose Clear and it immediately became Cloudy and So remaind all day. I have done a little washing, Some Wk in my Gardin &C, but feel feeble. Son Jonas wife Came in to See me, took Tea; James with her. at home. Dagt Balld Calld here a little while. W m Sleeps here.

Clear. I have helpt do my hous wk. Sally Ballard with me y e most of y e day. Shee and W m Sleep here. mr Ballard went and brot my Cloath from mrs Waids, 16 yds which Shee has wove for me. at home, Bakt and piqut wool.

X. Birth Ant y Brackets 8th Child 6th Son. XXX. Clear foren n . I was Calld by mr Ant y Bracket his wife being in Labour at 0 h 30 m . Shee was Safe Deld at 7h 30 m Evng of her 6th Son & 8th Child. I Came home, arivd at 12 O Clock [&] 30 m . it raind aftern. at Ant y Brackets. Birth 6th. receivd 9 s by an order.

Cloudy. mr Woodward here, made us A present of a Chees, w d 9 [lb]. Patty Town brot James here, he is much better. I have Bakt wheat & b n bread. mr Ballard bo t 2 lb But r . L. & E. Ballard Sleep here. at home. mr Woodd here.

Cloudy the most of y e day. I have done hous wk, planted Cucumbers & three kinds Squash. removd Banking fm the hous &C, knit Some. mrs Emry to See me. the girls left here y s morn. mrs Emry, two of Wil m Stones dts, had gardin Seeds of me. mr Ballard workt at Son Jonas, Jack Sett out for Sea. at home. mrs Emry here. the girls went home after breakfast. Jona Ballard Sett out to go to Sea.

Clear. I have done my hous wk and dug gardin, Sowd pees &C. mr Ballard went to Son Ephms, he Sent me 7_ lb fresh pork. Son Jona Sent me a piece green Chees & Some rice. Ephm Sleeps here. at home, workt in my Gardin.

Clear y e most of y e day. I have dugg a place and planted Cucumbers in y e South End of y e gardin. have finisht my washing, put water to my plants &C. my left knee is Sweld & painfl. Hannah Ballard brot me Spirrit to Baith it with. I applied black wool allso. at home, done various kinds work. am Lambe in my left knee.

Birth mr Burdens 6th Son & 12th Child. Clear and warm. I was Calld by mr Burden at 7 h morn, his wife in Labour. Shee was [fe] Deld at 6h 30m pm of her 6th Son & 12th Child. I left her Comfortable and returnd home, did my work up which took me till Eleven O Clock Evng. i was quite falagued. at mr Burdens. Birth 7th. Wm Sleeps here.

X. Birth Sarah Waids Dag t . John Alby father. XX. a rainy Day. I was So unwel lhat I Sett up but little, but was Calld about 1h pm to go and See Sarah Waid who was in Labour. Shee was Deld about 4 of a Daug t which Shee Declarad John Alby to be the Father of. I was Conducted home Just at night, had my work to do. Ezra Town and Jona B. Junr Sleep here. at mrs Waids. Birth [8]th. receivd my fee & 3/ of what mrs Waid owd me.

Clear & warm. mrs Burbank and Sarah Farewel here for Currents. mrs B. gave me 1/6 d . Son Jona, his wife, Sally, Mart a & Lucy Lamb d took Tea. Sister Barlon Came, her hors Slipt his Bridle and went away. Shee & I went to Jonas. Lefaett, Linda & Hannah Came with us & found him. at home. Son Jona & wife here, Sis t Barton allso. informd of y e Death of a mrs Robbins.
Clear part of y e day & Cool. Dagt Pollard and Hannah went to Dagt Lambards. Son Ephms wife and mrss Burbanck here. Sist Barton Sleeps here. at home, part of my [Childn] here.

Clear & Cold. Warrin Stones wife here. mr Emry Came in about 2 pm, Revd mr Stone & Lady at 4; Spent Evng with us, Cyrus to Son Ephms. he made us a pres t of a pice Beef, 12 lb. at home. mr Stones & wife & others here.
Cloudy & very Cold. I have mended Cloaths, done hous wk & knit Some. at home.

rainy. Hannah Ballard was with me foren. I have piqut a little wool. my Side is very painful yet. I am informd that Old mr [Na t ] Tylor and Saml Bond Expired last night. may we all be prepared to take our departure fm Time to Eternity. I am informd that mr Heartwel of Hallowell Expired this [morn]. at home, feel but feeble. heard of y e Death of Old mr Tylor & Saml Bond.
Clear. I have got my Apples into the Seller, pared Some for Sauce. at home.
Clear part of y e day. I have done hous work & knitt Some. Dagt Ballard Sent me 6 oz Butter, Some Sugar & Buttermilk. Le faett & W m Sleep here.
Clear & warm. I have workt in y e gardin, knit Some, boiling Soap. Jona Junr Sleeps here. Mr [Wi ] made us a presen of 12 fish. at home. [Compy ] here. Jonas wife gave us Butter.

Clear. mr Ballard went to James Boltons, receivd a Cow & Calf in part for what he owd us. I have brewd, Cleand my Sellar, gug gardin Some &C. mrs Dickman and Wil m Babcocks wife here, took Tea. at home. mrs Dickman & Babco k here.

Clear, Cool morn, warm aft n . I have washt Some and houghd Cucumbers & Beens N of ye hous. Dolly went fm here to Son Jonas. Hannah & Shee to Son Pollards. Martha & Sohpa here aftern. Capt Jason Cony infms Son Lambd is wel. at home. mr Ballard houghd Beens, put poles to those in the gardin.

Clear and warm. Lucy Lambd & Mata Ballard been here this day. mr Ballard returnd from Esq r Locks, brot a Bushl of rie meal. he went to the Settlement, brot me 2 qts Spirit & 1 qt Vinigar, _ lb Snuff. Ezra Town Came her tarries. at home. Ezra Town Sleeps here. this is Son Lambards Birth day, 37 years.

Clear. Son Lambd removd his Famely fm here to Rheuel Williams s hous below mill, [bror] Rhoda went with them. I had a very Sick night. the Prisners were Conducted f m this Goal to Slates prison. at [home]. Son Lambd [removd]. Prisners Sett out for State Prison.

Snowd y s morn, raind aftern. Son Jona Conducted his Sisters & Childn & Polly to his hous. Tibbits & Le faett brot a little wood & Cut Some. they Sup t & Sleep here. raind fas t at Evng. I have Bakt wheat bread & knit. at home. mr Dagts to Son Jonas. mr Tibbts & Lefaett Sleep here.
Snowd. mrs Farew l here. I began a [net] and Did hous wk. at home.

Clear and Cold. I have done hous wk & Some Mending. Pally Town & Rhoda Pollard Calld here. John Arnold after ashes for Son Ephm. Lefaett & ranus Pierce Sleep here. at home, heard that Esqr Tods Buildings were Burnt.
Cloudy, raind Some. I have done Some washing & other matters. Jon a Junr Sleeps here. at home.
Clear & Cold. I have mended hoes, knit & done other wk, hear y t mr James Cowen Expired last Tuesday, was interd on Thursday last. at [home].

Clear foren, Cloudy aft n , raind at night. I did Some washing for n , attended at mr Wimans hous, his wives Remains were interd. A Discr s Deliverd by mr Low, last prayer by mr Smith. words ot y e Text were, I must work while y e day lasts &C. Saml Wiman has Seen 14 years this day. Dagt Lambd, Lucy, W m & Patty Town took Tea. my dt and Childn Sleep here. at mr Wimans, the remains of his wife were intered. Funeral. Saml Wi ma is 14 years y s day.

raind. I workt out doors Some. mr Ballard began to plant his Corn, Ephm Ballard & Allin Lambard helpt him. Dagt Bald Sent me flower. I hear that 6 men were Sentanced to go to State prison this Coart. at home.

Clear. I have done my ironing & other hous wk. mrs Farewel Dind here. I went with her to Son Jonas and Shee went to mr Bennits. mr Ballard Came to Jonas, we all took Tea there. at Son Jonas with mrs Farewel.

Cloudy. mr Ballard to meeting, Cyrus Staid with me. Han h Ballard Came and did my wk. Jona & wife here. I was Calld at 9h 30m to go and See mrs Nason. Text y s day Jere m 13 C 23 vers. at [home] till 9h 30m Evng, then [to] Nasons.

Clear and very Pleast. mr Balld to meeting. Son Ephm brot him home. Revd mr Stone Disc st fm Acts 26 th 18 th vers, aftn Romans 14 th C 18 vers. Elisabeth here. at home. mrs [Farewel] went to Son Jonas.

Clear and very pleast. mr Ballard to meeting after n , Tex t John 16 C 33 vrs. Son Jona, his wife, Mart a , James, Polly Town, Sally Farewel and Sopha Ballard took Tea here. Elisabeth Sleeps here. at home. Some of our Friends here at Evng.
Clear and not so Cold. mr Balld to [mt], Text f m Deut 32,[48]; aft ps m 84, 12. Son Ep m , his wife & Dagt here at Evng. Elisabeth here. at home. Son Ep m & wife & Sopha here after meeting.

raind. Son Jona Sent for his Father & I to Dine with him, we had moos meet Stakes. it raind So hard they wisht me to tarrie all night. Jona Junr Came and Slept here. at Son Jonas, Tarried all [night].

Cloudy and Some rain. mr Ballard to meeting. Tex t Timo 6 C 6 vers. Dagt Lambd & Child n went to Son Jonas. I went with her and Came home to prepare Supper. at Son Jonas, his wife gave me a Sauser of Butter.
Clear. mr Ballard to meeting. Text for n Mat 6 C 20 vs, aft n Jobe 22 C 21 vers. Son Jona, his wife, Hannah and James took Tea with us after meeting. at home. Child n & gn Child n here.

Cloudy part of y e day. Pally washt and went to mr Wimans, tarries. mr Ballard to Parrish Meeting. Son Cyrus Came home. [Dolly] Lambd Sleeps here. I have done hous wk & knit. at home. Cyrus Came home. Dolly Lambard here.

Clear part of y e day, Showers aftern. I have dug ground west of y e hous planted Squash, Cucumbers, musk and water mellons Eas t Side house. began and finisht a Large wash after 3 O clock, feel falagued. Son Jona ploughing our field, my husband workt with him. at home. Jona Junr returnd, Could not get a Chance to go to Sea.
Some part rainy and Some Clear. mrs M c farling detaind

Birth mr Butlers 2nd dagt. Clear Part of y e day. I was Calld to See mrs Butler who livs in the hous which mr Livermore formally did. Shee was in Labour and was Safe Deld of her 2 nd Dagt & 3 d Child, about mid night. I tarried till morn. at mr Butlers. Birth 8 th . recd 6/ [ ].

Clear. I have done my hous work and attended Funeral (or at y e meeting hous to hear a Discoars on the Death of Solomon Voce Esqr and Capt of an independant Company. Revd mr Stone Deld y e Discoars from Leviticus X C 3 d vers, and Aaron held his peace. there were a great Concoarse of people attended. I did not go to y e grave. at y e meeting hous. Funeral of Solo Voce Esqr.
Clear. I have Brewd & knit a garter. Son Jona Sent us a Load wood. at home, Brewd.

Cloudy the most of y e day. Patty went to Son Jonas after Breakfast. I have brot Potatoes fron y e Cellar & washt them. Le faett, Ephm & W m Sleep here. inf m me Mrs s Wiman is thought to be near the Close of life. Patty gone to watch with her. may the great Supporter of Soul & Boddy Support her and may her Famely & friends be resigned to his will. at home.

Clear part of y e day. I got my Dagt up, Chand her Lining &C and left her at 8. reacht home at 11 am, find my hous any person in it. dag t Pollard gave me Cake & 2_ lb pork. I went to Son Jonas, Carried herbs & other matters for Pally Town to Carrie to Daugt Pollard. Sett Squash plants East Side y e Gardin. at Ditoes and Son Jonas.
Clear. Allin Lambd workt foren. I have Cut potatoes, done hous wk, killd Bugs on my vines &C. mr Ballard fiXing ground for potatoes. at home.
raind all night and y e most of y e day. I have felt very unwel all day. mr Ballard houghd Corn when it held up. at home, very feeble.
Clear and warm. I have done hous work and knit Piqut Some wool. mrs Emry here to Clean her yarn. Betsy Wiman Came aftern, they took Tea with us. at home. mrs Emry & Betsy Wiman here.

Clear. I returnd to my Sons, was at mr Childs, Westons & mr Hamlins. hear that Elijah Barton has gone away being acused of Shooting mr Chadock which hapned 9th ins t when he was asisting a Surveyer in runing out land in [no entry]. there were three guns fired. the men who Cummitted the Crime were in disguise, a woful afair. I went with others to See the Jail. at Livermors and other Places. Saw Joseph Bowman & Lady.

Clear. I have transplanted Squash & Mellons South of y e hous, done hous wk and Some washing. Allin Lambd workt here puting Plaster to y e Corn. he & W m B Sleep, he & Lefaett last night. at home, Sett mellons South hous.

Cloudy part of the day. I was Calld to See James Ballard who is unwel. we administred a Clister which Seemd to relieve him. I returnd at 11h am. mrs Farewel Came in, Shee and Jon a Junr & Allin Lambard Dind. Allin left Son Towns yesterday, all well there. at Son Jonas to See James.
Clear and very warm. mr Balld went to the Dedication of the New Meeting hous. mr Nichols of Portland performd, his Text 1 kings [no entry]. at [home]. done various kinds of work.

Clear till Evng, began to rain at [3]. mrs Emry Took Tea with us. we pickt hops of the vines of 5 Poles y s Evng. Son Jonas wife Calld in at dusk, Says mrs s Cleark is better. at home. mrs Emry here. [28]

X. Birth W m Saunders 1st Son, & 3 d Child. XX. Clear and warm. I was Calld at 1h y s morn to See the wife of Wil m Saunders who was in Labour. her illness Came on at 3h pm and I took her into my Care. Shee was Safe Delivd about 5 of her first Son & 3 d Child. I left her & inft Comfortable and reacht home at dusk in y e Evng. W m Ballard & Wil m Barny Lambd Sleep here this night. the Town was in an up roar by those who are Calld indiens makeing their apearence. at W m Saunders. Birth 14th. receivd 9 s at mg r Howards Store.

X. At James Catons. Birth his 11 Child & 5 Son. XXX. Clear. I was Calld by mr Caton at 2h 30m y s morn to go and See his wife. I arivd there at Sun rise, found her delivard of a Son. her 11th Child, but not Safe. I performd what was necessary and left her as Comfortable as Could be Expected. arivd home before ten and Sent herbs and other matters. at James Calons. Birth 4th. fell fm the hors on my way home. receivd 9 s of Wilm Babcock.

Clear part of the day. I am very Lambe bu t wrode to Isaac Savages hopeing to receiv my Due of him, but did not receiv a Cent. I Calld at Jack Shaws, receivd nothing there. I bathed my Lame knee with Vinagar, went to bed but could not rest. got up and lay before fire all night. Jon a Junr Sleeps [here]. at Isaac Savages & Jack Shaws.
Cloudy foren, thunder & rain aftern. I wed and bed of Beets and Sett Cabage & Turnip [plants]. at home. W m Sleeps here.
rainy the most of y e day. I Sett Some Turnip Plants but have felt very feeble. Ep m hauld us wood. Jon a & W m Sleep here. at home, very un unwel.
Clear. Sister Barton & I went to Son Jonas. mr Ballard Came there & took Tea. Nathaniel Tytars wife fell from a hors and broke her thigh. at Son Jonas. mrs Tylar broke her thigh.

Clear and Cool. Sis t Barton and I went to Son Jonas and mr Wimans. Son Jonas wife took Tea there, James Purington allso. I was Calld at 11 h Evng to Phineas Pains wife in Labour. at Son Jonas & Wiman & Phineas Pains.

Clear. Patty Town Came here this morn to work for me. the wido Savage Sleeps here. I have been harvesting gardin matters &C. at home. Pally Came here, mrs Savage allso. [29] [6] [Clear]. I have gatherd pees in my [Gardin], pulld up the vines &C. mrs Savage left here after breakfast. Patty went aftern to quilt for Betsy Smith. Sybble Springer & her Sister here. at home. Pally to quilting. [30]

Clear and warm. I have been at home. mrs Farewel & Dagt Ballard here. I have not felt So wel as I Could wish. mr Ballard to y e Settlement. Dagt Lambd, Lucy, W m & Henry & Sarah Sleep here. may that Great being who rules over y e univers Subdue our [Enimies] in bringing [th ] to a right Sence of y r Duty. at [home]. [ ].
Clear Part of y e day, Cloudy Evng. I have done my Common h s wk, washt y e bedroom & kitchen, knit on Cyrus s Stockin. Jona B. Jun r Sleeps here. at home. J. Balld Sleeps here.
rainy Part of y e day. Hannah Came and tarried with me y s day, mrs Emry Came allso, Spent aftern. mr Ballard to mr Nasons, had mr Bracketts order answered. at home, mrs Emry [here].
Clear. I [was] Calld by Sam l Livermore at 1h 20 m this morn to go and See his wife who was in Labour. mrs s Bradbury, [ ], Marshal & Shaw there. at [mr Livermores].
Clear. I have ironed & wkt in gardin. dagt Lambd Sent me 3 lb pork. mrs Farewel, Dagt Ballard & 3 Childn, Pally Town took Tea here. at home, Compy here. Jonas wife gave me Butter.

Clear. mr Ballard to the Settlement, bot 1 Busl indien Corn and _ do rie, had 7_ lb Sugar of W m Babcok. we have had 2 lb before on mr James Ketons acount. I have done hous wk [&] Some in my gardin. Son Jonas wife, Martha & the Babe here to Tea. at home. receivd Pay of Keton at Babcoks [Store]. Dagt Ballard here.

Clear and warm. I finisht washing and did other matters, have felt feeble. mr Ballard went to mr Lads, had of him 11 lb indien meel & _ lb Tea. Dagt Ballard, Mart a and Wm took Tea with us. at home. Son Jonas wife here. mr Purington and James here y s morn.

Clear. I have felt unwel, was so ill aftern that I Sent for Hanna t Ballard to Bake for me, her marm Came and got me to bed & nurst. H. & Linda Sleep here, Shub l WickSon allso. at home, very unwel. this day Dagt Lambard is 37 years old.

Birth Wm Stones 4th Dagt and 10th Child. raind part of the day. I was Calld at 5h 30m y s morn to go and See the wife of Wm Stone who was in Labour. Shee was Safe Deld about 10 of her 4th Daught and 10 Child. I tarried to See her made Comfortable. Calld to See mrs Cleark, find her not able to Sett up. arivd home at 1h pm, did various kinds of work &C. mr Ballard to Son Ephms. I am informd that Elijah Barton & 7 others are in Jail on acount of Chaddocks Death. O my Dear Sister, how I feel for her. at Wm Slones and Saml Clearks. Birth 12th. receivda Chees, w d 7 lb oct r 7 lb 11 oz.

Cloudy and Some rain. I have done hous wk, Shelld Beens and [Pees]. [Pally] Spining wool. at home. [1] [1] [Clear the most] of the day. mr Ballard to meeting. Son Jon a & wife, Martha, James & Elisabeth Supt. Son Pollard and John Bolton Calld here. at home. Gidion Barton here and others.

Clear. I went from mr Livermores to Son Ephms. Sis t Barton, B. Porter, his wife & Son in law there, they went to the Jail to See Elijah. Sis t & I were Calld to Liverms again. at mr Livermores and Son Ephms. [8]

Clear part of y e day, Showers aftern. mr Ballard at meeting, I went aftern. Text fn 1 Cor X C 12 V, aft n John 7 th C 7 vers. we Calld at Dagt Lambds. I Calld to See mrss Mosier, find her very Sick. Son Ephm Calld here, gave me 1 lb 3 oz Butter. at meeting, Dagt Lambds & mr Mosiers; Shee is yet living.
Cleare foren and hot, a Shower after 6h pm. mr Ballard been to meeting. Revd mr Stones Text foren [no entry], aftern pSalm 16th vers, I have been at home, Churnd at Evng. at home.

Clear and pleast. mr Ballard to meeting. Text foren John 20th, after n Revd mr Buckminster of Boston performd Text 42 psalm 2nd vers. the Wido Pierce & Dagt Ballard, Sally, James & Elisabeth Dind here. mrs Hall Calld in y s aftern. Luke Barton Came in allso. at home, do not feel very well. mrs Pierce here.

X. Birth Saml Livermores Son & Dagt. XX.] Clear. I was at mr Livermores, Shee was Deld of a Son at 5 h 30 m y s morn and of a Daugh t at 6h 20. her illness Severe but thro Gods mercie [there] Cleverly. I returnd home before night. at mr Livermors. Birth 15th and 16. [9]
A fine Clear day. mr Ballard to meeting, mr Gillit performd. Patty Town Came here. at home, Patty Came here. [30]

Clear part of y e day, Showers & Thunder. Cyrus went to Hallow l . I have been boiling Soap for Dagt Lambd. washt the out hous, Clear d y e Manure from the hen roost & done hous wk. Cyrus bot 2 oz Snuff & 6 nots Cors Thread. at home, makeing Soap for D t Lambd.

Clear till 6h pm when we had a Shower with Thunder. I have [washt] my Chambers and kitchen. I Slipt on the door Stone and my right Side Struk y e Sill and hurt me much. I applied Camphir and Baise to it. at home, washt Chamber & kitchen. I slipt down, hurt me.

Clear. I have harvisted Poland Beens, gatherd hopps. we gatherd our Damsins. at home. [3] [3] Clear and very warm. mr [Ballard] went to hear y e Coart opend. I have finisht galhering y e hopps, gathered in peas & Beens &C. A mr Heart here on business with my husband. at home. Clarrinda Cleark here, Says her Marm is not So wel as She was.
Clear. Sist Barton, Sons Town & Cyrus here. I have been at home. at home, friends Sleep here. [10]
raind. I did hous wk, Patty mending Cloaths. at home. [31]
me, Shee gave me Cotton yn and I knit me a pair hoes to

Clear part of y e day. I left my patient as wel as Could be Expected & reacht home a t 7 h am. mrs Emry, Sis t Barton, mrs Smart, Dagt Pollard, Ballard, Dolly, Lucy, W m & [ ] Lambd. [ ] Warrin & Georg Stone helpt mr Ballard hough potatoes. at [Ditoes].

Clear. I have done hous wk. Dagt Pollard Came here, Dind with us and went directly Son Jonas. after I washt my Dishes I went there and to my grief my Sone left his Famely Expecting to be Committed to prison for debt. at Son Jonas. Ephm & W m Sleep here, Barny last night.
Clear & very warm. Sis t & Patty washt. Patty went to W m Stones, got me a Chees w d 7 lb 11 oz. Sis t Slept a t Jonas. at home. [11]
Birth Wm Brooks Dagt. Cleard before day. I was at W m Brooks, his wife deld of a Dagt a t 9h morn. I returnd home at 1 h pm, receivd 2/1 bus l Corn, price 50 Cents. at W m Brooks s . Birth 18th.
Clear part of the day. I have been very Sick. Son Jona and his wife Came and tarried with us all night. at home, very unwel.

Cloudy, it began to rain at 4 h pm. mr Ballard ploughd & houghd Corn till it began to rain. I have done a little about my washing. Allin Lamb d here, Says the Babe is very Sick. I feel for but am not able to help them. [Ranus] and W m Sleep here. at home, washt Some.

Clear. I have felt Some Easier. mrs Emry Came and finisht Cleaning her yarn and washt Some things for me and Piqut wool. Barny Lambd here to Sleep, Says his Father is Come home. at home. mrs Emry here. Barny & W m Sleep here.
Clear and Cool. I returnd home between 8 & 9 am found much to do but got through it. Allin Lambard Came and Carried his Mothers Coverled away. at Son Ephms. Death Capt Cox.
Clear. Sist went to Son Lambds. I have been at home. at home. [12]
Clear. Patty went to John Wals, bro t me 9 qts molases which he owd me. we have had Company. at home.

raind after 11h am. I have Sett Squash, Cucumbers, Leutice; houghd Some. mr Ballard [w ] mr Heartwels Store, got [Salmon] with [thi ] Doct Cony gave an order for. at home. Sett plants, had 2_ lb Salmon.
Clear. I have been at home till 9h pm when I was Calld by a mr Smith to go and See his wife who is unwel. I left Patty Town here. at James Smiths.
Clear and warm. I have done hous work and various kinds of work. mr Ballard Cuting Stalks. at home.
Clear foren & Cool, Cloudy aftern. I have been at home, heard of the death of Peter Wiman. Son Cyrus Sett out for Rome. at home. Cyrus left here for Rome. [ ] P. Wiman Death. [13]
Cloudy & misty. I am Still lame but have workt in my Gardin all day Except doing my hous wk; planted potatoes & Beens. at home.

Clear Part of ye day. mr Ballard and I attended Lecture. Revd mr Stone Discoarst fm Acts 26th C 28 vers. Magr Coneys wife & Reuel Williams s [ond] y e Covenant and had their Childn Baptis ed . Judg North & Cony presented 2 Each & Brooks & mrs Hannah Cox was admited to full Communion with this Church. at Leclure & at Dagt Lambds. her Babe is not well. Dolly, Lucy & W m Sleep here, M. B. allso.
Clear part of y e day, raind at night. I have been unwel, did but little wk. at home. Wm Sleeps here.

Clear. I have workt Some in the Gardin & done hous wk. mr Ballard houghing. Sist Barton left here at 9h am to go to Dag t Lambds. Dagt Ballard and mrs s Saunders here to Tea, Sally & James allso. at home, had Company. Lefaett took our Calf away.

Birth Phineas Pains 3 d Dagt. recd 1 bs l wheat [Jany] 26, 1811. Clear part of the day. mrs s Pain was Deld a t 1h pm of her 3 d Dagt & 6th Child. I left her as wel as Could be Expected and reacht home at 4. Sist Barton mended mr Ballards Cloaths. Capt Solo mn Voce Expired Sudently at 1 h pm. at Phin s Pains. Birth 9th. Death Capt Solo Voce, very Sudint.
Clear & warm. I have been at home. mrs Gill and others here. at home, friends [here]. [14]
Clear part of y e day & very Cold. I have done hous wk & knit. mr Ballard went to See Dag t Lambd, find her well, wel as usual. at home. Saml & Wilm Sleep here.

Cloudy the most of y e day. mr Ballard attended the funeral of Saml Bond, he was interd [ ]. [I] Have been at home, done the business of my hous, washt my North room & kitchen. at [home]. Funa of mr Bond & mr Heartwel.
Clear day, raind at Evng. I have been at home. mrs Farewel & Gill dind here. at home. [15]

rainy from 10h morn. mr Ballard to meeting. mr Norton Spake fm Luke 6 C 12 vers, aftern fm Mat 23 C 23 d vers. Son Jona, his wife & Salley Supt with us. Sally help t me [y s ] aftern. at home. I feel feeble. Luke Barton & Jona [Junr] Sleep [here].

Clear. I am more Comfortable for which I wish to thank y e author. mr Ballard to meeting, Text [no entry]. mr Livermore & wife Calld in here, mr Hall [&] wife allso. Lon & Dagt Lambard took Tea here. at home, am better.
Cloudy & Some rain. mr Ballard to meeting. mr Gillit Spake from Ephe 6th C vers 13th. I have been at home. at home. [16]
Snow d . Sally & Dolly went to son Jonas after Breakfast. at home.

Clear foren, a Shower at 6h pm. mr Ballard to Parrish meeting. Warrin Stone workt here foren. W m B. wen t and Carred 6 DZ n Eggs, Sold y m fr 9 d / [dan] got _ lb Tea and 2 lb Sug r . Joan y Smith & Martha here to Tea. I have done hous wk and a little in y gardin. at home.
Clear. I was Calld at 3h morn to See John Wals wife who is unwel. at mrs Wals all day, feel feeble.
Clear. mrs Gill went f m here, [Flint] Barton Conducted her to his hous. at home. [17]
Clear and Cool. I have washt & mended Cloaths for Cyrus, he went to Son Epms. Boiting Dagt Lambd s Soape. at home.
Clear. I have been in great pain in my Side. Hannah Came and and [sic] helpt me. Shee Bakt. her Marn Came and took Tea. Linda Getchel & H. Ballard Slept here. at home. Hannah helpt me.
Clear. I have been at home. Patty did my washing. at home.
y e heel. left her about hous & returnd home, reacht

Clear. I have done hous wk, Scolt the Bed room & bed stead. Dagt Ballard Calld in here, informd me her husband Setled his Debt and did not go to Jail. Shee Sent Martha with 3_ [lb rice] & 3_ do of Chees. at home. Son Jonas wife [Calld] here.
Clear. I have done hous wk &C. Patty to Son Jonas at Evng. we Bakt meal made of this years Groth, y e first. at home.

X. Birth mr Smarts Son. XX. raind. I was Calld to See mrs Smart who was in Labour. Shee was Delivd at 11h am of A Son, her first born. I returnd home at 3h pm, left her Cleverly. at mr Smarts. Birth 20lh. [ ] receivd 9/.
Cloudy all day, raind part of it. mr Ballard went to Dagt Lambds to See y e Babe, finds it quite unwel. I have finisht y e wash I began last weak. at home. W m Sleeps here. I have washt today.

Clear and warm. Son Lambard Calld in to See me. mr Ballard Sett out to go to Esq r Locks at 11h 3 [ ] foren. I have pulld my String Pea vines and gatherd [pees] and Sheled, gathered Mustard Seed, Shelld Some that was dried. I went to Son Jonas, took Tea there. Linda, Hannah, Ephm and Saml Pierce Sleep here. at Son Jonas. Son Lambard Calld in to See me.

Clear, a frost this morn. I have been at home, Bakt and did other matters. Dagt Ballard here & 4 Child n , informs me my Son is gone down Expecting to go to Jail. I am very Sorry he is So much hampered. we are informd that Capt Cox Expired yesterday very Sudently. may I be prepard for that Chang when ever it may take place. at home, Dagt Ballard here.
Clear. I did my hous work & went to Son Lambds, Sist Barton there. at Lambds.

X. Birth James Smiths Son, 7th Child. XX. Clear and pleasant. I have been with mrs Smith, Shee has been unwel all day. her Neighbour women were Calld in at 1 h pm. Shee was Safe deld before 2 of her 4th Son & 7 th Child. I receivd 1 lb Tea 6[_] do Sugar and 1 qt of Ginn & _ peck Salt as a reward. at Ditoes. Birth 11th. receivd 11 S as a reward. Child wd 10 lb _ lb.

[Cloudy] till about noon then Clear. I have Scolt my pickles, washt the Buttery & kitchen, Sheld mustard and done my hous wk. mr Ballard Cutt Stalks. it is muster day, they peraded at the forks of y e roads. at home, did various kinds of work.
Clear part of y e day. I have washt. Jon a Junr Sleeps here. at [home].

Clear. I have washt y e Buttery, Bed room, kitchen & entry; puld a lamb Skin, washt y e wool. Hannah and James here to Tea. Ep m & W m Sleep here. mr Ballard bigan to hough his Corn Second time. at [home]. felt Some better than I have Some days past.
Clear part of y e day, Thunder and rain aft 3h pm. I have done hous wk and wed gardin. mr Ballard finisht houghing his Corn y e 3 d time. at home.

X. Birth mr mc Farlins 2 nd Dagt & 3 d Child. XX. Clear. I was Calld by mr mc Farling at 4h y s morn to Go and See his wife. We arivd at his hous at 8h y s morn, his wife was Safe Delivd of her 2nd dagt & 3d Child at 9. [ by his present wife ] I Left there. at mr m c Farlins. Birth 10 th. receivd 10/.

Cloudy part of the day. I have done my hous work but had a Severe turn of pain in my Stomach which held me 3 hours. I got Easier by takeing Some weak Ley and Cut up mustard South of the house. at home, feel the pain again.
Clear. Gideon Barton here, very unwel. did not Sitt up but little for y e day. m Porter & Stepn Barton Sleep here. at home. Gidion Barton here.
raind. I Salted our Pork & Tried the fatt. at home.

X. Birth John Wals 3 d Child & 1st Son. XX. Clear and warm. mrs Wals illness Came on Early y s morn. Shee was after A hard Labour Safe Delivd about 12 of her first Son and 3d Child. I left her Comfortable and reacht at 2h pm. the inft w d 10_ lb. at Ditoes. Birth 13th. receivd 9 qts Molases Oct 18th as reward.

Clear. I have been very lamb in my Side. Procured a Plaster which Seems to reliev me. [Hhanh] here to do my wk, her Marm, Marta & James here, took Tea. I had 1 qt Brandy at mr Nasons and Some [Diacalon] of Doct Ellis. at home, very unwel. mr Ballard to [Hallowell].
Cloudy all day, raind at night. I have felt very unwel but had to work very hard. at home. mrs Lad paid us 12/ s .
there at 11h am, found many things to do. find Sis t
Clear till after 4h pm. I have gatherd Beens to Sell. dagt Ballard Calld in here. I am informd Dagt Lambd is going to remmove again. at home, gatherd some Currents.
Clear. I have done hous wk. mrs Farewel Came here at Sun Sett, Sleept here. Son Ephm Calld me at 9h Evng to See his wife in Labour. at Son Ephms after [9h] Evng.
Clear. I have done hous work. at [home].
Cloudy and Some rain. Patty Town and Son Cyrus Came here at Evng. at home, Cyrus Came here.
Cloudy and Some rain. I did my ironing, was Calld at 6h pm to go to mr M c farlings, reacht there at Sunsett. at mr mc farlings.

Cloudy and rainy all day, a heavy Shower at Evng with thunder. mr Ballard and my Self were Sent for to attend y e Funeral of Capt James Cox of Hallowell but the wether was such we Could not go. I have Brewed and knit Some and done other matters.

X. Birth mr Yettons 4th Son. X. Clear. I was Calld by mr Yetton to See his wife at 1h y s morn from Son Lambards. patient Delivd at 5h Pm of her 4th son and 7th Child. I tarried all night, Patient Cleverly. at mr Yettns, Hollwell. Birth 17th. recvd 10/6.
Cloudy, Snowd at night. Son Cyrus went to Hallowell, he gave me 2/1 lb Shushon Tea. Dagt Ballard and mrs Pierce here. at home. part of my Childn here.

Clear and very warm. I have done part of my work about house and went to See mrss Cleark. Clarinda Came for Patty Town to watch. Son and dagt Lambard & 3 Childn Sleep here. at Saml Clearks, his wife is very Sick.
Cloudy the most of the day. I have done Some washing. Rhoda Pollarr Calld here. at home.
Snowd. I finisht my wash. Le faett Sleeps here. at [home].

Cloudy, Snowd some. Cyrus gave us an Allmanach for y e pres t y r . Le faett returnd fm Clinton, informs that Son Lambards Famely reacht there Safe for which favour I wish to thank the auther of mercies. at home. Son Cyrus left us bound to Esqr Locks.
Clear and warm. mr Ballard to meeting. my Childn went to Son Jonas. I went and Dind, was Calld to mr Livermores, tarried all night. at Son Jonas & mr [Livermores].

Clear the most of the day. Dagt Ballard, Mart a , James & [E ab h ] here. Son Ephm Calld Dolly, W m , Henry & Barny here. Dolly and Sally Ballard Sleep here. mr Ball d been watching his field to keep the Cattle out. at home. Child n & grand Child n here.
Cloudy. Hannah Ballard Spent aftern with us. Wilm Sleeps here. at home.
Clear and very Cold. mrs Babcock Expired at 9h this morn. I returnd home after her grave Cloaths were put on by mrs Hamlin, North & Waid. at mr Babcocks. his wife Expired at 9h morn.
Clear and very Cold. I have done hous wk and knit. Ephm Ballard and Allin Lambd Sleep here, his Daddys famely all wel. at home, Allin here.
Clear and Cool. I have done house wk, Shelld mustard and various kinds of work. mr Ballard Carried 7 lb wool to the masheen. at home.
Clear. mr Porter & Step n to Coart. Gidion tarries here, is better. mrs Pierce here. at home, Gidion here.
Cloudy [&] Some rain. I was Calld a t 7h y s morn to See mrs Beck who was unwel, tarried all night. Shee is Some better. at mr Becks.
Cloudy & Some rain. Jona Junr receivd of mr Livermore for me 6/. mr Ballard bot 1 bushl rie. at home. Jona & W m Sleep here.
Barlon & Son Cyrus have been here while I was absent. Son Jonas wife, Martha & Elisabeth here this aftern. Thunder & rain. at ditoes. returnd home at 11h am. mr Ballard bot 1 Bs l rie, do indian.

X. Birth Son Ep ms Son, 4th Child. XX. raind Some. mrs Hamlin and Titcomb were assistants at the birth of Son Ephms s Son & 4th Child which took place at y e 1st y s morn. they left there at 3 & went home. my Dagt Comfortable. I returnd home at 1h Pm, Sophia with me. Patty Town went to Nurs her aunt. mrs Farewel & Sophi Sleep here. at Son Ephms. Birth 19th. Patty went to Nurs. receivd 3 dol s .
raind part of ye day. I brot my Bed into my kitchen &C. at [home].
Cloudy. I relurnd from mr Babcocks, left his wife a little more Comfortable. Patty finisht my Gound. Patty at mr Babcocks.

Clear. I was Conducted to ye Bridg, from there walkt to Son Lambds. Sis t Barton & I went to mr Hodges, find his wife and Daugt very sick. from there to Son Ephms, he is in his own hous, removed yesterday. we returnd to Son Lambds at 9h Evng, find Rich d Foster there; he paid me 6/, old debt. at Dits and others.
Clear. mr Ballard to upper Parrish to meeting. Sister and I walkt fm Son Lambds to our hous. at Son Lambds.
Clear. Sist Bartons 4 Sons & Jona Ballard Jun r Supt here. Cap t Step n & Elijah Sleep here. at [home]. Friends here.
Clear and warm. I went to Son Ephms, was very unwel all day but returnd to Livermores [ ]. at Livermr s and Son Ephms. hear of Chadocks death.
Cloudy foren. Dolly & Sally went away after Breakfast. I have done hous work & harvested Some Beens. mr Ballard mending fence by y e Corn. at home. mrs Farewel Calld here.

X. Birth W m Babcocks 2 nd Dagt. XX. Clear. I was Calld after 1 hour Pm to See the wife of Wil m Babcock. Shee was Delivd at 3 of her Second Dagt. I tarried all night and next day till Nurs Came. at Wilm Babcocks. Birth 1st. receivd 9 s as a reward.
more Moderate. I have been a t home. at home.
Clear and Cold. I did hous wk & [knit]. at [home].
Clear. Gidion left here y s morn. I have done various kinds wk. at home.

raind. I left mrs Beck more Comfortable, Calld at mr Livermores and at Old mr Hamlins. he is he is [sic] giting better. I reacht home at 1h Pm, did my hous wk and wound 2 Skeins y n to Double. at Ditoes & others.
Clear and Cold. I have Brewd, done hous wk & knit. mr Ballard to Son Ephms. Son Jon a Calld in here, Says they are wel at Son s Lambards & Towns. at [home].
Clear part of ye day, Cloudy at night. Son Jonas wife, Martha and James here, took Tea with us. They brot me Some flower, I made a Cake. at home. Jona Junr Sleeps here.
Clear. Luke Barton, Jona, Lefaett & Ephm got wood for us. Patty mending Cloaths for us ys two days. at home. Patty & Hannah Sleep here.
Clear Part of y e day. I have done hous wk. Jona Junr & W m Sleep here. at home.
Clear. I have Bakt & ironed &C. at home.

Clear. I have Bakt broun & flower bread. D t Lambd, mrs s Smart, Pally Town & W m & Babe Came here foren. Old Lady Dillingham & grand Son, mrs Howard, Sally farewel aftern. 4 other Girls and 2 boys for Cherries. mr Ballard to y e Settlement, brot home pork, herring, _ lb Tea, 2 do sugar. at home, had Company.
Snowd. mrs Farewel & Sophi here. at home.
Clear part of y e day. I have finisht washing & done other lhings. at home.
Clear. I have been at home. Patty to Son Jonas. Son Lamb d Sleeps [h ]. a t home.

Clear and very warm. mr Ballard to meeting. Revd mr Stone Discoarst f m Ephe 4 th C three last verss. Dagt Lambards inft was Baptised by y e name of Sarah Farewel. Son Jona, his wife & 4 Child n here, Rhoda Pollard allso & Patty Town. at home. Childn & grand Child n here.
Clear & very Cold. I have fl t very unwel. Son Jonas Boys Sleep here. at home.

Clear and Cold. Son Ephm & wife and Childn Came here. I was Seisd with a Collic pain y s morn, am very ill at night. Son Jona, his wife and part of his Child n , Son Lambard allso, Spent Evng here. at home, Sick [with] y e Collic. Child n here, Patty returnd.

X. Birth John Pierces Son, first born. XX. Clear part of ye day. I was Calld after 1h Pm to See the wife of John Pierce who was in Labour. Shee was delivd about 2 of a Son, her first Born; her husband absent. Sister Barton & Son Jonas wife there but Shee was Delivd before they arivd. Sist & I got home at dusk. at Cap t Smilh. Birth 4th. Jany 19 recvd the [last] of my Due.
Snowd. I have been at home. Ephn and Wm Sleep here. James & Babe are a little better. at home.
Clear. mrs Emry Came here & washt her Cloaths. Sist B. & Patty went to Son Lambds. I Did hous work. at home.
Clear part of y e day. mr Nephews hr, left here to go to Viany. Jona Slept. at [home].

Cloudy, Snowd at night. I have been to Son Jonas, Sally Farewel to work there. Dagt Pollard and 2 Child n Came to my Sons near night. Barna and Wilm Sleep here. the remains of Old mr Babcock were interd this aftern. at Son Jonas. Funeral of mr Babcock.
Clear the most of the day, Cool. mr Ballard to Town meeting. I have washt, dried and ironed my Cloaths, and knit Some y s Evng. at home.
Clear. I have gatherd in [gardin] Matters. mr Ballard mending fence, Lefaett & Ephm helpt him. at home. Son Jona here, he came home last [night].
Cloudy and Some Snow. I went to mr Nasons Store, got 1-2/1 yds [wild boar] with Son Ephms order of 18[ s /]. Left mrs Babcock as wel as Could be expected. at Detoes. Came home near night. Very cold.
moderate. mr Beck Calld me a t Evn g to See his wife, her women were Calld. Shee was not very ill this night. Funeral of mrs Babcock y s day. at mr Becks. Funeral mrs Babcock.
Clear part of y e day & windy. I have done hous wk & knit. at home. Le faett Sleeps here.
Clear & pleast foren n , Cloudy aftern. I have done hous wk & knit. Wm sleeps here. at [home].
Clear. Sist Barton, Sons Jonas and Ephms wives here. I have done hous work and knit Some. Wm Sleeps here. at home, Child n here.
Clear and not So Cold. Old mr Hamlin and wife Calld here. I have done hous wk and knit. at [home]. mr Hamlin and wife here.
Clear. I have done hous wk [&] knit. mr Ballard went to Lads, bought 1 bushl indien 6/9 and 2/1 do rie, left it at the mill. at home. mr Bald bot Corn & rie.
Clear. mr Ballard been to Coart, y e Caus given to Jury. I have been makeing apple Sauce. at home. mr Ballard to Coart.
Clear. I have done hous wk. Jon a Junr Sleeps here, gave me Some Snuf. at home.
Snowd. I have been at home. Sone Lambard & Jona Junr Sleep here. at [home].
Clear. this is the yearly fas t day but no Preaching here. at home.
Cloudy foren, wind NW and very Cold. I have done hous wk, mended & knitt. Ephm and Wil m Sleep here. brot me 1 qt Spirit, 1 [lb] of Sugar which I Sent money by Jon a for. at home.
Clear morn, Cloudy aftn, Snowd a little. I have done hous wk and knitt. Patty did washing for her Self, went to Son Jonas; tarries. Le faett & Wm Sleep here, brot me flower. at home.

Clear. I have washt. Betsy Andrews here to Tea. I knit in y e Evng. no one Slept here. Son Jona informd us mr Devenport and mrs Balchelder of Hallowell were dead and Buried. be y e allso ready. Son Jonas wife gave us 5 lb fish, A Loaf Bread & 5 lb rie flower this weak. at home. News of Deaths.
Clear and warm. I have done hous wk & knit. Wm Sleeps here. at home.
Clear. I have Bakt pies. Jon a Slept here. at home.
Clear and pleast. I have done hous wk, Bakt and Cutt potatoes. Ephm & W m Sleep here. W m got me Snuff and 1 qt Spirit, the Sp t of mr Livermore. at home, Bakt.
Stormy. mrs Farewel & Sopha here. at [home].
Clear. mr Lad & Son Ep m Dind here on a roast Goos which Son Jona gave us. at home. Son Ep m here.
Clear. I have been at home. Son Jonas wife and Sist Barton here to Tea, Son Cyrus allso. we were informd of y e Death of Colo Howard. at home. Death Colo Howard.
Clear & warm. I have Brewed & Cleaned my Cellar. Old mrs s Hamlin & Son, Ep ms wife, Sopha & Martha here, in fm Amos Patridg had a Son & Dagt Born last night. at home. mrs Hamlin here.
Clear & more Pleast. Ephm Sleeps. at home.
Clear. I have been at home, unwel. a t home.
Cloudy foren. Sist Barton went to Son Jonas at 11 O clock. it began to Snow at 3h Pm. W m Bal d Sleeps here. at [home].
Clear. I have done my wk, pickt wool. Jona Junr Sleeps here. at home.
Snowd & raind. I have done hous wk & knit. Le faett & Ep m Sleep here. at home.

Clear part of y e day. Dagt Pollard & two of her Childn, Sally, Martha and James Came here foren. I have not felt So wel as I Could wish. it is as a Cordial to have A Child come to See me. my Dagt made me a present of 1 lb hyson Tea. at home, Dagt Pollard here.

Clear. I left mrs Bradford & infant Comfortable after Breakfast & reacht home at 7. Calld at Son Jonas, his Son Sett out for Clinton, mr Allby with him, he took gardin Seeds & potatoes for Son Lambd. Sister Barton has been quite Sick with her Eyes being Soar. at Ditoes & at Son Jonas. walkt from my Sons, the roads very bad.
Cloudy & misty. I have been a t home. [ ally] began to make my gound. at home.
A Snow Storm. I was at diloes. at Becks.
Clear and Cold. I have done hous work & knit. Son [Jona] & Jona & W m Sett out for Clinton. at home.

A Snow Storm. Son Jona, his wife and babe Sett out for Clinton at noon whin it Ceas t Storming but it Came on again. Patty Town and Sarah Farewel took Tea here. Son Pollard, his wife, Rhoda & y e babe gone to Clinton, Sam l allso. I have been Cuting Eyes out of Potatoes, have knit Some. at [home]. Company here.

X. Birth Dan l Woodwards 4th Son. Clear and Spring like weather. I was Calld at 11 h Am to go and See the wife of Daniel Woodward who was in Labour. Shee was Safe Deld at 1h Pm of 4 th Son & 5th Child. I left her and infant Comfortable and reacht home about 3. I receivd 1 s 6 d in part of fee. Dagt Ballard and James here to Tea. at Daniel Woodward. Birth 6th. recd 1/6 d May 1s t 1 Dol r & 20 cents.
Clear and not very Cold. mr Ballard has a pain in his Back. I have done hous wk & knit. Hannah Ballard has Seen 15 years y s day. at [home]. H. Ballard 15 years Old y s day.
raind. I have put my Soape in the barril. part done my washing, feel fatagued. mr Ballard ringed y e piggs. at [home].
A Severe Snow Storm, Cleard of about midnight. Le faett and Ephm Sleep here. at home.
Clear. I have done hous work. at home.
Clear. I have been at home. Son Lambard & Allin & Ephm Sleep here. Allin informs they are wel at his pas and at Son Towns. at [home].
raind. I have done hous work and knit Some. I have felt very unwel. at home.

Clear and very Cold. I have done hous work and mended Cloaths. Old mr Lambard Came here at Evng, he Sleeps here. Son Lamb d Supt here, Sleep t at Son Jonas. Wm Trask & Le faett Ballard Sleept here. at home. Brother Lambard Sleeps here.
Cloudy part of the day. I have done various kinds wk. Patty work Some for her Self and Some for me. Shee is gone to Son Jonas y s Evng. at home. Patty & Jon a Sleep here.
Clear. I have done hous wk, knit and mended things. mrss Smith here, had 5-2/1 qts Beens; brot home meal & Candle Shee had borrowed of me. W m Trask & Jon a Junr Sleep here. at home. mrs Smith here.
Clear and Cold. mr Lambard Sett out for home after Breakfast. Son L. here, went to Son Jonas. at home. Son Lambd Sleeps here.

Clear Pleast morn, Cloudy aftn. Hannah & James Dind here. Patty went home with them. mr Ballard gone there to hear them Sing. W m here for Camphir. Le faitt is unwel. Son Lambard Sleeps here, Patty allso. at home. Son Lambd here y s night.
Clear. mrs Farewel to [Son Jonas]. [at home.]
Clear. I have done hous wk & knit. Jona Sleeps here. at home.
raind in the night, Snowd the most of y e day. Cyrus went to Son Ephms. the remains of Colo Howard were intered. at home. Funeral Colo Howard.
[Cloudy] and Cold. I have been at home, did hous wk & knit Some. at [home].
Clear. I have done Some washing & mending & knit Some, Sowd Leutics Imperial. at home.

X. Birth Joshua Heaths 3 d Son. XX. Clear foren, Showers aftern. I was Calld at 2h ys morn to See Joshua Heaths Lady who was in Labour, Shee was Safe Deld at 3 of her 3 d Son and 5th Child. Shee & infant are Cleverly. I was Conduted hom w d as far as Cap t Smiths by mr Allby. I Calld in to See mrs Pierce, find her Breas t is not well yet. I sorted Beens for Planting and did my other wk. at mr Heaths. Birth 9th. receivd 6/ June 2nd 3/ S .
Clear part of y e day, Snowd before night &C. at home.
at home, very unwel. at home.
Clear. I have done hous wk, began to brew. was Calld to Son Jonas, Elisabeth is Sick. EbenZ Trask and wife there, he Conducted Sist Barton & I home in his Sleigh. at Son Jonas, the babe is Sick.
Clear & very pleas t . mr Jonat n Mower of Green Sleeps here. a t home.
raind all day. I wrote to Bro r Collins & Sist Waters. wido Pierc here. Saml Clearks wife Expired. Jona & Le faett Sleep here. at home. Death mrs Cleark. I wrote.
Cloudy. Son Pollard Came & took his wife and Babe to go to Son Ephms, the Childn went to Son Jonas. I have done hous wk and knit Some. at home. Son Pollard came for his wife & Childn.
Clear. Sister is very unwel. I sent for flies to draw a blister and for Luke to Come and See her, he Sleeps here. at home, Sister very unwel.
Clear. I made Sausages. Patty doing my gound. I was Calld at Evng to See mrs Babcock, performd Servises necessary. tarried all night. at mr Babcocks, his wife is not so [ ].

X Birth mr Becks 4 th Dagt. XX. Cloudy. mrs Beck had her women Calld after 1h morn, was Deld a t 2 of a fine Dagt. I tarried till 9 and returnd home. receivd an order on mr Nason for 9/. Brother Ebenz Moore Came here, Dind. he Sleeps here, has been to Portland. at Ditoes. Birth 3 d . receivd an orderon mr Nason for 9/, had it answerd [25] inst.
Clear foren, Cloudy aftern and Evng. I have washt my Cloaths and kitchen and knit Some. at home. Ephm Sleeps here.
Clear and Cool. Son Ephm Conducted me to his hous y s aftern. Elijah Barton there. at Son Ephms.
Clear. Sist B and I went to Son Jonas aftern. my husband there [to] Tea with us. at Son Jonas.
Clear and Cold. Pally Town here, took Some Sewing to do for me. Ephm Cutt wood for us, his Grand daddy not able to do any thing. at home. Patty Calld to See us.
raind, thunder at Evng. I have done various kinds of work, washt kitchin flore & the out hous. at [home].
Clear. I have finisht makeing my Apple Sauce, am informd y e Jury brot y e Prisoners in not Guilty. may their Conciencies do y e Same. at home. Prisoners acquited. mr Cleark Tap t y s day.
Clear till after Sun Sett. 3 of Son Lambds Sons & Dolly Sleep here. I have done various kinds work. Wil m Ballard is 11 years old this day. at home. Grand Childn here. Wm Bal d birth day.
Clear. I have done various kinds of work. Dagt Pollard, Patty Town & Hannah Pollard & y e babe Sleep here. at [home]. Dagt Pollard here.
raind and haild, Sun Shone part of y e day. mrs Chamberlain Dind here. mr Ballard to Son Ephms, got 2/1 bush l Potatoes. at home. Old mrs Chanber ln here.
Clear part of y e day & more moderate. Son Jona Calld in to see us. at home.
Snowd. I have had a Collic pain. Lon Lambds Famely Came to Son Jonas, removing to Clinton. at home.
Cloudy. Son Jon a , Dagt Pollard & 3 of her Childn & Patty Town Dind with us and left here before night. mrs Titcomb Expired this night. at home. Part of my Childn here. Death mrs Titcomb.

Clear and pleast. W m Trask took Breakfast. Son Jona & his Son Jon a Dind. this is the anniversary of Son Jonas Birth, 47 years. we were informd that an infant Child was found under a wharf at Hallowell this day, Dead. at home. Son Jona has Seen 47 years y s day. [5] [2] Clear part of y e day, Snowd before night. mr Ballard has been to Town meeting. he brot 2 lb Sugar fm mr Livermore & 1 qt Spirit. Lefaett Supt with us. I have done hous work & knit some, Piquet Beens &C. mr Ballard brot 9-2/1 lb Beef from Son Ephms as a present. at [home]. mr Ballard brot 9-2/1 lb Beef fm Son Ephms.
Clear. mr Ballard to meeting. Text foren in Math u , af t Romans. at home.
Clear. mr Ballard to Meeting. I have felt feeble. Son Jona, his wife and part of their Child n here. Text aftern Luke XIX C 41 vers. at home. Text for nn Luke 16 C 3 las t vers s .

Clear and Pleast. mr Ballard and I went to Son Jonas to take our leav of Son Lambards Famely who Sett out for Clinton. may God bless them in every lawful undertaking is my wish. at Son Jonas. Son Lambds famely Sett out for Clinton.
Cloudy, the Sun Shone a little while foren, it began to Snow at 9h Ev n . I have done hous wk, pick t up Chips and knit. Ephm & Wm Sleep here. at home. Martha & James here.
Clear morn, Cloudy aftn & rain. Son Lamb d left here after Breakfast. Sally Farewel Came fore n , Patty went home with her. I have done hous wk & knit Some. at home.
rainy. I was at mr Morgins this day and night. the Patient rested Some Easier. 2 of James Moors s dagts watcht. at [Di ].
Clear. mrs Farewel left us [aft n ]. Sally & Martha Sleep here. [at home.]
XX. Cloudy. I have done hous wk & knit. it is 55 years this day Since I was Joined in wedlock with my husband. many Changing Sceins have past me in that time. at home. 55 years since my Marriage.
Snowd Some. I have done hous wk. at home.
Clear. Cyrus Sett out for home. Sister Barton has had a Collic pain. I have been at home, finisht my hoes. at home. Sis t Bn unwel.
raind in the night, Clear foren, Showers aftern with Thunder. mr Bullin Calld here, his famely are wel. he informd of a Death at Hollowell this morn. at home. mr Bullin here.
Clear. I have Sowd Sage Seed and Sorted Beens for Planting &C, knit Some. at home.
Clear. I have been at home. at home.
Clear part of y e day & Cold. I have put our Cyder into y e Celler &C. at home.
Snowd and raind. I have done hous wk. we have been alone 5 nights past. at home.
[No entry.]
Clear part of y e day. James Purington and his uncle here. my Sis t Sleeps here. at home.
Clear part of the day. I have been at home, did work in my gardin and h s work. [at home.]
Clear. I have done hous work. a t home.
raind all day, Cleard at Evng. I did hous wk & knit. Sent my Letters to Son Lambard for Cap t Barton to Carrie on. at [home]. Jona & W m Sleep here.
Clear part of y e day. Sist Barton Came here foren. Son Jonas wife & part of her Children here aftern. Sis t washt for me. at home, Friends here.
Clear. Sister feels a little better. I did a little washing &C. at home.

X. Birth Enoch Rowels 3 d Dagt. XX. Cloudy morn and Some rain. mr Rowel Calld on me at 6h 30 m to to and See his wife in Labour. I found the Child born when I arivd. I finisht the performance. it is hir 3 d Dagt and 4th Child. I returnd to Son Jonas, Dind there; mr Ballard allso. I came home, removd Beet Plants and did other matters. at mr Rowel. Birth 11th. recd 9/ as a reward.

Clear. my Brother left hear Early, home ward bound. I was Calld at 10h morn to See mrs Purkins who has had an ill turn. her Mother & mrss Pitts there. we got her up and made her bed, Changd her Linning. I left her more Comfortable and returnd home. at mr Purkins s . his wife had an illturn. I had Becks ordered answered at Nasons a t 9 h Evng.
Snowd and raind. I have done hous wk and knit. Ephm Sleeps here. at home.
Clear and cold. mr Ballard Came to Son Ephms, dind there. my Son gave him 1 lb Tobacco & Some Lickoris ball. I tarrie all night. at Ditoes.
Cloudy and Some rain. I have done Some washing. Sister B. Twisted thread & hoes y n and Spun Some, her Eyes very Sore. at home.
Clear. Linda Getchel washt Bed Cloaths for me. I paid her 22 Cents. I helpt about my work but am feeble. at [home], Linda helpt.

X. Birth mr Orocks Dagt. XX. Clear and warm. I have washt Some wool, my Buttery and other matters. was Calld at 3h pm by mr Orock to See his Lady who was in Labour. Shee was Safe Delivd at 4 of a fine Dagt, her first Child by her present Husband. I left them as wel as Could be Expected and arivd at home at 6, did my work. at mr Orrocks. Birth 10th. receivd 2 Dols as A reward.

Birth Asa Pierces Son. Clear. I was Calld by Asa Pierce a t 8h morn to go and See his wife who was Safe Delivd at 5 h pm of a Son. I left them Comforlable and reacht home after 9h Evng, felt fatagud. at Asa Pierces. Birth 12th. receivd 6/.
Clear and Cold. I have done hous wk, Bakt bread &C. the Boys Cut wood for us, I got it in. Son Lambard & Jon a Came a t 11h Evng, Sleep here. at home. Son Lambd Sleeps here, his famelywell.
Clear. I have rensed & dried & folded my Cloaths. Bakt, washt Chamber Slairs &C. knit Some but I feel feeble. at [home].

Clear the most of y s day. Jason Pierce and wife Calld in here. I have done hous work, my ironing &C. mr Ballard went to mill. Brot 2/1 bushl rie meal to Son Ephms, got 2/1 bs l potatoes; to a Store, got 2/1 lb Tea, 2 lb Sugar & Some Spirit. all Cost /5 shilings & 3 d . at home. Jason Pierce Calld [here].
Clear day, raind at night. Son Jona Calld in here. at home.
Clear part of y e day. Son Jona Calld in here, Says my Child n at Ctinton & Winslow are well. at home.
Cloudy foren, raind aftern & all night. Jona Ballard Junr Calld in to See us, they are wel at Clinton. there was a man found dead at Hallowell. at home. Jona Junr here. A Death.
Cloudy most of y e day. I have done various kinds wk. Church Williams infant Expired. at home.
raind. I have been at home, heard from Son Cyrus, he is wel. at home. [m]
Clear part of the day. I have done my hous wk, Brewd. mr Balld Planted potatoes in ye field. at [home], Brewd.
Clear and warm. I have Bakt but feel very feeble. we were [alone this night]. at home.
Clear. I have washt, done hous wk and knit. mr Petengail took [ ] our Cow for Taxes. what we are to do God only knows. at home. our Cow was laken for Taxes this day.
Clear morn, Cloudy part of y e day, and Colder than it has been Some time. at home.

Cloudy morn, Clear aftern n . I arivd at home at 11h am attended by mr Moore. found much work to do, feel very weary at Evng. Son Ephm Calld here. at [Dito ]. returnd home at 11 [am]. Death Old [ ] Jackson.

Clear. mrs Farewel & Dagt Ballard & Elisabeth here to Tea. my Dagt brot me some Chees. mr Ballard been to Son Ephms, got potatoes. my Dagt Sent me 18 Candles. I finisht picking my white [wool]. at home. mrs Farewel & Dagt [Sally] Ballard here.
Cloudy. I have done hous wk. Betsy Wiman here. Jon a Sleeps here. at home.

Showers. I have been at home, am informd that the Remains of wido Lamb were interd y s aftern. Shee was 75 years Old lacking about 1 month. may we all hear y e Call and be allso ready. at [home]. Funeral wido Lamb.
Clear Spring like day. I have been Sorting Beens & other business about the hous. Son Jona Sett out for Clinton. Allin L. been down with OXen. I had a hen hatched 10 Chicks, los t one. at home.
Clear Except Showers. I have been at home. Dagt Ballard, Saml Babcocks wife & Asa Pierces here. I lransplanted Squash. at home, had Company.

Clear. mr Ballard left home a t 9 h am to go to Clinton. I wish he may return Safe. Hannah Pollard & Dolly Lambard washt for me and washt my kitchen. they went to Son Jonas after Dinner. I have wed gardin some. they and Hannah B. Sleep here. at [home]. mr [Ballard] to Clinton [or Winslow].

Clear part of the day, a Shower aftern. Allin Lambd Sett out for home this morn after breakfast. I have done hous work, Some in y e gardin, and Mended a Shirt for my husband. at [home]. Son [Jo ] Calld here y s morn. we were alone y s [night].
Clear. mr Ballard went to hear y e lrial of y e Prisoners, y e Jury were paneild & ajourned. Ep m Sleps here. at home.

X. Birth Purkinss 1st Dagt, 2nd Child. XX. Clear. we had men giting wood. I was Calld to See mrs Babcock, find find [sic] her very ill. was Calld at Evng by mr Purkins to see his wife in Labour. Shee was delivd before 10h Evng of her 2nd Child & first Dagt. I tarried all night. at mr [Babcocks] & Purkins. Birth 2nd. recd9/ as a rewd.
Clear part of the day. I have done hous wk & knit. was Calld to Son Jonas at 9h 30 m Evng to See James and Elisabeth who are unwel. I tarried all night. at Son Jonas.

Clear and warm. Son Ephm left his hors for me to go and See his Child n . they are not very wel. I Calld to See mrs Young, find her very low. my Sons Child n Some beller. I went to See mrs Ranlet, find her feeble. was at mr Orocks, their infant is very Sick. Calld at mr Livermores, he has Childn Sick allso. I Slept at my Sons. at Son Ephms and visited others who were Sick. Cap t Gartand Cut his throat.
Clear. I have done various kinds work. a t home.
Clear. I have washt Some. Jon a & Left Bankt our hous, they & W m Sleep here. at home. Funeral mrs Cleark.

Cloudy. Sist B. went to Jonas, returnd at Evn g . Bror Lambard Sleeps here. Saml Wiman got us wood, he brot 20 English herring as a present from his Sister Barton here y s night. at home. mr Lambard and Sist Barton Sleep here.

Clear. Sist So much better y t Shee has Spun 3 Skeins. I was Calld at noon by mr Bradford to go and See his wife who has an ill turn. I administred some remediy which gave her Some relief. at mr Bradfords, his wife has an ill turn.
Clear. I have felt better. I wish to be Greatful for the mercie. at home.

Clear part of the day and Cold. I have done hous wk & knit Some. Le faett had of Nason of Sidny pint & half Spirri t and 1 lb Sugar for me. he broke the bottle and los t the Spirrit. he got 1 lb Candles with Eggs he Carried for me. at home. no one Slept here y s night.

Clear and Cold. W m Farewel Esqr and wife Came to my Sons, Sister Barton allso. Luke brot me home. the Bell was toled for y e Death of Old mr Babcock, he was 89 years. I Calld at mr Hamlins, his wife not at home. Allin Lambard gave me 20 Cents. Son Ephms wife gave 2 lb Candles. at [Ditoes]. Death Old mr Babcock.
Clear. I have done hous work. mrs Carter here to Comb flax, Shee dind with us. we are informd that Elijah Barton has had a Daught Born Lately. at home. mrs Carter here. Death mrs Wingate.
Clear and warm, I have done my hous wk & ironing. mr Ballard bush t pees. Ephm hauld 1 twich wood for us. Peter Voces youngest Child Expired, aged 3 years. at [home]. Death P. Voce Child.

Clear part of the day. I have Brewd, workt in my gardin &C. I Sent 1 Dol by wm Ballard, he got me pint and half Spiret, 2/1 bl Corn and _ Snuff, [Chand], 11 Cents. Ephm & Jason Peirce Junr Came after we were in Bed and Sleep here. at home. I Brewd &C.
Clear. Hannah B. and Ephm here. they are well at Son Towns & Lambards. at home.
Clear and Cold. Son Lambd Sleeps here, his famely well. at home.

Clear foren, Cloudy aft n . Son & Dagt Ballard Came in here near night, Wil m & James with them. inform that a Son of Ezra Crosby was killd by a Logg roaling on to him as he was loading it & that Ezekiel Coal of Varsalboro fell with a Stick of wood he was Carrying on his Sholder which put a period to his life. at home. Son Jona, his wife, [&] part of ye Childn here. News of Deaths by accidents. Ephm & Wm Sleep here.
Clear and not very warm. the Boys went to Son Jonas. Allin wen t home. I have been at home. Ephm [and] Barna Came late and Slept here. at [home].

Clear. mr Ballard went to meeting but found [no] preacher. Son Jonas Girls to N parrish. A mr Newel discoars t from Romans 10 C 1s t vers. Son Jona & Jona Junr Came from Clinton, Childn well there. at home. Son Jona and his Son Came fm Clinton.
Clear and warm. mr Ballard is not wel and we did not attend public worship. Son Jonas wife took Tea with us, W m , Martha & Elisabth were here allso. Ephm & Wilm Sleep here. at [ ].

Clear. mr Ballard drest and Sett out for meeting, went as far as Son Jonas and returnd not being acomodated hors and Saddle to go. Son Cyrus Came here, Spent Some hours and Sett out for Rome again. Son Ephm Came after meeting, his Famely well. he informd us the Text was PSalm C III d vers s 15 & 16th. at home. Sons Cyrus & Ephm here.

Shours, Clear aftern. Son Lambd Calld here y s morn, he took Breakfas t at Son Jonas. my son & Luther Pierce Calld to See me, Luke Barton allso. mr Ballard to meeting and attended as a Pawl holder at y e Funeral of mr Crosby. it was Dark before he Came home. Son Lambd Sleeps here. at home. Funeral of Old mr Crosby of this town & Isaac Clearks wife of Hallowell. [20]

Clear. I feel easier than I did in y e Night. I hope I am Sincearly thankful to the Great Author of all mercies. Doct Cony Came to See me y s morn, left me Elixer & annodines. at [home], very unwel. Doct Cony [here] to See me.

rainy. I have been at home makeing Soap and mending Cloaths for mr Ballard and my Self. mrs Smith here, brot me 1 qt Spirit which John Pierce Sent me. Sopha Andrews brot me 1 qt Soap which her mother had borrowed. at [home]. mrs Smith here.
Clear. I have been at home, did hous work & planted Squash Seeds. at home.
Clear. I have washt. Wido s Savage, Swanton and Dagt Ballard took Tea with us. Martha, James and Elisabath here. at home, had Company.
raind Some this morn, the Sun Shone before 9 h AM. this is the aneversary of the Purington Scean 4 years Since. Jona Sett out for Clinton again. at home, hear Jonah Crosby is Dead.

Cloudy & Some rain. Son Lambd left here after breakfast. Revd mr Channing Discoars t foren fm Hebrews 2 nd C 3 vers, aft n 1s t Thesal 5 C 17 vers yesterday. Son Lambard left here y s morn after breakfast goin to y e Settlement. I have knit a garter for my husbd. at home. wm B. Sleeps here. I Sent for 2/1 lb Tea and pint & half Spirit.
Clear and warm. Dagt Lambd with me this day, Shee Seems very feeble. Son Jona, wife & part of their Child n to Tea with us. I cutt squash to drie. at home, Childn here. Luke Bartons Birthday. [4]
Snowd. I have done hous wk & knit. Ep m & W m Sleep here. at home.

raind part of the day. I have washt and done hous wk & finisht my Stockins. Patty Town & Jona B. [Sle ] here. I have Seen 75 years y s day. how many of my acqaintance are gone before me who are younger than my Self. may I [be ready allso]. at home. have Seen 75 years y s day.
Clear. I was Calld by mr Ranlet to go and See his wife who is in Danger of an Aborsion. Shee got more Comfortable. I tarried all night. at mr Ranlets.

Clear and warm. mr Ballard is houghing potatoes. I have done wk in the hous & Gardin. a t 2 h pm the News of y e death of Gen l Sewals Lady reacht us. may we all be allso ready. at home. Death mrs s Sewall.

Clear. mrs Farewel and Elijah Barton Dind with us. Son Jona Sent us [1 dzn] fish & Some pork. Luke Barton Came for an Eye Stone and some hops. mrs Farewel left here after dinner. I finisht washing my wool & workt Some in my gardin. at home. mrs Farewel & Elij Barton here.

Clear. I have been doing hous wk and Picking my refues wool. mr Martin of Hallowell here, Exprest a wish to have me attend his wife prety Soone. Jona Sleeps here. at home. mr Martin of Hallowell here. [8]
Cloudy & some rain. I have not Sett up but little. Hannah Ballard Came and made Tea, I drank 2 Cups. Shee and H. Getchel Sleep here. at [home], unwel.
Clear morn. Dagt Lambard & her Daddy and I took Tea at Son Jonas. at Son Jonas. [5]
Clear. mrs Carter, Bennet & Dagt Bald here. the Boys hauld 6 trees fm y e Corn field. they, James & Martha Dind here. at home, had Company.

raind the most of ye day. I have done hous work. Son Jonas wife Sent me 2 lb pork. I Cookt part of it with greens and potatoes. I have had a pain in my Stomach aftern. I Slipt doun going to the wel and hurt me Some. at [home].
Clear. Jona, his wife & Dagt Pollard Came here, Shee took Part of my wool and yarn home. her Father & I went to Son Jonas to Tea, Came home after Sun Sett. at Son Jonas, Child n been here.
Clear and warm. Jonas men mowd N of our gardin. I have washt North room, kitchen & Bed room and Bakt flower bread. Jona Sleeps here. at home. [9]

Clear. Dagt Lambard went from here foren to vasit her Friends in y e Settlement. I have been washing and takeing care of mustard, feel fatagud. mr Alby & Ephm Carried y e [rowin] to y e Barn. Ephm Sleeps here. at home. Dagt Lambard went to the Settlement.

Birth mr Thwings 3 d Dagt. Cloudy. I was Calld to mr Thwings at 1h y s morn. Shee was Deld of her 3d Dagt & 7th Child a t Sun rise. I was alone with her when it was born. mrs Smile Came in Soon after. at mr Thwings. Birth 21 st . receivd6 s June 6th, 1810. 1_ Sugar.

Showers and Cool. Saml Pollard was here y s day, his fathers famely are all well. I have been Sorting Beens, doing hous wk, made A Chees. my Husband has Seen 85 years this day. may he Consider of his las t End and be prepared when Ever it Comes. at home. mr Ballard is 85 years Old y s day.

Clear foren, Cloudy after n , warmer than it has been. mrs Marshal & mrs s Heath here aftern. Son Cyrus Came here at Evng, brot me flower which he got of Francis [Toul] for a dbt due fm hm. mr Ballard Sowd Carrots. I Sowd Parsly, put Squash Seeds & Some Potatoes in [Wof ]. at home, Cyrus Came a t Evng.
Clear forenn, Showers aft n . mr Ballard was Sumoned to Coart by Ruel Wilns. he went, [recievd] 75 Cents. I have been [at] home, Set Squash Plants.
Clear and warm. I have done hous wk & Pickt wool. Sophia Wiman and Betsy here. Han h Pollard & D. Lambd went to Son Ep ms . H., S., & M ta Sleep here. at [home].

Cloudy foren, raind aftern. I have Sett Some French Turnips, wed a Bed of Beets, done hous work & pickt wool. mr Ballard Sowd Turnips in the field. at home. I was very [Sick] in the night. [3] [6] Clear. I have been So unwel I did not Sett up but little till the middle of aftern. Son Jonas wife, H., S., M., James & Elisabeth took Tea with us, made my Bed &C. at home. Dagt Bald & Childn here aftern.

Clear. I have done a larg wash. Son Jona, his wife & 2 youngist Child n , mrs Smith of Canaan & Sally Farewel to Tea with us. Sally & H. Ballard Sleep here. at home. Sally Farewel & H. Balld Sleep here. [10]
Clear. mrs Pierce & Dagt Ballard here, mr Ben n Brown also. mr Ballard brot me 1-2/1 lb Candles for Son Lambard. mr MC Farlin & W m Sleep here. at home.
A very Severe Storm of Snow. I tarried at mr Purkinses all day, was Calld back to mr Babcocks at Evng. his wife is very ill. I Sett up part of this night. at ditoes & ditoes.

X. Birth B. Shaws 2 nd Dagt. XX. Clear. mr Ballard Came to Son Jonas, took Breakfast and we Came home. left y e Child n better. I was Calld at 3h 30m pm to See B. Shaws wife Eas t of y e Bridg. Shee was Deld of a Dagt, her Second Child, about 11 Evng. I tarried till morn. at Ditoes & B. Shaws. Birth 5th. recd 9/ Cashas reward.

Clear & warm. I left my Sons after dinner, Calld at Tim y Pages, Capt Pits s , Evliths Store, mr Blacks & mr Orocks. his Babe is no better. mrs Hodges has a Child has a Sweling on his head. I reacht home before night. Calld at Son Jonas.
raind foren. Sally went to Son Jonas aftern. mr Ballard to Carding mash n . mrs Capin & Joseph Burtuns wife here to Tea. we Stayed alone y s night. at home. mrs Capin & Burtun here.
Clear part of y e day, raind at night. I have done some washing. a t home.
raind all day. I have don hous wk. the Boys Sleep here. at home.
Clear. Bro Lambard went fm here. I have done hous work. Saml Babcock 3 d had his Barn Burnt, 3 Oxen & 2 Cows. at home, Sister B. Sleeps here.
Clear. I have been at home. Sister Seems more Comfortable. I began my Soap. at home.
raind all last night & till 2h pm. Le faet & Ep m Sleep here. at home.
Clear. Sist B. went to Son Jonas, came and Slept here. Death Arnals Child. at home.
Clear & Cold. I have washt, knit and done hous wk. mrs Farewel Came at dusk, Sleeps here. at home. mrs Farewel Sleeps here.
A Severe Snow Storm. Dagt Balld Came here. I went to the barn with her, performd 2 Extractions for y r Cows. he Sent me 1 qt Spirit. at home. Wm Sleeps here. I have done hous wk & knit Some.

X. Birth mr Bradfords 3 Son. XX. Clear. I was Calld at 7 h Evng by mr Bradford to go and See his wife who is in Labour. Shee was Delivd at 10h 30m of her 3 d Son and 6th Child. I tarrie all night. Novr recd 3 [ October 5]. at mr Bradfords. Birth 7th. reced 3[ ] in [ ] June & July.
Clear and warm. I have done hous wk and mend d a pair Trousers & transplanted Some Beets, houghd Squash &C. mr Ballard Seems a little better. at [home]. [Funeral] Peter Voces Son.

Clear. Linda Getchel washt for me, washt Buttery Shelves, floor & kitchen. Sally Farewel took Tea with us. I have done Some work but feel very feeble. I wish to be grateful for all Gods mercies. Linda Sleeps here. at home, Some Easier. Sally Farewel Calld here.

Clear. Son Ephm here, had Currint Bushes, Rheubarb and other roots. Warrin Stones wife [&] Shubal WickSons Calld, had gardin Seeds. I have done hous work, dugg parsnips &C. Daniel Woodward paid me 1 Dol and 20 Cents. at home.
Clear part of y e day. I went to Son Jonas to See mrs Peirc bu t Shee was gone home, her Breas t Soare. at Son Jonas.
Clear. I have done my washing. Old Lady Stone here to Chang Some Eggs. at home, mrs Stone here.
rainy. I have been at home. mr David Sewal s here on busines s with mr Ballard. Son Lambard Sleeps here. at home. Son Lambd Sleeps here. [22]
Clear. mr Ballard gathering hopps. I have done my hous wk but have been very unwel. Lefaett began to git in Corn. at home, unwel. [26]
Clear and very warm. I have been doing many things in hous & Gardin. at [home].
Clear part of ye day. mr Williams Child interd y s aftern. at home. Funeral C. W. Child.

Clear. I left the Patient after breakfast free from pain but weak. I Calld at mr Thwings, receivd 1 Dollar in part of my Due; at mr Lues Hamlins, find his wife very Comfortable. did Some washing and went to Son Jonas. my Dagt Came home with me. at Ditoes & others. Churnd and washt Some at home. mr B. plantd potaloes.

Clear part of the day. I have planted Beens, Corn of y e purple kind & potatoes of Lukes kind in my gardin foren. my husband and I attend at the Meeting hous at 4h pm where y e remains of Genl Henry Sewal [wive] were lodgd till Revd mr Gillit [Delivd] a discoarse f m Heb s 12 Chap 11 vers. mr Cogswel made the Closeing prayer and the Funeral proceeded to the grave, and we returnd home at Sun Sett. at mr Thwings and at the Funeral of mrs s Sewal. Calld at Son Jonas.

X. Birth Martins 5th Dagt, 6th Child. XX. Clear. I was Calld 30 m after mid night by mr Martin of Hallowell to go and See his wife who is in Labour. I went, Shee was linguring litt 11h 30 m Am when Shee was Safe Deld of her 6 Child & 5th Daug t . I went from her to See her Mother who apears to be near y e Close of life. God grant her Change may be happy. I returnd home a t 10h Evng. I left my Patients very Comfortable. at mr Martin Hallowell & at Isaac Clearks. Birth 13. receivd 12/ as a reward.
raind the most of y e day. I have done Some mending. Son Lambard went to Son Jonas to Breakfas t , he Expected to return home this day. he Sett out from y e Settlement at 4 h pm. at home. [23]

Clear. I have gatherd Some apples in my Gardin, Pared, Cut & put out to Drie. Allin Lambd Calld in, he Came to Conduct a Genlleman to Hallowell. he receivd 3 Dols & _ for Shais & Jorney. he informs his Marm & Sarah are unwel. W m B. Came home from Viany, brot a Chees wd 7 lb, a Box Butter wd 7 lb & _. Allin & W m Sleep here. at home, very unwel. [27]
Clear & very warm. I washt &C. Sally Farewel & Sopha Balld Sleep here, Lefaett & Ephm allso. at [home]. Sally [Farew ] here.
Clear part of y e day. Jonas wife to See me after n . Hannah helpt me fore n . I am very unwel. W m and Sally Sleep here. at [home] unwel.
Clear foren, heavy Thunder & rain aftern. I have been picking my Black wool. at home.
