we had a Smart Shower, began at 9 h Am. I have done various kinds work. mr Ballard been to Hallowell, Came and went directly down to the Settlement. mrs s Ann & Mary Bond here for Sweet apples for their Sister Esther. at home. mrs s Bonds here.
Clear. I have workt in y e hous & gardin, we were alone this night. at home.
Clear. I have been very unwel. mrs Smith Calld in, Dagt Ballard also. at home, very unwel. [28]

Clear and very warm. I have a pain in my Side . had news that my Dear Dagt Pollard is Sick with a fever. may God be with her, restore her to helth if it be his blessed will. Sally & Sohpa went to Son Jonas after dinner. at [home], not [very] wel.
Clear, Some Snow, part of y e day. I have washt. Jon a Jun r Sleeps here. at home.
Clear and Cloudy by turns, Cold for may. I have done hous work & mended hoes & knit Some. Wilm Trask & Wm Ballard Sleep here. at [home].
Clear Excep t a Shower. Cyrus Sheard 5 of our Sheep. I have been at home. at home.
Clear and Cool. I have bakt brown and flower bread, boiled the last of our Pork and Some Greens for dinner. mrs Babcock Sent me 1 oz Snuff and had Seeds of me. at home, Sett Squash Plants.
Clear part of the day, a little rain aft n . I went to Son Jonas to See Elisabeth, Shee is unwel. Sally Pollard and P. Lambd Sleep here. I have Scolt my [bed stead]. at Son Jonas.
Cloudy. I have done my hous work and gatherd Beens, Sheld Some. [at home, we Staid alone y s ].
Clear. Rhoda & Hannah Pollard, H. Balld, James & Elisabath. Rhoda did Some washing for me. at home. Rhoda Pollard did Some washing for me. [29]
Clear & very warm. I have done my hous wk tho feeble. hear d Dagt Pollard is no better. at [home].
Clear. Sally Pollard & Dolly Lambard Came & Sleep here.
Clear and Cold. I was at mr Babcocks all day. Doct Cony Came to See the patient, ordered Senna to be given. I Sett up all night. mrs [ ] was very ill all night. at mr Babcoks.
Clear. I left patients Cleverly and reacht home at 11h 30m Am, feel fatagued. Son Jona and Edmond Warrin here. Son Epm 31 years old yesterday. at mr Shaws, fee recevd.

Son Ephm has removd the Barn on y e Farewel farm, is raising it by mr Bennets. mr Ballard went to make pins, had his thigh hurt. I have mended mr Ballards Small Cloaths and Drawers, Done hous work, wed gardin Some. mrs Bradford Sent me _ of a Dollr. at my Sons and others. a Negro woman hanged her[Self at] Hallowell. at home.

Clear. we found a nest with 13 Eggs, one was rottne. I made Cake. was Calld to Son Jonas, Elisa very unwel. we aplyed Turnip poltis to her bowels which gave relief Soon. mr Ballard been to y e meshene with wool, 4-2/1 lb. he was at Son Ep hms , their Babe is unwel. he had _ of a hund d flower which he left with Son Jona. at Son Jonas, the [Babe] very unwel.
Clear part of the day, Sun Shone very hott part of y e day. I gatherd Beens & Pees & Cookt, puld weads in my gardin. we Slaid alone y s night. at home.

Clear & very warm for the Season. Saml Pollard here, infmd me his Marm was unwel. I feel much better than I have done the past weak for which I Desire to bless the Great Author of mercies. at home, much more Comfortable than I have. [30]
Clear and warm I Sett out for Son Pollards at 10, arivd at noon. find my Dagt Sick with a feaver. Doct Hemingway & wife & Dtr [Sagarte] Calld, they Dind there. at Son Pollard, my Dagt [is] Sick.
Clear. we did not go to meeting. mr Ben n Petingail & wife Calld here, Hannah s Getchel, Ballard, Linda, Sally and mr Woods Dagt allso. Allin Lambd, Ep h & W m Ballard Sleep here. at home.

raind in y e foren till 10h when the Sun Shone, we had Showers aftern. Son Ephm Calld here, Said there was Preaching. a mr Channing from Boston, Text Ma tt 11 C 13-14. at home. Son Eph m Calld here, Sopha has y e Chic n Pox.

very warm for y e las t of September. Clear and very warm. [Presidint] Appleton preacht in this paraish but we did not hear of it till Evning. I have had to do Some work altho it is Sabath day. at home. Funeral Mag r Conys youngest Child. [1] [2] Clear and very warm. I have had a great deal to do, Cut and pard 7 squash for Drying and some apples. I killd 2 Chickins, Cookt one of them.
Clear part of the day. my Dagt is no better, y e Doct Calld to See her. at Dito .
Clear. H.B. & Betsy Peirc, A mrs Price, Becky Fletcher & 2 of mr Lankesters Dagts been here. I have been at home. at home, hear Dagt Pollard is Better.
Cloudy. I have washt Some & knit. Jon a Jun r Sleps here. at [home].
Cloudy. Sist Barton went to Son Jonas, mr Ballard & I there to Tea. Sist Slept here, Shee has seene 63 years this day. at Son Jonas.

Clear and Cold. mr Ballard went to mr Eadses, walkt there and home again. mrs Farewel left here at 1 h pm. Jon a Ballard & Jon a Porter here. Le faett and W m Sleep here. at home. mrs Farewel to Son Jonas.

Clear. Son & Dagt Pollard, Dagt Ballard and part of their Childn here. I am informd that mrs Morgin is dead. mr Ballard is So wel as to hough Some in his field. Saml Pollard & W m Ballard Sleep here. at [home]. Son and Dagt Pollard here.

Clear and very warm. I have gatherd Some mustard, Brewd and done hous wk. Sally Ballard here part of the dag. Linda & Shee Sleep here. Son Jona, his wife, James, Elisabeth & mrs Sally Farewel Sett out for Clinton, Wm allso. at home, Sett up all day & Labourd but feel full.

Clear & windy. I have done hous work, Cut potatoes for planting. A young [man] by the name of [Howa ] left Cap t Bastows hors here to be kept till he Calls here for him. at home. W m Sleeps here. Snowd in y e night.
Clear. mrs Gill Came here, Son Towns famely wel Except Polly. Shee informd me the widdo Haywood is Sick. at [home]. mrs Gill here.
Clear part of ye Day. I have done my ironing. Dagt Ballard, Sarah Mart a and James here. the boys mowd our grass in y e gardin yesterday, houghing Corn today. at home.
Clear. it is Thanksgiving day. my Childn Sent us in pies. W m Sleeps. at home. Asa Trask Sleeps here.
Clear and Cool. I Transplanted 36 Cucumber plants and did hous work. at home.

Cloudy and raind at Evng. I have done part of my washing and Sett Squash ptants. Son Jonas wife here to Tea, informd that Cap t Dany of Hallowell Hanged him Self this Morn. he Cutt his throat last weak. at home. Cap t Dany hanged himSelf ys morn.
Clear. I have felt but feeble this day but have done my hous work. mr Ballard did Surveying for M gr Livermore of Hallowell yesterday for which he receivd 1 D and _ do. at home.
Clear and cool. Sis t Barton Came from Son Pollards, informs my Dagt is Low yet. Sis t Sleeps here. mrs Black Expired at 8h Evng. at home. Sis t Barton Sleeps here. [12]
Clear. I have been at home. Sist Barton at Son Jonas takeing Care of Hannah Getchel. Shee Sleeps there. at [home]. [Buried H. Getchels infant].
Clear foren, A very heavy Shower aftern. Son Ephms wife Came to See me. I have with great pains mended a Shirt for my husband. at [home]. Son Ep ms wife here.
Clear. I have been picking refues wool. Dagt Ballard Sent us a Chees & 1 lb But r . at home, houghd my Cucumbers.
Clear. I have been very ill. Jonas folks Came to take Care of me. mr Ballard to Son Pollards. Linda & Sally Slept here. at home, Sick. [25]

Clear till near night, raind a t Evng. I have had threats of the Collic but have Sheld mustard, Cut up Some & done my hous work. Ephm hauld us wood. I was Calld by Capt Ruel Howard to go and See his wife at 9h 30m Evng. at Capt Ruel Howard.
Clear & Cool. Sis t B. did my wash. Son Jonas wife here to Tea. Moses Partredges Child Expired. at home. Death of a Child. [13]
Clear. I finisht my wash. Le faett Sleeps h r . at home.

Clear & more Spring like. I have done various kinds of work. Allin Lambard and Ep m Ballard Sleep here. Allin Says his Marm has had a turn of Cramp in her Stomach but is better. at home, Allin Sleeps here.
Clear. Cyrus went to Hallowell. I have Bakt flouer bread. at home.

Clear and pleast. I have wash t and made a Meal bagg &C. mr Ballard to Hollowel. mr Lad Paid him the last of the Tax debt. he bot 2 lb Candles, 2/1 d o Tea, 1 of Sugar, 3 oz of Snuff & a paper of ink powder. at home. mr Ballard to Hallowell.

Clear. I have done hous wk, made a pair pillow Cases. Son Cyrus Came here, Dind & went to Hallowell. my Husband returnd from Clinton, all wel there. Cyrus, S. Pollard & D. Lambd Sleep here. at home. mr Ballard returnd fm Clinton.
Clear. I have been very ill with pain in my left Side & a Collic. Dagt Ballard to See me. Linda & Sally here all night. at home, very unwel.

Clear and Cool. Son & Dagt Lambd Calld here from Son Pollards, Sett out for Clinton. Rhoda Pollard Calld in with them, Shee was going to Hallowell. I have gather d Beens, Sheld & Strung them, Cucumbers for pickels, dug potatoes which I Planted June 20th. Sist Barton and Rhoda Pollard Sleep here. at [home]. Son and Dagt Lambd Sett out for [home].

Clear. Sis t B. went to Son Pollard, he informs his wife is Easier. may we all render prais there for. Son Jonas Sons got in our Corn. at home. Funeral [mr] Partrdges Child. Deaths mrs Gillman & AlaZ Smyles wife. [14]
Clear. Sons Jona, Lambd & wives & part of their Child n & wido Pierce here. Patty went home with her aunt Lambd. our Swine Butcherd yesterdy, wd 200.

Clear and Pleasant. Son Jona Calld in here. Allin Sett out for home but Slept at Son Jonas. W m to meeting. mr Cogswel Discoarst from Jeremiah 17 C 9 th vers. Elijah Barton Sleeps here, informs me his Mother is much better than Shee has been. at [home]. Elijah Barton here.

X. Birth Lues Hamlins [3 d ] Son. XX. Clear. I was Calld at 7 h morn to See Luis Hamlins wife, found her Deliverd of a fine Son by the help of mrs Pratt and Shubal Pitses wife [ ]. I attended public worship aftern. mr Hamlin Conducted me home, gave me 6S. at mr Hamln s . Case 8th performd before I reacht there.

Clear and warm. Sally Pollard and D. Lambard took their leav of me and Expected to Sett out for Clinton before breakfast. Son Cyrus after for Rome. may they all arive at their homes in safty is my ardent wish. Hannah Pollard Calld here, took her liev of me, [Sett] out for home. may they all be blest and prosper through life. at [home]. [Hannahs] Ballard, Pollard & Betsy Wiman [ ].
raind & Thunder. Jonas Babe is very unwel yet. Doct Howard there to See her las t Evng, left directions and medicin. at home. Jona iunr Sleps here.
Clear. mr Ballard, Sis t Bt n & Rhoda dind at Son Jonas. Rhoda went home. at Son Jonas. Death of mr [Bar ].

rainy. mr Ballard & I attended Funeral of mrss Black. Son Jonas wife, Hannah & Wil m . mr Ballard walkt home. we were thrown out of the Shais by the hors blundering but got to Jonas alive for which we ought to ascribe prais to the Great auther of all our mercies. Son Ephm Conducted me home fm Jonas on his hors. at the Funeral of mrs s Black. Revd mr Slone made a find Prayer & Discoarse. [15]

Cloudy & misty. mrs Gill went to Son Jonas after breakfas t . I have been at home. Son Ephm informd us that a mr Goodin preacht in this parrish this day. Wil m Usher Expired y s morn in y e poore hous. Old mr Bullin at Hallowel at Evng. may we be allso ready. at home. mrs Gill left here. Son Epm here at Evng.
Clear. I have done various kinds work. at home. Son Town Sleeps here.
Cloudy part of the day. I ironed foren. was attackt with a Severe Collick pain, took Some weak Lee which gave Some relief. at home. we Staed alone. I was unwel.
raind. my Child Continues very ill. mrs Chambertin watcht with her. at Deto.
Clear. I have done Some washing but feel feeble. at home. [16]
Clear. I have been at home, Cut apples for Sauce. at home.
Cloudy. I have been doing hous wk. Ep m Sleeps here. at [home].

Cloudy. Sist washt her gound and one for me. Sally Farewel Came here, Dind with us. Sis t Barton went with her to go to Son Ephms. the Remains of mr Arnals Dagt interd this afternoon. at home. Funeral of mr Arnals Dagt.

X. [Birth Han h Getchels Son, & first born. XX.] Clear. I was Calld to Son Jonas to See Hannah Getchel who is in Labour. Shee was Safe Deld of a Son which had life but the Smallist I ever Saw alive. Shee Says W m Sands is the father. I Sett up all night, Polly Lankester with me. Sis t Barton went to Bed, got some Sleep. at Son Jonas. Birth 15th. Dagt Pollard Some Easier. receivd [9/] as rewd. [17]
Clear foren n . I have done my hous work but feel feeble. Le faell and Ephm houghd Corn here. at [home]. we were alone y s night.
Cloudy the most of the day, raind aftern. Sally B. Came and helpt me do my work, Shee performd very well. Linda & Ephm Sleep here. at [home], Sally [helpt] me.

Clear part of the day, Snowd & raind Some part of it. I tarried lill 4 h Pm at my Sons, left the Babe alive. Son Pollard been there, Says his wife is Some better. the infant Expired at 9h Evng. James Saunderses youngest Child Expired. at Detoes. Jona Came home. Son Lambds famely wel Except the Babe. Deaths.
Clear. Wm B. took Current Bushes. I have finisht makeing my Soap. at home.
Clear. mrs Gill left here, went to Sons Jona & Ephms. mrs Farewel here, Sleeps here. Cap t Bastow from Rochester here at Evng. at home. Cap t Bastow here.
Cloudy & Some rain. I have done various kinds work, went to Son Jonas to See his wife who is very unwel. mrs Gill & Sarah Came home with me, Sleep here. at Son Jonas.
Clear Part of the day. mr Ballart to Son Pollards. James Moore Came after me to go and See mrs Morgin. I did no t go. Hitty, Sally & Martha Sleep here. at home. Jona B. Junr here.
Clear. I have been very feeble y s day. Dagt Ballard Came to See aftern, Mart a , James & Elis a with her. at [home]. Dagt Ballard here.

Clear. Sist Came here, did Some washing for her Self. we went & Dind at my Sons. Shee Came and Slept here, Sally B. allso. Shee brot us 1 [quart] Spirrit, 2 lb Sugar, 2/1 lb Tea from Son Jonas. at Son Jonas.

Clear. I have done my hous work, killd Buggs on my vines. mr Ballard and I took Tea at Son Jonas, mrs s Pratt, her Dagt and Sabery Getchel allso. I desire to prais y e Doner for my [recovry]. at Son Jonas.
Clear. I have done Some mending, went to Son Jonas; doubled Cottne yarn &C. [Pianus] Pierce Sleeph here, he and Faett las t night. at Son Jonas.

X. Birth Capt Howard [2 nd ] Dagt. XX. Cloudy & some rain. mrs Howard was Safe Deld at 2h am of her 2 nd Dagt and 5th Child. I returnd home at 10h 30m am, receivd 1 Dolr. left mother and inft Cleverly. performd a Considerable work. I Sent by Ephm Bond, got 2 qts N E Spirit and 3_ lb Sugar. Dagt Ballard in here aft n . at Ditoes. Birth 14th. receivd 6 s , 28 recd 3 & a gift of 10 Candles.
Clear & Cool. I have been at home, did hous work. y e Boys got Some wood. Ephm got me 2 lb Sugar, 2/1 do Tea & 2 qts Spirit. mr Coal fel from his hors at [Jonas]. at home.
Clear part of the day, a liitle rain. I have Cookt String Beens & green Peas, been at home. my husband to Son Jonas. mr Allby took his Bierd off. Allin Lambd & Ephm Ballard Sleep here. at home.
Clear. I have been at home, mr Ballard allso. at home.
Clear fine day. Son Jonas wife, Sally, James & Elisabeth here. Son Lambd Sleeps here, his famely well. A mr Hudson died in Clinton. at home.
Clear & not very Cold. mr Ballard to meeting. Jona Junr here. I put poultis on a Bile he had on his Legg. Hannah & James Came in to See me, mr Alby & Lefaett allso. at home. Grand Childn here.
raind all day. I have felt very unwel but have done hous work and pickt Some wool. at [home], unwel.

Clear. I workt ou t doors Some, pickt Some wool. went to Son Jonas after 4h pm, find the Child inclind to Play Some. A Son of mr Saml Babcock there after Linda. her aunt hitty fell fm a hors, hurt her. at Son Jonas. Dagt Pollard is 41 yr old y s day.
Clear. I have been at home. Sist Bt n went to Son Ephms, wido Hayw d interd yesterdy. at home.
Cloudy. I have been pairing & Cuting apples to drie & for Sauce. Wm B. Sleeps here. Luke Barton took 1 bs l Apples for Son Ephm. at home. Luke B. here at Evng.
Cloudy & Snow. I have done hous work. Jona Junr Sleeps here. at home.

Clear and Cool air. Son Town left us after Breakfast. I have done hous wk. we had a Lamb killd. I Cookt the harslet for Dinner. the boys finisht houghing the Corn 2 nd time. Hannhs Ballard, Pollard, Lucy Lambd and Sally Balard took Tea with us, y e 3 first Sleep here. at home. 3 Grand Daugts Sleep here.

Clear the most of the day. Doct H. & Dct Howard Calld to See my Child, think there is hopes of recovery. Sis t Barton & Jonas wife Came to See my Dagt. I returnd home with Jonas wife. have had a pain in my Side all day. at Dito, have [ ] Severe pain [ ] my [Side].
Clear. mrs Farewel Sleeps here. Luke Barton informd of the Death of Old mrs Norris of Hallowell. at home. mrs Farewel Sleeps here. [31]
Clear and Cold. I have done hous wk & knit Some. Son Town went to Son Jonas to breakfast. we were alone this night. at home. Son Town Sett out for home.
Cloudy, raind in the night. I have been makeing Soap. Dagt Ballard here of an arrand. Betsy Wiman, H. Ballard, Linda Getchel & Betsy Pierce Calld in here. at home makeing Soap.
Clear. I have been Cuting Pumpk n to Drie & doing other matters. Cyrus Sleeps here. at home.

Cloudy & Some Snow. this is the anniversary of my Marriage, 56 years Since. Son Lambd, Barny and W m Ballad Sleep here. I have part made a gound, done Some washing [&] hemd a hand kerchief. at home. aneversary of my Marriage, 56 years Since.
Clear part of y e day, Cloudy Evng. I have done various kinds of work, been at home. Son Lambard & Le faett Sleep here. at home.
Cloudy. I have done various things, Sett Beets, houghd Squash. W m & Sarah Ballard Sleep here. at [home].
Clear. I have done my hous work and gathered Some mustard. Ep m & Sally Sleep here. a t home.
Clear. mrs Farewel left here. mr Ballard and I went to Lecter. mr Stone deliverd A discoars from Hebrews 13 C 1 st vers. we went to Son Ephms after meeting. at Lecter and at Son Ephms.
Cloudy & rain. I went to See Dagt B. & Ephm who were very unwel. mrs Gill here mending Cloaths for her uncle. at Detoes.
a very rainy day. I have done hous work and Stript fethers. at home.

Clear. I have Bakt, done hous wk, gatherd my Sage & Some Burnit &C. mr Ballard got 2/1 bus l Indien & Peck of rie meal. he went to Doct Coneys, he made a present of 1-2/1 oz Senna, Some Camphr & 12 pills for which I feel gratefull. the Bell Told for a Death y s aftern. at home. mrs Smith here. Death Old mr Crosby.
Clear. I havee done various kinds work. Sist B. went to Son Ephmes after breakfast. at [home].
Cloudy and misty. I was Calld to See mrss Morgin, find her very Sick. I tarried all night there, many in to See her. her Mother & mrs Moore with her. at mr Morgins. Funera l John Arnals Child.
Clear part of the day. I have had my hous work to do, feel but feeble. Ephm & wife to Son Pollards. at [home]. hear [Dagt] P. is very [Sick].

Cloudy and Some rain. I have done various kinds of wk. Allin Came here aftern, very unwel with A pain in his head. I put Burdocke to his feet, bathd his temples with Camphr. he Seems Easier. Ephm Came & Sleeps with him. mr Ballard been to Son Ephms, brot home 2/1 a hundred of flower which Capt Bastow of Rochester Sent us. at home. Allin here unwel. Son Ephm gave us 2/1 lb Tea.
Clear. I have been at home, Sheld mustard. at home.
Cloudy part of y e day. we had a Swine Butchered. I was Calld Wil m Son of Betsy Andrews who has burnt his hands. Epm & W m Sleep here. at mrs Andrews s , Wil m is Burnt.
Clear. I have done Some Washing. Jona iunr Slept here. at home.
Clear. Sis t Came here again. Cap t Nichols of OXford, his Dagt Moore of Gardiner & 3 Child n Calld here [I] & mr Delenos Dagt. at [home]. Funeral Flint Barlons Son and Sidney.

Cloudy. mr Ballard to the Selllement, Brot home _ lb Salt, _ gln Spirit, _ lb Tea, 2 lb Sugar, 1 lb Candles. the Tea, Sugar & Candles had of Son Ephm. Son Jona Calld here, all wel at Clinton. at [home]. Funeral of Old mr Bullin of Hallowell.
Clear & Cold. I have done hous work. Jona Sleeps here. at home.
Clear and prety Cold. I have done hous wk & knit. Ep m Sleeps here. at home, we Slaid alone y s [night].
Clear and Cool. I have had many things to do, feel feeble. hear that Dagt P. rested Some better last night. may we thank the auther of mercies. at [home].
Cloudy morn and night. I have done hous wk & knit. we were alone y s night. at home.
Cloudy & misty. I have been at home.
Clear and Cold. mrs Bradford here, Shee paid me 3 s /. I have Cutt the last of my Pumpkins to drie. at home. mrs Bradford here.

Clear & pleast for y e Season. I have done hous wk, done Some thing to my gound & knit Some. Son Lambd left here to attend Coart. Barne Came up, brot 1 qt Spirit & 2 oz Snuff which I Sint 30 Cents for. mr Ballard been to work a t Son Jonas on a Slead. at home. we Staid alone y s night.
Clear & Cold. Son Lambd went to Son Jonas to breakfast. at home, washt kitchen.

Clear. I have done my hous wk. mr Ballard & Allby Cleand the Barn to put Son Jonas whea t in. [Ranies] & Ephm Sleep here. Son Jona returnd from Clinton. A Saw mill which was part his was Burnt while he was there. at [home].
Clear and very Cold. I have felt very feeble but have done my hous wk & Some washing. Ep m bro t wood. at home, Wm & Sally Sleep here.
Clear. I have been at home. mrs Smith hr. at [home].
Cloudy. mrs Gill left here, W m Ballard Conducted her to Cap t Pitts s . at home. mrs Gill left here.

Clear and Cold. we attended worship. Revd mr Packard Spake fm 1 st Corin 10 C 16 th vers foren n and administ the Sacrement. he discoarst aftn fm 2 Thes 2 C 10 V . [Puel] Wilms s Child Baptised by the name of Polina Cona Nathan Westons. Daniel Savages hous Consumd by fire. at Meetiing & at Son Ephms. A hous Burnt.

Clear and very Pleast. I have felt very feeble. rose y s morn, felt faint & retired to my bed where I lay till near 11h am. the Child n fm Jonas Came in, Say their Marm is better. Jona Junr & Wm Sleep here [S]. at home. Jona B. from Clinton Says Son Lambd s famely are Wel.
Some rain y s morn. I heard Dagt P. is more Comfortable to day. I have Cut Pumpkins to Drie. at [home].

X. Birth Capt S. Pitss 3 d Sn. XX. Clear. Capt Shubal Pitts Calld me this morn Early to See his wife who was in Labour. Shee was Comforlable till 4h pm when her Labour Came on. her women were Calld & She was Safe [ oth] at 7 h 30m. at Capt Pitses. Birth 1st. receivd 12/ as a reward.
Clear part of the day, Cloudy Evn. I have Sifted our flower & Bakt, it makes fine bread indead. Allin & Ephm Sleep here. at home.
Clear. Son Ep ms wife & Dagt Lambd Dind here. I went to Son Jonas with them aftn. at Son Jonas.
raind the most of y e day. I have been takeing Care of my meat and doing other matters. Ephm Sleeps here. Son Lambd Calld & took Some apples y s morn, then Sett out for home. at home.
Cloudy & Cold with some Snow. I have done hous work & knit some. at home.
raind. Sis t Bt n went to Son Jonas. I have done various kinds of work at home.

X. Birth Ebenz Hovys 3 d Child & 2nd Dagt. XX. Cloudy. I was Calld by Ebenz Hovy Some time before day to go and See his wife in Labour. I went on beyond Son Jonas, mett Joel Savage on the Same arand. my Patient was Deld before noon & Isaac Savages wife Came fm mr Savage who was Deld by mrs Carter and Comfortable. I left my patient Cleverly and [relurnd] home at 3h 30m pm. I [Calld] to See mrs Bracket who is very feeble. at Ebenz Hovys. Birth 16th. receivd 9/ as a reward. Joel Savage s Dagt Born at Son Jonas near night.
Clear part of the day, Snowd a t Evng. Hannah & Le faett dind here. Jona & Wm Slept. at home, Hannah here.
Cloudy & Some Snow. I have done hous wk, Sewd some. W m & Sally Sleep here. more moderate. at home.

Clear and Cold. I was Calld at 10h am to Son Jonus to See Hannah Getchel who is very unwel. Doct Ellis was to See her at Evng, thinks her in danger of having a Seated fever, left Jullop and Salts tarter. at Son Jonas. Han h Getchel is unwel there.
Clear part of ye day, Snowd in the night. I finisht my husbands mitts. Lef t Sleps here, Ep h las t ni t . I Bakt. at home.
Cloudy & Cold, Snowd before night. I have done hous wk, pared apples &C. at home.
Snowd. Son Jonas 4 youngest Childn here, dind with us. I have workt on my gound and under coats. Wm & Sally Sleep here. at home.
Cloudy, raind aftern & Evng. I have Twisted yarn, knit & ironed. mr Ballard let mr Farnhams have 4 Sheep for to have 1 lb wool a year for Each Sheep as rent. at home.
Cloudy the most of the day. I have Bakt flour & brown bread, gatherd mustard &C. we were alone y s night. at [home]. Son [Lambds] Birthday.
Clear & not So cold. mr Orrock here on busines. W m B. brot me 3 pints from John Pierce. at home.
Clear. I went from Son Towns to Son Lambds, Patty Town with me. Son & Dt L. went home with her. from Son [Towns] to Lambds.
Clear. mrs Bond Expired at 8h am, aged 53. mr Dean Wiman & wido Lucy Pierce were Joind in Mariage this Evng at Son Jonas. a t home. Death mrs Bond. Mariage mr Wiman to mrs Pierce.
Cloudy & raind hard at Evng. I have done hous work &C. we are alone y s night. I did part of my washing. it raind and y e wint blew in y e night. at home.
Clear and very Cold. I have mended Cloaths for my husband. he got in Some potatoes, La faett helpt him. at [home].

Clear Pleast morn. I tarried at Capt Pits s till near night when I arivd at home. took Care of my afairs &C. Sally Sleeps here. mrs North, Page & Carter were at Cap t Pits s in y e Coars of y e day. at Ditoes.
Clear. I have been at home till Evn, was Calld to Robd Kenedas at 10h Ev. Dagt Ballard & Lambd Sleep here.
Clear the most of the day. the boys hauld us Some wood. at home.
Cloudy the most of y e day. I have been Coulering woolin Cloath & knit on Ep ms mitin. he & Wm Sleep here. it began to Snow at 10h Evng, was but little fell. at home.
[Clear]. I have been at home. Sis t Barton was at Son Jonas. Eph & Wiln Sleep here. at home.
Clear & Cold. I have done hous wk, knit & twisted hoes yarn. Ep & Wm Sleep here. at home.
Cloudy with Some Snow. I have done hous wk, Sew d Some & knit at Evng. Lefaett went to mill for us with 1 bs hl wheat, 2/ D o indien. Ephm brot us wood. Sally Sleeps here. at home.
Cloudy part of y e day, Snowd at night. Hannah Getchel is much better. I have done hs wk & knit. I finisht my Cottne hoes and began a mit for mr Balld. Epm & Wm Sleep here. at home, feel unwel.
Cloudy the most of y e day. Sally Ballard Sleeps here, her Marm Sent my me Some Cheese. I washt & washt kitchin & bed room. at home.
Cloudy. mrs Gill & I to mr Herrins, his wife is unwel. at mr Herrins.

Clear and Cool. my Dagt is as wel as Can be Expected. mrs Gill, her Sons, Luke & Harnon left Son Lambds, went to a farm belonging to mr Rice. I wish them prosperity. Hannah Getchel and Sally Ballard Came there at 11h Evng. they drove a Carriage fm the kenebeck bridg after 2h pm. at [Ditoes]. H. [Getchel] Came in the night.
Snowed & very Cold. Son Ephms Son is 1 year old this day. at home.
Snowd, raind & haild. I finisht makeing my Gound & 1 underCoat &C. Wm & Sally Sleep here, Shee brot me 14 oz Butter. at home.
Clear Part of the day. I have have done hous work, mended mits and finisht kniting mr Ballards garters. I Sent Dagt Lambard 2/1 lb apples by Son Jona. at home. Ep m brot Some wood, he Slept here.
Clear. I am here yet. mrs Emry Came to See us. Son Jona arivd with his Stores. Hannah is to keep hous for him a while. at Ditoes.
Clear. we were at home. Dagt Lambd Came at Evng. Jona & wife & part of y r Child n been here. at [home]. Dagt Lambds Birthday.
Clear till Evng. we have not been to meeting. we were alone y s night. at home.
Clear part of the day. mr Wiman & Son Ephm here at Evng. my Son made us a present of 12 lb fresh Beef. at home. Son Epm here, gave us Beef; his wife to Jonas.
Clear and pleast. Son & Dagt L. to Fairfield. a t Son Lambds.

Clear and pleast foren. I left Son Lambds at 10 h am, Sally Came with me in the Carriage they wrode up in. we Calld at mr Capins to rest the hors, reacht Son Jonas before dark. we took Tea and Came home. I feel fatagued. Allin Came home with me. I went to See mrs Philbk and Set out for home.
Clear part of y e day, raind in the night. Son Ephm here after meeting. Jonas wife and part of the Childn Dind here. died, W. W. kindrick in this Town, aged 14 years. at home. Eph m here. Death.
Clear and very pleast. I went to Capt Shubal Pitts s , spent the night there. at Capt Pitts s .
Clear & pleast. Allin Lambd here, Says his fathers Famely are Cleverly. Harnon Barton with him, his Marm & famely are all wel. at home, Bakt. Allin here.
Cloudy & rain, Cleard of in y e night. we were alone y s night. I was informd that a mrs Shaw in the Settlement was Delvd of 2 Babs Still born, 3 Docts with her. at home.
Clear and Cold. I have done hous wk. a t [home].
Clear. I have been at home, fell and brused my face. at home.
Clear. I was at Kenedies till 9h Evn, Came home and had a fine Sleep. Wm Ballard Sleeps here. Dagt Poll d went home. at Kenedies [ ] dt Lambd [ ].

Son Ephm Sent a hors & Shais for his Father & me to go to his hous. my husband Stopt to meeting & to the funeral of mr Livermores Child. we Dind at my Sons & Supt. Leut Heartwel & wife Spent Evng there. at Son Ephms, Funeral mr Levermors Child.

Clear and Pleast. I have done hous wk, knit &C. Jona Junr hauld Some wood, he Sleeps here. Le faett Thrasing wheat he brot us in 2/1 bushl. mr Lankester Sent my Cloath Shoes which he made, price 6/. I found Cloath, have let him 1 and 2/1 bs l apples A 4/ pr bl. at home
Clear. Sis t Barton & I went to Son Jonas, mr Ballard took Tea there. at Son Jonas.
Clear part of the day. I have bakt Some pies and done other matters. at home.
Cold. Dagts Ballard & Pollard, Ep m and wife & Theodore here. mrs Pollard & Martha Sleep here. at home.
Cloudy, Snowd Some, misty aft. mr Balld to Jonas to mend a Sled. at home, we Staid alone.
Clear & Cold. I have done hs wk. at home.

Bth mr Philbrooks 4th Son. Cloudy, raind at night. I was Calld to See mrs Philbrook who was in labour. Shee was Deld at 5h 30m pm of her 4th Son & 7th Child. I left her very Comfortable. at mr Philbrooks. Birth 3 d . recvd 1/6 d .
Snowd, windy & Cold. at home.

Cloudy, Some Snow. Son Jona Sent for mr Ballard & I to his hous to Sup. Son Ep m & wife & Sopha Came after we left home, found us gone; Came to Jonas & Spent the Evng. at Son Jonas. Ephm, his wife and Dagt Came there.
Clear & pleast. Son Jona Sleeps at Son Lambds. high 25 2 wind & rain at night with thunder. at Son Lambds.

Clear. mr Ballard to meeting all day. I went aftern, wrode with mr Church Williams from his house. Calld of mr Carters aft meeting, took Tea. mr W ms Conducted me home in his Shais from his house. Hannah Glidon & Sally Balld Sleep here. I went to Son Jonas for our milk. he and Han h Getchel Came from Clinton, they are well there. at meeting, Text John.

Clear part of y e day. I have finisht makeing my petecoat, made two aprons of an old one. Sopha Lankester brot Some pork which Shee borrowed. Ma ta Balld here. at home. the boys found 5 of our Sheep [part of them].
Clear. Son Jona, his wife, widdo Pierce, James and Son Town here at Evng. the Latter Sleeps here, his famely are wel as usual. at home. Son Town Sleeps here.
Clear. Son Town Conducted my husband from his hous to Son Lambds. at ditoes, husband Came.
raind foren. Jud g Cony Calld in to See us. Dagt Ballard & Childn here aftern. I feel fatagued with my Journey. at home. Jud g Cony here, Dg t Ballard allso.

raind in the morn, Clear the most of y e day. Son Jona, his wife, James & Elisa Dind here. mrs Carter Calld in aflern. A mr Greanlief Calld here, took Breakfas t , Says he was Cast away a t Sea not long since, his home at 7 mile brook. Sally & Martha Sleep here. at home. Part of my Child n Dind here.
Clear. Sister Btn, mrs Farewel & I to vasit mr Wiman, find them wel. at Ditoes & mr Wimans.

Clear & pleast. Sist Barton and I went to See Old mrs Mosier and attended prayers at mr Bonds, his wives remains were interd at Evng. Sist & I Calld to See mrss Young & Thwing. I Came from Capt P s at dusk, wrode home with Hannahs Gelchel & Ballard. at mr Mosiers & others. Funeral of mrs Bond.
Clear. I have done my hous work. at home.
Clear. I have finisht my washing. Hannah Getchel Came in, paid me for attending her in Child Birth. at home.

Clear morn, thunder & rain aftern & Evng. mrs Carter here, had gardin Seeds of various kinds. Shee brot me 11 oz Chees. Allin Lambd, Ep m & Sally Ballard Sleep here. at home. Allin L. & Ep m B. & Sally Sleep here.
Clear & not so Cold. sis t Barton left here to go to [her] Sons. at [home. Sist [Barton] left [here].
Clear. I did my washing & ironed my Cloaths, feel very unwel a t night. La faett Sleeps here. at home, washt & ironed.
Cloudy & rain. mr Ballard Came home. I tarried all night. at Detos.
Clear part of y e day. I took my Cloath out of the die & dried it, did hous work and finisht Ephms mits which I began wedensday Evng. Jona Sleeps here. at home, Jona Sleeps here.

Clear day, Cloudy Evng. I have done various kinds of work, feel weary. mr Ballard to Cumings s mill & to Son Ephms. Carried them 1 Bush l Apples. my Dagt Sent me 4 Candles. at home. mrs Farewel and Sist Barlon Sleep here.
Clear & Cold. I was Calld a t 1 h 10m y s morn to go to See the wife of mr Ab m Devenport. Shee Lingured thro y e night & her women wint home. it Snowd in ye night. at mr Devenports.

Cloudy. we went to Son Jonas, Dind there. Dagt Pollard went home, Hannah Ballard with them. Son Lambd Came here afler we were in bed, he was very Sick in the night. I rose & tended him. at Son Jonas. Son Lambd Slept here.
rainy. mrs Farewel & Sist went to See Patridges Child, find it very Sick. at home, Dito [Sleep] here.

XXX. Birth Ab m Devenports 2 nd dagt & 5th Child. XXX. Clear & Cold. mrs D. had her women Calld in ys morn and was Deld of a Daugt, her Second, & 5th Child at 5h 20 m and is as Comfortable as Can be Expected. I was Conducted home about noon by her husband. I receivd 5 lb Candles & 1 Dolr. at Abm Devenports Birth. Birth 18th. recd 12/ for Service. Funeral infant Livermors.
Cloudy & misty or Foggy all day. we were at home alone all night. at home.
Clear, Cold yet. I have pard & Cutt apples for Sauce &C. I mended a Shirt for Cyrus. at home.
Clear part of the day, Snowd part. Allin Lambd Came here, infms that William is very Sick yet. he & Ep m Bald Sleep here. at home, the Boys brot wood.
Clear. I am a t Son Lambds Carding Cottne. at Ditoes.

Clear. I have workt in gardin and done hous wk. Son Ephms wife here, informs me A young man who livs with them was hurt at work in their gardin. Shee mended her Fathers Coat. we Staid alone y s night. at home. Son Ep ms wife here.

Cloudy & Some rain. I have workt in y e gardin, Sett french Turnips & Done other matters, feel fatagued. mr Ballard backt wood & workt in y e gardin. H. Ballard & Lucy Smith here for greens. mrs Smith took Tea with us, Shee brot me 2 knots thread. at home. mrs Smith here.

Cloudy morn, Clear Middle of y s day. A thunder Shour & heavy wind aftern. I have Sett Cucumber plants & F. lurnips, Churnd & made a Chees. mr Ballard houghing. Ep m 3 d here. all wel at Ctinton. at home. A Thunder shour. I Churnd 3-2/1 lb Butter.
Clear foren n , a squall of snow and high wind after n & Evng. I have washt 4 Shirts for mr Ballard & 3 for my Self and other things. at home.
Clear. we were at. Ditoes.
Clear part of the day. mrs Smith Supt here. at home.

Clear part of y e day, Some rain at night. mrs Farewel & Sophia Ballard Sleep here Han h , Mar ta & Elisabeth here aftern. I have done houn wk & mended Cloaths. at home. mrs Farewel, Sophia Sleep here.

Cloudy, raind at night. I left Son Epms after breakfast, Calld at mr Robinsons, mr Orocks, Capt Pitts s , mr Pipers, mr Mosiers, mrs Andrus s , Smiths, Moodys & Son Jonas; reacht home before night. at Ditoes & other Neighbors.

Clear. mr Ballard to Church meeting. Son Cyrus to See the Coart Opened, returnd here & Sett out for Rhome about 3h pm. may God Bless him in all his lawful under takeings is the wish of his aged Mother. I have done ironing, washing & other matters but feel very feeble. may God Support me. at home. Son Cyrus Sett out for Rome at 3h pm.
Clear and Cold. Son Jona & W m Sett out for Clinton. I have been at home. at home.
Cloudy foren, Clear aftern. Sister Barton Came here. I was Calld at 10 h Evn to mr Pipers, his wife in Labour. Childn Sleep here. at home till 10h Evng. Sist Barton here.
Clear the most of y e day, Cloudy Evng. I have done hous wk & ironing. at home.
raind all day. I Planted Cucumbers, Scrapt mors of 5 apple trees in my gardin, Churnd 1 lb _ Butter. Allin, Ep m , Sally & Martha Sleep here. at home. Allin, Ep m , Sally & Martha Sleep here.
Clear & very Pleast. I have been ["at home" - implied]. Ephm Calld at L. Hamlins, got me 5 oz Snuff for 1 qt mustard. at [home]. mr [Lan ] Sent [me] 2 lb [pork].
Clear. Allin Lambd Came here, wants me to go home with him. Says that W m is mending. at home.
rain & Sunshine by turns. I have don hous work & mended hoes. Sis t B. here y s day. at home. Sist Barton here.
Clear. W m B. Came to Son Ephms to Conduct me home. I Calld at mr Thwings, his wife is Some unwel, Lamb in her right Sholder. Shee let me have 6 Candles. at Ditos & at mr Thwings.

Clear & Cool. I was Calld by Shubal Wickson Junr to go & See his wife who is in Labour. her women were Calld at Evng. Shee lingured thro the night. we Slept none. at Wicksons. receivd 1 s [ ] [at] mrs Bradford.

X. Birth Shubal Wicksons Dagt. XX. Clear & Cold. mrs Wickson was Delivd at 9h am of a Daught, her first Child. the women retired and I dres t the Babe and left them as wel as Could be Expected. arivd home at 12/OClock, found work to do. at Ditoes. Birth 17th. receivd 6/25 Cent august30, 1811.
Cloudy. I have been at home, feel unwel. Son Lambd Sett out for home but he feels very unwel. Epm & W m Sleep here. at home.
Cloudy part of y e day. Sist went to [Viany]. mrs Farewel home. I have Done too much wk, knit Some at Evng. at home. Rhoda [ ] [B] to [Clinton].
Clear part of y e day. I have Bakt pies, knit & other wk. [Keziat] & Sally Sleep here this night. Epm & Jason Peirce last ni t . at home. y e [boys] got [Some] wood.
foggy, the Snow wastes fast. I have done hous wk & knit. at home, we are alone.
Clear & warm. I have Bakt, Churnd & workt in my gardin. Jona B. Junr Came from Clinton, al well there. at home.
Clear. Cyrus returnd from Clinton, all wel as usual. I have done hous work. Ranus Pierce & Ep m B. Sleep here. at home.
Clear & Cold. Allin & Ephm brot Some wood here, they Sleep here. I mended mr Ballds Coat. at home.
Cloudy. I was to See mrs Philbk, Shee is not so wel as we Could wish. her Son Pitts is Sick & her Nurs is lambe. a t mr Philbks.

Cloudy, raind aftern. I have gatherd up fuel in the Lane and Swep t Chambers & other work. Wil m & Sally Sleep here. Becky Fletcher left Son Jonas & went to mr Bennets. mr Ballard burnt bushes wes t y e house. at home.
Clear part of y e day. Wil m B. went to y e Settlement, Bot me 1 bus l Corn 7/6, [_] pint ginn. to mr Hodges, he Sent me 2/1 lb Tea which was my due. at home.
Clear part of y e day. I have washt. Son Jonas wife, Hannah and Elisabeth here foren. at home. Son Jonas wife here.
Snowd. we are at. Ditoes.
Clear part of y e day. Georg Bolton & another man dind here. I have Brewd, removd Banking & done other matters. at home.
Clear. mrs Farewel & Sophia wen t from here after breakfast. I have done hous work, Sorted Beens for planting &C. the remains of Kendrick were interd aftern. a t home. mrs Farewel left here. Funeral.

Clear. I have done hous wk & planted musk millons & Beens which mrs Pitts gave me. W m B. been to the Settlement. Sold 4 dus n Eggs A /9 - 50 Cents. got me 7 lb flour & 1 Sheet Ginger bread, he got me 1 qt Spirit on his fathers acount. at home. W m Sleeps here.
Clear. I have been very unwel but walkt to See Hannah Ballard aftern, feel Some better. made Tea & partook with my husb d . at Son Jonas.
Clear & very Cold. I have finisht footing my husbands hoes & a pair Mits for W m . Dg t Balld here. at home.

X. Birth mr Pipers 3 d Dagt. XX. Clear. mrs Piper was Safe Deld at 4 h am of her 3 d dagt. I receivd 1 q t sp t , 1 lb Candles, _ lb Sugar. I arivd at home Early. there was a fire raged to y e Eas t of here but fortunately it was Stopt. at mr Pipers. Birth 5th. fee receivd, 12/.
Clear and Cooler. I have washt my [North roome], paird & Cutt apples to drie &C. the Boys hauld us Some wood. at home.

Clear & Cool. I went to Son Jonas Early y s morn, he, his wife, Ep m , Martha, James & Elisabeth took their departure for Clinton about 11h am, Allin with them. may God prosper them in every lawful under takeing is the wish of me their aged mother. at Son Jonas. he removed part of his famely to Clinton.
Clear. I have done hous work but feel not So wel as I Could wish. at home.
Clear & pleast. two of mr Burdens Sons, Lefaette & Ephm finisht giting our Potatoes from y e field. I have Bakt, ironed & other matters. at [home].
Clear part of y e day. Allin Calld on me, wisht me to go home with him tomorrow. at home.

Clear. I have bakt & Brewd, feel much fatagued. Son Jona was put in iaill for debt, an unfortunate thing for him at this time as the freshet is risin and his Lumber up river in A precarious Situation. may all things work together for his good here, or here after, is the wish of me, his affectionate mother. at home. [seins] of troubles took place.
Cloudy morn, Snowd before n. I Sett out with Allin for Clinton at 11h am, reacht Son Lambds abou t Sun Sett, find W m very ill. to Son Lambds.
Clear part of y e day. Sis t Barton, Dagt Ballard, Elisa, mrs Smith & Charlotte took Tea here. Luke Barton Calld in at Evng. at home, friends here.
Clear. we did not go to meeting. Son Ep m & Ezra Town Came here. Ezra Sleeps here. Lefaett & Hannah went to Clinton. at [home]. Ezra Town Sleeps here.
Clear and warn. I am very Lambe with my toe. Son Jona Sleeps here, his famely at Clinton are wel. this is the anneversary of Son Lambards Birth. at home, Son Jona Slept here.
Snowd. I have felt very feeble, have done my hous wk & knit Some. my husband brot wood on his Sholders for y e fire. at home. Sally Sleeps here.

Clear fine day. Sister Barton left here at 10 h am to go to the Settlement. I have done hous wk, Churnd 1 lb Butter, houghd in y e gardin, Cut Grass with a knife between y e hous & pigg pen & mended a Shirt for my husband. at home. Sist B. was at [Partridg ].

Clear and warm. I have bakt, Brewd and done other matters. mr Balld gone to Parrish meeting. Son Lambard went home from Jail. Le faell & Allin Lambd Sleep here. at home. Son Lambd left Jail, his wives Birthday.
Clear. Son Lambard, Barna, Luke Barton & Wm Ballard Sleep here. Son Ephm here at Evng. Son Lamb gave us [ ] fish. at home, friends here.
foggy, Some hail in y e Evng. I have done hous wk & knit. am informd mr Dean Wiman & wido Pierce are Published. Lf Sleep here. at home, hear Wm Lambd is Sick.
Clear & warm. I have done hous work & Some in the gardin. I went to Jonas to inform their OXen were in y e wheat. at Son Jonas.

Clear & warm. Jona Junr took Breakfast here. I have made a Chees & wk t in gardin yet. Jona Junr Sett out for Clinton aftern. Son Lambard is in Jail for debt allso. may the wise Disposer of all things point Some way for their releas. I went to Son Jonas, he is in [Jail].

Birth Moses Patridges 2nd Son & 5th Child. Clear. I have workt hard in the hous & Gardin. Barny Lambd & W m Ballard Sleep here. Dagt Lambd Came in the Stage, Slep t at mr Dilinghams. Moses Patridg Calld me to See his wife in Labour at 10h Evng. Shee was Safe Deld at 11h 30 m Same Evng. I returnd home abou t 2h morn, her Child was a Son, y e Second male; Shee has had 3 Daugts. mr P. had been after 3 Docters, Could not obtain neither of them before he Calld me. at Moses Patridges s . Birth 11th. Ihave recd 3 [p ] Spirit.
Clear and very warm. I have done hous work. Lefaett Thrashed Wheat, brot in Some for us. at home.
Clear. Cyrus went to visit Son Ephm, he Sleeps here. I have done Some washing & Bakt Pumkin & Apple pies. I had a web of Ctoth for Shirts brot from Son Pollards. at home.
Cloudy, Snowd before night. Allin Sett out for home. I gave him Some Apples to Carrie to his marm. I have Starcht & ironed Cloaths. at home. Allin Set out home. EbenZ Learned & Polly Town Sleep here.
Cloudy. I was at Ditoes, Shee is better. Son Jona Came to Son L s in the night. at Ditoes
rainy. I have been makeing a Short gound & doing hous work. Hannahs Getchel and H. Ballard here on a vasit. mr Ballard planted Cucumbers & Beens. at home. we were alone y s night.

Clear, the air Cool. I have done hous work. mr Ballard went to mr Oroks, bot 2/1 lbsl rie A 7/ pr bus l , 3/6 with Eggs. he got Some Crackers & ginger bread. Lefaett Planted potatoes South of our gardin. at home. Le faett planting potatoes South of our gardin.
Clear. [Son] wife & mrs Lankester here. my husband & I went there & took Tea. at Son Jonas. mrs Lankestr & Shee here.
Clear & very hott. Hannah & Elisa Ballard & Hitty Peirce Dind here. mr Ballard to y e Settlement, bot 2 qts Spirit. Son Jonas Cows took down & Sold but Sen t home. at home.
Clear & very warm. I have done various kinds of work. at home.

X. Birth mrs Newalls Son. XX. Clear. I was Calld to Winslow to see mrs Newall. Shee was Deld at 4 h am of a Son which wd 11 & 2/1 lb. I tarried with her till after Tea, receivd 9/. at mrs Newals. Birth 2 nt . recd 9.
Clear & Cool. it is Fast day bu t no meeting at our meeting hous. at home.

Clear & Cool. I have removd my Bed into the bedroome, Sorted Beens but feel feeble. mr Ballard mended the kitchen Chimney & harth yesterday, the oven this day. Jonas Men plowing our field this day. at home.
Clear & Cool, a frost y s morn. I have washt & planted potatoes & Corn in y e gardin. at home.

X. Birth Winsl Burdins Dagt by Fanny Hodges out of Wedlock. XX. Clear morn, raind & Thundered before night. I was Calld Early y s morn to mr Hodges to see his Dagt Fanny who was in Labour & was Safe Delivered of a Dagt, her first born, which Shee in the Severety of her illness Dectared Winslow Burden was the Falher of. I tarried till 4 h pm then left them Comfortable. Came to Cap t Pittss, went in at mr Thwings, Came back to y e Capts & tarried all night. at Ezra Hodges. Birth 7th. recvd 6/, 12-2/1 lb Tea.
Clear & very warm. I have done A Considarable larg washing. mr Ballard houghd his potatoes North ye house. at home. independance.
Clear & warm. I have done work in the hous & gardin &C. at home.
Clear & very Cold. I have dome Some washing and Sewing. this is the 3 d night y t Hannah & Mart a have Slept here. at home.
Clear. Sister & I went to Jonas, mr Ballard allso. Jonas wife took Tea with us yesterday. at Son Jonas.
Clear & very warm. Dagt Ballard, her Dagts, Hannah, Elisa & Betsy Wiman here to Tea. at home, Company here.
Clear. I have workt in hous & gardin, washt &C. Hannah & Martha here to Tea. H Came from Clinton this morn, all well there. at home.
Clear fore n, Cloudy before night. I have Sett up a Leatch & run Some Lee, Cleand the hen roost, Sow d peas & made a Chees. at home.
Clear & very warm. I have Brewd & made a Chees. Hannah & Hitty Calld in, they have been gathering rasburies. at home.

Clear. I have done hous wk, washt my kitchen. Warrin Stones wife Came and gathered our Cherries which were in the gardin, 22 quarts. Shee is to have half, he Sold them for 6 cents pr qt. at home. Luke B. & Jona junr Sleep here.
Clear. I have Bakt & made a Chees. Georg Andrews Reaping our wheat, he found 18 Eggs in y e field. he informd us of y e Death of Wilm Suell. at home. Death. [18]
Clear the most of the day. I have bakt & done many other work. at home.
Cloudy most of the day. James Purington Dind with us, Says his grand marm & Fathers famely are well. at home.
Clear and not So warm. I went to Son Jonas. Luke Barton & Theodore Ballard here. Dagt B. & Elisa Came home with me. Wm brot our milk and Sleeps here. at Son Jonas. Son [ ] Cald in there.
Clear. I have been at home. mrs Smith here & a number of others. Luke & Jona took Breakfas t here. at home.
Clear the most of the day, A Thunder Shower in y e aftern. Luke Barton & Theodore Ballard here, dind with us. at home. Luke & Theodore here.

Clear. I have been So unwel that Hannah B. & Martha Came, got breakfast & took Care of me. H. Gliddon here the rest of y e day & night, Ab m Field allso. Son Epm and his Dagt Calld in to See me. at home, very unwel, there was no preaching at y e meeting hous.

Clear. I have felt more Comfortable. Hannah Pollard went to Son Jonas after breakfast. Son Lambd dind, he gave me a quarter of a Dol r . mr Livermore & wife here, Son Epm also. Epm & young Trask Came with y e milk after I was in bed. I rose & Straind it, they Sleep here. at home. Sons Lambd & Ep m here, mr Livermr & wife allso. Dagt Ballard & 2 youngest Childn Came down fm Clintn, Sleep here.
Snowd. Son L. went to Fairfield. W m Easier. at Ditoes.

Clear. Ezra left here after Breakfast to attend Coart, he is Foreman of the Jury. Son Cyrus Calld here after Sun Sett, tarried a fue muniets and went on for home. he informd me that a Child of A mr Bean died with the hooping Cough. at home. Ezra left here. Son Cyrus Calld here, told of a Death.
Clear. Rhoda Pollard & Han h Ballard Slept here. I have been at home, did h s wk & Sewing. at home.
Clear. I have had a Shocking ague fit & feaver. H. P. washt again y s day & washt kitchen & tended on me, is Churning allso. I feel revivd at 4h Pm. at home, had a feaver fitt.
Clear, a hard frost last night. Dagt Pollard is with me. Jonas wife in foren. they hav a husking. at home. Son Jona is in Jail again. [2]
Cloudy, Thunder & rain aftern. I have done hous work & Some in the gardin, have made mellolott Ointmen t for my Self and Son Jonas wife. at home.
Clear. I have Bakt & Done other work. mr Ballard been to the Settlement, b t 2 lb Sugar, Cost 30 Cents.
Clear. I have had a Collic pain, took Senna, had a very Sick night. mr Field Sleps here. Son Cyrus has Seen 54 years this day. [at home, unwel. Cyrus s Birthday.]

Clear and Cool. Dagt Pollard tarried here till after noon & went Jonas. mrs Ballard & Shee Came in before night and D t P. Sett ouf for home. I have felt Some better for which I wish to have A greatful Sence. at home, feel more Comfortable thro Gods Goodnes. Dagt P. wen t home. [3]
Cloudy. Cyrus left here for Rhome. mrs Gill & Child came, Shee began to make my husband a Shirt. it is [11] years Since the death of d gt Town. at home.

Clear & Cold. mr Learned & Polly left here at 11 h am. mr Orock, Esqr Titcomb & Weston Came to take mr Ballards Deposition Concerning his Survey of Land. James Pitts here. Wilm sleeps here. at home, Company here.
Clear. I was at Detoes, his Son very Sick. Nurs lambe. at ditoes.
raind till 11h am when it Cleard of. I have Churnd & made a Chees. mr Ballard went to See the vessel Launched, it Started but Slopt & did not go off. W m Sleeps here. at home, W m Sleeps here.

X. Birth mr Oroks 2nd Dagt by this wife. XX. Clear & pleast. I was Calld at the riseing of the Sun by mr Orok to See his wife who was in Labour. Shee was Safe Deld at 8h 30m of a Daugh t , her Second by him. I tarried till 5 h pm & he Conducted me to Son Jonas. I walkt fm there home, find mr Ballard not So wel as I Could wish. I took Care of my piggs, fouls & Sett Squash plants. at mr Oroks. Birth 9th. recd two Dollars reward.
Clear. I have Sett F. Turnips. mr Hallowway mend puter for me. I paid him 28 Cents. Dagt Ballard & her Sister Babcock Dind here. at home, friends here.
Clear. Hannah & Dolly Pollard Came to help me. I feel very feeble but thro Gods Goodnes free from pain. at home. H. & Dolly Pollard Came here. [4]
Clear. my husband, Self, Son & D t Lambd & mrs Gill to vasit John Emery. at mr Emerys.
Clear & Cold. I have washt, feel feeble. at home.
Clear and not so Cold. I have done some washing, Churnd & made a Chees, Sorted beens &C. at home.

X. Birth Lefaett Rowels Dagt. XX. Clear & Cool. I was Calld to mr Rowels, his wife in Labour. I reacht there at 11 h am. the Patient Deld of a dagt, her first born at 1 h pm. I left her & inft as wel as Could be Expected & returnd home about 4. I Bakt after I Came home, recd 1 Do lr . at mr Rowels. Birth 6th. recd 6/ in part, July9th paid 6/ in full.

Clear. I went fm y e Cap ts to mr Hodges, he Conducted me home before 9h am. I find much wk to do, Churnd 2_ lb. mrs Hall & mrs s Burden to See me. mr Ballard planting potatoes in y e field. at Ditoes & Capt Pitts s . mrss Hall & Burden here.

Cloudy and Cool. Hannah Scolt Pickles & part did my washing. mrs Stone here, brot 12 Cents fm Mrss Carter for Plumbs. mrs Burlun Sent me a present of Tamrinds, Tea and 4 lb Beef. Jona Calld to See me. at home, felt some Better thro Gods mercie. Son Lambard Sleeps here.

Clear & not So very Cold. Fineas Pain Sent me 1 bls l wheat in part for what is due to me for assis t ing his wife augus t 11th, 1810. Jona & Wm Ballard Sleep here, inform me W m Lambd is some better. let us bless God for his mercies. at home. Jona B. & Wm Sleep here.
Clear part of y e day. Sis t went from here to y e Settlement. I feel feeble. at home. Sis t went away.
Clear till after noon. Jona Junr Sleeps here. mr [Lankester] Spent Evning. at home, Jona Sleeps.
Cloudy, raind before night. mr Ballard has had a pain in his bowels and we did not attend public worship. at home. mr Ballard unwel.

rainy. I have been makeing Soap. mr Ballard went to Town meeting. Georg Crosby and Saml Cony were Chosen to represent this Town in Genaral Coart y e pres t year. we Sowd parsnips Saterday, Carrots y s day. at home.
Cloudy foren, raind aftern. I have felt feeble. Han h Ballard & Sally Pollard Sleep here. Son Ep ms wife took Tea here. at home, friends here.
Clear. I have done work in hous & gardin, feel very weary. A mrs s Butterfield here. Dagt Pollard Sent me Some yarn to knit. at home.
Clear & pleast. I feel more Comfortable for which I wish to bless y e Grea t auther. we Churnd 1-2/1 lb Butter. at home.

Clear day, Cloudy a t Evng. I have been Sleady to work all day tho feel feeble. H. Pollard Came fm Jonas, got breakfas t & Sett out for home. James Came to See me, his Marm Came in after Sun Sett. at home. H. Pollard went home. I have done [my]hous work, Churnd 2 lb _. Death Old Saml [Cunin ].
at Son Lambds, from there to Son Towns.
Clear & warm. I have been takeing Care of mustard & doing hous work, finisht gathering the peas in gardin. at home.
Clear. I have been at home, it is y e night Rh d & Hanh Slept here. at home.

Clear. I have felt a Some Esier. mrs s Hodges & Fanny Came to See me. Fanny Sleps here. H. Pollard at Faetts. my dear dagt Pollard Came at Evng. O how glad I felt to See her, tarries here. Son Epm Sent me 1 gln molases. at home, a little more Comfortable thro Gods Goodnes. Dagt Pollard Came at Evng. [19]
Clear morn, Cloudy aftern. Son Town Came here, took Breakfast. his famely wel. he is Sumoned to Coart as an Evidence. at home. Son Town took breakfast here.
Cloudy all day, raind part of it. I wed Carrotts, mended my husband s Trousers &C. at home.
Clear & not so warm. I have done hous work & went to See mrs Patridg, find her & infant Comfortable. at mr Palridges & Son [Jonas].
Clear. I have been very unwel. Hannah or Mart a with me the most of y e day & night. my Husband to Jud g Conys to Church meting, y e Doct Sent me Campher. [at home, Sick].

Clear. I had Some rest last night, prais to the Great author. Fanny left here after breakfast, Dagt P. also. I feel very feeble, God grant me patience. Dagt Pollard left me before noon. Hannah Bakt. mrs Bennet Calld here. H. and Mt a B. here. at home, unwel. Dagt Pollard went home. mr Baldgatherd Beens y t were ripe. [20] 6 Clear. I have felt more Comforlable but very weak. M. B. Sleepshere. Fanny at Jonas. these lines are for Yesterday. at home. [20]
Cloudy & Some [sic]. mrs Gill Sewing for me. we were informd that John Wall is Dround. at home.
Clear morn, Cloudy aft n . Son L. Calld [me] up in the night, his wife very unwel. Shee got Easier & I Slept a little. at Son Lambds.

Clear & Cool. I have washt my kitchen. Saml Wiman & Lefaett B. here, inform that H. Gelchel & Sally B. Sett out for Clinton about noone. mr Ballard been to See y e Ship launched, they got it to the water but not afleet when he left them. at home.
Clear. I have Bakt & washt. mrs Trask Came in to See me, Han h B. with her. at home. mrs Trask here.
Clear & very warm. I have washt the Buttery Shelves & floor, boild pork brine & Scolt my pickles &C. at home. mr Ballard been to the Settlement.

Clear. mrs Stone Came and Carried down Plumbs. mrs Pitts had 9 qts Sent us Gall n Vinagar mrs Carter 3 do, sen t 7 oZ Sugar mrs bond Some Sent [4] oZ Tea. H. Pollard gone y e af t n to quillt for mrs Bennet. Saml Pollard took 2 s 3 d to do errands for me. at home. Hannah Sleeps at Jonas. [21]
Clear part of y e day. we are at Son Lam ds . mrs Gill & Child n to Fairfield. Son Jona dind here & Sett out for home. at Son Lambds.
Clear and Cold. I have done hous work. at home.
Clear and pleast. I have done hous wk, ironed. mrs Smith here, had Beet & parsnip Seed and Some Carrot & Squash; is to let me have thread. W m Ballard Sleeps here. at home. mrs Smith here.
Clear and warmer. I have Brewd & workt in y e gardin, Planted Squash Seeds. my Purple Corn is Coming up. Son Lambd Sleeps here, his famely wel. at home. Son Lambard Sleeps here.
rain the most of the day. I made A small Chees, did hous wk; feel fatagued. at home.

Clear. I have had a very Sick foren but feel more Comfortable aftern. mrss Orrock & mrs s Pitts Came to See m. mrs s O. brot me 7 lb flower, 2 do Sugar, _ Tea, 1 pint Spirit. mrs s Pitt Sugar. at home. mrs s Orok & Pitts here.

Clear Some part of the day. I have done Chores, paird & Cutt apples to drie. Hannah finisht washing, washt the kitchen & Buttery & Bakt Bread and Pies. Marth a , Elisa & James Spent aftern here. at home. Son L. left here Early to attend Coart. he gave me 25 Cents.
Clear and very pleasant. I have done hous wk, Bakt apple pies & Bread. mr Ballard dug potatoes in y e gardin. at home, Bakt. [20]
Clear. we were at meeting a t Clinton. A mr Crosby Spake from Acts 11 Chapt. at meeting.
Clear and not So Cold. mr Ballard to meeting. mrs Smith, Charlot, Dagt Ballard & part of her Childn, Son Ephm & Ezra Town been here in the Coars of this day. at home. mr Balld to meeting.

X. Birth Marshal Edsons 1 st Dagt. XX. Clear. I was Calld about 10h am to See the wife of Marshal Edson who was in Labour. Shee was Safe deld at a little after noon of her firs t Dagt & 4th Child. I left them very Comfortable at [ ]h pm & returnd home. at marshal Edsons. Birth 8th. received 12/ as a reward. Wm Sleeps here.

Clear. I have felt more Comfortable. Hannah Pollard went to Son Jonas after breakfast. Son Lambd dind, he gave me a quarter of a Dol r . mr Livermore & wife here, Son Epm also. Epm & young Trask Came with y e milk after I was in bed. I rose & Straind it, they Sleep here. at home. Sons Lambd & Ep m here, mr Livermr & wife allso. Dagt Ballard & 2 youngest Childn Came down fm Clintn, Sleep here.
Cloudy & raind before night. Son Jonas wife & 3 youngest Child n & Luke Barton Dind here. Son Jona Came down from Clinton. at home. Dagt Ballard here. [21]
Clear. Barny Lambard dind here. he & wilm B. got a twich of wood. Dagt Ballard, Mart a , James & Elis a here aftern. Epm Came down, Calld in here. at home. Dagt B.s Child n here.
Clear part of the day. Dagt Pollard and Martha took Tea, they Sent for to go to Son Jonas. Shee & hir husband Sleep there. Epm B. Sleeps here. at home. Dagt Pollard here.
Clear & Cold. I have part done my washing & other matters. a t home.
Clear & Cool, it frose hard last night or y s morn. I have done my hous wk, Cutt and hanged up to drie what Squash I had. Churnd 2_ lb &C. feel Some fatagued. at home. W m & abner Sleep here. [22]
Clear & Cold for the Season. I have finisht Makeing my Soap, had but little. mr Ballard Planted yellow Bush Beens in y e field. at home. Sett my Sage roots. Planted.
Clear. Sally Pollard Scoured my Puter and did my washing. Dagt Pollard, Dolly, Mart a & Catharine Came here. Sally went home, Hannah Ballard & the 2 little girls with lhem. at home, Child n here.
Clear & very warm. Son Jona Sleeps here, his famelly are wel. he informd us that mrs s Young Expired this day. at home. Death mrs s Young.
Clear. I have been more Comfortable. Cut Stalks and done hous work. Jona Junr gave us Spirit & [sugg ]. at home.
Clear. mrs Farewel Calld to See me. I have done my hous work but feel very feeble. the Boys gathered the Apples in y e west orchard, brot 3 bags full in here. raind at night. at home.
Cloudy, raind at night. I have done various kinds of work, feel falagued. at home. [23]
Cold. I have Seen 76 years this day. X.

Clear. I have workt hard in hous & gardin. mr [Bond] here for mr Ball d to go to Church meeting, he went. Son Epms wife & Son, Sally Farewel & Mart a Ballard took Tea with me. at home, Bakt. Dagt Balld here.
Clear part of y e day. H. P. went to mr Blacks. mrs Farewel Sleeps here. mr Juett Came for me in the night. I was So unwel I Could not go with him. we Brewd . at [home]. mrs [Farew Sleeps ].
raind fore n, Sun Shine aftern. I have been pairing apples for Sauce. abner Sleeps here. at home. [24]
Clear and Pleast. I have washt and washt kitchen & North Roome. W m & Sally Sleep here. at home, washt.
Clear Part of the day. we finisht giting in our gardin Sause. I cut apples. W m Sleeps here. at home. [25]
Clear part of the day. I have been takeing Care of my apples, paired & Cut Some to drie. mr Ballard thrashing beens. at home. Death of Ezra Town.
Cloudy, Snowd at Evn g . Son Epm Calld here, his famely are well. I have kild 5 fowls & done other matters. Le faett did not Come after [ ur go ]. at [home].
raind by Shours. I have workt in my gardin Some, made a Chees, 3 Curds in i t ; made & Sett in to a Shift a pair Sleevs. at home.
Clear. I have part done my washing. Dagt Lambard & Son Ephms wife and their babes here to See us, informd of the Death of wido Rhed of Clinton. we had Cucumbers y s day. at home, Childn here.

rainy the most of the day & las t night. I am here alone, feel very unwel indead. the Sun Shone before it Sett. Ep m 3 d Came down fm Clinton, informs his marm is unwel. the horses dislroyed all our Corn las t [night]. [at home].
Some Snow and Cold. I have been Cuting apples for drieing & Sause. W m Ballard & Wm Partridg Sleep here. at home. [26]
Cloudy. mrs Gill finisht mr Ballards woolin Shirts. I have Bakt & mended hoes. Saml Pollards here, Says his Marm is better. he took apples & left them at Jonas. at home.
Snowd all day. I have Carded Cottne &C. at Ditoes.
Clear. I have done hous work, feel very unwel at night with a pain in my head. at home.

Clear & warm. I have been at home. Becky Fletcher & Hannah Balld here. Wm wen t to mr Oroks, bot me a pail, 2 lb Sugar, pin t 2/1 ginn; Cost 1 Dolr. he informd me mr Oroks inft Expired yesterday. at home. Death mr Oroks infant yesterday.
Clear the most of the day & warm. I went to Son Jonas foren of an Errand, have Bakt, made a Chees & ironed. at Jonas y s morn.
Cloudy, rain & hail. I have been prepareing apples to drie. at [home]. [27]
Snowd foren. Son Jona & Jona Junr at Son Lambd s . Cushman Hail Expired y s morn. Funeral of John Brown y s day. at Ditoes. Funeral J. Brown.
Clear & pleast. I have been at home, made a Chees. Dagt Ballard gone to Sydney. at home.
Clear. Son Ephm Sent A Carriage for us to go to meeting, we went. I tarrie at his hous y s night. Agustus & Calvin Balld there to See us. Sister Barton there. at meetng & at Son Ephms.

Clear & warm. Sons Lambd & Jona took Breakfas t here. I made an attempt to go to meeting but was so fatagued geting over the fence on y e old road that I fell down. Jona & Moses Partridg helpt me home. Cyrus Came aftern, he & Le faett took Tea here. at home. Son Cyrus Sleeps here.
Clear forn, Cloudy aft. mr Church Williams Came & Conducted us to his hous but there is no meeting and he brot us home again. at mr Williams s . we had no meeting & we returnd.

Clear, warm foren, Cooler aftern. I went to Jonas aftern, drank 1 Cup Tea. Old mrs Stone & Becky Fletcher there. Son Epm, his wife & Child n Came there, after meeting. they Came here and took Tea, Jonas wife allso. at Detoes. Jonas wife, Ep m , his wife & Childn here, took Tea with us.
Clear part of the day. I have felt Some better. H. Ballard, L e faett, Luke Barton, Ranus Pierce here. Mariage mr Heath to Sally Farewel. at home, friends here.
Clear. Han h , Mart a , James & Elisa Ballard dind here. I have been at home. at home. [28]
Clear. w went fm Son Lambds to Son Towns. at Son Towns.
raind & Snowd. Town meeting. mr Barllet Came to work for Son Jona. at Ditoes.
Clear & pleast. Allin Lambd here, Says his fathers Famely are Cleverly. Harnon Barton with him, his Marm & famely are all wel. at home, Bakt. Allin here.
Clear & very pleasant. I have Cut apples, Stued Some & hung up some to drie. at home. [29]
Clear. I did my hous wk & went to Son Jonas. my Dagt was Seting out to go to the Settlement. mrss Carter & Stone Came there. at Son Jonas. Funeral mrss Mason of Sydny.

Birth mr [Joseph] Firbushes Son. Birth Wm Spragues 2nd Dgt, 3 d Child. Clear. mr Firbush Calld me at 3h am to go to Capt Smiths to See his wife who w was Deliverd of a Son, her first Born at 5 h am. I was Calld from her a t 7 by Wil m Sprague to See his wife who was Deld before 12 of a Dagt, her 3 Child. they are all Comfortable. I reacht home a t Sun Sett feel some Fatagued. I receivd 2/1 lb Tea of Sprague in part. March 31 st recd 1 Bush l Corn at 4/6. at mr Firbushes. birth 12th. at wm Spragus. birth 13th. Death B. Bodwel.
Clear part of y e Day. Funeral C. Hail. I have been at my Son Lambds. at Ditoes. Funeral
Clear & very Cold. I have persued my washing, washt N roome &C. mr Ball d Makeing harrow a t Son Jonas. at home.
Clear & very pleast. I have washt Cloaths & the Buttery, put apples a drying. mr Ballard about banking the house. at home. [30]
Cloudy. I have felt unwel, have a bad boil. mrs Gill to mr Herrins. a t Ditoes.
Clear & Cool. I Sett my Sage, planted wild Goos Beens. feel very unwel at night. at home.
Clear. this is y e day Dagt Pollard Came here in Stead of yesterday. at home, Dagt Polld Came here.

Clear till aftern when it began to Thunder and rain. the Remains of mrs s Young were interd this aftern. mrs Andrews made me a present of 5-2/1 lb flower for which I feel greatfull. at home. Funeral mrs s Young.
Clear till after noon. my husband attended Funeral of mr Cumings, he Expired on his Birthday, aged 77 y rs . at home.
Clear. I have been about apple works. at home. [31]
Cloudy, raind aftern. Ephm Came home at 9h Evn, Sally with him. he left his mother, James & Elisa at mr Wimans. Jona Junr Came the first of the Evng. at home, did Some work about hous.

Cloudy and some rain. Epm Conducted his grand pah & I to Capt Pits s , we found his famely allmost Sick with Colds. Charls Coxes wife there. we went from there to Judg Norths to an Evn g Lecture. Revd mr Tappin performd. the Text Romans XIII C vers 11 th . we returnd home before 9h Evn. at Judg Norths to Lecture. a mr Deans here from New Sharon.
Cold.

Birth Son Lambds 4th Dagt and 9 th Child. Cloudy. Dagt Lambd [had] her women and Shee was Safe Deld of [her] 4 th Dagt & 9 th Child at 2h pm. it wd 10/ 2/1 lb. Shee Seems Comfortable as Can be Expected. may we bless [ ] auther. Patty Town Came to Nurs her. at Ditoes. Birth 4th.
Clear foren, Some rain aftern. I have workt hard part of y e day but feel very unwel. at home. aniversary of y e Birth, yesterday, Dagt Lucy, 53 years.
Cloudy the most of the day. I have done a little work but feel feeble. Hannah did Some washing, Brewd. at home.
Cloudy day, raind very hard in the night. I have been Cuting apples to Stue & drie. at home. [1]
Clear part of the day. I have finisht a Case for mr Ballards Chair Cushen & mended hoes, done my hous work &C. at home.
raind. we have had more than at 1 time this 12 months. I have over hauld my pickles, there were many of them damaged. at home.
Clear part of the day. I Churnd 2 lb Butter. at home.
Cloudy & some falling weather. we removd to Son Jonas. Jona Junr Came from Clinton reacht here at Evng, his marm & Child n wel. we [removd] to [Son Jonas].

Clear & very Pleasant. I have done Some washing and knit Some. Luke has been fixing Boards for floor. Keziah Hall Sleeps here, Georg Stone allso. a man by the name of Walker Came to our hous late last night. we lett him in, he Slept by the fire. at home. Luke Barton here fixing Boards for East roome floor.
raind the most of the day. I have Swep t my Chambers & lower rooms, feel feeble indeed. mr Hawl here, alterd the piggs. at home. Son Jona Came here this night.
raind the most of the day. I finisht washing. at [home].

Clear. I have been very Sick. mrs Smith and Stone Came and took Care of me, got my Bed in to the North room. my husband Sent for Doct Cony but they Calld Doct Ellis. he left me medisin. mrs s Firbush Came and Set with me till Evn when her Husband Came to accompany her home. Joanna Slept here. [at home, very Sick. Doct Ellis to See me].

Clear the most of this day. Dagt Ballard, Hannah & Elisa, Hannah Pollard, Becky Fletcher, Son Epm & his Son & Luke Barton here, Han h Glidon allso. Son Jona went to Clinton. at home, [friends] here. Funeral Clearks [Child].
Cloudy morn, Clear from 11h am till 4 pm when it thundered & raind. [Wilm] Sands, Hanh Getchel, Abram & the girls fm Jonas & mr Haul were in here aftern. at [home]. Thundered in the night & rain.

Clear. Joanna got Breakfas t and did up my wk and went home. mrs Farewel Came, tarries this night, Hannah Pollard allso. Old mrs s Carter & Sands were here. I feel more Comfortable thro Gods goodnes. Jonas boys gatherd the plumbe of the tree in gardin. [at home, Some Easier.]
Clear part of y e day, raind before night. mr Piper Sent me some Tea by L e faett. at home.
Clear & warm. mr Ballard to Parrish meeting, Cyrus to Hallowell. I have Sett Cucumbers & French turnips, made a Chees &C. Cyrus Sleeps here. at home, Cyrus Sleeps here.
Cloudy all day. I have Sett Cucumbers, musk mellions & F. Turnips &C. houghd west Side the hous, wash [ ]. at home.
Cloudy. I feel bu t feeble but have done Some work. Son Ephms wife Sent me meat prepared for mins Pies yesterday. we are bakeing them today. at home.
Snowd and very Cold. I returnd home before night, knit in the Evng. Linda Slept in my roome. at Ditoes.
Clear. at Ditoes. at Ditoes.
Clear. I have done my hous work. at home.

Clear & very pleasant. I went to Son Jonas Early. my Dagt & Ep m , Mart a , James & Elis a Sett out for Clinton at 10h morn. Old mrs Stone there. I Came home as Soon as they Sett out & did matters in my own house. at Son Jonas. Shee & 4 Childn Sett out for Clinton. I Churnd 3-4/1 lb butter.
Clear. I have done hous work & knit Some, went to our hous, brot Some things from there. Keziah Hall here, informd that Betsy Bodwel Died last night. at our hous from Son Jonas.
Clear and Cold. I have finisht my wash & done Some other things. at home.
Clear, a frost y s morn. I have planted musk mellions, part did my washing. Moses Patridges wife & Dagts here. at home. mrs Patridg here.
rainy all day. my Dagt P., her D t Dolly & Mart a Ballard here ys day. my Dagt did Sewing for me. at home.
Clear part of y e day & very warm. I have washt my Cloaths in 1 water, gathered mustard &C. Scolt my bed sted & bed roome. at home.
Clear. Dagt Ballard Came & took Care of me, I am very feeble. Hannah & Becky Fletcher Sleep here. a t home. Dagt B. here part ye day.

raind the most of the day, Snowd at Evng. Dagt Ballard & the Childn Came, tarried till aftern; then went to the hous that mr Moody did liv in, to keep hous till her husband is liberated from Jail. her Son Jona Sett out for Norridgwalk. it is 57 years this day Since I was joind in wedlock with my husband. at [home]. this is y e anneversary of my Marriage 57 years Since.
Cloudy & rain. Dagt Ballard, James and Elis a Came here, went home at Evng. Jona iunr Came from Clinton, all well there. at home, Jona Junr Sleeps here.
Clear. Son Jonas wife & 2 Child n Came here. I have done hous work & knit Some. at home, Jonas wife [here].
mrs Brown to See me

Clear & warm. I have had pain in my arm & foot. Martha went to Mrs Andrews s , Shee Sent me Spirit to Bathe my Limbs with. I have put a Cheese in pres which was made without rennet. at home, feel feeble.
Cloudy the most of the day. I feel feeble. Barny Lambd Calld here, gave me a pair. Hannah P. Did some washing. at home. Barny L. here.

Clear part of the day, Cloudy at Evng. I was Calld by Betsy Andrews to go & See her Marm who has a pain in her Side, and mrs Firbish who is in a weak Situation. was informd of mrs s Smyles Death which took place yeslerday. at mr Andrews s .
Clear part of y e day. Jona B. Junr Sleeps here, he informs W m Lambd is better. blessed be God for his goodnes. at home.
Clear. I have Bakt apple pies & Bread. W m Ballard been to the Settlement, got me 1 lb Candles & pint and half Spirit. at home.

Clear foren, raind at night. Son Ephm Calld here at Evng, gave us a quarter Lamb which wd 10 lb. he informd us he was told that Ezra Town was killd by the fall of a Tree last thursday. if So, may God grant us all to take a Seutable notis of his Dealings with us, may he be A Husband to the weddo & Father to y e Childn. at home.
very rainy. I have been a t home, Salted pork &C. at [home].

Cloudy all day & very Cold, A Severe Snow Storm Came on at Evng. Lefaett brot his mother, James & Eliza here and Conducted them home this Evng. I have done hous work, knit & mended hoes. Luke laid thee floor to the hearth. at home.
Cloudy. Jona left here going to Clinton. Son Jona Calld in aftern. Ep m brot us a Loade wood. at home.

Clear. we had the heavy tidings Confirmd and our Dear Grand Sons remains were interd this afternoone. may we all Strive to be allso ready. I receivd a letter from Sist Barton of August 28 th , [all] our friends were well. at home. Funeral of Ezra Town & [ ].
Clear part of the day, raind hard at Evng. mrs s Sands Came here. Luke B. & Ranus Pierce Slept at the old Barn. at home.
Snowed & was Cold & windy. P. T. Voce & inft, Ben Williams Calld. A mr Eddy Sleeps here. I have been at home. wether moderated at 10h Evn. at home.

raind all last night & Some after Sun rise, then Snowd till after noone, then Clear the rest of the day & Evng. the young men & Boys went to Lecture. Revd mr Jenks performd from 1 st John 1 C 3 vers. John & Jason P. Junr spent y e day here. I have been reading a book of mr Tappins and Some in the Bible. at home.

Clear & pleasant. I returnd home this morn, left my patients Cleverly. I have done my hous work & read Some. Betsy Town & Martha Ballard walkt from Son Jonas up here, were fatagued. at John Shaws. Betsy Town & Mart a Ballard Came here.
Clear the most of the day. I have washt Some, made a Chees, mended a Shirt &C. Allin Lambard Came here, his marm & the Child n are wel. at home. Allin Lambard here.
Clear. I have done hous work & Some in my gardin. Hannah B. Sent us 4 lb Veal & part of the head. W m Ballard Came from Clinton yesterday & returnd this day, all well lhere. at [home].

Clear. I have been So much better as to gather part of my Cucumbers. mrs Andrews here, brot me pie. Son Epm brot 1 qt wine & 3-2/1 lb Sugar. Hannah washt, mrs Farewel went home. mrss Sands & Betsy Pierce here. [at home, friends here.]

Birth mr Shaws first Son, Second Child. Clear & very Pleasant. I was Calld by Nicholas Shaw at 1h AM to go & See his wife who was in labour. Shee was Safe Deld at 11 h and I returnd before night. knit at Evn, I Cleand my piggs head & feet allso. at [Nicholas] Shaws. Birth 11th.

Clear. the Sun Shone pleasant but the aire Cold. Dagt Ballard, James & Eliza Came here. Jona Jun r Sett out for Clinton. Gidion & Luke Barton Came at Evn, took Tea and Conducted my dagt and Childn home. Linda went to O. Wimans, he brot his wife home. Betsy made me a Cap, Shee Sleeps here. at home. Dagt Balld here, Gidion & Luke Bart n allso.

Clear & very pleas t . I have Sett trees & Current Bushes & done other matters in my Gardin. Esq Titcomb, S. Cumings and Lat Hamlin Calld here. it is training through ou t y e Common wealth y s day. at home.
Clear and warm. I have Churnd 1 [ ] of butter and done other work. at home.
Cloudy. I have been at home, made a pair Pillow Cases, feel fatagued. at home. H. Ballard Sleeps here.

Clear. I was Calld to See mrs Partridges breast, it is very much Sweld but not broke yet. Son Town Came here at Evng, his famely are well, his widdow Dagts allso. he informd that Dagt Lambard had a fainting fitt last night. mrs Burton Sent me 10 oz of Sugar & 2 of Tea by mrs Stone. at [mr Partridges. Son Town Sleeps here.]
Clear, very Cold & windy. I have been at home, knit Some. mr Bennet workt for L e faett foren n . at home.
Clear but Cold. Ephm & Hannah Came from Clinton, Shee went to her Fathers. mrs s Sands Came here. Abner Came back. I had a Severe ague fitt in the night. at home. Hannah Came from Clinton.
from Son Towns to Son Lambds. a t Lambds.
Cloudy foren, Clear aftern. Sister Barton Came here. I was Calld at 10 h Evn to mr Pipers, his wife in Labour. Childn Sleep here. at home till 10h Evng. Sist Barton here.
raind. I have Bakt Some bread, pumpkin Pies, apple puding & 1 ap l pie &C. at home.
Clear. I was Calld by mr Livermore to See his wife about midnight, reach there a t 1h am, find her very unwel. Shee got Esier & [Slept Some]. at [mr Livermores].

Clear & pleasant. I have done hous wk & knit Some. the remains of Betsy Bodwel were interd this aftern. Hannah Ballard attended at the hous. mr Goodhue performd. Betsy Wiman Calld & took Tea with us. Barney Lambd brot me 2 aprons which his Marm Sent me, al wel there. at home. Funeral of Betey Bodwel.
Clear Except A Squall of Snow about noone. I have been at home. Jona Sleeps here. at [home].

Birth S Babcocks first Dagt & 5 th Child. Clear, wind South. I have been unwel all day. Selvanas Hatch & wife, Old mrs Butterfield & Betsy Andrews here. I was Calld a t Evng to See the wife of Saml Babcock 3 d , found her put to bed with her 1 st Dagt & 5th Child by her prest husband. I tarried all night. at Saml Babcocks. Birth 6th. Son Jona is 49 yearsold y s day.

Clear and Cold. I have done my ironing and other matters. L e faett Butcherd our Calf. Ephm Carried a hind quarter, the head & harslett & feet to Judg North. at home. we kild a Calf. Jonas g t red Cow Calvd.

Clear fore n, Cloudy aftern, raind at night. I went to Son Ephms & returnd to mr Livermores. his wife Seems more Comfortable. I Slept with her. (they are wel at [Son ]. mr Juet raisd a hous fraim. at [Detoes] & Son Ephms.

Clear and very pleasant. I returnd home between 11 & 12 am, find my Dagts have been here. mr Pollard, his wife, Dolly and Catharine Calld at Evng. mr Gower brot us 42_ lb pork a 9 d , 13_ Chese at 9 d , 14_ Butter a 1 s and took up a note which he gave mr Ballard last June 27 th . at ditoes. Child n Calld here. mr Hatch& wife left here. James Gower here, Paid what he owed us.
Clear. I have finisht washing, planted purple Corn & Coffee beens. a mrs Chase & Sally B. Sleep here. at home. my husband 86 years old.
Clear. Dagt Pollard left here at 10h morn to go to Son Ephms. I have done my hous work, Cut up herbs to drie; Cat mint & Tansey. at home. Dagt P. wen t to Son Epms.

Clear part of y s day, raind part. I have finisht my wash and washt the buttery. mr Ballard went to y e Settlement, Carried 4 Dozn Eggs & half [pisterae], got _ [tea] 1-2/1 Sugar and pint Spirit. at home, at home. Churned 1_ butr.
