Clear. Hannah Spent part of the day here, mrs Sands Came & washt my Milk vessals, Sleeps here. I had a poore nights res t . Son Jona here at Evng. at home, feel very feeble. Son Jona Calld to see me.
raind part of the day. I returnd a t 12 O Clock, left y e patient about hous. I washt & ironed after I Came home. at [Ditoes].
Clear and Cold. I have done Some washing & knit in the Evng. at home.
Snowd some, Cloudy all day. I have Twisted yarn & knit Some on a Slocken for mr Ballard. A mr Hudson Sleeps here, Jona allso. at home.
Clear. I have been at home, knit & did my hous work. Linda went to See her Sist Sands, 3 other Girls with her & Slept here; Fields allso. at home,

Birth A. Masons 5 th Son. Clear. we went to Lecture & Son Ephms. I was Calld to Asa Masons Soon after I reacht home. his wife was Deld of a Son, her 9 Child 5th Son at 11h Evng. at Leclure, Son Ephms & A. Masons. Birth 7 th .
at Ditoes & son Towns.
Clear. I have Sheld mustard and done various kinds work besides. Ep m went to the Settlement, go t me with Wicksons due bill 1 qt Spirit, 2/1 lb Tea & 3-2/1 do Sugar. at home, very lambe.
Clear part of the day. H. and D. Pollard finisht picking my wool, they Sett ou t for home at 3 h Pm. a Shower after they Sett ou t . at [home]. The Girls wen t [home].
Clear part of the day. I have done various kinds of work. Le faett got me 4/1 lb Snuf. 2 Peirces, Elder W. & a mr Mags here. A mr Sprage Sleeps here. it raind very hard all [night]. at [home].
Clear. I have been at home. Ep m , Hannah & Nabby Hudson Came from Clinton. Wil m Trask & Ranus Pierce here from Malta. Hannah Ballard is 17 years old this day. at home. Funeral mrs Smyle of Sydney.
Clear. I returnd fm Masons, felt Some Fatagued. Son Jonas famely Came up here last night, he Came this night. at Masons.
Clear. at Son Towns.
Clear & pleas t . Dagt Ballard & Eliza, Luke Barton & Theodore here. I have had a Collic pain, feel better aftern for which I wish to prais the auther of mercy. at home. Dagt B. & [Luke] B. here.
Clear the most of the day, a very high wind which removd the Shead out of place. at [home].
Clear. we went to meeting, it was Communion day. mr Heath & wife here at Evng, Betsy Wiman allso. at meeting & Son Ephms. mr Heath here, Son Cyrus allso.
Clear part of the day. I have done hous work &C. raind in the night. at home.
Cloudy, Snod Some. I have done hous work & minded Cloaths. Luke finish t laying our floor. Lefaett & Ephm wen t down with him, brot Sally up here. at home. Luke finisht work here.

Cloudy till 10h am, Clear afterwards. Son & Dagt Pollard, Jonas wife and Childn here. wido Moore & mrs s Broadstreet Calld. I have done hous wk, mended a Coat & knit. at home. Childn here & Cousins. Death of J. North Esq.
Clear. I went to Son Jonas. mrs Farewel, Sist Barton & Sopha Came home with me, Sleep here. at Son Jonas.

Clear. I have washt my Buttery, done other hous wk & wed Gardin. I wen to Son Jonas towards night. mr Ballard been to the Settlement. Dagt Lambard was gone to Son Pollards, Shee Calld at Jonas on return. to Jonas.
Clear and very Pleast. Old mrs Stone & mrs Bennet here. I have been very unwel. Jona Junr Came from Clinton. at home, unwel.
Clear part of y e day. I have done my hous work and wed gardin. at home.
Clear and Cold. Son Jonas wife & Calld here, left Sally, James and Eliza. Shee is gone on to Clinton, Ephm with her. at home. Son Jonas wife gone to Clinton.

Clear, Cold & windy. mrs Barden takeing Care of Jonas wife & Babes, I helpt Some. Field and wife left here for Molta. W m Ballard Sett out for Clinton to Conduct Hannah and Sally home. at Tho s Norcross.
Son L. sent for my husband. Jona Came. a t Ditoes.

X. Birth mr Pipers 3 d Dagt. XX. Clear. mrs Piper was Safe Deld at 4 h am of her 3 d dagt. I receivd 1 q t sp t , 1 lb Candles, _ lb Sugar. I arivd at home Early. there was a fire raged to y e Eas t of here but fortunately it was Stopt. at mr Pipers. Birth 5th. fee receivd, 12/.
raind but is not very Cold. I have done hous work, Spent y e Evng Cuting raggs for bed. at home.
Clear day, Cloudy Evng. I have removd my things into the East roome, knit Evng. at home, moovd to East roome.

X. Clear and Cold. mr Linsa Foss, mr Millet & wife Calld here. I went to our hous and brot a Plan of Livermore. mr Ballard lent it to mr Foss. Willian Ballard very unwell at night, we gave him medisin for his Cough, he Slep t with Jona. I have Seen 77 years this day. may I render prais to the Great author of mercies for all his Goodness to me in my pas t life, and obtain his forgivness for all Sins Committed. at home & to our own hous. People from Leads here. I have Seen 77 years this day.
Clear and not so Cold. I have done hous work &C. Ep m & Wm Sleep here. at home.

[Birth Edwd Savages Son]. Cloudy part of the day. I was Calld at 10h am by Edw d Savage to go and See his wife who was in Labour. I had a fall on my way but not much hurt. found the patiend had Calld 2 Mid wives & Doct Ellis before Shee Saw me. I found her mind was for Doc t Cony. he was Calld and as Providence would have Shee Calld on me to assist her. I performd the Case. Shee was Deld at 8 h 30m pm of a Son and is as wel as can be expected. I Slept at mr Jery Babcocks, had an aguish turn in the night. at Edw d Savages. Birth 11th.
Clear. I have been at home, done hous wk & mended Trousers, Sifted 16 lb meal Wm B. got me yesterdy for [12] qts. Beens.

Clear. I have Brewd & done other work. Dagt Pollard & her Dgt Dolly Came here at Evng, H. Getchel & Ballard with her. they went home. Son Cyrus Came at 11h Evng. at home, Brewd. Dagt Pold & Son Cyrus Sleep here.
Clear part of the day. I have done hous work & some in gardin. Son Ephm here, he Says his Son is unwel. he gave me 4-2/1 lb Lamb. at home, Son Epm here.
Cloudy. mrs s Sands went to Jonas after Shee had done my morning wk. A mr Joshua Gillmore here to See a plan, gave my husband 20 Cents. at home, very unwel. Jonas wife Sleeps here.
Clear till near night, Snowd at Evng. I have ironed & done Some mending. am informd that Jessy Lock of Hallowell Expired 16th inst. at home.

Snowd, Cleard a way at Evng. I was Calld to See mr Firbeshes infant, it has a very bad Cold and is Costive. we administred a Clistar which gave relief. I returnd home about Sun Set. I washt my husband A Shirt after. at mr Firbishes. [5]
Clear. I have mended a Shirt & part did [a] Coat for my husband. Stephen Lathrop here. at home.
raind. I am Still. Dc t Cony to See me, gave me medisin; Sent Sago & a fish. mrs Smith here, Dind. at home. Son Ephm & wife here, tarrie all night.

Clear & pleasant. Son Jonas wife Came up here, brot James & Elis a with her. mr Partridg Came in to See her. I have had a pain in my Stomach till near night. mrs Ballard had 4 gees killd, pickt & gutted. Shee left here at 10h Evng. at [home]. Jonas wife here. Jona & [Forgeson][Sleep] here.

Clear. I have been at home. Jonas wife and 2 Childn here at Evng. Shee informd me that mr Tappins Text was Eclesias ts 11 C 1s t vers, and that there was a Contribution for the relief of the poore that are Sick. at home. Son Jonas wife here at Evng. [6]

Cloudy day, Snowd at night. mr Lankester & wife here at Evng. Shee gave me flower and Tea. Becky Fletcher & Georg Andrus allso here. we have not been to meeting. at home. mr Lankester & wife here at Evng.

Birth Levy Cowens Son, [6th] Child. Cloudy, raind at Evng. I was Calld by Levy Cowen to go and See his wife in Labour. Shee was Safe deld at 4h am of a Son which Expired at 5. Shee had a fall not long Since which probably was the Cause. Hannah & Nabby wint to hear mr Tappin this day & Evng. at Levy Cowens. Birth 3 d . Death ofthe infant. Death of [Lydae] Springer of Sidney.
from Son Towns to watervil. at Watervil.
Clear. I have done my hous work and paired & Cut and steud apples for Sause. Wm & Caleb Sleep here. I rose from bed to Strain my milk which they bro t home. at home.
Clear morn, Cloudy aftn. I have done a larg wash for me to have pu t my Linning out to drie, knit at Evng. Linda filld Sausages. at home.
Clear. I have done houswork. Son Cyrus was at the Settlement. I Sent by him for 2/1 gln Spirit. Hannah & Ep m Sett out for Clinton.
Cloudy morn, Cleard away at 8h am. mr Johnston Came with a Shais for my husband to go and attend Town Meeting. he went and tarried all night at Cap t Pitts s . at home, feel very feeble.
Clear part of the day. mr Ballard to the Settlement, got me 2 oz Snuff. I have washt &C. Isaac Farewel Calld a t Evng for apples. at home.

Clear and pleasant day, Cloudy a t Evng. I have mended some Cloaths and wound 4 Skeins hoes yarn. Som Ephm and his wife took Tea with us. Shee looks feeble, their famely are wel. mr Bracket Calld here. at home. Son Ephm & wife here.

Snowd. mr Fuller & wido Town Calld going to Judg Conys. Calld on their return, took Tea and went on for home. I have been at home. my Connections well at Winslow. they informd of the Death of Es q James North. at home, wido Town here.

Clear part of the day. Sist washt my N roome. mrs Farewel went to mr Bennets. I was Calld by mr M c Fartin at 5 h pm to go and See his wife who is near the hour of Labour. I larried at his house till the 25th. at mc Farlins.
Clear. I have done hous work. at home.
Snowd this morn. mr Livermore Came and Conducted me to See Sally Foy who is unwel. it Cleard away aftern. at Foys. Son Cyrus left here. Son Lambd here.

raind. a mr Gore fm Farmington here. my Husband gave him a dead of his Share of undivided land in New Sharron. I [sind] it. Sist Barton Came here. (he paid 5 Dols, gave his note for 25 to be Paid Jany next. at home.

Clear and not So Cold. Son & Dagt Pollard and Catherene here, he did arronds for us. they informd me that the wido Lovjoy Expired 19th inst. Jona Junr Sleeps here. at home. Son & Dagt Pollard here. Death mrs Lovjoy 19 th inst.

X. Birth Tho s Norcross 1 Child. XX. Clear and Cold. mrs Norcros was Deld at 5h am of a Son, her first Born. I left her and Child comfortable and arivd at home at 10 morn, receivd two Dollars in Sugar, Tea & Spirit. Son Jonas youngest inft is feeble. Hannah & Sally Came from Clinton. Son & Dagt Lambd here at Evng. at Ditoes. Birth 10th. receivd 12/.

Clear & very pleast. my husband Sett out for home, Allin & wm B. with him in a Carriage of mr Bealses. mrs Gill, Dagt Lambd & I at Col o Mowers s on a vasit this aftern. Son L. & L. Barton there. a Ditoes. my husband went home.
Clear. Sister & I went to Jonas, mr Ballard allso. Jonas wife took Tea with us yesterday. at Son Jonas.
raind & Cloudy all day. I have done hous wk. this is y e aneversary of the death of my Dear Dagt Town, 13 years Since. Funeral of Lucy [Maxee] of this Town y s aftern. at home. Funeral.
Clear and Coolr. I went to our own house, brot Some things. mrs Sands here. knit in the Evng till late. at home.
Clear & Cold. Hannah Pollard Saml, & Betsy Town Calld in to See us. Old mrs Wickson here, gave me a broom. Wilm is Some better, is here yet. at home. H. Polld & B. Town hir.

[Birth Sally Foys Son & 3 rd Child]. raind. I was at Foys. Sally was Deld at [1]h this morn of A Son which w d 10 lb. John Foys Dagt and only Child Expired 15th ins t . it Slackt raining and I Came home after 7h am very much fatagued. mrs Smith here to Tea. Sally Ballard Sleps here. a [F ]. Birth 13th. recd 12 /.
Clear most of the day. I have done hous wk.
Cloudy. I returnd home before noon, feel fatagud. Doct Cony gave me hira picra & Camphr. I went to bed & Slept Some aftern. at Ditoes.

Clear & Cold. mrs Farewel at mr heaths all night. Shee went home after Breakfast. mrs Heath ill all day. we have Slept a little. I have had ague fitts yesterday & today. at mr Heaths. mrs [Bridg] Came at 9h Evng.
Clear. Dagt Pollard & Dolly left us at 9 am. Cyrus at 11h. I have don y e hous work. L e faett Carting hay in to the Barn. at home.
A tedious Snow Storm. I have felt very unwel all day & night. at home, unwel.

[Josiah Heath Birth, dagt, first Born]. Clear & very Cold for the Season. mrs Heaths illness increas t after mid night and Shee was Deld at 4 h 30m am of a Dagt, her first Born. I left her before noone, her marm Came. her illness has been very Severe. I have felt very feeble this day. Mrith 15th. receivd 12/S. left patienls Comfortable.
Clear. Epms wife here till near night when Dagt Pollard Came. at home, very feeble.

Clear foren, Cloudy aftn, raind a little at 10h Evn. Luke Came here, brot 8 Cabbage heads which Son Ep m Sent us. he informs me that my Sons wife is unwel. Sally Ballard is unwell. I made her Sage Tea. at [home].
Clear part of the day. Beck here all day. Ab m Fields & Hanh Glidon Came at Evng. Ran s Pierce, Jona Ballard & Wilm all Sleep here. at home, Company here.

Clear part of the day. mr James Gore of New Sharon brot us Corn, rie & flower in part of what he owed us. he paid 5 Doll s in money. I have been at home, my head is Soar. H. N. and Sally Sleep here. it began to rain at 10h Evn. mrs s Davis & Rhoda Pollard Calld here, took Tea; left here near Sun Sett. at home. Rhoda Pollard & mrss Davis here.
Clear. at Son Towns. at S. Towns.
Cloudy & Some rain. I have Sorted apples, washt my kitchen and brot my Bed in to it. I Sent by Wilm B. for pint & half Spirit, he bot i t at mr Sargents Store. at home.

Cloudy part of the day. Ep m Cutt his ancle. mr Ballard went to Son Ep ms . mrs Farewel Came here, went to W m Stones; returnd and Sleeps here. I have Cut frosen apples to Stue. at home. mrs Farewel Sleeps here.

Clear & pleast. Capt Pitts procured a hors for My husband to ride home. Son Jona Led it back. I have felt Some better but feeble yett. mrs Partridg, Smith & Brooks been to See Son Jonas wife. I have done my hous work & knitt. at home.
Snowd and very Cold. I have felt very feeble. at home.
Cloudy & Cold. I have ironed. A mrs Donison & another young woman Calld. at home.
Clear, Cold & windy. our Cow Calvd & lost it. I had an ague fit in the night. at home.
Birth mc Farlins 2nd Son, 4 th Child by his present wife. Son Jona & wife wen t to Clinton 23 inst. sister Barton Set out for Boston in the Packet this morn. Birth 10th.
Cloudy foren. I wed a bed of Carrots, Churnd 2 lb Butter & made a Chees &C. at home.

Clear and Cold. mr Livermore Came to Foys & Conducted me home, his wife Came up with him and went to Doct Howards. I left Sally better than Shee was but not got to bed. lhe Boys brot my apples from our house, I Cutt & Stued parl of them, they are frozen. at Dittoes & mr Livermores, he and wife Came home with me.
Snowd. I have been very unwel in the night and foren n . Ame Niles Came here, tarried a little while. I rose aftern n , feel Some better. at home, unwel.
Clear. Dagt Pollard Came here. Son Jonas youngest inft Expired at 2h 30m Pm. I have felt not very. at home. Death of Son Jonas infant.
very pleast. we went to Esqr Jonstons. a t Esq Jonston.
Clear part of y e day. Sis t went from here to y e Settlement. I feel feeble. at home. Sis t went away.
raind. I have done various kinds work. Sabery Getchel Sleeps here. at home.
Clear & Cold. I wenl to See mrs Firbush, find her torable Comfortable. I came home, Spent Evng kniting. Hannah & Linda went to mrs Andruss. to See mrs Ferbush.

Clear. mr Isaac Savage, his wife, Isaac Junr & his wife Dind. Revd mr Stone & Lady, Son Jonas wife & Childn took Tea with us. I finisht kniting Le faetts Stockins & washt them. at home. Revd mr Stone and wife here.
Cloudy. Warrin Stones wife Came and washt for me. I have had two ague fitts, felt very Sick indeed. Funeral Foys Child. Sally & Martha Sleep here this night. at home. mrs Stone washt here. Funeral.
Clear & very pleast. Son Jona Sleps at Son Lambds. at Son Lambds.
Cloudy, raind before night. mr Ballard has had a pain in his bowels and we did not attend public worship. at home. mr Ballard unwel.
Clear. Luke Barton Came in to see us, informd that the Sacramen t was adminestred. H. Glidon, H. Ballard, L. Gitchel Came in. Sabery Sleeps here. at home.
Clear. I have been at home, roasted a piece of Beef which Son Ephm gave me. Luke Dind with us, Keziah [here] allso. at home. Hannah had Compy at Evn. Snowd at night.
Clear foren n, Cloudy aft n , Snowd at Evng. Luke B. & Jon a Junr went to Son Pollards. Luke Sleeps here. at home.

[Birth Wilm Saunders 3 d Dagt & 4 th Child]. Cloudy morn, raind aftern. I have felt very feeble. mrs Stone Came in to See me, Shee brot wood to the doore. Shee informd me that William Brooks s wife fell from the Scaffold of her Fathers Barn yesterday and hurt her So her life is not Expected. Nancy Smith here, Says Shee is not any better. I was Calld by Wil m Saunders at 4h pm, his wife was Deld at 10 Evn of her 3 d dagt & 4th Child and is Comfortable. I laid down & Slept Some. at Wm Saunders. Birth 14.
Clear foren n , rain with high wind aftern. Hannah Getchel here. I have done hous work & Some in my gardin. at home. H. Getchel here Par t y s day.
Some Sun Shine but very Cold & windy. this is the anaversary of Son Ephms Birth 33 years Since. at home, very feeble.
Clear. I have been very ill. Sally Came towards night. Betsy Andrews Came, Staid all night. at home.
A Severe Snow Storm. Jack Carried Sally & James to his Fathers in a Sleigh. he returnd here, Forgison allso. at home kniting.
Clear part of the day & Cloudy part. Fields & Hannah left here afler Breakfast, Becky Fletcher after dinner. Jon a & Ranus Sleep here. at home.
raind till 10 h am, Clear aflerwards. I have done hous work, knit &C. Hannah gone to her Fathers. I finisht futing W ms hoes. at home.
raind. I am at Ditoes. at Ditoes.
Cloudy & rain. mr Ballard went to Ordination. Son Ephm Came for me, I went to his hous. mr Ballard Came & Slept there. at Son Ephms. mr Tappin Ordained in Augusta.
Cloudy and Some Snow. mrs Farewel went from here. Han h Trask here, Mrs Bennet & mrs Smith allso. Sally Came at Evn g . at home. mrs Farewl left here.
Clear. I have been So unwel that I Sett up but little. Betsy Wiman Came in to See me, Shee made my Bed & made me hasty pudding. at home, very unwel.
A very Stormy day. I do not fel any better. at home.
Snowd & raind. Son Epm Sent a Carriage for his Father & me, we went. mr husband went to meeting, it is Thanks giving day. at Son Ephms.

Clear and more pleasant. I have been So unwel that I kept my Bed till 2h pm. mrs Smith & her Dagt Brooks here. James North Es q was interd this day, and an infant of mr Welses of augusta. at home. Funeral James North Es q ofClinton, an infant of mr Wels s augusta.
Clear. I have ben doing hous wk & Some in the gardin. at [home].

Clear and Cold. I have washt my roome, Cutt & Stued Some apples, feel Some fatagued. Dagt Ballard is Some better than Shee has been. mrss Partridg was here, informd me that Uncle Jeremy Learneds wife is dead. at home. Son Jona Came from Clinton.

Clear the most of the day, Clouded a t Evn. Son Pollard Calld here, brot us 2 Bush l Corn at 4 s pr Bushel. he took monney & got us 1 lb Candles & 2_ do Butter. brot our meal from the mill. his Dagt Hannah went home with him. Son Ep ms wife is better. mr EbenZ Trask & wife spent Evn. his Son Wilm & Ranus Pierce & Becky Fletcher & Abner Trask Sleep here. at home, did my washing. mr Trask & wife here, B. Fletcher & olhers.
Clear. I have not been able to Sett up but little, there has been a great number of people here this day. Jonas wife as wel as Can be Expected. at home.

Snowd. Jona Junr Sett out for Clinton. Ranus Pierce & he took it up on then to Treat my Husband and I unbecomingly. may God forgiv that & their other misconduct is my Sinceer prayer. Son Ephm, his wife & Son, mr Heath & wife Spent Evng here. Alfred Sprague, Linda and Keziah Haul went to Lecture to mr Rowels. at home. Son Ep m , his wife & Son, mr Heath & his wife here.

Clear and pleasant. I feel better for which I wish to bless the author. the funeral of Son Jonas infant was this aftern. our former minester, dear mr Stone, made a very apropriate prayer on the ocation. at home. Funeral Son Jonas [infant].
Clear & pleast. mrs Gill & I to mr Philbrooks.
Clear & Cold. I have part done my washing & other matters. a t home.
Clear. I have Bakt Brown & flour bread & an apple puding & done other matters. Sabery left here after breakfas t . we Staid alone. at home.
Clear. I have done hous work & knit. mr Ballard put up a Shelf in ye Closit. at home.
Snowd & very windy. I have been at home, feel unwel bu t Churnd, had 2_ Butter. Martha here this day & night, Wil m at his Fathers. at home.

Clear. I took Breakfast at Saunders s and went in to See mrs Heath, Shee is wel. was Conducted home, reach t there at 10h am. Jonas Child n here. I did my ironing and Some mending but feele feeble. at Ditoes & mr Heaths. Sally Slept here.

Clear and not very warm. I have felt very feeble. Wil m Sprague brot me 1 bushel of Corn, Carried it to mill; got it ground, brot it and what we had at the mill before. at home. W m Sprague brot me 1 Bush l Corn.
Clear. I have had a very Sick day. Betsy here. at home.
Cloudy, Snowd Some. I have done hous wk & knit Some. Jona Sett out again for Clinton, Forgison with him.
Clear part of the day, Snowd Some. I have done hous work & knit some. at home. Death old mrs s Shaw.
Sun Shone till twelve o Clock, Snode afterwds. Hannah & Epm Sett out for Clinton. I have done Some washing and mending. at home. Hannah Sett out to Clinton.
Clear. at ditoes. mr Rice, his Lady and others There. at Ditoes.
Clear & Cooler. mr Ballard Sett out for home after Breakfast. I Tarried at my Sons all day & night. at Ditoes.

Clear part of the day. mr Lankester Calld here going from foren n Meeting, informd Me the Text was in Daniel IX C 6 & 7 verss. Moses Partridg & Le faett makeing a hogg pen. Mitchel Swingling Flax for them. at home.

Clear the most of y e day & very Cold & windy. Dagt Ballard and a Number of her Children here, mrs Partridg & Smith allso. Revd mr Tappin Came and Convers t Swetly and made A Prayer adapted to my Case. at home, very feeble, Revd mr Tappin [ ] see me.
Clear part of the day & raind part, we were. at Ditoes.

Clear morn, Snowd aftrn. mr Bowls & wife Came to See us. Dagt Ballard & 2 youngest Child n here. Luthar Pierce, Jona B. Junr & a mr Hudson Sleep here. it raind in y e night. at home. mr Bowls & wife, Dagt Ballard here.

Clear and not So Cold. I have felt unwel. Sister Pollard Calld to See me. Luke Barton & Sopha Ballard Dind here. John Pierce & wife Sleep here. Lefaett Came home with his [teeme]. at home. Sis t Pollard here. Son Pollard in Jail.
Clear part of the day. I have been very unwel. mrs Smith & others here. at home, unwel.
Clear & Cold. Dagt Ballard & 2 Childn here. mr Bennet, his wife & Childn here Evng. I have done Some washing & knit Some. at home. Linda makeing Soap.
Clear and pleasant. I have felt very feeble. Son Jona brot his wife from the East Chamber to the west roome, Shee Seems Comfortable. at home, feel feeble. we Churnd 1-2/1 lb Butter.
Clear part of the day. Jona B. Junr Came to Son Lambds very lambe by a Cutt on his foot. he Sleeps here. at Son Lambds.
Clear & very Cold. I have persued my washing, washt N roome &C. mr Ball d Makeing harrow a t Son Jonas. at home.
Clear. I have washt & done Some mending. Ab m Field Calld in to See us. at home.
Clear pleast day, Cloud Evng. Ephm & Hannah Sett out for Clinton a t 10h am. I began to wash at 2 pm, finisht what I had in hand at 7 Evn; knit in the Evng. at home. Hannah went to Clinton.
Clear forin, Snowd a little at Evng. Luke Barton & Jona Ball d Jun r gone to Son Pollards to a Ball. his Grand Fatther lent Jona 2 Dollars, he returnd 3 s . at home.

Clear, a hard frost this morn. mrs Stone Came and washt Bed Cloaths & North roome, made my Brown Bread. Sally Sifted the meal. I have felt very feeble the most of y e day. at home. mrs Stone washt here.
Clear and more pleast. I have felt feeble. mrs Bur d in here to Spin Linning on Dagt Ballards wheal. I had 1-4/1 lb Butter Churnd y s day. at home.

Clear. I feel some more Comfortable for which I wish to Praise the Grea t author. Son Ephm Came with a hors for his Father to ride to Lecture. he had a turn of pain which led him to think he Could not go but Sett out about noone. at home, Sick. Betsy [here].
Clear. Son Ep m Calld here. Han h Pollard with him, going to help his wife who is unwel. mr Ballard Sent 3 s by Ep m , he got 4/1 Tea, 2-4/1 lb Sugar. at home.
Clear the most of the day. old mrs Stone here, informd that old mrs Shaw departed this life last night. A mr Hammond and mrs Mason here a t Evng. at home. Funeral mr Pipers Son.
Clear, Cold & windy. I have done hous work & Some mending. mrs Burdin Calld here, Shee is going to New [Vinyard], her Mother is Sick. Ephm returnd from Clinton, all wel there. at home.
Clear. mrs Town & I to mr Fullers, mrs Fairfield allso. at mr Fullers.

Clear. I left my Sons aft Breakfast. Cald at Old mr Hamlins & mr Levermores & Capt Pitts s & mr Thwings. mrs Heath Conducted me to Son Jonas. I walkt fm there, find much to do at home. at Detoes & others.
raind. I have been Sick on the Bed aftern. at home.
Clear butt my Son Could not bring us home. at Ditoes.
Clear pleast foren, windy aftn & Evng. Charls Dingly and wife Calld in to See us. I have Bakt & washt & knit Some. at home. Charls Dingly & wife here.
Cloudy & some rain. Isaac Farewel brot me home in A Shais. my Son gave me 7 lb Beef, his wife [] lb of very god Soape. at Ditoes. mr Ballard walkt home, I wrode.

Clear pleast foren, Cloudy Evng. Dagt Ballard, her Childn, Betsy & Saml Wiman & L. Barton here at Evng. Revd mr T Tappins text foren mat 8 11th, aft Revela [ ] 15-16-17 vers s . at home, Child n here.
Cloudy & not very Cold. Dagt Ballard had Company. Rhoda and Saml Pollard Calld here at Evng, their Father Came out of jail. at home. Son Pollard Came out of jail.

Clear and Cold. mr Ballard has a pain in his Neck, has not been able to work. I have done hous work & knit Some. Jonas wife & James here, Shee finisht hir Soape & took Care of other matters. at home. Dagt Ballard here, finisht makeing her Soape.
Clear, A Cold wind. Sons Jona & Lambd, Linda Getchel, Jona Jun r & Ephm Sett out for Clinton at 10h am. I have washt a fue things. at home, feeble. Jona went to Clinton.
Clear. Jona Sett out for Augusta. at Ditoes.
Clear and Cold. I have finisht my wash & done Some other things. at home.
rainy. I have done my hous work, Sorted part of my apples that were in y e Sellar, Pared & Cut the rot out. Hannah Glidon went to Malta, mr Fields with her. at home.

Birth Anthony Bracketts 7th Son, 9th Child. Cloudy & Some Snow. I was Calld at 2h pm to See the wife of Anthony Bracket who was in Labour and was Safe Deld at 5h 30 m of her 7th Son & 9th Child. her illness was dificult & very Severe but I left mother & infan t Comfortable and reacht home before 10 Evng. at mr Bracketts. Birth 4th. receivd 1 Dollar.
Cloudy, raind at night. Sally helpt me all day. I have been very Sick this day. Martha Came and Slept here. at home, unwel. Sally here.
Clear and warm. mrs Stone went home. mrs Bennet & Anna to See mrs Ballard. I have felt very feeble. at home. mrs Stone went home.
Clear and very Cold, Snowd y s morn. I have been very ill. Betsy was Calld home before night. at home, very ill. Betsy left [me].

Clear. Funeral of Old mrs s Shaw. Bets y Wiman Calld here. Revd mr Tappin here, gave mr Ballard 8 Dolars of the money Contributed for the relief of the poore. I was Calld by mr Livermore to go and See his wife who was in Labour, her women were Calld at 9 h Evn. old mrs s Hamlin, Nichols and 2 mrs s Heartfords. at home till Evng. Revd mr Tappin here. Funeral Old mrs s Shaw. I went to mr Livermores at Evng.

Clear part of the day. A Son of mr Flint Bartons, a mr Robards here, took Tea. Luke Barton here at Evng. I have been to our hous, Ephm Conducted me in A Sleigh. we brot Cyrus s Bed and other things from there. Jason Pierce Sleeps here. at home.
Cloudy part of the day. I have felt very unwel. mrs Smith here for milk. I have not been able to work. at home.
Clear. Old mrs s Stone here & 1 of Burdens dagts. Le faett Sett out to go to meeting, found the mill Brook bridg upsett by the ice, men at work on it to Secure it. at home. Old mrs Stone [here].

Clear Day, Cloudy Evng. I have washt. Le faett Butchered our Spotted pigg. Ep m Calld in here, he Came fm Clinton Satter day, all well there. Abner & Wil m Sleep here. Son Jona Came with a raf t . at home, washt.
Cloudy, Snowd at Evng. Bro r EbenZ s wife & John Calld here, they left EbenZ Junr s Child alive but Dangerously ill. at home. Sist Moor here.

Birth Son Jonas 7th & 8th Sons. Snowd all day. Dagt Ballard was in Labour, her women Calld after noone. Shee was Safe Deld between 2 & 3 pm of a Sone and aboul 3 pm of another Son. her Labour Severe but Shee & infants Seeme likely to do wel. the first born wd 5 & _ lb, the last 6 & _ lb. Shee has now been the mother of 8 Sons and 4 Dagts. at home. Births Son Jonas twins, 8th & 9th for this year. Ab m Fields & wife Sleep here.

Clear foren n , Cloudy aft; Snowd at Evng. Revd mr Tappin Deld a discoarse from matthew 11 C 28 vers. there were A Considerable number of people Collected here. Sons Pollard & Ep m , their wives & Samuel P. & Sopha, Son Jonas wife, Sally, James and Elisabeth. at home, an Evn g Lecture Preacht here.
Cloudy part of the day. I have done Some washing but feel feeble yet. Sopha Lankester helpt Hannah. mrs Farewel Sleeps here. at home.
Clear part of y e day. I have Carded Cottne. Lucy Lambard Spun 2 Skeins. at Ditoes.

Clear and Cold. I have done my ironing and other matters. L e faett Butcherd our Calf. Ephm Carried a hind quarter, the head & harslett & feet to Judg North. at home. we kild a Calf. Jonas g t red Cow Calvd.
Clear, Cold & windy; Cloudy Evn g . Le faett is gone to work with his team for W m Babcock. I have Bak t wheat & Brown Bread y s day. at home.
Cleard of about 9h am, high wind at W. the Girls went home after Breakfast. I have done my hous wk & Brewd Some beer. James Ballard is 5 years old this day. at home.
Clear. I have felt feeble. Asa Pierce Came here about mid night for me to go to Jery Tolmans but I did not go about . at home.
Clear & very Cold. Dagt Lambd went home. I have not been quite So ill. mr Ballard went to the Settlement, bot him some tobacko, rode home. at home. Dagt Lambard went home.

Birth mr Livermores Dagt. Clear and Cold. mrs Livermore Deld at 10 h am of a Dagt after a very Dangerous Labour. I returnd home a t 2h pm very much over Come with the Cold. found Dagt Ballard here. mr Field Conducted his Bride home to hous keeping. at mr Livermores. Birth 1 st. Funeral mrs Baxter.
A very rainy day. I have ironed and mended A Coat &C. Ranus & Jason Pierce Sleep here, Sally Ballard allso. at home.

[X]. Birth mrs s Wilms Son, first Born. XX. Clear part of the day, Snowd some & very Cold. Luke Barton here. Isaac [Farewel], H. Pollard & Sopha Ballard Calld here. I was Calld to See mrs Williams, Shee was Safe Deld of a Son, her first Born at 9h [20]m pm. I tarried all night, Slept a little. Birth 2nd. receivd 1 Dolr at Jobe Springers. receivd 1 Dolr March 20th.

Cloudy till about [ ] pm, when it began to Snow. I have washt the Cuboard in East roome, the door into the bed roome, but feel feeble. I have Churnd 1-2/1 lb Butter. Snowd all day & very Cold. at home.
Clear & not so Cold. I have wash t kitchen and Buttery & began a Stockin for Son Pollard. my husband had a faint turn aftern. at home. Indiens at Son Jonas fout.

Cloudy the most of y e day. mrs Partrage here foren. I was Calld to See mrs Butterfield who is under difacult Circumstans s . I gave Some advice and returnd home, performd Some business of various kinds. the young men & Boys a t Cards till near mid night. at mr Butterfields. mrs s Partridg here.
Cloudy. I have mended Legins & hoes. Linda went to mr [Colitus], bot me pint & half new r m , 2 lb Sugar [_ pepper & pins, Cos t 6S ]. at home. Death David Smilys wife.
Cloudy foren. I have finisht the little washing that I began on Tuesday. at home.
Clear and not so Cold. I have done hous work &C. Ep m & Wm Sleep here. at home.

Cloudy and Some Snow. a mr Snell of Sydna Calld with his wife & 2 Childn to warm, he informd Me that Tim y Runels s Dagt Syntha was dead; Jona Junr that the wido North of Clinton dead, her remains interd this day. allso that EbenZ Moore s Child that was Scolt was dead. at home.
Clear & Cold wind. I was Calld at 9 h morn to See mrs Heath who is in Labour. her Marm & Sister & mrs Jones there all day and night. at mr Heat s .

[X Birth Joel Clearks 5 th Son XX]. Clear. I was Calld at 1h this morn by mr Cleark to See his wife in Labour. I wrode on hors back with ou t a pillion, felt very much fatagued. the Patient was Safe Deld at 3h pm of her fifth Son. I tarried all night. at [Joel] Clearks. Birth 12. recd 6/ and 4 lb Snuff, Sugar & [Cash] in full.
Clear. Dolly Lambard Came to take Care of me. I have had a Sick Day. at home, very [unweal].
Cloudy y morn, Clear aflern. I have felt very feeble, been a t home. at home.
Cloudy, Snow & rain. I have been fixing to remove to Son Jonas hous, he Calld here y s Morn, is gone to Jail this aftern. Wm Sleeps here. at home. Son Jona is gone to Jail for debt.
Clear most of the day. I have done hous wk.

Birth John Shaws 2nt Son, 4 th Child. Snowd. I was Calld to John Shaws, his wife Deld of her Second Son, 4th Child a t 9h Evn. Shee & Child Cleverly. my Self & the women tarried all night. 29, at John Shaws. Bth 5th. recd 9 S in [ ]. Funeral mrs North, Clinton.
Clear part of y e day, raind in the night. Son Ephm here after meeting. Jonas wife and part of the Childn Dind here. died, W. W. kindrick in this Town, aged 14 years. at home. Eph m here. Death.
Cloudy. I Came home in a Sleigh Early y s morn, was fatagued. went onto the bed Soon after I got home, did not Sett up bu t little all day. at Ditoes. Came home fatagued.

Cloudy. mr Ballard gone to meeting. Son Lambd Calld to See me. Sons Jona & Epm Came after meeting, Luke and Lefaell also. Sally Sleeps here. I have been feeble y s day. this was Sacrament day, lhere were a number of persons admited. at home, very feeble. Child n Calld to see me.
Clear part of the day. I have been very unwel. mr Burden here at Evng, Says his wife is very Sick. I have rested Some this night. at home. Death [Fo ] Dagt AE 2 years 6 mo.

raind in the morn, Clear the most of y e day. Son Jona, his wife, James & Elisa Dind here. mrs Carter Calld in aflern. A mr Greanlief Calld here, took Breakfas t , Says he was Cast away a t Sea not long since, his home at 7 mile brook. Sally & Martha Sleep here. at home. Part of my Child n Dind here.
Clear. mr Ballard to Town meeting. Dolly Lambd Came to help me. at home, very [ ].

Clear Part of the day. we removd from Son Jonas to our own house. Hannah Came and helpt me Some hours for which favour I feel Greatful. we [removed] to our own house. I went to [Foy s ],set out at 9 h Evng.

Clear part of y e day, Some rain at night. mrs Farewel & Sophia Ballard Sleep here Han h , Mar ta & Elisabeth here aftern. I have done houn wk & mended Cloaths. at home. mrs Farewel, Sophia Sleep here.
Clear. mrs Farewel & Sophia wen t from here after breakfast. I have done hous work, Sorted Beens for planting &C. the remains of Kendrick were interd aftern. a t home. mrs Farewel left here. Funeral.

Clear & Cool. I have removd my Bed into the bedroome, Sorted Beens but feel feeble. mr Ballard mended the kitchen Chimney & harth yesterday, the oven this day. Jonas Men plowing our field this day. at home.
Clear and not so Cold. I have done some washing, Churnd & made a Chees, Sorted beens &C. at home.
Clear and pleast. I have done hous wk, ironed. mrs Smith here, had Beet & parsnip Seed and Some Carrot & Squash; is to let me have thread. W m Ballard Sleeps here. at home. mrs Smith here.
Clear & pleast. I have been at home, made a Chees. Dagt Ballard gone to Sydney. at home.
Clear part of y e day, raind before night. mr Piper Sent me some Tea by L e faett. at home.

Clear & very pleas t . I have Sett trees & Current Bushes & done other matters in my Gardin. Esq Titcomb, S. Cumings and Lat Hamlin Calld here. it is training through ou t y e Common wealth y s day. at home.

Clear morn, thunder & rain aftern & Evng. mrs Carter here, had gardin Seeds of various kinds. Shee brot me 11 oz Chees. Allin Lambd, Ep m & Sally Ballard Sleep here. at home. Allin L. & Ep m B. & Sally Sleep here.
raind all day. I Planted Cucumbers, Scrapt mors of 5 apple trees in my gardin, Churnd 1 lb _ Butter. Allin, Ep m , Sally & Martha Sleep here. at home. Allin, Ep m , Sally & Martha Sleep here.

Clear & Cool. I went to Son Jonas Early y s morn, he, his wife, Ep m , Martha, James & Elisabeth took their departure for Clinton about 11h am, Allin with them. may God prosper them in every lawful under takeing is the wish of me their aged mother. at Son Jonas. he removed part of his famely to Clinton.
Clear fore n, Cloudy before night. I have Sett up a Leatch & run Some Lee, Cleand the hen roost, Sow d peas & made a Chees. at home.
Cloudy most of the day. James Purington Dind with us, Says his grand marm & Fathers famely are well. at home.

rainy. I have been makeing Soap. mr Ballard went to Town meeting. Georg Crosby and Saml Cony were Chosen to represent this Town in Genaral Coart y e pres t year. we Sowd parsnips Saterday, Carrots y s day. at home.
Clear & Cold for the Season. I have finisht Makeing my Soap, had but little. mr Ballard Planted yellow Bush Beens in y e field. at home. Sett my Sage roots. Planted.
